Genesis1:1 Kale ku tshibangidilu Nzambi wakafuka diulu ne buloba. 
Genesis1:2 Buloba kabuakadi busunguluka, buakadi butuhu, midima yakadihu, Nyuma wa Nzambi wakadi unyunguluka ha mutu ha mai." 
Genesis1:3 Nzambi wakamba ne, Munya wikale, ne munya wakikala." 
Genesis1:4 Nzambi wakamona munya ne Mmuimpe Nzambi wakatahulula munya ne midima. 
Genesis1:5 Nzambi wakidika munya ne, Munya, wakidika mîdima ne Butuku Dinda ne dilolo biakadi dituku dia kumudilu." 
Genesis1:6 Nzambi wakamba ne, Mulu muikale hankatshi ha mai a ha buloba ne mai a mu diulu." 
Genesis1:7 Nzambi wakafuka mulu, wakatahulula mai a ha buloba ne mai a mulu Bualu buakenjibua" 
Genesis1:8 Nzambi wa kuhita mulu ne, Diulu, dilolo ne dinda biakadi dituku dibidi." 
Genesis1:9 Nzambi wakamba ne Mai adi muinshi mua diulu asangile kaba kamue, buloba bume bumueneke, bualu ebu buakenjibua:" 
Genesis1:10 Nzambi wakidika buloba bûme ne, Buloba Mai masangile nunku yeye wakidika ne, Mai manene Nzambi wakabi mona ne, Mbimpe." 
Genesis1:11 Nzambi wakamba ne, Buloba bumeneshe bimenyi bionso, midioko idi yela ntete ne mitshi idi ikuama mamuma adi ne ntete yai, bu mudi mushindu wai. Bualu buakenjibua" 
Genesis1:12 Buloba buakamenesha bimenyi, midioko idi yela ntete, bu mudi mishindu yai, ne mitshi idi ikuama mamuma adi ne ntete yai, bu mudi mushindu wai. Nzambi wakabimona ne, Mbimpe." 
Genesis1:13 Dilolo ne dinda biakadi dituku disatu. 
Genesis1:14 Nzambi wakamba ne, Bintu bidi bikenka bikale mulu mua diulu bua kutahulula munya kudi butuku, bikale bua bimanyinu ne bua bikondo ne bua matuku ne bua bidimu," 
Genesis1:15 bikale bu minda mulu mua diulu bua kutokeshayi ha buloba, bualu buakenjibua." 
Genesis1:16 Nzambi Wakenza munda minene ibidi, muinda mutambe bunene bua kukokesha mu munya ne muinda mukese bua kukokesha butuku, yeye Wakenza mitoto kabidi." 
Genesis1:17 Nzambi wakabiteka mulu mua diulu bua kutokeshayi buloba," 
Genesis1:18 ne bua kukokeshayi mu munya ne butuku, ne bua kutahululayi munya kudi midima, Nzambi wakabimona ne, Mbimpe." 
Genesis1:19 Dilolo ne dinda biakadi dituku dinai. 
Genesis1:20 Nzambi wakamba ne, Mai avudishe bifukibua bia bungi bidi ne muoyo, ne nyunyu myunge mulu" 
Genesis1:21 Nzambi wakafuka bintu binene bia mu mai ne bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo bia mu mai bu mudi mishindu yabi, ne nyunyu yonso bu mudi mushindu wai Nzambi wakabimona ne, Mbimpe" 
Genesis1:22 Nzambi wakabisankisha ne, Nulelangane, nulue bia bungi, nûshe mai manene tente, nyunyu ikumbane ha buloba" 
Genesis1:23 Dilolo ne dinda biakadi dituku ditanu. 
Genesis1:24 Nzambi wakamba ne, Buloba buvuishe bifukibua bidi ne muoyo bu mudi mishindu yabi, ya bimuna ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi, ne nyama yonso ya ha buloba bu mudi mishindu yai, bualu buakenjibua." 
Genesis1:25 Nzambi Wakenza nyama ya ha buloba bu mudi mishindu yai, ne bimuna bu mudi mishindu yabi, ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi bu mudi mushindu watshi. Nzambi wakabimona ne, Mbimpe." 
Genesis1:26 Nzambi wakamba ne, Tuenze muntu ne tshifuanyikishi tshietu mufuanangane nʼetu, balue bakokeshi ba minyinyi ya mu mai manene ne ba nyunyu ya mulu, ne ba bimuna, ne ba buloba buonso, ne ba tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi." 
Genesis1:27 Nzambi wakafuka muntu ne tshifuanyikishi tshiandi, wakamufuka ne tshifuanyikishi tshia Nzambi, wakabafuka balume ne bakashi." 
Genesis1:28 Nzambi wakabisankisha, wakabambila ne, Nulelangane, nukumbane ba bungi, nûshe buloba tente, nubukokeshe, nuikale ne bukokeshi ku mutu kua minyinyi ya mu mai, ne nyunyu ya mulu, ne tshintu tshionso tshidi ne muoyo tshidi tshiendakana ha buloba." 
Genesis1:29 Nzambi wakamba ne, Monai, nakanuha midioko yonso ya ha buloba idi yela ntete, ne mitshi yonso idi ikuama mamuma adi ne ntete munda, bua kuikalabi bia kudia bienu." 
Genesis1:30 Nakufila midioko yonso bu bia kudia kudi nyama yonso ya ha buloba ne nyunyu ya mulu ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi, tshionso tshidi ne muoyo; bualu buakenjibua." 
Genesis1:31 Nzambi wakamona bintu bionso biakenzeye ne biakadi bimpe be! Dilolo ne dinda biakadi dituku disambombo. 
Genesis2:1 Diulu ne buloba ne bintu bionso biakashikishibua, buonso buabi." 
Genesis2:2 Mu dituku dia muanda mutekete Nzambi wakadi mumane kushikisha mudimu wandi wakenzeye, yeye wakikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete ku mudimu wonso wakenzeye" 
Genesis2:3 Nzambi wakavudishila dituku dia muanda mutekete disanka, wakadijidila, bualu bua yeye wakikisha dituku diadia ku mudimu wandi wonso wa kufuka ne kuenza." 
Genesis2:4 Eku nkulondolola kua malu a diulu ne a buloba hakafukibuabi Mu dituku diakenza Yehowa Nzambi buloba ne diulu," 
Genesis2:5 midioko ya mu madimi kayakanza kudiunda ha buloba ne mashinde kâkanza kutoloka, bualu bua Yehowa Nzambi kakanza kulokesha nvula ha buloba, ne kakuakadi muntu bua kuihileye buloba," 
Genesis2:6 kadi dibungi diakabanda ha buloba, ne tshitelele tshiakadi ha buloba buonso." 
Genesis2:7 Yehowa Nzambi wakafuka mulume ne dinfuenkenya dia buloba, wakela muhuya wa muoyo mu diulu diandi, ne mulume wakalua ne muoyo." 
Genesis2:8 Yehowa Nzambi wakakuma bintu mu budimi ku esete, mu Edene, wakatekamu mulume wakafukeye." 
Genesis2:9 Yehowa Nzambi wakamenesha mitshi yonso idi buimpe ku mesu ne idi mimpe bua kudia mu buloba, mutshi wa muoyo kabidi wakadi munkatshi mua budimi, ne mutshi wa lungenyi lua kujingulula malu mimpe ne malu mabi." 
Genesis2:10 Musulu wa mai wakaluhuka mu Edene bua kumiamina midioko mai, wakahanduluka maboko anai." 
Genesis2:11 Dina dia diboko dia kumudilu didi Pishona, didi dinyunguluka buloba buonso bua Hawila, kudi or," 
Genesis2:12 or wa mu buloba abu udi muimpe, ne mabue a mushinga mukole a bdelhum ne a onyx adiku." 
Genesis2:13 Dina dia diboko dibidi didi Gihona, didi dinyunguluka buloba buonso bua Atiopa." 
Genesis2:14 Dina dia diboko disatu didi Hidekela, didi dinyunguluka ku esete kua buloba bua Ashû. Dina dia diboko dinai didi Pelata." 
Genesis2:15 Yehowa Nzambi wakangata mulume, wakamuteka mu budimi bua Edene bua kubuihileye ne bua kubulama." 
Genesis2:16 Yehowa Nzambi wakamuelela mukenji ne, Udi mua kudia mamuma a mitshi yonso ya mu budimi, bu mûdi musue," 
Genesis2:17 kadi mamuma a mutshi wa lungenyi lua kujingulula malu mimpe ne malu mabi kuadi nansha, bualu bua mu dituku diudi wadia wewe neufue bulelela." 
Genesis2:18 Yehowa Nzambi wakamba ne, Kambimpe bua mulume ashale nkayandi nansha, nemmufukile mukuatshishi bu mudiye." 
Genesis2:19 Yehowa Nzambi wakafuka nyama yonso ya mu madimi ne nyunyu yonso ya mulu ne buloba, wakalua nʼai kudi mulume bua kutangila bu muakadiye mua kuyidika, dina dionso diakidikeye tshifukibue tshionso diakadi dina dia tshi." 
Genesis2:20 Mulume wakidika bimuna bionso ne nyunyu yonso ya mu diulu ne bimuna bionso bia mu madimi mena abi, kadi mulume kakadi ne mukuatshishi wa bu muakadiye nansha." 
Genesis2:21 Yehowa Nzambi wakaladika mulume tulu tukole, ne yeye wakalala tulu, wakangata lubale luandi lumue, Wakabikila musunyi kabidi," 
Genesis2:22 ne lubale luakangata Yehowa Nzambi kudi mulume, yeye Wakenza nʼalu mukashi, wakalua nʼandi kudi mulume." 
Genesis2:23 Mulume wakamba ne, Eu udi mufuba wa mifuba yanyi ne musunyi wa misunyi yanyi, nebamuedike ne, Mukashi, bualu bua bakamuangata kudi mulume." 
Genesis2:24 Bua bualu ebu mulume neashiye tatuʼandi ne mamu andi, nealamate mukashi wandi, bubidi buabo nebikale mubidi umue." 
Genesis2:25 Bubidi buabo, mulume ne mukashi, bakadi butaka, kabakadi ne bundu." 
Genesis3:1 Nyoka wakatamba nyama yonso yakafuka Yehowa Nzambi bidimu. Nyoka wakakonka mukashi ne, Nzambi wakamba ne, Kanudi mamuma a nu tshi yonso idi mu budimi, anyi?" 
Genesis3:2 Mukashi wakambila nyoka ne, Tudi mua kudia mamuma a mitshi yonso idi mu budimi," 
Genesis3:3 kadi mamuma a mutshi udi munkatshi mua budimi, Nzambi wakamba ne, Kanuadi, kanualengi, bua kanufu." 
Genesis3:4 Nyoka wakambila mukashi ne, Kanuena nufua bulelela," 
Genesis3:5 bualu bua Nzambi udi mu manye ne, Hanuadia mamuma au, mesu enu neabuluke, nenuikale bu Nzambi, nenumanye malu mimpe ne malu mabi." 
Genesis3:6 Hakamona mukashi ne, Mutshi au udi muimpe wa kudia ne udi muimpe ku mesu ne udi mua kuha muntu lungenyi, yeye wakangata dimuma, wakadia, wakahesha mulume wandi kabidi, ne yeye wakadia." 
Genesis3:7 Mesu a bubidi buabo akabuluka, bakamanya ne, Tudi butaka, bakatela mabeshi a nfigi, bakadienzela mbondia." 
Genesis3:8 Bakunvua di dia Yehowa Nzambi wendakana mu budimi dilolo, mulume ne mukashi bakasokoma munkatshi mua mitshi ya mu budimi ku mesu kua Yehowa Nzambi." 
Genesis3:9 Yehowa Nzambi Wakabikila mulume, wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi kudi kunyi?" 
Genesis3:10 Yeye wakamba ne, Nakunvua di diebe mu budimi, nakutshina, bualu bua nakadi butaka, nakusokoma." 
Genesis3:11 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Wakakuambila ne, Udi butaka nganyi? Wakudia mamuma a mutshi unakukuambila ne, Kudi, anyi?" 
Genesis3:12 Mulume wakamba ne, Mukashi uwakumpa bua kuikala nʼanyi wakumpa dimuma dia mutshi, nakudia." 
Genesis3:13 Yehowa Nzambi wakambila mukashi ne, Bualu ebu buwakuenza budi tshinyi? Mukashi wakamba ne, Nyoka wakundinga, nakudia." 
Genesis3:14 Yehowa Nzambi wakambila nyoka ne, Bualu bua wewe wakuenza nunku, ndi nkuela mulau, mulau webe neutambe wa nyama yonso ya mu madimi, wewe neukoke difu diebe hanshi, neudie dinfuenkenya dia buloba matuku ebe onso." 
Genesis3:15 Nenteke lukuna hankatshi hebe ne mukashi, ne hankatshi ha bana bebe ne bana bandi, muana wa mukashi neakukume ku mutu kuebe, ne wewe neumusume ku tshikankanyi-tshiandi." 
Genesis3:16 Yeye wakambila mukashi ne, Nentambe kuvudisha didinyenga diebe ne kuimitshishibua kuebe neulele bana ne didinyenga, mutshima webe newikale kudi mulume webe, yeye neikale ne bukokeshi ku mutu kuebe." 
Genesis3:17 Wakambila Adama ne, Bualu bua wewe wakuteleja di dia mukashi webe, wakudia mamuma a mutshi unakukuambila ne, Kuadi nansha, buloba buakedibua mulau bualu buebe, wewe neudie bidia biabu ne kanyinganyinga matuku ebe onso," 
Genesis3:18 buloba nebukumeneshile meba ne tusokola, neudie midioko ya mu budimi," 
Genesis3:19 neudie bidia ne luanga ha mpala hebe to ne hawahingana mu buloba kabidi, wewe wakumushibua mu buloba, wewe udi dinfuenkenya dia buloba, neuhingane mu dinfuenkenya dia buloba kabidi." 
Genesis3:20 Mulume wakidika mukashi wandi dina ne, Eva, bualu bua yeye udi muledi wa bonso badi ne muoyo." 
Genesis3:21 Yehowa Nzambi wakatelela Adama ne mukashi wandi bivualu bia biseba, wakabaluatshishabi." 
Genesis3:22 Yehowa Nzambi wakamba ne, Monai, mulume wakulua bu umue wetu, udi mumanye malu mimpe ne malu mabi, bua yeye kolodi tshianza tshiandi bua kuangateye mamuma a mutshi wa muoyo, wadia, wikala ne muoyo tshiendelele," 
Genesis3:23 Yehowa Nzambi wakamuihata mu budimi bua Edene, bua kuihileye buloba buakafumeye." 
Genesis3:24 Nunku, yeye wakihata mulume, wakateka bakeluba ku esete kua budimi bua Edene ne muele wa nvita wa kalua wakadi utshinguluka ku nseke yonso, bua kulamabo nshila wa ku mutshi wa muoyo." 
Genesis4:1 Adama wakamanyangana ne Eva, mukashi wandi, ne yeye wakimita difu, wakalela Kana, wakamba ne, Nakuangata muntu kudi Yehowa." 
Genesis4:2 Yeye wakalela muakunyʼandi Ebele kabidi Ebele wakadi mulami wa mikoko, kadi Kana wakadi tshidime." 
Genesis4:3 Dituku dikuabo Kana wakalua ne bintu biakamena mu buloba bu mulambu kudi Yehowa. 
Genesis4:4 Ebele kabidi wakalua ne ban a bute ba mikoko ne dianyi diai Yehowa wakitabusha Ebele ne mulambu wandi," 
Genesis4:5 kadi yeye wakahidia Kana ne mulambu wandi Kana wakadi ne tshiji, wakabungama" 
Genesis4:6 Yehowa wakakonka Kana ne, Udi ne tshiji bua tshinyi? Udi ubungamina tshinyi?" 
Genesis4:7 Biwenza bimpe, kuena ubanduluka, anyi? Kadi biwokala kuyi wenza bimpe, bualu bubi budi bualamina ku mbelu kuebe, mutshima wa bubi newikale kudi, kadi wewe ubukokeshe." 
Genesis4:8 Kana wakambila Ebele muakunyʼandi bualu ebu Hashishe hakadibo mu budimi, Kana wakabika ku mpala kua Ebele muakunyʼandi, wakamushiha." 
Genesis4:9 Yehowa wakakonka Kana ne, Muakunyʼebe Ebele udi kudi kunyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena mumanye, ndi mulami wa muakunyʼanyi, anyi?" 
Genesis4:10 Yeye wakamukonka ne, Wewe wakuenza tshinyi? Muadi wa mashi a muakunyʼebe udi wela di kundi difume ha buloba." 
Genesis4:11 Katataka wewe wakuedibua mulau mufume ha buloba buakubulula mukana muabu bua kumina mashi a muakunyʼebe ku tshianza tshiebe," 
Genesis4:12 hawadima buloba, kabuena bukumeneshila bintu bimpe, wewe newikale munyemi ne muena tshiendenda ha buloba." 
Genesis4:13 Kana wakambila Yehowa ne, Dikenga dianyi didi dintamba bukole" 
Genesis4:14 Mona, wewe wakungihata lelu ha buloba, nengikale musokome ku mesu kuebe, nengikale munyemi ne muena tshiendenda ha buloba, ne hashishe yonso wansangana neanshihe." 
Genesis4:15 Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Muntu yonso udi ushiha Kana, nebamusombuele misangu muanda mutekete Yehowa wakalekela Kana tshimanyinu bua wamusangana kamushihi." 
Genesis4:16 Kana wakumuka ku mesu kua Yehowa, wakashikama mu buloba bua Nodo, ku esete kua Edene." 
Genesis4:17 Kana wakamanyangana ne mukashi wandi, yeye wakimita difu, wakalela Hanoka, yeye wakasa musoko, wakidika musoko dina dia muanʼandi Hanoka." 
Genesis4:18 Hanoka wakalela Ilada ne Ilada wakalela Mehuyaela ne Mehuyaela Wakalela Metushaele ne Metushaele wakalela Lemeke. 
Genesis4:19 Lemeke wakabaka bakashi babidi, dina dia muadi diakadi Ada, ne dina dia tshilondi ne, Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada wakalela Yabala, yeye wakadi nkambua wa badi bashikama mu nsubu ya ntenta ne badi ne bimuna." 
Genesis4:21 Dina dia muakunyʼandi diakadi Yubala, yeye wakadi nkambua wa badi bimba bisanji ne nshiba." 
Genesis4:22 Sila wakalela Tubalakana, yeye wakadi mutudi wa tshiamu tshia mitaku ne tshiamu tshifike, muakunyʼandi mukashi wakadi Nama." 
Genesis4:23 Lemeke wakambila bakashi bandi ne, Ada ne Sila, telejai matshu, bakashi ba Lemeke, unvuai di dianyi, nakashiha muntu bualu bua yeye wakantaha mputa, nakashiha nsongalume bualu bua yeye wakantuta," 
Genesis4:24 biasombuelabo Kana nusangu muanda mutekete, bulelela, nebasombuele Lemeke misangu makumi muanda mutekete ne muanda mutekete." 
Genesis4:25 Adama wakamanyangana ne mukashi wandi kabidi, Wakalela muana mulume, wakamuidika dina ne, Sheta Wakamba ne, Nzambi wakumpa muana mukuabo mu muaba wa Ebele, bualu bua Kana wakamushiha." 
Genesis4:26 Sheta wakalela muana mulume kabidi, wakamuidika dina ne, Enosha Etshi ntshibangidilu tshiakabikilabo dina dia Yehowa." 
Genesis5:1 Eu udi mukanda wa ndelanganyi ya Adama Mu dituku diakafuka Nzambi bantu mu tshifuanyikishi tshiandi," 
Genesis5:2 wakabafuka mulume ne mukashi, wakabasankisha, wakabidika ne, Adama, mu dituku diakabafukeye." 
Genesis5:3 Adama wakikala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu, wakalela muana mulume ne tshifuanyikishi tshiandi, mufuanangane nʼandi, wakamuidika dina ne, Sheta." 
Genesis5:4 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Sheta Adama wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama muanda mukulu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:5 Matuku onso a Adama akadi nkama tshitema ne makumi asatu, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:6 Sheta wakikala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne bitanu, wakalela Enosha" 
Genesis5:7 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Enosha, Sheta wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne muanda mutekete, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi" 
Genesis5:8 Matuku onso a Sheta akadi bidimu nkama tshitema ne dikumi ne bibidi, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:9 Enosha wakikala ne muoyo bidimu makumi tshitema, wakalela Kenana." 
Genesis5:10 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Kenana Enosha wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne dikumi ne bitanu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:11 Matuku onso a Enosha akadi bidimu nkama tshitema ne bitanu, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:12 Kenana wakikala ne muoyo bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, wakalela Mahalelela." 
Genesis5:13 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Mahalelela, Kenana wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi anai, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:14 Matuku onso a Kenana akadi bidimu nkama tshitema ne dikumi, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalelela wakikala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asambombo ne bitanu, wakalela Yalede." 
Genesis5:16 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Yalede, Mahalelela wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi asatu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:17 Matuku onso a Mahalelela akadi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi tshitema ne bitanu, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:18 Yalede wakikala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne makumi asambombo ne bibidi, wakalela Hanoka." 
Genesis5:19 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Hanoka, Yalede wakikala ne muoyo bi dimu nkama muanda mukulu, wa kalela bana balume ne bana bakashi" 
Genesis5:20 Matuku onso a Yalede akadi bidimu nkama tshitema ne makumi asambombo ne bibidi, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:21 Hanoka wakikala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asambombo ne bitanu, wakalela Metushela" 
Genesis5:22 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Metushela, Hanoka wakendakana ne Nzambi bidimu nkama isatu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:23 Matuku onso a Hanoka akadi bidimu nkama isatu ne makumi asambombo ne bitanu. 
Genesis5:24 Hanoka wakendakana ne Nzambi, ne yeye kakikalaku bualu bua Nzambi wakamuangata." 
Genesis5:25 Metushela wakikala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne muanda mutekete, wakale la Lemeke." 
Genesis5:26 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Lemeke, Metushela wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi muanda mukulu ne bibidi, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:27 Matuku onso a muoyo a Metushela akadi bidimu nkama tshitema ne makumi asambombo ne tshitema, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:28 Lemeke wakikala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne bibidi, wakalela muana mulume," 
Genesis5:29 wakamuidika dina ne, Noa, wakamba ne, Yeye neatusambe mu mudimu wa bianza bietu, bualu bua buloba buakedibua mulau kudi Yehowa." 
Genesis5:30 Ku nyima kua kulela kua Noa, Lemeke wakikala ne muoyo bidimu nkama itanu ne makumi tshitema ne bitanu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis5:31 Matuku onso a Lemeke akadi bidimu nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi muanda mutekete ne mua nda mutekete, yeye wakafua biandi." 
Genesis5:32 Hakadi Noa ne bidimu nkama itanu, Noa wakalela Shema, Hama ne Yafete." 
Genesis6:1 Hakabanga bantu kusangana ba bungi ha buloba ne hakalelabo bana bakashi," 
Genesis6:2 bansongalume ba bantu ba Nzambi bakamona bana bakashi ba bantu ba tshianana ne, Mbalengele, bakasungula bonso bakasuabo bu bakashi babo" 
Genesis6:3 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nyuma wanyi kena utendekena bantu tshiendelele, bualu bua badi anu ba ha buloba, ne matuku abo neikale bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi." 
Genesis6:4 Mu matuku au bantu banene ba nfiondo bakadi ha buloba, ne hakaya bansongalume ba bantu ba Nzambi kudi bansongakashi ba bantu ba tshianana, bakalela nʼabo bana Bobo bakadi bantu banene ba kale ne ba butumbi." 
Genesis6:5 Yehowa wakamona ne, Mibi ya bantu idi idiundadiunda munkatshi mua ba ha buloba ne meji adibo bela mu mitshima yabo adi mabi matuku onso." 
Genesis6:6 Mutshima wa Yehowa wakanyingalala bualu bua yeye wakafuka bantu ha buloba, kanyinganyinga kakadi mu mutshima wandi." 
Genesis6:7 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nenjimishe bantu banakafuka ha buloba, ne bantu ne nyama ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ne nyunyu ya mulu, bualu bua mutshima wanyi udi munyingalale bua nakabifuka." 
Genesis6:8 Kadi Noa wakasangana luse ku mesu kua Yehowa. 
Genesis6:9 Eku nkulondolola kua malu a Noa. Noa wakadi muntu muimpe, wakadi muakane tshishiki mu tshikondo tshiandi, Noa wakendakana ne Nzambi." 
Genesis6:10 Noa wakalela bana balume basatu, Shema, Hama ne Yafete." 
Genesis6:11 Bantu bakadi babi ku mesu kua Nzambi ne buloba buakadi bûle tente ne malu mabi. 
Genesis6:12 Nzambi wakatangila buloba ne monai, buakadi bunyanguka, bualu bua bantu bonso bakanyanguka mu bienzedi biabo bia ha buloba." 
Genesis6:13 Nzambi wakambila Noa ne, Kunshikidilu kua bantu bonso kuakufika ku mpala kuanyi bualu bua buloba budi bûle tente ne mayoyo bualu buabo, mona, nembajimishe ne buloba hamue." 
Genesis6:14 Enza biebe buatu ne mutshi wa gopher, enza nsubu mikese munda mua buatu ne laba kamonyi munda mua buatu ne ku nyima kuabu kabidi." 
Genesis6:15 Enza buatu nunku buludi buabu nebuikale coudées nkama isatu ne butshiama bua buatu nebuikale coudées makumi atanu ne bule buabu bua mulu nebikale coudées makumi asatu. 
Genesis6:16 Enza mutu wa buatu, ushiye muaba wa coudée umue hankatshi ha mutu ne buatu buashi ku nseke yonso, ushiye mushiku ku luseke lukuabo lua buatu, lungakasha nsubu isatu, nsubu wa kumudilu ne nsubu muibidi ha mutu ne nsubu muisatu ha mutu." 
Genesis6:17 Tangila, meme nkayanyi, nendokeshe mai mangi ha buloba bua kujimisha bintu bionso bidi ne muhuya wa muoyo munda muabi muinshi mua diulu, tshintu tshionso tshidi ne muoyo ha buloba netshifue." 
Genesis6:18 Kadi nenjadike tshihungidi tshianyi nʼebe, wewe neubuele mu buatu ne bana bebe balume ne mukashi webe ne bakashi ba bana bebe." 
Genesis6:19 Buela mu buatu ne bintu bibidi bia tshintu tshionso tshidi ne muoyo, bua kusungila mioyo ya bintu, buela ne mulume ne mukashi ba bintu bionso," 
Genesis6:20 ba nyunyu ne ba bimuna ne ba tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi, bu mudi mishindu yabi, buela ne bintu bibidi bia bintu bionso bua kusungila mioyo yabi." 
Genesis6:21 Sangisha bintu bia ku diabi bionso, nebikale bu bintu bia kudia biebe ne biabi kabidi." 
Genesis6:22 Noa wakenza nunku, wakenza muanda yonso yakamuambila Nzambi." 
Genesis7:1 Yehowa wakambila Noa ne, Buela biebe mu buatu ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu muebe, bualu bua meme nakakumona muimpe ku mesu kuanyi munkatshi mua tshikondo etshi." 
Genesis7:2 Buela biebe ne nyama yonso idi mimpe, balume muanda mutekete ne bakashi muanda mutekete, ne nyama idi kayiyi mimpe, buela ne balume babidi ne bakashi babidi." 
Genesis7:3 Buela biebe ne balume ba nyunyu muanda mutekete ne bakashi ba nyunyu muanda mutekete, bua kusungila mioyo ya bintu." 
Genesis7:4 Haleha matuku muanda mutekete nendokeshe nvula ha buloba munya ne bufuku to matuku makumi anai, nenjimishe bintu bionso binakafuka ha buloba." 
Genesis7:5 Noa wakenza muanda yonso yakamuambila Yehowa. 
Genesis7:6 Noa wakadi ne bidimu nkama isambombo hakaloka nvula ha buloba. 
Genesis7:7 Noa wakabuela mu buatu ne mukashi wandi ne bana bandi balume ne bakashi ba bana bandi, bualu bua mai akavulangana." 
Genesis7:8 Ne nyama idi mimpe ne nyama idi kayiyi mimpe ne nyunvu ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi," 
Genesis7:9 bintu bibidi bintu bibidi, bilume ne bikashi, biakabuela ne Noa mu buatu, bu muakambila Nzambi Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Hakashika matuku muanda mutekete mai akavulangana ha buloba. 
Genesis7:11 Hakadi Noa mu tshidimu tshia nkama isambombo tshia muoyo wandi, mu ngondo muibidi ne dituku dia dikumi ne muanda mutekete dia ngondo, mu dituku adi mene, mishimi yonso ya mu mai manene yakahongoloka ne bibi bionso bia mu diulu biakunzuludibua." 
Genesis7:12 Nvula yakaloka ha buloba munya ne bufuku tô matuku makumi anai. 
Genesis7:13 Mu ditu ku adi diodimue Noa ne bana bandi, Sheme ne Hama ne Yafete, bana ba Noa, ne mukashi wa Noa, ne bakashi basatu ba bana bandi bakabuela mu buatu," 
Genesis7:14 bobo ne nyama yonso ya mushindu ne mushindu ne bimuna bionso bia mushindu ne mushindu, ne bintu bionso budi bidikoka hanshi bia mushindu ne mushindu, ne nyunyu yonso ya mushindu ne mushindu, tshionso tshidi ne mahuahua." 
Genesis7:15 Biakabuela ne Noa mu buatu, bintu bibidi bintu bibidi bia bintu bionso bidi ne muhuya wa muoyo." 
Genesis7:16 Biakabuela mulume ne mukashi ba bintu bionso, bu muakamuambila Nzambi, ne Yehowa wakamuinshidila tshibi." 
Genesis7:17 Nvula yakaloka tô matuku makumi anai, mai akavulangana, akabandisha buatu ha mutu, buakabandishibua ku buloba." 
Genesis7:18 Mai akatamba, akavulangana a bungi ha buloba, ne buatu buakabanda ha mutu ha mai." 
Genesis7:19 Mai akatamba kuvulangana ha buloba, ne mikuna mile yonso idi muinshi mua diulu yakabuikidibua." 
Genesis7:20 Mai akabanda to coudées díkumi ne itanu ha mikuna mile. 
Genesis7:21 Bintu bionso biakadi ha buloba biakafua, ne nyunyu ne bimuna ne nyama ne bintu bionso budi bidikoka hanshi ne muntu yonso," 
Genesis7:22 bintu bionso biakadi ne muhuya wa muoyo munda muabi bia ha buloba bume biakafua. 
Genesis7:23 Wakajimisha tshintu tshionso tshiakadi ne muoyo ha buloba, ne bantu ne bimuna ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ne nyunyu ya mulu, bintu bionso biakajimina ha buloba, anu Noa ne bantu ne bintu biakadiye nʼabi mu buatu biakashala." 
Genesis7:24 Mai akavulangana ha buloba matuku lukama ne makumi atanu. 
Genesis8:1 Nzambi wakavuluka Noa ne nyama yonso ne bimuna bionso biakadi nʼandi mu buatu, Nzambi wakahehesha luhehele ha buloba ne mai akahueka." 
Genesis8:2 Mishimi ya mu mai manene ne bibi bia mu diulu kabidi biakadi bikandibua, ne nvula ya mu diulu yakalekeshibua." 
Genesis8:3 Mai akahuekahueka ha buloba, hakakumbana matuku lukama ne makumi atanu, mai akadi ahueka." 
Genesis8:4 Mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete ne dituku dia dikumi ne muanda mutekete dia ngondo buatu buakatua ha mikuna ya Alalata. 
Genesis8:5 Mai akadi ahuekahueka tô ne ku ngondo wa dikumi, ku dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa dikumi, mitu ya mikuna yakamueneka." 
Genesis8:6 Hakakumbana matuku makumi anai Noa wakunzulula ha disoso dia buatu diakenzeye. 
Genesis8:7 Yeye waka tuma nyunyu wa tshikololo, tshiakalembelela tô ne hakûma mai ha buloba." 
Genesis8:8 Yeye waka tuma nyunyu wa nkutshi bua kumanyeye ne mai akahueka ha buloba. 
Genesis8:9 Kadi nyunyu wa nkutshi kakamona muaba wa kuikala, nunku wakahingana kudiye mu buatu, bualu bua mai akatshidi ha buloba buonso, yeye wakolola tshianza tshiandi, wakamukuata, wakamuteka mu buatu muakadiye." 
Genesis8:10 Noa wakindila matuku muanda mutekete makuabo, wakatuma nyunyu wa nkutshi kabidi," 
Genesis8:11 nyunyu wakahingana kudiye dilolo, ne monai, wakadi ne katamba ka mutshi wa olive kabishi ku muinu, nunku Noa wakamanya ne mai akadi makehe ha buloba." 
Genesis8:12 Wakindila matuku muanda mute kete makuabo, waka tuma nyunyu wa nkutshi kabidi, ne nyunyu kakahingana kudiye kabidi tshiendelele." 
Genesis8:13 Hakalua tshidimu tshia Noa tshia nkama isambombo ne tshimue, mu ngondo wa kumudilu ne dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo, mai onso akûma ha buloba, ne Noa wakumusha tshibuikilu tshia buatu, wakatangila ne monai, buloba buonso buakûma." 
Genesis8:14 Hakalua ngondo muibidi ne dituku dia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, buloba buakuma" 
Genesis8:15 Nzambi wakambila Noa ne," 
Genesis8:16 Hatuka mu buatu, wewe ne mukashi webe ne bana bebe balume ne bakashi babo." 
Genesis8:17 Luhuka mu buatu ne bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo biakadi nʼebe ne nyunyu ne bimuna ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi, bilelangane, bivulangane bia bungi ha buloba." 
Genesis8:18 Noa wakaluhuka ne bana bandi balume ne mukashiʼandi ne bakashi ba bana bandi," 
Genesis8:19 ne nyama yonso ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi ne nyunyu yonso ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshiendakana ha buloba, bu mudi mishindu yabi, biakaluhuka mu buatu." 
Genesis8:20 Noa wakashila Yehowa tshioshelu, wakangata wa nyama yonso idi miakane ne wa nyunyu yonso idi miakane, wakabika bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kalua ha tshioshelu." 
Genesis8:21 Yehowa wakanunkila dihembu dimpe: Yehowa wakamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Tshiena ngela buloba mulau kabidi bualu bua bantu badi ne meji mabi mu mitshima yabo hatshidibo bitende tô ne hakulumpabo, tshiena njimisha bifukibua bionso bidi ne muoyo kabidi bu munakenza diambedi." 
Genesis8:22 Hashala buloba, tshidimu tshia kukuna bintu ne tshidimu tshia kunowa bintu ne tshidimu tshia mashika ne tshidimu tshia luya ne munya ne mîdima kabiena bihanga tshiendelele nansha." 
Genesis9:1 Nzambi wakasankisha Noa ne bana bandi, wakabambila ne, Nulelangane, nukumbane ba bungi, nuikale ha buloba buonso." 
Genesis9:2 Ditshina ne buowa nebikale kudi nyama yonso ne kudi nyunyu yonso ya mulu ne kudi tshintu tshionso tshidi tshidikoka hanshi ne kudi minyinyi ya mu mai manene bua bualu buenu, nakafila bintu bionso mu bianza bienu." 
Genesis9:3 Bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo mbia kudia bienu, bu munakanuha midioko, mbu mundi nnuha bintu bionso." 
Genesis9:4 Kadi kanudi muoyo wa munyinyi wonso, mmashi mene mene." 
Genesis9:5 Numanye kabidi ne, Nendombe bulami bua mashi enu, nembulombe kudi nyama yonso ne kudi muntu yonso, nendombe bulami bua muoyo wa muntu hankatshi ha muntu ne muntu" 
Genesis9:6 Muntu yonso udi umatshisha mashi a munga muntu hanshi, nebamatshishe mashi andi hanshi, bualu bua Nzambi wakafuka bantu mu tshifuanyikishi tshiandi." 
Genesis9:7 Nuenu kabidi nulelangane, nukumbane, nuvulangane ba bungi ha buloba, nukumbanehu." 
Genesis9:8 Nzambi wakambila Noa ne bana bandi balume ne," 
Genesis9:9 Meme bianyi ndi njadika tshihungidi tshianyi nʼenu ne bana benu badi banulonda. 
Genesis9:10 Ndi ntshijadika ne bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo ne nyunyu ne bimuna ne nyama yonso bidi nʼenu bintu bionso bia ha buloba biakaluhuka mu buatu. 
Genesis9:11 Nenjadike nʼenu tshihungidi tshianyi ne, Tshiena njimisha bintu bionso ne mai kabidi nansha, mai kaena awilangana kabidi bua kujimishau buloba." 
Genesis9:12 Nzambi wakamba ne, Etshi tshidi tshimanymu tshia tshihungidi tshindi nteka hankatshi hetu ne bintu bionso bidi nʼenu to ne tshiendelele." 
Genesis9:13 Ndi muteke muanzankongolo wanyi mulu, newikale bu tshimanymu tshia tshihungidi hankatshi hetu ne buloba." 
Genesis9:14 Hashishe hanatuma matutu mulu, muanzankongolo neumueneke mu matutu," 
Genesis9:15 nenvuluke tshihungidi tshianyi tshidi hankatshi hetu ne bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo, ne mai kaena avulangana kabidi bua kujimishau bintu bionso" 
Genesis9:16 Muanzankongolo wanyi newikale mu matutu, hanaumona, nenvuluke tshihungidi tshia kashidi tshidi hankatshi ha Nzambi ne bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo ha buloba." 
Genesis9:17 Nzambi wakambila Noa ne, Etshi ntshimanyinu tshia tshihungidi tshinakujadika hankatshi hetu ne bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo ha buloba." 
Genesis9:18 Bana balume ba Noa bakaluhuka nʼandi mu buatu bakadi Sheme, Hama ne Yafete Hama wakadi nkambua wa Kanâna." 
Genesis9:19 Basatu aba bakadi bana balume ba Noa ne tunkanuniuna tuabo tuakamuangalaka ha buloba buonso. 
Genesis9:20 Noa wakabanga kuikala tshidime ne yeye wakakuna mitshi ya tumuma tukese. 
Genesis9:21 Noa wakanua nvinyo, wakakuatshika nvinyo, wakalala mu ntenta wandi butaka." 
Genesis9:22 Hama, tatu wa Kanana, wakamona butaka bua tatu wandi, wakamanyisha bana babo babidi bakadi ha bule." 
Genesis9:23 Sheme ne Yafete bakangata tshilulu, bakatshiteka ha makaya abo, bakaya tshianyima, bakabuikila butaka bua tatu abo, mpala yabo yakadi mitangile kukuabo, kabakatangila butaka bua tatuʼabo nansha." 
Genesis9:24 Noa wakatabala ku muoyo wandi, wakamanya bu muakenza muanʼandi wa mukala." 
Genesis9:25 Yeye wakamba ne, Kanana udi muedibue mulau, yeye neikale muhika wa bahika kudi bana babo." 
Genesis9:26 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Sheme, atumbishibue, Kanana neikale muhika wandi." 
Genesis9:27 Nzambi akumbashe Yafete, yeye ashikame biandi mu ntenta ya Sheme, Kanana ikale muhika wandi kabidi." 
Genesis9:28 Noa wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama isatu ne makumi atanu ku nyima kua nvula munene. 
Genesis9:29 Matuku onso a Noa akadi bidimu nkama tshitema ne makumi atanu, yeye wakafua." 
Genesis10:1 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya bana balumeba Noa Sheme ne Hama ne Yafete, bobo bakalela bana balume ku nyima kua nvula munene." 
Genesis10:2 Bana balume ba Yafete badi nunku Gome ne Magoga ne Madai ne Yawana ne Tubala ne Mesheka ne Tilasa. 
Genesis10:3 Bana balume ba Gomê badi nunku Ashakenaza ne Lifata ne Togama. 
Genesis10:4 Bana balume ba Yawana badi nunku Elisha ne Tâshishi ne Kitima ne Dodamma. 
Genesis10:5 Bobo bakabanyangana maloba a bisamba bia bantu akadi kukala kua mai manene, muntu ne muaku wandi, muntu ne muaku wandi, bu mudi meku abo ne bisamba biabo." 
Genesis10:6 Bana balume ba Hama badi nunku Kusha ne Miselayima ne Puta ne Kanana. 
Genesis10:7 Bana balume ba Kusha badi nunku Seba ne Hawila ne Sabeta ne Lâma ne Sabeteka Bana balume ba Lama badi Sheba ne Dedana. 
Genesis10:8 Kusha wakalela Nimeloda, yeye wakabanga kuikala muntu mukole." 
Genesis10:9 Wakadi tshilembi tshikole ku mesu kua Yehowa, bantu bakadi bamba bu lusumuinu ne, Bu Nimeloda, tshilembi tshikole ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Genesis10:10 Tshibangidilu tshia bukelenge buandi tshiakadi Babela ne Eleke ne Akada ne Kalene mu buloba bua Shinâ. 
Genesis10:11 Yeye wakumuka mu buloba abu, wakaya mu Ashû, wakasa Ninewe ne Lehobote-Ila ne Kala" 
Genesis10:12 ne Lesene, hankatshi ha Ninewe ne Kala (eu udi musoko munene)." 
Genesis10:13 Miselayima wakalela Ludima ne Anamima ne Lehabima ne Nafetuhima 
Genesis10:14 ne Patalusima ne Bena Kasaluha (nkambua wa Bena Peleshete) ne Bena Kafetô. 
Genesis10:15 Kanana wakalela Sidona muaba buta wandi ne Hete 
Genesis10:16 ne Bena Yebuse ne Bena Amole ne Bena Gîgashi 
Genesis10:17 ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Aka ne Bena Sina 
Genesis10:18 ne Bena Âwada ne Bena Semâ ne Bena Hamata Ku nyima kua malu au, Bena Kanana bakamuangalaka." 
Genesis10:19 Mukalu wa Bena Kanana wakadi ku Sidona (mu nshila wa ku Gela) to ne ku Gaza mu nshila wa ku Sodoma ne Amola ne Adema ne Seboima to ne ku Lasha. 
Genesis10:20 Aba mbana balume ba Hama ku meku abo ne ku nuaku yabo ne ku maloba abo ne ku bisamba biabo. 
Genesis10:21 Sheme, nkambua wa Bena Ebê, muanʼabo ne Yafete, yeye mene wakalela bana." 
Genesis10:22 Bana balume ba Sheme badi nunku Elama ne Ashû ne Âpakashada ne Luda ne Alama. 
Genesis10:23 Bana balume ba Alama badi Usa ne Hula ne Gete ne Masha. 
Genesis10:24 Âpakashada wakalela Shela ne Shela wakalela Ebe. 
Genesis10:25 Ebe wakalela bana balume babidi dina dia mukuabo diakadi Pelege, mu matuku andi bakabanyangana buloba, dina dia muanʼabo diakadi Yoketana." 
Genesis10:26 Yoketana wakalela Alamodada ne Shelefe ne Hasamaweta ne Yela 
Genesis10:27 ne Hadolama ne Uzala ne Dikela 
Genesis10:28 ne Obala ne Abimaele ne Shiba 
Genesis10:29 ne Ofi ne Hawila ne Yobaba bantu aba bonso bakadi bana balume ba Yoketana 
Genesis10:30 Mukalu wabo wakadi ku Mesha mu nshila wa ku Sefa, to ne ku mikuna mile ya ku esete." 
Genesis10:31 Aba mbana balume ba Sheme ku meku abo ne ku miaku yabo ne ku maloba abo ne ku bisamba biabo. 
Genesis10:32 Ebi mbiota bia bana balume ba Noa ku milongo yabo, bisamba bia bantu biakamuangalaka ha buloba ku nyima kua nvula munene biakafuma kudibo." 
Genesis11:1 Bantu bonso ba ha buloba bakadi ne muaku umue ne mei amue. 
Genesis11:2 Hashishe hakamuangalakabo ku esete, bakasangana mpata munene mu buloba bua Shinâ, bakashikamaku." 
Genesis11:3 Bakambilangana ne, Tuyai bietu, tuenzai tushola, tutuoshe mu kalua Bakadi ne tushola bu mabue, ne bitume bu tshimama." 
Genesis11:4 Bakambilangana ne, Tuyai kuasa musoko ne tshibumba tshile, musonga watshi neufike mulu mu matutu tuikale ne dina dia butumbi, bua katutangadiki ha buloba buonso." 
Genesis11:5 Yehowa wakahuka hanshi bua kumona musoko ne tshibumba biakasa bana ba bantu. 
Genesis11:6 Yehowa wakamba ne, Tangilai, bantu bonso badi bantu bamue, bonso badi ne muaku umue, au mmalu akabangabo kuenza, ne katataka kakuena bualu budibo basue kuenza budi mua kubakolela." 
Genesis11:7 Tuyai bietu hanshi, tutompakashe muaku wabo, nunku kabena mua kunvuangana muaku wabo kabidi." 
Genesis11:8 Nunku Yehowa wakabamuangalasha ha buloba buonso, bakalekela kuasa musoko." 
Genesis11:9 Ka dina dia musoko diakadi Babela, bualu bua Yehowa wakatompakashaku muaku wa ba ha buloba bonso, ne Yehowa wakabamuangalashaku ha buloba buonso." 
Genesis11:10 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya tunkanunuina tua Sheme Hakadi Shema ne bidimu lukama, wakalela Âpakashada, bidimu bibidi ku nyima kua nvula munene." 
Genesis11:11 Hakalela Sheme Âpakashada, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama itanu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:12 Âpakashada wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asatu ne bitanu, wakalela Shela" 
Genesis11:13 Hakalela Âpakashada Shela, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama mai ne bidimu bisatu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:14 Shela wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asatu, wakalela Ebê." 
Genesis11:15 Hakalela Shela Ebê, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama mai ne bisatu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:16 Ebê wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asatu ne binai, wakalela Pelege." 
Genesis11:17 Hakalela Ebê Pelege, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama mai ne makumi asatu, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:18 Pelege wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asatu, wakalela Leu." 
Genesis11:19 Hakalela Pelege Leu, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama ibidi ne tshitema, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:20 Leu wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi, wakalela Seluga." 
Genesis11:21 Hakalela Leu Seluga, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama ibidi ne muanda mutekete, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:22 Seluga wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi asatu, wakalela Nahô." 
Genesis11:23 Hakalela Seluga Nahô, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu nkama ibidi, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:24 Nahô wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema, wakalela Tela." 
Genesis11:25 Hakalela Nahô Tela, yeye wakashala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne dikumi ne tshitema, wakalela bana balume ne bana bakashi." 
Genesis11:26 Tela wakashala ne muoyo bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, wakalela Abalama ne Nahô ne Halana." 
Genesis11:27 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya tunkanunuina tua Tela. Tela wakalela Abalama ne Nahô ne Halana, Halana wakalela Lota." 
Genesis11:28 Halana wakafua hakadi tatu wandi Tela ne muoyo mu buloba buakakulelabo bua Ula wa Bena Kasada. 
Genesis11:29 Abalama ne Nahô bakabaka bakashi, dina dia mukashi wa Abalama diakadi Salai, ne dina dia mukashi wa Nahô diakadi Mileka, muana wa Halana, tatu wa Mileka ne tatu wa Yiseka." 
Genesis11:30 Salai wakadi nkumba, kakadi ne muana nansha." 
Genesis11:31 Tela wakangata Abalama, muanʼandi mulume ne Lota, muana wa Halana, muikulu wandi, ne Salai, ma muenʼandi, mukashi wa muanʼandi mulume Abalama, bakamuangala mu buloba bua Ula wa Kasada bua kuya ku buloba bua Kanâna, bakafika ku Halana, bakashikamaku." 
Genesis11:32 Matuku a Tela akadi bidimu nkama ibidi ne bitanu, Tela wakafua mu Halana." 
Genesis12:1 Yehowa wakambila Abalama ne, Umuka mu musoko webe ne kudi bana benu ne ku nsubu wa tatuʼebe, ya biebe mu muaba undualua kukulesha." 
Genesis12:2 Nenkuvuishe tshisamba tshinene, nenkusankishe, nenvuishe dina diebe dinene, ne wewe neuvudishile bakuabo disanka." 
Genesis12:3 Nensankishe bantu badi bakuvudishila wewe disanka, nengele muntu mulau udi ukuela wewe mulau Bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisanke bua bualu buebe." 
Genesis12:4 Nunku Abalama wakaya bu muakamba Yehowa, ne Lota wakaya nʼandi Abalama wakadi ne bidimu makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu hakumukeye mu Halana." 
Genesis12:5 Abalama wakangata mukashi wandi Salai, ne Lota, muana wa muanʼabo, ne bintu biabo bionso, ne bantu bonso bakahetabo mu Halana, bakaya mu nshila wa ku buloba bua Kanâna, bakafika mu buloba bua Kanâna" 
Genesis12:6 Abalama wakalala mu buloba, wakalua ku Shekeme, kuakadi mutshi wa telebinta wa mu Mole Bena Kanana bakadi mu buloba tshikondo atshi." 
Genesis12:7 Yehowa wakamueneka kudi Abalama, wakamba ne, Nempe tunkanunuina biebe buloba ebu Abalama wakenzela Yehowa, wakamueneka kudiye, tshioshelu." 
Genesis12:8 Yeye wakumukaku, wakaya ku mukuna wakadi ku esete wa Betele, wakashimikaku ntenta wandi, Betele wakadi ku wesete ne Ai wakadi ku esete. Wakenzelaku Yehowa tshioshelu, Wakabikila dina dia Yehowa." 
Genesis12:9 Abalama wakatshidi uya ku Sude. 
Genesis12:10 Tshiole tshiakadi mu buloba abu, ne Abalama wakaya mu Ejipitu bua kushikamamu bualu bua tshiole tshiakadi tshikole mu buloba abu." 
Genesis12:11 Hakambabo kubuela mu Ejipitu, Abalama wakambila mukashiʼandi Salai ne, Tangila ndi mumanye ne wewe udi mukashi muimpe kumona," 
Genesis12:12 ne hakumona Bena Ejipitu, bobo nebambe ne, Eu udi mukashi wandi! Bobo nebanshihe meme, nebakushiye wewe ne muoyo." 
Genesis12:13 Ndi nkutendekena ne, Wamba biebe ne, Meme ndi muanʼabo wa bakashi, bua meme mpete diakalengele bua bualu buebe, ne mutshima wanyi wikale ne muoyo bua bualu buebe" 
Genesis12:14 Hashishe hakalua Abalama mu Ejipitu, Bena Ejipitu bakatangila ne mukashi wakadi mulengele be." 
Genesis12:15 Bakelenge bana ba Palo bakamumona, bakamuanyishila Palo, bakaya nʼandi mu nsubu wa Palo." 
Genesis12:16 Yeye wakenzela Abalama bimpe bua bualu buandi, wakamuha mikoko ne ngombe, ne balume ba nyama ya mpunda, ne bahika balume ne bahika bakashi, ne mashina a nyama ya mpunda ne tumelo." 
Genesis12:17 Yehowa wakakengesha Palo ne ba mu nsubu wandi ne bihuhu bikole bualu bua Salai, mukashi wa Abalama." 
Genesis12:18 Palô Wakabikila Abalama, wakamukonka ne, Bualu ebu buwakungenzela budi tshinyi? Kuakungambila ne, Eu udi mukashi wanyi bualu kai?" 
Genesis12:19 Wakungambila ne, Yeye udi muanʼetu wa bakashi, bua meme kumuangata bu mukashi wanyi bualu kai? Ka, tangila mukashi webe, umuangate, uye biebe mu nshila webe" 
Genesis12:20 Palô wakadimusha bantu bandi bua bualu buandi, ne bakaya nʼandi ne mukashi wandi ne bintu biandi bionso mu nshila." 
Genesis13:1 Abalama wakumuka mu Ejipitu ne mukashiʼandi ne bintu biandi bionso ne Lota, wakaya mu luseke lua ku Sude." 
Genesis13:2 Abalama wakadi ne bubanji be bua bimuna ne argent ne or. 
Genesis13:3 Wakatshidi uya ku Sude to ne ku Betele kuakashimikeye ntenta wandi diambedi, hankatshi ha Betele ne Ai." 
Genesis13:4 Wakaya kuakenzeye tshioshelu diambedi, ne Abalama wakahitaku dina dia Yehowa." 
Genesis13:5 Lota wakaya ne Abalama, ne yeye wakadi ne mikoko ne bimuna ne ntenta." 
Genesis13:6 Muaba wakadi mukese bua bobo kushikama hohamue, bualu bua bintu biabo biakadi bia bungi, kabakamanya mua kushikama hohamue." 
Genesis13:7 Balami ba bimuna bia Abalama ne balami ba bimuna bia Lota bakatandangana. Bena Kanâna ne Bena Pelese bakadi mu buloba tshikondo atshi. 
Genesis13:8 Abalama wakambila Lota ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Katutandanganyi, balami ba bintu bietu kabatandanganyi, bualu bua tudi bana ba muntu umue." 
Genesis13:9 Buloba buonso kabuena ku mpala kuebe, anyi? Ndi nkutendekena ne, Tahuluka kundi bi waya ku tshianza tshia bakashi, nenye bianyi ku tshianza tshia balume ne biwaya ku tshianza tshia balume, nenye bianyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Genesis13:10 Lota wakabanduluka, wakamona mpata ne bibanda bia musulu wa Yadene, ne tusulu tuakadi kuonso diambedi Yehowa kayi muanze kushiha Sodoma ne Amola, mpata au wakadi bu tshibundu tshia Yehowa, wakadi bu buloba bua Ejipitu, hawaya mu nshila wa ku Soa." 
Genesis13:11 Nunku Lota wakasungula mpata wonso wa Yadene, wakaya biandi ku esete, bakaha ndulukangana nunku." 
Genesis13:12 Abalama wakikala mu buloba bua Kanana, Lota wakashikama mu misoko ya mu mpata, wakashimika ntenta yandi tô ne ku Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Bantu ba mu Sodoma bakadi babi, bakatamba kuhidia Yehowa." 
Genesis13:14 Hakahanduluka Lota, Yehowa wakambila Abalama ne, Bandisha mesu ebe ha muaba ûdi muimane, utangile ku nôde ne ku sude ne ku esete ne ku wesete," 
Genesis13:15 buloba buonso bûdi umona nenkuhebu ne tunkanunuina tuebe tshiendelele. 
Genesis13:16 Nenkuvudishile tunkanunuina tuebe, netuikale bu dinfuenkenya dia buloba, nunku biamanya muntu mua kubala dinfuenkenya dia buloba, hashishe, tunkanunuina tuebe netubadibue kabidi." 
Genesis13:17 Bika biebe, wendakana mu buloba buonso, mu bule buabu ne mu butshiama buabu, bualu bua nenkuhebu." 
Genesis13:18 Abalama wakatula ntenta yandi, wakamuangala, wakaya kushikama hehi ne nu tshi ya telebinta ya Mamale idi mu Hebelone, wakenzelaku Yehowa tshioshelu." 
Genesis14:1 Mu matuku a Amalafele, mukelenge wa Shinâ, ne Ayoka, mukelenge wa Elasa, ne Kedôlaome, mukelenge wa Elama, ne Tidala, mukelenge wa Goyima," 
Genesis14:2 bakaluangana nvita ne Bela, mukelenge wa Sodoma, ne Bisha, mukelenge wa Amola, ne Shinaba, mukelenge wa Adema, ne Shemebê, mukelenge wa Bena Seboi, ne mukelenge wa Belê (eu udi Soâ)." 
Genesis14:3 Bantu aba bonso bakadisangisha mu tshibanda tshia Sidima (etshi ntshibanda tshia Dishiba dia Mai a Luehu). 
Genesis14:4 Bakalamata Kedolaomê to bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, ne mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bisatu, bakatomboka" 
Genesis14:5 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne binai Kedôlaome wakalua ne bakelenge bakadi nʼandi, bakahita Bena Lefa ba mu Ashelota kânayima bukole, ne Bena Zusa ba mu Hama, ne Bena Eme ba mu Shawe kiyatayima," 
Genesis14:6 ne Bena Holi ba ku mikuna ya Sei to ne ku Ele-palana, hehi ne tshihela." 
Genesis14:7 Bakahingana, bakalua ku Ene-mishapata (eu udi Kadesha), bakahaula buloba buonso bua Bena Amaleka ne Bena Amole bakadi bashikama mu Hasasona-tamâ." 
Genesis14:8 Mukelenge wa Sodoma ne mukelenge wa Amole ne mukelenge wa Adema ne mukelenge wa Bena Seboi ne mukelenge wa Bela (eu udi Soa) bakaluhuka, bakaluangana nʼabo mu tshibanda tshia Sidima." 
Genesis14:9 Bakaluangana ne Kedolaomê, mukelenge wa Elama, ne Tidala, mukelenge wa Goyima, ne Amalafele, mukelenge wa Shinâ, ne Aliyoka, mukelenge wa Elasa, ku luseke lukuabo bakelenge banai, ku luseke lukuabo batanu." 
Genesis14:10 Tshibanda tshia Sidima tshiakadi tshiule tente ne bina bia bitume ne bakelenge ba Sodoma ne Amola bakanyema, bakahonamu, bakuabo bakashala bakanyemena ku mukuna." 
Genesis14:11 Bakahaula biuma bionso bia mu Sodoma ne Amola ne bintu bia kudia, bakaya mu nshila." 
Genesis14:12 Bakakuata Lota, muana wa muanʼabo ne Abalama, wakadi ushikama mu Sodoma, ne bintu biandi bionso, bakaya nʼabi." 
Genesis14:13 Muntu wakadi muhanduke mu bianza biabo wakaya, wakamanyisha Abalama, Muena Ebelu, wakadi ushikama hehi ne mitshi ya telebinta ya Mamale, muena Amole, muanʼabo ne Eshekola, muanʼabo ne Ane, bobo bakalamatangana ne Abalama." 
Genesis14:14 Hakunvua Abalama lumu ne, Bakaya ne muanʼetu, yeye wakaya ne bahika bandi bakadiye mueyemene bakadi baledibue mu nsubu muandi, nkama isatu ne dikumi ne muanda mukulu, wakabihata to ne ku Dana." 
Genesis14:15 Abalama wakatahulula bantu bandi, wakatuangana nʼabo butuku, yeye ne bahika bandi bakabatamba bukole, wakabihata to ne ku Hoba, udi ku tshianza tshia bakashi tshia Damaseke." 
Genesis14:16 Wakahingana ne biuma biabo bionso ne muanʼabo Lota, ne bintu biandi ne bakashi ne bantu." 
Genesis14:17 Mukelenge wa Sodoma wakaluhuka bua kumuakidila hakahinganeye ku dishiha dia Kedolaome ne bakelenge bakadi nʼandi, mu tshibanda tshia Shawe (etshi ntshibanda tshia Bakelenge)." 
Genesis14:18 Melekisedeke, mukelenge wa Salema, wakalua ne mampa ne nvinyo. Yeye wakadi muakuidi wa Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu." 
Genesis14:19 Yeye wakamuvudishila disanka, wakamba ne, Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu, mufuki wa diulu ne buloba asankishe Abalama," 
Genesis14:20 ne Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu, wakafua bena lukuna bebe mu tshianza tshiebe, atumbishibue Abalama wakamuha tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionso." 
Genesis14:21 Mukelenge wa Sodoma wakambila Abalama ne, Umpe bantu, wewe wangate biuma." 
Genesis14:22 Abalama wakambila mukelenge wa Sodoma ne, Nakamana kubisha tshianza tshianyi bua kuditshiha kudi Yehowa, Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu, mufuki wa diulu ne buloba," 
Genesis14:23 ne, Tshiena ngangata nansha nshinga nansha muonshi wa bisabata nansha kantu kebe kamue, bua wewe kuambi ne, Nakavuisha Abalama bubanji." 
Genesis14:24 Anu bintu bia kudia bia bansongalume ne bia bantu bakaya nʼanyi, Anê ne Eshekola ne Mamale, bobo bangate tshituha tshiabo." 
Genesis15:1 Hakashika malu a, dî dia Yehowa diakalua kudi Abalama mu tshilota ne, Abalama kutshinyi, meme ndi ngabu webe ne difutu diebe ditambe bunene." 
Genesis15:2 Abalama wakamba ne, Mukelenge Yehowa, wewe neumpe tshintu kai, bualu bua meme tshiena ne muana, ne muhianyi wa bintu bianyi udi Elieze, muena Damaseke?" 
Genesis15:3 Abalama wakamba ne, Tangila, wewe kuena muanze kumpa muana, ne muntu muledibue mu nsubu wanyi, yeye udi muhianyi wa bintu bianyi." 
Genesis15:4 Monai, di dia Yehowa diakalua kudiye ne, Muntu eu kena wikala muhianyi wa bintu biebe nansha, kadi yeye uwalela nkayebe neikale muhianyi wa bintu biebe." 
Genesis15:5 Yehowa wakaluhuka nʼandi mu nsubu, wakamba ne, Tangila mutu bala mitoto, biwamanya mua kuyibala Yeye wakamuambila ne, Tunkanunuina biebe netuikale bungi nunku." 
Genesis15:6 Yeye wakitabusha Yehowa, ne Yehowa wakabala kuitabusha kuandi ne, Mbuakane buandi." 
Genesis15:7 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Meme ndi Yehowa wakakumusha mu Ula wa Bena Kasada, bua kukuha buloba ebu bua kubuhiana." 
Genesis15:8 Yeye wakamba ne, Mukelenge Yehowa, ndi mumanye ne, Nembuhiane munyi?" 
Genesis15:9 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Wangate lukungulu lua ngombe lua bidimu bisatu, ne dishina dia mbushi dia bidimu bisatu, ne tshimpanga tshia mukoko tshia bidimu bisatu, ne nyunyu wa nkutshi ne mputu nyunyu" 
Genesis15:10 Yeye wakangata bintu ebi bionso, wakabihanda nseke, wakateka luseke eku luseke eku, kadi yeye kakahanda nyunyu nseke." 
Genesis15:11 Hakikila nyunyu ya bikololo ha bitalu ebi, Abalama wakayihata." 
Genesis15:12 Hakamba diba kubuela, tulu tukole tuakakuata Abalama monai, buowa bua midima buakamukuata." 
Genesis15:13 Yehowa wakambila Abalama ne, Umanye biebe bimpe ne, Tunkanu nuina biebe nebikale bendakanyi mu buloba budi kabuyi buabo, netukuatshile bena buloba mudimu, nebatukengeshe to bidimu nkama mai," 
Genesis15:14 meme nendumbuluishe tshisamba tshia bantu baditu tukuatshila mudimu, hashishe, netuhatuke ne biuma bia bungi." 
Genesis15:15 Kadi wewe neuye kudi bankambua bebe hola, neujikibue muntu mununu." 
Genesis15:16 Mu tshikondo tshinai tunkanunuina tuebe netulue kunoko kabidi, bualu bua bubi bua Bena Amole kabuena buanji kukumbana." 
Genesis15:17 Hashishe, hakabuela diba ne midima yakadiku, tshikutu tshiakadi ne muishi wa kahia ne tshimunyi tshia kalua kakole biakahita hankatshi ha nseke ya minyinyi." 
Genesis15:18 Mu dituku adi mene Yehowa wakahunga ne Abalama tshihungidi ne, Ndi mpa tunkanunuina biebe buloba abu ku musulu wa mu Ejipitu to ne ku musulu munene wa Pelata," 
Genesis15:19 buloba bua Bena Kene ne bua Bena Keneze ne bua Bena Kadamona 
Genesis15:20 ne bua Bena Hiti ne bua Bena Pelese ne bua Bena Lefa," 
Genesis15:21 ne bua Bena Amole ne bua Bena Kanâna ne bua Bena Gîgashi ne bua Bena Yebuse. 
Genesis16:1 Salai, mukashi wa Abalama, kakamulelela bana nansha, wakadi ne mukashi muena mudimu, Muena Ejipitu, dina diandi Haga." 
Genesis16:2 Salai wakambila Abalama ne, Mona, Yehowa wakumpidisha bua kulela, ndi nkutendekena ne, Uye biebe kudi mukashi, muena mudimu wanyi, binamanya mua kuheta bana kudiye Abalama wakitabusha di dia Salai." 
Genesis16:3 Hakashikama Abalama mu buloba bua Kanâna to bidimu dikumi, Salai, mukashi wa Abalama, wakangata Hagâ, Muena Ejipitu, muena mudimu wandi, wakamuha kudi Abalama, mulume wandi, amubake bu mukashi wandi." 
Genesis16:4 Wakaya kudi Haga ne yeye wakimita difu, hakatangileye ne, Nakuimita difu, yeye wakalengulula mukelenge wandi mukashi." 
Genesis16:5 Salai wakambila Abalama ne, Bubi buanyi buikale kûdi wewe nakafila mukashi muena mudimu wanyi mu tshiadi tshiebe, ne hakamoneye ne, Nakuimita difu, yeye wakundengulula, Yehowa alumbuluile tshilumbu tshidi hankatshi hetu nʼebe." 
Genesis16:6 Kadi Abalama wakambila Salai ne, Mona, muena mudimu webe udi mu tshianza tshiebe, umuenzele bu mûdi musue Salai wakamuenzela bibi ne yeye wakanyema ku mesu kuandi." 
Genesis16:7 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamusangana hehi ne mushimi wa mai wa mu tshihela, mushimi eu udi mu nshila wa ku Shû." 
Genesis16:8 Yeye wakebesha Hagâ, mukashi muena mudimu wa Salai, ne, Wakufuma kudi kunyi? Uyaya kudi kunyi? Yeye wakamuandamuna dî ne, Ndi munyeme ku mesu kua mukelenge wanyi mukashi Salai." 
Genesis16:9 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Hingana kudi mukelenge webe mukashi, udikokeshe mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Genesis16:10 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Nenkumbashile tunkanunuina biebe, tuikale bia bungi, kabena mua kutubala bua bungi bualu." 
Genesis16:11 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Tangila, wewe udi ne difu, neulele muana mulume, neumuidike dina ne, Yishemaele, bualu bua Yehowa wakunvua dikenga diebe." 
Genesis16:12 Yeye neikale bu nyama wa mpunda udi ne luonji munkatshi mua bantu, tshianza tshiandi netshiluishe muntu yonso, ne tshianza tshia muntu yonso netshimuluishe kabidi, yeye neikale mutangilangane ne bana babo bonso" 
Genesis16:13 Yeye wakidika Yehowa wakamuambila malu au ne, Wewe udi Nzambi udi utangila, bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Nakamana kumona Nzambi, munyi mundi nshala ne muoyo?" 
Genesis16:14 Nunku yeye wakidika mushimi wa mai ne, Bê-laha-loi (kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Mushimi wa Nzambi wa muoyo utu wantangila) udi hankatshi ha Kadesha ne Belede." 
Genesis16:15 Hagâ wakalelela Abalama muana mulume Abalama wakidika dina dia muana wakamulelela Hagâ ne, Yishemaele." 
Genesis16:16 Abalama wakadi muikale ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne bisambombo, hakamulelela Haga Yishemaele." 
Genesis17:1 Hakadi Abalama ne bidimu makumi tshitema ne tshitema, Yehowa wakamueneka kudi Abalama, wakamuambila ne, Ndi Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso, wenda ku mpala kuanyi, wikale muakane." 
Genesis17:2 Nenja dike tshihungidi tshianyi hankatshi hetu nʼebe, nenkukumbashe ba bu ngi." 
Genesis17:3 Abalama wakadia mpala hanshi, ne Nzambi wakayikila nʼandi ne," 
Genesis17:4 Mona, tshihungidi tshianyi tshidi nʼebe, wewe newikale nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi." 
Genesis17:5 Kabena babikila kabidi dina diebe ne, Abalama, kadi nebakuidike dina diebe ne, Abalahama, bualu bua nakakuvuisha nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi." 
Genesis17:6 Nenkuvudishangane ba bungi, nenkuvuishe bisamba bia bungi, bakelenge nebaledibue munda muebe." 
Genesis17:7 Nenjadike tshihungidi tshianyi hankatshi hetu hebe ne tunkanunuina tuebe to ne bikondo biatu bionso bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele, bua meme kuikala Nzambi webe ne wa tunkanunuina tuebe." 
Genesis17:8 Nenkuhe wewe ne tunkanunuina tuebe buloba buonso bua Kanana bûdi wendakanamu, bu buhianyi buenu bua tshiendelele, nengikale Nzambi wabo." 
Genesis17:9 Nzambi wakambila Abalahama ne, Wewe ne tunkanunuina tuebe mu bikondo biatu bionso, nenutumikile tshihungidi tshianyi." 
Genesis17:10 Etshi ntshihungidi tshidi hankatshi hetu nʼebe ne tunkanunuina tuebe tshinudi nʼatshi bua kutumikila ne, Muana mulume yonso wa munkatshi muenu atengudibue." 
Genesis17:11 Nebanutengule, ne bualu ebu nebuikale bu tshimanyinu tshia tshihungidi tshidi hankatshi hetu nʼebe." 
Genesis17:12 Muana mulume wa munkatshi muenu, hafikeye matuku muanda mukulu, neatengudibue, muana mulume yonso wa ku bikondo bienu bionso, yeye udi muledibue mu nsubu wenu, anyi yeye udibo basumba kudi ba bende ku argent, udi kayi kankanunuina kebe." 
Genesis17:13 Yeye udi muledibue mu nsubu webe ne yeye udibo basumba ku argent webe udi ne bua kutengudibua, tshi hungidi tshianyi netshikale munda muenu bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele." 
Genesis17:14 Muntu mulume udi kayi mutengula nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo, bualu bua yeye wakashiha tshihungidi tshianyi." 
Genesis17:15 Nzambi wakambila Abalahama ne, Kabena babikila mukashi webe, Salai kabidi, nebamubikile ne, Sala," 
Genesis17:16 nemmuvudishile di sanka, yeye neakulelele muana mulume, nemmusankishe bulelela, yeye neikale nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi, ne bakelenge ba bantu nebaluhuke munda muandi." 
Genesis17:17 Hashishe, Abalahama wakadishinda hanshi, wakaseka, wakamba mu mu tshima wandi ne, Nebalelele muntu udi ne bidimu lukama muana, anyi? Sala udi ne bidimu makumi tshitema nealele, anyi?" 
Genesis17:18 Abalahama wakambila Nzambi ne, Mbimpe Yishemaele ikale ne muoyo ku mesu kuebe" 
Genesis17:19 Nzambi wakamba ne, Nansha, Sala mukashi webe neakulelele muana wewe neumuidike dina ne, Isaka, nenjadike nʼandi yeye ne tunkanunuma tuandi tshihungidi tshianyi bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele." 
Genesis17:20 Nakukunvuila bualu bua Yishemaele kabidi, mona, nakumusankisha, nemmukumbashe, nemmuvuishe bisamba bia bungi, yeye nealele baminyampala dikumi ne babidi, nemmuvuishe tshisamba tshinene." 
Genesis17:21 Kadi nenjadike tshihungidi tshiandi ne Isaka, wakulelela Sala tshidimu tshialua hakumbana ngondo yandi." 
Genesis17:22 Nzambi wakalekela kuyikila ne Abalahama, wakamushiya, wakaya mu diulu." 
Genesis17:23 Abalahama wakangata Yishemaele, muanʼandi mulume, ne bana bonso bakaledibua mu nsubu wandi, ne bantu bonso bakasumbibua ku argent yandi, bantu balume bonso ba mu nsubu wa Abalahama bakatengudibua dituku adi mene bu muakamuambila Nzambi." 
Genesis17:24 Abalahama wakadi ne bidimu makumi tshitema ne tshitema hakamutengulabo. 
Genesis17:25 Yishemaele, muanʼandi mulume, wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bisatu hakamutengulabo." 
Genesis17:26 Abalahama ne Yishemaele, muanʼandi mulume, bakatengudibua dituku dimue." 
Genesis17:27 Balume bonso ba mu nsubu wandi, baledibue mu nsubu wandi, ne basumbibue ku argent kudi ba bende, bakatengudibua nʼandi." 
Genesis18:1 Yehowa wakamueneka kudi Abalahama hehi ne mitshi ya telebinta ya Mamale hakadiye ushikama ku mbelu kua ntenta wandi munda munya. 
Genesis18:2 Yeye wakabandisha mesu andi, wakatangila balume basatu bimane ku mpala kuandi, hakabatangileye, wakabika ku mbelu kuandi, wakaya lubilu bua kubakidila, wakabakukuila," 
Genesis18:3 wakamba ne, Mukelenge wanyi, biwikala ne luse kundi, ndi nkutendekena ne, Kuhitshi muntu webe." 
Genesis18:4 Nuitabushe balue ne mai, nuvuwe makasa enu, nuikishe bienu mu diledi dia mutshi," 
Genesis18:5 nendue ne bintu bia kudia bikese, nukoleshe mitshima yenu hashishe nudi mua kuhita, bualu bua nuenu nuakulua kudi muntu wenu Bakamuambila ne, Enza biebe bu muwakuamba." 
Genesis18:6 Abalahama wakabuela mu ntenta lubilu kudi Sala wakamuambila ne Wangate bihiminu bisatu bia bukula lubilu, usangakashe, ulambe mikata." 
Genesis18:7 Abalahama wakaya lubilu ku tshisumbu tshia ngombe, wakangata lukungulu lua ngombe luakadi lutekete ne luimpe, wakalufila kudi muntu wandi, ne yeye wakaluhandulula lubilu." 
Genesis18:8 Yeye wakangata manteke ne mabele ne lukungulu lua ngombe luakalambabo, wakabiteka ku mpala kuabo. Yeye wakimana ha buihi nʼabo muinshi mua mutshi hakadibo badia." 
Genesis18:9 Bakamukonka ne, Sala, mukashi webe, wehi? Yeye wakamba ne, Udi mu ntenta." 
Genesis18:10 Yeye wakamba ne, Bulelela, hakumbana ngondo, nempingane kûdi, ne mona, Sala, mukashi webe, neakulelele muana mulume Sala wakunvua dî diandi hakadiye mu ntenta ku mpenge kua tshibi, wakadi ku nyima kua muanjelo." 
Genesis18:11 Abalahama ne Sala bakadi ne bidimu bia bungi, bakadi bakoke, miloû ya bakashi yakashika kudi Sala." 
Genesis18:12 Sala wakadi useka munda munda, wamba ne, Meme nakulua mukoke ne mukelenge wanyi muikale mununu kabidi, nengikale ne disanka, anyi?" 
Genesis18:13 Yehowa wakakonka Abalahama ne, Sala wakaseka bua tshinyi, wamba ne, Meme nendele muana, hankadi mukoke aha, anyi?" 
Genesis18:14 Tshintu tshidi mua kuhita Yehowa bukole, anyi? Ku dituku dinakasungula nempingane kûdi, hakumbana ngondo yandi, Sala nealele muana mulume." 
Genesis18:15 Sala wakadia ne, Tshiakaseka, bualu bua yeye wakadi utshina. Kadi muanjelo wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, wewe wakaseka." 
Genesis18:16 Bantu aba bakabika, bakatangila ku Sodoma, ne Abalahama wakaya kubashindikila mu nshila." 
Genesis18:17 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nensokoke Abalahama bualu bundi ngenza, anyi?" 
Genesis18:18 Bualu bua yeye nealue tshisamba tshinene, ne bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisanke bua bualu buandi." 
Genesis18:19 Nakamumanya bua yeye ayishe bana bandi ne ba mu nsubu wandi bimpe, bua bobo baye mu nshila wa Yehowa bua kuenza malu makane ne malulame, nunku Yehowa neamanye mua kuenzela Abalahama malu onso akamuambileye." 
Genesis18:20 Yehowa wakamba ne, Bualu bua muadi wa Sodoma ne wa Amola udi munene, ne bualu bua malu mabi abo adi matambe bukole," 
Genesis18:21 nyaya katataka bua kubamona ne badi benza bu mudi muadi wabo wakufika kundi, ne bikalabo kabayi benze nunku, nemmanye bianyi." 
Genesis18:22 Balume aba bakumuka, bakaya mu nshila wa ku Sodoma, kadi Abalahama wakatshidi muimane ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Genesis18:23 Abalahama wakasemena ha buihi, wakamukonka ne, Neushihe bantu bakane ne bantu babi hohamue, anyi?" 
Genesis18:24 Bikala bantu bakane makumi atanu mu musoko, wewe neûshihe, kuena usungila musoko bualu bua bantu bakane makumi atanu badimu, anyi?" 
Genesis18:25 Bualu ebu kabuikadi kudi bua wewe kuenza nunku bua kushiha bantu bakane ne bantu babi hohamue, biwenza nunku bantu bakane nebikale muomumue ne bantu babi, bualu ebu kabuikadi kûdi, Mulumbuluishi wa buloba buonso katu wenza bimpe, anyi?" 
Genesis18:26 Yehowa wakamba ne, Binasangana bantu bakane makumi atanu mu musoko wa Sodoma, nensungile musoko wonso bua bualu buabo." 
Genesis18:27 Abalahama wakamba ne, Tangila, nakukuata bualu bua kusomba ne Yehowa, meme ndi bu luhuishi ne butue." 
Genesis18:28 Bikalamu bantu bakane makumi atanu kakuiyi bantu batanu, neushihe musoko wonso bualu bua bantu batanu kabayiku, anyi? Wakamba ne, Tshiena nshiha musoko binasangana bantu bakane makumi anai ne batanu." 
Genesis18:29 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Biwamona bantu bakane makumi anai? Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena nshiha musoko bualu bua bantu makumi anai." 
Genesis18:30 Yeye wakamba ne, Mukelenge, kukuatshi tshiji, nengakule bianyi, bikalamu bantu bakane makumi asatu Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena nshiha musoko bualu bua bantu makumi asatu." 
Genesis18:31 Yeye wakamba ne, Nakukuata bualu bua kusomba ne Mukelenge, bikalamu bantu makumi abidi Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena nshiha musoko bualu bua bantu makumi abidi." 
Genesis18:32 Yeye wakamba ne, Mukelenge, kukuatshi tshiji, nengakule musangu eu, bikalamu bantu bakane dikumi Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena nshiha musoko bualu bua bantu dikumi." 
Genesis18:33 Hakashikisha Yehowa kusangana ne Abalahama yeye wakaya biandi ne Abalahama wakahingana kuandi. 
Genesis19:1 Banjelo aba babidi bakafikaku Sodoma dilolo Lota wakadi ushikama ku tshibi tshia ku Sodoma. Lota wakabamona, wakabika bua kubakidila, wakabakukiula hanshi." 
Genesis19:2 Yeye wakamba ne, Tangilai, ba kelenge banyi ndi nnusengelela ne Luai kunu, nubuele mu nsubu wa muntu wenu, nulalemu butuku ebu, nuvuwe makasa enu, hashishe, ne nubike dinda dionso, nenuye mu nshila wenu Bobo bakamba ne, Nansha, netuikale mu misesu butuku ebu buonso." 
Genesis19:3 Yeye wakabatendekena bikole, bobo bakaya nʼandi bakabuela mu nsubu wandi, yeye wakabalambishila bintu bia bungi ne bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene ne bobo bakabidia." 
Genesis19:4 Kadi dia mbedi bobo kabayi banze kulala bena musoko wa Sodoma, ne banso ngalume ne bantu banunu ba nseke yonso bakanyunguluka nsubu," 
Genesis19:5 ba kabikila Lota, bakamukonka ne Balume aba bakulua kudi butuku ebu badi hanyi? Uluhuke nʼabo, bua tuetu tubamanye." 
Genesis19:6 Lota waka luhuka kudibo wakinshila tshibi ku nyima kuandi. 
Genesis19:7 Yeye wakamba ne, Bakuetu, ndi nnusengelela ne kanuenji bualu bubi nunku." 
Genesis19:8 Tangilai, ndi ne bana bakashi babidi badi kabayi banze kumanya balume, binuitabusha, nendue nʼabo kunudi, nubenzele bu munudi basue, kadi kanuenji balume aba bualu, bualu bua bobo bakulua mu diledi dia nsubu wanyi." 
Genesis19:9 Bobo bakamba ne, Umuke Bobo bakamba ne, Mulumiana eu, wakahatula bua kushikameye kunoko, ne katataka yeye udi musue kuikala bu mulumbuluishi, nenkuenzele bualu bubi budi butamba bualu butudi tubenzela bobo. Bobo bakamunguila ba bungi, Lota mene mene bakasemena ha buihi bua kuhandabo tshibi." 
Genesis19:10 Kadi bantu bakolola bianza biabo, bakakoka Lota mu nsubu kudibo, ba-kinshila tshibi." 
Genesis19:11 Bobo bakafofomesha mesu a balume bakadi bimane ku tshibi tshia nsubu, bakese ne banene, bakateketa, kabakamona tshibi." 
Genesis19:12 Bantu bakakonka Lota ne, Bantu bakuabo badi nʼebe anyi? Baku ne bana bebe balume ne bana bebe bakashi ne bonso baudi nʼabo mu musoko eu, umuke nʼabo mu muaba eu." 
Genesis19:13 Bualu bua netubutule musoko eu, bualu bua muadi wabo wakulua munene ku mesu kua Yehowa, ne Yehowa wakatutuma bua kûshiha." 
Genesis19:14 Lota wakaluhuka, wakambila baku bakadi babangila bana bandi bakashi ne, Jukai, numuke mu musoko eu, bualu bua Yehowa neashihe musoko Kadi yeye wakadi bu muntu udi wakula biakulakula kudi baku bandi." 
Genesis19:15 Hakatshia butuku banjelo bakenzesha Lota ne, Bika biebe, wangate mukashi webe ne bana bebe bakashi babidi badiku diambedi kanuyi banze kufua mu dikenga dia musoko eu." 
Genesis19:16 Kadi yeye wakajanguluka bantu bakamukuata ku tshianza tshiandi, ne tshianza tshia mukashi wandi, ne bianza bia bana bandi bakashi babidi bualu bua Yehowa wakamufuila luse, bobo bakalua nʼandi, bakamuteka ku butshika bua musoko." 
Genesis19:17 Hakayabo nʼabo ha bule umue wabo wakamba ne Nyema lubilu, bua kuhandisha muoyo webe kutangidi ku nyima kuebe, kushadi ha mpata nyema ku mikuna kufu biebe." 
Genesis19:18 Lota wakabambila ne, Mukelenge wanyi, kuenji nunku," 
Genesis19:19 tangila, muntu webe wakamana kusangana luse ku mesu kuebe, ne wewe wakavudisha luse luebe kundi hawakasungila muoyo wanyi, tshiena mua kunyemena ku mikuna, bua bualu bubi nebunkuate, nenfue bianyi." 
Genesis19:20 Tangila musoko eu udi ha buihi bua kunyemenamu, udi mukese, witabushe bua mpandilemu (musoko eu udi mukese nansha?) ne mutshima wanyi newikale ne muoyo." 
Genesis19:21 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Nakuitabusha bualu ebu kabidi, tshiena nshiha musoko eu uwakulombela." 
Genesis19:22 Nyemenamu lubilu, bualu bua tshiena mua kuenza bualu wewe kuyi muanze kufikaku. Nunku bakabikila dina dia musoko au ne, Soâ." 
Genesis19:23 Diba diakadi dimane kubanda mulu hakabuela Lota mu Soa. 
Genesis19:24 Hashishe, Yehowa wakamatshisha mu Sodoma ne Amola soufre ne kalua bia mu diulu kudi Yehowa." 
Genesis19:25 Yeye wakabutula misoko ai ne mpata yonso, ne bantu bonso ba mu misoko, ne bintu biakadi bidiunda mu buloba." 
Genesis19:26 Kadi mukashi wa Lota wakatangila ku nyima kuandi, wakakudimuka dibue dia luehu." 
Genesis19:27 Abalahama wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakaya ku muaba wakimaneye ku mpala kua Yehowa;" 
Genesis19:28 wakatangila ku luseke lua Sodoma ne Amola ne Mpata yonso, ne tangilai, muishi wakadi ubanda bu muishi wa tshikutu." 
Genesis19:29 Hakabutula Nzambi misoko ya mu Mpala, yeye wakavuluka Abalahama, wakumusha Lota munkatshi mua dikenga hakabutuleye misoko kuakadi Lota mushikame." 
Genesis19:30 Lota wakumuka ku Soâ, wakaya kushikama ku mikuna, yeye ne bana bandi bakashi babidi, wakatshina bua kushikama ku Soâ, wakikala biandi ne bana bandi bakashi babidi mu lubuebue." 
Genesis19:31 Muanʼa bute wakambila muanʼa mukala ne, Tatu wetu udi mununu, ne kakuena mulume mukuabo udi mua kulua kutudi bu mudi tshilele tshia bonso ba ha buloba." 
Genesis19:32 Lua, tunuishe tatu wetu nvinyo, netulale nʼandi, bua tuetu tulelele tatu wetu bana." 
Genesis19:33 Bakanuisha tatu wabo nvinyo butuku abu, ne muaba bute wakabuela, wakalala ne tatu wandi, tatu wandi kakamanya hakalaleye ne hakabikeye." 
Genesis19:34 Hakatshiabu muanʼa bute wakambila muanʼa mukala ne, Butuku bua lelu nakulala ne tatu wanyi, tumunuishe nvinyo butuku ebu kabidi, wewe ubuele, ulale bandi, bua tuetu tulelele tatu wetu bana." 
Genesis19:35 Bakanuisha tatu wabo nvinyo butuku abu kabidi, ne muanʼa mukala wakabika, wakalala nʼandi, ne tatu wandi kakamanya hakalaleye ne hakabikeye." 
Genesis19:36 Nunku bana bakashi ba Lota babidi bakimita mafu kudi tatu wabo. 
Genesis19:37 Muanʼa bute wakalela muana mulume, wakamulelela dina ne, Moaba, yeye wakadi nkambua wa Bena Moaba to ne lelu." 
Genesis19:38 Muanʼa mukala wakalela muana mulume kabidi, wakamuidika dina ne, Beneami, yeye wakadi nkambua wa Bena Amona tô ne lelu." 
Genesis20:1 Abalahama wakumuka ku muaba au, wakaya ku Sude, wakashikama hankatshi ha Kadesha ne Shû, wakashikama ku Gelâ." 
Genesis20:2 Abalahama wakamba bua Sala, mukashi wandi, ne, Yeye udi muanʼetu mukashi, ne Abimeleke, mukelenge wa Gelâ, wakatuma bantu, bakangata Sala." 
Genesis20:3 Kadi Nzambi wakamueneka kudi Abimeleke mu tshilota butuku, wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi anu muntu mufue, bualu bua mukashi uwakuangata udi mukashi wa munga muntu." 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleke kakadi muanze kulua kudiye, ne yeye wakakonka ne, Mukelenge, wewe neushihe tshisamba tshiakane, anyi?" 
Genesis20:5 Yeye kakungambila ne, Yeye udi muanʼetu mukashi, anyi? Mukashi mene wakamba ne, Yeye udi muanʼetu mulume Nakuenza bualu ebu mu buakane bua mu mutshima ne kutoka kua bianza bianyi." 
Genesis20:6 Nzambi wakamuambila mu tshiota ne, Bulelela, ndi mumanye ne wewe wakuenza bualu ebu mu buakane bua mu mutshima webe, nakakuhidisha kabidi bua kuenza bualu bubi ku mesu kuanyi, nunku tshiakuitabusha bua wewe kumulenga tshianza." 
Genesis20:7 Nunku uhingashe mukashi kudi mulume wandi, bualu bua yeye udi muprofete, neakulombele Nzambi bua wewe wikale ne muoyo, kadi biwahidia kumuhingasha, umanye biebe ne wewe ne bantu bonso baudi nʼabo nenufue bulelela." 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleke wakabika ne dinda dionso, Wakabikila bantu bandi bonso, wakabambila malu au onso ku matshu abo; ne bantu bandi bakatamba kutshina." 
Genesis20:9 Hashishe Abimeleke Wakabikila Abalahama, wakamukonka ne, Bualu ebu buwakungenzela budi tshinyi? Nakukuenzela bualu bubi kai, bua wewe wakunvuisha ne bantu banyi mu bualu bubi bunene nunku? Wewe wakungenzela bualu bubi, budi kabuyi buimpe bua kuenza." 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleke wakakonka Abalahama ne, Meji kai akadi munda muebe a kukuenzesha bualu ebu?" 
Genesis20:11 Abalahama wakamuambila ne, Bualu bua nakuelangana meji ne, Bushuwa, ditshina dia Nzambi kadiena mu muaba eu, ne bobo nebanshihe bualu bua mukashi wanyi." 
Genesis20:12 Bulelela, yeye udi muakunyi wanyi, udi muana wa tatu wanyi, kadi kena muana wa mamu wanyi, ne yeye wakalua mukashi wanyi." 
Genesis20:13 Hashishe hakambikila Nzambi, wakangumusha ku nsubu wa tatu wanyi, meme nakamuambila ne, Elu nduse lundi musue wewe kundesha, ku miaba yonso itudi tuya nʼebe ubambile bua bualu buanyi ne, Yeye udi mukulu wanyi wa balume." 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleke wakangata mikoko ne ngombe ne bahika balume ne bahika bakashi, wakabifila kudi Abalahama, wakahingasha Sala mukashi wandi kudiye kabidi." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleke wakamuambila ne, Mona, buloba buanyi budi ku mpala kuebe, ushikame kudi musue." 
Genesis20:16 Yeye wakambila Sala ne, Mona, nakuha mukulu webe bituha bia argent tshinunu, ntshintu tshiebe tshia kutokesha nʼatshi munda ne bantu bonso badi nʼebe, wewe wakubingishibua ku mesu kua bantu bonso." 
Genesis20:17 Abalahama wakalomba Nzambi, ne yeye wakakolesha Abimeleke ne mukashi wandi ne bena mudimu bandi ba bakashi, ne bobo bakalela bana." 
Genesis20:18 Bualu bua Yehowa wakakumbamisha bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa Abimeleke, bualu bua Sala, mukashi wa Abalahama." 
Genesis21:1 Yehowa wakahingana kudi Sala bu muakambeye, ne wakenzela Sala bu muakambeye." 
Genesis21:2 Sala wakimita difu, wakalelela Abalahama muana mulume mu bununu buandi mu tshikondo tshiakamuambila Nzambi." 
Genesis21:3 Abalahama wakabika muana wandi mulume wakamulelela Sala ne, Isaka" 
Genesis21:4 Abalahama wakatengula muana wandi mulume Isaka hakahita matuku muanda mukulu, bu muakamuambila Nzambi." 
Genesis21:5 Abalahama wakadi ne bidimu lukama hakamulelabo muana wandi mulume Isaka. 
Genesis21:6 Sala wakamba ne, Nzambi wakansekesha ne bantu bonso badi bunvua lumu elu nebaseke nʼanyi." 
Genesis21:7 Yeye wakamba ne, Muntu kai wakadi kuambila Abalahama ne, Sala neamushe bana mabele? Bualu bua meme nakamulelela muana mu bununu buandi." 
Genesis21:8 Muana wakadiunda, wakalekela mabele, mu dituku diakalekeleye mabele Abalahama wakalambishila Isaka bidia bia bungi." 
Genesis21:9 Sala wakamona muana mulume wa Haga, muena Ejipitu, wakadi muledibue kudi Abalahama, wakadi useka biandi." 
Genesis21:10 Nunku yeye wakambila Abalahama ne, Wihate muhika eu ne muana wandi mulume bualu bua muana wa muhika eu kena mua kuhiana buhianyi muomumue ne muana wanyi Isaka mene." 
Genesis21:11 Bualu ebu buakadi bujitu bukole kudi Abalahama bualu bua muana wandi mulume. 
Genesis21:12 Nzambi wakambila Abalahama ne, Bualu ebu kabuikadi bujitu ku mesu kuebe, bualu bua nsongalume ne bua muhika webe, witabusha mei onso akukuambila Sala, unvua dî diandi, bualu bua tunkanunuina tuebe netubikidibue mu Isaka." 
Genesis21:13 Nenvuishe muana wa muhika webe tshisabata tshinene bualu bua yeye udi muana webe. 
Genesis21:14 Abalahama wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakangata bidia ne mulondo wa mai, wakabika kudi Haga, wakabiteka ha diaha diandi, wakamuha muana, wakabatuma ha bule, wakaya biandi, wakendakana mu tshihela tshia Bê-sheba." 
Genesis21:15 Mai akadi mu mulondo akashika, ne yeye wakaladika muana muinshi mua katshi kasase." 
Genesis21:16 Yeye wakaya ha bule buludiludi buakadi muana bu mudi muntu wamba kuela mikete, bualu bua wakamba ne, Tshitangidi lufu lua muana Yeye wakashikama buludiludi buakadi muana, wakaula muadi, wakadila." 
Genesis21:17 Nzambi wakunvua di dia nsongalume, ne muanjelo wa Nzambi wakela dî kudi Hagâ difume mu diulu, wakamukonka ne, Hagâ, bualu kai budi bukutonda? Kutshinyi, bualu bua Nzambi wakamana kunvua di dia nsongalume mudiye mulale." 
Genesis21:18 Bika biebe, ubishe nsongalume, umukuate ku tshianza, bualu bua meme nemmuvuishe tshisamba tshinene." 
Genesis21:19 Nzambi wakatabasha mesu andi, yeye wakamona mushimi wa mai, yeye wakaya, wakasuna mai mulondo tente, wakanuisha nsongalume mai." 
Genesis21:20 Nzambi wakadi ne nsongalume, yeye wakadiunda, yeye wakashikama mu tshihela wakalua tshilembi tshidi ne ndudi." 
Genesis21:21 Wakashikama mu tshihela tshia Palana, mamu wandi wakamuangatshila mukashi wa mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Genesis21:22 Mu tshikondo atshi Abimeleke ne Pikola, kamanda ka masalayi andi, bakambila Abalahama ne, Nzambi udi nʼebe mu malu onso audi wenza." 
Genesis21:23 Nunku uditshihe nʼanyi kudi Nzambi bua wewe kundingi, nansha muanʼanyi mulume, nansha muana wa muanʼanyi, kadi ungenzele malu ne luse bu munakakuenzela wewe ne buloba bûdi mushikame." 
Genesis21:24 Abalahama wakamba ne, Nenditshihe nunku." 
Genesis21:25 Abalahama wakabela Abimeleke bualu bua dina dia mai diakanyengabo kudi bahika ba Abimeleke ku bukole. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleke wakamba ne, Tshiena mumanye bantu bakuenza bualu ebu, wewe kuakungambila diambedi, tshiakunvua lumu lua bualu ebu, anu lelu." 
Genesis21:27 Abalahama wakangata mikoko ne ngombe, wakabika kudi Abimeleke, bubidi buabo bakafua ndondo." 
Genesis21:28 Abalahama wakateka bana ba mikoko ba mashina muanda mutekete ha buabo. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleke wakebesha Abalahama ne, Wakuteka bana aba ba mikoko muanda mutekete ha buabo bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis21:30 Yeye wakamba ne, Bana aba ba mikoko muanda mutekete, wewe neubangate ku tshianza tshinyi, nebikale bu bamanyi ba bualu buanyi ne, Meme nakumbula dina edi dia mai." 
Genesis21:31 Nunku bakabikila muaba au ne, Besheba bualu bua bubidi buabo bakaditshihilaku." 
Genesis21:32 Nunku bakahungakasha tshihungidi ku Bê-sheba, ne Abimeleke ne Pikola, kamanda ka masalayi andi, bakabika, bakahingana ku buloba bua Bena Peleshete." 
Genesis21:33 Abalahama wakakuna mutshi ku Be-sheba, wakabikilaku dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Kashidi." 
Genesis21:34 Abalahama wakashikama mu buloba bua Bena Peleshete matuku a bungi. 
Genesis22:1 Hakahita malu au Nzambi wakateta Abalahama, wakamuambila ne, Abalahama yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku." 
Genesis22:2 Yeye wakamba ne, Wangate muan ebe mulume, muana umuehele, ûdi munange, Isaka mene, uye biebe mu buloba bua Moliya, umufileku bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kalua, ha mutu ha mukuna undualua kukulesha." 
Genesis22:3 Abalahama wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakasuika tshiseba ha nyima ha nyama wandi wa mpunda, wakangata bansongalume bandi babidi ne Isaka muanʼandi, wakahanda nkunyi ya kalua ka ha tshioshelu, wakabika, wakaya ku muaba wakamuambila Nzambi." 
Genesis22:4 Hakahita matuku asatu Abalahama wakabandisha mesu andi, wakamona muaba kule kuakua" 
Genesis22:5 Abalahama wakambila bansongalume bandi babidi ne, Nuenu nushale kimoko ne nyama wa mpunda, tuetu netuye ne nsongalume, netutendelele, netuhingane kunudi." 
Genesis22:6 Abalahama wakangata nkunyi ya kalua ka ha tshioshelu, wakayiteka ha diaha dia muanʼandi Isaka, yeye wakangata kalua ne kele mu tshianza tshiandi, bubidi buabo bakaya hohamue." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka wakambila Abalahama, tatuʼandi ne, Tatu wanyi, yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku, muanʼanyi Isaka wakamba ne, Tangila kalua ne nkunyi bidiku, kadi muana wa mukoko wa kuosha ha kalua weba?" 
Genesis22:8 Abalahama wakamba ne, Muanʼanyi, Nzambi nkayandi neatuhe muana wa mukoko wa kuosha ha kalua, nunku bubidi buabo bakaya hohamue." 
Genesis22:9 Bakafika ku muaba wakamua mbila Nzambi, ne Abalahama wake nza tshioshelu, wakalongolola nkunyi, wakasuika muanʼandi Isaka, wakamuladika ha tshioshelu ha mutu ha nkunyi." 
Genesis22:10 Abahalama wakolola tshianza tshiandi, wakangata kele bua kushiheye nʼaku muanʼandi." 
Genesis22:11 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamuela di difume mu diulu ne, Abalahama, Abalahama, yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku." 
Genesis22:12 Yeye wakamba ne, Kulengi nsongalume tshianza nansha, kumuenzedi bualu, bualu bua katataka ndi mumanye ne wewe udi utshina Nzambi, bualu bua wewe kuakumpidia muanʼebe, muana umuehele mene." 
Genesis22:13 Abalahama wakabandisha mesu andi, wakamona ku nyima kuandi tshi-mpanga tshiakadi ne nsengu yatshi mile mikuata ku mutshi Abalahama wakaya, wakangata tshimpanga, wakatshishihela Nzambi mu muaba wa muanʼandi." 
Genesis22:14 Abalahama Wakabikila dina dia muaba au ne, Yehowa-yile; nunku badi bamba tô ne ku dituku edi ne, Mu mukuna wa Yehowa nebatuhe bintu." 
Genesis22:15 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakela di diandi kudi Abalahama difume mu diulu tshiakabidi," 
Genesis22:16 wakamba ne, Nakaditshiha ku dina dianyi, muakuamba Yehowa, bualu bua wewe wakuenza bualu ebu, kuakumpidisha muanʼebe, muana umue hele mene," 
Genesis22:17 ne hanasankisha bakuabo nenkuyudíshile disanka, ne hanakumbasha bakuabo nenkumbashe tunkanunuma tuebe bu mitoto ya mu diulu ne bu nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene tunkanunuma tuebe netuhiane bibi bia bantu badi nʼatu lukuna," 
Genesis22:18 bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisanke bualu bua tunkanunuma tuebe, bualu bua wewe wakatumikila di dianyi." 
Genesis22:19 Hashishe Abalahama wakahingana kudi bansongalume bandi, bakabika, bakaya bonso hohamue ku Be-sheba, Abalahama wakashikama mu Be-sheba." 
Genesis22:20 Ku nyima kua malu au bakambila Abalahama ne, Mona, Mileka wakalelela muanʼenu Naho bana," 
Genesis22:21 dina dia muanʼa bute ne, Uza, ne dina dia muakunyʼandi ne Buza, ne Kemuele, tatu wa Alama" 
Genesis22:22 ne Kesede ne Hazo ne Piledasha ne Yidilafa ne Betuele. 
Genesis22:23 Betuele wakalela Lebeka: Mileka wakalelela Naho muanʼabo ne Abalahama, bana aba muanda mukulu." 
Genesis22:24 Muhika wandi mukashi, dina diandi Leuma, wakamulelela Teba ne Gahama ne Tahasha ne Maka." 
Genesis23:1 Sala wakadi ne bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, ebi mbidimu bionso bia muoyo wa Sala." 
Genesis23:2 Sala wakafua mu Kiyata-aba (eu udi Hebelone) mu buloba bua Kanana, Abalahama wakaya bua kuaula muadi wa Sala ne bua kumujinga." 
Genesis23:3 Abalahama wakabika ku mpala kua tshitalu tshiandi, wakambila bana ba Hete ne," 
Genesis23:4 Ndi bianyi muenyi ne muikadi munkatshi muenu, numpe muaba wa majambu bua meme kujikarnu tshitalu etshi ku mesu." 
Genesis23:5 Bana ba Hete bakambila Abalahama ne," 
Genesis23:6 Mukelenge, utunvuile, wewe udi bu muntu wa Nzambi munene munkatshi muetu, usungule muaba wa majambu nkayebe udi musue kujikarnu tshitalu etshi, kakuena muntu udi mua kukukanda bua wewe kuangata muaba wa kujikamu tshi tatu etshi." 
Genesis23:7 Abalahama waka bika, wakakukuila bana ba Hete, bena buloba." 
Genesis23:8 Yeye wakayikila nʼabo, wakabambila ne, Binuitabusha bua meme kujika tshitalu etshi ku mesu kuanji, nungunvuile, nungakuile kudi Efelona, muana wa Sohâ" 
Genesis23:9 bua yeye ampe lubuebue lua ku Makepela, ludiye nʼalu ku mpenge kua budimi buandi, yeye alumpe ku mesu kua buonso buenu ku mushinga udiye musue wa muaba wa kujikamu tshitalu." 
Genesis23:10 Efelona wakadi ushikama munkatshi mua bana ba Hete, ne Efelona, Muena Hiti wakambila Abalahama ku mpala kua bana ba Hete bonso mene bakadi babuela mu musoko wandi ne," 
Genesis23:11 Nansha, mukelenge, ungunvuile nenkuhe budimi ne lubuebue bidimu, nenkuhebi ku mpala kua bana ba bantu banyi, ujikemu tshitalu etshi." 
Genesis23:12 Abalahama wakakukuila ku mpala kua bena buloba.
