Genesis23:13 Yeye wakambila Efelona ku mpala kua bena buloba ne, Biwitabusha, ndi nkutendekena ne, Ungunvuile, nenkuhe mushinga wa budimi uwangate ne meme nenjikemu tshitalu etshi." 
Genesis23:14 Efelona wakakudimuna Abalahama di ne," 
Genesis23:15 Mukelenge wanyi, ungunvuile budimi bua nkama mai ya nshekele ya argent budi mushinga kai munkatshi muetu? Nunku ujikemu tshitalu." 
Genesis23:16 Abalahama wakitabusha dî dia Efelona Abalahama wakamuidikishila bungi bua argent buakalombeye ku mpala kua bana ba Hete, nshekele ya argent nkama mai bu muakitabusha bahanyi ba bintu." 
Genesis23:17 Nunku budimi bua Efelona, buakadi mu Makepela ku mpala kua Mamale, budimi ne lubuebue luakadimu ne mitshi yonso yakadi mu budimi ne ku mpenge kuabu, bintu ebi bionso biakalua kudi Abalahama," 
Genesis23:18 bu buhianyi buandi ku mpala kua bana ba Hete ne kua bonso bakadi babuela mu musoko wandi. 
Genesis23:19 Ku nyima kua malu au Abalahama wakajika Sala, mukashi wandi, mu lubuebue biakadi mu budimi bua Makepela ku mpala kua Mamale (eu udi Hebelone) mu buloba bua Kanâna." 
Genesis23:20 Budimi ne lubuebue luakadimu biakaya mu bianza bia Abalahama tshiendelele ku mpala kua bana ba Hete bu muaba wa kujikabo bantu bafue. 
Genesis24:1 Abalahama wakadi muntu mununu mukoke, ne Yehowa wakasankisha Abalahama mu malu andi onso." 
Genesis24:2 Abalahama wakambila muhika wandi mukulu, wakadi mulami wa bintu biandi bionso ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Uteke tshianza tshiebe muinshi mua tshibelu tshianyi," 
Genesis24:3 nenkutshihishe kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa diulu ne wa buloba, ne wewe kuangatshidi muanʼanyi mulume mukashi wa bana bakashi ba Bena Kanâna babidi bashikame nʼabo," 
Genesis24:4 kadi uye biebe kuanyi, kudi bana betu, wangatshile muanʼanyi Isaka mukashi." 
Genesis24:5 Muhika wandi wakamukudimuna di ne, Abu biahidia mukashi kundonda ku buloba ebu, netuhingane ne muan ebe mulume ku buloba buwakumuka, anyi?" 
Genesis24:6 Abalahama wakamuambila ne, Udimuke, kuyi ne muanʼanyi kabidi kuakua." 
Genesis24:7 Yehowa, Nzambi wa mulu, wakangumusha ku nsubu wa tatu wanyi ne ku buloba buakandelabo, wakabambila, wakandaya ne, Nempe tunkanunuina biebe buloba ebu yeye mene neatume muanjelo wandi ku mpala kuebe, ne wewe newangatshile muanʼanyi mukashi kuakua." 
Genesis24:8 Biahidia mukashi kukulonda, hashishe, munda muebe nemu ikale mutoke ku kuditshiha eku." 
Genesis24:9 Muhi ka wakateka tshianza tshiandi muinshi mua tshibelu tshia Abalahama, mukelenge wandi, wakaditshiha bua bualu ebu." 
Genesis24:10 Muhika wandi wakangata nyama ya tumelo dikumi mu tshisumbu tshia tumelo bia mukelenge wandi, wakaya ne biuma bia mukelenge wandi bia mishindu yonso mu tshianza tshiandi, wakabika, wakaya ku buloba bua Mesopotamia, ku musoko wa Naho." 
Genesis24:11 Yeye Wakabikila tumelo binu hanshi ku butshika bua musoko hehi ne mushimi wa mai dilolo ha diba diyaya bakashi bua kusunabo mai. 
Genesis24:12 Yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa mukelenge wanyi Abalahama, ndi nkulomba ne, Ungendeshe dikasa dimpe lelu, ufuile mukelenge wanyi Abalahama luse." 
Genesis24:13 Tangila, hantshidi muimane hehi ne mushimi wa mai, ne bana bakashi ba bena musoko bakadi balua bua kusunabo mai," 
Genesis24:14 witabushe ne nsongakashi undi ngambila ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Utule mulondo webe wa mai, umpe mai a kunua, yeye angandamune di ne, Nua biebe, nennuishe tumelo biebe kabidi, nunku yeye mene ikale mukashi uwakasunguila muntu webe Isaka, nunku nemmanye ne wewe wakufuila mukelenge wanyi luse." 
Genesis24:15 Hashishe, hakadiye wakula, tangilai, Lebeka wakadi mulela kudi Betuele, muana mulume wa Mileka, mukashi wa Naho, muanʼabo ne Abalahama, wakaluhuka ne mulondo wa mai ha diaha diandi." 
Genesis24:16 Nsongakashi eu wakadi ne mpala muimpe be, wakatshidi kamama, kayi muanze kumanyibua kudi mulume, yeye wakahueka ku mushimi wa mai, wakasuna mulondo wandi tente, wakabanda kabidi." 
Genesis24:17 Muhika wakaya lubilu kudiye, wakamuakidila, wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Umpeku tuima tukese bia meme kunua." 
Genesis24:18 Yeye wakamba ne, Nue biebe, mukelenge wanyi, yeye wakatula mulondo wandi lubilu mu tshianza tshiandi, wakamunuisha." 
Genesis24:19 Hakashikisheye kumunuisha mai, yeye wakamba ne, Nensunyine tumelo biebe mai kabidi to ne hukutatu." 
Genesis24:20 Yeye wakaya lubilu, wakahongoluela mai mu luvu lunene, wakaya lubilu ku mushimi kabidi, wakasunyina tumelo biandi tuonso mai." 
Genesis24:21 Mulume eu wakamutangila talalâ, wakadi welangana meji munda bua kumanyeye ne, Yehowa wakungendesha dikasa bimpe, anyi?" 
Genesis24:22 Hakashikisha tumelo kunua mai, mulume eu wakahatula kakanu ka or ka bujitu bua tshituha tshia nshekele, ne nkanu ibidi ya ku maboko ya bujitu bua nshekele dikumi kabidi." 
Genesis24:23 Wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi muana wa nganyi? Ndi nkusengelela ne, Ungambile Udi ne muaba mu nsubu wa tatu webe bua tuetu kulalamu, anyi?" 
Genesis24:24 Yeye wakamukudimuna di ne, Ndi muana wa Betuele, muana mulume wa Mileka, wakaleleleye Naho." 
Genesis24:25 Wakamuambila kabidi ne, Tudi ne mashinde ne manvua a bungi, ne miaba ya kulala." 
Genesis24:26 Mulume eu wakinyika mutu wandi, wakatendelela Yehowa." 
Genesis24:27 Yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa mukelenge wanyi Abalahama, atumbishibue, yeye kakumushila mukelenge wanyi luse luandi ne bulelela buandi, hanakadi mu nshila Yehowa wakandombola ku nsubu wa bana babo ne mukelenge wanyi." 
Genesis24:28 Nsongakashi wakaya lubilu, wakambila ba mu nsubu wa mamu andi malu au." 
Genesis24:29 Lebeka wakadi ne muanʼabo wa balume dina diandi Labana, Labana wakaya lubilu kudi mulume wakadi ku mushimi wa mai." 
Genesis24:30 Hakatangileye kakanu ka ku diulu ne nkanu ya ku maboko a muanʼabo mukashi, ne hakunvueye mei a Lebeka muanʼabo mukashi ne, Mulume au wakungambila nunku, yeye wakaya kudi mulume wakadi muimane ne tumelo hehi ne mushimi wa mai." 
Genesis24:31 Yeye wakamba ne, Ubuele, wewe udi musankishibue kudi Yehowa, udi muimane ha bule bualu kai? Bualu bua nakumana kukulongoluela nsubu ne muaba wa tumelo tuebe." 
Genesis24:32 Mulume wakabuela mu nsubu, wakumusha biseba ha nyima ha tumelo, wakalua ne mashinde ne manvua bia tumelo, ne mai a kuvuwa nʼau makasa andi ne makasa a bantu bakadi nʼandi." 
Genesis24:33 Bakateka bintu bia kudia ku mpala kuandi, kadi yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena ndia diambedi tshiyi muanze kunuambila bualu bunakuluila Labana wakamuambila ne, Ambaku." 
Genesis24:34 Yeye wakamba ne, Ndi bianyi muhika wa Abalahama." 
Genesis24:35 Yehowa wakatamba kusankisha mukelenge wanyi, yeye wakulua muntu munene, wakumuka bisumbu bia mikoko ne bia ngombe, ne argent ne or, ne bahika balume ne bahika bakashi, ne tumelo ne nyama ya mpunda." 
Genesis24:36 Sala, mukashi wa mukelenge wanyi, wakamulelela muana mulume hakadiye muntu mununu, yeye wakadia muana eu bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi." 
Genesis24:37 Mukelenge wanyi wakuntshihisha ne, Kuangatshidi muanʼanyi mulume mukashi wa bana bakashi ba Bena Kanâna badi mu buloba bundi mushikame," 
Genesis24:38 kadi uye biebe ku nsubu wa tatuʼanyi ne kudi bana betu, wangatshileku muanʼanyi mulume mukashi" 
Genesis24:39 bakambila mukelenge wanyi ne, Ahu, biahidia mukashi kundonda." 
Genesis24:40 Yeye wakungambila ne, Yehowa, undi ngendakana ku mpala kuandi, neatume muanjelo wandi nʼebe, neakuendeshe dikasa dimpe, ne wewe newangatshile muanʼanyi mulume mukashi kudi bana betu ne kudi ba mu nsubu wa tatu wanyi" 
Genesis24:41 Hashishe, munda muebe nemuikale mutoke ku kuditshiha eku, hawaya kudi bana betu, biahidiabo kukuha mukashi, munda muebe nemuikale mutoke ku kuditshiha eku." 
Genesis24:42 Hanakufika lelu ku mushimi wa mai, nakuamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa mukelenge wanyi Abalahama, biwasua kungendesha dikasa dimpe mu nshila unaya," 
Genesis24:43 tangila, hantshidi muimane hehi ne mushimi wa mai, witabushe ne nsongakashi ulualua bua kusuneye mai undi ngambila ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne Umpeku tuima tua kunua mu mulondo webe," 
Genesis24:44 yeye neangandamune dî ne, Nua biebe, nennuishe tumelo biebe kabidi, ka yeye mene ikale mukashi wakasunguila Yehowa muana mulume wa mukelenge wanyi." 
Genesis24:45 Diambedi tshiyi muanze kushikisha kuamba mei au mu mutshima wanyi, Lebeka wakaluhuka ne mulondo wa mai ha diaha diandi, wakaya ku mushimi wa mai, wakasuna mai, meme nakamuambila ne, Umpeku mai a kunua." 
Genesis24:46 Yeye wakatula mulondo wandi lubilu ha diaha diandi, wakamba ne, Nua biebe, nensunyine tumelo biebe mai kabidi, nunku nakunua ne yeye wakumusha tumelo mai kabidi." 
Genesis24:47 Nakumuebesha ne, Wewe udi muana wa nganyi? Yeye wakungambila ne, Ndi muana wa Betuele, muana wa Naho, wakamulelela Mileka, nunku nakumuluatshisha kakanu ka ku diulu diandi ne nkanu ya ku maboko." 
Genesis24:48 Nakuinyika mutu wanyi, nakutendelela Yehowa, nakutumbisha Yehowa, Nzambi wa mukelenge wanyi Abalahama, wakandombola mua kuya mu nshila muakane bua kuangatshila muana mulume wa mukelenge wanyi mukashi kudi muana wa muanʼabo." 
Genesis24:49 Katataka binuasua kulesha mukelenge wanyi luse ne bulelela, nungambile, ne binuahidia, nungambile kabidi: nunku meme ndi mua kuya ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Genesis24:50 Labana ne Betuele bakamba ne, Bualu ebu buakufuma kudi Yehowa, tuetu katuena mua kukuambila dî dibi anyi dî dimpe." 
Genesis24:51 Tangila, Lebeka udi ku mpala kuebe, umuangate, uye nʼandi, yeye neikale mukashi wa muana mulume wa mukelenge webe bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Genesis24:52 Hakunvua muhika wa Abalahama mei abo, yeye wakakukuila mpala wandi hanshi ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Genesis24:53 Muhika wa Abalahama wakahatula bilenga bia argent ne bia or ne bilulu, Wakabikila kudi Lebeka, yeye wakaha muanʼabo mulume ne mamu wandi kabidi bintu bia mushinga mukole." 
Genesis24:54 Yeye ne balume bakadi nʼandi bakadia, bakanua, bakalala butuku abu, bakabika ne dinda, yeye wakabambila ne, Nuntume kudi mukelenge wanyi." 
Genesis24:55 Muanʼabo mulume ne mamu wa Lebeka bakamba ne, Nsongakashi anji kushala matuku makese, nansha dikumi, hashishe yeye neaye." 
Genesis24:56 Yeye wakabambila ne, Kanumpumbishi, bualu bua Yehowa wakungendesha dikasa dimpe, nuntume kudi mukelenge wanyi." 
Genesis24:57 Bobo bakamba ne, Netubikile nsongakashi, netumuebeshe yeye." 
Genesis24:58 Bakabikila Lebeka, bakamuebesha ne, Udi musue kuya ne muntu eu, anyi? Yeye wakabakudimuna ne, Nyaya" 
Genesis24:59 Nunku bakatuma muanʼabo Lebeka ne muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi ne muhika wa Abalahama ne bantu bandi. 
Genesis24:60 Bakavudishila Lebeka disanka, bakamuambila ne, Wewe muanʼetu mukashi, wikale nkambua mukashi wa binunu bia mbombo ya bantu, ne tunkanunuina tuebe tuhiane buloba bua bantu badi nʼatu lukuna." 
Genesis24:61 Lebeka wakabika ne bena mudimu bandi ba bakashi, bakabanda ha nyima ha tumelo, bakalonda muntu wa Abalahama, yeye wakangata Lebeka, wakaya mu nshila wandi." 
Genesis24:62 Isaka wakalua mu nshila wa ku Bê-laha-loi, bualu bua yeye wakadi ushikama ku buloba bua ku Sude." 
Genesis24:63 Isaka wakaya mu budimi dilolo bua kutendelela, wakabandisha mesu andi, ne monai, tumelo tuakadi tulua." 
Genesis24:64 Lebeka wakabandisha mesu andi kabidi ne hakatangileye Isaka, yeye wakatuluka ha nyima ha kamelo." 
Genesis24:65 Yeye wakakonka muhika ne, Eu mulume kai udi wendakana mu budimi bua kusambakana nʼetu? Muhika wakamukudimuna dî ne, Nyeye mukelenge wanyi Lebeka wakangata tshilulu tshikudika, wakatshiteka ku mishiku yandi." 
Genesis24:66 Muhika wakambila Isaka malu onso akenzeye. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka wakalua nʼandi mu ntenta wa mamu wandi, Sala, yeye wakangata Lebeka, wakalua mukashi wandi Isaka wakamunanga, ne mutshima wandi wakasambibua bua lufu lua mamu wandi." 
Genesis25:1 Abalahama wakabaka mukashi mukuabo dina diandi Ketula. 
Genesis25:2 Yeye wakamulelela Zimelana ne Yokeshana ne Medana ne Midiyana ne Yishebaka ne Shua. 
Genesis25:3 Yokeshana wakalela Sheba ne Dedana, bana balume ba Dedana bakadi Ashulima ne Letushima ne Leumima." 
Genesis25:4 Bana ba Midiyana bakadi Eha ne Ehê ne Hanoka ne Abida ne Eleda Bana aba bonso bakadi bana ba Ketula. 
Genesis25:5 Abalahama wakafua bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi kudi Isaka. 
Genesis25:6 Abalahama wakaha bana ba bakashi bandi bakuabo matabisha, wakabumusha kudi Isaka hakadiye ne muoyo, wakabatuma ku luseke lua ku esete." 
Genesis25:7 Â adi matuku a bidimu bia Abalahama, biakadi lukama ne makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu." 
Genesis25:8 Abalahama wakahuola muoyo wandi, wakafua mununu, bidimu biandi biakakumbana bia bungi, ne yeye wakadisangisha ne bankambua bandi." 
Genesis25:9 Bana bandi balume, Isaka ne Yishemaele, bakamujika mu lubuebue lua Makepela mu budimi bua Efelona, muana wa Soha, Muena Hiti, ku mpala kua Mamale," 
Genesis25:10 budimi buakasumba Abalahama kudi bana ba Hete, bakajikamu Abalahama ne Sala, mukashi wandi." 
Genesis25:11 Ku nyima kua lufu lua Abalahama Nzambi wakasankisha Isaka muanʼandi, ne Isaka wakashikama mu Be-laha-loi." 
Genesis25:12 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya bana ba Yishemaele, muana wa Abalahama wakamulelela Haga, Muena Ejipitu, muena mudimu wa bakashi wa Sala:" 
Genesis25:13 au mmena a bana ba Yishemaele ku bikondo biabo muaba bute wa Yishemaele Nebayota, ne Kedâ ne Adebele ne Mibesama," 
Genesis25:14 Mishema ne Duma ne Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadada ne Tema ne Yetû ne Nafisha ne Kedema. 
Genesis25:16 Abambana balume ba Yishemaele ku mena abo ne misoko yabo ne ku meku abo, baminyampala dikumi ne babidi ku bisamba biabo." 
Genesis25:17 Ebi mbidimu bia muoyo wa Yishemaele, biakadi lukama ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete, yeye waka huola muoyo wandi, wakafua, wakadisangisha ne bankambua bandi." 
Genesis25:18 Bana bandi bakadi ne mukalu wabo ku Hawila to ne ku Shû, ku mpala kua Ejipitu mu nshila wa ku Ashû, bakashikama batangilangane ne bana babo bonso." 
Genesis25:19 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya Isaka, muana wa Abalahama, Abalahama wakalela Isaka," 
Genesis25:20 hakadi Isaka ne bidimu makumi anai, yeye wakabaka Lebeka, muana mukashi wa Betuele, muena Alama wa ku Padana-alama, muanʼabo ne Labana." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka wakalombela mukashi wa ndi Yehowa, bualu bua yeye wakadi nkumba, Yehowa wakamunvuila ne Lebeka wakimita difu." 
Genesis25:22 Bana bakadi baluangana munda muandi, yeye wakamba ne, Bikala bualu nunku, ndi mushale ne muoyo bua tshinyi? Yeye wakaya bua kuebesha Yehowa." 
Genesis25:23 Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Bisamba bibidi bidi munda muebe, bisamba bibidi bia bantu nebiluhuke munda muebe tshisamba tshimue netshitambe tshisamba tshikuabo bukole, ne mukulu neakuatshile muakunyʼandi mudimu." 
Genesis25:24 Hakakumbana matuku andi, monai, bana ba makasa bakadi munda muandi." 
Genesis25:25 Wa kumudilu wakahatuka wakadi mukunze-kunzû, wakadi ne miosa ya bungi hamʼbidi handi, bakamuidika dina ne, Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Ku nyima muakunyʼandi wakahatuka ne tshianza tshiandi tshikuata ku tshikankanyi tshia Esau Bakamuidika dina ne, Yakoba Isaka wakadi ne bidimu makumi asambombo hakamuleleleye bana." 
Genesis25:27 Bana aba bakadiunda, Esau wakadi tshilembi tshidi ne budimu bua bungi, Yakoba wakadi biandi munda mukole, wakashikama mu ntenta." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka wakasua Esau bualu bua yeye wakamudisha munyinyi wa ntole, Lebeka wakasua Yakoba." 
Genesis25:29 Yakoba wakalamba bintu bia kudia, Esau wakahingana mu tshisuku, wakadi muhungila." 
Genesis25:30 Esau wakambila Yakoba ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Undisheku bintu bikunze biudi mulambe bualu bua meme ndi muhungila. Bua bualu ebu bakamuidika dina ne, Edome." 
Genesis25:31 Yakoba wakamba ne, Anji kunsumbisha bintu bia buanʼa bute diambedi." 
Genesis25:32 Esau wakamba ne, Abu akadi ha kufua, ne bintu bia buanʼa bute nebinsankishe kudi kunyi?" 
Genesis25:33 Yakoba wakamba ne, Anji kuditshiha kundi diambedi. Yeye wakaditshiha kudiye, wakahana bintu bia buanʼa bute kudi Yakoba." 
Genesis25:34 Nunku Yakoba wakaha Esau bidia ne tshiteku, yeye wakadia, wakanua, wakabika, wakaya, nunku Esau wakahatula bintu bia buanʼa bute." 
Genesis26:1 Tshiole tshiakadi mu buloba ku nyima kua tshiole tshia diambedi tshiakadiku mu matuku a Abalahama Isaka wakaya kudi Abimeleke, mukelenge wa Bena Peleshete, mu Gelâ." 
Genesis26:2 Yehowa wakamueneka kudiye, wakamba ne, Kuyi mu Ejipitu, ushikame mu buloba bundi nkuambila." 
Genesis26:3 Ushale mu buloba ebu, nengikale bebe, nenkusankishe, bualu bua nenkuhe wewe ne tunkanunuma diebe buloba ebu buonso, nenjadike nʼebe tshihungidi tshinakahunga ne Abalahama, tatuʼebe." 
Genesis26:4 Nenvudishangane tunkanunuina tuebe bungi bu mitoto ya mulu, nempe tunkanunui na tuebe buloba ebu buonso bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisankishibue bua tunkanunuina tuebe." 
Genesis26:5 Bualu bua Abalahama wakitabusha dî dianyi, wakanemekela kudimusha kuanyi, ne mikenji ne mikandu yanyi ne mei anyi." 
Genesis26:6 Isaka wakashikama mu Gelâ. 
Genesis26:7 Bena musoko bakamukonka bua mukashi wandi, ne yeye wakabambila ne, Yeye udi muanʼetu wa bakashi Bualu bua yeye wakatshina mua kuamba ne, Yeye udi mukashi wanyi, bua bena musoko kabamushihi bua Lebeka, bualu bua yeye wakadi miumpe kumona." 
Genesis26:8 Hakashikameye mu musoko au musangu mule, dituku dikuabo Abimeleke, mukelenge wa Bena Peleshete, wakatangila ha disoso dia mu nsubu wandi, wakamona ne, Isaka wakadi usaba ne Lebeka, mukashi wandi." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleke Wakabikila Isaka, wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, yeye udi mukashi webe, bualu kai wewe wakuamba ne, Yeye udi muanʼetu wa bakashi? Isaka wakamuambila ne, Nakatshina ne, Nebanshihe bua bualu buandi." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleke wakamuebesha ne, Bualu buwakutuenzela budi tshinyi? Bikala muena musoko mulale ne mukashi webe, wewe wakadi kutuvuisha mu mulau." 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleke wakadimusha bantu bandi bonso ne, Bialenga muntu mulume eu anyi mukashi wandi tshianza, nebamushihe." 
Genesis26:12 Isaka wakakuna bintu mu buloba abu, ne tshidimu atshi wakahuola lukama lukama, Yehowa wakamusankisha." 
Genesis26:13 Yeye wakalua muntu munene be, wakatamba kudiunda bunene," 
Genesis26:14 wakadi ne bisumbu bia mikoko ne bia ngombe ne bantu ba bungi ku nyima kuandi. Bena Peleshete bakadi nʼandi mukau. 
Genesis26:15 Mena onso a mai akimbabo kudi bahika ba Abalahama, tatu wandi, Bena Peleshete bakajibikila, bakelamu buloba." 
Genesis26:16 Abimeleke wakambila Isaka ne, Umuka kutudi, bualu bua wewe udi ututamba bukole." 
Genesis26:17 Isaka wakumukaku, wakashimika ntenta yandi mu tshibanda tshia Gelâ, wakashikamamu." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka wakumbula kabidi mena a mai akimbabo mu matuku a tatu wandi Abalahama, bualu bua Bena Peleshete bakelamu buloba bakafua Abalahama, Isaka wakayidika mena akidika Abalahama." 
Genesis26:19 Bantu ba Isaka bakimba dina mu tshibanda, bakasanganamu mushimi wa mai." 
Genesis26:20 Balami ba bimuna bia Bena Gelâ bakatandangana ne balami ba bimuna bia Isaka, bakamba ne, Dina dia mai edi ndietu. Wakidika dina dia mai ne, Eseke; bualu bua bobo bakatandangana nʼandi." 
Genesis26:21 Bakimba dina dia mai dikuabo, bakaditandila kabidi. Wakadidika ne, Sitena." 
Genesis26:22 Wakumukaku, wakimba dina dia mai dikuabo, kabakaditandila, yeye wakadidika ne, Lehobota. Yeye wakamba ne, Katataka Yehowa wakutuenzela muaba, netukumbane mu buloba." 
Genesis26:23 Wakumukaku, wakaya ku Bê-sheba" 
Genesis26:24 Yehowa wakamueneka kudiye butuku abu mene, wakamba ne, Ndi Nzambi wa tatu webe Abalahama, kutshinyi, bualu bua meme ndi nʼebe, nenkusankishe, nenkumbashile tunkanunuina tuebe bualu bua muntu wanyi Abalahama." 
Genesis26:25 Yeye wakenzaku tshitendelelu, Wakabikila dina dia Yehowa, waka shimikaku ntenta yandi, ne bahika ba Isaka bakimbaku dina dia mai." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleke ne Ahuzata, muanda wandi, ne Pikola, kamanda ka masalayi andi, bakumuka ku Gelâ, bakaya kudiye." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka wakabambila ne, Nudi nʼanyi lukuna, nuakungihata munkatshi muenu, nunku nuakuluila kundi bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis26:28 Bobo bakamba ne, Bulelela, tuakutangila ne Yehowa udi nʼebe, nunku tuakuambilangana ne, Tutshihangane nʼebe, tuhunge nʼebe tshihungidi," 
Genesis26:29 bua wewe kutuenzedi bualu bubi, bu mutuakadi katuyi tukulenga tshianza, tuakukuenzela anu malu mimpe; tua-kukumusha talalâ, ne katataka wewe udi musankishibue kudi Yehowa." 
Genesis26:30 Yeye wakabalambishila bidia bia disanka, bakadia, bakanua." 
Genesis26:31 Bakabika ne dinda, bakahingana, Isaka wakabatuma kuabo, bakaya talala." 
Genesis26:32 Ku dituku adi mene bahika ba Isaka bakalua kudiye, bakamuambila bua dina dia mai diakimbabo ne, Tuakusangana mai." 
Genesis26:33 Yeye wakadidika ne, Shiba, nunku badi babikila dina dia musoko au ne, Be-sheba to ne ku dituku edi." 
Genesis26:34 Hakadi Esau ne bidimu makumi anai, wakangata Yudita, muana mukashi wa Bêli, Muena Hiti, ne Basemata, muana mukashi wa Elone, Muena Hiti, bu bakashi bandi." 
Genesis26:35 Bobo bakanyingalasha mutshima wa Isaka ne wa Lebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Dituku dikuabo hakadi Isaka muntu mununu ne mesu andi akadi bileshileshi, kakamanya mua kutangila bimpe, yeye Wakabikila Esau muanʼandi, muanʼa bute, wa kamuambila ne, Muan anyi Yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku." 
Genesis27:2 Yeye wa kamba ne, Tangila, ndi muntu mununu, tshiena mumanye dituku dia lufu luanyi." 
Genesis27:3 Ndi nkutendekena ne, Wangata bintu biebe bia bule mbi, mukulu wa mikete ne buta buebe, uye mu tshisuku, unkebele ntole" 
Genesis27:4 undambile munyinyi wa dihembu undi musue Ulue nʼau kundi, nengudie, bua mutshima wanyi ukuvudishile disanka diambedi tshiyi muanze kufua." 
Genesis27:5 Lebeka wakunvua bakambila Isaka Esau muanʼandi mei au Esau wakaya mu budimi bua kukebeye ntole, ne bua kuhinganeye nʼandi." 
Genesis27:6 Lebeka wakambila Ya koba muanʼandi ne, Tangila, nakunvua tatuʼebe wambila Esau, mukuluʼebe ne," 
Genesis27:7 Ulue kundi ne munyinyi wa ntole, undambile munyinyi muimpe wa dihembu, bua meme ngudie, nkuvudishile disanka ku mpala kua Yehowa diambedi tshiyi muanze kufua." 
Genesis27:8 Nunku muanʼanyi, utumikile dî dindi nkua mbila." 
Genesis27:9 Ya biebe ku tshisumbu tshia mbushi, Ulue kundi ne nku ngulu ya mbushi ibidi idi mimpe, nendambile tatu webe munyinyi muimpe wa dihembu udiye musue." 
Genesis27:10 Wewe neulue nʼau kudi tatu webe, yeye audie, akuvudishile disanka diambedi yeye kayi muanze kufua." 
Genesis27:11 Yakoba wakambila Lebeka mamuʼandi ne, Tangila, Esau, mukuluʼanyi udi ne miosa ya bungi hamʼbidi bandi kadi meme ndi ne mubidi mutuhu." 
Genesis27:12 Bumue tatuʼanyi neandengele tshianza, ne meme nengikale bu muena mashimi ku mesu kuandi nendieleshe mulau, tshidivuishi disanka." 
Genesis27:13 Mamuʼa ndi wakamuambila ne, Mulau webe wikale ha mutu hanyi, muanʼanyi, anji kutumikila di dianyi, Ulue ne nkungulu ya mbushi." 
Genesis27:14 Yeye wakaya, wakalua nʼai kudi mamuʼandi, ne mamuʼandi wakalamba munyinyi muimpe wa dihembu bu muakasua tatuʼandi." 
Genesis27:15 Lebeka wakangata bilulu bimpe bia Esau, muanʼandi muanʼa bute, biakadiye nʼabi mu nsubu, wakabiluatshisha Yakoba, muanʼandi muanʼa mukala," 
Genesis27:16 wakamuluatshisha biseba bia nkungulu ya mbushi ha bianza ne ha dikoshi. 
Genesis27:17 Yeye wakateka munyinyi muimpe ne bidia biakalambeye mu bianza bia Yakoba muan andi. 
Genesis27:18 Yeye wakaya kudi tatu andi, wakamba ne, Tatu anyi, ne yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Ndiku wewe udi nganyi, muan anyi?" 
Genesis27:19 Yakoba wakambila tatuʼandi ne, Ndi bianyi Esau, muan ebe muanʼa bute, nakuenza bu mu dî diebe, ndi nkutendekena ne, Bika biebe, ushikame, udie munyinyi wanyi wa ntole, bua mutshima webe unvudishile disanka." 
Genesis27:20 Isaka wakebesha muanʼandi ne, Muanʼanyi, wakamona ntole lubilu nunku munyi? Yeye wakamuambila ne, Bualu bua Yehowa Nzambi webe wakungendesha dikasa dimpe." 
Genesis27:21 Isaka wakambila Yakoba ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Lua ha buihi, nenkulengele tshianza tshianyi, muanʼanyi, nemmanye ne, Wewe udi muanʼanyi Esau bulelela." 
Genesis27:22 Yakoba wakasemena ha buihi ne Isaka tatuʼandi, yeye wakamulengela tshianza tshiandi, wakamba ne, Dî ndia Yakoba kadi bianza mbia Esau." 
Genesis27:23 Yeye kakamujingulula bimpe bualu bua bianza biandi biakadi ne miosa bu bianza bia muanʼabo Esau, nunku yeye waka-muvudishila disanka." 
Genesis27:24 Isaka wakamuebesha ne, Wewe udi muanʼanyi Esau bulelela, anyi? Yeye wakamba ne, E." 
Genesis27:25 Yeye wakamba ne Lua nʼau kundi nendie munyinyi wa ntole wa muanʼanyi bua mutshima wanyi ukuvudishile disanka. Yeye wakalua nʼau kudiye, yeye wakadia, wakalua kudiye ne nvinyo, yeye wakanua." 
Genesis27:26 Tatu wandi Isaka wakamuambila ne, Semena ha buihi, muanʼanyi, utuangane nʼanyi mishiku." 
Genesis27:27 Yeye wakasemena ha buihi, wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku, yeye wakanunkila muhuya wa bilulu biandi, wakamuvudishila disanka ne, Tangila, muhuya wa muanʼanyi udi bu muhuya wa budimi buakasankishibua kudi Yehowa," 
Genesis27:28 nunku Nzambi akumatshishile dibungi dia mu diulu akuhe buloba butu bukuatshike bintu bia bungi, ne manvua ne nvinyo muhiamuhia bia bungi," 
Genesis27:29 bantu bakukuatshile mudimu, ne bisamba bia bantu bitue mpala hanshi ku mesu kuebe wikale mukelenge wa bana benu, bana ba mamu webe batue mpala hanshi ku mesu kuebe, muntu yonso udi ukuela mulau neadiele mulau muntu yonso udi ukuvudishila disanka, adivudishile disa nka." 
Genesis27:30 Hakashikisha Isaka kusankisha Yakoba ne Yakoba mumuke anu tshituha ku mesu kua tatu wandi Isaka, Esau mukulu andi wakahingana kuakadiye muye bua kumukebela nyama." 
Genesis27:31 Yeye wakalamba munyinyi muimpe wa dihembu kabidi, wakalua nʼau kudi tatuʼandi, yeye wakambila tatuʼandi ne Tatu anyi abike biandi adie munyinyi wa ntole wa muanʼandi, bua mutshi ma webe unvudishile disanka." 
Genesis27:32 Isaka tatu andi wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi nganyi? Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Ndi muan ebe, muan a bute Esau." 
Genesis27:33 Isaka wakatamba kuhampakana, wakamba ne, Muntu kai wakangata munyinyi wa ntole, wakulua nʼau kundi, ne nakudia diambedi wewe kuyi muanji kulua, ne nakamuvudishila disanka? Yeye neikale ne disanka bulelela" 
Genesis27:34 Ha kunvua Esau mei a tatu andi waka dila muadi bikole ne mutshima wandi munyingalala, wakambila tatu andi ne, Unsankishe meme kabidi, tatuʼanyi." 
Genesis27:35 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Muakunyʼebe wakulua ne bu dimu wakumana kuangata disanka diebe." 
Genesis27:36 Yeye wakamba ne, Dina dia Yakoba kadiena dimukumbane, anyi? Bualu bua yeye wakandinga misangu ibidi wakamana kuangata bintu bianyi bia buanʼa bute, ne lelu wakangata disanka dianyi kabidi. Yeye wakebesha Isaka ne, Wewe kuakunshilaku disanka, anyi?" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka wakambila Esau ne, Mona, nakumana kumuvuisha mukelenge, webe nakufila bana benu bonso kudiye bu bahika bandi nakumujadika ne manvua ne nvinyo muhiamuhia nenkuenzele wewe tshinyi, muan anyi?" 
Genesis27:38 Esau wakambila tatu andi ne, Wewe udi ne disanka anu dimue, anyi? Unvudishile meme kabidi disanka tatuʼanyi Esau wa kabandisha di diandi wakadila" 
Genesis27:39 Isaka tatu andi wakamuambila ne, Wewe neushikame mu buloba budi bukuatshika bintu bimpe, ne dibungi dia mu diulu nedikumatshile," 
Genesis27:40 wewe newikale ne muoyo bualu bua muele webe wa nvita wewe neukuatshile muakunyʼebe mudimu hawahanduka wewe neumushe mutshi wandi wa tshikokedi ku nshingu kuebe. 
Genesis27:41 Esau wakadi ne Yakoba lukuna bualu bua disanka diakamusankisha nʼadi tatu andi Esau wakamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Hashika matuku a madilu a tatu anyi, hashishe, nenshihe muakunyʼanyi Yakoba." 
Genesis27:42 Bakambila Lebeka mei a Esau, muanʼandi muan a bute yeye Wakabikila Yakoba muanʼandi muan a mukala, wakamuambila ne Esau mukulu ebe udi welangana meji a kukushiha bua kutokesheye munda muandi." 
Genesis27:43 Nunku muanʼanyi witabusha di dianyi, bika biebe, unyemene kudi Labana muan etu wa balume, udi mu Halana," 
Genesis27:44 ushale nʼandi matuku makese to ne hashika lukuna lua mukuluʼebe ludiye nʼalu kudi. 
Genesis27:45 To ne hashika tshiji tshia muan enu kudi, ne hahueye bualu buwakamuenzela muoyo, hashishe nenkutumine di nenkubikile, nennujimishile bubidi buenu dituku dimue bualu kai?" 
Genesis27:46 Lebeka wakambila Isaka ne, Bana bakashi ba Bena Hete badi batondesha muoyo wanyi, biabaka Yakoba mukashi wa bana bakashi ba Bena Hete bu bana bakashi badi mu buloba ebu, muoyo wanyi newikale ne mushinga kai kundi?" 
Genesis28:1 Isaka Wakabikila Yakoba wakamuvudishila disanka wakamudimusha ne, Kubaki mukashi wa bana bakashi ba Bena Kanana." 
Genesis28:2 Bika biebe, va ku Padana-alama ku nsubu wa Betuele tatu wa ma mu ebe wangataku mukashi wa bana bakashi ba Labana, muan abo wa balume ne mamuʼebe." 
Genesis28:3 Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso akusankishe akukumbashe, akuvuishe bana ba bungi bua wewe ulue tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu," 
Genesis28:4 akuhe wewe ne tunkanunuina tuebe disanka dia Abalahama, bua wewe kuhiana buloba buakalaya Nzambi Abalahama." 
Genesis28:5 Isaka wakatuma Yakoba yeye wakaya ku Padana-alama kudi Labana muana wa Betuele, Muena Alama muanʼabo wa balume ne Lebeka, mamu wa Yakoba ne Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Esau wakamona hakasankisha Isaka Yakoba ne hakamutumeye ku Padana-alama bua kuangateye mu kashi kuakua, ne bu muakamuvudishila Isaka disanka ne muakamudimusheye ne, Kudiangatshidi mu kashi wa bana ba bakashi ba Bena Kanana" 
Genesis28:7 ne bu muakatumikila Yakoba di dia tatu wandi ne mamu wandi ne bû muakayeye ku Padana-alama. 
Genesis28:8 Hakatangila Esau ne bana bakashi ba Bena Kanana kabakasankisha mutshima wa Isaka tatu andi," 
Genesis28:9 Esau wakaya kudi Yishemaele, wakangata Mahalata muana mukashi wa Yishemaele muana wa Abalahama, wakadi muanʼabo wa bakashi ne Nebayota bu mukashi wandi, ha mutu ha bakashi bakadiye nʼabo." 
Genesis28:10 Yakoba wakabika ku Be-sheba wakaya mu nshila wa ku Halana 
Genesis28:11 Hakafikeye ku muaba mukuabo yeye wakalalaku butuku abu, bualu bua diba diakamana kubuela, yeye wakangata dibue diakadi ku muaba au, wakasamahu mutu wandi, waka lala tulu." 
Genesis28:12 Yeye wakalota tshiota, wakamona tshibandilu tshi shimika hanshi ne mutu watshi wakateka to ne mu diulu ne mona banjelo ba Nzambi bakadi babandahu, bahuekahu:" 
Genesis28:13 Wakamona ne Yehowa wakadi muimane ku mutu watshi, wamba ne Ndi bianyi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Abalahama, kaku webe ne Nzambi wa Isaka buloba budi ulalahu nenkuhebu wewe ne tunkanunuina tuebe." 
Genesis28:14 Tunkanunuina tuebe netuikale bu dinfuenkenya dia buloba netumuangalale ku wesete ne ku esete ne ku nôde ne ku sude bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisanke bualu buebe ne bua tunkanunuina tuebe. 
Genesis28:15 Mona, meme ndi nʼebe, nenkulame kuonso kuwaya nenkuhingashe ku buloba ebu kabidi, tshiena nkulekela tô ne hanashikisha kukuenzela malu onso anakukuambila." 
Genesis28:16 Yakoba wakatabala ku tulu tuandi, wakamba ne Bulelela, Yehowa udi kunoko ne meme tshiakamanva bualu ebu." 
Genesis28:17 Yeye wakatshina, wakamba ne Muaba eu ngua bualu bukole udi nsubu wa Nzambi ne bu mushiku wa diulu." 
Genesis28:18 Yakoba wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakangata dibue diakadive musamehu mutu, wakadimanyika bu tshibumba wakela manyi ha mutu hadi." 
Genesis28:19 Wakidika dina dia muaba eu ne Betele kadi diambedi dina dia musoko diakadi Luze. 
Genesis28:20 Yakoba wakaditshiha ne Bikala Nzambi nʼanyi, biandameye bimpe mu nshila mundi nya ne biampeye bintu bia kudia ne bia kuluata," 
Genesis28:21 bua meme kuhingana kabidi ku nsubu wa tatu wanyi talala, hashishe Yehowa neikale Nzambi wanyi," 
Genesis28:22 ne dibue edi dinakuimanyika nebikale bu nsubu wa Nzambi ne bintu bionso biwampa nempingashe tshia dikumi kudi bulelela. 
Genesis29:1 Yakoba wakaya ku luendu luandi wakateka ku buloba bua bantu ba ku esete. 
Genesis29:2 Wakabandisha mesu andi, wakamona dina dia mai mu budimi ne bisumbu bia mikoko bisatu biakadi bilalaku, bualu bua bakadi banuishaku mikoko, ne dibue dinene diakadi ku mushiku wa dina dia mai." 
Genesis29:3 Bakadi basangisha bisumbu bia mikoko bionso kunoko, bakumusha dibue diakadi ku mushiku wa dina, bakanuisha mikoko mai, bakahingasha dibue dia ku mushiku wa ku muaba wadi." 
Genesis29:4 Yakoba wakabebesha ne Bakuetu, nuakufuma kudi kunyi? Bakamukudimuna di ne, Tudi ba ku Halana." 
Genesis29:5 Yeye wakabebesha kabidi ne, Nudi bamanye Labana, muana wa Naho, anyi? Bakamukudimuna ne, Tudi bamumanye." 
Genesis29:6 Yeye wakabebesha ne, Yeye udi ne bukole, anyi? Bobo bakamuitaba ne, E, yeye udi ne bukole, ne tangila, muanʼandi wa bakashi, Lakele, ulualua ne mikoko." 
Genesis29:7 Yeye wakamba ne Monai, diba ditshidi mulu, kandiba dia kusangisha bimuna nansha, nuishai mikoko mai, yai bienu nuyidishe." 
Genesis29:8 Bakamukudi muna di ne, Nansha, katuena bamanye mua kuenza nunku, anu hatuasangisha mikoko yonso ne humushabo dibue ku mushiku wa dina, hashishe netunuishe mikoko mai." 
Genesis29:9 Hakadiye uyikila nʼabo, Lakele wakalua ne mikoko ya tatu andi, bualu bua yeye wakadi muyilame." 
Genesis29:10 Hakatangila Yakoba Lakele, muana wa Labana, muanʼabo wa balume ne mamu andi, ne mikoko ya Labana muanʼabo wa balume ne mamu andi, Yakoba wakasemena ha buihi, wakumusha dibue diakadi ku mushiku wa dina, wakanuisha mikoko ya Labana, muan abo wa balume ne mamuʼandi." 
Genesis29:11 Yakoba wakatuangana ne Lakele mishiku wakabandisha di diandi, wakadia." 
Genesis29:12 Yakoba wakambila Lakele ne, Ndi muan abo ne tatu ebe, ndi muana wa Lebeka, Lakele wakaya lubilu, wakamanyisha tatu andi." 
Genesis29:13 Hakunvua Labana lumu lua Yakoba muana wa muan abo mukashi, yeye wakaya lubilu bua kumuakidila, wakamuhukila, wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku, wakalua nʼandi ku nsubu wandi Yeye wakambila Labana malu onso" 
Genesis29:14 Labana wakamuambila ne Bulelela, wewe udi mufuba wanyi ne musunyi wanyi Yeye wakashala nʼandi to ngondo mujima." 
Genesis29:15 Labana wakambila Yakoba ne, Bualu bua wewe udi muanʼetu wa balume, bidi bimpe wewe unkuatshile mudimu tshianana, anyi? Ungambile, difutu diebe nedikale tshinyi?" 
Genesis29:16 Labana wakadi ne bana bakashi babidi dina dia muan a bute diakadi Lea, ne dina dia mukunyʼandi diakadi Lakele." 
Genesis29:17 Lea wakadi ne mesu a bulengu, kadi Lakele wakadi muimpe mubidi ne mpala wandi." 
Genesis29:18 Yakoba wakananga Lakele, yeye wakambila Labana ne, Nenkukuatshile mudimu bidimu muanda mutekete bualu bua muanʼebe muana wa bakashi muanʼa mukala" 
Genesis29:19 Labana wakamuambila ne, Bualu bua meme kumufila kudi budi butamba bua meme kumufila kudi mulume mukuabo ushale nʼanyi." 
Genesis29:20 Yakoba wakamukuatshila mudimu to bidimu muanda mutekete bualu bua Lakele, ne bidimu ebi biakadi bu anu matuku makese bualu bua dinanga diakamunangeye nʼadi." 
Genesis29:21 Yakoba wakambila Labana ne, Umpe mukashi wanyi, bualu bua matuku anyi akukumbana bua meme kuikala nʼandi." 
Genesis29:22 Labana wakasangisha bantu bonso bakadiye nʼabo, wakabalambishila bidia bia dibanji." 
Genesis29:23 Hakila butuku yeye wakangata Lea, muanʼandi wa bakashi, wakamufila kudiye, ne yeye wakabuela nʼandi mu nsubu." 
Genesis29:24 Labana wakafua Zilepa, muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi, kudi Lea muanʼandi wa bakashi bu muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi." 
Genesis29:25 Hakatshia butuku Yakoba wakamona ne Lea wakambila Labana ne, Bualu ebu buwakungenzela budi munyi? Tshiakukukuatshila mudimu bualu bua Lakele, anyi? Wakundinga nunku bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis29:26 Labana wakamuambila ne, Kabena benza nunku mu buloba buetu, katuena tufila muanʼa mukala ku dibaka diambedi mukuluʼandi kayi muanze kuya." 
Genesis29:27 Ushikishe lumingu lua muana eu, hashishe, netukuhe muana mukuabo kabidi biwankuatshila mudimu bidimu muanda mutekete bikuabo." 
Genesis29:28 Yakoba Wakenza nunku, wakashikisha lumingu luandi, ne yeye wakamuha Lakele bu mukashi wandi" 
Genesis29:29 Labana wakafua Bileha, muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi, kudi Lakele bu muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi." 
Genesis29:30 Yeye wakaya kudi Lakele kabidi, wakatamba kunanga Lakele ku mpala kua Lea, yeye wakakuatshila Labana mudimu bidimu muanda mutekete bakuabo." 
Genesis29:31 Hakatangila Yehowa ne Lea wakadi mubengibue, yeye wakamulelesha bana, kadi Lakele wakadi nkumba." 
Genesis29:32 Lea wakimita difu, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Lubena, bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa wakatangila dikenga dianyi, ne katataka bayanyi neansue." 
Genesis29:33 Wakimita difu dikuabo, wakalela muana wa balume, yeye wakamba ne Bualu bua Yehowa wakumpa ne meme ndi mubengibue, nunku yeye wakumpa muana eu mukuabo, wakamuidika dina ne, Shimeona." 
Genesis29:34 Wakimita difu dikuabo, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamba ne, Katataka bayanyi neandamate bualu bua nakumulelela bana ba balume basatu, nunku wakadika dina diandi ne, Lewi." 
Genesis29:35 Wakimita difu dikuabo, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamba ne, Katataka nentumbishe Yehowa, nunku wakidika dina diandi ne, Yuda, ne yeye wakalekela kulela." 
Genesis30:1 Hakatangila Lakele ne, Tshiena ndelela Yakoba bana, hashishe Lakele wakadi ne mukuluʼandi mukau, wakambila Yakoba ne, Umpe bana, anyi meme nenfue." 
Genesis30:2 Yakoba wakadi ne Lakele tshiji, wakakonka ne, Meme ndi bu Nzambi udi mujidike munda muebe ne, Kuledi, anyi?" 
Genesis30:3 Yeye wakamuambila ne Mona, Bileha, muena mudimu wanyi wa bakashi udiku, uye kudiye bua yeye andelele bana ha binu bianyi, ne bua meme ngikale ne bana kudiye." 
Genesis30:4 Yeye wakamuha Bileha, muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi, bu mukashi wandi, ne Yakoba wakaya kudiye." 
Genesis30:5 Bileha wakimita difu, wakalelela Yakoba muana wa balume." 
Genesis30:6 Lakele wakamba ne, Nzambi wakundumbuluila, wakunvua dî dianyi kabidi, wakumpa muana wa balume; nunku yeye wakamuidika dina ne, Dana." 
Genesis30:7 Bileha, muena mudimu wa Lakele, wakimita difu kabidi, wakalelela Yakoba muana wa balume mukuabo." 
Genesis30:8 Lakele wakamba ne, Nakasangana bibula bikole ne mukulu wanyi wa bakashi, nakumutamba bukole, wakamuidika dina ne, Nafatale." 
Genesis30:9 Hakatangila Lea ne, Tshiena ndela bana kabidi, yeye wakangata Zilepa, muena mudimu wandi wa bakashi, wakamufila kudi Yakoba bu mukashi wandi." 
Genesis30:10 Zilepa, muena mudimu wa Lea, wakalelela Yakoba muana wa balume." 
Genesis30:11 Lea wakamba ne, Dikasa dimpe! Nunku yeye wakamuidika dana ne, Gada." 
Genesis30:12 Zilepa, muena mudimu wa Lea, wakalelela Yakoba muana wa balume mukuabo" 
Genesis30:13 Lea wakamba ne, Ndi ne disanka, ne bakashi nebambikile ne, Muena disanka Wakamuidika dina ne, Ashe." 
Genesis30:14 Mu tshidimu tshia kuhuola blê, Lubena wakaya mu budimi, wakangula tumuma, wakalua nʼatu kudi mamuʼandi Lea Lakele wakambila Lea ne, Ndi nkutendekena ne, Umpeku tumuma tukuabo tua muanʼebe." 
Genesis30:15 Yeye wakamukudimuna dî ne, Bualu budi bukese bua wakuangata bayanyi, anyi? Udi musue kuangata tumuma tua muanʼanyi kabidi, anyi? Lakele wakamba ne, Biwampa tumuma tua muanʼebe, Yakoba nealale nʼebe butuku ebu." 
Genesis30:16 Yakoba wakahi ngana ku budimi dilolo ne Lea wakaya kumualamina, wakamua mbila ne, Bûdi nʼabu mbua kulua kundi, bualu bua nakakusumba ku tumuma tua muan anyi. Yeye wakalala nʼandi butuku abu." 
Genesis30:17 Nzambi wakunvua kulomba kua Lea, yeye wakimita difu, wakalelela Yakoba muana wa balume muitanu." 
Genesis30:18 Lea wakamba ne, Nzambi wakumpa difutu dianyi bualu bua meme nakafila muena mudimu wanyi wa bakashi kudi bayanyi, wakamuidika dina ne, Yisakâ." 
Genesis30:19 Lea wakimita difu kabidi, wakalelela Yakoba muana muisambombo." 
Genesis30:20 Lea wakamba ne, Nzambi wakumpa bintu bia bungi, katataka bayanyi neashale nʼanyi bualu bua meme nakamulelela bana ba balume basambombo, wakamuidika dina ne, Zebuluna." 
Genesis30:21 Ku nyima Lea wakalela muana wa bakashi wakamuidika dina ne, Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Nzambi wakavuluka Lakele, Nzambi wakamunvuala, wakajilula munda muandi." 
Genesis30:23 Yeye wakamita difu, wakalela muana wa balume, yeye wakamba ne, Nzambi wakungumushila bundu buanyi," 
Genesis30:24 wakamuidika dina ne, Yosefe, wamba ne, Yehowa ampe muana mukuabo." 
Genesis30:25 Hakalela Lakele Yosefe, Yakoba wakambila Labana ne, Untume ha bule, nye bianyi kuanyi, ku buloba buanyi." 
Genesis30:26 Umpe bakashi banyi ne bana banyi, banakakukuatshila mudimu, undekele, nenye, bualu bua wewe udi mumanye mudimu unakukuenzela." 
Genesis30:27 Labana wakamuambila ne Bingikala ne diakalengele ku mesu kuebe ushale biebe, bualu bua meme nakumana kujingulula ne, Yehowa wakunsankisha bua bualu buebe." 
Genesis30:28 Yeye wakamba ne, Ungambila difutu diebe, nenkufutedi." 
Genesis30:29 Yakoba wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi mumanye bu munakakukuatshila mudimu ne bu muakavulangana bimuna biebe binakadi nʼabi." 
Genesis30:30 Bualu bua wakadi ne anu bintu bikese tshiyi muanze kulua kunoko mpindiu biakuvulangana tshisumbu tshinene, Yehowa wakukusankisha wewe bua malu onso anakukuenzela, ne katataka meme nengenze mudimu tshikondo kai bua kukumbasha bia ba mu nsubu wanyi kabidi?" 
Genesis30:31 Yeye wakamukonka ne, Nenkuhe tshinyi? Yakoba wakamukudimuna ne, Kambualu bua kumpa tshintu nansha, biwitabusha bualu ebu, meme nendishe bimuna biebe, nembilame kabidi." 
Genesis30:32 Nengendakane munkatshi mua bimuna biebe lelu, nengumushe bionso bidi ne matoba, ne mikoko yonso idi mifike, ne mbushi yonso idi ne matoba, bintu ebi nebikale difutu dianyi." 
Genesis30:33 Mu matuku adi ku mpala, buimpe buanyi nebumbingishe hawalua bua kunkonka bua difutu dianyi didi kûdi, biwasangana mbushi udi kayi ne matoba, anyi mukoko udi kauyi mufike munkatshi mua bintu bianyi, nebikale bu tshintu tshiakuibabo." 
Genesis30:34 Labana wakamba ne, Bualu ebu nebuikale bu mu di diebe." 
Genesis30:35 Mu dituku adi Yakoba wakumusha mbushi ya bimpanga yakadi ne matoba, ne mashina a mbushi akadi ne matoba, ne mikoko yonso yakadi mifike, wakabika mu bianza bia bana bandi balume." 
Genesis30:36 Wakabituma luendu lua matuku asatu hankatshi ha Labana ne Yakoba, Yakoba wakadisha bimuna bikuabo bia Labana biakashala ku nyima." 
Genesis30:37 Yakoba wakangata mitshi mibishi ya peuplier ne ya amande ne ya platane, wakubula bihusu bibaka bitoke, wakamuenesha bibaka bitoke bia mitshi." 
Genesis30:38 Yeye wakateka mitshi yakubuleye bibaka bitoke mu luvu lua mai biakadi bimuna binuinamu mai, biakadi bimita mafu hakanuabi." 
Genesis30:39 Bimuna biakadi bimita mafu ku mpala kua mitshi ei biakalela bana bakadi ne matoba. 
Genesis30:40 Yakoba wakumusha bana ba mikoko, wakateka mesu abo kudi bimuna bia Labana biakadi ne matoba ne biakadi bifike, wakateka bimuna biandi ha buabi, kakabiteka hamue ne bimuna bia Labana." 
Genesis30:41 Hakimita bimuna bikole mafu, Yakoba wakateka mitshi ei ku mpala kuabi mu mai, bua bimuna bimite mafu ku mpala kua mitshi," 
Genesis30:42 kadi hakatshidi bimuna bitekete, yeye kakateka mitshi, nunku bimuna bitekete biakadi bia Labana ne bimuna bikole biakadi bia Yakoba." 
Genesis30:43 Yeye wakatamba kulua mubanji wakadi ne bisumbu bia bimuna ne bena mudimu ba bakashi ne bena mudimu ba balume, ne tumelo ne tubalu." 
Genesis31:1 Yakoba wakunvua mei a bana ba balume ba Labana bamba ne, Yakoba wakakongolola bintu bionso bia tatu wetu wakadiangatshila bubanji buakadi bua tatu wetu." 
Genesis31:2 Yakoba wakatangila mpala wa Labana, kakadi bu muvueye dia mbedi." 
Genesis31:3 Yehowa wakambila Yakoba ne, Uhingane ku buloba bua batatuʼebe, ne bua bana benu, nengikale nʼebe." 
Genesis31:4 Yakoba wakatuma di wakabikila Lakele ne Lea mu budimi buakadi bimuna biandi," 
Genesis31:5 wakabambila ne, Ndi ntangila ne mpala wa tatuʼenu kena bu muvueye diambedi kadi Nzambi wa tatu wanyi wakadi nʼanyi." 
Genesis31:6 Nudi bamanye ne nakukuatshila tatuʼenu mudimu ne bukole buanyi buonso 
Genesis31:7 Tatu wenu wakundinga, wakakudimuna difutu dianyi misangu dikumi, kadi Nzambi kakitabusha bua yeye kunkengesha." 
Genesis31:8 Hakambeve ne, Bimuna bionso bia matoba ndifutu diebe, hashishe, bimuna bionso biakalela bana bakadi ne matoba, hakambeye ne, Bimuna bionso bia mihola ndifutu diebe, hashishe, bimuna bionso biakalela bana bakadi ne mihola." 
Genesis31:9 Nunku Nzambi wakumusha bimuna bia tatu enu, wakubimpa." 
Genesis31:10 Hakalua tshikondo tshidi bimuna bimita mafu, nakabandisha mesu anyi mu tshiota, nakatangila ne mbushi ya bimpanga yakadi ne matoba yakaya kudi mashina a mbushi akadi ne mihola mihola ne matoba matoba." 
Genesis31:11 Muanjelo wa Nzambi wakungambila mu tshiota tshianyi ne, Yakoba, nakuitaba ne, Ndiku." 
Genesis31:12 Yeye wakungambila ne, Ubanduluke, utangile ne mbushi ya bimpanga yonso idi iya kudi mashina a mbushi idi ne mihola mihola ne matoba matoba bualu bua nakutangila malu onso akukuenzela Labana." 
Genesis31:13 Ndi Nzambi wa ku Betele kuwakela manyi ha mutu ha dibue, ne kuwakaditshihila kundi, bika biebe, umuka ku buloba ebu, uhingane ku buloba buakakulelabo." 
Genesis31:14 Lakele ne Lea bakamukonka ne, Tuetu tudi ne tshituha tshietu anyi buhianyi buetu mu nsubu wa tatuʼetu, anyi?" 
Genesis31:15 Tuetu tudi bu benyi ku mesu kua tatuʼetu nansha? Bualu bua yeye wakatuhana, wakatudila bintu bietu bionso." 
Genesis31:16 Bualu bua bintu bionso biakumusha Nzambi kudi tatuʼetu mbietu ne bia bana betu, nunku wenza malu onso akukuambila Nzambi." 
Genesis31:17 Hashishe Yakoba wakabika, wakateka bakashi bandi ne bana bandi ha nyima ha tumelo." 
Genesis31:18 Yeye wakasangisha bimuna biandi bionso ne bintu bionso biakangateye mu Padana-alama bua kuyeye kudi tatuʼandi Isaka mu buloba bua Kanana. 
Genesis31:19 Hakaya Labana bua kukoseye mikoko miosa, Lakele wakiba mpingu ya mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi." 
Genesis31:20 Yakoba wakanyema mu musokoko, Labana, Muena Alama, kakadi mumanye bualu, yeye kakamuambila ne, Nyaya." 
Genesis31:21 Yeye wakanyema ne bintu bionso biaka diye nʼabi, wakabika, wakasabuka musulu wa Pelata, wakabisha luendu bua kuya ku mukuna wa Gilada." 
Genesis31:22 Hakahita matuku asatu bakambila Labana ne, Yakoba wakunyema." 
Genesis31:23 Yeye wakangata bantu bandi, bakamulonda to luendu lua matuku muanda mutekete, bakamuhetela ku mukuna wa Gilada." 
Genesis31:24 Nzambi wakamueneka kudi La bana, Muena Alama, mu tshiota butuku, wakamuambila ne, Udimuke, kuambidi Yakoba nansha di dimpe nansha di dibi." 
Genesis31:25 Hakaheta Labana Yakoba, wakamusangana mumane kushimika ntenta yandi ku mukuna, Labana ne bantu bandi bakalala ku mukuna wa Gilada." 
Genesis31:26 Labana wakebesha Yakoba ne, Bualu ebu buwakungenzela budi tshinyi, wakunyema kundi mu musokoko, wakuya ne bana banyi bakashi bu bahika bakuata mu nvita, anyi?" 
Genesis31:27 Bualu kai wewe wakunyema mu musokoko kuakungambila, bua meme kukutuma ne disanka ne misambu ne biombelu?" 
Genesis31:28 Kuakuitabusha bua meme kusangana mishiku ne bana banyi ba balume ne bana banyi ba bakashi munyi? Wewe wakuenza bualu buhote. 
Genesis31:29 Meme ndi ne bukole bua kukukengesha nʼabu, kadi Nzambi wa tatuʼebe wakungambila butuku bua lelu ne, Udimuke, kuambidi Yakoba nansha dî dimpe nansha di dibi." 
Genesis31:30 Wewe wakusua kuhingana bualu bua mutshima webe wakadi ujinga ku nsubu wa tatu ebe, kadi wewe wakuiba mpingu yanyi bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis31:31 Yakoba wakambila Labana ne, Bualu bua nakatshina, nakelangana meji ne wewe neunyenge bana bebe ba bakashi ku bukole." 
Genesis31:32 Biwasangana mpingu yebe mu bianza bia muntu wanyi afue biandi, usungule bintu biebe bionso ku mpala kua bana betu, uye nʼabi Bualu bua Yakoba hakadi mumanye ne, Lakele wakayiba." 
Genesis31:33 Labana wakabuela mu ntenta wa Yakoba ne mu ntenta wa Lea ne mu ntenta ya bena mudimu babo ba bakashi, kakasangana mpingu. Wakaluhuka mu ntenta wa Lea, wakabuela mu ntenta wa Lakele" 
Genesis31:34 Kadi Lakele wakamana kumusha mpingu, wakayiteka muinshi mua biseba bia tumelo, wakashikama ha mutu hai Labana wakakeba ne bianza, kakayisangana." 
Genesis31:35 Lakele wakambila tatuʼandi ne, Mukelenge kanfuidi tshiji, bualu bua meme tshiena mbika ku mpala kuebe, bualu bua ndi mujingakana tshilele tshia bakashi tshidi nʼanyi. Yeye wakakebulula kakasangana mpingu." 
Genesis31:36 Yakoba wakadi ne tshiji, wakatanda ne Labana, wakebesha Labana ne, Dihanga bianyi didi hanyi, anyi bubi buanyi budi hanyi bua wakundonda lukasa nunku?" 
Genesis31:37 Wewe wakasasula bintu bianyi bionso, wakasanganamu tshintu tshiebe tshimue, anyi? Utshiteke ku mpala kua bantu banyi ne kua bantu bebe, bobo balumbulule tshilumbu tshietu." 
Genesis31:38 Nakuikala nʼebe to bidimu ebi makumi abidi, mashina a mikoko ne mashina a mbushi kakatula mafu nansha, ne meme tshiakudia mbushi yebe ya bimpanga." 
Genesis31:39 Wakahandibua kudi nyama mibi tshiakalua nʼau kûdi, meme nkayanyi nakaujimisha wakibabo nansha munya nansha butuku, wewe wakateka difutu edi hamʼbidi hanyi." 
Genesis31:40 Nakadi ne dikenga nunku, munya wakangosha, mashika akankuata butuku, tshitabala tshiakankuata." 
Genesis31:41 Nakadi mu nsubu webe nunku to bidimu makumi abidi, nakakukuatshila mudimu bidimu dikumi ne binai bua bana bebe ba bakashi babidi, ne bidimu bisambombo bua bimuna biebe, ne wewe wakakudimuna difutu dianyi misangu dikumi." 
Genesis31:42 Bu Nzambi wa tatuʼanyi, Nzambi wa Abalahama, ne ditshina dia Isaka kabiyi bikale nʼanyi, wewe wakadi kuntuma ne bianza bituhu bulelela Nzambi wakutangila dikenga dianyi ne mudimu wa bianza bianyi, ne yeye wakukubela butuku bua lelu." 
Genesis31:43 Labana wakambila Yakoba ne, Bana aba bakashi mbana banyi, bana bakalelabo mbana banyi, ne bimuna mbianyi, ne bintu bionso biudi nʼabi mbianyi, ne lelu ndi mua kuenzela bana banyi ba bakashi ne bana bakalelabo tshinyi?" 
Genesis31:44 Tuye nʼebe, tuhunge tshihungidi, wewe ne meme, tshihungidi etshi tshikale bu kuditshiha kua bualu munkatshi muetu." 
Genesis31:45 Yakoba wakangata dibue, wakadimanyika bu tshibumba." 
Genesis31:46 Yakoba wakambila bantu bandi ne, Sangishai mabue, bobo bakangata mabue, bakunguisha mushiki wa mabue, bakadia bidia kukala kua mushiki." 
Genesis31:47 Labana Wakabikila dina dia muaba au ne, Yegâsahaduta, kadi Yakoba wakaubikila ne, Galede." 
Genesis31:48 Labana wakamba ne Mushiki eu udi bu mutshihu wa bualu hankatshi hetu lelu Nunku bakabikila muaba au ne, Galede ne," 
Genesis31:49 Misepa, bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa atulame meme ne wewe, hatuamuangalaka muntu ne muntu." 
Genesis31:50 Biwakengesha bana banyi ba bakashi, anyi biwabaka bakashi bakuabo, kakuena mumanyi mukuabo hankatshi hetu, anu Nzambi udi mumanyi wa bualu buetu, meme ne wewe." 
Genesis31:51 Labana wakambila Yakoba ne, Tangila mushiki eu ne dibue edi binakuimanyika hankatshi hetu." 
Genesis31:52 Mushiki eu wikale mumanyi wa bualu ne dibue edi dikale mumanyi wa bualu, ne, Meme tshiena nsambuka mushiki eu bua kukuenzela bibi, ne wewe kuena usambuka mushiki eu ne dibue bua kungenzela bibi." 
Genesis31:53 Nzambi wa Abalahama, Nzambi wa Naho ne Nzambi wa tatu wabo ikale mulumbuluishi hankatshi hetu Yakoba wakaditshiha ku ditshina dia tatu wandi Isaka." 
Genesis31:54 Yakoba wakafua mulambu wa kuosha ba kalua ku mukuna, Wakabikila bantu bandi bua kudiabo bidia, bakadia bidia, bakalala ku mukuna butuku abu" 
Genesis31:55 Labana wakabika hatshiatshia, wakatuangana mishiku ne bana bandi ba balume ne bana bandi ba bakashi, wakabavudishila disanka Labana wakahingana ku muaba wandi." 
Genesis32:1 Yakoba wakaya mu nshila wandi ne banjelo ba Nzambi bakasambakena nʼandi. 
Genesis32:2 Hakabamona Yakoba, yeye wakamba ne, Ebi mbisumbu bia banjelo ba Nzambi, Wakabikila muaba au ne, Mahanayima." 
Genesis32:3 Yakoba wakatuma miloho ku mpala kuandi kudi Esau mukuluʼandi mu buloba bua Seî, buloba bua Edome." 
Genesis32:4 Yeye wakayambila ne, Nuambile mukelenge wanyi Esau nunku ne, Muntu webe Yakoba udi wamba ne, Nakashikama ne Labana, nakushalaku to ne katataka." 
Genesis32:5 Ndi ne ngombe ne tubalu ne mikoko ne bahika ba balume ne bahika ba bakashi, nakutuma di kudi mukelenge wanyi binamanya mua kusangana luse ku mesu kuandi." 
Genesis32:6 Miloho yakahingana kudi Yakoba, yakamuambila ne, Tuakuya kudi mukuluʼebe Esau, ne yeye ulualua kusangakena nʼebe mu nshila, udi ne balume nkama mai ku nyima kuandi." 
Genesis32:7 Hashishe Yakoba wakatshina bikole, mutshima wandi wakazakala wakatahulula bintu biandi bisumbu bibidi, ne bantu ne mikoko ne bimuna ne tumelo." 
Genesis32:8 Wakamba ne, Bialua Esau ku tshisumbu tshimue bua kutshishiha, tshisumbu tshikuabo netshihanduke." 
Genesis32:9 Yakoba wakamba ne, Yehowa Nzambi wa kaku wanyi Abalahama, ne Nzambi wa tatuʼanyi Isaka, wewe wakungambila ne, Uhingane kuebe, ne kudi bana benu, nenkuenzele bimpe." 
Genesis32:10 Tshiena ne buimpe bua kudiangatshila tshituha tshia luse ne bulelela biwakalesha muntu webe, nakasabuka musulu eu wa Yadene anu ne tshibangu, katataka nakulua bisumbu bibidi bia bintu." 
Genesis32:11 Ndi nkutendekena ne, Unsungile mu bianza bia mukuluʼanyi Esau, ndi mmutshina ne yeye nealue kunshiha ne bamamu ne bana." 
Genesis32:12 Wewe wakungambila ne, Bulelela, nenkue nzele bimpe, nenkukumbashile tunkanunuina tuebe bungi bua nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene, idibo kabayi mua kubala." 
Genesis32:13 Yeye wakalalahu butuku abu wakasungula bintu biakadiye nʼabi bua kuambika mukulu andi Esau matabisha 
Genesis32:14 mashina a mbushi nkama ibidi ne mpumbu ya mbushi makumi abidi, mashina a mikoko nkama ibidi ne mikoko ya bimpanga makumi abidi," 
Genesis32:15 ne tumelo tudibo bakama mabele makumi asatu ne bana batu, ne ngombe idibo bakama mabele makumi anai, ne balume ba ngombe dikumi mashina a mpunda makumi abidi ne nkungulu yai dikumi." 
Genesis32:16 Wa kabifila mu bianza bia bahika bandi, tshisumbu ha buatshi tshisumbu ha buatshi, wakabambila ne Sabukai ku mpala kuanyi, nushilangane muaba hankatshi ha tshisumbu ne tshisumbu." 
Genesis32:17 Wakela di diandi kudi muhika wandi wa ku mpala ne, Hawasambakena ne Esau, mukuluʼanyi, ne hakukonkeye ne, Wewe udi wa nganyi? Uyaya kudi kunyi? Bintu ebi bidi ku mpala kuebe mbia nganyi?" 
Genesis32:18 Hashishe, wewe umuambile ne, Mbintu bia muntu webe Yakoba. Bidi matabisha akatumineye Esau mukelenge wandi, ne mona, yeye udi kabidi ku nyima kuetu." 
Genesis32:19 Yeye wakela di diandi nunku kudi muntu muibidi ne muisatu ne kudi bonso bakadi balonda ne bisumbu bia bintu ne, Nuambile Esau nunku hanuasangakena nʼandi." 
Genesis32:20 Numuambile ne, Mona, muntu webe Yakoba udi kabidi ku nyima kuetu Bualu bua yeye wakabambila munda ne, Nemmutokeshe munda ne matabisha akaya ku mpala kuanyi, ne hatuatangilangana nʼandi ku mesu, bumue yeye neangitabushe." 
Genesis32:21 Nunku wakatuma matabisha ku mpala kuandi, yeye wakalala butuku abu munkatshi mua tshitudilu." 
Genesis32:22 Butuku abu wakabika biandi wakangata bakashi bandi babidi ne bakashi babidi benji ba mudimu ne bana bandi dikumi ne umue, bakasabuka ku dilobo dia Yaboka." 
Genesis32:23 Wakabangata, wakabasabula ne bintu biandi bionso." 
Genesis32:24 Yakoba wakashala ku nyima nkayandi muntu wakaluangana nʼandi bibula to ne hakatshia butuku. 
Genesis32:25 Hakamanya muntu ne, Tshiena mumuhite bukole wakalenga tshianza ha tshikundukundu tshiandi ne tshikundukundu tshia Yakoba tshiakakoyoboka hakadiye uluangana nʼandi bibula." 
Genesis32:26 Yeye wakambila Yakoba ne, Undekele butuku bukadi ha kutshia. Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena nkulekela biwikala kuyi munsankishe." 
Genesis32:27 Yeye wakakonka Yakoba ne, Dina diebe nganyi? Yeye wakamuitaba ne Ndi Yakoba." 
Genesis32:28 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Kababikidi dina diebe ne Yakoba kabidi bakubikile dina ne Isalele bualu bua wewe wakuluangana ne Nzambi ne bantu, wakahatula bukole." 
Genesis32:29 Yakoba wakamukonka ne, Ungambile dina diebe Muntu wakamuebesha ne, Udi unkonkela dina dianyi tshinyi? Yeye wakamuvudishilaku disanka" 
Genesis32:30 Yakoba wakidika muaba au ne, Peniele bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Nakumonangana ne Nzambi mpala ha mpala ne muoyo wanyi wakuhanduka." 
Genesis32:31 Hakalueye Penuele, diba diakabanda, ne Yakoba wakadi utebuka bualu bua tshikundukundu tshiandi." 
Genesis32:32 Nunku Bena Isalele kabatu badia munyinyi wa ku tshikundukundu to ne katataka, bualu bua yeye wakalenga tshianza ha tshikundukundu tshia Yakoba." 
Genesis33:1 Yakoba wakabanduluka, wakamona Esau ulua ne bantu nkama mai. Yeye wakatahulula bana ba Lea ne ba Lakele ne ba bakashi babidi benji ba mudimu." 
Genesis33:2 Wakateka bakashi benji ba mudimu ne bana babo ku mpala, ne Lea ne bana bandi ku nyima kuabo, ne Lakele ne Yosefe ku nyima kuabo." 
Genesis33:3 Yeye nkayandi wakahita ku mpala kuabo, wakakukuila hanshi misangu muanda mutekete to ne hakasemeneye ha buihi ne mukuluʼandi." 
Genesis33:4 Esau wakaya lubilu bua kumuakidila, wakamuela tshituha ku nshingu, wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku, bakadila." 
Genesis33:5 Yeye wakabisha mesu andi wakamona bakashi ne bana, wakamukonka ne, Bantu aba badi nʼebe mbanganyi? Wakamukudimuna ne, Aba mbana bakuha Nzambi muntu webe mu luse." 
Genesis33:6 Hashishe, bakashi benji ba mudimu bakasemena ha buihi, bobo ne bana babo, bakafua mpala yabo hanshi." 
Genesis33:7 Lea wakalua ne bana bandi bakafua mpala yabo hanshi kabidi, Yosefe ne Lakele bakalua ku nyima, bakatua mpala yabo hanshi." 
Genesis33:8 Esau wakamuebesha ne, Tshisumbu atshi tshinene tshmakusangakena nʼatshi mu nshila ntshia bualu kai? Wakamukudimuna ne, Tshia kuheta nʼatshi luse kudi mukelenge wanyi" 
Genesis33:9 Esau wakamuambila ne, Ndi ne bintu bikumbane, muakunyiʼanyi ushale ne bintu biudi nʼabi." 
Genesis33:10 Yakoba wakamba ne, Nansha, ndi nkutendekena ne, Biwikala nʼanyi luse, witabushe matabisha a ku tshianza tshinyi, bualu bua nakumona mpala webe bu muntu udi umona mpala wa Nzambi, ne wewe wakusanka bua bualu buanyi." 
Genesis33:11 Ndi nkutendekena ne, Witabushe matabisha anakulua nʼau kudi, bualu bua Nzambi wakungenzela bimpe ne meme ndi ne bintu bikumbane kabidi. Wakananukila kumusengelela ne yeye wakângata." 
Genesis33:12 Esau wakamuambila ne, Tuyai bietu, meme nenye ku mpala kuebe." 
Genesis33:13 Yakoba wakamukudimuna ne, Mukelenge wanyi udi mumanye ne bana batshidi batekete ne mikoko ne ngombe bidi ne bana, ne biabenzeshabo lukasa lukasa anu dituku dimue, bimuna bionso nenfue." 
Genesis33:14 Ndi ntendekena mukelenge wanyi adianjile ku mpala kuanyi, nenkulonde bitekete bitekete, bu mudi luendu lua bimuna ne lua bana bindi nʼabi, to ne hanafika kudi mukelenge wanyi ku Seî." 
Genesis33:15 Esau wakamba ne, Witabushe bua bantu banyi bakuabo bashale nʼebe Yakoba wakamukonka ne, Bua tshinyi? Mpete diakalengele ku mesu kua mukelenge wanyi" 
Genesis33:16 Nunku Esau wakaya mu nshila wandi wa ku Sei dituku adi. 
Genesis33:17 Yakoba wakaya ku Sukota, wakasaku nsubu, wakenzelaku bimuna biandi bitanda, nunku bakidika muaba au ne Sukota." 
Genesis33:18 Yakoba wakalua ku musoko wa Shekeme, mu buloba bua Kanâ-na, talalâ, hakafumeye ku Padanaalama, wakashimika ntenta yandi ku mpala kua musoko." 
Genesis33:19 Wakasumba tshituha tshia buloba kuakashimikeye ntenta yandi kudi bana ba Hamo tatu wa Shekeme, ku lukama lua kesita." 
Genesis33:20 Wakenzaku tshioshelu, wakatshidika dina ne, El-Elohe Isalele." 
Genesis34:1 Dina, muana mukashi wa Lea wakaleleleye Yakoba, wakaya bua kumoneye bana ba bakashi ba mu buloba abu." 
Genesis34:2 Shekeme muana mulume wa Hamo, Muena Hiwi, mukelenge muana wa buloba, wakamutangila wakamukuata, wakalala nʼandi, wakamufuisha bundu." 
Genesis34:3 Mutshima wandi wakalamata Dina, muana mukashi wa Yakoba, yeye wakananga nsongakashi eu, wakamuambila mei a kalolo." 
Genesis34:4 Shekeme wakambila tatu wandi Hamo ne, Ungangatshile nsongakashi eu bu mukashi wanyi." 
Genesis34:5 Yakoba wakunvua lumu ne, Yeye wakamana kunyanga muanʼandi mukashi Dina. Bana bandi ba balume bakadi ne bimuna biandi mu tshisuku Yakoba wakahuwa biandi to ne hakaluabo" 
Genesis34:6 Hamo, tatu wa Shekeme, wakaya kudi Yakoba, wakayikila nʼandi." 
Genesis34:7 Bana ba balume ba Yakoba bakahingana ku tshisuku hakunvuabo lumu elu, mutshima yabo yakanyingalala, bakadi ne tshiji tshikole bualu bua yeye wakafuisha bana ba Isalele bundu hakalaleye ne muana mukashi wa Yakoba bualu ebu kabuena buimpe bua kuenza." 
Genesis34:8 Hamo wakayikila nʼabo wakamba ne, Mutshima wa muanʼanyi Shekeme udi musue mua nʼebe wa bakashi, ndi nkusengelela ne umufile kudiye bu mukashi wandi." 
Genesis34:9 Tubakilangane nʼenu, nuenu nufîle bana benu ba bakashi kutudi ne nuangate bana betu ba bakashi kunudi." 
Genesis34:10 Nenushikame munkatshi muetu, buloba nebuikale ku mpala kuenu, nuikalemu, nuendulukemu mushinga, nuangatemu bintu." 
Genesis34:11 Shekeme wakambila tatu wa mukashi ne bana babo ne, Ndi musue kuikala ne diakalengele ku mesu kuenu, nennufute bintu bionso binudi nuamba." 
Genesis34:12 Binuandomba bintu bia dibaka bidi bitamba bungi, nennuhebi, anjai kumpa nsongaka shi bu mukashi wanyi." 
Genesis34:13 Bana ba Yakoba bakakudimuna Shekeme ne tatu andi Hamo mei a budimu, bualu bua yeye wakanyanga muanʼabo wa bakashi, Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Bakabambila ne, Katuena mua kuenza bualu ebu bua kufila muanʼetu wa bakashi kudi muntu udi kayi mute ngula, bualu ebu budi butufuisha bundu." 
Genesis34:15 Netuitabushe anu bua bualu ebu, bua buonso buenu nulue bu tuetu, ne balume bonso ba munkatshi muenu batengudibue," 
Genesis34:16 hashishe, netufile bana betu ba bakashi kunudi, ne tuetu netuangate bana benu ba bakashi, netuikale nʼenu netuikale bu bantu bamue." 
Genesis34:17 Binuahidia kutunvuila bua kutengu dibua, hashishe, netuangate muanʼetu wa bakashi, netuye." 
Genesis34:18 Mei abo akasankisha Hamo ne Shekeme, muanʼandi wa balume." 
Genesis34:19 Nsongalume kakahidia bualu ebu bualu bua mutshima wandi wakadi muele kudi muana wa bakashi wa Yakoba, butumbi buandi buakatamba bua bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi." 
Genesis34:20 Hamo ne muanʼandi Shekeme bakalua ku tshibi tshia ku musoko wabo, bakayilala ne bena musoko, bakamba ne," 
Genesis34:21 Balume aba badi bashikama nʼetu talala nunku tuitabushe bua bobo bashale mu buloba buetu bendeshangane nʼetu mushinga buloba budi bunene bua bobo bikalemu tuangate bana babo ba bakashi bu bakashi betu, tufile bana hetu ba bakashi budibo." 
Genesis34:22 Anu bua bualu ebu bumue balume aba nebitabushe bua kushikama nʼetu tulue bantu bamue bua mulume yonso wa munkatshi muetu atengudibue bu mudibo batengula. 
Genesis34:23 Bimuna biabo bionso ne bintu biabo bionso ne nyama yabo yonso kabiena bikale bu bietu, anyi? Tuanji kuitabusha bualu ebu, ne bobo nebashikame nʼetu" 
Genesis34:24 Bena musoko bonso ba mu musoko wandi bakitabusha mei a Hamô ne a muanʼandi Shekeme, balume bonso ba mu musoko wandi bakätengudibua." 
Genesis34:25 Hakahita matuku asatu, ne bobo bakadi ne kusama, bana ba balume ba Yakoba babidi, Shimeona ne Lewi, bana babo ne Dina, bakangata muntu muele Wandi wa nvita muntu muele wandi wa nvita, bakalua ku musoko ne mitshima ya dikima, bakashiha balume bonso." 
Genesis34:26 Bakashiha Hamo ne muanʼandi Shekeme ne muele wa nvita, bakangata Dina mu nsubu wa Shekeme, bakaluhuka nʼandi." 
Genesis34:27 Bana ba balume ba Yakoba bakalua munkatshi mua bantu bafue bakahaula musoko, bualu bua bobo bakanyanga muanʼabo wa bakashi" 
Genesis34:28 Bakangata mikoko yabo ne ngombe yabo ne mpunda yabo, ne bintu biakadi mu musoko, ne bintu biakadi mu madimi," 
Genesis34:29 ne biuma biabo bionso ne bana babo ne bakashi babo, bakabangata bu bahika babo ba mu nvita bionso mene biakadi mu nsubu." 
Genesis34:30 Yakoba wakambila Shimeona ne Lewi ne, Nuenu nuakuntatshisha, nuakunvuisha bu tshintu tshibi munkatshi mua bena buloba munkatshi mua Bena Kanana ne Bena Pelese, tuetu tudi bakehe ne bobo nebunguile kundi, nebanshihe, nebahaule nsubu wanyi ne meme nenjimishibue." 
Genesis34:31 Bobo bakamukudimuna ne Yeye wakadi ne bualu bua kuenzela muan etu wa bakashi bu mukashi wa masandi, anyi?" 
Genesis35:1 Nzambi wakambila Yakoba ne, Bika biebe uye ku Betele, ushikameku, wenzeleku Nzambi, wakamueneka kûdi bawakadi unyema ku mesu kua Esau, mukulu ebe, tshioshelu." 
Genesis35:2 Yakoba wakambila bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wandi ne bonso bakadi nʼandi ne, Umushai nzambi ya bende idi munkatshi muenu, nudilongolole, nuluate bilulu bikuabo," 
Genesis35:3 tubike tumuke, tuye ku Betele, nengenzeleku Nzambi, waka-ngunvuila mu dituku dia dikenga dianyi, wakadi nʼanyi mu nshila kunakaya, tshioshelu." 
Genesis35:4 Bobo bakaha Yakoba nzambi yonso ya bende yakadibo nʼai ne nkanu yakadi ku matshu abo, Yakoba wakabijika muinshi mua mutshi munene wakadi hehi ne Shekeme." 
Genesis35:5 Bakaya ku luendu luabo, ditshina dia Nzambi diakadi ku misoko yakadi ha buihi nʼabo, ne bena musoko kabakalonda bana ba balume ba Yakoba." 
Genesis35:6 Yakoba wakalua ku Luze (eu udi Betele) mu buloba bua Kanana, yeye ne bantu bonso bakadiye nʼabo." 
Genesis35:7 Wakenzaku tshioshelu wakabikila mua ba au ne, Ele-betele bualu bua mu muaba eu Nzambi wakamueneka kudiye hakadiye unyema ku mesu kua mukuluʼandi." 
Genesis35:8 Debola, muena mudimu wa bakashi wa Lebeka, wakafua, bakamujika muinshi mua mutshi munene wa mu Betele, bakabikila muaba au ne, Alonobakuta." 
Genesis35:9 Nzambi wakamueneka kudi Yakoba tshiakabidi hakafumeye ku Padana-alama, wakamusankisha." 
Genesis35:10 Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Dina diebe nYakoba, kabakubikidi ne Yakoba kabidi, nebakubikile ne, Isalele." 
Genesis35:11 Nzambi wakamuambila kabidi ne, Ndi Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso, uvulangane ukumbane ba bungi, bisamba bia bungi nebifume kudi, bakelenge nebaluhuke munda muebe" 
Genesis35:12 Buloba bunakalaya Abalahama ne Isaka, nenkuhebu ne tunkanunuma tuebe tualonda ku nyima kuebe." 
Genesis35:13 Nzambi wakabanda kulu ku muaba wakadiye uyikila nʼandi. 
Genesis35:14 Yakoba wakimanyika dibue dinene bu tshibumba ha muaba wakayikidileye nʼandi, wakahongolola mai a kutendelela nʼau ha mutu hadi wakelahu manyi kabidi." 
Genesis35:15 Yakoba wakabikila muaba wakayikidileye ne Nzambi ne Betele. 
Genesis35:16 Bakumuka ku Betele, ne diambedi bobo kabayi banze kufika ku Efelata, kanyinganyinga kakakuata Lakele, wakatantamana bikole." 
Genesis35:17 Hakatantamaneye bikole nunku, muleleshi wakamuambila ne, Kutshinyi, bualu bua wewe neulele muana wa balume mukuabo." 
Genesis35:18 Hakambeye kuhuola muoyo wandi (bualu bua yeye wakafua), yeye wakamuidika diba ne, Benoni kadi tatu wandi wakamuidika ne, Benyamina." 
Genesis35:19 Lakele wakafua, bakamujika mu nshila wa ku Efelata (eu udi Beteleheme)." 
Genesis35:20 Yakoba wakimanyika dibue dia ha lukita luandi, dibue edi didi ha lukita lua Lakele to ne ku dituku edi." 
Genesis35:21 Isalele wakabisha luendu luandi, wakashimika ntenta yandi ku nyima kua tshibumba tshinene tshia Ede." 
Genesis35:22 Hakadi Isalele ushikama mu muaba eu, Lubena wakalala ne Bileha, mukashi mukuabo wa tatu wandi, Isalele wakunvua lumu elu. Bana balume ba Yakoba bakadi dikumi ne babidi." 
Genesis35:23 Bana ba balume ba Lea bakadi Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Yakoba, ne Shimeona ne Lewi ne Yuda ne Yisaka ne Zebuluna." 
Genesis35:24 Bana ba balume ba Lakele bakadi Yosefe ne Benyamina. 
Genesis35:25 Bana ba balume ba Bileha, muena mudimu wa bakashi wa Lakele, bakadi Dana ne Nafatale." 
Genesis35:26 Bana ba balume ba Zilepa muena mudimu wa bakashi wa Lea, bakadi Gada ne Ashe Aba mbana ba balume ba Yakoba bakamulelelabo mu Padana-alama." 
Genesis35:27 Yakoba wakalua kudi Isaka tatu andi mu Mamale, musoko wa Kiyata-aba (eu udi Hebelona) Wakadi Abalahama ne Isaka bashikame." 
Genesis35:28 Matuku onso a Isaka akadi bidimu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu. 
Genesis35:29 Isaka wakahuola muoyo Wandi, wakafua, wakaya kudi bankambua bandi, wakadi muntu mununu wa bidimu bia bungi Esau ne Yakoba, bana bandi ba balume, bakamujika." 
Genesis36:1 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya Esau (dina diandi dikuabo Edome). 
Genesis36:2 Esau wakabaka bakashi ba bana bakashi ba Bena Kanana: Adamuana wa bakashi wa Elona, Muena Hiti, ne Oholibama, muana wa bakashi wa Ana, muana wa bakashi wa Sibiona, Muena Hiwi," 
Genesis36:3 ne Basemata, muana wa bakashi wa Yishemaele, ne muan abo wa bakashi wa Nebayota." 
Genesis36:4 Ada wakalelela Esau Elifasa ne Basemata wakalela Luele," 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama wakalela Yeusha ne Yalama ne Kola. Aba mbana ba Esau bakamulelelabo mu buloba bua Kanana 
Genesis36:6 Esau wakangata bakashi bandi ne bana bandi ba balume ne bana bandi ba bakashi ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wandi, ne bimuna biandi, ne nyama yandi yonso, ne bintu bionso biakamueneye mu buloba bua Kanana, wakumuka kudi muakunyiʼandi Yakoba, wakaya ku buloba bukuabo." 
Genesis36:7 Bualu bua bintu biabo biakatamba bia bungi kabakamanya mua kushikama kaba kamue, ne buloba buakadibo bashikame buakadi bukese bualu bua bungi bua bimuna biabo." 
Genesis36:8 Esau wakashikama mu mukuna wa Sei Esau udi Edome. 
Genesis36:9 Ei idi ndelanganyi ya Esau, nkambua wa Bena Edome ba mu mukuna wa Sei." 
Genesis36:10 Au mmena a bana balume ba Esau Elifasa, muana wa balume wa Ada, mukashi wa Esau, ne Luele muana wa Basemata, mukashi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Bana ba balume ba Elifasa bakadi Temana ne Omâ ne Sefo ne Gatama ne Kenaza. 
Genesis36:12 Timena wakadi mue na mudimu wa bakashi wa Elifasa, muana wa Esau, ne yeye wakalelela Elifasa Amaleka, aba mbana ba balume ba Ada, mukashi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Aba mbana ba balume ba Luele Nahata ne Zela ne Shama ne Miza, aba mbana ba balume ba Basemata, mukashi wa Esau" 
Genesis36:14 Aba mbana ba balume ba Oholibama, muana wa bakashi wa Ana muana wa bakashi wa Sibiona mukashi wa Esau, yeye wakalelela Esau Yeusha ne Yalama ne Kola." 
Genesis36:15 Aba mbakelenge ba bana ba balume ba Esau bana ba balume ba Elifasa, muanʼa bute wa Esau, bakadi mukelenge Temana, ne mu kelenge Oma ne mukelenge Sefo ne mukelenge Kanaza" 
Genesis36:16 ne mukelenge Kola ne mukelenge Gatama ne mukelenge Amaleka, aba mbakelenge bakaluhuka kudi Elifasa mu buloba bua Edome, aba mbana ba balume ba Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Aba mbana ba balume ba Luele, muana wa Esau: mukelenge Nahata ne mukelenge Zela ne mukelenge Shama ne mukelenge Miza, aba mbakelenge bakaluhuka kudi Luele mu buloba bua Edome, aba mbana ba balume ba Basemata, mukashi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Aba mbana ba balume ba Oholibama, mukashi Wa Esau mukelenge Yeusha ne mukelenge Yalama ne mukelenge Kola, aba mbakelenge bakaluhuka kudi Oholibama, muana wa Ana, mukashi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Aba mbana ba balume ba Esau, aba mbakelenge babo, eu udi Edome." 
Genesis36:20 Aba mbana ba balume ba Seî, Muena Holi, bena buloba Lotana ne Shobala ne Sibiona ne Ana," 
Genesis36:21 ne Dishona ne Eze ne Dishana, aba mbakelenge ba Bena Holi, bana ba Sei, mu buloba bua Edome." 
Genesis36:22 Bana ba Lotana bakadi Holi ne Hemana; Timena wakadi muanʼabo wa bakashi ne Lotana. 
Genesis36:23 Aba mbana ba Shobala Aluwana ne Manahata ne Ebala ne Shofo ne Onama. 
Genesis36:24 Aba mbana ba Sibiona Aya ne Ana muntu eu Ana wakasangana mishimi yakadi ihatuka mai a kahia mu tshihela, hakadiye udisha nyama ya mpunda ya tatuʼandi Sibiona." 
Genesis36:25 Aba mbana ba Ana Dishona ne Oholibama, muana mukashi wa Ana" 
Genesis36:26 Aba mbana ba Dishona Hemedana ne Eshebane ne Yitelana ne Kelana. 
Genesis36:27 Aba mbana ba Eze Bilehana, ne Zâwana ne Akana." 
Genesis36:28 Aba mbana ba Dishana: Usa ne Alana. 
Genesis36:29 Aba mbakelenge bakaluhuka kudi Bena Holi, mukelenge Lotana ne mukelenge Shobala ne mukelenge Sibiona ne mukelenge Ana" 
Genesis36:30 ne mukelenge Dishona ne mukelenge Eze ne mukelenge Dishana, aba mbakelenge ba Bena Holi mu buloba bua Sei." 
Genesis36:31 Aba mbakelenge bakakokesha ba mu buloba bua Edome, diambedi mukelenge kayi muanze kukokesha Bena Isalele." 
Genesis36:32 Bela, muana wa Beô, wakakokesha mu Edome, dina dia musoko wandi ne, Dinehaba." 
Genesis36:33 Bela wakafua, ne Yobaba, muana wa Zela, muana wa Bosela, wakadia bukelenge buandi." 
Genesis36:34 Yobaba wakafua, ne Hushama, wa mu buloba bua Bena Temana, wakadia bukelenge buandi" 
Genesis36:35 Hushama wakafua, ne Hadada, muana wa Bedada, wakahita Bena Midiyana bukole mu buloba bua Moaba, wakadia bukelenge buandi, dina dia musoko wandi ne, Awita." 
Genesis36:36 Hadada wa kafua, ne Samala wa ku Maseleka, wakadia bukelenge buandi." 
Genesis36:37 Samala wakafua, ne Shaula wa ku Lehobota, hehi ne musulu wa Pelata, wakadia bukelenge buandi." 
Genesis36:38 Shaula wakafua ne, Balahanana, muana wa Akabo, wakadia bukelenge bua ndi." 
Genesis36:39 Balahanana, muana wa Akabô, wakafua ne Hada wakadia bukelenge buandi, dina dia musoko wandi ne, Pau, dina dia mukashi wandi diakadi Mahetabela, muana wa bakashi wa Mateledi, muana wa bakashi wa Mezehaba." 
Genesis36:40 Â mmena a bakelenge bakaluhuka kudi Esau ku meku abo ne mu miaba yabo ne ku mena abo mukelenge Timena ne mukelenge Alawa ne mukelenge Yatete 
Genesis36:41 ne mukelenge Oholibama ne mukelenge Ela ne mukelenge Pinona," 
Genesis36:42 mukelenge Kenaza ne mukelenge Temana ne mukelenge Mibesâ," 
Genesis36:43 mukelenge Magadiele ne mukelenge Ilama aba mbakelenge ba Edome, ku miaba yabo mu buloba bua buhianyi buabo Eu udi Esau, nkambua wa Bena Edome." 
Genesis37:1 Yakoba wakashikama mu buloba buakadi tatuʼandi mushikame mu buloba bua Kanâna. 
Genesis37:2 Eku nkulondolola kua malu a Yakoba Hakadi Yosefe ne bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete, yeye wakadi udisha bimuna ne bana babo Yeye wakadi nsongalume wakadi ne bana ba balume ba Bileha ne Zilepa, bakashi ba tatuʼandi, Yosefe wakalua ne lumu luabo lubi kudi tatu abo." 
Genesis37:3 Dinanga dia Isalele kudi Yosefe diakatamba dinanga diandi kudi bana bandi bonso, bualu bua yeye wakadi muana wakaleleye ku bununu buandi, wakamulelela tshikowelu tshia maboko male." 
Genesis37:4 Bana babo bakamona ne dinanga dia tatu wabo kudiye diakatamba dia kudi buonso buabo, bobo bakadi nʼandi lukuna, kabakamanya mua kuyikila nʼandi talala." 
Genesis37:5 Yosefe wakalota tshilota, wakatshiawila bana babo, bobo bakatamba kuikala nʼandi lukuna." 
Genesis37:6 Yeye wakabambila ne, Unvuai, ndi nnusengelela, tshiota tshinakulota," 
Genesis37:7 bualu bua monai, biakadi basuika bisumbu bia blé mu budimi, ne monai, tshisumbu tshianyi tshiakabika, tshiakimana, ne bisumbu bienu biakela tshianza munkatshi, biakatshikukuila." 
Genesis37:8 Bana babo bakamuambila ne, Wewe newikale mukelenge wetu, anyi? Neutukokeshe, anyi? Bakatamba kuikala nʼandi lukuna bualu bua bilota biandi ne bua mei andi." 
Genesis37:9 Yeye wakalota tshilota tshikuabo, wakatshiawila bana babo, wakabambila ne, Monai, nakulota tshilota tshikuabo, nakumona diba ne ngondo ne mitoto dikumi ne umue, biakunkukuila." 
Genesis37:10 Wakatshiawila tatu wandi ne bana babo, tatu wandi wakamukuhulula ku di diandi ne, Etshi ntshilota kai tshiwakulota? Meme ne mamuʼebe ne bana benu netulue bua kukukukuila hanshi, anyi?" 
Genesis37:11 Bana babo bakadi nʼandi mukau, kadi tatu wandi wakateka mei au mu mutshima wandi." 
Genesis37:12 Bana babo bakaya ku Shekeme bua kudishabo bimuna bia tatu abo 
Genesis37:13 Isalele wakebesha Yosefe ne, Bana benu kabena badisha bimuna ku Shekeme, anyi? Lua biebe, nenkutume kudibo Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ndiku." 
Genesis37:14 Yeye wakamuambila ne Ya biebe, umone ne bana benu badi bakole ne bimuna bidi bimpe, anyi, walukila ungambile. Wakamutuma ku tshibanda tshia Hebelone, ne yeye wakalua ku Shekeme" 
Genesis37:15 Mulumiana wakamusangana ne, mona, wakadi wendakana mu tshisuku, wakamuebesha ne, Udi ukeba tshinyi?" 
Genesis37:16 Yeye wakamuitaba ne Ndi nkeba bana betu, ndi nkusengelela ne, undeshe kudibo badisha mikoko." 
Genesis37:17 Muntu wakamuambila ne, Bakumuka kunoko, nakabunvua bamba ne Tuyai ku Dotana Yosefe wakalonda bana babo, wakabasangana mu Dotana." 
Genesis37:18 Bobo bakamumona kule kuakua, ne diambedi yeye kayi muanze kufika ha buihi nʼabo, bakamuelela tshifufu bua kumushiha." 
Genesis37:19 Bakambilangana ne, Monai, muena bilota njowa ulua." 
Genesis37:20 Tuye kumushiha, tumuele mu mukela mukuabo, netuambe ne, Nyama mubi wakamudia, netumone tshiavuisha bilota biandi." 
Genesis37:21 Lubena wakunvua tshifufu tshiabo, wakamusungila mu bianza biabo, wakamba ne, Kabamushihi." 
Genesis37:22 Lubena wakabambila ne, Kanumatshishi mashi andi hanshi, tumuele mu mukela eu udi mu tshihela, kadi kanumulengi tshianza nansha, yeye wakamba nunku bua kumusungileye mu bianza biabo ne bua kumuhingasheye kudi tatu wandi." 
Genesis37:23 Hakalua Yosefe kudi bana babo, bakamukohola tshikowelu tshiandi, tshikowelu tshiandi tshia maboko male tshiakadiye muluate," 
Genesis37:24 bakamukuata, bakamuela mu mukela, mukela wakadi mûme, kamuakadi mai." 
Genesis37:25 Bakashikama bua kudiabo bidia, bakabanduluka, bakamona Bena Yishemaele bafume ku Gilada, ne tumelo tuabo tutuala manananshi ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne mula, bakadi bahueka mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda wakambila bana babo ne, Hatuashiha muanʼetu, ne hatuasokoka mashi andi, netushale ne tshintu kai?" 
Genesis37:27 Tuye kumuhana kudi Bena Yishemaele, katumulengi tshianza, bualu bua yeye udi muanʼetu, udi musunyi wetu Bana babo bakamunvuila." 
Genesis37:28 Bena Midiyana, bendi ba mushinga bakahita, ba kahatula Yosefe mu mukela, bakamuhanyisha Bena Yishemaele ku bituha bia argent makumi abidi. Bakaya ne Yosefe mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis37:29 Lubena wakahingana ku mukela, ne Yosefe kakadimu, yeye wakahanda tshivualu tshiandi." 
Genesis37:30 Wakahingana kudi bana babo, wakamba ne, Nsongalume kenaku, ne meme nenye kudi kunyi?" 
Genesis37:31 Bakangata tshikowelu tshia Yosefe, bakashiha mbushi, bakina tshikowelu mu mashi," 
Genesis37:32 bakatuma tshikowelu tshia maboko male kudi tatu wabo, bakamba ne, Tuakutshisangana hanshi, umanye ne ntshikowelu tshia muanʼebe, anyi?" 
Genesis37:33 Yeye wakatshimanya wakamba ne, Etshi ntshikowelu tshia muanʼanyi, nyama mubi wakamudia, bulelela, Yosefe udi muhandibue bihese bihese kudi nyama." 
Genesis37:34 Yakoba wakahanda bivualu biandi, wakaluata tshilulu tshikayabala mu tshimono, wakajinga muanʼandi matuku a bungi." 
Genesis37:35 Bana bandi ba balume bonso ne bana bandi ba bakashi bonso bakabika bua kumusamba, kadi yeye wakahidia bamusambe, wakamba ne, Nenye bianyi mu Muaba wa Lufu, njinga muanʼanyi. Tatu wandi wakamudila." 
Genesis37:36 Bena Midiyana bakahana Yosefe mu Ejipitu kudi Potifâ, kamanda ka masalayi a Palô." 
Genesis38:1 Mu matuku au Yuda wakumuka kudi bana babo, wakaya ku di Muena Adulama dina diandi Hila." 
Genesis38:2 Yuda wakamonaku muana wa bakashi wa muena Kanana, dina diandi Shua, yeye wakamuangata, wakalala nʼandi." 
Genesis38:3 Yeye wakimita difu, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Ele." 
Genesis38:4 Wakukuta difu dikuabo, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Onana." 
Genesis38:5 Wakimita difu dikuabo, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Shela, hakamuleleleye wakadi mu musoko wa Keziba." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda wakangatshila Ele muanʼandi, muan a bute, mukashi dina diandi Tama" 
Genesis38:7 Ele, muanʼa bute wa Yuda wakadi muntu mubi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Yehowa wakamushiha." 
Genesis38:8 Yuda wakambila Onana ne, Uye kudi mukashi wa mukulu ebe, umuangate bu mukashi webe, yeye nealelele mukuluʼebe bana." 
Genesis38:9 Onana wakamanya ne bana aba kabena bikala bu bana banyi ne hakayeye kudi mukashi wa mukulu andi, wakalela hanshi, bua yeye kaleledi mukuluʼandi bana." 
Genesis38:10 Bualu buakenzeye buakadi bubi ku mesu kua Yehowa, ne yeye wakamushiha kabidi." 
Genesis38:11 Hashishe Yuda wakambila Tama maʼmue nʼandi ne, Ushale bu mukashi wa mu lufuila mu nsubu wa tatuʼebe to ne hadiunda muanʼanyi Shela. Yeye wakatshina ne, Yeye neafue bu muakafua bana babo. Tama wakaya, wakashikama mu nsubu wa tatu andi." 
Genesis38:12 Dituku dikuabo, muana wa bakashi wa Shua, mukashi wa Yuda, wakafua, Yuda wakasambibua, wakaya kudi bakoshi ba miosa ya mikoko yandi ku Timena, kudi mulunda wandi Hila, Muena Adulama." 
Genesis38:13 Bakambila Tamâ ne, Tatuʼebe-muenu uyaya ku Timena bua kukoseye mikoko yandi miosa." 
Genesis38:14 Yeye wakavula bilulu bia mu lufuila, wakaluata bilulu bikuabo, wakadibuikila ne tshilulu tshikudika, wakashikama ku tshibi tshia ku Enayima, hehi ne nshila wa ku Timena, bualu bua yeye wakamona ne, Shela wakamana kudiunda ne kabena banze kumbakisha kudiye." 
Genesis38:15 Hakamutangila Yuda, yeye wa kelangana meji ne, Yeye udi mukashi wa masandi, bualu bua yeye wakabuikila mpala wandi ne tshilulu." 
Genesis38:16 Yeye wakahuka kudiye hakadiye mu nshila, wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Lua biebe, ndi musue kulala nʼebe, yeye kakamanya ne yeye udi maʼmuenʼandi Mukashi wakamukonka ne, Neumpe tshinyi hawalua kundi?" 
Genesis38:17 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Nenkutumine muanʼa mbushi wa mu tshisumbu tshinyi. Mukashi wakamuebesha ne, Wewe neungeyeke tshieya to ne hawamutuma, anyi?" 
Genesis38:18 Yeye wakamuebesha ne, Nenkueyeke tshieya kai? Mukashi wakamukudimuna ne, Umpe kakanu ka ku munu webe ne mionshi misuika ku maboko ebe ne tshibangu tshiebe tshiudi nʼatshi mu tshianza tshiebe. Yeye wakamuhabi, wakaya kudiye, ne mukashi wakimita difu kudiye." 
Genesis38:19 Mukashi wakabika, wakaya mu nshila wandi, wakavula tshilulu tshiandi tshikudika, wakaluata bilulu bia mu lufuila kabidi."
