Genesis38:20 Yuda wakatuma muana wa mbushi mu tshianza tshia mulunda wandi, Muena Adulama, bua kuangateye tshieya tshia keyekeye mu tshianza tshia mukashi, kadi yeye kakamusangana." 
Genesis38:21 Hashishe, yeye wakebesha balume ba mu musoko ne, Mukashi au wa masandi wakadi ku Enayima udi kudi kunyi? Bobo bakamukudimuna di ne, Kakuakadi mukashi wa nasandi kunoko." 
Genesis38:22 Yeye wakalukila kudi Yuda, wakamuambila ne, Tshiakumusangana, ne balume ba musoko bakungambila ne, Mukashi wa masandi kakadiku." 
Genesis38:23 Yuda wakamba ne, Yeye ashale nʼatshi, bua bundu kabutukuatshi, mona, nakamutumina muana wa mbushi eu, ne wewe kuakamusangana." 
Genesis38:24 Hakahita ngondo isatu, bakambila Yuda ne, Tamâ ma muenʼebe wakandamuka bu mukashi wa masandi, ne yeye wakimita difu kabidi ku masandi. Yuda wakamba ne, Balue nʼandi kunoko, bamuoshe mu kalua." 
Genesis38:25 Hakaluabo nʼandi, yeye wakatumina tatuʼandi-muenu dî ne, Nakimita difu kudi muena bintu ebi, ujingulule nfumu wa bintu ebi, kakanu ka ku munu, ne mionshi ya ku maboko ne tshibangu." 
Genesis38:26 Yuda wakabimanya, wakamba ne, Yeye udi muntambe meme buakane, bualu bua meme tshiakamubakisha kudi muanʼanyi mulume Shela. Yeye kakamumanya kabidi tshiendelele." 
Genesis38:27 Hakakumbana ngondo yandi, mona, bana ba mahasa bakadi munda muandi." 
Genesis38:28 Hakatantamaneye, muana umue wakahatula tshianza, ne muleleshi wakasuika muonshi mukunze ku tshianza tshiandi, wakamba ne, Yeye wakaluhuka diambedi." 
Genesis38:29 Kadi yeye wakahingasha tshianza tshiandi, ne mona, muana mukuabo wakaluhuka. Muleleshi wakamba ne, Mona tshihatukidi tshiwakuhatuka! Nunku bakamuidika dina ne Pelese" 
Genesis38:30 Ne ku nyima muanʼabo wakadi ne muonshi mukunze musuika ku tshianza tshiandi wakahatuka, bakamuidika dina ne, Zela." 
Genesis39:1 Bakaya ne Yosefe mu Ejipitu, ne Potifa, kamanda ka masalayi a Palo, Muena Ejipitu, wakamusumba ku bianza bia Bena Yishemaele, bakalua nʼandi." 
Genesis39:2 Yehowa wakadi ne Yosefe, wakamuendesha diakalengele, wakadi mu nsubu wa mukelenge wandi, Muena Ejipitu." 
Genesis39:3 Mukelenge wandi wakamona ne, Yehowa udi nʼandi, ne Yehowa wakadi mumuendeshe diakalengele mu tshianza tshiandi mu malu onso akenzeye." 
Genesis39:4 Yosefe wakasangana luse ku mesu kuandi, wakamuenzela mudimu, wakamuteka mulami wa nsubu wandi yonso, wakafila bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Genesis39:5 Mu dituku diakamutekeye mulami wa nsubu wandi ne wa bintu biandi bionso biaka diye nʼabi, Yehowa wakavudishila bonso bakadi mu nsubu wa Muena Ejipitu masanka, bualu bua Yosefe Disanka dia Yehowa diakadi ku bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi mu nsubu muandi ne bia mu madimi andi kabidi." 
Genesis39:6 Yeye wakashiya bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi mu tshianza tshia Yosefe, yeye kakamanya bungi bua bintu biakadiye nʼabi, anu bidia biakadiye udia." 
Genesis39:7 Yosefe wakadi muntu muimpe mubidi ne mpala Ku nyima kua malu au mukashi wa mukelenge wandi wakananga mesu andi kudi Yosefe, wakamuambila ne, Ulale nʼanyi." 
Genesis39:8 Kadi yeye wakahidia, wakambila mukashi wa mukelenge wandi ne, Mona, mukelenge wanyi kena mumanye bintu bindi nʼabi mu nsubu muandi, yeye wakashiya bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi mu tshianza tshianza." 
Genesis39:9 Yeye kena muntambe meme bunene mu nsubu eu, yeye kakumpidisha tshintu tshimue tshidiye nʼatshi anu wewe nkayebe, bualu bua wewe udi mukashi wandi: ndi mua kuenza bualu ebu bubi bunene ne mua kuenzela Nzambi bibi munyi?" 
Genesis39:10 Yeye wakadi wambila Yosefe bualu ebu ku dituku ku dituku, kadi yeye kakamunvuila bua kulaleye nʼandi, anyi bua kushala nʼandi." 
Genesis39:11 Dituku dikuabo hakayeye mu nsubu bua kuenzeye mudimu wandi, ne mu nsubu kamuakadi muntu mukuabo," 
Genesis39:12 yeye wakamukuata ku tshivualu tshiandi, wakamuambila ne, Ulale nʼanyi, ne yeye wakashiya tshivualu tshiandi mu tshianza tshiandi, wakanyema, wakahatuka." 
Genesis39:13 Hakatangila mukashi ne Yosefe wakashiya tshivualu mu tshianza tshiandi, wakanyema, wakahatuka," 
Genesis39:14 mukashi wakela dî kudi balume ba mu nsubu wandi, wakabambila ne, Tangilai, mulume wanyi wakulua ne Muena Ebelu mu nsubu bualu bua kutufiusha bundu, wakabuela mu nsubu bua kulaleye banyi, ne meme nakuela di dianyi dikole." 
Genesis39:15 Hakunvueye di dianyi, yeye wakashiya tshivualu tshiandi kundi, wakanyema, wakahatuka." 
Genesis39:16 Yeye wakateka tshivualu tshia Yosefe hanshi to ne hakahingana mukelenge wandi ku nsubu wandi. 
Genesis39:17 Yeye wakambila mulume wandi mei onso ne, Muhika webe, Muena Ebelu, uwakulua nʼandi mu nsubu, wakabuela kundi bua kunfuisha bundu," 
Genesis39:18 ne hanakela di dianyi, yeye wakashiya tshivualu tshiandi kundi, wakanyema." 
Genesis39:19 Hakunvua mukelenge wa Yosefe mei akamuambila mukashi wandi ne, Muntu webe wakungenzela nunku, tshiji tshikole tshiakamukuata." 
Genesis39:20 Mukelenge wa Yosefe wakamukuata, wakamubuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu muakadi bena buloko ba mukelenge basuikila, yeye wakadi mu nsubu wa lukanu nunku." 
Genesis39:21 Kadi Yehowa wakadi ne Yosefe, waka mulesha luse, wakamuendesha diakelengele kudi mulami wa nsubu wa lukanu." 
Genesis39:22 Mulami wa nsubu wa lukanu wakafua bonso bakadi mu nsubu wa lukanu mu tshianza tshia Yosefe, malu onso akenzabomu, yeye wakadi bu muenzeshi wau." 
Genesis39:23 Mulami wa nsubu wa lukanu kakalama bintu biakadi mu bianza bia Yosefe, bualu bua Yehowa wakadi nʼandi, Yehowa wakamuendesha diakalengele mu malu onso akenzeye." 
Genesis40:1 Hakashika malu au, mutuadi wa maluvu wa mukelenge wa Ejipitu ne mulambi wa bidia biandi bakafikisha mukelenge wabo wa Ejipitu munda." 
Genesis40:2 Mukelenge Palô wakadi ne tuhita tuandi tubidi tshiji, kahita ka bena maluvu ne kuhita ka bena bidia." 
Genesis40:3 Yeye wakatubuesha mu lukanu, mu nsubu wa kapitene ka masalayi malami, mu muaba muakadi Yosefe musuikila." 
Genesis40:4 Kapitene ka masalayi kakatufila mu bianza bia Yosefe, yeye wakatukuatshisha, tuakashala mu nsubu wa lukanu musangu." 
Genesis40:5 Tuakalota bilota bubidi bualu, muntu tshiandi tshiota muntu tshiandi tshilota butuku bumue, mutuadi wa maluvu ne mulambi wa bidia bia mukelenge wa Ejipitu, bakadi basuikila mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Genesis40:6 Yosefe wakabuela kudibo ne dinda, wakamona ne bakadi babungame." 
Genesis40:7 Yeye wakakonka tuhita tua Palô diakadi nʼandi mu nsubu wa lukanu mu nsubu wa mukelenge wandi ne, Nudi nubungamina lelu nunku tshinyi?" 
Genesis40:8 Tuakamuandamuna di ne, Tuakulota bilota, ne kakuena muntu udi mua kutujinguluilabi. Yosefe wakatuebesha ne, Kujingulula kua malu kakuena kudi Nzambi, anyi? Ndi nnusengelela ne, Nubingambile." 
Genesis40:9 Kuhita ka bena maluvu kakambila Yosefe tshilota tshiandi ne, Mu tshilota tshianyi, nakumona muonshi wa tumuma tua nvinyo ku mpala kuanyi," 
Genesis40:10 mudishi eu wakadi ne matamba asatu akasampila ntonga, ne bilongo biakabaluluka, biakakuama tumuma tuhia." 
Genesis40:11 Luhanza lua Palô luakadi mu tshianza tshianza, nakahuola tumuma atu, nakatukamina mu luhanza lua Palô, nakateka luhanza mu tshianza tshia Palo." 
Genesis40:12 Yosefe wakamuambila ne, Eku nkujingulula kua tshilota tshiebe, matamba asatu adi bu matuku asatu." 
Genesis40:13 Hahita matuku asatu, Palô neabishe mutu webe, neakuhingashe mu mudimu webe kabidi, wewe neuhe luhanza lua Palô mu tshianza tshiandi, bu muwakenza diambedi bawakadi mutuadi wandi wa maluvu." 
Genesis40:14 Halua bualu ebu buimpe kûdi, wewe unvuluke, ndi nkusengelela ne, Unfuile luse, wambileku Palô bualu buanyi, angumushe mu nsubu eu" 
Genesis40:15 Bulelela, bakungiba mu buloba bua Bena Ebelu, ne kunoko kabidi tshiakuenza bualu bubi bua kungelelabo mu nsubu wa mîdima." 
Genesis40:16 Hakatangila kahita ka bena bidia ne, Kujingulula eku kudi kuimpe, yeye wakambila Yosefe ne, Mu tshilota tshianyi, mona, nakadi ne bisaka bisatu bia bidia ha mutu hanyi," 
Genesis40:17 mu tshisaka tshiakadi ku mutu mene mene muakadi bidia bia Palô bilamba, ne nyunyu ya mulu yakalua, yakabizokola mu tshisaka tshiakadi ha mutu hanyi." 
Genesis40:18 Yosefe wakamuambila ne, Eku nkujingulula kua tshilota tshiebe bisaka bisatu bidi bu matuku asatu," 
Genesis40:19 hahita matuku asatu, Palô neakukose mutu, neakuowe ku mutshi, ne nyunyu ya mulu neyizokole munyinyi wa mubidi webe." 
Genesis40:20 Hakahita matuku asatu, dituku adi diakadi dituku dia kuledibua kua Palo, yeye wakalambishila bantu bandi bidia bia disanka, ne yeye Wakabikila kahita ka bana maluvu ne kahita ka bena bidia ku mesu kua bantu bandi." 
Genesis40:21 Yeye wakahingasha kahita ka bena maluvu mu mudimu wandi kabidi, ne yeye wakaha Palo luhanza luandi mu tshianza tshiandi kabidi." 
Genesis40:22 Kadi yeye wakowa kahita ka bena bidia bu muakamba Yosefe. 
Genesis40:23 Kadi kahita ka bena maluvu wakahua Yosefe muoyo, yeye kakamuvuluka." 
Genesis41:1 Hakahita bidimu bibidi bijima, Palô wakalota tshiota, yeye wakadi muimane hehi ne musulu." 
Genesis41:2 Wakamona ngombe muanda mutekete yakadi ne manyi a bungi, yakabanda mu mai, yakadi idia mashinde malehe." 
Genesis41:3 Wakamona kabidi ngombe mikuabo muanda mutekete minyane, kayakadi ne manyi nansha, yakabanda mu mai, yakimana ne ngombe mikuabo kukala kua mai." 
Genesis41:4 Ngombe minyane yakadia ngombe muanda mutekete yakadi midiunde ne ya manyi. Hashishe Palô wakatabala 
Genesis41:5 Wakalala tulu kabidi, wakalota tshiota tshikuabo, wakamona miehu ya mponda muanda mutekete minene, miakane idiundile ku lubalabala lumue." 
Genesis41:6 Wakamona miehu mikuabo muanda mutekete yakadi mikese, yakafubidila ku luhehele luakafuma ku esete, yakadiunda kuinshi kua mikuabo." 
Genesis41:7 Miehu mikese yakamina miehu yakadi miakane. Palô wakatabala, wakamanya ne, Ntshilota." 
Genesis41:8 Dinda adi mutshima wandi wakabanga kubungama, wakatuma dî, Wakabikila bena majimbu ne bena meji bonso ba mu Ejipitu, Palô wakabamanyisha bilota biandi, kadi nansha umue wabo wakamanya mua kujinguluila Palô bilota biandi." 
Genesis41:9 Hashishe, kahita ka bena maluvu wakambila Palo ne, Ndi muvuluke dihanga dianyi lelu." 
Genesis41:10 Hakadi Palô ne bantu bandi tshiji, yeye wakatubuesha ne kahita ka bena bidia mu nsubu wa lukanu," 
Genesis41:11 bubidi buetu tuakalota bilota dituku dimue, bu mudi dijingulula dia tshilota tshiandi." 
Genesis41:12 Nsongalume Muena Ebelu, mukuatshishi wa kapitene ka masalayi, wakadi nʼetu mu nsubu wa lukanu, bakamuambila bilota bietu, ne yeye wakatujinguluila muntu tshilota tshiandi muntu tshiota tshiandi." 
Genesis41:13 Malu onso akalua bu muakambeye, bakampingasha mu mudimu wanyi, kadi bakowa muntu mukuabo." 
Genesis41:14 Hashishe Palô wakatuma di, Wakabikila Yosefe, bakamuhatula mu nsubu wa midima lubilu, yeye wakadibeya muedi wandi, wakaluata bilulu bikuabo, wakaya kudi Palô." 
Genesis41:15 Palô wakambila Yosefe ne, Nakalota tshiota ne kakuena muntu udi mua kutshinjinguluila, kadi nakunvua lumu hebe ne, Wewe haunvua tshiota tshia muntu, udi mua kumujinguluilatshi." 
Genesis41:16 Yosefe wakambila Palô ne, Kammeme to, kadi Nzambi neahe Palô kujingulula kudi ne ditalala." 
Genesis41:17 Palo wakambila Yosefe ne, Mu tshiota tshanyi nakamona meme muimane kukala kuamusulu," 
Genesis41:18 nakamona ngombe muanda mutekete yakadi ne manyi a bungi, yakabanda mu mai, yakadia mashinde malehe." 
Genesis41:19 Ngombe muanda mutekete mikuabo, minyane, kayakadi ne manyi yakayilonda, tshakatangila ngombe minyane nunku mu buloba bua Ejipitu diambedi nansha." 
Genesis41:20 Ngombe minyane yakadia ngombe muanda mutekete yakadi midiunde," 
Genesis41:21 ne hakayidia ngombe mikuabo nunku, kabakama nya ne yakayidia, yakadi anu minyane bu diambedi Nunku nakatabala." 
Genesis41:22 Mu tshiota tshikuabo nakatangila miehu muanda mutekete minene miakane midiunde ku lubalabala lumue. 
Genesis41:23 Miehu muanda mutekete mikese yakadi mifubidile ku luhehele luakafuma ku esete, yakadiundila kuinshi kua mikuabo," 
Genesis41:24 ne miehu nukese yakadia miehu muanda mutekete miakane, meme nakatshiawila benu majimbu, kadi nansha umue wabo wakamanya mua kutshinjinguluila." 
Genesis41:25 Yosefe wakambila Palô ne, Bilota bia Palo bidi tshilota tshimue, Nzambi wakamanyisha Palô malu akadiye ha kuenza." 
Genesis41:26 Ngombe midiunde muanda mutekete idi bu bidimu muanda mutekete, ne miehu miakane muanda mutekete idi bu bidimu muanda mutekete, tshilota tshidi anu tshimue." 
Genesis41:27 Ngombe minyane muanda mutekete yakalonda ku nyima kuai idi bu bidimu muanda mutekete, ne miehu yakafubidila ku luhehele luakafuma ku esete, idi bu bidimu muanda mutekete bia tshiole." 
Genesis41:28 Au mmalu anakuambila Palô, Nzambi wakulesha Palô malu akadiye ha kuenza" 
Genesis41:29 Monai, bidimu muanda mutekete bilualua bidi buloba bua Ejipitu buonso bulua ne bintu bia bungi," 
Genesis41:30 ne ku nyima bidimu muanda mutekete bia tshiole bilualua bidi bantu bahua muoyo bua bintu bia bungi biakadibo nʼabi, tshiole netshidie bintu bionso biakadi mu buloba," 
Genesis41:31 kabena bamanye bintu bia bungi mu buloba bualu bua tshiole tshilualua, netshitambe bukole." 
Genesis41:32 Bua bualu ebu mbuakalotela Palo bilota bibidi, bualu ebu nebujadikibue kudi Nzambi, Nzambi neabushikishe tshituha tshibi." 
Genesis41:33 Nunku Palo asungule muntu udi ne budimu ne lungenyi, amuteke ku mutu kua buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:34 Palo enze biandi bualu ebu kabidi, asungule tuhita tua mu buloba, tusangishe tshintu tshitanu tshia bintu bionso bidi bidiunda mu buloba bua Ejipitu mu bidimu ebi muanda mutekete bidi buloba bulua ne bintu bia bungi." 
Genesis41:35 Tusangishe bintu bia kudia mu bidimu ebi bimpe, tubiteke mu bianza bia Palo bua bantu kudiabo mu bimenga, tubilame bimpe." 
Genesis41:36 Bintu ebi nebikale bilamibue mu diyeba bua bidimu muanda mutekete bia tshiole tshilualua mu buloba bua Ejipitu, bua bena buloba kabafu ne tshiole." 
Genesis41:37 Bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kua Palô ne ku mesu kua bantu bandi bonso. 
Genesis41:38 Palô wakambila bantu bandi ne, Tudi mua kumona muntu mukuabo udi ne mutshima wa Nzambi nunku kudi kunyi?" 
Genesis41:39 Palô wakambila Yosefe ne, Bualu bua Nzambi wakakulesha bualu ebu buonso, kakuena muntu udi mua kukutamba budimu ne lungenyi," 
Genesis41:40 wewe newikale mulami wa nsubu wanyi, ne bantu banyi bonso nebakokeshibue anu ku dî diebe, anu bua nkuasa wa bukelenge nenkutambe." 
Genesis41:41 Palô wakambila Yosefe ne, Tangila, nakukuteka ha mutu ha buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Genesis41:42 Palô wakakohola kakanu ka tshimanyinu tshiandi tshifundahu ku munu wandi, wakakela ku munu wa Yosefe, wakamuluatshisha bilulu bia lin, wakamuela lukanu lua or mu nshingu muandi," 
Genesis41:43 wakamuendesha mu dikalu dibidi dia bukelenge, wakela mbila ku mpala kuandi ne, Tuai binu hanshi, wakamuteka mu bukelenge bua buloba bua Ejipitu buonso" 
Genesis41:44 Palo wakambila Yosefe ne, Meme ndi Palo, ne biwikala kuyi muambe di diebe, muntu kena mua kubisha tshianza tshiandi anyi dikasa diandi mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Genesis41:45 Palo wakidika Yosefe dina dikuabo ne, Sefenata-panea, wakamuha Asenata, muana mukashi wa Poti-fela, mubuki wa mu Ono, bu mukashi wandi Yosefe wakendakana mu misoko yonso ya mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:46 Yosefe wakadi ne bidimu makumi asatu hakimaneye ku mpala kua Palo, mukelenge wa Ejipitu. Yosefe wakumuka ku mpala kua Palô, wakendakana mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Genesis41:47 Mu bidimu bimpe muanda mutekete buloba buakalua ne bintu bia bungi, mafuka mafuka" 
Genesis41:48 Yeye wakasangisha bintu bia kudia bionso bia mu bidimu abi muanda mutekete bia mu Ejipitu, wakabiteka mu bimenga, bintu bia kudia biakadiunda mu madimi a ha matshika a musoko, wakabiteka mu musoko au." 
Genesis41:49 Yosefe wakasangisha matete bu bungi bua nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene, akatamba bungi, yeye wakalekela kua-bala, kabakamanya mua kuabala." 
Genesis41:50 Asenata, muana mukashi wa Poti-fela, mubuki wa mu Ono, wakalelela Yosefe bana ba balume babidi, diambedi tshiole katshiyi tshianze kulua." 
Genesis41:51 Yosefe wakidika muanʼa bute dina ne, Manashe; bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Nzambi wakumpuisha muoyo bua mudimu wanyi mukole ne bua bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatuʼanyi." 
Genesis41:52 Wakidika muana mukuabo dina ne, Efelayima, bualu bua wakamba ne, Nzambi wakunkumbasha mu buloba bua dikenga dianyi." 
Genesis41:53 Bidimu bimpe muanda mutekete biakadi buloba bua Ejipitu bulua ne bintu bia bungi biakashika. 
Genesis41:54 Bidimu bia tshiole muanda mutekete biakabanga kulua bu muakamba Yosefe, biole biakadi mu maloba onso, kadi mu Ejipitu muakadi mushale bintu bia kudia." 
Genesis41:55 Hakamueneka nzala mu buloba bua Ejipitu, bantu bakadidila Palô ne, Utuhe bia kudia Palo wakambila Bena Ejipitu bonso ne, Yai bienu kudi Yosefe, nuenze malu adiye wamba." 
Genesis41:56 Tshiole tshiakadi ku nseke yonso ya buloba, ne Yosefe wakunzulula bibi bia mayeba onso, wakamanyisha Bena Ejipitu, tshiole tshiakatamba bukole mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:57 Bantu ba mu maloba onso bakalua mu Ejipitu kudi Yosefe bua kusumbabo bia kudia, bualu bua tshiole tshiakadi tshikole mu maloba onso." 
Genesis42:1 Hakamanya Yakoba ne, Bintu bia kudia biakashala mu Ejipitu, yeye wakambila bana bandi balume ne, Nudi batangilangana muaku bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis42:2 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Monai, nakunvua lumu ne, Bintu bia kudia biakashala mu Ejipitu, yai bienu kuakua, nutusumbileku bia kudia, bua tuetu tuhanduke, katufu." 
Genesis42:3 Bana babo ne Yosefe dikumi bakaya mu Ejipitu bua kusumbabo bia kudia. 
Genesis42:4 Kadi Yakoba kakatuma Benyamina, muakunyi wa Yosefe, ne bana babo, wakamba ne, Bumue bualu bubi nebumukuate." 
Genesis42:5 Bana balume ba Isalele bakalua mu tshisumbu tshia bantu bua kusumbabo bia kudia, bualu bua tshiole tshiakadi mu buloba bua Kanana." 
Genesis42:6 Yosefe wakadi mukokeshi wa mu buloba, nyeye mene wakadi uhanyisha bantu bonso bintu, bana babo ne Yosefe bakalua, bakamukukuila hanshi." 
Genesis42:7 Yosefe wakamona bana babo, wakabamanya, kadi yeye wakadivuisha bu muntu mukuabo kudibo, wakabambila mei makole, wakabakonka ne, Nuakufuma kudi kunyi? Bakamukudimuna di ne, Mu buloba bua Kanana, tuakuluila bua kusumba bia kudia." 
Genesis42:8 Yosefe wakamana bana babo, kadi bobo kabakamumanya." 
Genesis42:9 Yosefe wakavuluka bua bilota biandi biakabaloteleye, yeye wakabambila ne, Nudi batentekedi, nuakuluila bua kutangila ne buloba budi butuhu." 
Genesis42:10 Bobo bakamuambila ne, Nansha, mukelenge wetu, bantu bebe bakuluila anu bua kusumbabo bia kudia." 
Genesis42:11 Buonso buetu tudi bana ba muntu umue, tudi bambe mei a bushuwa, katuena batentekedi." 
Genesis42:12 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Nansha, nuakuluila anu bua kutangila ne buloba budi hatuhu." 
Genesis42:13 Bobo bakamuku dimuna ne, Tuetu, bantu bebe, tudi bana dikumi ne babidi ba muntu umue wa mu buloba bua Kanana, ne mona, muana wa mukala udi mushale ne tatu wetu katataka, ne mukuabo kenaku." 
Genesis42:14 Yosefe wakabambila ne, Adi ndi dinakunuambila ne, Nudi batentekedi," 
Genesis42:15 nennutete ku bualu ebu, ndi nditshiha ku muoyo wa Palô ne, Kanuena numuka kunoko anu hanualua ne muanʼenu, muanʼa mukala kunoko." 
Genesis42:16 Nutume umue wa munkatshi muenu, alue biandi ne muanʼenu, muanʼa mukala kunoko, netunusuike mionshi buonso buenu, netutete mei enu, bua kumanya ne, Nudi nuamba mei malelela, anyi bualu bunakuditshiha ku muoyo wa Palo ne, Nudi batentekedi, nebuikale bulelela." 
Genesis42:17 Yeye wakababuesha buonso buabo mu nsubu wa lukanu to matuku asatu. 
Genesis42:18 Hakahita matuku asatu, Yosefe wakabambila ne, Enzai nunku nushale ne muoyo, bualu bua meme ndi ntshina Nzambi." 
Genesis42:19 Binuamba mei malelela, nuitabushe bua: umue wenu ashale musuikibue mu nsubi wa lukanu, kadi bakuabo benu baye kuenu ne bia kudia bualu bua tshiole tshidi mu nsubu yenu." 
Genesis42:20 Nu hingane ne muanʼenu, muanʼa mukala kundi, nunku mei enu neajalame, kanuena nufue. Bobo bakitabusha." 
Genesis42:21 Bakambilangana ne, Tuetu tuakudihisha bulelela mu bualu bubi butuakenzela muanʼetu hatuakatangila kanyinganyinga ka mutshima wandi hakadiye utusengelela, kadi tuetu katuakamunvuila, bua bualu ebu dikenga diakatukuata." 
Genesis42:22 Lubena wakabambila ne Tshiakanuambila ne, Kanuenzedi muana bualu bubi, kadi nuenu kanuakangunvuila, anyi? Nunku mashi andi adi ashala ha bilamba bienu." 
Genesis42:23 Bobo kabakamanya ne, Yosefe wakadi ujingulula mei akadibo bambilangana, bualu bua muandamunyi wa miaku wakadiku." 
Genesis42:24 Yeye wakabakoma nyima, wakadia, ne yeye wakatshinguluka kudibo, wakayikila nʼabo, wakakuata Shimeona, wakamusuika ku mesu kuabo." 
Genesis42:25 Hashishe Yosefe wakambila ba ntu bandi ne, Nubushile bibombi biabo tente ne bia kudia, nuhingashe argent wa muntu ne muntu mu tshibombi tshiandi, nubahe bintu bia kudiabo mu nshila, bakenza nunku." 
Genesis42:26 Bakateka bintu bia kudia ha nyima ha mpunda yabo bakaya. 
Genesis42:27 Hakafikabo ku nsubu wa tshilala benyi, umue wabo wakasulula tshi bombi tshiandi bua kudisheye mpunda wandi, wakatangila argent yandi ba mutu ha tshibombi tshiandi." 
Genesis42:28 Yeye wakambila bana babo ne Bakumpingashila argent yanyi, idi mu tshibombi, mitshima yabo ya kahandika, bakazakala, bakambila ngana ne, Bualu ebu buakutuenzela Nzambi budi tshinyi?" 
Genesis42:29 Bakalua kudi Yakoba, tatuʼabo, mu buloba bua Kanana, bakamuambila malu onso akabakuata ne," 
Genesis42:30 Muntu au mukelenge wa mu buloba, wakatua mbila mei makole, wakatuenzela bu batentekedi ba buloba." 
Genesis42:31 Tuetu tuakamuambila ne, Tudi bambe mei malelela, katuena batentekedi," 
Genesis42:32 tudi bana dikumi ne babidi ba tatu umue, umue wetu kenaku, ne mua nʼetu, muanʼa mukala udi mushale ne tatu wetu mu buloba bua Kanâna." 
Genesis42:33 Muntu au, mukelenge wa buloba, wakabambila ne, Ku bualu ebu nemmanye ne, Nudi nuamba mei malelela, nushiye umue wenu kundi, bakuabo benu bangate bia kudia bia kumana nʼabi tshiole tshidi mu nsubu yenu, yai bienu." 
Genesis42:34 Nuhingane kundi ne muanʼenu, muan a mukala, hashishe nemmanye ne, Kanuena batentekedi nudi bantu ba mei a bushuwa nunku nempingashe muan enu mu bianza bienu, nenumanye mua kuendulula mushinga mu buloba." 
Genesis42:35 Hakahongololabo bintu biakadi mu bibombi biabo, bakasangana argent ya muntu ne muntu mu tshibombi tshiandi, hakamonabo, bobo ne tatu wabo argent yabo bakatshina." 
Genesis42:36 Yakoba, tatu wabo, wakabambila ne, Nuenu nuakunjimishila bana banyi Yosefe kenaku, ne Shimeona kenaku, ne nudi nuamba kuya ne Benyamina, malu au onso adi mantonde." 
Genesis42:37 Lubena wakambila tatu wandi ne, Udi mua kushiha bana banyi balume babidi, binahanga kumuhingasha kudi umufile mu tshianza tshianyi, ne meme nemmuhingashe kûdi kabidi." 
Genesis42:38 Yakoba wakamba ne Muan anyi kena uya nʼenu, mukuluʼandi udi mufue ne anu yeye umuehele udi mushale, biamukuata bualu bubi mu nshila unuaya, hashishe, nenuvuishe nsuki yanyi mitoke to ne kanyinganyinga mu Muaba wa Bafue." 
Genesis43:1 Tshiole tshiakatamba bukole mu buloba. 
Genesis43:2 Hakashikishabo kudia bintu bionso biakaluabo nʼabi ku Ejipitu, tatu wabo wakabambila ne, Yai bienu tshiakabidi nutusumbileku ba kudia tukese." 
Genesis43:3 Yuda wakamuambila ne, Mulume au wakabambila bikole ne, Kanuena nu ntangila ku mesu, binuikala kanuyi nulua ne muakunyʼenu kundi." 
Genesis43:4 Biwatutuma ne muanʼetu, netuye, ne tukusumbile bia kudia," 
Genesis43:5 kadi biwahidia kututuma nʼandi, katuena tuyaku, bualu bua mulume au waka tuambila ne, Kanuena nuntangila ku mesu, binuikala kanuyi nulua ne muakunyiʼenu kundi." 
Genesis43:6 Isalele wakamba ne, Nuakungenzela bibi nunku, hanuakuambila mulume au ne, Tudi ne muakunyʼetu, munyi?" 
Genesis43:7 Bakamba ne, Mulume au wakatukonka bua malu etu mene, ne bua bana betu ne, Tatu wenu utshidi ne muoyo, anyi? Nudi ne muanʼenu mukuabo wa balume, anyi? Tuetu bakamukudimuna anu bu muakatukonkeye, tuakadianjila kumanya ne, Yeye wakadi mua kutuambila ne, Luai ne muanʼenu wa balume kunoko, anyi?" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda wakambila Isalele tatuʼandi ne, Utume nsongalume nʼanyi, netubike, netuye, bua betu ne wewe ne bana hetu bakese bikale ne muoyo, katufu" 
Genesis43:9 Meme nendieyeke kudiye bu tshieya mu muaba wandi, udi mua kumusombuela ku tshianza tshianyi binahanga kuhingana nʼandi kudi ne kumuteka ku mpala kuebe hashishe nendibadile bujitu ebu tshiendelele;" 
Genesis43:10 bu tuetu katuyi bajanguluke nunku, tuakadi mua kuhingana kunoko tshiakabidi." 
Genesis43:11 Tatu wabo Isalele wakabambila ne, Bikala bualu butukuate, enzai bienu nunku nuangate bintu biakakuamibua mu buloba buetu, nubiteke mu bisaka bienu, nuye nʼabi bu matabisha kudi mulume au Nuangate bintu bia muhuya muimpe, baume ne buitshi ne mula ne pistaches ne amandes," 
Genesis43:12 nuye ne argent muhite misangu ibidi mu bianza bienu, argent yakahingashabo munda mua bibombi bienu, nuye nʼai mu bianza bienu kabidi, bumue bakenza bualu abu ku mpukahuka" 
Genesis43:13 nuangate muakunyiʼenu kabidi, bikai bienu, nuye kudi mulume au." 
Genesis43:14 Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso anufue luse ku mesu kua mulume au, bua yeye ahingashe muanʼenu mukuabo ne Benyamina kabidi mu bianza bienu Bianjimishilabo bana banyi, nembajimishe" 
Genesis43:15 Bobo bakangata matabisha au, ne argent misangisha misangu ibidi, ne Benyamina mu bianza biabo, bakabika, bakaya mu Ejipitu, bakimana ku mpala kua Yosefe." 
Genesis43:16 Hakatangila Yosefe Benyamina nʼabo, wakambila mulami wa nsubu wandi ne, Ulue ne balume aba mu nsubu, ubashihele nyama, ulongolole bintu bia kudia, bualu bua bantu aba nebadie nʼanyi bidia diba hankatshi." 
Genesis43:17 Mulami Wakenza bu muakamba Yosefe, wakalua nʼabo mu nsubu wa Yosefe." 
Genesis43:18 Bobo bakatshina hakaluabo nʼabo mu nsubu wa Yosefe, bakambilangana ne, Bakatubuesha mu nsubu nunku bualu bua argent yakahingashabo mu bibombi bietu diambedi badi basue kutubanda ne bubi, nebatukuate ne mpunda yetu, nebatubueshe mu buhika." 
Genesis43:19 Bakasemena ha buihi ne mulami wa nsubu wa Yosefe, bakayikila nʼandi ku tshibi tshia nsubu," 
Genesis43:20 bakamba ne, Mukelenge wetu, tuakalua kunoko diambedi bua kusumba bia kudia," 
Genesis43:21 ne hatuakafika ku nsubu wa tshilala benyi, tuakasulula bibombi bietu, tuakamona argent yetu yonso munda mua tshibombi tshia muntu ne muntu, tuakulua nʼai kabidi mu tshianza tshietu." 
Genesis43:22 Tuakulua kabidi ne argent mikuabo bua kusumba bia kudia, katuena bamanye muntu wakahingasha argent ei mu bibombi bietu." 
Genesis43:23 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuikale talala, kanutshinyi Nzambi, Nzambi wa tatu wenu, wakanuha bintu mu bibombi bienu, meme nakadi ne argent yenu. Yeye wakalua ne Shimeona kudibo." 
Genesis43:24 Muntu eu wakalua nʼabo mu nsubu wa Yosefe, wakabaha mai, ne bobo bakuvuwa makasa abo, ne yeye wakadisha mpunda yabo kabidi." 
Genesis43:25 Bobo bakalongolola matabisha diambedi Yosefe kayi muanze kulua diba hankatshi, bualu bua bakunvua lumu ne, Netudieku nʼandi bidia." 
Genesis43:26 Hakalua Yosefe ku nsubu kuandi, bakalua ne matabisha mu bianza biabo, bakamukukuila hanshi." 
Genesis43:27 Yeye wakabakonka bua malu abo ne, Tatu wenu, muntu au mununu unuakungambila, udi mukole, anyi? Utshidi ne muoyo, anyi?" 
Genesis43:28 Bobo bakamukudimuna ne, Muntu webe tatu wetu, udi mukole, utshidi ne muoyo Bobo bakatua mpala yabo hanshi, bakamukukuila." 
Genesis43:29 Yeye wakakenzakana, wakamona Benyamina, muakunyʼandi, muana wa mamu wandi, wakabakonka ne, Eu udi muakunyʼenu unuakungambila, anyi? Yeye wakamuambila ne, Nzambi akufute luse, muanʼanyi." 
Genesis43:30 Yosefe wakumuka lubilu, bualu bua mutshima wandi wakajinga bua muakunyiʼandi, wakakeba muaba wa kudidileye, wakabuela mu nsubu wandi wa bulalu, wakadidilamu." 
Genesis43:31 Yeye wakuvuwa mai ku mpala kuandi, wakahingana kudibo, wakadikanda, wakamba ne, Lua ne bidia." 
Genesis43:32 Bakamuha bidia ha buandi, bakabaka bidia ha buabo, ne bakaha Bena Ejipitu bakadi badia nʼandi ha buabo, bualu bua Bena Ejipitu kabatu badia bidia ne Bena Ebelu, bualu ebu budi bufuisha Bena Ejipitu bundu." 
Genesis43:33 Bakashikama ku mpala kuandi, muntu ku mulongo wandi muntu ku mulongo wandi, wakatuadishila ku muanʼa bute to ne ku muanʼa mukala, balume aba bakakemangana." 
Genesis43:34 Yeye wakababanyina bidia biakadi ku mpala kuandi, kadi tshituha tshia Benyamina tshiakahita tshituha tshiabo misangu itanu. Bakanua, bakasanka nʼandi." 
Genesis44:1 Yosefe wakambila mulami wa nsubu wandi ne, Ûshe bibombi bia balume ne bia kudia tente, bungi bua bujitu budibo mua kutuala, teka argent ya muntu ne muntu munda mua tshîbombi tshiandi." 
Genesis44:2 Teka luhanza luanyi lua argent mu tshibombi tshia muana muakunyi ne argent yandi kabidi Yeye Wakenza bu dî dia Yosefe. 
Genesis44:3 Hakatshia butuku bakatuma balume aba ne mpunda yabo kuabo. 
Genesis44:4 Hakumukabo mu musoko, kabayi banze kuya kule, Yosefe wakambila mulami wandi ne, Bika biebe, ulonde balume aba ne hawabaheta, ubakonke ne, Bualu kai nuakashintakasha malu mabi ku malu mimpe?" 
Genesis44:5 Luhanza alu kaluena luhanza lua mukelenge wanyi ludiye unua nʼalu ne ludiye utempa nʼalu matempu anyi? Nuakuenza bibi mu bualu ebu. 
Genesis44:6 Yeye wakabaheta, wakabambila mei au." 
Genesis44:7 Bobo bakamuambila ne, Mukelenge wetu udi wamba mei au munyi? Bantu bebe kabena mua kuenza bualu bubi nunku." 
Genesis44:8 Monai argent ituakasangana mu bibombi bietu, tuakulua nʼai kûdi kabidi hatuakafuma ku buloba bua Kanana. Tuetu tuakadi tuiba argent anyi or mu nsubu wa mukelenge webe munyi?" 
Genesis44:9 Biwasangana luhanza alu kudi muntu kai wa munkatshi muetu udi nʼalu, afue biandi, ne tuetu kabidi netuikale bahika ba mukelenge webe." 
Genesis44:10 Yeye wakamba ne, Bualu ebu nebuenjibue bu mu mei enu, muntu utuasangana nʼalu, yeye neikale muhika wanyi, ne bakuabo benu nebahanduke." 
Genesis44:11 Bakadila bibombi biabo hanshi lubilu, ne muntu ne muntu bakasulula bibombi biabo." 
Genesis44:12 Bakabangila kukeba ku muanʼa bute to ne ku muanʼa mukala, bakasangana luhanza mu tshibombi tshia Benyamina." 
Genesis44:13 Hashishe bakahanda bilulu biabo, bakahingasha majitu ha nyima ha mpunda yabo, bakahingana mu musoko." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda ne bana babo bakalua ku nsubu wa Yosefe, yeye wakadiku, bakadikuma hanshi ku mpala kua ndi." 
Genesis44:15 Yosefe wakabakonka ne, Bualu ebu bunuakuenza budi munyi? Kanuena bamanye ne muntu bu meme udi mua kutempa matempu, anyi?" 
Genesis44:16 Yuda wakamba ne, Netuandamune mukelenge wetu dî manyi? Netuambe tshinyi? Netudibingishe munyi? Nzambi wakasokolola bubi bua bantu bebe, tangila, buonso buetu tudi bahika bebe, ne tuetu ne muntu wakasanganabo ne luhanza." 
Genesis44:17 Yosefe wakabambila ne Tshiena mua kuenza nunku anu muntu wakasanganabo ne luhanza mu tshianza tshiandi neikale muhika wanyi kadi bakuabo benu nuhingane kudi tatu wenu talala. 
Genesis44:18 Hashishe Yuda wakalua ha buihi nʼandi, wakamba ne, Mukelenge wanyi, witabushe, ndi nkutendekena, bua muntu webe ambile di ku matshu a mukelenge wanyi kunakadi ne tshiji kudi muntu webe, bualu bua wewe udi bu Palo mene." 
Genesis44:19 Mukelenge wanyi wakakonka bantu bebe ne Nudi ne tatu, anyi muanʼenu mukuabo, anyi?" 
Genesis44:20 Tuetu tuakakudimuna mukelenge wetu di ne, Tudi ne tatu muntu mununu, ne muan etu mukuabo wakamulelabo ku bununu buandi utshidi mukese, muan abo mukuabo wa difu dimue wakafua, ne anu yeye muana umuehele kua mamu wandi udi mushale ne tatu wandi udi umunanga." 
Genesis44:21 Wewe wakambila bantu bebe ne, Luai nʼandi kundi, bua meme kumonangana nʼandi ku mesu." 
Genesis44:22 Tuetu tuakambila mukelenge wetu ne, Nsongalume eu kena mua kushiya tatu Wandi, biamushiyeye, tatu wandi neafue." 
Genesis44:23 Wewe wakambila bantu bebe ne, Binuikala kanuyi balue ne muakunyʼenu, kanuena numonangana nʼanyi ku mesu." 
Genesis44:24 Nunku hatuakahingana kudi muntu webe, tatu wetu, bakamuambila mei a mukelenge wanyi." 
Genesis44:25 Tatu wetu wakatuambila ne, Yai bienu kabidi, nutusumbile tuntu tua kudia tukese." 
Genesis44:26 Tuetu bakamba ne, Kabena mua kuyaku, bikala muakunyʼetu kayi muye nʼetu, bualu bua katuena mua kumonangana ne muntu au ku mesu bikala muakunyʼetu kayi nʼetu." 
Genesis44:27 Muntu webe, tatu wetu wakabambila ne, Nudi bamanye ne mukashi wanyi wakundelela bana balume babidi," 
Genesis44:28 umue wabo wakumuka kundi, nakamba ne, Nyama mubi wakamuhandulula, ne ku dituku adi tshiakamutangila kabidi," 
Genesis44:29 binumusha muana eu mukuabo kundi, ne biakuatshishibueye bualu bubi, nennubueshe nsuki yanyi mitoke to mu Muaba wa Bafue ne kanyinganyinga kakole" 
Genesis44:30 Nunku hanaya kudi muntu webe, tatu wanyi, ne nsongalume eu kayi nʼetu, bualu bua muoyo wandi udi musuikakana ne muoyo wa nsongalume eu," 
Genesis44:31 hashishe, hatangileye ne nsongalume kena nʼetu, yeye neafue, ne tuetu, bantu bebe, netubueshe nsuki ya muntu webe, tatu wetu, mu Muaba wa Bafue ne kanyinganyinga kakole." 
Genesis44:32 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, meme, muntu webe nakadieyeka bu tshieya tshia nsongalume eu kudi tatu wanyi. Nakamuambila ne, Binahanga kuhingana nʼandi kûdi, hashishe nendituadile bujitu bua bualu ebu tshiendelele." 
Genesis44:33 Nunku ndi nkutendekena ne, Witabushe bua muntu webe ashale kunoko bu muhika webe mu muaba wa nsongalume, ne nsongalume ahingane ne bana babo." 
Genesis44:34 Ndi mua kuya kudi tatu wanyi bikala nsongalume kayi nʼanyi munyi? Bua tshitangidi bualu ebu bubi budi bulue kudi tatu wanyi. 
Genesis45:1 Hashishe, Yosefe kakamanya mua kudikanda kudishikunka ku mesu kua bantu bakimana ha buihi nʼandi, wakamba ne, Numushe bantu bonso kundi Nansha muntu mukuabo wakashala nʼandi hakadimanyisha Yosefe kudi bana babo." 
Genesis45:2 Yeye wakadia bikole, Bena Ejipitu ne bantu ba mu nsubu wa Palô bakunvua muadi wandi." 
Genesis45:3 Yosefe wakambila bana babo ne, Ndi Yosefe mene; tatu wanyi utshidi ne muoyo, anyi? Bana babo kabakamanya mua kumuitaba, bakadi batshina ku mesu kuandi." 
Genesis45:4 Yosefe wakambila bana babo ne, Ndi nnutendekena ne, Semenai ha buihi nʼanyi. Bakasemena ha buihi Yeye wakamba ne, Ndi bianyi Yosefe, muakunyʼenu unuakahana mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis45:5 Mitshima yenu kayinyingaladi, kanukuatshiki tshiji bualu bua nuenu nuakumpana kunoko; bualu bua Nzambi wakantumina ku mpala kuenu bua kusungila mioyo ya bantu." 
Genesis45:6 Tshiole tshiakashala mu buloba bidimu bibidi, ne bidimu bitanu bidi bishala bidibo kabayi badima, kabayi bahuola bintu." 
Genesis45:7 Nzambi wakantuma ku mpala kuenu bua kunusangasha difuka dikese dia bantu ne bua kusungila mioyo yenu ku luhandu lunene. 
Genesis45:8 Nunku nuenu kanuakantuma kunoko, kadi Nzambi wakantuma; nyeye wakanvuisha bu tatu wa Palô ne mukelenge wa nsubu wandi wonso, ne mukokeshi wa buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Genesis45:9 Yai bienu lubilu kudi tatu wanyi, numuambile ne, Muanʼebe Yosefe wakamba ne, Nzambi wakanvuisha mukelenge wa buloba bua Ejipitu buonso, Ulue biebe kundi, kujanguluki." 
Genesis45:10 Wewe neushikame mu buloba bua Goshene, newikale ha buihi nʼanyi, wewe ne bana bebe ne bana ba bana bebe, ne mikoko yebe ne ngombe yebe ne bintu bionso biudi nʼabi," 
Genesis45:11 nenkudishileku bualu bua bidimu bia tshiole bidi bishale bitanu; kanulu bu bahele, wewe ne bonso badi mu nsubu webe ne bintu biudi nʼabi." 
Genesis45:12 Nunku tangildi, mesu enu adi amona bu mudi mesu a muakunyʼanyi Benyamina amona ne, Mukana muanyi mudi munuambila malu au." 
Genesis45:13 Nuenu nuambile tatu wanyi bua butumbi buonso bundi nʼabu mu Ejipitu, ne bua malu onso anuakumona, nuhingane ne tatu wanyi kunoko lubilu." 
Genesis45:14 Yeye wakela Benyamina tshituha ku nshingu, wakadila, ne Benyamina wakadia ku nshingu wandi kabidi." 
Genesis45:15 Wakatuangana mishiku ne bana babo bonso, wakadidila ku nshingu yabo, hashishe bana babo bakayikila nʼandi." 
Genesis45:16 Bakunvua lumu elu mu nsubu wa Palô ne, Bana babo ne Yosefe bakalua; lumu elu luakasankisha mitshima ya Palô ne ya bantu bandi." 
Genesis45:17 Palô wakambila Yosefe ne, Wambile bana benu ne, Enzai nunku, tekai majitu ha nyima ha mpunda yenu, yai bienu ku buloba bua Kanâna;" 
Genesis45:18 nuangate tatuʼenu ne bantu badi mu nsubu yenu, nuhingane kundi nennuheshe bintu bimpe bia mu buloba bua Ejipitu, nenudie bintu bidi bitamba buimpe bia mu buloba." 
Genesis45:19 Nakumana kunuambila dî dianyi, enzai nunku, nuangate makalu a tubalu tua mu buloba buetu bua kutuadilamu bana benu bakese ne bakashi benu, nuangate tatu wenu, nuhingane." 
Genesis45:20 Kanuedianganyi meji a bintu bienu, bualu bua bintu bimpe bionso bia mu buloba bua Ejipitu mbienu." 
Genesis45:21 Bana balume ba Isalele bakenza nunku, Yosefe wakabahesha makalu bu muakamba Palô, wakabaha bintu bia kudiabo mu nshila." 
Genesis45:22 Wakabaha muntu ne muntu bilulu bihia-bihia, kadi wakaha Benyamina bituha bia argent nkama isatu ne bilulu bihia-bihia bitanu." 
Genesis45:23 Wakatumma tatu wandi bintu nunku, nyama ya mpunda dikumi yakadi ne bujitu bua bintu bimpe bia mu buloba bua Ejipitu ha nyima hai ne nyama ya mpunda mikashi dikumi yakadi ne bujitu bua bintu bia kudia ne bintu bia kukuatshisha nʼabi tatuʼandi mu nshila." 
Genesis45:24 Yosefe wakatuma bana babo nunku, bakaya yeye wakabambila ne, Nudimuke, kanutandanganyi mu nshila." 
Genesis45:25 Bakumuka mu Ejipitu, bakalua ku buloba bua Kanana kudi Yakoba tatu abo." 
Genesis45:26 Bakamuambila ne, Yosefe utshidi ne muoyo, ne yeye udi mukelenge wa buloba bua Ejipitu Mutshima wandi wakahandika yeye kakitabusha di diabo." 
Genesis45:27 Bakamuambila mei onso akabambila Yosefe ne hakatangileye makalu akamutumina Yosefe, mutshima wa Yakoba tatuʼabo wakasangala." 
Genesis45:28 Isalele wakamba ne Bualu budi bulelela Yosefe muan anyi utshidi ne muoyo nenye kumumona diambedi tshiyi muanze kufua. 
Genesis46:1 Isalele wakabisha luendu luandi wakangata bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi, wakalua ku Be-sheba wakashihela Nzambi wa tatuʼandi Isaka nyama." 
Genesis46:2 Nzambi wakambila Isalele mu bikena kumona mu butuku ne, Yakoba, Yakoba Yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku." 
Genesis46:3 Yeye wa kamba ne, Ndi Nzambi wa tatuʼebe, kutshinyi bua kuya mu Ejipitu, bualu bua nenkuvuisheku tshisamba tshmene" 
Genesis46:4 nenye nʼebe mu Ejipitu, nennumusheku kabidi bulelela, Yosefe neateke bianza biandi ha mesu ebe" 
Genesis46:5 Yakoba Wakabika ku Be-sheba, bana balume ba Isalele bakatuala Yakoba tatuʼabo ne bana babo ne bakashi babo mu makalu akabatumma Palo." 
Genesis46:6 Bakangata bimuna biabo ne bintu bionso biakangatabo mu buloba bua Kanana, bakalua mu Ejipitu, Yakoba ne tunkanunuina tuandi bionso" 
Genesis46:7 bana bandi ba balume bakaleleye, ne bana ba balume ba bana bandi, ne bana bandi ba bakashi bakaleleye, ne bana ba bakashi ba bana bandi, wakalua ne buonso buabo mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis46:8 Â mmena a bana ba Isalele bakalueye nʼabo mu Ejipitu Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Yakoba." 
Genesis46:9 Bana ba balume ba Lubena, Hanoka ne Palu ne Heselona ne Kâmi." 
Genesis46:10 Bana ba balume ba Shimeona, Yemuele ne Yamina ne Ohada ne Yakina ne Sofa ne Shaula, muana wa mukashi wa Bena Kanana." 
Genesis46:11 Bana ba balume ba Lewi, Geshona ne Kohata ne Melah." 
Genesis46:12 Bana ba balume ba Yuda Ele ne Onana ne Shela, ne Pelese ne Zela kadi Ele ne Onana bakafuila mu buloba bua Kanana Bana ba balume ba Pelese, Helelona ne Hamula." 
Genesis46:13 Bana ba balume ba Yisakâ, Tola ne Puwa ne Yoba ne Shimelona." 
Genesis46:14 Bana ba balume ba Zebuluna, Selede ne Elona ne Yalele." 
Genesis46:15 Aba mbana ba balume ba Lea bakaleleleye Yakoba mu Padana-alama, ne muanʼandi wa bakashi Dina, bana bandi ba balume ne bana bandi ba bakashi makumi asatu ne basatu." 
Genesis46:16 Bana ba balume ba Gada, Sifiona ne Haga ne Shuni ne Esebone ne Eli ne Alodi ne Aleli." 
Genesis46:17 Bana ba balume ba Ashe, Yimena ne Yishewa ne Yishewi ne Belia ne muanʼabo wa bakashi, Sela, ne bana ba balume ba Belia, Hebê ne Malekiele." 
Genesis46:18 Aba mbana ba Zilepa, wakaha Labana muanʼandi mukashi Lea, yeye wakalelela Yakoba bana aba dikumi ne basambombo." 
Genesis46:19 Bana balume ba Lakele, mukashi wa Yakoba, ba kadi Yosefe ne Benyamina." 
Genesis46:20 Asenata, muana mukashi wa Poti-fela, mubuki wa mu Ono, mukashi wa Yosefe, wakamulelela Manashe ne Efelayima mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Genesis46:21 Bana ba balume ba Benyamina, Bela ne Bekê ne Ashebele ne Gela ne Nâmana ne Ehi ne Losha ne Mupima ne Hupima ne Ada." 
Genesis46:22 Aba mbana ba balume ba Lakele bakaleleleye Yakoba buonso buabo dikumi ne banai. 
Genesis46:23 Bana ba Dana, Hushima." 
Genesis46:24 Bana ba Nafatale, Yasele ne Guni ne Yese ne Shilema." 
Genesis46:25 Aba mbana ba Bileha, wakaha Labana Lakele muanʼandi mukashi yeye wakalelela Yakoba bana aba buonso buabo bakadi muanda mutekete" 
Genesis46:26 Bantu aba bonso bakalua ne Yakoba mu Ejipitu bonso bakahatuka munda mua Yakoba, kababadi bakashi ba bana bandi bakadi makumi asambombo ne basambombo," 
Genesis46:27 ne bana ba balume ba Yosefe bakamulelelabo mu Ejipitu bakadi babidi, bantu bonso ba mu nsubu bakalueye nʼabo mu Ejipitu bakadi makumi muanda mutekete." 
Genesis46:28 Yeye wakatuma Yuda ku mpala kuandi kudi Yosefe bua kumulesheye nshila wa ku Goshene, bakalua mu buloba bua Goshene." 
Genesis46:29 Yosefe wakalongolola dikalu diandi wakaya kusangakena ne Isalele, tatuʼandi, mu Goshene Wakafika kudiye, wakamuela tshituha ku nshingu, wakadila to musangu mule." 
Genesis46:30 Isalele wakambila Yosefe ne, Ndi mua kufua katataka, bualu bua nakumana kukumona ku mesu ne wewe utshidi ne muoyo." 
Genesis46:31 Yosefe wakambila bana babo ne bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi ne, Nendianjile kudi Palô, nemmuambile ne, Bana betu bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu wanyi bakadi mu buloba bua Kanâna bakulua kundi." 
Genesis46:32 Bantu aba badi balami ba mikoko, bualu bua bakadi balami ba bimuna, bakalua ne mikoko yabo ne bimuna biabo ne bintu bionso bidibo nʼabi." 
Genesis46:33 Hanubikilabo kudi Palo, yeye neanukonke ne, Nudi benji ba mudimu kai?" 
Genesis46:34 Nuenu nenukudimune di ne, Bantu bebe bakadi balami ba bimuna hatuakadi bitende tô ne katataka, ne tuetu ne batatuʼetu, bua nuenu nushikame mu buloba bua Goshene Bualu bua mulami yonso wa mikoko udi mulenguludibue kudi Bena Ejipitu." 
Genesis47:1 Hashishe Yosefe wakaya, wakambila Palo ne, Tatu wanyi ne bana betu bakulua ku buloba bua Kanâna ne mikoko yabo ne bimuna biabo ne bintu bionso bidibo nʼabi, mona, badi mu buloba bua Goshene." 
Genesis47:2 Yeye wakasungula bantu batanu ba munkatshi mua bana babo, wakabafila kudi Palô." 
Genesis47:3 Palo wakabakonka ne, Nudi benji ba mudimu kai? Bakakudimuna Palo ne, Bantu bebe badi balami ba mikoko, ne tuetu ne batatuʼetu." 
Genesis47:4 Bakambila Palo ne, Tuakuluila bua kushikama mu buloba ebu, katuena ne muaba wa kudisha bimuna bietu bualu bua tshiole tshidi tshikole mu buloba bua Kanana, nunku tudi tukusengelela ne, Witabushe bua bantu bebe bashikama mu buloba bua Goshene" 
Genesis47:5 Palô wakambila Yosefe ne, Tatuʼebe ne bana benu bakulua kudi," 
Genesis47:6 buloba bua Ejipitu buonso budi ku mpala kuebe, ushikike tatuʼebe ne bana benu mu buloba budi butamba buimpe bashikame mu buloba bua Goshene, ne biwamanya bantu ba lungenyi luimpe munkatshi muabo, ubateke balami ba bimuna bianyi." 
Genesis47:7 Yosefe wakalua ne Yakoba, tatuʼandi, wakamuteka ku mpala kua Palô, ne Yakoba wakavudishila Palo disanka." 
Genesis47:8 Palo wakakonka Yakoba ne, Bidimu bia muoyo webe bidi bungi munyi?" 
Genesis47:9 Yakoba wakamukudimuna ne Bidimu bia luendu lua bukole buanyi bidi lukama ne makumi asatu, matuku anyi adi makese, akadi mule tente ne malu mabi, kaena manze kufika ku bungi bua bidimu bia bankambua banyi mu luendu lua bukole buabo." 
Genesis47:10 Yakoba wakavudishila Palo disanka, wakumuka ku mesu kua Palo." 
Genesis47:11 Yosefe wakalesha tatuʼandi ne bana babo muaba bua kushikamabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu, mu buloba buakatamba buimpe, mu buloba bua Lamesese, bu muakamba Palô." 
Genesis47:12 Yosefe wakadisha tatuʼandi ne bana babo ne bantu bonso bakadi mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi, ku meku abo." 
Genesis47:13 Bintu bia kudia kabiakadi mu buloba, bualu bua tshiole tshiakatamba bukole, nunku bantu bonso ba mu Ejipitu ne ba mu buloba bua Kanana bakamba kufua ne nzala." 
Genesis47:14 Yosefe wakasangisha argent yonso yakadi mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne ya mu buloba bua Kanâna ku bintu bia kudia biakasumbabo, Yosefe wakalua ne argent yonso mu nsubu wa Palo." 
Genesis47:15 Hakashika argent yonso ya mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne ya mu buloba bua Kanana, hashishe Bena Ejipitu bonso bakalua kudi Yosefe, bakamuambila ne, Utuhe bia kudia, netufuile ku mesu kuebe bualu kai? Argent yetu yakushika." 
Genesis47:16 Yosefe wakamba ne, Numpe bimuna bienu, nennuhe bia kudia ku bimuna bienu bikale argent yenu mishike." 
Genesis47:17 Bakalua ne bimuna biabo kudi Yosefe, ne Yosefe wakashintakasha nʼabo bia kudia ku tubalu tuabo ne ngombe yabo ne mikoko yabo ne nyama ya mpunda, yeye wakabadisha tshidimu tshijima ne bintu bia kudia biakashintakasheye ku bimuna biabo," 
Genesis47:18 Hakashika tshidimu atshi, bakalua kudiye tshidimu tshibidi, bakamuambila ne, Katuena tusokoka mukelenge wetu bualu tuakashiki sha argent yetu yonso, ne bimuna bietu mbia mukelenge wetu kabidi kakuena tshintu tshidi tshishala ku mesu kua mukelenge wanyi, anu mibidi yetu ne maloba etu." 
Genesis47:19 Kadi netufuile ku mesu kuebe, netujimishe buloba buetu kabidi bualu kai? Utusumbe bietu ne buloba buetu kabidi ku bia kudia ne tuetu ne buloba buetu netuikale bahika ba Palo, utuhe bia kudia, tuikale ne muoyo, katufu, ne buloba kabushadi hatuhu." 
Genesis47:20 Nunku Yosefe wakasumbila Palo buloba bua Ejipitu buonso bualu bua Muena Ejipitu yonso wakahana madimi andi bualu bua tshiole tshiakabatamba bukole, buloba buakalua bua Palô." 
Genesis47:21 Bualu bua bantu aba, yeye wakabateka ku musoko ne ku musoko ku matshika a buloba bua Ejipitu to ne kunfudilu kuabu." 
Genesis47:22 Yeye kakasumba buloba bua babuki, bualu bua babuki bakadi ne tshituha tshiabo kudi Palo, ne bakadila bintu biakabaha Palo nunku bobo kabakahana buloba buabo." 
Genesis47:23 Hashishe Yosefe wakambila bantu ne, Monai, nakunusumbila Palo lelu, nuenu ne buloba buenu ka maminu adi aha bua bualu buenu, nuakune mu buloba." 
Genesis47:24 Nunku hanuahuola bintu, nenufile tshi tuha tshitanu kudi Palô ne nuenu nenushale ne bituha binai bua kukunaku kabidi ne bua kudidisha ne bonso banudi nʼabo mu nsubu yenu, ne bana benu bakese." 
Genesis47:25 Bobo bakamuambila ne, Wewe wakusungi la mioyo yetu, utuendeshe diakalengele ku mesu kua mukelenge wetu, nebikale bahika ba Palo." 
Genesis47:26 Yosefe wakafunda mukanda bua lu bua buloba bua Ejipitu, udiku to ne katataka, ne, Tshituha tshitanu tshia bintu bionso ntshia Palo, anu buloba bua babuki nkayabo kabuakalua bua Palô." 
Genesis47:27 Isalele wakashikama mu buloba bua Ejipitu, mu buloba bua Goshene bakangata bintu mu buloba abu, bakavulangana bakakumbana ba bungi." 
Genesis47:28 Yakoba wakashala mu buloba bua Ejipitu bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete, nunku bidimu bionso bia muoyo wa Yakoba biakadi lukama ne makumi anai ne muanda mutekete." 
Genesis47:29 Dituku dia lufu lua Isalele diakalua ha buihi, Wakabikila muanʼandi Yosefe, wakamuambila ne, Bingikala ne luse ku mesu kuebe, ulenge tshianza tshiebe muinshi mua tshibelu tshinyi, uditshihe bua kungenzela malu mimpe ne a bushuwa, ndi nkutendekena ne, Kabanjiki mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis47:30 Kadi hanalala tulu mu lufu ne bankambua banyi, hashishe umuka nʼanyi mu Ejipitu, uye kunjika mu muaba wakabajikabo Yeye wakamba ne, Nengenze bu muwakuamba." 
Genesis47:31 Yeye wakamba ne, Udi tshihe kundi yeye wakaditshiha Isalele wakashindamina mutu ku mutu wa bulalu." 
Genesis48:1 Hakashika malu a bakambila Yosefe ne, Mona tatu webe udi usama; yeye wakaya kudiye ne bana bandi ba balume babidi, Manashe ne Efelayima." 
Genesis48:2 Bakambila Yakoba ne, Mona muan ebe Yosefe ulua lua kûdi Isalele wakadikolesha, wa kashikama ha bulalu." 
Genesis48:3 Yakoba wakambila Yosefe ne, Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso wakamueneka kundi ku Luze mu buloba bua Kanâna wakansankisha," 
Genesis48:4 wakangambila ne, Mona, nenkuvuishe tshisamba tshinene, nenkukumbashe, neulue tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, nempe tunkanunuina tuebe buloba ebu tshiendelele." 
Genesis48:5 Bana babidi bakakulelelabo mu Ejipitu diambedi tshiyi muanze kulua mu Ejipitu mbana banyi, Efelayima ne Manashe badi banyi bu Lubena ne Shimeona." 
Genesis48:6 Biwalela bana bakuabo ku nyima kuabo, nebikale bana bebe kabidi nebabidike dina dia bana babo mu buhianyi buabo." 
Genesis48:7 Hanakadi nfuma ku Padana, Lakele wakafua mu nshila wa ku buloba bua Kanâna diambedi katuyi banze kufika ku Efelata, nakamujika kuakua mu njila wa ku Efelata (eu udi Beteleheme)." 
Genesis48:8 Isalele wakamona bana babidi ba Yosefe, wakamukonka ne, Aba mbanganyi?" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefe wakambila tatu wandi ne, Aba mbana bakumpa Nzambi kunoko Yeye wakamba ne, Ulue nʼabo kundi, nembavudishile disanka." 
Genesis48:10 Mesu a Isalele akadi bileshileshi bualu bua bununu buandi, yeye kakamanya mua kumona bimpe Yeye wakalua nʼabo ha buihi nʼandi, yeye wakatuangana nʼabo mishiku, wakabuhukila." 
Genesis48:11 Isalele wakambila Yosefe ne Tshiakuelangana meji kua kumona mpala webe, kadi mona, Nzambi wakundesha bana bebe kabidi." 
Genesis48:12 Yosefe wakabumusha hankatshi ha binu biandi, wakatua mpala wandi hanshi." 
Genesis48:13 Yosefe wakabangata bubidi buabo, Efelayima ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ne mpala wandi mutangile ku tshianza tshia bakashi tshia Isalele, ne Manashe ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi mutangile ku tshianza tshia balume tshia Isalele, wakabasemesha ha buihi nʼandi." 
Genesis48:14 Isalele wakolola tshianza tshiandi tshia balume, wakatshitentekasha ha mutu ha Efelayima, wakadi muanʼa mukala wakatentekasha tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi ha mutu ha Manashe wakashintakasha bianza biandi bu muakasueye, bualu bua Manashe wakadi muanʼa bute" 
Genesis48:15 Yeye wakavudishila Yosefe disanka, wakamba ne, Nzambi wakadi batatuʼanyi Abalahama ne Isaka bendakena ku mesu kuandi, Nzambi wakandisha matuku anyi onso tô ne ku dituku edi," 
Genesis48:16 muanjelo wakampikula ku malu mabi onso, avudishile bansongalume aba disanka, dina dianyi ne dina dia batatuʼanyi, Abalahama ne Isaka, ashale kudibo, bakumbane ba bungi mu buloba." 
Genesis48:17 Hakatangila Yosefe ne tatu wandi wakatentekasha tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ha mutu ha Efelayima, bualu ebu kabuakamusankisha, ne yeye wakabisha tshianza tshia tatu wandi, wakamba kutshiumusha ku mutu wa Efelayima, wakamba kutshiteka ku mutu wa Manashe." 
Genesis48:18 Yosefe wakambila tatuʼandi ne, Nansha, tatuʼanyi, kuenji nunku, bualu bua eu udi muanʼa bute, utentekashe tshianza tshiebe tshia balume ha mutu handi." 
Genesis48:19 Kadi tatu wandi wakabenga ne, Ndi mumanye bualu ebu, muanʼanyi, yeye nealue bantu ba bungi, nealue muntu munene kabidi, kadî muakunyʼandi neamutambe bunene, ne tunkanunuina tuandi netuikale tshisamba tshinene." 
Genesis48:20 Yeye wakabavudishila disanka dituku adi, wamba ne, Isalele neavudishile bakuabo disanka bualu buenu, neambe ne, Nzambi anuvuishe disanka dia Efelayima ne dia Manashe, yeye wakateka Efelayima ku mpala kua Manashe." 
Genesis48:21 Isalele wakambila Yosefe ne, Nfuafua, kadi Nzambi neikale nʼenu neanuhingashe mu buloba bua batatuʼetu." 
Genesis48:22 Nakukuha wewe tshituha tshikuabo tshia buloba ku mutu kua bana benu, tshinakanyenga mu bianza bia Bena Amole ne muele wanyi wa nvita ne buta buanyi." 
Genesis49:1 Yakoba Wakabikila bana bandi bonso, wakamba ne, Nudisangishe hamue bua meme kunuambila bua malu alualua kunudi mu matuku adi kayi manze kulua," 
Genesis49:2 Nuenu bana balume ba Yakoba, nudisangishe hamue, unvuai di telejai matshu kudi Isalele tatuʼenu." 
Genesis49:3 Lubena, wewe udi muanʼa bute wanyi, ntshibangidilu tshia bukole buanyi, udi wa kumudilu wa kanemu, ne wa kumudilu wa bukokeshi." 
Genesis49:4 Wewe udi bu mai adi asaba ha kalua, atutukila muiku, wewe kuena wikala ne bukokeshi ku mutu kua bantu, bualu bua wewe wakabanda ha bulalu bua tatuʼebe, wakenzahu bualu bubi wakabanda ha bulalu buanyi." 
Genesis49:5 Shimeona ne Lewi badi bana babo mene, miele yabo ya nvita idi mikole." 
Genesis49:6 Mutshima wanyi kaubuedi mu tshifufu tshiabo, ne butumbi buanyi kabubuelakanyi nʼabo mu disangisha diabo. Bualu bua bobo bakashiha bantu mu tshiji tshiabo, ne mu tshishiku tshiabo bakakosa ngombe mijilu ya bikono biai." 
Genesis49:7 Tshiji tshiabo tshidi tshiedibue mulau, bualu bua tshiakatamba bukole ne bualu bua lukina luabo kaluakadi ne luse, nembatahulule mu Yakoba, nembamuangalashe mu Isalele." 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, bana benu nebakutumbishe, tshianza tshiebe netshifiekele mu nshingu ya bantu badi nʼebe lukuna, bana ba tatu ebe nebakukukuile." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda udi bu muana wa nyama wa ntambue, wakalekela tshintu tshiandi tshia kudia, wakalamina ne binu biandi bu nyama wa ntambue udi bu mukashi wa nyama wa ntambue, mundi kai wamubisha ku tulu?" 
Genesis49:10 Dikombo dia bukelenge kadiena diumuka kudi Yuda, tshibangu tshia bukokeshi katshiena tshiumuka hankatshi ha makasa andi to ne halua Shilo, ne bantu bonso nebakukukuile." 
Genesis49:11 Udi usuika nyama wandi wa mpunda ku muonshi wa tumuma tukese, udi usuika lukungulu lua nyama wa mpunda ku muonshi udi utamba buimpe, wakuvuwa bilulu biandi mu nvinyo, wakuvuwa kazaku kandi mu mashi a tumuma tukese." 
Genesis49:12 Mesu andi neikale makunzekunzû ne manye, ne menu andi neikale matoke to ne mabele." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuluna neashikame kukala kua mai manene muaba wandi newikale muaba wa mabi manene, mukalu wandi neufike tô ne ku Sidona." 
Genesis49:14 Yisakâ udi bu nyama wa mpunda mukole, udi ulala hankatshi ha mpangu ya mikoko," 
Genesis49:15 wakatangila muaba wa kulala ne, Mmuimpe wakatangila buloba ne, Mbuimpe, wakahuekesha diaha diandi bua kumema bujitu, wakalua bu muhika wa mudimu mukole." 
Genesis49:16 Dana nealumbuluile bantu bilumbu biabo, bu tshimue tshia mu bisamba bia Bena Isalele." 
Genesis49:17 Dana neikale bu nyoka mu nshila, ne bu ntoka mu nshila udi usuma kabalu ku mijilu ya bikono, ne muntu udi ubanda ha nyima udi uhona hanshi bualame." 
Genesis49:18 Yehowa, nakuindila luhandu luebe." 
Genesis49:19 Gada, tshisumbu tshia bantu netshimunguile, kadi yeye neabakume ku bikankanyi biabo." 
Genesis49:20 Ashe neikale ne bintu bia kudia bia bungi, neavudishe bintu bia kudia bidi bitambe bilengele." 
Genesis49:21 Nafatale udi bu ntole musulula, udi Wamba mei malengele." 
Genesis49:22 Yosefe udi bu ditamba dia mutshi diakakuama mamuma a bungi, udi bu mutshi hehi ne mushimi wa mai, matamba andi adi asambuka ha mutu ha lumbu." 
Genesis49:23 Bilembi bia m ta biakumunyingalasha bikole, biakumuela mikete, biakumutatshisha," 
Genesis49:24 kadi buta buandi buakuikala bukole, maboko andi ne bianza biandi biakakoleshibua kudi bianza bia Nzambi wa Bukole wa Yakoba. (Mulami wa mikoko wakafumaku, ku dibue dia Isalele)." 
Genesis49:25 Nzambi wa tatuʼebe udi ukukuatshisha, Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso udi ukusankisha ne masanka adi afuma mu diulu, ne masanka adi afuma muinshi mua buloba, ne masanka adi afuma ku mabele ne mafu." 
Genesis49:26 Masanka a tatu webe akuhita masanka a batatuʼanyi bunene tô ne ku mukalu wa mikuna minene idiku tshiendelele, masanka au neikale ha mutu ha Yosefe ne ha lubombo lua mutu wa yeye wakadi muhandulula kudi bana babo." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamina udi bu nkashama udi ne luonji, udi udia bintu dinda, ne dilolo udi ubiabanya." 
Genesis49:28 Bonso aba badi bisamba bia Bena Isalele dikumi ne bibidi, a mmei akabambila tatu wabo, hakabavudishileye disanka, muntu ne muntu wakadi ne disanka diakamuvudishileye nʼadi." 
Genesis49:29 Yeye wakabadimusha, wakabambila ne, Nkadi ha kudisangisha ne bankambua banyi, nunjike mu muaba wakajikabo batatuʼanyi mu lubuebue ludi mu budimi bua Efelona, Muena Hiti," 
Genesis49:30 mu lubuebue ludi mu budimi bua Makepela, ku mpala kua Mamale mu buloba bua Kanana, buakasumba Abalahama kudi Efelona, Muena Hiti, bu muaba wa kujikabo bantu bafue." 
Genesis49:31 Bakajikamu Abalahama ne Sala, mukashi wandi, ne Isaka ne Lebeka, mukashi wandi, nakajikamu Lea kabidi," 
Genesis49:32 bakasumba budimi ne lubuebue ludimu kudi bana ba Hete. 
Genesis49:33 Hakashikisha Yakoba kubadimusha nunku, wakateka makasa andi ha bulalu, wakahuola muoyo wandi, wakasangishibua kudi bankambua bandi." 
Genesis50:1 Yosefe wakadiela ha mpala wa tatu wandi, wakadila, wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku." 
Genesis50:2 Yosefe wakela bantu bandi mukenji bua kulongololabo tshitalu tshia tatu wandi, banganga buka bakalongolola tshitalu tshia Isalele." 
Genesis50:3 Matuku makumi anai akashika, matuku adibo balongolola tshitalu akakumbana, Bena Ejipitu bakamujinga matuku makumi muanda mutekete." 
Genesis50:4 Hakashika matuku a madilu, Yosefe wakambila ba mu nsubu wa Palo ne, Bingikala ne luse ku mesu kuenu, ndi nnusengelela ne, Nuambile Palô ku matshu andi ne," 
Genesis50:5 Tatu wanyi wakuntshihisha ne, Hanafua unjike mu muaba unakasumba mu buloba bua Kanâna. Nunku witabushe bua meme kuya bua kujika tatu wanyi, nempingane kûdi kabidi." 
Genesis50:6 Palô wakamba ne, Ya, ujike tatu webe, bu muakukutshihisheye." 
Genesis50:7 Yosefe wakaya kujika tatu wandi, ne bena mudimu bonso ba mu nsubu wa Palô, ne bakulu ba mu nsubu wandi, ne bakulu bonso ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu," 
Genesis50:8 ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa Yosefe ne bana babo bonso, ne bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu wandi, bakaya nʼandi, anu bana bakese ne mikoko ne bimuna biakashala mu buloba bua Goshene." 
Genesis50:9 Bantu bakadi benda mu makalu ne ha nyima ha tubalu bakaya nʼandi, tshisumbu tshinene be." 
Genesis50:10 Hakafikabo ku tshituilu tshia Atada, tshidi dishiya dia Yadene, bakadila muadi mukole, baka jinga tatu wandi to matuku muanda mutekete." 
Genesis50:11 Hakatangila bena buloba, Bena Kanana mene, madilu makole a ku tshituilu tshia Atada, bakambilangana ne, Â mmadilu makole a Bena Ejipitu, nunku bakidika muaba au ne, Abele-miselayima, udi dishiya dia Yadene." 
Genesis50:12 Bana ba Yakoba bakamuenzela bu muakabambileye," 
Genesis50:13 bualu bua bobo bakamutuala mu buloba bua Kanana, bakamujika mu lubuebue lua mu budimi bua Makepela, luakasumba Abalahama hamue ne budimi, kudi Efelona, Muena Hiti, bu muaba wa kujikamu bafue, ku mpala kua Mamale." 
Genesis50:14 Hakamanabo kumujika, Yosefe ne bana babo ne bantu bakaya nʼandi bua kujika tatu wandi bakahingana mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis50:15 Hakatangila bana babo ne Yosefe ne, Tatu wetu wakafua bakambilangana ne, Hashishe Yosefe neikale nʼetu lukuna, neatusombuele bua malu mabi onso atua kamuenzela." 
Genesis50:16 Bakatuma dî kudi Yosefe ne, Tatu webe wakamba diambedi yeye kayi muanze kufua ne," 
Genesis50:17 Nuenu nuambile Yosefe ne, Ulekelele bana benu mibi yabo ne malu mabi akakuenzelabo Hashishe tuetu tudi tukusengelela ne, Utubuikidile matomboka a bena mudimu ba Nzambi wa tatu webe Yosefe wdkadila hakamuambilabo mei a." 
Genesis50:18 Bana babo bakaya kudiye kabidi bakafua mpala yabo hanshi ku mesu kuandi, bakamba ne, Mona, Buonso buetu tudi bahika bebe." 
Genesis50:19 Yosefe wakabambila ne, Kanutshinyi, bua meme ndi mu muaba wa Nzambi, anyi?" 
Genesis50:20 Bua bualu buenu nuenu nuakasua kungenzela bibi, kadi Nzambi wakasua kuenza bimpe, wakakudimuna malu bua kusungileye bantu bu muakuenzeleye lelu." 
Genesis50:21 Nunku kanutshinyi, nennudishe ne bana benu bakese Yeye wakabasamba, wakabambila mei a kalolo." 
Genesis50:22 Yosefe wakashikama mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu wandi, Yosefe wakikala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne dikumi." 
Genesis50:23 Yosefe wakamona bana ba Efelayima to ne ku bikondo bisatu, bakalela bana ba Mala, muana wa Manashe, ha binu bia Yosefe kabidi." 
Genesis50:24 Yosefe wakambila bana babo ne, Nfuafua, kadi Nzambi neikale nʼenu, neanumushe mu buloba ebu, neanuhingashe ku buloba buakalayeye Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba" 
Genesis50:25 Yosefe wakatshihisha bana ba Isalele wakabambila ne, Nzambi neikale nʼenu, ne nuenu nenuye ne mifuba yanyi." 
Genesis50:26 Nunku Yosefe wakafua, wakadi ne bidimu lukama ne dikumi bakalongolola tshitalu tshiandi, bakatshiteka mu mushete mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus1:1 Â mmena a bana balume ba Isalele bakalua mu Ejipitu, muntu ne muntu ne ba mu nsubu wandi bakalua ne Yakoba." 
Exodus1:2 Lubena, Shimeona, Lewi ne Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Yisakâ, Zebuluna ne Benyamina," 
Exodus1:4 Dana ne Nafatale, Gada ne Ashe" 
Exodus1:5 Bantu bonso ba munda mua Yakoba bakadi makumi muanda mutekete, Yosefe wakadi mu Ejipitu diambedi" 
Exodus1:6 Yosefe wakafua ne bana babo bonso, ne bantu bonso ba mulongo au" 
Exodus1:7 Bena Isalele bakakumbana ba bungi, bakavulangana, bakalua bakole be, bakula mu buloba tente." 
Exodus1:8 Mukelenge muhia muhia wakahingana mu bukelenge bua Ejipitu, wakadi kayi mumanye Yosefe." 
Exodus1:9 Yeye wakambila bantu bandi ne, Tangilai, Bena Isalele badi batuhita bungi ne bukole." 
Exodus1:10 Tuye kuenza budimuke, kabalu ba bungi, halua nvita, kabayi kudi bantu badi nʼetu lukuna bua kuhingana nʼetu nvita, kabumuki mu buloba buetu." 
Exodus1:11 Bakabatekela tuhita, bakabakengesha ne mudimu. Bakashala Palô misoko ya kutekelamu bintu biandi, mena ai Pitoma ne Lamesese." 
Exodus1:12 Hakabakengeshabo nunku, Bena Isalele bakakumbana ba bungi, bakatangadika Mitshima ya Bena Ejipitu yakanyingalala bualu bua Bena Isalele." 
Exodus1:13 Bena Ejipitu bakenzesha Bena Isalele mudimu bikole. 
Exodus1:14 Bakabakengesha ne mudimu mukole, mudimu wa tushola ne buloba busoha ne midimu yonso ya mu madimi. Bakabenzesha mudimu mukole." 
Exodus1:15 Mukelenge wa Ejipitu wakambila baleleshi ba bakashi ba Bena Ebelu, dina dia umue wabo ne, Shifela, ne dina dia mukuabo ne, Pua ne," 
Exodus1:16 Hanuaya kuenzela bakashi ba Bena Ebelu mudimu wa baleleshi, ne hanuabatangila mu buledi, bialelabo muana wa balume, nuenu nenumushihe, kadi bialelabo muana wa bakashi, numushiye ne muoyo." 
Exodus1:17 Kadi baleleshi bakatshina Nzambi, kabakenza muakabambila mukelenge wa Ejipitu, kadi bakasungila bana balume." 
Exodus1:18 Mukelenge wa Ejipitu Wakabikila baleleshi, wakabambila ne, Bualu kai nuakuenza nunku, nuakusungila bana ba balume?" 
Exodus1:19 Baleleshi bakambila Palo ne, Bualu bua bakashi ba Bena Ebelu kabena bu bakashi ba Bena Ejipitu bobo badi ne bukole bua kudilelela, ne bakamana kulela diambedi baleleshi kabayi banze kulua kudibo." 
Exodus1:20 Nzambi wakenzela baleleshi bimpe, bantu bakakumbana ba bungi, bakalua bakole be," 
Exodus1:21 Bualu bua baleleshi bakatshina Nzambi, yeye wakabaha bana." 
Exodus1:22 Palo wakelela bantu bandi bonso mukenji ne, Bialelabo muana mulume, nenumuele mu musulu, kadi nensungile bana bakashi." 
Exodus2:1 Muntu wa tshisamba tshia Lewi wakabaka mukashi, muana wa Lewi." 
Exodus2:2 Mukashi wakimita difu, wakalela muana wa balume, hakamumoneye ne muana muimpe, wakamusokoka ngondo isatu." 
Exodus2:3 Hakadiye kayi mua kumusokoka kabidi, wakamuangatshila tshisaka tshia ntuhu, wakatshilaba bitume ne kamonyi, wakatekamu muana, wakatshiteka mu malenge akadi kukala kua musulu." 
Exodus2:4 Muanʼabo mukashi wakimana kule, bualu bua kumanya muenzelabo muakunyʼandi." 
Exodus2:5 Muana wa bakashi wa Palô wakalua kuowa mai mu musulu au, bantu bandi bakashi bakendakana ku muelelu wa mai, yeye wakamona tshisaka mu malenge, wakatuma muntu wandi ne, Ya utshiangate." 
Exodus2:6 Yeye wakatshisulula, wakamona muana, ne muana wakadila Yeye wakafuka muana luse, wakamba ne, Yeye udi muana wa Bena Ebelu." 
Exodus2:7 Mukuluʼandi, muana wa bakashi, wakambila muana wa bakashi wa Palô ne, Nye kukubikidila muamushi wa muana wa mu bakashi ba Bena Ebelu, alue kukuamushila muana mabele, anyi?" 
Exodus2:8 Muana wa bakashi wa Palo wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe Nsongakashi wakaya, Wakabikila mamu wa muana." 
Exodus2:9 Muana wa bakashi wa Palô wakamuambila ne, Wangate muana eu, umungamushile mabele, nenkufute Mukashi wakangata muana, wakamuamusha mabele." 
Exodus2:10 Muana wakakola, mamuʼandi wakalua nʼandi kudi muana wa bakashi wa Palo, yeye wakalua bu muana wandi mene. Yeye wakamuidika dina ne, Mose, wakamba ne, Bualu bua nakamukoka mu mai." 
Exodus2:11 Mu matuku au, hakakola Mose, yeye wakaya kudi bana babo, wakamona mudimu wabo mukole, wakamona Muena Ejipitu ukuma Muena Ebelu, muanʼabo." 
Exodus2:12 Wakakenzakana, kakamona muntu, wa kashiha Muena Ejipitu, wakamusokoka mu lusenga." 
Exodus2:13 Wakaya biandi dituku dibidi, wakamona balume babidi ba Bena Ebelu baluangana, yeye wakakonka muntu. Wakenza bualu bubi ne, Udi ukumina mukuenu tshinyi?" 
Exodus2:14 Yeye wakamba ne, Wakukuteka mukelenge wetu ne mulumbuluishi wetu nganyi? Udi ukeba kunshiha bu muwakushiha Muena Ejipitu, anyi? Mose wakatshina, wakamba ne, Bulelela, bualu ebu buakumanyibua." 
Exodus2:15 Kakamanya Palô bualu ebu, wakakeba kushiha Mose. Kadi Mose wakanyema ku mesu kua Palo, wakikala mu buloba bua Midiyana, wakashikama hehi ne dina dia mai." 
Exodus2:16 Mubuki wa Midiyana wakadi ne bana ba bakashi muanda mute kete bobo bakaha kusuna mai, bakûsha luvu lua mai tente bua kunuisha mikoko ya tatuʼabo mai." 
Exodus2:17 Balami ba mikoko bakalua, bakabihata, kadi Mose wakabika, wakabasankisha, wakanuisha mikoko yabo mai." 
Exodus2:18 Hakaluabo kudi Luele, tatuʼabo, yeye wakamba ne, Nuakuhingana lubilu lelu bualu kai?" 
Exodus2:19 Bakamba ne, Muena Ejipitu wakatusungila mu tshianza tshia balami, wakatukokela mai kabidi, wakanuisha mikoko." 
Exodus2:20 Wakakonka bana bandi ba bakashi ne, Yeye udi kudi kunyi? Bualu kai nuakushiya mulume ku nyima? Numubikile, alue biandi kudia bidia." 
Exodus2:21 Mose wakasua kushikama ne mulume au, ne yeye wakaha Mose Sipola, muanʼandi wa bakashi." 
Exodus2:22 Yeye wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Geshoma, wakamba ne, Nakadi mushikame mu buloba bua benyi." 
Exodus2:23 Hakalela matuku a bungi, mukelenge wa Ejipitu wakafua Bena Isalele bakafua mikemu bualu bua buhika, bakadila, muadi wabo wakafika kudi Nzambi bualu bua buhika buabo." 
Exodus2:24 Nzambi wakumpa mikemu yabo, ne Nzambi wakafuka mulayi wandi kudi Abalahama ne kudi Isaka ne kudi Yakoba." 
Exodus2:25 Nzambi wakamona Bena Isalele Nzambi wakamanya dikenga diabo. 
Exodus3:1 Mose wakadi ulama mikoko ya Yetelo tatu andi-muenu, mubuki wa mu Midiyana, wakaya ne mikoko ku nyima kua tshihela, wakalua ku mukuna wa Nzambi, dina diau Holeba." 
Exodus3:2 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamueneka kudiye mu ludimi lua kahia, luakadi luluhuka mu katshi, wakamona talala, kahia kakadi kosha katshi, katshi kakakahia." 
Exodus3:3 Mose wakamba ne, Nenye kutangila bualu ebu bua kukema ne, Munyi katshi kakena kahia." 
Exodus3:4 Bakamumona Yehowa uya kutangila bualu ebu. Nzambi wakamubikila mu katshi, wakamba ne, Mose, Mose Yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku." 
Exodus3:5 Nzambi wakamba ne, Kulu ha buihi, umushe bisabata biebe ku makasa, bualu bua muaba udi muimane udi buloba bua tshijila." 
Exodus3:6 Wakamba kabidi ne, Ndi bianyi Nzambi wa tatuʼebe, Nzambi wa Abalahama, Nzambi wa Isaka, Nzambi wa Yakoba Mose wakayikila mesu andi, wakatshina kutangila Nzambi." 
Exodus3:7 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nakutangila dikenga dia bantu banyi badi mu Ejipitu bulelela, nakunvua muadi wabo bualu bua tuhita tuabo, bualu bua ndi mumanye kanyinganyinga kabo." 
Exodus3:8 Nakulua hanshi bua kubasungila mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu, ne bua kubaluhula mu buloba abu, ne bua kulua nʼabo mu buloba buimpe ne bunene, mu buloba budi ne mabele ne buitshi bia bungi, mu muaba wa Bena Kanana ne wa Bena Hiti ne wa Bena Amole ne wa Bena Pelese ne wa Bena Hiwi ne wa Bena Yebuse." 
Exodus3:9 Katataka, tangila, muadi wa Bena Isalele Wakafika kundi, Hakatangila kabidi dikenga diabo didi Bena Ejipitu babakengesha nʼadi." 
Exodus3:10 Lua biebe, nenkutume kudi Palo, Ulue biebe ne bantu banyi, bana ba Isalele, badi mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus3:11 Mose wakambila Nzambi ne, Meme ndi nganyi bua kuya kudi Palo ne bua buhatula Bena Isalele mu Ejipitu?" 
Exodus3:12 Nzambi wakamba ne, Bulelela, nengikale nʼebe, nenkuhe tshimanyinu etshi tshidi tshilesha ne nakukutuma hawahatula bantu badi mu Ejipitu, nenutendelele Nzambi ha mukuna eu." 
Exodus3:13 Mose wakambila Nzambi ne, Hanaya bianyi kudi Bena Isalele, hanabambila ne, Nzambi wa batatuʼenu wakantuma kunudi, nebankonke ne, Dina diandi nganyi, nembambile tshinyi?" 
Exodus3:14 Nzambi wakambila Mose ne, MEME NDI MUNDI. Nzambi wakamba kabidi ne, Ambila Bena Isalele ne, NDI MUNDI wakuntuma." 
Exodus3:15 Nzambi wakambila Mose kabidi ne, Wewe newambile Bena Isalele ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu, Nzambi wa Abalahama, Nzambi wa Isaka ne Nzambi wa Yakoba wakuntuma kunudi edi ndina dianyi tshiendelele, etshi ntshivulukidi tshianyi kudi bantu bonso." 
Exodus3:16 Ya usangishe bakulu ba Bena Isalele, ubambile ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu, Nzambi wa Abalahama, Nzambi wa Isaka ne Nzambi wa Yakoba wakamueneka kundi, wakungambila ne, Nakulua kunudi, Hakatangila mudibo banuenzela mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus3:17 Nakumana kuamba ne, Nennuhatule mu dikenga dia Ejipitu, nendue nʼenu mu buloba bua Bena Kanana ne bua Bena Hiti ne bua Bena Amole ne bua Bena Pelese ne bua Bena Hiwi ne bua Bena Yebuse, mu buloba budi ne mabele ne buitshi bia bungi." 
Exodus3:18 Bobo nebunvue dî diebe, wewe ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele nenufile kudi mukelenge wa Ejipitu, nenumuambile ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Bena Ebelu, wakusangakena nʼetu Tudi tukutendekena ne, Witabushe bua tuetu kuya luendu lua matuku asatu mu tshihela bua kushihela Yehowa Nzambi wetu nyama." 
Exodus3:19 Ndi mumanye ne, Mukelenge wa Ejipitu kena witabusha bua nuenu kuya, neitabushe anu ne tshianza tshikole." 
Exodus3:20 Nengolole tshianza tshianyi, nembakengeshe ne malu a kukema; ne ku nyima kua malu â yeye neanulekele." 
Exodus3:21 Nempe bantu aba dikasa dimpe kudi Bena Ejipitu, ne hayabo, kabena baye ne bianza bituhu." 
Exodus3:22 Kadi mukashi ne mukashi nealombe mukashi udi ushikama ha buihi nʼandi, ne mukashi udi ushikama mu nsubu wandi, bintu bia argent ne bia or ne bilulu, nuenu nenubiluatshishe bana benu ba balume ne bana benu ba bakashi, nunku nenuhaule Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus4:1 Mose wakandamuna ne, Kadi bobo kabena bangitabusha, kabena bunvua di dianyi, bobo nebambe ne, Yehowa kakamueneka kûdi nansha." 
Exodus4:2 Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Udi ne tshintu kai mu tshianza tshiebe? Yeye wakamba ne, Mulangala." 
Exodus4:3 Yehowa wakamba ne, Wele hanshi Nunku wakawela hanshi ne wowo wakakudimuka nyoka, Mose wakamunyema." 
Exodus4:4 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe, umukuate ku mukila, yeye wakolola tshianza tshiandi, wakamukuata ne nyoka wakakudimuka mulangala kabidi." 
Exodus4:5 Yehowa wakamba ne, Bualu ebu nebubitabushishe ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, Nzambi wa Abalahama, Nzambi wa Isaka ne Nzambi wa Yakoba wakamueneka kudi." 
Exodus4:6 Yehowa wakamuambila kabidi ne, Teka tshianza mu tshiadi tshiebe. Yeye wakateka tshianza tshiandi mu tshiadi, ne hakatshiumusheye, monai, tshianza tshiandi tshiakadi ne nsudi mutoke bu neige." 
Exodus4:7 Yehowa wakamba ne, Teka tshianza tshiebe mu tshiadi kabidi. Yeye wakateka tshianza mu tshiadi kabidi, hakatshiumusheye mu tshiadi, tshianza tshiandi tshiakakudimuka bu muakadi mubidi wandi." 
Exodus4:8 Bikalabo kabayi bakuitabusha, kabayi bunvue di dia tshimanymu tshia kumudilu, bobo nebitabushe dî dia tshimanymu tshia kunshikidilu." 
Exodus4:9 Bikalabo kabayi bitabusha bimanyinu ebi bibidi, kabayi bunvue dî diebe, wewe newangate mai a mu musulu, wele ha buloba bûme, ne mai awakangata mu musulu neakudimuke mashi ha buloba bûme." 
Exodus4:10 Mose wakambila Yehowa ne, Yehowa, meme tshiena mua kuakula bimpe, nansha diambedi, nansha katshia wabanga kuakula ne muntu webe, bualu bua meme ndi muena tshikukumina." 
Exodus4:11 Yehowa wakamukonka ne, Mufuki wa mukana mua bantu nganyi? Udi ufuka bena kamama ne bena mahaha ne bantu badi mua kumona ne bantu badi bafofo nganyi? Meme Yehowa, tshiena ngenza malu â, anyi?" 
Exodus4:12 Nunku, ya biebe, meme nengikale ne mukana muebe, meme nenkuyishe mei andi musue wewe kuamba." 
Exodus4:13 Mose wakamba ne, Yehowa, nda nkusengelela ne, Utume muntu ûdi musue kutuma." 
Exodus4:14 Tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakalua kudi Mose, wakamuambila ne, Alona, muanʼenu mulume, muena Lewi, kenaku, anyi? Ndi mumanye ne, Yeye udi mua kuakula bimpe. Yeye ulualua mu nshila bua kusangakena hebe, ne hakatangileye, yeye neasanke mu mutshima wandi." 
Exodus4:15 Wewe neuyikile handi, neuteke mei mukana muandi, meme nengikale ne mukana muebe ne mukana muandi, nenkuyishe malu anudi mua kuenza." 
Exodus4:16 Yeye neikale muakuidi webe kudi bantu, yeye neikale bu mukana muebe ne wewe newikale bu Nzambi kudiye." 
Exodus4:17 Wangate mulangala eu mu tshianza tshiebe, ûdi wenza nʼau bimanyinu ebi." 
Exodus4:18 Mose wakahingana kudi Yetelo tatuʼandi-muenu, wakamuambila ne, Ndi musue kuhingana kudi bana betu badi mu Ejipitu, bua kubamona ne bobo batshidi ne muoyo Yetelo wakambila Mose ne, Ya biebe talala." 
Exodus4:19 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu Midiyana ne, Ya biebe, uhingane mu Ejipitu bualu bua bantu bonso bakasua kukushiha bakafua." 
Exodus4:20 Mose wakangata mukashi wandi ne bana bandi balume, wakabateka ha nyima ha mpunda, wakahingana mu buloba bua Ejipitu. Mose wakaya ne mulangala wa Nzambi mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Exodus4:21 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Hawahingana mu Ejipitu, wenza ku mesu kua Palô malu a kukema onso anakuteka mu tshianza tshiebe, kadi meme nenkoleshe mutshima wa Palô, ne yeye kena ulekela bantu." 
Exodus4:22 Wewe newambile Palô ne, Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Isalele udi muanʼanyi wa balume, muanʼa bute wanyi," 
Exodus4:23 ne meme nakamana kukuambila ne, Ulekela muanʼanyi wa balume, bualu bua kunkuatshila mudimu, kadi wewe wakahidia kulu ulekela, nunku meme nenshihe muana webe, muanʼa bute webe." 
Exodus4:24 Hakadibo baya mu nshila wa ku nsubu wa tshilala benyi, Yehowa wakasangakena nʼandi, wakamba kumushiha." 
Exodus4:25 Sipola wakangata dibue ditue, wakatengula muan andi mulume, wakateka dikoba ku makasa a Mose, wakambila Mose ne, Bulelela, wewe udi bayanyi wa mashi." 
Exodus4:26 Yeye wakalekela Mose. Mukashi wakamba ne, Wewe udi bayanyi wa mashi bualu bua ku tengula." 
Exodus4:27 Yehowa wakambila Alona ne, Ya biebe mu tshihela bua kusangakena ne Mose Yeye wakaya, wakasangakena handi mu mukuna wa Nzambi, wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku." 
Exodus4:28 Mose wakambila Alona mei onso akamuambila Yehowa ne bimanyinu bionso biakamuheye. 
Exodus4:29 Mose ne Alona bakaya, bakasangisha bakulu bonso ba Bena Isalele." 
Exodus4:30 Alona wakabambila mei onso akadi Yehowa wambila Mose, ne yeye wakenza bimanyinu ku mesu kua bantu." 
Exodus4:31 Bantu bakitabusha ne hakunvuabo ne, Yehowa wakulua kudi Bena Isalele, wakumona dikenga diabo, bakinama mitu yabo, bakatendelela." 
Exodus5:1 Ku nyima kua malu â Mose ne Alona bakalua kudi Palô, bakamuambila ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi Wamba ne, Ulekele bantu banyi, baye mu tshihela bua kudia bidia ku mesu kuanyi." 
Exodus5:2 Palo wakamba ne, Yehowa nganyi? Tshiena ngitabusha di diandi bua kulekela Bena Isalele. Meme tshiena mumanye Yehowa ne tshiena ndekela Bena Isalele." 
Exodus5:3 Bakamba ne, Nzambi wa Bena Ebelu wakasangakena hetu, witabushe ne tuetu tuye luendu lua matuku asatu mu tshihela bua kushihela. Yehowa Nzambi wetu nyama, bua yeye katukengeshi ne masama anyi muele wa mata." 
Exodus5:4 Mukelenge wa Ejipitu wakabambila ne, Bualu kai, nuenu Mose ne Alona, nudi nulekesha bantu midimu yabo, yai bienu ku midimu yenu." 
Exodus5:5 Palô wakamba ne, Monai, bantu bakukumbana ba bungi mu buloba, ne nuenu nudi nulekesha midimu yabo." 
Exodus5:6 Mu dituku adi mene Palo wakela di kudi tuhita tua bantu ne tupitene tuabo ne," 
Exodus5:7 Kanulu bantu bisonsa bia kuenza nʼabi tushola bu munuakenza diambedi, bobo badikebele bisonsa." 
Exodus5:8 Bobo nebenze bungi bua tushola buakenzabo diambedi, kanuena nuhuekesha mudimu, nansha kakese, bualu bua bobo badi bafuba, badi bamba ne, Tudi basue kuya kushihela Nzambi wetu nyama." 
Exodus5:9 Nudiundishe mudimu wabo, bawenze, nunku kabitabushi mei a mashimi." 
Exodus5:10 Tuhita tua bantu ne tupitene tuakaya kudi bantu, tuakabambila ne, Palo wakamba ne, Tshiena nnuha bisonsa." 
Exodus5:11 Yai bienu, nudikebele bisonsa kunudi mua kubisangana, kadi kabena bahuekesha mudimu wenu." 
Exodus5:12 Nunku bantu bakadi bamuangalaka buloba bua Ejipitu buonso bua kukeba bisonsa. 
Exodus5:13 Tuhita tuakabenzesha ne, Nushikishai mudimu wenu wa buatshia-buatshia bu munuakenza hanuakadi ne bisonsa." 
Exodus5:14 Tuhita tua Palô tuakakuma bantu bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Isalele, tuakamba ne, Bualu kai kanuena nushikisha mudimu wenu ne makelela ne lelu bu munuakenza diambedi?" 
Exodus5:15 Bantu bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Isalele bakalua, bakadila kudi Palo ne, Udi wenzela bantu bebe nunku bualu kai?" 
Exodus5:16 Kabena bakesha bantu bebe bisonsa, ne badi bamba ne Enzai tushola, mona, badi bakulua bantu bebe, kadi dihila didi kudi Bena Ejipitu bebe." 
Exodus5:17 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Nudi bafuba, nudi bafuba, ne bua bualu ebu nudi nuamba ne, Witabushe bua tuye kushihela Yehowa nyama!" 
Exodus5:18 Yai bienu, enzai mudimu, katuena tunuha bisonsa, kadi nuenu nenulue ne bungi bua tushola bu mutuakuamba." 
Exodus5:19 Bantu bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Isalele bakamona ne, Tudi ne tshilumbu tshikole Hakambabo ne, Katuena tuhuekesha bungi bua tushola butudi tulomba buatshia-buatshia." 
Exodus5:20 Bakasangakena ne Mose ne Alona mu nshila hakaluhukabo kudi Palô," 
Exodus5:21 bobo bakabambila ne, Yehowa anutangile, anulumbuluishe, bualu bua nuakutuvuisha bu tshintu tshidi tshi tua tshibi ku mesu kua Palô ne ku mesu kua bantu bandi, nuakuteka muele wa nvita mu bianza biabo wa kutushiha nʼau." 
Exodus5:22 Mose wakahingana kudi Yehowa, wakamba ne, Yehowa, wewe wakenzela bantu aba bibi nunku bualu kai? Wakantuma bualu kai?" 
Exodus5:23 Hanakalua kudi Palô mu dina diebe, yeye wakenzela bantu aba bibi, ne wewe kuena muanze kusungila bantu bebe nansha kakese." 
Exodus6:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Katataka wewe mutangile bu mundi ngenzela Palô, bualu bua yeye neabalekele ku tshianza tshikole, neabihate mu buloba buandi ne tshianza tshikole." 
Exodus6:2 Nzambi wakambila Mose ne, Meme ndi Yehowa." 
Exodus6:3 Nakamueneka kudi Abalahama ne kudi Isaka ne kudi Yakoba bu Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso, kadi bobo kabakamanya dina dianyi Yehowa nansha" 
Exodus6:4 Meme kabidi nakajadika nʼabo tshihungidi tshianyi bua kubaha buloba bua Kanana, buloba buakadibo bashikamamu bu benyi." 
Exodus6:5 Bualu bukuabo, nakunvua mikemu ya Bena Isalele badi mu butaka kudi Bena Ejipitu, ndi muvuluke tshihungidi tshianyi." 
Exodus6:6 Nunku wambile Bena Isalele ne, Ndi Yehowa, ne meme nennuhatule muinshi mua majitu a Bena Ejipitu, nennusungile ku buhika buabo, nennuhikule ne diboko diolola ne dilumbulula dikole." 
Exodus6:7 Nennuangate bu bantu banyi ne meme nengikale Nzambi wenu, nuenu nenumanye ne, Meme udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi unuhatula muinshi mua majitu a Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus6:8 Meme nendue nʼenu mu buloba bunakalaya Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba, nennuhebu bu buhianyi ndi Yehowa." 
Exodus6:9 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele nunku kadi bobo kabakatumikila dî dia Mose bualu bua kanyinganyinga ka mutshima, ne bua dikenga dia buhika." 
Exodus6:10 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus6:11 Ya biebe kudi Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, umuambile ne, Lekela Bena Isalele bahatuke mu buloba buebe." 
Exodus6:12 Mose wakamba ku mesu kua Yehowa ne, Mona, Bena Isalele kabena banze kutumikila dî dianyi, Palô neunvuile muena tshikukumina kudi kunyi?" 
Exodus6:13 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona mei a kuya nʼau kudi Bena Isalele ne kudi Palo, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, bualu bua kuhatula Bena Isalele mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus6:14 Aba mbantu badi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo. Bana ba balume ba Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Isalele Hanoka ne Palu, Heselona ne Kâmi, â mmeku a Lubena." 
Exodus6:15 Bana ba balume ba Shimeona Yemuele ne Yamina ne Obada ne Yakina ne Soha ne Shaula, muana wa balume wa mukashi wa Bena Kanana, â mmeku a Shimeona." 
Exodus6:16 Mena a bana ba balume ba Lewi ku bikondo biabo adi nunku Geshona ne Kohata ne Melah, bidimu bia Lewi biakadi lukama makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete." 
Exodus6:17 Bana ba balume ba Geshona: Libini ne Shimei, ku meku abo." 
Exodus6:18 Bana ba balume ba Kohata: Amalama ne Yisehâ ne Hebelone ne Uziele, bidimu bia Kohata biakadi lukama ne makumi asatu ne bisatu." 
Exodus6:19 Bana ba balume ba Melali: Mali ne Mushi. Â mmeku a, Bena Lewi ku bikondo biabo." 
Exodus6:20 Amalama wakabaka Yokebede, muanʼabo wa bakashi ne tatu wandi, ne yeye wakamulelela Alona ne Mose, bidimu bia Amalama biakadi lukama ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete."
