Exodus6:21 Bana ba balume ba Yisehâ: Kola ne Nefege ne Zikeli. 
Exodus6:22 Bana ba balume ba Uziele Mishaele ne Ehsafana ne Siteli. 
Exodus6:23 Alona wakabaka Elisheba, muana wa bakashi wa Aminadaba, muanʼabo wa bakashi ne Nashona ne yeye wakamulelela Nadaba ne Abihu, Eleazâ ne Itamâ." 
Exodus6:24 Bana ba balume ba Kola: Asi ne Elekana ne Abiasafa, â mmeku a Bena Kola." 
Exodus6:25 Eleazâ, muana wa balume wa Alona, wakabaka umue wa bana ba bakashi ba Putiele, yeye wakamulelela Pinehasa. Bantu aba badi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, Bena Lewi, ku meku abo." 
Exodus6:26 Bantu aba Mose ne Alona mbantu bakambila Yehowa ne, Hatulai Bena Isalele mu buloba bua Ejipitu ku misumba yabo." 
Exodus6:27 Bantu aba Mose ne Alona tuakambila Palo, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, ne, Lekela Bena Isalele mu Ejipitu Ka Mose ne Alona aba." 
Exodus6:28 Mu dituku diakadi Yehowa uyikila ne Mose mu buloba bua Ejipitu," 
Exodus6:29 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Meme ndi Yehowa, Wambile Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, mei onso anakuambila." 
Exodus6:30 Mose wakamba ku mesu kua Yehowa ne, Mona, meme ndi muena tshikukumina, Palo neangunvuile munyi?" 
Exodus7:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Nakukuvuisha bu Nzambi ku mesu kua Palô, ne Alona mukuluʼebe neikale muakuidi webe." 
Exodus7:2 Wewe newambe mei onso andi nkuambila, ne Alona mukuluʼebe neambile Palo ne, Ulekele Bena Isalele mu buloba buebe." 
Exodus7:3 Nenkoleshe mutshima wa Palô, nennudishe bimanyinu bianyi ne malu anyi a kukema mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus7:4 Kadi Palô kena ukunyuila, ne meme nenteke tshianza tshianyi ha Ejipitu, nempatule bantu banyi Bena Isalele mu buloba bua Bena Ejipitu ku dilumbulula dikole." 
Exodus7:5 Bena Ejipitu nebamanye ne meme ndi Yehowa, hangolola tshianza tshianyi ha Ejipitu ne hanahatula Bena Isalele munkatshi muabo." 
Exodus7:6 Mose ne Alona bakenza bu muakamba Yehowa, bakenza nunku." 
Exodus7:7 Mose wakadi ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu, ne Alona wakadi ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne bisatu, hakadibo bakula ne Palô." 
Exodus7:8 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Exodus7:9 Hanuambila Palo ne, Nundeshe bualu bua kukema, hashishe, wewe wambile Alona ne, Angata mulangala webe, uwele hanshi ku mesu kua Palô ne mulangala neukudimuke nyoka." 
Exodus7:10 Mose ne Alona bakaya kudi Palô, bakenza bu muakamba Yehowa: Alona wakela mulangala wandi hanshi ku mesu kua Palô ne bantu bandi, ne mulangala wakakudimuka nyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Palô wakabikila bena meji ne bena muhongo ne bena bilengulengu ba mu Ejipitu, bakenza muomumue ne manga abo." 
Exodus7:12 Muntu ne mundi wakela mulangala wandi hanshi, wakakudimuka nyoka, kadi mulangala wa Alona wakatuma milangala yabo." 
Exodus7:13 Mutshima wa Palo wakakoleshibua, yeye kakabunvuila, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Exodus7:14 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Mutshima wa Palô udi ne tshitshu, yeye udi uhidia kulekela bantu." 
Exodus7:15 Ya biebe kudi Palô ne dinda, hayeye ku mai, wimane kukala kua musulu bua kusangakena nʼandi, uye ne mulangala wakakudimuka nyoka au mu tshianza tshiebe." 
Exodus7:16 Umuambile ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Bena Ebelu, wakuntuma kudi ne, Ulekele bantu banyi, baye bua kuntendelela mu tshihela, ku diambedi to ne mpindiu wewe kuena muanze kunvua." 
Exodus7:17 Yehowa udi wamba ne, Mu bualu ebu wewe neumanye ne, Meme ndi Yehowa tangila, nenkume mai adi mu musulu ne mulangala udi mu tshianza tshianyi, ne mai onso neakudimuke mashi." 
Exodus7:18 Minyinyi ya mu mai idi mu musulu neyifue, mai neanunke muhuya mubi, mai a mu musulu neatonde Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus7:19 Yehowa wakela dî kudi Mose ne, Wambile Alona ne, Angata mulangala webe, olola tshianza tshiebe ha mutu ha mai a mu Ejipitu, ku mutu kua misulu yabo ne tusulu tuabo ne mashiba abo, mai onso akudimuke mashi, mashi neikale mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso ne mu milondo ya mitshi ne mu milondo ya mabue." 
Exodus7:20 Mose ne Alona bakenza bu muakamba Yehowa, Alona wakabisha mulangala, wakakuma mai akadi mu musulu, ku mesu kua Palô ne ku mesu kua bantu bandi, mai onso akadi mu musulu akakudimuka mashi." 
Exodus7:21 Minyinyi ya mu mai yakadi mu musulu bakafua, musulu wakamuha muhuya mubi, ne Bena Ejipitu kabakamanya mua kunua mai a mu musulu, mashi akadi mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso," 
Exodus7:22 Bena bilengulengu ba mu Ejipitu bakenza muomumue ne manga abo, mutshima wa Palô wakakoleshibua, yeye kakabunvuila, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Exodus7:23 Palô wakanyunguluka, wakaya mu nsubu wandi, kakateka bualu ebu mu mutshima wandi." 
Exodus7:24 Bena Ejipitu bonso bakumbula mena hehi ne musulu, bakakeba mai a kunua, bualu bua kabakamanya mua kunua mai a mu musulu." 
Exodus7:25 Matuku akakumbana muanda mutekete ku nyima kua dituta dia mai a mu musulu kudi Yehowa. 
Exodus8:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ya biebe kudi Palô, umuambile ne, Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Lekela bantu banyi baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus8:2 Biwahidia kubalekela, nentume biula mu buloba buebe." 
Exodus8:3 Musulu newikale tente ne biula, neubuele mu nsubu webe ne mu nsubu webe wa bulalu ne ha bulalu buebe, ne mu nsubu ya bahika bebê ne kudi bantu bebe, ne mu nfulu yenu ne mu binu bienu." 
Exodus8:4 Biula nebilue hamʼbidi hebe ne hamʼbidi ha bantu bebe ne hamʼbidi ha bahika bebe bonso. 
Exodus8:5 Yehowa wakela dî kudi Mose ne, Wambile Alona ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe ne mulangala webe ha mutu ha misulu ne ha mutu ha tusulu ne mashiba bualu bua kutuma biula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus8:6 Alona wakolola tshianza tshiandi ku mutu kua mai a mu Ejipitu, biula biakabaha, biakûsha buloba bua Ejipitu tente." 
Exodus8:7 Bena bilengulengu bakenza muomumue ne manga abo, bakatuma biula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus8:8 Palo Wakabikila Mose ne Alona, wakamba ne, Nundombele Yehowa, yeye umushe biula kundi ne kudi bantu banyi, nendekele bantu baye kushihela Yehowa nyama." 
Exodus8:9 Mose wakambila Palô ne, Wikale ne butumbi ebu kundi, ndituku kai diudi musue meme nkulombele bua kumusha biula kûdi ne kudi bantu bebe ne kudi bahika bebe ne mu nsubu yenu, bishale anu mu musulu nkayau?" 
Exodus8:10 Yeye wakamba ne, Makelela Mose wakamba ne, Bualu buikale bu mu dî diebe, bua kukumanyisha ne, Kakuena nzambi mukuabo bu Yehowa Nzambi wetu." 
Exodus8:11 Biula nebiumuke kûdi ne ku nsubu yebe, ne kudi bahika bebe ne kudi bantu bebe, nebishale anu mu musulu nkayau." 
Exodus8:12 Mose ne Alona bakaluhuka kudi Palô. Mose wakalomba Yehowa bua buila biakatumeye kudi Palô. 
Exodus8:13 Yehowa wakenza bu mu dî dia Mose, biula biakafua mu nsubu ne mu mbanza ne mu madimi." 
Exodus8:14 Bakabisangisha mu bisumbu, ne buloba buakanunka muhuya mubi." 
Exodus8:15 Kadi bakatangila Palô ne, Bualu buakushika, wakakolesha mutshima wandi, kakabinvuila, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Exodus8:16 Yehowa wakela dî kudi Mose ne, Wambile Alona ne, Olola mulangala webe, ukume dinfuenkenya dia buloba, dinfuenkenya nedikudunuke nkusu ya mu mitu mu buloba buonso bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus8:17 Bakenza nunku, Alona wakolola tshianza tshiandi ne mulangala wandi, wakakuma dinfuenkenya dia buloba ne nkusu yakadi kudi bantu ne kudi nyama, dinfuenkenya dionso dia ha buloba diakakudimuka nkusu mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Exodus8:18 Bena bilengulengu bakenza nunku ne manga abo bua kutuma nkusu, kadi kabakamanya mua kuenza, nkusu yakadi kudi bantu ne kudi nyama." 
Exodus8:19 Bena bilengulengu bakambila Palo ne, Bualu ebu budi bu munu wa Yehowa, kadi mutshima wa Palô wakakoleshibua, yeye kakabunvuila, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Exodus8:20 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ubike ne dinda dionso, uye kudi Palô hayeye ku mai, umuambile ne, Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Ulekele bantu banyi, baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus8:21 Biwahidia kulekela bantu banyi, nentumine bisumbu bia tuishi kûdi ne kudi bahika bebe ne kudi bantu bebe ne mu nsubu yenu, nsubu ya Bena Ejipitu neyikale ne bisumbu bia tuishi tente, ne hanshi ha buloba kabidi." 
Exodus8:22 Mu dituku adi nendame buloba bua Goshene budi bantu banyi bashikame, bisumbu bia tuishi kabiena bifikaku, bualu bua kukumanyisha ne, Meme ndi Yehowa hanshi ha buloba." 
Exodus8:23 Nenteke ditahulula hankatshi ha bantu banyi ne bantu bebe, nengenze tshimanyinu etshi makelela." 
Exodus8:24 Yehowa Wakenza nunku, ne bisumbu binene bia tuishi biakabuela mu nsubu wa Palô ne mu nsubu ya bena mudimu bandi, tuishi tuakahaula buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Exodus8:25 Palô Wakabikila Mose ne Alona, wakamba ne, Yai bienu, nushihele Nzambi wenu nyama mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus8:26 Mose wakamba ne, Katuena mua kuenza nunku, bituashihela Yehowa Nzambi wetu nyama, netuenze bualu budi bufuisha Bena Ejipitu bundu, bituenza bualu budi bufuisha Bena Ejipitu bundu ku mesu, bobo kabena batukuma ne mabue, anyi?" 
Exodus8:27 Netuye luendu lua matuku asatu mu tshihela, netushihele Yehowa Nzambi wetu nyama bu muatuambileye." 
Exodus8:28 Palô wakamba ne, Nennulekele, nuye mu tshihela bua kushihela Yehowa Nzambi wenu nyama, kadi kanuyi kule, nundombele Nzambi." 
Exodus8:29 Mose wakamba ne, Mona, nengumuke kûdi, nendombe Yehowa ne yeye neamushe bisumbu bia tuishi kudi Palô ne kudi bena mudimu bandi ne kudi bantu bandi makelela, kadi Palô katu dingi kabidi bua kulekela bantu baye kushihela Yehowa nyama." 
Exodus8:30 Mose wakaluhuka kudi Palô, wakalomba Yehowa." 
Exodus8:31 Yehowa wakenza bu mu dî dia Mose yeye wakumusha bisumbu bia tuishi kudi Palô ne kudi bena mudimu bandi ne kudi bantu bandi, nansha kishi kamue kakashala." 
Exodus8:32 Palô wakakolesha mutshima wandi musangu eu kabidi, yeye bakalekela bantu bua kuyabo." 
Exodus9:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ya biebe kudi Palô, umuambile ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Bena Ebelu, udi Wamba ne, Ulekele bantu banyi, baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus9:2 Biwahidia kubalekela, ne biwabakanda," 
Exodus9:3 Yehowa neateke tshianza tshiandi ha bimuna bidi mu budimi, ha tubalu ne nyama ya mpunda ne nyama ya tumelo ne ngombe ne mikoko, dishina dikole nedibikuate." 
Exodus9:4 Yehowa neatahulule bimuna bia Bena Isalele ne bimuna bia Bena Ejipitu, nansha tshintu tshikese tshia Bena Isalele netshifue." 
Exodus9:5 Yehowa wakamana ku sungula dituku, makelela Yehowa nênze bualu ebu mu buloba." 
Exodus9:6 Hakatshiabu Yehowa Wakenza bualu ebu; bimuna bionso bia mu Ejipitu biakafua, kadi bimuna bia Bena Isalele kabiakafua nansha tshimue." 
Exodus9:7 Palô wakatuma mundi, wakamona ne, Nansha tshintu tshimue tshia bimuna bia Bena Isalele tshiakafua. Mutshima wa Palô wakakoleshibua, yeye bakalekela bantu." 
Exodus9:8 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne, Nuangate manza a butue bua mu tshikutu, Mose abumiamine mulu ku mesu kua Palô." 
Exodus9:9 Butue nebulue bu dinfuenkenya dikese mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso, butue nebuenzeshe mputa ya mbalanga hamʼbidi ha bantu ne hamʼbidi ha nyama mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Exodus9:10 Bakangata butue bua mu tshikutu, bakimana ku mpala kua Palô, Mose wakabumiamina mulu, buakenzesha bantu ne nyama mputa ya mbalanga hamʼbidi." 
Exodus9:11 Bena bilengulengu kabakamanya mua kuimana ku mpala kua Mose bualu bua mputa ya mbalanga, mputa yakadi hamʼbidi ha bena bilengulengu ne hamʼbidi ha Bena Ejipitu bonso." 
Exodus9:12 Yehowa wakakolesha mutshima wa Palô, yeye kakabunvuila, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus9:13 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Bika ne dinda dionso, wimane ku mpala kua Palô, umuambile ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Bena Ebelu udi wamba ne, Ulekele bantu banyi, baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus9:14 Musangu eu nentume milau yanyi yonso ku mutshima webe ne kudi bena mudimu bebe ne kudi bantu bebe, bua kukumanyisha ne, Kakuena nzambi mukuabo bu meme mu buloba buonso." 
Exodus9:15 Bu meme muolole tshianza tshianyi, mufume disama dikole kudi bantu bebe, wewe wakadi kujimina ha buloba." 
Exodus9:16 Kadi bulelela, nakukubisha bua kukulesha bukole buanyi ne bua dina dianyi dimanyishibue ha buloba buonso." 
Exodus9:17 Wewe utshidi udibandisha kudi bantu banyi, udi uhidia kubalekela munyi?" 
Exodus9:18 Tangila, makelela ha diba edi mene nemmatshishe mabue a nvula a bungi be, kabena banze kutangila mabue a nvula nunku ku tshibangidilu tshia bukelenge bua Ejipitu tô ne katataka," 
Exodus9:19 Nunku utumine bantu lubilu, basangishe bimuna biebe ne bintu bionso biudi nʼabi mu budimi, muntu yonso ne nyama yonso bidi bishala mu budimi bidi kabiyi bihingana mu nsubu, mabue a nvula neahone hamʼbidi babi, nebifue." 
Exodus9:20 Muntu yonso wakatshina di dia Yehowa munkatshi mua bena mudimu ba Palô wakatuma bantu bandi, bakasangisha bimuna biandi mu nsubu." 
Exodus9:21 Yeye wakadi kayi muitabushe di dia Yehowa wakashiya bantu bandi ne bimuna biandi mu mpata. 
Exodus9:22 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe mulu, bua mabue a nvula ikale mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso, ne ha muntu ne ha nyama ne ha midioko yonso ya mu budimi, mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Exodus9:23 Mose wakolola mulangala wandi mulu ne Yehowa wakatuma makubakuba ne mabue a nvula, miele ya nvula yakakuma ha buloba, Yehowa wakama tshisha mabue a nvula ha buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus9:24 Mabue a nvula ne miele ya nvula biakabuelakana, biakatamba bikole, kabakatangila bualu abu mu buloba bua Ejipitu katshia bualua tshisamba tshia bantu." 
Exodus9:25 Mabue a nvula akashika bintu bionso bia mu buloba bua Ejipitu biakadi mu budimi, ne bantu ne nyama, mabue a nvula akashika midioko yonso ya mu budimi ne mitshi yonso." 
Exodus9:26 Anu mu buloba bua Goshene muakadi Bena Isalele, mabue a nvula kakadiku." 
Exodus9:27 Palô wakatuma di, wakabikila Mose ne Alona, wakabambila ne, Nakuenza bualu bubi musangu eu, Yehowa udi muakane ne meme ne bantu banyi tudi bantu babi." 
Exodus9:28 Nundombele Yehowa, bualu bua makubakuba ne mabue a nvula biakututonda, nennulekele, kanuena nushala kabidi." 
Exodus9:29 Mose wakamuambila ne, Hanaluhuka mu musoko eu, nengolole bianza bianyi kudi Yehowa, makubakuba neashike, mabue a nvula neashike kabidi, bualu bua kukumanyisha ne buloba budi bua Yehowa." 
Exodus9:30 Kadi ndi muma nye ne wewe ne bantu bebe kanuena banze kuikala ne ditshina dia Yehowa Nzambi. 
Exodus9:31 Mitshi ya lin ne ya orge yakashihibua, bualu bua orge yakadi mu miehu ne lin yakadi ne bilongo." 
Exodus9:32 Kadi blê ne bintu bikuabo kabiakadi bifue, kabiakanza kukola nansha." 
Exodus9:33 Mose wakaluhuka mu musoko kudi Palô, wakolola bianza biandi kudi Yehowa, ne makubakuba ne mabue a nvula biakashika, nvula kakamata ha buloba kabidi." 
Exodus9:34 Hakatangila Palô nvula ne mabue a nvula ne makubakuba biakashika, yeye wakatamba kuenza bibi, wakakolesha mutshima wandi ne yeye ne bantu bandi." 
Exodus9:35 Mutshi ma wa Palô wakakoleshibua, yeye kakunvuila Bena Isalele, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus10:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ya biebe kudi Palô, bualu bua nakakolesha mutshima wandi ne mitshima ya bantu bandi bua kulesha bimanyinu bianyi munkatshi muabo." 
Exodus10:2 Wewe newambile muan ebe wa balume mu matshu, ne muana wa muanʼebe wa balume, malu anakuenza mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne bimanyinu bianyi binakuenza munkatshi muabo, bua nuenu numanye ne, Meme ndi Yehowa." 
Exodus10:3 Mose ne Alona bakaya kudi Palô, bakamuambila ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Bena Ebelu, udi Wamba ne. Wewe neuhidie kudihuekesha ku mesu kuanyi musangu bule munyi? Ulekele bantu banyi baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus10:4 Biwahidia kulekela bantu hanyi, makelela nentumine mikumbi mu buloba buebe," 
Exodus10:5 neyikale ha mutu ha buloba buonso, kabena mua kutangila buloba, yoyo neyidie bintu biakushala ku mabue a nvula, nenudie mitshi yenu yonso idi idiunda mu budimi." 
Exodus10:6 Neyule nsubu yebe tente ne nsubu ya bantu bebe ne nsubu ya Bena Ejipitu bonso, nansha batatu benu nansha bankambua benu kabakatangila bualu ebu katshia babuela mu buloba ebu to ne katataka Mose wakanyunguluka, wakaluhuka kudi Palô." 
Exodus10:7 Bantu ba Palô bakamukonka ne, Muntu eu neikale buteyi kutudi musangu bule munyi? Ulekele bantu baye kutendelela Yehowa Nzambi wabo, wewe kuena mumanye ne, Buloba bua Ejipitu buakushihibua, anyi?" 
Exodus10:8 Bakalua ne Mose ne Alona kudi Palo, ne yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu nutendelele Yehowa Nzambi wenu kadi badi bamba kuya mbanganyi?" 
Exodus10:9 Mose wakamba ne, Netuye ne bana bakese ne bantu banunu, ne bana betu ba balume ne bana betu ba bakashi, netuye ne mikoko yetu ne ngombe yetu, bualu bua tudi ne bualu bua kudia bidia ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Exodus10:10 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yehowa ashale nʼenu binanulekela ne bana benu bakese, bualu bua bualu bubi budi munda muenu." 
Exodus10:11 Nansha, nuenu bantu balume nudi mua kuya kutendelela Yehowa, bualu bua nudi basue kuenza nunku. Bakabihata ku mesu kua Palô." 
Exodus10:12 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe ha buloba bua Ejipitu, bua kutuala mikumbi mu buloba bua Ejipitu, neyidie bintu bionso biakashala ku mabue a nvula." 
Exodus10:13 Mose wakolola mula ngala wandi ha buloba bua Ejipitu, ne Yehowa wakatuma luhehele luaku esete dituku adi to ne hakatshia butuku, ne dinda luhehele lua ku esete luakatuma mikumbi." 
Exodus10:14 Mikumbi yakamuangalaka buloba bua Ejipitu buonso, yakatamba bungi, kakuakadi mikumbi bu ei diambedi, ne mikuabo bu ei kayena ilua kabidi." 
Exodus10:15 Yakabuikila buloba buonso, to ne hakalua buloba midima, yakadia midioko yonso ya mu madimi ne mamuma onso a ku mitshi, biakashala ku mabue a nvula, nansha tshintu tshikese nansha midioko nansha mutshi biakashala mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso." 
Exodus10:16 Hashishe Palô wakabikila Mose ne Alona lubilu, wakamba ne, Nakuenzela Yehowa Nzambi wenu bualu bubi ne nuenu kabidi." 
Exodus10:17 Nundekelele bubi buanyi anu musangu eu, nundombele Yehowa Nzambi wenu, yeye angumushile bualu ebu bua lufu." 
Exodus10:18 Yeye wakaluhuka kudi Palo, wakalomba Yehowa." 
Exodus10:19 Yehowa wakatuma luhehele lukole lua ku wesete, bakabandisha mikumbi, luakayihata mu Dishiba Dikunze, nansha mukumbi umue wakashala mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus10:20 Kadi Yehowa wakakolesha mutshima wa Palô, yeye kakalekela Bena Isalele." 
Exodus10:21 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe mulu, midima ikale mu buloba bua Ejipitu, bantu babubute mu midima." 
Exodus10:22 Mose wakolola tshianza tshiandi mulu ne midima mikole be yakadi mu buloba bua Ejipitu to matuku asatu. 
Exodus10:23 Ka bakamanya mua kutangilangana, nansha muntu wakumuka mu muaba wandi tô matuku asatu, kadi munya wakadi mu nsubu ya Bena Isalele bonso." 
Exodus10:24 Palô wakabikila Mose, wakamuambila ne, Yai bienu nutendelele Yehowa, shiyai anu mikoko ne ngombe, bana benu bakese baye nʼenu." 
Exodus10:25 Mose wakamba ne, Bualu buakukukuata bua kufila nyama mu bianza bietu ya kuoshila Nzambi, tudi basue kuyishihela Yehowa Nzambi wetu." 
Exodus10:26 Netuye ne bimuna bietu kabidi, katuena dishiya nansha mukoko umue ku nyima, bualu bua didi ne bualu bua kutendelela Yehowa Nzambi wetu ne nyama ei; katuena bamanye bintu bidi Yehowa musue anu bakafikaku." 
Exodus10:27 Kadi Yehowa wa kakolesha mutshima wa Palo, yeye kakabalekela." 
Exodus10:28 Palô wakambila Mose ne, Umuka kundi, udimuke biebe, kuntangidi kabidi, mu dituku diudi utangila mpala wanyi wewe neufue." 
Exodus10:29 Mose wakamba ne, Wewe wakuamba bimpe, tshiena utangila mpala webe kabidi." 
Exodus11:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Nentume mulau umue mukuabo kudi Palo ne ha buloba bua Ejipitu; ne ku nyima yeye neanulekele, hanulekeleye, yeye neanuihate tshiendelele." 
Exodus11:2 Wambile bantu mu matshu abo ne, Mulume yonso alombe muena mutumba nʼandi, ne mukashi yonso alombe mukashi muena mutumba nʼandi bilenga bia argent ne bilenga bia or." 
Exodus11:3 Yehowa wakaha bantu dikasa dimpe kudi Bena Ejipitu Muntu eu Mose wakadi muntu munene be mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne ku mesu kua bena mudimu ba Palô ne ku mesu kua bantu bandi. 
Exodus11:4 Mose wakamba ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Mundankulu meme nenye munkatshi mua Ejipitu;" 
Exodus11:5 banʼa bute bonso ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu nebafue, ku muanʼa bute wa Palô udi ushikama ha nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge tô ne kudi muanʼa bute wa mukashi udi uhela manvua andi, banʼa bute ba bimuna bionso nebafue kabidi." 
Exodus11:6 Muadi mukole newikale mu buloba bua Ejipitu buonso; kakuena kuanze kuikala muadi bu eu, ne kawena wikalaku kabidi." 
Exodus11:7 Kadi nansha mbua kena mua kubululala umue wa Bena Isalele, nansha muntu nansha nyama, bua nuenu mumanye ne, Yehowa udi utahulula Bena Ejipitu ne Bena Isalele." 
Exodus11:8 Bantu bebe bonso nebalue kundi, nebankukuile, nebambe ne, Ya biebe ne bantu bonso badi balonda ku nyima kuebe, ne ku nyima kua bualu ebu nempatuke. Wakaluhuka kudi Palô ne tshiji tshikole." 
Exodus11:9 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Palô kena ukunvuila nansha, bualu bua kuvudisha malu anyi a kukema mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus11:10 Mose ne Alona bakenza malu â onso a kukema ku mesu kua Palô, Yehowa wakakolesha mutshima wa Palô, yeye bakalekela Bena Isalele mu buloba buandi." 
Exodus12:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne," 
Exodus12:2 Ngondo eu neikale tshibangidilu tshia ngondo kunudi, neikale ngondo wa kumudilu kua tshidimu kunudi." 
Exodus12:3 Nuambile bantu bonso ba mu Isalele ne, Mu dituku dia dikumi dia ngondo eu muntu ne muntu asungule muana wa mukoko ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, muana wa mukoko ku nsubu muana wa mukoko ku nsubu." 
Exodus12:4 Bikala bantu ba mu nsubu banya-banya, muena nsubu neatahulule muana wa mukoko ne muena nsubu udi hehi nʼandi ku bungi bua bantu badi mu nsubu, bobo babale bungi bua bantu badi mua kudia muana wa mukoko umue." 
Exodus12:5 Muana mulume wenu wa mukoko neikale muakane ne wa tshidimu tshimue nebamuangate munkatshi mua mikoko anyi mua mbushi. 
Exodus12:6 Nenumulame tô ne ku dituku dia dikumi ne anai dia ngondo eu, bantu bonso ba mu Isalele nebamushihe dilolo." 
Exodus12:7 Bobo nebangate mashi, nebâmiamine ku mutshi wa ha mutu ha mushiku wa mbelu ne ku biluwa bibidi bia mushiku wa mbelu wa nsubu mudibo bamudîla." 
Exodus12:8 Neboshe munyinyi ku kahia butuku abu, nebaudie ne mampa adi kâyi ne luevene, nebaudie ne matamba adi ne bululu." 
Exodus12:9 Kanudi munyinyi mubishe, anyi mulamba mu mai a kahia, kadi nuoshe munyinyi mu kahia, mutu wandi ne bibelu biandi ne bia munda biandi." 
Exodus12:10 Kanushiyi tshintu tshikese tô ne ku dinda, kadi biashala bintu dinda nenubioshe mu kahia." 
Exodus12:11 Nenudie munyinyi nunku ne bilulu bienu biela mikaya, ne bisabata ku makasa ne mulangala ku bianza bienu nenudie munyinyi lubilu, bualu ebu budi kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Exodus12:12 Bualu bua meme nempite buloba bua Ejipitu butuku abu, nenshihe banʼa bute bonso ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne ba bantu ne ba nyama; nendumbuluishe nzambi yonso ya Ejipitu, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Exodus12:13 Mashi neikale bu tshimanymu tshia mu nsubu munudi, ne hanamona mashi, nempite ha mutu henu, ne mulau kawena unukuata hanashiha bantu ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus12:14 Dituku edi nedikale kunudi bu tshmilukidi, nenudilame bu disanka dia Yehowa, nuenu nenuvuluke dituku edi ne tshivulukidi etshi tshiendelele." 
Exodus12:15 Nenudie mampa adi kayi ne luevene to matuku muanda mutekete, dituku dia kumudilu nenumushe luevene mu nsubu yenu, muntu yonso udi udia mampa adi neluevene ku dituku dia kumudilu to matuku muanda mutekete, nebamumushe munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Exodus12:16 Dituku dia kumudilu nedikale dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila, ne dituku dia muanda mutekete nedikale dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila, kabenji mudimu mu matuku â, anu mudimu wa kudikebela bia kudia." 
Exodus12:17 Nuenu nenudie mampa adi kayi ne luevene dituku adi bualu bua nakahatula bisumbu bienu mu buloba bua Ejipitu, nunku nenujidile dituku edi bu tshivulukidi tshienu tshiendelele." 
Exodus12:18 Mu ngondo wa kumudilu ne ku dituku dia dikumi ne anai dilolo nenudie mampa adi kâyi ne luevene to ne ku dituku dia makumi abidi ne dimue dilolo. 
Exodus12:19 Kanuikadi ne luevene mu nsubu yenu to matuku muanda mutekete, ne muntu yonso udi udia bintu bia luevene, nebamumushe munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele; nansha bikaleye muenyi anyi muntu muledibue mu buloba." 
Exodus12:20 Kanudi nansha tshintu tshikese tshia luevene, mu nsubu yenu yonso nenudie anu bintu bidi kabiyi ne luevene." 
Exodus12:21 Mose Wakabikila bakulu bonso ba Bena Isalele, wakabambila ne, Nusungule bana ba mikoko bungi buai buikale bungi bua meku enu, nuyishihe bua kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Exodus12:22 Nuangate mabeshi a hisopa, nutue mu mashi adi mu dilonga, numianune mashi ku mutshi wa ha mutu ha mushiku wa mbelu ne ku biluwa bibidi bia mushiku wa mbelu, muntu kaluhuki mu nsubu wandi tô ne ha tshia butuku." 
Exodus12:23 Yehowa neahite bua kushiha Bena Ejipitu, hamoneye mashi ku mutshi wa ha mushiku wa mbelu ne ku biluwa bia mushiku wa nsubu, neaye biandi ha mutu ha tshibi, neahite, Yehowa neahidishe mushiku ne, Kayi mu nsubu yenu bua kunushiha." 
Exodus12:24 Nuenu nuenze bualu ebu bu tshilele tshienu ne tshia bana benu tshiendelele. 
Exodus12:25 Hanuafika mu buloba bulualua Yehowa kunuha, bu muakalayeye, nuenze tshilele etshi." 
Exodus12:26 Hanukonka bana benu ne, Nudi nuenzela tshilele etshi tshinyi?" 
Exodus12:27 nenubambile ne, Tshidi tshintu tshituha tshia kuhita kua Yehowa, yeye wakahita ha mutu ha nsubu ya Bena Isalele mu Ejipitu, hakashiheye Bena Ejipitu, ne wakasungila nsubu yetu Bantu bakinama mitu yabo, bakatendelela Yehowa." 
Exodus12:28 Bena Isalele bakaya, bakenza nunku, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose ne Alona, mbu muakenzabo." 
Exodus12:29 Hakalua mundankulu Yehowa wakashiha banʼa bute bonso ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu, muanʼa bute wa Palô wakadi ushikama ha nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge tô ne ku muanʼa bute wa muntu wa mu nsubu wa lukanu, ne bana bonso ba bute ba bimuna." 
Exodus12:30 Palô wakabika mu butuku, yeye ne bantu bandi bonso, ne Bena Ejipitu bonso, muadi munene wakadi mu Ejipitu, kamuakadi nsubu wakadi kayi ne mufue." 
Exodus12:31 Palô wakabikila Mose ne Alona mu butuku, wakamba ne, Bikai, yai bienu munkatshi mua bantu banyi, ne nuenu ne Bena Isalele, yai bienu nutendelele Yehowa bu munuakamba." 
Exodus12:32 Angatai bisumbu bia mikoko ne bia ngombe, bu munuakamba, yai bienu, nunvudishe disanka kabidi." 
Exodus12:33 Bena Ejipitu bakenzesha bantu bualu bua kubihata mu buloba lubilu, bakamba ne, Tudi bantu bafue bonso." 
Exodus12:34 Bantu bakangata bidia bia mampa diambedi luevene kaluyi luanze kubuelamu, ne binu bidibo benza nʼabi mampa bakabikuta mu bilulu biabo, bakabiteka ha mahaʼabo." 
Exodus12:35 Bena Isalele bakenza bu mu dî dia Mose, bakatamba Bena Ejipitu bilenga bia argent ne bia or ne bilulu." 
Exodus12:36 Yehowa wakaha bantu dikasa dimpe ku mesu kua Bena Ejipitu, bakabaka bintu biakabalombabo Bakahaula Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus12:37 Bena Isalele bakaya ku Lamesese tô ne ku Sukota, balume bakenda hanshi bakadi bu bununu nkama isambombo, ne bana kabidi." 
Exodus12:38 Tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu bakuabo tshiakaya nʼabo, ne mikoko ne ngombe ne bimuna bia bungi." 
Exodus12:39 Bakatamba mikata ya bidia biakadi kabiyi ne luevene biakaluabo nʼabi, kabakadi ne luevene bualu bua bakahitata mu Ejipitu, kabakamanya mua kushala, ne kabakadianjila kudilongoluela bia kudia." 
Exodus12:40 Bena Isalele bakashala mu Ejipitu bidimu nkama mai ne makumi asatu. 
Exodus12:41 Hakaleha bidimu nkama mai ne makumi asatu, mu dituku adi mene mene, bisumbu bionso bia bantu ba Yehowa bakaluhuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus12:42 Butuku abu budi butuku budibo basue kuyidika Yehowa, bualu bua yeye wakabahatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ebu mbutuku bua Yehowa budi Bena Isalele bavuluka ku bikondo biabo bionso." 
Exodus12:43 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne, Etshi ntshilele tshia kuhita kua Yehowa muenyi kena mua kutshidia." 
Exodus12:44 Kadi biasumba muntu muhika wandi ku argent, ne hakamutengulabo, yeye udi mua kutshidia." 
Exodus12:45 Muenyi ne muena mudimu wa difutu kabena mua kutshidia. 
Exodus12:46 Nebadie munyinyi mu nsubu umue, kanuhatuki ne munyinyi ku nsubu, kanutshibudi nansha mufuba umue." 
Exodus12:47 Tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele netshienze tshilele etshi. 
Exodus12:48 Bikala muenyi mushikame nʼenu, udi musue kuenza tshilele tshia kuhita kua Yehowa, nebatengule bana bandi ba balume bonso, nunku yeye udi mua kutshienza, yeye neikale bu muntu muledibue mu buloba buenu, kadi muntu udi kayi mutengula kena mua kutshidia." 
Exodus12:49 Mukenji umue newikale kûdi ne kudi muntu muledibue mu buloba buenu ne muenyi udi ushikama munkatshi muenu. 
Exodus12:50 Bena Isalele bonso bakenza bu muakambila Yehowa Mose ne Alona. 
Exodus12:51 Mu dituku adi mene mene Yehowa wakumuka ne Bena Isalele mu Ejipitu ne bisumbu biabo. 
Exodus13:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus13:2 Unjidile banʼa bute bonso ba Bena Isalele, bonso badianjile kuledibua, ne ba bantu ne ba nyama, bobo mbanyi." 
Exodus13:3 Mose wakambila bantu ne, Vulukai dituku edi dinuakuhatuka mu Ejipitu, mu nsubu wa lukanu, bualu bua Yehowa wakanuhatula mu muaba eu ne bukole bua tshianza tshiandi, kanudi bidia bidi ne luevene." 
Exodus13:4 Nenuhatuke dituku edi mu ngondo wa Abiba. 
Exodus13:5 Halua Yehowa nʼenu mu buloba bua Bena Kanana ne Bena Hiti ne Bena Amole ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse buakalayeye batatuʼenu ne, Nennuhebu, buloba budi ne mabele ne buitshi bia bungi, nuenu nuvuluke tshilele etshi mu ngondo eu." 
Exodus13:6 Nudie mampa adi kayi ne luevene to matuku muanda mutekete, ne dituku dia muanda mutekete nudie bidia ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Exodus13:7 Nudie anu mampa adi kâyi ne luevene to matuku muanda mutekete, kanuikadi ne mampa a luevene, kabatangidi luevene mu nseke yenu yonso." 
Exodus13:8 Mu dituku adi nenuambile muanʼebe wa balume ne, Ebu mbualu buwakungenzela Yehowa hanakaluhuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:9 Bualu ebu nebuikale bu tshimanyinu ku tshianza tshiebe ne bu tshivulukidi hankatshi ha mesu ebe, bua dî dia Yehowa dikale mukana muenu, bualu bua Yehowa wakanuhatula mu Ejipitu ne tshianza tshikole." 
Exodus13:10 Nunku nuenze bualu, ebu bu tshilele tshienu mu ngondo watshi ku tshidimu ku tshidimu." 
Exodus13:11 Halua Yehowa nʼenu mu buloba bua Bena Kanâna buakanulayeye ne batatuʼenu ne hanuheye buloba abu," 
Exodus13:12 nuenu nenujidile Yehowa banʼa bute bonso ba bantu ne ba nyama kabidi, bana ba balume mbana ba Yehowa." 
Exodus13:13 Nuenu nenuhikule muanʼa bute wa nyama wa mpunda ku muana wa mukoko, ne binuahanga kumuhikulai nenutshibule nshingu wandi, nenuhikule banʼa bute bonso ba bantu kabidi." 
Exodus13:14 Hanukonka muanʼenu wa balume ne, Bualu ebu ntshinyi? nemmuambile ne, Yehowa wakatuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne mu nsubu wa lukanu ku bukole bua tshianza tshiandi." 
Exodus13:15 Hakamba Palo kuhidia kundekelu, Yehowa wakashiha banʼa bute bonso ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne ba bantu ne ba nyama kabidi, nunku ndi mushihele Yehowa banʼa bute ba balume ba nyama, kadi ndi muhikule banʼa bute ba balume banyi." 
Exodus13:16 Bualu ebu nebuikale bu tshimanymu ku tshianza tshiebe ne bu tshmilukidi hankatshi ha mesu ebe bualu bua Yehowa wakabihanda mu Ejipitu ku bukole bua tshianza tshiandi. 
Exodus13:17 Bakalekela Palô bantu, Nzambi kakabalombola mu nshila wa ku buloba bua Bena Peleshete, nshila au wakatamba buihi, Nzambi wakamba ne, Bamue bantu nebakudimune mitshima yabo hatangilabo nvita, nebahingane mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:18 Kadi Nzambi wakabalombola mu nshila wa ku tshihela hehi ne Dishiba Dikunze Bena Isalele bakahatuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne bintu bia nvita. 
Exodus13:19 Mose wakaya ne mifuba ya Yosefe, bualu bua yeye wakatshihisha Bena Isalele ne, Nzambi nealue kunudi bulelela, nuenu nenuye ne mifuba yanyi." 
Exodus13:20 Bakabisha luendu luabo ku Sukota, bakashikama mu Etama, ku butshika bua tshihela." 
Exodus13:21 Yehowa wakaya ku mpala kuabo mu ditutu, kubalesha nshila, ne butuku mu difutu diakadi ne dinkenke bua kubatemena mu nshila, bua bobo bamanye mua kuya ne munya ne butuku." 
Exodus13:22 Ditutu dia mu munya diakadi ne dinkenke butuku kadiakumuka ku mpala kua bantu. 
Exodus14:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus14:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Nuhingane, Shikamai ku mpala kua Pi-hahilota, hankatshi ha Migedola ne mai manene, ku mpala kua Bâla-sefona, Shikamai bienu ku mpala kua muaba eu hehi ne mai manene." 
Exodus14:3 Palô neambe bua Bena Isalele ne, Bakuhambuka mu nshila, tshihela tshiakubahumbisha." 
Exodus14:4 Meme nenkoleshe mutshima wa Palô, yeye neabalonde, nempete butumbi kudi Palô ne kudi bisumbu biandi bionso, Bena Ejipitu nebamanye ne, Meme ndi Yehowa Bakenza nunku." 
Exodus14:5 Lumu bakafika kudi mukelenge wa Ejipitu ne, Bantu bakanyema Palô ne bantu bandi bakakudimuna mitshima yabo, bakamba ne, Tuakenza tshinyi hatuakalekela Bena Isalele ku mudimu wetu?" 
Exodus14:6 Yeye wakalongolola dikalu diandi, wakaya ne bantu bandi." 
Exodus14:7 Wakangata makalu nkama isambombo masungula, ne makalu onso makuabo a mu Ejipitu ne tuhita tua makalu onso." 
Exodus14:8 Yehowa wakakolesha mutshima wa Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, yeye wakalonda Bena Isalele, bualu bua Bena Isalele bakahatuka ne tshianza tshikole." 
Exodus14:9 Bena Ejipitu bakabalonda ne tubalu dionso ne makalu onso bia Palô Masalayi andi ne bantu ba ha nyima ha tubalu bakabaheta hakadibo bashikama hehi ne mai manene, hehi ne Pi-hahilota ku mpala kua Bâla-sefona." 
Exodus14:10 Hakalua Palo ha buihi, Bena Isalele bakabandisha mesu abo, bakamona Bena Ejipitu babalonda ku nyima, bakatamba kutshina, Bena Isalele bakadila kudi Yehowa." 
Exodus14:11 Bakambila Mose ne, Bualu bua kakuakadi nkita mu Ejipitu, wewe wakulua nʼetu bua tuetu kubala mu tshihela, anyi? Wakutuenzela nunku tshinyi, bua kutuhatula mu Ejipitu?" 
Exodus14:12 Edi kadiena di dituakukuambila mu Ejipitu ne, Utulekele bua tukuatshile Bena Ejipitu mudimu, anyi? Bua kukuatshila Bena Ejipitu mudimu budi butamba bua kufua mu tshihela buimpe." 
Exodus14:13 Mose wakambila bantu ne, Kanutshinyi, imanai, numone luhandu lua Yehowa lualueye kunuha lelu, bua Bena Ejipitu banuakumona lelu kanuena nubamona kabidi tshiendelele." 
Exodus14:14 Yehowa neanuluile nvita yenu, nenuikale holâ." 
Exodus14:15 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Udi udidila kundi tshinyi? Ambila Bena Isalele ne, Baye ku mpala." 
Exodus14:16 Wewe ubishe mujangala webe, wolola tshianza tshiebe ha mai, wahandulule, Bena Isalele nebaye munkatshi mua mai ha buloba bûme." 
Exodus14:17 Ne tangila, meme nenkoleshe mitshima ya Bena Ejipitu, nebayemu ku nyima kua Bena Isalele, nengangate butumbi bualu bua Palô ne bisumbu biandi bionso ne makalu andi ne masalayi andi adi enda ha tubalu." 
Exodus14:18 Bena Ejipitu nebamanye ne, Meme ndi Yehowa, hanakuangata butumbi buanyi bualu bua Palô ne makalu andi ne masalayi andi adi enda ha tubalu." 
Exodus14:19 Muanjelo wa Nzambi, wakadi wenda ku mpala kua Bena Isalele, wakumukaku, wakaya ku nyima kuabo, ne difutu diakumuka ku mpala kuabo kabidi, diakimana ku nyima kuabo." 
Exodus14:20 Difutu diakadi hankatshi ha Bena Ejipitu ne Bena Isalele, difutu ne midima biakadiku kadi diakadi ne dinkenke butuku Kabikadianganyi ha buihi to butuku buonso." 
Exodus14:21 Mose wakolola tshianza tshiandi ha mai, ne Yehowa wakatuma luhehele lukole lua ku esete, wakahingasha mai butuku abu buonso, buloba bûme buakamueneka kuakadi mai, mai akahanduluka." 
Exodus14:22 Bena Isalele bakaya mu bunene bua mai ha buloba bûme, mai akadi bu tshinunu kudibo ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Exodus14:23 Bena Ejipitu bakamba kubihata, bakabalonda ku nyima kuabo mu bunene bua mai, tubalu tua Palô bionso ne makalu andi onso ne masalayi andi onso akadi enda ha tubalu." 
Exodus14:24 Hakatshia butuku, Yehowa wakatangila bisumbu bia Bena Ejipitu mu ditutu diakadi ne dinkenke dia kahia, wakabatshinyisha." 
Exodus14:25 Wakakanga nkata ya makalu, kabakamanya mua kuya bimpe, Bena Ejipitu bakamba ne, Tunyeme bietu ku mesu kua Bena Isalele, bualu bua Yehowa udi ubaluila nvita yabo, udi uluangana ne Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus14:26 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe ha mai, mai ahingane kabidi ha mutu ha Bena Ejipitu ne ha makalu abo ne ha masalayi abo adi enda ha tubalu." 
Exodus14:27 Mose wakolola tshianza tshiandi ha mai, ne hakatshia butuku mai akahingana kabidi ne bukole buau, Bena Ejipitu bakanyema ne Yehowa wakahita Bena Ejipitu bukole mu bunene bua mai." 
Exodus14:28 Mai akahingana, akabanda ha mutu ha makalu ne ha mutu ha masalayi akadi enda ha tubalu, ha mutu ha bisumbu bionso bia Palô, biakabalonda mu bunene bua mai, nansha umue wabo wakahandika." 
Exodus14:29 Kadi Bena Isalele bakenda mu buloba bûme munkatshi mua mai, mai akadi bu tshimanu kudibo ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Exodus14:30 Nunku Yehowa wakasungila Bena Isalele mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu dituku adi Bena Isalele bakatangila Bena Ejipitu bafue kukala kua mai manene. 
Exodus14:31 Bena Isalele bakatangila bualu bukole buakenzela Yehowa Bena Ejipitu, ne bantu bonso bakatshina Yehowa, bakeyemena Yehowa ne muntu wandi Mose." 
Exodus15:1 Mose ne Bena Isalele balambila Yehowa musambu eu, bakamba ne, Nengimbile Yehowa musambu, bualu bua yeye wakatamba bukole ne butumbi buandi. Yeye wakela kabalu ne muntu wakadi wenda ha nyima haku mu bunene bua mai manene." 
Exodus15:2 Yehowa udi bukole buanyi ne musambu wanyi, yeye wakulua luhandu luanyi, Yeye udi Nzambi wanyi, nemmutumbishe, udi Nzambi wa tatuʼanyi, nemmunemeke." 
Exodus15:3 Yehowa udi muena nvita, Yehowa ndina diandi." 
Exodus15:4 Wakela makalu a Palô ne bisumbu biandi bionso mu mai manene, wakashiha tuhita tuakasunguleye mu Dishiba Dikunze." 
Exodus15:5 Mai adi ha mutu habo, bakadina mu mai a dijimba bu dibue." 
Exodus15:6 Yehowa, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi ne butumbi ne bukole, Yehowa, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi tshisunsula bantu badi nʼetu lukuna." 
Exodus15:7 Mu bunene bua buakane buebe, wewe utu wahita bantu bukole badi badilesha ku mesu kuebe, wewe udi ubatumina tshiji tshiebe, tshidi tshibosha bu bilu." 
Exodus15:8 Muhuya webe wakabandisha mai, akimana bu tshimama, mai akimana dibula. Mai manene akakuatakana mu ndondo wa mai." 
Exodus15:9 Muena lukuna wakamba ne, Nembalonde, nembahete, nentahulule bintu bionso bidi bishala, mutshima wanyi neusanke bualu buabo, nempatule muele wanyi wa nvita, nembashihe ne tshianza tshianyi." 
Exodus15:10 Wewe wakatuma luhehele luebe, ne mai manene akababuikila, bakadma bu mabue mu mai manene." 
Exodus15:11 Nganyi udi bu wewe Yehowa, munkatshi mua nzambi mikuabo? Nganyi udi bu wewe, udi ne butumbi bua tshijila, udi utshinyisha bantu ne bienzedi bia butumbi, udi wenza malu a kukema?" 
Exodus15:12 Wewe wakolola tshianza tshiebe ne buloba buakabanda. 
Exodus15:13 Mu luse luebe wewe wakalombela bantu bawakuhikula, wewe wakabenzesha mu bukole buebe to ne ku muaba webe wa tshijila." 
Exodus15:14 Bantu bakunvua lumu, bakutshina, mikemu yakukuata Bena Peleshete." 
Exodus15:15 Bakelenge ba Edome bakukema, balume bakole ba Moaba badi bazakala, bantu bonso ba mu buloba bua Kanana bakujimina." 
Exodus15:16 Buowa ne ditshina biakubakuata, bualu bua bukole bua diboko diebe bobo badi bashikama holâ bu mabue, to ne hasabuka bantu bebe, Yehowa, tô ne hasabuka bantu bawakahikula." 
Exodus15:17 Wewe neulue nʼabo, neubateke mu mukuna wa buhianyi buebe, muaba uwakusungula, Yehowa, ne, Nenshikamemu, muaba wa tshijila, uwakajadika ne bianza biebe." 
Exodus15:18 Yehowa neakokeshe bantu tshiendelele. 
Exodus15:19 Bualu bua tubalu tua Palo ne makalu andi ne masalayi akadi enda ha nyima ha tubalu biakaya mu mai manene ne Yehowa wakahingasha mai ha mutu habo, kadi Bena Isalele bakenda ha buloba bûme munkatshi mua mai manene." 
Exodus15:20 Mîyama, muprofete mukashi, muanʼabo mukashi ne Alona, wakangata tshisanji mu tshianza tshiandi, ne bakashi bonso bakamulonda ne bisanji, benda batuhika." 
Exodus15:21 Mîyama wakabambila ne, Nuimbile Yehowa musambu, bualu bua yeye wakatamba bukole ne butumbi buandi, wakela kabalu ne muntu wakadi wenda ha nyima haku mu bunene bua mai manene." 
Exodus15:22 Mose wakalombela bantu bua kuyabo ku mpala bumuke ku Dishiba Dikunze, bakaya mu tshihela tshia Shû bakaya mu tshihela matuku asatu, kabakasangana mai." 
Exodus15:23 Hakaluabo ku Mala kabakamanya mua kunua mai a Mala, mai akadi ne bululu, nunku balodiha muaba au ne, Mala." 
Exodus15:24 Bantu baka tontolola Mose ne, Netunue tshinyi?" 
Exodus15:25 Yeye wakadila kudi Yehowa, ne Yehowa wakamulesha mu tshi, wakawela mu mai, mai akalua mimpe. Yehowa wakela nʼabo tshifufu, wakabateta," 
Exodus15:26 wakabambila ne, Binuatumikila di dia Yehowa Nzambi wenu, binuenza malu adi mimpe ku mesu kuandi, ne binuateleja matshu kudi mikenji yandi, binuenza mei andi onso, tshiena nnutumina nansha disama dimue dinakatumina Bena Ejipitu, bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa udi unuondaha." 
Exodus15:27 Bakalua ku Elima kuakadi mpokolo ya mai dikumi ne ibidi, ne mabue makumi muanda mutekete bakashikamaku hehi ne mai." 
Exodus16:1 Bakabika mu Elima ne Bena Isalele bonso, bakalua mu tshihela, dina diatshi Sina, hankatshi ha Elima ne Sinai. Bakafika nunku dituku dia dikumi ne ditanu dia ngondo muibidi hakumukabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus16:2 Bena Isalele buonso buabo bakajiana Mose ne Alona mu tshihela. 
Exodus16:3 Bena Isalele bakabambila ne, Biakadi bimpe bua tuetu kufua mu Ejipitu ku tshianza tshia Yehowa hatuakashikama hadi bivuadi bia munyinyi ne hatuakukutshika mafu ne bidia, kadi nuenu nuakuluila nʼetu mu tshihela etshi bualu bua kushiha tshisumbu etshi tshionso ne nzala." 
Exodus16:4 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Mona, nennulokeshile bidia bia mu diulu, bantu nebaye, nebabisangishe ku dituku bikumbane ku dituku bikumbane. Nembatete ne badi benda mu di dianyi, anyi?" 
Exodus16:5 Mu dituku disambombo nebalongolole bidibo bangate, bikale tshituha ha mutu ha tshituha tshidibo basangisha ku dituku ku dituku." 
Exodus16:6 Mose ne Alona bakambila Bena Isalele bonso ne, Dilolo nenumanye ne, Yehowa wakunuluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu," 
Exodus16:7 ne dinda nenumone butumbi bua Yehowa, bualu bua Yehowa udi munvue munudi numujiana, tuetu tudi banganga bua nudi nutujiana?" 
Exodus16:8 Mose wakamba ne, Halua Yehowa kunuha munyinyi dilolo ne kunukutshisha bidia ne dinda, bualu bua Yehowa udi munvue bu munudi numujiana, tuetu tudi banganyi? Kanuena nutujiana, nudi nujiana Yehowa." 
Exodus16:9 Mose wakambila Alona ne, Ambila tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele ne, Luai ha buihi ku mpala kua Yehowa, bualu bua yeye wakunvua tshitanu tshienu." 
Exodus16:10 Hakadi Alona wambila tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele nunku, bakatangila ku tshihela, ne monai, butumbi bua Yehowa buakamueneka mu ditutu." 
Exodus16:11 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus16:12 Nakunvua tshitanu tshia Bena Isalele, ubambile ne, Dilolo nenudie munyinyi, dinda nenukute bidia, nuenu nenumanye ne, Meme ndi bianyi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Exodus16:13 Hakalua dilolo nkuadi yakalua, yakabuikila tshitudilu, dinda dime diakadi dinyunguluka tshitudilu." 
Exodus16:14 Kakahanda dime diakadi hanshi, monai, tshintu tshikese tshibulunge tshiakadi ha tshihela, tshiakadi tshikese bu dime dikuatakane ha buloba." 
Exodus16:15 Hakatshimonabo, Bena Isalele bakakemangana ne, Etshi ntshinyi? bua bobo kabakatshumanya Mose wakabambila ne, Tshidi bidia biakunuha Yehowa bua kudia." 
Exodus16:16 Tshidi tshintu tshiakunuambila Yehowa ne, Muntu ne muntu adisangishilebi mudiye mua kudia, tshihiminu ku muntu ne muntu, muntu ne muntu adisangishilebi bu bungi bua bantu ba mu ntenta wandi." 
Exodus16:17 Bena Isalele bakenza nunku, bakuabo bakasangisha bia bungi, bakuabo bakasangisha bikese." 
Exodus16:18 Hakabidikishabo ne tshihiminu, muntu wakadi usangisha bia bungi bintu kabiakashala kudiye, ne muntu wakadi usangisha bikese kakadi ne nzala, muntu ne muntu wakadisangishilabi bu muakamanyeye mudiadieye." 
Exodus16:19 Mose wakabambila ne, Muntu kabishiyi tô ne dinda." 
Exodus16:20 Kadi bobo kabakitabusha dî dia Mose, bakuabo bakabishiya tô ne ku dinda, bishi biakabuelamu, bidia biakanunka muhuya mubi, Mose wakadi nʼabo tshiji." 
Exodus16:21 Bakabisangisha buatshia-buatshia, muntu ne muntu bu muakamanyeye mudiadieye, ne hakatema munya, bidia biakenguluka." 
Exodus16:22 Hakalua dituku disambombo, bakasangisha bituha bibidi, bihiminu bibidi ku muntu ne ku muntu, ne bakulu ba munkatshi muabo Bakalua, bakamanyisha Mose." 
Exodus16:23 Yeye wakabambila ne, Edi ndî diakuamba Yehowa ne, Makelela udi dituku dia kuikisha dia tshijila, dituku diakadijidila Yehowa nulambe bidia ne munyinyi binudi basue, ne bintu bionso bidi bishala, nubitekele bua kudia makelela." 
Exodus16:24 Bakalekela bidia tô ne ku dinda bu muakamba Mose, ne bidia kabiakabola, ne bishi kabiakabuelamu." 
Exodus16:25 Mose wakamba ne, Nudie bintu ebi lelu, bualu bua edi ndituku diakadijidila Yehowa, kanuena nubisangana mu mpata lelu." 
Exodus16:26 Nudisangishe matuku asambombo, kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete didi dijidila, kabiena bikalaku dituku adi." 
Exodus16:27 Hakalua dituku dia muanda mutekete, bakuabo bakaya kusangisha bidia, kadi kabakabisangana." 
Exodus16:28 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Nenuhidie kutumikila mikenji ne mei anyi musangu bule munyi?" 
Exodus16:29 Monai, Yehowa wakunuha dituku dijidila, nunku yeye wakunuha bidia bia matuku abidi ku dituku disambombo, muntu ne muntu ashale mu muaba wandi, kaluhuki mu muaba wandi dituku dia muanda mutekete." 
Exodus16:30 Nunku bantu bakikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete. 
Exodus16:31 Bena Isalele bakabikila bidia abi ne, Mana Tshiakadi tshintu tshitoke tô bu ntete ya conandre, tshiakadi tshintu tshia kutua kuimpe bu mikata mienza ne bintshi." 
Exodus16:32 Mose wakamba ne, Etshi ntshintu tshiakuamba Yehowa ne, Nushale ne tshihiminu tshia bintu ebi tô ne ku bikondo bienu bionso, bua nuenu numone bidia binakanudisha nʼabi mu tshihela, hanakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus16:33 Mose wakambila Alona ne, Angata tshivuadi, tekamu tshihiminu tshia bidia abi tente, ubiteke ku mesu kua Yehowa, nushale nʼabi tô ne ku bikondo bienu bionso." 
Exodus16:34 Alona wakabiteka ku mpala kua Mushete wa Yehowa bu muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Exodus16:35 Bena Isalele bakadia bidia abi tô bidimu makumi anai, tô ne hakaluabo mu buloba muakadi bantu, baka dia bidia abi tô ne hakaluabo ku matshika a buloba bua Kanâna." 
Exodus16:36 Tshihiminu etshi tshidi bu tshia dikumi tshia épha. 
Exodus17:1 Bena Isalele bakabisha luendu luabo mu tshihela tshia Sinai, bakashikama mu Lefidima bu muakamba Yehowa, kabakasanganamu mai a kunua." 
Exodus17:2 Nunku bantu bakatandangana ne Mose, bakamba ne, Utuhe mai a kunua Mose wakabambila ne, Nudi nutandangana nʼanyi bualu kai? Nudi nuteta Yehowa munyi?" 
Exodus17:3 Bantu bakadi ne nyota, bakatontolola Mose, bakamba ne, Wakuluila nʼetu ku Ejipitu bua kutushiha ne bana betu ne bimuna bietu ne nyota munyi?" 
Exodus17:4 Mose wakadila kudi Yehowa, wakamba ne, Nengenzele bantu aba tshinyi? Bobo badi bamba kunkuma ne mabue." 
Exodus17:5 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Uye biebe ku mpala kua bantu, ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele baye nʼebe, angata mulangala webe mu tshianza, uwakakuma nʼau musulu, ya biebe." 
Exodus17:6 Mona, meme nengimane ku mpala kuebe ha mutu ha dibue dia Holeba, wewe neukume dibue ne mai neahatuke, bantu banue mai Mose wakenza nunku ku mesu kua bakulu ba Bena Isalele." 
Exodus17:7 Bakidika dina dia muaba au ne, Masa ne Meliba, bualu bua kutontolola kua Bena Isalele ne bualu bua bakatela Yehowa ne, Yehowa udi munkatshi muetu, anyi?" 
Exodus17:8 Amaleka wakalua, wakaluangana ne Bena Isalele mu Lefidima." 
Exodus17:9 Mose wakambila Yoshua ne, Utusunguile bantu baye kuluangana ne Bena Amaleka. Makelela nengimane ha mutu ha mukuna ne mulangala wa Nzambi mu tshianza tshianyi." 
Exodus17:10 Yoshua Wakenza bu muakamuambila Mose, wakasangana ne Bena Amaleka Mose ne Alona ne Hû bakaya ha mutu ha mukuna." 
Exodus17:11 Hakabandisha Mose tshianza tshiandi Bena Isalele bakatamba bukole, ne hakahuekesheye tshianza tshiandi, Bena Amaleka bakatamba." 
Exodus17:12 Kadi bianza bia Mose biakanema bujitu; bakangata dibue, bakaditeka ku nyima ne yeye wakashikama ha mutu hadi, ne Alona ne Hû bakabandisha bianza biandi, umue ku luseke lukuabo, umue ku luseke lukuabo, ne bianza biandi biakakoleshibua to ne hakabuela diba." 
Exodus17:13 Yoshua wakahita Amaleka ne bantu bandi bukole ne muele wa nvita. 
Exodus17:14 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ufunde bualu ebu mu mukauda bu tshivulukidi, ububadile mu matshu a Yoshua ne, Meme nenjimishe tshivulukidi tshia Amaleka muinshi mua diulu." 
Exodus17:15 Mose wakashila tshioshelu, wakidika dina dia tshi ne, Yehowa-nisi," 
Exodus17:16 wakamba ne, Yehowa wakaditshiha, Yehowa neuhingane ne Bena Amaleka nvita ku tshikondo ku tshikondo." 
Exodus18:1 Yetelo, mubuki wa Midiyana, tatu-muenu wa Mose, wakunvua malu onso akenzela Nzambi Mose ne Bena Isalele, bantu bandi, ne muakalua Yehowa ne Bena Isalele mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus18:2 Yetelo, tatu-muenu wa Mose, wakangata Sipola, mukashi wa Mose, hakadiye mumutume," 
Exodus18:3 ne bana bandi balume babidi, dina dia mukuabo ne, Geshoma, bualu bua Mose wakamba ne, Nakadi muenyi mu buloba bua bende." 
Exodus18:4 Dina dia mukuabo ne, Eliezê, bualu bua Mose wakamba ne, Nzambi wa tatuʼanyi wakadi mukuatshishi wanyi, wakansungila ku muele wa nvita wa Palô." 
Exodus18:5 Yetelo, tatu-muenu wa Mose, wakalua ne bana bandi balume ne mukashi wandi kudi Mose mu tshihela hakadiye ushikama ku mukuna wa Nzambi." 
Exodus18:6 Yeye wakambila Mose ne, Meme tatuʼebe-muenu, Yetelo, nakukuluila ne mukashi webe ne bana bandi ba balume babidi." 
Exodus18:7 Mose wakaya kusangakena ne tatuʼandi-muenu, wakamukukuila, wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku, bakakonkangana bua malu abo, bakabuela mu ntenta." 
Exodus18:8 Mose wakambila tatuʼandi-muenu malu onso akenzela Yehowa Palô ne Bena Ejipitu bualu bua Bena Isalele, ne bua makenga akabakuata mu nshila, ne muakabasungila Yehowa." 
Exodus18:9 Yetelo wakasanka bua malu mimpe onso akenzela Yehowa Bena Isalele, bualu bua yeye wakabasungila mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus18:10 Yetelo wakamba ne, Yehowa avudishibue disanka, wakanusungila mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu ne mu bianza bia Palô, wakahatula bantu mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus18:11 Katataka ndi mumanye ne, Yehowa udi utamba nzambi yonso buene, bualu bua wakahatula bantu mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu hakabaleshabo dikamakama." 
Exodus18:12 Yetelo, tatu-muenu wa Mose, wakoshila Nzambi nyama ya mulambu, ne Alona ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele bakalua kudia bidia ne tatu-muenu wa Mose ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
Exodus18:13 Hakatshiabu, bakashikama Mose bua kulumbuluila bantu bilumbu, bantu bakimana ku mpala kua Mose dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Exodus18:14 Hakatangila tatu-muenu wa Mose malu onso akenzeleye bantu, yeye wakamba ne, Wewe udi wenzela bantu tshinyi? Udi ushikama nkayebe ne bantu bimana ku mpala kuebe dinda tô ne ku dilolo munyi?" 
Exodus18:15 Mose wakambila tatuʼandi-muenu ne, Bualu bua bantu badi balue kundi bua kuebesha Nzambi malu." 
Exodus18:16 Bikalabo ne tshilumbu, badi balue kundi, ne meme ndi ndumbulula hankatshi ha muntu ne mmena mutumba nʼandi, ndi mbamanyisha mei a Nzambi ne mikenji yandi." 
Exodus18:17 Tatu-muenu wa Mose wakamuambila ne, Bualu ebu bûdi wenza kambuimpe." 
Exodus18:18 Wewe neuhange bulelela, ne wewe ne bantu badi nʼebe bujitu bua bualu ebu budi bukutamba bukôle, wewe nkayebe kuena mua kubuenza." 
Exodus18:19 Unvua dî dianyi, nenkuhe lungenyi, ne Nzambi neikale nʼebe, wewe wikale muakuidi wa bantu kudi Nzambi, Ulue biebe ne malu onso kudi Nzambi." 
Exodus18:20 Neubamanyishe mei a Nzambi ne mikenji, neubaleshe nshila udibo ne bua kuendamu, ne mudimu udibo ne bua kuenza." 
Exodus18:21 Bualu bukuabo, usungule munkatshi mua bantu bonso balume badi ne lungenyi lule, badi batshina Nzambi, bena bulelela, badi bakina mbueshilu, ubateke ku mutu kua bantu bu bakokeshi ba bantu tshinunu ne ba bantu lukama ne ba bantu makumi atanu ne ba bantu dikumi." 
Exodus18:22 Bobo nebalumbuluile bantu bilumbu matuku onso bobo nebalue kûdi ne bilumbu binene, kadi bobo nebakose bilumbu bikese; nunku badi mua kukumatshisha." 
Exodus18:23 Biwenza nunku, ne Bikala Nzambi numuambile dî diandi nunku, wewe neumanye mua kuikala ne bukole ne bantu nebaye ku miaba yabo talalâ." 
Exodus18:24 Mose wakitabusha di dia tatuʼandi-muenu, wakenza mei onso akambeye." 
Exodus18:25 Mose wakasungula balume ba lungenyi lule ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, wakabateka bakokeshi ha mutu ha bantu, bakokeshi ba bantu tshinunu ne ba bantu lukama ne ba bantu makumi atanu ne ba bantu dikumi." 
Exodus18:26 Bobo bakalumbuluila bantu bilumbu matuku onso, bakalua ne bilumbu bikole kudi Mose, ne bobo bakakosa bilumbu bikese." 
Exodus18:27 Mose wakitabusha bua tatuʼandi-muenu ahingane, yeye wakaya mu nshila wa ku buloba buandi." 
Exodus19:1 Hakadi Bena Isalele bamane kuluhuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu ngondo isatu, mu dituku adi mene bakafika mu tshihela tshia Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Hakumukabo ku Lefidima ne hakafikabo ku tshihela tshia Sinai, bakashikama mu tshihela, Bena Isalele bakashimika ntenta ku mpala kua mukuna." 
Exodus19:3 Mose wakabanda ha mukuna kudi Nzambi, ne Yehowa wakamubikila mu mukuna, wakamba ne, Wewe newambile ba mu nsubu wa Yakoba nunku, neumanyishe Bena Isalele ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne," 
Exodus19:4 Nuenu nuakutangila malu anakenzela Bena Ejipitu, ne bu munakanutuala ha mahuahua a nyunyu wa mukanku, bu munakalua nʼenu kundi meme." 
Exodus19:5 Binuatumikila dî dianyi, ne binuanemeka tshihungidi tshianyi, nuenu nenuikale bantu banyi ba munkatshi mua bantu bonso, bualu bua buloba buonso mbuanyi." 
Exodus19:6 Nuenu nenuikale kundi bu bukelenge bua bakuidi, bu tshisamba tshia tshijila. Â mei audi mua kuambila Bena Isalele." 
Exodus19:7 Mose wakalua, wakabikila bakulu ba bantu, wakabamanyisha mei onso akamuambila Yehowa." 
Exodus19:8 Bantu bonso bakamba hohamue ne, Netuenze mei onso akutuambila Yehowa Mose wakambila Yehowa mei akamba bantu." 
Exodus19:9 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Mona, ndi mulue kudi mu ditutu difike, bua bantu bunvue hanayikila nʼebe, bobo bitabushe di diebe tshiendelele. Mose wakamanyisha Yehowa mei a bantu." 
Exodus19:10 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ya biebe kudi bantu, ubajidike lelu ne makelela, bobo bauvu-we bilulu biabo," 
Exodus19:11 badilongolole ku dituku disatu, bualu bua Yehowa neahueke ha mukuna wa Sinai ku mesu kua bantu dituku disatu." 
Exodus19:12 Wewe ujidike nshila ya ku mukuna, wambile bantu ne, Nudimuke, kanuyi ku mukuna, kanûlengi tshianza, muntu udi ulenga mukuna tshianza nebamushihe." 
Exodus19:13 Muntu kamulengi tshianza nansha, kadi nebamushihe ne mabue anyi nebamutahe ne difuma, bikaleye nyama anyi muntu, yeye kena wikala ne muoyo Helabo mpungi musangu mule, bantu nebalue ku mukuna." 
Exodus19:14 Mose wakumuka ku mukuna, wakahueka kudi bantu, wakabidika bantu ne bobo bakuvuwa bilulu biabo." 
Exodus19:15 Yeye wakambila bantu ne, Nudilongolole ku dituku disatu, kanuyi ha buihi ne bakashi nansha." 
Exodus19:16 Hakalua dituku disatu ne dinda, makubakuba ne miele ya nvula ne difutu difike biakadi ha mukuna, ne di dia mpungi diakatamba bukole, bantu bonso bakadi mu tshitudilu bakazakala." 
Exodus19:17 Mose wakaluhuka mu tshitudilu ne bantu bua kusangakena ne Nzambi, bobo bakimana kuinshi kua mukuna." 
Exodus19:18 Mukuna wa Sinai wonso wakadi ne muishi, bualu bua Yehowa wakahueka ha mutu hau mu kahia, muishi wakabanda bu muishi wa tshikutu, mukuna wonso wakakanka bikole." 
Exodus19:19 Hakakola dî dia mpungi bikole bikole, Mose wakela dî ne Nzambi wakitaba kudiye ne dî diandi." 
Exodus19:20 Yehowa wakahueka mu diulu, wakalua ha mutu ha mukuna wa Sinai. Yehowa wakabikila Mose ku mutu kua mukuna, ne Mose wakabanda." 
Exodus19:21 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Uhueke biebe, udimushe bantu, kabalu ha buihi bua kumona Yehowa, bungi buabo nebafue." 
Exodus19:22 Bakuidi bonso badi balue hehi ne Yehowa badijidile, bua Yehowa kabashihi." 
Exodus19:23 Mose wakambila Yehowa ne, Bantu kabena mua kulua ku mukuna wa Sinai bualu bua wewe wakamba ne, Ujidike mukuna, ûjidile" 
Exodus19:24 Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Ya, hueka biebe, wewe neuhingane, wewe ne Alona kadi bakuidi ne bantu kabalu ha buihi nansha, bua Yehowa kabashihi." 
Exodus19:25 Nunku Mose wakahueka kudi bantu, wakabamanyisha." 
Exodus20:1 Nzambi wakamba mei â onso ne," 
Exodus20:2 Ndi bianyi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakakuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, mu nsubu wa buhika." 
Exodus20:3 Kuikadi ne nzambi mikuabo ne meme hohamue. 
Exodus20:4 Kudisongedi luhingu anyi tshifuanyikishi tshia tshintu tshia mu diulu anyi tshia tshintu tshia hanshi ha buloba anyi tshia tshintu tshia mu mai adi muinshi mua buloba. 
Exodus20:5 Kubinaminyi, kubitendeledi, bua meme Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ndi bianyi Nzambi wa mukau, ntu ngatumina bana ba tshihungu tshisatu anyi tshinai badi hanyi lukuna mibi ya batatuʼabo." 
Exodus20:6 Ntu ngalesha bihungu tshinunu badi bansue ne badi benza mikenji yanyi luse lujalame. 
Exodus20:7 Kutedi dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi webe, tshitelatela, bua Yehowa kena ubingisha muntu udi utela dina diandi tshitelatela." 
Exodus20:8 Uvuluke dituku dia Lumingu, udijidile." 
Exodus20:9 Ukuate mudimu webe matuku asambombo, wenza midimu yebe yonso," 
Exodus20:10 kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete didi Lumingu lua Yehowa, Nzambi webe Dituku adi kuenji mudimu, nansha wewe nansha muanʼebe wa balume nansha muanʼebe wa bakashi nansha muhika webe mulume nansha muhika webe mukashi nansha bimuna biebe nansha muenyi udi ku mbelu kuebe," 
Exodus20:11 bualu bua Yehowa wakafuka diulu ne buloba ne mai manene ne bintu bionso bidimu matuku asambombo, wakikisha biandi dituku dia muanda mutekete, nunku Yehowa wakalengesha dituku dia muanda mutekete, wakadijidila." 
Exodus20:12 Unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe, bua matuku ebe ikale a bungi mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ukuha." 
Exodus20:13 Kushihianganyi. 
Exodus20:14 Kuendi masandi. 
Exodus20:15 Kuibi. 
Exodus20:16 Kudingidi mukuenu. 
Exodus20:17 Kukuna mutshima webe ku nsubu wa mukuenu, kukumi mutshima webe ku mukashi wa mukuenu anyi ku muntu wandi mulume anyi ku muntu wandi mukashi anyi ku ngombe wandi anyi ku mpunda wandi anyi ku tshintu tshionso tshia mukuenu." 
Exodus20:18 Bantu bonso bakatangila makubakuba ne miele ya nvula ne di dia mpungi ne muishi ha mukuna, hakamonabo malu â, bakatshina, bakimana ha bule." 
Exodus20:19 Bakambila Mose ne, Wakula biebe nʼetu, netunvue, kadi biakula Nzambi nʼetu, netufue." 
Exodus20:20 Mose wakambila bantu ne, Kanutshinyi, bualu bua Nzambi wakulua bua kunuteta, ditshina diandi dikale ku mpala kuenu, bua nuenu kanuenji malu mabi." 
Exodus20:21 Bantu bakimana kule, ne Mose wakalua hehi ne difutu difike hakadi Nzambi." 
Exodus20:22 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Wewe wambila Bena Isalele ne, Nuenu nkayenu nuakumona bu munakusomba nʼenu mufume mu diulu." 
Exodus20:23 Kanuenji nzambi mikuabo bua kuikala hehi nʼanyi nzambi ya tshiamu tshia argent anyi nzambi ya tshiamu tshia or, kanuyenji." 
Exodus20:24 Nungashile tshishihelu tshia buloba, nufile ha mutu hatshi milambu ya kuosha, ne milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, ne mikoko yenu ne ngombe yenu, ku miaba yonso kundi nnuvuluisha dina dianyi, nendue kunudi, nennusankishe." 
Exodus20:25 Binuangashila tshioshelu tshia mabue, kanusongi mabue ne biamu, bualu bua binuâheya ne tshiamu, nuenu nuakuona mabue au." 
Exodus20:26 Kanubandi ku tshioshelu tshianyi ha tshibanda, bantu kabatangidi butaka buebe." 
Exodus21:1 Ei idi mikenji ludi mua kuteka ku mpala kuabo. 
Exodus21:2 Biwasumba muhika, Muena Ebelu, yeye neakukuatshile mudimu bidimu bisambombo, ne tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete yeye neahete budishikaminyi hatuhu." 
Exodus21:3 Bialueye nkayandi, neaye biandi nkayandi, bikaleye mubake, nunku mukashi wandi neaye nʼandi." 
Exodus21:4 Biamuha mukelenge wandi mukashi ne biamulelela mukashi nansha bana ba balume nansha bana ba bakashi, mukashi ne bana bandi nebikale ba mukelenge wandi, yeye muhika neaye nkayandi." 
Exodus21:5 Biamba muhika ne, Ndi musue mukelenge wanyi ne mukashi wanyi ne bana banyi, tshiena musue kuheta budishikaminyi," 
Exodus21:6 nunku mukelenge wandi nealue handi kudi balumbuluishi, nealue handi ku tshibi anyi ku tshibanda tshia tshibi ne mukelenge wandi neatubuishe ditshu diandi ne tshiamu ne yeye neamukuatshile mudimu tshiendelele." 
Exodus21:7 Biahana muntu muahandi mukashi bu muhika, yeye kena uluhuka bu bahika balume." 
Exodus21:8 Bikaleye kayi musankishe mukelenge wakamubaka, nunku yeye neitabushe ne bamuhikule, kadi yeye kena mua kumuhana kudi ba bende bualu bua yeye wakamudinga." 
Exodus21:9 Biamubakisheye kudi muanʼandi wa balume, yeye neamuenzele bu mu tshilele tshia bana ba bakashi." 
Exodus21:10 Biangateye mukashi mukuabo, yeye kena mua kuhuekesha bidia biandi ne bilulu biandi ne bilele bia bantu bia kubakangana." 
Exodus21:11 Bikaleye kayi mumuenzele malu â asatu, nunku mukashi udi mua kuya tshianana, kakuyi bua argent." 
Exodus21:12 Muntu udi ukuma mukuabo, udi umushiha, nebamushihe yeye bulelela." 
Exodus21:13 Bikala muntu kayi mumualamme mu musokoka, kadi Nzambi wakamuha mu tshianza tshiandi (wakamushiha ku mpukahuka), nunku nenkulongoluele muaba wa yeye kunyemenamu." 
Exodus21:14 Bialua muntu ne luonji lua kushiha mukuandi mu budimu, wewe neumumushe ku tshioshelu tshianyi, bua kumushiha." 
Exodus21:15 Muntu udi ukuma tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi, nebamushihe bulelela." 
Exodus21:16 Muntu udi wiba muntu mukuabo, udi umuhana anyi bamusangana mu bianza biandi, nebamushihe bulelela." 
Exodus21:17 Muntu udi uhenda tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi, nebamushihe bulelela." 
Exodus21:18 Bialuangana balume ne biakuma umue mukuabo ne dibue anyi biamututeye tshisusu, kena umushiha kadi yeye udi ulala ha bulalu," 
Exodus21:19 biabikeye kabidi ne udi wenda ne mulangala wandi, muntu wakamukuma neabinge, kadi yeye neamufute bua matuku akalaleye hanshi, ne mushinga wa kuondahibua kua ndi." 
Exodus21:20 Biakuma muntu muhika wandi mulume anyi muhika wandi mukashi ne mulangala, ne biafueye mu tshianza tshiandi, nebamukengeshe bulelela." 
Exodus21:21 Kadi biashaleye ne muoyo nansha dituku dimue nansha matuku abidi, kabena bamukengesha bualu bua yeye udi biuma biandi." 
Exodus21:22 Bialuangana balume ne badi bakulua mukashi udi ne difu, ne yeye udi utula difu, kadi dikenga dikuabo kadiena dilonda ku nyima, yeye wakamukuma neafutie mulume wandi bintu bidiye musue, yeye neamufute bintu bidi balumbuluishi bamba." 
Exodus21:23 Kadi bikala dikenga dikuabo dilonda ku nyima, wewe neufue muoyo ku muoyo," 
Exodus21:24 disu ku disu, dinu ku dinu, tshianza ku tshianza, dikasa ku dikasa," 
Exodus21:25 udi muoshe mukuabo kahia nebamuoshe kabidi, udi utaha mukuabo mputa nebamutahe biandi, udi ukuma mukuabo mibundabunda nebamukume biandi." 
Exodus21:26 Biatuta muntu muhika wandi mulume anyi muhika wandi mukashi ku disu, ne biafuadi, yeye neamumushe ku butaka buandi bualu bua disu diandi." 
Exodus21:27 Biahuoleye dinu dia muhika wandi mulume anyi muhika wandi mukashi, yeye neamumushe ku buhika buandi bualu bua dinu diandi." 
Exodus21:28 Biakuma ngombe mulume anyi mukashi ne nsengu yandi ne biafueye, nebakume ngombe mabue, kabadi munyinyi wandi nansha, kadi muena ngombe neabinge." 
Exodus21:29 Kadi bikala ngombe muikale ne tshilele tshia kukuma bantu nsengu, ne bakamanyisha mukelenge wandi, ne yeye wakahidia kumukanda, biashiheye nansha mulume nansha mukashi, nebakume ngombe ne mabue, nebashihe mukelenge wandi kabidi." 
Exodus21:30 Kadi biatekabo biuma bia kudihikula kudiye, yeye neafile biuma bionso bidibo balomba bua kuhikula muoyo wandi." 
Exodus21:31 Bikaleye mushihe nansha muana wa balume nansha muana wa bakashi, nebamuenzele nunku bu mudi dilumbulula edi." 
Exodus21:32 Biakuma ngombe muhika mulume anyi muhika mukashi ne nsengu, nebafute mukelenge wabo nshekele makumi asatu ya argent, nebakume ngombe ne mabue." 
Exodus21:33 Biumusha muntu tshibuikidi tshia ha mutu ha dina, anyi biumbuleye dina kayi uteka tshibuikidi ha mutu, ne biahonamu ngombe anyi kabalu," 
Exodus21:34 muena dina neashikishe bualu bimpe, neahe muenʼabi biuma, ne nyama mufue neikale wandi." 
Exodus21:35 Biakuma ngombe wa muntu ngombe wa muntu mukuabo, biamushiheye, bobo nebahane ngombe udi ne muoyo, nebabanyangane mushinga wandi, nebabanyangane ngombe mufue, kabidi." 
Exodus21:36 Anyi bikala ngombe muikale ne tshilele tshia kukuma ne nsengu diambedi, ne bikala mukelenge wandi kayi mumulame, yeye neafute ngombe ku ngombe, ne ngombe mufue neikale wandi." 
Exodus22:1 Biba muntu ngombe anyi mukoko, biamushiheye anyi biamuhaneye, yeye neahingashe ngombe itanu ku ngombe umue, ne nukoko mai ku mukoko umue." 
Exodus22:2 Biasanganabo muibi mubuele mu nsubu ne biamukumabo ne biafueye, kabena benze mushiku bualu." 
Exodus22:3 Biamukuatabo mu munya, nebamusombuele, yeye neahingashe bintu, ne bikaleye kayi ne bintu, nebamuhane bua buibi buandi." 
Exodus22:4 Biasanganabo bintu bidi ne muoyo mu tshianza tshiandi, nansha ngombe nansha mpunda nansha mukoko, yeye neahingashe bintu misangu ibidi." 
Exodus22:5 Bialekela muntu ngombe wandi mu budimi bua muntu mukuabo, ne biadieye mitshi yandi ya tumuma tukese, yeye neamuhingashile bintu bidi bitamba buimpe bia mu budimi buandi ne bia mu budimi buandi bua nvinyo." 
Exodus22:6 Biosha kahia bisumbu bia luosa anyi luosa lua mu budimi, muntu wakatemesha kahia neafute." 
Exodus22:7 Biafila muntu argent anyi biuma mu bianza bia mukuandi bua kubilama, ne biabibabo mu nsubu muandi, biasanganabo muibi, yeye neabafute bintu misangu ibidi." 
Exodus22:8 Kadi bikalabo kabayi basangana muibi, nunku muena nsubu nealue biandi kudi balumbuluishi, bua bobo bajingulule ne yeye wakalenga biuma bia mukuandi tshianza, anyi." 
Exodus22:9 Biafuilanganabo bua tshintu tshionso, nansha ngombe nansha mpunda nansha mukoko nansha bilulu nansha bintu bikuabo bidi bantu bamba ne, Ebu mbualu bua bantu baye kudi balumbuluishi, muntu udi balumbuluishi bahishe yeye neafute mukuandi bintu misangu ibidi." 
Exodus22:10 Biafila muntu nansha nyama wa mpunda nansha ngombe nansha mukoko nansha nyama mukuabo kudi mukuandi bua kumiamina, ne biafua nyama, anyi biamutahabo mputa, anyi biamuihatabo ne muntu kayi mumutangile," 
Exodus22:11 ditshiha dia Yehowa nedikale hankatshi ha bubidi buabo bua kujingulula ne, Yeye kakalenga bintu bia mukuandi tshianza, ne bitabusha mukelenge wa nyama au nunku, mukuandi kena ne bualu bua kumufuta." 
Exodus22:12 Kadi bibabo nyama mu tshianza tshiandi, yeye neafute mukelenge wandi." 
Exodus22:13 Bikala nyama muhandibue bihese, yeye nealue ne munyinyi wandi bu tshimanymu tshia bualu, ne yeye kena ufuta bua nyama muhandibue." 
Exodus22:14 Biasombesha muntu nansha nyama kai kudi mukuandi, ne biamutahabo mputa anyi biafueye ne muenʼandi kayiku, yeye nealamate bulelela." 
Exodus22:15 Kadi bikalaku muenʼandi, yeye kena ne bualu bua kumufuta. Bikaleye mufutshile nyama au bua kuenza nʼandi mudimu, mushinga wakumufutshileye neukumbane." 
Exodus22:16 Biateya mulume mukashi utshidi kamama, udi kayi muanze kutangila kudi mulume, ne bialaleye nʼandi, yeye neafile biuma bia dibaka bulelela bua yeye kuikaleye mukashi wandi." 
Exodus22:17 Biahidia tatu wa mukashi kumufila kudiye, yeye neafute biuma bu bia dibaka dia bakashi batshidi kamama." 
Exodus22:18 Kuitabushi bua muena milongo mukashi ashale ne muoyo. 
Exodus22:19 Muntu yonso udi ulala ne nyama nebanshihe bulelela. 
Exodus22:20 Muntu udi ushihela nzambi mikuabo nyama, kayi uyishihela Yehowa nkayandi, nebamushihe yeye." 
Exodus22:21 Kuenzedi muenyi bualu bubi, kumukengeshi, bualu bua nuenu nuakadi benyi mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus22:22 Kanukengeshi bakashi ba mu lufuila anyi bana ba nshiya. 
Exodus22:23 Biwabakengesha ne biadilabo kundi, meme nengunvuile muadi wabo," 
Exodus22:24 ne tshiji tshianyi netshitambe bukole, nennushihe ne muele wa nvita, ne bakashi benu nebikale bakashi ba mu lufuila ne bana benu nebikale bana ba nshiya." 
Exodus22:25 Biwasombesha mukuabo muhele wa munkatshi mua bantu banyi argent, kumubadi bu muena dibanza, kumulombi tshia kasombelu." 
Exodus22:26 Biwangata tshilulu tshia mukuenu bu tshieya, wewe neutshihingashe kudiye diambedi diba kadiyi dianzekubuela," 
Exodus22:27 bualu bua tshiotshi tshidi anu tshiandi tshia kudibuikila nʼatshi, yeye nealale tulu munyi? Hadileye kundi, nemmunvuile, bualu bua meme ndi ne luse." 
Exodus22:28 Kutedi dina dia Nzambi tshitelatela, kuhendi mukokeshi wa bantu bebe." 
Exodus22:29 Kunengi bua kufila bintu bia kunowa kudi Nzambi, ne nvinyo ûdi ukama. Nufile banʼa bute ba balume kundi." 
Exodus22:30 Enzai nunku ne ngombe yenu ne mikoko yenu kabidi, muana neikale ne mamu wandi matuku muanda mutekete, kadi numufile kundi dituku dia muanda mukulu." 
Exodus22:31 Nuenu nenuikale bu bantu bajidila kundi kanudi munyinyi wakahandabo kudi nyama ya mu mpata, nuwele kudi mbua." 
Exodus23:1 Kumanyishi bakuabo lumu ludi kaluyi lululela. Kubuelakanyi ne bantu babi bualu bua kuikala bu mumanyi wa malu adi kayi malelela. 
Exodus23:2 Kulondi ku nyima kua tshisumbu tshia bantu tshinene bua kuenza malu mabi, kuikadi bu mu manyi wa bualu munkatshi mua bantu badi basangisha dî diabo bua kudibingisha mu tshilumbu tshidi ka tshiyi tshilelela." 
Exodus23:3 Kueyemenyi buhele bua muntu muhele mu dikosa dia tshilumbu tshiandi. 
Exodus23:4 Biwasangana nansha ngombe nansha mpunda bia muntu udi nʼebe lukuna biya ha bule, uhingashe nyama wandi kudiye kabidi." 
Exodus23:5 Biwatangila mpunda wa muntu udi nʼebe lukuna muhone muinshi mua bujitu buandi, kushiya mpunda nunku, kadi umukuatshishe ne bujitu buandi." 
Exodus23:6 Kuhidi kubingisha muntu muhele mu tshilumbu tshiakane tshidiye nʼatshi bualu bua buhele buandi. 
Exodus23:7 Shila malu a mushimi kaba, kanushihi muntu muimpe udi kayi ne bualu meme tshiena mbingisha muntu mubi." 
Exodus23:8 Kanuitabushi tshintu tshia mbueshilu, bualu bua tshintu tshia mbueshilu tshidi tshifofomesha muntu udi ne mesu matabale, tshidi tshikudimuna mei a muntu muakane." 
Exodus23:9 Kanukengeshi muenyi wa munkatshi muenu, bualu bua nuenu nudi bamanye mutshima wa muenyi, nuenu nuakadi benyi mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus23:10 Mu bidimu bisambombo nukune bintu mu buloba, nuhuole bintu bidi bikumbana," 
Exodus23:11 kadi tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete nushiye buloba bua kututuka ne bualu bua bantu bahele ba munkatshi muenu badie bintu, ne bintu bidibo bashiye, nyama ya mu mpata neyibidie. Nuenze mitshi yenu ya tumuma tukese nunku ne mitshi ya olive kabidi." 
Exodus23:12 Nuenze mudimu wenu matuku asambombo kadi nuikishe mu dituku dia muanda mutekete, bua ngombe webe ne mpunda webe bikishe ne muana wa balume wa muhika webe mukashi, ne muenyi basangale." 
Exodus23:13 Nudimuke mu malu onso anakanuambila, kanuambilanganyi dina dia nzambi mikuabo, bantu bakuabo kabunvu dina adi mukana muebe." 
Exodus23:14 Nuenu nenudie bidia bia disanka ku mesu kuanyi misangu isatu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. 
Exodus23:15 Nenudie bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene matuku muanda mutekete, mu tshikondo tshinakasungula mu ngondo wa Abiba (bualu bua nuakaluhuka mu Ejipitu mu ngondo au) muntu kalu ku mesu kuanyi ne bianza bituhu," 
Exodus23:16 nenudie bidia bia disanka hanuahuola bintu bia kumudilu binuakakuna mu madimi, nudie bidia bia disanka kabidi kunshikidilu kua tshidimu hanuashikisha kusangisha bintu bionso bia mu madimi." 
Exodus23:17 Balume bonso nebalue ku mesu kua Mukelenge Nzambi misangu isatu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. 
Exodus23:18 Kanuntendeledi ne mashi a nyama mishiha ne bidia bidi ne luevene hohamue kanushiyi manyi a nyama ya milambu yanyi to ne ku dinda 
Exodus23:19 Bintu bia kumudilu binudi nu huola mu madimi, nulue nʼabi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu. Kulambi muana wa mukoko ne mabele a mamu wandi." 
Exodus23:20 Mona, ndi nfuma muanjelo ku mpala kuebe, bua kukulama mu nshila ne bua kulua nʼebe mu muaba unakakulongoluela." 
Exodus23:21 Udimuke ku mpala kuandi, unvue di diandi, kumufuishishi tshiji, yeye kena ukubuikidila bubi buebe bualu bua dina dianyi didi munda muandi." 
Exodus23:22 Kadi biwunvua di diandi ne biwenza mei onso andi nkuambila, nunku meme nengikale bu muena lukuna kudi bantu badi nʼebe lukuna, ne bu muena nvita kudi bantu badi basue kusangana nʼebe." 
Exodus23:23 Bualu bua muanjelo wanyi neaye ku mpala kuebe, nealue nʼebe kudi Bena Amole ne kudi Bena Pelizi ne kudi Bena Hiti ne kudi Bena Kanana ne kudi Bena Hiwi ne kudi Bena Yebuse, ne meme nembashihe." 
Exodus23:24 Kuinaminyi nzambi yabo, kuyitendeledi, kuenji mudibo benza, kadi ubiele hanshi, ushihe bibumba biabo." 
Exodus23:25 Nuenu nenutendelele Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, yeye neayudishe disanka ku bidia bienu ne ku mai enu, nennumushile disama munkatshi muenu." 
Exodus23:26 Kakuena mukashi udi utula difu, kakuena mukashi udi wikala nkumba mu buloba buenu, nenkumbashe bungi bua matuku enu." 
Exodus23:27 Nentume dishina dianyi ku mpala kuebe, nentshinyishe bantu bonso baudi ufika kudibo, nenkobamishe bantu bonso badi nʼebe lukuna nyima yabo." 
Exodus23:28 Nentume tuishi ku mpala kuebe bualu bua kukuihatshila Bena Hiwi ne Bena Kanâna ne Bena Hiti. 
Exodus23:29 Tshiena mbihata mu tshidimu tshimue bua buloba kabulu tshianana, ne nyama ya mu mpata kayikumbanyi ku mesu kuebe." 
Exodus23:30 Nembihate bilulu bitulu tô ne hakakumbana ba bungi ne hanuahiana buloba. 
Exodus23:31 Nenteke mikalu yenu ku Dishiba Dikunze tô ne ku mai manene a Bena Peleshete, ne ku tshihela tô ne ku musulu wa Pelata, bualu bua meme nenfile bena buloba mu bianza bienu, nuenu nenubihate ku mpala kuenu." 
Exodus23:32 Kuhungi nʼabo tshihungidi anyi ne nzambi yabo. 
Exodus23:33 Bobo kabena bikala mu buloba buebe bualu bua bobo nebakuenzeshe bua kungenzela malu mabi, biwatendelela nzambi yabo, bualu ebu nebuikale buteyi kûdi." 
Exodus24:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ulue biebe kudi Yehowa ne wewe ne Alona ne Nadaba ne Abihu ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele makumi muanda mutekete, nuntendelele ha bule." 
Exodus24:2 Mose nealue nkayandi hehi ne Yehowa, kadi bobo kabalu hehi nansha, bantu kabayi nʼandi." 
Exodus24:3 Mose wakalua, wakamanyisha bantu mei onso akamba Yehowa, ne mikenji yandi yonso, ne bantu bonso bakitaba dî dimue ne, Mei onso akutuambila Yehowa netuênze." 
Exodus24:4 Mose wakafunda mei onso a Yehowa mu mukanda, wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakasa tshioshelu kuinshi kua mukuna, ne mabue manene dikumi ne abidi bu bungi bua bisamba bia Bena Isalele." 
Exodus24:5 Yeye wakatuma bansongalume ba Bena Isalele, bakoshila Yehowa nyama, bakamushihela ngombe ya milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala." 
Exodus24:6 Mose wakangata tshituha tshibidi tshia mashi, wakateka mu malonga, wakamiamina tshituha tshikuabo tshibidi ha tshioshelu." 
Exodus24:7 Wakangata mukanda wa dihungila, wakaubala ku mpala kua bantu, bobo bakamba ne, Mei onso akuamba Yehowa netuênze, netuatumikile." 
Exodus24:8 Mose wakangata mashi, wakâmiamma hamʼbidi ha bantu, wakamba ne, Tangilai mashi a dihungila, diakuhunga nʼenu Yehowa bua mei au onso." 
Exodus24:9 Hashishe, Mose wakabanda ne Alona ne Nadaba ne Abihu ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele makumi muanda mutekete." 
Exodus24:10 Bakamona Nzambi wa Isalele, muinshi mua makasa andi muakadi mabue a saphir, akadi matoke tô bu mubidi wa diulu." 
Exodus24:11 Yeye kakalenga tshianza tshiandi ha bantu banene ba Bena Isalele, bakamona Nzambi, bakadia bidia, bakanua." 
Exodus24:12 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ulue biebe kundi ha mukuna, wikaleku, nenkuhe mabue adi ne mikenji inakufunda, bua wewe kuyiyisha bantu." 
Exodus24:13 Mose wakabika ne Yoshua mukuatshishi wandi, Mose wakabanda mu mukuna wa Nzambi." 
Exodus24:14 Yeye wakambila bakulu ne, Nutuindile bienu kunoko tô ne ha bialua kunudi kabidi, ne monai, Alona ne Hû badi nʼenu, muntu udi ne tshilumbu aye biandi kudibo." 
Exodus24:15 Mose wakabanda mu mukuna ne difutu diakabuikila mukuna. 
Exodus24:16 Butumbi bua Yehowa buakikala ha mukuna wa Sinai, ne difutu diakaubuikila matuku asambombo Dituku dia muanda mutekete yeye wakabikila Mose munkatshi mua ditutu." 
Exodus24:17 Dimueneka dia butumbi bua Yehowa diakadi bu kahia kakole ha mutu ha mukuna ku mesu kua Bena Isalele. 
Exodus24:18 Mose wakabuela munkatshi mua difutu, wakabanda mu mukuna Mose wakashala mu mukuna munya ne butuku mafuku makumi anai." 
Exodus25:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus25:2 Wambile Bena Isalele bua kumpeshabo bintu bia kuntendelela nʼabi, nenuangate kudi muntu ne muntu bintu bidi mutshima wandi musue bua kuntendelela nʼabi." 
Exodus25:3 Ebi mbintu binudi mua kuangata kudibo or ne argent ne tshiamu tshia mitaku," 
Exodus25:4 ne bilulu bia bleu ne bilulu bifikuluke ne bilulu bikunze-kunzû ne bilulu bia lin ne miosa ya mbushi," 
Exodus25:5 ne biseba bia bimpanga bina mu mai makunze, ne biseba bia nkonge ne mutshi wa acacia," 
Exodus25:6 ne manyi a muinda, manananshi adibo bela mu manyi a kulaba hamʼbidi, ne manyi adi atua dihembu," 
Exodus25:7 mabue a mushinga mukole adibo bateka mu efoda ne mu tshiamu tshidibo baluata ha tshiadi. 
Exodus25:8 Bobo bangashile tshitendelelu, bua meme kuikala munkatshi muabo." 
Exodus25:9 Nutshiase bu bintu binakakulesha ne bu tshidikishilu tshia tshitendelelu ne bu tshidikishilu tshia bintu bia kutekamu. 
Exodus25:10 Bobo nebenze mushete wa mutshi wa acacia buludi bua mushete nebuikale coudées ibidi ne tshituha, ne butshiama buau nebuikale coudée umue ne tshituha, ne bule buau bua mulu nebuikale coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus25:11 Wewe neulamike tshiamu tshia or mutambe buimpe ha nyima honso ne munda mua mushete kabidi, neuteke tshiamu tshia or ku mibangu ya mushete." 
Exodus25:12 Enza biebe nkanu ya or mai, witeka kû mikolo ya mushete, ibidi ku luseke lumue, ibidi ku luseke lukuabo." 
Exodus25:13 Enza biebe mitshi ya acacia, lamika tshiamu tshia or ku nseke yai yonso." 
Exodus25:14 Neubueshe mitshi ai mu nkanu idi ku nseke ya mushete, bua kutuala nʼai mushete." 
Exodus25:15 Mitshi ai neyikale mu nkanu ya mushete, kayumuki nansha." 
Exodus25:16 Wewe neuteke mu mushete mabue a dihungila andi nkuha. 
Exodus25:17 Wewe newenze tshibuikilu ne tshiamu tshia or mutambe buimpe, buludi buatshi nebuikale coudées ibidi ne tshituha ne butshiama buatshi nebuikale coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus25:18 Enza biebe bakeluba babidi ne or mutudibue, ubateke ku matshika a tshibuikilu tshia mushete." 
Exodus25:19 Enza mukeluba umue ku butshika bumue ne mukeluba mukuabo ku butshika bukuabo enza bakeluba ne tshibuikilu tshia mushete ne tshituha tshijima tshia or. 
Exodus25:20 Bakeluba nebolole mahuahua abo kulu, nebabuikile tshibuikilu tshia mushete ne mahuahua abo, bobo batangilangana mpala, mpala yabo neyikale mitangile ha tshibuikilu tshia mushete." 
Exodus25:21 Wewe neuteke tshibuikilu ha mutu ha mushete neubueshe mabue a dihungila andi nkuha mu mushete. 
Exodus25:22 Meme ne nsangakene nʼebe aha, nensombe nʼebe ha mutu ha tshibuikilu tshia mushete, hankatshi ha bakeluba badi ha mutu ha mushete, nenkumanyishe malu onso andi nkuhesha bu mikenji kudi Bena Isalele." 
Exodus25:23 Wewe newenze mesa a mutshi wa acacia buludi buau nebuikale coudées ibidi, ne butshiama buau nebuikale coudée umue, ne bule buau bua mulu nebuikale coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus25:24 Wewe neulamike tshiamu tshia or mutambe buimpe mu nseke yonso, ne ku mpenge kabidi." 
Exodus25:25 Enza mushonyi wa or bunene bua butshiama bua tshianza ku matshika onso, enza tshintu tshia or ku matengu onso." 
Exodus25:26 Enza nkanu ya or mai, ne teka nkanu ku mikolo mai ya mesa." 
Exodus25:27 Teka nkanu hehi ne mpenge ya mesa bualu bua kutuala nʼai mesa 
Exodus25:28 Enza biebe mitshi ya acacia, ulamike or ku nseke yai yonso, bua kutuala nʼai mesa." 
Exodus25:29 Wewe newenze malonga ne nkuta ne mpanza ne bihanza bia or mutambe buimpe. 
Exodus25:30 Teka bidia bilesha ha mesa au matuku onso ku mpala kuanyi. 
Exodus25:31 Wewe newenze tshitekelu tshia minda tshia or mutambe buimpe, nebenze tshitekelu etshi ne or muhite, ne tshishikaminu tshiatshi ne mukolo watshi, tukoho tuatshi ne mahu atshi ne bilongo biatshi nebenze ne tshituha tshimue tshia or mene tshiakenzabo nʼatshi tshitekelu." 
Exodus25:32 Enza mahu asambombo ha tshitekelu, mahu asatu ku luseke lumue, mahu asatu ku luseke lukuabo." 
Exodus25:33 Uzole tukoho tusatu bu bilongo bia amande mu ditamba dimue, dihu ne tshilongo dihu ne tshilongo, uzole tukoho tusatu bu bilongo bia amande mu ditamba dikuabo, dihu ne tshilongo dihu ne tshilongo, uzole nunku ku matamba asambombo adi masa ku tshitekelu." 
Exodus25:34 Enza tukoho binai tua ha tshitekelu bu bilongo bia amande ne mahu atshi ne bilongo bia tshi. 
Exodus25:35 Enza dihu ne tshituha tshimue tshia or hankatshi ha mahu abidi, hankatshi ha mahu abidi ku mahu asambombo a ha tshitekelu tshia minda." 
Exodus25:36 Bintu ebi bionso ubienze ne tshituha tshimue tshia or, tshintu tshijima tshienza ne tshituha tshimue tshia or muedibue mutambe buimpe." 
Exodus25:37 Enza minda muanda mutekete, bualu bua kutemenayi muaba udi ku mpala kua tshitekelu."
