Exodus25:38 Enza mpandu ne tulonga tukese bia tsiutekelu ne or mutambe buimpe. 
Exodus25:39 Enza tshitekelu ne bintu ebi bionso ne ntalanta umue wa or mutambe buimpe. 
Exodus25:40 Udimuke biebe bua kuenza bintu bionso bu tshidikishilu tshinakukulesha mu mukuna. 
Exodus26:1 Wewe newase tshitendelelu ne bilulu binene dikumi bia lin mutambe buimpe, bilulu bia bleu ne bilulu bikunzubile ne bilulu bikunze-kunzû, ubienze ne bakeluba benjibue ne lungenyi lule." 
Exodus26:2 Bule bua tshilulu ne tshilulu nebuikale coudées makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu, ne butshiama buatshi coudées mai, bilulu bionso nebikale ne luidi lumue." 
Exodus26:3 Bilulu bitanu nebikale bituangane ne bilulu bitanu bikuabo, binga bilulu bitanu nebikale bituangane ne bilulu bitanu bikuabo." 
Exodus26:4 Enza makoha ne muonshi wa bleu ku mibangu ya bilulu idi ituangana, ku tshisumbu ne ku tshisumbu tshia bilulu." 
Exodus26:5 Enza makoha makumi atanu ku mibangu ya tshilulu ne makoha makumi atanu ku mibangu ya tshilulu tshikuabo tshidi tshituangana nʼatshi, makoha ikale makanangane." 
Exodus26:6 Enza mbote ya or makumi atanu ku mubangu wa tshilulu tshimue, ne mesu a mbote makumi atanu ku mubangu wa tshilulu tshikuabo, bua kutuangasha bilulu, tshitendelelu netshikale bu tshilulu tshimue." 
Exodus26:7 Enza biebe bilulu bia miosa ya mbushi dikumi ne tshimue bualu bua kuteka ha mutu ha tshitendelelu. 
Exodus26:8 Bule bua tshilulu tshimue nebuikale coudées makumi asatu, ne butshiama bua tshi coudées mai, idikisha bilulu dikumi ne tshimue ne luidi lumue." 
Exodus26:9 Utuangashe bilulu bitanu ha buabi, ne utuangashe bilulu bisambombo ha buabi, tshilulu tshisambombo netshikale tshihitakane ku mushiku wa tshitendelelu." 
Exodus26:10 Enza makoha makumi atanu ku mibangu ya tshilulu, ne makoha makumi atanu ku mibangu ya tshilulu tshikuabo tshidi tshituangane katshi." 
Exodus26:11 Enza mbote makumi atanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku, ne mesu a mbote ku mibangu ya tshilulu tshikuabo bualu bua kutuangasha bilulu, bua ntenta ikale bu tshilulu tshimue." 
Exodus26:12 Tshituha tshia tshilulu tshidi tshibita tshisonga netshilembelele hanshi ku nyima kua tshitendelelu. 
Exodus26:13 Tshituha tshidi bule bua coudée ku luseke lumue ne tshituha tshidi bule bua coudée tshiota tshisonga netshikale ku luseke lua tshitendelelu bua kutshibuikila. 
Exodus26:14 Enza biebe tshintu tshia biseba bia bimpanga biaka tuabo mu mai makunze-kunzû ne tshia biseba bia mbushi tshia kuteka ha musonga wa tshitendelelu. 
Exodus26:15 Uhande mabaya a mitshi ya acacia bua kuimanyika kulu mu tshitendelelu. 
Exodus26:16 Bule bua dibaya dimue nebuikale coudées dikumi ne butshiama buadi nebuikale coudée umue ne tshituha. 
Exodus26:17 Mabaya abidi neikale ne mpoko ibidi bua kutuângasha, enza mabaya onso a tshitendelelu nunku." 
Exodus26:18 Enza mabaya makumi abidi bua kuteka ku luseke lua ku Sude lua tshitendelelu. 
Exodus26:19 Enza biamu bidi ne mahoka ne tshiamu tshia argent makumi anai ku mabaya makumi abidi, mahoka abidi ku dibaya ne ku dibaya, bualu bua kuelamu tutshi tua tutuhu." 
Exodus26:20 Enza mabaya makumi abidi a kutoka ku luseke lua tshitendelelu lua ku nôde," 
Exodus26:21 ne biamu bia mahoka ne tshiamu tshia argent makumi anai, mahoka abidi ku dibaya dimue, bualu bua kuelamu tutshi tua bituhu." 
Exodus26:22 Enza mabaya asambombo a kutoka ku wesete ku luseke lua ku nyima. 
Exodus26:23 Enza mabaya abidi a kutoka ku matumba a tshitendelelu adi ku nyima. 
Exodus26:24 Mabaya ikale mashilangane kuinshi ne matuangane kulu, ku dikoha dia kumudilu, bubidi buau neikale nunku, teka mabaya au ku matumba a tshitendelelu." 
Exodus26:25 Enza mabaya muanda mukulu nunku, ne biamu bia mahoka bia argent, mabaya dikumi ne asambombo, biamu bibidi ku dibaya ne ku dibaya." 
Exodus26:26 Enza biebe mitshi ya acacia ya kuela ku mabaya atanu adi ku luseke lumue lua tshitendelelu," 
Exodus26:27 mitshi itanu ya kuela ku mabaya adi ku luseke lumue ne mitshi itanu ya kuela ku mabaya adi ku luseke lukuabo, ne mitshi itanu ya kuela ku mabaya adi ku nyima." 
Exodus26:28 Mutshi udi hankatshi ha mabaya neuhite ku ditumba dimue tô ne ku ditumba dikuabo. 
Exodus26:29 Lamika tshiamu tshia or ku nseke yonso ya mabaya ne enza nkanu ya or ya kuelamu mitshi, lamika or ku nseke yonso ya mitshi ei." 
Exodus26:30 Wewe neushimike tshitendelelu bu mudi tshileshilu tshinakukulesha mu mukuna. 
Exodus26:31 Enza biebe tshilulu tshinene tshia buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzu ne bua lin udi mutambe buimpe utshienzeshe kudi bantu badi ne lungenyi lule badi bamanye mua kuenza tshifuanyikishi tshia bakeluba mu tshilulu atshi. 
Exodus26:32 Utshilembeleshe ha makunshi a acacia anai adi ne or ku nseke yonso, teka nkanu ya or ku tshilulu, ku bitubuidi binai bia argent bia ha makunshi." 
Exodus26:33 Ulembeleshe tshilulu ha bitubuidi, Ulue ne mushete wa Nzambi ku nyima kua tshilulu, tshilulu atshi netshikale hankatshi ha muaba wa tshijila ne muaba mutambe wa tshijila." 
Exodus26:34 Wewe neuteke tshibuikilu ha mutu ha mushete wa Nzambi mu muaba mutambe wa tshijila. 
Exodus26:35 Teka mesa ku mpala kua tshilulu, ne teka muinda ku luseke lua tshitendelelu ludi ku Sude, neuteke mesa ku luseke lua ku nôde." 
Exodus26:36 Enza biebe tshilulu tshia kuteka ku mbelu kua tshitendelelu tshia buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzû ne bua lin mutambe buimpe, utshienzeshe kudi muntu udi ne lungenyi lule lua kulengesha." 
Exodus26:37 Enza biebe makunshi atanu a acacia adi ne or ku nseke yonso enza bitubuidi biau ne or, ne enza nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku itanu ya kuelaku." 
Exodus27:1 Enza biebe tshioshelu tshia mabaya a acacia, buludi bua tshi nebuikale coudées itanu, butshiama buatshi coudées itanu ne bule buatshi bua mulu coudées isatu." 
Exodus27:2 Enza bintu bu nsengu ya ngombe ku matumba anai, enza nsengu ne dibaya dimue, lamika tshiamu tshia mitaku ku nseke yonso." 
Exodus27:3 Enza bivuadi bia tshiamu bia kumusha nʼabi butue bua tshioshelu, ne bikasu biatshi ne malonga atshi ne bitubuidi bia kukuata nʼabi munyinyi, ne bihanza biatshi, enza bintu ebi bionso ne tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
Exodus27:4 Enza tshiamu tshilukibue bu munyingu ne nkanu mai ya tshiamu tshia mitaku ku matumba atshi anai. 
Exodus27:5 Teka tshiamu etshi munda mua nseke mai ya tshioshelu ne hankatshi, mu bule buatshi." 
Exodus27:6 Enza mitshi ya acacia ya kuela ku tshioshelu, lamika tshiamu tshia mitaku ku nseke yonso ya mitshi." 
Exodus27:7 Buesha mitshi ei mu nkanu idi ku nseke ibidi ya tshioshelu bua kutshituala. 
Exodus27:8 Utshienze ne mabaya, ushiye munda muatshi mutuhu, utshienze bu munakukulesha ku mukuna." 
Exodus27:9 Wewe neulongolole luhangu lua tshitendelelu, ku luseke lua sude enza bilulu bidi bituangane tô ne ku coudées lukama," 
Exodus27:10 makunshi makumi abidi ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku makumi abidi, bitubuidi bia ku makunshi nebikale bia argent." 
Exodus27:11 Ku luseke lua ku nôde kabidi, enza bilulu bidi bituangane to ne ku coudées lukama, ne makunshi makumi abidi ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku makumi abidi; bitubuidi bia ku makunshi nebikale bia argent." 
Exodus27:12 Ku butshiama bua luhangu ku luseke lua ku wesete, enza bilulu bidi bituangane tô ne ku coudées makumi atanu, ne makunshi dikumi ne nkanu dikumi." 
Exodus27:13 Butshiama bua luhangu lua ku esete nebuikale coudées makumi atanu. 
Exodus27:14 Bilulu bia ku luseke lua tshibi nebikale coudées dikumi ne itanu, ne makunshi abi asatu ne nkanu isatu." 
Exodus27:15 Ku luseke lukuabo lua tshibi bilulu nebikale coudées dikumi ne itanu, ne makunshi asatu ne nkanu isatu." 
Exodus27:16 Ku mbelu kua luhangu tshilulu netshikaleku tshia buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzû ne bua lin mutambe buimpe, tshienjibue kudi mundi wa lungenyi lule, enza makunshi anai ne nkanu mai." 
Exodus27:17 Lengesha makunshi onso ne tshiamu tshia argent, ne bitubuidi bia argent ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
Exodus27:18 Buludi bua muaba wa luhangu nebuikale coudées lukama ne butshiama bualu nebuikale coudées makumi atanu, ne bule bualu bua mulu coudées itanu, ne bilulu bia lin ne nkanu yabi ya tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
Exodus27:19 Bintu bionso bidibo bakuata nʼabi mudimu mu tshiendelele ne milonda yonso yatshi, ne milonda yonso ya luhangu luatshi, nebikale bia tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
Exodus27:20 Wewe newele dî kudi Bena Isalele bua kuluabo ne manyi a olive a kuela mu muinda, muinda uteme matuku onso." 
Exodus27:21 Mu tshitendelelu ku mpala kua tshilulu tshidi ku mpala kua mushete wa Nzambi Alona ne bana bandi balume nebalame muinda dilolo tô ne dinda ku mesu kua Yehowa, bualu ebu nebuikale bu mukenji ku bikondo bienu tshiendelele kudi bana ba Isalele." 
Exodus28:1 Ubikile Alona mukuluʼebe kûdi, ne bana bandi balume balue nʼandi ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, yeye ankuatshile mudimu wa buakuidi, Alona mene ne Nadaba ne Abihu, Eleazâ ne Itamâ, bana balume ba Alona." 
Exodus28:2 Wewe neutelele Alona, mukuluʼebe, bilulu bia tshijila, bidi bitambe buimpe." 
Exodus28:3 Wewe neubikile bantu bonso badi ne mitshima ya lungenyi, bantu banakûsha ne lungenyi tente, bua bobo batelele Alona bilulu bia kumujidila, bua yeye ankuatshile mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus28:4 Ebi mbilulu bidibo ne bua kutela tshintu tshia kuteka ha tshiadi, ne efoda, ne tshikowelu, ne kazaku ka bibaka bibaka, ne tshilulu ne mukaba, bobo nebatelele Alona ne bana bandi bilulu bia tshijila, bua yeye ankuatshile mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus28:5 Bobo bangate or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin mutambe buimpe. 
Exodus28:6 Bobo nebatele efoda ne bintu bia or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bukunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin mutambe buimpe, bintu bidibo benzesha kudi bantu badi ne lungenyi lule." 
Exodus28:7 Batele bilulu bikese ha maha bua kutuangasha bituha bia efoda bibidi. 
Exodus28:8 Bobo nebenze mukaba wa efoda bu mudibo benza efoda, newikale tshituha tshimue tshia ku efoda, ne bintu bia or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin mutambe buimpe." 
Exodus28:9 Wewe newangate mabue abidi a onyx, ufundehu mena a Bena Isalele," 
Exodus28:10 mena asambombo ha dibue dimue ne mena asambombo adi ashala ha dibue dikuabo, balondangane bu mudi kuledibua kuabo." 
Exodus28:11 Wenzeshe mabue â kudi muntu udi ne lungenyi lule lua kufunda mateta bimpe, yeye neafundehu mena a Bena Isalele, babueshe mabue mu masoso a mu bintu bia or." 
Exodus28:12 Wewe neuteke mabue abidi ha bilulu bia ha maha ha efoda; mabue au neikale bu tshivulukidi tshia Bena Isalele, Alona neatuale mena abo ku mesu kua Yehowa ha maha andi abidi bu tshivulukidi." 
Exodus28:13 Wewe newenze bitubuidi bia or," 
Exodus28:14 ne tukanu tua or tubidi, tudi tuhindakasha bu muonshi, uteke tukanu ku bitubuidi." 
Exodus28:15 Wewe newenzeshe tshilulu tshia dilumbulula tshia ha tshiadi kudi bantu badi ne lungenyi lule, bobo nebenze tshilulu etshi bu muakenzabo efoda, ne bintu bia or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bilulu bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin mutambe buimpe." 
Exodus28:16 Utshidikishe nseke mai mikosolola hankatshi bua kuikala nseke ibidi ya bunene bumue, buludi buatshi nebuikale bu ntanta wa tshianza, ne butshiama buatshi bu ntanta wa tshianza." 
Exodus28:17 Uteke milongo ya masoso mai a kubueshamu mabue, mulongo wa kumudilu wa mabue a sardoine ne topaze ne émeraude," 
Exodus28:18 mulongo muibidi wa mabue a escarboucle ne saphir ne calcédoine," 
Exodus28:19 mulongo muisatu wa mabue a opale ne agate ne améthyste," 
Exodus28:20 ne mulongo muinai wa mabue a chrysolithe ne onyx ne jaspe ubueshe mabue a mu masoso. 
Exodus28:21 Mabue neikale dikumi ne abidi bu bungi bua mena a Bena Isalele, nebafunde dina dia tshisamba ne tshisamba tshia Bena Isalele ha dibue ne ha dibue." 
Exodus28:22 Newenze tukanu tua or mutambe buimpe tudi tuhindakasha bu mionshi. 
Exodus28:23 Wewe newenze nkanu ya or ibidi, uteke nkanu ei ku nseke ibidi ya tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi." 
Exodus28:24 Uteke tukanu tua or tuhindakasha ku nkanu idi ku nseke ya tshilulu. 
Exodus28:25 Uteke nsonga ibidi ya tukanu tuhindakasha ku bilulu bia efoda bidi ha maha, ku mpala kuabi." 
Exodus28:26 Enza biebe nkanu ya or ibidi, uyiteke ku luseke lua tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi tshituangane ne efoda." 
Exodus28:27 Enza biebe nkanu ya or ibidi, uyiteke muinshi mua bilulu bia efoda bia ha maha, ku mpala kuabi ne ku mutu kua mukaba wa efoda." 
Exodus28:28 Nebasuike tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi ku nkanu yatshi ku nkanu ya efoda ne muonshi wa bleu muhindakasha, tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi netshikale hamʼbidi ha mukaba muluka bilengele wa efoda, kabasulule tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi ku efoda." 
Exodus28:29 Alona neatuale mena a Bena Isalele ha tshilulu tshia dilumbulula tshidi ha mutshima wandi, hayeye ku muaba wa tshijila, bu tshivulukidi tshia tshiendelele ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Exodus28:30 Ubueshe mabue a Ulima ne Tumima mu masoso a mu tshilulu tshia dilumbulula tshia ha tshiadi, a neikale ha mutshima wa Alona hayeye ku mpala kua Yehowa, Alona neatuale kulumbulula kua malu a Bena Isalele ku mpala kua Yehowa matuku onso." 
Exodus28:31 Wewe neutele tshikowelu tshia efoda ne bilulu bia bleu. 
Exodus28:32 Ushiye disoso ku mutu kua tshikowelu bua kubueshamu mutu, nyungulula disoso ne muonshi muhindakasha, bu mudibo benza tshikowelu tshia nvita tshikowelu katshihandiki nansha." 
Exodus28:33 Neufunde bifuanyikishi bia tumuma tua grenade ne buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunzekunzû kuinshi kua tshikowelu tshionso, neuteke ndibu ya or hankatshi ha tumuma," 
Exodus28:34 neuteke kadibu ka or ne kamuma, ne kadibu ka or ne kamuma to ne kuinshi kua tshikowelu tshionso." 
Exodus28:35 Alona nealuate tshikowelu henzeye mudimu, nebunvue tshiona tshia ndibu hayeye mu muaba wa tshijila ku mesu kua Yehowa, ne haluhukeye kabidi, bua yeye kafu nansha." 
Exodus28:36 Wewe newenze tshikololo tshia tshiamu tshia or, neufundehu ne, TSHIA TSHIHE A KUDI YEHOWA." 
Exodus28:37 Neutshiteke ha muonshi wa bleu muhindakasha, utshisuike ku mpala kua tshilulu." 
Exodus28:38 Netshikale ha mpala ha Alona, ne Alona neatuale mahambuka a Bena Isalele mu muaba wa tshijila hayeye bua kubajidila ne bintu bidibo bafila kudi Nzambi, netshikale ha mpala handi matuku onso bua Yehowa abitabushe." 
Exodus28:39 Wewe newenze tshikowelu bikeshe bikeshe ne buanda bua lin muimpe, ne wewe newenze tshilulu tshia lin muimpe ne mukaba muimpe mutambe." 
Exodus28:40 Wewe neutelele bana balume ba Alona bikowelu ne mikaba ne bifulu bia butumbi ne buimpe. 
Exodus28:41 Wewe neubiluatshishe Alona muanʼenu ne bana bandi balume badi nʼandi, wewe neubele manyi ha mutu, ubalengeshe, ubajidile, bua bobo bankuatshile mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus28:42 Ubatelele mihanu ya lin ya kubuikila butaka buabo, mihanu neyikale ku tshimono mifike to ne ku bibelu." 
Exodus28:43 Alona ne bana bandi balume nebaluate mihanu ei hayabo mu tshitendelelu anyi hayabo hehi ne tshioshelu bua kuenza mudimu wabo mu muaba wa tshijila, bobo kabatuadi mahambuka, kabafu. Mukenji eu newikale kudiye ne kudi bana bandi badi banulonda ku nyima tô ne tshiendelele." 
Exodus29:1 Wewe newenze bualu ebu bua kubajidila bankuatshile mudimu wa buakuidi. Angata muana mulume wa ngombe ne bimpanga bibidi bidi biakane," 
Exodus29:2 ne mampa adi kâyi ne luevene, ne mikata idi kayiyi ne luevene misangisha ne manyi, ne tukata luhehele ludi katuyi ne luevene tudi ne manyi mela ha mutu, ubilambe ne bukula buakane bua blé." 
Exodus29:3 Ubiteke mu tshisaka tshimue, ulue nʼabi mu tshisaka ne muana wa ngombe ne bimpanga bibidi." 
Exodus29:4 Ulue ne Alona ne bana bandi balume ku tshibi tshia ntenta wa kusangakena, uboweshe mai." 
Exodus29:5 Wewe newangate bilulu, uluatshishe Alona tshikowelu ne tshilulu tshia ha mutu ha efoda ne efoda ne tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi ne umuele mukaba muluka bilengele wa efoda ku tshimono." 
Exodus29:6 Teka tshifulu ha mutu handi ne tshitotolo tshia tshijila ha tshifulu. 
Exodus29:7 Hashishe angata manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ne ela manyi au ha mutu handi." 
Exodus29:8 Wewe neulue ne bana bandi balume, ubaluatshishe bikowelu." 
Exodus29:9 Ubele mikaba ku bimono, Alona ne bana bandi balume, teka bifulu ha mitu habo, bobo nebikale ne mudimu wa buakuidi tshiendelele, wewe neujidile Alona ne bana bandi balume." 
Exodus29:10 Wewe neulue ne muana wa ngombe ku tshibi tshia ntenta wa kusambakena, Alona ne bana bandi balume nebatentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu ha muana wa ngombe." 
Exodus29:11 Wewe neushihe muana wa ngombe ku mesu kua Yehowa ku tshibi tshia ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Exodus29:12 Wewe newangate mashi a muana mulume wa ngombe, ulabe mashi ha nsengu ya ha tshioshelu ne munu webe, hongolola mashi onso ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu." 
Exodus29:13 Angata dianyi dionso didi ku mala ne lukutu lua ku mutshima ne tumuma tubidi ne, dianyi diabi, ubioshile ha tshioshelu." 
Exodus29:14 Kadi wewe newoshe munyinyi wa muana mulume wa ngombe, ne tshiseba ne tunvi ne kahia ku butshika bua tshitudilu ebu mbualu bua kubuikidila bubi bua bantu." 
Exodus29:15 Angata tshimpanga tshimue, ne Alona ne bana bandi balume nebatentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu hatshi." 
Exodus29:16 Wewe neushihe tshimpanga, newangate mashi atshi wamiamine ha tshioshelu tshionso." 
Exodus29:17 Wewe neusaye tshimpanga, uvuwa mala atshi ne mikolo, uteke bituha biatshi hamue ne mutu watshi." 
Exodus29:18 Wewe newoshe tshimpanga tshijima ha tshioshelu, tshidi mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa, udi utua dihembu, udibo boshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Exodus29:19 Wewe newangate tshimpanga tshikuabo, Alona ne bana bandi balume nebatentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu ha tshimpanga." 
Exodus29:20 Wewe neashihe tshimpanga, angata mashi atshi, wateke ku lusongo lua ditshu didi ku tshianza tshia balume tshia Alona, ne ku lusongo lua ditshu ku tshianza tshia balume tshia bana bandi balume, ne ku tshiala tshia ku tshianza tshiabo tshia bukole, ne ku muanʼa dikasa munene dia ku tshianza tshia balume, umiamine mashi ha tshioshelu tshionso." 
Exodus29:21 Wewe newangate mashi adi ha tshioshelu, ne manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ubimiamine Alona, ha bilulu biandi ne ha bana bandi balume ne ha bilulu biabo, yeye ne bilulu biandi ne bana bandi balume ne bilulu biabo nebikale bijidibue." 
Exodus29:22 Wewe newangate dianyi dia tshimpanga, ne mukila udi ne dianyi ne dianyi didi ku mala ne lukutu lua ku mutshima, ne tumuma tubidi ne dianyi diabi ne tshibelu tshia ku tshianza tshia balume, bualu bua tshimpanga etshi ntshia kujidila nʼatshi bakuidi." 
Exodus29:23 Angata mutanda wa mampa, ne mukala mulamba ne manyi, ne kakata kahehele bia mu tshisaka tshia bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene bidi ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Exodus29:24 Uteke bintu ebi bionso mu bianza bia Alona ne mu bianza bia bana bandi balume, bobo nebabinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Exodus29:25 Wewe newangate bintu ebi ku bianza biabo, ubioshile ha tshioshelu bu mulambu udi utua dihembu dimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, udi mulambu udibo boshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Exodus29:26 Wewe newangate tshiadi tshia tshimpanga tshia kujidila kua Alona, utshinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mpala kua Yehowa, netshikale tshituha tshiebe." 
Exodus29:27 Wewe neujidile tshiadi tshidibo banyukula, ne tshihela tshidibo babisha mulu tshia tshimpanga tshia kujidila kua Alona ne tshia bana bandi balume." 
Exodus29:28 Tshintu etshi netshikale tshituha tshia Alona ne tshia bana bandi balume kudi Bena Isalele tshiendelele, bualu bua tshidi tshituha tshia bakuidi tshia mu mulambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala ya Bena Isalele, tshidi mulambu udibo babisha mulu kudi Yehowa." 
Exodus29:29 Bilulu bia tshijila bia Alona nebikale kudi bana bandi balume badi banulonda ku nyima bua kubela manyi ne kubajidila. 
Exodus29:30 Muana mulume udi biandi muakuidi mu muaba wandi neabiluate matuku muanda mutekete hayeye mu ntenta wa disangisha bua kuenza mudimu mu muaba wa tshijila. 
Exodus29:31 Wewe newangate tshimpanga tshia tshijila, ulambe munyinyi watshi ne mai a kahia mu muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus29:32 Alona ne bana bandi balume nebadie munyinyi wa tshimpanga ne bidia bidi mu tshisaka ku tshibi tshia ntenta wa kusangakena. 
Exodus29:33 Bobo nebadie bintu abi bidibo babuikidila nʼabi bantu mibi yabo, bua kubajidila ne kubalengesha kudi Yehowa, kadi muenyi kena mua kudia bintu ebi, bualu bua bidi bia tshijila." 
Exodus29:34 Bikala tshintu tshikese tshia munyinyi wa tshijila anyi tshia bidia bishale tô ne ku dinda, wewe neutshioshe mu kahia, kabatshidi, bualu bua tshidi tshia tshijila." 
Exodus29:35 Wewe newenzele Alona ne bana bandi balume bu mudi mei onso anakukuambila, ubajidile matuku muanda mutekete." 
Exodus29:36 Wewe newoshe muana wa ngombe ku dituku ku dituku bua kubuikidila bantu mibi yabo, wewe neutokeshe tshioshelu hawoshila bintu bia kubuikidila nʼabi bantu mibi yabo, wele manyi ha tshioshelu bua kutshijidila." 
Exodus29:37 Wewe neubuikile mibi idi ha tshioshelu matuku muanda mutekete, utshijidile, tshioshelu netshikale bu tshintu tshitambe tshia tshijila, muntu yonso udi ulenga tshioshelu neikale wa tshijila." 
Exodus29:38 Ei mmilambu ludi mua kuoshila ha tshioshelu bana ba mikoko babidi ba tshidimu tshimue ku dituku ku dituku misangu yonso 
Exodus29:39 Wewe newoshile umue wa mikoko ne dinda ne mukuabo dilolo 
Exodus29:40 Woshe muana umue wa mukoko ne tshia dikumi tshia tshihiminu tshia bukula busangisha ne tshia tshinai tshia tshihiminu tshia manyi, ne tshia tshinai tshia tshihiminu tshia nvinyo bu mulambu wa kunua." 
Exodus29:41 Neufile muana wa mukoko mukuabo dilolo, neumufile ne mulambu wa bukula ne mulambu wa kunua, bu muwakenza dinda, bu mulambu wa dihembu dimpe, mulambu udibo boshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Exodus29:42 Neboshile bintu ebi ku dituku ku dituku ku bikondo bienu bionso ku tshibi tshia ntenta wa kusangakena ku mesu kua Yehowa, kundi nsangakena nʼenu bua kuyikila nʼebe." 
Exodus29:43 Meme nensangakeneku ne Bena Isalele, ne tshitendelelu netshikale tshiedibue ku butumbi buanyi." 
Exodus29:44 Meme nenjidile ntenta wa kusangakena ne tshioshelu, nenjidile Alona ne bana bandi balume kabidi bua kunkuatshilabo mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus29:45 Meme nengikale munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, nengikale Nzambi wabo." 
Exodus29:46 Bobo nebamanye ne, Meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wabo, wakabahatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu bua meme kuikala munkatshi muabo, ndi bianyi Yehowa, Nzambi wabo." 
Exodus30:1 Wewe newenze tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi ne mutshi wa acacia. 
Exodus30:2 Buludi buatshi nebuikale coudée umue, ne butshiama buatshi nebuikale coudée umue, utshidikishe ne luidi lumue, bule buatshi bua mulu nebuikale coudées ibidi; wenze nsengu yatshi ne mutshi au umue." 
Exodus30:3 Ulamike tshiamu tshia or mutambe buimpe ha mutu hatshi ne ku nseke yatshi ne ku nsengu yatshi, nyungulula mubangu watshi ne or ku nseke yonso." 
Exodus30:4 Enza biebe nkanu ya or ibidi, uyiteke ku nseke ibidi kuinshi kua mutu watshi; neyikale bu miaba ya kubueshamu mitshi ya kutshituadila." 
Exodus30:5 Enza mitshi ya acacia ibidi, ulamike or ku nseke yonso." 
Exodus30:6 Utshiteke hehi ne tshilulu tshidi ku mushete wa Nzambi, ku mpala kua tshibuikilu tshidi ha mutu ha mushete, kundi nsangakena nʼebe." 
Exodus30:7 Alona neoshileku musenga wa manananshi dinda ne dinda hayeye kulongolola minda. 
Exodus30:8 Hatemesha Alona minda dilolo, yeye neoshe musenga wa manananshi bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa ku bikondo bienu bionso." 
Exodus30:9 Kuoshi musenga wa manananshi udi kauyi mujidila ha tshioshelu, nansha mulambu wa nyama idiho bosha, nansha mulambu wa bukula, nansha mulambu wa nvinyo idiho banua." 
Exodus30:10 Alona neamiamine mashi a nyama mishiha ha nsengu ya tshioshelu etshi bua kubuikidila bantu mibi yabo, yeye nênze bualu ebu musangu umue ku tshidimu ku tshidimu bikondo bienu bionso, tshidi tshia tshijila tshitambe kudi Yehowa." 
Exodus30:11 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus30:12 Hawabala bungi bua Bena Isalele, muntu ne muntu afile bintu bia kuhikula nʼabi muoyo wandi kudi Yehowa; bua makenga makole kâbakuatshi hawababala." 
Exodus30:13 Muntu ne muntu udibo babala neafile tshituha tshia nshekele bu mudibo bafila mu nsubu wa tshiendelele tshituha tshia nshekele bu kuha kuabo kudi Yehowa. 
Exodus30:14 Muntu ne muntu udibo babala wakabita bidimu makumi abidi neafile kuha kua Yehowa. 
Exodus30:15 Muntu mubanji kena ne bualu bua kufila tshintu tshidi tshilamba tshituha tshia nshekele bunene, ne muntu muhele kena ne bualu bua kufila tshintu tshidi tshilamba tshituha tshia nshekele bukese, hanuafila kuha kua Yehowa bua kuhikula mioyo yenu." 
Exodus30:16 Wewe newangate argent ya dihikula dia Bena Isalele, uyiteke bua kukuatshisha mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusangakena, neyikale bu tshiyulukidi tshia Bena Isalele ku mesu kua Yehowa bua kuhikula kua mioyo yenu." 
Exodus30:17 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus30:18 Wewe newenze tshiowelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku ne tshitaku tshiatshi tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku kudibo bowa mai. Neutshiteke hankatshi ha tshitendelelu ne tshioshe lu, newelemu mai." 
Exodus30:19 Alona ne bana bandi balume neboweshe bianza biabo ne makasa abo ne mai mu tshiowelu," 
Exodus30:20 hayabo mu ntenta wa kusangakena, nebowe mai bua bobo kabafu nansha, anyi hayabo ku tshioshelu bua kuosha nyama ha kahia kudi Yehowa." 
Exodus30:21 Nunku bobo neboweshe bianza biabo ne makasa abo ne mai, bua bobo kabafu, etshi ntshilele tshiabo tshiendelele kudiye ne bana bandi badi banulonda ku nyima ku bikondo biabo bionso." 
Exodus30:22 Yehowa wakambila Mose kabidi ne," 
Exodus30:23 Angata bintu bia manananshi bidi bitambe buimpe myrrhe bujitu bua nshekele nkama itanu, ne cinnamone bujitu bua nshekele nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, ne canne aromatique bujitu bua nshekele nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu," 
Exodus30:24 ne nkashia bujitu bua nshekele nkama itanu bu idiho bafila mu tshitendelelu ne tshihiminu tshia manyi a olive. 
Exodus30:25 Wewe newenze manyi a tshijila adibo bela ha mutu ne bintu ebi, manyi adi atua dihembu bu mudibo benza kudi benyi ba manananshi, manyi au neikale manyi a tshijila adibo bela ha mutu." 
Exodus30:26 Wewe newamiamine ntenta wa kusangakena ne mushete wa Nzambi," 
Exodus30:27 ne mesa ne malonga onso a mesa, ne muinda ne malonga onso a muinda, ne tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi," 
Exodus30:28 ne tshioshelu tshia kahia ne malonga onso a tshioshelu, ne tshiowelu ne tshitaku tshia tshiowelu." 
Exodus30:29 Wewe neubilengeshe, neubijidile, muntu yonso udi ubilenga tshianza neikale wa tshijila." 
Exodus30:30 Wewe newele Alona ne bana bandi balume manyi ha mutu, neubajidile, bua bobo bankuatshile mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus30:31 Wewe newambile Bena Isalele ne, Manyi au neikale ku mesu kuanyi bu manyi a tshijila adibo bela ha mutu ku bikondo bienu bionso." 
Exodus30:32 Kuedi manyi au hamʼbidi ha bantu, kabena manyi mafuanangane nʼau, wowo adi a tshijima, neikale a tshijila kunudi." 
Exodus30:33 Muntu yonso udi usangisha manyi bu au, anyi udi waela muenyi, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Exodus30:34 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Angata bintu bia manananshi a mushinga mukole bia stacte ne onyx ne gabanum, bintu bia manananshi matambe buimpe, widikishe bintu bionso ne tshihiminu tshimue." 
Exodus30:35 Ubisangishe bu manananshi adi atua dihembu kudi benyi ba manananshi, ubisangishe ne luehu lutambe buimpe ne lua tshijila." 
Exodus30:36 Wewe neuboteshe tshituha, utshiteke ku mpala kua mushete wa Nzambi mu ntenta wa kusangakena kundi nsangakena nʼebe, netshikale tshilamba tshia tshima kunudi." 
Exodus30:37 Kanudisangishidi manananshi adi atua dihembu nunku ne bintu ebi, manananshi au neikale a tshijila kudi Yehowa." 
Exodus30:38 Muntu yonso udi usangisha bintu ebi bua kudienzela manananshi, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Exodus31:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus31:2 Nakubikila Besalele, muana mulume wa Uli, muana mulume wa Hu wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Nakumûsha tente ne Nyuma wa Nzambi ne lungenyi ne dijingulula ne meji mu kuenza kua midimu yonso ya bianza," 
Exodus31:4 bua kulongololeye bintu bia or ne bia argent ne bia tshiamu tshia mitaku," 
Exodus31:5 ne bintu bidibo basonga nʼabi mabue, ne bidibo basonga nʼabi mitshi, ne midimu yonso ya bantu badi ne lungenyi lule." 
Exodus31:6 Mona, meme nakusungula Oholiaba, muana mulume wa Ahisamaka, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dana bua kumumatshisha, nakabuesha lungenyi lule mu mitshima ya bantu bonso badi ne meji bua bobo benze bintu bionso binakukuambila." 
Exodus31:7 Nebenze ntenta wa kusangakena, ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi, ne tshibuikilu tshia ha mutu ha mushete, ne bintu bionso bidi mu ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Exodus31:8 ne mesa ne malonga a mesa, ne muinda muimpe ne malonga a muinda, ne tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi," 
Exodus31:9 ne tshioshelu tshia kahia ne malonga a tshioshelu, ne tshiowelu ne tshitaku tshia tshiowelu." 
Exodus31:10 Nebenze bilulu bitambe buimpe, ne bilulu bia tshijila bia Alona muakuidi, ne bilulu bia bana bandi balume, bua kunkuatshilabo mudimu wa buakuidi," 
Exodus31:11 ne manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ne bintu bia manananshi bidi bidia dihembu bia mu muaba wa tshijila bobo nebenze malu onso anakukuambila." 
Exodus31:12 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus31:13 Wambile Bena Isalele kabidi ne, Nuenu nuvuluke matuku anyi a Lumingu dituku edi didi bu tshivulukidi hankatshi hetu ku bikondo bienu bionso bualu bua kunumanyisha ne, Meme ndi Yehowa wakunujidila." 
Exodus31:14 Nuvuluke dituku dia Lumingu, didi dituku dia tshijila kunudi, mundi yonso udi wona dituku adi nebamushihe, mundi yonso udi wenza mudimu dituku adi, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Exodus31:15 Enzai mudimu wenu matuku asambombo; kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete ndituku dia dikisha dia kuela meji, dituku dia kujidila Yehowa, mundi yonso udi wenza mudimu dituku dia Lumingu nebamushihe bulelela." 
Exodus31:16 Nunku Bena Isalele nebajidile dituku dia Lumingu ku bikondo biabo bionso bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele. 
Exodus31:17 Etshi ntshimanyinu tshia tshiendelele hankatshi hanyi ne Bena Isalele, bualu bua Yehowa wakafuka diulu ne buloba matuku asambombo, wakikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete, wakadikankamika." 
Exodus31:18 Hakashikisha Yehowa kusomba ne Mose ha mukuna wa Sinai, yeye wakamuha mabue abidi akadi ne mikenji mifundahu ne munu wa Nzambi." 
Exodus32:1 Kakamanya bantu ne, Mose wakashala ku mukuna musangu mule, bakadisangisha kudi Alona, bakamuambila ne, Bika biebe, utuenzele nzambi idi mua kuya ku mpala kuetu, bua muntu au Mose, wakalua nʼetu mu Ejipitu, katuena bamanye bualu buakumukuata." 
Exodus32:2 Alona wakabambila ne, Nukuohole nkanu ya or idi ku matshu a bakashi benu ne a bana benu ba balume ne a bana benu ba bakashi, nulue nʼai kundi." 
Exodus32:3 Bantu bonso bakakuohola nkanu ya or yakadi ku matshu abo, bakalua nʼai kudi Alona." 
Exodus32:4 Yeye wakayangata ku bianza biabo, wakayilamba mu kahia, wakayiteka ne mulolo bu kana ka ngombe, bakamba ne, Bena Isalele, ke nzambi wenu, wakanuluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus32:5 Hakamona Alona bualu ebu, Wakenza tshioshelu ku mpala kua luhingu, Alona wakela dî, wakamba ne, Makelela disanka dia Yehowa nedikaleku." 
Exodus32:6 Hakatshiabu bakabika ne dinda dionso, bakafua milambu ya kuosha, bakalua ne milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, bantu bakashikama bua kudia ne bua kunua, bakabika bua kunaya." 
Exodus32:7 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Hueka mu tshibanda, bualu bua bantu bebe bawakaluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu bakudiona." 
Exodus32:8 Bakusesuka lubilu mu nshila unakubambila, bakulamba nkanu ya or, bakutula kana ka ngombe, bakukatendelela, bakukashihela milambu, bakuamba ne, Bena Isalele, nzambi wenu nyeu wakanuluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Exodus32:9 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Nakutangila bantu aba, mona, badi ne buhidia bukole," 
Exodus32:10 nunku kumpumbishi nansha, tshiji tshianyi tshikale tshikole kudibo, neashihe, kadi nenkuvuishe wewe tshisamba tshinene." 
Exodus32:11 Mose wakatendekena Yehowa, Nzambi wandi, wakamba ne, Yehowa, bualu kai tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshitambe bukole kudi bantu bebe bawakaluhula mu buloba bu Ejipitu ne bukole bunene ne tshianza tshia bukole?" 
Exodus32:12 Munyi mudi Bena Ejipitu mua kuamba ne, Yeye wakabaluhula bua kubenzela bibi, ne bua kubashiha ku mikuna, ne bua kubajimisha ha buloba? Lekela tshiji tshiebe tshikole, ukudimune mutshima bua malu audi musue kuenzela bantu bebe." 
Exodus32:13 Uvuluke Abalahama ne Isaka ne Isalele, bantu bebe, bawakaditshiha kudibo, wakabambila ne, Nenvudishe bana benu bu bungi bua mitoto ya mulu, ne buloba ebu buonso bunakanuambila nempe bana benu, bobo nebabuhiane tshiendelele." 
Exodus32:14 Yehowa wakakudimuna mutshima wandi bua malu akeleye meji bua kuenzela bantu bandi. 
Exodus32:15 Mose wakatshunguluka, wakahueka mu tshibanda ne mabue abidi akadi ne mikenji mifundahu mu bianza biandi, mabue akadi mafu nda nseke yau ibidi, ha luseke lumue ne ha luseke lukuabo." 
Exodus32:16 Mabue au akadi menza kudi Nzambi, ne mei akadi mafunda kudi Nzambi, mafunda ha mabue au." 
Exodus32:17 Hakunvua Yoshua diyoyo dia bantu hakadibo bela mbila, yeye wakambila Mose ne, Au mmutoyi wa bantu badi baluangana nvita mu tshitudilu." 
Exodus32:18 Mose wakamba ne, Adi kadiena dî dia bantu badi bahita bakuabo bukole, ne kadiena dî dia bantu bakutambibua bukole, ndi munvue mutoyi wa bantu badi bimba misambu." 
Exodus32:19 Hakalueye hehi ne tshitudilu, wakatangila kana ka ngombe ne bantu baja maja Mose wakadi ne tshiji tshikole, wakela mabue hanshi akadi mu bianza biandi, wakatshibula kuinshi kua mukuna." 
Exodus32:20 Mose wakangata kana ka ngombe kakenzabo, wakakosha mu kahia, wakakabotesha, wakakela mu mai, wakanuisha Bena Isalele mai au." 
Exodus32:21 Mose wakakonka Alona ne, Bantu bakakuenzela tshinyi bua wewe wakubavuishila bualu bubi?" 
Exodus32:22 Alona wakamba ne, Mukelenge wanyi, kuikadi ne tshiji tshikole, wewe udi mumanye bantu aba, badi ne mitshima yabo ku malu mabi." 
Exodus32:23 Bualu bua bobo bakungambila ne, Utuenzele nzambi idi mua kuya ku mpala kuetu, bua muntu eu Mose wakatumikila mu buloba bua Ejipitu, katuena bamanye bualu buakumukuata." 
Exodus32:24 Meme nakabambila ne, Muntu yonso udi ne or akuohole, ne bobo bakafua or kundi, nakuela mu kahia ne kana aka ka ngombe ka or kakahatuka mu kahia." 
Exodus32:25 Hakatangila Mose ne bantu bakadi batomboka (Alona wakabanda bua kudifuishishabo bundu kudi bena lukuna babo)," 
Exodus32:26 Mose wakimana ku mbelu kua tshitudilu, wakamba ne, Udi ku luseke lua Yehowa alue biandi kundi Bana balume bonso ba Lewi bakadisangisha kudiye." 
Exodus32:27 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi Wamba ne, Muntu yonso aluate muele wandi wa nvita, endakane ku tshibi ne ku tshibi mu tshitudilu tshionso, ashihe muanʼabo mulume ne mulunda wandi ne muena mutumba nʼandi." 
Exodus32:28 Bana balume ba Lewi bakenza bu mu di dia Mose, bantu bakafua dituku adi bu binunu bisatu." 
Exodus32:29 Mose wakamba ne, Muntu yonso wakudifila kudi Yehowa lelu ku mushinga wa muanʼandi mulume ne muanʼabo mulume, Yehowa anuvudishile disanka lelu." 
Exodus32:30 Hakatshiabu Mose wakambila bantu ne, Nuenu nuakuenza bualu bubi bunene Katataka nembande kudi Yehowa, binamanya mua kunubuikidila bubi buenu." 
Exodus32:31 Mose wakahingana kudi Yehowa, wakamba ne, Bantu aba bakuenza bualu bubi bunene, bakudienzela nzambi wa or." 
Exodus32:32 Kadi katataka biwasua kubabuikidila bubi buabo, kadi biwikala kuyi musue, ndi nkusengelela ne, Unjimishe mu mukanda webe uwakufunda." 
Exodus32:33 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Muntu yonso wakungenzela bibi, nemmujimishe yeye mu mukanda wanyi." 
Exodus32:34 Katataka ya biebe, uye ne bantu ku muaba unakukuambila, tangila, muanjelo wanyi neaye ku mpala kuebe, kadi dituku dinalua kudibo, nembenzele kabidi bu mudi bubi buabo." 
Exodus32:35 Yehowa wakakengesha bantu bualu bua bobo bakenza kana ka ngombe kakadi Alona muenze. 
Exodus33:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Bikai, yai bienu, ne wewe ne bantu bawakaluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ku buloba bunakalaya Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba ne, Nembuhe bana benu." 
Exodus33:2 Nentume muanjelo ku mpala kuebe, nengihate Bena Kanana ne Bena Amole ne Bena Hiti ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse," 
Exodus33:3 ku bu loba budi ne mabele ne buitshi bia bungi; bualu bua meme tshiena nya munkatshi muenu bualu bua nudi bantu ba buhidia bukole, bua tshinushihi mu nshila." 
Exodus33:4 Hakunvua bantu lumu alu lubi, bakadila nansha mundi umue wa kaluata bintu bia kudilengesha nʼabi." 
Exodus33:5 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Nudi bantu ba buhidia bukole, binaya bianyi munkatshi muenu anu tshituha tshikese, nennushihe, nunku nuvule bintu bia kudilengesha nʼabi, bua meme mmanye tshindi mua kunuenzela." 
Exodus33:6 Bena Isalele bakavula bintu bia kudilengesha nʼabi ku mukuna wa Holeba tô ne ku mpala kuakadibo baya. 
Exodus33:7 Mose wakadi ushimika ntenta ku butshika bua tshitudilu, wakamubikila ne, Ntenta wa kusambakena Muntu yonso wakasua kukeba Yehowa wakaluhuka mu tshitudilu bua kuya ku ntenta wa kusambakena, wakadi ku butshika bua tshitudilu." 
Exodus33:8 Hakaya Mose ku tshitendelelu, bantu bonso bakabika, bakimana muntu ne muntu ku ntenta wandi, bakatangila Mose tô ne hakabueleye mu Ntenta." 
Exodus33:9 Hakabuela Mose mu tshitendelelu, difutu diakahueka, diakimana ku mbelu kua Ntenta ne Yehowa wakayikila ne Mose." 
Exodus33:10 Hakatangila bantu difutu dimana ku mbelu kua Ntenta, bantu bonso bakabika, bakatendelela muntu ne mu ntu ku ntenta wandi." 
Exodus33:11 Yehowa wakayikila ne Mose mpala ha mpala bu mudi muntu uyikila ne mulunda wandi. Mose wakahingana ku tshidi dilu kabidi, kadi mukuatshishi wandi Yoshua, nsongalume, muana wa balume wa Nuna, kakaluhuka mu Ntenta." 
Exodus33:12 Mose wakambila Yehowa ne, Mona, wewe udi ungambila ne, Uye ne bantu aba, ne wewe kuena muanze kummanyisha muntu udi musue kutuma nʼanyi. Kadi wewe wakamba ne, Ndi mumanye dina diebe, ne wewe wakasangana luse ku mesu kuanyi." 
Exodus33:13 Katataka, bingikala ne luse ku mesu kuebe, undeshe bienzedi biebe, bua meme kukumanya wewe, ne bua kusangana luse ku mesu kuebe, uvuluke ne tshisamba etshi tshidi bantu bebe." 
Exodus33:14 Yehowa wakamba ne, Mpala wanyi neaye nʼebe, ne meme nenkuhe dikisha." 
Exodus33:15 Mose wakamba ne, Bikala mpala webe kayi uya nʼanyi, kudimusha kunoko." 
Exodus33:16 Nemmanye ne, Nakasangana luse ku mesu kuebe, ne meme ne bantu bebe, kudi kunyi? Kabuena nunku ne, Wewe uyaya nʼetu, ne tuetu, meme ne bantu bebe, netuikale bu bantu badi bahanduluka kudi bisamba bionso bia bantu badi hanshi ha buloba, anyi?" 
Exodus33:17 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Nengenze bualu ebu buwakuamba bualu bua wewe wakasangana luse ku mesu kuanyi, meme ndi mumanye Hina diebe." 
Exodus33:18 Mose wakamba ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Undeshe butumbi buebe." 
Exodus33:19 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nengendeshe buimpe buanyi buonso ku mesu kuebe, nemmanyishe dina dianyi dia Yehowa ku mpala kuebe; nengikale ne dinanga kudi bantu bandi musue kuikala ne dinanga, nendeshe luse kudi bantu bandi musue kulesha luse." 
Exodus33:20 Yeye wakamba ne, Wewe kuena mua kumona mpala wanyi; bualu bua muntu kena mua kumona mpala wanyi ne kuikala ne muoyo." 
Exodus33:21 Yehowa wakamba ne, Tangila, muaba udiku, udi hehi nʼanyi; wewe newimane ha dibue." 
Exodus33:22 Hahita butumbi buanyi, nenkuteke mu dina didi mu dibue, nenkubuikile ne tshianza tshianyi to ne hanamana kuhita ku mesu kuebe." 
Exodus33:23 Hashishe nengumushe tshianza tshianyi, ne wewe neumone nyima wanyi; kadi kuena mua kumona mpala wanyi." 
Exodus34:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Songa biebe mabue abidi bu mabue a diambedi: neufundehu mei onso anakafunda ha mabue a diambedi awakatshibula." 
Exodus34:2 Udilongolole dinda, Ulue biebe ne dinda ku mukuna wa Sinai; Ulue biebe kundi ku mutu kua mukuna." 
Exodus34:3 Kulu ne muntu mukuabo nansha: muntu kamueneki ku mukuna nansha: bisumbu bia mikoko ne bia ngombe kabidi bintu ku mukuna. 
Exodus34:4 Nunku Mose wakasonga mabue abidi bu mabue a diambedi; wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakabanda ku mukuna wa Sinai, bu muakamuambila Yehowa; wakaya ne mabue abidi mu bianza biandi." 
Exodus34:5 Yehowa wakahueka mu ditutu, wakimanahu nʼandi. Wakamumanyisha dina dia Yehowa." 
Exodus34:6 Yehowa wakahita ku mpala kuandi, wakela dî ne, Yehowa, Yehowa, Nzambi wa luse ne dinanga, kena ukuata tshiji lubilu, udi mûle tente ne luse lujalame ne bushuwa," 
Exodus34:7 udi ulesha binunu bia bantu luse lujalame, udi ubuikidila bantu malonga abo ne kusambuka kuabo kua mikenji ne malu mabi abo; kadi kena ubingisha muntu udi uhila; udi utumina bana ba tshikondo tshisatu anyi tshinai mibi ya batatuʼabo." 
Exodus34:8 Mose wakinama mutu wandi lubilu, wakatendelela." 
Exodus34:9 Yeye wakamba ne, Bingikala muhete dianyisha ku mesu kuebe, Yehowa, witabushe bua Yehowa aye biandi munkatshi muetu; nansha bantu aba bikale ne buhidia bukole; utubuikidile kuhanga kuetu ne mibi yetu, utuitabushe bu buhianyi buebe." 
Exodus34:10 Yeye wakamba ne, Nempunge nʼenu tshihungidi; nengenze malu a kukema ku mesu kua bantu bebe bonso, malu adi kâyi manze kumueneka ha buloba buonso anyi kudi tshisamba tshikuabo; bantu bonso badi nʼebe nebamone bienzedi bia Yehowa; bualu bua meme nengenze nʼebe bualu bukole." 
Exodus34:11 Enza bu mundi nkuambila dituku edi. Mona, nengihate Bena Amole ne Bena Kanâna ne Bena Hiti ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse ku mpala kuebe." 
Exodus34:12 Udimuke, kuhungi tshihungidi ne bantu ba mu buloba bûdi uya; bualu ebu kabulu buteyi munkatshi muenu." 
Exodus34:13 Ushimbule bioshelu biabo, utshibule bibumba biabo, ukose mpingu yabo ya Bashela." 
Exodus34:14 Kutendeledi nzambi mukuabo nansha; bualu bua Yehowa udi ne dina diandi dia Mukau, udi Nzambi wa mukau." 
Exodus34:15 Kuhungi tshihungidi ne bena buloba; hendabo masandi ne mpingu yabo, ne hashihelabo nzambi yabo nyama, hakubikilabo bua kudia nʼabo munyinyi wa nyama mishiha;" 
Exodus34:16 bua nuenu kanubikidi bana babo ba bakashi kudi bana benu ba balume; ne bana babo ba bakashi badi benda masandi ku mpingu yabo ka-benzeshi bana benu ba balume masandi kudi mpingu yabo. 
Exodus34:17 Kudisongidi mpingu. 
Exodus34:18 Nuenu nenudie bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene ku mesu kua Yehowa. Nenudie bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene matuku muanda mutekete, bu munakanuambila mu ngondo wa Abiba unakasungula; bualu bua nuakahatuka mu Ejipitu mu ngondo wa Abiba." 
Exodus34:19 Bana bonso banudi batela mbanyi; banʼa bute ba balume ba bimuna mbanyi, banʼa bute ba ngombe ne ba mikoko." 
Exodus34:20 Nenuhikule banʼa bute benu ba mpunda ku muanʼa mukoko; binuikala kanuyi nubahikula, nutshibule nshingu yabo. Nenuhikule banʼa bute benu ba balume bonso. Kanulu ku mesu kuanyi ne bianza bituhu." 
Exodus34:21 Nuenze mudimu wenu matuku asambombo, kadi nuikishe dituku dia muanda mutekete: nuikishe mu tshidimu tshia kukuna bintu ne mu tshidimu tshia kuhuola bintu." 
Exodus34:22 Nenudie bidia bia disanka dia mbingu ku mesu kua Yehowa hanuahuola bintu, ne hanuasangisha bintu kunshikidilu kua tshidimu." 
Exodus34:23 Bana benu ba balume bonso nebamueneke kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, misangu isatu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu." 
Exodus34:24 Bualu bua meme nengihate bisamba bia bantu ku mesu kuenu, nendeheshe matshika enu: bantu bakuabo kabena bikale ne lukuka lua buloba buenu, hanuamueneka kudi Yehowa Nzambi wenu misangu isatu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu." 
Exodus34:25 Kanulu ne mashi a nyama mishiha ne mampa adi ne luevene hohamue; kanushihi nansha tshintu tshikese tshia mulambu wa disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa tô ne ku dinda. 
Exodus34:26 Bintu bia kumudilu binudi nuhuola biai nʼabi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu. Kanulambi muana wa mukoko ne mabele a mamu wandi." 
Exodus34:27 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ufunde mei â, bualu bua nakuhunga nʼebe ne Bena Isalele tshihungidi bu mudi mei â." 
Exodus34:28 Yeye wakashala ne Yehowa minya makumi anai ne mafuku makumi anai; wakajila bia kudia ne mai a kunua. Wakafunda mei a dihungila, mikenji dikumi, ha mabue." 
Exodus34:29 Hakumuka Mose ku mukuna wa Sinai ne mabue abidi a mei a dihungila mu bianza biandi, hakahuekeye nunku, Mose kakamanya ne musunyi wa ha mpala handi wakakonka bualu bua yeye wakadi usomba ne Yehowa." 
Exodus34:30 Hakamona Alona ne Bena Isalele bonso Mose, monai, musunyi wa ha mpala handi wakakonka, bobo bakatshina bua kulua nʼandi ha buihi." 
Exodus34:31 Mose wakababikila; Alona ne bakokeshi bonso ba munkatshi muabo ba-kahingana kudiye; Mose wakasomba nʼabo. 
Exodus34:32 Ku nyima Bena Isalele bonso bakafua ha buihi ne yeye wakabamanyisha mikenji yonso yakamuambila Yehowa ha mukuna wa Sinai. 
Exodus34:33 Hakashikisha Mose kusomba nʼabo, yeye wakateka tshilulu tshikudika ha mpala handi." 
Exodus34:34 Kadi hakabuela Mose kudi Yehowa bua kusomba nʼandi, yeye wakumusha tshilulu tshikudika tô ne hakaluhukeye; wakaluhuka, wakambila Bena Isalele mikenji yakamuambila Yehowa." 
Exodus34:35 Bena Isalele bakamona mpala wa Mose ne musunyi wa ha mpala ha Mose wakakonka: Mose wakateka tshilulu tshikudika ha mpala handi kabidi tô ne hakayeye kusomba ne Yehowa. 
Exodus35:1 Mose Wakabikila tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele, wakabambila ne, Â mmalu adi Yehowa musue nuenu nuenze." 
Exodus35:2 Enzai mudimu matuku asambombo; kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete nedikale dituku dia tshijila, dituku dia kuikisha ku mesu kua Yehowa; muntu yonso udi wenza mudimu dituku adi nebamushihe." 
Exodus35:3 Kanutemeshi kahia mu matshika enu onso dituku dia Lumingu. 
Exodus35:4 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele bonso ne, Ebu mbualu buakamba Yehowa ne," 
Exodus35:5 Usangishe kuha kua Yehowa munkatshi muenu; muntu yonso udi witabusha mu mutshima wandi, alue biandi ne kuha kua Yehowa: ne or ne argent ne tshiamu tshia mitaku," 
Exodus35:6 ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin ne miosa ya mbushi 
Exodus35:7 ne biseba bia bimpanga bitua mu mai makunze-kunzû, ne biseba bia nkonge wa mu mai, ne mitshi ya acacia," 
Exodus35:8 ne manyi a mu muinda ne manananshi a kulengesha nʼau manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ne manananshu adi atua dihembu dimpe," 
Exodus35:9 ne mabue a onyx, ne mabue makuabo adibo bateka mu efoda ne mu tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi." 
Exodus35:10 Muntu yonso udi ne lungenyi lule alue biandi bua kuenza bi ntu bionso biakunuambila Yehowa 
Exodus35:11 ne nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne tshilulu tshia ha mutu, ne nkanu yatshi ne mabaya atshi, ne mitshi yatshi ne makurishi atshi ne nkanu ya ku makunshi," 
Exodus35:12 ne mushete ne mitshi ya mushete, ne tshibuikilu tshia mushete, ne tshilulu tshia munkatshi mua tshitendelelu," 
Exodus35:13 ne mesa ne mitshi ya mesa ne malonga a mesa ne bidia bia ha mesa," 
Exodus35:14 ne tshitekelu tshia minda ne malonga atshi ne minda yatshi, ne manyi a muinda," 
Exodus35:15 ne tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi, ne mitshi yatshi, ne manyi adibo bela ha mutu ne manananshi adi atua dihembu dimpe, ne tshilulu tshia ha mbelu ha tshitendelelu," 
Exodus35:16 ne tshioshelu tshia kahia ne bintu bia tshiamu tshia mitaku, ne mitshi yatshi ne malonga atshi, ne tshiowelu ne mesa atshi," 
Exodus35:17 ne bilulu bia ku luhangu ne makunshi a luhangu, ne nkanu ya ku makunshi ne tshilulu tshia ha mbelu ha luhangu," 
Exodus35:18 ne milondo ya mu tshitendelelu ne ya mu luhangu ne nshinga yai," 
Exodus35:19 ne bilulu bia mushinga mukole bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu mu muaba wa tshijila, bilulu bia tshijila bia muakuidi. Alona ne bia bana bandi balume bua kuenza nʼabi mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus35:20 Hashishe, tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele tshionso tshiakumuka ku mesu kua Mose." 
Exodus35:21 Muntu yonso wakadi mutshima wandi umuenzesha ne wakadi tshihahai wakalua ne kuha kua Yehowa bualu bua mudimu wa nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bintu bionso biakadi mu tshitendelelu ne bilulu bia tshijila. 
Exodus35:22 Balume ne bakashi bakalua bungi buabo bakadi bitabusha mu mitshima yabo, bakalua ne tukanu tua ku matshu ne tukanu tua ku minu ne nkanu ya ku maboko ne bintu bionso bia or, muntu ne muntu wakalua ne kuha kua or kudi Yehowa." 
Exodus35:23 Muntu ne muntu wakadi ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzu ne bia lin, ne bia miosa ya mbushi ne biseba bia bimpanga bitua mu mai makunze-kunzû, ne biseba bia nkonge ya mu mai, wakalua nʼabi." 
Exodus35:24 Muntu ne muntu wakadi ne tshiamu tshia argent ne tshia mitaku wakalua nʼabi bu kuha kua Yehowa, muntu yonso wakadi ne mitshi ya acacia yakadibo mua kuenza nʼai mudimu wakalua nʼai." 
Exodus35:25 Bakashi bonso bakadi ne lungenyi lule bakakuma bilulu ne bianza biabo, bakalua ne bilulu biakakumabo ne bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin muimpe." 
Exodus35:26 Bakashi bonso bakadi ne lungenyi lule mu mitshima yabo bakakuma bilulu ne miosa ya mbushi. 
Exodus35:27 Bakokeshi bakalua ne mabue a onyx ne mabue makuabo a kuteka mu efoda ne mu tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi," 
Exodus35:28 ne manyi ne bintu bia dihembu dimpe bia kuela mu manyi, ne manyi a muinda ne manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ne manyi adi atua dihembu." 
Exodus35:29 Bena Isalele bonso, balume ne bakashi, ba mitshima miololoke bakitabusha kufila bintu ku mudimu wakadi Yehowa Wambila Mose bua kuenjibua, bakabika kudi Yehowa bu kuha kuabo kua disanka." 
Exodus35:30 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Yehowa wakamana kuhikula Besalele, muana mulume wa Uli, muana mulume wa Hû wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda," 
Exodus35:31 wakamûsha tente ne Nyuma wa Nzambi ne lungenyi lule lua kuenza nʼalu midimu yonso," 
Exodus35:32 ne lua kulongolola nʼalu mudimu muimpe wa bintu bia or ne bia argent ne bia tshiamu tshia mitaku," 
Exodus35:33 ne mudimu wa kusonga mabue ne wa kusonga mabaya ne midimu yonso ya bantu badi ne lungenyi lule. 
Exodus35:34 Wakabuesha lungenyi lua kuyisheye nʼalu bantu mu mutshima wandi, ne yeye ne Oholiaba, muana mulume wa Ahisamaka wa mu tshisamba tshia Dana." 
Exodus35:35 Yeye wakabûsha mitshima tente ne lungenyi bua kuenza nʼalu midima yonso ya bantu badi basonga bintu ne badi bakuma bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin, ne ya bantu bonso badi balongolola midimu ya lungenyi." 
Exodus36:1 Besalele ne Oholiaba nebenze mudimu wa mu tshitendelelu, ne bantu bonso badi ne lungenyi mu mitshima yabo tente nebenze mudimu eu bu muakuamba Yehowa, bobo bakadi Yehowa uhesha lungenyi ne meji bua kumanyabo mua kuenza midimu yonso ya mu tshitendelelu." 
Exodus36:2 Mose Wakabikila Besalele ne Oholiaba ne muntu yonso wakadi ne mutshima mûsha tente ne lungenyi kudi Yehowa, ne muntu yonso wakadi ne mutshima bua kulua kuenza mudimu." 
Exodus36:3 Bobo bakangata ku bianza bia Mose bintu bionso biakafua Bena Isalele ne disanka bua kuenza nʼabi bintu bionso bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu. Bakatshidi halua kudiye ne bintu biakadi mitshima yabo misue ku dinda ku dinda. 
Exodus36:4 Bantu ba lungenyi lule bakadi benza midimu ya mishindu yonso mu tshitendelelu bakaha kudi Mose," 
Exodus36:5 bakamuambila ne, Bantu badi balue ne bintu bitamba bungi bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu wakuamba Yehowa." 
Exodus36:6 Nu nku Mose wakela di, bakamanyi-shangana mu tshitudilu ne, Nansha mulume nansha mukashi kalu ne bintu bikuabo bia tshitendelelu. Bakakanda bantu nunku." 
Exodus36:7 Bualu bua bobo bakadi ne bungi bua bintu bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu wonso, ne bintu bikuabo ha mutu." 
Exodus36:8 Balume bonso bakadi ne lungenyi lule munkatshi mua bena mudimu bakenza nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bilulu dikumi bia lin muimpe ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû, bakenza bakeluba kudi bena mudimu bakadi ne lungenyi lule." 
Exodus36:9 Bule bua tshilulu tshimue buakadi coudées makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu, ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudées mai, bilulu bionso biakadi ne budi lumue." 
Exodus36:10 Wakatuangana bilulu bitanu ha buabi, bilulu bitanu ha buabi." 
Exodus36:11 Wakenza mesu a mbote ne bilulu bia bleu ku luseke lua tshilulu tshiakadi ha bule, Wakenza nunku kabidi ne tshilulu tshikuabo tshiakadi ha bule." 
Exodus36:12 Wakenza mesu a mbote makumi atanu mu tshilulu tshimue, ne mesu a mbote makumi atanu mu tshilulu tshikuabo mesu a mbote akadi atuangana." 
Exodus36:13 Wakenza mbote ya or makumi atanu, wakatuangasha bilulu ne mbote ai, nunku nsubu wa tshitendelelu wakadi bu nsubu umue." 
Exodus36:14 Wakenza bilulu bia miosa ya mbushi dikumi ne tshilulu tshimue bua kuteka ha mutu ha nsubu. 
Exodus36:15 Bule bua tshilulu tshimue buakadi coudées makumi asatu, ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudées anai bilulu dikumi ne tshimue biakadi ne luidi lumue." 
Exodus36:16 Wakatuangasha bilulu bitanu ha buabi, ne bilulu bisambombo ha buabi." 
Exodus36:17 Wakenza mesu a mbote makumi atanu ku luseke lua tshilulu tshiakadi ha bule, ne mesu a mbote makumi atanu ku luseke lua tshilulu tshikuabo tshiakadi ha bule." 
Exodus36:18 Wakenza mbote ya tshiamu tshia mitaku makumi atanu bua kutuangasha bilulu bia nsubu bu nsubu umue. 
Exodus36:19 Wakenza tshintu tshia kuteka ha mutu ha nsubu ne biseba bia bimpanga bitua mu mai makunze-kunzû ne biseba bia nyama ya nkonge bia kuteka ha mutu hatshi. 
Exodus36:20 Wakenza mabaya mimanyike kulu a nsubu wa tshitendelelu a mitshi ya acacia. 
Exodus36:21 Bule bua dibaya dimue buakadi coudées dikumi, ne butshiama buadi buakadi coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus36:22 Dibaya dimue diakadi ne tutshi tua bituha tutshiamakasha hankatshi ha dibaya, bakenza mabaya onso a mu nsubu nunku." 
Exodus36:23 Wakenza mabaya a mu nsubu makumi abidi a kuteka ku luseke lua ku sude," 
Exodus36:24 Wakenza masoso makumi anai a tshiamu tshia argent mu mabaya makumi abidi, masoso abidi mu dibaya dimue a kuteka mu tutshi tua tutuha, ne masoso abidi mu dibaya dikuabo a kutekamu tutshi tua tutuha." 
Exodus36:25 Wakenza kabidi mabaya makumi abidi a kuteka ku luseke lua ku nôde," 
Exodus36:26 ne masoso a tshiamu tshia argent makumi anai, masoso abidi mu dibaya dimue masoso abidi mu dibaya dikuabo." 
Exodus36:27 Wakenza mabaya asambombo a kuteka ku nyima ku luseke lua ku wesete. 
Exodus36:28 Wakenza mabaya abidi a kuteka ku matumba a nsubu a ku nyima. 
Exodus36:29 Mabaya au akadi bu mabaya abidi hanshi, kadi akadi matuangasha ku mutu ne biamu bia masoso, Wakenza bubidi buau ku matumba abidi." 
Exodus36:30 Mabaya muanda mukulu akadiku ne masoso a tshiamu tshia argent dikumi ne asambombo, masoso abidi ku dibaya ku dibaya." 
Exodus36:31 Wakenza mitshi ya acacia itanu ya kubuesha mu mabaya akadi ku luseke lumue lua nsubu wa tshitendelelu," 
Exodus36:32 ne mitshi itanu ya kubuesha mu mabaya a ku luseke lukuabo lua nsubu, ne mitshi itanu ya kubuesha mu mabaya adi ku nyima kua nsubu ku luseke lua ku wesete." 
Exodus36:33 Wakabisha mitshi hankatshi ha mabaya ku mutu tô ne ku tshitaku tshia mabaya. 
Exodus36:34 Wakalamika tshiamu tshia or ha mutu ha mabaya, wakenza nkanu ya or ya kubueshamu mitshi, wakalamika tshiamu tshia or ha mutu ha mitshi." 
Exodus36:35 Wakenza tshilulu tshia buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzû ne bua lin, bakenza tshifuanyikishi tshia bakeluba mu tshilulu kudi bantu bakadi ne lungenyi lule." 
Exodus36:36 Wakenza makunshi a acacia anai, wakalamika tshiamu tshia or ku makunshi, akadi ne bitubuidi bia or, wakenza nkanu yau mai ya tshiamu tshia argent." 
Exodus36:37 Wakenza tshilulu tshikuabo tshia buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzû ne bua lin tshia kuteka ku mbelu kua tshitendelelu, wakatshienzesha kudi bena lungenyi lule," 
Exodus36:38 wakenza makunshi atanu ne bitubuilu biau, wakalamata tshiamu tshia or ha mutu, ne nkanu ya tshilulu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
Exodus37:1 Besalele Wakenza mushete wa acacia Buludi bua mushete buakadi coudées ibidi ne tshituha, ne butshiama buau buakadi coudée umue ne tshituha, ne bule buau bua mulu coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus37:2 Wakalamika tshiamu tshia or ku nyima ne munda mua mushete, wakateka tshiamu tshia or ku mibangu ya mushete." 
Exodus37:3 Wakenza nkanu ya or mai ya kuteka ku matumba anai, ibidi ku luseke lumue, ibidi ku luseke lukuabo." 
Exodus37:4 Wakenza mitshi ya acacia mai, wakalamika tshiamu tshia or ku nseke yonso." 
Exodus37:5 Wakabuesha mitshi mu nkanu ya ku nseke ya mushete bua kutuala nʼai mushete. 
Exodus37:6 Wakenza tshibuikilu tshia tshiamu tshia or nkayandi, buludi buatshi buakadi coudées ibidi ne tshituha, ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus37:7 Wakenza bakeluba babidi ne tshiamu tshia or tshituha tshimue tshijima, ku matengu abidi a tshibuikilu," 
Exodus37:8 mukeluba umue ku ditengu dimue, ne mukeluba mukuabo ku ditengu dikuabo, wakenza bakeluba ne tshibuikilu tshia mushete ne tshituha tshijima tshia or." 
Exodus37:9 Bakeluba bakolola mahuahua abo kulu, bakabuikila tshibuikilu tshia mushete ne mahuahua abo, bakadi belangana mpala, mpala yabo yakadi ku tshibuikilu tshia mushete." 
Exodus37:10 Wakenza mesa a acacia, buludi buau buakadi coudées ibidi, ne butshiama buau buakadi coudée umue, ne bule buau bua mulu coudée umue ne tshituha." 
Exodus37:11 Wakaladika tshiamu tshia or ha mutu ha mesa ne ku matengu onso kabidi. 
Exodus37:12 Wakenza tshintu tshia or bunene bua butshiama bua tshianza ku matengu onso. 
Exodus37:13 Wakenza nkanu ya or mai, wakateka nkanu ei ku matumba anai ku mikolo ya mesa mai." 
Exodus37:14 Bakateka nkanu ku nseke ya mesa bua kutuala nʼai mesa. 
Exodus37:15 Wakenza mitshi ya acacia, wakaladika tshiamu tshia or ku nseke yonso bua kutuala nʼai mesa." 
Exodus37:16 Wakenza malonga a mesa, ne nkuta ne bihanza ne bibuikilu bia bintu ebi ne tshiamu tshia or nkayandi." 
Exodus37:17 Wakenza tshitekelu tshia minda ne or nkayandi, bakahita tshitaku tshia kahanza, ne tshintu tshia tshiamu tshiakadi hankatshi, ne luhanza tukese, ne bihunga, ne bilongo ne tshituha tshia tshiamu tshia or tshijima." 
Exodus37:18 Wakenza mahu asambombo, mahu asatu ku luseke lumue lua tshitekelu ne mahu asatu ku luseke lukuabo." 
Exodus37:19 Wakazola bilongo bia amande ne tuhanza tusatu tuakadi ku mutu kua mahu a tshitekelu, ne tshihunga tshia or ne tshilongo, wakazola bilongo bia amande ha tuhanza tuakadi ku luseke lukuabo, ne tshihunga ne tshilongo, wakenza matu asambombo nunku." 
Exodus37:20 Tuhanza tunai tuakadi tuzola ne bilongo bia amande ne tshihunga tshia or ne tshilongo," 
Exodus37:21 tshihunga tshia or tshiakadi hankatshi ha mahu abidi, hankatshi ha mahu abidi, hankatshi ha mahu abidi, ku mahu asambombo." 
Exodus37:22 Bihanga ne mahu a tshitekelu biakadi bia tshituha tshia or tshimue, bakatula bintu bionso ne tshiamu tshia or nkayandi." 
Exodus37:23 Wakenza minda muanda mutekete ne biamu bia kujimisha nʼabi minda ne malonga ai ne or nkayandi. 
Exodus37:24 Bakenza bintu ebi bionso ne ntalanta wa or nkayandi. 
Exodus37:25 Wakenza tshioshelu tshia musonga wa manananshi ne mabaya a acacia, buludi bua tshi buakadi coudée umue, ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudée umue, bakidikisha nseke yonso ne luidi lumue, bule buatshi bua mulu buakadi coudées ibidi, wakenza nsengu yatshi ne tshituha tshijima." 
Exodus37:26 Wakalamika tshiamu tshia or ha mutu hatshi ne ku nseke yatshi ne ku nsengu yatshi, wakenza tshintu tshia or ku matengu onso." 
Exodus37:27 Wakenza nkanu ya or ibidi kuinshi kua mutu watshi, ku matumba abidi adi ku nseke yatshi, bualu bua kutshituala." 
Exodus37:28 Wakenza mitshi ya acacia ibidi, wakalamina or ku nseke yai yonso." 
Exodus37:29 Wakenza manyi adibo bela ha mutu ne musenga wa manananshi kudi bantu bakadi ne lungenyi lule. 
Exodus38:1 Wakenza tshioshelu tshia kuosha nyama ne mabaya a acacia. Buludi buatshi buakadi coudées itanu ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudées itanu, ne bule buatshi bua mulu buakadi coudées isatu." 
Exodus38:2 Wakenza nsengu ku matumba anai, wakenza nsengu ne tshituha tshijima, wakalamata tshiamu tshia mitaku ku nseke yonso." 
Exodus38:3 Wakenza malonga onso a tshioshelu ne bivuadi ne nkasu ne malonga ne bitubuidi bia kukuata nʼabi munyinyi ne bihanza bia kahia ne bintu biatshi bionso ne tshiamu tshia mitaku. 
Exodus38:4 Wakenzela tshioshelu munyingu wa tshiamu tshia mitaku, wakatekeye munda mua mibangu ya ku mutu kua tshioshelu hankatshi, mu bule buatshi." 
Exodus38:5 Wakatula nkanu mai ya kuteka ku matumba a tshintu atshi bua kubueshamu mitshi. 
Exodus38:6 Wakenza mitshi ya acacia, wakalamata tshiamu tshia mitaku ku nseke yonso." 
Exodus38:7 Wakabuesha mitshi ei mu nkanu ya ku nseke ya tshioshelu, bua kutshituala nʼai, wakashiya munda muatshi mutuhu." 
Exodus38:8 Wakenza tshiowelu tshia mai ne tshiamu tshia mitaku, ne mesa atshi ne tshiamu tshia mitaku, wakatshienza ne ndimuenu ya ba kashi bakadi benza mudimu ku mbelu kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Exodus38:9 Wakalongolola luhangu lua muaba wa kutendelela ku luseke lua ku sude wakenza bilulu bia lin muimpe tô ne ku coudées lukama," 
Exodus38:10 ne makunshi makumi abidi, ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku makumi abidi, kadi bitubuidi bia ku makunshi biakadi bia argent." 
Exodus38:11 Ku luseke lua ku nôde wakenza bilulu tô ne ku coudées lukama, ne makunshi makumi abidi, ne nkanu makumi abidi, kadi bitubuidi biakadi bia argent." 
Exodus38:12 Ku luseke lua ku wesete wakenza bilulu to ne ku coudées makumi atanu, ne makunshi dikumi, ne nkanu dikumi ne bitubuidi bia argent dikumi." 
Exodus38:13 Ku luseke lua ku esete wakenza bilulu tô ne ku coudées makumi atanu. 
Exodus38:14 Bilulu bia ku luseke lumue lua tshibi biakadi coudées dikumi ne itanu, ne makunshi asatu ne nkanu isatu," 
Exodus38:15 luseke lukuabo luakadi nunku kabidi, bilulu tô ne ku coudées dikumi ne itanu ne makunshi asatu ne nkanu isatu." 
Exodus38:16 Bakenza bilulu ebi bionso ne buanda bua lin muimpe. 
Exodus38:17 Bakenza nkanu yonso ya makunshi ne tshiamu tshia mitaku, kadi bitubuidi bia makunshi biakadi bia tshiamu tshia argent, wakalengesha mitu ya makunshi onso ne tshiamu tshia argent, ne makunshi onso a luhangu akadi malengesha ne tshiamu tshia argent." 
Exodus38:18 Bakenza tshilulu tshia ku mbelu kua luhangu ne buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzû ne bua lin muimpe kudi bantu bakadi ne lungenyi lule bule buatshi buakadi coudées ma kunu abidi ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudées itanu, muomumue ne bilulu bia luhangu." 
Exodus38:19 Makunshi a tshibi akadi anai, ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku mai, ne bitubuidi bia argent, bakalengesha makunshi ne tshiamu tshia argent." 
Exodus38:20 Milonda yonso ya mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne mu luhangu lua muaba wa kutendelela yakadi ya tshiamu tshia mitaku. 
Exodus38:21 Ebu mbungi bua bintu bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu biakabalabo bu muakamba Mose biakakuatshila Bena Lewi mu mudimu wabo, mu bukokeshi bua Itama, muana mulume wa Alona, muakuidi." 
Exodus38:22 Besalele, muana mulume wa Uli, muana mulume wa Hû wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda wakenza bintu bionso bakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus38:23 Oholiaba, muana mulume wa Ahisamaka, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dana wakadi nʼandi, mundi wa lungenyi lule wakenza bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû." 
Exodus38:24 Bakasangisha or wa kuenza nʼai mudimu wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu ntalanta makumi abidi ne tshitema, ne nshekele nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asatu, bu muakadi nshekele wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
Exodus38:25 Bakabala tshiamu tshia argent bu bungi bua bantu, ntalanta lukama ne nshekele tshinunu tshimue, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu bu muakadi nshekele wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
Exodus38:26 Muntu ne mundi wakela beka umue udi tshituha tshia nshekele wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi, muntu ne muntu wakadibo babala, waka mana kuhita bidimu makumi abidi, bakadi balume binunu nkama isambombo, binunu bisatu, nkama itanu ne makumi atanu." 
Exodus38:27 Bakenza nkanu ya mu nsubu ne ya mu bilulu ne ntalanta ya argent lukama, ntalanta ku lukanu, ntalanta ku lukanu." 
Exodus38:28 Wakenza bitubuidi bia makunshi ne bintu bia kulengesha nʼabi makunshi ne nshekele ya argent tshinunu tshimue, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
Exodus38:29 Bakasangisha tshiamu tshia mitaku bu ntalanta makumi muanda mutekete, ne nshekele binunu bibidi ne nkama mai." 
Exodus38:30 Bakenza nʼatshi nkanu ya ku tshibi tshia nsubu, ne tshioshelu tshia nyama ne biamu bitshiamakane, ne malonga onso a tshioshelu," 
Exodus38:31 ne nkanu ya ku luhangu, ne nkanu ya ku tshibi tshia luhangu, ne milonda yonso ya mu nsubu, ne milonda yonso ya mu luhangu lua ku muaba wa tshitendelelu." 
Exodus39:1 Bakenza bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzu bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu mu muaba wa tshima, bakenzela Alona bilulu bia tshijila bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:2 Wakenza efoda ne or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzu ne bia lin muimpe. 
Exodus39:3 Bakatula tshiamu tshia or to ku muhimbu mukese, bakenza nshinga ya or, bakatshikuma ne buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzu ne bua lin kudi bantu ba lungenyi lule." 
Exodus39:4 Bakenza bintu bia kuteka ha maha bua kutuishangana bituha bia efoda bibidi. 
Exodus39:5 Bakenza mukaba wa efoda bu muakadibo benza efoda ne bintu bia or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû ne bia lin, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:6 Bakenza mabue a onyx, bakabuesha mu masoso a or, bakafundahu mena a bisamba bia bana ba balume ba Isalele." 
Exodus39:7 Wakâteka ha bilulu bia ha maha bia efoda, mabue â akadi bu tshivulukidi kudi bana ba balume ba Isalele bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:8 Wakenza tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi kudi bantu ba lungenyi lule, bu muakenzabo efoda ne bintu bia or ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzu ne bia lin muimpe." 
Exodus39:9 Bakidikisha nseke yonso ne luidi lumue, bakatshibula tshilulu, buludi buatshi buakadi bunene bua ntanta wa tshianza ne butshiama buatshi buakadi bunene bua ntanta wa tshianza." 
Exodus39:10 Bakatshitekahu milongo ya masoso a mabue mai mu mulongo wa kumudilu bakateka mabue a sardoine ne topaze ne émeraude," 
Exodus39:11 mu mulongo muibidi mabue a rubis ne saphir ne calcédoine," 
Exodus39:12 mu mulongo muisatu mabue a opale ne agate ne améthyste," 
Exodus39:13 mu mulongo muinai mabue a chrysohthe ne onyx ne jaspe. Bakabuesha mabue au mu masoso a tshiamu tshia or. 
Exodus39:14 Mabue akadi bungi bua mena a bisamba bia Bena Isalele, dikumi ne bibidi, bakafundahu mena a bisamba bia Bena Isalele dikumi ne bibidi ku mulongo wa tshisamba ne tshisamba." 
Exodus39:15 Bakenza tukanu tua or tuakadi tuhindakana bu muonshi. 
Exodus39:16 Bakenza masoso a or abidi ne nkanu ibidi, bakateka nkanu ei ibidi ku nseke ibidi ya tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi." 
Exodus39:17 Bakabuesha tukanu tua or tuhindakana mu nkanu ibidi yakadi ku nseke ya tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi. 
Exodus39:18 Baketeka nsonga ibidi mikuabo ya tukanu tuhindakana mu masoso abidi, nunku bakatuteka ha bilulu bia efoda bia ha maha ku mpala kua tshilulu." 
Exodus39:19 Bakenza nkanu ya or ibidi bakayiteka ku luseke lua tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi luakadi lutuangane ne efoda. 
Exodus39:20 Bakenza nkanu ya or ibidi, bakayiteka muinshi mua bilulu bia ha maha, ku mpala kuabi ne ku mutu kua mukaba muimpe wa efoda" 
Exodus39:21 Bakasanka tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi ne nkanu yatshi ku nkanu ya efoda ne muonshi wa bleu muhindakana tshilulu etshi tshiakashala hehi ne mukaba wa efoda, kabakatshisulula, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:22 Wakenza tshikowelu tshia efoda ne buanda bua bleu," 
Exodus39:23 bakashiya disoso bua kubueshamu mutu, bakanyunguluka disoso ne muonshi muhindakana bu mudibo benza tshikowelu tshia nvita, bua tshikowelu katshihandiki nansha." 
Exodus39:24 Bakafunda bifuanyikishi bia tumuma tukese tua grenade ne buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunze-kunzû kuinshi kua tshikowelu tshionso. 
Exodus39:25 Bakenza ndibu ya or nkayandi, bakateka ndibu hankatshi ha tumuma tuakadi kuinshi kua tshikowelu," 
Exodus39:26 kadibu ne kamuma kadibu ne kamuma kuinshi kua tshikowelu tshia kuenza nʼatshi mudimu, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:27 Bakenzela Alona ne bana bandi balume bikowelu bia lin," 
Exodus39:28 ne bifulu bia lin, ne bilulu bikuabo bia ha mutu, ne mihanu ya lin," 
Exodus39:29 ne mukaba wa lin ne bilulu bia bleu ne bikunzubile ne bikunze-kunzû, mudimu wa bantu ba lungenyi lule, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:30 Bakenza tshitotolo tshia tshijila tshia tshiamu tshia or, bakafundahu bu muakafundabo ha mabue ne, TSHINTU TSHIJIDILA KUDI YEHOWA." 
Exodus39:31 Bakatekahu muonshi wa bleu muhindakana, bakatshisuika ha tshilulu, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:32 Nunku bakashikisha mudimu wonso wa tshitendelelu, ntenta wa kusangakena, Bena Isalele bakenza malu onso akambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus39:33 Bakatuala nsubu wa tshitendelelu, Ntenta mene, kudi Mose, ne bintu bionso biakenzabo, ne nkanu ne mabaya, ne mitshi ne makunshi ne masoso a tshiamu," 
Exodus39:34 ne tshintu tshia biseba bia bimpanga tshima mu mai makunze-kunzû tshia kuteka ha mutu ha nsubu, ne tshintu tshia biseba bia nkonge tshia kuteka ha mutu hatshi, ne tshilulu tshia hankatshi ha nsubu," 
Exodus39:35 ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi, ne mitshi ya mushete, ne tshibuikilu tshia mushete," 
Exodus39:36 ne mesa, ne malonga onso a mesa, ne bidia bilesha," 
Exodus39:37 ne bitekelu bia minda, ne minda ne malonga au onso, ne manyi a minda," 
Exodus39:38 ne tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia or, ne manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ne musenga wa manananshi, ne tshilulu tshia kuteka ku mbelu kua nsubu," 
Exodus39:39 ne tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku, ne biamu bitshiamakane, ne mitshi yatshi, ne malonga atshi onso, ne tshiowelu ne mesa atshi," 
Exodus39:40 ne bilulu bia luhangu lua muaba wa kutendelela, ne makunshi a luhangu ne nkanu, ne tshilulu tshia tshibi tshia luhangu, ne mionshi yonso ne milonda ne bintu bionso bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, mbia ntenta wa kusangakena," 
Exodus39:41 ne bilulu bitedibue bimpe bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu wa mu nsubu wa tshijila, ne bilulu bia tshijila bia Alona muakuidi, ne bilulu bia bana bandi balume bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus39:42 Bena Isalele bakenza mudimu wonso wakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Exodus39:43 Mose wakamona mudimu wonso wakenzabo, ne mona, baka wenza bu muakamba Yehowa Mose wakabandisha disanka." 
Exodus40:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Exodus40:2 Halua dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa kumudilu, ushimike ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Exodus40:3 Ubueshemu mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi, ubuikile mushete ne tshilulu tshia mu nsubu." 
Exodus40:4 Uluemu ne mesa, ulongolole bintu bidihu, uluemu ne bitekelu bia minda, utekemu minda." 
Exodus40:5 Uteke tshioshelu tshia or tshia musenga wa manananshi ku mpala kua mushete, ukudike tshilulu ku mbelu kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Exodus40:6 Uteke tshioshelu tshia mulambu wa kuosha ku mbelu kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu. 
Exodus40:7 Uteke tshiowelu hankatshi ha ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshioshelu tshia milambu, welemu mai." 
Exodus40:8 Ushimike luhangu lua tshilulu lunyunguluke, ukudike tshilulu tshia ku mbelu kua luhangu." 
Exodus40:9 Wangate manyi adibo bela ha mutu, wamiamine ha nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne ha bintu bionso bidimu, ujidile nsubu ne bintu biandi bionso, neikale mujidila." 
Exodus40:10 Umuamine manyi ha tshioshelu tshia mulambu wa kuosha, ne ha bintu biatshi bionso, ujidile tshioshelu tshioshelu netshikale tshijidila." 
Exodus40:11 Umiamine manyi ha tshiowelu ne ha mesa atshi, utshijidile." 
Exodus40:12 Ulue ne Alona ne bana bandi balume ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena, uboweshe mai." 
Exodus40:13 Uluatshishe Alona bilulu bijidila, umuele manyi, umujidike, bua angenzele biandi mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Exodus40:14 Ulue ne bana bandi balume kabidi, ubaluatshishe bikowelu," 
Exodus40:15 ubele manyi bu muwakela tatuʼabo bua kukuatshilabo mudimu wa buakuidibualu ebu nebubajidile mu mudimu wa buakuidi bua tshiendelele mu bikondo biabo bionso. 
Exodus40:16 Mose wakenza nunku, wakenza malu onso akamuambila Yehowa." 
Exodus40:17 Bakashimika nsubu wa tshitendelelu mu dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa kumudilu mu tshidimu tshibidi. 
Exodus40:18 Mose wakashimika nsubu, wakalongolola nkanu ne mabaya, wakabueshamu mitshi, wakajadika makunshi a nsubu." 
Exodus40:19 Wakabikila nsubu ne tshilulu tshia ha mutu ha nsubu, wakateka tshilulu tshikuabo ha mutu hatshi, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus40:20 Wakabuesha mabue a mikenji mu mushete, wakateka mitshi ya kutuala nʼai mushete, wakateka tshibuikilu ha mutu ha mushete." 
Exodus40:21 Wakalua ne mushete mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, wakakudika tshilulu, wakajibikila mushete bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus40:22 Wakateka mesa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu ku luseke lua ku nôde, ku mpala kua tshilulu." 
Exodus40:23 Wakalongolola mampa ha mesa ku mpala kua Yehowa, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus40:24 Wakateka bitekelu bia minda mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu ku mpala kua mesa ku luseke lua nsubu lua ku sude. 
Exodus40:25 Wakatemesha minda ku mpala kua Yehowa bu muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Exodus40:26 Wakateka tshioshelu tshia or mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu ku mpala kua tshilulu," 
Exodus40:27 wakoshahu musenga wa manananshi, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus40:28 Wakakudika tshilulu ku mbelu kua nsubu. 
Exodus40:29 Wakateka tshioshelu tshia mulambu wa kuosha ku mbelu kua nsubu wa tshiendelele wakoshahu mulambu wa bukula bua manvua bu muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Exodus40:30 Wakateka tshiowelu hankatshi ha ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshioshelu tshia mulambu ya kuosha, wakelamu mai a kuowa," 
Exodus40:31 akadi Mose ne Alona ne bana bandi balume bowesha nʼau bianza ne makasa. 
Exodus40:32 Hakadibo babuela mu nsubu wa tshiendelele ne hakaluabo hehi ne tshioshelu, bakowa mai, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Exodus40:33 Wakashimika luhangu ludi lunyunguluka nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne tshioshelu tshia milambu ya kuosha, wakakudika tshilulu ku mbelu kua luhangu. Mose wakashikisha mudimu wonso nunku." 
Exodus40:34 Hashishe ditutu diakabuikila ntenta wa kusangakena, ne butumbi bua Yehowa buakûla nsubu tente." 
Exodus40:35 Mose kakamanya mua kubuela mu ntenta bualu bua difutu diakimana ha mutu ha nsubu, ne butumbi bua Yehowa buakula nsubu tente." 
Exodus40:36 Mu ngendu yabo yonso, hakabandishibua difutu ha mutu ha nsubu, Bena Isalele bakadi babanga luendu." 
Exodus40:37 Kadi hakadi difutu kadiyi dibandishibua, kabakaya mu luendu tô ne ku dituku diakabandishibua difutu." 
Exodus40:38 Bualu bua difutu dia Yehowa diakadi ha mutu ha nsubu mu munya, ne mu butuku kahia kakadihu, ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso mu ngendu yabo yonso." 
Leviticus1:1 Yehowa Wakabikila Mose, wakamuambila mu ntenta wa kusangakena ne," 
Leviticus1:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Halua muntu ne bintu bidiye musue kuoshila Nzambi, alue biandi ne mulambu wa muana wa ngombe anyi muana wa mukoko." 
Leviticus1:3 Bikala mulambu wandi wa kuosha wa muana wa ngombe, neafile mulume udi kayi ne tshilema, neamushihele ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, ne Yehowa neamuitabushe." 
Leviticus1:4 Yeye neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha ngombe wa mulambu ne Yehowa neawitabushe bua kubuikidila nʼau bubi buandi. 
Leviticus1:5 Yeye neashihe muana wa ngombe ku mesu kua Yehowa, ne bana balume ba Alona bakuidi nebaye ne mashi, nebamiamine mashi ku tshioshelu tshidi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus1:6 Neubule tshiseba tshia ngombe, neamukose bituha." 
Leviticus1:7 Bana balume ba Alona bakuidi nebateke kahia ha tshioshelu, balonge nkunyi mu kahia," 
Leviticus1:8 ne bana balume ba Alona bakuidi nebalonge bituha ne mutu ne dianyi ha nkunyi mu kahia kadi ha tshioshelu," 
Leviticus1:9 kadi nebuvuwe bintu bia munda ne bioku ne mai; ne muakuidi neoshile bintu bionso ha tshioshelu, bu mulambu udibo bosha ha kahia bu tshintu tshidi tshi tua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus1:10 Bikala mulambu wandi wa kuosha muana wa mukoko anyi muana wa mbushi, yeye neafile mulume udi kayi ne tshilema." 
Leviticus1:11 Yeye neamushihe ku luseke lua tshioshelu lua ku nôde, ku mesu kua Yehowa; ne bana balume ba Alona bakuidi nebamiamine mashi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus1:12 Yeye neamukose bituha ne mutu ne dianyi, ne muakuidi neabilonge ha nkunyi idi mu kahia kadi ha mutu ha tshioshelu," 
Leviticus1:13 kadi neuvuwe bintu bia munda ne bioku ne mai, ne muakuidi neoshile bintu bionso ha tshioshelu bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus1:14 Bikala mulambu wandi wa kuosha wa nyunyu, yeye neafile nansha nyunyu wa nkutshi nansha mputu nyunyu." 
Leviticus1:15 Muakuidi nealue handi ku tshioshelu, neanyengabashe nshingu wandi, neamuoshile ha tshioshelu, mashi andi neamate hanshi ku luseke lua tshioshelu," 
Leviticus1:16 yeye neumushe dibodi ne masala, nealele ku luseke lua tshioshelu ludi ku esete, mu muaba wa butue." 
Leviticus1:17 Yeye neamukuate ku mahuahua andi, neamuhande hankatshi, kadi kahanduludi bituha bibidi nansha, ne muakuidi neamuoshile ha tshioshelu, ha nkunyi idi mu kahia bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus2:1 Halua muntu ne mulambu wa bukula kudi Yehowa, neafile bukula bubotesha, newelehu manyi ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Leviticus2:2 nealue nʼabu kudi bana balume ba Alona bakuidi, neambulule dianza tente ne bukula ne manyi abu ne manananshi abu onso, ne muakuidi neabuoshile ha tshioshelu, bu tshivilukidi, bu tshintu tshidi tshi tua dihembu kudi Yehowa," 
Leviticus2:3 ne tshituha tshia bukula tshidi tshishale netshikale tshia Alona ne bana bandi balume ntshintu tshidi tshitambe tshia tshijila tshia mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia. 
Leviticus2:4 Hawalua ne mulambu wa bukula budibo balamba mu nfulu, nebuikale mikata ya bukula budi kabuyi ne luevene busangisha ne manyi, anyi mikata ya bukula budi kabuyi ne luevene idi ne manyi mela ha mutu." 
Leviticus2:5 Bikala mulambu webe wa bukula budibo balamba mu dilonga, newikale wa bukula budi kabuyi ne luevene busangisha ne manyi." 
Leviticus2:6 Wewe neusunsulule mukata eu, neuwelehu manyi tshintu etshi ntshintu tshia mulambu wa bukula." 
Leviticus2:7 Bikala mulambu webe wa bukula budibo balamba mu dilonga, neusangishe bukula bubotesha ne manyi." 
Leviticus2:8 Wewe neulue ne mulambu wa bukula budi busangisha ne bintu ebi kudi Yehowa, ulue nʼabi kudi muakuidi ne yeye nealue nʼabi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus2:9 Muakuidi neameme tshituha tshia mulambu wa bukula bu tshivulukidi, neatshioshile ha tshioshelu ne kahia bu tshintu tshidi tshi tua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus2:10 Tshituha tshidi tshishale netshikale tshia Alona ne bana bandi balume ntshintu tshidi tshitambe tshia tshijila tshia mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia. 
Leviticus2:11 Kanulu kudi Yehowa ne mulambu wa bukula budi busangisha ne luevene, kanuoshi luevene anyi buitshi bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa." 
Leviticus2:12 Nudi mua kulua ne bintu bia kumudilu binudi nuhuola kudi Yehowa, kadi bintu ebi kabiena bu bintu bidi bitua dihembu ha tshioshelu." 
Leviticus2:13 Neutuishe milambu yonso ya bukula ne luehu, kanulekedi luehu lua tshihungidi tshia Nzambi mu milambu yenu ya bukula, tuishai milambu yonso ne luehu." 
Leviticus2:14 Biwalua ne mulambu wa bintu bia kumudilu binudi nuhuola kudi Yehowa, nufile bintu bidi mu miehu biosha mu kahia, miehu mihia-mihia idibo ba tua diambedi." 
Leviticus2:15 Wewe neuwelehu manyi ne musenga wa manananshi tshintu etshi ntshintu tshia mulambu wa bukula. 
Leviticus2:16 Muakuidi neabuoshe bu tshivulukidi, tshituha tshia miehu nu tua ne tshia manyi ne musenga wonso wa manananshi tshintu etshi ntshintu tshia mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus3:1 Bikala mulambu wa mundi wa kumuvuisha nʼau ditalala, yeye neafile muana wa ngombe, nansha mulume nansha mukashi, udi kayi ne tshitema, ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus3:2 Yeye neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha muana wa ngombe wa mulambu wandi, neamushihe ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, ne bana balume ba Alona bakuidi nebamiamme mashi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus3:3 Yeye neoshe mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, dianyi didi dibuikila bintu bia munda ne dianyi dionso dia ha mutu ha bintu bia munda," 
Leviticus3:4 tumuma tubidi ne dianyi didi ha mutu hatu hehi ne bituntuku bia bibelu ne lukutu lua mutshima ne tumuma tubidi yeye neanumushe. 
Leviticus3:5 Bana balume ba Alona nebabioshile ha tshioshelu, ha nkunyi idi mu kahia tshintu etshi ntshintu tshia mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus3:6 Bikala mulambu wa mundi wa kumuvuisha nʼau ditalala wa munkatshi mua mikoko wa kudia kudi Yehowa, neafue mulume nansha mukashi udi kayi ne tshilema." 
Leviticus3:7 Biafileye muana wa mukoko bu mulambu wandi, nealue handi ku mesu kua Yehowa,"
