Leviticus3:8 neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha muana wa mukoko wa mulambu wandi, neamushihe ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, bana balume ba Alona nebamiamine mashi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus3:9 Yeye neoshe mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, yeye neumushe dianyi dionso ne dianyi dia mukila didi hehi ne muongo ne dianyi didi ha mutu ha bintu bia munda," 
Leviticus3:10 tumuma tubidi ne dianyi didi ha mutu hatu hehi ne bituntuku bia bibelu ne lukutu lua mutshima ne lua tumuma kabidi yeye neabiumushe. 
Leviticus3:11 Muakuidi neabioshe ha tshioshelu etshi ntshintu tshia kudia tshidibo bafila bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia. 
Leviticus3:12 Bikala mulambu wa mundi mbushi, nealue handi ku mesu kua Yehowa," 
Leviticus3:13 neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu handi, neamushihe ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, ne bana balume ba Alona nebamiamine mashi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus3:14 Neafue mulambu wandi bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, neumushe dianyi didi dibuikila bintu bia munda ne dianyi dionso didi ha mutu ha bintu bia munda," 
Leviticus3:15 tumuma tubidi ne dianyi didi ha mutu hatu hehi ne bituntuku bia bibelu ne lukutu lua mutshima ne lua tumuma kabidi neabiumushe. 
Leviticus3:16 Muakuidi neabioshe ha tshioshelu etshi ntshintu tshia kudia tshidibo bafila bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu, dianyi dionso ndia Yehowa." 
Leviticus3:17 Bualu ebu nebuikale bu mukenji wa tshiendelele mu nsubu yenu yonso mu bikondo bienu bionso kanudi nansha dianyi nansha mashi. 
Leviticus4:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus4:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Bienza muntu bualu bubi ku mpukahuka budi Yehowa uhidia," 
Leviticus4:3 bienza muakuidi muela manyi ha mutu bualu bubi budi buhisha bantu, yeye nealele mulambu wa muana wa ngombe udi kayi ne tshitema kudi Yehowa, bu mulambu wa kubuikidila nʼau bubi buandi." 
Leviticus4:4 Nealue ne muana wa ngombe ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena ku mesu kua Yehowa, neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha muana wa ngombe, neashihe muana wa ngombe ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus4:5 Muakuidi muela manyi ha mutu neangate mashi makuabo a muana wa ngombe, nealue nʼau mu ntenta wa kusangakena," 
Leviticus4:6 muakuidi neafue munu wandi mu mashi, neamiamine mashi misangu muanda mutekete ku mpala kua tshilulu tshikudika tshidi hankatshi ha nsubu wa tshitendelelu ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus4:7 Muakuidi nealabe mashi ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi tshidi mu ntenta wa kusangakena ku mesu kua Yehowa, neahongolole mashi onso a muana wa ngombe ku tshitaka tshia tshioshelu tshia kahia tshidi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus4:8 Yeye neamushe dianyi dionso dia muana wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne dianyi didi ha mutu ha bintu bia munda," 
Leviticus4:9 tumuma tubidi ne dianyi didi ha mutu hatu hehi ne bituntuku bia bibelu ne lukutu lua mutshima ne lua tumuma neanumushe," 
Leviticus4:10 bu mudibo bumusha dianyi dia muana wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kuikisha nʼau ditalala, muakuidi neabioshe ha tshioshelu tshia kahia." 
Leviticus4:11 Tshiseba tshia muana wa ngombe ne munyinyi wandi wonso ne mutu wandi ne bioku biandi ne bintu bia munda ne tuma tuandi 
Leviticus4:12 ne mubidi wandi mujima, neabituale ku butshika bua tshitudilu ku muaba muteke kudibo bela butue, neabioshe ha nkunyi ne kahia, yeye neabioshile kudibo bela butue." 
Leviticus4:13 Bienza Bena Isalele bonso bualu bubi, ne bikala bualu ebu busokome ku mesu kuabo, bienzabo bualu budi Yehowa uhidia ne biahilabo," 
Leviticus4:14 ne hamanyabo bualu bubi buakenzabo, bantu bonso ba mu tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele nebafile muana mulume wa ngombe bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, balue nʼandi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus4:15 Bakulu ba mu tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele nebatentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu ha muana mulume wa ngombe ku mesu kua Yehowa, nebashihe muana mulume wa ngombe ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus4:16 Muakuidi nealue ne mashi makuabo a muana mulume wa ngombe ku nsubu wa tshitendelelu," 
Leviticus4:17 muakuidi nealue munu wandi mu mashi, neamiamine misangu muanda mutekete ku mpala kua tshilulu tshikudika ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus4:18 Nealabe mashi ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu tshidi mu ntenta wa kusangakena ku mesu kua Yehowa, yeye neahongolole mashi onso ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu tshia kahia tshidi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus4:19 Neumushe dianyi dionso, neadioshe ha tshioshelu." 
Leviticus4:20 Yeye nênze nunku ne muana mulume wa ngombe, bu muakenzeye ne muana mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu, muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buabo nunku, ne bubi buabo nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus4:21 Yeye neatuale muana mulume wa ngombe ku butshika bua tshitudilu, neamuoshe ha kahia bu muakenzeye ne muana mulume wa ngombe wa kumudilu eu udi mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu bonso." 
Leviticus4:22 Bienza mukokeshi wa bantu bualu bubi ku mpukahuka budi Yehowa uhidia ne biahilabo," 
Leviticus4:23 ne hamanyeye bualu bubi buakenzeye, neafue mpumbu wa mbushi udi kayi ne tshilema bu mulambu wandi," 
Leviticus4:24 neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha mbushi, neamushihe kudibo bashihela mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ku mesu kua Yehowa, eu udi mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi." 
Leviticus4:25 Muakuidi nealue munu wandi mu mashi makuabo a mulambu, nealabe ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu tshia kahia, neahongolole mashi makuabo ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu tshia kahia." 
Leviticus4:26 Neoshe dianyi dionso ha tshioshelu, bu muakenzeye ne dianyi dia mulambu wa kuikisha nʼau ditalala, muakuidi neafue mulambu wa ku buikila nʼau bubi buandi ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus4:27 Bienza Muena Isalele bualu bubi ku mpukahuka budi Yehowa uhidia ne biahileye," 
Leviticus4:28 ne hamanyeye bualu bubi buakenzeye, yeye neafile mukashi wa mbushi udi kayi ne tshilema bu mulambu wa bubi buakenzeye." 
Leviticus4:29 Yeye neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha mbushi wa mulambu wandi, neamushihe kudibo bashihela mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia." 
Leviticus4:30 Muakuidi neafue munu wandi mu mashi makuabo, nealabe ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu tshia kahia, neahongolole mashi makuabo ku tshiaku tshia tshioshelu." 
Leviticus4:31 Neumushe dianyi dionso bu muakenzeye ne mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala, muakuidi neadioshe ha tshioshelu bu tshintu tshidi tshitue dihembu kudi Yehowa, muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi, ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus4:32 Bialueye ne muana wa mukoko bu mulambu wa kubindila nʼau bubi, nealue biandi ne mukashi wa mukoko udi kauyi ne tshilema." 
Leviticus4:33 Yeye neatenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha mukoko wa mulambu wandi, neanshihe kudibo bashihela mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia." 
Leviticus4:34 Muakuidi neafue munu wandi mu mashi makuabo, neâlabe ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu tshia kahia, neahongolole mashi onso makuabo ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu." 
Leviticus4:35 Neumushe dianyi dionso bu muakenzeye ne mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala, muakuidi neadioshe ha tshioshelu bu muakenzeye ne milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi, ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus5:1 Bienza muntu bualu bubi, yeye mumane kuditshiha ne muikale mumanyi wa bualu, mubumone ne mesu andi, mubumanye mu mutshima wandi kadi yeye muhidie kumanyisha bantu, yeye neadituadile dihila dia bubi buandi." 
Leviticus5:2 Bialenga muntu tshianza tshiandi ha tshintu tshibi, nansha mifuba ya nyama udi kayi muakane, nansha mifuba ya ngombe udi kayi muakane, nansha mifuba ya tshintu tshidi tshidikoka hanshi tshidi katshiyi tshiakane, ne bikala bualu ebu busokoka ku mesu kuandi, yeye udi muntu wa bukoya, neahile." 
Leviticus5:3 Anyi bialengeye tshianza ha manyanu a muntu ne bikala bualu ebu busokoka ku mesu kuandi, hamanyeye bualu ebu, yeye neahile." 
Leviticus5:4 Anyi biaditshiha muntu lubilu ne mishiku yandi bua kuenza bualu bubi anyi bualu buimpe, biaditshiha muntu lubilu nunku ne bikala bualu ebu busokoka ku mesu kuandi, hamanyeye bualu, yeye neahile." 
Leviticus5:5 Hahileye bua bualu bubi, yeye neatonde bualu bubi buakenzeye" 
Leviticus5:6 yeye neafile mulambu kudi Yehowa wa disambuka dia mikenji, nansha muana mukashi wa mukoko nansha muana mukashi wa mbushi, bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, ne muakuidi neafile mulambu bua kumubuikidila nʼau bubi buandi." 
Leviticus5:7 Bikaleye kayi ne mushinga wa muana wa mukoko, yeye neafile mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji kudi Yehowa, nansha nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi nansha mputu nyunyu ibidi, nyunyu umue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia." 
Leviticus5:8 Yeye nealue nʼai kudi muakuidi, neafile mulambu wa kubindila nʼau bubi diambedi, neanyengabashe nshingu wandi kadi kena umuhandulula nansha," 
Leviticus5:9 neamiamine mashi makuabo a mulambu wa kubuikala nʼau bubi ku luseke lua tshioshelu, ne mashi makuabo yeye neahongolole ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu, tshintu etshi mmulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi." 
Leviticus5:10 Neafile nyunyu muibidi bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, bu muakadi mikenji, muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kumubuikidila nʼau bubi buandi ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus5:11 Bikaleye kayi ne mushinga wa nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi anyi mputu nyunyu ibidi, yeye neafile tshituha tshia dikumi tshia épha wa bukula bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu, kedihu nansha manyi nansha musenga wa manananshi, eu mmulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu." 
Leviticus5:12 Yeye nealue nʼabu kudi muakuidi, ne muakuidi neabuambule dianza tente bu tshivulukidi, neabuoshe ha tshioshelu bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia eu udi mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu." 
Leviticus5:13 Muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kumubuikidila nʼau bubi buakenzeye, ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue, tshituha tshia bukula tshidi tshishale netshikale tshia muakuidi, bu mudibo benza ne mulambu wa bukula." 
Leviticus5:14 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus5:15 Biasambuka muntu ku mikenji bua kuenza bualu bubi ku mpukahuka mu malu a tshijila a Yehowa, yeye neafile mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji kudi Yehowa, tshimpanga tshidi katshiyi ne tshitema mushinga wa nshekele wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji." 
Leviticus5:16 Yeye neahingishe mushinga wa tshintu tshia tshijila ne tshituha tshitanu ha mutu, neabifile mu bianza bia muakuidi, ne muakuidi neafile tshimpanga bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus5:17 Bienza muntu bualu bubi budi Yehowa uhidia, kayi mumanye bualu, yeye neahile, neadituadile dihila dia bubi buandi." 
Leviticus5:18 Neafile tshimpanga tshidi katshiyi ne tshilema kudi muakuidi tshia mushinga ûdi witabusha bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, ne muakuidi neafile mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji buakenzeye ku mpukahuka, kayi mubumanye, ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus5:19 Eu udi mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, yeye udi ne dihila dilelela ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus6:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus6:2 Biasambuka muntu ku mikenji bua kuenzela Yehowa bualu bubi, ne bienzeleye muena mutumba nʼandi bualu bubi ne bintu biakafileye mu bianza biandi anyi hendululeye nʼabi mushinga anyi bibeye bintu biandi, anyi biakengesheye muena mutumba nʼandi," 
Leviticus6:3 anyi bianguleye tshintu tshiakajimishabo kudi mukuabo mumudinge bua bualu ebu ne muditshiheye ne mashimi, bienzeye malu mabi â onso," 
Leviticus6:4 bienzeye bibi, bikaleye muhile, yeye neahingishe bintu biakibeye anyi tshintu tshiakanyengeye ku bukole anyi bintu biakufileye mu bianza biandi anyi bintu biakadi bijimina biakuanguleye" 
Leviticus6:5 anyi tshintu tshiakaditshiheye nʼatshi ne mashimi, neahingishe tshintu atshi ne tshituha tshitanu ha mutu katshi, neatshihingishe kudi muenʼatshi mu dituku didibo bamuhisha." 
Leviticus6:6 Yeye neafile mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji kudi Yehowa, tshimpanga tshidi katshiyi ne tshialua tshia mushinga ûdi witabusha kudi muakuidi bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji," 
Leviticus6:7 muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kumubuikidila nʼau bubi kudi Yehowa ne bubi buakenzeye nebuikale bubuikidibue. 
Leviticus6:8 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus6:9 Elela Alona ne bana bandi balume mukenji ne, Eu udi mukenji wa mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, mulambu wa kuosha newikale ha nkunyi ha tshioshelu butuku buonso tô ne dinda, kahia nekikalehu butuku buonso, kakajimi nansha." 
Leviticus6:10 Muakuidi nealuate bilulu biandi bia lin ne mihanu ya lin, neangate butue bua kahia kakosha mulambu wa ha tshioshelu, neabuteke hehi ne tshioshelu." 
Leviticus6:11 Neavule bilulu ebi, nealuate bilulu bikuabo, neatuale butue ku butshika bua tshitudilu ku muaba mutoke." 
Leviticus6:12 Kahia ka ha tshioshelu kakajimi nansha, muakuidi neatekehu nkunyi dinda ne dinda, nealonge mulambu wa kuosha ha tshioshelu, neoshe dianyi dia mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala." 
Leviticus6:13 Kahia katemene ha tshioshelu ku dituku ne ku dituku, kakajimi nansha." 
Leviticus6:14 Eu udi mukenji wa mulambu wa bukula bana balume ba Alona nebaufile ku mesu kua Yehowa ku mpala kua tshioshelu. 
Leviticus6:15 Yeye neambule dianza dia bukula bubotesha tente budi busangisha ne manyi ne musenga wa manananshi, neabuoshe ha tshioshelu bu tshintu tshidi tshima dihembu, bu tshivulukidi kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus6:16 Tshituha tshidi tshishale netshikale kudi Alona ne bana bandi balume bu tshintu tshia kudia, bobo nebadie tshituha tshidi katshiyi ne luevene mu muaba wa tshijila, mu luhangu lua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus6:17 Kabalambi tshituha atshi ne luevene. Nakabaha tshituha tshia mulambu wanyi wa kuosha ha kahia, tshintu tshidi tshitambe tshijila bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu ne mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji." 
Leviticus6:18 Bana balume ba Alona bonso nebatshidie, bu tshituha tshiabo mu bikondo biabo bionso munkatshi mua mulambu ya kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, muntu yonso udi ulenga bintu ebi tshianza neikale muntu wa tshijila." 
Leviticus6:19 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus6:20 Eu udi mulambu wa Alona ne bana bandi balume udibo bafila kudi Yehowa mu dituku didibo bela manyi ha mutu tshia dikumi tshia épha wa bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula, neafile tshituha dinda ne tshituha tshikuabo dilolo." 
Leviticus6:21 Nebabusangishe ne manyi mu dilonga, ne hashikishabo kubulamba, nebafile bituha bidi bilamba kudi Yehowa bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu." 
Leviticus6:22 Muakuidi wa munkatshi mua bana balume ba Alona, udibo bela manyi ha mutu bua kuhianeye mudimu wandi, neaufile kudi Yehowa bu muakelabo mukenji tshiendelele, neboshe mulambu eu mujima." 
Leviticus6:23 Mulambu wonso udi muakuidi ufila nebawoshe ne kahia, kabadi mulambu eu." 
Leviticus6:24 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus6:25 Wambile Alona ne bana bandi balume ne, Eu udi mukenji wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu mu muaba udibo bashihela mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia nebashihe mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu ku mesu kua Yehowa, eu udi mulambu mutambe wa tshijila." 
Leviticus6:26 Muakuidi udi ufila mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, yeye neaudie, neaudie mu muaba wa tshijila mu luhangu lua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus6:27 Tshintu tshionso tshidi tshituangane ne munyinyi au netshikale tshia tshijila, hamiaminabo mashi a mulambu, biamatshilau ha tshmialu, wewe neutshisukule mu muaba wa tshijila." 
Leviticus6:28 Kadi tshivuadi tshia dima tshidibo baulambila nebatshishihe, biaulambilabo mu tshivuadi tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku, nebatshisukule bimpe ne mai." 
Leviticus6:29 Bana balume bonso ba bakuidi nebaudie, etshi ntshintu tshitambe tshijila." 
Leviticus6:30 Kabadi mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi udibo balue nʼau ne mashi mu ntenta wa kusangakena bua kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu mu muaba wa tshijila, nebawoshe ne kahia." 
Leviticus7:1 Eu udi mukenji wa mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, etshi ntshintu tshidi tshitambe tshijila." 
Leviticus7:2 Nebashihele mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji kudibo bashihela mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, muakuidi neamiamine mashi ku nseke yonso ya tshioshelu." 
Leviticus7:3 Neafile dianyi dionso ne mukala udi ne dianyi ne dianyi didi dibuikila bintu bia munda," 
Leviticus7:4 tumuma tubidi ne dianyi diatu didi hehi ne bituntuku bia bibelu ne lukutu lua mutshima ne lua tumuma yeye neanumushe," 
Leviticus7:5 neabioshe ha tshioshelu bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia eu udi mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji. 
Leviticus7:6 Bana balume bonso ba bakuidi nebaudie mu muaba wa tshijila, etshi ntshintu tshitambe tshijila." 
Leviticus7:7 Mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji udi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu, mukenji umue udi wisuika, muakindi udi ufila mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu neangate tshituha tshia munyinyi tshidi tshishale." 
Leviticus7:8 Muakuidi udi ufila mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia wa muntu mukuabo, yeye mene neangate tshiseba tshia mulambu wa kuosha udiye ufila." 
Leviticus7:9 Muakuidi udi ufila mulambu wa bukula budibo balamba mu nfulu ne mu tshivuadi ne mu dilonga, yeye mene neangate bintu ebi bionso." 
Leviticus7:10 Mulambu wonso wa bukula budi busangisha ne manyi, anyi mulambu wa bukula nkayabu, newikale wa bana balume ba Alona, muntu tshituha tshiandi muntu tshituha tshiandi." 
Leviticus7:11 Eu udi mukenji wa mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala udibo bafila kudi Yehowa. 
Leviticus7:12 Biafila muntu mulambu eu bua kubakidila Nzambi, yeye nealue kabidi ne mikata ya bukula budi kabuyi ne luevene busangisha ne manyi, ne mikata ya bukula budi kabuyi ne luevene miela manyi ha mutu, ne mikata ya bukula bubotesha budi busangisha ne manyi." 
Leviticus7:13 Yeye neafile mulambu wandi wa mikata ya bukula budi ne luevene ne mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala bua kusakidileye nʼai Nzambi. 
Leviticus7:14 Neafile tshituha tshia mulambu ne mulambu bu mulambu udibo bakuha ku mesu kua Yehowa, netshikale kudi muakuidi udi umiamine mashi a mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala." 
Leviticus7:15 Yeye neadie munyinyi wa mulambu wandi wa kubisha nʼau ditalala bua kusakidileye nʼau Nzambi mu dituku didiye ufila mulambu wandi, kashiyi nansha katuha kakese tô ne dinda." 
Leviticus7:16 Kadi bikala mulambu wandi wa kuditshiha nʼau anyi mulambu udiye ufila ku disua diandi, yeye neaudie mu dituku didiye ûfila ne tshituha tshidi tshishale yeye neatshidie makelela," 
Leviticus7:17 kadi bikala tshituha tshia munyinyi wa mulambu tshishale tô ne ku dituku disatu, nebatshioshe mu kahia." 
Leviticus7:18 Biadieye tshituha tshia munyinyi wa mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala tshidi tshishale tô ne ku dituku disatu, kabena bitabusha mulambu wandi, kabena baubala, netshikale bu tshintu tshibole, ne mundi udi udia munyinyi neadituadile bubi buandi." 
Leviticus7:19 Munyinyi udi utuanganaa ne tshintu tshibi, kabena mua kûdia, nebawoshe mu kahia. Muntu yonso udi mudijidile udi mua kudia munyinyi eu," 
Leviticus7:20 kadi mundi udi kayi mudijidile udi udia munyinyi wa mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala udibo bafila kudi Yehowa, nebumushe mundi eu munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus7:21 Bialenga mundi tshianza tshiandi ha tshintu tshidi ne bukoya, nansha bukoya bua mundi nansha bukoya bua nyama nansha tshintu tshikuabo tshidi ne bukoya, ne biadieye munyinyi wa mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala udibo bafila kudi Yehowa, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus7:22 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus7:23 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Kanudi dianyi dia ngombe anyi dia mukoko anyi dia mbushi." 
Leviticus7:24 Dianyi dia tshintu tshidifuile ne dianyi dia tshintu tshihandibue kudi nyama nudi mua kuenza nʼadi mudimu mukuabo, kadi kanudi dianyi adi." 
Leviticus7:25 Muntu yonso udi udia dianyi dia nyama udibo bafila bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus7:26 Kanudi mashi, nansha a nyunyu nansha a nyama mu nsubu yenu." 
Leviticus7:27 Muntu yonso udi udia mashi nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo. 
Leviticus7:28 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus7:29 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Muntu udi ufila mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala kudi Yehowa nealue ne tshituha tshia mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala," 
Leviticus7:30 yeye nealue ne mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia mu bianza biandi, nealue ne dianyi ne tshiadi, nebatshinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus7:31 Muakuidi neoshe dianyi ha tshioshelu, kadi tshiadi netshikale tshia Alona ne bana bandi balume." 
Leviticus7:32 Nenuhe muakuidi diboko dia balume dia nyama wa mulambu wa kuikisha nʼau ditalala udibo banyukula ku mesu kua Yehowa. 
Leviticus7:33 Muntu wa munkatshi mua bana balume ba Alona udi ufila mashi ne dianyi bia mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala neikale ne diboko dia balume bu tshintu tshiandi. 
Leviticus7:34 Bualu bua meme nakangata tshiadi tshidibo banyukula ne diboko didibo bakuha munkatshi mua milambu ya Bena Isalele, nakabifila kudi Alona muakuidi ne bana bandi balume bu bituha biabo tshiendelele." 
Leviticus7:35 Etshi ntshintu tshia tshijila tshia Alona ne tshia bana bandi balume munkatshi mua milambu ya Yehowa idibo bosha ha kahia mu dituku diakabasunguleye bua kuenzelabo Yehowa mudimu wa buakuidi," 
Leviticus7:36 Yehowa wakela mukenji wandi kudi Bena Isalele bua kubahabo tshintu etshi mu dituku diakabasunguleye. Etshi ntshintu tshiabo tshiendelele mu bikondo biabo bionso. 
Leviticus7:37 Eu udi mukenji wa mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ne wa mulambu wa bukula ne wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne wa mulambu wa kusambuka kua mikenji, ne wa tshijila tshia bakuidi, ne wa mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala," 
Leviticus7:38 wakambila Yehowa Mose mu mukuna wa Sinai mu dituku diakeleye mukenji wandi kudi Bena Isalele bua kufilabo milambu yabo kudi Yehowa mu tshihela tshia Sinai. 
Leviticus8:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus8:2 Angata Alona ne bana bandi balume badi nʼandi ne bilulu ne manyi adibo bela ha mutu ne mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne bimpanga bibidi ne tshisaka tshia mampa adi kâyi ne luevene," 
Leviticus8:3 ubikile bantu bonso ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena. 
Leviticus8:4 Mose Wakenza bu muakamuambila Yehowa; bantu bonso bakasangakena ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena. 
Leviticus8:5 Mose wakambila bantu ne, Ebu mbualu buakamba Yehowa bua tuetu tuenze." 
Leviticus8:6 Mose wakalua ne Alona ne bana bandi balume, wakabowesha ne mai." 
Leviticus8:7 Wakaluatshisha Alona kazaku, wakamuela mukaba, wakamuluatshisha tshikowelu ne efoda, wakamuela mukaba wa efoda, wakamusuika hamʼbidi handi." 
Leviticus8:8 Wakamuluatshisha tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi, wakateka Ulima ne Tumima mu tshilulu tshia ha tshiadi," 
Leviticus8:9 wakasa tshifulu ku mutu kuandi, wakasuika tshitotolo tshia tshiamu tshia or, tshintu tshia tshijila, ku mpala kua tshifulu, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus8:10 Mose wakangata manyi adibo bela ha mutu, wakantumina manyi ku nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne ku bintu bionso biakadimu, wakadidila." 
Leviticus8:11 Wakantumina manyi ku tshioshelu misangu muanda mutekete ne ku malonga atshi onso ne ku tshiowelu ne ku tshitaku tshiatshi bua kubijidila. 
Leviticus8:12 Wakela Alona manyi ha mutu handi, wakamujidila." 
Leviticus8:13 Mose wakalua ne bana balume ba Alona, wakabaluatshisha tuzaku, wakabasuika ne mikaba, wakabasa bifulu ku mitu yabo, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus8:14 Wakalua ne mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi; ne Alona ne bana bandi balume bakatentekasha bianza biabo ha mutu ha ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi. 
Leviticus8:15 Mose wakamushiha, wakangata mashi, wakitaba ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu ne munu wandi, wakajidila tshioshelu, wakela mashi ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu bua kutshijidila, bua kubuikila bubi bua bantu." 
Leviticus8:16 Wakangata dianyi dionso diakadi ha bintu bia munda ne lukutu lua mutshima ne tumuma tubidi ne dianyi diatu, Mose wakabisha ha tshioshelu." 
Leviticus8:17 Kadi ngombe ne tshiseba tshiandi ne munyinyi wandi ne tunvi tuandi yeye wakabioshila ku butshika bua tshitudilu, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus8:18 Wakalua ne tshimpanga tshia kuosha ha kahia, Alona ne bana bandi bakatentekasha bianza biabo ha mutu ha tshimpanga." 
Leviticus8:19 Mose wakatshishiha, wakantumina mashi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus8:20 Mose wakasaya tshimpanga, wakosha mutu ne bituha bia munyinyi ne dianyi." 
Leviticus8:21 Wakuvuwa bintu bia munda ne bioku ne mai, Mose wakosha tshimpanga tshijima ha tshioshelu, eu udi mulambu udi utua dihembu, mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus8:22 Wakalua ne tshimpanga tshikuabo, tshimpanga tshia kujidila kua bakuidi; Alona ne bana bandi balume bakatentekasha bianza biabo ha mutu ha tshimpanga." 
Leviticus8:23 Mose wakatshiawila, wakangata mashi atshi, wakâlaba ku lusongo lua ditshu dia ku tshianza tshia balume dia Alona ne ku tshiala tshia ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku munu munene wa dikasa diandi dia balume." 
Leviticus8:24 Bakalua ne bana balume ba Alona; Mose wakateka mashi ku nsongo ya matshu abo ya ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku biala biabo bia ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku bana banene babo ba ku makasa a balume, Mose wakantumina mashi ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus8:25 Wakangata dianyi ne mukala wakadi ne dianyi ne dianyi dionso dia ha mutu ha bintu bia munda ne lukutu lua mutshima ne tumuma tubidi ne dianyi diabi ne tshibelu tshia ku tshianza tshia balume," 
Leviticus8:26 wakangata mukala umue wakadi kauyi ne luevene ne mukata wakadi ne manyi mela ha mutu ne mukata mukuabo mu tshisaka tshiakadi ne mampa adi kâyi ne luevene ku mesu kua Yehowa, wakayiteka ha mutu ha dianyi ne ha tshibelu;" 
Leviticus8:27 wakateka bintu bionso mu bianza bia Alona ne mu bianza bia bana bandi balume, bakabinyukula bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus8:28 Mose wakangata bintu mu bianza biabo, wakabisha ha tshioshelu tshia mulambu wa kahia, ebi mbintu bia kujidila nʼabi bakuidi bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa eu udi mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus8:29 Mose wakangata tshiadi, wakatshinyukula ku mesu kua Yehowa: etshi ntshintu tshia Mose tshia ku tshimpanga tshia kujidila nʼatshi bakuidi, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus8:30 Mose wakangata manyi adibo bela ha mutu, ne mashi akadi ha tshioshelu wakabimiamina ha Alona ne ha bilulu biandi ne ha bana bandi balume ne ha bilulu biabo, wakajidila Alona ne bilulu biandi ne bana bandi balume ne bilulu bia bana bandi balume bakadi nʼandi." 
Leviticus8:31 Mose wakambila Alona ne bana bandi balume ne, Nulambe munyinyi mu mai a kahia ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, nûdie ne mampa adi mu tshisaka tshidi ne bintu bia tshijila bu munakamba ne, Alona ne bana bandi balume nebaudie." 
Leviticus8:32 Munyinyi udi mushale ne mampa adi mashale nubioshe mu kahia. 
Leviticus8:33 Kanuluhuki ku tshibi tshia ntenta wa kusangakena matuku muanda mutekete tô ne hanuashikisha matuku a kujidila kuenu, bualu bua Yehowa neanujidile matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus8:34 Tuakuenza lelu bu muakamba Yehowa bua kunubuikidila bubi. 
Leviticus8:35 Nenuikale ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena munya ne butuku tô matuku muanda mutekete, nutumikile dî dia Yehowa bua kanufu bienu, bualu bua Yehowa wakangambila nunku." 
Leviticus8:36 Alona ne bana bandi balume bakenza mei onso akamba Yehowa mukana mua Mose. 
Leviticus9:1 Hakahita matuku muanda mukulu, Mose wakabikila Alona ne bana bandi balume ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele," 
Leviticus9:2 wakambila Alona ne, Angata kana ka ngombe bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne tshimpanga, bidi kabiyi ne tshitema, bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, ubifile ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus9:3 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Nuangate mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, nusungulule kana ka ngombe ne kana ka mukoko bia tshidimu tshimue, bidi kabiyi ne tshitema, bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Leviticus9:4 angata kabidi mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala bua kubishiha ku mesu kua Yehowa ne mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne manyi, bualu bua Yehowa neamueneke kunudi lelu." 
Leviticus9:5 Bobo bakalua ne bintu biakamba Mose ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bantu bonso bakalua ha buihi, bakimana ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus9:6 Mose wakamba ne, Ebu mbualu buakamba Yehowa bua nuenu nuenze, ne butumbi bua Yehowa nebumueneke kunudi." 
Leviticus9:7 Mose wakambila Alona ne, Semena ha buihi ne tshioshelu, ufile mulambu webe wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mulambu webe wa kuosha ha kahia, udibuikidile bubi buebe ne bubi bua bantu, ufile mulambu wa bantu kabidi bua kubabuikidila nʼau bubi buabo bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Leviticus9:8 Nunku Alona wakalua ha buihi ne tshioshelu, wakashihela kana ka ngombe ka mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi." 
Leviticus9:9 Bana balume ba Alona bakamulesha mashi, yeye wakatua munu wandi mu mashi, wakâlaba ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu, wakalongolola mashi ku tshitaku tshia tshioshelu," 
Leviticus9:10 kadi yeye wakosha dianyi ne tumuma ne lukutu lua mutshima bia mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ha tshioshelu, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus9:11 Wakosha munyinyi ne tshiseba ku butshika bua tshitudilu. 
Leviticus9:12 Wakashiha mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, ne bana balume ba Alona bakamulesha mashi ne yeye wakâmiamina ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus9:13 Bakamulesha mulambu wa kuosha, tshituha ne tshituha ne mutu, yeye wakabisha ha tshioshelu." 
Leviticus9:14 Wakuvuwa bintu bia munda ne bioku, wakabisha ha tshioshelu ha mutu ha mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus9:15 Wakalua ne mulambu wa bantu, wakangata mbushi wa mulambu wa kubuikila bubi bua bantu, wakamushiha, wakamufila bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, bu muakenzeye mulambu wa diambedi." 
Leviticus9:16 Wakalua ne mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, waka ufila bu muakadi mukenji." 
Leviticus9:17 Wakalua ne mulambu wa bukula, wakabuambula dianza tente, wakabuosha ha tshioshelu hehi ne mulambu udibo bosha ne dinda." 
Leviticus9:18 Wakashiha mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga kabidi, bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala kudi bantu, bana balume ba Alona bakamulesha mashi akamiamineye ku tshioshelu," 
Leviticus9:19 ne dianyi dia mulume wa ngombe ne dia tshimpanga ne mukila udi ne dianyi ne dianyi didi ha mutu ha bintu bia munda ne tumuma ne lukutu lua mutshima," 
Leviticus9:20 bakateka dianyi ha biadi, ne yeye wakosha dianyi ha tshioshelu," 
Leviticus9:21 kadi Alona wakanyukula biadi ne tshibelu tshia ku tshianza tshia balume bu mulambu wa kunyukula ku mesu kua Yehowa, bu muakamba Mose." 
Leviticus9:22 Alona wakolola bianza biandi kudi bantu, wakabandisha disanka, yeye wakahueka kuakadiye ufila mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne wa kuosha ha kahia ne ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala." 
Leviticus9:23 Mose ne Alona bakabuela mu ntenta wa kusangakena, bakaluhuka, bakavudishila bantu disanka, butumbi bua Yehowa buakamueneka kudi bantu bonso." 
Leviticus9:24 Kahia bakahatuka kudi Yehowa, kakosha mulambu ne dianyi biakadi ha tshioshelu, hakakatangila bantu bonso, bakela mbila, bakatua mpala hanshi." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadaba ne Abihu, bana balume ba Alona, bakangata malonga a kahia, muntu dilonga diandi muntu dilonga diandi, bakatekamu kahia, bakelahu musenga wa manananshi, bakalua ne kahia kakadi kakayi tshijila ku mpala kua Yehowa, hakadiye kayi mubambile." 
Leviticus10:2 Kahia bakahatuka kudi Yehowa, kakabosha, bakafua ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus10:3 Nunku Mose wakambila Alona ne, Ebu mbualu bakamba Yehowa ne, Nenjidibue kudi bantu balualua ha buihi nʼanyi, nentumbishibue ku mesu kua bantu bonso Alona wakahuwa talalâ." 
Leviticus10:4 Mose wakabikila Mishaele ne Elesafana, bana balume ba Uziele, tatu mukuabo wa Alona, wakabambila ne, Luai ha buihi, numushe bana benu ku mpala kua muaba wa tshijila, yai nʼabo ku nyima kua tshitudilu." 
Leviticus10:5 Nunku bakalua ha buihi, bakabatuala mu bikowelu biabo ku nyima kua tshitudilu, bu muakamba Mose." 
Leviticus10:6 Mose wakambila Alona ne Eleazâ ne Itama ne, Kanutudi bifulu ku mitu yenu, kanuhandi bilulu bienu, bua kanufu bienu, ne bua tshiji tshia Yehowa katshilu kudi bantu bonso, kadi bana benu, tshisamba tshionso tshia Bena Isalele, badile bualu bua kahia kakatemesha Yehowa." 
Leviticus10:7 Nuenu kanumuki ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena bua kanufu nansha, bualu bua manyi akela Yehowa adi hamʼbidi henu Bakenza bu muakamba Mose." 
Leviticus10:8 Yehowa wakambila Alona ne," 
Leviticus10:9 Wewe ne bana bebe balume, kanunu nvinyo ne bintu bikole bia kunua hanuahuola mu ntenta wa kusambakena bua kanufu bienu. Mukenji eu newikale kunudi bikondo bienu bionso tshiendelele." 
Leviticus10:10 Nuenu nenujingulule bidi tshijila ne bidi kabiyi tshijila, ne bidi binyanguke ne bidi biakane." 
Leviticus10:11 Nuenu nuyishe Bena Isalele mikenji yonso yakabamanyisha Yehowa mukana mua Mose. 
Leviticus10:12 Mose wakambila Alona ne Eleaza ne Itama, bana bandi balume bakadi bashala, ne, Nuangate mulambu wa bukula udi ushala munkatshi mua milambu idibo boshila Yehowa ha kahia, nûdie ne bintu bidi kabiyi ne luevene hehi ne tshioshelu, bualu bua tshintu etshi ntshintu tshia tshijila," 
Leviticus10:13 nenudie mu muaba wa tshijila, bualu bua etshi ntshintu tshiebe ne tshia bana bebe balume munkatshi mua milambu idibo boshila Yehowa ha kahia, bualu bua Yehowa wakangambila nunku." 
Leviticus10:14 Kadi wewe ne bana bebe balume ne bana bebe bakashi nenudie tshiadi tshia kunyukulabo ne tshibelu tshia kukuhabo ebi mbintu biebe ne bia bana bebe balume munkatshi mua milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala ya Bena Isalele. 
Leviticus10:15 Nebalue ne tshibelu tshidibo bakuha ne tshiadi tshidibo banyukula hohamue ne dianyi dia milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ku mesu kua Yehowa etshi ntshintu tshiebe ne tshia bana bebe balume tshiendelele, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Leviticus10:16 Mose wakakebakeba mbushi wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, ne monai, bakamana kuwosha! Yeye wakadi ne Eleazâ ne Itamâ, bana balume ba Alona bakadi bashala, tshiji, wakamba ne," 
Leviticus10:17 Bualu kai nuenu kanuena banze kudia mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ntshintu tshia tshijila, tshiakanuha Yehowa bua kumusha nʼatshi bubi bua bantu ne bua kubabuikidila nʼatshi bubi buabo ku mesu kua Yehowa?" 
Leviticus10:18 Tangilai, kabena balue ne mashi a mulambu mu nsubu munda mua tshitendelelu; nuakadi kûdia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bu munakamba." 
Leviticus10:19 Alona wakambila Mose ne, Tangila, bakulua lelu ne mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buabo, ne mulambu wabo wa kuosha ha kahia ku mesu kua Yehowa, malu au onso akunkuata! Bu meme muebe mulambu wa kubuikila nʼqu bubi bua bantu lelu, bualu ebu buakadi kuikala buimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, anyi?" 
Leviticus10:20 Hakunvua Mose mei au, bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kuandi." 
Leviticus11:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Leviticus11:2 Nuambile Bena Isalele ne, Ebi mbintu bidi ne muoyo binudi mua kudia munkatshi mua nyama yonso idi ha buloba." 
Leviticus11:3 Nyama yonso idi ne mikono mihanduluke ne idi ihingishilula bintu mukana ibidia kabidi, nudi mua kudia nyama ei." 
Leviticus11:4 Kadi kanudi nyama mikuabo idi ihingishilula bintu mukana, anyi idi ne mikono mihanduluke kamelo, bualu bua kadi kahingishilula bintu mukana, kabidia, kadi kakena ne mikono mihanduluke, kakena kakane kunudi." 
Leviticus11:5 Kabundi ka mputu kakena kakane kunudi, bualu bua kadi kahingishilula bintu mukana, kadi kakena ne mikono mihanduluke." 
Leviticus11:6 Nsenji kena muakane kunudi bualu bua udi uhingishilula bintu mukana, kadi kena ne mikono mihanduluke." 
Leviticus11:7 Ngulube kena muakane kunudi, bualu bua udi ne mikono mihanduluke, kadi kena uhingishilula bintu mukana." 
Leviticus11:8 Kanudi munyinyi wa nyama ei, kanulengi tshianza hamʼbidi hai, kayena miakane kunudi." 
Leviticus11:9 Nudi mua kudia bintu ebi bia mu mai bintu bidi ne mialala ne mabamba bidi mu mai manene ne mu misulu. 
Leviticus11:10 Kadi bintu bionso bia mu mai budi kabiyi ne mialala ne mabamba, bidi mu mai manene anyi mu misulu, bidi bibi kunudi," 
Leviticus11:11 nebikale bibi kunudi, kanudi munyinyi wa bintu ebi, ne mibidi mifue yabi neyikale bu bintu bibi kunudi." 
Leviticus11:12 Bintu bionso bia mu mai bidi kabiyi ne mialala ne mabamba nebikale bintu bibi kunudi. 
Leviticus11:13 Nyunyu ei idi mibi kunudi, kanudi nyunyu ei nyunyu wa mukanku ne nyunyu wa gypaête ne nyunyu wa orfraie," 
Leviticus11:14 ne nyunyu wa milan mufike ne wa milan mukunze 
Leviticus11:15 ne mushindu wonso wa tshikololo 
Leviticus11:16 ne nyunyu wa autriche ne nyunyu wa chat-huant ne nyunyu wa mouette ne wa nkumbikumbi 
Leviticus11:17 ne nyunyu wa tshihungulu ne nyunyu wa choutte ne nyunyu wa ibis," 
Leviticus11:18 ne nyunyu wa pélican ne nyunyu mutoke utu wadia bintu bibole ne nyunyu wa cormoran 
Leviticus11:19 ne nyunyu wa cigogne ne nyunyu wa ya héron ne nyunyu wa huppe ne nyunyu wa mudima. 
Leviticus11:20 Bintu bionso bidi ne mahuahua bidi bienda ne mikolo mai bidi bibi kunudi. 
Leviticus11:21 Kadi nudi mua kudia bintu bionso bidi ne mahuahua bidi bienda ne mikolo mai bituhike ha buloba," 
Leviticus11:22 nudi mua kudia mikumbi ne nsua ne bintunte ne mintuntu. 
Leviticus11:23 Kadi bintu bikuabo bidi ne mahuahua ne bidi ne mikolo mai bidi bibi kunudi. 
Leviticus11:24 Muntu yonso udi ulenga tshianza hamʼbidi ha bintu ebi neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo; 
Leviticus11:25 muntu yonso udi utuala tshituha tshia mubidi mufue wa bintu ebi, neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus11:26 Nyama yonso idi ne mikono mihanduluke ne idi kayiyi mihingishilula bintu mukana udi mubi kunudi, muntu yonso udi ulenga tshianza hamʼbidi hai neikale ne bukoya." 
Leviticus11:27 Nyama yonso udi wenda ne makama udi mubi kunudi, muntu yonso udi ulenga tshianza hamʼbidi hai neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus11:28 Muntu yonso udi utuala mubidi mufue wa nyama ei, neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neikale ne bu koya tô ne dilolo, nyama ei idi mibi kunudi." 
Leviticus11:29 Bintu ebi bidi bibi munkatshi mua bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ha buloba bibulebule ne mpuka ne dibemba 
Leviticus11:30 ne musodi ne tshiula ne lungonyonyi. 
Leviticus11:31 Bintu ebi bidi bibi kunudi munkatshi mua bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi, muntu yonso udi ubilenga tshianza hadibi bifue yeye neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo" 
Leviticus11:32 Bikala bintu ebi bifue ne biahonabi ha tshintu, tshintu atshi netshikale ne bukoya, nansha dilonga nansha bilulu nansha biseba nansha tshibombi nansha tshintu tshikuabo tshidibo benza nʼatshi mudimu, nebatshiteke mu mai, netshikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo, nunku netshikale tshitoke tô." 
Leviticus11:33 Biahona bintu ebi mu tshivuadi tshia dima, netshikale ne bukoya, nebatshishihe." 
Leviticus11:34 Bintu bionso bia kudia bidi bituangana ne mai akadi mu bintu ebi nebikale ne bukoya, ne mai a kunua onso akadi mu bintu ebi neikale ne bukoya." 
Leviticus11:35 Biahona tshituha tshia mibidi mufue ya bintu ebi ha tshintu, tshintu atshi netshikale ne bukoya, nansha nfulu nansha bivuadi, nebanshihe, bidi ne bukoya, nebikale bibi kunudi." 
Leviticus11:36 Kadi mpokolo wa mai anyi dina dia mai diakumbulabo didi ne mai a bungi, mai au neikale malengele, kudi bintu bionso bidi bituangana ne mibidi yabi mufue nebikale ne bukoya." 
Leviticus11:37 Biahona tshituha tshia mubidi yabi mufue ha bintu bidibo bakuna mu buloba, bintu ebi nebikale bilengele." 
Leviticus11:38 Bielabo mai ha bintu ebi bia kukuna ne biahona tshituha tshia mubidi yabi mufue ha mutu habi, bintu ebi nebikale ne bukoya kunudi." 
Leviticus11:39 Biafua nyama wa munkatshi mua nyama mudi mua kudia, mundi yonso udi ulenga tshianza tshiandi hamʼbidi handi neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus11:40 Muntu udi udia munyinyi wandi neuvuwe bilulu, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo, ne mundi udi utuala mubidi wandi mufue neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus11:41 Bintu bionso bidi bidikoka hanshi ha buloba bidi bibi, kanudi bintu ebi." 
Leviticus11:42 Bintu bionso bidi bidikoka hanshi ne mafu, anyi bintu bidi bienda ne mikolo mai, kanudi bintu ebi bionso bidi bidikoka hanshi ha buloba, bualu bua bintu ebi bidi bibi." 
Leviticus11:43 Kanudionyi ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ha buloba, kanudienzedi bibi ne bintu bidi ne bukoya, kanudinyangi ne bintu ebi." 
Leviticus11:44 Bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; nunku nudilengeshe, nuikale bantu ba tshijila bualu bua meme ndi wa tshijila, kanudinyangi ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ha buloba" 
Leviticus11:45 Bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu bua kuikala Nzambi wenu; nuenu nuikale bantu ba tshijila bualu bua meme ndi wa tshijila. 
Leviticus11:46 Eu udi mukenji wa nyama ne wa nyunyu ne wa bintu bidi bienda mu mai ne bintu bionso bidi bidikoka hanshi ha buloba," 
Leviticus11:47 bua kutahulula bintu bibi ne bintu bimpe, ne bintu bidi ne muoyo binudi mua kudia ne bintu bidi ne muoyo binudi kanuyi mua kudia." 
Leviticus12:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus12:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Bimita mukashi difu, bialeleye muana wa balume, yeye neikale mundi udi kayi muakane tô matuku muanda mutekete, bu muakadiye mu matuku a tshijila a disama dia lulelu luandi, yeye neikale bu mundi udi kayi muakane." 
Leviticus12:3 Halua dituku dia muanda mukulu, nebatengule muana wa balume." 
Leviticus12:4 Yeye neikale ne mashi a kudilengesha kuandi tô matuku makumi asatu ne asatu, kalengi tshianza tshiandi ha tshintu tshia tshijila, kabuedi mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu tô ne hashikisheye matuku a kudilengesha kuandi." 
Leviticus12:5 Kadi bialeleye muana wa bakashi, yeye neikale mundi udi kayi muakane tô mbingu ibidi, bu matuku a tshijila tshiandi, neikale ne mashi a kudilengesha kuandi tô matuku makumi asambombo ne asambombo." 
Leviticus12:6 Hashika matuku a kudilengesha kuandi, nansha matuku a muana wa balume nansha a muana wa bakashi, yeye nealue ne muana wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, ne mputu nyunyu anyi nyunyu wa nkutshi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, kudi muakuidi," 
Leviticus12:7 ne yeye neayifile ku mpala kua Yehowa, bua kumubuikidila nʼau bubi; yeye neikale mulengeshibue kudi mashi andi. Eu udi mukenji wa mukashi udi ulela nansha muana wa balume nansha muana wa bakashi." 
Leviticus12:8 Bikaleye kayi ne mushinga wa muana wa mukoko, alue biandi ne nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi anyi mputu nyunyu ibidi, umue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, muakuidi munene neayifile bua kumubuikidila nʼau bubi, ne yeye neikale mulengeshibue." 
Leviticus13:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Leviticus13:2 Bikala muntu ne tshiuja tshikese mu dikoba diandi anyi tshilamulamu anyi ditoba ditoke tô, bikala bintu ebi bu disama dia nsudi, nebalue nʼandi kudi Alona muakuidi anyi kudi umue wa bana bandi balume bakuidi." 
Leviticus13:3 Muakuidi neatangile ha disama didi mu dikoba diandi, bikala miosa ya mu muaba wa disama miandamuke mitoke tô, ne bikala disama dimane kubuela mu munyinyi wandi mene mene, edi ndisama dia nsudi, muakuidi neamutangile, neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane." 
Leviticus13:4 Biamueneka ditoba ditoke tô mu dikoba diandi, ne bikaladi kadiyi dibuela mu munyinyi wandi mene, ne bikala miosa kayiyi mianze kuandamuka mitoke tô, nunku muakuidi neabueshe muntu udi ne disama ha nkayandi mu nsubu tô matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:5 Halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, muakuidi neamutangile kabidi, bielanganeye meji ne disama didi diamba kushika, kadiena ditampakana, nunku muakuidi neamubueshe mu nsubu ha nkayandi matuku muanda mutekete makuabo." 
Leviticus13:6 Halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, muakuidi neamutangile kabidi, ne biamba disama kushika, bikaladi kadiyi ditampakana mu dikoba diandi, nunku muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu udi muakane, disama edi didi bu tshilamulamu, muntu eu neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neikale mua kane." 
Leviticus13:7 Kadi bikala tshilamulamu tshitampakane mu dikoba, hakashikisheye kudilesha kudi muakuidi bualu bua kudilengesha, nunku yeye neadileshe kudi muakuidi kabidi," 
Leviticus13:8 muakuidi neatangile ne bikala tshilamulamu tshitampakane mu dikoba, nunku muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane disama edi didi dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:9 Bikala muntu ne disama dia nsudi, nebalue nʼandi kudi muakuidi," 
Leviticus13:10 muakuidi neatangile, ne bikala tshima tshitoke tô mu dikoba, ne bikala miosa miandamuke mitoke tô, ne bikala munyinyi mubishe mu tshima," 
Leviticus13:11 edi didi disama dia nsudi diakadi kudiye diambedi mu dikoba diandi, ne muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane, yeye kena umubuesha mu nsubu, bualu bua yeye kena muakane." 
Leviticus13:12 Kadi bikala disama dia nsudi ditampakane mu dikoba ne biabuikiladi dikoba dionso dia muena nsudi, ku mutu tô ne ku makasa andi, ku miaba yonso idi muakuidi utangila," 
Leviticus13:13 nunku muakuidi neatangile ne bikala disama dia nsudi dimane kubuikila dikoba diandi dionso, yeye neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu wakadi ne nsudi udi muakane, wakandamuka muteke tô, yeye udi muakane." 
Leviticus13:14 Kadi biamueneka munyinyi wa mubidi mubishe, yeye kena muakane." 
Leviticus13:15 Muakuidi neatangile ha munyinyi wa mubidi mubishe, neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane, munyinyi eu mubishe kawena muakane edi ndisama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:16 Anyi bikala munyinyi eu mubishe muandamuke muteke tô kabidi nunku yeye nealue kudi muakuidi," 
Leviticus13:17 muakuidi neamutangile, ne biandamukeye mutoke tô, nunku muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu wakadi ne nsudi udi muakane, ne yeye neikale muakane." 
Leviticus13:18 Bikala muntu ne tshima mu dikoba, ne bikala tshima tshiondahibue," 
Leviticus13:19 ne bikala muaba watshi mutoke tô, anyi ditoba ditoke, nunku yeye neadileshe kudi muakuidi," 
Leviticus13:20 muakuidi neatangile, ne bielanganeye meji ne disama diakabuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, ne miosa idi miandamuke mitoke tô, nunku muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane edi ndisama dia nsudi diakamueneka mu tshima." 
Leviticus13:21 Kadi biatangila muakuidi ne miosa mitoke tô kayenaku, ne disama kadiena dibuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, nunku muakuidi neamubueshe ha nkayandi mu nsubu matuku muanda mutekete," 
Leviticus13:22 bikala disama ditampakane mu dikoba, nunku muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane edi ndisama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:23 Kadi bikala ditoba ditoke tô dishale mu muaba wadi, kadiyi ditampakane, etshi ntshibangu tshia tshima, ne muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu udi muakane." 
Leviticus13:24 Bikala muntu mudioshe ne kahia, ne bikala munyinyi wa mu muaba muandamuke mutoke anyi mukunze," 
Leviticus13:25 muakuidi neatangile ha muaba au, ne bikala miosa ya mu muaba au miandamuke mitoke tô, ne bikala disama dimane kubuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, edi ndisama dia nsudi diakumueneka mu muaba wakadiosheye muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane edi ndisama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:26 Biatangila muakuidi ne miosa mitoke tô kayena mu muaba au mutoke, ne disama kadiena dibuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, muakuidi neamubueshe ha nkayandi mu nsubu matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:27 Halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, muakuidi neamutangile ne bikala disama ditampakane mu dikoba muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane edi ndisama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:28 Bishala ditoba ditoke mu muaba umue, kadiyi ditampakane mu dikoba, etshi ntshiuja tshiakadiosheye ne kahia, ne muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu udi muakane, etshi ntshibangu tshia kahia." 
Leviticus13:29 Bikala mulume anyi mukashi ne mputa ku mutu anyi ku muedi," 
Leviticus13:30 muakuidi neatangile ha muaba au, bielanganeye meji ne mputa udi ubuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, ne nsuki yakuandamuka mitoke tô, muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane edi ndisama dia nsudi didi ku mutu anyi ku muedi." 
Leviticus13:31 Biatangila muakuidi ha mputa ne bielanganeye meji ne disama kadiena dibuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, ne nsuki mifike kayenaku, muakuidi neamubueshe ha nkayandi mu nsubu matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:32 Halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, muakuidi neatangile mu mputa, ne bikala mputa kayi mutampakane, ne nsuki mitoke kabayiku, bielanganeye meji ne mputa kena ubuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi," 
Leviticus13:33 nebamubeye, kadi nebashiye muaba wa mputa, ne muakuidi neamubueshe mu nsubu matuku muanda mutekete makuabo." 
Leviticus13:34 Halua dituku dia muanda mute kete, muakuidi neatangile mu mputa, ne bikala mputa kayi mutampakane mu dikoba, ne kayi ubuela mu munyinyi wa mubidi, muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu udi muakane, yeye neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neikale muakane." 
Leviticus13:35 Kadi bikala mputa mutampakane hakashikisheye kudilengesha," 
Leviticus13:36 muakuidi neamutangile, ne bikala mputa mutampakane mu dikoba, muakuidi kena ne bua kukeba nsuki mitoke tô, muntu eu kena muakane." 
Leviticus13:37 Kadi bielanganeye meji ne mputa wakuamba kushika, ne nsuki mifike yakamueneka mu muaba eu, mputa wakuondahibua, ne muntu eu udi muakane, muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu udi muakane." 
Leviticus13:38 Bikala mulume anyi mukashi ne matoba matoke mu dikoba," 
Leviticus13:39 muakuidi neamutangile, ne bi kala matoba au kâyi matambe kutoka tô, ei idi bu mpusu yakumueneka mu dikoba, muntu eu udi muakane." 
Leviticus13:40 Bikala nsuki ya muntu mituke, ne bikaleye muena dibala, yeye udi muakane." 
Leviticus13:41 Bikala nsuki ya muntu ya ku mpala nubike, ne bikala mpala wandi ne dibala, yeye udi muakane." 
Leviticus13:42 Kadi biamueneka mputa mutoke tô ku mutu kua muena dibala, anyi ha mpala hadi dibala, edi ndisama dia nsudi diakumueneka ku mutu kua muena dibala anyi ha mpala hadi dibala." 
Leviticus13:43 Muakuidi neamutangile, ne bikala tshiuja etshi tshitoke tô ku mutu kua muena dibala, anyi ha mpala hadi dibala, bu nsudi udi umueneka mu dikoba diandi," 
Leviticus13:44 yeye udi muena nsudi, kena muakane, muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu kena muakane, udi ne disama dia nsudi ku mutu kuandi." 
Leviticus13:45 Muena nsudi eu neahande bilulu biandi, neashiye nsuki ya ku mutu kuandi tshianana, neabuikile mushiku wandi wa ha mutu, nêle mbila ne, Tshiena muakane, tshiena muakane." 
Leviticus13:46 Neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô matuku onso a disama diandi, yeye kena muakane, neashikame ha nkayandi ku butshika bua tshitudilu." 
Leviticus13:47 Bilulu biakadiye nʼabi, nansha tshilulu tshiakenzabo ne miosa ya mikoko nansha tshilulu tshia lin," 
Leviticus13:48 nansha mu milongo ya buludi nansha mu milongo ya butshiama ya miosa ya mikoko anyi ya lin, nansha mu tshiseba anyi mu tshintu tshiakenzabo ne tshiseba," 
Leviticus13:49 bikala bintu bifike anyi bikunze mu tshilulu anyi mu tshiseba anyi mu milongo ya buludi anyi mu milongo ya butshiama anyi mu tshintu tshiakenzabo ne tshiseba, edi ndisama dia nsudi, nebaleshe disama edi kudi muakuidi." 
Leviticus13:50 Muakuidi neatangile ha disama, neateke tshintu tshidi ne disama edi ha buatshi tô matuku muanda mutekete," 
Leviticus13:51 halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, yeye neatangile ha disama, bikala disama ditampakane mu tshilulu, nansha mu milongo ya buludi nansha mu milongo ya butshiama, nansha mu tshiseba tshidibo benza nʼatshi mudimu edi ndisama dia nsudi; tshintu etshi katshiena tshiakane." 
Leviticus13:52 Yeye neoshe tshilulu mu kahia, bikala disama mu milongo ya buludi anyi mu milongo ya butshiama ya bintu biakenzabo ne miosa ya mikoko anyi bia lin anyi tshintu tshia tshiseba, edi ndisama dia nsudi, neboshe tshintu atshi mu kahia." 
Leviticus13:53 Biatangila muakuidi ne disama kadiena ditampakane mu tshilulu, nansha mu milongo ya buludi nansha mu milongo ya butshiama nansha mu tshintu tshia tshiseba," 
Leviticus13:54 muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Nuvuwe tshintu tshidi ne disama, ne yeye neatshiteke ha buatshi matuku muanda mutekete makuabo." 
Leviticus13:55 Hashikishabo kuvuwa tshintu atshi, muakuidi neatangile ne ditoba dia disama kadiyi diandamuke mekala, nansha bikaladi kadiyi ditampakane, tshintu atshi katshiena tshiakane, nebatshioshe mu kahia edi ndisama dia nsudi, bikala disama ku mutu kua muena dibala anyi ku mpala hadi dibala." 
Leviticus13:56 Biatangila muakuidi ne disama diakuamba kushika hashikishabo kuvuwa tshintu atshi, yeye neahande tshituha tshia tshilulu anyi tshia tshiseba anyi tshia milongo ya buludi anyi tshia milongo ya butshiama tshidi ne disama." 
Leviticus13:57 Bikala disama dishale mu tshilulu nansha mu milongo ya buludi nansha mu milongo ya butshiama anyi mu tshintu tshia tshiseba, disama edi didi ditampakana, neboshe tshintu atshi mu kahia." 
Leviticus13:58 Biuvuwabo tshilulu nansha milongo ya buludi nansha milongo ya butshiama anyi tshintu tshia tshiseba, ne biajimina disama, nebatshiuvuwe musangu muibidi ne tshintu etshi netshikale tshiakane." 
Leviticus13:59 Eu udi mukenji wa disama dia nsudi didi mu tshilulu tshiakenzabo ne miosa ya mikoko anyi ne bintu bia lin, nansha mu milongo ya buludi nansha mu milongo ya butshiama anyi tshintu tshia tshiseba, bua kutahulula tshintu tshidi tshiakane ne tshintu tshidi ka tshiyi tshiakane." 
Leviticus14:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus14:2 Eu udi mukenji wa muena nsudi mu dituku didibo bamulengesha, nebalue handi kudi muakuidi," 
Leviticus14:3 ne muakuidi neaye biandi ku butshika bua tshitudilu, ne muakuidi neatangile, ne bikala disama dia muena nsudi dishike," 
Leviticus14:4 neambile bantu bua bamuangatshile nyunyu ibidi idi miakane ne mitshi ya cèdre ne bintu bikunze-kunzû, ne mabeshi a hisopa;" 
Leviticus14:5 muakuidi neambile bantu bua bashihele nyunyu umue mu tshivuadi tshia dima ha mutu ha mai adi ahueka. 
Leviticus14:6 Yeye neangate nyunyu utshidi ne muoyo ne mitshi ya cèdre ne bintu bikunze-kunzû ne mabeshi a hisopa, nealue bintu ebi ne nyunyu utshidi ne muoyo mu mashi a nyunyu wakashihabo ha mutu ha mai adi ahueka," 
Leviticus14:7 yeye neamiamine mashi hamʼbidi ha muena nsudi udiye musue kulengesha misangu muanda mutekete, neambile bantu ne, Muntu eu udi muakane, nealekele nyunyu utshidi ne muoyo mu tshisuku." 
Leviticus14:8 Muntu udi musue kudilengesha neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neabeye nsuki yandi yonso, neadioweshe ne mai, yeye neikale muakane; ku nyima nealue biandi mu tshitudilu, kadi neashikame ku mbelu kua ntenta wandi matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus14:9 Halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, yeye neabeye nsuki yandi yonso idi ku mutu wandi ne muedi wandi ne makiki andi ne miosa yandi yonso, neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neoweshe mubidi wandi ne mai, neikale muakane." 
Leviticus14:10 Halua dituku dia muanda mutekete, yeye neangate bana balume ba mikoko babidi badi kabayi ne tshilema ne muana mukashi wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue udi kayi ne tshilema ne bituha bisatu bia dikumi bia épha bia bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne manyi ne dikoho dia manyi." 
Leviticus14:11 Muakuidi udi ulengesha muntu neashikike muntu udiye musue kulengesha ne bintu ebi ku mpala kua Yehowa ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena. 
Leviticus14:12 Muakuidi neangate umue wa bana balume ba mikoko, neamufile bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, ne dikoho dia manyi, neabinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mpala kua Yehowa;" 
Leviticus14:13 yeye neashihe muana mulume wa mukoko kudibo bashihela milambu ya kubindila nʼai bubi ne mulambu ya kuosha ha kahia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, mulambu wa disatu buka dia mikenji udi mulambu wa muakuidi bu mudi mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu, etshi ntshintu tshia tshijila." 
Leviticus14:14 Muakuidi neangate mashi a mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, nealabe mashi ku lusongo lua ditshu dia ku tshianza tshia balume dia muntu udiye musue kulengesha, ne ku tshiala tshia ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume, ne ku muanʼa dikasa munene wa ku tshianza tshia balume." 
Leviticus14:15 Muakuidi neangate dikoho dia manyi, nele munda mua tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi," 
Leviticus14:16 neafue munu wandi wa ku tshianza tshia balume mu manyi adi mu tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi, neamiamine manyi ne munu wandi misangu muanda mutekete ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus14:17 Muakuidi nealabe manyi adi ashala mu tshianza tshiandi ku lusongo lua ditshu dia ku tshianza tshia balume dia muntu udiye musue kulengesha ne ku tshiala tshiandi tshia ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku muanʼa dikasa munene wa ku tshianza tshia balume ha mutu ha mashi a mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji," 
Leviticus14:18 manyi adi ashala mu tshianza tshia muakuidi, nêle ha mutu ha muntu udiye musue kulengesha, muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus14:19 Muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, neabuikile bubi bua muntu udiye musue kulengesha ku bubi buandi ku nyima yeye neashihe mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Leviticus14:20 muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ne mulambu wa bukula ha tshioshelu, muakuidi neamubuikidile bubi buandi, ne yeye neikale muakane." 
Leviticus14:21 Bikaleye muntu muhele udi kayi mua kusangisha bintu ebi bionso, neangate muana mulume wa mukoko umue bu mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji bua kunyukula kudi Yehowa bua kumubuikidila nʼau bubi buandi, ne tshituha tshimue tshia dikumi tshia épha tshia bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi ne dikoho dia manyi" 
Leviticus14:22 ne nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi anyi mputu nyunyu ibidi, bu bintu bidiye mua kuangata, nyunyu umue neikale bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia." 
Leviticus14:23 Halua dituku dia muanda mukulu, nealue ne bintu bia kudilengesha nʼabi kudi muakuidi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena ku mpala kua Yehowa," 
Leviticus14:24 muakuidi neangate muana wa mukoko wa mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji ne dikoho dia manyi, ne muakuidi neabinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus14:25 Yeye neashihe muana wa mukoko wa mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, ne muakuidi neangate mashi makuabo a mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji, nealabe ku lusongo lua ditshu dia ku tshianza tshia balume dia muntu udiye musue kulengesha ne ku tshiala tshia ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku muanʼa dikasa munene wa ku tshianza tshia balume." 
Leviticus14:26 Muakuidi nêle manyi munda mua tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi," 
Leviticus14:27 muakuidi neamiamine ne munu wandi wa ku tshianza tshia balume manyi adi mu tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi misangu muanda mutekete ku mpala kua Yehowa," 
Leviticus14:28 muakuidi nealabe manyi adi mu tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi ku lusongo lua ditshu dia ku tshianza tshia balume dia muntu udiye musue kulengesha ne ku tshiala tshiandi tshia ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku muanʼa dikasa munene wa ku tshia nza tshia balume, ha mutu ha mashi a mulambu wa disambuka dia mikenji," 
Leviticus14:29 manyi adi ashala mu tshianza tshia muakuidi, yeye neaele ha mutu ha muntu udiye musue kulengesha, bua kumubuikidila disambuka diandi ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus14:30 Neafile umue wa nyunyu wa nkutshi anyi wa mputu nyunyu udiye mua kuangata 
Leviticus14:31 umue wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo wa mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ne mulambu wa bukula, muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua muntu udiye musue kulengesha ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus14:32 Eu udi mukenji wa muena nsudi udi kayi mua kusangisha bintu bia mushinga mukole bia kudilengesha nʼabi. 
Leviticus14:33 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Leviticus14:34 Hanualua mu buloba bundi musue kunuha bu buhianyi buenu ne hanateka disama dia nsudi mu nsubu wa mu buloba bua buhianyi buenu," 
Leviticus14:35 nunku muena nsubu nealue biandi, neambile muakuidi ne, Ndi ngelangana meji ne ditoba dia disama didi mu nsubu muanyi." 
Leviticus14:36 Muakuidi nele dî diandi bua kumusha bintu bionso bia mu nsubu diambedi muakuidi kayi muanze kubuela bua kutangila disama, bua bintu bionso bia mu nsubu kabilu bu bintu bidi kabiyi biakane, ku nyima muakuidi neabuele bua kutangila mu nsubu." 
Leviticus14:37 Yeye neatangile hadi disama, ne biamueneka disama mu bimanu bia nsubu milongo mifike ne milongo mikunze, ne bielanganeye meji ne bintu ebi biakubuela munda mua tshimanu mene mene," 
Leviticus14:38 muakuidi neahatuke ku mushiku wa mbelu wa nsubu, neinshile bibi bia nsubu matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus14:39 Muakuidi neahingane dituku dia muanda mutekete, neatangile kabidi, ne bikala disama ditampakane mu bimanu bia nsubu," 
Leviticus14:40 muakuidi nêle di bua kumusha mabue akadi ne disama, nebêle mu muaba udi kauyi muakane ku butshika bua musoko," 
Leviticus14:41 nebakuone munda mua nsubu, nebêle bintu bidibo bakuona ku butshika bua musoko mu muaba udi kauyi muakane," 
Leviticus14:42 nebangate mabue makuabo, nebâbueshe mu miaba ya makuabo, nebajinguile makuabo mu miaba yakadi makuabo." 
Leviticus14:43 Biamueneka disama mu nsubu kabidi hashikisheye kumusha mabue ne kukuona munda mua nsubu ne hajinguileye makuabo," 
Leviticus14:44 muakuidi nealue bua kutangila, ne bikala disama ditampakane mu nsubu, edi ndisama dia nsudi didi mu nsubu, nsubu kena muakane." 
Leviticus14:45 Yeye neuhule nsubu ne mabue a nsubu ne mabaya ne bionso biakajinguileye nʼabi nsubu, nebabituale ku butshika bua musoko ku muaba udi kauyi muakane." 
Leviticus14:46 Biabuela muntu mu nsubu mu matuku akinshileye bibi, yeye neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus14:47 Muntu udi ulala mu nsubu neuvuwe bilulu biandi, ne muntu udi udia bidia mu nsubu neuvuwe bilulu biandi." 
Leviticus14:48 Bialua muakuidi ne hatangileye ne disama kadiena ditampakana mu nsubu hashikishabo kumujinguila, muakuidi neambile bantu ne, Nsubu eu udi muakane bualu bua disama diakashika." 
Leviticus14:49 Yeye neangate bintu bia kulengesha nʼabi nsubu nyunyu ibidi ne mitshi ya cêdre ne bintu bikunze ne mabeshi a hisopa," 
Leviticus14:50 neashihele umue wa nyunyu mu tshivuadi tshia dima ha mutu ha mai adi ahueka," 
Leviticus14:51 neangate mitshi ya cêdre ne mabeshi a hisopa ne bintu bikunze ne nyunyu utshidi ne muoyo, neafue bintu ebi mu mashi a nyunyu wakashiheye ne mu mai adi ahueka, neâmiamine ku nsubu misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus14:52 Yeye nealengeshe nsubu ne mashi a nyunyu ne mai adi ahueka ne nyunyu utshidi ne muoyo ne mitshi ya cêdre ne mabeshi a hisopa ne bintu bikunze," 
Leviticus14:53 kadi yeye nealekele nyunyu utshidi ne muoyo mu tshisuku ku butshika bua musoko, nealengeshe nsubu nunku, ne nsubu neikale muakane." 
Leviticus14:54 Eu udi mukenji wa disama dia nsudi 
Leviticus14:55 dia mu tshilulu anyi dia mu nsubu," 
Leviticus14:56 ne wa tshiuja kabidi anyi wa tshilamulamu anyi wa ditoba ditoke," 
Leviticus14:57 bua kubalesha hadi bintu kabiyi biakane ne hadibi biakane eu udi mukenji wa disama dia nsudi. 
Leviticus15:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Leviticus15:2 Nuambile Bena Isalele ne, Hahatuka tufina mu mubidi wa muntu, tufina atu tudi tubi." 
Leviticus15:3 Eu mmukenji wa bukoya buandi nansha hahatuka tufina mu mubidi wandi nansha hashalatu mu mubidi tudi anu tubi. 
Leviticus15:4 Bulalu buonso budiye ulalahu hahatuka tufina budi ne bukoya, ne bintu bionso bidiye ushikamahu bidi ne bukoya." 
Leviticus15:5 Muntu yonso udi ulenga bulalu buandi tshianza neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale mukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:6 Muntu yonso udi ushikama ha tshintu tshiashikameye neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:7 Muntu yonso udi umulenga tshianza hamʼbidi handi neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:8 Biahatuka tufina mu mubidi wa muntu, biatuidileye muntu udi muakane lute, yeye neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:9 Biashikameye ha tshiseba tshia ha nyima ha kabalu, netshikale ne bukoya." 
Leviticus15:10 Muntu yonso udi ulenga tshintu tshiakashalameye tshianza neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo, muntu udi utuala bintu ebi neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:11 Bialenga muntu udi tufina tuhatuka mu mubidi wandi munga muntu tshianza diambedi yeye kayi muanze kuowa bianza biandi, yeye neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:12 Bialenga muntu udi tufina tuhatuka mu mubidi wandi tshivuadi tshia dima tshianza, nebatshishihe, ne nguvu yonso yakasongabo ya mabaya nebayuvuwe ne mai." 
Leviticus15:13 Hashika disama dia muntu udi tufina tuhatuka mu mubidi wandi, nebamubadile matuku muanda mutekete bua kumulengesha, ne yeye neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe mu mai a mueji, neikale muakane." 
Leviticus15:14 Halua dituku dia muanda mukulu, yeye neadiangatshile nansha nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi nansha mputu nyunyu ibidi, nealue nʼai ku mpala kua Yehowa ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena, neayifile mu bianza bia muakuidi," 
Leviticus15:15 ne muakuidi neayifile bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, muakuidi neafue milambu ya kumubuikidila nʼai bubi ku mpala kua Yehowa bualu bua tufina tuandi." 
Leviticus15:16 Hela muntu bilumi, yeye neadioweshe mubidi wandi wonso ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:17 Biamatshila bilumi tshilulu anyi tshiseba nebatshiuvuwe ne mai, netshikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:18 Bialala mulume ne mukashi, biamueleye bilumi, bubidi buabo nebadioweshe ne mai, nebikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:19 Hamona mukashi katshetshi, yeye neikale ne bukoya tô matuku muanda mutekete, ne muntu yonso udi umulenga tshianza neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:20 Tshintu tshionso tshidiye ulala hadiye ku katshetshi netshikale ne bukoya, ne tshintu tshionso tshidiye ushikama netshikale ne bukoya." 
Leviticus15:21 Muntu yonso udi ulenga bulalu buandi tshianza neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:22 Muntu yonso udi ulenga tshintu tshiakashikameye neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:23 Bikala tshintu atshi ha bulalu buakadiye anyi ha tshintu tshiakashikameye hakatshilengeye, yeye neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:24 Bialala handi mulume ne biamumatshila katshetshi, yeye neikale ne bukoya tô matuku muanda mutekete, bulalu buonso budiye ulala nebuikale ne bukoya." 
Leviticus15:25 Biamona mukashi katshetshi mu matuku a bungi adi kâyi a tshikondo tshiandi, matuku au onso neikale bu matuku a tshikondo tshia ndi, yeye udi ne bukoya." 
Leviticus15:26 Bulalu buonso budiye ulala hatshidiye ne disama, nebuikale bu bulalu bua mu tshikondo tshiandi tshia katshetshi, tshintu tshionso tshi diye ushikama netshikale ne bukoya bu muditshi mu tshikondo tshiandi." 
Leviticus15:27 Muntu yonso udi ulenga bintu ebi bianza neikale ne bukoya, neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neadioweshe ne mai, neikale ne bukoya tô ne dilolo." 
Leviticus15:28 Hashika disama diandi, nebamubadile matuku muanda mutekete, ku nyima neikale mulengele." 
Leviticus15:29 Halua dituku dia muanda mukulu, yeye neangatshile nansha nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi nansha mputu nyunyu ibidi, nealue nʼai kudi muakuidi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus15:30 Muakuidi neafile umue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia Muakuidi neafile milambu ei bua kumubuikidila nʼai bubi ku mpala kua Yehowa bualu bua bukoya bua katshetshi kandi. 
Leviticus15:31 Nunku nenutahulule Bena Isalele ku bukoya buabo, bua bobo kabafu mu bukoya buabo honabo nsubu wanyi wa tshitendelelu tshidi munkatshi muabo." 
Leviticus15:32 Eu mmukenji kudi muntu udi tufina tuhatuka mu mubidi wandi ne wa bintu bidi bilumi bimatshila bua kumuvuisha mukoya," 
Leviticus15:33 ne kudi mukashi hamoneye katshetshi, ne kudi muntu udi tufina tuhatuka mu mubidi wandi, ne kudi muntu udi ulala ne mukashi hatshidiye ha katshetshi." 
Leviticus16:1 Yehowa wakayikila ne Mose ku nyima kua lufu lua bana balume ba Alona hakaluabo ku mpala kua Yehowa ne hakafuabo. 
Leviticus16:2 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Wambile Alona, mukulu webe, ne, Kulu nusangu yonso mu muaba wa tshijila udi ku nyima kua tshilulu tshikudika ku mpala kua tshibuikilu tshia mushete wa Nzambi, kufu biebe, bualu bua meme nemmueneke mu difutu ku mutu kua tshibuikilu tshia mushete wa Nzambi." 
Leviticus16:3 Alona nealue ne bintu ebi mu muaba wa tshijila ne muana mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne tshimpanga tshia mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia. 
Leviticus16:4 Nealuate tshikowelu tshia ku ne mihanu ya lin, nêle mukaba wa lin ku tshimono tshiandi, nease tshifufu tshia lin ku mutu ebi mbilulu bia tshijila, yeye neowe mai, neabiluate." 
Leviticus16:5 Yeye neangate kudi Bena Isalele mpumbu ya mbushi ibidi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne tshimpanga tshimue tshia mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia. 
Leviticus16:6 Alona neafile muana mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi ne bubi bua bantu ba mu nsubu muandi. 
Leviticus16:7 Neangate mbushi ibidi, neayiteke ku mpala kua Yehowa ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena." 
Leviticus16:8 Alona nêle mbushi ei ibidi nshobo, biakuata nshobo umue, ngua Yehowa, ne biakuata nshobo mukuabo, ngua Azazele." 
Leviticus16:9 Alona neafile mbushi wakakuatabo kudi nshobo wa Yehowa bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi. 
Leviticus16:10 Kadi mbushi wakakuatabo kudi nshobo wa Azazele neamuteke ne muoyo ku mpala kua Yehowa bua kubuikila nʼandi bubi bua bantu, ne bua kumuihatshilabo bua Azazele mu tshihela." 
Leviticus16:11 Alona neafile muana mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi, neadibuikidile bubi ne bua bantu ba mu nsubu muandi, neashihe muana mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi." 
Leviticus16:12 Neangate dilonga tente ne makala a kahia ku tshioshelu tshidi ku mpala kua Yehowa, ne bianza biandi tente ne musenga wa manananshi, nealue nʼabi ku nyima kua tshilulu tshikudika," 
Leviticus16:13 neateke musenga wa manananshi ha kahia ku mpala kua Yehowa bua ditutu dia muishi wa musenga wa manananshi dibuikile tshibuikilu tshia mushete wa Nzambi, bua yeye katu nansha." 
Leviticus16:14 Neangate mashi a muana mulume wa ngombe, neamiamine mashi ne munu wandi ku tshibuikilu tshia mushete ku luseke lua ku esete, neamiamine mashi ku mpala kua tshibuikilu tshia mushete ne munu wandi kabidi misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus16:15 Nunku yeye neashihe mbushi wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bantu, nealue ne mashi andi ku nyima kua tshilulu tshikudika, nênze bu muakenzeye ne mashi a muana mulume wa ngombe, neamiamine mashi ku tshibuikilu tshia mushete wa Nzambi ne ku mpala kua tshi kabidi." 
Leviticus16:16 Yeye neafile mulambu eu bua muaba wa tshijila, bualu bua Bena Isalele kabena bakane, ne bualu bua disambuka diabo dia mikenji, ne bualu bua malu mabi abo onso, nênze nunku bua kulengesha ntenta wa kusangakena udi munkatshi muabo, munkatshi mua bubi buabo." 
Leviticus16:17 Muntu mukuabo kikadi mu ntenta wa kusangakena hayeye kufila mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi buandi mu muaba wa tshijila ne bubi bua ba mu nsubu muandi ne bubi bua Bena Isalele, tô ne hahatukeye mu nsubu." 
Leviticus16:18 Neahatuke bua kuya ku tshioshelu tshidi ku mpala kua Yehowa bua kutshilengesha neangate mashi a muana mulume wa ngombe ne mashi a mbushi, nealabe ku nsengu ya ku tshioshelu." 
Leviticus16:19 Neamiamine mashi ne munu wandi ha mutu hatshi misangu muanda mutekete, neatshilengeshe, neatshijidile bua bubi bua Bena Isalele." 
Leviticus16:20 Hashikisheye kulengesha muaba wa tshijila ne ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshioshelu, nealue ne mbushi udi ne muoyo." 
Leviticus16:21 Alona neatentekashe bianza biandi bibidi ha mutu ha mbushi udi ne muoyo, neatondele Bena Isalele mabi yabo ne disambuka diabo dionso dia mikenji ne malu mabi abo onso, neatentekashe malu mabi onso ha mutu ha mbushi, nebamuihate mu tshihela ku tshianza tshia muntu wakasunguleye diambedi," 
Leviticus16:22 mbushi neatuale bujitu bua mibi yabo mu muaba wa hatuhu, neihate mbushi mu tshihela." 
Leviticus16:23 Alona nealue biandi mu ntenta wa kusangakena, neavule bilulu biandi bia lin biakadiye muluate hakayeye mu muaba wa tshijila, neabishiyemu," 
Leviticus16:24 yeye neowe mai mu muaba wa tshijila, nealuate bilulu biandi, neahatuke neafile mulambu wandi wa kuosha ha kahia ne mulambu wa bantu wa kuosha ha ka hia, neabuikile bubi buandi ne bubi bua bantu." 
Leviticus16:25 Neoshe dianyi dia mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ha tshioshelu. 
Leviticus16:26 Muntu wakihata mbushi wa Azazele neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neowe mai, ne ku nyima yeye neuhingane mu tshitudilu." 
Leviticus16:27 Muana mulume wa ngombe wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mbushi wa mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi miena mashi akaluabo nʼau bua ku buikila bubi mu muaba wa tshijila nebaye nʼai ku butshika bua tshibi dilu, neboshe biseba biai ne munyinyi wai ne tuma tuai mu kahia." 
Leviticus16:28 Muntu wakuosha bintu ebi neuvuwe bilulu biandi ne mubidi wandi ne ku nyima neuhingane mu tshitudilu. 
Leviticus16:29 Bualu ebu nebuikale mukenji kunudi tshiendelele mu dituku dia dikumi mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete nenujinge mu mitshima yenu, kanuenji mudimu, nansha bantu baledibue mu nsubu yenu nansha benyi badi munkatshi muenu," 
Leviticus16:30 bualu bua edi ndituku didibo banubuikidila bubi buenu bua kunulengesha nunku nenuikale balengeshibue ku mibi yenu yonso ku mpala kua Yehowa. 
Leviticus16:31 Edi ndituku dia lumingu dia dikisha dienu, nujinge mu mitshima yenu, eu mmukenji kunudi tshiendelele." 
Leviticus16:32 Muakuidi wakelabo manyi ha mutu ne wakajidilabo bua kubuela mu mudimu wa tatuʼandi yeye neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, nealuate bilulu bia lin bilulu bia tshijila," 
Leviticus16:33 neafile mulambu bua kujidila nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bua ntenta wa kusangakena ne bua tshioshelu ne bua kubuikila nʼau bubi bua bakuidi ne bua bantu bonso. 
Leviticus16:34 Eu newikale mukenji kunudi tshiendelele bua kubuikila bubi bua Bena Isalele musangu umue ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. Bakenza bu muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Leviticus17:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus17:2 Wambile Alona ne bana bandi balume ne Bena Isalele bonso ne, Ebu mbualu buakuamba Yehowa ne," 
Leviticus17:3 Muntu yonso wa munkatshi mua Bena Isalele udi ushiha nansha ngombe nansha mukoko nansha mbushi mu tshitudilu anyi ku butshika bua tshitudilu," 
Leviticus17:4 kayi nulue n andi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena bua kumufila bu mulambu wa Yehowa ku mpala kua nsubu wa Yehowa, nebamubale bu muhite bua mashi akamatshisheye hanshi, yeye wakamatshisha mashi hanshi, nebumushe mundi au munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus17:5 Bualu bua ndi musue Bena Isalele bangate milambu idibo basue kushihela mu tshisuku, balue nʼai kudi Yehowa, ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena kudi muakuidi, bayifile bu mulambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus17:6 Muakuidi neamiamine mashi ku tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, neoshe dianyi bu mulambu udi ulua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus17:7 Nunku kabena bashihela ba-demon milambu yabo hadibo benda nʼabo masandi. Eu newikale mukenji kudibo bikondo biabo bionso. 
Leviticus17:8 Wewe ubambile ne, Muntu yonso wa mu bisamba bia Bena Isalele anyi wa benyi badi munkatshi muabo udi ufila mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia anyi mulambu mukuabo" 
Leviticus17:9 ne udi uhidia kulua ne mulambu ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusangakena bua kûshihela Yehowa nebumushe muntu au munkatshi mua bana babo. 
Leviticus17:10 Muntu yonso wa mu bisamba bia Bena Isalele anyi wa benyi ba munkatshi muabo udi udia mashi, meme nengumushe mesu anyi kudi muntu au udi udia mashi nemmumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus17:11 Bualu bua mashi adi bu muoyo wa tshintu nakanuha mashi ha tshioshelu bualu bua kunubuikidila nʼau bubi buenu mashi adi anubuikidila bubi bualu bua muoyo wau. 
Leviticus17:12 Bua bualu ebu nakambila Bena Isalele ne, Muntu wa munkatshi muenu kadi mashi nansha muenyi udi munkatshi muenu kadi mashi." 
Leviticus17:13 Muntu yonso wa munkatshi mua Bena Isalele anyi wa benyi badi munkatshi muabo udi ulemba nyama anyi nyunyu bua kudia neahongolole mashi andi hanshi, neajibikile ne dinfuenkenya dia buloba." 
Leviticus17:14 Bualu bua mashi adi bu muoyo wa bintu bionso, mashi a tshintu ne muoyo watshi bidi muomumue nunku nakambila Bena Isalele ne, Kanudi mashi a mu munyinyi, bualu bua muoyo wa bintu bionso udi mu mashi, muntu yonso udi udia mashi nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus17:15 Muntu yonso udi udia tshintu tshidifuile anyi tshidi tshihandulule kudi nyama, bikaleye muledibue mu nsubu yenu anyi muenyi, yeye neuvuwe bilulu biandi ne mubidi wandi ne mai, neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô ne dilolo, hashishe yeye neikale muakane." 
Leviticus17:16 Kadi biahidieye kuvuwa bilulu biandi anyi mubidi wandi, yeye neadituadile bubi buandi." 
Leviticus18:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus18:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus18:3 Kanuenji bilele bia mu buloba bua Ejipitu bunuakadi bashikame, kanuenji bilele bia mu buloba bua Kanâna bundualua kunuha, kanulondi mikenji yabo." 
Leviticus18:4 Nuenu nuenze mei anyi ne mikenji yanyi, nubilonde meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus18:5 Nuenu nutumikile mei anyi ne mikenji yanyi, bienza muntu nunku, neikale ne muoyo. Meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus18:6 Kuyi ha buihi ne muanʼenu bua kumuvula bilulu biandi, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus18:7 Kuvudi tatuʼebe anyi mamuʼebe bilulu, yeye udi mamu webe, kumuvudi bilulu." 
Leviticus18:8 Kuvudi mukashi wa tatuʼebe bilulu, yeye udi bu tatu mene." 
Leviticus18:9 Kuvudi muanʼenu mukashi bilulu, bikaleye muana wa tatuʼebe anyi muana wa mamuʼebe udi muledibue mu nsubu muenu, anyi muaba mukuabo." 
Leviticus18:10 Kuvudi muana mukashi wa muana webe mulume, anyi muana mukashi wa muana webe mukashi bilulu, bobo badi bu wewe mene." 
Leviticus18:11 Kuvudi muana mukashi wa mukashi wa tatuʼebe bilulu, yeye udi muanʼenu mukashi." 
Leviticus18:12 Kuvudi tatuʼebe mukashi bilulu, yeye udi muanʼabo ne tatuʼebe." 
Leviticus18:13 Kuvudi mamuʼebe mukuabo bilulu, yeye udi muanʼabo ne mamuʼebe." 
Leviticus18:14 Kuvudi muanʼabo ne tatuʼebe mulume bilulu, kuyi ha buihi ne mukashi wandi, yeye udi mukashi wa tatuʼebe mukuabo." 
Leviticus18:15 Kuvudi mukashi wa muanʼebe bilulu, yeye udi mukashi wa muana webe, kuvudi bilulu biandi." 
Leviticus18:16 Kuvudi mukashi wa muanʼenu mulume bilulu, yeye udi mukashi wa mua nʼenu mulume." 
Leviticus18:17 Kuvudi mukashi ne muanʼandi mukashi bilulu, kuvudi muana mukashi wa muanʼandi mulume, anyi muana mukashi wa muanʼandi mukashi bilulu, badi bana benu, bualu ebu budi bubi." 
Leviticus18:18 Kubala muan abo ne mukashi ebe, bua kumutatshisha hatshidiye ne muoyo ne kumuvula bilulu." 
Leviticus18:19 Kuvudi mukashi bilulu hatshidiye ne tshijila tshia kulela kuandi. 
Leviticus18:20 Kuladi ne mukashi wa mukuenu bua kudionena bualu buandi. 
Leviticus18:21 Kanuadi bana bebe bua kubahitshisha mu kahia ka Moleke, kutedi dina dia Nzambi wenu tshitelatela meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus18:22 Kuladi ne mulume bu mudibo balala ne mukashi, bualu ebu budi bubi." 
Leviticus18:23 Kuladi ne nyama bua kudionena mutshima webe, ne mukashi kimanyi biandi ku mpala kua nyama bua kulala handi, bualu ebu budi butamba bubi." 
Leviticus18:24 Kanudionenyi mitshima yenu ne malu au Ebi mbilele bia bisamba bindi ngihata ku mesu kuenu," 
Leviticus18:25 buloba buabo buakoneka, nempingishe bubi ha mutu habu, buloba nkayabu budi buluka bena buloba." 
Leviticus18:26 Nuenu nutumikile mei anyi ne mikenji yanyi, kanuenji bilele ebi bidi bitambe bubi, nansha bana baledibue mu nsubu yenu nansha benyi badi munkatshi muenu" 
Leviticus18:27 (bualu bua bena buloba bakadi ku mpala kuenu bakenza malu mabi â onso, ne buloba buakoneka)," 
Leviticus18:28 buloba kabunuluki kabidi hanuabuona, bu muakadi buloba buluka tshisamba tshiakadi ku mpala." 
Leviticus18:29 Bantu bonso batu benza malu mabi au nebumushibue munkatshi mua bana babo. 
Leviticus18:30 Nunku nutumikile dî dianyi, kanuenji bilele ebi bibi biakenzabo ku mpala, kanudionyi mu malu au meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus19:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus19:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Nuikale bantu ba tshijila bualu bua meme Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ndi wa tshijila." 
Leviticus19:3 Muntu yonso atshine tatuʼandi ne mamuʼandi, nuvuluke matuku a lumingu ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu."
