Leviticus19:4 Kanukudimunyi mitshima yenu kudi mpingu, kanudienzedi mpingu ne tshiamu tshiakengululabo mu kahia ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus19:5 Hanualua ne mulambu wa kubisha nʼau ditalala kudi Yehowa, nûfile ne mutshima udiye mua kuitabusha." 
Leviticus19:6 Nenudie mulambu dituku dinudi nûfila ne makelela kabidi, biashala tshintu tô ne dituku disatu nebatshioshe mu kahia." 
Leviticus19:7 Biatshidiabo dituku disatu, bualu ebu budi bubi, tshiena ngitabusha mulambu," 
Leviticus19:8 muntu yonso udi ûdia neadituadile bubi buandi, bualu bua yeye wakuona tshintu tshijila tshia Yehowa, nebumushe muntu au munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus19:9 Hanuahuola bintu binuakakuna mu buloba, kanuhuodi ku matengu a madimi, kanusangishi bintu bionso binudi nuhuola." 
Leviticus19:10 Kanusangishi tumuma tuonso ludi mu madimi enu, kanuambudi tumuma tuakahona hanshi mu madimi enu, nushiye bintu ebi bia kukuatshisha nʼabi bahele ne benyi meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus19:11 Kanuibi, kanudingidianganyi, kanushimianganyi." 
Leviticus19:12 Kanuditshihi ne mashina ne dina dianyi, kanutedi dina dianyi tshitelatela, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:13 Kanukengeshi mukuenu, kanuibi bintu biandi, kanushadi ne difutu dia muena mudimu butuku tô ne dinda." 
Leviticus19:14 Kanuhendi muena mahaha, kanuteki tshintu tshia ku lenduisha nʼatshi muntu mufofo, kadi nuenu nutshine Nzambi wenu meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:15 Kanuenji bibi hanualumbulula tshilumbu, kanunemekedi muntu muhele, kanutumbishi muntu munene, kadi nulumbulule bilumbu bia muena mutumba nʼenu ne buakane mu mutshima." 
Leviticus19:16 Kanuendakanyi bu bena mukoso munkatshi mua bantu benu, kanuhuwi bikala muena mutumba nʼenu mikuata kudi tshilumbu meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:17 Kuikadi ne lukuna mu mutshima kudi muanʼenu, kadi ubele muena mutumba nʼebe, bua wewe kutuadi bubi bua bualu buandi." 
Leviticus19:18 Kudisombuedi, kuikadi ne lukuna kudi bana ba bana benu, kadi sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:19 Nutumikile mei anyi. Kanubueshakanyi bimuna bienu, kanukunyi ntete ya mishindu ibidi mu budimi bumue, kanuluatshi bilulu bikuma ne munda mashilangane." 
Leviticus19:20 Muntu yonso udi ulala ne mukashi muhika, udi mubangila kudi mulume, udi kayi muanze kuhikudibua, nebabakengeshe bubidi buabo, kabena babashiha bualu bua yeye kakadi muhikudibue." 
Leviticus19:21 Mulume eu nealue ne mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau disambuka diandi dia mikenji kudi Yehowa, ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusangakena, neafile tshimpanga tshia mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau disambuka diandi dia mikenji." 
Leviticus19:22 Muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kumubuikidila nʼau bubi buakenzeye ku mpala kua Yehowa, ne bubi buandi buakenzeye nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Leviticus19:23 Hanuahuola mu buloba ne hanuakuna mitshi ya mamuma, kunudi mamuma a mitshi tô bidimu bisatu." 
Leviticus19:24 Kadi halua tshidimu tshinai, nujidile mamuma onso a mu tshidimu atshi bua kutendelela nʼau Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:25 Halua tshidimu tshitanu, nudi mua kudia mamuma ne kuendulula nʼau mushinga meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 Kanudi tshintu ne mashi atshi, kanutempi mbuku, kanuenji bilengulengu." 
Leviticus19:27 Kanubeyi nsuki yenu biketu, kanuhungi miedi yenu ku bihanga." 
Leviticus19:28 Kanutahi mputu hamʼbidi henu bua kujinga nʼai bantu bafue, kanutahi nsalu hamʼbidi henu meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:29 Kuendeshi muanʼebe mukashi masandi, malu a masandi neikale mu buloba, ne buloba nebukale ne malu mabi tente." 
Leviticus19:30 Uvuluke matuku a lumingu, wakale ne ditshina mu nsubu wanyi meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:31 Kanubuelakanyi ne bena mulongo anyi batempi ba mbuku, kanubakebi, kunudionyi kudibo meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus19:32 Uleshe kanemu kudi muntu udi ne nsuki yandi mitoke tô, unemeke muntu mununu, utshine Nzambi webe meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus19:33 Biashikama muenyi mu buloba buenu, kanumuenzedi bibi." 
Leviticus19:34 Muenyi udi ushikama munkatshi muenu ikale bu muntu udi muledibue mu nsubu yenu, numusue bu munudi badisue, bualu bua nuenu nuakadi benyi mu buloba bua Ejipitu meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus19:35 Kanuenji bubi hanualumbulula bilumbu, anyi hanuidikisha bule bua bintu anyi bujitu buabi anyi bungi buabi." 
Leviticus19:36 Nuikale ne bihimu bimpe ne bihiminu bimpe, nuikale ne épha muimpe ne hin muimpe meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakantaha tula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Leviticus19:37 Nutumikile mei anyi onso ne mikenji yanyi yonso, nubienze, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus20:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus20:2 Wambile Bena Isalele kabidi ne, Muntu yonso wa Bena Isalele anyi wa benyi ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele udi ufila muana wandi kudi Moleke neashihibue bulelela, bena buloba nebamukume ne mabue." 
Leviticus20:3 Meme kabidi nengumushe mesu anyi kudi muntu au, nemmumushe munkatshi mua bana babo, bualu bua yeye wakafua muana wandi kudi Moleke bua kuona nsubu wanyi ne kunyangisha dina dianyi dia tshijila." 
Leviticus20:4 Biabuikila bena buloba mesu abo kudi muntu au hafileye bana bandi kudi Moleke, kabayi bamushihe," 
Leviticus20:5 meme nengumushe mesu anyi kudi muntu au ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu muandi, nemmumushe ne bantu bandi bonso badi benza handi malu a masandi ne Moleke, munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus20:6 Muntu yonso udi ubuelakana ne bena muhongo ne batempi ba mbuku bua kulonda malu abo a masandi, nengumushe mesu anyi kudi muntu au, nemmumushe munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus20:7 Nudilengeshe nunku, nuikale bantu ba tshijila bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Nutumikile mikenji yanyi, nuyenze meme ndi Yehowa udi unulengesha." 
Leviticus20:9 Muntu yonso udi wela tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi mulau nebamushihe bulelela, wakela tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi mulau mashi andi neikale hamʼbidi handi." 
Leviticus20:10 Mulume udi wenda masandi ne mukashi wa mulume mukuabo, nebashihe mulume ne mukashi wake ndeye nʼandi masandi." 
Leviticus20:11 Mulume udi ulala ne mukashi wa tatuʼandi udi bu muntu wakavula bilulu bia tatuʼandi nebabashihe bubidi buabo, ne mashi abo neikale hamʼbidi habo." 
Leviticus20:12 Bialala mulume ne mukashi wa muanʼandi, nebabashihe bubidi buabo, bobo bakenza bualu bubi, ne mashi abo neikale hamʼbidi habo." 
Leviticus20:13 Bialala mulume ne mulume mu kuabo bu mudiye ulala ne mukashi, bubidi buabo bakenza bualu bubi nebabashihe, ne mashi abo neikale hamʼbidi habo." 
Leviticus20:14 Biabaka mulume mukashi ne mamuʼandi, bualu ebu budi bubi, nebaboshe mu kahia, busatu buabo, bualu bubi kabuikadi munkatshi muenu." 
Leviticus20:15 Bialala mulume ne nyama, nebanshihe yeye ne nyama kabidi." 
Leviticus20:16 Bialala mukashi ne nyama, nebashihe mukashi ne nyama kabidi, mashi abi neikale hamʼbidi habi." 
Leviticus20:17 Biangata mulume muanʼabo mukashi, muana wa tatuʼandi anyi muana wa mamuʼandi, biavuleye bilulu biandi, ne biamuvula mukashi bilulu, ebu mbualu bua bundu, nebumushibue munkatshi mua bana babo, yeye wakavula muanʼabo mukashi bilulu, yeye nendituadile bubi buandi." 
Leviticus20:18 Bialala mulume ne mukashi hatshidiye ku katshetshi, bia muvuleye bilulu, yeye wakamuela bilulu ne mukashi wakitabusha hakadiye ku katshetshi kandi, nebumushibue bubidi buabo munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus20:19 Kuvudi mamu webe mukuabo anyi tatu webe mukashi bilulu, bualu bua yeye wakavula bana babo bilulu, bobo nebadituadile bubi buabo." 
Leviticus20:20 Bialala mulume ne mukashi wa mansebʼandi, udi bu muntu wakavula mansebʼandi bilulu, bobo nebadituadile bubi buabo, kabena balela bana tshiendelele." 
Leviticus20:21 Biangata mulume mukashi wa muanʼabo mulume, ebu mbualu bubi, yeye wakavula muanʼabo mulume bilulu, bobo kabena balela bana tshiendelele." 
Leviticus20:22 Nuenu nutumikile mei anyi ne mikenji yanyi, nubienze, buloba bundi musue kunuha bua kushikamamu kabunuluki." 
Leviticus20:23 Kanuendi mu bilele bia tshisamba tshindi ngihata ku mesu kuenu, bualu bua bobo bakenza malu au onso, nunku nakabalengulula." 
Leviticus20:24 Kadi meme nakanuambila ne, Nenuhiane buloba buabo, nennuhebu, buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nakanujidila munkatshi mua bantu bakuabo." 
Leviticus20:25 Nunku nuenu nenutahulule nyama udi muimpe ne nyama udi kayi muimpe ne nyunyu udi muimpe ne udi kayi muimpe, kanuonyi mitshima yenu kudi nyama anyi nyunyu anyi kudi tshintu tshidi tshidikoka hanshi binakunuhidisha bu tshintu tshidi ka tshiyi tshimpe." 
Leviticus20:26 Nuikale bantu ba tshijila kundi, bualu bua meme Yehowa ndi wa tshijila, nakanusungula munkatshi mua bantu bua nuenu nuikale bantu banyi." 
Leviticus20:27 Mulume anyi mukashi udi ne muhongo anyi udi mutempi wa mbuku neashihibue, nebakumibue ne mabue, mashi abo neikale hamʼbidi habo." 
Leviticus21:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Wambile bakuidi, bana balume ba Alona, ne, Nansha umue wabo kadinyangi bua bantu bafue badi munkatshi muabo," 
Leviticus21:2 anu bua bana babo, nansha mamuʼandi nansha tatuʼandi, nansha muanʼandi mulume, nansha muanʼandi mukashi, nansha muanʼabo wa balume," 
Leviticus21:3 nansha muanʼandi mukashi utshidi kamama, udi kayi ne mulume, yeye udi mua kudinyanga bua bualu buandi." 
Leviticus21:4 Yeye kena udinyanga nansha, bualu bua yeye udi muntu munene munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus21:5 Kababeyi muaba wa dibala ha mutu habo, kabahungi miedi yabo, kabatahi nsalu hamʼbidi habo." 
Leviticus21:6 Bobo nebikale ba tshijila kudi Nzambi wabo, kabanyangishi dina dia Nzambi wabo, bualu bua bobo badi bafila milambu ya kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia nunku bobo nebikale ba tshijila." 
Leviticus21:7 Kababaki mukashi wa masandi ne munya nguke anyi mukashi wakahidiabo kudi mulume wandi yeye udi wa tshijila kudi Nzambi wandi. 
Leviticus21:8 Nunku wewe neumujidile bualu bua yeye udi ufila milambu kudi Nzambi webe, bualu bua meme Yehowa wakamuidika, ndi wa tshijila." 
Leviticus21:9 Bienda muana mukashi wa muakuidi masandi, yeye wakadinyanga wakasangisha tatuʼandi kabidi, nebamuoshe mu kahia." 
Leviticus21:10 Muakuidi udi ku mutu kua bakuabo udi ne manyi mele ha mutu ne udi mujidila bua kuluata bilulu bia tshijila, kalekedi nsuki yandi tshianana, kahandi bilulu biandi nansha," 
Leviticus21:11 kabuedi kudi muntu mufue nansha, kadinyangi bua tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi," 
Leviticus21:12 kahatula ku nsubu wa tshitendelelu, kanyangishi nsubu wa Nzambi wandi nansha, bualu bua manyi a tshijila a Nzambi wandi adi ha mutu handi, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus21:13 Yeye neabake mukashi utshidi kamama. 
Leviticus21:14 Kabaki mukashi wa mu lufuila anyi mukashi wakahidiabo kudi mulume wandi anyi mukashi udi munyanga anyi mukashi wa masandi, yeye neabake mukashi utshidi kamama wa munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Leviticus21:15 Kanyangishi bana bandi munkatshi mua bana babo nansha, bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa wakamujidila." 
Leviticus21:16 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus21:17 Wambile Alona ne, Muntu yonso wa munkatshi mua bana bebe tô mu bikondo biabo bionso udi ne tshilema kena mua kulua ha buihi bua kufileye milambu kudi Nzambi wandi." 
Leviticus21:18 Bualu bua muntu udi ne tshilema kena mua kulua ha buihi muntu mufofo anyi tshibombo anyi muntu udi ne diulu dibatama anyi tshioka tshitambe bule," 
Leviticus21:19 anyi muntu udi ne dikasa ditshibuka anyi udi ne tshianza tshitshibuka 
Leviticus21:20 anyi muntu udi ne nyima mutuntamana anyi muntu mushunguke anyi udi ne disu disama anyi udi ne mpusu anyi udi ne bilamulamu anyi udi ne mihesa yandi mitshibuke," 
Leviticus21:21 muntu wa munkatshi mua bana ba Alona muakuidi udi ne bintu ebi hamʼbidi handi kena mua kulua ha buihi bua kulaleye mulambu ya kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, yeye udi ne tshitema, kena mua kudia mulambu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus21:22 Yeye udi mua kudia bidia bia Nzambi wandi ne bidia bidi bitambe tshijila ne bia tshijila," 
Leviticus21:23 kadi yeye kena mua kubuela mu muaba wa tshijila anyi mua kulua ha buihi ne tshioshelu, bualu bua yeye udi ne tshilema, kanyangishi nsubu wanyi nansha, bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa wakabajidila." 
Leviticus21:24 Mose wakambila Alona ne bana bandi balume ne Bena Isalele bonso nunku. 
Leviticus22:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus22:2 Wambile Alona ne bana bandi balume ne, Nuenu nudijidile ku bintu bia tshijila bia Bena Isalele bidibo banjidila, kanunyangishi dina dianyi dia tshijila meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:3 Ubambile kabidi ne, Muntu yonso wa munkatshi mua bana benu ku bikondo biabo bionso udi ulua ha buihi ne bintu bidi Bena Isalele bajidile Yehowa ne mubidi wandi kauyi muakane, nebamumushe ku mesu kuanyi meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:4 Muntu yonso wa munkatshi mua bana ba Alona udi muena nsudi anyi udi tufina tuhatuka mu mubidi wandi kena mua kudia bintu bia tshijila tô ne hashika disama diandi Muntu yonso udi ulenga mukuabo udi munyanguke bualu bua wakadi mulenge tshitalu anyi wakadi muele bilunu," 
Leviticus22:5 anyi udi ulenga tshianza tshiandi ha tshintu tshidi tshidikoka hanshi tshidi mua kumunyanga, anyi hamʼbidi ha mundi udi munyanguke mu mushindu wonso," 
Leviticus22:6 muntu udi ulenga bianza hamʼbidi ha bintu ebi neikale munyanguke tô ne dilolo, kena mua kudia bintu bia tshijila diambedi yeye kayi muanze kuowa mai ha mubidi." 
Leviticus22:7 Habuela diba yeye neikale muakane, ku nyima yeye udi mua kudia bintu bia tshijila bualu bua ebi mbidia biandi." 
Leviticus22:8 Tshintu tshi difume anyi tshidi tshihandulula kudi nyama yeye kena mua kutshidia, yeye neadinyange nʼatshi meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:9 Bobo nebatumikile dî dianyi, bua biahidiabo, nebadituadile bubi buabo, nebafue meme ndi Yehowa wakabajidila." 
Leviticus22:10 Muenyi kena mua kudia tshintu tshia tshijila, nansha muenyi wa muakuidi nansha muena mudimu kabena mua kudia tshintu tshia tshijila." 
Leviticus22:11 Kadi biasumba muakuidi muntu, muntu eu udi mua kutshidia, ne bana baledibue mu nsubu muandi nebadie bidia biandi." 
Leviticus22:12 Bikala muana mukashi wa muakuidi mubaka kudi muenyi, yeye kena mua kudia tshintu tshia tshijila tshifila kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:13 Kadi bikala muana mukashi wa muakuidi mukashi wa mu lufuila, anyi mukashi wakahidiabo kudi mulume wandi, ne bikaleye kayi ne muana, bikaleye nuhingane ku nsubu wa tatuʼandi muakadiye diambedi, yeye neadie bidia bia tatuʼandi, kadi muenyi kena mua kudia bintu ebi." 
Leviticus22:14 Biadia muntu tshintu tshia tshijila ku mpukahuka, yeye neasangishe tshintu tshitanu ha mutu hatshi, neahe muakuidi tshintu tshia tshijila." 
Leviticus22:15 Bobo kabanyangishi bintu bia tshijila Nakafila Bena Isalele kudi Yehowa," 
Leviticus22:16 bua kabatekedi bantu bujitu bua bubi bua bakuidi hadia bakuidi bintu bia tshijila bia bantu meme ndi Yehowa wakabajidila. 
Leviticus22:17 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus22:18 Wambile Alona ne bana bandi balume ne Bena Isalele bonso ne, Muntu yonso wa mu nsubu ya Bena Isalele anyi wa benyi ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele udi ufila mulambu wa kuditshiha, anyi mulambu udi mutshima wandi musue kufila, anyi mulambu mukuabo udibo boshila Yehowa ha kahia," 
Leviticus22:19 biasueye kufila mulambu udi Yehowa muitabushe, afile mulume udi kayi ne tshialua wa munkatshi mua ngombe anyi mikoko anyi mbushi." 
Leviticus22:20 Kadi kanufidi tshintu tshidi ne tshilema bualu bua tshiena ngitabusha tshintu etshi. 
Leviticus22:21 Hafila muntu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala kudi Yehowa bua kushikisha kuditshiha kuandi anyi mulambu udi mutshima wandi musue kufila wa munkatshi mua ngombe anyi mikoko, nengitabushe anu tshintu tshidi tshiakane, katshiena mua kuikala ne tshitema." 
Leviticus22:22 Nyama udi mufofo, anyi ne mifuba mitshibuke, anyi udi ujeka, anyi udi ne mputa, anyi udi ne tshikutu, anyi udi ne bilamulamu, kanufidi nyama ei kudi Yehowa bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ha tshioshelu tshia Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:23 Nudi mua kufila mulume wa ngombe anyi muana wa mukoko udi ne tshidimba tshiandi tshihita bule anyi buihi bu mulambu udi mitshima yenu misue kufila, kadi kanuena mua kufila nyama ei bu mulambu wa kuditshiha nʼau." 
Leviticus22:24 Nyama udi ne mihesa yandi mihandike anyi mitahe mputa kanumufidi bu mulambu kudi Yehowa mu buloba buenu. 
Leviticus22:25 Kanuitabushi mulambu ei ku bianza bia benyi bua kuyifila kudi Nzambi wenu, mulambu ei idi ne bilema, tshiena nyitabusha bualu bua idi munyanguke." 
Leviticus22:26 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus22:27 Halelabo muana kudi ngombe anyi kudi mukoko anyi kudi mbushi, yeye neikale ne mamuʼandi matuku muanda mutekete, ku dituku dia muanda mukulu ne matuku adi ku mpala badi mua kumufila bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus22:28 Biwikala ne mukashi wa ngombe anyi wa mukoko, kumushihi ne muana wandi dituku dimue." 
Leviticus22:29 Binualua ne mulambu wa kusakidila n au Yehowa, nufile bua nuikale bitabushibue." 
Leviticus22:30 Nenudie dituku adi mene mene, kanushiyi tshintu tô ne dinda meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:31 Nuenu nenutumikile mikenji yanyi, nengenze meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus22:32 Kanunyangishi dina dianyi dia tshijila, kadi nengikale mujidibue munkatshi mua Bena Isalele meme ndi Yehowa udi unujidila," 
Leviticus22:33 wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu bua kuikala Nzambi wenu meme ndi Yehowa. 
Leviticus23:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus23:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Nakasungula matuku andi musue bantu badie bidia bia Yehowa anudi mua kumanyisha bantu, matuku au neikale matuku a tshijila." 
Leviticus23:3 Nukuate mudimu matuku asambombo kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete ndituku dia lumingu dia kuikisha, dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu, edi ndituku dia lumingu dia Yehowa mu nsubu yenu yonso." 
Leviticus23:4 Au mmatuku a kudia bidia bia Yehowa, matuku a tshijila andi musue wewe ubamanyishe ku bikondo biau." 
Leviticus23:5 Ngondo wa kumudilu, mu matuku dikumi ne anai, diba dia dilolo, ndituku dia kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus23:6 Dituku dia matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondo eu mene ndituku dia kudila Yehowa bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene, nenudie bidia bidi kabiyi ne Iuevene matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus23:7 Dituku dia kumudilu nedikale dituku dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu." 
Leviticus23:8 Kadi nenufile milambu ya kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia tô matuku muanda mutekete, dituku dia muanda mutekete ndituku dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu." 
Leviticus23:9 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus23:10 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanuabuela mu buloba bundi nnuha, ne hanuahuola bintu bia mu buloba, nulue bienu ne bintu binudi nuhuola diambedi kudi muakuidi," 
Leviticus23:11 yeye neanyukule tshisumbu tshia bintu ku mpala kua Yehowa, bualu bua kunuitabushisha kudi Yehowa, muakuidi neatshinyukule dituku didi dilonda dia lumingu." 
Leviticus23:12 Mu dituku dinudi nunyukula bintu, nenufile muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue udi kayi ne tshilema bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus23:13 Nenufile diatshimue ne mulambu wa bukula wa bituha bibidi bia dikumi bia épha busangisha ne manyi, mulambu wa kutua dihembu dimpe muoshile Yehowa, nenufile mulambu wa nvinyo wa kunua wa tshituha tshinai tshia hin." 
Leviticus23:14 Kanudi mampa anyi manvua akoshabo mu kahia, anyi manvua mabishi dituku edi diambedi kanuyi banze kufila milambu yenu kudi Nzambi eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele mu bikondo bienu bionso mu nsubu yenu yonso." 
Leviticus23:15 Nenubange ku dituku didi dilonda dia lumingu, dituku dinuakalua ne tshisumbu tshia bintu bidibo banyukula, nenubale matuku a lumingu muanda mutekete," 
Leviticus23:16 tô ne ku dituku didi dilonda dituku dia lumingu dia muanda mutekete bu matuku makumi atanu nenufile mulambu wa bukula buhia-buhia kudi Yehowa. 
Leviticus23:17 Nenufume ku nsubu yenu ne mitanda ya mampa ibidi ya kunyukula, milamba ne bituha bibidi bia dikumi bia épha ya bukula bubotesha busangisha ne luevene, ebi mbintu bihuola bia diambedi bifila kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus23:18 Nulue ne mampa au ne bana ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne bilema ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne bimpanga bibidi, bintu ebi nebikale bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, udibo bafila ne mulambu wa bukula ne mulambu wa bintu bia kunua, bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia udi utua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus23:19 Nenufile mpumbu wa mbushi umue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne bana balume ba mikoko babidi ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala. 
Leviticus23:20 Muakuidi neanyukule bintu ebi ne mampa a bintu biakahuolabo diambedi ne bana ba mikoko babidi bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mesu kua Yehowa, nebikale bintu bia tshijila kudi Yehowa bualu bua muakuidi." 
Leviticus23:21 Wewe newambile bantu dituku adi bua dituku adi dikale dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila kunudi, kanuenji mudimu eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele mu nsubu yenu yonso tô ne mu bikondo bienu bionso." 
Leviticus23:22 Hanuahuola bintu binuakakuna mu buloba, kanuhuodi ku matengu a madimi, kanusangishi bintu bionso, nenushiye bintu ebi bua kukuatshisha nʼabi bahele ne benyi meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus23:23 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus23:24 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa muanda mutekete nedikale dituku dia kuikisha kunudi, dituku dia tshivulukidi didibo bela mpungi, dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila." 
Leviticus23:25 Ka nuenji mudimu, nenufile mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus23:26 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus23:27 Dituku dia matuku dikumi a ngondo eu wa muanda mutekete ndituku dia kubuikila bubi bua bantu, nebikale dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila, nenujinge mu mitshima yenu, nenufile mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus23:28 Kanuenji mudimu dituku adi, edi ndituku dia kubuikila bubi buenu ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus23:29 Muntu yonso udi uhidia kujinga mu mutshima wandi dituku adi nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo. 
Leviticus23:30 Muntu yonso udi wenza mudimu dituku adi nebamumushe munkatshi mua bana babo. 
Leviticus23:31 Kanuenji mudimu nansha mukese dituku adi eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele mu bikondo bienu bionso mu nsubu yenu yonso. 
Leviticus23:32 Dituku edi nedikale dituku dia lumingu dia kuikisha, ne nuenu nenujinge mu mitshima yenu, nuikishe bienu ku dilolo dia matuku tshitema a ngondo eu tô ne ku dilolo dia matuku dikumi." 
Leviticus23:33 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus23:34 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Dituku dia matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondo eu wa muanda mutekete nebikale dituku didibo badia bidia bia mu bitandatanda tô matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus23:35 Dituku dia kumudilu nedikale dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu." 
Leviticus23:36 Matuku muanda mutekete nenufile milambu ya kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, dituku dia muanda mukulu nedikale dituku dia disangisha dia tshijila kunudi, nenufile mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, edi ndisangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu." 
Leviticus23:37 Â mmatuku anakasungula bua nuenu nuambile bantu bua bikondo bia masangisha a tshijila bia kufila milambu ya kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia, mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ne mulambu wa bukula ne mulambu wa bintu bia kunua, mulambu dituku diau mulambu dituku diau," 
Leviticus23:38 malu â adi ha mutu ha matuku a lumingu lua Yehowa ne bintu binudi basue kufila ne ha mutu ha bintu bidi mitshima yenu musue kufila kudi Yehowa. 
Leviticus23:39 Halua dituku dia matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondo wa muanda mutekete hanuashikisha kuhuola bintu, nenudie bidia bia Yehowa matuku muanda mutekete, dituku dia kumudilu nedikale dituku dia kuikisha, ne dituku dia muanda mukulu nedikale dituku dia kuikisha." 
Leviticus23:40 Dituku dia kumudilu nenuangate mamuma a mitshi mimpe ne bikola bia mabue ne matamba a mitshi ne ntuhu ya mu mai, nenusanke ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus23:41 Nenudie bidia nunku ku mesu kua Yehowa matuku muanda mutekete ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele mu bikondo bienu bionso, nenuenze bualu ebu mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus23:42 Nenuikale mu bitandatanda matuku muanda mutekete; bantu bonso hakalelabo mu Isalele nebashikame mu bitandatanda 
Leviticus23:43 bua kumanyisha bantu ba mu bikondo bienu bionso ne, Bena Isalele bakashikama mu bitandatanda hanakahatuka nʼabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu, meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus23:44 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele nunku bua matuku a kudia bidia akasungula Yehowa. 
Leviticus24:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus24:2 Wambile Bena Isalele bua bobo balue kûdi ne manyi akatuabo bua kutemesha nʼau minda ku dituku ku dituku. 
Leviticus24:3 Alona nealongolole minda dilolo ne dinda ku mesu kua Yehowa ku dituku ku dituku, ku mpala kua tshilulu tshia ku muaba wa tshijila mu ntenta wa kusangakena eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele mu bikondo bienu bionso." 
Leviticus24:4 Yeye nealongolole minda ha bitekelu biai bia or numpe ku mpala kua Yehowa ku dituku ku dituku. 
Leviticus24:5 Wangate bukula bubotesha, ulambe nʼabu mikata dikumi ne ibidi, ulambe mukata umue ne bituha bibidi bia dikumi bia épha." 
Leviticus24:6 Ubiteke milongo ibidi, mulongo isambombo mulongo isambombo, ha mesa adi ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Leviticus24:7 Wele manananshi ku mulongo ne ku mulongo, manananshi neikale bu tshivulukidi ha mampa bu mulambu wa kuoshila Yehowa ha kahia." 
Leviticus24:8 Nealongolole mampa dituku dia lumingu ku mpala kua Yehowa ku lumingu ku lumingu, yeye nênzele Bena Isalele bualu ebu bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele." 
Leviticus24:9 Bintu ebi mbia Alona ne bana bandi balume, ne nebabidie mu muaba udi wa tshijila bualu bua bidi bitambe tshijila ku mesu kua Yehowa munkatshi mua mulambu yonso idibo bosha ha kahia. Eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele." 
Leviticus24:10 Muana wakadiku, mamu wandi wakadi Muena Isalele ne tatuʼandi wakadi Muena Ejipitu wakaluhuka munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, muana mulume eu wa mukashi wa Bena Isalele wakasangana ne Muena Isalele mukuabo mu tshituilu," 
Leviticus24:11 muana mulume wa mukashi wa Bena Isalele wakateta dina dia Yehowa tshitelatela, wakamuhenda, ba kalua handikudi Mose. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Shelomita, muana mukashi wa Dibili, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dana." 
Leviticus24:12 Baka muela mu lukanu bua kuindila mei a kudi Yehowa. 
Leviticus24:13 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus24:14 Uhatule muntu eu muena bihendu ku butshika bua tshitudilu, bantu bonso bakunvua mei andi batentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu handi ne bantu bonso bamukume ne mabue." 
Leviticus24:15 Wewe wambile Bena Isalele ne, Muntu yonso udi uhenda Nzambi wandi nendituadile bubi buandi." 
Leviticus24:16 Muntu udi utela dina dia Yehowa tshitelatela nebamushihe bulelela, bantu bonso nebamukume ne mabue, bikaleye muenyi anyi muntu muledibue mu nsubu yenuhateleye dina dia Yehowa tshitelatela, nebamushihe." 
Leviticus24:17 Muntu udi ushiha mukuabo nebamushihe. 
Leviticus24:18 Muntu udi ushiha nyama neafute muena nyama, muoyo ku muoyo." 
Leviticus24:19 Muntu udi utaha mukuabo mputa nebamuenzele muomumue 
Leviticus24:20 mputa ku mputa, disu ku disu, dinu ku dinu bu muakenzeleye mukuabo nebamuenzele yeye." 
Leviticus24:21 Muntu udi ushiha nyama neafute muena nyama ne mundi udi ushiha mukuabo nebamushihe. 
Leviticus24:22 Nudi ne mukenji muomumue kudi muenyi ne kudi mundi muledibue mu nsubu yenu bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus24:23 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele nunku, ne bobo bakaluhuka ne muena bihendu ku butshika bua tshitudilu, bakamukuma ne mabue Bena Isalele bakenza bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Leviticus25:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu mukuna wa Sinai ne," 
Leviticus25:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanuabuela mu buloba bundi nnuha, nenushiye buloba bua kubandabu kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus25:3 Nenukune bintu mu madimi enu bidimu bisambombo, nenulongolole mitshi ya tumuma, ne nuhuole tumuma tua mitshi bidimu bisambombo," 
Leviticus25:4 kadi tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete buloba nebuikale mua kubandabu kudi Yehowa, kanukunyi bintu mu madimi, kanulongolodi mitshi ya tumuma." 
Leviticus25:5 Kanuhuodi bintu bidi bidimenena anyi tumuma didi tudimenena etshi ntshidimu tshia kubanda kua buloba. 
Leviticus25:6 Bintu bidi bidimenena mu tshidimu tshia kubanda kua buloba nebikale bintu bienu bia kudia, bintu biebe ne bia muhika webe mulume ne bia muhika webe mukashi ne bia muena mudimu webe ne bia muenyi udi ushikama nʼebe" 
Leviticus25:7 ne bia bimuna biebe ne bia nyama yonso idi mu buloba buebe bintu bionso biakadimenena nebikale bintu bia kudia. 
Leviticus25:8 Wewe neubale bidimu bia kubanda kua buloba muanda mutekete, bidimu muanda mutekete misangu muanda mutekete, neubale nunku bidimu muanda mutekete bia kubanda kua buloba misangu muanda mutekete tô ne ku bidimu makumi anai ne tshitema." 
Leviticus25:9 Nunku wewe neweleshe mpungi bikole dituku dia dikumi mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete, mu dituku dia kubuikila bubi bua bantu wewe neweleshe mpungi kuonso mu buloba buenu." 
Leviticus25:10 Wewe neujidile tshidimu tshia makumi atanu, newele di bua bantu bonso bahete budishikaminyi, etshi ntshidimu tshia disanka dinene kunudi, neuhingishe buloba buonso kudi bena buloba, ne muntu yonso neahingane kudi bana babo." 
Leviticus25:11 Tshidimu tshia makumi atanu netshikale tshidimu tshia disanka dinene kunudi, kanukunyi bintu, kanuhuodi bintu bidi bidimenena anyi tumuma tudi tudimenena." 
Leviticus25:12 Etshi ntshidimu tshia disanka dinene, netshikale tshidimu tshia tshijila kunudi, nenudie bintu bidi bidimenena mu madimi." 
Leviticus25:13 Mu tshidimu etshi tshia disanka dinene nenuhingane muntu yonso ku buloba buandi muntu yonso ku buloba buandi. 
Leviticus25:14 Binuahanyisha mukuenu bintu bienu anyi binuasumba bintu ku bianza bia mukuenu, kanuenzedianganyi bibi." 
Leviticus25:15 Bu mudi bungi bua bidimu ku nyima kua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene wewe neusumbe bintu kudi mukuenu, ne yeye neakusumbishe bu mudi bungi bua bidimu biakamaneye kuhuola bintu." 
Leviticus25:16 Biahita bidimu bia bungi, wewe udi mumanye mua kuhandisha mushinga wa bintu, ne bialeha bidimu bikese, wewe neuhuekeshe mushinga wabi bu mudi bungi bua bintu bidiye ukusumbisha." 
Leviticus25:17 Kanuenzedianganyi bibi, nuenu nenutshine Nzambi webe bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus25:18 Nuenu nenutumikile mei anyi ne mikenji yanyi, nenubienze, nenushikame mu buloba talala." 
Leviticus25:19 Buloba nebukuame bintu bia bungi, nuenu nenukute mafu tente, nenushikame bienu talala." 
Leviticus25:20 Binuadikonka ne, Netudie tshinyi tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete hatudi katuyi tukuna bintu, katuyi tuhuola bintu?" 
Leviticus25:21 nennuvudishile disanka dianyi tshidimu tshisambombo, ne buloba nebukuame bintu bia bidimu bisatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Hanuakuna bintu tshidimu tshia muanda mukulu, nenudie bintu bia diambedi biakadi bishale mu nsubu yenu, tô ne ku tshidimu tshia tshitema hanuahuola bintu, nenudie bintu bia diambedi biakadi bishale." 
Leviticus25:23 Kanuena mua kusumbisha muntu buloba bua yeye kuikala nʼabu tshiendelele, buloba buonso mbuanyi, ne nuenu nudi bu benyi ne bena luendu ku mesu kuanyi." 
Leviticus25:24 Mu buloba buonso bunudi nuhiana biasumbabo bukuabo, nebashiye tshieya tshia buhikudi bua buloba kudi wakabusumbisha." 
Leviticus25:25 Bialua mukuenu muntu muhele, biahaneye tshituha tshia buloba buandi, ne bialua bana babo bua kubuhikula, badi mua kuhikula buloba buakahanabo kudi muanʼabo." 
Leviticus25:26 Bikala muntu eu kayi ne muanʼabo bua kubuhikula, kadi bialueye muntu mubanji udi ne bintu bia kubuhikula nʼabi," 
Leviticus25:27 yeye neabale bungi bua bidimu biakahita hakamusumbisheye buloba, neamuhingashile mushinga wabu ne bintu bikuabo ha mutu, yeye neahingane mu buloba buandi." 
Leviticus25:28 Bikaleye kayi ne bintu bia kubuhikula nʼabi, nunku buloba buakahaneye nebuikale mu bianza bia muntu wakabusumba tô ne halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, mu tshidimu tshia disanka dinene buloba nebuhikudibue ne yeye neahingane mu buloba buandi." 
Leviticus25:29 Biahana muntu nsubu mu musoko udi munyungulula ne lumbu yeye udi mua kuhikula nsubu diambedi tshidimu tshimue katshiyi tshianze kuhita, tô tshidimu tshijima yeye udi mua kumuhikula." 
Leviticus25:30 Kadi biahangeye kumuhikula diambedi tshidimu tshimue katshiyi tshianze kuhita, nunku nsubu wa mu musoko udi munyungulula ne lumbu neikale kudi wakamusumba tô tshiendelele, muena nsubu kena uhingana mu nsubu halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene." 
Leviticus25:31 Kadi nsubu ya mu misoko idi kayiyi minyungulula ne lumbu neyikale ne madimi, nudi mua kuyihikula, ne bena nsubu nebahingane halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene." 
Leviticus25:32 Kadi misoko ya Bena Lewi ne nsubu ya mu misoko yabo, Bena Lewi badi mua kuyihikula hasuabo." 
Leviticus25:33 Biahikula Muena Lewi nsubu, nunku nsubu wakahanabo ne musoko wa buhianyi buandi nebihingane kudibo halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, bualu bua nsubu ya mu misoko ya Bena Lewi idi buhianyi buabo munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Leviticus25:34 Kadi kabena mua kuhana madimi adi ku matshika a misoko yabo, ebu mbuhianyi buabo tshiendelele." 
Leviticus25:35 Bialua mukuenu mundi muhele, biateketa maboko andi ha buihi hebe, wewe neumukuatshishe, yeye neikale kûdi bu muenyi anyi bu muena luendu." 
Leviticus25:36 Kumulombi tshia kasombela, kadi utshine Nzambi webe, mukuenu neikale nʼebe." 
Leviticus25:37 Kumulombi tshia kasombela ku argent iwakamusombesha anyi ku bintu bia kudia biwakamuha. 
Leviticus25:38 Meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakakuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu bua kukuha buloba bua Kanâna ne bua kuikala Nzambi webe." 
Leviticus25:39 Bialua mukuenu mundi muhele, biadihaneye kûdi, kumuenzeshi mudimu bu muhika." 
Leviticus25:40 Yeye neikale nʼebe bu muena mudimu anyi bu muenyi, neakukuatshile mudimu tô ne halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene," 
Leviticus25:41 hashishe yeye neumuke kudi ne yeye ne bana bandi badi nʼandi, nebahingane kudi bana babo ne ku buhianyi bua batatu bandi." 
Leviticus25:42 Bualu bua bobo badi bantu banyi banakuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, kababahanyi bu bahika." 
Leviticus25:43 Kumukokeshi ne tshianza tshikole, kadi utshine Nzambi webe." 
Leviticus25:44 Wewe neusumbe bahika balume ne bahika bakashi kudi bisamba bia bantu badi hehi nʼebe. 
Leviticus25:45 Udi mua kusumba bana ba benyi badi munkatshi muenu, ne bana ba benyi badi baledibue mu buloba buenu, bobo nebikale bahika benu." 
Leviticus25:46 Bobo nebikale bu buhianyi bua bana benu badi banulonda ku nyima bua kubahiana tshiendelele, nudi mua kuangata bahika benu munkatshi muabo, kadi kabakokeshi bana benu ba Bena Isalele ne tshianza tshikole." 
Leviticus25:47 Bialua muenyi wa munkatshi muenu mundi mubanji, ne bialua mukuenu udi ushikama hehi handi muntu muhele, biadihaneye kudiye anyi kudi mundi mukuabo wa mu diku diandi," 
Leviticus25:48 hadihaneye, badi mua kumuhikula, umue wa bana babo udi mua kumuhikula," 
Leviticus25:49 mansebʼandi anyi muana mulume wa mansebʼandi anyi muanʼabo mukuabo udi mua kumuhikula, bialueye muntu mubanji, yeye udi mua kudihikula." 
Leviticus25:50 Bobo nebabange ku tshidimu tshiakudihaneye nebabale bungi bua bidimu tô ne halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, mushinga wa kudihikula nʼau newikale bu bungi bua bidimu biakashaleye handi bu muena mudimu." 
Leviticus25:51 Biashala bidimu bia bungi, neamuhingishile bu mushinga wa kudihikula nʼau tshituha tshia bintu biakamusumbabo babi." 
Leviticus25:52 Biashala bidimu bikese tô ne ku tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, bobo nebabibale, yeye neamuhingishile tshituha tshia kudihikula nʼatshi bu bungi bua bidimu biandi bidi bishala." 
Leviticus25:53 Yeye neikale handi bu muena mudimu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu kamukokeshi ne tshianza tshikole ku mesu kuebe. 
Leviticus25:54 Bikaleye kayi muhikudibue nunku, yeye neumuke halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, yeye ne bana bandi." 
Leviticus25:55 Bualu bua Bena Isalele badi bantu banyi banakahatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus26:1 Kanusongi mpingu, kanujadiki luhingu lua tshiamu tshiakafulabo, anyi dikunshi anyi dibue diakasongabo mu buloba buenu bua kubmamina, bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 Nuvuluke matuku anyi a lumingu, nuikale ne kanemu mu nsubu wanyi, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus26:3 Binualonda mei, anyi binuatumikila mikenji yanyi, binuayenza," 
Leviticus26:4 nennuhe nvula mu tshidimu tshia nvula, ne buloba nebukuame bintu bia bungi, ne mitshi ya mu madimi neyikuame mamuma a bungi." 
Leviticus26:5 Tshikondo tshidibo bashehula bintu netshikale tô ne ku tshikondo tshidibo bahuola mamuma a mitshi, ne tshikondo tshidibo bahuola mamuma netshikale tô ne ku tshikondo tshidibo bakuna bintu, nenukute mafu tente ne bia kudia, nenushikame mu buloba buenu talala." 
Leviticus26:6 Nennuhe ditalala mu buloba, nenulale tulu, ne bantu kabena banutshinyisha, nengihate nyama mibi mu buloba buenu, ne kabena balue ne muele wa nvita mu buloba buenu." 
Leviticus26:7 Nuenu nenuihate bantu badi nʼenu lukuna, nenubashihe ne muele wa nvita." 
Leviticus26:8 Batanu benu nebihate bantu lukama, ne bantu benu lukama nebihate binunu dikumi bia bantu, badi nʼenu lukuna nebafue ku muele wa nvita." 
Leviticus26:9 Nengikale nʼenu luse, nennuleleshe bana ba bungi, nennuvudishangane, nenjadike tshihungidi tshianyi munkatshi muenu." 
Leviticus26:10 Nenudie bintu binuakahuola kale, nenumushe bia kale bua kushila bihia-bihia muaba." 
Leviticus26:11 Nenshimike nsubu wanyi wa tshitendelelu munkatshi muenu, mutshima wanyi kawena wikala ne tshiji kunudi." 
Leviticus26:12 Meme nengendakane munkatshi muenu, nengikale Nzambi wenu, ne nuenu nenuikale bantu banyi." 
Leviticus26:13 Meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu bua nuenu kanuikadi bahika babo, nakatshibula mitshi ya tshikokedi yakatekabo ha nshingu yenu, nakanujalamisha." 
Leviticus26:14 Kadi binuahidia kunvua dî dianyi, binuahidia kutumikila mikenji yanyi," 
Leviticus26:15 binuahidia mikandu yanyi, binuabenga mei anyi mu mitshima yenu, kanuyi nuenza mikenji yanyi, binuashiha tshihungidi tshianyi," 
Leviticus26:16 meme kabidi nennuenzele nunku nengenze malu adi anutshinyisha, nennutumine masama adi anyanyisha mibidi yenu ne disama dia mubidi kahia, masama au neashihe mesu enu, neanyanyishe mitshima yenu, nenukune bintu bienu tshianana, bualu bua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna nebabidie." 
Leviticus26:17 Meme nengumushe mesu anyi kunudi, nenuhone ku mpala kua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna, bantu badi nʼenu lukuna nebanukokeshe, nenunyeme tshianana, bantu kabayi banze ku nuihata." 
Leviticus26:18 Binuahidia kunvua di dianyi meme mumane kunuenzela malu au onso, nennukengeshe bikole misangu muanda mutekete bualu bua mibi yenu." 
Leviticus26:19 Nenjimishe kudisua kunudi nʼaku bua bukole buenu, diulu nedikale bu tshiamu tshifike ne buloba nebuikale bu tshiamu tshia mitaku," 
Leviticus26:20 nenuenze mudimu wenu tshianana bualu bua buloba kabuena bukuama bintu, ne mitshi ya mu buloba kayena ikuama mamuma." 
Leviticus26:21 Binuenda mu nshila mdi muhidie, kanuyi nunvua mei anyi, meme nendiundishe makenga enu mahite mibi yenu misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus26:22 Nentume nyama ya muitu munkatshi muenu, neyinunyenge bana benu bakese, neyishihe bimuna bienu, nuenu nenulue bantu banya-banya nshila yenu neyikale hatuhu." 
Leviticus26:23 Bikala malu a onso kayi akudimuna mitshima yenu kundi, binuampidia," 
Leviticus26:24 meme nennuhidie kabidi, nennukume misangu muanda mutekete bualu bua mibi yenu." 
Leviticus26:25 Nendue ne muele wa nvita munkatshi muenu bu musombuedi wa tshihungidi tshianyi, ne hanuadisangisha mu misoko yenu, meme nentume masama makole munkatshi muenu, nennufile mu bianza bia bantu badi nʼenu lukuna." 
Leviticus26:26 Hanakehesha bintu bienu bia kudia, bakashi dikumi nebalambe bidia mu luesu lumue, bobo nebanuhimine bintu bia kudia mu tshihimu, nuenu nenuhidie kadi kanuena nukuta." 
Leviticus26:27 Binuahidia kunvua mei anyi bua malu a onso, binuampidia," 
Leviticus26:28 meme nennuhidie kabidi, nengikale nʼenu tshiji nennukengeshe misangu muanda mutekete bualu bua mibi yenu." 
Leviticus26:29 Nenudie munyinyi wa bana benu balume ne wa bana benu bakashi. 
Leviticus26:30 Meme nenshimbule bitendelelu bienu bidi ku mutu kua mikuna, nenkose mpingu inudi nutendelela nʼai diba, nengele bitalu bienu ha mutu ha mpingu yenu, mutshima wanyi neunulengulule." 
Leviticus26:31 Meme nembutule misoko yenu, ne bitendelelu bienu nebikale hatuhu, bintu bienu kabiena bi tua dihembu kundi." 
Leviticus26:32 Meme nembutule buloba buenu, ne bantu badi nʼenu lukuna badi bashikamamu nebakeme bua bualu buabu." 
Leviticus26:33 Nennumuangalashe mu bisamba bikuabo, nempatule muele wa nvita ku nyima kuenu, buloba buenu nebuikale hatuhu ne misoko yenu neyikale mihaula." 
Leviticus26:34 Nunku buloba nebuikale ne bidimu bia kubanda, nebuikale hatuhu hanuikala mu buloba bua bantu badi n enu lukuna buloba buenu nebuikale mua kubanda." 
Leviticus26:35 Buloba nebuikale ne bidimu bia buhafe tô bu bungi bua bidimu binuakuhidia kushiya buloba bua kubandabu hanuakashikamamu. 
Leviticus26:36 Bungi bua bantu benu badi bashala nebikale ne mitshima mitekete mu buloba bua bantu badi nʼabo lukuna, nebanyeme hunvuabo tshiona tshia dibeshi dia mutshi didi dinyunga kudi luhehele, nebanyeme bu mundi udi unyema ku muele wa nvita, nebadishinde, mundi kayi ubihata." 
Leviticus26:37 Nebalenduishangane, mundi kayi ubihata, bu bantu badi banyema ku muele wa nvnta, kanuena nuikala ne bukole bua kuimana ku mpala kua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna." 
Leviticus26:38 Nuenu nenufue munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabo, ne buloba bua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna nebunumine" 
Leviticus26:39 Bantu benu badi bashala nebanyingalale ne makenga a mibi yabo mu buloba bua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna, nebanyingalale ne makenga a mibi ya batatuʼabo kabidi." 
Leviticus26:40 Bobo nebatonde mibi yabo, nebatonde mitu ya batatuʼabo kabidi disambuka diabo dia mikenji ne kumpidia kuabo," 
Leviticus26:41 nunku meme nakabahidia, nakabafila mu buloba bua bantu badi nʼabo lukuna. Biahuekeshabo mitshima yabo idi kayiyi mitengula, bitabushabo dikenga dia mibi yabo," 
Leviticus26:42 nenvuluke tshihungidi tshianyi ne Yakoba ne tshihungidi tshianyi ne Isaka ne tshihungidi tshianyi ne Abalahama, nenvuluke buloba ebu." 
Leviticus26:43 Buloba buakashiyabo nebuikale ne bidimu bia kubanda, nebuikale hatuhu; bobo nebitabushe dikenga dia mibi yabo bualu bua bobo bakahidia mei anyi, ne mitshima yabo yakalengulula mikenji yanyi." 
Leviticus26:44 Kadi bua malu au onso hayabo mu buloba bua bantu badi nʼabo lukuna, meme tshiena mbahidia, tshiena ngikala nʼabo tshiji bua kubashiha tshiendelele ne bua kushiha tshihungidi tshianyi tshinakahunga nʼabo, bualu bua meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wabo," 
Leviticus26:45 kadi bua bualu buabo nenvuluke tshihungidi tshianyi tshinakahunga ne bankambua babo banakahatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ku mesu kua bisamba bia bantu, bua meme kuikala Nzambi wabo meme ndi Yehowa." 
Leviticus26:46 Ebi bidi mei mafunda ne mei majalame ne mikenji biakela Yehowa hankatshi handi ne Bena Isalele mukana mua Mose mu mukuna wa Sinai. 
Leviticus27:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Leviticus27:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Biasua mundi kushikisha kuditshiha kua kudifila kuandi, wewe neubale bungi bua bintu bidiye ufila kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus27:3 Wewe neubale bungi bua bintu kudi mundi mulume udi ne bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ku bi dimu makumi asambombo bu nshekele ya argent makumi atanu bu nshekele udibo bafila mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu. 
Leviticus27:4 Bikaleye muana wa bakashi, neubale nshekele makumi asatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Bikaleye muana wa balume udi ne bidimu bitanu tô ne ku bidimu makumi abidi, neubale nshekele makumi abidi, ne bikaleye muana wa bakashi, nshekele dikumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Bikaleye muana wa balume wa ngondo umue tô ne ku bidimu bitanu, neubale nshekele itanu, ne bikaleye muana wa bakashi, nshekele isatu." 
Leviticus27:7 Bikaleye mulume udi uhita bidimu makumi asambombo, wewe neubale nshekele dikumi ne itanu, ne bikaleye mukashi, nshekele dikumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Bikaleye muhele kayi ne bungi bua bintu biwakamubadila, nunku nebamushikike ku mpala kua muakuidi, ne muakuidi neatuangane nʼandi mushinga, muakuidi neatuangane ne muena kuditshiha mushinga ku bungi bua bintu bidiye nʼabi." 
Leviticus27:9 Bialueye ne nyama udibo bafila bu mulambu kudi Yehowa, bintu bionso bidibo baha Yehowa nebikale bintu bia tshijila." 
Leviticus27:10 Kamushintakashi nansha, nyama muimpe ku nyama mubi anyi nyama mubi ku nyama muimpe, biashintakasheye nyama ku nyama mukuabo, nyama eu ne nyama wakashintakasheye handi nebikale bia tshijila." 
Leviticus27:11 Bialueye ne nyama mubi udibo kabayi mua kudia bu mulambu kudi Yehowa, yeye neateke nyama ku mpala kua muakuidi," 
Leviticus27:12 ne muakuidi neatuangane handi mushinga bikala nyama muimpe anyi mubi, nyama neikale wa mushinga wakadiye ne muakuidi." 
Leviticus27:13 Biasueye kumuhikula, yeye neasakidile tshituha tshitanu ha mutu ha mushinga wandi." 
Leviticus27:14 Biajidila mundi Yehowa nsubu wandi, muakuidi neatuangane nʼandi mushinga, bikala nsubu muimpe anyi mubi, nsubu neikale ne mushinga wakatueye ne muakuidi." 
Leviticus27:15 Biasua muena nsubu kuhikula nsubu wandi, yeye neasakidile tshituha tshitanu tshia mushinga wa nsubu ha mutu hau, ne nsubu neikale wandi." 
Leviticus27:16 Biajidila muntu Yehowa tshituha tshia budimi bua buhianyi buandi, wewe neutuangane nʼandi mushinga ku bungi bua bintu bidiye mukunemu, biakuneye homer wa orge, mushinga wai newikale nshekele ya argent makumi atanu." 
Leviticus27:17 Biajidileye budimi buandi ku tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, mushinga wabu newikale bu muakatuanganabo." 
Leviticus27:18 Kadi biajidileye budimi buandi ku nyima kua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, muakuidi neamubadile mushinga bu bungi bua bidimu bidi bishala tô ne halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, nebamuhuekeshile mushinga wakasanganabo." 
Leviticus27:19 Biasua muntu wakajidila budimi kubuhikula, yeye neasakidile tshituha tshitanu ha mutu ha mushinga wakasanganabo, ne budimi nebuikale buandi." 
Leviticus27:20 Kadi biahidieye kuhikula budimi, anyi bikaleye muhanyishe muntu mukuabo budimi, kabena mua kubuhikula kabidi," 
Leviticus27:21 kadi halua tshidimu tshia disanka dinene hahingashabo budimi mu bia nza bia banfumu babu, budimi ebu nebuikale bua tshijila kudi Yehowa, nebuikale mu bianza bia muakuidi." 
Leviticus27:22 Biajidileye Yehowa budimi buakasumbeye budi kabuyi bua buhianyi buandi," 
Leviticus27:23 muakuidi neamubadile mushinga uwakatuangana nʼandi ku tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, yeye neafue mushinga uwakatuangana handi dituku adi bu tshintu tshia tshijila kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus27:24 Mu tshidimu tshia disanka dinene budimi nebuhingane kudi wakabuhana, kudi muena budimi mene." 
Leviticus27:25 Neubale mushinga wa bintu bionso bu mushinga wa nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu guéras makumi abidi idi nshekele umue. 
Leviticus27:26 Muntu kena mua kujidila Yehowa muanʼa bute wa nyama, nansha muana wa ngombe nansha muana wa mukoko etshi ntshintu tshia Yehowa." 
Leviticus27:27 Bikala nyama kayi muakane, yeye neamuhikule bu mudi mushinga webe, neasakidile tshituha tshitanu ha mutu, bikaleye kayi umuhikula, wewe neumuhane bu mudi mushinga webe." 
Leviticus27:28 Kabena mua kuhana anyi kuhikula tshintu tshia tshijila tshiakajidilabo kudi Yehowa, nansha tshintu tshia muntu anyi tshia nyama anyi tshia budimi bua buhianyi buandi bintu ebi bidi bitambe tshijila kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus27:29 Kabena mua kuhikula muntu mujidile munkatshi mua bantu bua kuhishibua, nebamushihe." 
Leviticus27:30 Tshintu tshionso tshia dikumi tshia buloba anyi tshia bintu biakakuama mu buloba anyi tshia mamuma a mitshi, etshi ntshintu tshia Yehowa, ntshintu tshia tshijila kudi Yehowa." 
Leviticus27:31 Biasua muntu kuhikula tshituha tshia tshintu tshia dikumi, yeye neasakidile tshituha tshitanu ha mutu hatshi." 
Leviticus27:32 Tshintu tshionso tshia dikumi tshia ngombe anyi tshia mikoko bidibo babala netshikale tshintu tshia tshijila kudi Yehowa. 
Leviticus27:33 Yeye kena ukeba mua kutangila ne tshintu tshidi tshimpe anyi tshidi tshibi, yeye kena mua kutshishintakasha nansha, biabishintakasheye, tshintu etshi ne tshintu tshiakashintakasheye nʼatshi nebikale bia tshima, kabena mua kubihikula." 
Leviticus27:34 Ei mmikenji yakelela Yehowa Bena Isalele mukana mua Mose mu mukuna wa Sinai. 
Numbers1:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu tshihela tshia Sinai, mu ntenta wa kusambakena, ku dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo muibidi mu tshidimu tshibidi tshia kuluhuka kuabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne," 
Numbers1:2 Ubale bungi bua Bena Isalele bonso, ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena a balume, muntu ne mundi," 
Numbers1:3 wewe ne Alona nubange kudi balume bonso ba mu Isalele bakahita bidimu makumi abidi to ne ha mutu, nubale buonso buabo ku tshisumbu ne ku tshisumbu badi bamanye mua kuya mu nvita." 
Numbers1:4 Nuye bienu ne muntu wa mu tshisamba muntu wa mu tshisamba, muntu yonso udi ku mutu kua nsubu wa batatuʼabo." 
Numbers1:5 Au mmena a balume badi mua kuimana nʼenu. Wa mu tshisamba tshia Lubena, Elisu muana mulume wa Shedeu." 
Numbers1:6 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Shimeona, Shelumiele muana mulume wa Sulishadai." 
Numbers1:7 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, Nashona muana mulume wa Aminadaba." 
Numbers1:8 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Yisakâ, Netanaele muana mulume wa Sua." 
Numbers1:9 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Zebuluna, Ehaba muana mulume wa Helona." 
Numbers1:10 Wa munkatshi mua bana ba Yosefe, wa mu tshisamba tshia Efelayima, Elishama muana mulume wa Amihuda. Wa mu tshisamba tshia Manashe, Gamaliele muana mulume wa Pedasû." 
Numbers1:11 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina, Abidana muana mulume wa Gideom." 
Numbers1:12 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Dana, Ahiezê muana mulume wa Amishadai." 
Numbers1:13 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Ashe, Pagiele muana mulume wa Okelana." 
Numbers1:14 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Gada, Eleyasafa muana mulume wa Deuele." 
Numbers1:15 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Nafatale, Ahila muana mulume wa Enana." 
Numbers1:16 Aba mbantu bakabikilabo ba mu tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele, bakelenge ba bisamba bia batatuʼabo, bakadi ku mutu kua binunu bia Bena Isalele." 
Numbers1:17 Mose ne Alona bakangata balume aba bakabikilabo ku mena abo 
Numbers1:18 bakasangisha tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele ku dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo muibidi, bakababadila milongo ya bankambua babo ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, muntu ne muntu." 
Numbers1:19 Bu muakambila Yehowa Mose, wakababadila mu tshihela tshia Sinai." 
Numbers1:20 Bana ba Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Isalele, ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo muntu ne muntu, ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu balume bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:21 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Lubena binunu makami anai ne bisambombo ne nkama itanu. 
Numbers1:22 Bana ba Shimeona, ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo muntu ne muntu, balume bonso ku bidimu makumi abidi to ne ha mutu, bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:23 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Shimeona binunu makumi atanu ne tshitema ne nkama isatu. 
Numbers1:24 Bana ba Gada ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo, ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita;" 
Numbers1:25 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Gada binunu makumi anai ne bitanu ne nkama isambombo ne makumi atanu. 
Numbers1:26 Bana ba Yuda ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita;" 
Numbers1:27 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Yuda binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne binai ne nkama isambombo. 
Numbers1:28 Bana ba Yisakâ ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:29 bakabala ba tshisamba tshia Yisakâ binunu makumi atanu ne binai ne nkama mai. 
Numbers1:30 Bana ba Zebuluna ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita;" 
Numbers1:31 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Zebuluna binunu makumi atanu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama mai. 
Numbers1:32 Bana ba Yosefe ba mu tshisamba tshia Efelayima ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:33 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Efelayima binunu makumi anai ne nkama itanu. 
Numbers1:34 Bana ba Manashe ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:35 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Manashe binunu makumi asatu ne bibidi ne nkama ibidi. 
Numbers1:36 Bana ba Benyamina ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita;" 
Numbers1:37 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina binunu makumi asatu ne bitanu ne nkama mai. 
Numbers1:38 Bana ba Dana ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi to ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:39 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Dana binunu makumi asambombo ne bibidi ne nkama muanda mutekete. 
Numbers1:40 Bana ba Ashê ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:41 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Ashê binunu makumi anai ne tshimue ne nkama itanu. 
Numbers1:42 Bana ba Nafatale ku bikondo biabo, ku meku abo, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bungi bua mena abo ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita," 
Numbers1:43 bakabala ba mu tshisamba tshia Nafatale binunu makumi atanu ne bisatu ne nkama mai. 
Numbers1:44 Aba mbantu bakabalabo kudi Mose ne Alona, ne kudi bakelenge ba Bena Isalele dikumi ne babidi, muntu ku nsubu wa batatuʼabo muntu ku nsubu wa batatuʼabo." 
Numbers1:45 Nunku bungi bua Bena Isalele buakabalabo ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bonso bakamanya mua kuya mu nvita mu Isalele" 
Numbers1:46 bungi bua buonso buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu nkama isambombo ne bisatu ne nkama itanu ne makumi atanu. 
Numbers1:47 Kadi kabakabala Bena Lewi munkatshi muabo ku tshisamba tshia batatuʼabo. 
Numbers1:48 Bualu bua Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers1:49 Kubadi tshisamba tshia Lewi nansha, kubadi bungi buabo munkatshi mua Bena Isalele," 
Numbers1:50 kadi usungule Bena Lewi bua kuenzabo mudimu mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne wa bintu bionso bidimu bobo nebatuale nsubu ne bintu bionso bidimu, bobo nebabibale, nebashikame ha buihi ne nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers1:51 Hayabo ne nsubu wa tshitendelelu mu nshila, Bena Lewi nebatule nsubu, ne halongololabo tshitudilu, Bena Lewi nebamushimike, bialua muenyi ha buihi nebamushihe." 
Numbers1:52 Bena Isalele nebadishimikile ntenta yabo, mundi ne muntu ku tshitudilu tshiandi, hehi ne dibendele diandi ku bisumbu biabo." 
Numbers1:53 Kadi Bena Lewi nebashimike ntenta yabo minyunguluke nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bua mulau kaukuatshi Bena Isalele Bena Lewi nebabale nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers1:54 Bena Isalele bakenza nunku, bakenza malu onso akambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers2:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Numbers2:2 Muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi mua Bena Isalele nenshimike ntenta wandi hehi ne dibendele diandi, didi ne bimanyinu bia nsubu ya batatuʼabo bifundahu, nebashimike ntenta yabo minyunguluke tshitendelelu mitangile ku tshitendelelu." 
Numbers2:3 Bantu badi ne bimanyinu bia dibendele dia tshisamba tshia Yuda ku tshisumbu ne ku tshisumbu nebashikame ku luseke lua ku esete kudi diba dihatuka. Nashona muana mulume wa Aminadaba neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Yuda. 
Numbers2:4 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne binai ne nkama isambombo. 
Numbers2:5 Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Yisakâ nebashikame hehi nʼandi. Netanele muana mulume wa Sua neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Yisakâ. 
Numbers2:6 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi atanu ne binai ne nkama mai. 
Numbers2:7 Tshisamba tshia Zebuluna, Eliaba muana mulume wa Helona neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Zebuluna." 
Numbers2:8 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi atanu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama mai. 
Numbers2:9 Bantu bonso bakabalabo ba mu tshitudilu tshia Yuda bakadi binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne bisambombo ne nkama mai ku bisumbu biabo Bobo nebaye ku mpala. 
Numbers2:10 Nebateke dibendele dia tshitudilu tshia Lubena ku luseke lua ku sude. Elisu muana mulume wa Shedeu neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Lubena. 
Numbers2:11 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi anai ne bisambombo ne nkama itanu. 
Numbers2:12 Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Shimeona nebashikame hehi nʼandi Shelumiele muana mulume wa Sulishadai neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Shimeona. 
Numbers2:13 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi atanu ne tshitema ne nkama isatu. 
Numbers2:14 Tshisamba tshia Gada, Eleyasafa muana mulume wa Luele neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Gada." 
Numbers2:15 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi anai ne bitanu ne nkama isambombo ne makumi atanu. 
Numbers2:16 Bantu bonso bakabalabo ba mu tshitudilu tshia Lubena bakadi binunu lukama ne makumi atanu ne tshimue ne nkama mai ne makumi atanu Bobo nebatonde ku nyima, tshisumbu tshibidi." 
Numbers2:17 Nunku nebaye ne ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshisumbu tshia Bena Lewi tshikala munkatshi mua bisumbu bikuabo bu mudibo bashikama mu bitudilu, nebaye ku mpala nunku, muntu mu muaba wandi mundi mu muaba wandi ku mabendele abo." 
Numbers2:18 Nebateke dibendele dia tshitudilu tshia Efelayima ku luseke lua ku wesete ku bisumbu biabo Elishama muana mulume wa Amihuda neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Efelayima 
Numbers2:19 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi anai ne nkama itanu. 
Numbers2:20 Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Manashe nebashikame hehi nʼandi. Gamaliele muana mulume wa Pedasu neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Manashe. 
Numbers2:21 Bantu bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi asatu ne bibidi ne nkama ibidi. 
Numbers2:22 Tshisamba tshia Benyamina Abidana muana mulume wa Gideoni neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Benyamina. 
Numbers2:23 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi asatu ne bitanu ne nkama mai. 
Numbers2:24 Bantu bonso bakabalabo ba mu tshitudilu tshia Efelayima bakadi binunu lukama ne muanda mukulu ne lukama lumue ku bisumbu biabo. Bobo nebabalonde ku nyima, tshisumbu tshisatu." 
Numbers2:25 Nebateke dibendele dia tshitudilu tshia Dana ku luseke lua ku nôde. Ahiezê muana mulume wa Amishadai neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Dana. 
Numbers2:26 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi asambombo ne bibidi ne nkama muanda mutekete. 
Numbers2:27 Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Ashe nebashikame hehi nʼandi Pagiele muana mulume wa Okelana neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Ashe. 
Numbers2:28 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi anai ne tshimue ne nkama itanu. 
Numbers2:29 Tshisamba tshia Nafatale Ahila muana mulume wa Enana neikale mukelenge wa bana ba Nafatale. 
Numbers2:30 Bantu bandi bakamubadilabo bakadi binunu makumi atanu ne bisatu ne nkama mai. 
Numbers2:31 Bantu bonso bakabalabo ba mu tshitudilu tshia Dana bakadi binunu lukama ne makumi atanu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama isambombo. Bobo nebalonde ku nyima kua bonso ku mabendele abo. 
Numbers2:32 Aba mbantu bakabalabo ba Bena Isalele ku nsubu ya batatu abo, bungi bua bantu bakabalabo ba mu bitudilu biabo ku bisumbu biabo buakadi binunu nkama isambombo ne bisatu ne nkama itanu ne makumi atanu." 
Numbers2:33 Kadi kabakabala Bena Lewi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers2:34 Bena Isalele bakenza nunku, mu malu onso akambila Yehowa Mose, nunku bakashikama ku mabendele abo, ne bakaya ku mpala ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo." 
Numbers3:1 Ebi mbikondo bia Alona ne Mose mu dituku diakasomba Yehowa ne Mose mu mukuna wa Sinai. 
Numbers3:2 Au mmena a bana ba balume ba Alona Nadaba muanʼa bute ne Abihu ne Eleazâ ne Itamâ. 
Numbers3:3 Au mmena a bana ba balume ba Alona bakuidi bakadi ne manyi mela ha mitu, bakajidilabo bua kuenza mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Numbers3:4 Nadaba ne Abihu bakafua ku mpala kua Yehowa, hakaluabo ne kahia kakadi kakayi kajidila ku mpala kua Yehowa, mu tshihela tshia Sinai, bobo kabakadi ne bana, ne Eleazâ ne Itamâ bakenza mudimu wa buakuidi ku mesu kua Alona tatuʼabo." 
Numbers3:5 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers3:6 Ulue biebe ne tshisamba tshia Lewi, ubateke ku mpala kua Alona muakuidi, bua bobo bamuenzele mudimu." 
Numbers3:7 Bobo nebalame bintu biandi ne bintu bia bantu bonso ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bua kuenzelabo mudimu wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers3:8 Bobo nebalame bintu bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne bintu bia Bena Isalele, bua kuenzelabo mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers3:9 Wewe neufue Bena Lewi kudi Alona ne kudi bana bandi balume bobo badi bafidibue kudi Alona, bua kukuatshishabo Bena Isalele." 
Numbers3:10 Wewe neusungule Alona ne bana bandi balume, ne bobo nebashale ne mudimu wa buakuidi, bialua muenyi ha buihi nebamushihe." 
Numbers3:11 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers3:12 Mona, meme nakudiangatshila Bena Lewi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele mu miaba ya banʼa bute bonso bakalelabo munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, Bena Lewi nebikale banyi:" 
Numbers3:13 bualu bua banʼa bute bonso mbanyi, mu dituku dinakashiha banʼa bute bonso mu buloba bua Ejipitu, nakadijidila banʼa bute bonso ba mu Isalele, ne ba bantu ne ba nyama, bobo mbanyi, meme ndi Yehowa." 
Numbers3:14 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu tshihela tshia Sinai ne," 
Numbers3:15 Ubale bana ba Lewi ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo ne ku meku abo ubale bana ba balume bonso ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu. 
Numbers3:16 Mose wakababala bu mu dî dia Yehowa. 
Numbers3:17 Aba mbana ba balume ba Lewi ku mena abo Gêshona ne Kohata ne Melali. 
Numbers3:18 Au mmena a bana ba balume ba Gêshona ku meku abo Libini ne Shimei. 
Numbers3:19 Bana ba balume ba Kohata ku meku abo Amalama ne Yisehâ ne Hebelone ne Uziele 
Numbers3:20 Bana ba balume ba Melali ku meku abo Mali ne Mushi. Au mmeku a Bena Lewi ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo. 
Numbers3:21 Mu Gêshona muakadi diku dia Bena Libini ne diku dia Bena Shimei, au mmeku a bena Gêshona." 
Numbers3:22 Bantu bakabalabo, bana balume ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu, bakadi binunu muanda mutekete ne nkama itanu." 
Numbers3:23 Meku a Bena Gêshona nebashikame ku nyima kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu ku wesete. 
Numbers3:24 Eleyasafa muana mulume wa Laele neikale mukelenge wa nsubu wa batatu ba Bena Gêshona. 
Numbers3:25 Bintu bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu bidi bana balume ba Gêshona balama nebikale ntenta, ne tshilulu tshidibo bateka ha mutu, ne bilulu bia ku bibi bia ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Numbers3:26 ne bilulu bia luhangu ne bilulu bidibo bateka ku mbelu kua luhangu, hehi ne nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne hehi ne tshioshelu, ne nshinga ya ku luhangu bua mudimu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers3:27 Mu Kohata muakadi diku dia Bena Amalama ne dia Bena Yisehâ ne dia Bena Hebelone ne dia Bena Uziele au mmeku a Bena Kohata. 
Numbers3:28 Bungi bua bana ba balume ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu buakadi binunu muanda mukulu ne nkama isambombo, bakadi balama bintu bia nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers3:29 Bantu ba mu meku a bana balume ba Kohata nebashikame ku luseke lua ku sude. 
Numbers3:30 Elisafana muana wa balume wa Uziele neikale mukelenge wa nsubu wa batatu ba Bena Kohata. 
Numbers3:31 Bobo nebalame mushete wa Nzambi ne mesa ne minda ne bioshelu ne malonga adibo benza nʼau mudimu mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne tshilulu tshidibo bateka ku mpala kua muaba wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:32 Eleazâ muana mulume wa Alona, muakuidi, neikale ku mutu kua bakelenge ba Bena Lewi, ne ku mutu kua bantu badi balama bintu bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers3:33 Mu Melali muakadi diku dia Bena Mali ne dia Bena Mushi au mmeku a Melali. 
Numbers3:34 Bungi bua balume ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu buakadi binunu bisambombo ne nkama ibidi. 
Numbers3:35 Suliele, muana mulume wa Abihayila, neikale mukelenge wa nsubu wa batatu ba meku a Melali bobo nebashikame ku luseke lua nsubu wa tshitendelelu lua ku nôde." 
Numbers3:36 Bintu bidi bana balume ba Melali balama bidi mabaya a nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne mitshi ne makunshi ne nkanu ne bintu biabi bionso;" 
Numbers3:37 ne makunshi a ku luhangu ne nkanu yai ne mitanda yai ne nshinga yai. 
Numbers3:38 Mose ne Alona ne bana bandi balume nebashikame ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena ku luseke lua ku esete kudi diba dihatuka, bua kulama nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bintu bia Bena Isalele; bialua muenyi ha buihi nebamushihe." 
Numbers3:39 Bungi bua Bena Lewi bakabalabo kudi Mose ne Alona bu muakambila Yehowa, ku meku abo, balume bonso ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu, buakadi binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
Numbers3:40 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Ubale banʼa bute balume bonso ba Bena Isalele ba mu ngondo umue to ne ha mutu, funda bungi bua mena abo." 
Numbers3:41 Wewe newangatshile Bena Lewi (meme ndi Yehowa) mu miaba ya banʼa bute ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, ne bimuna bia Bena Lewi mu miaba ya banʼa bute ba bimuna bia Bena Isalele." 
Numbers3:42 Mose wakabala banʼa bute bonso ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bu muakamuambila Yehowa." 
Numbers3:43 Bungi bua banʼa bute balume ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi ne nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mutekete ne basatu. 
Numbers3:44 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers3:45 Angata Bena Lewi mu miaba ya banʼa bute ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, ne bimuna bia Bena Lewi mu miaba ya bimuna biabo, Bena Lewi nebikale banyi meme ndi Yehowa" 
Numbers3:46 Bua kuhikula banʼa bute ba Bena Isalele, nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mutekete ne basatu, badi bahita balume ba Bena Lewi bungi," 
Numbers3:47 newangate nshekele itanu ku muntu ne ku muntu bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi (nshekele udi bu guéras makumi abidi): 
Numbers3:48 wewe neufue nshekele ya bungi buabo buakahikulabo, kudi Alona ne kudi bana bandi balume." 
Numbers3:49 Mose wakangata argent ya buhikudi bua bantu bakahita Bena Lewi bungi; 
Numbers3:50 yeye wakangata nshekele kudi banʼa bute ba Bena Isalele bu tshinunu tshimue ne nkama isatu ne makumi asambombo ne itanu, bu nshekele udibo bafile mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers3:51 Mose wakafua argent ya buhikudi buabo kudi Alona ne bana bandi balume bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers4:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Numbers4:2 Balai bungi bua bana balume ba Kohata ba munkatshi mua bana balume ba Lewi ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo," 
Numbers4:3 mu bidimu makumi asatu to ne ku bidimu makumi atanu buonso buabo badi bakuata mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Numbers4:4 Eu udi mudimu wa bana balume ba Kohata udibo benza ne bintu bia tshijila mu ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Numbers4:5 hayabo ku luendu Alona neabuelemu ne bana bandi balume nebatuhe tshilulu tshikudika, nebabituale hatshi mushete wa Nzambi," 
Numbers4:6 nebâteke tshibuikilu tshia biseba bia nkonge ha mutu hatshi, nebâteke tshilulu tshifike ha mutu hatshi kabidi, nebabueshemu mitshi ya mushete." 
Numbers4:7 Nebateke tshilulu tshia bleu ha mutu ha mesa a mampa, nebâteke ha mutu hatshi malonga ne nkutu ne mpanza ne makoho adibo balongolola nʼau, ne mampa neikalehu," 
Numbers4:8 nebatekehu tshilulu tshikunze, nebâteke tshibuikidi tshia biseba bia nkonge ha mutu hatshi, nebabueshemu mitshi ya mesa." 
Numbers4:9 Nebangate tshilulu tshia bleu, nebabuikile hatshi bitekelu bia minda ne minda, ne bintu bidibo bajima habi minda, ne tuhanza tua mishila ya kahia, ne bihanza bia manyi adibo bakuatshisha nʼau minda" 
Numbers4:10 nebateke minda ne malonga ne bintu ebi bionso mu tshibuikidi tshia biseba bia nkonge, nebabiteke ha mitshi ibidi idi mikuatakasha." 
Numbers4:11 Nebateke tshilulu tshia bleu ha mutu ha tshioshelu tshia or, nebâteke ha mutu hatshi tshibuikidi tshia biseba bia nkonge, nebabueshemu mitshi ya tshioshelu" 
Numbers4:12 nebangate malonga onso adibo benza nʼau mudimu wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu nebâteke mu tshilulu tshia bleu, nebâbuikde ne tshibuikidi tshia biseba bia nkonge, nebâteke ha mitshi ibidi idi mikuatakasha" 
Numbers4:13 Nebumushe butue ku tshioshelu, nebatekehu tshilulu tshikunzubile" 
Numbers4:14 nebâteke ha mutu hatshi bintu bionso bidibo benza nʼabi mudimu watshi ne malonga a kahia ne nkobo ya munyinyi, ne nkasu, ne bihanza ne malonga onso a tshioshelu, nebâteke tshibuikilu tshia biseba bia nkonge, nebabueshemu mitshi yatshi." 
Numbers4:15 Kushikisha Alona ne bana bandi balume kubuikila nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bintu bionso bia mu nsubu, hayabo mu nshila, hashishe bana balume ba Kohata nebalue bua kubituala, kadi bobo kabalengi bintu bia tshijila bianza, bua kabafu. Bintu ebi mmajitu a bana balume ba Kohata mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers4:16 Bintu bidi nʼabi Eleazâ, muana mulume wa Alona, muakuidi, nebikale manyi a minda ne musenga wa manananshi, ne mulambu wa bukula, ne manyi adibo bela ha mutuyeye udi mulami wa nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bintu bionso bidimu, ne wa muaba wa tshijila ne bintu bionso bidimu." 
Numbers4:17 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Numbers4:18 Kanumushi tshisamba tshia meku a Bena Kohata munkatshi mua Bena Lewi," 
Numbers4:19 nubenzele nunku, bua bikale ne muoyo, kabafu, haluabo ha buihi ne bintu bia tshijila Alona ne bana bandi balume nebabuelemu, nebaleshe muntu ne muntu mudimu wandi ne bujitu buandi," 
Numbers4:20 kababuedi bua kutangila bintu bia tshijila nansha kakese, bua kabafu." 
Numbers4:21 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers4:22 Ubale bungi bua bana balume ba Gêshona kabidi ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo ne ku meku abo; 
Numbers4:23 ba bidimu makumi asatu tô ne ku bidimu makumi atanu wewe neubabale, buonso buabo badi bakuata mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers4:24 Eu mmudimu wa meku a Bena Gêshona udibo benza ne majitu adibo batuala 
Numbers4:25 nebabidie bilulu bidi binyunguluka nsubu wa tshitendelu, ne ntenta mene wa kusambakena, ne tshilulu tshia ha mutu, ne tshibuikidi tshia biseba bia nkonge tshidi ha mutu hatshi, ne tshilulu tshidi ku mbelu kua nsubu," 
Numbers4:26 ne bilulu bia ku luhangu, ne tshilulu tshidi ku tshibi tshia luhangu tshidi hehi ne nsubu wa tshitendelelu tshidi tshinyunguluka tshioshelu tshia kahia, ne nshinga ya ku luhangu, ne bintu bionso bidibo benza nʼabi mudimu, bobo nebenze mudimu eu." 
Numbers4:27 Bu mu dî dia Alona ne bana bandi balume Bena Gêshona nebenze mudimu wabo, nebatuale majitu abo; nuenu nenubaleshe majitu abo." 
Numbers4:28 Eu udi mudimu wa meku a bana balume ba Bena Gêshona mu ntenta wa kusambakena ne bintu bidibo nʼabi bualu nebikale mu tshianza tshia Itamâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi." 
Numbers4:29 Wewe neubale bana balume ba Bena Melali ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo," 
Numbers4:30 ba bidimu makumi asatu tô ne ku bidimu makumi atanu, wewe neubabale, muntu yonso udi akuata mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers4:31 Ebi mbintu bidibo ne bualu bua kutuala, mu mudimu udibo benza mu ntenta wa kusambakena mabaya a nsubu ne mitshi yandi ne makunshi andi ne nkanu yandi," 
Numbers4:32 ne makunshi a ku luhangu ne nkanu yau ne milonda yau ne nshinga yau ne bintu biau bionso bidibo benza nʼabi mudimuku mena abi wewe neubaleshe bintu bia majitu abo. 
Numbers4:33 Eu udi mudimu wa meku a bana balume ba Melali, udibo benza mu ntenta wa kusambakena, ku tshianza tshia Itamâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi." 
Numbers4:34 Mose ne Alona ne bakelenge ba mu tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele bakabala bana balume ba Bena Kohata ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo," 
Numbers4:35 ba bidimu makumi asatu to ne ku makumi atanu, muntu yonso wakadi ubuela mu mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusambakena" 
Numbers4:36 bakabalabo ku meku abo bakadi binunu bibidi ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi atanu. 
Numbers4:37 Aba mbantu bakabalabo mu meku a Bena Kohata bakadi benza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bakababala kudi Mose ne Alona, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers4:38 Bungi bua bana balume ba Gêshona bakabalabo ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo," 
Numbers4:39 ba mu bidimu makumi asatu tô ne ku bidimu makumi atanu, buonso buabo bakadi benza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Numbers4:40 bakabalabo ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo bakadi binunu bibidi ne nkama isambombo ne makumi asatu. 
Numbers4:41 Aba mbana balume ba Gêshona bakabalabo ku meku abo, buonso buabo bakenza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bakabalabo kudi Mose ne Alona bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Numbers4:42 Bana balume ba Melali bakabalabo ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo," 
Numbers4:43 ba bidimu makumi asatu to ne ku bidimu makumi atanu, buonso buabo bakadi benza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Numbers4:44 bakabalabo ku meku abo bakadi binunu bisatu ne nkama ibidi. 
Numbers4:45 Aba mbana balume ba Melali bakabalabo ku meku abo, bakabalabo kudi Mose ne Alona bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers4:46 Bungi bua Bena Lewi bakabalabo kudi Mose ne Alona ne kudi bakelenge ba mu Isalele, ku meku abo ne ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo," 
Numbers4:47 ba bidimu makumi asatu tô ne ku bidimu makumi atanu, buonso buabo bakadi benza mudimu ne bakadi batuala majitu a ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Numbers4:48 bakabalabo bakadi binunu muanda mukulu ne nkama itanu ne makumi muanda mukulu. 
Numbers4:49 Bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa bakabalabo kudi Mose, muntu yonso ku mudimu wandi ne ku bujitu buandi, bakabalabo kudiye bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers5:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers5:2 Wele dî kudi Bena Isalele bua bobo bihate bena nsudi mu tshitudilu, ne muntu yonso udi ne mputa wa luhangu ne muntu yonso udi munyanguke ku dilenga dia muntu mufue" 
Numbers5:3 nebihate nansha mulume nansha mukashi ku tshitudilu, kabanyangi tshitudilu tshiabo, mundi mushikame." 
Numbers5:4 Bena Isalele bakenza nunku, bakabihata mu tshitudilu, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose, Bena Isalele bakenza nunku." 
Numbers5:5 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers5:6 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Henza mulumi anyi mukashi bualu bubi budi bantu benza, udi ushiha mukenji wa Yehowa, ne badi bahisha muntu au," 
Numbers5:7 nunku yeye neatonde bubi buakenzeye, neahingishe bintu bionso biakangateye, neasangishe tshintu tshia tshitanu ha mutu habi, neabihingishe kudi nfumu wabi wakenzeye bubi." 
Numbers5:8 Bikala muntu kayi ne muanʼabo wa kumuhingishila bintu bia bubi buandi, bintu bidiye uhingisha bia kudilengesha nʼabi munda kudi Yehowa nebikale bintu bia muakuidi, ha mutu ha mulambu wa tshimpanga udiye ufila bua kudibuikila nʼau bubi buandi." 
Numbers5:9 Bintu bionso bia tshijila bia Bena Isalele bidibo banyukula, bidibo bafila kudi muakuidi, nebikale biandi." 
Numbers5:10 Bintu bionso bia tshijila bia muntu ne muntu nebikale biandi, ne bintu bionso bidi muntu uha muakuidi nebikale biandi." 
Numbers5:11 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers5:12 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Bikala mukashi wa muntu usesuka, bikaleye umuenzela bibi," 
Numbers5:13 bikala mulume mukuabo ulala nʼandi, bikala bualu ebu busokoma ku mesu kua mulume wandi, kabuyi bumanyibue, bikala mukashi muonyibue ne kakuyi mumonyi wa bualu, kabayi bamukuata hakadiye wenda nʼandi," 
Numbers5:14 ne bikala mukau mumukuate bualu bua mukashi wandi udi muonyibue anyi bikala mukau umukuata bualu bua mukashi wandi udi kayi muonyibue," 
Numbers5:15 hashishe mulume alue biandi ne mukashi wandi kudi muakuidi, nealue ne mulambu wandi, tshituha tshia dikumi tshia tshihiminu tshia bukula bua orge, kedihu nansha manyi, katekihu nansha musenga wa manananshi, bualu bua eu udi mulambu wa mukau, mulambu wa bukula wa tshivulukidi, bua kuvuluishangana bualu bubi." 
Numbers5:16 Muakuidi nealue nʼandi ha buihi, neamuteke ku mpala kua Yehowa" 
Numbers5:17 ne muakuidi neangate mai a tshijila mu tshivuadi tshia dima, neangate dinfuenkenya dia buloba didi hanshi mu ntenta wa kusambakena, neadiele mu mai." 
Numbers5:18 Muakuidi neashikike mukashi ku mpala kua Yehowa, neasulule nsuki ya mukashi, neateke mulambu wa bukula wa tshivulukidi mu bianza biandi, eu udi mulambu wa mukau, muakuidi neangate mai a bululu adi elesha mulau mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Numbers5:19 Muakuidi neamutshihishe, neambile mukashi ne, Bikala mulume kayi mulale nʼebe, ne wewe kuyi musesuke mu malu mabi kudi mundi udi kayi mulume webe, wewe wikale mubingishibue kudi mai a bululu adi elesha mulau." 
Numbers5:20 Kadi biwikala musesuke kudi mundi udi kayi mulume webe, ne biwikala muonyibue ne bikala mundi udi kayi mulume webe mulale nʼebe," 
Numbers5:21 (nunku muakuidi neatshihishe mukashi kuditshiha kua mulau) muakuidi neambile mukashi ne, Yehowa akuenzeshe mulau ne kuditshiha munkatshi mua bana benu, haboleshe Yehowa tshibelu tshiebe, ne hatuntumusheye mubidi," 
Numbers5:22 ne mai au adi elesha mulau neabuele mu mala ebe, neatuntumushe mubidi webe, neaboleshe tshibelu tshiebe Ne mukashi neitabe ne, Amen, Amen." 
Numbers5:23 Muakuidi neatonde milau ei mu mukanda, neanumushe mu mai a bululu," 
Numbers5:24 neamushe mukashi mai a bululu adi elesha mulau, ne mai adi elesha mulau neabuele munda muandi, neikale mai a bululu." 
Numbers5:25 Muakuidi neangate bukula bua mulambu wa mukau ku bianza bia mukashi, neanyukule mulambu wa bukula ku mpala kua Yehowa, nealue nʼau ku tshioshelu," 
Numbers5:26 ne muakuidi neambule dianza tente ne bukula, bu tshivulukidi tshiau, neabuoshele ha tshioshelu, ne ku nyima yeye neamushe mukashi mai." 
Numbers5:27 Hakamunuisheye mai, hashishe Bikala mukashi muonyibue, bikaleye muenzele mulume wandi bualu bubi, mai adi elesha mulau neabuele munda muandi, neikale a bululu, ne mubidi wandi neutuntumuke, ne tshibelu tshiandi netshibole ne mukashi neikale ne mulau munkatshi mua bana babo." 
Numbers5:28 Bikala mukashi kayi muonyibue, kadi yeye udi muakane, nunku yeye neikale mubingishibue, nealele bana." 
Numbers5:29 Eu udi mukenji wa mukau hasesuka mukashi bua kulala ne mundi udi kayi mulume wandi ne yeye udi muonyibue," 
Numbers5:30 anyi hakuata mulume mukau bualu bua mukashi wandi, nunku yeye neashikike mukashi ku mpala kua Yehowa, hashishe muakuidi neashikishe mukenji eu wonso kudi mukashi." 
Numbers5:31 Mulume neikale mubingishibue ku bubi, ne mukashi eu neadituadile bubi buandi." 
Numbers6:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers6:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Biatshiha nansha mulume nansha mukashi kuditshiha kua Munazi bua kudijidila kudi Yehowa," 
Numbers6:3 neajile muoyo ne maluvu makole kanu vinaigre wa nvinyo anyi vinaigre wa maluvu makole, kanu mai a tumuma tukese, kadi tumuma tubishe anyi tumuma tûme." 
Numbers6:4 Mu matuku onso a tshijila tshiandi kadi tshindi tshiakenzabo ne mitshi ya tumuma ku ntete ya tumuma tô ne ku bihusu biatu. 
Numbers6:5 Mu matuku onso a tshijila tshiandi kabateki dihaya ha mutu nʼandi, neikale mundi wa tshijila tô ne hashikisheye matuku adiye musue kubijidila kudi Yehowa; nsuki ya ha mutu nʼandi neyikale mile." 
Numbers6:6 Mu matuku onso adiye mudijidile kudi Yehowa yeye kena mumanye mua kulua ha buihi ne mundi mufue. 
Numbers6:7 Kena mumanye mua kudiona bualu bua tatuʼandi anyi bua mamuʼandi anyi bua muanʼabo mulume anyi bua muanʼabo mukashi hafuabo, bualu bua tshijila tshiandi kudi Yehowa tshidi ha mutu nʼandi." 
Numbers6:8 Yeye udi mujidile kudi Yehowa matuku onso a tshijila tshiandi. 
Numbers6:9 Bikala muntu mukusuke tshituha tshibi hehi nʼandi, ne bikala mutu wa tshijila tshiandi muonyibue, nunku yeye neabeye nsuki ya ha mutu nʼandi mu dituku didiye mudilengeshe, neadibeye nsuki dituku dia muanda mutekete." 
Numbers6:10 Halua dî diku dia muanda mukulu nealue biandi ne nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi anyi mputu nyunyu ibidi kudi muakuidi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena 
Numbers6:11 muakuidi neafile umue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, neamubuikidile bubi buandi buakenzeye bua muntu mufue, neajidile mutu wandi dituku adi mene." 
Numbers6:12 Yeye neujidile Yehowa matuku a tshijila tshiandi, nealue biandi ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bihanga diandi, kadi matuku a diambedi adi hatuhu bualu bua tshijila tshiandi tshiakadi tshionyibue." 
Numbers6:13 Eu udi mukenji wa Munazi hashikisheye matuku a tshijila tshiandi nebalue nʼandi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena:
