Numbers6:14 neafile mulambu wandi kudi Yehowa, muana mulume wa mukoko udi kayi ne tshilema wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, ne muana mukashi wa mukoko udi muakane wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kubuikila hau bubi, ne tshimpanga tshidi tshiakane bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala," 
Numbers6:15 ne tshisaka tente ne mampa adi kayi ne luevene, ne mikata yakenzabo ne bukula bubotesha ne manyi, ne mikata idi kayiyi ne luevene ne manyi mela ha mutu hai, ne mulambu wa bukula ne mulambu wa bintu bia kunua." 
Numbers6:16 Muakuidi neabifile kudi Yehowa, neafile mulambu wandi wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mulambu wandi wa kuosha ha kahia" 
Numbers6:17 neafile tshimpanga bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala kudi Yehowa ne tshisaka tshia mampa adi kâyi ne luevene, muakuidi neafile kabidi mulambu wa bukula ne mulambu wa bintu bia kunua." 
Numbers6:18 Munazi neabeye nsuki ya ha mutu ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena neangate nsuki, neayiteke ha kahia kadi kuinshi kua mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala." 
Numbers6:19 Muakuidi neangate diboko dia tshimpanga diakalambabo, ne mutanda wa mampa adi kâyi ne luevene mu tshisaka, ne mukata udi kauyi ne luevene, neabiteke mu bianza bia Munazi hashikisheye kubeya mutu wandi," 
Numbers6:20 muakuidi neabinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula ku mpala kua Yehowa, ebi mbintu bia tshijila kudi muakuidi bidi bisangisha ne tshiadi ne tshibelu bidibo banyukula ku mpala kua Yehowa, hashika bualu ebu, Munazi udi mumanye mua kunua nvinyo." 
Numbers6:21 Eu udi mukenji wa Munazi udi uditshiha, ne mulambu wa tshijila tshiandi kudi Yehowa, ha mutu ha bintu bidiye mumanye mua kufila bu kuditshiha kuakaditshiheye nʼaku mbudiye nʼabu mbua kuenza bu mudi mukenji wa tshijila tshiandi." 
Numbers6:22 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers6:23 Wambile Alona ne bana bandi balume ne, Nenuvudishile Bena Isalele disanka nunku, nenubambile ne," 
Numbers6:24 Yehowa anusankishe, anulame." 
Numbers6:25 Yehowa atemeshe mpala wandi kunudi, anufuile luse." 
Numbers6:26 Yehowa abandishe mesu andi kunudi, anuhe ditalala." 
Numbers6:27 Hashishe nebâteke dina dianyi ha Bena Isalele, meme nembavudishile disanka." 
Numbers7:1 Hakalua dituku diakashikisha Mose kushimika nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne hakeleye manyi ha mutu hatshi, wakatshijidila, ne bintu bionso biakadimu ne tshioshelu ne malonga atshi onso, ne hakeleye manyi ha mutu habi, wakabijidila." 
Numbers7:2 Bakelenge ba mu Isalele, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bakafua bintu. Aba mbakelenge ba bisamba, bakadi ku mutu kua bantu bakabalabo" 
Numbers7:3 bakatua ne bintu biabo ku mpala kua Yehowa makalu manene asambombo ne ngombe dikumi ne ibidi dikalu dimue kudi bakelenge babidi, ne ngombe umue kudi muntu ne mundi, bakalua nʼabi ku mpala kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers7:4 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers7:5 Angata bintu biabo bua kuenza nʼabi mudimu wa ntenta wa kusambakena, ubifile kudi Bena Lewi mundi ne muntu ku mudimu wandi." 
Numbers7:6 Mose Wakangata makalu ne ngombe, wakabifila kudi Bena Lewi." 
Numbers7:7 Wakaha bana balume ba Gêshona makalu abidi ne ngombe mai, bu muakadi mudimu wabo" 
Numbers7:8 wakaha bana balume ba Melali makalu anai ne ngombe muanda mukulu bu muakadi mudimu wabo wakenzabo, ku tshianza tshia Itamâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi." 
Numbers7:9 Kadi yeye bakaha bana balume ba Kohata tshintu, bualu bua bobo bakadi ne mudimu ne bintu bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bakabituala ha maha abo." 
Numbers7:10 Bakelenge bakafua bintu bia kujidila nʼabi tshioshelu mu dituku diakelabo manyi ha mutu hatshi, mbakelenge mene bakafua bintu biabo ku mpala kua tshioshelu." 
Numbers7:11 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Buonso buabo nebafile bintu biabo, mukelenge dituku, mukelenge dituku, bua kujidila tshioshelu." 
Numbers7:12 Nashona, muana mulume wa Aminadaba wa tshisamba tshia Yuda, wakafua bintu biandi dituku dia kumudilu." 
Numbers7:13 Bintu biakafileye biakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete, bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:14 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi, mule tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:15 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:16 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:17 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu, ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kumusha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Nashona, muana mulume wa Aminadaba." 
Numbers7:18 Netanele, muana mulume wa Sua, mukelenge wa Yisakâ, wakaula bintu biandi dituku dibidi." 
Numbers7:19 Wa kafila bu mulambu wandi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:20 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mule tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:21 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:22 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi 
Numbers7:23 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Netanele, muana mulume wa Sua." 
Numbers7:24 Ehaba, muana mulume wa Helona, mukelenge wa bana ba Zebuluna, wakafua bintu dituku disatu." 
Numbers7:25 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent dia nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:26 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:27 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:28 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:29 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Ehaba, muana mulume wa Helona." 
Numbers7:30 Elisû muana mulume wa Shedeu, mukelenge wa bana balume ba Lubena, wakafua bintu dituku dinai." 
Numbers7:31 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:32 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:33 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:34 mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:35 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha n au ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Elisû, muana mulume wa Shedeu." 
Numbers7:36 Shelumiele, muana mulume wa Shulishadai, mukelenge wa bana ba Shimeona, wakafua bintu dituku ditanu." 
Numbers7:37 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:38 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mule tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:39 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:40 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:41 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Shelumiele, muana mulume wa Shulishadai." 
Numbers7:42 Eleyasafa, muana mulume wa Deuele, mukelenge wa bana ba Gada, wakafua bintu dituku disambombo" 
Numbers7:43 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:44 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:45 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:46 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila n au bubi," 
Numbers7:47 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Eleyasafa, muana mulume wa Deuele." 
Numbers7:48 Elishama, muana mulume wa Amihuda, mukelenge wa bana ba Efelayima, wakafua bintu dituku dia muanda mutekete." 
Numbers7:49 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:50 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi; 
Numbers7:51 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:52 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa ku bialeha nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:53 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Elishama, muana mulume wa Amihuda." 
Numbers7:54 Gamaliele, muana mulume wa Pedasû, mukelenge wa bana ba Manashe, wakafua bintu dituku dia muanda mukulu." 
Numbers7:55 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:56 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:57 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:58 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:59 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kubisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Gamaliele, muana mulume wa Pedasû." 
Numbers7:60 Abidana, muana mulume wa Gideoni, mukelenge wa bana ba Benyamina, wakafua bintu dituku dia tshitema." 
Numbers7:61 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula;" 
Numbers7:62 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mule tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:63 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia; 
Numbers7:64 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi 
Numbers7:65 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuyifila nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Abidana, muana mulume wa Gideoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ahiezê, muana mulume wa Amishadai, mukelenge wa bana ba Dana, wakafua bintu dituku dia dikumi." 
Numbers7:67 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi," 
Numbers7:68 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi," 
Numbers7:69 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia," 
Numbers7:70 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:71 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Ahiezê, muana mulume wa Amishadai." 
Numbers7:72 Pagiele, muana mulume wa Okelana mukelenge wa bana ba Ashe, wakafua bintu dituku dia dikumi ne dimue." 
Numbers7:73 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula;" 
Numbers7:74 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mûle tente ne musenga wa manananshi; 
Numbers7:75 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia; 
Numbers7:76 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers7:77 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Pagiele, muana mulume wa Okelana." 
Numbers7:78 Ahila, muana mulume wa Enana, mukelenge wa bana ba Nafatale, wakafua bintu dituku dia dikumi ne abidi." 
Numbers7:79 Mulambu wandi wakadi dilonga disalame dia tshiamu tshia argent, bujitu buadi buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne dilonga dia ndondo dia argent wa nshekele makumi muanda mutekete bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, bubidi buabi biule tente ne bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bu mulambu wa bukula," 
Numbers7:80 ne nkutu wa or wa nshekele dikumi mule tente ne musenga wa manananshi; 
Numbers7:81 ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne muana mulume wa mukoko wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia; 
Numbers7:82 ne mbushi wa mpumbu bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi; 
Numbers7:83 ne ngombe ibidi ne bimpanga bitanu ne mbushi ya mpumbu itanu ne bana balume ba mikoko batanu ba tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala eu udi mulambu wa Ahila, muana mulume wa Enana." 
Numbers7:84 Ebi mbintu biakajidilabo nʼabi tshioshelu mu dituku diakelabo manyi ha mutu hatshi kudi bukelenge ba mu Isalele malonga masalame a argent dikumi ne abidi, ne malonga a ndondo a argent dikumi ne abidi, ne nkutu ya or dikumi ne ibidi;" 
Numbers7:85 bujitu bua dilonga disalame dimue buakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi asatu, ne bua dilonga dia ndondo dimue nshekele makumi muanda mutekete, ne argent yonso ya bintu ebi bionso yakadi nshekele binunu bibidi ne nkama mai bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu;" 
Numbers7:86 ne nkutu ya or dikumi ne ibidi yakadi miule tente ne musenga wa manananshi, bujitu bua nkutu ne nkutu buakadi nshekele dikumi bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, or yonso ya nkutu ei yakadi nshekele lukama ne makumi abidi;" 
Numbers7:87 ne mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia wakadi balume ba ngombe dikumi ne babidi, bimpanga dikumi ne bibidi, ne bana balume ba mikoko ba tshidimu tshimue dikumi ne babidi, ne mulambu wabi wa bukula, ne mbushi ya mpumbu ya mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi dikumi ne bibidi;" 
Numbers7:88 ne mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala wakadi balume ba ngombe makumi abidi ne banai, ne bimpanga makumi asambombo ne mbushi ya mpumbu makumi asambombo ne bana balume ba mikoko makumi asambombo ba tshidimu tshimue. Ebi mbintu bia kujidila nʼabi tshioshelu, hakelabo manyi ha mutu hatshi." 
Numbers7:89 Hakaya Mose mu ntenta wa kusambakena bua kusomba ne Yehowa, hashishe yeye wakunvua Di diakadi diakula nʼandi ha mutu ha tshibuikidi tshia ha mutu ha mushete wa Nzambi hankatshi ha bakeluba babidi ne yeye wakasomba ne Yehowa." 
Numbers8:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers8:2 Wambile Alona ne, Hawatemesha minda minda muanda mutekete neyikale ku mpala kua tshitekelu tshia muinda." 
Numbers8:3 Alona wake nza nunku, wakatemesha minda ku mpala kua tshitekelu tshia muinda, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers8:4 Bakenza tshitekelu tshia muinda ne tshiamu tshia or tshiakafulabo, bakatula tshitaku tshiatshi ne bilongo biatshi ne tshiamu tshia or tshijima, bakenza tshitekelu bu tshidikishilu tshiakalesha Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers8:5 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers8:6 Angata Bena Lewi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, ubalengeshe." 
Numbers8:7 Wewe newenze nunku bua kubalengesha ubamiamine mai a kubalengesha nʼau ku bubi, babeye mubidi wabo wonso ne dihaya, buvuwe bilulu biabo ne badilengeshe." 
Numbers8:8 Bangate muana mulume wa ngombe ne mulambu wandi wa bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi, wewe newangate muana mulume wa ngombe mukuabo bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi." 
Numbers8:9 Ulue biebe ne Bena Lewi ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena, usangishe tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele," 
Numbers8:10 wewe neumueneshe Bena Lewi ku mpala kua Yehowa Bena Isalele nebatentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu ha Bena Lewi: 
Numbers8:11 Alona neanyukule Bena Lewi ku mpala kua Yehowa bu mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Bena Isalele, bua bobo bikale bajidile bua kukuatshila Yehowa mudimu." 
Numbers8:12 Bena Lewi nebatentekashe bianza biabo ha mutu ha balume ba ngombe wewe neufile umue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne mukuabo bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa, bua kubuikidila Bena Lewi bubi buabo." 
Numbers8:13 Wewe neushikike Bena Lewi ku mpala kua Alona ne kua bana bandi balume, ubanyukule ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Numbers8:14 Nunku wewe neumushe Bena Lewi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, Bena Lewi nebikale banyi." 
Numbers8:15 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu Bena Lewi nebabale mu mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusambakena, wewe neubalengeshe, neubanyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula." 
Numbers8:16 Bualu bua bobo badi bampebue bajima munkatshi mua Bena Isalele mu miabo ya banʼa bute bonso ba Bena Isalele nakadiangatshilabo. 
Numbers8:17 Bualu bua banʼa bute bonso ba mu Isalele mbanyi, ne ba bantu ne ba nyama, mu dituku dinakashiha banʼa bute bonso ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu nakabajidila kundi." 
Numbers8:18 Nakadiangatshila Bena Lewi mu miaba ya banʼa bute bonso munkatshi mua Bena Isalele. 
Numbers8:19 Nakafila Bena Lewi kudi Alona ne bana bandi balume bu kuha kuabo munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bua kukuatshila Bena Isalele mudimu mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne bua kubuikidila Bena Isalele bubi buabo, bua bualu bubi kabukuatshi Bena Isalele haluabo ha buihi ne ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers8:20 Mose ne Alona ne Bena Isalele bonso bakenzela Bena Lewi nunku, Bena Isalele bakenza malu onso akambila Yehowa Mose bua Bena Lewi." 
Numbers8:21 Bena Lewi bakadilengesha ku bubi buabo, bakuvuwa bilulu biabo, Alona wakabanyukula bu mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Yehowa, Alona wakadia mulambu wa kubabuikidila nʼau bubi, bualu bua kubalengesha." 
Numbers8:22 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu Bena Lewi bakabuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena bua kuenza mudimu ku mpala kua Alona ne kua bana bandi balume, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose bua Bena Lewi, bakabenzela nunku." 
Numbers8:23 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers8:24 Ebu mbualu bua mudimu wa Bena Lewi ba bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu tô ne ha mutu nebenze mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena," 
Numbers8:25 hahitabo bidimu makumi atanu, nebalekele mudimu, kabankuatshidi mudimu kabidi," 
Numbers8:26 kadi nebakuatshile bana babo mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bua kulamabo bintu, kabenji mudimu mukole, wewe newenzele Bena Lewi nunku hawabalesha mudimu wabo." 
Numbers9:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu tshihela tshia Sinai mu ngondo wa kumudilu wa tshidimu tshibidi tshiakaluhukabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne," 
Numbers9:2 Bena Isalele nebadie bintu bia kuhita kua Yehowa mu tshikondo tshinakasungula. 
Numbers9:3 Mu dituku dia dikumi ne anai dia ngondo eu ku dilolo, nebadie mu tshikondo tshiaku, bobo nebenze bu mudi mei onso ne mikenji yonso bia kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Numbers9:4 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele bua bobo bavuluke kuhita kua Yehowa. 
Numbers9:5 Bakavuluka kuhita kua Yehowa mu ngondo wa kumudilu mu dituku dia dikumi ne anai ku dilolo, mu tshihela tshia Sinai, bu muakadi mei onso akambila Yehowa Mose, Bena Isalele bakenza nunku." 
Numbers9:6 Balume bakuabo bakadiku bakadi banyanguke kudi mubidi wa mundi mufue, kabakamanya mua kuvuluka kuhita kua Yehowa dituku adi, bakatua ku mpala kua Mose ne Alona dituku adi," 
Numbers9:7 balume aba bakamuambila ne, Tudi banyanguke bua mubidi wa mundi mufue, bualu kai didi bikandibua bua tuetu katuena mua kufila mulambu wa Yehowa mu tshikondo tshiau munkatshi mua Bena Isalele?" 
Numbers9:8 Mose wakabambila ne, Imanai, nganji kunvua dî kudi Yehowa bua bualu buenu." 
Numbers9:9 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers9:10 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Bikala mundi wa munkatshi muenu anyi wa munkatshi mua tunkanunuma dienu munyanguke ku dilenga dia mundi mufue, anyi bikaleye muye ku luendu kule yeye neavuluke kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Numbers9:11 Mu ngondo muibidi mu dituku dia dikumi ne anai ku dilolo nebakuvuluke, nebadie mampa adi kâyi ne luevene ne matshitshi adi ne bululu," 
Numbers9:12 kabashiyi tshintu to ne ku dinda, kabatshibudi nansha mufuba umue, nebenze bu mudi mikenji yonso ya kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Numbers9:13 Kadi mundi udi kayi munyanguke, ne udi kayi muye ku luendu, udi uhidia kuvuluka kuhita kua Yehowa, nebumushe muntu au munkatshi muabo; bualu bua yeye kakafila mulambu wa Yehowa mu tshikondo tshiau, muntu au neadituadile bubi buandi." 
Numbers9:14 Bikala muenyi munkatshi muenu udi musue kuvuluka kuhita kua Yehowa, yeye nênze bu mudi mikenji ya kuhita kua Yehowa, nenuikale ne mukenji umue kudi muenyi ne kudi muntu mulela munkatshi muenu." 
Numbers9:15 Mu dituku diakashimikabo nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ntenta wa dimanyisha dia Yehowa, ditutu diakabuikila nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ku dilolo tô ne ku dinda diakakenka bu kahia ha mutu ha nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers9:16 Ditutu diakabuikila nsubu matuku onso, diakakenka bu kahia butuku." 
Numbers9:17 Hakumuka difutu ku mutu kua Ntenta, hashishe Bena Isalele bakaya ku luendu, mu muaba wakimana ditutu, Bena Isalele bakalongolola tshitudilu." 
Numbers9:18 Ku dî dia Yehowa Bena Isalele bakaya ku luendu, ne ku dî dia Yehowa bakalongolola tshitudilu, hakatshidi ditutu dimana ku mutu kua nsubu, bobo bakashala mu tshitudilu." 
Numbers9:19 Hakimana ditutu ku mutu kua nsubu matuku a bungi, nunku Bena Isalele bakatumikila dî dia Yehowa, kabakaya ku luendu." 
Numbers9:20 Bikondo bikuabo ditutu diakimana ku mutu kua nsubu matuku makese, hashishe bakashala mu tshitudilu bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa, ne bakaya ku luendu bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa." 
Numbers9:21 Bikondo bikuabo ditutu bakimana dilolo tô ne ku dinda, ne hakumuka ditutu ne dinda, bakaya ku luendu, hakumuka ditutu nansha mu munya nansha mu butuku, bakaya ku luendu." 
Numbers9:22 Bakimana ditutu nansha matuku abidi nansha ngondo nansha tshidimu, Bena Isalele bakashala mu tshitudilu, kabakaya ku luendu, hakumukadi, bakaya ku luendu." 
Numbers9:23 Bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa bakashala mu tshituha ne bu muakadi dî ba Yehowa bakaya ku luendu, bakatumikila dî dia Yehowa, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers10:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers10:2 Enza biebe mpungi ibidi ya tshiamu tshia argent tshiakafulabo, wewe neubikile nʼai bantu bua kutendelela ne bua kubisha luendu." 
Numbers10:3 Helabo mpungi, bantu bonso nebadisangishe kûb ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers10:4 Helabo mpungi umue, bakelenge ne bantu ba ku mutu kua binunu bia Bena Isalele nebadisangishe kûdi." 
Numbers10:5 Hawela mpungi bikole, bantu ba mu bitudilu bia ku esete nebaye ku luendu luabo." 
Numbers10:6 Hawela mpungi bikole tshiakabidi, bantu ba mu bitudilu bia ku sude nebaye ku luendu luabo, bobo nebele mpungi bikole bua luendu luabo." 
Numbers10:7 Biwasua kusangisha bantu hohamue, wewe newele mpungi, kadi kuedi bikole nansha." 
Numbers10:8 Bana balume ba Alona bakuidi nebele mpungi, mpungi neyikale bu mukenji, ku bikondo bienu bionso tshiendelele." 
Numbers10:9 Hanuaya kusangana mba ne bantu badi banukengesha mu buloba buenu, nenuele mpungi bikole, nenuikale nuvulukibua ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nenusungidibue kudi bantu badi nʼenu lukuna." 
Numbers10:10 Mu dituku ba disanka dienu, ne mu bikondo binudi nudia bidia bia Yehowa, ne mu tshibangidilu tshia ngondo yenu, nenuele mpungi ku milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, ne ku milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, neyikale bu tshivulukidi ku mesu kua Nzambi wenu meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Numbers10:11 Mu tshidimu tshibidi, mu ngondo muibidi, mu matuku makumi abidi a ngondo eu, ditutu bakumuka ku mutu kua ntenta wa dimanyisha ba Yehowa." 
Numbers10:12 Bena Isalele bakaya ku mpala ku luendu luabo mu tshihela tshia Sinai, ditutu bakimana mu tshihela tshia Palana." 
Numbers10:13 Bakaya ku luendu luabo lua kumudilu bu muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Numbers10:14 Bena Yuda bakaya ku mpala ne dibendele dia tshitudilu tshiabo, Nashona, muana mulume wa Aminadaba, wakadi ku mutu kuabo." 
Numbers10:15 Netanele, muana mulume wa Suâ, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Yisakâ." 
Numbers10:16 Eliaba, muana mulume wa Helona, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Zebuluna." 
Numbers10:17 Bakatulula nsubu wa tshitendelelu hanshi, ne bana balume ba Gêshona ne bana balume ba Melali, bakadi batuala nsubu, bakaya ku mpala." 
Numbers10:18 Bakaya ne dibendele ba tshitudilu tshia Lubena, ne Elisû, muana mulume wa Shedeu, wakadi ku mutu kuabo." 
Numbers10:19 Shelumiele, muana mulume wa Sulishadai, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia bena Shimeona." 
Numbers10:20 Eleyasafa, muana mulume wa Deuele, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia Bena Gada." 
Numbers10:21 Bena Kohata bakaya ku mpala batuale bintu bia mu nsubu wa tshijila, ne bakuabo bakashimika nsubu wa tshitendelelu diambedi bobo kabayi banze kulua." 
Numbers10:22 Bakaya ne dibendele dia tshitudilu tshia Bena Efelayima, ne Elishama, muana mulume wa Amihuda, wakadi ku mutu kuabo." 
Numbers10:23 Gamaliele, muana mulume wa Pedasû, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe." 
Numbers10:24 Abidana, muana mulume wa Gideoni, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia Bena Benyamina." 
Numbers10:25 Bakaya ne dibendele dia tshitudilu tshia Dana, bobo bakadi halua ku nyima kua bakuabo, bakaya ku luendu luabo ku bisumbu biabo, ne Ahiezê, muana mulume wa Amishadai, wakadi ku mutu kuabo." 
Numbers10:26 Pagiele, muana mulume wa Okelana, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia Bena Ashê." 
Numbers10:27 Ahila, muana mulume wa Enana, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia Bena Nafatale." 
Numbers10:28 Ei ngendu ya Bena Isalele ku bisumbu biabo, bakaya ku mpala." 
Numbers10:29 Mose wakambila Hobaba, muana mulume wa Luele, Muena Midiyana, tatuʼandi-muenu wa Mose ne, Tutshidi tuya ku muaba wakamba Yehowa ne, Nennuheu, uye nʼetu, netukuenzele bimpe, bualu bua Yehowa wakalaya Bena Isalele bualu buimpe." 
Numbers10:30 Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena nya, nempingane kuetu kudi bana betu." 
Numbers10:31 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Kutushiyi, ndi nkusengelela, bualu bua wewe udi mumanye ne, Tuetu netuikale mu tshihela, wewe newikale bu mesu etu." 
Numbers10:32 Biwaya biebe nʼetu, hashishe bikala Yehowa mutuenzele bimpe, tuetu netukuenzele bimpe." 
Numbers10:33 Bakabika ku mukuna wa Yehowa, bakaya mu luendu matuku asatu, ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa wakaya ku mpala kuabo matuku asatu bualu bua kubakebela muaba wa kuikisha." 
Numbers10:34 Ditutu dia Yehowa diakadi ku mutu kuabo mu munya, hakumukabo ku tshitudilu tshiabo." 
Numbers10:35 Hakaya mushete ku mpala, Mose wakamba ne, Yehowa, bika biebe, bantu badi nʼebe lukuna batangadishibue, bantu badi nʼebe tshiji banyeme ku mesu kuebe." 
Numbers10:36 Hakikisha mushete, yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa, uhingana biebe kudi binunu bia binunu bia Bena Isalele." 
Numbers11:1 Bantu bakadi batontolodi, bualu ebu buakadi bubi ku matshu a Yehowa ne hakabunvua Yehowa, tshiji tshiakamukuata, kahia ka Yehowa kakabosha tô ne ku matshika a tshitudilu." 
Numbers11:2 Bantu bakadila kudi Mose, ne Mose wakalomba Yehowa, kahia kakajima." 
Numbers11:3 Bakidika muaba au ne, Tabela, bualu bua kahia ka Yehowa kakatema munkatshi muabo." 
Numbers11:4 Bantu bakuabo ba munkatshi muabo bakadi ne lukuka be Bena Isalele bakadila kabidi, bakamba ne, Nganyi neatuhe munyinyi wa tuetu kudia?" 
Numbers11:5 Tudi tuvuluka bua munyinyi wa mu mai utuakadia mu Ejipitu tshianana, concombres ne melona ne poireaux ne matungulu ne ail," 
Numbers11:6 kadi katataka mioyo yetu idi minyane, katuena ne tshintu tshikuabo tshia kutangila anu mana â." 
Numbers11:7 Mana akadi bu ntete ya kolianda, akadi afuanangana ne bedola." 
Numbers11:8 Bantu bakaluhuka, bakâsangisha, bakâhela mu biamu ne mu binu, bakâlamba mu bivuadi ne mai, bakalamba nʼau mikata, akashemakana bu manyi mahia-mahia." 
Numbers11:9 Kakahanda mume mu tshitudilu butuku, mana akamueneka nʼau." 
Numbers11:10 Mose wakumpa muabi wa bantu ku meku ne ku meku, mundi ne mundi ku mbelu kua ntenta wandi tshiji tshiakatamba kukuata Yehowa, tshiji tshiakakuata Mose kabidi." 
Numbers11:11 Mose wakambila Yehowa ne, Wewe wakenzela mundi webe bibi nunku bualu kai? Munyi tshiakusangana luse ku mesu kuebe bua wewe wakateka bujitu bua bantu aba bonso hamʼbidi hanyi?" 
Numbers11:12 Meme nakimitshisha baledi ba bantu aba mafu, anyi, nakabalela, anyi, bua wewe wakungambila ne, Ubatuale ha tshiadi tshiebe, bu mudi muledi utuala muana utshidi wamua, tô ne ku buloba buwakalaya batatuʼabo?" 
Numbers11:13 Meme ndi mua kudisha bantu aba bonso munyinyi kudi kunyi? Bualu bua bobo badi badila kundi ne, Utuhe munyinyi wa tuetu kudia." 
Numbers11:14 Meme nkayanyi tshiena mua kutuala bantu aba bonso, bualu ebu budi buntambe bunene." 
Numbers11:15 Biwasua kutuenzela nunku, ndi nkusengelela ne, Unshihe ku tshianza tshiebe, binasangana luse ku mesu kuebe, bua tshitangidi dikenga dianyi nunku." 
Numbers11:16 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Unsangishile balume makumi muanda mutekete ba bakulu ba mu Isalele, baudi mumanye ne mbakulu ba bantu, ne bakelenge badi ku mutu kuabo, ulue nʼabo ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bobo bimaneku nʼebe." 
Numbers11:17 Meme nempueke, nensombe nʼebe, nengangate Nyuma udi kûdi, nembaheye, nenukuatshishangane bua kutuala bujitu bua bantu aba, wewe kuena ubutuala nkayebe." 
Numbers11:18 Wambile bantu ne, Nudijidile bua makelela, nenudie munyinyi, bualu bua nuenu nuakudila mu matshu a Yehowa ne, Udi utudisha munyinyi nganyi? Bakatuenzela bimpe mu Ejipitu, nunku Yehowa neanuhe munyinyi, nenudie." 
Numbers11:19 Kanuena nudia dituku dimue anyi matuku abidi anyi matuku atanu anyi matuku dikumi anyi matuku makumi abidi," 
Numbers11:20 kadi ngondo mujima, tô ne hanuaulukila mu diulu, neunutonde, bualu bua nuenu nuakuhidia Yehowa udi munkatshi muenu, nuakudila ku mpala kuandi ne, Tuakaluhuka mu Ejipitu bualu kai?" 
Numbers11:21 Mose wakamba ne, Bantu bandi nʼabo badi bena nvita binunu nkama isambombo, ne wewe wakuamba ne, Nembahe munyinyi, bua bobo badie ngondo mujima." 
Numbers11:22 Netubashihele bisumbu bia mikoko ne ngombe bua kubadisha, anyi? Netusangishe minyinyi yonso ya mu mai manene bua kubadisha, anyi?" 
Numbers11:23 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Tshianza tshia Yehowa tshiakulua tshihi, anyi? Katataka wewe neutangile ne bualu bunakukuambila nebuenjibue anyi kabuena buenjibua." 
Numbers11:24 Mose wakaluhuka, wakambila bantu mei a Yehowa, wakasangisha balume makumi muanda mutekete ba bakulu ba bantu, wakabanyungulusha Ntenta." 
Numbers11:25 Yehowa wakahueka mu dî ditu, wakasomba nʼandi, wakangata tshituha tshia Nyuma wakadiye nʼandi, wakamuteka kudi bakulu makumi muanda mutekete, hashishe hakalua. Nyuma kudibo, bakamba dî dia Nzambi, kadi kabakenza kabidi musangu mukuabo." 
Numbers11:26 Kadi balume babidi bakashala mu tshitudilu, dina dia umue ne Eladada ne dina dia mukuabo ne Medada. Nyuma wakashala kudibo, bakadi ne mena abo mafunda, ka dî kabakaya ku Ntenta, bakamba di dia Nzambi mu tshitudilu." 
Numbers11:27 Nsongalume wakadiku, wakaya lubilu, wakamanyisha Mose ne, Eladada ne Medada badi bamba dî dia Nzambi mu tshitudilu." 
Numbers11:28 Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, mukuatshishi wa Mose, umue wa balume bakasunguleye, wakamba ne, Mukelenge wanyi, Mose, ubakande." 
Numbers11:29 Mose wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi ne mukau ku bualu buanyi, anyi? Nakadi kusua bua bantu ba Yehowa bonso bikale baprofete, ne Yehowa ateke Nyuma wandi kudibo." 
Numbers11:30 Mose wakaya mu tshitudilu, yeye ne bakulu ba Isalele." 
Numbers11:31 Luhehele luakaheha kudi Yehowa, diakalua ne nyunyu ya nkuadi ku mai manene, luakayihonesha hehi ne tshitudilu, bu luendu lua dituku dimue ku luseke elu ne luendu lua dituku dimue ku luseke lukuabo, yakanyunguluka tshitudilu ku nseke yonso, yakalembelela mulelu mukese bu coudées ibidi." 
Numbers11:32 Bantu bakajuka dituku adi, ne butuku bujima tô ne ku dituku dikuabo, bakasangisha nkuadi muntu wakasangisha bungi bukese wakasangisha bihiminu binene dikumi, bakadilongoluelayi mu tshitudilu." 
Numbers11:33 Hakatshidi munyinyi mukana, diambedi bobo kabayi banze kûdia ku menu, tshiji tshiakakuata Yehowa bua bantu, ne Yehowa wakasamisha bantu bikole." 
Numbers11:34 Bakidika muaba au ne, Kibelota-hatawa, bualu bua bakajikamu bantu bakadi ne lukuka." 
Numbers11:35 Bakabisha luendu luabo ku Kibelota-hatawa, bakaya ku Haselota, bakashikama mu Haselota." 
Numbers12:1 Mîyama ne Alona bakasonguela Mose bua mukashi wa Bena Kushi wakabakeye, bualu bua yeye wakadi mubake mukashi wa Bena Kushi." 
Numbers12:2 Bakamba ne, Bulelela, Yehowa wakasomba anu ne Mose, anyi? Yeye kena usomba nʼetu kabidi, anyi? Yehowa wakunvua." 
Numbers12:3 Muntu eu Mose wakadi ne kalolo be, wakatamba bantu bonso ba ha buloba ne kalolo." 
Numbers12:4 Tshituha tshibi Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne Miyama ne, Busatu buenu nulue mu ntenta wa kusambakena Busatu buabo bakaluamu." 
Numbers12:5 Yehowa wakahueka mu difutu, wakimana ku mbelu kua Ntenta, wakabikila Alona ne Mîyama, bobo bakaluhuka." 
Numbers12:6 Yeye wakamba ne, Unvuai mei anyi, bikala muprofete munkatshi muenu, meme Yehowa nendimanyishe kudiye mu tshikena kumona, meme nensombe nʼandi mu tshilota." 
Numbers12:7 Muntu wanyi Mose kena nunku, yeye udi wenza mudimu wandi bimpe mu nsubu wanyi wonso," 
Numbers12:8 meme nensombe nʼandi mukana ha mukana, ne mei adiye mumanye, tshiena nsomba nʼandi ne nsumuinu, neatangile mundidimbi wa Yehowa nunku kanuakutshina bua kusonguela mundi wanyi Mose munyi?" 
Numbers12:9 Tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakabakuata, yeye wakumuka." 
Numbers12:10 Difutu diakumuka ku mutu kua Ntenta, ne tangila, Miyama wakadi mûle tente ne disama dia nsudi mitoke to Alona wakatangila ne Mîyama wakadi mûle tente ne nsudi." 
Numbers12:11 Alona wakambila Mose ne, Mukelenge wanyi, kuteki bualu bubi kutudi, bualu bua tuetu tuakuenza buhote, tuakuenza bualu bubi." 
Numbers12:12 Kuitabusha bua yeye kuikala bu muntu mufue udi ne tshituha tshia mubidi mubole hamulelabo. 
Numbers12:13 Mose wakadila kudi Yehowa ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Nzambi, umuondahe." 
Numbers12:14 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Bikala tatu wandi mumutuile lute ku mesu, yeye wakadi kushala ne bundu matuku muanda mutekete, nansha? Bamuteke ku butshika bua tshitudilu matuku muanda mutekete, ne ku nyima nebamuhingishe kabidi." 
Numbers12:15 Mîyama wakashala ku butshika bua tshitudilu matuku muanda mutekete, bantu kabakaya ku luendu to ne hakaluabo ne Mîyama kabidi." 
Numbers12:16 Hashishe bantu bakumuka ku Haselota, bakashikama mu tshihela tshia Palana." 
Numbers13:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers13:2 Utume bantu, bua bobo batentekele buloba bua Kanâna, bundi mpa Bena Isalele, usungule mundi ku tshisamba ku tshisamba, mundi yonso udi bu mukelenge munkatshi muabo." 
Numbers13:3 Mose wakabatuma ku Kanâna bumuke ku tshihela tshia Palana, muakamba Yehowa buonso buabo bakadi balume ba ku mutu kua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers13:4 Au mmena abo wa mu tshisamba tshia Lubena, Shamua, muana mulume wa Zaku." 
Numbers13:5 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Shimeona, Shafata, muana mulume wa Holi." 
Numbers13:6 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune." 
Numbers13:7 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Yisakâ, Igala, muana mulume wa Yosefe." 
Numbers13:8 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Efelayima, Hoshea, muana mulume wa Nuna." 
Numbers13:9 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina, Palati, muana mulume wa Lafu." 
Numbers13:10 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Zebuluna, Gadadiele, muana mulume wa Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Yosefe ne wa mu tshisamba tshia Manashe, Gadi, muana mulume wa Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Dana, Amiele, muana mulume wa Gemali." 
Numbers13:13 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Ashe, Setû, muana mulume wa Mikaele." 
Numbers13:14 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Nafatale, Nabi, muana mulume wa Wofesi." 
Numbers13:15 Wa mu tshisamba tshia Gada, Gewele, muana mulume wa Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Au mmena a balume bakatuma Mose bua kutentekelabo buloba Mose wakidika Hoshea, muana mulume wa Nuna ne, Yoshua." 
Numbers13:17 Mose wakabatuma bua kutentekela buloba bua Kanâna, wakabambila ne, Yilai ku nshila wa luseke lua Sude, yai bienu mu buloba bua mikuna" 
Numbers13:18 nutangile buloba ne budi munyi, bantu badimu badi bakole anyi badi batekete, badi banya-banya anyi badi ba bungi:" 
Numbers13:19 buloba budi munyi budibo bashikama, budi buimpe anyi budi bubi, misoko idibo bashikamamu idi ya hatuhu anyi idi ya mpangu ya mabue," 
Numbers13:20 nutangile buloba ne budi ne bufunfule anyi budi busenguluke, mitangile ne mudi metu, anyi kaenamu. Nukoleshe mitshima yenu, nulue ne mamuma a mu buloba abu Hakayabo nunku, mamuma a nvinyo akabanga kulua." 
Numbers13:21 Bakaya nunku, bakatentekela buloba ku tshihela tshia Sina tô ne ku Lehoba udi mu nshila wa ku Hamata." 
Numbers13:22 Bakayila ku luseke lua sude, bakafua ku Hebelone, ne Ahimana ne Sheshai ne Talemai, bana ba Anaka bakadimu. (Bakasa Hebelone bidimu muanda mutekete ku mpala kua Soana mu Ejipitu.)" 
Numbers13:23 Bakalua mu tshibanda tshia Eshekola, bakakosamu ditamba diakadi ne tshisumbu tshia mamuma a nvinyo, bakadituala ku mutshi babidi, balualua ne mamuma makuabo a grenade ne a nfigi." 
Numbers13:24 Muaba au wakidikibua ne, Tshibanda tshia Eshekola, bualu bua tshisumbu tshia mamuma tshiakakosamu Bena Isalele." 
Numbers13:25 Hakatentekelabo buloba nunku matuku makumi anai, bakahingana." 
Numbers13:26 Hakafikabo, bakalua kudi Mose ne kudi Alona ne kudi tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele mu tshihela tshia Palana ku Kadesha, bakalua kudibo ne kudi tshisumbu tshionso ne dî diabo, bakabalesha mamuma a buloba abu." 
Numbers13:27 Bakamuambila ne, Tuakuya mu buloba buwakatutuma, bulelela, buloba abu budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi, â mmamuma a buloba." 
Numbers13:28 Kadi bantu badi mu buloba abu badi bakole, misoko yabo idi ne mpangu ya mabue, ne idi minene be; ne bualu bukuabo, tuakamonamu bana ba Anaka." 
Numbers13:29 Bena Amaleka badi ku luseke lua ku Sude, Bena Hiti ne Bena Yebuse ne Bena Amole badi ku luseke lua ku mikuna, Bena Kanâna badi hehi ne mai manene ne kukala kua musulu wa Yadene." 
Numbers13:30 Kaleba wakakolesha bantu ku mesu kua Mose ne, Tuyai katataka, tunyenge buloba abu, tudi bamanye mua kuhita bena buloba abu bukole." 
Numbers13:31 Kadi bantu bakaya nʼandi bakamba ne, Katuena bamanye mua baluangana ne bantu aba, bualu bua badi batutamba bukole." 
Numbers13:32 Bakalua kudi Bena Isalele ne lumu lubi lua buloba buakatentekelabo, bakamba ne, Buloba abu butuakutentekela buta buadia bantu badi bikalamu, bantu bonso batuakamonamu badi bantu ba mibidi minene." 
Numbers13:33 Tuakamona bantu ba nfiondo, bana balume ba Anaka, hakalelabo kudi Nefilima hatuakaditangila, tuakadi bu mpasu, tuakadi nunku ku mesu kuabo kabidi." 
Numbers14:1 Bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshionso bakela dî diabo bikole, bakadila butuku abu." 
Numbers14:2 Bena Isalele bonso bakatontolola Mose ne Alona, bakabambila ne, Biakadi bimpe tuafuila mu Ejipitu, anyi tuafuila mu tshihela etshi." 
Numbers14:3 Bualu kai Yehowa udi ulua nʼetu ku buloba ebu bua kutushihesha ku miele ya nvita? Bakashi betu ne bana betu bakese nebashihibue, bualu budi butamba buimpe bua tuetu tuhingane mu Ejipitu nansha?" 
Numbers14:4 Bakambilangana ne, Tusungulai bietu kapitene, netuhingane mu Ejipitu." 
Numbers14:5 Hashishe Mose ne Alona bakadikuma hanshi ku mpala kua tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele. 
Numbers14:6 Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, ne Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune, bakaya ne bantu bakatentekela buloba, bakadihanda bilulu biabo," 
Numbers14:7 bakambila tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele ne, Buloba butuakahita bua kutentekela budi butambe buimpe." 
Numbers14:8 Bikala Yehowa ne disanka bualu buetu, yeye nealue nʼetu mu buloba ebu, neatuhebu; buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Numbers14:9 Kanuanji kutombokela Yehowa nansha, kanutshinyi bena buloba; bobo badi bu bintu bia tuetu kudia, bintu bidibo badisungila nʼabi biakumuka, ne Yehowa udi nʼetu; kanubatshinyi." 
Numbers14:10 Kadi bantu bonso bakamba ne, Tubakume ne mabue Butumbi bua Yehowa buakamueneka mu ntenta wa kusambakena kudi Bena Isalele bonso." 
Numbers14:11 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Bantu aba nebampetule musangu bule munyi? Nebikale nʼanyi ne mpata musangu bule munyi bua malu a kukema onso anakenza munkatshi muabo?" 
Numbers14:12 Nembashihe ne disama dikole, nembahidie, nenkuvuishe wewe tshisamba tshidi tshibahita bunene ne bukole." 
Numbers14:13 Mose wakambila Yehowa ne, Nunku Bena Ejipitu nebunvue lumu elu, bualu bua wewe wakahatula bantu aba munkatshi muabo ne bukole buebe," 
Numbers14:14 bobo nebamanyishe bena buloba ebu Bobo bakunvua lumu ne, Wewe Yehowa udi munkatshi mua bantu aba, bualu bua wewe Yehowa udi umuenyibua mpala ha mpala, ne ditutu diebe didi dimana ku mutu kuabo, ne wewe utu waya ku mpala kuabo ne difutu didi ne diledi mu munya, ne difutu didi dikenka ne kahia butuku." 
Numbers14:15 Biwashiha bantu aba bu mundi umue, hashishe bisamba bionso biakunvua lumu luebe nebiambe ne," 
Numbers14:16 Bualu bua Yehowa kakadi ne bukole bua kulua ne bantu aba mu buloba buakahaneye, nunku yeye wakabashiha mu tshihela." 
Numbers14:17 Katataka, ndi nkusengelela ne, Bukole bua Yehowa buikale bunene, bu muwakuamba ne," 
Numbers14:18 Yehowa kena ukuata tshiji lubilu, udi mûle tente ne luse lujalame, utu wabuikila bubi ne kuhanga bia bantu, kena ubingisha muntu utu wenza bubi, utu watumina bana ba tshihungu tshisatu anyi tshinai mibi ya batatuʼabo." 
Numbers14:19 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Ubuikidile bantu aba bubi buabo, bu mudi bunene bua luse luebe lujalame, bu muwakababuikidila bubi buabo ku Ejipitu to ne katataka." 
Numbers14:20 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nakubabuikidila bubi bu mudi dî diebe," 
Numbers14:21 kadi bulelela, bu mundi ne muoyo, ne bu mudi buloba bûle tente ne butumbi bua Yehowa," 
Numbers14:22 bualu bua bantu aba bakamona butumbi buanyi ne malu anyi a kukema anakenza munkatshi muabo mu Ejipitu ne mu tshihela, kadi bakunteta munda misangu ei dikumi, kabakunvua dî dianyi," 
Numbers14:23 bulelela, bobo kabena batangila buloba bunakalaya batatuʼabo, bantu bakampidia kabena babutangila," 
Numbers14:24 kadi muntu wanyi Kaleba, bualu bua yeye udi ne mutshima mukuabo munda muandi, ne yeye wakundonda bulelela, nendue nʼandi mu buloba buakayeye, tunkanunuma tuandi netubuhiane." 
Numbers14:25 Bena Amaleka ne Bena Kanâna badi bashikama mu tshibanda, makelela nuhingane, yai mu tshihela mu nshila wa ku Dishiba Dikunze." 
Numbers14:26 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Numbers14:27 Nengikale ne bantu aba babi badi bantontolola musangu bule munyi? Nakunvua kutontolola kua Bena Isalele kudibo bantontolola nʼaku. 
Numbers14:28 Nubambile ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Bu mundi ne muoyo, bu munuakuamba mu matshu anyi, nennuenzele nunku:" 
Numbers14:29 mibidi yenu neyihone hanshi mifue mu tshihela etshi, buonso buenu baka balabo ba bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, bakadi bantontolola," 
Numbers14:30 bulelela, nuenu kanuena nulua mu buloba bunakanulaya bua nuenu nushikamemu, anu Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune, ne Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna." 
Numbers14:31 Kadi bana benu bakese banuakuamba ne, Bobo nebafue ku miele ya nvita, nendue nʼabo, bobo nebamanye buloba bunuakuhidia." 
Numbers14:32 Kadi nuenu mene, mibidi yenu nenuhone hanshi mifue mu tshihela etshi." 
Numbers14:33 Bana benu nebikale bu bena tshiendenda mu tshihela etshi tô bidimu makumi anai, bobo nebatuale bujitu bua masandi enu, tô ne hajimina mibidi yenu mifue mu tshihela etshi." 
Numbers14:34 Bungi bua matuku anuakutentekela buloba, matuku makumi anai mene, nebuikale bungi bua bidimu binudi nutuala bujitu bua bubi buenu, nenumanye ne mbualu bukole hangumuka kunudi." 
Numbers14:35 Meme Yehowa nakuamba, nengenzele bantu aba bonso badi bampidia nunku, nebajimine mu tshihela etshi, nebafuemu." 
Numbers14:36 Balume aba bakatuma Mose bua kutentekelabo buloba, bakadi bahingana, bakadi batontoluesha bantu bonso kudiye, bualu bua bobo bakalua ne lumu lubi lua buloba," 
Numbers14:37 balume aba mene bakalua ne lumu tubi lua buloba bakafua ne disama dikole ku mpala kua Yehowa. 
Numbers14:38 Kadi Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, ne Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune, anu bobo bakashala ne muoyo munkatshi mua bantu bakaya bua kutentekelabo buloba." 
Numbers14:39 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele mei au onso, ne mitshima yabo yakanyingalala bikole." 
Numbers14:40 Bakabika hatshiatshia, bakahanda ku mutu kua mukuna mule bakamba ne, Tudiku, netuye ku muaba wakatulaya Yehowa, bualu bua tuakenza bualu bubi." 
Numbers14:41 Mose wakamba ne, Nudi nuhidia dî dia Yehowa munyi? Bualu ebu kabuena bunusankisha." 
Numbers14:42 Kanuyi bualu bua Yehowa kena munkatshi muenu, kanufu ku mesu kua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna." 
Numbers14:43 Bena Amaleka ne Bena Kanâna badi ku mpala kuenu, nunku nenufue ku miele ya nvita, bualu bua nuenu nuakuhidia kulonda Yehowa, nunku Yehowa kena wikala nʼenu." 
Numbers14:44 Kadi bobo bakaya ku mutu kua mukuna ku bukole, kadi Mose ne mushete wa Yehowa kabiakumuka mu tshitudilu." 
Numbers14:45 Hashishe Bena Amaleka bakahueka ne Bena Kanâna bakadi bashikama mu mikuna, bakabahita bukole, bakabihata tô ne ku Homa." 
Numbers15:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers15:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanualua mu buloba buenu, bundi munuhe," 
Numbers15:3 ne hanuafila mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa bua kushikisha kuditshiha, anyi mulambu udi mitshima yenu misue kufila, anyi mu matuku anudi nudia bidia bia disanka, bualu bua kumusha dihembu kudi Yehowa, nansha mulambu wa ngombe nansha wa mikoko," 
Numbers15:4 muntu udi ufila mulambu neafile mulambu wa bukula bubotesha bu tshintu tshia dikumi tshia tshihiminu tshimue, busangisha ne tshituha tshinai tshia dikoho dia manyi." 
Numbers15:5 Hanuafila mulambu wa kuosha anyi wa kudifila, nenufile kabidi tshituha tshinai tshia dikoho dia nvinyo bu mulambu udibo banua, nenufile nunku ku muana wa mukoko ne ku muana wa mukoko." 
Numbers15:6 Hanuafila mulambu wa tshimpanga, nenulongolole tshintu tshitanu tshia bukula bubotesha busangisha ne tshituha tshisatu tshia dikoho dia manyi," 
Numbers15:7 ne tshituha tshisatu tshia nvinyo bu mulambu udibo banua bua kûtuisha dihembu kudi Yehowa. 
Numbers15:8 Hanualongolola mulume wa ngombe bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia anyi bu mulambu wa kushikisha kuditshiha anyi bu mulambu wa kuvuisha nʼau ditalala kudi Yehowa," 
Numbers15:9 nebafile mulambu wa bukula bubotesha bu bituha bisatu bia ha dikumi busangisha ne tshituha tshia dikoho dia manyi," 
Numbers15:10 nebafile kabidi tshituha tshia dikoho dia nvinyo bu mulambu udibo banua, bu mulambu wa kuosha, bua kûtuisha dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers15:11 Nenuenze nunku kudi mulume wa ngombe yonso anyi kudi tshimpanga tshionso anyi kudi bana ba balume ba mikoko anyi kudi mbushi. 
Numbers15:12 Bu bungi bua milambu mudi nu fila nenulongolole bintu ebi. 
Numbers15:13 Bantu bonso badi balela munkatshi muenu nebenze bilele ebi, hafilabo milambu ya kuosha ha kahia bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers15:14 Bikala muenyi mushikame munkatshi muenu, anyi muntu yonso muikale munkatshi muenu tô ne ku bikondo bienu bionso udi musue kufila mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa, yeye nênze bu munudi nuenza." 
Numbers15:15 Bualu bua bantu bonso nebikale ne mukenji umue kunudi ne kudi muenyi udi munkatshi muenu ku bikondo bienu bionso: muenyi neikale bu nuenu ku mesu kua Yehowa. 
Numbers15:16 Nenuikale ne mukenji umue ne dî dimue kunudi ne kudi muenyi udi munkatshi muenu. 
Numbers15:17 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers15:18 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanualua mu buloba bundi ngamba kunuha," 
Numbers15:19 ne hanuadia bintu bia mu buloba abu, nenufile mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers15:20 Nenunyukule mulambu wa mukata wakelabo ne bukula buakaboteshabo diambedi, nenufile mulambu eu bu mulambu wa bintu biakahuolabo." 
Numbers15:21 Nenunyukule mulambu wa bukula buakaboteshabo diambedi kudi Yehowa, ku bikondo bienu bionso." 
Numbers15:22 Hanuahanga, kanuyi nutumikila mikenji yonso yakambila Yehowa Mose," 
Numbers15:23 malu onso mene akanuambila Yehowa mukana mua Mose ku dituku diakanuheye mikenji yandi tô ne ku bikondo bionso bidi ku mpala," 
Numbers15:24 bikala bualu buenjibue ku mpukahuka, bantu ba tshisumbu kabayi babumanye, bantu bonso nebafile muana mulume wa ngombe bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia bua kutuisha dihembu dimpe kudi Yehowa, ne mulambu wandi wa bukula ne mulambu wandi wa bintu bidibo banua, ne muana mulume wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi, bu mudi mukenji wamba." 
Numbers15:25 Muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikidila Bena Isalele bonso bubi, ne bubi buabo nebuikale bubuikidibue, bualu bua bobo bakahanga ne bakalua ne milambu yabo, mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa, ne mulambu wa kubuikila hau bubi ku mpala kua Yehowa, bualu bua dihanga diabo;" 
Numbers15:26 bubi bua Bena Isalele bonso ne bua muenyi udi munkatshi muabo nebuikale bubuikidibue, bualu bua bakadi benze bualu ebu ku mpukahuka." 
Numbers15:27 Bikala mundi muenze bualu bubi ku mpukahuka, neafile muana mukashi wa mbushi wa tshidimu tshimue bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi." 
Numbers15:28 Muakuidi neafile mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi bua mundi wakenza bualu ku mpukahuka ku mpala kua Yehowa, ne bubi buandi nebuikale bubuikidibue." 
Numbers15:29 Nenuikale ne mukenji umue kudi muntu mulela munkatshi mua Bena Isalele ne kudi muenyi udi munkatshi muenu, henzeye bualu bubi ku mpukahuka." 
Numbers15:30 Kadi muntu udi wenza bualu bubi ne mutshima mukole nansha muntu mulela munkatshi muenu nansha muenyi, muntu au udi uhenda Yehowa, nebamumushe munkatshi muabo." 
Numbers15:31 Bualu bua yeye wakalengulula dî dia Yehowa, wakashiha mukenji wandi, nebamûmushilemu bulelela, neadituadile bubi buandi." 
Numbers15:32 Hakadi Bena Isalele mu tshihela, bakasangana muntu wangula nkunyi dî diku dia Lumingu." 
Numbers15:33 Bantu bakamusangana hakadiye wangula nkunyi, bakalua nʼandi kudi Mose ne Alona ne kudi tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele." 
Numbers15:34 Bakamuela mu lukanu, bualu bua kabakamanya dî dia Yehowa diakasueye kungenzela." 
Numbers15:35 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Nebashihe muntu au bulelela bantu bonso nebamukume ne mabue ku butshika bua tshitudilu." 
Numbers15:36 Bantu bonso ba mu tshisumbu bakalua nʼandi ku butshika bua tshitudilu, bakamushiha ne mabue, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers15:37 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers15:38 Wambile Bena Isalele bua bobo ne tunkanunuma tuabo badienzele malenda ku bilulu biabo, ne bobo bateke muonshi wa bleu ku malenda abo." 
Numbers15:39 Hanuatangila malenda au, nuvuluke mikenji ya Yehowa, nuyenze, kanulondi mitshima yenu ne mesu enu adi anuenzesha malu a masandi," 
Numbers15:40 nuenu nuvuluke mikenji yanyi yonso, nuyenze, nuikale bantu ba tshijila kudi Nzambi wenu." 
Numbers15:41 Meme nda Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, bua kuikala Nzambi wenumeme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Numbers16:1 Kola, muana mulume wa Yiseha, muana mulume wa Kohata, muana mulume wa Lewi, ne Datana ne Abilama, bana balume ba Eliaba, ne Ono, muana mulume wa Pelete, bana balume ba Lubena," 
Numbers16:2 bakabika ne Bena Isalele bakuabo ne bakelenge ba mu tshisumbu bu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, bantu bakadi ne lumu lunene," 
Numbers16:3 bakadisangisha bua kufuilangana ne Mose ne Alona, bakabambila ne, Nudi nutamba kudienzela malu, bualu bua bantu bonso mbantu ba tshijila ne Yehowa udi munkatshi muabo nuenu nudi nudibandisha ku mutu kua bantu ba Yehowa munyi?" 
Numbers16:4 Hakunvua Mose dî edi, yeye wa kakuma mpala hanshi," 
Numbers16:5 wakambila Kola ne bakadiye habo ne, Dinda Yehowa neadileshe bantu bandi, ne nganyi udi wa tshijila, neamubikile ku mpala kuandi, neabifile wasunguleye ku mpala kuandi." 
Numbers16:6 Nuenze bienu nunku Kola ne bantu hadiye habo bangate malonga a kahia," 
Numbers16:7 batekemu kahia, batekehu musenga wa manananshi ku mpala kua Yehowa makelela, ne muntu udi musungudibue kudi Yehowa neikale muntu wa tshijila, nuenu bana balume ba Lewi nudi nutamba kudienzela malu." 
Numbers16:8 Mose wakambila Kola ne, Unvuai, bana balume ba Lewi:" 
Numbers16:9 nudi nuelangana meji ne bualu ebu budi bukese bua Nzambi wa Isalele wakamujidila munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bua nuenu nulue ha buihi nʼandi kumukuatshia mudimu mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne bua kukuatshila tshisumbu tshonso mudimu kabidi," 
Numbers16:10 yeye wakanuhatula ne bana benu bonso ba Lewi ha buihi nʼandi, nuenu nudi nudikebela mudimu wa buakuidi kabidi, anyi?" 
Numbers16:11 Wewe ne bantu baudi nʼabo nuakudisangisha bua kuelangana ne Yehowa! Alona udi nganyi bua nuenu nudi numutontolola? 
Numbers16:12 Mose wakabikila Datana ne Abilama, bana balume ba Eliaba, ne bobo bakamba ne, Katuena tulua," 
Numbers16:13 bualu budi bukese bua wewe wakumuka nʼetu mu buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi bua kubishiha mu tshihela, udi musue kudibandisha bu mukelenge wetu kabidi, anyi?" 
Numbers16:14 Bualu bukuabo, wewe kuena muanze kulua nʼetu mu buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi, kuena mutuhe buhianyi bua madimi ne madimi a tumuma, udi musue kuvuisha bantu aba bafofo, anyi? Katuena tulua." 
Numbers16:15 Mose wakadi ne tshiji tshikole ne yeye wakambila Yehowa ne, Kuitabusha milambu yabo nansha, meme tshiakunyenga umue wabo nyama wandi wa mpunda, tshiakuenzela umue wabo bibi." 
Numbers16:16 Mose wakambila Kola ne, Wewe ne bantu bonso baudi habo nuikale ku mpala kua Yehowa ne kua Alona makelela:" 
Numbers16:17 mundi yonso angate dilonga diandi dia kahia, atekehu musenga wa manananshi, bantu bonso balue ne malonga nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ku mpala kua Yehowa, ne wewe ne Alona, mundi ne dilonga diandi mundi ne dilonga diandi." 
Numbers16:18 Muntu yonso wakangata dilonga diandi, wakatekamu kahia, wakatekahu musenga wa manananshi, bakimana ne Mose ne Alona ku mbelu kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu." 
Numbers16:19 Kola wakabikila tshisumbu tshonso tshia batomboki ku mbelu kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu, ne butumbi bua Yehowa buakamueneka kudi tshisumbu tshonso." 
Numbers16:20 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Numbers16:21 Umukai bienu munkatshi mua tshisumbu etshi, nembashihe mu tshituha tshikese." 
Numbers16:22 Bobo bakadikuma hanshi, bakamba ne, Nzambi, Nzambi wa mioyo ya bantu, wewe newikale ne tshisumbu tshonso tshiji bua bubi bua mundi umue, anyi?" 
Numbers16:23 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers16:24 Wambile tshisumbu tshonso ne, Umukai ku nsubu wa tshitendelelu wa Kola ne Datana ne Abilama." 
Numbers16:25 Mose wakabika, wakaya kudi Datana ne Abilama, ne bakulu ba mu Isalele bakamulonda ku nyima." 
Numbers16:26 Yeye wakambila tshisumbu tshia bantu ne, Umukai, ndi nnusengelela, ku ntenta ya bantu aba babi, kanulengi tshintu tshiabo tshianza, kabanushihi bua mibi yabo." 
Numbers16:27 Nunku bakumuka ku nsubu wa tshitendelelu wa Kola ne Datana ne Abalama ku nseke yonso: ne Datana ne Abilama bakaluhuka, bakimana ku mbelu kua ntenta yabo ne bakashi babo ne bana babo balume ne bana babo bakese." 
Numbers16:28 Mose wakamba ne, Nenumanye ne Yehowa wakatuma bua kuenza malu au onso, tshiakadienzela bualu bua mutshima wanyi." 
Numbers16:29 Biafila balume aba bu mudi bantu bonso bafue, anyi biabakuata bualu bu mudibu bukuata bantu bonso, nunku Yehowa kena muntume." 
Numbers16:30 Kadi bikala Yehowa wenza bualu buhia-buhia, ne buloba bubulula mukana muabu bubamina ne bantu bonso hadibo nʼabo, ne bobo baya ku Muaba wa Bafue hatshidibo ne muoyo, nunku nenumanye ne bantu aba bakalengulula Yehowa." 
Numbers16:31 Hakashikisheye kubambila mei a onso, buloba buakahandika muinshi mua makasa abo," 
Numbers16:32 buloba buakubulula mukana muabu, buakabamina ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu yabo ne bantu bonso bakalamata Kola ne bintu biabo bionso." 
Numbers16:33 Nunku bobo ne bantu bonso bakalamata kudibo bakaya mu Muaba wa Bafue hakadibo ne muoyo, ne buloba buakabuikila mukana muabu ku mutu kuabo, ne bobo biakajimina munkatshi mua tshisumbu." 
Numbers16:34 Bena Isalele bonso bakadi ha buihi habo bakanyema hakunvuabo muadi wabo, bobo bakamba ne, Buloba kabutuminyi." 
Numbers16:35 Kahia bakahatuka kudi Yehowa, kakosha balume nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu bakadi bafila musenga wa manananshi." 
Numbers16:36 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers16:37 Wambile Eleazâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi, bua yeye angate malonga munkatshi mua kahia, ne wewe utangalashe kahia kuaka ebi mbintu bia tshijila," 
Numbers16:38 malonga a bantu aba babi bakadijinushila mioyo yabo, wenze nʼau tshibuikilu tshia tshioshelu bobo bakâfila ku mpala kua Yehowa, nunku adi bintu bia tshijila, neikale bu tshivulukidi kudi Bena Isalele." 
Numbers16:39 Eleazâ muakuidi wakangata malonga a tshiamu tshia mitaku akatuabo, bakâtula bu tshibuikilu tshia tshioshelu," 
Numbers16:40 bua kuikalau tshivulukidi kudi Bena Isalele ne kubamanyisha ne, Muntu udi kayi muana wa Alona, kalu ha buihi bua kuosheye musenga wa manananshi ku mpala kua Yehowa, kenji bu Kola ne bantu bandi, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers16:41 Kadi hakatshiabu Bena Isalele bonso bakatontolola Mose ne Alona ne, Nuenu nuakushiha bantu ba Yehowa." 
Numbers16:42 Hashishe bakadisangisha tshisumbu tshia bantu bua kuelangana ne Mose ne Alona, baka tangila ku ntenta wa kusambakena, ne monai, difutu diakamubuikila ne butumbi bua Yehowa buakamueneka," 
Numbers16:43 Mose ne Alona bakatua ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Numbers16:44 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers16:45 Umuka biebe munkatshi mua tshisumbu etshi tshia bantu, nenubashihe mu tshituha tshihi. Bobo bakahaula mpala yabo hanshi." 
Numbers16:46 Mose wakambila Alona ne, Angata dilonga dia kahia, tekahu kahia ka ku tshioshelu, tekahu musenga wa manananshi, uye biebe lubilu kudi tshisumbu tshia bantu, bua kubabuikidila bubi buabo, bualu bua tshiji tshiakumana kuhatuka kudi Yehowa, disama dikole diakumana kubanga." 
Numbers16:47 Alona wakangata dilonga diandi bu muakamba Mose, wakaya lubilu munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bantu, ne monai, disama dikole diakamana kubanga munkatshi mua bantu, yeye wakatekahu musenga wa manananshi bua kubuikidila bantu bubi buabo." 
Numbers16:48 Wakimana biandi hankatshi ha bantu bafue ne bantu bakatshidi ne muoyo, ne disama diakashika." 
Numbers16:49 Bungi bua bantu bakafua ku disama edi bakadi binunu dikumi ne binai ne nkama muanda mutekete, ha mutu ha bantu bakafua bua bualu bua Kola." 
Numbers16:50 Alona wakahingana kudi Mose ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena, disama diakashika." 
Numbers17:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers17:2 Ela dî kudi bana ba Isalele, usungule bantu dikumi ne babidi badi bakelenge ba nsubu ya batatuʼabo, wewe wangata milangala kudibo, muntu ne mulangala wandi muntu ne mulangala wandi, wewe ufunde dina dia muntu ne muntu ha mulangala wandi." 
Numbers17:3 Wewe neufunde dina dia Alona ha mulangala wa tshisamba tshia Lewi, bualu bua wewe neusungule mulangala umue kudi muntu ne muntu udi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo." 
Numbers17:4 Wewe neuyiteke mu ntenta wa kusambakena ku mpala kua mushete kundi ndimuenesha, muaba utudi tusangakana nʼebe." 
Numbers17:5 Hashishe mulangala wa muntu unakusungula newele ntonga, meme nenshikishe kutontolola kua Bena Isalele kudibo bakutontolola." 
Numbers17:6 Mose wakamanyisha Bena Isalele, bakelenge babo bakamuha milangala dikumi ne ibidi, mukelenge mulangala wandi mukelenge mulangala wandi, bu mu nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ne mulangala wa Alona wakadi munkatshi mua milangala yabo." 
Numbers17:7 Mose wakateka milangala ku mpala kua Yehowa mu ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Numbers17:8 Hakatshiabu Mose wakabuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena, ne monai, mulangala wa Alona wa mu nsubu wa Lewi wakadi muele ntonga ne bilongo, wakakuama tumuma tukese tua amandes." 
Numbers17:9 Mose wakaluhuka ku mpala kua Yehowa ne milangala yonso kudi Bena Isalele bobo bakatangila ne muntu yonso wakangata mulangala wandi. 
Numbers17:10 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Hingasha mulangala wa Alona ku mpala kua mushete, bu tshivulukidi kudi bantu badi basue kutomboka, neumanye mua kushikisha kutontolola kudibo bantontolola nʼaku bua bobo kabafu nansha." 
Numbers17:11 Mose wakenza nunku bu muakamuambila Yehowa, mbu muakenzeye." 
Numbers17:12 Bena Isalele bakambila Mose ne, Mona! tudi bafue, ditu tuahanga, ditu tuahanga bonso." 
Numbers17:13 Muntu yonso udi ulua ha buihi ne nsubu wa Yehowa utu wadia: buonso buetu netulue, anyi?" 
Numbers18:1 Yehowa wakambila Alona ne, Wewe ne bana bebe balume ne ba mu nsubu wa ba tatuʼebe nenutuale mahambuka a ku buakane a bantu mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu, wewe ne bana bebe balume nenutuale mahambuka a mudimu wenu wa buakuidi." 
Numbers18:2 Bana benu kabidi, tshisamba tshia Lewi, tshisamba tshia tatuʼebe, ulue nʼabo bua bobo bakukuatshile mudimu kadi wewe ne bana bebe balume badi nʼebe nenuikale ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers18:3 Bobo nebalame bintu biebe ne bintu bia mu Ntenta: kadi bobo kabalu ha buihi ne malonga a mu nsubu anyi tshioshelu, bua bobo kabafu ne nuenu kanufu kabidi." 
Numbers18:4 Bobo nebakukuatshishe bua bintu bia mu ntenta wa kusambakena, ne mu mudimu wonso wa Ntenta muenyi kalu ha buihi nʼenu." 
Numbers18:5 Nuenu nenulame tshitendelelu ne tshioshelu, nunku mulau mukuabo kaukuatshi Bena Isalele." 
Numbers18:6 Mona! Meme nakadiangatshila bana benu, Bena Lewi, munkatshi mua Bena Isalele badi bu kuha kuebe kuwakuha Yehowa bua kuenza mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers18:7 Wewe ne bana bebe balume badi nʼebe nenuikale ne mudimu wa buakuidi bua bintu bionso bia tshioshelu ne bintu bidi ku nyima kua tshilulu tshikudika, nuenu nenuenze mudimu eu, nakunuha mudimu wa buakuidi bu mudimu wa kuha kuenu, muenyi udi ulua ha buihi, nebamushihe." 
Numbers18:8 Yehowa wakambila Alona ne, Mona, meme nakakuteka ku mutu kua milambu yanyi idibo banyukula ne bintu bionso bidi Bena Isalele bajila, nakakuha bintu ebi bu tshituha tshia bintu biebe bualu bua kujidila kuebe ne kua bana bebe balume tshiendelele." 
Numbers18:9 Nebikale bintu biebe munkatshi mua bintu biakajidilabo ku kahia milambu yabo yonso, ne ya bukula, ne ya kubuikila nʼai bubi buabo, ne ya kubuikila nʼai kusambuka kuabo kua mikenji, milambu idibo bafila kundi neyikale bu tshintu tshia tshijila kûdi ne kudi bana bebe balume." 
Numbers18:10 Wewe neudie bintu ebi bia tshijila, muntu mulume yonso neadie bintu ebi ebi mbintu biebe bia tshijila." 
Numbers18:11 Ebi mbintu biebe kabidi: bintu bidi Bena Isalele banyukula, ne milambu yonso idibo bakuha, nakunuha ne bana bebe balume ne bana bebe bakashi badi nʼebe, bu tshintu tshienu tshiendelele muntu yonso udi muakane mu nsubu webe neabidie." 
Numbers18:12 Bintu bimpe bia manyi ne bia tumuma tukese ne bia manvua ne bia mamuma adibo bahuola diambedi, bintu bionso bidibo bafila kudi Yehowa, nakukuha bintu ebi." 
Numbers18:13 Mamuma mimpe a mu buloba buabo buonso adibo bahuola diambedi, adibo halua nʼau kudi Yehowa, neikale mamuma ebe, muntu yonso wa mu nsubu webe udi muakane neadie." 
Numbers18:14 Tshintu tshionso tshidibo bajila mu Isalele netshikale tshiebe. 
Numbers18:15 Bintu bionso bidibo balela, ne bia bantu ne bia nyama idibo bafila kudi Yehowa, nebikale biebe, kadi wewe neuhikule banʼa bute ba bantu ne banʼa bute bonso ba nyama idi kayiyi miakane." 
Numbers18:16 Bintu bidi ne bualu bua kuhikudibua bia ngondo umue, wewe neubihikule bu mudi mushinga wabi, nshekele itanu bu nshekele wa mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu (nshekele udi bu guéras makumi abidi)." 
Numbers18:17 Kadi banʼa bute ba ngombe ne ba mikoko ne ba mbushi, wewe kuena ubihikula, ebi mbintu bia tshijila wewe neumiamine mashi abi ha tshioshelu, newoshe dianyi diabi bu mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia, bu tshintu tshidi tshitua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers18:18 Munyinyi wabi newikale webe bu mudi tshiadi tshidibo banyukula ne tshibelu tshia ku tshianza tshia bukole. 
Numbers18:19 Milambu yonso ya bintu bia tshijila bidibo banyukula bidi Bena Isalele bafila kudi Yehowa, nakunuhabi ne bana bebe balume ne bana bebe bakashi, bu tshintu tshienu tshiendelele: etshi ntshihungidi tshia luehu tshia tshiendelele ku mesu kua Yehowa kûdi wewe ne kudi bana bebe badi nʼebe." 
Numbers18:20 Yehowa wakambila Alona ne, Wewe kuena ne buhianyi mu buloba buabo, wewe kuena ne tshituha munkatshi muabo meme ndi tshituha tshiebe ne buhianyi buebe munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers18:21 Mona, nakuha Bena Lewi tshintu tshia dikumi tshionso tshia mu Isalele bu buhianyi buabo bua mudimu udibo benza mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers18:22 Bena Isalele kabalu ha buihi ne ntenta wa kusambakena bua kabadituadidi bubi buabo, kabafu." 
Numbers18:23 Kadi Bena Lewi nebenze mudimu wa mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bobo nebadituadile bubi buabo eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele ku bikondo bienu bionso, bobo kabena ne buhianyi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers18:24 Bualu bua nakuha Bena Lewi tshintu tshia dikumi tshia Bena Isalele tshidibo banyukula kudi Yehowa, bu buhianyi buabo, bua bualu ebu nakubambila ne, Kabena ne buhianyi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers18:25 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers18:26 Wambile Bena Lewi ne, Hanuangata tshintu tshia dikumi tshia bintu bia Bena Isalele tshinakunuha bu buhianyi buenu, nenutshinyukule bu mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Yehowa, tshintu tshia dikumi tshia tshintu tshia dikumi tshiakanuhabo." 
Numbers18:27 Nebanubadile mulambu udibo banyukula bu bintu biakushihulabo ku tshishihuidi ne bu bintu biakukamabo ha tshikaminu. 
Numbers18:28 Nunku nuenu nenufile mulambu wa bia dikumi bionso binudi nuangata kudi Bena Isalele bu mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Yehowa, wewe neuhe Alona muakuidi mulambu eu wa bintu bidibo banyukula kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers18:29 Nenufile tshituha tshia bintu bienu bionso bu mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Yehowa nenufile bintu bidi bitamba buimpe, bintu bia tshijila mene." 
Numbers18:30 Nunku wewe mubambile ne, Hanuanyukula bintu bidi bitamba buimpe, bintu ebi nebikale bibadibue kudi Bena Lewi bu bintu biakuvulangana ku tshishihuidi ne ha tshikaminu." 
Numbers18:31 Nenudie bintu ebi mu miaba yonso, ne nuenu ne ba mu nsubu yenu edi ndifutu dienu diakanufutabo bua mudimu wenu mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers18:32 Bua bualu ebu kanuena nudituadila bubi, hanuanyukula bintu bidi bitamba buimpe kanuena nuona bintu bia tshijila bia Bena Isalele, bua nuenu kanufu." 
Numbers19:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne," 
Numbers19:2 Eu udi mukenji wakuela Yehowa ne, Nuambile Bena Isalele bua bobo balue kûdi ne muana wa ngombe mukunze, udi kayi ne ditoba anyi tshilema, udi kayi muanze kuya muinshi mua mutshi wa tshikokedi." 
Numbers19:3 Nenumuhe Eleazâ muakuidi, yeye nealue nʼandi ku butshika bua tshitudilu, nebamushihe ku mesu kuandi," 
Numbers19:4 ne Eleazâ muakuidi neangate mashi andi ku munu wandi, neamiamine mashi ku luseke lua tshibuelelu tshia ntenta wa kusambakena misangu muanda mutekete." 
Numbers19:5 Umue wabo neoshe muana wa ngombe ku mesu kuandi, ne tshiseba tshiandi ne munyinyi wandi ne mashi andi ne tunvi tuandi:" 
Numbers19:6 ne muakuidi neangate mitshi ya cèdre, ne mabeshi a hysope, ne bintu bikunzubile, neabiele munkatshi mua kahia kadi kosha muana wa ngombe." 
Numbers19:7 Hashishe muakuidi neuvuwe bilulu ne mubidi wandi ne mai, ne ku nyima nealue biandi mu tshitudilu, neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô ne ku dilolo." 
Numbers19:8 Muntu wakanuisha ne kahia neuvuwe bilulu biandi ne mubidi wandi ne mai, ne yeye neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô ne ku dilolo." 
Numbers19:9 Muntu udi muakane neasangishe butue buonso bua muana wa ngombe, neabuteke ku butshika bua tshitudilu ha muaba mutoke, nebabulamine tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele bu mai a kulengesha hau bubi eu udi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi." 
Numbers19:10 Muntu udi usangisha butue bua muana wa ngombe neuvuwe bilulu biandi, neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane to ne ku dilolo eu udi mukenji wa Bena Isalele ne wa muenyi udi munkatshi muabo tô ne tshiendelele." 
Numbers19:11 Muntu udi ulenga bianza ha mubidi wa muntu mufue neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô matuku muanda mutekete," 
Numbers19:12 yeye neadilengeshe ne mai au dituku disatu, ne halua dituku dia muanda mutekete yeye neikale muakane, kadi biahidieye kudilengesha dituku disatu, halua dituku dia muanda mutekete yeye kena wikala muakane." 
Numbers19:13 Muntu yonso udi ulenga muntu mufue bianza, mubidi wa muntu mumane kufua, ne kena udilengesha, yeye udi wona nsubu wa Yehowa, nebamumushe munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bualu bua kabakamumiamina mai a kumulengesha nʼau, yeye kena wikala muakane, ne bubi buandi butshidi hamʼbidi handi." 
Numbers19:14 Eu udi mukenji wa hafuila mundi mu ntenta mundi yonso udi ubuela mu ntenta au, ne mundi yonso wakadi mu ntenta au neikale bu mundi udi kayi muakane tô matuku muanda mutekete." 
Numbers19:15 Malonga onso a mu nsubu, adi kayi ne bibuikidi, neikale bu tshintu tshidi katshiyi tshiakane." 
Numbers19:16 Muntu yonso wa mu budimi udi ulenga mundi wakafua ku muele wa nvita bianza, anyi mubidi wa mundi mufue, anyi mufuba wa mundi, anyi lukita, neikale bu mundi udi kayi muakane tô matuku muanda mutekete." 
Numbers19:17 Muntu udi kayi muakane neangate butue bua mulambu wakoshabo bua kubuikila nʼau bubi, neangate mai adi ahueka mu dilonga:" 
Numbers19:18 mundi utshidi muakane neangate mabeshi a hysope, neâtue mu mai, neamiamine ha ntenta, ne ha malonga onso, ne ha bantu bonso bakadimu, ne mundi wakalenga mifuba tshianza, anyi mundi wakafua ku muele wa nvita, anyi mundi mufue, anyi lukita," 
Numbers19:19 mundi utshidi muakane neamiamine mai ha mundi udi kayi muakane dî diku disatu ne dituku dia muanda mutekete, ne halua dituku dia muanda mutekete neamulengeshe, yeye neuvuwe bilulu biandi ne mubidi wandi ne mai, neikale muakane ku dilolo." 
Numbers19:20 Kadi mundi udi kayi muakane ne kena udilengesha, nebamumushe munkatshi mua tshisumbu, bualu bua yeye wakuona nsubu wa tshitendelelu, kabakamumiamina mai a kumulengesha nʼau, yeye kena muakane." 
Numbers19:21 Eu newikale mukenji wa tshiendelele kudibo muntu udi umiamine mai a kubalengesha nʼau, neuvuwe bilulu biandi, muntu udi ulenga mai a kubalengesha nʼau tshianza neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô ne ku dilolo." 
Numbers19:22 Bintu bionso bidi muntu udi kayi muakane ulenga bianza nebikale bu bintu bidi kabiyi biakane, ne muntu udi ubilenga tshianza neikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane tô ne ku dilolo." 
Numbers20:1 Bena Isalele bonso bakalua mu tshihela tshia Sina mu ngondo wa kumudilu, bakashikama mu Kadesha, Mîyama wakafua, bakamujikamu." 
Numbers20:2 Bantu kabakadi ne mai a kunua, bakadisangisha kudi Mose ne kudi Alona." 
Numbers20:3 Bantu bakatandangana ne Mose, bakamba ne, Biakadi bimpe bua tuetu kufua bu muakafua bana betu ku mesu kua Yehowa!" 
Numbers20:4 Nuakulua ne bantu ba Yehowa mu tshihela etshi bualu bua kubishiha ne nyama yetu munyi? 
Numbers20:5 Bualu kai nuakatuhatula mu Ejipitu bua kulua nʼetu mu muaba eu mubi? Kimoko kakuena bintu bia kukuna nansha mamuma a nfigi nansha tumuma tukese nansha mamuma a grenade, kakuena mai a kunua." 
Numbers20:6 Mose ne Alona bakumuka ku mesu kua bantu, bakaya ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bakatua mpala yabo hanshi. Butumbi bua Yehowa buakamueneka kudibo." 
Numbers20:7 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers20:8 Angata mulangala, usangishe bantu bonso ne wewe ne Alona mukuluʼebe, wewe wambile dibue didi ku mesu kuabo, dihatule mai, wewe neubahatuile mai ku dibue, wewe neubanuishe mai ne bimuna biabo." 
Numbers20:9 Mose wakangata mulangala ku mpala kua Yehowa bu muakamuambileye. 
Numbers20:10 Mose ne Alona bakasangisha bantu bonso ku mpala kua dibue, ne yeye wakabambila ne, Unvuai, bena kutomboka, netunuhatuile mai ku dibue edi, anyi?" 
Numbers20:11 Mose wakabandisha tshianza tshiandi, wakakuma dibue ne mulangala wandi misangu ibidi, mai a bungi akabuluka, ne bantu bonso bakanua, ne bimuna biabo." 
Numbers20:12 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona ne, Bualu bua nuenu kanuakungitabusha bua kunjidila ku mesu kua Bena Isalele, nunku kabuena nulua ne bantu aba mu buloba bunakubaha." 
Numbers20:13 Au adi mai a Meliba, bualu bua Bena Isalele bakatanda ne Yehowa, ne yeye wakajidibua ku mesu kuabo." 
Numbers20:14 Mose wakatuma miloho ku Kadesha kudi mukelenge wa Edome ne, Muanʼenu Isalele udi wamba ne, Wewe udi mumanye makenga onso akutukuata:" 
Numbers20:15 bankambua betu bakaya mu Ejipitu, ne tuetu tuakashikama mu Ejipitu musangu mule, Bena Ejipitu bakadienzela bibi ne bankambua betu kabidi:" 
Numbers20:16 ne hatuakadila kudi Yehowa, yeye wakumpa dî dietu, wakatuma muanjelo wakatuhatula mu Ejipitu, ne tangila, tudi mu Kadesha, musoko udi ku butshika bua buloba buenu mene." 
Numbers20:17 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Nuitabushe bua tuetu tuhite ku buloba buenu, katuena tuhita mu madimi anyi mu madimi a tumuma, katuena tunua mai a mena a mai anuakumbula, netuye anu mu musesu wa mukelenge, katuena tusesuka ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi tô ne hakahita butshika buenu." 
Numbers20:18 Mukelenge wa Edome wakamuambila ne, Nansha, kanuena nuhita, nendue kusangana nʼebe ne muele wa nvita." 
Numbers20:19 Bena Isalele bakamuambila ne, Netuye anu mu musesu munene, bituanua mai ebe nansha tuetu nansha bimuna bietu, netukufute, anji kuitabusha bua tuetu tuhite anu ha makasa etu, katuena bienza bualu bukuabo." 
Numbers20:20 Yeye wakamba ne, Kanuena mua kuhita. Mukelenge wa Edome wakalua ne bantu ba bungi, ne tshianza tshikole." 
Numbers20:21 Nunku mukelenge wa Edome wakahidia bua Bena Isalele bahite butshika buandi, nunku Bena Isalele bakasesuka kuakadiye." 
Numbers20:22 Bakabisha luendu luabo mu Kadesha, ne Bena Isalele bonso bakalua ku mukuna wa Hô." 
Numbers20:23 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Alona mu mukuna wa Hô, hehi ne butshika bua buloba bua Edome ne," 
Numbers20:24 Alona neadisangishe kudi bankambua bandi, yeye kena ubuela mu buloba bunakalaya Bena Isalele, bualu bua nuenu nuakuhidia dî dianyi ku mai a Meliba." 
Numbers20:25 Wangate Alona ne Eleaza, muanʼandi mulume, ulue nʼabo ku mukuna wa Hô," 
Numbers20:26 uvule Alona bilulu biandi, ubiluatshishe Eleazâ, muanʼandi mulume, Alona neasangakene ne bankambua bandi, neafue biandi." 
Numbers20:27 Mose wakenza muakamba Yehowa, bakaya ku mutu kua mukuna wa Hô ku mesu kua bantu bonso." 
Numbers20:28 Mose wakavula Alona bilulu biandi, wakabiluatshisha Eleazâ, muanʼandi mulume, ne Alona wakafua biandi ha mutu ha mukuna, ne Mose ne Eleazâ bakahueka mu tshibanda." 
Numbers20:29 Hakatangila bantu bonso ne Alona wakafua, Bena Isalele bonso bakamujinga tô matuku makumi asatu." 
Numbers21:1 Atada, mukelenge wa Bena Kanâna, wakadi ushikama ku luseke lua ku Sude, wakunvua lumu ne, Bena Isalele badi baya mu nshila wa ku Atalima, yeye wakaluangana ne Bena Isalele, wakaya ne bakuabo mu lukanu." 
Numbers21:2 Bena Isalele bakaditshiha kudi Yehowa ne, Biwafila bantu aba mu bianza bietu, netushihe misoko yabo yonso." 
Numbers21:3 Yehowa wakulua dî dia Bena Isalele, wakafua Bena Kanâna mu bianza biabo, bakabashiha ne misoko yabo yonso, ne dina dia muaba au diakadi Hôma." 
Numbers21:4 Bakumuka ku mukuna wa Hô, bakaya mu nshila wa ku Dishiba Dikunze bualu bua kunyunguluka ku nyima kua buloba bua Edome, mitshima ya bantu yakahanga bualu bua nshila." 
Numbers21:5 Bantu bakajiana Nzambi ne Mose kabidi ne, Nuakatuluhuila mu Ejipitu bua kutufuisha mu tshihela nunku bua tshinyi? Kakuena bia kudia, kakuena mai, ne bidia ebi bia tshianana biakututonda." 
Numbers21:6 Yehowa wakatuma nyoka idi isuma bu kahia kosha munka tshi mua bantu, yakasuma bantu, bantu ba bungi ba Isalele bakafua." 
Numbers21:7 Bantu bakalua kudi Mose, bakamba ne, Tuakuenza bibi bualu bua tuetu tuakujiana Yehowa ne wewe kabidi, ulombe Yehowa atumushile nyoka munkatshi muetu Mose wakalombela bantu Nzambi." 
Numbers21:8 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Enza biebe nyoka ne mubidi bu kahia, umuteke kulu kua mutshi, nunku hamutangila mundi musumibue, neikale ne muoyo." 
Numbers21:9 Mose wakenza nyoka ne tshiamu tshia mitaku, wakamuteka kulu kua mutshi, hashishe bakatangila mundi musumibue nyoka wa tshiamu tshia mitaku, wakadi ne muoyo kabidi." 
Numbers21:10 Bena Isalele bakaya, bakashikama mu Oboto." 
Numbers21:11 Bakumuka mu Oboto, bakashikama mu Iye-habalima, mu tshihela tshidi ku mpala kua Moaba, kudi diba dihatuka." 
Numbers21:12 Bakumukamu, bakashikama mu tshibanda tshia Zalede." 
Numbers21:13 Bakumukamu, bakashikama dishiya dia mai a Ânona, mu tshihela tshidi ku butshika bua buloba bua Bena Amole, mai a Ânona adi ku butshika bua Moaba, hankatshi ha Moaba ne Bena Amole." 
Numbers21:14 Nunku bakafunda mu mukanda dina diau Nvita ya Yehowa ne, Waheba wa mu Sufa ne tshibanda tshia Ânona," 
Numbers21:15 buloba budi busendama mu tshibanda ku musoko wa Ala hehi ne butshika bua Moaba. 
Numbers21:16 Bakumukamu, bakaya ku Bê, ku mpokolo wa mai, wakambila Yehowa Mose ne, Usangisheku bantu, nembanuishe mai." 
Numbers21:17 Hashishe Bena Isalele bakimba musambu eu ne, Mai abande, nuenu nuimbile musambu;" 
Numbers21:18 mpokolo wa mai wakumbulabo kudi bakelenge, ne kudi miloho ya bantu ne dikombo dia bukelenge ne milangala yabo. Bakumuka mu tshihela, bakaya ku Matana:" 
Numbers21:19 bakumuka ku Matana, bakaya ku Nahaliele, bakumuka ku Nahaliele, bakaya ku Bamota," 
Numbers21:20 bakumuka ku Bamota, bakaya mu tshibanda tshia mu buloba bua Moaba tô ne ku mutu kua mukuna wa Pisega, kuakatangilabo tshihela." 
Numbers21:21 Bena Isalele bakatuma miloho kudi Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, ne," 
Numbers21:22 Witabushe bua tuetu tuhitshile ku buloba buebe, katuena tusesuka mu madimi anyi mu madimi a tumuma, katuena tunua mai a mena a mai anuakumbula, netulonde anu mu musesu wa mukelenge tô ne hatuahita ku butshika bua buloba buebe." 
Numbers21:23 Sihona wakahidia bua Bena Isalele bahite ku buloba buandi, kadi Sihona wakasangisha bantu bandi bonso, wakaya kudi Bena Isalele mu tshihela tô ne ku Yahasa; wakatuangana nvita ne Bena Isalele." 
Numbers21:24 Bena Isalele bakamushiha ne muele wa nvita, bakanyenga buloba buandi ku mai a Ânona tô ne ku mai a Yaboka ku butshika bua buloba bua Bena Amona, bualu bua butshika bua buloba bua Bena Amona buakadi bukole." 
Numbers21:25 Bena Isalele bakanyenga bimenga ebi bionso Bena Isalele bakashikama mu bimenga bionso bia Bena Amole, mu Heshebona ne mu misoko ei yonso." 
Numbers21:26 Heshebona wakadi tshimenga tshia Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi uluangana ne mukelenge mukuabo wa Moaba, wakanyenga buloba buandi buonso mu tshianza tshiandi to ne ku mai a Ânona." 
Numbers21:27 Nunku badi belangana nsumuinu ne, Luai bienu ku Heshebona, musoko wa Sihona wikale muibakibue,"
