Numbers21:28 Bualu bua kahia kakumuka ku Heshebona, ludimi lua kahia ku musoko wa Sihona, luakosha Ala wa Moaba ne bakelenge ba ku mikuna ya mai a Ânona." 
Numbers21:29 Mulau ukukuate, Moaba! Nuenu, Bena Kamoshe, nudi bajimine! Bakatua bana babo balume bu banyemi, ne bana babo bakashi bu bena lukanu kudi Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole." 
Numbers21:30 Tuakabasa mikete, musoko wa Heshebona udi muhaula tô ne ku Dibona, tuakunyanga buloba tô ne ku Nofa ne ku Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Nunku Bena Isalele bakashikama mu buloba bua Bena Amole. 
Numbers21:32 Mose wakatuma bantu bua kutentekelabo buloba bua Yazê, ne bakanyenga misoko ei kabidi, bakihata Bena Amole bakadimu." 
Numbers21:33 Bakasesuka, bakaya mu nshila wa ku Bashana, ne Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, wakaya ne bantu bandi bonso bua kusangana nʼabo nvita ku Edelei." 
Numbers21:34 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Kumutshinyi nansha, bualu bua nakamufila mu tshianza tshiebe, ne bantu bandi bonso ne buloba buandi, wewe neumuenzele bu muwakuenzela Sifiona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi ushikama mu Heshebona." 
Numbers21:35 Nunku bakamushiha ne bana bandi balume ne bantu bandi bonso, nansha mundi umue wakashala, bakanyema buloba buandi." 
Numbers22:1 Bena Isalele bakaya ku luendu, bakashikama mu mpata wa Moaba dishiya dia mai a Yadene, batangilangana ne Yeleko." 
Numbers22:2 Balaka, muana mulume wa Sipô, wakatangila malu onso akenzela Bena Isalele Bena Amole." 
Numbers22:3 Bena Moaba bakatamba kutshina bantu, bualu bua bungi buabo; mitshima ya Bena Moaba yakanyingalala bualu bua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers22:4 Mukelenge wa Moaba wakambila bakulu ba Midiyana ne, Bantu aba bd bungi nebatukengeshe bu mudi ngombe ukongolesha mashinde a mu budimi ne ludimu luandi Balaka, muana mulume wa Sipô, wakadi mukelenge wa Moaba ku tshikondo atshi." 
Numbers22:5 Yeye wakatuma miloho kudi Belâma, muana mulume wa Beô, ku Petô udi hehi ne musulu wa Pelata ku buloba bua bantu bandi bualu bua kumubikila ne, Tangila, bantu bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu, tangila, badi batangalaka buloba buonso, badi bashikama hehi nʼanyi." 
Numbers22:6 Nunku lua biebe, ndi nkusengelela, ungelele bantu aba mulau, bualu bua bobo badi bantamba bukole, hashishe nembahite bukole, netubashihe, nengihate mu buloba, bualu bua ndi mumanye ne, Muntu ûdi uvudishila disanka neikale ne disanka, ne mundi ûdi wela mulau neikale ne mulau." 
Numbers22:7 Bakulu ba Bena Moaba ne bakulu ba Midiyana bakaya ne bintu bia kumubila nʼabi mu bianza biabo, bakatua kudi Belâma, bakamuambila mei onso a Balaka." 
Numbers22:8 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nulale bienu kunoko butuku ebu, nennuambile dî kabidi, bu mudi Yehowa ungambila, ne bakelenge ba Moaba bakashala ne Belâma." 
Numbers22:9 Nzambi wakamueneka kudi Belâma wakamuambila ne, Balume aba badi kuebe mbantu kai?" 
Numbers22:10 Belâma wakambila Nzambi ne, Balaka, muana mulume wa Sipô, mukelenge wa Moaba, wakantumina dî ne," 
Numbers22:11 Bantu bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu, bakatangadika buloba buonso, lua biebe, ubangelele mulau, hashishe nemmanye mua kuluangana nʼabo, nembihate." 
Numbers22:12 Nzambi wakambila Belâma ne, Kuyi nʼabo, kuedi bantu aba mulau nansha, bantu aba badi basankishibue." 
Numbers22:13 Belâma wakabika dinda, wakambila miloho ya Balaka ne, Yai bienu ku buloba buenu, Yehowa wakahidia bua meme kuya nʼenu." 
Numbers22:14 Miloho ya Moaba yakabika, yakahingana kudi Balaka, yakamba ne, Belâma udi uhidia bua kulua nʼetu." 
Numbers22:15 Balaka wakatuma miloho mikuabo, yakahita miloho mikuabo butumbi." 
Numbers22:16 Yakalua kudi Belâma, yakamuambila ne, Balaka, muana mulume wa Sipô, udi wamba ne, Kuitabusha bua bualu buonso bukuhumbishe bua kulua kundi," 
Numbers22:17 bualu bua meme nenkuhe butumbi bunene, nengenze mei onso audi wamba, lua biebe, ndi nkusengelela, ungelele bantu aba mulau." 
Numbers22:18 Belâma wakitaba kudi miloho ya Balaka ne, Biampa Balaka nsubu wandi mûle tente ne argent ne or, tshiena mumanye mua kuhidia dî dia Yehowa Nzambi wanyi, bua kuenza bualu bukese anyi bualu bunene." 
Numbers22:19 Nuanji kulala bienu kunoko butuku ebu kabidi, bua meme kumanya dî didi Yehowa ungambila kabidi." 
Numbers22:20 Nzambi wakambila Belâma butuku ne, Bialua balume aba bua kukubikila, ubike biebe, uye habo, kadi wenze biebe anu dî dinakuambila." 
Numbers22:21 Belâma wakabika ne dinda, wakela tshiseba ha nyima ha mpunda wandi, wakaya ne miloho ya Bena Moaba." 
Numbers22:22 Tshiji tshiakakuata Nzambi bualu bua yeye wakaya, ne muanjelo wa Yehowa wakaditeka mu nshila bu muhumbishi wandi: Belâma wakadi wenda ha nyima ha mpunda wandi, ne bahika bandi babidi bakadi nʼandi." 
Numbers22:23 Mpunda wakatangila muanjelo wa Yehowa muimane mu nshila, ne muele wa nvita mu tshianza tshiandi, mpunda wakasesuka mu nshila, wakaya mu budimi, Belâma wakakuma mpunda bua kumuhingisha mu nshila." 
Numbers22:24 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakimana mu nshila mukese udi hankatshi ha madimi a tumuma, lumbu luakadi ku luseke elu, ne lumbu ku luseke lukuabo" 
Numbers22:25 Mpunda wakatangila muanjelo wa Yehowa, wakadikuma ku lumbu, wakasunsula dikasa dia Belâma ku lumbu, ne yeye wakamukuma kabidi." 
Numbers22:26 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakaya ku mpala, wakimana mu nshila mukese, kakadi ne muaba wa mua kuya ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Numbers22:27 Mpunda wakatangila muanjelo wa Yehowa, wakalala hanshi muinshi mua Belâma, tshiji tshiakakuata Belâma, wakakuma mpunda ne mulangala wandi." 
Numbers22:28 Yehowa wakabidika mukana mua mpunda, wakambila Belâma ne, Nakuenza tshinyi bua wewe wakunkuma misangu isatu?" 
Numbers22:29 Belâma wakambila mpunda ne, Bualu bua wewe wakansekesha, bu meme muikale ne muele wa nvita mu tshianza, nakadi kukushiya." 
Numbers22:30 Mpunda wakambila Belâma ne, Meme tshiena mpunda webe uwakenda ha nyima nʼandi matuku ebe onso tô ne katataka, anyi? Nakadi nkuenzela nunku dia mbedi, anyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Nansha." 
Numbers22:31 Yehowa wakabidika mesu a Belâma, ne yeye wakamona muanjelo wa Yehowa muimane mu nshala, ne muele wa nvita mu tshianza tshiandi, yeye wakinama mutu wandi, wakatua mpala hanshi." 
Numbers22:32 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Wakakuma mpunda webe misangu isatu bualu kai? Tangila, meme nakulua bu muhumbishi webe, bualu bua nshila webe kena muakane ku mesu kuanyi," 
Numbers22:33 mpunda wakuntangila, wakusesuka kundi nusangu ei isatu bu mpunda muhidie kusesuka kundi, nakadi kukushiha wewe, ne nakadi kusungila mpunda." 
Numbers22:34 Belâma wakambila muanjelo wa Yehowa ne, Nakuenza bibi, bualu bua tshiakamanya ne wewe wakadi muimane bua kunkanda mu nshila. Ne bikala bualu bukufikishe munda, meme nempingane kabidi." 
Numbers22:35 Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakambila Belâma ne, Ya biebe ne balume aba kadi wewe wambe anu dî dinaknambila. Nunku Belâma wakaya ne miloho ya Balaka." 
Numbers22:36 Hakunvia Balaka lumu ne, Belâma wakalua, wakaya kusangakena nʼandi ku tshimenga tshia Moaba, tshidi ku muelelu wa mai a Amona, ku butshika bua buloba buandi mene." 
Numbers22:37 Balaka wakambila Belâma ne, Tshiakakusengelela bua kulua kundi, anyi? Wewe kuena mulue kundi munyi? Meme tshiena mumanye mua kukuha butumbi bulelela, anyi?" 
Numbers22:38 Belâma wakambila Balaka ne, Mona, nakamana kulua kudi! Ndi mumanye mua kukuambila bualu, anyi? Di didi Nzambi uteka mukana muanyi, nenkuambiledi." 
Numbers22:39 Belâma wakaya ne Balaka, bakalua ku Kîyata-husota." 
Numbers22:40 Balaka wakamushihela ngombe ne mikoko, wakantumina Belâma ne miloho yakadi nʼandi." 
Numbers22:41 Dinda Balaka wakaya ne Belâma ku mutu kua mikuna ya Bâla; yeye wakatangila tô ne ku matshika onso a tshitudilu tshia bantu. 
Numbers23:1 Belâma wakambila Balaka ne, Ungashile bioshelu muanda mutekete, undongoluele balume ba ngombe muanda mutekete ne bimpanga muanda mutekete." 
Numbers23:2 Balaka Wakenza muakamba Belâma, Balaka ne Belâma bakosha ngombe ne tshimpanga ha tshioshelu ne ha tshioshelu." 
Numbers23:3 Belâma wakambila Balaka ne, Wimane ha buihi ne mulambu webe wa kuosha ha kahia ne meme nengumuke, bumue Yehowa nealue kusangakena hanyi, nenkuambile malu onso adiye ungambila Yeye wakaya kulu ku muaba wakadi mutuhu." 
Numbers23:4 Nzambi wakasangakena ne Belâma, ne Belâma wakamuambila ne, Nakasa bioshelu muanda mutekete, nakosha mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga ha tshioshelu ne ha tshioshelu." 
Numbers23:5 Yehowa wakateka dî mukana mua Belâma, wakamba ne, Hingana kudi Balaka, umuambile nunku." 
Numbers23:6 Wakahingana kudiye, ne mona, yeye wakadi muimane ha buihi ne mulambu wandi wa kuosha ha kahia, yeye ne miloho ya Moaba yonso." 
Numbers23:7 Yeye wakabela lusumuinu luandi ne, Balaka, mukelenge wa Moaba, wakumbikila ku Alama ne ku mikuna ya ku Esete ne, Lua biebe, ungelele bana ba Yakoba mulau, lua biebe kukanda Bena Isalele." 
Numbers23:8 Nengele nunku mulau udi kayi muanze kuedibua mulau kudi Yehowa munyi? Nenkande mundi udi kayi muanze kukandibua kudi Yehowa munyi? 
Numbers23:9 Bualu bua nakumutangila ku mutu kua mabue, nakamumona ku mutu kua mikuna, bantu aba badi bashikama ha buabo kabena babadibua munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabo." 
Numbers23:10 Udi mumanye mua kubala bana ba Yakoba nganyi? udi mumanye mua kubala tshituha tshinai tshia Bena Isalele nganyi? Nfue bianyi lufu lua muntu muakane, ne kunshikidilu kuanyi kuikale bu kuandi." 
Numbers23:11 Balaka wakambila Belâma ne, Wakungenzela tshinyi? Nakakubikila bua kungelela bantu badi nʼanyi lukuna mulau, ne mona, wewe wakubavudishila disanka." 
Numbers23:12 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Tshiena ne bualu bua kudimuka bua kuamba dî diakuteka Yehowa mukana muanyi, anyi?" 
Numbers23:13 Balaka wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Lua hanyi ku muaba mukuabo kûdi mumanye mua kubatangila, wewe mutangile anu tshituha tshiabo, kuena utangila buonso buabo, ubangelele mulau ku muaba au." 
Numbers23:14 Wakaya nʼandi mu mpata wa Sofima, ku mutu kua Pisega, wakasa bioshelu muanda mutekete, wakosha mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga ku tshioshelu ne ku tshioshelu." 
Numbers23:15 Yeye wakambila Balaka ne, Wimane ha buihi ne mulambu webe wa kuosha ha kahia, nenye kusangakena ne Yehowa kuaka." 
Numbers23:16 Yehowa wakasangakena ne Belâma, wakateka dî mukana muandi, wakamba ne, Uhingane kudi Balaka, umuambile nunku." 
Numbers23:17 Wakalua kudiye, wakadi muimane ha buihi ne mulambu wandi wa kuosha ha kahia, miloho ya Moaba yakadi nʼandi. Balaka wakamuebesha ne, Yehowa wakuamba tshinyi?" 
Numbers23:18 Yeye wakamuela lusumuinu luandi ne, Balaka, bika biebe, unvua, ungunvuile, muana mulume wa Sipô:" 
Numbers23:19 Nzambi kena bu muntu udi wamba mei a mashimi, kena bu muana wa muntu, bua kukudimuneye mutshima. Biambeye dî, kena udishikisha, anyi? Anyi biambeye bualu, kena ubuenza, anyi?" 
Numbers23:20 Eyo, nakuangata dî bua kubavudishila disanka yeye wakabavudishila disanka, ne meme tshiena mumanye mua kudikudimuna." 
Numbers23:21 Yeye kena mutangile malu mabi munkatshi mua bana ba Yakoba, yeye kena mutangile mitshima mikole munkatshi mua Isalele. Yehowa, Nzambi wandi udi nʼandi ne dî dia lubila dia bukelenge didi munkatshi muabo." 
Numbers23:22 Nzambi wakabaha tula mu Ejipitu, yeye udi ne bukole bu nyama wa mbowa." 
Numbers23:23 Bulelela, kakuena muena muhongo munkatshi mua bana ba Yakoba, kakuena batempi ba mbuku munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, katataka nebambile bana ba Yakoba ne Bena Isalele ne, Yehowa wakuenza tshinyi?" 
Numbers23:24 Mona, bantu aba badi bahika bu mukashi wa nyama wa ntambue, yeye udi ubika bu nyama wa ntambue, yeye kena ulala kabidi to ne hadieye tshintu, ne hanueye mashi a tshintu tshiakashiheye." 
Numbers23:25 Balaka wakambila Belâma ne, Kubedi mulau, kubavudishidi disanka nansha." 
Numbers23:26 Kadi Belâma wakambila Balaka ne, Tshiakukuambila ne, Neakuambile mei onso adi Yehowa mungambile, anyi?" 
Numbers23:27 Balaka wakambila Belâma ne, Lua biebe, nenkuleshe muaba mukuabo, bumue Nzambi neitabushe bua wewe ubangelele mulau ku muaba au." 
Numbers23:28 Balaka wakaya ne Belâma ku mutu kua mukuna wa Peô, kuakatangileye ku tshihela." 
Numbers23:29 Belâma wakambila Balaka ne, Ungashile bioshelu muanda mutekete, undongoluele balume ba ngombe muanda mutekete ne bimpanga muanda mutekete." 
Numbers23:30 Balaka Wakenza muakamba Belâma, wakosha ngombe ne tshimpanga ku tshioshelu ne ku tshioshelu." 
Numbers24:1 Hakatangila Belâma ne bualu ebu buakusankisha Yehowa bua kuvudishila Bena Isalele disanka, yeye kakaya kabidi kutempa mbuku bu muakenzeye misangu mikuabo, kadi wakatangisha mpala wandi ku tshihela." 
Numbers24:2 Belâma wakabandisha mesu andi, wakatangila Bena Isalele bashikama ku milongo ya bisamba biabo, Nyuma wa Nzambi wakalua kudiye." 
Numbers24:3 Yeye wakela lusumuinu luandi ne, Belâma, muana mulume wa Beô, muntu wakadi ne disu diandi dibuikila," 
Numbers24:4 udi unvua mei a Nzambi, udi utangila bilota bia Nzambi wa Bukole, hahoneye hanshi, mesu andi adi matabale," 
Numbers24:5 udi wamba ne, Yakoba, ntenta yebe idi mimpe! Bena Isalele, bitudilu bienu bidi bimpe!" 
Numbers24:6 Bidi bibaluluke bu bibanda, bu bibunda bidi hehi ne musulu, bu mitshi ya aloe yakakunabo kudi Yehowa, bu mitshi ya cèdre idi hehi ne mai." 
Numbers24:7 Mai adi aluhuka mu milondo yandi, bana bandi nebikale munkatshi mua mai a bungi, mukelenge wandi neahite Agaga bunene, bukelenge buandi nebutumbishibue." 
Numbers24:8 Nzambi wakamubadila mu Ejipitu, yeye udi ne bukole bua nyama wa mbowa, yeye neamine bisamba bia bantu badi nʼandi lukuna, neatshibule mifuba yabo bituha, yeye neabatubule ne mikete." 
Numbers24:9 Udi walamina bu nyama wa ntambue, udi ulala hanshi bu mukashi wa nyama wa ntambue, nganyi neamubishe? Wakasankisha ikale biandi ne disanka, ne wakuela mulau ikale biandi ne mulau." 
Numbers24:10 Tshiji tshiakakuata Balaka bualu bua Belâma wakakuma bianza biandi Balaka wakambila Belâma ne, Nakakubikila bua kungelela bantu badi hanyi lukuna mulau, kadi mona, wewe wakubavudishila disanka misangu ei isatu." 
Numbers24:11 Katataka ya kuebe, nakadi ngelangana meji bua kukuha butumbi bunene, kadi mona, wewe wakubavudishila butumbi ebu." 
Numbers24:12 Belâma wakambila Balaka ne, Tshiakuambila miloho yebe kabidi iwakuntumina ne," 
Numbers24:13 Biampa Balaka nsubu wandi mûle tente ne argent ne or, tshiena mumanye mua kuya ku mpala kua dî dia Yehowa, bua kuenza bualu buimpe anyi bualu bubi mu mutshima wanyi, nenkuambile mei onso adi Yehowa ubambile, tshiakayambila nunku, anyi?" 
Numbers24:14 Katataka nyaya kudi bantu banyi, lua biebe, nenkuleshe malu adi bantu aba benzela bantu bebe mu matuku adi ku mpala." 
Numbers24:15 Yeye wakamuela lusumuinu luandi ne, Belama, muana mulume wa Beô, muntu wakadi ne disu diandi dibuikila, udi Wamba ne," 
Numbers24:16 Udi unvua mei a Nzambi, udi ne lungenyi lua Nzambi wa mu diulu, udi utangila bilota bia Nzambi wa Bukole, hahoneye hanshi ne mesu andi adi matabale." 
Numbers24:17 Ndi mumutangile kadi tshiena mumutangile katataka, ndi mumumone kadi yeye kena ha buihi, Mutoto nebiluhuke kudi Yakoba, ne dikombo dia bukelenge nedibike munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, nedikume ku matshika a Moaba, nedishihe bana bonso ba Shete." 
Numbers24:18 Edome neikale buhianyi, ne Sei, buloba bua bena lukuna bandi, neikale buhianyi buandi, kadi Bena Isalele nebenze malu makole." 
Numbers24:19 Muntu nealuhuke kudi Yakoba, neikale ne bukelenge butambe, neashihe tshituha tshia bantu badi bashala mu musoko." 
Numbers24:20 Yeye wakatangila kudi Amaleka, wakabela lusumuinu luandi ne, Amaleka wakadi tshisamba tshia ku mpala munkatshi mua bisamba, kadi kunshikidilu tshisamba tshiandi netshijimme tshiendelele." 
Numbers24:21 Yeye wakatangila kudi Bena Kene, wakabela lusumuinu ne, Muaba unudi nushikama udi mukole, udi munkatshi mua mabue." 
Numbers24:22 Kadi nebahaule Bena Kene tô ne haya Bena Ashû nʼabo bu bena lukanu. 
Numbers24:23 Wakela lusumuinu luandi kabidi ne, Nganyi neikale ne muoyo hashikisha Nzambi malu au?" 
Numbers24:24 Kadi matu manene nealue kukala kua buloba bua Bena Kiti, nebakengeshe Bena Ashû, nebakengeshe Bena Ebê kabidi, yeye neikale muhaudibue kabidi." 
Numbers24:25 Belâma wakabika, wakahingana kuandi, Balaka wakaya kuandi kabidi." 
Numbers25:1 Bena Isalele bakashikama mu Shitima, bantu bakabanga kuenda masandi ne bana bakashi ba Bena Moaba," 
Numbers25:2 bualu bua bakabikila bantu ku milambu ya nzambi yabo, ne bantu bakadia, bakinamina nzambi yabo." 
Numbers25:3 Bena Isalele bakadisangisha kudi Bâla-peô ne tshiji tshiakakuata Yehowa bualu bua Bena Isalele. 
Numbers25:4 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Angata bakelenge bonso ba bantu, ubowe ku mpala kua Yehowa mu munya, nunku tshiji tshikole tshia Yehowa tshiumuke kudi Bena Isalele." 
Numbers25:5 Mose wakambila balumbuluishi ba mu Isalele ne, Muntu ne muntu ashihe bantu ba mu tshisamba tshiandi bakadisangisha kudi Bâla-peô." 
Numbers25:6 Mona, mukuabo wa Bena Isalele wakalua kudi bana babo ne mukashi wa Bena Midiyana ku mesu kua Mose ne ku mesu kua tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele, hakadibo badila ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers25:7 Hakatangila Pinehasa, muana mulume wa Eleazâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi, bualu ebu, yeye wakabika munkatshi mua tshisumbu, wakangata difuma mu tshianza tshiandi," 
Numbers25:8 yeye wakalonda ku nyima kua Muena Isalele mu nsubu wakababambakasha bubidi buabo, Muena Isalele ne mukashi Nunku disama diakalekedibua munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers25:9 Bantu bakafua ku disama adi bakadi binunu makumi abidi ne binai. 
Numbers25:10 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers25:11 Pinehasa, muana mulume wa Eleazâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi, wakalekesha tshiji tshianyi kudi Bena Isalele, bualu bua yeye wakadi ne mukau bu mukau wanyi munkatshi muabo, nunku tshiakashiha Bena Isalele bonso ne mukau wanyi." 
Numbers25:12 Nunku amba biebe ne, Mona, ndi mmuhe dihungila dianyi dia ditalala," 
Numbers25:13 nedikale kudiye ne kudi bana badi bamulonda ku nyima, bu dihungila dia mudimu wa buakuidi tshiendelele bualu bua yeye wakadi ne mukau bualu bua Nzambi wandi, wakabuikidila Bena Isalele bubi." 
Numbers25:14 Dina dia Muena Isalele wakashihabo ne mukashi wa Bena Midiyana diakadi Zimeli, muana mulume wa Salu, mukelenge wa nsubu ya batatuʼabo ya Bena Shimeona." 
Numbers25:15 Dina dia mukashi wa Bena Midiyana wakashihibua diakadi Kozebi, muana mukashi wa Sû, yeye wakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo ya mu Midiyana." 
Numbers25:16 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers25:17 Utatshishe Bena Midiyana, ubashihe," 
Numbers25:18 bualu bua bobo badi banutatshisha ne budimu, bakanushima mu bualu bua Peô ne mu bualu bua Kozebi, muana mukashi wa mukelenge wa mu Midiyana, muanʼabo mukashi, wakamushihabo mu dituku diakalua disama bualu bua Peô." 
Numbers26:1 Hashishe hakashika disama, Yehowa wakambila Mose ne Eleazâ, muana mulume wa Alona muakuidi ne," 
Numbers26:2 Nubale bungi bua bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele, ba mu bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, badi bamanye mua kuya mu nvita ya Bena Isalele." 
Numbers26:3 Mose ne Eleazâ bakabambila mu mpata ya Moaba hehi ne mai a Yadene batangilangane ne Yeleko ne," 
Numbers26:4 Nubale bungi bua bantu ba mu bidimu makumi abidi to ne ha mutu bu muakambila Yehowa Mose ne Bena Isalele bakaluhuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu. 
Numbers26:5 Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Isalele, bana balume ba Lubena, Hanoka ne meku a Bena Hanoka, Palu ne meku a Bena Palu," 
Numbers26:6 Heselona ne meku a Bena Heselona, Kantu ne meku a Bena Kami." 
Numbers26:7 Au mmeku a Bena Lubena, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi anai ne bisatu ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asatu." 
Numbers26:8 Bana balume ba Palu: Eliaba. 
Numbers26:9 Bana balume ba Eliaba: Nemuele ne Datana ne Abilama Datana eu ne Abilama eu bakabikila tshisumbu tshia bantu, bakatanda ne Mose ne Alona mu tshisumbu tshia Kola, hakadibo batanda ne Yehowa," 
Numbers26:10 buloba buakubulula mukana muabu, buakabamma ne Kola, bakafua tshisumbu atshi, kahia kakosha balume aba nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, ne bobo bakalua bu tshivulukidi kudi Bena Isalele." 
Numbers26:11 Kadi bana balume ba Kola kabakafua. 
Numbers26:12 Bana balume ba Shimeona ku meku abo Nemuele ne meku a Bena Nemuele, Yamina ne meku a Bena Yamina, Yakina ne meku a Bena Yakina," 
Numbers26:13 Sela ne meku a Bena Sela, Shaula ne meku a Bena Shaula." 
Numbers26:14 Au mmeku a Bena Shimeona, bantu binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi ne nkama ibidi." 
Numbers26:15 Bana balume ba Gada ku meku abo Sefona ne meku a Bena Sefona, Hagi ne meku a Bena Hagi, Shuni ne meku a Bena Shuni," 
Numbers26:16 Ozeni ne meku a Bena Ozeni, Eli ne meku a Bena Eli," 
Numbers26:17 ne Aloda ne meku a Bena Aloda, ne Aleli ne meku a Bena Aleli." 
Numbers26:18 Au mmeku a Bena Gada, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi anai ne nkama itanu." 
Numbers26:19 Bana balume ba Yuda, Ele ne Onana; Ele ne Onana bakafua mu buloba bua Kanâna." 
Numbers26:20 Bana balume ba Yuda ku meku abo. Shela ne meku a Bena Shela, Pelese ne meku a Bena Pelese, Zela ne meku a Bena Zela." 
Numbers26:21 Bana balume ba Pelese Heselona ne meku a Bena Heselona, Hamula ne meku a Bena Hamula." 
Numbers26:22 Au mmeku a Yuda, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne bisambombo ne nkama itanu." 
Numbers26:23 Bana balume ba Yisakâ ku meku abo: Tola ne meku a Bena Tola; Puwa ne meku a Bena Puna; 
Numbers26:24 Yashuba ne meku a Bena Yashuba, ne Shimelona ne meku a Bena Shimelona." 
Numbers26:25 Au mmeku a Yisakâ, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi asambombo ne binai ne nkama isatu." 
Numbers26:26 Bana balume ba Zebuluna ku meku abo Selede ne meku a Bena Selede; Elone ne meku a Bena Elone; Yalele ne meku a Bena Yalele. 
Numbers26:27 Au mmeku a Bena Zebuluna, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi asambombo ne nkama itanu." 
Numbers26:28 Bana balume ba Yosefe ku meku abo, Manashe ne Efelayima." 
Numbers26:29 Bana balume ba Manashe Mala ne meku a Bena Mala, Mala wakalela Gilada; Gilada ne meku a Bena Gilada." 
Numbers26:30 Aba mbana balume ba Gilada: Yezê ne meku a Bena Yezê, Heleke ne meku a Bena Heleke;" 
Numbers26:31 Aseliele ne meku a Bena Aseliele; Shekeme ne meku a Bena Shekeme; 
Numbers26:32 Shenuda ne meku a Bena Shenuda, Hefê ne meku a Bena Hefê." 
Numbers26:33 Selofehada, muana mulume wa Hefê, kakadi ne bana ba balume nansha, wakadi anu ne bana ba bakashi, mena a bana ba bakashi ba Selofehada. Mala ne Noa ne Hogela ne Mileka ne Tîsa." 
Numbers26:34 Au mmeku a Manashe, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi atanu ne bibidi ne nkama muanda mutekete." 
Numbers26:35 Aba mbana balume ba Efelayima ku meku abo Shutela ne meku a Bena Shutela, Bekê ne meku a Bena Bekê; Tahana ne meku a Bena Tahana." 
Numbers26:36 Aba mbana balume ba Shutela: Elana ne meku a Bena Elana. 
Numbers26:37 Au mmeku a bana balume ba Efelayima, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi asatu ne bibidi ne nkama itanu Aba mbana balume ba Yosefe ku meku abo." 
Numbers26:38 Aba mbana balume ba Benyamina ku meku abo Bela ne meku a Bena Bela; Ashabele ne meku a Bena Ashabele; Ahilama ne meku a Bena Abalama; 
Numbers26:39 Shefufama ne meku a Bena Shefufama; Hufama ne meku a Bena Hufama. 
Numbers26:40 Bana balume ba Bela bakadi Ada ne Nâmana: ne meku a Bena Ada ne meku a Bena Nâmana. 
Numbers26:41 Aba mbana balume ba Benyamina ku meku abo, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi anai ne bitanu ne nkama isambombo." 
Numbers26:42 Aba mbana balume ba Dana ku meku abo: Shuhama ne Bena Shuhama. Au mmeku a Dana ku meku abo. 
Numbers26:43 Meku onso a Bena Shuhama, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi asambombo ne binai ne nkama mai." 
Numbers26:44 Aba mbana balume ba Ashê ku meku abo: Yimena ne meku a Bena Yimena, Yishewi ne meku a Bena Yishewi, Belia ne meku a Bena Belia," 
Numbers26:45 ne bana balume ba Belia Hebe ne meku a Bena Hebe, Malekiele ne meku a Bena Malekiele." 
Numbers26:46 Dina dia muana mukashi wa Ashê diakadi Sela. 
Numbers26:47 Au mmeku a bana balume ba Ashê, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi atanu ne bisatu ne nkama mai." 
Numbers26:48 Bana balume ba Nafatale ku meku abo Yasele ne meku a Bena Yasele; Guni ne meku a Bena Guni; 
Numbers26:49 Yesê ne meku a Bena Yesê, Shilema ne meku a Bena Shilema." 
Numbers26:50 Au mmeku a Nafatale, bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi anai ne bitanu ne nkama mai." 
Numbers26:51 Bungi bua Bena Isalele buakabalabo buakadi binunu nkama isambombo ne tshimue ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asatu. 
Numbers26:52 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers26:53 Newabanyine bantu aba buloba bua buhianyi buabo bu bungi bua mena abo. 
Numbers26:54 Wewe neuhe bantu ba bungi buhianyi bunene, ne bantu bakese buhianyi bukese muntu ne muntu wakabalabo wewe neumuhe buhianyi." 
Numbers26:55 Kadi nebabanye buloba anu ku nshobo, bobo nebahiane buloba ku mena a bisamba bia batatuʼabo." 
Numbers26:56 Nebabanye buhianyi bunene anyi buhianyi bukese anu ku nshobo. 
Numbers26:57 Ebu mbungi bua Bena Lewi ku meku abo Gêshona ne meku a Bena Gêshona, Kohata ne meku a Bena Kohata; Melali ne meku a Bena Melali." 
Numbers26:58 Au mmeku a Lewi: diku dia Bena Libina, diku dia Bena Hebelone ne diku dia Mali ne diku dia Bena Mushi ne diku dia Bena Kola Kohata wakalela Amalama." 
Numbers26:59 Dina dia mukashi wa Amalama diakadi Yokebede, muana mukashi wa Lewi, wakalelabo mu Ejipitu: yeye wakalelela Amalama Alona ne Mose ne Miyama, muanʼabo mukashi." 
Numbers26:60 Alona wakalela Nadaba ne Abihu ne Eleazâ ne Itamâ. 
Numbers26:61 Nadaba ne Abihu bakafua hakafuabo kahia kakadi kakayi ka tshijila kudi Yehowa. 
Numbers26:62 Bungi buabo buakabalabo buakadi binunu makumi abidi ne bisatu ba mu ngondo umue tô ne ha mutu, kabakababala munkatshi mua Bena Isalele bualu bua kabakadi ne buhianyi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers26:63 Aba mbantu bakabalabo kudi Mose ne kudi Eleazâ muakuidi, bakabala Bena Isalele mu mpata ya Moaba hehi ne Yadene mutangilangane ne Yeleko." 
Numbers26:64 Kadi kakuakadi muntu umue munkatshi muabo wakabalabo kudi Mose ne Alona mu tshihela tshia Sinai. 
Numbers26:65 Bualu bua Yehowa wakamba ne, Bobo nebafue mu tshihela. Nansha umue wabo wakashala anu Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune ne Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna." 
Numbers27:1 Bana bakashi ba Selofehada, muana mulume wa Hefê, muana mulume wa Gilada, muana mulume wa Mala, muana mulume wa Manashe, wa meku a Manashe, muana mulume wa Yosefe, au mmena a bana bakashi: Mahala ne Noa ne Hogela ne Mileka ne Tîsa." 
Numbers27:2 Bobo bakimana ku mpala kua Mose ne kua Eleazâ, muakuidi ne ku mpala kua bakelenge ba mu tshisumbu, ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bakamba ne," 
Numbers27:3 Tatu wetu wakafua mu tshihela, yeye kakadi munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia Kola tshiakadisangisha kudi Yehowa, kadi yeye wakafua anu bualu bua mibi yandi, yeye kakadi ne bana ba balume nansha." 
Numbers27:4 Bualu kai nebajimishe dina dia tatu wetu munkatshi mua diku diandi bualu bua yeye kakadi ne muana wa balume? Utuhe bietu buhianyi munkatshi mua bana babo ne tatu wetu. 
Numbers27:5 Mose wakaya ne bualu ebu ku mpala kua Yehowa. 
Numbers27:6 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers27:7 Bana ba bakashi ba Selofehada badi bamba dî dilelela: Ubahe buhianyi munkatshi mua bana babo ne tatuʼabo, buhianyi bua tatuʼabo nebulue kudibo." 
Numbers27:8 Wewe newambile Bena Isalele ne, Biafua muntu udi kayi ne muana wa balume, nunku yeye neaheshe muanʼandi wa bakashi buhianyi buandi." 
Numbers27:9 Bikaleye kayi ne muana wa bakashi, yeye neaheshe bana babo buhianyi buandi." 
Numbers27:10 Bikaleye kayi ne bana babo, yeye neaheshe bana babo ne tatuʼandi buhianyi buandi." 
Numbers27:11 Bikala tatuʼandi kayi ne bana babo, yeye neaheshe muanʼabo udi umulonda mu diku diandi buhianyi buandi, yeye mene neabuhete, eu udi mukenji wa tshiendelele kudi Bena Isalele, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers27:12 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Banda biebe ku mukuna wa Abalima, utangile buloba bundi mpa Bena Isalele." 
Numbers27:13 Hawabutangila, wewe neusangakene ne bankambua bebe bu muakenza Alona mukuluʼebe," 
Numbers27:14 bualu bua nuenu nuakahidia dî dianyi mu tshihela tshia Sina, hakatontolola bantu bualu bua mai, kanuakanjidila ku mesu kuabo. (Au mmai a Meliba mu Kadesha mu tshihela tshia Sina.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mose wakambila Yehowa ne," 
Numbers27:16 Yehowa, Nzambi wa mioyo ya bantu asunguile bantu bandi muntu" 
Numbers27:17 udi mumanye mua kuya ku mpala kuabo, udi mumanye mua kulua kudibo, udi mumanye mua kubalombola, udi mumanye mua kulua nʼabo mu buloba, bantu ba Yehowa kabikadi bu mikoko idi kayiyi ne mulami." 
Numbers27:18 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Wangate Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, udi ne Nyuma munda muandi, utentekashe tshianza tshiebe ha mutu nʼandi," 
Numbers27:19 umushikike ku mpala kua Eleazâ muakuidi ne ku mpala kua bantu bonso, umuambile dî ku mesu kuabo." 
Numbers27:20 Wewe neumuvuishe butumbi buebe, bua Bena Isalele bonso batumikile dî diandi." 
Numbers27:21 Yeye neimane ku mpala kua Eleazâ muakuidi, yeye neamukonkele kulumbulula kua Ulima ku mpala kua Yehowa, ku dî diandi bobo nebaluhuke, ne ku dî diandi bobo nebabuelemu, ne yeye ne Bena Isalele bonso badi nʼandi." 
Numbers27:22 Mose wakenza bu muakamuambila Yehowa, wakangata Yoshua, wakamushikika ku mpala kua Eleazâ ne kua tshisumbu tshionso," 
Numbers27:23 wakatentekasha bianza biandi ha mutu nʼandi, wakamuambila dî, muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers28:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers28:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Nulue ne milambu, ne bintu binudi nuosha ha kahia, bidi bitua dihembu kundi, mu matuku anakasungula." 
Numbers28:3 Wewe neubambile kabidi ne, Eu udi mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia unudi nûfila kudi Yehowa bana balume ba mikoko ba tshidimu tshimue, badi kabayi ne tshilema, bana babidi ba buatshia-buatshia, bu mulambu wa kuosha wa tshiendelele." 
Numbers28:4 Neudie muana wa mukoko umue ne dinda ne mukuabo dilolo," 
Numbers28:5 ne tshintu tshia dikumi tshia tshihiminu tshia bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne tshituha tshinai tshia dikoho dia manyi. 
Numbers28:6 Eu udi mulambu wa tshiendelele unakanuelela mukenji mu mukuna wa Sinai, mulambu udi utua dihembu, mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers28:7 Mulambu wa kunua newikale tshituha tshinai tshia dikoho ku muana wa mukoko yonso, nebahongoluele Yehowa mulambu wa nvinyo udibo banua mu muaba wa tshijila." 
Numbers28:8 Neafile muana wa mukoko mukuabo dilolo, neufile mulambu wa bukula bu mûdi wenza dinda ne nvinyo udibo banua, mulambu udibo bosha ha kahia, udi utua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers28:9 Mu dituku dia Lumingu neufue bana balume ba mikoko babidi badi kabayi ne tshilema ba tshidimu tshimue, ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi bia tshihiminu tshimue tshia bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne manyi, ne mulambu wa bintu bidibo banua:" 
Numbers28:10 eu udi mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia ku matuku a Lumingu, ku mutu kua mulambu udibo bafila buatshia-buatshia." 
Numbers28:11 Mu bibangidilu bia ngondo yenu nenufile mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa bana balume ba ngombe babidi ne tshimpanga tshimue ne bana balume ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers28:12 ne bintu bisatu bia dikumi bia tshihiminu tshia bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne manyi ku muana wa ngombe yonso, ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi bia tshihiminu tshia bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne manyi ku tshimpanga tshionso," 
Numbers28:13 ne tshintu tshia dikumi tshia bukula bubotesha bu mulambu wa bukula busangisha ne manyi ku muana wa mukoko yonso, mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia udi utua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers28:14 Milambu yabi ya bintu bidibo banua neyikale tshituha tshia dikoho dia nvinyo ku muana wa ngombe yonso, ne tshintu tshisatu tshia dikoho dia nvinyo ku tshimpanga tshionso, ne tshintu tshinai tshia dikoho dia nvinyo ku muana wa mukoko yonso, eu udi mulambu unudi nuosha ha kahia ku ngondo ku ngondo tô ne ngondo yonso ya mu tshidimu," 
Numbers28:15 Nenufile mulume wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi kudi Yehowa ku mutu kua milambu idibo bafila buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua. 
Numbers28:16 Dituku dia dikumi ne anai dia ngondo wa kumudilu ndituku dia kuhita kua Yehowa. 
Numbers28:17 Dituku dia dikumi ne atanu dia ngondo eu ndituku dinudi nudia bidia bia Yehowa, nenudie bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene to matuku muanda mutekete." 
Numbers28:18 Dituku dia kumudilu nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu," 
Numbers28:19 kadi nenufile mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa bana babidi ba ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne bana balume ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers28:20 ne milambu yabi ya bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi bintu bisatu bia dikumi ku ngombe ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi ku tshimpanga," 
Numbers28:21 ne tshintu tshia dikumi ku muana wa mukoko to ne ku bana bonso ba mikoko muanda mutekete," 
Numbers28:22 ne mulume wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi. 
Numbers28:23 Nenufile bintu ebi ku mutu kua milambu mudi nuosha ne dinda bu mulambu wa kuosha wa tshiendelele. 
Numbers28:24 Nenufile milambu ya buatshia-buatshia nunku, milambu ya kuosha ha kahia tô matuku muanda mutekete, idi itua dihembu kudi Yehowa, nenufile milambu ei ku mutu kua milambu mudi nuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers28:25 Dituku dia muanda mutekete nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu." 
Numbers28:26 Mu dituku dinudi nuhuola bintu bia kumudilu, hanuafila mulambu wa bukula buhia-buhia kudi Yehowa, nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu," 
Numbers28:27 hadi nenufile mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia udi utua dihembu kudi Yehowa bana balume ba ngombe babidi ne tshimpanga tshimue ne bana balume ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue," 
Numbers28:28 ne milambu yabi ya bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi, bintu bisatu bia dikumi ku muana wa ngombe yonso, ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi ku tshimpanga tshionso," 
Numbers28:29 ne tshintu tshia dikumi ku muana wa mukoko tô ne ku bana ba mikoko muanda mutekete," 
Numbers28:30 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi. 
Numbers28:31 Nenufile bintu ebi bidi kabiyi ne tshilema ku mutu kua milambu idibo bosha buatshia-buatshia, ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:1 Dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa muanda mutekete nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshiula, kanuenji mudimu, edi ndituku didibo bela mpungi." 
Numbers29:2 Nenufile milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, idi itua dihembu kudi Yehowa, muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne bana balume ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:3 ne milambu yabi ya bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi, bintu bisatu bia dikumi ku muana wa ngombe, ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi ku tshimpanga," 
Numbers29:4 ne tshintu tshia dikumi ku muana wa mukoko tô ne ku bana ba mikoko muanda mutekete," 
Numbers29:5 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi," 
Numbers29:6 ha mutu ha milambu idibo bosha babala ngondo, ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua, bu mudi mukenji wamba, milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, idi itua dihembu kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers29:7 Dituku dia dikumi dia ngondo eu wa muanda mutekete nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshijila, nenunyingalashe mioyo yenu, kanuenji mudimu," 
Numbers29:8 ka dî nenufile mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia udi utua dihembu kudi Yehowa muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga tshimue ne bana balume ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:9 ne milambu yabi ya bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi, bintu bisatu bia dikumi ku muana wa ngombe, ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi ku tshimpanga," 
Numbers29:10 ne tshintu tshia dikumi ku muana wa mukoko tô ne ku bana ba mikoko muanda mutekete," 
Numbers29:11 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, nenufile bintu ebi ku mutu kua mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau bubi ne milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ya buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:12 Mu dituku dia dikumi ne atanu dia ngondo wa muanda mutekete nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu, nenudie bidia bia Yehowa matuku muanda mutekete," 
Numbers29:13 nenufile milambu ya kuosha ha kahia idi itua dihembu kudi Yehowa bana ba balume ba tshidimu tshimue ba ngombe dikumi ne basatu ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:14 ne milambu yabi ya bukula bubotesha busangisha ne manyi, bintu bisatu bia dî kunu ku muana wa ngombe tô ne ku bana ba ngombe dikumi ne basatu, ne bintu bibidi bia dikumi ku tshimpanga tshionso," 
Numbers29:15 ne tshintu tshia dikumi ku muana wa mukoko to ne ku bana ba mikoko dikumi ne banai," 
Numbers29:16 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha ha kahia buatshia-buatshia, ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:17 Mu dituku dibidi nenufile bana balume ba ngombe dikumi ne babidi ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:18 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua, ku bana ba ngombe ne ku bimpanga ne ku bana ba mikoko bu bungi budi, bu mudi mukenji wamba," 
Numbers29:19 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:20 Mu dituku disatu bana balume ba ngombe dikumi ne umue ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema; 
Numbers29:21 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua, ku bana ba ngombe ne ku bimpanga ne ku bana ba mikoko bu bungi buai, bu mudi mukenji wamba," 
Numbers29:22 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila hau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:23 Mu dituku dinai bana balume ba ngombe dikumi ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai ba tshidimu tshimue, badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:24 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua, ku bana balume ba ngombe ne ku bimpanga ne ku bana ba mikoko bu bungi buai, bu mudi mukenji wamba;" 
Numbers29:25 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:26 Mu dituku ditanu bana balume ba ngombe tshitema ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:27 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua, ku bana balume ba ngombe ne ku bimpanga ne ku mikoko bu bungi buai, bu mudi mukenji wamba," 
Numbers29:28 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila n au bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:29 Mu dituku disambombo bana balume ba ngombe muanda mukulu ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:30 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua, ku bana balume ba ngombe ne ku bimpanga ne ku bana ba mikoko bu bungi buai, bu mudi mukenji wamba," 
Numbers29:31 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:32 Mu dituku dia muanda mutekete bana balume ba ngombe muanda mutekete, ne bimpanga bibidi ne bana balume ba mikoko dikumi ne banai ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:33 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua, ku bana balume ba ngombe ne ku bimpanga ne ku bana ba mikoko bu bungi buai bu mudi mukenji wamba;" 
Numbers29:34 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:35 Mu dituku dia muanda mukulu nenuikale ne disangisha dia tshijila, kanuenji mudimu," 
Numbers29:36 kadi nenufile mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia udi utua dihembu kudi Yehowa muana mulume wa ngombe ne tshimpanga ne bana balume ba mikoko muanda mutekete ba tshidimu tshimue badi kabayi ne tshilema," 
Numbers29:37 ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua, ku muana mulume wa ngombe ne ku tshimpanga ne ku bana ba mikoko bu bungi buai, bu mudi mukenji wamba:" 
Numbers29:38 ne mpumbu wa mbushi bu mulambu wa kunubuikidila nʼau bubi, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuosha buatshia-buatshia ne milambu ya bukula ne ya bintu bidibo banua." 
Numbers29:39 Nenufile bintu ebi kudi Yehowa mu matuku anudi nudia bidia bia Yehowa, ku mutu kua milambu ya kuditshiha nʼai ne bintu budi mitshima yenu misue kufila, ne milambu yenu ya kuosha ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua ne milambu yenu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala." 
Numbers29:40 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele mei onso akambila Yehowa Mose. 
Numbers30:1 Mose wakambila bakadi ku mutu kua bisamba bia Bena Isalele ne, Edi ndî diakutuambila Yehowa." 
Numbers30:2 Haditshiha mulume kudi Yehowa, anyi halayeye mulayi wandi, yeye kena mumanye mua kulekela dî diandi, yeye nênze mei onso akaluhuka mukana muandi." 
Numbers30:3 Haditshiha mukashi kudi Yehowa, anyi halayeye mulayi wandi, hatshidiye mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi, ku bunsongakashi buandi," 
Numbers30:4 biunvua tatu wandi kuditshiha kuandi, biahuwa tatu wandi kudiye, nunku kuditshiha kuandi kuonso ne mei andi onso nebijalame." 
Numbers30:5 Kadi bikala tatu wandi mumukande mu dituku diakunvueye kuditshiha kuandi, nunku kuditshiha kuandi ne mei andi onso kabiena bijalama: Yehowa neamubuikidile bualu ebu bua tatuʼandi wakamuitaba." 
Numbers30:6 Bikaleye mubaka kudi mulume hatshidiye ne kuditshiha kuandi anyi mei makuabo akaditshiheye nʼau 
Numbers30:7 ne biunvua mulume wandi ne biahuweye mu dituku diakunveye kuditshiha kuandi, nunku kuditshiha kuandi ne mei andi onso nebijalame." 
Numbers30:8 Kadi bikala mulume wandi mumukande mu dituku diakunvueye kuditshiha, nunku kuditshiha kuandi ne mei andi onso nebikale tshianana, Yehowa neamubuikidile bualu abu." 
Numbers30:9 Kadi kuditshiha kua mukashi wa mu lufuila, anyi mukashi udi muhidia kudi mulume wandi, mei andi onso akaditshiheye nʼau neajalame." 
Numbers30:10 Bikaleye mudi tshihe mu nsubu wa mulume wandi, anyi mulaye mulayi wandi," 
Numbers30:11 ne bikala mulume wandi munvue, muhuwe biandi kayi mumukande nansha, nunku kuditshiha kuandi ne mei andi onso nebijalame." 
Numbers30:12 Kadi bikala mulume wandi mumukande mu dituku diakunvueye, nunku kuditshiha kuandi ne mei andi onso kabiena bualame, mulume wandi wakavuisha malu au bu malu a hatuhu, Yehowa neamubiukidile bualu abu." 
Numbers30:13 Mulume wandi udi mumanye mua kujadika kudi tshiha kuandi kuonso anyi mei andi onso, anyi udi mua kumusha malu au ne malu a hatuhu." 
Numbers30:14 Biahuwa mulume wandi ku dituku diakunvueye kuditshiha kuandi anyi mei makuabo akaluhuka mukana muandi, nunku yeye udi ujadika kuditshiha kuandi kuonso ne mei andi onso, bualu bua yeye wakuhuwa ku dituku diakakunvueye." 
Numbers30:15 Bikaleye muvuishe malu au bu malu a hatuhu, hakunvueye, nunku yeye neamutuadile bubi buandi." 
Numbers30:16 Ei idi mikenji yakela Yehowa kudi Mose bua mulume ne mukashi wandi, ne bua tatu ne muanʼandi mukashi udi mu nsubu wandi mu bunsongakashi buandi." 
Numbers31:1 Yehowa Wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers31:2 Usombuele Bena Isalele bualu bua Bena Midiyana, ku nyima wewe neusangakene ne bankambua bebe." 
Numbers31:3 Mose wakambila bantu ne, Bena nvita badi munkatshi muenu bangate bintu bia nvita bualu bua kushikisha dikenga didi Yehowa musue kusombuela nʼadi Bena Midiyana." 
Numbers31:4 Tshisamba ne tshisamba tô ne bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele nebitume bantu tshinunu ku nvita. 
Numbers31:5 Nunku bakasangisha ku bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele bantu tshinunu ku tshisamba, bantu tshinunu ku tshisamba, bena nvita binunu dikumi ne bibidi." 
Numbers31:6 Mose wakabatuma ku nvita, bantu tshinunu ku tshisamba ku tshisamba, Pinehasa, muana mulume wa Eleazâ muakuidi, wakaya nʼabo ne bintu bikuabo bia mu nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne mpungi ya kuela nʼai dî dikole mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Numbers31:7 Bakaluangana ne Bena Midiyana bu muakambila Yehowa Mose, bakashiha balume bonso." 
Numbers31:8 Bakashiha bakelenge ba mu Midiyana kabidi: Evi ne Lekeme ne Sû ne Hû ne Leba bakelenge batanu ba Midiyana bakashiha Belama, muana mulume wa Beô, ne muele wa nvita kabidi." 
Numbers31:9 Bena Isalele bakaya ne bakashi ba Bena Midiyana ne bana babo bakese, bakangata kabidi bimuna biabo ne bisumbu bia mikoko ne bintu biabo bionso." 
Numbers31:10 Bakosha misoko yabo yakadibo bashikamamu ne bitudilu biabo ne kahia. 
Numbers31:11 Bakangata bintu bionso bia bantu ne bia bimuna kabidi. 
Numbers31:12 Bakalua ne bantu bakakuatabo ne bintu biabo bionso kudi Mose ne kudi Eleazâ muakuidi ne kudi tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele, ku tshitudilu tshiakadi mu mpata ya Moaba, hehi ne Yadene ku Yeleko." 
Numbers31:13 Mose ne Eleazâ muakuidi ne bakelenge bonso ba mu tshisumbu bakaya bua kusangakena nʼabo ku butshika bua tshitudilu. 
Numbers31:14 Mose wakadi ne tshiji kudi ba ku mutu kua bena nvita, tuhita tua binunu binunu ne tuhita tua nkama nkama, bakahingana ku nvita." 
Numbers31:15 Mose wakabambila ne, Nuakushiya bakashi bonso ne muoyo, anyi?" 
Numbers31:16 Monai, bobo bakenzesha Bena Isalele bua kuenzabo malu mabi kudi Yehowa bualu bua dî dia Belâma mu bualu bua Peô, nunku dikenga dikole diakadi munkatshi mua bantu ba Yehowa." 
Numbers31:17 Nunku nushale bana ba balume bakese bonso badi munkatshi muabo ne mukashi yonso ukadi mumanyibue kudi mulume. 
Numbers31:18 Kadi bana ba bakashi badi kabayi banze kumanyibua kudi balume nubashiye ne muoyo bualu buenu. 
Numbers31:19 Nushikame ku butshika bua tshitudilu matuku muanda mutekete, muntu yonso wakashiha mundi mukuabo, anyi wakalenga muntu mufue tshianza, adilengeshe ku dituku disatu ne dituku dia muanda mutekete ne nuenu ne bantu banuakukuata." 
Numbers31:20 Bualu bua bilulu, ne bintu bionso biakenzabo ne biseba, ne bintu bionso biakenzabo ne miosa ya mbushi, ne bintu bionso biakenzabo ne mabaya, nenudilengeshe bua bintu ebi." 
Numbers31:21 Eleazâ muakudi wakambila bena nvita bakaya mu nvita ne, Eu udi mukenji wakela Yehowa kudi Mose:" 
Numbers31:22 kadi or ne argent ne tshiamu tshia mitaku ne tshiamu tshifike ne tshiamu tshia étain ne tshia plomb 
Numbers31:23 ne tshintu tshionso tshidi katshiyi tshitua mu kahia, nenutshiteke mu kahia bua kutshilengesha, kadi nenutshilengeshe ne mai adibo balengesha nʼau bintu, bintu bionso bidi bihia mu kahia nenubilengeshe mu mai." 
Numbers31:24 Nenuvuwe bilulu dituku dia muanda mutekete, nenubale bakane, ku nyima nenuhingane mu tshitudilu." 
Numbers31:25 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers31:26 Ubale bungi bua bintu biakangatabo ne bia bantu ne bia bimuna, ne wewe ne Eleazâ muakuidi ne ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo mu Isalele." 
Numbers31:27 Nutahulule bintu bituha bibidi, tshituha kudi bena nvita bakaya mu nvita ne tshikuabo kudi tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele." 
Numbers31:28 Nuangate kabidi mulambu wa Yehowa kudi bantu bakaya mu nvita mundi umue ku bantu nkama itanu, ne umue wa ngombe ne wa nyama wa mpunda ne wa mikoko kabidi," 
Numbers31:29 nutshiangate kudi tshituha tshiabo, nutshine kudi Eleazâ muakuidi bu mulambu udibo banyukula kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers31:30 Mu tshituha tshia Bena Isalele nenuangate umue kudi makumi atanu, wa bantu ne wa ngombe ne wa nyama wa mpunda ne wa mikoko, nubifile kudi Bena Lewi badi balama nsubu wa Yehowa." 
Numbers31:31 Mose ne Eleazâ bakenza muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Numbers31:32 Bintu bionso biakangatabo kudi bena nvita biakadi mikoko binunu nkama isambombo ne makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu," 
Numbers31:33 ne ngombe binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne bibidi," 
Numbers31:34 ne nyama ya mpunda binunu makumi asambombo ne tshinunu tshimue," 
Numbers31:35 ne bakashi binunu makumi asatu ne bibidi badi kabayi banze kumanyibua kudi balume. 
Numbers31:36 Tshituha tshiakaheta bantu bakaya ku nvita tshiakadi mikoko binunu nkama isatu ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama itanu," 
Numbers31:37 ne mulambu wa Yehowa wakadi mikoko nkama isambombo ne makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu. 
Numbers31:38 Ngombe yakadi binunu makumi asatu ne bisambombo, ne mulambu wa Yehowa wakadi makumi muanda mutekete ne ibidi." 
Numbers31:39 Nyama ya mpunda yakadi binunu makumi asatu ne nkama itanu, ne mulambu wa Yehowa wakadi makumi asambombo ne umue." 
Numbers31:40 Bantu bakadi binunu dikumi ne bisambombo, ne mulambu wa Yehowa wakadi bantu makumi asatu ne babidi." 
Numbers31:41 Mose wakatua mulambu wa Yehowa kudi Eleazâ bu mulambu udibo banyukula, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers31:42 Tshituha tshia Bena Isalele tshiakabatahuluila Mose, tshiakashilangana ne tshia bena nvita," 
Numbers31:43 (tshituha tshiabo tshiakadi mikoko binu nu nkama isatu ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama itanu," 
Numbers31:44 ne ngombe binunu makumi asatu ne bisambombo," 
Numbers31:45 ne nyama ya mpunda binunu makumi asatu ne nkama itanu," 
Numbers31:46 ne bantu binunu dikumi ne bisambombo.) 
Numbers31:47 Mose wakangata umue wa makumi atanu wa bintu bia Bena Isalele, ne wa bantu ne wa bimuna wakabifila kudi Bena Lewi bakadi balama nsubu wa Yehowa, muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Numbers31:48 Bakadi ku mutu kua binunu bia bena nvita ne tuhita tua binunu ne binunu ne tuhita tua nkama ne nkama, bakalua kudi Mose," 
Numbers31:49 bakambila Mose ne, Bantu bebe bakabala bungi bua bena nvita badi ku nyima kuetu, nansha umue wetu udi mushale." 
Numbers31:50 Tuetu tuakulua ne mulambu wa Yehowa, bintu biakangatabo kudi mundi ne mundi, bintu bia or ne nkanu ya ku mikolo ne nkanu ya ku maboko ne tukanu tua ku munu, lukanu tua ku matshu ne tukanu tua ku nshingu, bualu bua kubuikidila nʼabi bubi buetu ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Numbers31:51 Mose ne Eleazâ muakuidi bakangata bintu bia tshiamu tshia or tshiakatulabo ku bianza biabo. 
Numbers31:52 Or yonso ya tuhita tua binunu ne binunu yakanyukulabo kudi Yehowa yakadi nshekele binunu dikumi ne bisambombo ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi atanu. 
Numbers31:53 (Bualu bua bena nvita bonso bakadiangatshila bintu mundi ne mundi.) 
Numbers31:54 Mose ne Eleazâ muakuidi bakangata or ya tuhita tua binunu ne binunu ne tuhita tua nkama ne nkama, bakalua nʼai mu ntenta wa kusambakena bu tshivulukidi tshia Bena Isalele ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Numbers32:1 Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada bakadi ne bimuna bia bungi be, hakatangilabo ne buloba bua Yazê ne buloba bua Gilada buakadi muaba muimpe wa bimuna," 
Numbers32:2 Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena bakalua kudi Mose ne Eleazâ muakuidi ne kudi bakelenge ba tshisumbu, bakamba ne," 
Numbers32:3 Atalota ne Dibona ne Yazê ne Nimela ne Heshebona ne Eleale ne Sebama ne Nebo ne Beone," 
Numbers32:4 buloba buakashihabo kudi Yehowa ku mpala kua tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele, mbuloba bua bimuna, ne bantu benu badi ne bimuna." 
Numbers32:5 Bakamba kabidi ne, Bituikala ne luse ku mesu kuenu, nuitabushe bua buloba ebu buikale buhianyi bua bantu benu, kanuyi nʼetu dishiya dia Yadene." 
Numbers32:6 Mose wakambila Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena ne, Nudi basue bana benu baye ku nvita, ne nuenu nushikame kunoko, anyi?" 
Numbers32:7 Nudi basue kuhangisha mitshima ya Bena Isalele bua kuya mu buloba buakabahabo kudi Yehowa munyi? 
Numbers32:8 Batatu benu bakenza nunku hanakabatuma ku Kadeshe-bânea bua kutentekelabo buloba. 
Numbers32:9 Bualu bua hakayabo mu tshibanda tshia Eshekola, bakatangila buloba, bakahangisha mitshima ya Bena Isalele, bua bobo kabayi mu buloba buakabahabo kudi Yehowa." 
Numbers32:10 Tshiji tshiakakuata Yehowa dituku adi, ne yeye wakaditshiha ne," 
Numbers32:11 Bulelela, nansha umue wa balume aba bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu, ba mu bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu, neatangile buloba bunakalaya Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba, bualu bua bobo kabakalonda ne mitshima yabo yonso," 
Numbers32:12 anu Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune, Muena Kenizi, ne Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, bualu bua bobo bakalonda Yehowa ne mitshima yabo yonso." 
Numbers32:13 Yehowa wakadi ne tshiji kudi Isalele ne wakabende sha eku ne eku mu tshihela to bidimu makumi anai tô ne hakafua bantu bonso ba tshikondo atshi, bakadi benze bualu ebu bubi ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Numbers32:14 Nuenu nuakadibisha mu miaba ya batatu benu bu bana ba bantu babi bakavulangana, bua kudiundisha bukole bua tshiji tshia Yehowa kudi Isalele." 
Numbers32:15 Binuikala nusesuka bua kulekela kulonda ku nyima kuandi yeye neabashiye mu tshihela, yeye neashihe bantu aba bonso." 
Numbers32:16 Bobo bakalua ha buihi nʼandi, bakamba ne, Netuashile mpangu ya bimuna bietu kunoko, ne misoko ya bana betu bakese," 
Numbers32:17 kadi tuetu nkayetu netuye ne bintu bia nvita ku mpala kua Bena Isalele to ne hatualua nʼabo ku miaba yabo, ne bana betu bakese nebashikame mu misoko idi ne ngumbu bualu bua bena buloba." 
Numbers32:18 Katuena tuhingana ku nsubu yetu diambedi Bena Isalele kabayi banze kuhiana buhianyi buabo kudi mundi ne muntu. 
Numbers32:19 Tuetu katuena tuhiana nʼabo buloba budi dishiya dia Yadene to ne ku mpala, bualu bua buhianyi buetu budi dishiya dia munemu ku esete kua Yadene." 
Numbers32:20 Mose wakabambila ne, Binuenza bualu ebu, binuangata bintu bia nvita bua kuya nʼabi ku nvita ku mpala kua Yehowa," 
Numbers32:21 ne bena nvita bonso badi basabuka Yadene ku mpala kua Yehowa to ne hashikisheye kuihata bantu bonso badi nʼandi lukuna ku mpala kuandi," 
Numbers32:22 ne hateketa bena buloba bonso ku mpala kua Yehowa, hashishe nenuhingane, kanuena ne bualu bubi kudi Yehowa ne kudi Bena Isalele, ne buloba ebu nebuikale buhianyi buenu ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Numbers32:23 Ka dî binuahidia kuenza nunku, monai, nuakuenzela Yehowa bualu bubi, numanye bienu ne, Bualu bubi buenu nebunukuate bulelela." 
Numbers32:24 Nuase misoko ya bana benu bakese ne mpangu ya mikoko yenu, nuenze mei onso akaluhuka mukana muenu." 
Numbers32:25 Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena bakambila Mose ne, Bantu bebe nebenze bu mudi mukelenge Wamba." 
Numbers32:26 Bana betu bakese ne bakashi betu ne mikoko ne ngombe yetu nebishale mu misoko ya Gilada," 
Numbers32:27 kadi bantu bebe, bena nvita bonso, nebasabuke ku nvita ku mesu kua Yehowa, bu muakuamba mukelenge." 
Numbers32:28 Mose wakambila Eleazâ muakuidi ne Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, ne bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo ya bisamba bia Bena Isalele bua bualu buabo." 
Numbers32:29 Mose wakabambila ne Bikala Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena basabuka Yadene nʼenu bikala muena nvita yonso ne bintu bia nvita ku mesu kua Yehowa ne bikala bena buloba bateketa ku mesu kuenununku nennubahe buloba bua Gilada bu buhianyi buabo; 
Numbers32:30 kadi biabi diabo kusabuka nʼenu ne bintu bia nvita, nunku bobo nebikale ne buhianyi munkatshi muenu mu buloba bua Kanâna." 
Numbers32:31 Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena bakamba ne Netuenze bu mudi Yehowa wambila bantu bandi. 
Numbers32:32 Netusabuke ne bintu bia nvita ku mesu kua Yehowa mu buloba bua Kanâna, netuikale ne buhianyi buetu dishiya dia munemu dia Yadene." 
Numbers32:33 Mose wakaha Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe muana mulume wa Yosefe buloba bua Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole ne buloba bua Oga mukelenge wa Bashana, bungi bua misoko yabo to ne ku matshika abo onso." 
Numbers32:34 Bena Gada bakasa Dibona ne Atalota ne Aloe ne 
Numbers32:35 Atalota shofana ne Yazê ne Yogebeha," 
Numbers32:36 ne Betenimela ne Betehalana, misoko yakadi ne mpangu ya mabue, ne mpangu ya mikoko." 
Numbers32:37 Bena Lubena bakasa Heshebona ne Eleale ne Kiyatayima," 
Numbers32:38 ne Nebo ne Bâla-meona (bakidika misoko ei mena mahia-mahia) ne Sibema; bakidika misoko mikuabo yakasabo mena mahia-mahia. 
Numbers32:39 Bena Maki muana mulume wa Manashe bakaya ku Gilada, bakihata Bena Amole bakadimu bakanyenga musoko." 
Numbers32:40 Mose wakaha Maki, muana mulume wa Manashe musoko wa Gilada ne yeye wakasekamamu." 
Numbers32:41 Yai muana mulume wa Manashe wakaya wakanyenga misoko mikuabo wakayidika ne, Hawota-yai (misoko ya Yai)." 
Numbers32:42 Noba wakaya wakanyenga Kenata ne misoko mikuabo wakidika musoko wandi ne Noba, bu diba diandi." 
Numbers33:1 Ei ngendu ya Bena Isalele hakaluhukabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu ku tshianza tshia Mose ne Alona bu muakadi bisumbu biabo. 
Numbers33:2 Mose wakafunda ngendu yabo bu mu dî dia Yehowa ei idi ngendu yabo. 
Numbers33:3 Bakabisha luendu luabo mu Lamesese mu dituku dia dikumi ne atanu dia ngondo wa kumudilu, ku nyima kua dituku dia kuhita kua Yehowa Bena Isalele bakumuka ku mesu kua Bena Ejipitu ne tshianza tshikole," 
Numbers33:4 hakadi Bena Ejipitu bajika banʼa bute bakashihabo kudi Yehowa munkatshi muabo Yehowa wakalumbuluisha nzambi yabo kabidi. 
Numbers33:5 Bena Isalele bakumuka mu Lamesese bakashikama mu Sukota. 
Numbers33:6 Bakumuka mu Sukota, bakashikama mu Etama, udi ku butshika bua tshihela." 
Numbers33:7 Bakumuka mu Etama bakahingana ku Pihahilota, udi ku mpala kua Bâla-sefona, bakashikama ku mpala kua Migedola." 
Numbers33:8 Bakumuka mu Pihahilota, bakahita munkatshi mua dishiba dia mai bakaya mu tshihela bakaya luendu lua matuku asatu mu tshihela tshia Etama, bakashikama mu Mala." 
Numbers33:9 Bakumuka mu Mala bakatua ku Elima mu Elima muakadi mpokolo ya mai dikumi ne ibidi ne mabue a ngashi makumi muanda mutekete bakashikamaku. 
Numbers33:10 Bakumuka mu Elima bakashikama hehi ne Dishiba Dikunze. 
Numbers33:11 Bakumuka ku Dishiba Dikunze, bakashikama mu tshihela tshia Sina." 
Numbers33:12 Bakumuka mu tshihela tshia Sina, bakashikama mu Dofaka." 
Numbers33:13 Bakumuka mu Dofaka, bakashikama mu Alusha." 
Numbers33:14 Bakumuka mu Alusha bakashikama mu Lefidima, ne bantu kabakadi ne mai a kunua." 
Numbers33:15 Bakumuka mu Lefidima bakashikama mu tshihela tshia Sinai. 
Numbers33:16 Bakumuka mu tshihela tshia Sinai, bakashikama mu Kibelota hatawa." 
Numbers33:17 Bakumuka mu Kibelota-hatawa bakashikama mu Haselota. 
Numbers33:18 Bakumuka mu Haselota, bakashikama mu Litema." 
Numbers33:19 Bakumuka mu Litema, bakashikama mu Limona-pelese." 
Numbers33:20 Bakumuka mu Limona-pelese, bakashikama mu Libina." 
Numbers33:21 Bakumuka mu Libina, bakashikama mu Lisa." 
Numbers33:22 Bakumuka mu Lisa bakashikama mu Kehelata. 
Numbers33:23 Bakumuka mu Kehelata, bakashikama ku mukuna wa Shefe." 
Numbers33:24 Bakumuka ku mukuna wa Shefe, bakashikama mu Halada." 
Numbers33:25 Bakumuka mu Halada bakashikama mu Makehelota. 
Numbers33:26 Bakumuka mu Makehelota bakashikama mu Tahata. 
Numbers33:27 Bakumuka mu Tahata, bakashikama mu Tela." 
Numbers33:28 Bakumuka mu Tela bakashikama mu Miteka. 
Numbers33:29 Bakumuka mu Miteka, bakashikama mu Hashemona," 
Numbers33:30 Bakumuka mu Hashemona, bakashikama mu Moselota." 
Numbers33:31 Bakumuka mu Moselota, bakashikama mu Bene-yâkana." 
Numbers33:32 Bakumuka mu Bene-yâkana, bakashikama mu Ho-hadidegada" 
Numbers33:33 Bakumuka mu Ho-hadidegada, bakashikama mu Yotebata." 
Numbers33:34 Bakumuka mu Yotebata, bakashikama mu Abalona." 
Numbers33:35 Bakumuka mu Abalona, bakashikama mu Esione-gebê," 
Numbers33:36 Bakumuka mu Esione-gebê, bakashikama mu tshihela tshia Sina (dina dikuabo ne Kadesha)." 
Numbers33:37 Bakumuka mu Kadesha, bakashikama ku mukuna wa Hô, ku butshika bua buloba bua Edome." 
Numbers33:38 Alona muakuidi wakabanda ku mukuna wa Hô bu muakamuambila Yehowa, wakafua biandi mu tshidimu tshia makumi anai ku nyima kua kuhatuka kua Bena Isalele mu buloba bua Ejipitu, mu dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo muitanu." 
Numbers33:39 Alona wakadi ne bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi ne bisatu hakafueye mu mukuna wa Hô. 
Numbers33:40 Mukelenge Alada, Muena Kanâna, wakadi ushikama ku luseke lua ku Sude lua buloba bua Kanâna, wakunvua lumu ne, Bena Isalele balualua." 
Numbers33:41 Bakumuka ku Hô, bakashikama mu Salemona." 
Numbers33:42 Bakumuka mu Salemona, bakashikama mu Punona." 
Numbers33:43 Bakumuka mu Bimuna, bakashikama mu Oboto." 
Numbers33:44 Bakumuka mu Oboto, bakashikama mu Iye-habalima, ku luseke lua Bena Moaba." 
Numbers33:45 Bakumuka mu Iyima, bakashikama mu Dibona-gada." 
Numbers33:46 Bakumuka mu Dibona-gada, bakashikama mu Alamona-dibelatayima." 
Numbers33:47 Bakumuka mu Alamona-dibelatayima, bakashikama mu mikuna ya Abalama, mitangilangane ne Mukuna wa Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Bakumuka ku mikuna ya Abalima, bakashikama mu mpata ya Moaba hehi ne Yadene mitangilangane ne Yeleko." 
Numbers33:49 Bakashikama hehi ne Yadene, ku Bete-yishimota tô ne ku Abele-shitima, mu mpata ya Moaba." 
Numbers33:50 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu mpata ya Moaba hehi ne Yadene mitangilangane ne Yeleko ne," 
Numbers33:51 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanuasabuka Yadene mu buloba bua Kanâna," 
Numbers33:52 nenuihate bena buloba ebu bonso ku mpala kuenu, nushihe mpingu yabo ya mabue, ne mpingu yakatulabo ne tshiamu, ne miaba yabo ya kutendelela," 
Numbers33:53 nenunyenge buloba, nenushikamemu, bualu bua nakanuhabu bu buhianyi buenu." 
Numbers33:54 Nenuhiane buloba ku meku enu, hanuela nshobo, nenuhe bantu ba bungi buloba bua bungi, ne bantu bakese buloba bukese, biakuata nshobo muntu, buloba abu nebuikale buandi, nenuhiane buloba bu mulongo wa bisamba bia batatu benu." 
Numbers33:55 Kadi binuahidia kuihata bena buloba ku mesu kuenu, bantu badi bashala nebikale bu tushingi mu mesu enu ne bu meba mu mbadi yenu, nebamatshishe mu buloba bunudi nushikama." 
Numbers33:56 Hashishe nennuenzele bu munakelangana meji bua kubenzela bobo. 
Numbers34:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers34:2 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanuabuela mu buloba bua Kanâna (ebu mbuloba bua buhianyi buenu, buloba bua Kanâna mene ku mikalu yabo yonso)" 
Numbers34:3 mukalu wenu wa ku luseke lua sude newikale ku tshihela tshia Sina, ne ku mukalu wa Edome to ne kuinshi kua Dishiba dia Luehu ku luseke lua ku esete," 
Numbers34:4 mukalu wenu neunyunguluke mukuna wa Akalabima ku luseke lua ku sude, neutuangane ne tshihela tshia Sina tô ne ku Kadeshe-bânea, tô ne ku Hasâ-adâ, to ne ku Asemona," 
Numbers34:5 mukalu wenu neunyunguluke ku Asemona tô ne ku kasulu ka Ejipitu tô ne ku mai manene. 
Numbers34:6 Mukalu wenu wa luseke lua ku wesete neutuangane ne muelelu wa mai manene, eu newikale mukalu wenu wa ku wesete." 
Numbers34:7 Mukalu wenu wa ku luseke lua ku nôde newikale ku mai manene tô ne ku mukuna wa Hô," 
Numbers34:8 ku mukuna wa Hô nenufunde tô ne ku mukalu wa Hamata ku Sedada; 
Numbers34:9 mukalu newikale kabidi ku Zifelona tô ne ku mukalu wa Hasâ-enana, eu newikale mukalu wenu wa ku nôde." 
Numbers34:10 Nenufunde mukalu wenu wa ku esete ku Hasâ-enana tô ne ku Shefama," 
Numbers34:11 mukalu neuhueke ku Shefama to ne ku Libela ku esete kua Ayina, mukalu neuhueke tô ne ku muelelu wa dishiha dia Kinelete ku esete," 
Numbers34:12 mukalu neuhueke tô ne ku Yadene uhueka tô ne ku Dishiba dia Luehu Ai mmikalu idi înyunguluka buloba buenu. 
Numbers34:13 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Ebu mbuloba bunudi nuhiana hanuela nshobo, buloba buakuha Yehowa kudi bisamba tshitema ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshikuabo," 
Numbers34:14 bualu bua Bena Lubena ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ne Bena Gada ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bakamana kuangata buhianyi buabo;" 
Numbers34:15 bisamba bibidi ne tshituha tshia tshikuabo bakamana kuangata buhianyi buabo dishiya dia Yadene, batangilangane ne Yeleko, ku esete, kudi diba dihatuka." 
Numbers34:16 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers34:17 Au mmena a balume badi banutahuluila buloba bua buhianyi buenu, Eleazâ muakindi ne Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna." 
Numbers34:18 Nenusungule mukelenge wa mu tshisamba ne tshisamba bua kunutahuluila buloba. 
Numbers34:19 Au mmena a bakelenge aba: wa tshisamba tshia Yuda, Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune;" 
Numbers34:20 wa tshisamba tshia Shimeona, Shemuele, muana mulume wa Amihuda," 
Numbers34:21 wa tshisamba tshia Benyamina, Elidada, muana mulume wa Kiliona," 
Numbers34:22 wa tshisamba tshia Dana, Buki, muana mulume wa Yogeli," 
Numbers34:23 wa tshisamba tshia Yosefe tshisamba tshia Manashe, Haniele, muana mulume wa Efoda," 
Numbers34:24 wa tshisamba tshia Efelayima, Kemuele, muana mulume wa Shifetana," 
Numbers34:25 wa tshisamba tshia Zebuluna, Elisafana, muana mulume wa Pânaka," 
Numbers34:26 wa tshisamba tshia Yisakâ, Palatiele, muana mulume wa Azana," 
Numbers34:27 wa tshisamba tshia Ashê, Ahihuda, muana mulume wa Shelomi," 
Numbers34:28 wa tshisamba tshia Nafatale, Pedahele, muana mulume wa Amihuda." 
Numbers34:29 Aba mbantu bakasungula Yehowa bua kutahulula Bena Isalele buloba bua Kanâna. 
Numbers35:1 Yehowa wakambila Mose mu mpata ya Moaba hehi ne Yadene mitangilangane ne Yeleko ne," 
Numbers35:2 Wele mukenji kudi Bena Isalele, bua bobo bahe Bena Lewi misoko ya kushikamamu bu buhianyi buabo, bobo bahe Bena Lewi kabidi tshituha tshia buloba budi bunyunguluka misoko ei." 
Numbers35:3 Bobo nebashikame mu misoko ei, ne bimuna ne bintu biabo ne nyama yabo mikuabo nebikale mu buloba budi bunyunguluka misoko." 
Numbers35:4 Tshituha tshia buloba bunudi nuha Bena Lewi netshikale ku lumbu lua musoko tô ne ku coudées tshinunu ku nseke yonso. 
Numbers35:5 Ku butshika bua musoko nenuidikishe ku luseke lua ku esete coudées binunu bibidi, ne ku luseke lua ku Sude coudées binunu bibidi, ne ku luseke lua ku wesete coudées binunu bibidi, ne ku luseke lua ku nôde coudées binunu bibidi Buloba ebu bua ku matshika a misoko nebuikale buhianyi buabo." 
Numbers35:6 Nenuhe Bena Lewi misoko ei isambombo ya kunyemena, biashala muntu muntu mukuabo, yeye neanyemenemu; ha mutu ha misoko ei nenubahe misoko mikuabo makumi anai ne ibidi." 
Numbers35:7 Bungi bua misoko mudi nuha Bena Lewi neyikale makumi anai ne muanda mukulu, nenubahe misoko ei ne buloba budi buyinyunguluka." 
Numbers35:8 Bualu bua misoko mudi nubaha munkatshi mua Isalele, bantu badi ne misoko ya bungi, nebabahe misoko ya bungi, ne badi ne misoko mikese nebabahe misoko mikese, nebahe Bena Lewi misoko bu bungi bua buhianyi buabo." 
Numbers35:9 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne," 
Numbers35:10 Wambile Bena Isalele ne, Hanuasabuka Yadene mu buloba bua Kanâna," 
Numbers35:11 nenusungule misoko ya kunyemena, ne hashiha muntu muntu mukuabo ku mpukahuka, yeye neanyemenemu." 
Numbers35:12 Misoko neyikale bu binyemenu kudi musombuedi, mushihi wa mundi kafu biandi tô ne himaneye ku mpala kua tshisumbu tshia bantu bua kumulumbuluishabo." 
Numbers35:13 Nenusungule misoko ya kunyemena isambombo. 
Numbers35:14 Nenusungule misoko isatu dishiya dia Yadene, ne isatu mu buloba bua Kanâna, neyikale misoko ya kunyemena." 
Numbers35:15 Neyikale misoko ya kunyemenamu kudi Bena Isalele, ne kudi muenyi udi munkatshi muabo, hashiha muntu muntu mukuabo ku mpukahuka, neanyemenemu." 
Numbers35:16 Bikaleye mumukume ne tshintu tshia tshiamu tshifike, ne biafileye, yeye udi mushihi wa muntu, nebashihe mushihi wa muntu bulelela." 
Numbers35:17 Bikaleye mumukume ne dibue mu tshianza tshiandi, ne biafileye, yeye udi mushihi wa muntu, nebashihe mushihi wa muntu." 
Numbers35:18 Anyi bikaleye mumukume ne mutshi mu tshianza, ne biafileye, yeye udi mushihi wa muntu, nebashihe mushihi wa muntu." 
Numbers35:19 Musombuedi nkayandi neashihe mushihi wa muntu. 
Numbers35:20 Bikaleye mumukume ne tshiji, anyi bikaleye mumuele tshintu, hakadiye muale mu nshila, wakamushiha," 
Numbers35:21 anyi bikaleye mumukume ne tshianza tshiandi ne tshiji, mumushihe, nebashihe muntu wakamukuma, yeye udi mushihi wa muntu musombuedi neashihe mushihi wa muntu, hasangakeneye nʼandi." 
Numbers35:22 Kadi bikaleye mumutahe kayi ne tshiji, anyi bikaleye muele tshintu, tshimukume, kayi mumualamine mu nshila," 
Numbers35:23 anyi bikaleye mumukume ne dibue kayi mumutangile, ne mumushihe, kayi muikale nʼandi lukuna, kayi musue kunuenzela bibi," 
Numbers35:24 nebalumbulule tshilumbu tshia mukuna wa muntu ne musombuedi, bu mudi mikenji ei yamba," 
Numbers35:25 nebasungile mushihi mu tshianza tshia musombuedi, nebamuhingishe ku musoko wa kunyemena, kuakunyemeneye, ne yeye neashikamemu to ne hafua muakuidi munene, udi ne manyi a tshijila mela ha mutu." 
Numbers35:26 Kadi bikala mushihi mubi tshile butshika bua musoko wakanyemeneye," 
Numbers35:27 ne bikala musombuedi musangakene nʼandi ku butshika bua musoko wandi wa kunyemena, ne bikala musombuedi mushihe mushihi wa muntu, yeye kena ne bualu bubi," 
Numbers35:28 bualu bua yeye wakadi ne bualu bua kuikala mu musoko wa kunyemena to ne bakafua muakuidi munene, kadi ku nyima kua lufu lua muakuidi munene mushihi udi mumanye mua kuhingana ku buloba bua buhianyi buandi." 
Numbers35:29 Ei idi mikenji ya kuhumbulula hai malu ku bikondo bienu bionso, mu miaba yonso mudi nushikama," 
Numbers35:30 muntu udi ushiha mukuabo, nebashihe mushiku bu mu dî dia bamonyi; kadi kabena bamanye mua kumushiha anu ku dî dia mumonyi umue." 
Numbers35:31 Kanuangatshi bintu bia buhikudi kudi mushihi wa muntu udi muhile bulelela, bualu bua nebamushihe bulelela." 
Numbers35:32 Kanuangatshi bintu bia buhikudi kudi muntu wakasemena ku musoko wa kunyemena, bualu bua kumuhingisha ku buloba buandi to ne hafua muakuidi munene." 
Numbers35:33 Nunku kanuena nuona buloba bunudi nushikamamu, bualu bua mashi adi ona buloba, kabena bamanye mua kuhikula buloba hakamata mashi, anu ku mashi a muntu wakamatshisha mashi." 
Numbers35:34 Kanuonyi buloba bunudi nushikamamu, kundi mushikame kabidi, bualu bua meme Yehowa ndi mushikame munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Numbers36:1 Bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo ba diku dia Bena Gilada, muana mulume wa Makî, muana mulume wa Manashe, wa meku a bana balume ba Yosefe, bakalua kudi Mose ne kudi bakelenge ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo ba mu Isalele, bakamba ne," 
Numbers36:2 Yehowa wakela dî kudi mukelenge wetu bua kutahulula buloba bua buhianyi ku nshobo, Yehowa wakela dî kudi mukelenge wetu kabidi bua kuha buhianyi bua Selofehada muanʼetu mulume kudi bana bandi bakashi." 
Numbers36:3 Bikalabo babakibue kudi balume ba mu tshisamba tshikuabo tshia Bena Isalele, nunku nebanyeme buhianyi buabo ku buhianyi bua batatuʼetu, nebabusangishe ku buhianyi bua tshisamba tshiakayabo." 
Numbers36:4 Nunku halua tshidimu tshia disanka dia Bena Isalele, buhianyi buabo nebusangishibue ku buhianyi bua tshisamba tshiakayabo, nunku buhianyi buabo nebumuke ku buhianyi bua batatuʼetu." 
Numbers36:5 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele bu mu dî dia Yehowa ne, Ba mu tshisamba tshia bana balume ba Yosefe badi bamba dî dilelela." 
Numbers36:6 Edi ndî diakamba Yehowa bualu bua bana bakashi ba Selofehada ne, Bobo babakibue kudi balume hadibo basue, kadi babakibue kudi balume ba mu meku a tshisamba tshia batatuʼabo." 
Numbers36:7 Nunku buhianyi bua Bena Isalele kabuena bumuka ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba, muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi mua Bena Isalele neashale ne buhianyi bua tshisamba tshia batatuʼabo." 
Numbers36:8 Muana mukashi yonso udi ne buhianyi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, neikale mukashi wa umue wa mu tshisamba tshia tatuʼandi, nunku muntu ne muntu wa Bena Isalele neikale ne buhianyi bua batatuʼabo." 
Numbers36:9 Nunku buhianyi bumue kabuena bumuka ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba, tshisamba ne tshisamba tshia Bena Isalele netshikale ne buhianyi buatshi." 
Numbers36:10 Bana bakashi ba Selofehada bakenza muakambila Yehowa Mose," 
Numbers36:11 bualu bua Mahala ne Tîza ne Hogela ne Mileka ne Noa, bana bakashi ba Selofehada, bakadi babakibua kudi bana balume bakadi bana babo ne tatuʼabo." 
Numbers36:12 Bakadi babakibua kudi ba mu meku a bana balume ba Manashe, muana mulume wa Yosefe, buhianyi buabo buakashala mu tshisamba tshia meku a tatuʼabo." 
Numbers36:13 Au mmei ne mikenji bakambila Yehowa Bena Isalele mukana mua Mose mu mpata ya Moaba hehi ne Yadene mitangilangane ne Yeleko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Â mmei akambila Mose Bena Isalele dishiya dia Yadene mu tshihela mu Alabâ tshitangilangane ne Sufa, hankatshi ha Palana ne Tofele ne Labana ne Heselota ne Dizababa." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Ku Holeba wa mu nshila wa ku mukuna wa Sei tô ne ku Kadeshe-bânea, nduendu lua matuku dikumi ne dimue." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi anai ne mu ngondo wa dikumi ne umue ne dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo eu, Mose wakamanyisha Bena Isalele bua malu onso akamuambila Yehowa mu mikenji yakabeleleye;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 hakashiheye Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi ushikama mu Heshebona, ne Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, wakadi ushikama mu Ashetalota ku Edelei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Dishiya dia Yadene mu buloba bua Moaba, Mose wakabanga kubamanyisha bua mikenji ne," 
Deuteronomy1:6 Yehowa Nzambi wetu wakatuambila mu Holeba ne, Nuakumana kushikama musangu mule mu mukuna eu:" 
Deuteronomy1:7 bishai luendu luenu, yai bienu ku mikuna ya Bena Amole, ne ku miaba yonso idi hehi nʼabo mu Alabâ ne mu mikuna ne mu bibanda, ne mu luseke lua ku Sude, ne hehi ne muelelu wa mai manene, mu buloba bua Bena Kanâna ne mu Lebanona tô ne ku musulu munene dina diau Pelata." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Monai, nakuteka buloba ebu buonso ku mpala kuenu: nubuelemu, nuhiane buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatuʼetu Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba, bua kubahabu ne tunkanunuina tuabo tudi tubalonda ku nyima." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Nakanuambila ku tshikondo atshi ne, Tshiena mua kunutuala nkayanyi:" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakunukumbasha ba bungi, ne monai, lelu nudi bu bungi bua mitoto ya mulu." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatuʼetu, anukumbashe tô ne hanuahita bungi buenu bua katataka misangu tshinunu, anusankishe bu muakunulayeye!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Meme nkayanyi ndi mua kutuala malu enu ne bujitu buenu ne kutanda kuenu munyi? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nuangate balume ba lungenyi lule, banudi bamanye, bungi bua bisamba bienu, nembateke ku mutu kuenu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nuenu nuakangambila ne, Bualu buwakuamba budi buimpe bua tuetu tuenze." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Nunku nakasungula balume ba lungenyi lule, banuakamanya, nakabateka ku mutu kuenu, tuhita tua binunu binunu, ne tuhita tua nkama nkama, ne tuhita tua makumi atanu makumi atanu, ne tuhita tua dikumi dikumi, ne miloho bungi bua bisamba bienu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Meme nakadimusha balumbuluishi benu tshikondo atshi ne, Unvuai bilumbu bia bana benu, nulumbulule bilumbu bia muntu ne muanʼabo mulume ne muenyi udi nʼandi biakane." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Kanuikadi ne kansungusungu hanualumbulula bilumbu; nunvue dî dia muntu mukese ne dia muntu munene muomumue; kanutshinyi mpala wa muntu; bualu bua kulumbulula kua bilumbu kudi kua Nzambi: tshilumbu tshidi tshihita bukole, nulue nʼatshi kundi, meme nentshiunvue." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Mu tshikondo atshi nakanuambila malu onso anudi ne bualu bua kuenza. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Tuakabika ku Holeba, tuakenda tô mu tshihela atshi tshinene tshibi tshinuakatangila, ku nshila wa ku mikuna ya Bena Amole, bu muakatuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wetu; tuakalua ku Kadeshe-bânea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Meme nakanuambila ne, Nuakulua ku mikuna ya Bena Amole, buloba budi Yehowa mutuhe." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Tangilai, Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakateka buloba ku mpala kuenu: yai bienu, nubuhiane, bu muakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatuʼenu; kanutshinyi, kanuikadi ne buowa." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Nuenu nuakalua kundi, buonso buenu muakamba ne, Tutume bantu ku mpala kuetu, bua hobo batentekele buloba, bahingane, batumanyishe bua nshila utudi tuyamu, ne misoko itudi tubuelamu." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Bualu ebu buakusankisha bimpe, nakasungula balume dikumi ne babidi, muntu ku tshisamba muntu ku tshisamba." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Bobo bakaya ku mikuna, bakalua mu tshibanda tshia Eshekola, bakatentekela buloba." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Bakangata bintu biakadiunda mu buloba mu bianza biabo, bakalua nʼabi kutudi, bakatuambila ne, Buloba budi Yehowa mutuhe budi buimpe." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Kadi nuenu nuakahidia bua kuyamu, nuakahidia mukenji wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Nuakatontolola mu ntenta yenu, nuakamba ne, Bualu bua Yehowa wakadi nʼetu tshiji, yeye wakatuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, bua kutufila mu bianza bia Bena Amole, bua bobo batushihe." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Netubuelemu munyi? Bana betu bakatekesha mitshima yetu, bakamba ne, Bantu aba badi batuhita hunene ne bule; misoko yabo idi minene, ne mpangu yai ya mabue idi miye mulu mule; bualu bukuabo, tuakatangilamu bana balume ba Bena Anaka." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Hashishe nakanuambila ne, Kanuikadi ne buowa, kanubatshinyi." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi uya ku mpala kuenu, yeye neanuluile nvita yenu, bu muakenzeye ku mesu kuenu mu Ejipitu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 ne mu tshihela, nuakatangila ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanutuala mu maboko, bu mudi tatu utuala muanʼandi mulume, mu nshila yonso inuakaya tô ne hanuakalua ku muaba eu." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kadi mu bualu ebu buonso kanuakatumikila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 wakaya ku mpala kuenu mu nshila bua kunukebela muaba wa kushimika ntenta yenu, mu difutu dikenka kahia butuku, ne mu dî tulu dia diledi munya, bua kunulombola mu nshila unuakadi ne bualu bua kuenda." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Yehowa wakunvua mei enu, wakadi nʼenu tshiji, wakaditshiha ne," 
Deuteronomy1:35 Nansha muntu umue wa mu tshikondo etshi tshibi neatangile buloba ebu buimpe, bunakalaya batatuʼenu bua kunuhabu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 anu Kaleba, muana mulume wa Yefune, neabutangile; nemmuhe buloba buakadiateye muinshi mua makasa andi, ne kudi bana bandi, bualu bua yeye wakalonda Yehowa bulelela." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Yehowa wakadi nʼanyi tshiji bualu buenu, wakamba ne, Wewe kuena ubuelamu:" 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yoshua, muana mulume wa Nuna, utu wimana ku mpala kuebe, yeye neabuelemu: ukoleshe mutshima wandi, bualu bua yeye neahianyishe Bena Isalele buloba." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Kadi bana benu bakese banuakamba ne, Nebafue, badi kabayi banze kumanya malu mimpe ne malu mabi, bobo nebabuelemu, nebahiane buloba." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kadi nuenu, nunyunguluke, yai bienu mu tshihela mu nshila wa ku Dishiba Dikunze." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Hashishe nuenu nuakangambila ne, Tuakuenzela Yehowa bibi, netuye, netuluangane, bu muakatuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wetu. Muntu ne muntu wakangata bintu biandi bia nvita; nuakamba kuya ku mikuna." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Ubambile ne, Kanuyi, kanuluanganyi; bualu bua meme tshiena munkatshi muenu; kanuhonyi ku mpala kua bantu badi nʼenu lukuna." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nakanuambila nunku, kanuakangunvuila; kadi nuakadi ne budisu, nuakahidia dî dia Yehowa, nuakadiyila ku mikuna." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Bena Amole bakadi bashikama ku mikuna bakaluhuka kunudi, bakanuihata bu mbulubulu, bakanunyemesha mu Sei tô ne ku Hôma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Nuenu nuakahingana, nuakadila ku mpala kua Yehowa; kadi Yehowa kakunvua dî dienu, kakateleja matshu andi kunudi." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Nunku nuakashikama mu Kadesha matuku a bungi, nudi bamanye bungi bua matuku anuakashalamu." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Tuakanyunguluka, tuakaya mu tshihela mu nshila wa ku Dishiba Dikunze, bu muakangambila Yehowa; tuakanyunguluka mukuna wa Sei matuku a bungi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Yehowa wakangambila ne," 
Deuteronomy2:3 Nuakunyunguluka mukuna eu musangu mule, yai bienu ku nôde." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Wambile bantu aba ne, Nenuhite mu buloba bua bana benu, bana ba Esau, badi bashikama mu Sei; bobo nebanutshine, nudimuke bienu;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 kanutandanganyi nʼabo, bualu bua tshiena munuhe buloba buabo, nansha kaba ka bunene bua dikasa dia muntu; bualu bua nakamana kuha Esau mukuna wa Sei bu buhianyi buandi." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Nudi mua kudisumbila bia kudia kudibo ku argent, bua nuenu kudia; nenudisumbile mai a kunua kudibo ku argent, bua nuenu kunua." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakatuadishila disanka mu malu onso anuakenza ne tshianza tshienu; yeye wakamanya ngendu yenu mu tshihela etshi tshinene; mu bidimu ebi makumi anai Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakadi nʼenu; kanuakakengela tshintu." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Nunku tuakahita bana betu, bana ba Esau, bakadi bashikama mu Sei, mu nshila wa ku Alabâ ku Elata to ne ku Esione-gebê. Tuakanyunguluka, tuakaya mu nshila wa ku tshihela tshia Moaba." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Kanutatshishi Bena Moaba, kanuluanganyi nʼabo nvita; bualu bua tshiena munuhe buloba buabo bu buhianyi buenu; bualu bua nakamana kuha bana ba Lota buloba bua Ala bu buhianyi buabo." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Bena Eme bakashikamamu diambedi, bantu banene, bantu ba bungi, bule bua Bena Anaka:" 
Deuteronomy2:11 badi bababikila kabidi ne, Bena Lefa, bu Bena Anaka; kadi Bena Moaba bakababikila ne, Bena Eme."
