Deuteronomy2:12 Bena Holi bakashikama mu Sei diambedi, kadi Bena Esau bakabalonda ku nyima; bakabashiha ku mpala kuabo, bakashikama mu muaba wabo; bu muakenza Bena Isalele ku buloba bua buhianyi buabo, buakabahebua kudi Yehowa.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Katataka bikai bienu, nusabuke kasulu ka Zelede; tuakasabuka kasulu ka Zelede." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Bungi bua matuku atuakalala mu nshila ku Kadeshe-bânea tô ne ku kasulu ka Zelede akadi bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu; tô ne hakafua mulongo wonso wa bena nvita munkatshi mua tshitudilu, bu muakabalaya Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Tshianza tshia Yehowa tshiakadi kudibo, bua kubashiha munkatshi mua tshitudilu, tô ne hakafuabo buonso buabo." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Hashishe hakajimina bena nvita bonso, hakafuabo munkatshi mua bantu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Yehowa wakangambila ne," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Lelu nenuhite ku Ala, butshika bua Moaba:" 
Deuteronomy2:19 hanualua ba buihi ne Bena Amona, kanubatatshishi, kanuluanganyi nʼabo; bualu bua tshiena munuhe buloba bua Bena Amona bu buhianyi buenu, bualu bua nakamana kuha bana ba Lota buloba abu bu buhianyi buabo." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Buloba ebu buakadi buloba bua Bena Lefa: Bena Lefa bakashikamamu diambedi; kadi Bena Amona badi bababikila ne, Bena Zamazuma," 
Deuteronomy2:21 bantu bakole, bantu ba bungi, bule bua Bena Anaka; kadi Yehowa wakabashiha ku mpala kuabo, bobo bakabalonda ku nyima, bakashikama mu muaba wabo;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 bu muakenzeleye bana ba Esau, bakadi bashikama mu Sei, hakashiheye Bena Holi ku mpala kuabo; bobo bakabalonda ku nyima, badi bashikama mu muaba wabo tô ne ku dituku edi." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Bena Awa bakadi bashikama mu misoko tô ne ku Gaza ne Bena Kafetô bakafuma ku Kafetô, bakabashiha, bakashikama mu muaba wabo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Bikai bienu, yai, nuhite mu tshibanda tshia mai a Ânona: monai, nakafila Sihona, Muena Amole, mukelenge wa Heshebona, ne buloba buandi mu tshianza tshienu; nubange kuhiana buloba, nuluangane nʼandi nvita." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Lelu nembange kubuesha buowa ne ditshina mu mitshima ya bantu bonso badi muinshi mua diulu, badi bunvua lumu luenu: ne hunvuabo, nebazakale ne mitshima yabo nebanyingalale bualu buenu." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Nakatuma bamessager mu tshihela tshia Kedemota kudi Sihona, mukelenge wa Heshebona, ne mei a ditalala ne," 
Deuteronomy2:27 Witabushe bua tuetu tuhite mu buloba buebe: netuye anu mu musesu munene, katuena tusesuka ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Wewe neutusumbishe bia kudia ku argent bua tuetu kudia; Utuhe mai a kunua ku argent, bua tuetu kunua, anji kuitabusha bua tuetu tuhite ku makasa;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 bu muakatuenzela bana ba Esau ne Bena Moaba badi bashikama mu Ala, tô ne hatuasabuka Yadene mu buloba buakatuha Yehowa, Nzambi wetu." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kadi Sihona, mukelenge wa Heshebona, wakahidia bua tuetu tuhite mu buloba; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanyengabasha meji andi, wakakolesha mutshima wandi, bualu bua kumufila mu tshianza tshienu, bu muakenzeye lelu." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Mona, nakubanga kufila Sihona ne buloba buandi mu tshianza tshienu, bua nuenu nuhiane buloba buandi." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Hashishe Sihona wakalua kutudi ne bantu bandi bonso bua kuluangana nʼetu nvita ku Yahasa. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, wakamufila mu tshianza tshietu; tuakabashiha ne yeye ne bana bandi balume ne bantu bandi bonso." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tuakanyenga misoko yandi yonso tshikondo atshi, tuakahaula musoko ne musoko muakadi bantu, ne bakashi ne bana bakese: katuakashiya nansha muntu;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 kadi tuakadiangatshila bimuna, ne bintu biakadi mu misoko ituakanyenga." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Ku Aloê udi ku muelelu wa tshibanda tshia Ânona ne ku musoko mukuabo udi mu tshibanda tô ne ku Gilada, katuakasangana musoko umue wakatuhita bukole bua kûnyenga; Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, wakafua misoko yonso mu tshianza tshietu;" 
Deuteronomy2:37 anu buloba bua Bena Amona, katuakalua ha buihi nʼabu; buloba buonso bua dishiya dia kasulu ka Yaboka, ne misoko ya ku mikuna ne miaba yonso yakatukanda Yehowa, Nzambi wetu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Tuakanyunguluka, tuakaya mu nshila wa ku Bashana: ne Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, wakalua ne bantu bandi bonso bua kuluangana nʼetu ku Edelei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Kumutshinyi nansha; bualu bua nakumufila ne bantu bandi bonso ne buloba buandi mu tshianza tshiebe; wewe neumuenzele yeye bu mu wakenzela Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi ushikama mu Heshebona." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Nunku Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, wakafua Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, ne bantu bandi bonso mu tshianza tshietu kabidi; tuakabashiha, nansha muntu umue wakashala." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Tuakanyenga misoko yandi yonso ku tshikondo atshi, katuakashiya musoko umue; tuakanyenga misoko makumi asambombo, ne luseke tuonso lua Âgoba, bukelenge bua Oga mu Bashana." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Misoko ei yonso yakadi ne mpangu mile ne bibi bikanda ne biamu; tuakanyenga misoko mikuabo ya bungi yakadi kayiyi ne mpangu. 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tuakabajimisba, bu munuakenzela Sihona, mukelenge wa Heshebona; tuakahaula misoko yonso yakadi ne bantu, ne bakashi ne bana bakese." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kadi tuakadiangatshila bimuna ne bintu bionso bia mu misoko. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Tuakanyenga buloba mu bianza bia bakelenge babidi bakadi dishiya dia Yadene, ku tshibanda tshia Ânona tô ne ku mukuna wa Hêmona;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Bena Sidona badi babikila Hêmona ne, Sileona, ne Bena Amole badi babikila Hêmona ne, Senî;)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 misoko yonso ya mu mpata, ne misoko yonso ya mu Gilada, ne ya mu Bashana tô ne ku Saleka ne Edelei, misoko ya bukelenge bua Oga mu Bashana." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Anu Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, wakadi mushale wa Bena Lefa; monai, bulalu buandi buakadi bua biamu; budi mu Laba wa Bena Amona: bule buabu buakadi coudées tshitema ne butshiama buabu buakadi coudées mai.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Tuakanyenga buloba ebu ku tshikondo atshi, ku Aloê mu tshibanda tshia Ânona, ne tshituha tshia mikuna ya Gilada ne misoko idimu, nakaha Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada:" 
Deuteronomy3:13 ne tshituha tshikuabo tshia Gilada ne misoko ya bukelenge bua Oga wa mu Bashana nakaha tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe: luseke luonso lua Âgoba, misoko yonso ya mu Bashana. (Ebu mbuloba bua Bena Lefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yai, muana mulume wa Manashe, wakangata luseke luonso lua Âgoba tô ne ku butshika bua Bena Geshû ne Bena Mâka, wakidika buloba bua Bashana bu dina diandi ne, Hawota-yai tô ne ku dituku edi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Nakaha Maki Gilada. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Nakaha Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada buloba buonso ku Gilada tô ne ku hankatshi ha tshibanda tshia Ânona tô ne ku kasulu ka Yaboka ku butshika bua Bena Amona; 
Deuteronomy3:17 ne buloba bua Alabâ kabidi ne tshibanda tshia Yadene ku Kinelete tô ne ku dishiha dia Alabâ, Dishiba dia Luehu, kuinshi kua mukuna wa Pisega ku esete." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Nakanuambila ku tshikondo atshi ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuha buloba abu bu buhianyi: bena nvita nebasabuke ne bintu bia nvita ku mpala kua bana benu ba Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kadi bakashi benu ne bana benu bakese ne bimuna (ndi mumanye ne, Nudi ne bimuna bia bungi) nebishale mu misoko nakanuha," 
Deuteronomy3:20 tô ne haha Yehowa baha benu dikisha bu nuenu, ne bobo badi bahiana buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ubaha, dishiya dia Yadene; hashishe nenuhingane muntu ne muntu ku buhianyi buandi bunakamuha." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Nakambila Yoshua ku tshikondo atshi ne, Mesu ebe akatangila malu onso akenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, bakelenge aba babidi: Yehowa nênzele makelenge onso nunku a kunudi nuya." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Kanubatshinyi, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi unuluila nvita." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Nakasengelela Yehowa ku tshikondo atshi, nakamba ne," 
Deuteronomy3:24 Mukelenge Yehowa, wewe wakabanga kulesha muntu webe bunene buebe, ne tshianza tshiebe tshikole: nzambi kai udi mu diulu anyi udi ha buloba udi mua kuenza bu mûdi wenza malu ebe a kukema?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Witabushe bua meme nsabuke, utangile buloba buimpe budi dishiya dia Yadene, mukuna au muimpe, ne Lebanona." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kadi Yehowa wakadi nʼanyi tshiji bua bualu buenu, yeye kena mungunvuile; Yehowa wakangambila ne, Kuakushika, kungambidi bualu ebu kabidi." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Ubande biebe ku mutu kua Pisega, bandisha mesu ebe ku luseke lua ku wesete ne lua ku nôde ne lua ku Sude ne lua ku esete, tangila ne mesu ebe, bualu bua wewe kuena usabuka Yadene eu." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kadi Wambile Yoshua dî, ushindike mutshima wandi, umukoleshe; bualu bua yeye neasabuke ku mpala kua bantu aba, neabahianyishe buloba budi utangila." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Nunku tuakashikama mu tshibanda tshitangilangane ne Bete-peô. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Katataka, nuenu Bena Isalele, unvuai mei ne mikenji bindi musue kunuyisha, bua nuenu kubienza bua nuikale ne muoyo, nubuelemu, nuhiane buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatu benu, unuha." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Kanusangishi mei ha mutu ha dî dinakanuambila, kanumushi mei ku dî adi; bua nuenu nutumikile mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Nakanuambila." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mesu enu akatangila bualu buakenza Yehowa bualu bua Bâla-peô; Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakashiha balume bonso munkatshi muenu bakalonda Bâla-peô;" 
Deuteronomy4:4 kadi nuenu bakalamata Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nudi ne muoyo lelu eu." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Monai, nakanuyisha mei ne mikenji, bu muakangambila Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi, bua nuenu kubienza mu buloba bunudi nubuela bua kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Nubivuluke, nubienze; bualu ebu budi lungenyi luenu ne budimu buenu ku mesu kua bantu badi bunvua mikenji ei yonso, badi bamba ne, Bulelela, bantu aba banene badi ne lungenyi ne budimu." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Tshisamba kai tshidi ne nzambi ha buihi nʼabo bu mudi Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, hanuaulukila?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Tshisamba kai tshidi ne mikenji ne mei majalame bu mikenji ei yonso inakateka ku mpala kuenu lelu? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Nuanji kudimuka, nulame mioyo yenu bilengele, bua kanuhu muoyo bua malu anuakatangila ne mesu enu, ne bua mei au kaluhuki mu mitshima yenu matuku onso a muoyo wenu; kadi nuamanyisha bana benu ne bana ba bana benu;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 dituku dinuakimana ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu Holeba, hakangambila Yehowa ne, Unsangishile bantu, mbunvuishe mei anyi, bua bobo bamanye mua kuntshina matuku abo onso a ha buloba, ne bua bobo bayishe bana babo." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Nuenu nuakalua ha buihi, nuakimana kuinshi kua mukuna; mukuna wakatema kahia tô ne mu diulu, ne midima mikole ne matutu." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Yehowa wakanuambila mei munkatshi mua kahia: nuenu nuakulua mei kadi kanuakatangila muntu; nuakunvua anu dî dia muntu. 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yeye wakanumanyisha bua tshihungidi tshiandi tshiakanuambileye bua nuenu nuenze, mikenji ei dikumi mene mene; yeye wakayifunda ha mabue abidi." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Yehowa wakangambilaku tshikondo atshi bua meme nnumanyishe mei ne mikenji, bua nuenu kubienza mu buloba bunudi nubuela bua kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Nudimuke bienu bimpe; bualu bua kanuakatangila tshifuanyikishi tshia muntu dituku diakasomba nʼenu Yehowa mu Holeba munkatshi mua kahia; 
Deuteronomy4:16 kanuonyi mitshima yenu, kanudisongidi luhingu ne tshifuanyikishi tshia muntu nansha mulume nansha mukashi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 nansha tshia nyama yonso ya ha buloba, anyi tshia nyunyu yonso idi yenda mu diulu," 
Deuteronomy4:18 anyi tshia tshintu tshidi tshidikoka hanshi ha buloba, anyi tshia munyinyi wa mu mai adi muinshi mua buloba;" 
Deuteronomy4:19 bua hanuabandisha mesu enu mulu, ne hanuatangila diba ne ngondo ne mitoto ne bintu bionso bia mu diulu, kanubitendeledi, kanubienzedi mudimu; ebu mbualu buakaha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bantu bonso bakuabo badi muinshi mua diulu." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kadi Yehowa wakanusungula bienu, wakanuhatula mu tshikutu tshia kahia, mu Ejipitu mene, bua nuenu nuikale bantu ba buhianyi buandi, bu mu dituku edi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Bualu bukuabo, Yehowa wakadi nʼanyi tshiji bua bualu buenu, wakaditshiha ne, Wewe kuena mua kusabuka Yadene ne kubuela mu buloba abu buimpe budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bu buhianyi buenu;" 
Deuteronomy4:22 kadi bûdi nʼabu mbua kufuila mu buloba ebu, kuena mua kusabuka Yadene; kadi nuenu nenusabuke, nenuhiane buloba abu buimpe." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Nudimuke bienu, kanuhu muoyo bua tshihungidi tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tshiakahungeye nʼenu: kanudisongidi luhingu anyi tshifuanyikishi tshia tshintu tshimue tshiakanuhidisha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu," 
Deuteronomy4:24 Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi bu kahia kadi kashidisha bionso, udi Nzambi wa mukau." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Hanuadia bana, ne bana ba bana benu, hanuashala mu buloba musangu mule, hanuona mitshima yenu bua kudisongela luhingu ne tshifuanyikishi tshia tshintu, hanuenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kumufuisha tshiji;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 ndi mbikila diulu ne buloba bu bamanyi ba bualu kunudi lelu ne, Nenujimine ha buloba bunudi nuhiana dishiya dia Yadene tshituha tshihi; kanuena nuvudishangana matuku enu ha buloba, kadi nebanujimishe bulelela." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Yehowa neanumuangalashe munkatshi mua bantu bakuabo, nenuikale bantu bakehe munkatshi mua bisamba mudi Yehowa unutuma." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Kuaka nenutendelele nzambi mikuabo yakasongabo ne mitshi ne mabue, kayena mua kutangila anyi mua kunvua anyi mua kudia anyi mua kununkila." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kadi kuaka nenukebe Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nenusangakene nʼandi hanuamukeba ne mitshima yenu yonso ne mioyo yenu yonso." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Hanuakenga mu dikenga, halua malu au onso kunudi, nenuhingane kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu matuku adi ku nyima, nenutumikile dî diandi:" 
Deuteronomy4:31 bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi Nzambi wa luse; yeye kena unuhanga, kena unujimisha, yeye kena uhua muoyo bualu bua tshihungidi tshia batatuʼenu tshiakahungeye nʼabo." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Katataka nudikonke munda bua matuku adi ku nyima akadi ku mpala kuenu, katshia Nzambi wafuka bantu ha buloba, ne ku luseke lumue lua diulu tô ne ku luseke lukuabo ne, Bikalaku bualu bunene nunku, anyi bikalabo bunvue lumu lua bualu bua nunku." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Bantu kai bakumpa dî dia Nzambi diakalua kudibo munkatshi mua kahia, bu munuakadiunvua, ne bakikala ne muoyo?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Anyi Nzambi wakamba kuya bua kudisunguila tshisamba munkatshi mua tshisamba tshikuabo, kudi mateta ne kudi bimanyinu ne kudi malu a kukema ne kudi nvita ne ku tshianza tshikole ne diboko diandi diolola ne kudi malu manene adi atshinyisha bantu bu muakanuenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu Ejipitu ku mesu kuenu, anyi?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Wakunuenzela nunku bua kunumanyisha ne, Yehowa udi Nzambi; kakuena Nzambi mukuabo." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Yeye wakanunvuisha dî diandi mu diulu bua kunumanyisha malu: wakanuisha kahia kandi kanene hanshi ha buloba; nuenu nuakunyua mei andi munkatshi mua kahia. 
Deuteronomy4:37 Bualu bua yeye wakasua batatu benu, nunku yeye wakasungula bana babo bakabalonda ku nyima, yeye nkayandi wakanuhatula mu Ejipitu ne bukole buandi bunene;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 bua kunuihatshila bisamba bidi binuhita bunene ne bukole ku mesu kuenu, ne bua kulua nʼenu mu buloba buabo bu buhianyi, bu mudi bualu ebu lelu." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Numanye bienu lelu, nubueshe bualu ebu mu mitshima yenu ne, Yehowa udi Nzambi wa mu diulu ne hanshi ha buloba kabidi: kakuena mukuabo." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Nuenu nutumikile mei andi ne mikenji yandi, bu munakunuambila lelu, bua nuenu nuikale ne disanka ne bana benu badi banulonda ku nyima, ne bua nuenu nuvudishangane matuku enu ha buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha tshiendelele." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Hashishe Mose wakasungula misoko ya kunyemena isatu dishiya dia Yadene kudi diba dihatuka; 
Deuteronomy4:42 bualu bua mushihi wa muntu ku mpukahuka, wakadi kayi nʼandi lukuna diambedi, anyemene ku umue wa mu misoko ei, ikale biandi ne muoyo." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Mena a misoko ei akadi: Besê mu tshihela, mu muaba wa mpata, wa mu Bena Lubena; ne Lamota mu Gilada wa Bena Gada; ne Golana mu Bashana wa Bena Manashe." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Â mmei akela Mose Bena Isalele: 
Deuteronomy4:45 â mmalu ne â mmei ne ei mmikenji wakambila Mose Bena Isalele, hakaluhukabo mu Ejipitu," 
Deuteronomy4:46 dishiya dia Yadene, mu tshibanda tshidi tshitangilangane ne Bete-peô, mu buloba bua Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi ushikama mu Heshebona, wakashihabo kudi Mose ne Bena Isalele hakaluhukabo mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Bobo bakanyenga buloba buandi, ne buloba bua Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, bakelenge babidi ba Bena Amole, bakadi dishiya dia Yadene kudi diba dihatuka;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 ku Aloê udi ku butshika bua tshibanda tshia mai a Ânona tô ne ku mukuna wa Sileona (dina dikuabo ne Hêmona)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ne buloba buonso bua Alabâ dishiya dia Yadene ku esete tô ne ku dishiha dia mai a Alabâ kuinshi kua mukuna wa Pisega. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mose wakabikila Bena Isalele bonso, wakabambila ne, Unvuai, Isalele, mei ne mikenji bindi nnuambila mu matshu enu lelu, bua nuenu nubimanye ne nubienze." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, wakahunga nʼetu tshihungidi mu Holeba." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Yehowa kakahunga tshihungidi etshi ne batatu betu, kadi wakatshihunga anu nʼetu buonso buetu badi ne muoyo lelu eu." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Yehowa wakasomba nʼenu mpala ha mpala ha mukuna munkatshi mua kahia," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (Meme nakimana hankatshi henu ne Yehowa tshikondo atshi, bua kunulesha dî dia Yehowa; nuenu nuakatshina bualu bua kahia, kanuakabanda ku mukuna;) yeye wakamba ne," 
Deuteronomy5:6 Meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Kuikadi ne nzambi mikuabo ne meme hohamue. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Kudisongidi luhingu anyi tshifuanyikishi tshia tshintu tshia mu diulu anyi tshia tshintu tshia hanshi ha buloba anyi tshia tshintu tshia mu mai adi muinshi mua buloba: 
Deuteronomy5:9 kubmamina, kubitendeledi; bua meme Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ndi bianyi Nzambi wa mukau; ntu ngatumina bana ba tshihungu tshisatu anyi tshinai badi nʼanyi lukuna mibi ya batatuʼabo;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ntu ngalesha bihungu tshinunu badi bansue ne badi benza mikenji yanyi luse lujalame. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Kutedi dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi webe, tshitelatela, bua Yehowa kena ubingisha muntu udi utela dina diandi tshitelatela." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Uvuluke dituku dia Lumingu, udijidile, bu muakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ukuate mudimu webe matuku asambombo, wenza midimu yebe yonso;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete didi Lumingu lua Yehowa, Nzambi webe: dituku adi kuenji mudimu, nansha wewe nansha muanʼebe mulume nansha muanʼebe mukashi, nansha muhika webe mulume nansha muhika webe mukashi, nansha ngombe webe, nansha mpunda webe, nansha bimuna biebe, nansha muenyi udi ku mbelu kuebe; bualu bua muhika webe mulume ne muhika webe mukashi nebikishe bu wewe mene." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Uvuluke ne wewe wakadi muhika mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakakuhatulamu ne tshianza tshia bukole ne diboko diandi diolola: nunku Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakalelela mukenji bua wewe uvuluke dituku dia Lumingu." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe bu muakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi webe, bua matuku ebe ikale a bungi, ne bua wewe ukume dikasa dimpe mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ukuha." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Kushihianganyi. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Kuendi masandi. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Kuibi. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Kudingidi mukuenu. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Kukumi mutshima webe ku mukashi wa mukuenu, anyi ku nsubu wa mukuenu, anyi ku budimi buandi, anyi ku muhika wandi mulume anyi ku muhika wandi mukashi, anyi ku ngombe wandi anyi ku mpunda wandi anyi ku tshintu tshionso tshia mukuenu." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Yehowa wakambila tshisumbu tshienu tshionso mei â ku mukuna munkatshi mua kahia, mu difutu dinene, ne mu midima mikole ne dî dikole; kena usangisha mei makuabo ha mutu. Yeye wakafunda ha mabue abidi, wakampau." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Hashishe hanuakunvua dî diakadi munkatshi mua midima, hakadi mukuna mutema kahia, nuenu nuakalua kundi, ne ba ku mutu kua bisamba bienu ne bakulu benu;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 nuakamba ne, Tangila, Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, wakafuisha butumbi buandi ne bunene buandi, tuakulua dî diandi munkatshi mua kahia: tuakatangila lelu ne Nzambi udi usomba ne muntu, ne yeye udi wikala ne muoyo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Nunku netufue bua tshinyi? Bualu bua kahia aka kanene nekatuoshe; bitunvua dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, kabidi, hashishe netufue." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Muntu kai munkatshi mua bantu bonso wakunvua dî dia Nzambi wa muoyo, diakafuma munkatshi mua kahia, bu tuetu tuakulua, ne wakashala ne muoyo?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Semena biebe ha buihi, unvua mei onso adi Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, musue kubambila: utuambile bietu mei onso adi Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, mukuambile; tuetu netulue dî diandi, netudienze." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Yehowa wakunyua mei enu hanuakadi basombe nʼanyi; ne Yehowa wakangambila ne, Nakunvua mei a bantu aba, akukuambilabo; mei onso akuambabo adi mimpe." 
Deuteronomy5:29 O, nakadi kusua bua mutshima eu wikale munda muabo, bua kuntshina ne bua kuenza mikenji yanyi yonso matuku onso, ne bobo bikale ne dikasa dimpe, ne bana babo badi balonda ku nyima tshiendelele!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ya biebe, ubambile ne, Hinganai bienu ku ntenta yenu." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kadi wewe wimane biebe hehi nʼanyi, nenkuambile mei onso, ne mikenji ne malu bindi musue wewe kubamanyisha, bua bobo babienze mu buloba bundi nnuha." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Nuenu nutumikile mei onso adi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuambila; kanusesuki ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Nuende bienu mu nshila wakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua nuenu nuikale ne muoyo, ne bua nuenu nukume dikasa dimpe, ne bua nuenu nuvudishangane matuku enu mu buloba bunudi nuhiana." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ei mmikenji ne â mmei ne â mmalu wakangambila Yehowa bua kunumanyisha, bua nuenu nubienze mu buloba bunudi nuhiana:" 
Deuteronomy6:2 bua nuenu nutshine Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kutumikila mei andi onso ne mikenji yandi, binakanuambila, ne wewe ne muanʼebe mulume, ne muana wa muanʼebe mulume, matuku onso a muoyo wenu; bua wewe uvudishe matuku ebe." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Unvuai, Isalele, nubienze; bua nuenu nukume dikasa dimpe, ne bua nuenu nukumbane ba bungi, bu muakanulaya Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatuʼenu, mu buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Unvuai Isalele, Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, udi biandi Yehowa umue;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 sua Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ne mutshima webe wonso, ne muoyo webe wonso, ne bukole buebe buonso." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Mei au anakukuambila lelu eu ikale mu mutshima webe; 
Deuteronomy6:7 wewe newayishe bana bebe, wewe neusombelele nʼabo bua mei au, hawashikama mu nsubu webe, ne hawenda mu nshila, ne hawalala, ne hawabika." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Wewe newasuike bu tshimanyinu ku tshianza tshiebe, ne hankatshi ha makiki." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Newafunde ha minoko ya bibi bia nsubu webe, ne ha bibi bia mishiku ya luhangu luebe." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Hashishe halua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nʼenu mu buloba buakalayeye batatu benu, Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba, bua kunuhabu, misoko minene ne miakane mudi kanuyi bibake," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ne nsubu miule tente ne bintu bimpe mudi kanuyi bûshe, ne mena a mai akumbulabo, anudi kanuyi bumbule, ne madimi a tumuma tukese ne mitshi ya olive, binudi kanuyi bakune; nuenu nenudie, nenukute mafu tente;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 hashishe nudimukai, bua kanuhu muoyo bua Yehowa wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne mu nsubu wa buluka." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Nutshine Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, numuenzele yeye nkayandi mudimu, nuditshihe kudi dina diandi." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Kanulondi nzambi mikuabo ya bantu badi ha buihi nʼenu; 
Deuteronomy6:15 bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi munkatshi muenu, udi Nzambi wa mukau, bua tshiji tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, katshikadi kunudi, ne bua yeye kanujimishi ha mutu ha buloba." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Kanutetshi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munda bu munuakamuteta mu Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Nutumikile mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne mei akanuambileye ne malu andi akanumanyisheye." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Nuenze anu malu adi makane ne mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa; bua nuenu nukume dikasa dimpe, ne bua nuenu nubuele ne nuhiane buloba buimpe buakalaya Yehowa batatu benu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 bua kunuihatshila bantu bonso badi nʼenu lukuna ku mpala kuenu, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Hakukonkabo kudi muanʼebe mulume ne, Mei au ne mikenji ne malu biakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bidi tshinyi?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Hashishe newambile muanʼebe mulume ne, Tuakadi bahika ba Palo mu Ejipitu, ne Yehowa wakatuhatula mu Ejipitu ne tshianza tshikole;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 ne Yehowa wakatulesha bimanyinu ne malu a kukema a bungi ne makole mu Ejipitu ne kudi Palô ne ba mu nsubu muandi, ku mesu kuetu;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 yeye wakatuhatulamu, bualu bua kulua nʼetu ne bua kutuha buloba buakalayeye batatu betu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Yehowa wakatuela mikenji ei, bua tuetu tutshine Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, bua yeye atuenzele bimpe matuku onso, bua tuetu tuikale ne muoyo utudi nʼau lelu eu." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Bituenza mikenji ei ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, bu muakabambileye, netubadibue ne mbakane." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Halua Yehowa nʼenu mu buloba bunudi nuya bua kubuhiana, hanuihatshileye bisamba bia bungi ku mpala kuenu, Bena Hiti ne Bena Gîgashi ne Bena Amole ne Bena Kanâna ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse, bisamba muanda mutekete bidi binuhita bunene ne bukole;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 habafila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu bianza bienu, nenubashihe; hashishe nenubajimishe ha buloba: kanuhungi nʼabo tshihungidi, kanubaleshi luse," 
Deuteronomy7:3 kanubakanganyi nʼabo, kanubakishi muanʼenu mukashi kudi muana wabo mulume, kanuangatshidi muana wenu mulume mukashi kudibo." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Bualu bua bobo nebakudimune mutshima wa muanʼenu mulume, bua yeye kandondi meme bua kukuatshileye nzambi mikuabo mudimu: nunku Yehowa neanukuatshile tshiji, neanujimishe lubilu." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kadi nenubenzele nunku: nushihe bishihelu biabo, nuele mabue abo hanshi adibo batendelela, nutahe Bashela babo, nuoshe mpingu yabo ne kahia." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Bualu bua nuenu nudi bantu ba tshijila kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanusungula munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bidi hanshi ha buloba, bua nuenu nuikale bantu ba buhianyi buandi." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Yehowa kakateka luse luandi kunudi, kakanusungula bualu bua nuenu nuakahita bantu bakuabo bungi; nuenu nuakatamba bantu bonso bukese;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 kadi bualu bua Yehowa udi munusue ne bualu bua yeye utu watumikila mulayi wakalayeye batatu benu, Yehowa wakanuhatula ne tshianza tshikole, wakanuhikula mu nsubu wa lukanu, ne mu tshianza tshia Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Numanye bienu ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi Nzambi mene; Nzambi utu walamata dî diandi, utu watumikila tshihungidi tshiandi ne luse luandi kudi bantu badi bamusue ne batu batumikila mikenji yandi tô ne ku bihungu tshinunu;" 
Deuteronomy7:10 utu wafuta bantu badi nʼandi lukuna difutu diabo ku mesu kuabo, bua kubashiha: yeye kena uhanga muntu udi nʼandi lukuna, neamufute ku mesu kuandi." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Nunku nutumikile mikenji ne malu ne mei binakunuambila lelu, nubienze." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Binunvua mikenji ei, binuayenza, hashishe Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nênze tshihungidi ne luse biakalayeye batatu benu:" 
Deuteronomy7:13 yeye neanusue, neanusankishe, neanuvudishe, yeye neasankishe bana benu kabidi, ne bintu bidi bidiunda mu buloba buebe, midioko yenu, ne nvinyo yenu mihia-mihia, ne manyi enu ne bana ba ngombe yenu ne bana ba mikoko yenu, mu buloba buakalayeye batatu benu bua kunuhabu." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Nuenu nenusankishibue ku mutu kua bantu bonso: nansha mulume nansha mukashi munkatshi muenu anyi munkatshi mua bimuna bienu nebikale nkumba. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Yehowa neanumushile masama onso: kena unusamisha masama mabi a mu Ejipitu, anudi bamanye, kadi yeye neasamishe badi nʼenu lukuna masama au." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nujimishe bantu bonso badi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ufila mu bianza bienu; kanubafuidi luse, kanutendeledi nzambi yabo; bualu ebu nebuikale bu buteyi kunudi." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Binuamba mu mitshima yenu ne, Bisamba ebi bidi bituhita bunene, nembihate munyi?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Kanubatshinyi: nuvuluke malu akenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Palô ne Bena Ejipitu bonso;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 mateta makole anuakatangila ku mesu, ne bimanyinu, ne malu a kukema, ne tshianza tshikole ne diboko diolola wakanuhatula nʼabi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nênzele bantu bonso banudi nutshina nunku." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, Yehowa neatume matembue munkatshi muabo, bantu badi bashala nebasokome, tô ne hafuabo ku mpala kuenu." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Kanutshinyi ku mesu kuabo, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi munkatshi muenu, udi Nzambi munene udi uvuisha ditshina dikole." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuihatshile bisamba abi ku mpala kuenu bituha bituha: kanubashihi tshikondo tshimue, bualu bua nyama ya muitu neyikumbane munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kadi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neabafile mu bianza bienu, neabakengeshe ne makenga makole, tô ne hajiminabo." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Yeye neafile bakelenge babo mu bianza bienu, nuenu nenjimishe mena abo hanshi ha buloba; kakuena muntu umue udi mua kuimana ku mpala kuenu tô ne hanuabashiha bonso." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Nuoshe mpingu yabo yakasongabo ne kahia: kanukumi mitshima yenu kudi argent anyi or idi ha mutu hai, kanuyidiangatshidi, kanudionyi mu buteyi ebu; bualu ebu budi butonda mutshima wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kanulu ne tshintu tshidi tshitonda Yehowa mu nsubu muenu bua kufuanangana nʼatshi: nuhidie tshintu atshi, nuikale nʼatshi lukuna; atshi ntshintu tshibihe tshia tshijila." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Nuenze mikenji yonso inakunuambila lelu, bua nuenu nuikale ne muoyo, nukumbane, nubuelemu bua kuhiana buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatu benu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Nuvuluke malu onso akanuenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bidimu ebi makumi anai hakadiye munulombole mu tshihela, bualu bua kunuhuekesha, ne kunuteta bualu bua kumanya malu akadi mu mitshima yenu, ne nudi basue kutumikila mikenji yandi, anyi kuyihidia." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Yeye wakanuhuekesha, wakanufuisha nzala ne wakanudisha ne mana a mu diulu, anudi kanuyi bamanye, ne akadi batatu benu kabayi bamanye; bua kunumanyisha ne, Muntu kena wikala ne muoyo bualu bua bidia nkayabo kadi utu wikala ne muoyo bualu bua mei onso adi ahatuka mukana mua Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Bilulu bienu kabiakasunsuka hamʼbidi henu, ne makasa enu kaena mûle bidimu ebi makumi anai." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Nuenu nuelangane meji mu mitshima yenu ne, Bu mudi tatu ukengesha muanʼandi mulume, nunku Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanukengesha." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Nutumikile mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nuende mu nshila yandi, numutshine." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi ulua nʼenu mu buloba buimpe, buloba budi bûle tente ne tusulu tua mai, ne mishimi ya mai idi ihatuka mu mikuna ne mu bibanda;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 buloba bua blê ne orge ne mionshi ya tumuma ne mitshi ya nfigi ne grenade; buloba bua mitshi ya olive ne buitshi; 
Deuteronomy8:9 buloba bunudi mua kudia bidia bia bungi, kanuena nukengela tshintu; buloba budi ne biamu bia tubanda, nudi bamanye mua kumbula biamu bikunze bia tubanda ku mikuna yabu." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nenukute mafu tente, nenusakidile Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bualu bua buloba buimpe buakalayeye." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Nudimuke, kanuhu muoyo bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kutumikila mikenji yandi ne mei andi ne malu anakunuambila lelu:" 
Deuteronomy8:12 hanuadia bintu bia bungi, hanukuta, hanuasa nsubu mimpe ne hanuashikamamu," 
Deuteronomy8:13 hakumbana ngombe yenu ne mikoko yenu ne havulangana biamu bienu bia argent ne bia or, ne havulangana bintu bienu bionso;" 
Deuteronomy8:14 hashishe nudimuke, kanudisu mu mitshima yenu, kanuhu muoyo bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne mu nsubu wa lukanu;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 wakanulombola mu tshihela tshinene tshibi, tshiakadi ne nyoka isuma bu kahia ne tuminyiminyi, ne buloba budi kabuyi ne mai; wakanuhatula mai mu dibue dikole;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 wakanuisha ne mana mu tshihela, adi batatu benu kabayi bamanye; bualu bua kunuhuekesha ne kunuteta, bua kunuenzela bimpe mu matuku a kunshikidilu kuenu:" 
Deuteronomy8:17 kanuambi mu mitshima yenu ne, Tuakudiangatshila biuma ebi bionso ne bukole bua bianza bietu." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kadi nuvuiuke Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua yeye utu wanuha bukole bua kuangata nʼabu biuma; bua yeye akashe nʼenu tshihungidi tshiandi tshiakahungeye ne batatu benu: bu bualu buakuenjibua lelu." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Binuahua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, muoyo, binualonda nzambi mikuabo, binuenzela nzambi mikuabo midimu, binuayitendelela, ndi nnumanyisha lelu ne, Nenufue bulelela." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Bu muakajimisha Yehowa bisamba bikuabo ku mpala kuenu, nunku nuenu nenujimine, bualu bua nuenu nuakahidia kunvua dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Unvuai, Isalele, nenusabuke Yadene lelu, bualu bua kuihata bisamba bidi binuhita bunene ne bukole, ne misoko minene idi ne mpangu mile idi mihite mulu," 
Deuteronomy9:2 bantu banene badi bale, bana balume ba Anaka, banudi bamanye; nuakulua lumu luabo ne, Nganyi udi mua kuimana ku mpala kua bana balume ba Anaka?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Numanye bienu lelu ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi uya ku mpala kuenu udi bu kahia kadi kabutula bionso; yeye nembashihe, neabahoneshe ku mpala kuenu: nunku nenubihate, nembajimishe lubilu, bu muakanuambila Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Hashikisha Yehowa kubihata, kanuambi mu mitshima yenu ne, Mbualu bua buakane buetu, Yehowa wakaluamu nʼetu bua kuhiana buloba ebu: bualu bua Yehowa udi ubihata ku mpala kuenu bualu bua bubi buabo." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Kanuena nuhiana buloba buabo bualu bua buakane buenu anyi bua dijalama dia mitshima yenu: kadi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi ubihata ku mpala kuenu bualu bua bubi buabo; bualu bua kuakasha nʼenu dî diakalaya Yehowa kudi batatu benu, Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Numanye bienu ne, Yehowa kena munuhe buloba ebu buimpe bu buhianyi bualu bua buakane buenu; bualu bua nudi bantu ba tshitshu." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Vulukai, kanuhu muoyo bu munuakafuisha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tshiji mu tshihela; ku dituku dinuakahatuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu tô ne hanuakafika ku muaba eu, nuakahidia Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Mu Holeba nuakafuisha Yehowa tshiji kabidi ne Yehowa wakadi nʼenu tshiji, wakamba kunushiha." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Hanakabanda ku mukuna bua kuangata mabue akadi ne mei a tshihungidi tshia Yehowa mafundahu, nakashala ku mukuna matuku makumi anai munya ne butuku; tshiakadia bidia, tshiakanua mai." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Yehowa wakumpa mabue au abidi akadi mafunda ne munu wa Nzambi; akadi mafundahu mei onso akanuambila Yehowa ku mukuna munkatshi mua kahia mu dituku dia disangisha dietu. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Hakaleha matuku makumi anai, Yehowa wakampa mabue au abidi akadi malundahu mei a tshihungidi." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Bika biebe, uhueke lubilu bualu bua bantu bebe bawakahatula mu Ejipitu, bakoneka, bakasesuka lubilu mu nshila unakabalesha; bakadienzela luhingu ne biamu biakatulabo." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Yehowa wakangambila kabidi ne, Nakatangila bantu aba ne mona, badi bantu ba tshitshu;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 undekele, bua meme neashihe, nenjimishe dina diabo muinshi mua diulu; meme nenkuvuishe wewe tshisamba tshidi tshibahita bunene ne bukole." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Nunku nakanyunguluka, nakahueka mu tshibanda, ne mukuna wakadi utema ne kahia; ne mabue abidi a mei a tshihungidi akadi mu bianza bianyi bibidi." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Nakatangila ne monai, nuakenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bubi; nuakadienzela kana ka ngombe ne biamu biakatulabo; nuakadi nusesuka lubilu mu nshila wakanulesha Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Nakangata mabue au abidi akadi mu bianza bianyi, nakashiha ku mesu kuenu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Nakadikuma hanshi ku mpala kua Yehowa matuku makumi anai bu munakenza diambedi, tshiakadia bidia, tshiakanua mai, bualu bua mibi yenu muakenza, hanuakenza bualu ebu bubi ku mesu kua Yehowa bua kumufuisha tshiji." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Bualu bua nakutshina difikʼa munda ne tshiji tshikole biakadi Yehowa nʼabi bua kunushiha. Kadi Yehowa wakangunvuila musangu eu kabidi. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Yehowa wakadi ne Alona tshiji tshikole bua kumushiha; nakalombela Alona musangu eu kabidi. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Nakangata bualu bubi bunuakenza, kana ka ngombe mene, nakakosha ne kahia, nakakadiata munda mua dikasa, nakakabotesha bu dinfuenkenya dia buloba: nakela dinfuenkenya diaku mu kasulu kakadi kafuma ku mukuna." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Ku Tabela ne Masa ne Kibelota-hatawa nuakafuisha Yehowa tshiji. 
Deuteronomy9:23 Hakanumusha Yehowa ku Kadeshe-bânea ne, Yai bienu, nuhiane buloba bunakanuha; hashishe nuakahidia dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, kanuakamuitabusha, kanuakunvua di diandi." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Nuenu nutu nuahidia Yehowa katshia ku dituku dinakanumanya. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Nunku nakadikuma hanshi ku mpala kua Yehowa matuku makumi anai, bualu bua Yehowa wakamba ne, Nembashihe." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Nakatendelela Yehowa, nakamba ne, Mukelenge Yehowa, kushihi bantu bebe ne buhianyi buebe buwakahikula ne bukole buebe, bantu bawakahatula mu Ejipitu ne tshianza tshikole." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Uvuluke bantu bebe, Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba; kutangidi tshitshu tshia bantu aba anyi buhidia buabo anyi mibi yabo," 
Deuteronomy9:28 bua bena buloba buwakatuhatula kabambi ne, Bualu bua Yehowa kakadi ne bukole bua kulua nʼabo mu buloba buakahaneye ne bualu bua yeye wakadi nʼabo tshiji, yeye wakalua nʼabo mu tshihela bua kubashiha." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Bobo batshidi bantu bebe ne buhianyi buebe, bawakahatula ne bukole buebe bunene ne diboko diebe diolola." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Ku tshikondo atshi Yehowa wakangambila ne, Songa mabue abidi bu mabue a diambedi, ulue biebe kundi ku mukuna, udienzele mushete wa mabaya." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Nenfunde ha mabue au mei akadi mafunda ha mabue awakashiha, wewe wabueshe mu mushete." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Nunku nakenzela mushete wa mitshi ya acacia, nakasonga mabue abidi bu mabue a diambedi, nakabanda ku mukuna ne mabue abidi mu tshianza tshianyi." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Yeye wakafunda ha mabue, bu muakafundeye diambedi, mikenji dikumi yakanuambila Yehowa ku mukuna munkatshi mua kahia mu dituku dia disangisha dietu; Yehowa wakumpau." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Nakanyunguluka, nakahueka ku mukuna, nakateka mabue mu mushete unakenza, adimu bu muakangambila Yehowa," 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Bena Isalele bakumuka ku Belota Bene-yâkana, bakaya ku Mosela. Alona wakasaku, bakamujika; ne Eleazâ, muanʼandi mulume, wakenza mudimu wandi wa buakuidi." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bakumukaku, bakaya ku Gudugoda; ku Gudugoda bakaya ku Yotebata, muakadi buloba bua tusulu tua mai." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ku tshikondo atshi Yehowa wakajidila tshisamba tshia Lewi, bua kutualabo mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi, ne bua kuimana ku mpala kua Yehowa bua kamuenzela mudimu, ne bua kuvudishila bantu disanka mu dina diandi, bu mudibo benza lelu." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Bua bualu ebu Bena Lewi kabena ne buhianyi munkatshi mua bana babo; Yehowa udi buhianyi buabo bu muakabambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu)." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Nakashala ku mukuna matuku makumi anai bu munakenza diambedi: Yehowa wakangunvuila musangu eu kabidi; Yehowa kakanushiha. 
Deuteronomy10:11 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Bika, uye biebe ku mpala kua bantu, nebabuelemu, nebahiane buloba bunakalaya batatu babo bua kubahabu." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Katataka, nuenu Bena Isalele, Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi musue nuenu nuenze malu kai? Mbua kutshina Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne kuenda mu nshila yandi yonso, ne bua kumusua, ne bua kuenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mudimu ne mitshima yenu yonso ne bukole buenu buonso," 
Deuteronomy10:13 ne bua kutumikila mikenji ya Yehowa ne mei andi anakunuambila lelu bua nuenu kukuma dikasa dimpe. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Tangilai, Yehowa udi muena diulu dikuabo didi ku nyima kua diulu, ne muena buloba ne bintu bionso bidimu." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Yehowa wakadi ne disanka bualu bua batatu benu, yeye wakahasua, yeye wakasungula bana babo bakabalonda ku nyima, wakanusungula nuenu mene mene munkatshi mua bantu bonso, bu mutshidi bualu lelu." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Nuditengule mu mitshima yenu, kanuikadi bantu ba tshitshu kabidi." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi Nzambi wa nzambi mikuabo, udi Mukelenge wa bakelenge, Nzambi munene ne mukole, udibo batshina, yeye katu watangila bantu ne kansungusungu, kena witabusha matutu." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Udi ulesha buakane kudi bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila, udi musue kuha benyi bintu bia kudia ne bintu bia kuluata." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Nunku nuenu nudi ne bualu bua kusua benyi bualu bua nuenu nuakadi benyi mu buloba bua Ejipitu. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Nutshine Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, numuenzele mudimu, nulamate kudiye, nuditshihe kudi dina diandi." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Yeye udi butumbi buenu, yeye udi Nzambi wenu, wakanuenzela malu manene ne a kukema anuakatangila ku mesu." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Bankambua benu makumi muanda mutekete bakaya mu Ejipitu; katataka Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuvudisha bungi bua mitoto idi mu diulu." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Nunku suai Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, numunemeke, nutumikile malu andi ne mei andi ne mikenji yandi matuku onso." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Numanye bienu lelu, bualu bua tshiena ngakula ne bana benu badi kabayi bamanye, badi kabayi banze kutangila malu akanuyishabo kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu. Kabakanji kutangila bunene buandi ne tshianza tshiandi tshia bukole, ne diboko diandi diolola," 
Deuteronomy11:3 ne bimanyinu biandi, ne midimu yandi biakanuenzeleye mu Ejipitu kudi Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, ne ku buloba buandi buonso." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Kabakanji kutangila bualu buakenzeye masalayi a mu Ejipitu, ne tubalu tuabo ne makalu abo; muakahingisheye mai a Dishiba Dikunze ha mitu yabo, hakadibo banulonda ku nyima, ne muakabashiha Yehowa tô ne ku dituku edi;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 ne muakanuenzeleye mu tshihela tô ne hanuakalua ku muaba eu. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Kabakatangila bualu buakenzeye Datana ne Abilama, bana balume ba Eliaba, muana mulume wa Lubena; muakabulula buloba mukana muabu, buakabamina, ne ba mu nsubu yabo, ne ntenta yabo ne bintu biabo bionso bia muoyo munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Kadi mesu enu akatangila malu manene onso akenza Yehowa. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Nunku nutumikile mikenji yonso inakunuambila lelu, bua nuenu nuikale ne bukole, ne bua nuenu nubuelemu, ne bua nuenu nuhiane buloba bunudi nuya bua kubuhiana;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 ne bua nuenu nuvudishangane matuku enu mu buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatu benu bua kubahabu ne tunkanunuma tuabo, buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Bualu bua buloba bunuyaya kuhiana kabuena bu buloba bua Ejipitu munuakumuka, bunuakakuna ntete yenu, nuakayimiamina mai nuendakana ku makasa, bu tshibanda tshia midioko;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kadi buloba bunuyaya kuhiana mbuloba bua mikuna ne bibanda, buloba ebu budi bumina mai a nvula ya mu diulu," 
Deuteronomy11:12 buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ulama; mesu a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, atu atangila ha buloba abu ku tshibangidilu tshia tshidimu tô ne kunshikidilu kuatshi." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Binuateleja matshu bimpe ku mikenji inakunuambila lelu, bua kusua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne kungenzela mudimu ne mitshima yenu yonso ne muoyo wenu wonso," 
Deuteronomy11:14 hashishe nentume nvula ha buloba buenu mu tshidimu tshia nvula, ne nvula ya mbedi ne nvula ya ku nyima; nenumanye mua kuhuola manvua enu ne kukama nvinyo mihia-mihia ne manyi enu." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Nendiundishe mashinde mu madimi enu bua nuenu kudisha bimuna bienu; nenudie, nenukute." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Nudimuke bienu, bua kanudidingi mu mitshima yenu, kanusesuki bua kukuatshila nzambi mikuabo midimu ne kuyitendelela;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 bualu bua Yehowa neanukuatshile tshiji, yeye neabuikile diulu ne nvula kayena iloka, ne buloba kabuena bukuama bintu; nunku nenujimishibue lubilu mu buloba buimpe buakamba Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Nunku nubueshe mei â munda mua mitshima yenu ne muoyo wenu; nuasuika ku tshianza tshienu bu tshimanymu ne hankatshi ha makiki enu. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Numanyishe bana benu mei â, nubambileu hanuashikama mu nsubu yenu ne hanuenda mu nshila ne hanuaya ne hanuabika." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Nuafunda ha minoko ya nsubu yenu, ne ku mishiku ya mpangu yenu;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 nunku nebavudishe matuku enu ne matuku a bana benu mu buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatu benu bua kubahabo matuku onso atshidi diulu ha mutu ha buloba. 
Deuteronomy11:22 Bualu bua binuatumikila mikenji yonso Nakanuambila bua kuyenza bua kusua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kuenda mu nshila yandi yonso, ne bua kulamata kudiye," 
Deuteronomy11:23 hashishe Yehowa neanuihatshile bisamba ebi bionso ku mpala kuenu, nenuhiane buloba bua bisamba bidi binuhita bunene ne bukole." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Miaba yonso mudi nudiata munda mua makasa enu neyikale yenu: ku tshihela ne mikuna ya Lebanona ne ku musulu munene wa Pelata tô ne ku mai manene adi ku nyima kuenu. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Kakuena muntu udi mua kuimana ku mpala kuenu: Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neateke buowa ne dishina kudi bena buloba buonso bunudi nudiata ku makasa, bu muakanuambileye." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Tangilai, nakateka disanka ne mulau ku mpala kuenu lelu." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Binunvua mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, inakunuambila lelu, nenuhete disanka;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 binuahidia kunvua mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, binuasesuka mu nshila unakunulesha lelu bua kulonda nzambi mikuabo, Nudi kanuyi bamanye, nenuhete mulau." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Hashishe hanuabuela mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu unuha, nenjadike disanka ku mukuna wa Gelizima, ne mulau ku mukuna wa Ebala." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Idi dishiya dia Yadene mu nshila wa kudi diba dibuela, mu buloba bua Bena Kanâna bakadi bashikama mu Alabâ, hehi ne Gilegala, hehi ne mitshi ya telebinta ya Mole." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Bualu bua nenusabuke Yadene bua kubuelamu ne bua kuhiana buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha; nenubuhiane, nenushikamemu." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Nutumikile, nuenze malu onso ne mei onso anakuteka ku mpala kuenu lelu." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Â mmalu ne mei anudi ne bualu bua kutumikila mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatu benu, munuhe bua kubuhiana matuku onso a muoyo wenu ha buloba." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Nuenu nudi ne bualu bua kujimisha miaba yonso yakadi bisamba binudi nuihata bitendelelaku nzambi yabo ku mutu kua mikuna mile, ne ku mutu kua tukuna tukese ne muinshi mua mitshi mibishi." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Nenushale bioshelu biabo, nutshibule mabue abo bituha, nuoshe Bashela babo ne kahia; nenutahe mpingu yakasongabo ne tshifuanyikishi tshia nzambi yabo; nenjimishe mena abo mu muaba au." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Kadi kanuenji Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nunku." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Kadi muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, musungule munkatshi mua bisamba bienu bionso, bua kujadikamu dina diandi: nenukebe muaba kudiye mushikame, nenudisangisheku;" 
Deuteronomy12:6 nenulueku ne milambu yenu ya kuosha, ne nyama mishiha, ne bintu bia dikumi bia bintu bienu, ne bintu bienu bidibo bakuha, ne milambu ya kuditshiha kuenu, ne bintu bidi mitshima yenu misue kufila, ne banʼa bute ba ngombe yenu ne ba mikoko yenu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Nenudieku bidia ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nenusanke mu malu onso anudi nuenza ne bianza bienu, ne nuenu ne ba mu nsubu yenu mu malu onso akanusankisha nʼau Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Kanuenji bu munudi nuenza kunoko lelu, benza muntu yonso anu malu adi mimpe ku mesu kuandi;" 
Deuteronomy12:9 bualu bua kanuena banze kubuela mu dikisha ne buhianyi bidi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kadi hanuasabuka Yadene, hanuashikama mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuhianyisha, udi unuha dikisha kudi bena lukuna bonso badi banunyunguluka, ne nenushikame talalâ." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Hashishe nenulue ne bintu binakanuambila ku muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Usungula bua kujadikamu dina diandi; milambu yenu ya kuosha ne nyama yenu mishiha, ne bintu bia dikumi bia bintu bienu, ne bintu bienu bidibo bakuha, ne milambu ya kuditshiha kuenu kunudi nuditshiha nʼaku kudi Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Nenuikale ne disanka dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne nuenu ne bana benu balume ne bana benu bakashi, ne bahika benu balume ne bahika benu bakashi, ne Bena Lewi badi ku mbelu kuenu badi kabayi ne buhianyi kunudi." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Nudimuke, kanufidi milambu ya kuosha mu miaba yonso mudi nutangila;" 
Deuteronomy12:14 kadi muaba udi Yehowa Usungula munkatshi mua bisamba bienu, nenufileku milambu yenu ya kuosha, nenuenzeku mei onso anakunuambila." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Kadi nudi mua kushiha nyama ne mua kudia munyinyi ku mbelu kuenu udi mitshima yenu misue, bu mudi disanka dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, diakanusankisheye nʼadi; bantu badi kabayi bakane ne badi bakane badi mua kudia munyinyi wa kabuluku ne mbashi." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kanudi mashi, kadi nuahongolole ha buloba bu mai." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Kanudi ku mbelu kuenu tshintu tshia dikumi tshia manvua enu, anyi tshia nvinyo yenu mihia-mihia, anyi tshia manyi enu, anyi tshia banʼa bute ba ngombe yenu ne ba mikoko yenu: nansha milambu yenu mudi nuditshiha nʼai, nansha bintu bidi mitshima yenu misue kufila, nansha milambu idibo bakuha:" 
Deuteronomy12:18 kadi nubidie ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, musungule, ne wewe ne muana webe mulume ne muana webe mukashi ne muhika webe mulume ne muhika webe mukashi, ne Muena Lewi udi ku mbelu kuenu: nuikale ne disanka ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu malu onso anudi nuenza ne bianza bienu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Nudimuke, kanulekedi Muena Lewi tô matuku onso anudi nushala mu buloba buenu." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Hadiundisha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, matshika enu muakanulayeye, ne nuenu nenuambe ne, Netudie munyinyi, bualu bua mitshima yenu idi misue kudia munyinyi; nudi mua kudia munyinyi udi mitshima yenu misue." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Bikala muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Usungula bua kujadihamu dina diandi, udi kule, hashishe nenushale ngombe wa mu ngombe yenu ne mukoko wa mu mikoko biakanuha Yehowa, bu munakanuambila; nudi mua kudia ku mbelu kuenu bintu bionso bidi mitshima yenu misue." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Nudi mua kudia munyinyi wa kabuluku ne wa mbashi bu mudi bakuabo badia; badi kabayi bakane ne badi bakane badi bamanye mua kudia. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kadi kanudi mashi, bualu bua mashi adi muoyo; kanudi muoyo ne munyinyi hohamue." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Kanudi mashi, nuahongolole ha buloba bu mai." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Kanudi mashi; bua nukume dikasa dimpe ne bana benu badi banulonda ku nyima, hanuenza malu adi mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Nuye anu ne bintu binuakajidila ne milambu yenu ya kuditshiha ku muaba udi Yehowa Usungula; 
Deuteronomy12:27 nenufile milambu yenu ya kuosha, ne munyinyi ne mashi, ha tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; nuhongolole mashi a milambu yenu ha tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; nudie munyinyi wau." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Nutumikile, nunvue mei onso anakanuambila: nunku nenukune dikasa dimpe ne bana benu badi banulonda ku nyima tshiendelele, hanuenza malu adi mimpe ne makane ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Hashiha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bisamba bidi ku mpala kuenu, hanuabihata, hanuahiana buloba buabo," 
Deuteronomy12:30 nudimuke, kanukuatshibu kudi mateyi abo bua kubalonda, habajimishabo ku mesu kuenu; kanukonkanganyi bua nzambi yabo ne. Bisamba ebi bidi bitendelela nzambi yabo munyi? Tuetu nkayetu tudi basue kuenza nunku kabidi." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Kanuenzedi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nunku bualu bua bobo badi benzela nzambi yabo malu onso mabi adi atonda Yehowa; bualu bua bobo badi boshila nzambi yabo bana babo balume ne bana babo bakashi mene mene ha kahia." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Nuenu nutumikile, nuenze mei onso anakunuambila; kanutentekashi dî dikuabo ha mutu ha mei au, kanûmushi dî ku mei au." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Biabika muprofete anyi mulotshi wa bilota munkatshi muenu, udi unulesha tshimanyinu anyi bualu bua kukema;" 
Deuteronomy13:2 ne hashikisheye tshimanyinu anyi bualu bua kukema bua kunubikila ne, Tuye, tulonde nzambi mikuabo mudi kanuyi bamanye, tuyenzele mudimu;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 kanunvu mei a muprofete au, anyi mulotshi au wa bilota; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi munutete, bua kumanya ne, Nudi basue Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne mitshima yenu yonso ne muoyo wenu wonso." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Nuenu nulonde Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, numutshine, nutumikile mikenji yandi, numuenzele yeye nkayandi mudimu, nulamate kudiye." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Nebashihe muprofete au anyi mulotshi au wa bilota, bualu bua yeye wakamba mei adi anutombuesha kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanu; hatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, wakanuhikula mu nsubu wa lukanu; udi musue kunusesuisha mu nshila wakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenubua nuenu kuendamu. Nunku nenumushe malu mabi â munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Bikala muanʼenu mulume, muana mulume wa mamu webe mene, anyi muanʼebe mulume anyi muanʼebe mukashi, anyi mukashi webe ûdi unanga, anyi mulunda webe wa ha mutshima webe, mukusesuishe mu musokoko ne, Tuye bietu, tuenzele nzambi mikuabo mudimu, inudi kanuyi bamanye, nansha wewe nansha batatu benu;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 nzambi ya bantu badi ha buihi nʼenu, anyi badi ha bule ku luseke lumue lua buloba tô ne ku luseke lukuabo;" 
Deuteronomy13:8 kuitabushi, kunvu dî diandi, kumuleshi luse, kumusungidi, kumusokoki;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 kadi umushihe bulelela; wewe umukuate tshianza bua kumushiha diambedi, ne ku nyima bantu bakuabo bonso nebamukuate." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Neumukume ne mabue, neumushihe; bualu bua yeye wakakeba mua kunusesuisha mu nshila wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Bena Isalele bonso nebunvue lumu elu, nebatshine, kabena benza bualu ebu bubi kabidi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Binunvua lumu lua umue wa misoko yakanuha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kushikamamu ne," 
Deuteronomy13:13 Bantu bakuabo ba tshikamakama, bakumuka munkatshi muenu, bakasesuisha bena musoko wabo ne, Tuye tuenzele nzambi mikuabo mudimu, inudi kanuyi bamanye;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 hashishe nenuebeshangane, nenukebe, nenukonkangane bimpe; bikala bualu bulelela, bakuenza bualu bua tshikamakama munkatshi muenu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 nenushihe bena musoko aba ne miele ya nvita, nenuhaule musoko; nenushihe bimuna ne bintu bidimu ne muele wa nvita." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Nenusangishe bintu bionso bia musoko mu musesu, nenuoshile Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, musoko ne bintu ebi bionso; musoko eu newikale musasula tshiendelele, kabena bawasaku kabidi." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ka nudiangatshidi tshintu tshimue tshia mulau tshia musoko au mu tshianza tshienu; nunku Yehowa nealekele tshiji tshiandi tshikole, neanuleshe luse, neanusankishe, neanukumbashe bu muakalayeye batatu benu;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 hanunvua dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kutumikila mikenji yandi yonso inakunuambila lelu ne bua kuenza malu adi makane ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Nuenu nudi bana ba Yehowa, Nzambi wenu: kanuditahi nsalu, kanubeyi makiki enu bualu bua bantu bafue." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Bualu bua nuenu nudi bantu ba tshijila kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; Yehowa wakanusungula munkatshi mua bantu bonso ba ha buloba bua nuenu nuikale bantu ba buhianyi buandi." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Kanudi bintu bidi kabiyi biakane. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ei idi nyama mudi mua kudia: ngombe ne mukoko ne mbushi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 mbashi ne kabuluku ne ntole ne mbushi wa ha mpata, ne lusumbi, ne ngulungu ne mukoko wa mu mikuna." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Bimuna bionso bidi ne mikono mihanduluke, bidi bihingishilula bintu mukana: nudi mua kudia nyama ei." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Kadi kanudi nyama mikuabo idi mihingishilula bintu mukana anyi idi ne mikono mihanduluke: kamelo, ne nsenji, ne kabundi ka ku mputu; bualu bua nyama ei idi mihingishilula bintu mukana, kadi kayena ne mikono mihanduluke, kayena miakane kunudi." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ngulube kena muakane kunudi bualu bua yeye udi ne mikono mihanduluke kadi kena uhingishilula bintu mukana; kanudi munyinyi wa nyama ei, kanulengi tshianza hamʼbidi ha bitalu biai." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ebi mbintu bionso bia mu mai binudi mua kudia: bintu bionso bidi ne mialala ne mabamba nudi mua kudia; 
Deuteronomy14:10 kanuena mua kudia bintu bidi kabiyi ne mialala ne mabamba; kabiena biakane kunudi. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Nudi mua kudia nyunyu yonso idi miakane. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kadi ei nyunyu mudi kanuyi mua kudia: nyunyu wa mukanku, ne nyunyu wa gypaete, ne nyunyu wa orfraie, ne nyunyu wa faucon," 
Deuteronomy14:13 ne nyunyu wa milan mufike ne wa milan mukunze," 
Deuteronomy14:14 ne mushindu wonso wa tshikololo," 
Deuteronomy14:15 ne nyunyu wa nfiondo, ne nyunyu wa chat-huant ne nyunyu wa mouette ne wa nkumbi-kumbi," 
Deuteronomy14:16 ne nyunyu wa tshihungulu ne nyunyu wa chouette, ne nyunyu wa ibis," 
Deuteronomy14:17 ne nyunyu wa pêlican, ne nyunyu mutoke utu wadia bintu bibole, ne nyunyu wa cormoran," 
Deuteronomy14:18 ne nyunyu wa cigogne, ne nyunyu wa hêron ne nyunyu wa huppe ne nyunyu ya mudima." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Bintu bionso bidi ne mahuahua ne bidi bidikoka hanshi kabiena biakane kunudi; kanubidi. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Nudi mua kudia nyunyu yonso idi miakane. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Kanudi tshintu tshidifuile: nudi mua kuha muenyi udi ku mbelu kuenu tshintu atshi, yeye atshidie; anyi nudi mua kutshihanyisha muntu wa bende; bualu bua nuenu nudi bantu ba tshijila kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu. Kanulambi muana wa mukoko mu mabele a mamu wandi." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Nufile kudi Yehowa tshintu tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionso binudi nuhuola ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Nudie tshintu tshia dikumi tshia manvua enu ne tshia nvinyo yenu mihia-mihia ne tshia manyi enu ne tshia banʼa bute ba ngombe yenu ne tshia ba mikoko yenu ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu muaba udiye Usungula bua kujadikamu dina diandi; nunku nenubale bualu bua kutshina Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, matuku onso." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Hakuvudishila Yehowa, Nzambi webe, disanka, bikala nshila mutambe kule, ne wewe kuena mua kutuala bintu biebe bualu bua muaba udi Yehowa neusungule bua kujadikamu dina diandi udi utamba kule," 
Deuteronomy14:25 hashishe neubihane ku argent: wangate argent mu tshianza tshiebe, uye biebe ku muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, musungule;" 
Deuteronomy14:26 neudisumbile bintu bidi mutshima webe musue, nansha ngombe nansha mikoko nansha mioyo nansha maluvu makole nansha bintu bionso biudi musue; neubidie ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi webe, neusanke, wewe ne ba mu nsubu webe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Kanuhu Muena Lewi udi ku mbelu kuenu muoyo; bualu bua yeye kena ne tshituha tshiandi ne buhianyi buandi kunudi. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Haleha bidimu bisatu nuenu nempatule tshintu tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionso biakakumbana tshidimu atshi, nenutshiteke ku mbelu kuenu;" 
Deuteronomy14:29 ne Bena Lewi, bualu bua bobo kabena ne tshituha anyi buhianyi kunudi, ne benyi ne bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila badi ku mbelu kuenu nebalue, nebadie, nebukute; nunku Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuvudishile disanka mu mudimu wonso unudi nuenza ne bianza bienu." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Hahita bidimu muanda mutekete nenulekelelangane bintu. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Nenulekelelangane bintu nunku: muena dibanza yonso nealekele bintu biakasombesheye muena mutumba nʼandi; yeye kena wenzesha muena mutumba nʼandi ne muanʼabo mulume bua kuhingishabo bintu ebi; bualu bua etshi ntshidimu tshiakabambila Yehowa bua kulekelelangana bintu. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Nudi mua kulombela bantu ba bende bintu ebi; kadi bintu bionso bidi muanʼenu mulume nʼabi, nuenu nenubilekele." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Kadi bantu bahele kabena bikala munkatshi muenu; (bualu bua Yehowa neanusankishe mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe bu buhianyi buenu;)" 
Deuteronomy15:5 binunvua dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kutumikila mikenji yonso inakunuambila lelu." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanusankishe bu muakanulayeye; nuenu nenusombeshe bisamba bia bungi bintu, kadi kanuena nusomba bintu kudibi; nuenu nenukokeshe bisamba bia bungi, kadi bisamba ebi kabiena binukokesha." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Bikalaku muntu muhele, umue wa bana benu, ku mbelu kua muntu yonso mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe, kanukoleshi mitshima yenu, kanubuikidi tshianza tshienu kudi muanʼenu udi muhele;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 kadi nubulule tshianza tshienu kudiye, numusombeshe bintu bidiye musue bua kushikisheye nʼabi malu andi." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Nudimuke, kanuedianganyi meji mabi mu mitshima yenu ne, Tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, tshidibo balekelelangana bintu tshikadi ha kulua, ne kanuenzedi muanʼenu muhele bibi, bua kubenga kumuha tshintu; bua kadidi kudi Yehowa bualu buebe, ne bua wewe kushadi ne bubi." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Numuke bintu bulelela; mitshima yenu kayinyingaladi, hanuamuhabi; bua bualu ebu Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuvudishile disanka mu mudimu wonso unudi nuenza ne bianza bienu." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Bualu bua bahele nebikale mu buloba buenu matuku onso, nunku nakanuambila ne, Nubulule tshianza tshienu kudi muanʼenu, kudi mukengi ne kudi muhele mu buloba buenu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Biakusumbishabo Muena Ebelu mulume anyi Muena Ebelu mukashi, yeye neakukuatshile mudimu bidimu bisambombo; kadi hafika tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete wewe neumulekele." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Hawamulekela, kumutumi ne bianza bituhu;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 umuhe bintu bia bungi munkatshi mua mikoko yebe, ne bia bintu biwakuhuola ne bia nvinyo; bu mudi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, mukusankishe, wewe neumuhe." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Uvuluke ne wewe wakadi muhika mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakakubikula: ka nunku ndi nkuelela mukenji eu lelu." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Bikaleye mukuambile ne, Tshiena musue kumuka kûdi, bualu bua yeye udi ukunanga ne ba mu nsubu webe, wakabela disanka kûdi," 
Deuteronomy15:17 hashishe wewe newangate nkulonda, neumutuhite ditshu ku tshibi ne yeye neikale muhika webe tshiendelele. Newenzele muhika mukashi muomumue." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Bualu ebu kabuena butamba bakole ku mesu kuebe, hawamulekela, bualu bua yeye wakakuenzela mudimu bidimu bisambombo udi utamba muena mudimu wa difutu misangu ibidi; hashishe Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanusankishe mu malu onso anudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Nenujidile Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, banʼa bute balume ba ngombe ne ba mikoko; kanuenzeshi banʼa bute ba ngombe mudimu, kanukoshi banʼa bute ba mikoko miosa." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Wewe ne ba mu nsubu webe nenubadie ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ku tshidimu ku tshidimu mu muaba udi Yehowa musungule." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Bikala umue wabo kayi muakane, udi mulema anyi udi mufofo anyi udi muoneka muaba mukuabo, kanumushihedi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Nudi mua kumudia ku mbelu kuenu: muntu udi muakane anyi udi kayi muakane udi mua kumudia bu mudiye udia kabuluku anyi mbashi. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kadi kanudi mashi andi; nuahongolole hanshi ha buloba bu mai. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Nuvuluke ngondo wa Abiba bua kutendelela kuhita kua Yehowa wenu; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu butuku mu ngondo wa Abiba." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Nenushihele Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mulambu wa kuhita kua Yehowa, wa mikoko ne wa ngombe, mu muaba udi Yehowa Usungula bua kujadikamu dina diandi." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Kanudi mampa adi ne luevene ne mulambu eu; nenudie nʼau mampa adi kâyi ne luevene matuku muanda mutekete, mbia kudia bia tshivulukidi tshia dikenga; bualu bua nuakahatuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu lubilu; nunku numuke dituku dinuakahatuka mu buloba bua Ejipitu matuku onso a muoyo wenu." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Kabatangidi lue-vene mu miaba yenu yonso tô matuku muanda mutekete; kanushiyi munyinyi unuakashiha wa milambu dilolo dia dituku dia ku mpala butuku buonso tô ne ku dinda. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Kanushihi milambu ya kuhita kua Yehowa munda mua misoko idi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe;" 
Deuteronomy16:6 anu mu muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Usungula bua kujadikamu dina diandi, nenushihe milambu ya kuhita kua Yehowa dilolo habuela diba, ha diba mene dinuakahatuka mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nenuanyike milambu ha kahia, nenuyidie mu muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Usungula; nenualukile dinda, nuhingane mu ntenta yenu." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Nenudie mampa adi kâyi ne luevene matuku asambombo; ne dituku dia muanda mutekete nedikale dia tshijila kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; kanuenji mudimu nansha." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Nenubale mbingu muanda mutekete: ku tshikondo tshinudi nuhuole bintu nenubange kubala mbingu ei muanda mutekete. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Nenudie bidia bia disanka dia mbingu ei muanda mutekete ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne diha didi mitshima yenu misue kufila mu bianza bienu, bu muakanuvudishila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, disanka." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Nenusanke ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne wewe ne muana webe mulume ne muana webe mukashi ne muntu webe mulume ne muntu webe mukashi ne Muena Lewi udi mu musoko webe ne muenyi ne bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila badi munkatshi muenu, mu muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Usungula bua kujadikamu dina diandi." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Numuke ne nuenu nuakadi bahika mu Ejipitu: nutumikile mikenji ei yonso. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Nenudie bidia bia disanka dia bitandatanda tô matuku muanda mutekete, hanuashikisha kusangisha bintu ku tshishihuidi ne ku tshikaminu:" 
Deuteronomy16:14 nenuikale ne disanka hanuadia bidia ebi, ne muana webe mulume ne muana webe mukashi ne muntu webe mulume ne muntu webe mukashi ne Muena Lewi ne muenyi ne bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila badi mu misoko yenu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Nenudie bidia ebi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tô matuku muanda mutekete, mu muaba udi Yehowa Usungula; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuvudishile disanka ne bintu bienu bionso biakakumbana, ne mudimu wonso unuakenza ne bianza bienu: nenuikale ne disanka dingi." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Balume bonso nebamueneke ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, misangu isatu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu mu muaba udiye Usungula: ku disanka dia mampa adi kâyi ne luevene, ne ku disanka dia mbingu ai muanda mutekete, ne ku disanka dia bitandatanda; kabamueneki ku mesu kua Yehowa ne bianza bituhu:" 
Deuteronomy16:17 kadi muntu yonso neafile bintu bidiye nʼabi bu muakanuvudishila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, disanka." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Nenudisunguluile balumbuluishi ne bafundi mu misoko yonso, idi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe, ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba; bobo nebalumbuluishe bantu bilumbu biabo ne dilumbuluisha didi diakane." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Kanulumbuluishi bantu ne dilumbuluisha didi kadiyi diakane; kanutangidi mpala ya bantu; kanuitabushi bintu bia kunubueshilabo nʼabi; bualu bua bintu bia kunubueshilabo nʼabi bidi bifofomesha mesu a muena lungenyi, bidi binyanga dilumbuluisha didi diakane." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Nulonde anu dilumbuluisha didi diakane, nunku nenuikale ne muoyo, nenuhiane buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Kanukunyi mutshi wa Ashela hehi ne tshishihelu tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tshinudi badiashile." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Kanujadiki dibue dia kutendelela didi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ukina." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Kanushihedi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ngombe anyi mukoko bidi kabiyi biakane, anyi tshintu tshikuabo tshidi tshibi; bualu ebu budi bundu ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Binuasangana muntu mu misoko idi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, nansha mulume nansha mukashi udi wenza bualu bubi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi ushiha tshihungidi tshia Yehowa," 
Deuteronomy17:3 wakaya bua kukuatshila nzambi mikuabo mudimu, ne wakayitendelela, nansha diba nansha ngondo, nansha bintu bikuabo bia mu diulu bindi muhidie;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 bikalabo banuambile dî edi anyi binuikala bunvue lumu lua bualu ebu ku matshu, nenukebakebe tô ne bikala bualu ebu bua bundu buenjibue bulelela mu Isalele," 
Deuteronomy17:5 hashishe nenulue ne muntu wakenza bualu bubi ebu ku bibi bia musoko, nansha mulume nansha mukashi, nenubakume ne mabue, nenubashihe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Numushihe anu ku mei a bamonyi babidi anyi basatu; kanumushihi anu ku dî dia mumonyi umue. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Bamonyi ba bualu nebolole bianza kudiye diambedi bua kumushiha, ne ku nyima bantu bonso nebolole bianza biabo. Nunku nenumushe malu mabi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Bikala tshilumbu tshinuhite bukole, nansha hankatshi ha bashihianganyi, nansha hankatshi ha muntu ne muntu badi badiakuilangana, nansha hankatshi ha muntu ne muntu badi batutangana, mmalu adibo batandangana nʼau mu misoko yenu; hashishe nenubike, nenuye ku muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, usungula;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 nenulue kudi bakuidi, Bena Lewi, ne kudi mulumbuluishi munene wa mu matuku au; nenubakonke, ne bobo nebanukosele tshilumbu." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Nenuenze bu mudibo bamba ha muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, usungula; nuenu nenutumikile mei onso adibo banuyisha:" 
Deuteronomy17:11 nenuenze bu mudi mikenji idibo banuyisha, ne bu dilumbulula didibo banuambila; kanusesuki ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi mu dî didibo banuambila." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Muntu udi ne tshitshu, udi uhidia kunvua dî dia muakuidi udi muimane ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kumukuatshia mudimu, anyi dî dia mulumbuluishi, nebashihe muntu eu: nunku nenumushe malu mabi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Bantu bonso nebunvue mei abo, nebatshine, kabena benza malu a tshitshu kabidi." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Hanuabuela mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, hanuabuhiana, bakashikamamu, hanuamba ne, Tudisunguile mukelenge bua kuteka ku mutu kuetu bu bisamba bikuabo bidi bituela munkatshi;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 nenutekele mukelenge ku mutu kuenu anu yeye udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Usungula; nutekele anu wa munkatshi mua bana benu bu mukelenge wenu; kanuteki muenyi udi kayi muanʼenu ku mutu kuenu." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kadi yeye kena ne bualu bua kudikumbashila tubalu tua bungi, anyi bua kuhingisha bantu mu Ejipitu bua kuheteye tubalu tua bungi; bualu bua Yehowa wakamana kunuambila ne, Kanuhinganyi mu nshila au kabidi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Yeye kena ne bualu bua kudiangatshila bakashi ba bungi bua kukudimuneye mutshima wandi; yeye kena ne bualu bua kudikumbashila biamu bia argent ne bia or. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Hashikameye ha nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge, yeye neadifundile mukanda wa mikenji idi mifunda mu mukanda au udi mu bianza bia bakuidi ba mu Bena Lewi;" 
Deuteronomy17:19 yeye neashale ne mukanda eu, neaubale matuku andi onso; nunku yeye neamanye mua kutshina Yehowa, Nzambi wandi, ne mua kutumikila mei onso ne mikenji yonso bidi bifundamu, bua kubienza;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 nunku mutshima wandi kaudibandishi ku mutu kua bana babo, nunku yeye kasesuki mu nshila wa mikenji nansha ku tshianza tshia balume nansha ku tshianza tshia bakashi; nunku nebavudishe matuku a bukelenge buandi, ne a bana bandi mu Isalele." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Bakuidi ba mu Bena Lewi, ne tshisamba tshionso tshia Lewi kabena ne buhianyi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele; bobo nebadie munyinyi wa milambu ya Yehowa idibo bosha ha kahia bu buhianyi bua Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Bobo kabena ne buhianyi munkatshi mua bana babo; Yehowa udi buhianyi buabo, bu muakabambileye." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Bintu ebi bidi tshituha tshia bakuidi kudi bantu badi bafila milambu ya kuosha, nansha ngombe nansha mukoko: bobo nebahe bakuidi diboko ne matama abidi ne tshiadi." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Nenubahe kabidi bintu binudi nuhuola diambedi, ne tshia nvinyo muhia-muhia, ne tshia manyi enu, ne miosa ya mikoko." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Bualu bua Yehowa wakasungula Bena Lewi munkatshi mua bisamba bienu bionso, bua kunuenzela mudimu mu dina dia Yehowa, ne yeye ne bana bandi balume tshiendelele." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Biumuka Muena Lewi ku umue wa misoko ya mu Isalele, muakadiye ushikama, bua kubuela ne mutshima wandi wonso mu muaba udi Yehowa Usungula," 
Deuteronomy18:7 hashishe yeye neanuenzele mudimu mu dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wandi; bu mudi bana babo, Bena Lewi, batu bimana ku mesu kua Yehowa, benza." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Bobo nebadie, muntu tshituha tshiandi muntu tshituha tshiandi ku mutu kua buhianyi bua batatuʼabo buakahanabo." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Hanuabuela mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, kanuyidi bua kulonda ku nyima kua malu a bundu a bisamba abi." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Muntu kikadi munkatshi muenu udi utambisha muanʼandi mulume anyi muanʼandi mukashi mu kahia, nansha mutempi wa mbuku, nansha muena dijimbu nansha muena bilengulengu, nansha muena buloshi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 nansha musesuishi wa bantu ne miloû yandi, nansha mutendeledi wa bakishi, nansha muena muhongo, nansha muena lubuku lua muzangu." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Muntu yonso utu wenza malu au udi bu tshintu tshibi ku mesu kua Yehowa; bualu bua malu au mabi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi Wihata bantu ku mesu kuenu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Nuenu nuikale balamate kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Bualu bua bisamba ebi binudi nuihata nunku bakadi bunvue mei a bena dijimbu ne a batempi ba mbuku; kadi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, kena witabusha bua nuenu nuenze nunku." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanubishile muprofete munkatshi mua bana benu bu meme, nenunvue dî diandi:" 
Deuteronomy18:16 bu munuakalomba Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu Holeba mu dituku dituakasambakena nʼenu ne, Katunvu dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, kabidi, katutangidi kahia aka kanene kabidi, bua katufu." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Yehowa wakangambila ne, Bobo bakamba dî dimpe." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Meme nembabishile muprofete munkatshi mua bana babo bu wewe; meme nenteke mei anyi onso mukana muandi, ne yeye neabambile mei onso anamuambila." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Muntu yonso udi uhidia kunvua mei anyi adiye wamba mu dina dianyi, meme nenkose tshilumbu tshiandi." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Muprofete udi udiambila mei mu dina dianyi ne dikamakama andi tshiyi mumuambile anyi udi wamba mei mu dina dia nzambi mukuabo, muprofete au neafue biandi." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Binuamba mu mitshima yenu ne, Nemmanye dî didi Yehowa kayi mutuambile munyi?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Hamba Muprofete malu mu dina dia Yehowa ne malu au kaena menjibue, au mmalu adi Yehowa kayi mumuambile; muprofete au wakatuambila, kanumutshinyi." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Hashiha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bisamba abi bia mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, hanuabihata, hanuaslukama mu misoko yabo ne mu nsubu yabo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 nenuditahuluile misoko isatu mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Nenulongolole nshila, nenutahulule mikalu ya buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe bu buhianyi bituha bisatu, bua mushihianganyi yonso anyemenemu." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Aba mbashihianganyi badi mua kunyemenamu bua kuikala ne muoyo: muntu yonso udi ushiha mukuabo ku mpukahuka, kakadi nʼandi tshiji diambedi;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 bu muntu wakuya ne mukuabo muitu bua kutaha nkunyi, ne hakuambeye kutaha mutshi ne kasui, ne kasui kakukuka, kakutaha muntu mukuabo, kakumushiha; muntu eu neanyemene ku umue wa misoko ei, neikale ne muoyo." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Musombuedi kalondi mushihianganyi eu hadiye ne tshiji tshikole, kamuhetshi, bualu bua nshila udi utamba bule, kamushihi diambedi kabayi banze kumuhisha, bualu bua yeye kakadi nʼandi tshiji diambedi." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Bua bualu ebu nakanuambila ne, Nuditahuluile misoko isatu." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Bikala Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, muleheshe matshika enu, bu muakudi tshiheye kudi bankambua benu, bianuheye buloba buonso buakalayeye bankambua benu;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 binuatumikila mukenji eu, undi munuelele lelu, binuawenza, bua kusua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kuenda mu nshila yandi; hashishe nenusungule misoko mikuabo isatu ha mutu ha misoko ei isatu." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Nunku kabamatshishi mashi a muntu udi kayi ne tshilumbu ha buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nnuha bua nuenu nubuhiane; mashi au kaikadi hamʼbidi henu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Kadi bikala muntu ne muena mutumba nʼandi lukuna, umualamina, ubika, umutaha tô ne hafileye, ne bianyemeye ku umue wa misoko ei;" 
Deuteronomy19:12 hashishe bakulu ba mu musoko wandi nebatuale bantu, nebamukuatemu, nebamufile mu bianza bia musombuedi bua kufueye." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Nuenu kanuikadi ne luse kudi muntu eu, kadi nenumushe mashi a muntu udi kayi ne tshilumbu munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bua nuenu nuikale ne diakalengele." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Kanuhanduludi mikalu ya bantu bakuabo yakahandabo kudi bakaku benu diambedi, mu buhianyi buenu mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Kanuitabushi dî dia mumonyi umue udi utumpila mukuabo tshianana bua dihambuka diandi anyi bua bubi buakenzeye; malu neajalame anu ku mei a bamonyi babidi anyi basatu. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Biabika muena mashimi bua kutumpila mukuabo bua malu mabi akadiye wenza," 
Deuteronomy19:17 nunku bubidi buabo badi batandangana, nebimane ku mesu kua Yehowa ne ku mesu kua bakuidi ne balumbuluishi ba mu matuku au." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Balumbuluishi nebalondolole tshilumbu tô; ne bikala mumonyi eu muena mashimi mutumpile mukuabo tshianana," 
Deuteronomy19:19 hashishe bamuenzele yeye bu muakasueye kuenzela muanʼabo: nunku nenumushe malu mabi munkatshi muenu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Bantu bakuabo ne-bunvue, nebatshine, kabena benza malu au mabi munkatshi muenu kabidi." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Kanuikadi ne luse kudi batumpidianganyi aba: nebafile muoyo ku muoyo, disu ku disu, dinu ku dinu, tshianza ku tshianza, dikasa ku dikasa." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Hanuaya kuluangana nvita ne bantu badi nʼenu lukuna, ne hamutangila tubalu ne makalu ne bantu badi banuhita bungi, kanubatshinyi bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, udi nʼenu." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Hanuahanga kuluangana, muakuidi neasemene ha buihi ne bantu," 
Deuteronomy20:3 neabambile ne, Bena Isalele, unvuai, nuakusemena hehi ne bantu badi nʼenu lukuna bua kuluangana nʼabo lelu: kanuikadi ne mitshima mitekete, kanuikadi ne buowa, kanuzakadi, kanubatshinyi;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi unuluila, bua kuluangana ne badi nʼenu lukuna ne bua kunusungila." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Ba ha mutu habo nebambile bantu ne, Nganyi wakuasa nsubu muhia-muhia, ne kena muanze kunjidila? Bimpe yeye ahingane ku nsubu kuandi; anyi bialueye mu nvita, muntu mukuabo neajidile nsubu wandi." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Nganyi wakukuna mitshi ya tumuma tukese kayi muanze kudia tumuma atu? Bimpe yeye ahingane ku nsubu kuandi; anyi biafileye mu nvita, muntu mukuabo neadie tumuma tuandi." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Nganyi wakubangila mukashi kayi muanze kumubaka? Bimpe yeye ahingane ku nsubu kuandi; anyi biafileye mu nvita, muntu mukuabo neabake mukashi au." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Ba ha mutu habo nebambile bantu mei makuabo kabidi ne, Nganyi udi ne ditshina ne mutshima mutekete? Bimpe yeye ahingane ku nsubu kuandi, anyi yeye neatekeshe mitshima ya bantu bakuabo." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Nunku hambila ba ha mutu habo bantu mei au, nebasungile tuhita tua kutoka ku mutu kua bantu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Hanuasemena hehi ne musoko bua kuluangana nʼabo, diambedi nenubaleshe ditalala;" 
Deuteronomy20:11 ne bikalabo banukudimune mei makane, bianunzuluilabo bibi, hashishe bantu bonso badimu nebanulambule milambu, nebanukuatshile mudimu." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kadi biahidiabo ditalala, ne bialuanganabo nʼenu, hashishe nenubatshintshimike;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 ne hafila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bantu aba mu bianza bienu, nenushihe balume bonso ne miele ya nvita;" 
Deuteronomy20:14 kadi bakashi ne bana bakese ne bimuna ne bintu bionso bia mu musoko, nenudiangatshile ebi; nuenu nenudie bintu bionso bia badi nʼenu lukuna, bidi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Nenuenzele misoko yonso idi kule, idi kayiyi misoko ya bisamba ebi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kadi misoko ya bantu aba idi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuhayi bua nuenu kuyihiana, kanusungidi tshintu tshimue tshidi tshieyela muhuya;" 
Deuteronomy20:17 kadi nenubishihe bionso: ne Bena Hiti ne Bena Amole ne Bena Kanâna ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse, bu muakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 bua bobo kabanuyishi mua kulonda malu mabi abo, adibo benzela nzambi yabo; nunku nuenu nenuenzele Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bibi." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Hanuatshintshimika musoko musangu mule, hanualuangana nʼabo bua kûnyenga, kanushihi mitshi ya tumuma ne tusui; nudi mua kudia tumuma atu, kanushihi mitshi, bualu bua mitshi ei idi bu bantu banudi uluangana nʼabo, anyi?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Kadi mitshi mudi bamanye ne kayena ne tumuma, nudi mua kuyikosa; nuase nʼai bibumba bia nvita ku butshika bua musoko wa badi banuluisha to ne hanuabahita bukole."
