Deuteronomy21:1 Biasanganabo muntu mufue mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu nubuhiane, kabayi bamanye muntu wakamushiha;" 
Deuteronomy21:2 hashishe bakulu ne balumbuluishi nebaluhuke, nebahime mutantshi kubangila ku muaba udi tshitalu tô ne ku misoko idi ha buihi ne muntu mufue;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 bakulu ba mu musoko udi utamba ha buihi ne muntu mufue nebangate kana ka ngombe kadi kakayi kanze kuenza mudimu ne tshikokedi; 
Deuteronomy21:4 bakulu ba mu musoko nebahueke ne kana ka ngombe mu tshibanda tshidi ne mai adi ahueka, tshidibo kabayi banze kudimamu ne kukunamu bintu, nebatshibule nshingu wa kana ka ngombe mu tshibanda atshi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Bakuidi, bana balume ba Lewi, bakasungulabo kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kumuenzelabo mudimu ne bua kuvudishila bantu disanka mu dina dia Yehowa, nebalue ha buihi: bua mei abo malu onso ne bilumbu bionso bia kukumangana nebijalame." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Bakulu bonso ba mu musoko eu udi utamba ha buihi ne muntu mufue, nebuvuwe bianza biabo ha mutu ha kana ka ngombe kadi ne nshingu waku mutshibula mu tshibanda;" 
Deuteronomy21:7 bobo nebitabe ne, Bianza bietu kabiakamatshisha mashi au, mesu etu kaena mâmone." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Yehowa, ubuikile bubi bua bantu bebe Bena Isalele, bawakahikula, kuitabushi bua mashi a muntu udi kayi ne tshilumbu ashale munkatshi mua bantu bebe Bena Isalele. Ne mashi au neabuikidibue." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Nunku nenumushe mashi adi kâyi ne tshilumbu munkatshi muenu hanuenza malu adi mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa. 
Deuteronomy21:10 Binuaya kuluangana nvita ne bantu badi nʼenu lukuna ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi ubafila mu bianza bienu, nuenu nudi nuya nʼabo mu buluka," 
Deuteronomy21:11 ne umue wenu udi utangila mukashi udi ne mpala muimpe munkatshi muabo, ne yeye udi mumusue, udi musue kumubaka bu mukashi wandi;" 
Deuteronomy21:12 hashishe yeye nealue nʼandi ku nsubu kuandi; nebamubeye nsuki ya ku mutu, nebamukose nzadi;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 yeye neavule bilulu biandi bia buluka, neashale mu nsubu wa muntu eu: neadile tatu wandi ne mamu wandi tô ngondo mujima; ne ku nyima muntu eu neaye kudiye bu mulume wandi, ne yeye neikale mukashi wandi." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Bikaleye kayi ne disanka bualu bua mukashi eu, hashishe yeye neamutume kudiye musue kuya; kadi kamuhanyi ku biuma, kamuenji bu muhika, bualu bua yeye wakamukehesha." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Bikala mulume ne bakashi babidi, udi musue umue, udi ukina mukuabo, ne bubidi buabo ne mukashi wakadiye musue ne mukuabo wakadiye ukina, hakamulelela bana; ne bikala mukashi wakadiye ukina mumulelele muanʼa bute wandi;" 
Deuteronomy21:16 hashishe mu dituku didiye uhianyisha bana bandi balume bintu bidiye nʼabi, yeye kena mua kuteka muana wa mukashi wakadiye musue ku mpala kua muanʼa bute wandi wa mukashi wakadiye ukina." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Kadi yeye neitabushe muanʼa bute wandi wa mukashi udiye ukina, neamuhe bituha bibidi bia bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi; bualu bua yeye udi wa tshibangidilu tshia bukole buandi; bintu bia buanʼa bute mbiandi." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Bikala muntu ne muana mulume udi ne tshitshu ne buhidia, katu watumikila dî dia tatu wandi anyi dia mamu wandi, ne yeye katu wabahvuila biamukengeshaho," 
Deuteronomy21:19 hashishe tatu wandi ne mamu wandi nebamukuate, nebaluhuke nʼandi kudi bakulu ba mu musoko wabo ne ku tshibi tshia musoko;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 nebambile bakulu ba mu musoko wabo ne, Muana wetu eu udi ne tshitshu ne buhidia, kena utumikila mei etu; udi muena lumpukusu ne mukuatshiki wa maluvu." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Balume bonso ba mu musoko wabo nebamukume ne mabue tô ne hafueye: nunku nenumushe malu mabi munkatshi muenu; ne Bena Isalele nebunvue, nebatshine." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Bikala muntu muenze bualu bubi bua lufu, ne badi bamushiha, nebamuowe ku mutshi;" 
Deuteronomy21:23 kabashiyi tshitalu tshiandi ku mutshi butuku bujima, bamujike anu dituku adi mene; muntu yonso muowa ku mutshi udi muedibue mulau kudi Nzambi; kanunyangi buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Binuatangila nansha ngombe nansha mukoko bia mukuenu bihambuka, kusokoki bualu ebu kudiye, kadi ubihingashe kudi mukuenu." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Bikala mukuenu kayi ha buihi nʼenu, anyi biwikala kuyi mumumanye, hashishe nuye nʼabi ku nsubu kuenu, nushale nʼabi tô ne halua mukuenu bua kubikeba, nuenu nubihingashe kudiye." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Nenuenzele nyama wandi wa mpunda nunku kabidi, ne bilulu biandi; nenuenzele bintu bionso bia mukuenu biakajimisheye ne wewe wakabiangula, kanubisokoki." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Binuatangila nansha mpunda nansha ngombe bia mukuenu biakahona hanshi mu nshila, kanubisokoki, kadi numukuatshishe bua kubibisha kabidi." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Mukashi kaluatshi bilulu bia mulume, ne mulume kaluatshi bilulu bia bakashi: muntu yonso udi wenza malu au nunku udi bu tshintu tshibi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Binuasangana disua dia nyunyu mu nshila ku mutshi anyi ha buloba, ne bana ba nyunyu anyi makela bidimu, ne mukashi wa nyunyu udi ushikama ha bana anyi ha makela, kanuangatshi mukashi wa nyunyu ne bana bandi kabidi;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 nulekele mukashi wa nyunyu tshianana, kadi nudi mua kudiangatshila bana ba nyunyu; nunku malu enu neikale mimpe, nenuvudishe matuku enu." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Hanuasa nsubu muhia-muhia, nenuenze kabidi lumbu tukese ku mutu kua nsubu, nunku muntu kahonyi hanshi, ne mashi andi kaikadi ku nsubu yenu." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Kanukunyi ntete ya mishindu ibidi mishilangane mu budimi bua tumuma tukese, anyi nebajidile bintu bionso biakadiundamu ne ntete inuakukuna ne tumuma tukese tudi mitshi ei ikuama." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Kanusuiki ngombe ne mpunda ku mutshi wa tshikokedi umue. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Kanuluatshi tshilulu tshiakakumabo ne miosa ya mikoko misambakasha ne buanda bua lin. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Nudienzele bisele ku mpenga inai ya bilulu bienu binudi baluata. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Biabaka mulume mukashi, adi ulala nʼandi ne udi umukina," 
Deuteronomy22:14 udi wambila bakuabo mei a bundu, udi wona lumu luandi, udi wamba ne, Nakabaka mukashi eu ne hanakasangila nʼandi bulalu, tshiakasangana bimanyinu bu mukashi utshidi kamama;" 
Deuteronomy22:15 hashishe tatu wa mushikankunde eu ne mamu wandi nebaluhuke ne bimanyinu biandi bu bia mukashi utshidi kamama kudi bakulu ba mu musoko ne ku tshilumbuluidi tshia ku tshibi tshia musoko. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Tatu wa mushikankunde neambile bakulu ne, Nakafila muanʼanyi kudi mulume eu bu mukashi wandi, ne yeye udi umukina;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 yeye wakambila bakuabo mei a bundu ne, Tshiakasangana bimanyinu bu bia mukashi utshidi kamama kudi muana webe; kadi ebi mbimanyinu biandi bu bia mukashi utshidi kamama. Nebavungulule tshilulu ku mesu kua bakulu ba mu musoko." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Bakulu ba mu musoko au nebakuate muntu au, nebamukengeshe;" 
Deuteronomy22:19 ne bobo nemmuambile ne, Ufute lukama lua nshekele ya argent ne yeye neayifile kudi tatu wa mushikankunde eu, bualu bua yeye wakuona lumu lua mukashi utshidi kamama mu Isalele: yeye neikale mukashi wandi, yeye kena mua kumuhidia tô matuku andi onso." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kadi bikala bualu ebu bulelela, kabakamusangana ne bimanyinu bu bia mukashi utshidi kamama," 
Deuteronomy22:21 hashishe nebalue ne mushikankunde eu ku tshibi tshia nsubu wa tatu wandi, ne balume ba mu musoko nebamukume ne mabue tô ne hafileye, bualu bua yeye wakuenza bualu bua tshikama mu Isalele, wakuenza bu mukashi wa masandi mu nsubu wa tatu wandi: nunku nenûmushe malu mabi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Biasanganabo mulume mulale ne mukashi wa muntu mukuabo, nebashihe bubidi buabo, ne mulume wakadi ulala ne mukashi eu ne mukashi kabidi: nunku nenumushe malu mabi munkatshi mua Isalele." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Bikalaku mushikankunde utshidi kamama, udi mubangila kudi mulume, ne muntu mukuabo udi usangakena nʼandi mu musoko, udi ulala nʼandi;" 
Deuteronomy22:24 hashishe nebalue nʼabo bubidi buabo ku tshilumbuluidi tshia ku tshibi tshia musoko au, nenubakume ne mabue tô ne hafuabo; mushikankunde, bualu bua yeye kakadila hakadiye mu musoko, ne mulume, bualu bua yeye wakanyanga mukashi wa muena mutumba nʼandi: nunku nenumushe malu mabi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kadi bikala mulume usangakena ne mushikankunde udi mubangila kudi mulume mukuabo mu budimi, udi umuakuata ku bukole, udi ulala nʼandi, anu mulume wakalala nʼandi neafue biandi;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 kadi kanuenji mushikankunde bualu; yeye kena muenze bualu bubi budibo mua kumushihela; bualu ebu budi bu muntu udi uhika ku mpala kua muena mutumba nʼandi udi umushiha; 
Deuteronomy22:27 bualu bua yeye wakasangakena nʼandi mu budimi; ne mushikankunde mubangila kudi mukuabo wakadila, ne kakuakadi muntu bua kumusungila." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Biasangakena mulume ne mushikankunde utshidi kamama, kayi mubangila kudi mukuabo, biamukuateye ku bukole bua kulala nʼandi, ne bantu badi babasangana;" 
Deuteronomy22:29 hashishe mulume wakalala nʼandi, neafute tatu wa mushikankunde nshekele ya argent makumi atanu, ne yeye neikale mukashi wandi, bualu bua yeye wakamunyanga, kena mua kumuhidia matuku andi onso." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Muntu kabaki mukashi wa tatu wandi: muntu kavudi tshilulu tshia tatu wandi. 
Deuteronomy23:1 Muntu udi mutaha mputa ku mihesa yandi anyi udi ne mihesa mikosoke kabuedi mu disangisha dia bantu ba Yehowa. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Muana wa masandi kabuedi mu disangisha dia bantu ba Yehowa; ne tunkanuniuna tuandi kaubuedi mu disangisha dia bantu ba Yehowa tô ne hahita bikondo dikumi. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Muena Amona anyi Muena Moaba kababuedi mu disangisha dia bantu ba Yehowa; ne tunkanunuma tuabo kaubuedi mu disangisha dia bantu ba Yehowa tô ne hahita bikondo dikumi tshiendelele; 
Deuteronomy23:4 bualu bua bobo kabakanuha bia kudia ne mai a kunua mu nshila hanuakaluhuka mu Ejipitu; ne bualu bua bobo bakahita Belâma, muana mulume wa Beô ku Petô wa mu Mesopotamia, bua kunueleye mulau." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Kadi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, kakunyua mei a Belâma; kadi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakakudimuna mulau ulua disanka dienu, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanusua." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Kanukebi mua kubalesha ditalala ne malu makane tô matuku enu onso. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Kanuikadi ne Muena Edome lukuna, bualu bua yeye udi muanʼenu; kanuikadi ne Muena Ejipitu lukuna, bualu bua nuenu nuakadi benyi mu buloba buandi." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Bana hadibo balela mu tshikondo tshisatu badi mua kubuela mu disangisha dia Yehowa. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Hanuaya kuluangana ne badi nʼenu lukuna, hashishe nudikande mu malu mabi onso." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Bikala muntu munkatshi muenu udi kayi muakane bua malu akamukuata butuku, hashishe yeye neaye ku mpenge kua tshitudilu, kabuedi mu tshitudilu;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 kadi hafika dilolo, yeye neowe mai, ne habuela diba, yeye neahingane mu tshitudilu." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Nunku nudisunguile muaba ku mpenge kua tshitudilu bua nuenu nuye ha bule bua kuhuya munda. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Muntu yonso aditekele kakasu mu bintu biandi bia nvita, ne hayeye mu tshisuku, neaumbule dina, neahingashe buloba ha mutu ha bintu biakahuyeye;" 
Deuteronomy23:14 bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi wendakana munkatshi mua tshitudilu bua kunusungila, ne bua kufila badi nʼenu lukuna mu bianza bienu; nunku tshitudilu netshikale tshia tshijila. Yehowa katangidi tshintu tshibi munkatshi muenu, kasesuki kunudi." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Kanuhingashi muhika wakunyemena kunudi munyeme mu bianza bia mukelenge wandi; 
Deuteronomy23:16 yeye ashikame nʼenu mu muaba udiye usungula mu umue wa misoko yenu udi utamba kumusankisha; kanumuenzedi bibi. 
Deuteronomy23:17 Mukashi wa masandi kikadi munkatshi mua bana bakashi ba mu Isalele, ne muena Sodoma kikadi munkatshi mua bana balume ba mu Isalele." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Kanulu ne difutu dia mukashi wa masandi anji dia muntu udi bu mbua, mu nsubu wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kushikisha diditshiha dienu; bualu bua bubidi buabo badi bu tshintu tshibi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Kanulombi mukuenu bintu bia kasombela ka bintu biwakamusombesha: kasombela ka argent ne ka bia kudia ne ka bintu bionso biwakamusombesha. 
Deuteronomy23:20 Nudi mua kuamba muntu wa bende kasombela; kadi kanulombi mukuenu kasombela; bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, anuvudishile disanka mu malu onso anudi nuenza ne bianza, mu buloba bunudi nuya bua kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Hanuaditshiha ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, kanuhangi kushikisha mitshihu yenu; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nealombe bua nuyishikishe; ne bualu ebu nebuikale bubi kunudi binuahanga kuyisbikisha." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kadi binuikala kanuyi baditshiha, bualu ebu kabuena bubi kunudi." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Mei onso akaluhuka mukana muena nuenze bu munuakuditshiha kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bintu bidi mitshima yenu misue kufila, binuakumulaya mukana muenu." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Hanuabuela mu budimi bua tumuma bua mukuenu, nudi mua kudia tumuma kukuta tente, kadi kanuangatshi tumuma mu tshisaka." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Hanuabuela mu budimi bua manvua bua mukuenu, nudi mua kutula manvua mu tshianza, kadi kanutahi manvua a mukuenu ne muele." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Hangata mulume mukashi bua kumubaka, ne bikala mukashi kayi muimpe ku mesu kuandi bualu bua yeye wakamusangana ne malu adi kayi mimpe, hashishe yeye neamufundile mukanda wa kushiha dibaka, neamuheu mu bianza, neamûmushe mu nsubu wandi." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Kumukeye mu nsubu wandi, yeye udi mua kuikala mukashi wa munga muntu." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Bikala mulume eu wa ku nyima mumukine, mumufundile mukanda wa kushiha dibaka kabidi, mumuheu mu bianza biandi, mumûmushe mu nsubu wanyi, anyi biafua mulume eu wa ku nyima wakamuangata bu mukashi wandi," 
Deuteronomy24:4 mulume wa diambedi, wakamûmusha mu nsubu wandi, kena mua kumuangata bu mukashi wandi kabidi, bualu bua mukashi wakumana kunyangisha; bualu ebu budi bubi ku mesu kua Yehowa. Nunku kanunyangi buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Habaka mulume mukashi muhia-muhia, kayi mu bisumbu bia bena nvita, kabamutekedi bujitu bukuabo; ashale mu nsubu wandi tô tshidimu tshijima, bua kusambeye mukashi wakuangateye." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Muntu kangatshi mabue adibo bahela nʼau manvua, anyi dibue dia mpelu bu tshieya; bualu bua budi bu muntu udi ufila muoyo wandi bu tshieya." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Biasanganabo muntu udi wiba muanʼabo umue wa Bena Isalele, udi umuenza bu muhika, anyi udi umuhana, hashishe nebashihe muibi: nunku nenûmusbe malu mabi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Nudimuke bualu bua disama dia nsudi, bua nuenu kuenza malu onso bimpe adi bakuidi ba mu Bena Lewi banuyisha: bu munakabambila bobo, nuenu nuenze nunku." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Nuvuluke bu muakenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, Miyama mu nshila hanuakalubuka mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Hanuasombesha mukuenu tshintu, kanuyi mu nsubu wandi bua kudiangatshila tshieya tshiandi." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Nuenu mumane ku mbelu ne muntu uwakusombesha tshintu nealuhuke kûdi ne tshieya. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Bikala muntu muhele, kanuladi tulu ne tshieya tshiandi;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 nuhingashe tshieya tshiandi habuela diba, bua yeye alale tulu ne tshilulu tshiandi, anuvudishile disanka; bualu ebu nebuikale buakane kunudi, ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Kanukengeshi muntu wakabuela mu mudimu wa difutu, udi muhele ne udi kayi ne bintu, nansha umue wa bana benu nansha muenyi udi ushikama mu buloba buenu ne mu misoko yenu;" 
Deuteronomy24:15 nubafute difutu diabo buatshia-buatshia diambedi diba kadiyi dianze kubuela; bualu bua bobo badi bahele ne badi bakuma mitshima yabo ku difutu; bobo kabadidi kudi Yehowa bualu buenu, ne bualu ebu kabuikadi bubi kunudi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Batatu kabafuidi bana babo, ne bana kabafuidi batatuʼabo: muntu yonso adifuile bua malu mabi andi." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Kanubengi muenyi anyi bana ba nshiya dilumbulula didi diakane; kanuangatshi bilulu bia mukashi wa mu lufuila bu tshieya: 
Deuteronomy24:18 nuvuluke ne nuenu nuakadi bahika mu Ejipitu, ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakanuhikula: bua bualu ebu nakunuelela mukenji eu." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Hanuahuola bintu bia mu madimi enu, ne kafulaminyi kadi kanukuata bua kushiya bisumbu bikuabo mu madimi enu, kanuhinganyi bua kubiangata; nebikale bia benyi ne bia bana ba nshiya ne bia bakashi ba mu lufuila; nunku Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuvudishile disanka mu malu onso anudi nuenza ne bianza bienu." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Hanuakuna matamba a mitshi yenu ya olive bua mamuma ahone, kanuakumi tshiakabidi; neashale a benyi ne a bana ba nshiya ne a bakashi ba mu lufuila." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Hanuahuola tumuma tukese tua mu madimi enu a tumuma, kanutuhuodi tshiakabidi: tumuma netushale tua benyi ne tua bana ba nshiya ne tua bakashi ba mu lufuila." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Nuenu nuvuluke ne nuakadi bahika mu buloba bua Ejipitu; bua bualu ebu nakunuelela mukenji eu. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Bikala bantu babidi batandangane, ne haluabo bua kulumbuluishibua, balumbuluishi nebalumbulule tshilumbu tshiabo; ku nyima nebabingishe muntu muimpe ne nebahishe muntu mubi." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Bikala muntu mubi mukumbane bua kukumibua, hashishe mulumbuluishi neamuladike hanshi, nebamukume ku mpala kuandi; bungi bua mikumu nebuikale bu bubi buandi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Badi mua kumukuma mikumu makumi anai, kadi kabahitshi: biahilabo mikumu ei, muanʼenu neikale bu muntu wa hatuhu kunudi." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Kanusuiki nkata ku mishiku ya ngombe udi udiata mponda. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Bikala bana balume ba difu dimue bashikame muaba umue, ne biafua umue wabo kayi mushiye muana mulume, mukashi wa muntu mufue kayi ku dibaka kudi mulume mukuabo; muanʼabo ne mulume wandi neamuangate, alue bu mukashi wandi; neamuenzele bualu buakadiye ne bualu bua kuenza bu muanʼabo." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Hashishe muanʼa bute udi mukashi eu ulela nebamuidike dina dia muanʼabo wakafua; bua dina diandi kadijiminyi mu Isalele. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Bikala muntu kayi musue kuangata mukashi wa muanʼabo, hashishe mukashi wa muanʼabo mulume neaye ku tshibi tshia musoko kudi bakulu, neambe ne, Muanʼabo ne mulume wanyi udi uhidia kulelela muanʼabo wakafua bana mu Isalele, yeye kena mungangate bu mukashi wandi." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Hashishe bakulu ba mu musoko wandi nebamubikile, nebasombe nʼandi; ne himaneye, wamba ne, Tshiena musue kumuangata," 
Deuteronomy25:9 hashishe mukashi wa muanʼabo nealue kudiye ku mesu kua bakulu, neambulule tshisabata ku dikasa diandi, neamutuile lute ku mesu; neamuambile ne, Nebenzele mulume nunku udi uhidia kudiundisha nsubu wa muanʼabo mulume." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Nebamuidike dina mu Isalele ne, Nsubu wa udi ne tshisabata tshiandi tshisulula." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Bikala balume babidi baluangane, ne mukashi wa umue wabo ulualua bua kusungila mulume wandi mu tshianza tshia muntu udi umukuma, udi wolola tshianza tshiandi, udi umukuata ku biaha mesu," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ku nyima nebamukose tshianza tshiandi, kabamuleshi luse nansha." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Kanuikadi ne biamu bibidi bia kuidikisha nʼabi majitu, ne tshinene ne tshikese." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Kanuikadi ne bihiminu bibidi mu nsubu yenu, ne tshinene ne tshikese." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Nuikale anu ne tshiamu tshimue tshidi tshiakane, ne tshihiminu tshimue tshidi tshiakane; nunku matuku enu neikale a bungi mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Muntu yonso utu wenza malu au, malu au mabi, udi bu tshintu tshibi ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Nuvuluke bu muakanuenzela Amaleka mu nshila hanuakaluhuka mu Ejipitu; 
Deuteronomy25:18 bu muakasangakeneye nʼenu mu nshila, wakashiha bantu bakashala ku nyima bakadi batekete, hanuakahanga, hanuakamba kufua mu nshila; yeye kakatshina Nzambi." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Nunku hafila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bantu bonso badi nʼenu lukuna mu bianza bienu, ne hanuaheta dikisha mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu kubuhiana, hashishe nenujimishe tshivulukidi tshia Amaleka muinshi mua diulu; kanuhu muoyo bua bualu ebu nansha." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Hanuabuela mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha bua nuenu kubuhiana, hanuabunyenga ne hanuashikamamu," 
Deuteronomy26:2 hashishe nenuangate bintu bionso bidi biboba diambedi mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, nubiteke mu tshisaka, nulue nʼabi mu muaba udi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, usungula, bua kujadikamu dina diandi." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Nulue kudi muakuidi wa mu matuku au, numuambile ne, Ndi nkuambila lelu ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ne, Nakubuela mu buloba buakaiaya Yehowa batatu betu, bua kutuhabu." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Muakuidi neangate tshisaka mu bianza bienu, neatshiteke hanshi ku mpala kua tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Nenuambe ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne, Tatu wetu wakadi Muena Sulia, wakadi wamba kufua; ne yeye wakaya mu Ejipitu, wakashikamamu bantu banya-banya; yeye wakalua tshisamba tshinene tshia bukole ne bantu ba bungi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Bena Ejipitu bakatuenzela bibi, bakatukengesha, bakatuenzesha mudimu mukole;" 
Deuteronomy26:7 ne tuetu tuakadi la kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua betu, ne Yehowa wakulua dî dietu, wakatangila makenga etu ne mudimu wetu ne majitu etu." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Yehowa wakatuhatula mu Ejipitu ne tshianza tshikole ne diboko diandi diolola ne malu makole ne bimanyinu ne malu a dikema; 
Deuteronomy26:9 wakalua nʼetu mu muaba eu, wakatuha buloba ebu, buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Katataka, Yehowa, tuakulua ne bintu biakaboba diambedi mu buloba buwakutuha. Nenuteke bintu ebi hanshi ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nenutendelele ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu;" 
Deuteronomy26:11 nenusanke mu malu mimpe onso akanuha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne nuenu ne ba mu nsubu yenu, ne Muena Lewi ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Hanuashikisha kufila tshia dikumi tshia bintu bienu bionso mu tshidimu tshisatu tshidibo bafila tshia dikumi tshia bintu, nenubale Bena Lewi ne benyi ne bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila; nunku bobo nebadie mu misoko yenu, nebukute." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Nenuambe ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne, Tuakumusha bintu bia tshijila mu nsubu yetu, tuakabiha Bena Lewi ne benyi ne bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila, bu mukenji uwakutuelela, katuakashiha mikenji yebe, katuakuhua mikenji muoyo." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Katuakudia bintu ebi mu madilu etu, katuakabilenga hatuakadi banyanguke, katuakabifila kudi bakadi mu madilu: tuakutumikila dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wetu; tuakuenza malu onso akatuambileye." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Utangile hanshi mu muaba webe wa tshijila mu diulu, uvudishile bantu bebe ba Isalele disanka, ne buloba buwakutuha, bu muwakalaya bankambua betu, buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi unuelela mukenji lelu bua nuenu nuenze mikenji ei ne mei au; nunku nubienze ne mitshima yenu yonso ne mioyo yenu yonso." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Nuenu nuakuitabusha Yehowa bu Nzambi wenu lelu, nuakuamba ne, Tuetu netuende mu nshila yandi, netutumikile mei andi ne mikenji yandi ne mikandu yandi, netunvue dî diandi;" 
Deuteronomy26:18 ne Yehowa wakanuitabusha bu bantu ba buhianyi buandi bu muakanulayeye, bua nuenu nutumikile mikenji yandi yonso," 
Deuteronomy26:19 ne kunubandisha ku mutu kua bisamba bionso biakafukeye mu butumbi ne mu dina ne mu buneme; bua nuenu nuikale bantu ba tshijila kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bu muakuambeye." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mose ne bakulu ba mu Isalele bakambila bantu ne, Nutumikile mikenji yonso indi nnuambila lelu." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Halua dituku dinudi nusabuka musulu wa Yadene bua kubuela mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, hashishe nenjadike mabue manene, nenuashinguile ne nshimete." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Nenufundehu mikenji ei hanuasabuka; nunku nenubuele mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha, buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi, bu mudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu, munulaye." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Hanuamana kusabuka Yadene, nenjadike mabue au mu mukuna wa Ebala, nenuashinguile ne nshimete, bu mundi nnuambila lelu." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Nenuenzeleku Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tshioshelu ne mabue, kanuoshi tshiamu ha mutu hau." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Enzelai Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tshioshelu ne mabue adibo kabayi basonge; nuenu nenuoshilehu Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, milambu;" 
Deuteronomy27:7 nenufile kabidi milambu yenu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, nenudieku; nenusanke ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Nenufunde ha mabue au mei onso a mikenji ne kufunda kuakane. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Mose ne bakuidi ba mu Bena Lewi bakambila Bena Isalele bonso ne, Huwai, unvuai, Bena Isalele, lelu nuakulua bu bantu ba Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Nunku nudi ne bualu bua kutumikila dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kuenza mikenji yandi ne mei andi bindi nnuambila lelu." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Mose wakadimusha bantu dituku adi mene ne," 
Deuteronomy27:12 Bantu aba nebimane ha mutu ha Gelizima bua kuvudishila bantu disanka hanuasabuka Yadene: Shimeona ne Lewi ne Yuda ne Yisakâ ne Yosefe ne Benyamina. 
Deuteronomy27:13 Bantu aba nebimane ha mutu ha Ebala bua kuela bantu mulau: Lubena ne Gada ne Ashe ne Zebuluna ne Dana ne Nafatale. 
Deuteronomy27:14 Bena Lewi neitabe, nebambile bantu bonso ba mu Isalele ne dî dikole ne:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 Muntu yonso udi usonga luhingu anyi udi wenza luhingu ne tshiamu tshiakatulabo kudi muntu udi ne lungenyi lule, udi kujadika mu musokoko, ntshintu tshibi ku mesu kua Yehowa, udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Muntu yonso udi uhenda tatu wandi anyi mamu wandi udi ne mulau; bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:17 Muntu yonso udi utentulula mukalu wa muena mutumba nʼandi udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:18 Muntu yonso udi uhambuisha muntu mufofo mu nshila udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:19 Muntu yonso udi ulumbuluisha benyi anyi bana ba nshiya anyi bakashi ba mu lufuila dilumbulula didi kadiyi diakane udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Muntu yonso udi ulala ne mukashi wa tatu wandi udi ne mulau, bualu bua yeye wakavula tshilulu tshia tatu wandi. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Muntu yonso udi ulala ne nyama udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Muntu yonso udi ulala ne muanʼabo mukashi, nansha muana wa tatu wandi nansha muana wa mamu wandi udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Muntu yonso udi ulala ne muku wandi udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:24 Muntu yonso udi ukuma mukuabo mu musokoko udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:25 Muntu yonso udi witabusha tshintu tshia kumubueshelabo nʼatshi bua kushiha muntu udi kayi ne tshilumbu udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:26 Muntu yonso udi kayi ujadika mei a mikenji ei bua kuyenza udi ne mulau. Bantu bonso nebakudimune dî ne, Amen." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Binuananukila kutumikila mei a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kuenza mikenji yandi yonso indi nnuambila lelu, hashishe Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuteke ku mutu kua bisamba bionso bia hanshi ha buloba;" 
Deuteronomy28:2 ne masanka â onso nealue kunudi, neanuhete, binuatumikila dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Nenuikale ne disanka mu misoko yenu, nenuikale ne disanka mu madimi enu." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Nenuikale ne disanka bua bana banudi nulela, ne bua bintu bidi bidiunda mu buloba, ne bua kukumbasha kua nyama yenu ne bimuna bienu ne mikoko yenu." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Nenuikale ne disanka mu bisaka bienu ne mu malonga anudi nuenzelamu mampa. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Nenuikale ne disanka hanuabuela mu nsubu, nenuikale ne disanka hanualuhukamu." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Yehowa neanuihatshile bena lukuna badi bahika ku mesu kuenu; nebalue kunudi mu nshila umue, nebanyeme ku mesu kuenu mu nshila muanda mutekete." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Yehowa nea-nuvudishile disanka mu bisasa bienu, ne mu malu onso anudi nuenza ne bianza bienu; neanuvudishile disanka mu buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nnuha." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Yehowa neanujadike bu bantu bandi ba tshijila, bu muakanulayeye, binuatumikila mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, binuenda mu nshila yandi." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Bantu bonso ba ha buloba nebamanye ne, Nuenu nudi nubikidibua ku dina dia Yehowa; bobo nebanutshine." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Yehowa neanuhe bintu bia bungi bia disanka, ne bia kukumbasha kua bana, ne bia kukumbasha kua bimuna ne bintu bidi bidiunda mu buloba buakalaya Yehowa bankambua benu bua kunuhabu." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Yehowa neanunzuluile masanka adiye nʼau mu diulu bua kunulokeshila nvula ha buloba mu tshikondo tshia nvula, ne bua kunuvudishila disanka mu malu anudi nuenza ne bianza bienu; nuenu nenusombeshe bisamba bia bungi bintu, kadi nuenu kanuena nusomba bintu kudibo." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Yehowa neanuvuisbe bu mitu, kena unuvuisha bu mikila; nuenu nenuikale anu ku mutu, kanuena nuikala hanshi, binuatumikila mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, indi nnuambila lelu, binuayenza;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 binuikala kanuyi nusesuka lelu ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi ku mei andi nnuambila, bua kuya kukuatshila nzambi mikuabo mudimu." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Kadi binuikala kanuyi nunvua dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kuenza mikenji yandi yonso ne mei bindi nnuambila lelu, hashishe milau ei yonso neyilue kunudi, neyinukuate." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Nenuikale ne milau mu misoko, nenuikale ne milau mu madimi." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Nenuikale ne milau mu bisaka bienu ne mu malonga anudi nuenzelamu mampa. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Nenuikale ne milau mu kukumbasha kua bana ne mu bintu bidi bidiunda mu buloba ne mu kukumbasha kua bimuna ne kua mikoko. 
Deuteronomy28:19 Nenuikale ne milau hanuabuela mu nsubu, nenuikale ne milau hanualuhukamu." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Yehowa neanutumine milau ne makenga ne mahumbisha mu malu anudi nuenza ne bianza bienu, tô ne hanuajimishibua ne hanûmushibua lubilu ha buloba; bualu bua bubi bua bienzedi bienu, bua nuakundekela." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Yehowa neanutumine masama mabi tô ne hanuajimishibua ha buloba bunudi nuya bua kubuhiana. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Yehowa neanutumine disama dia nfuenke ne dia mubidi kahia ne dia biusha ne dia lukanku, ne miele ya nvita, ne luhehele lua nvunde ne butu; malu au neanulonde tô ne hanuafua." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Diulu nedikale bu tshiamu tshia mitaku ku mutu kuenu, ne buloba nebuikale bu tshiamu mu makasa enu." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Yehowa neavuishe nvula wa buloba buenu bu lufuishi ne nsenga bia mu diulu tô ne hanuajimishibua. 
Deuteronomy28:25 Yehowa neanuihate ku mesu kua bena lukuna benu; nuenu nenuye kudibo mu nshila umue, kadi nenunyeme ku mesu kuabo mu nshila muanda mutekete; nebanuendakashe munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia ha buloba." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Bitalu bienu nebikale bu bidia bia nyunyu yonso ya mu diulu ne bia nyama yonso ya ha buloba; kakuena muntu udi uyihata. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Yehowa neanutumine biusha bia mu Ejipitu, ne disama dia muiaka, ne mpusu ne lubila: masama adibo kabayi mua kuondaha." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Yehowa neanuhadishe, neanutumme bufofo, nenufue mikemu mu mitshima yenu;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 nenububute munda munya bu mudi muntu mufofo ububuta mu midima; kanuena nuenda dikasa dimpe mu nshila yenu, nebanutatshishe, nebanuibe, kakuena muntu udi mua kunusungila." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Neubangile mukashi kadi munga muntu nealale nʼandi; newase nsubu kadi kuena ushikamamu; neukune budimi bua nvinyo, ne kuena udia mamuma abu." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Nebashihe ngombe webe ku mesu kuebe, ne wewe kuena udia munyinyi wandi; nebanyenge mpunda webe ku mesu kuebe ku bukole, ne kabena bakuhingishileye; nebahe badi nʼebe lukuna mikoko yebe, kakuena muntu wa kunusungila." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Nebahe bantu bakuabo bana benu balume ne bana benu bakashi; mesu enu neabatangile ne mitshima minyingalala matuku onso; kadi kanuena nushala ne bukole nansha bukese mu bianza bienu. 
Deuteronomy28:33 Tshisamba tshinudi kanuyi bamanye nebadie bintu biakadiunda mu buloba bualu bua mudimu wenu; nebanunyange, nebanudiate matuku onso;" 
Deuteronomy28:34 malu anudi nutangila ku mesu neanuhadishe. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Yehowa neanutumme biusha bibi ku binu bienu ne ku mikolo yenu, ne ku munda mua makasa tô ne mu lubombo lua mutu: disama didi kadiyi mua kuondahibua." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Yehowa nealue nʼenu ne mukelenge unuakateka ku mutu kuenu kudi tshisamba tshinudi kanuyi bamanye, nansha nuenu nansha bankambua benu; nenutendeleleku nzambi mikuabo ya mitshi ne mabue." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Nenuikale bu dikema ne bu lusumuinu ne bu bihendu kudi bisamba bionso bidi Yehowa mulela munkatshi muabi. 
Deuteronomy28:38 Nenukune maminu a bungi mu madimi, nenuhuole makese, bualu bua mikumbi neyadie." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Nenukune mitshi ya tumuma tukese, nenuyilame bimpe, kadi kanuena nunua nvinyo, kanuena nuhuola tumuma; bualu bua bishi nebitudie." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Nenuikale ne mitshi ya olive mu madimi enu onso, kadi kanuena nudilaba manyi ai hamʼbidi; bualu bua mamuma neahohoke." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Nenulele bana balume ne bana bakashi, kadi bobo kabena benu, bualu bua bobo nebaye mu buluka." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Mitshi yenu ne bintu bienu bionso bidi bidiunda mu buloba nebikale bia mikumbi. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Benyi badi munkatshi muenu nebabandile ku mutu kuenu, ne nuenu nenuhuekele." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Bobo nebanusombeshe bintu, kadi nuenu kanuena nubasombesha bintu; bobo nebikale bu mitu, nuenu nenuikale bu mikila." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Milau ei yonso neyilue kunudi, neyinulonde, neyinuhete tô ne hanuajimishibua ba buloba; bualu bua nuenu kanuakunvua mei a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kutumikila mikenji yandi ne mei andi biakanuambileye:" 
Deuteronomy28:46 milau ei neyikale kunudi bu tshimanyinu ne dikema, ne kudi bana benu tshiendelele." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Bualu bua nuenu kanuakakuatshila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mudimu ne disanka mu mitshima yenu bua bintu bionso biakanuheye," 
Deuteronomy28:48 nunku nenukuatshile badi nʼenu lukuna mudimu badi Yehowa unutumina, ne nzala ne nyota ne butaka ne kuhanga kua bintu bionso. Bobo nebanuteke tshikokedi tshia tshiamu ha nshingu yenu tô ne hanuajimishibua kudibo." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Yehowa neanutumme tshisamba tshia kule kuakua ku ditunga dikuabo bu nyunyu wa mukanku; kanuena bamanye muaku wa tshisamba atshi; 
Deuteronomy28:50 badi ne luonji ku mpala kuabo, kabena banemeka bantu banunu, kabena ne luse kudi bana batekete;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 bobo nebadie kukumbana kua bimuna bienu, ne bintu biakadiunda mu buloba buenu tô ne hanuajimishibua; kabena banushila kabidi manvua anyi nvinyo mihia-mihia anyi manyi anyi kukumbana kua bimuna bienu anyi bana ba mikoko yenu tô ne hanuajimishibua kudibo." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Bobo nebanutshintshimike ku bibi bienu bionso tô ne hahona ngumbu yenu yonso inuakueyemena mu buloba buenu buonso; bobo nebanutshintshimike ku misoko yenu yonso mu buloba buonso budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unuha." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Nuenu nenudie bana banuakalela, munyinyi wa bana benu balume ne wa bana benu bakashi bakamuha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bualu bua kanyinganyinga kadi kanukuata bua ditshintshimika dia misoko yenu ne bua makenga adi bena lukuna benu banukengesha nʼau." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Muntu wakadi ne mutshima mulengele ne kalolo neikale ne disu dibi kudi muanʼabo ne kudi mukashi udiye munange ne kudi bana bandi bakashala; 
Deuteronomy28:55 nunku yeye kena ubabanyinaku munyinyi wa bana bandi hadiye udia, bualu bua yeye kena ne tshintu tshishala kudiye mu ditshintshimika ne mu ditata didi bena lukuna banutatshisha nʼadi ku misoko yenu yonso." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Mukashi wakadi ne mutshima mulengele ne kalolo munkatshi muenu wakatshina mua kuihata makasa ha buloba bualu bua kalolo ne kanemu kakatamba, neikale ne disu dibi kudi mulume udiye munange, ne kudi muanʼandi mulume ne kudi muanʼandi mukashi," 
Deuteronomy28:57 ne kudi muana muhia-muhia wakaleleye ha binu biandi ne kudi bana bonso hadiye mulele; yeye neabadie mu musokoko bua kuhanga kua bia kudia mu ditshintshimika ne ditata bidi bena lukuna banutatshisha nʼabi ku misoko yenu. 
Deuteronomy28:58 Binuahidia kutumikila mei onso a mikenji idi mifunda mu mukanda eu, bua nuenu nutshine dina edi dia butumbi ne ditshina ne, YEHOWA, NZAMBI WENU;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 hashishe Yehowa neanuenzele masama a kukema ne bana badi banulonda; masama makole neashale kunudi musangu mule ne makenga manene neashale kunudi musangu mule kabidi. 
Deuteronomy28:60 Yeye neanutumine masama onso a mu Ejipitu anuakatshina; masama au neanulamate nuenu. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Masama onso ne makenga adi kâyi mafunda mu mukanda wa mikenji, Yehowa neanutumineu, tô ne hanuajimishibua." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Diambedi nuakadi bungi bua mitoto ya mu diulu kadi nenushale anu banya-banya, bualu bua kanuakunvua dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Bu muakadi Yehowa ne disanka bua kunuenzela bimpe ne bua kunukumbasha ba bungi, mbu mudiye mua kuikala ne disanka bua kunujimisha ne bua kunushiha; nebanûmushe mu buloba bunudi nuya bua kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Yehowa neanumuangalashe munkatshi mua bantu bonso ku ditengu edi dia buloba tô ne ku ditengu dikuabo; nenukuatshileku nzambi mikuabo ya mitshi ne ya mabue mudimu, mudi kanuyi bamanye, ne bankambua benu kabakayimanya kabidi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Munkatshi mua bisamba ebi kanuena nusangana ha kuikisha, anyi kua kutalasha munda mua makasa enu; Yehowa neanutumineku mitshima izakala ne mesu a buowa ne kusamina kua muoyo;" 
Deuteronomy28:66 nenuikale ne mpata bua mioyo yenu; nenuikale ne buowa munya ne butuku, kanuena nuikala ne ditekemena dia mioyo yenu." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Dinda nenuambe ne, Tudi basue butuku buile. Dilolo nenuambe ne, Tudi basue butuku butshie bualu bua buowa budi bunukuata mu mitshima yenu, ne bua malu anudi batangila ku mesu." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Yehowa neanuhingashe mu Ejipitu kabidi mu matu mu nshila unakanuambila ne, Kanuena numutangila kabidi. Nenukebeku mua kudihana kudi badi nʼenu lukuna bu bahika balume ne bahika bakashi, kadi kakuena muntu udi unusumba." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Â mmei a tshihungidi akambila Yehowa Mose bua kuhanga ne Bena Isalele mu buloba bua Moaba, ku mutu kua tshihungidi tshiakahungeye nʼabo mu Holeba." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mose wakabikila Bena Isalele bonso, wakabambila ne, Nuenu nuakatangila malu onso akenzela Yehowa Palo mu buloba bua Ejipitu ku mesu kuenu, ne bantu bandi bonso ne buloba buonso;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 mateta makole anuakatangila ne mesu, ne bimanyinu ne malu a kukema." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kadi Yehowa kena muanze kunuha mitshima ya kumanya nʼai ne mesu a kutangila nʼau ne matshu a kunvua nʼau tô ne ku dituku edi. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Nakanulombola mu tshihela tô bidimu makumi anai: bilulu bienu kabiakasunsuka hamʼbidi henu, ne bisabata kabiakasunsuka ku makasa enu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Kanuakadia mampa, kanua-kanua nvinyo anyi maluvu makole, bua nuenu numanye ne, Meme ndi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Hanuakalua ku muaba eu, Sihona, mukelenge wa mu Heshebona, ne Oga, mukelenge wa mu Bashana, bakaluhuka bua kuluangana nʼetu, ne tuetu tuakabahita;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 bakanyenga buloba buabo, tuakabuha Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bu buhianyi buabo." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Nunku nuenu nutumikile mei a tshihungidi etshi, nuê-nze, bua nuenu nuikale ne dikasa dimpe mu malu onso anudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Buonso buenu nudi nuimana ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, lelu; ne ba ku mutu kuenu, bisamba bienu, bakulu benu, tuhita tuenu, ne balume bonso ba mu Isalele," 
Deuteronomy29:11 ne bana benu bakese ne bakashi benu, ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu, ne batatu ba nkunyi ne basunyi ba mai;" 
Deuteronomy29:12 bua nuenu nubuele mu tshihungidi tshidi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, muhunge nʼenu ne mu kuditshiha kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, muditshihe nʼenu lelu," 
Deuteronomy29:13 bua yeye anuitabushe lelu bu bantu bandi, ne bua yeye kuikala Nzambi wenu, bu muakanuambileye, ne bu muakalayeye bankambua benu, Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Tshiena muhunge nʼenu nuenu nkayenu tshihungidi etshi ne kuditshiha eku," 
Deuteronomy29:15 kadi ne muntu yonso udi muimane ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, lelu, ne muntu yonso udi kayi muimane nʼetu lelu." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Bualu bua nudi bamanye bu mutuakashikama mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne mutuakahita munkatshi mua bisamba biakadi mu nshila;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 ne nuenu nuakatangila malu mabi abo ne mpingu yabo ya mitshi ne ya mabue ne ya tshiamu tshia argent ne tshia or yakadi munkatshi muabo; 
Deuteronomy29:18 bua muntu kikadi munkatshi muenu, nansha mulume nansha mukashi nansha diku dia bantu nansha tshisamba, udi akudimuna mutshima wandi kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kukuatshila nzambi ya bisamba abi mudimu; ne bua muji udi ukuama mamuma a mulungu ne a bululu kawikadi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Kadi bikala muntu udi unvua mei a mulau eu udiamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Meme nengikale ne ditalala nansha binalonda tshitshu tshia mu mutshima wanyi, bua kutenteka dikuatshika ha mutu ha nyota," 
Deuteronomy29:20 Yehowa kena umubuikidila bubi buandi, kadi tshiji tshia Yehowa ne mukau wandi nebimueneke kudi muntu eu ne milau yonso idi mifunda mu mukanda eu neyimukuate, ne Yehowa nenjimishe dina diandi muinshi mua diulu." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Yehowa neamutahulule munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele bua kamuenzela bibi, bu mudi milau yonso ya tshihungidi etshi mifunda mu mukanda eu wa mikenji." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Mu tshihungu tshia bantu tshidi tshitua, bana benu badi banulonda ku nyima ne benyi badi bafuma ku buloba bukuabo, hatangilabo makenga akalua ku buloba abu ne masama onso adi Yehowa mubatumine" 
Deuteronomy29:23 ne buloba buonso budi bu butue ne luehu ne bintu bioshibue, kabena bakunamu tshintu, kabena bahuolamu tshintu; ne mashinde kaena amenamu: buloba budi buikala bu kubutuka kua misoko ya Sodoma ne Amola ne Adema ne Seboima yakashiha Yehowa mu tshiji tshiandi tshikole;" 
Deuteronomy29:24 bantu aba bonso nebambe ne, Bualu kai Yehowa wakuenzela buloba ebu nunku? Yeye wakadi ne tshiji tshikole nunku munyi?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Hashishe bantu nebambe ne, Bualu bua bobo bakahidia tshihungidi tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatu babo, tshiakahungeye nʼabo hakaluhukeye nʼabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 ne bobo bakaya bua kukuatshila nzambi mikuabo mudimu, ne bua kuyitendelela; nzambi yakadibo kabayi bamanye, idi Yehowa kayi mubahe:" 
Deuteronomy29:27 nunku tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakamueneka mu buloba ebu, bua kushikisha milau yonso idi mifunda mu mukanda eu;" 
Deuteronomy29:28 ne Yehowa wakabumusha mu buloba abu ne difika dia munda ne tshiji tshikole, wakaya nʼabo mu buloba bukuabo; bualu ebu budi nunku lelu." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Malu atshidi masokoka adi malu a Yehowa, Nzambi wetu: kadi malu adi masokolola adi malu etu ne a bana betu tshiendelele, bua tuetu tuenze mei onso a mikenji ei." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Halua malu au onso kunudi ne disanka ne mulau, binakuteka ku mpala kuenu, ne hanuayuluka malu au munkatshi mua bisamba bidi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, unutuma munkatshi muabi," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ne hanuakudimuna mitshima yenu kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kutumikila mei andi ne mitshima yenu yonso ne mioyo yenu yonso, bu munakunuambila lelu, ne nuenu ne bana benu;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 hashishe Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neakudimune buluka buenu, neanuleshe luse, neahingane kunudi, neanusangishe ba munkatshi mua bantu bonso muakanumuangalasha Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Bikala bakuabo bamuangalake tô ne ku ditengu dia diulu, Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neabasangisheku, neabahingisheku kabidi;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nealue nʼenu mu buloba bua batatu benu, ne nuenu nenubuhiane; yeye neanuenzele bimpe, neanuvudishe ha mutu ha hatatu benu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanutengule mu mitshima yenu ne ya bana benu, bua nuenu kunanga Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne mitshima yenu yonso ne mioyo yenu yonso, bua nuenu kuikala ne muoyo." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neateke milau ei yonso hamʼbidi ha bena lukuna ne badi nʼenu tshiji, bakadi banukengesha." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Nuenu nenuhingane, nenutumikile dî dia Yehowa, nenuenze mikenji yonso inakunuambila lelu." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuvudishile disanka mu mudimu wonso unudi nuenza ne bianza, ne mu kukumbasha kua bana ne mu kukumbasha kua bimuna bienu ne mu bintu bionso bidi bidiunda mu buloba; bualu bua Yehowa neikale ne disanka bualu buenu, bu muakasankeye bualu bua batatu benu;" 
Deuteronomy30:10 binuatumikila dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bua kuenza mikenji yandi ne mei andi bidi bifunda mu mukanda eu wa mikenji: binuakudimuka kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne mitshima yenu yonso ne mioyo yenu yonso." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Bualu bua mikenji ei inakunuambila lelu kayena minuhite bukole bua nuenu kuyenza; kayena kule. 
Deuteronomy30:12 Kayena mu diulu bua nuenu nuambe ne, Nganyi neahande mu diulu bua kulua ne mikenji kutudi, ne bua kutunyuisha bua tuetu kuyenza?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Mikenji ei kayena dishiya dia mai manene, bua nuenu nuambe ne, Nganyi watusabukila dishiya dia mai manene bua kulua nʼai kutudi ne bua kutunyuisha bua tuetu kuyenza?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Kadi dî edi didi ha buihi nʼenu ne mukana muenu ne mu mitshima yenu, bua nuenu kudienza." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Tangilai, nakuteka muoyo ne malu mimpe, ne lufu ne malu mabi ku mpala kuenu lelu;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 mukenji unakunuelela lelu bua kunanga Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kuenda mu nshila yandi ne bua kutumikila mikenji yandi ne mei andi ne mikandu yandi: nunku nenuikale ne muoyo, nenukumbane ba bungi, ne Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neanuvudishile disanka mu buloba bunuyaya kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kadi bikala mitshima yenu mihambuke, ne binuikala kanuyi nunyua, kadi binuatendelela nzambi mikuabo bua kuyikuatshila mudimu," 
Deuteronomy30:18 meme ndi nnuambila lelu ne, Nenujimishibue bulelela; kanuena nuvudisha matuku enu mu buloba bunuyaya dishiya dia Yadene bua kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Meme ndi mbikila diulu ne buloba bu bamonyi ba bualu ne, Nakuteka muoyo ne lufu, ne disanka ne mulau ku mpala kuenu lelu: muiku nudisunguile muoyo, nenuikale ne muoyo ne nuenu ne bana benu," 
Deuteronomy30:20 bua kunanga Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kutumikila dî diandi, ne bua kumulamata; bualu bua yeye udi muoyo wenu ne muvudishi wa matuku enu; nunku nenushikame mu buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatu benu, Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba, bua kubahabu." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Mose wakaya biandi, wakambila Bena Isalele bonso mei â." 
Deuteronomy31:2 Yeye wakabambila ne, Lelu nakuhita bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi; tshiena mua kuya ne mua kulua kabidi; ne Yehowa wakamana kungambila ne, Wewe kuena usabuka Yadene eu." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neasabuke ku mpala kuenu; yeye neashihe bisamba abi ku mpala kuenu, nuenu nenubihate; Yoshua neasabuke ku mpala kuenu bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Yehowa neabenzele bu muakenzeleye Sihona ne Oga, bakelenge ba Bena Amole, bakashiheye ne buloba buabo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Yehowa neabafile mu bianza bienu, nuenu ne nubenzele bu mudi mikenji yonso inakanuambila." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Nuikale ne bukole ne mitshima ya dikima, kanubatshinyi, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, yeye mene uyaya nʼenu; yeye kena unuhanga, kena unulekela." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Mose wakabikila Yoshua, wakamuambila ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso ne, Wikale ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima, bualu bua wewe uyaya ne bantu aba mu buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatu babo bua kubahabu; ne wewe neubahianyishe buloba abu." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Yehowa mene uyaya ku mpala kuebe, yeye neikale hebe, kena ukuhanga, kena ukulekela: kutshinyi, kuzakadi." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mose wakafunda mikenji ei, wakayifila mu bianza bia bakuidi, bana balume ba Lewi, bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi, ne kudi bakulu bonso ba mu Isalele." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mose wakabambila ne, Hafika bidimu muanda mutekete, mu tshikondo tshidibo bahingashangana bintu, hadiabo bidia bia disanka dia bitandatanda," 
Deuteronomy31:11 halua Bena Isalele bonso ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mu muaba udiye usungula, hashishe nenubadile Bena Isalele bonso mikenji ei mu matshu abo." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Nusangishe bantu bonso, ne balume ne bakashi ne bana bakese ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu, bua buonso buabo bumue, bayile lungenyi, batshine Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, batumikile mei onso a mikenji ei;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 nunku bana babo badi kabayi banze kumanya nebunvue, nebamanye mua kutshina Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tô matuku onso anudi nushikama mu buloba bunudi nuya dishiya dia Yadene bua kubuhiana." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Tangila, dituku dia lufu luebe dikadi ha buihi: bikila Yoshua, ne bubidi buenu nudisangishe mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bua meme mmudimushe. Mose ne Yoshua bakaya, bakadisangisha mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Yehowa wakamueneka mu Ntenta mu difutu: difutu diakimana ku mutu kua tshibi tshia Ntenta. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Yehowa wakambila Mose ne, Tangila, wewe neulale tulu ne bankambua bebe; ne bantu aba nebabike, nebalonde malu a masandi a nzambi ya bende ya mu buloba buyayabo, nebandekele, nebashihe tshihungidi tshituakahunga nʼabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Hashishe tshiji tshikole netshinkuate dituku adi, ne meme nembalekele, nengumushe mesu anyi kudibo ne bobo nebajimishibue; ne matata ne makenga a bungi nealue kudibo; bobo nebambilangane dituku adi ne, Malu â mabi onso kaena alua kutudi bualu bua Nzambi wetu kena munkatshi muetu, anyi?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Meme nengumushe mesu anyi kudibo dituku adi bulelela, bua malu mabi akenzabo, hakakudimunabo mitshima yabo bua kutendelela nzambi mikuabo." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Katataka wewe ubafundile musambu eu, wayisha Bena Isalele bonso musambu; uteke musambu eu mukana muabo, newikale bu mumanyi wa bualu buanyi kudi Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Bualu bua hanakamana kulua nʼabo mu buloba bunakalaya batatuʼabo, budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi, ne hakamanabo kudia, kukuta ne kuvunda, hashishe nebakudimune mitshima yabo bua kutendelela nzambi mikuabo, nebayikuatshile mudimu, nebampetule, nebashihe tshihungidi tshianyi." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Nunku halua matata ne makenga makole kudibo, musambu eu newikale bu mumanyi wa bualu, neudiambe kudibo; bana babo kabahu musambu eu muoyo, bualu bua meme ndi mumanye meji adibo nʼau mu mitshima yabo lelu diambedi tshiyi muanze kulua nʼabo mu buloba bunakabalaya." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Nunku Mose wakafunda musambu eu dituku adi, wakauyisha Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Yeye wakadimusha Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, ne, Wikale ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima; bualu bua wewe neulue ne Bena Isalele mu buloba bunakabalaya; meme nengikale nʼebe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Hakashikisha Mose kufunda mei a mikenji ei mu mukanda," 
Deuteronomy31:25 hashishe Mose wakadimusha Bena Lewi bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa ne," 
Deuteronomy31:26 Nuangate mukanda eu wa mikenji, nûteke ku luseke lua mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, newikaleku bu mumanyi wa bualu buanyi." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Bualu bua meme ndi mumanye kutomboka kuenu ne tshitshu tshienu: monai, hantshidi ne muoyo munkatshi muenu lelu, nuakumana kutombokela Yehowa; nenutambe kutomboka ku nyima kua lufu luanyi!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Nusangishe bakulu benu bonso ba mu bisamba bienu ne tuhita tuenu kundi, bua meme kubambila mei â onso ku matshu abo, nembikile diulu ne buloba bu bamonyi ba bualu kudibo." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Bualu bua ndi mumanye ne, Ku nyima kua lufu luanyi nenutambe kudisangisha ne kusesuka mu nshila unakunulesha; malu mabi neanukuate mu matuku atshidi ku mpala; bualu bua nuenu nenuenze malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bua kumufikisha munda bua mudimu wa bianza bienu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Mose wakambila Bena Isalele bonso mei a musambu eu mu matshu abo, tô ne hakashikisheye." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Diulu, teleja matshu, nengambe, buloba bunvue mei a mukana muanyi." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Diyisha dianyi dimate hanshi bu nvula, ne mei anyi akudimuke bu mume; bu nvula mukese ha mashinde a nseku, bu nvula wa mudimbi ha midioko." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Bualu bua meme nengambe dina dia Yehowa: tumbishai bunene bua Nzambi wetu. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Yeye udi Dibue; mudimu wandi wonso udi muakane, bualu bua nshila yandi yonso idi milulame: Nzambi wa kalolo udi kayi ne bubi, udi ne malu makane a bushuwa." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Bantu bakadinyangisha kudiye, kabena bu bana bandi, bakahambuka, malu abo akanyanguka, akalua manyongoboka." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Nuenu bantu bahote badi kabayi ne meji, nudi nuhingishila Yehowa malu mabi nunku, anyi? Yeye kena tatu wenu wakanuafuka, wakanuenza, wakanujadika, anyi?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Nuvuluke matuku a diambedi, nuelangane meji a bidimu ne bikondo bia bungi: webeshe tatu webe, ne yeye neakuleshe; ne bakulu benu, bobo nebakuambile." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Hakaha Nzambi wa mu diulu bisamba buhianyi buabi, hakatahululeye bantu, wakadika mikalu ya bantu bu mudi bungi bua bana ba Isalele." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Tshituha tshia buhianyi bua Yehowa mbantu bandi; Yakoba udi buhianyi buandi. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Yeye wakasangakena nʼandi mu muaba wa hatuhu, mu tshihela muakadi luhehele nkayalu; yeye wakamunyunguluka, wakamulama bimpe, wakamuenzela bu kamonyi ka disu diandi." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Bu mudi nyunyu wa mukanku unyungisha disua diandi, udi uhahala ha mutu ha bana bandi; nunku yeye wakolola mahuahua andi, wakabangata, wakabatuala ha mahuahua andi." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Yehowa nkayandi wakamulombola, kakadi nzambi wa bende kudiye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Yeye wakamubandisha ha mutu ha miaba mile ya ha buloba, wakadia bintu biakaboba mu madimi, wakamunuisha buitshi buakadi mu mabue, ne manyi akadi mu mabue makole;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Wakamudisha manteke a mabele a ngombe, ne mabele a mbushi, ne dianyi dia mikoko ne bimpanga bia mu Bashana ne mbushi, ne blê yakatamba buimpe, nuakanua nvinyo ya tumuma tukunze tuakadi bu mashi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Kadi Yeshuluna wakavunda, wakatua mikumu: nuenu nuakuvunda, nudi ne mafuta a bungi, nuakusenena; hashishe yeye wakalekela Nzambi wakamufuka, wakahetula Dibue dia luhandu luandi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Bakamufuisha mukau ne nzambi ya bende; bakamufikisha munda ne malu mabi. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Bakashihela ba-demon badi kabayi Nzambi nyama, nzambi idibo kabayi bamanye, nzambi mihia-mihia yakamueneka anu katataka, yakadi batatu benu kabayi batshina diambedi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Nuakulekela Dibue diakanufuka, nuakuhua Nzambi wakanulelesha muoyo." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Yehowa wakatangila bualu ebu, wakadi nʼabo tshiji, bualu bua mateta a bana bandi balume ne a bana bandi bakashi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nenkudimune mesu anyi kudibo, neutangile muikala nshikidilu wabo, bualu bua badi bena tshikondo tshia tshitshu, bu bana badi kabayi mua kueyemenyibua." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bakunfuisha mukau ne tshintu tshidi katshiyi Nzambi, bakunfikisha munda ne mpingu yabo ya hatuhu, meme nembafuishe mukau ne bantu ba hatuhu, meme nembafikishe munda ne tshisamba tshia bantu bahote." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Bualu bua kahia kakatemeshibua mu tshiji tshianyi, kadi katema tô ne mu Muaba wa Bafue, kadi kosha buloba ne bintu biakadiundamu, kadi kosha makunshi adi muinshi mua mikuna mile." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Nententekashe malu mabi ha mitu habo, nembase mikete yanyi;" 
Deuteronomy32:24 nzala neyibanyange, makala a kahia ne makenga makole neabashihe, nentume nyama ya menu makole munkatshi muabo, ne lulengu lua nyoka idi idikoka hanshi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Muele wa nvita neubashihe ha bula, ne buowa nebubuele mu nsubu yabo; nebashihe bansongalume ne bansongakashi batshidi tumama, ne bana batshidi bamua mabele ne bakulumpe badi ne nvi ku mitu kuabo." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nakadi kuamba ne, Nembamuangalashe kule kuaka, nenjimishe tshivulukidi tshiabo munkatshi mua bantu;" 
Deuteronomy32:27 bu meme tshiyi nutshine ne bantu badi nʼabo lukuna nebanfikishe munda, ne bobo nebabange kujingulula bimpe, neba diambe ne, Bianza bietu bidi bibandishibua, ne Yehowa kena wenza malu â onso." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Bualu bua bobo badi bu tshisamba tshia bantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi, kabena ne dijingulula dia malu munda muabo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Bu bobo bikale ne lungenyi, bakadi kujingulula bualu ebu, bakadi kuela meji a malu atua kudibo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Muntu umue wakadi kumanya mua kuihata tshinunu tshia bantu, ne bantu babidi bakadi kumanya mua kuihata binunu dikumi bia bantu munyi, bikala Dibue kadiyi dibahane, ne Yehowa kayi mubafile kudibo?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Bualu bua dibue diabo kadiena bu Dibue dietu nansha bikala bena lukuna balumbuluishi ba bualu. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Bualu bua mitshi yabo ya tumuma tukese idi bu mitshi ya mu Sodoma ne ya mu madimi a Amola: tumuma tuabo tudi bu nyongangandu, ne tshisumbu tshia tumuma tshidi ne bululu:" 
Deuteronomy32:33 nvinyo yabo idi bu lulengu lua nyoka, bu lulengu bikole lua nyoka wa ntoka." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Lulengu elu kaluena lusokoma kundi, luteka mu tshibutshilu tshianyi, anyi?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kusombuela kudi kuanyi, ne difutu kabidi, halua dituku didi dikasa diabo difinuka, bualu bua dituku dia dikenga diabo diakalua, ne malu akadi ha kulua kudibo nealue lubilu." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Bualu bua Yehowa nealumbuluile bantu bandi bilumbu biabo, neakudimune mutshima wandi bualu bua bantu bandi, hatangileye ne bukole buabo buakujimina, ne kakuena muntu udi mushale muhika anyi mudishikaminyi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Yehowa neambe ne, Nzambi yabo idi kudi kunyi, ne dibue diabo diakadibo batekemena didi hanyi," 
Deuteronomy32:38 yakadia manyi a nyama yakadibo bamushihela, yakanua nvinyo yakafilabo? Nzambi yenu ibike, inukuatshishe, inulame." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Katataka, tangilai, anu meme nkayanyi, nYeye mene, kakuena nzambi mukuabo, anu meme; meme ndi nshiha bantu, ndi mbabisha ku lufu; meme ndi ntaha bantu mputa, ndi mbondaha kabidi; kakuena muntu udi mua kubasungila mu tshianza tshianyi." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Bualu bua ndi mbandisha tshianza tshianyi kulu bua kuditshiha ne, Bu mundi muikale ne muoyo tshiendelele." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Binatuisha muele wanyi wa nvita, ne bingolola tshianza tshianyi bua kulumbulula bilumbu, meme nensombuele badi nʼanyi lukuna, neafute badi nʼanyi tshiji." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Nenvuishe mikete yanyi bu mukuatshiki wa maluvu bualu bua mashi abo, ne muele wanyi wa nvita neudie munyinyi wabo ne mashi a bafue ne a bena lukanu, ne mitu ya bukelenge ba bena lukuna." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Nuenu ba bisamba bionso, sankai ne bantu bandi, bualu bua yeye nealombe mashi a bantu bandi, neasombuele badi nʼandi lukuna, udi umusha dihila dia buloba ne dia bantu bandi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mose wakalua, wakambila bantu mei onso a musambu eu mu matshu abo, yeye ne Hoshea, muana mulume wa Nuna." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Mose wakashikisha kuambila Bena Isalele bonso mdi â onso; 
Deuteronomy32:46 yeye wakabambila kabidi ne, Tekai mei onso anakunuambila lelu mu mitshima yenu, mei onso a mikenji mene mudi nuambila bana benu bua bobo kuyenza." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ebu kambualu bua hatuhu kunudi; kadi budi muoyo wenu, budi buvudisha matuku enu mu buloba bunuyaya kuhiana dishiya dia Yadene." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Yehowa wakambila Mose dituku adi mene ne," 
Deuteronomy32:49 Banda biebe mukuna eu wa Abalima, ku mutu kua mukuna wa Nebo, udi buludiludi ne Yeleko mu buloba bua Moaba, utangile buloba bua Kanâna bundi mpa Bena Isalele bu buhianyi buabo;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 afue biebe ku mukuna ûdi ubanda, usangishibue kudi bankambua bebe, bu muakafua Alona, mukulu webe, ku mukuna wa Hô, wakasangishibua kudi bankambua bandi:" 
Deuteronomy32:51 bualu bua wewe wakahidia dî dianyi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele ku mai a Meliba a mu Kadesha mu tshihela tshia Sina; bualu bua wewe kuakanjidila munkatshi mua Bena Isalele. 
Deuteronomy32:52 Bualu bua wewe neutangile buloba budi ku mpala kuebe; kadi kuena ubuela mu buloba bundi mpa Bena Isalele. 
Deuteronomy33:1 Â mmasanka akavudishila Mose, muntu wa Nzambi, Bena Isalele, diambedi yeye kayi muanze kufua." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa wakahueka ha mukuna wa Sinai, wakabika munkatshi muabo ku Sei, wakatemena ku mukuna wa Palana, wakamueneka munkatshi mua binunu makumi bia bantu bandi ba tshijila, wakalua kudibo ne mikenji mitema kahia mu tshianza tshiandi tshia bukole." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Bulelela, yeye udi unanga bantu bonso, bantu bandi bonso ba tshijila hadi mu tshianza tshiebe: bobo bakashikama hanshi ku makasa ebe, bua kunvua mei ebe." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mose wakalelela mikenji bu buhianyi bua tshisambakena tshia Yakoba. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Yeye wakadi mukelenge wa mu Yeshuluna, hakasangishabo bakadi ku mutu kua bantu ba bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Lubena ikale biandi ne muoyo, kafu nansha, bantu bandi kabikadi banya-banya." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Edi ndisanka dia Yuda; wakamba ne, Yehowa, unvua dî dia Yuda, ulue nʼandi kudi bantu bandi: bianza biebe bimukoleshe, wikale mukuatshishi wandi kudi bena lukuna." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Bua Lewi yeye wakamba ne, Tumima ne Ulima biebe bikale kudi ûdi musue, uwakateta ku Masa, uwakaluangana nʼandi ku mai a Meliba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Wakambila tatu wandi ne mamu wandi ne, Tshiena mumumone; kena mumanye bana babo, kena mumanye bana bandi, bualu bua bobo bakatumikila dî diebe ne tshihungidi tshiebe." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Bobo nebayishe bana ba Yakoba mei ebe, ne Bena Isalele mikenji yebe; nebateke musenga wa manananshi ku mpala kuebe, ne milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ha tshioshelu tshiebe." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Yehowa avudishile bintu biandi disanka, itabushe mudimu wa bianza biandi: atshibule nyima ya bantu badi bahika ku mpala kuandi, ne ya badi nʼandi lukuna bua kababiki kabidi." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Bua Benyamina yeye wakamba ne, Munangi wa Yehowa neashikame nʼandi talalâ, utu wamubuikila matuku onso, udi ushikama hankatshi ha makaya andi." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Bua Yosefe yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa avudishile buloba buandi disanka, bua bintu bia mushinga mukole bia mu diulu, bua mume, ne bua mai adi muinshi mua buloba;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 ne bua bintu biakakuama mamuma bualu bua diba, ne bua bintu bidi belangana ku ngondo ku ngondo;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 bua bintu bimpe bia mu mikuna, ne bua mabue a mushinga mukole a mu mikuna ya tshiendelele;" 
Deuteronomy33:16 ne bua bintu bimpe bia ha buloba ne tshiuwidi tshiabu, ne bua diakalengele dia bantu badi bashikama muitu. Disanka edi nedilue ha mutu ha Yosefe, ne ku lubombo lua mutu wa muntu wakadi mutahuluke kudi bana babo." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Butumbi buandi budi bu muanʼa bute wa ngombe, nsengu yandi idi bu nsengu ya ngombe wa mu mpata; yeye neatue bantu bonso ba ha buloba nsengu yandi, ne ba binunu makumi bia bantu ba mu Efelayima ne binunu bia bantu ba mu Manashe." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Bua Zebuluna yeye wakamba ne, Usanke mu kuluhuka kuebe; ne Yisakâ, usanke mu ntenta yebe." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Bobo nebabikile bantu ku mikuna, nebashiheleku milambu ya buakane: bua bobo nebadie bintu bia bungi bia mu mai manene, ne bintu bimpe bidi bisokoma muinshi mua nsenga." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Bua Gada yeye wakamba ne, Muntu wavudishila Gada disanka udi ne disanka: yeye udi walamina bu mukashi wa nyama wa ntambue, yeye udi utula diboko ne lubombo lua ku mutu kabidi." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yeye udi udianjila kudisunguila tshituha tshiandi, bualu bua etshi ntshituha tshia mukokeshi, wakalua nʼatshi kudi ba ku mutu kua bantu; yeye udi ujadika dilumbulula diakane dia Yehowa, ne mikenji yandi kudi Bena Isalele." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Bua Dana yeye wakamba ne, Dana udi bu muana wa nyama wa ntambue: udi muhika mumuke ku Bashana." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Bua Nafatale yeye wakamba ne, Nafatale wakadiukutshisha ne diakalengele, udi mûle tente ne disanka dia Yehowa. Uhiane biebe buloba bua ku dishiha ne bua ku sude." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Bua Ashe yeye wakamba ne, Ashe asanke biandi ne bana, ikale ne diakalengele kudi bana babo: atue dikasa diandi mu manyi." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Milonda yebe ya bibi bia musoko neyikale ya tshiamu tshifike ne tshiamu tshia mitaku, bukole buebe nebuikale bule bua matuku ebe onso." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Yeshuluna, kakuena mukuabo bu Nzambi, udi ushikama biandi mu diulu bua kukukuatshisha: bulengele buandi budi ku mutu kua matutu." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Nzambi wa kashidi udi muaba webe wa kushikama talalâ, ne maboko andi a tshiendelele atu akubisha: yeye wakihata bena lukuna ku mesu kuebe, ne yeye wakamba ne, Bashihai." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Isalele udi ushikama biandi talalâ, mpokolo wa Yakoba udi ha nkayandi mu madimi a blé ne a nvinyo mihia-mihia: ne matutu andi adi amatshisha dibungi." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Bena Isalele, nuenu nudi ne disanka, banganyi badi bu nuenu basungidibue kudi Yehowa! Yeye udi bu ngabu wa dikuatshisha dienu; udi bu muele wa nvita unudi nutamba nʼau bakuabo! Bantu badi nʼenu lukuna nebanukokele, nuenu nenudiate mikuna yabo mu makasa enu." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Mose wakaya ku mpata ya Moaba ku mukuna wa Nebo, ku mutu kua Pisega, kuakadi kutangilangana ne Yeleko. Yehowa wakamufila buloba buonso bua Gilada tô ne ku Dana," 
Deuteronomy34:2 ne buloba buonso bua Nafatale, ne bua Efelayima ne Manashe ne buloba buonso bua Yuda tô ne ku mai manene a ku nyima," 
Deuteronomy34:3 ne buloba bua ku Sude, ne mpata wa mu tshibanda tshia Yeleko, musoko wa mabue, tô ne ku Soâ." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Ebu mbuloba bunakalaya Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba ne, Nembuhe tunkanunuina tuenu, nakukuleshabu ne mesu ebe, kadi wewe kuena usabukaku." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Nunku Mose, muinu wa Yehowa, wakafua mu buloba bua Moaba muakamba Yehowa." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Yehowa wakamujika mu tshibanda tshia buloba bua Moaba tshiakatangilangana ne Bete-peô; kakuena muntu udi mumanye kudi lukita luandi tô ne ku dituku edi. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Hakafua Mose, yeye wakadi ne bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi: mesu andi kâkadi bileshileshi ne bukole buandi kabuakahua." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Bena Isalele bakadila Mose matuku makumi asatu mu mpata wa Moaba; nunku matuku a kudila kua Mose akashika. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, wakadi ne lungenyi munda muandi tente bualu bua Mose wakamutentekasha bianza biandi; ne Bena Isalele bakunvua di diandi, bakenza bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Ku dituku adi kakuena muprofete mukuabo mubike munkatshi mua Bena Isalele bu Mose, wakadi mumanyangane ne Yehowa ku mesu," 
Deuteronomy34:11 mu bimanyinu bionso ne mu malu a kukema akamutumina Yehowa bua kuenzeye mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne bua kuenzela Palo ne bantu bandi bonso ne buloba buandi buonso," 
Deuteronomy34:12 ne mu tshianza tshikole, ne mu buowa bunene biakenza Mose ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso." 
Joshua1:1 Hakafua Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, Yehowa wakambila Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, mukuatshishi wa Mose, ne," 
Joshua1:2 Mose, muntu wanyi, udi mufue; nunku bika biebe, usabuka musulu eu wa Yadene, wewe ne bantu aba bonso, uye mu buloba bundi mpa Bena Isalele." 
Joshua1:3 Nakanuha miaba yonso inuadiata muinshi mua makasa enu bu munakambila Mose. 
Joshua1:4 Mikalu ya buloba buenu neyikale ku tshihela etshi ne ku Lebanona eu tô ne ku musulu munene dina diau Pelata, buloba buonso bua Bena Hiti tô ne ku mai manene kudi kubuelela diba." 
Joshua1:5 Kakuena muntu udi mua kuimana ku mpala kuebe tô matuku onso autshidi ne muoyo; nengikale nʼebe bu munakadi ne Mose; tshiena ukulekela, tshiena nkushiya nkayebe." 
Joshua1:6 Ikala ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima, bualu bua wewe neutahuluke bantu aba buhianyi bua buloba bunakalaya batatuʼabo bua kubahabu." 
Joshua1:7 Anji kuikala ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima: udimuke bua kutumikila mikenji yonso yakakuambila muntu wanyi Mose; kusesuka ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi, nunku newikale ne diakalengele kuonso kuwaya." 
Joshua1:8 Mukanda eu wa mikenji yanyi kaumuki mukana muebe; kadi welangane meji a mukanda eu munya ne butuku, udimuke mua kuenza malu onso adi mafundamu; hashishe neutute dikasa dimpe, newikale ne diakalengele." 
Joshua1:9 Tshiakukuambila, anyi? Ikala ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima; kutshinyi, kukuatshiki buowa, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi webe, udi nʼebe kuonso kuwaya." 
Joshua1:10 Hashishe Yoshua wakambila miloho ya bantu ne," 
Joshua1:11 Hitshilai munkatshi mua tshitudilu, nuambile bantu ne, Dilongoluelai bia kudia, bualu bua hahita matuku asatu, nenusabuke Yadene eu, bua kuya kuangata buloba, budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munuhe bua nuenu kubuangata." 
Joshua1:12 Yoshua wakambila Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe ne," 
Joshua1:13 Nuvuluke dî diakanuambila Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi unuha dikisha, neanuhe buloba ebu." 
Joshua1:14 Bakashi benu ne bana benu bakese ne bimuna bienu nebishale mu buloba buakamba Mose dia munemu dia Yadene; nuenu bantu bakole bonso ba dikima nuhite ku mpala kua bana benu bavuale bintu bienu bia nvita, bua kubakuatshisha;" 
Joshua1:15 tô ne haha Yehowa bana benu dikisha, bu muakunuheye, ne hangatabo kabidi buloba budi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mubahe; ku nyima nenuhingane ku buloba buenu buakanuha Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, dishiya dia Yadene kudi kuhatuka diba, bua nuenu kubuangata." 
Joshua1:16 Bobo bakakudimuna Yoshua dî ne, Mei onso awakutuambila, netuênze; netuye kuonso kûdi ututuma." 
Joshua1:17 Netutumikile dî diebe bu mutuakatumikila mei onso a Mose; Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ikale nʼebe bu muakadiye ne Mose." 
Joshua1:18 Muntu yonso udi uhidia dî diebe, kayi unvua mei audi umuambila, nebamushihe; anji kuikala ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima." 
Joshua2:1 Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, wakatuma batentekedi babidi ku Shitima mu musokoko, wakabambila ne, Yai, nutangile buloba, ne Yeleko. Bobo bakaya, bakabuela mu nsubu wa mukashi muena tshiendenda dina diandi Lahaba, bakalalamu." 
Joshua2:2 Bakambila mukelenge wa Yeleko ne, Mona, balume ba Bena Isalele bakafika munemu butuku bua kutentekela buloba." 
Joshua2:3 Mukelenge wa Yeleko wakatumina Lahaba dî ne, Hatula balume bakulua kudi, bakubuela mu nsubu muebe; bualu bua bobo bakulua bua kutentekela buloba buonso." 
Joshua2:4 Mukashi eu wakangata bantu aba babidi, wakabasuika; yeye wakamba ne, Bulelela, bantu aba bakulua kundi kadi tshiakamanya kuakafumabo;" 
Joshua2:5 ne bakulua diba didibo binshila bibi bia musoko, hakuila butuku, bantu aba bakaluhuka; kadi meme tshiena mumanye kuakuyabo; nubalonde lubilu, nenubahete." 
Joshua2:6 Kadi yeye wakamana kuya nʼabo ku musaka wa nsubu wandi, wakabasokoka muinshi mua mitshi ya lin yakadiye mulonge ha musaka." 
Joshua2:7 Balume bakabalonda mu nshila tô ne ku malobo a Yadene; bakaluhuka bantu, bakaya bua kubakeba, bakinshila tshibi." 
Joshua2:8 Diambedi kabayi banze kulala tulu, yeye wakabanda kudibo ku musaka wa nsubu;" 
Joshua2:9 yeye wakambila balume aba ne, Ndi mumanye ne, Yehowa wakanuha buloba, ne buowa buakatukuata bualu buenu ne bena buloba bonso badi batekete-teketê ku mpala kuenu." 
Joshua2:10 Tuakunvua lumu bu muakumisha Yehowa mai a Dishiba Dikunze ku mpala kuenu, hanuakaluhuka mu Ejipitu; ne bu munuakenzela bakelenge babidi ba Bena Amole, Sihona ne Oga, bakadi dishiya dia Yadene, banuakashiha." 
Joshua2:11 Hatuakunvua lumu alu, mitshima yetu yakahandika, kakuena muntu umue udi mushale ne dikima mu mutshima wandi bualu buenu; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, udi Nzambi wa mu diulu ne ha buloba kabidi." 
Joshua2:12 Nunku, ndi nnusengelela ne, Nuditshihe kudi Yehowa bua bualu buanyi bu munakunuenzela bimpe, nuenu kabidi nungenzele meme ne nsubu wa tatu wanyi bimpe, numpe bianyi tshieya tshilelela;" 
Joshua2:13 nuenu nusungile tatu wanyi ne mamu wanyi, ne bana betu balume ne bana betu bakashi, ne bonso hadibo nʼabo, nusungile mioyo yetu ku lufu." 
Joshua2:14 Balume aba bakamuambila ne, Netudie mioyo yetu bua kukufuila. Biwikala kuyi usokolola bualu buetu ebu hatuha Yehowa buloba, netukuenzele malu a luse ne a bushuwa." 
Joshua2:15 Nunku yeye wakabatuma ne muonshi ha dididishi dia nsubu, bualu bua nsubu wandi wakadi mutuangane ne lumbu lua musoko, yeye wakashikama ha mutu ha lumbu." 
Joshua2:16 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu ku mikuna, nunku bantu badi banulonda kabanuhetshi; nusokomeku matuku asatu tô ne hahinganabo; ne ku nyima nudi bamanye mua kuya mu nshila wenu." 
Joshua2:17 Balume bakamuambila ne, Tuetu netubinge ku mutshihu uwakututshihisha nʼau." 
Joshua2:18 Mona, hatuabuela mu buloba, wewe neusuike nshinga eu mukunze ku dididishi dia nsubu kuwakututuila: udisangishe mu nsubu webe ne tatu webe ne mamu webe ne bana benu ne bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu webe." 
Joshua2:19 Kadi muntu yonso udi uluhuka ku bibi bia nsubu webe, Uyaya mu misesu, mashi andi neikale ha mutu handi, ne tuetu netubinge; ne muntu yonso udi wikala nʼebe mu nsubu, mashi andi neikale ha mitu hetu, biamulengabo tshianza." 
Joshua2:20 Kadi biwamba bualu ebu, hashishe tuetu netubinge bua mutshihu uwakututshihisha nʼau." 
Joshua2:21 Yeye wakamba ne, Bualu buikale bu mudi mei enu. Yeye wakabatuma, ne bobo bakaya; yeye wakasuika nshinga mukunze eu ku dididishi dia nsubu." 
Joshua2:22 Bobo bakumuka ne bakaya ku mikuna, bakashalaku matuku asatu tô ne kakahingana babakebi; bantu bakabakeba mu nshila yonso, kadi kabakabamona." 
Joshua2:23 Balume aba babidi bakahueka bafume ku mikuna, bakasabuka musulu, bakatua kudi Yoshua, muana wa Nuna; bakamuambila malu onso akabakuata." 
Joshua2:24 Bobo bakambila Yoshua ne, Bulelela, Yehowa wakadia buloba buonso mu bianza bietu; ne bualu bukuabo kabidi, bena buloba bonso badi batekete-teketê ku mpala kuetu." 
Joshua3:1 Yoshua wakabika ne dinda dionso; bakumuka ku Shitima, bakulua ku Yadene, yeye ne Bena Isalele bonso; bakalalaku diambedi kabayi banze kusabuka." 
Joshua3:2 Hakahita matuku asatu, miloho yakendakana munkatshi mua tshitudilu;" 
Joshua3:3 yakambila bantu ne, Hanuatangila mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bakuidi Bena Lewi bautuala, nenumuke ku muaba unudi, nenûlonde." 
Joshua3:4 Kadi nushiye muaba hankatshi henu ne mushete bule bua coudées binunu bibidi; kanusemenyi ha buihi nʼau, nunku nenumanye nshila unudi mua kuya; bualu bua kanuakaya mu nshila eu diambedi." 
Joshua3:5 Yoshua wakambila bantu ne, Nudijidile, bualu bua makelela Yehowa nênze malu a kukema munkatshi muenu." 
Joshua3:6 Yoshua wakambila bakuidi ne, Ambulai mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei, nusabuke ku mpala kua bantu. Bakambula mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei, bakaya ku mpala kua bantu." 
Joshua3:7 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Lelu nembange kukubandisha ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso, bua bobo bamanye ne, Nengikale nʼebe bu munakadi ne Mose." 
Joshua3:8 Wewe Wambile bakuidi badi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei ne, Hanuafika kukala kua mai a Yadene, mumane balulame mu Yadene." 
Joshua3:9 Yoshua wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Luai kunu, nunvue mei a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Joshua3:10 Yoshua wakamba ne, Bua bualu ebu nenumanye ne Nzambi wa muoyo udi munkatshi muenu, ne yeye kena uhanga kunuihatshila Bena Kanâna ne Bena Hiti ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Gigashi ne Bena Amole ne Bena Yebuse ku mpala kuenu." 
Joshua3:11 Monai, mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Mukelenge wa buloba buonso udi usabuka Yadene ku mpala kuenu." 
Joshua3:12 Nunku musungule bantu dikumi ne babidi ba mu bisamba bia Bena Isalele, muntu umue wa mu tshisamba ne tshisamba." 
Joshua3:13 Hadiata makasa a bakuidi badi batuala mushete wa Yehowa, Mukelenge wa buloba buonso, mu mai a Yadene, hashishe mai a Yadene neahanduluke, mai a ku mutu kaena ahueka, neimane dibula." 
Joshua3:14 Hakumuka bantu mu ntenta yabo bua kusabuka Yadene, bakuidi bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei bakadi ku mpala kua bantu;" 
Joshua3:15 hakalua bantu bakadi batuala mushete mu Yadene, ne bakatua bakuidi bakadi batuala mushete makasa abo ku muelelu wa mai (bualu bua mai a Yadene atu ahita ha mutu ha bibungubungu mu ngondo yonso ya kuhuola)," 
Joshua3:16 hashishe mai akadi ahueka ku mutu akimana, akimana dibula kule ku Adama, musoko udi ku luseke lua Saletana, ne mai a kumanda akadi ahueka ku dishiha dia Alabâ, ku Dishiba dia Luehu, akahanduluka; ne bantu bakasabuka buludiludi ne Yeleko." 
Joshua3:17 Bakuidi bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa bakimana balulame mu lusenga lume munkatshi mua Yadene; ne Bena Isalele bonso bakasabuka mu lusenga lume tô ne hakasabuka bantu bonso Yadene. 
Joshua4:1 Hakasabuka bantu bonso Yadene, Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne," 
Joshua4:2 Usungule bantu dikumi ne babidi munkatshi mua bantu, muntu umue wa mu tshisamba ne tshisamba," 
Joshua4:3 ubambile ne, Nuangate mabue dikumi ne abidi munkatshi mua Yadene mu muaba wakadiata makasa a bakuidi, nuatuale, nuâele hanshi mu muaba unudi nulala butuku ebu." 
Joshua4:4 Hashishe, Yoshua wakabikila bantu dikumi ne babidi bakasunguleye munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, muntu wa mu tshisamba ne tshisamba;" 
Joshua4:5 Yoshua wakabambila ne, Hitai ku mpala kua mushete wa Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, munkatshi mua Yadene, muntu ne muntu ambule dibue, aditeke ha diaha diandi, bu bungi bua bisamba bia Bena Isalele;" 
Joshua4:6 nunku mabue au neikale munkatshi muenu bu tshivulukidi, ne hanukonka bana benu mu tshikondo tshialua ne, Mabue â ntshinyi?" 
Joshua4:7 nenubambile ne, Bualu bua mai a Yadene akahanduluka ku mpala kua mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa; hakasabuka mushete Yadene, mai a Yadene akahanduluka; ne mabue au neikale bu tshivulukidi kudi Bena Isalele tshiendelele." 
Joshua4:8 Bena Isalele bakenza bu muakamba Yoshua, bakambula mabue dikumi ne abidi munkatshi mua Yadene, bu bungi bua bisamba bia Bena Isalele, bu muakambila Yehowa Yoshua; bakâtuala ku muaba wakadibo balala, bakâelaku hanshi." 
Joshua4:9 Yoshua wakajadika mabue au dikumi ne abidi munkatshi mua Yadene mu muaba wakadiata makasa a bakuidi bakatuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei: adiku tô ne ku lelu. 
Joshua4:10 Bakuidi bakadi batuala mushete bakimana munkatshi mua Yadene, tô ne hakashika malu onso akambila Yehowa Yoshua bua kuambileye bantu, malu onso akambila Mose Yoshua; ne bantu bakasabuka lubilu." 
Joshua4:11 Hakasabuka bantu bonso, ku nyima bakuidi bakasabuka ne mushete wa Yehowa ku mesu kua bantu." 
Joshua4:12 Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe bakasabuka bavuale bintu biabo bia nvita ku mpala kua Bena Isalele, bu muakabambila Mose;" 
Joshua4:13 bantu bu binunu makumi anai bakadi ne bintu biabo bia nvita bilongolola bakasabuka ku mpala kua Yehowa, bua kuluangana ku mpata ya Yeleko." 
Joshua4:14 Dituku adi Yehowa wakabandisha Yoshua ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso; bobo bakamutshina bu muakatshinabo Mose matuku onso a muoyo wandi. 
Joshua4:15 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne," 
Joshua4:16 Wambile bakuidi badi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi ne, Umukai mu Yadene." 
Joshua4:17 Yoshua wakambila bakuidi ne, Umukai mu Yadene." 
Joshua4:18 Hakumuka bakuidi bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa, hakadiatabo makasa abo ha buloba bume, hashishe mai a Yadene akahingana mu muaba wau, aka tua ku muelelu bu diambedi." 
Joshua4:19 Bantu bakumuka ku Yadene mu matuku dikumi a ngondo wa kunfudilu, bakasa tshitudilu mu Gilegala ku esete kua Yeleko." 
Joshua4:20 Mabue au dikumi ne abidi akangatabo mu Yadene, Yoshua wakâjadika mu Gilegala." 
Joshua4:21 Yeye wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Biakonka bana benu batatuʼabo mu matuku atshidi ku mpala ne, Mabue â ntshinyi?" 
Joshua4:22 nenumanyishe bana benu ne, Bena Isalele bakasabuka Yadene eu ha lusenga lume." 
Joshua4:23 Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakûmisha mai a Yadene ku mpala kuenu, tô ne hanuakasabuka bonso, bu muakenza Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ku Dishiba Dikunze diakumisheye ku mpala kuetu, tô ne hatuakasabuka buonso buetu;" 
Joshua4:24 bua bantu bonso ba ha buloba bamanye ne, Tshianza tshia Yehowa tshidi tshikole; ne bua nuenu nutshine Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, tshiendelele." 
Joshua5:1 Hakunvua bakelenge bonso ba Bena Amole bakadi dishiya dia Yadene dia ku wesete, ne bakelenge bonso ba Bena Kanâna bakadi bashikama kukala kua mai manene, lumu ne, Yehowa wakûmisha mai a Yadene ku mpala kua Bena Isalele tô ne hakasabukabo bonso, hashishe mitshima yabo yakahandika, kabakadi ne dikima kabidi bualu bua Bena Isalele." 
Joshua5:2 Mu matuku au Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Enza tuele tua mabue, utengule Bena Isalele tshiakabidi." 
Joshua5:3 Yoshua Wakenza tuele atu, wakatengula Bena Isalele ku muaba udibo babikila ne, Mukuna wa tshitenguidi." 
Joshua5:4 Ebu mbualu buakabatenguila Yoshua; bualu bua balume bonso, bena nvita, bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu bakafua mu nshila mu tshihela, ku nyima kua kuhatuka kuabo mu Ejipitu."
