Joshua5:5 Bantu bonso bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu bakadi batengula, kadi bantu bonso bakalelabo mu nshila mu tshihela hakaluhukabo mu Ejipitu kabakadi batengula." 
Joshua5:6 Bualu bua Bena Isalele bakendakana mu tshihela bidimu makumi anai tô ne hakajimishibua bena nvita bonso bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu, bualu bua bobo kabakunvua dî dia Yehowa; bakadi Yehowa muditshihe kudibo ne, Nuenu kanuena nutangila buloba buakalaya Yehowa batatu benu ne, Nennuhebu; buloba budi bûle tente ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Joshua5:7 Bana babo bakahingasheye mu muaba wabo Yoshua wakabatengula; bualu bua kabakadi batengudibue mu nshila. 
Joshua5:8 Hakashikishabo kutengula bantu bonso, bobo bakashala mu miaba yabo mu tshitudilu tô ne hakondahibuabo." 
Joshua5:9 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Lelu nakumusha bundu bua Ejipitu kunudi. Nunku badi babikila muaba au ne, Gilegala tô ne lelu." 
Joshua5:10 Bena Isalele bakasa tshitudilu mu Gilegala; dilolo bakadia bidia bia disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa mu mpata ya Yeleko mu matuku dikumi ne anai a ngondo. 
Joshua5:11 Ku nyima kua disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa bakadia bintu biakasanganabo mu buloba, ne mampa adi kayi ne luevene ne manvua akoshabo." 
Joshua5:12 Mana akashika hakabangabo kudia bintu biakasanganabo mu buloba; Bena Isalele kabakadi ne mana kabidi; bakadia anu bintu biakasanganabo mu buloba bua Kanâna tshidimu atshi. 
Joshua5:13 Hakadi Yoshua hehi ne Yeleko, wakabanduluka, wakatangila ne, monai, muntu wakadi muimane hehi nʼandi ne muele wa nvita mu tshianza tshiandi, ne Yoshua wakaya kudiye, wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi ku luseke luetu anyi ku luseke lua badi nʼetu lukuna?" 
Joshua5:14 Yeye wakitaba ne, Nansha, nakutuma bu mukelenge wa musumba wa Yehowa. Yoshua wakamututshila mpala hanshi, wakamutendelela, wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge wanyi udi Wambila muntu wandi tshinyi?" 
Joshua5:15 Mukelenge wa musumba wa Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Umushe bisabata ku makasa ebe; bua muaba ûdi muimane udi wa tshijila. Yoshua Wakenza nunku." 
Joshua6:1 Bakinshila bibi bionso bia Yeleko, bakabikanga, bualu bua Bena Isalele; muntu kakahatuka, muntu kakabuelamu." 
Joshua6:2 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Mona, nakulala Yeleko ne mukelenge wa musoko ne bena nvita bonso ba dikima mu tshianza tshiebe." 
Joshua6:3 Nuenu bena nvita bonso nenunyunguluke musoko musangu umue. Nenuenze nunku tô matuku asambombo. 
Joshua6:4 Bakuidi muanda mutekete nebaye ne mpungi muanda mutekete ya nsengu ya bimpanga ku mpala kua mushete wa tshihungidi; dituku dia muanda mutekete nenunyunguluke musoko misangu muanda mutekete, ne bakuidi nebele mpungi." 
Joshua6:5 Nunku helabo mpungi bikole, hanunvua muadi wa mpungi, bantu bonso nebele mbila; ne lumbu lua musoko neludishimbukile hanshi mu muaba walu, ne muntu yonso neabuele mu muaba udi buludiludi nʼandi." 
Joshua6:6 Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, wakabikila bakuidi, wakabambila ne, Ambulai mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei; bakuidi muanda mutekete baye ne mpungi muanda mutekete ya nsengu ya bimpanga ku mpala kua mushete wa tshihungidi wa Yehowa." 
Joshua6:7 Bakambila bantu ne, Hitai, nunyunguluke musoko, bena nvita baye ku mpala kua mushete wa Yehowa." 
Joshua6:8 Hakambila Yoshua bantu nunku, bakuidi muanda mutekete bakadi baya ne mpungi muanda mutekete ya nsengu ya bimpanga ku mpala kua Yehowa, bakahita, bakela mpungi; mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa wakabanda ku nyima." 
Joshua6:9 Bena nvita bakaya ku mpala kua bakuidi bakadi bela mpungi, bantu bakuabo bakalonda mushete, bakuidi bakadi benda bela mpungi." 
Joshua6:10 Yoshua wakambila bantu ne, Kanuedi mbila, dî dienu kadiunvuiki, di dimue kadiluhuki mukana muenu tô ne halua dituku dinanuambila ne, Elai mbila; hananuambila nunku, nuele mbila." 
Joshua6:11 Nunku yeye wakanyunguluisha mushete wa Yehowa musoko musangu umue; bantu bakalua kabidi ku tshitudilu, bakalalaku." 
Joshua6:12 Yoshua wakabika ne dinda dionso, ne bakuidi bakambula mushete wa tshihungidi wa Yehowa." 
Joshua6:13 Bakuidi muanda mutekete bakadi ne mpungi muanda mutekete ya nsengu ya bimpanga bakaya ku mpala kua mushete wa tshihungidi wa Yehowa, bakela mpungi; bena nvita bakaya ku mpala kuabo; bantu bakuabo bakadiunguisha ku nyima kua mushete wa Yehowa, bakuidi bakadi benda bela mpungi." 
Joshua6:14 Dituku dibidi bakanyunguluka musoko musangu umue, bakahingana ku tshitudilu; bakenza nunku matuku asambombo." 
Joshua6:15 Hakalua dituku dia muanda mutekete, bakabika ne dinda hakatshia butuku, bakanyunguluka musoko misangu muanda mutekete bu muakenzabo diambedi, kadi dituku adi bakanyunguluka musoko misangu muanda mutekete." 
Joshua6:16 Hakanyungulukabo musangu wa muanda mutekete, ne hakela bakuidi mpungi, Yoshua wakambila bantu ne, Elai mbila, bualu bua Yehowa wakunuha musoko." 
Joshua6:17 Musoko eu ne bintu bionso bidimu bikale bia tshijila kudi Yehowa. Anu Lahaba, mukashi wa tshiendenda, ikale ne muoyo ne bantu bonso badi nʼandi mu nsubu muandi, bualu bua yeye wakasokoka batentekedi batuakatuma." 
Joshua6:18 Nuenu nuhidie tshintu tshia tshijila; kanuangatshi tshintu tshinuakajila; binuatshiangata, nenueleshe tshitudilu tshia Bena Isalele mulau, nenutshikengeshe." 
Joshua6:19 Kadi tshiamu tshionso tshia argent ne tshia or, ne malonga a tshiamu tshia mitaku ne tshiamu tshifike bidi bajidila kudi Yehowa; bintu ebi bionso nebikale mu tshibutshilu tshia Yehowa." 
Joshua6:20 Nunku bantu bakela mbila, ne bakuidi bakela mpungi; hakunvua bantu muadi wa mpungi, bakela mbila bikole, ne lumbu luakadishimbukila, ne bantu bakabuela mu musoko, muntu yonso wakabuelamu anu mu buludiludi nʼandi, bakanyenga musoko." 
Joshua6:21 Bakashiha bionso biakadi mu musoko ku miele yabo, balume ne bakashi, bana ne bakulumpe, ngombe ne mikoko ne mpunda." 
Joshua6:22 Yoshua wakambila balume babidi bakaya kutentekela buloba ne, Yai bienu mu nsubu wa mukashi au muena tshiendenda, nulue ne mukashi ne bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi, bu munu akadi tshiha kudiye." 
Joshua6:23 Batentekedi aba bakayamu, bakalua ne Lahaba ne tatu wandi ne mamu wandi ne bana babo ne bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi; bakalua ne bena diku diandi bonso kabidi, bakabateka ku butshika bua tshitudilu tshia Bena Isalele." 
Joshua6:24 Bakosha musoko ne bintu bionso biakadimu ne kahia; anu tshiamu tshia argent ne tshia or, ne malonga a tshiamu tshia mitaku ne tshia tshiamu tshifike, bakahueka mu tshibutshilu tshia mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
Joshua6:25 Kadi Yoshua wakasungila Lahaba, mukashi muena tshiendenda, ne bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu wandi ne bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi; yeye wakashikama munkatshi mua Bena Isalele tô ne ku dituku edi, bualu bua yeye wakasokoka batentekedi bakatuma Yoshua bua kutentekela Yeleko." 
Joshua6:26 Yoshua wakadimusha bantu dituku adi, wakabambila ne, Muntu yonso udi ubika bua kuasa musoko eu wa Yeleko kabidi neikale ne mulau ku mpala kua Yehowa; habangeye kuasa musoko neajimishe muanʼa bute wandi ne hajadikeye bibi bia musoko neajimishe muanʼa mukala wandi." 
Joshua6:27 Nunku Yehowa wakadi ne Yoshua; ne lumu luandi luakatangadika buloba buonso. 
Joshua7:1 Kadi Bena Isalele bakenza bualu bubi ne tshintu tshia tshijila; bualu bua Akana, muana wa Kâmi, muana wa Zabedi, muana wa Zela wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, wakadiangatshila tshintu tshia tshijila; ne tshiji tshiakakuata Yehowa bualu bua Bena Isalele." 
Joshua7:2 Yoshua wakatuma bantu ku Ai bumuke ku Yeleko, udi hehi ne Bete-awena ku esete kua Betele, wakabambila ne, Yai bienu bua kutentekela buloba. Bantu aba bakaya, bakatentekela Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Bobo bakahingana kudi Yoshua, bakamuambila ne, Kambualu bua bantu bonso kuya nansha, kadi anu balume binunu bibidi anyi bisatu baye bua kuluisha Bena Ai; kuenzeshi bantu bonso mudimu eu nansha, bualu hua bobo badi bantu banya-banya." 
Joshua7:4 Nunku bantu bu binunu bisatu bakayaku, ne bobo bakanyema ku mpala kua Bena Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Bena Ai bakashiha bantu bu makumi asatu ne basambombo, bakabihata ku tshibi tshia musoko tô ne ku Shebalima: bakabashiha mu tshibanda kabidi; mitshima ya bantu yakatekete-teketê, yakakudimuka bu mai." 
Joshua7:6 Yoshua wakadihanda bilulu biandi, wakadikuma mpala wandi hanshi ku mpala kua mushete wa Yehowa tô ne ku dilolo; yeye ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele bakadiela buloba mu mitu." 
Joshua7:7 Yoshua wakamba ne, Aka! Mukelenge Yehowa, wewe wakulua ne bantu aba dia munemu dia Yadene bua kutufila mu bianza bia Bena Amole ne bua kutufuisha munyi? Biakadi bimpe bua tuetu kushikama dishiya dia Yadene!" 
Joshua7:8 Mukelenge, nengambe tshinyi, hela Bena Isalele bena lukuna babo nyima?" 
Joshua7:9 Bualu bua Bena Kanâna ne bena buloba bonso nebulue lumu elu, nebatunyunguluke, nebajimishe dina dietu ha buloba; ne wewe newenze tshinyi bua dina diebe dinene?" 
Joshua7:10 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Bika biebe, udi mutuile mpala hanshi tshinyi?" 
Joshua7:11 Bena Isalele bakenza bibi; bakashiha tshihungidi tshinakahunga nʼabo, bakadiangatshila tshintu tshia tshijila, bakatshiba kabidi, bakasokoka bubi buabo; bakatshiteka munkatshi mua bintu biabo mene." 
Joshua7:12 Nunku Bena Isalele kabena mua kuimana ku mpala kua bena lukuna babo; bakela bena lukuna babo nyima bualu bua bobo bakadiela mulau; meme tshiena ngikala nʼenu kabidi anu hanûmusha tshintu tshia tshijila munkatshi muenu. 
Joshua7:13 Bika biebe, ujidike bantu, ubambile ne, Nudijidile bua malu a makelela; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi Wamba ne, Tshintu tshia tshijila tshidi munkatshi muenu, nuenu Bena Isalele, nunku kanuena mua kuimana ku mpala kua bena lukuna tô ne hanûmusha tshintu tshia tshijila munkatshi muenu." 
Joshua7:14 Nunku ne dinda nulue ku tshisamba ku tshisamba: ne hasungula Yehowa tshisamba, bantu nebalue ku meku abo; ne hasungula Yehowa diku, bantu nabalue ku nsubu ne ku nsubu; ne hasungula Yehowa nsubu, bantu nebalue ku muntu ne ku muntu." 
Joshua7:15 Biasanganabo mundi ne tshintu tshia tshijila, nebamuoshe mu kahia, ne yeye ne bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi, bualu bua wakashiha tshihungidi tshia Yehowa, Wakenza bualu buhote mu Isalele." 
Joshua7:16 Nunku Yoshua wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakasangisha Bena Isalele ku bisamba biabo; bakasungula tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Joshua7:17 Yeye wakalua ha buihi ne meku a Yuda; wakasungula diku dia Bena Zela; wakalua ne diku dia Bena Zela muntu ne muntu; wakasungula Zabedi. 
Joshua7:18 Yeye wakalua ne ba mu nsubu wa Zabedi ku muntu ku muntu, wakasungula Akana, muana wa Kâmi, muana wa Zabedi, muana wa Zela wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Yoshua wakambila Akana ne, Muanʼanyi, ndi nkusengelela ne, Utumbishe Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, umutondele bubi buebe; ungambile buwakuenza, kubusokoki kundi nansha." 
Joshua7:20 Akana wakambila Yoshua ne, Bulelela, nakenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, bubi; bualu bunakuenza budi nunku:" 
Joshua7:21 hanakatangila tshilulu tshimpe tshia Bena Babulona ne nshekele nkama ibidi ya argent ne tshiamu tshia or tshia mushinga wa nshekele makumi atanu munkatshi mua bintu, lukuka luakangata, nakabiangata; mona, bidi bisokoka mu buloba munkatshi mua ntenta wanyi, ne tshiamu tshia argent tshidi muinshi muabi." 
Joshua7:22 Yoshua wakatuma ba-messager, ne bobo bakaya lubilu ku ntenta; monai, biakadi bisokoka mu ntenta wandi, ne tshiamu tshia argent muinshi muabi." 
Joshua7:23 Bakabiangata munda mua ntenta, bakalua nʼabi kudi Yoshua ne Bena Isalele bonso; bakahueka hanshi ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
Joshua7:24 Yoshua ne Bena Isalele bonso bakangata Akana, muana wa Zela, ne tshiamu tshia argent ne tshilulu ne tshiamu tshia or ne bana bandi balume ne bana bandi bakashi ne ngombe yandi ne mpunda yandi ne mikoko yandi ne ntenta wandi ne bionso biakadiye nʼabi: bakalua nʼabi mu tshibanda tshia Akola." 
Joshua7:25 Yoshua wakamba ne, Wewe wakatukengesha bualu kai? Yehowa neakukengeshe lelu. Bena Isalele bonso bakamukuma ne mabue yeye ne bintu biandi bionso kabidi, bakabiosha ne kahia." 
Joshua7:26 Bakunguisha mushiki munene wa mabue ha mutu handi; udiku tô ne lelu; ne Yehowa wakalekela tshiji tshiandi. Nunku badi babikila muaba au ne, Tshibanda tshia Akola tô ne lelu." 
Joshua8:1 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Kutshinyi, kukuatshila buowa, angata bena nvita bonso; bika biebe, ya ku Ai; tangila, nakamana kufila mukelenge wa Ai ne bantu bandi ne musoko wandi ne buloba buandi mu tshianza tshiebe;" 
Joshua8:2 ne wewe newenzele Ai ne mukelenge wa musoko bu muwakenzela Yeleko ne mukelenge wau; kadi bintu bia mu musoko ne bimuna, nubiangate bu bintu bienu; utume balaminyi ku nyima kua musoko." 
Joshua8:3 Nunku Yoshua wakabika ne bena nvita bonso bua kuya ku Ai; Yoshua wakasungula bantu ba bukitu ne ba dikima binunu makumi asatu, wakabatuma butuku." 
Joshua8:4 Yeye wakabambila ne, Monai, nulale batentekela ku nyima kua musoko; kanuikadi kule ne musoko, kadi nudimuke bienu." 
Joshua8:5 Meme ne bantu bonso badi nʼanyi netusemene ha buihi ne musoko; ne hahatukabo kutudi bu diambedi, tuetu netunyeme ku mpala kuabo." 
Joshua8:6 Bobo nebatulonde tô ne hasemenabo kule ne musoko; bualu bua bobo nebambe ne, Badi batunyema, bu muakenzabo diambedi: nunku tuetu netubanyeme." 
Joshua8:7 Hashishe nuenu balaminyi nenubike, nenunyenge musoko; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neaufile mu bianza bienu." 
Joshua8:8 Hanuanyenga musoko nenuwoshe ne kahia; nuenze bu mu dî dia Yehowa; monai, nakanuambila." 
Joshua8:9 Yoshua wakabatuma, bakaya, bakalalaku bu balaminyi: bakashikama hankatshi ha Betele ne Ai, ku wesete kua Ai; kadi Yoshua wakalala munkatshi mua bantu butuku abu." 
Joshua8:10 Yoshua wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakasangisha bantu, ne yeye ne bakulu ba Bena Isalele bakaya ku mpala kua bantu ku Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Bena nvita bonso bakadi nʼandi bakaya, bakasemena ha buihi, bakalua ku mpala kua musoko; bakasa tshitudilu ku luseke lua nôde lua Ai; tshibanda tshiakadi hankatshi habo ne Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Wakangata bantu bu binunu bitanu, wakabatuma bu balaminyi hankatshi ha Betele ne Ai ku luseke lua wesete lua musoko." 
Joshua8:13 Nunku yeye wakangata bantu bu binunu bitanu, wakabateka bua kudiabo bu balaminyi ku luseke lua nôde lua musoko; Yoshua wakaya mu tshibanda butuku abu." 
Joshua8:14 Hakatangila mukelenge wa Ai bualu ebu, wakabika lubilu ne dinda ne bantu bandi bonso, bakaluhuka mu musoko bua kuluangana ne Bena Isalele mu muaba wakasungulabo ku mpala kua mpata wa Alabâ; kadi yeye kakamanya ne balaminyi bakadi ku nyima kua musoko." 
Joshua8:15 Yoshua ne Bena Isalele bonso hakadimanyisha bu bantu batekete ku mpala kuabo, bakanyema mu nshila wa ku tshihela." 
Joshua8:16 Bantu bonso bakadi mu musoko bakadisangisha bua kubalonda, ne bobo bakalonda Yoshua, bakashiya musoko wabo kule." 
Joshua8:17 Kakuakadi mulume umue mushale mu Ai anyi Betele, buonso buabo bakalonda Bena Isalele: bakashiya musoko, bakalonda Bena Isalele." 
Joshua8:18 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Tangisha difuma didi mu tshianza tshiebe ku Ai; bualu bua nengufile mu tshianza tshiebe. Yoshua wakatangisha difuma diakadi mu tshianza tshiandi ku Ai." 
Joshua8:19 Balaminyi bakabika lukasa ku muaba wabo, bakanyema lubilu hakabandisheye tshianza tshiandi, bakabuela mu musoko, bakaunyenga; bakosha musoko ne kahia." 
Joshua8:20 Hakatangila Bena Ai ku nyima kuabo, monai, muishi wa musoko ubanda mulu; kabakadi ne bukole bua kunyema luseke elu anyi lukuabo; bakadi banyema ku tshihela bakakudimuna bakadi babalonda." 
Joshua8:21 Hakatangila Yoshua ne Bena Isalele bonso ne balaminyi bakanyenga musoko, ne muishi wa musoko wakabanda mulu, bobo bakakudimuka, bakashiha Bena Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Bakuabo bakadi mu musoko bakaluhuka kudibo munkatshi mua Bena Isalele, bakuabo ku luseke elu, bakuabo ku luseke elu; bakabashiha tô, kakuakadi umue wabo wakahanduka." 
Joshua8:23 Bakakuata mukelenge wa Ai ne muoyo, bakalua nʼandi kudi Yoshua." 
Joshua8:24 Hakashikisha Bena Isalele kushiha Bena Ai bonso bakadi mu madimi ne mu tshihela kuakabalondabo, ne hakahonabo bonso ku miele ya nvita, tô ne hakajiminabo bonso, hashishe Bena Isalele bonso bakahingana ku Ai, bakaubutula ku miele ya nvita." 
Joshua8:25 Bena Ai bonso ne balume ne bakashi bakafua dituku adi bakadi binunu dikumi ne bibidi, bantu bonso ba mu Ai mene." 
Joshua8:26 Bualu bua Yoshua kakahingasha tshianza tshiandi tshiakadiye muolole ne difuma tô ne hakabutuleye Bena Ai bonso kabutu. 
Joshua8:27 Anu bimuna ne bintu bikuabo biakahuolabo bia mu musoko, Bena Isalele bakabiangata bu bintu biabo bu mu dî dia Yehowa diakambileye Yoshua." 
Joshua8:28 Nunku Yoshua wakosha Ai ne kahia, wakunguisha bionso biakadimu mushiki tshiendelele, wakahaudibua tô ne ku dituku edi." 
Joshua8:29 Bakowa mukelenge wa Ai ku mutshi tô ne ku dilolo; bakamba diba kubuela Yoshua wakamba ne, Batulule tshitalu tshiandi, bakatshiela ku mbelu kua tshibi tshia musoko, bakunguisha mushiki wa mabue ha mutu hatshi, udihu tô ne ku dituku edi." 
Joshua8:30 Yoshua wakashila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, tshioshelu mu mukuna wa Ebala," 
Joshua8:31 bu muakambila Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, Bena Isalele, bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose; bakasa tshioshelu ne mabue adibo kabayi banze kusonga ne biamu; bakafidilahu milambu ya kuosha kudi Yehowa ne milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala." 
Joshua8:32 Wakafunda ha mabue â mikenji ya Mose, yakafundeye ku mpala kua Bena Isalele." 
Joshua8:33 Bena Isalele bonso ne bakulu babo ne tuhita ne balumbuluishi babo bakimana ku luseke ne luseke lua mushete ku mpala kua bakuidi, Bena Lewi, bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa; benyi kabidi bakimana bu bantu baledibue ba munkatshi muabo; tshituha tshiabo ku mukuna wa Gelezima ne tshituha tshikuabo ku mukuna wa Ebala; bu muakadianjila Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, kubambila, bua kuvudishila Bena Isalele masanka." 
Joshua8:34 Ku nyima wakababadila mei onso a mikenji, ne masanka ne milau, bu muakadi malu onso mafunda mu mukanda wa mikenji." 
Joshua8:35 Yoshua kakashiya dî dimue dia mei onso akamba Mose; yeye wakâbadila tshisumbu tshijima tshia Bena Isalele ne bakashi ne bana bakese ne benyi bakadi munkatshi muabo. 
Joshua9:1 Kakunyua bakelenge bonso ba dia munemu dia Yadene, ku mikuna ne mu bibanda ne kukala kua mai manene ku mpala kua Lebanona, Bena Hiti ne Bena Amole ne Bena Kanâna ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse, lumu elu;" 
Joshua9:2 Buonso buabo bakahunga dî diabo, bakadisangisha bua kutuisha Yoshua ne Bena Isalele." 
Joshua9:3 Kakunyua Bena Gibeona muakenzela Yoshua Yeleko ne Ai," 
Joshua9:4 hobo bakenza budimu, bakadisangisha bu miloho yakalua kule, bakateka bibombi bikulakasha ha nyima ha mpunda yabo, ne milondo ya nvinyo ya biseba bihandike ne bilamakasha," 
Joshua9:5 ne bisabata bilamakasha ku makasa abo, ne bilulu bisunsuke hamʼbidi habo, ne mampa abo onso akûma, akakuata butu." 
Joshua9:6 Bakaya kudi Yoshua mu tshitudilu ku Gilegala, bakamuambila ne Bena Isalele bonso ne, Tuetu tuakufuma kule ku buloba bukuabo, nunku nuhunge nʼetu tshihungidi." 
Joshua9:7 Bena Isalele bakambila Bena Hiwi ne, Bumue nuenu nudi ba munkatshi muetu, nunku netuhunge nʼenu tshihungidi munyi?" 
Joshua9:8 Bobo bakambila Yoshua ne, Tuetu tudi bahika bebe. Yoshua wakabakonka ne, Nudi banganyi? Nuakufuma kudi kunyi?" 
Joshua9:9 Bakamuambila ne, Bahika bebe bakalua kule ku buloba bukuabo bualu bua dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi webe; bualu bua tuetu tuakunvua lumu luandi ne malu onso akenzeye mu Ejipitu," 
Joshua9:10 ne malu akenzeleye bakelenge babidi ba Bena Amole bakadi dishiya dia Yadene, Sihona, mukelenge wa Heshebona, ne Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, wakadi mu Ashatelota." 
Joshua9:11 Bakulu betu ne bena kuetu bonso bakatuambila ne, Angata! bintu bia kudia mu nshila mu bianza bienu, yai bienu kusangakana nʼabo, nubambile ne, Tuetu tudi bahika benu, nuhunge nʼetu tshihungidi." 
Joshua9:12 Mampa â akadi ne kahia hatuakângata mu nsubu yetu dituku dituakabanga luendu bua kulua kunudi, kadi monai, adi mûme, adi makuate butu;" 
Joshua9:13 ne milondo ei ya nvinyo ituakûsha tente yakadi mihia-mihia, kadi monai, yakahandika; ne bilulu ebi ne bisabata bietu biakakulakasha bualu bua luendu bakatamba bule." 
Joshua9:14 Bantu bakangata bintu biabo, kabakakonka lungenyi kudi Yehowa." 
Joshua9:15 Yoshua wakabaha budishikaminyi, wakahunga nʼabo tshihungidi, bua bobo bikale ne muoyo; bakelenge ba mu Isalele bakaditshiha kudibo." 
Joshua9:16 Hakahita matuku asatu ku nyima bamane kuhunga nʼabo tshihungidi, bakunvua lumu ne bobo bakadi nʼabo mutumba, bakashikama munkatshi muabo." 
Joshua9:17 Bena Isalele bakabisha luendu luabo, bakalua ku misoko yabo dituku disatu. Mena a misoko yabo akadi Gibeona ne Kefila ne Bêlota ne Kîyata-yalima." 
Joshua9:18 Bena Isalele kabakabashiha, bualu bua bakelenge babo bakamana kuditshiha kudibo mu dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele. Kadi bantu bonso bakatontolola bakelenge babo." 
Joshua9:19 Kadi bakelenge bonso bakabambila ne, Tuakamana kuditshiha kudibo mu dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ne katataka katuena bamanye mua kubalenga tshianza." 
Joshua9:20 Ebu mbualu butudi mua kubenzela bua bobo bashale ne muoyo: tshiji katshitukuatshi bualu bua mutshihu utuakuditshiha nʼau. 
Joshua9:21 Bakelenge bakabambila kabidi ne, Bobo bikale ne muoyo. Nunku bakalua bahandi ba nkunyi ne basunyi ba mai kudi Bena Isalele bonso, bu muakabambila bakelenge babo." 
Joshua9:22 Yoshua wakababikila, wakabambila ne, Bualu kai nuakatudinga ne, Tudi ba kule, nuenu bikale anu munkatshi muetu?" 
Joshua9:23 Nunku nudi ne mulau, kakuena umue wenu wahanga kuikala muhika: buonso buenu nenuikale bahandi ba nkunyi ne basunyi ba mai ba mu nsubu wa Nzambi wanyi." 
Joshua9:24 Bobo bakakudimuna Yoshua dî ne, Bualu bua bakambila bantu bebe bu muakadi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, muambile muntu wandi Mose bua kunuha buloba buonso, ne bua kushiha bena buloba bonso ku mpala kuenu; nunku tuakatshina bikole bua bualu buenu, ne tuakenza bualu ebu." 
Joshua9:25 Katataka, tudi mu tshianza tshiebe, utuenzele budi buimpe ku mesu kuebe." 
Joshua9:26 Wakabenzela nunku, wakabasungila mu tshianza tshia Bena Isalele, bua bobo kababashihi." 
Joshua9:27 Yoshua wakabayuisha dituku adi bu bahandi ba nkunyi ne basunyi ba mai ba Bena Isalele ne ba tshioshelu tshia Yehowa mu muaba wakadiye musungule tô ne ku dituku edi. 
Joshua10:1 Kakunyua Adoni-sedeke, mukelenge wa Yelushalema, bu muakanyenga Yoshua Ai, ne muakauhauleye; ne bu muakenzeleye Yeleko ne mukelenge wau ne bu muakenzeleye Ai ne mukelenge wau; ne bu muakaheta Bena Gibeona budishikaminyi kudi Bena Isalele, ne bu muakashikamabo munkatshi muabo;" 
Joshua10:2 nunku bobo bakatamba kutshina, bualu bua Gibeona wakadi musoko munene, mufuane tshimenga tshia bakelenge mene mene, ne bualu bua musoko eu wakatamba Ai bunene, ne balume bonso bakadi ne bukitu." 
Joshua10:3 Nunku Adoni-sedeke, mukelenge wa Yelushalema, wakatumina Hohama, mukelenge wa Hebelone, ne Pilama, mukelenge wa Yâmuta, ne Yafia, mukelenge wa Lakisha, ne Debî, mukelenge wa Egelona, dî, Wamba ne," 
Joshua10:4 Luai bienu kundi, nunkuatshishe, tushihai Gibeona; bualu bua bobo bakaheta budishikaminyi kudi Yoshua ne kudi Bena Isalele." 
Joshua10:5 Hashishe bakelenge batanu ba Bena Amole, mukelenge wa Yelushalema, ne mukelenge wa Hebelone ne mukelenge wa Yâmuta ne mukelenge wa Lakisha ne mukelenge wa Egelona, bakadisangisha hamue, bakaya, bobo ne misumba yabo yonso, bakasa tshitudilu ku mpala kua Gibeona, bakaluangana ne benʼau nvita." 
Joshua10:6 Bena Gibeona bakatumina Yoshua dî ku tshitudilu tshia ku Gilegala, bamba ne, Kukandi tshianza tshiebe kudi bahika bebe nansha, lua biebe kutudi lubilu, utusungile, utukuatshishe, bualu bua bakelenge bonso ba Bena Amole badi bashikama ku mikuna bakadisangisha bua kutuluisha." 
Joshua10:7 Nunku Yoshua wakumuka ku Gilegala, yeye ne bena nvita bonso bakadi nʼandi ne bena ngulu bonso ba bukitu." 
Joshua10:8 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne, Kubatshinyi nansha, bualu bua nakubafila mu tshianza tshiebe; kakuena muntu wa kudibo udi mua kuimana ku mpala kuebe." 
Joshua10:9 Nunku Yoshua wakalua kudibo tshimpalantanta, bualu bua yeye wakumuka ku Gilegala wenda butuku bujima." 
Joshua10:10 Yehowa wakabalubakasha ku mpala kua Bena Isalele, wakabashiha ne dishiha dikole ku Gibeona; bakabihata mu nshila wa kubanda ku Bete-holona tô ne ku Azeka ne Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Hakanyemabo ku mpala kua Bena Isalele, ne hakadibo bahueka ku tshibanda tshia Bete-holona tô ne ku Azeka, Yehowa wakahamatshishila mabue a nvula mu diulu ne bakafua: bantu bakafua ku mabue a nvula bakahita bungi bua bantu bakashihabo ku miele ya nvita kudi Bena Isalele." 
Joshua10:12 Hashishe Yoshua wakakula ne Yehowa mu dituku diakafila Yehowa Bena Amole mu bianza bia Bena Isalele; ne ku mesu kua Bena Isalele yeye wakamba ne, Diba, imane biebe talalâ ku Gibeona; ne wewe, ngondo, mu tshibanda tshia Ayalona." 
Joshua10:13 Diba diakimana ne ngondo wakimana tô ne hakadisombuela Bena Isalele kudi bena lukuna babo. Bualu ebu kabuena bufunda mu mulunda wa Yashâ, anyi? Diba diakimana mulu kaba kamue, kadiakabuela lukasa tô dituku dijima." 
Joshua10:14 Kakuakadi dituku dikuabo bu dituku edi ku mpala kuadi anyi ku nyima kuadi, hakunvua Yehowa dî dia muntu nunku; bualu bua Yehowa wakadila Bena Isalele nvita." 
Joshua10:15 Yoshua ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi bakahingana ku tshitudilu tshia ku Gilegala. 
Joshua10:16 Bakelenge aba batanu bakanyema, bakasokoma mu lubuebue lua ku Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Bakambila Yoshua ne, Tuakasangana bakelenge aba batanu basokome mu lubuebue lua ku Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Yoshua wakamba ne, Bungulushai mabue manene, nuateke ku mushiku wa lubuebue, ne bantu bimaneku bua kubalama;" 
Joshua10:19 kadi kanushadiku, londai bena lukuna benu, shihai badi bashadile ha nyima; kanuitabushi bua babuele mu misoko yabo kabidi, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakabafila mu bianza bienu." 
Joshua10:20 Hakashikisha Yoshua ne Bena Isalele kubashiha ne dishiha dikole tô ne hakabajimishabo, tshituha tshiabo tshiakadi tshishala, tshiakahuela mu misoko yakadi ne ngumbu." 
Joshua10:21 Bantu bonso bakahingana kudi Yoshua ku tshitudilu tshia ku Makeda talalâ: kakuakadi muntu wakahotela Bena Isalele kahidi. 
Joshua10:22 Yoshua wakamba ne, Unzululai mushiku wa lubuebue, hatulai bakelenge aba batanu mu lubuebue, luai nʼabo kundi." 
Joshua10:23 Bakenza nunku, bakahatula bakelenge aba batanu mu lubuebue, bakalua nʼabo kudiye, ne mukelenge wa Yelushalema ne mukelenge wa Hebelone ne mukelenge wa Yâmuta ne mukelenge wa Lakisha ne mukelenge wa Egelona." 
Joshua10:24 Hakaluabo ne bakelenge aba batanu kudi Yoshua, Yoshua wakabikila balume bonso ba mu Isalele, wakambila tuhita tua bena nvita tuakadi nʼandi ne, Luai bienu ha buihi, diatai makasa enu ha nshingu ya bakelenge aba batanu. Bobo bakalua ha buihi, bakadiata makasa abo ha nshingu yabo." 
Joshua10:25 Yoshua wakabambila ne, Kanutshinyi, kanukuatshiki buowa; nuikale ne bukole ne mitshima ya dikima, bualu bua Yehowa nênzele bena lukuna benu bonso banudi nuluisha nunku." 
Joshua10:26 Ku nyima Yoshua wakabashiha, wakabowa ku mitshi itanu; bakadi balembelela ku mitshi tô ne ku dilolo." 
Joshua10:27 Hakamba diba kubuela, Yoshua wakela dî diandi ne bakahatuka ku mitshi, bakabela mu lubuebue luakadibo basokome, bakateka mabue manene ku mushiku wa lubuebue, adiku tô ne ku dituku edi mene mene." 
Joshua10:28 Ku dituku adi Yoshua wakanyenga musoko wa Makeda kabidi, wakabashiha ne mukelenge wabo ku muele wa nvita; wakashiha bantu bonso bakadimu, kakuakadi muntu wakashala; yeye wakenzela mukelenge wa Makeda bu muakenzeleye mukelenge wa Yeleko." 
Joshua10:29 Yoshua wakumuka ku Makeda ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi, bakalua ku Libina, bakaluisha Bena Libina;" 
Joshua10:30 Yehowa wakabafila ne mukelenge wabo mu bianza bia Bena Isalele; wakashiha Libina ku muele wa nvita, ne bantu bonso bakadimu; kakashiyamu nansha umue; yeye wakenzela mukelenge wau bu muakenzeleye mukelenge wa Yeleko." 
Joshua10:31 Yoshua wakumuka ku Libina ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi; bakalua ku Lakisha, bakasaku tshitudilu ne bakabaluisha;" 
Joshua10:32 Yehowa wakafila Lakisha mu bianza bia Bena Isalele, wakaunyenga dituku dibidi, wakashiha ku muele wa nvita ne bantu bonso bakadimu, bu muakenzeleye Libina." 
Joshua10:33 Hashishe Holama, mukelenge wa Gezê, wakalua bua kukuatshisha Bena Lakisha; Yoshua wakamushiha ne bantu bandi bonso, kakashiya nansha umue." 
Joshua10:34 Yoshua wakumuka ku Lakisha ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi, bakalua ku Egelona, bakasaku tshitudilu, bakauluisha." 
Joshua10:35 Bakanyenga musoko dituku adi, bakashiha ku muele wa nvita; wakabutula bantu bonso bakadimu dituku adi, bu muakenzeleye Lakisha." 
Joshua10:36 Yoshua wakumuka ku Egelona ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi, bakalua ku Hebelone, bakauluisha." 
Joshua10:37 Bakaunyenga, bakashiha ku muele wa nvita, ne mukelenge wau, ne misoko yau yonso, ne bantu bonso bakadimu; kakashiya nansha umue, bu muakenzeleye Egelona; kadi yeye wakaubutula ne bantu bonso bakadimu." 
Joshua10:38 Yoshua wakahingana ne Bena Isalele bonso ku Debî, bakauluisha;" 
Joshua10:39 wakanyenga musoko ne mukelenge wau, ne misoko yau yonso; bakabashiha ne muele wa nvita ne bakabutula bantu bonso bakadimu; kakashiya nansha umue: bu muakenzeye ku Hebelone, nunku wakenzela Debî ne mukelenge wau bu muakenzeleye Libina ne mukelenge wau." 
Joshua10:40 Nunku Yoshua wakalekesha buloba bujima, ne bua ku mikuna, ne bua ku Sude, ne bua mu bibanda, ne bua ku tukunakuna, ne bakelenge babu bonso: kakashiya nansha umue, wakabutula bonso bakadi ne muoyo, bu muakamba Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
Joshua10:41 Yoshua wakabashiha ku Kadeshe-bânea tô ne ku Gaza, ne ba mu buloba buonso bua Goshena tô ne ku Gibeona." 
Joshua10:42 Bakelenge aba bonso ne buloba buabo buonso Yoshua wakanyenga musangu umue, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, wakadila Bena Isalele nvita." 
Joshua10:43 Yoshua wakahingana, ne Bena Isalele bonso, ku tshitudilu tshia ku Gilegala." 
Joshua11:1 Ku nyima hakunvua Yabina, mukelenge wa Hasô, lumu elu, yeye wakatuma di kudi Yobaba, mukelenge wa Madona, ne mukelenge wa Shimelona ne mukelenge wa Akasafa," 
Joshua11:2 ne kudi bakelenge bonso ba ku luseke lua nôde lua ku mikuna ne ba mu Alabâ ku luseke lua Sude wa Kinelota, ne mu bibanda ne ku mutu kua mikuna ya Dô ku luseke lua wesete," 
Joshua11:3 ne kudi Bena Kanâna ba ku esete ne ba ku wesete ne Bena Amole ne Bena Hiti ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Yebuse ba ku mikuna ne Bena Hiwi kuinshi kua mukuna wa Hêmona mu buloba bua Misepa. 
Joshua11:4 Bobo bakahatuka, bobo ne misumba yabo yonso ba bungi be bu nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene, ne tubalu ne makalu a bungi." 
Joshua11:5 Bakelenge aba bonso bakadisangisha hamue; bakalua, bakasa tshitudilu ku mai a Meloma bua kuluangana ne Bena Isalele." 
Joshua11:6 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne. Kanubatshinyi; makelela diba edi nembafile bonso bashihibue ku mpala kua Bena Isalele; nenukose tubalu tuabo tuonso mifungu yatu ya mikono, nenuoshe makalu abo mu kahia." 
Joshua11:7 Nunku Yoshua wakalua kudibo lubilu ne bena nvita bonso bakadi nʼandi ku mai a Meloma, wakadiela kudibo." 
Joshua11:8 Yehowa wakabafila mu bianza bia Bena Isalele, bakabashiha, bakabihata tô ne ku Sidona, musoko munene, ne ku Miselefota-mayima, ne ku tshibanda tshia Misepa tshia ku esete; bakabashiha tô, kabakashiya nansha umue." 
Joshua11:9 Yoshua wakabenzela bu muakamuambila Yehowa: wakakosa tubalu mifingu ya mikono, wakosha makalu abo mu kahia." 
Joshua11:10 Ku tshikondo atshi Yoshua wakahingana, wakanyenga Hasô, wakashiha mukelenge wau ne muele wa nvita; bualu bua Hasô wakadi ku mutu kua makelenge au onso diambedi." 
Joshua11:11 Bakashiha bantu bonso bakadimu ne miele ya nvita, bakaba-butula; kabakashiya nansha umue ne muoyo; wakosha Hasô ne kahia." 
Joshua11:12 Yoshua wakanyenga misoko yonso ya bakelenge aba ne bakelenge bai kabidi, wakabashiha ne muele wa nvita, wakababutula, bu muakamba Mose, muntu wa Yehowa." 
Joshua11:13 Bena Isalele kabakosha misoko yakadi ha mikuna, anu Hasô; Yoshua wakawosha." 
Joshua11:14 Bena Isalele bakadiangatshila bintu bionso bia mu misoko ei ne bimuna; kadi bakashiha muntu yonso ne muele wa nvita tô ne hakababutulabo bonso; kabakashiya umue uhuyakana. 
Joshua11:15 Bu muakambila Yehowa muntu wandi Mose, nunku Mose wakambila Yoshua, ne Yoshua Wakenza nunku; kakalekela bualu bumue kabuyi buenjibue bua mu malu onso akambila Yehowa Mose." 
Joshua11:16 Nunku Yoshua wakanyenga buloba abu buonso, ne buloba bua mikuna ne luseke lujima lua ku Sude, ne buloba buonso bua Goshene, ne bibanda, ne Alabâ, ne buloba bua mikuna ya Isalele ne bibanda biabu;" 
Joshua11:17 ku mukuna wa Halaka wa ku nshila wa ku Sei tô ne ku Bâla-gada wa mu tshibanda tshia Lebanona kuinshi kua mukuna wa Hêmona; wakakuata bakelenge hai bonso, wakabataha, wakabashiha." 
Joshua11:18 Yoshua wakaluangana ne bakelenge aba bonso tô musangu mule. 
Joshua11:19 Kakuakadi musoko umue wakahunga dî bua kuikala talalâ ne Bena Isalele, anu Bena Hiwi bakadi bashikama mu Gibeona; bakayinyenga yonso anu ku nvita." 
Joshua11:20 Yehowa wakitabusha bua bakoleshe mitshima yabo bua kuluisha Bena Isalele nvita, bua Bena Isalele bababutule bonso, kababafuidi luse, kadi babashihe, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose." 
Joshua11:21 Ku tshikondo atshi Yoshua wakalua, wakabutula Bena Anaka ba ku mikuna ne ku Hebelone ne ku Debî ne ku Anaba ne ku mikuna yonso ya Yuda ne ku mikuna yonso ya Isalele: Yoshua wakababutula ne misoko yabo." 
Joshua11:22 Kakuakadi muena Anaka wakashala mu buloba bua Bena Isalele; anu mu Gaza ne mu Gata ne mu Ashedodo bakuabo bakashalamu. 
Joshua11:23 Nunku Yoshua wakanyenga buloba buonso bu muakambila Yehowa Mose; Yoshua wakabuabanyina Bena Isalele bu buhianyi buabo, tshisamba luseke luatshi tshisamba luseke luatshi. Buloba buakashala talalâ, kakuyi nvita." 
Joshua12:1 Au mmena a bakelenge ba buloba bakashihabo kudi Bena Isalele, ne bakanyengabo buloba buabo dishiya dia Yadene kudi kuhatukila diba, ku tshibanda tshia Ânona tô ne ku mukuna wa Hêmona, ne buloba buonso bua Alabâ bua ku esete:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi mushikame mu Heshebona, ne wakadi mukokeshe ku Aloe udi ku muelele wa tshibanda tshia Ânona, ne musoko udi munkatshi mua tshibanda, ne tshituha tshia Gilada tô ne ku musulu wa Yaboka, mukalu wa Bena Amona;" 
Joshua12:3 ku Alabâ tô ne ku mai a Kinelota a ku esete tô ne ku mai a Alabâ, Dishiba dia Luehu mene, a ku esete mu nshila wa ku Bete-yishimota; ne ku luseke lua ku Sude, kuinshi kua mukuna wa Pisega;" 
Joshua12:4 tô ne ku mukalu wa Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, ne wa bakadi bashala ba Bena Lefa bakadi bashikama mu Ashetalota ne mu Edelei," 
Joshua12:5 wakadi mubakokeshe mu mukuna wa Hêmona ne mu Saleka, ne mu Bashana mujima tô ne ku mukalu wa Bena Geshû ne Bena Mâka ne tshituha tshia Gilada udi ku mukalu wa Sihona, mukelenge wa Heshebona." 
Joshua12:6 Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, ne Bena Isalele bakabashiha; ne Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, wakamuha Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bu buhianyi buabo." 
Joshua12:7 Au mmena a bakelenge ba buloba bakashihabo kudi Yoshua ne Bena Isalele ku luseke lua wesete lua Yadene, ku Bâla-gada mu tshibanda tshia Lebanona tô ne ku mukuna wa Halaka mu nshila wa ku Sei; Yoshua wakabuabanyina bisamba bia Bena Isalele bu buhianyi buabo, bu muakatahuluilabo bisamba;" 
Joshua12:8 mu buloba bua ku mikuna, ne bua mu bibanda ne bua mu Alabâ, ne buloba bua ku tukuna, ne bua mu tshihela, ne bua mu Sude; Bena Hiti ne Bena Amole ne Bena Kanâna ne Bena Pelizi ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse:" 
Joshua12:9 mukelenge umue wa mu Yeleko, mukelenge umue wa mu Ai hehi ne Betele," 
Joshua12:10 mukelenge umue wa mu Yelushalema ne mukelenge umue wa mu Hebelone," 
Joshua12:11 mukelenge umue wa mu Yâmuta, mukelenge umue wa mu Lakisha," 
Joshua12:12 mukelenge umue wa mu Egelona, mukelenge umue wa mu Gezê," 
Joshua12:13 mukelenge umue wa mu Debî, mukelenge umue wa mu Gedê," 
Joshua12:14 mukelenge umue wa mu Homa, mukelenge umue wa mu Alada," 
Joshua12:15 mukelenge umue wa mu Libina, mukelenge umue wa mu Adulama," 
Joshua12:16 mukelenge umue wa mu Makeda, mukelenge umue wa mu Betele," 
Joshua12:17 mukelenge umue wa mu Tapua, mukelenge umue wa mu Hefê," 
Joshua12:18 mukelenge umue wa mu Afeke, mukelenge umue wa mu Lashalona," 
Joshua12:19 mukelenge umue wa mu Malona, mukelenge umue wa mu Hasô," 
Joshua12:20 mukelenge umue wa mu Shimelona-melona, mukelenge umue wa mu Akasafa," 
Joshua12:21 mukelenge umue wa mu Tanaka, mukelenge umue wa mu Megido," 
Joshua12:22 mukelenge umue wa mu Kedeshe, mukelenge umue wa mu Yokenama mu Kâmele," 
Joshua12:23 mukelenge umue wa mu Dô ku mukuna wa Dô, mukelenge umue wa mu Goyima mu Gilegala," 
Joshua12:24 mukelenge umue wa mu Tîsa: bakelenge bonso makumi asatu ne umue. 
Joshua13:1 Yoshua wakadi muntu mununu ne wa bidimu bikumbane; Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi muntu mununu ne wa bidimu bikumbane, ne buloba bunene butshidi bushala bua nuenu kubuangata." 
Joshua13:2 Ebu mbuloba butshidi bushala: nseke yonso ya Bena Peleshete, ne ya Bena Geshû bonso;" 
Joshua13:3 ku Shihô udi ku mpala kua Ejipitu tô ne ku mukalu wa Ekelona ku luseke lua nôde ludi bibadibue bu lua Bena Kanâna; bakelenge batanu ba Bena Peleshete; Bena Gaza, Bena Ashedodo, Bena Ashakalola, Bena Giti, ne Bena Ekelona; ne Bena Awa kabidi," 
Joshua13:4 ku luseke lua Sude; buloba buonso bua Bena Kanâna, ne Meala udi wa Bena Sidona, tô ne ku Afeke ku mukalu wa Bena Amole;" 
Joshua13:5 buloba bua Bena Gebala ne Lebanona mujima kudi kuhatukila diba, ku Bâla-gada udi kuinshi kua mukuna wa Hêmona tô ne ku mukalu wa Hamata;" 
Joshua13:6 bantu bonso badi bashikama ku mikuna ya Lebanona tô ne ku Miselefota-mayima ne kudi Bena Sidona bonso; meme nembihate ku mesu kua Bena Isalele; wewe wanji kubuabanyina Bena Isalele ne nshobo bu buhianyi buabo bu munakakuambila. 
Joshua13:7 Nunku wewe wabanyina bisamba tshitema ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe buloba ebu bu buhianyi buabo. 
Joshua13:8 Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshikuabo tshia Bena Manashe bakamana kuangata buhianyi buabo buakabahabo kudi Mose dishiya dia Yadene ku esete, bu muakabaha Mose, muntu wa Yehowa:" 
Joshua13:9 ku Aloê udi ku muelelu wa tshibanda tshia Ânona, ne musoko udi munkatshi mua tshibanda, ne mpata mujima wa Medeba tô ne ku Dibona;" 
Joshua13:10 ne misoko yonso ya Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole wakadi mukokeshe mu Heshebona tô ne ku mukalu wa Bena Amona;" 
Joshua13:11 ne Gilada ne mukalu wa Bena Geshû ne Bena Mâka ne mukuna wonso wa Hêmona, ne buloba buonso bua Bashana tô ne ku Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 bukelenge buonso bua Oga bua mu Bashana, wakadi mukokeshe bantu mu Ashetalota ne mu Edelei (wakadi wa bakadi bashala ba Bena Lefa); bualu bua Mose wakataha bantu aba, wakabihata." 
Joshua13:13 Kadi Bena Isalele kabakihata Bena Geshû ne Bena Mâka; kadi Bena Geshû ne Bena Mâka badi bashikama munkatshi mua Bena Isalele tô ne ku dituku edi. 
Joshua13:14 Yeye kakaha tshisamba tshia Lewi buhianyi nansha; milambu idibo boshila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ha kahia, mbuhianyi buabo, bu muakabambileye." 
Joshua13:15 Mose wakaha tshisamba tshia Lubena buhianyi bu bungi bua meku abo. 
Joshua13:16 Mukalu wabo wakadi ku Aloê udi ku muelelu wa tshibanda tshia Ânona ne musoko udi munkatshi mua tshibanda ne mpata mujima wa Medeba; 
Joshua13:17 Heshebona ne misoko yonso idi mu mpata; Dibona ne Bamota-bâla ne Bete-bâla-meona," 
Joshua13:18 ne Yahasa ne Kedemota ne Mefâta," 
Joshua13:19 Kiyatayima ne Sibema ne Selete-shaha udi munkatshi mua tshibanda," 
Joshua13:20 ne Bete-peô, ne tukuna tua Pisega, ne Bete-yeshimoto," 
Joshua13:21 ne misoko yonso ya mu mpata ne bukelenge buonso bua Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, wakadi mukokeshe mu Heshebona, ne bakelenge ba Midiyana, Ewe ne Lekema, ne Sû ne Hula ne Leba, bana ba Sihona bakadi bashikama mu buloba bakashihabo kudi Mose." 
Joshua13:22 Belâma kabidi, muana wa Beo, mutempi wa mbuku, Bena Isalele bakamushiha ne muele wa nvita munkatshi mua bantu bakuabo bakashihabo." 
Joshua13:23 Mukalu wa Bena Lubena wakadi musulu wa Yadene ne mukalu wau. Ebu mbuhianyi bua Bena Lubena ku meku abo, ne bimenga ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua13:24 Mose wakaha tshisamba tshia Bena Gada buhianyi bu bungi bua meku abo. 
Joshua13:25 Mukalu wabo wakadi ku Yazê ne misoko yonso ya Gilada ne tshituha tshia buloba bua Bena Amona tô ne ku Aloe udi ku mpala kua Laba; 
Joshua13:26 ne ku Heshebona tô ne ku Lamata-misepa ne Betonima; ne ku Mahanayima tô ne ku mukalu wa Debî; 
Joshua13:27 ne mu tshibanda, Bete-halama ne Bete-nimema ne Sukota ne Safona, tshituha tshikuabo tshia bukelenge bua Sihona, mukelenge wa Heshebona, ku mukalu wa Yadene tô ne kunfudilu kua mai a Kinelete dishiya dia Yadene ku esete," 
Joshua13:28 Ebu mbuhianyi bua Bena Gada ku meku abo, bimenga ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua13:29 Mose wakaha tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe buhianyi: buakadi bua tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia bana ba Manashe bu bungi bua meku abo. 
Joshua13:30 Mukalu wabo wakadi ku Mahanayima, Bashana mujima, bukelenge buonso bua Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, ne misoko yonso ya Yai, idi mu Bashana, misoko makumi asambombo:" 
Joshua13:31 ne tshituha tshia Gilada ne Ashetalota ne Edelei; misoko ya mu bukelenge bua Oga mu Bashana yakadi ya Maki, muana wa Manashe, ya tshituha tshia bana ba Maki ku meku abo." 
Joshua13:32 Au mmahianyi akabanya Mose mu mpata ya Moaba dishiya dia Yadene ku Yeleko ku esete," 
Joshua13:33 Kadi Mose kakaha tshisamba tshia Lewi buhianyi nansha: Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, mbuhianyi buabo bu muakabambileye." 
Joshua14:1 Au mmahianyi akangata Bena Isalele mu buloba bua Kanâna, akababanyinabo kudi Eleazâ muakuidi, ne Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, ne kudi bakadi ku mutu kua meku a batatu a mu bisamba bia Bena Isalele;" 
Joshua14:2 bakatahulula muhianyi abo ne nshobo, bu muakambila Yehowa Mose, bua bisamba tshitema ne bua tshituha tshia tshisamba." 
Joshua14:3 Bualu bua Mose wakamana kuha bisamba bibidi ne tshituha buhianyi buabo dishiya dia Yadene; kadi yeye kakaha Bena Lewi buhianyi munkatshi muabo nansha. 
Joshua14:4 Bualu bua bana ba Yosefe bakadi bisamba bibidi, Manashe ne Efelayima: kabakaha Bena Lewi buhianyi mu buloba, anu misoko ya kushikamabo ne miaba ya kudishabo bimuna biabo ne ya kutekabo bintu biabo." 
Joshua14:5 Bena Isalele bakenza bu muakambila Yehowa Mose; bakabanya buloba. 
Joshua14:6 Bena Yuda bakalua kudi Yoshua mu Gilegala. Kaleba, muana wa Yefune, Muena Kenizi, wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi mumanye bualu buakambila Yehowa Mose, muntu wa Nzambi, bualu buanyi ne bualu buebe mu Kadeshe-bânea." 
Joshua14:7 Nakatshidi bidimu makumi anai hakantuma Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, ku Kadeshe-bânea bua kutentekela buloba; nakahingana kudiye kabidi ne dî diakadi mu mutshima wanyi." 
Joshua14:8 Bana betu batuakaya nʼabo bakatekesha mitshima ya bantu; kadi meme nakalonda Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi." 
Joshua14:9 Mose wakaditshiha dituku adi ne, Bulelela, buloba buwakadiata makasa ebe nebuikale kûdi ne kudi bana bebe bu buhianyi tshiendelele, bualu bua wewe wakalonda Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi mene mene." 
Joshua14:10 Katataka mona, Yehowa wakundama ne ntshidi ne muoyo, bu muakambeye tô bidimu ebi makumi anai ne bitanu, ku dituku diakambila Yehowa Mose dî adi, hakadi Bena Isalele bendakana mu tshihela: lelu ndi ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne bitanu." 
Joshua14:11 Ntshidi ne bukole lelu, bu munakadi nʼabu dituku diakantuma Mose; bu muakadi Bukole buanyi dituku adi, mbu mutshidibu katataka, bua kuluangana nvita ne bua kuya ne bua kuhingana." 
Joshua14:12 Katataka Umpe bianyi luseke elu lua ku mikuna, bu muakamba Yehowa dituku adi; bualu bua wewe wakunyua dituku adi bu muakadiku Bena Anaka, ne misoko minene ya ngumbu; bikala Yehowa nʼanyi, nembihate, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
Joshua14:13 Yoshua wakamuvudishila disanka; yeye wakaha Kaleba, muana wa Yefune, Hebelone bu buhianyi." 
Joshua14:14 Nunku Hebelone wakalua buhianyi bua Kaleba, muana wa Yefune, Muena Kenizi, tô ne ku dituku edi; bualu bua yeye wakalonda Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele mene mene." 
Joshua14:15 Dina dia Hebelone diambedi diakadi Kîyata-âba; muntu eu Aba wakatamba balume bonso ba munkatshi mua Bena Anaka. Buloba buakashala talalâ, kakuyi nvita." 
Joshua15:1 Luseke lua tshisamba tshia Bena Yuda ku meku abo luakafika ku mukalu wa Edome tô ne ku tshihela tshia Sina ku luseke lua ku sude, kunfudilu kua buloba bua ku sude." 
Joshua15:2 Mukalu wabo wa ku sude wakadi kunfudilu kua Dishiba dia Luehu, ku tshinkonya tshia mai tshidi tshitangila ku sude;" 
Joshua15:3 makalu wabo wa ku sude wakayila ku mutu kua Akalabima, wakalonda butshika bua Sina, wakabandila ku sude ku luseke lua Kadeshe-bânea, wakayila ku Heselona, wakabandila ku Adâ, wakanyunguluka ku Kâka;" 
Joshua15:4 wakayila ku Asumona, wakayila tô ne ku kasulu ka Ejipitu; kunshikidilu kua mukalu kuakadi ku mai manene: eu newikale mukalu wenu wa ku luseke lua Sude." 
Joshua15:5 Mukalu wa ku esete wakadi Dishiba dia Luehu tô ne kunshikidilu kua Yadene. Mukalu wa ku luseke lua ku nôde wakadi ku tshinkonya tshia mai tshiakadi kunshikidilu kua Yadene; 
Joshua15:6 mukalu wakabandila ku Bete-hogola, wakayila ku nôde kua Bete-alabâ; mukalu wakabandila ku dibue dia Bohana, muana wa Lubena;" 
Joshua15:7 mukalu wakabandila ku Debî ku tshibanda tshia Akola, wakayila ku nôde kudi kutangilangana ne Gilegala udi kuinshi kua mukuna wa Adumima, udi ku muelelu wa musulu wa ku sude; mukalu wakayila ku mai a Ene-shemeshe, wakashiha ku Ene-logele;" 
Joshua15:8 mukalu wakabandila ku tshibanda tshia muana wa Hinoma tô ne ku luseke lua Bena Yebuse ku sude (eu udi Yelushalema mene); mukalu wakabandila ku mutu kua mukuna udi ku mpala kua tshibanda tshia Hinoma ku wesete, udi kunfudilu kua tshibanda tshia Bena Lefa ku nôde;" 
Joshua15:9 mukalu wakadi ku mutu kua mukuna tô ne ku mushimi wa mai a Nefetoa, tô ne ku bimenga bia ku mutu kua mukuna wa Efelona; mukalu wakayila tô ne ku Bala (eu udi Kîyata-yalima mene);" 
Joshua15:10 mukalu wakanyunguluka ku Bâla ku wesete ku mukuna wa Sei, wakayila ku luseke lua mukuna wa Yalima lua ku nôde (eu udi Kasalona mene), wakahuekela ku Bete-shemeshe, wakanyunguluka ku Timena;" 
Joshua15:11 mukalu wakayila ku luseke lua Ekelona lua ku nôde; mukalu wakayila tô ne ku Shikelona, wakaya tô ne ku mukuna wa Bâla, wakahatuka ku Yabenêle; kunshikidilu kua mukalu kuakadi kukala kua mai manene." 
Joshua15:12 Mukalu wabo wa ku wesete wakadi mai manene. Eu mmukalu wa Bena Yuda ku meku abo. 
Joshua15:13 Yeye wakaha Kaleba, muana wa Yefune, tshituha tshiandi munkatshi mua Bena Yuda bu mu dî dia Yehowa kudi Yoshua, musoko wa Kîyata-âba, tatu wa Anaka (eu udi musoko wa Hebelone mene)." 
Joshua15:14 Kaleba wakihata bana balume basatu ba Anaka: Sheshai ne Ahimana ne Talemai, bana ba Anaka." 
Joshua15:15 Wakaya kuluangana ne Bena Debî: dina dia Debî diambedi diakadi Kîyata-sefe. 
Joshua15:16 Kaleba wakamba ne, Muntu yonso watamba musoko wa Kîyata-sefe, udi ûnyenga, nemmuhe Akasa, muanʼanyi wa bakashi, bu mukashi wandi." 
Joshua15:17 Oteniele, muana wa Kenasa, muanʼabo ne Kaleba, wakaunyenga: yeye wakamuha Akasa, muanʼandi wa bakashi, bu mukashi wandi." 
Joshua15:18 Hakalueye kudiye, yeye wakamusengelela bua yeye kulomba tatu wandi budimi; mukashi wakahuka ha nyima ha mpunda wandi, ne Kaleba wakamuebesha ne, Udi musue tshinyi?" 
Joshua15:19 Yeye wakamuitaba ne, Unvudishile disanka; bualu bua wewe wakunteka ku buloba bua ku Sude, Umpe bianyi kabidi mishimi ya mai. Yeye wakamuha mishimi ya mai yakadi ku mutu ne yakadi kuinshi." 
Joshua15:20 Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Yuda ku meku abo. 
Joshua15:21 Bimenga bia kunfudilu kua tshisamba tshia Bena Yuda ku mukalu wa Edome ku Sude biakadi Kabesêle ne Edê ne Yagû," 
Joshua15:22 ne Kina ne Dimona ne Adada," 
Joshua15:23 ne Kedeshe ne Hasô ne Yitenana," 
Joshua15:24 ne Zifa ne Teleme ne Bealota," 
Joshua15:25 Hasôhadata ne Keliyota-heselona (eu udi Hasô mene)," 
Joshua15:26 Amama ne Shema ne Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hasâ-gada, Heshemona, Bete-pelete," 
Joshua15:28 ne Hasâ-shuala ne Bê-sheba ne Bizeyoteya," 
Joshua15:29 Bâla ne Iyima ne Eseme," 
Joshua15:30 Eletolada ne Kesila ne Homa," 
Joshua15:31 ne Sikelaga ne Mademana ne Sanesana," 
Joshua15:32 ne Lebaota ne Shilihima ne Ayina ne Limona: bimenga bionso bidi makumi abidi ne tshitema ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:33 Mu tshibanda: Eshetaola ne Solea ne Ashena 
Joshua15:34 ne Zanoa ne Ene-ganima, Tapua ne Enama," 
Joshua15:35 Yâmuta ne Adulama, Soko ne Azeka" 
Joshua15:36 ne Shâlayima ne Aditayima ne Gedela ne Gedelotayima; bimenga dikumi ne binai ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:37 Senana ne Hadasha ne Migedala-gada," 
Joshua15:38 ne Dileana ne Misepe ne Yoketêle," 
Joshua15:39 Lakisha ne Bosakata ne Egelona," 
Joshua15:40 ne Kabona ne Lamama ne Kudisha," 
Joshua15:41 ne Gedelote ne Bete-dagona, ne Nâma ne Makeda; bimenga dikumi ne bisambombo ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua15:42 Libina ne Etê ne Ashana," 
Joshua15:43 ne Ifeta ne Ashena ne Nesiba," 
Joshua15:44 ne Kila ne Akeziba ne Malesha; bimenga tshitema ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:45 Ekelona ne bimenga ne misoko yabi; 
Joshua15:46 ku Ekelona tô ne kukala kua mai manene, bimenga bionso biakadi ku luseke lua Ashedodo ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua15:47 Ashedodo ne bimenga ne misoko yabi; Gaza ne bimenga ne misoko yabi; ku kasulu ka Ejipitu tô ne kukala kua mai manene. 
Joshua15:48 Ku mikuna: Shamî ne Yatî ne Soko," 
Joshua15:49 ne Dana ne Kîyata-sana (eu udi Debî kabidi)," 
Joshua15:50 ne Anaba ne Eshetemo ne Anima," 
Joshua15:51 ne Goshene ne Holona ne Gilo; bimenga dikumi ne tshimue ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:52 Alabâ ne Duma ne Eshana," 
Joshua15:53 ne Yanima ne Bete-tapua ne Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 ne Humeta ne Kîyata-âba (eu udi Hebelone kabidi) ne Siô; bimenga tshitema ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:55 Maona, Kâmele ne Zifa ne Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 ne Yizelele ne Yokedama ne Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kayina, Gibea ne Timena; bimenga dikumi ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua15:58 Halelula, Bete-sû ne Gedô," 
Joshua15:59 ne Mâlata ne Bete-anota ne Eletekona; bimenga bisambombo ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:60 Kîyata-bâla (eu udi Kîyata-yalima kabidi) ne Laba; bimenga bibidi ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua15:61 Mu tshihela: Bete-alabâ, Midina ne Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 ne Nibeshana ne Tshimenga tshia Luehu, ne Enegedi; bimenga bisambombo ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua15:63 Kadi Bena Yuda kabakamanya mua kuihata Bena Yebuse ba mu Yelushalema: Bena Yebuse badi bashikama ne Bena Yuda tô ne ku dituku edi. 
Joshua16:1 Bana ba Yosefe bakangata buhianyi buabo ku Yadene ku Yeleko, ku mai a Yeleko ku esete, ne tshihela tshidi tshijima ku Yeleko tô ne ku mukuna wa ku Betele;" 
Joshua16:2 mukulu wakafumina ku Betele ku Luze, wakaya ku butshika bua Bena Akâ ku Atalota;" 
Joshua16:3 wakahueka ku wesete ku mukalu wa Bena Yafelete, ku butshika bua Bete-holona udi kumanda tô ne ku Gezê; kunshikidilu kua mukalu kuakadi kukala kua mai manene." 
Joshua16:4 Bana ba Yosefe, Manashe ne Efelayima, bakangata buhianyi buabo." 
Joshua16:5 Au mmukalu wa Bena Efelayima ku meku abo; mukalu wa buhianyi buabo bua ku esete wakadi Atalota-adalâ tô ne ku Bete-holona udi ku mutu; 
Joshua16:6 ne mukalu wa ku wesete wakahatuka ku Mikemetata ku nôde, ne mukalu wakanyunguluka ku esete ku Tânata-shilo, wakaya ku esete kua Yanoa;" 
Joshua16:7 wakahueka ku Yanoa ku Atalota ne ku Nâla tô ne ku Yeleko, wakahatuka ku Yadene." 
Joshua16:8 Mukalu wakayila ku wesete kua Tapua ku musulu wa Kana; wakahatuka kukala kua mai manene. Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Efelayima ku meku abo; 
Joshua16:9 ne bimenga biakatahuluilabo Bena Efelayima munkatshi mua buhianyi bua Bena Manashe; ne bimenga bionso ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua16:10 Kabakihata Bena Kanâna bakadi mu Gezê: kadi Bena Kanâna batshidi bashikama munkatshi mua Bena Efelayima tô ne ku dituku edi, bakatua bu bahika babo ba mudimu." 
Joshua17:1 Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Manashe, bualu bua yeye wakadi muanʼa bute wa Yosefe. Bualu bua Maki, muanʼa bute wa Manashe, tatu wa Gilada, wakaheta Gilada ne Bashana, bualu bua yeye wakadi tshilobo." 
Joshua17:2 Bakaha bana bakuabo ba Manashe tshituha tshiabo ku meku abo: bana ba Ahiezê, ne bana ba Heleka ne bana ba Aseliele ne bana ba Shekeme ne bana ba Hefê ne bana ba Shemida; aba mbana balume ba Manashe, muana wa Yosefe, ku meku abo." 
Joshua17:3 Kadi Selofehada, muana mulume wa Hefê, muana mulume wa Maki, muana mulume wa Manashe, kakadi ne bana ba balume nansha, anu bana ba bakashi; au mmena a bana bandi ba bakashi: Mahala ne Noa ne Hogela ne Mileka ne Tîsa." 
Joshua17:4 Bobo bakalua ku mpala kua Eleazâ muakuidi, ne ku mpala kua Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, ne ku mpala kua bakelenge, bakamba ne, Yehowa wakelela Mose mukenji bua kutuha buhianyi munkatshi mua bana betu: nunku yeye wakabaha buhianyi munkatshi mua bana babo ne tatu wabo bu mu dî dia Yehowa." 
Joshua17:5 Bena Manashe bakangata bituha dikumi ha mutu ha buloba bua Gilada ne Bashana budi dishiya dia Yadene; 
Joshua17:6 bualu bua bana ba bakashi ba Manashe bakangata buhianyi munkatshi mua bana bandi ba balume. Buloba bua Gilada buakadi bua bana ba balume bakuabo ba Manashe. 
Joshua17:7 Mukalu wa Bena Manashe wakadi ku Ashê tô ne ku Mikemetata udi ku mpala kua Shekeme; wakayila ku tshianza tshia balume tô ku musoko wa Bena Ene-tapua. 
Joshua17:8 Buloba bua Tapua buakadi bua Bena Manashe; kadi musoko wa Tapua wakadi ku mukaba wa Bena Manashe ngua Bena Efelayima. 
Joshua17:9 Mukalu wakahueka ku musulu wa Kana ku sude kuau; bimenga ebi biakadi bia Bena Efelayima munkatshi mua bimenga bia Bena Manashe; mukalu wa Bena Manashe wakadi ku luseke lua nôde lua musulu, wakahatukila kukala kua mai manene:" 
Joshua17:10 luseke lua ku sude luakadi lua Bena Efelayima ne luseke lua ku nôde luakadi lua Bena Manashe, ne mai manene akadi mukalu wabo; mukalu wakafika tô ne ku Ashê ku nôde ne ku Yisakâ ku esete." 
Joshua17:11 Bena Manashe bakadi ne misoko ei munkatshi mua Bena Yisakâ ne Bena Ashê: Bete-sheana ne misoko yau, ne Yibelama ne misoko yau, ne Bena Dô ne misoko yabo, ne Bena Endô ne misoko yabo, ne Bena Tanaka ne misoko yabo, ne Bena Megido ne misoko yabo, ne mikuna isatu." 
Joshua17:12 Bena Manashe kabakamanya mua kuihata bena misoko ai; kadi Bena Kanâna bakahangidisha bua kushikama mu buloba abu. 
Joshua17:13 Kadi hakaheta Bena Isalele bukole, bakalambuisha Bena Kanâna mulambu wa mudimu, kabakabihata mene." 
Joshua17:14 Bana ba Yosefe bakambila Yoshua ne, Bualu kai wewe wakatuha anu tshituha tshimue bu buhianyi buetu, tuetu tudi bantu ba bungi bualu bua Yehowa wakatusankisha?" 
Joshua17:15 Yoshua wakabambila ne, Binuikala bantu ba bungi, yai bienu muitu nuditahile muaba mu buloba bua Bena Pelizi ne bua Bena Lefa; bualu bua buloba bua mikuna ya Bena Efelayima budi butamba bukese kunudi." 
Joshua17:16 Bana ba Yosefe bakamba ne, Buloba bua ku mikuna kabuena butukumbana; Bena Kanâna bonso badi bashikama mu tshibanda badi ne makalu a biamu, ne badi mu Bete-sheana ne misoko ei ne badi mu tshibanda tshia Yizelele." 
Joshua17:17 Yoshua wakambila ba mu nsubu wa Yosefe, Bena Efelayima ne Bena Manashe, ne, Nuenu nudi bantu ba bungi, nudi ne bukole bua bungi, kanuena anu ne tshituha tshimue:" 
Joshua17:18 kadi buloba bua ku mikuna nebuikale buenu; ditu didiku, kadi nenuditahe, ne muaba au newikale wenu; nudi mua kuihata Bena Kanâna nansha bobo ne makalu a biamu nansha bobo ne bukole." 
Joshua18:1 Bena Isalele bonso bakadisangisha ku Shilo, bakashimikaku ntenta wa kusambakena; buloba buonso buakadi talalâ ku mpala kuabo." 
Joshua18:2 Bisamba bia Bena Isalele muanda mutekete biakadi bishala, kabiyi bianze kuangata buhianyi buabo." 
Joshua18:3 Yoshua wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Nuenu nenutshimbakane musangu bule munyi bua kuya bua kuangata buloba buakanuha Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu?" 
Joshua18:4 Sungulai bantu basatu ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba; nembatume, bobo nebabike, nebendakane ku buloba buonso, ne bobo nebatangile buloba bu mudi buhianyi buabo; nebalue kundi kabidi." 
Joshua18:5 Bobo nebabutahulule bituha muanda mutekete; Bena Yuda nebashikame mu tshituha tshiabo ku sude, ne Bena Yosefe nebashikame mu tshituha tshiabo ku nôde." 
Joshua18:6 Nuenu nenutahulule buloba bituha bituha muanda mutekete, nenungambile bu munuakenza; meme nennuelele nshobo ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wetu." 
Joshua18:7 Bualu bua Bena Lewi kabena ne buhianyi munkatshi muenu: bualu bua buakuidi bua Yehowa budi buhianyi buabo. Bena Gada ne Bena Lubena ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bakamana kuangata buhianyi buabo dishiya dia muamua dia Yadene ku esete, buakabahabo kudi Mose, muntu wa Yehowa." 
Joshua18:8 Bantu aba bakabika, bakaya; Yoshua wakadimusha bantu bakadi baya kutangila buloba ne, Yai bienu, nuendakane ku buloba, nuhingane kabidi kundi, nungambile bu munuamona; ne meme nennuelele nshobo kunoko ku mesu kua Yehowa mu Shilo." 
Joshua18:9 Bantu aba bakaya, bakendakana mu buloba buonso, bakafunda misoko mu mukanda, bakayitahulula mu bituha muanda mutekete; bakahingana kudi Yoshua ku tshitudilu tshia ku Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Yoshua wakabelela nshobo mu Shilo ku mesu kua Yehowa, ne Yoshua wakatahulula Bena Isalele buloba bu muakadi ditahulula diabo." 
Joshua18:11 Tshisamba tshia Benyamina tshiakangata buhianyi buatshi ku meku atshi; mukalu wabo wakahatuka hankatshi ha Bena Yuda ne Bena Yosefe. 
Joshua18:12 Mukalu wabo wa ku nôde wakadi ku Yadene: mukalu wakabanda ku nôde ku Yeleko, ne ku mikuna ya ku wesete; wakahatuka ku tshihela tshia Bete-awena." 
Joshua18:13 Mukalu wakayila ku Luze (eu udi Betele kabidi) ku luseke lua Luze lua ku sude; mukalu wakahueka ku Atalota-adala, ku mukuna udi ku luseke lua sude lua Bete-holona wa ku tshibanda." 
Joshua18:14 Mukalu wakayila nunku ku wesete ne wa kunyunguluka ku sude ku mukuna udi ku mpala kua Bete-holona ku sude; wakahatuka ku Kîyata-bâla (eu udi Kîyata-yalima), musoko wa Bena Yuda: eu mmukalu wa ku wesete." 
Joshua18:15 Mukalu wa ku Sude wakadi kunfundilu kua Kîyata-yalima; mukalu wa ku wesete wakayila tô ne ku mishimi ya mai a Nefetoa; 
Joshua18:16 mukalu wakahueka tô ne kunfudilu kua mukuna udi ku mpala kua tshibanda tshia muana mulume wa Hinoma, mu tshibanda tshia Bena Lefa ku nôde; wakahueka ku tshibanda tshia Hinoma ku luseke lua Bena Yebuse ku Sude, wakahueka kabidi tô ne ku Ene-logela;" 
Joshua18:17 wakayila ku nôde, wakahatuka ku Ene-shemeshe ne ku Gelilota ku mpala kua mukuna wa Adumima; wakahueka ku dibue dia Bohana, muana wa Lubena;" 
Joshua18:18 wakaya ku luseke ludi buludiludi ne Alabâ ku nôde, wakahueka ku Alabâ mene;" 
Joshua18:19 wakayila ku luseke lua ku nôde ku Bete-hogola; wakahatuka ku tshinkonya tshia ku nôde tshia Dishiba dia Luehu kuinshi kua Yadene ku sude: eu mmukalu wa ku sude. 
Joshua18:20 Yadene wakadi mukalu wabu wa ku esete. Ebu mbuhianyi bua Bena Benyamina ku mikalu yabo ku meku abo. 
Joshua18:21 Bimenga bia tshisamba tshia Bena Benyamina ku meku abo biakadi Yeleko ne Bete-hogola ne Emeke-kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 ne Bete-alabâ ne Semalayima ne Betele," 
Joshua18:23 ne Bena Awa ne Pâla ne Ofela," 
Joshua18:24 ne Kefâ-amonai ne Ofeni ne Geba; bimenga dikumi ne bibidi ne misoko yabi; 
Joshua18:25 Gibeona ne Lama ne Belota," 
Joshua18:26 ne Misepe ne Kefila ne Moza," 
Joshua18:27 ne Lekema ne Yipele ne Talalâ," 
Joshua18:28 ne Sela ne Elefe ne musoko wa Bena Yebuse (Yelushalema mene), Gibena ne Kîyata; bimenga dikumi ne binai ne misoko yabi. Ebu mbuhianyi bua Bena Benyamina ku meku abo." 
Joshua19:1 Buhianyi buibidi buakadi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Shimeona ku meku abo, buhianyi buabo buakadi munkatshi mua buhianyi bua Bena Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Buhianyi buabo buakadi Bê-sheba, dina dikuabo Sheba, ne Molada," 
Joshua19:3 ne Hasâ-shuala, ne Bala ne Eseme," 
Joshua19:4 ne Eletolada ne Betula ne Hôma," 
Joshua19:5 ne Sikelaga ne Bete-mâkabota ne Hasâ-susa," 
Joshua19:6 ne Bete-lebaota ne Shaluhena; bimenga dikumi ne bisatu ne misoko yabi; 
Joshua19:7 Ayina, Limona ne Ete ne Ashana; bimenga binai ne misoko yabi;" 
Joshua19:8 ne misoko yonso yakadi nuluangane ne bimenga ebi tô ne ku Bâlata-bê ne Lama wa ku Sude. Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Shimeona ku meku abo. 
Joshua19:9 Buhianyi bua Bena Shimeona buakadi munkatshi mua buhianyi bua Bena Yuda, bualu bua tshituha tshia Bena Yuda tshiakabahita bunene: nunku Bena Shimeona bakadi ne buhianyi munkatshi mua buhianyi buabo." 
Joshua19:10 Buhianyi buisatu buakadi bua Bena Zebuluna ku meku abo. Mukalu wa buhianyi buabo wakadi ku Salida; 
Joshua19:11 mukalu wabo wakayila ku wesete ku Malala tô ne ku Dabeshete; wakabatuala ku musulu udi ku mpala kua Yokenama; 
Joshua19:12 wakanyunguluka ku Salida ku esete kudi kuhatukila diba ku mukalu wa Kiselota-tabô; wakahatukila ku Dabelata, wakabandila ku Yafia;" 
Joshua19:13 wakayila ku esete ku Gata-hefê tô ne ku Eta-kasina; wakahatukila ku Limona udi ufaka ha buihi ne Nea; 
Joshua19:14 mukalu wakanyunguluka ku luseke lua nôde ku Hanatona; wakahatukila ku tshibanda tshia Yafetaele; 
Joshua19:15 ne Katata ne Nahalala ne Shimelona ne Yidala ne Beteleheme: bimenga dikumi ne bibidi ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:16 Ebu mbuhianyi bua Bena Zebuluna ku meku abo, bimenga ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua19:17 Buhianyi buinai buakadi bua Bena Yisakâ ku meku abo. 
Joshua19:18 Mukalu wabo wakadi ku Yizelele ne Kesulota ne Shunema," 
Joshua19:19 ne Hafa-layima ne Sidona ne Anahalata," 
Joshua19:20 ne Labita ne Kishiona ne Ebese 
Joshua19:21 ne Lemeta ne Ene-ganima ne Ene-hada ne Bete-pasesa," 
Joshua19:22 ne mukalu wakafika ku Tabô ne Shahasuma ne Bete-shemeshe; mukalu wakahatukila ku Yadene; bimenga dikumi ne bisambombo ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:23 Ebu mbuhianyi bua Bena Yisakâ ku meku abo: bimenga ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:24 Buhianyi buitanu buakadi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Ashê ku meku abo. 
Joshua19:25 Mukalu wabo wakadi Helekata ne Hali ne Betena ne Akasafa 
Joshua19:26 ne Alameleke ne Amada ne Mishala; Wakafika ku Kâmele ku wesete ne ku Shihô-libenata; 
Joshua19:27 wakanyunguluka ku Bete-dagona kudi kuhatukila diba, wakafika ku Zebuluna ne ku tshibanda tshia Yifetahele ku Bete-emeke ne Niele; wakahatukila ku Kabula ku tshianza tshia bakashi," 
Joshua19:28 ne Ebelona ne Lehoba ne Hamona ne Kana tô ne ku Sidona, musoko munene;" 
Joshua19:29 mukalu wakanyunguluka ku Lama ne ku musoko wa Tulo wakadi ne lumbu; mukalu wakanyunguluka ku Hosa; wakahatukila kukala kua mai manene ku luseke lua Akiziba; 
Joshua19:30 ne Uma kabidi ne Afeke ne Lehobo; bimenga makumi abidi ne bibidi ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:31 Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Ashê ku meku abo: bimenga ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:32 Buhianyi bisambombo buakadi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Nafatale ku meku abo. 
Joshua19:33 Mukalu wabo wakadi ku Helefe ku mutshi wa telebinta wa mu Sananima ne Adami-nekeba ne Yabenele tô ne ku Lakuma; wakahatukila ku Yadene; 
Joshua19:34 mukalu wakayila ku Azanotatabô, ku wesete, wakayila ku Hukoka; wakafika ku Zebuluna ku sude ne wakatua ku Ashê ku wesete, ne ku Yuda ku Yadene kudi kuhatukila diba." 
Joshua19:35 Misoko yakadi ne ngumbu yakadi Sidima, Sê ne Hamata, Lakata ne Kinelete," 
Joshua19:36 ne Adama ne Lama ne Hasô," 
Joshua19:37 ne Kedeshe ne Edelei ne Ene-hasô," 
Joshua19:38 ne Iliona ne Migedala-ele, Holema ne Bete-anata ne Bete-shemeshe; bimenga dikumi ne tshitema ne misoko yabi." 
Joshua19:39 Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Nafatale ku meku abo: bimenga ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:40 Buhianyi bua muanda mutekete buakadi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Dana ku meku abo. 
Joshua19:41 Mukalu wa buhianyi buabo wakadi Solea ne Eshetaola ne Ishemesha," 
Joshua19:42 ne Shalabina ne Ayalona ne Yitela," 
Joshua19:43 ne Elona ne Timena ne Ekelona," 
Joshua19:44 ne Eleteke ne Gibetona ne Bâlata," 
Joshua19:45 ne Yehuda ne Bene-belaka ne Gata-limona," 
Joshua19:46 ne Me-yâkona ne Lakona ne mukalu udi hehi ne Yopa. 
Joshua19:47 Mukalu wa Bena Dana wakasompoka ku mpala kuabo; bualu bua Bena Dana bakaya, bakaluangana ne Bena Leshema, bakanyenga musoko, bakaushiha ku miele ya nvita, bakashikamamu, bakidika Leshema ne, Dana, ku dina dia nkambua wabo Dana." 
Joshua19:48 Ebu mbuhianyi bua tshisamba tshia Bena Dana ku meku abo: bimenga ne misoko yabi. 
Joshua19:49 Hakashikishabo kuabanyangana buloba buakahanabo ku mikalu yabu, Bena Isalele bakaha Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, buhianyi munkatshi muabo:" 
Joshua19:50 bu mu dî dia Yehowa bakamuha musoko wakalombeye, Timena-tasela ku mikuna ya Efelayima; yeye wakasa musoko, wakashikamamu." 
Joshua19:51 Au mmahianyi akabanyabo kudi Eleazâ muakuidi, ne kudi Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, ne kudi bakadi ku mutu kua bisamba bia Bena Isalele, hakelabo nshobo mu Shilo, ku mpala kua Yehowa, ku mbelu kua ntenta wa kutendelelamu. Nunku bakashikisha kuabanya buloba." 
Joshua20:1 Yehowa wakambila Yoshua ne," 
Joshua20:2 Ambila Bena Isalele ne, Nudisunguile misoko ya kunyemena bu munakanutumina dî kudi Mose," 
Joshua20:3 mushihi wa muntu mukuabo ku mpukahuka anyemenemu; neyikale tshinyemenu tshienu kudi musombuedi. 
Joshua20:4 Yeye anyemene ku umue wa misoko ai, imane biandi ku tshibuelelu tshia musoko, ambile biandi bakulu ba musoko bualu buandi; bobo bamuteke mu musoko, bamuhe muaba, ashikame biandi munkatshi muabo." 
Joshua20:5 Biamulonda musombuedi, kabafidi mushihi mu tshianza tshiandi, bualu bua yeye wakashiha mukuandi ku mpukahuka, kakadi nʼandi lukuna diambedi." 
Joshua20:6 Yeye ashikame biandi mu musoko au tô ne himaneye ku mpala kua tshisumbu, bua kumulumbuluishabo bualu buandi, tô ne hafua muakuidi munene wa mu matuku au; hashishe mushihianganyi ahingane, alue ku musoko wandi, ne ku nsubu kuandi, ku musoko kuakadiye mumuke." 
Joshua20:7 Bakasungula Kedeshe wa mu Galela wa mu mikuna ya Nafatale, ne Shekeme wa mu mikuna ya Efelayima, ne Kîyata-âba (dina dikuabo ne, Hebelone) wa mu mikuna ya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Dishiya dia Yadene ku Yeleko ku esete bakasungula Besê wa mu tshihela tshia mu mpata wa tshisamba tshia Bena Lubena, ne Lamota wa mu Gilada wa mu tshisamba tshia Bena Gada, ne Golana wa mu Bashana wa mu tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe." 
Joshua20:9 Ai mmisoko yakasunguilabo Bena Isalele bonso, ne benyi bakadi bashikama munkatshi muabo, bua muntu yonso washiha muntu mukuabo ku mpukahuka anyemenemu, kafu biandi ku tshianza tshia musombuedi, tô ne himaneye ku mpala kua tshisumbu." 
Joshua21:1 Hashishe bakadi ku mutu kua meku a Bena Lewi bakalua kudi Eleazâ muakuidi, ne kudi Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, ne kudi bakadi ku mutu kua meku a Bena Isalele;" 
Joshua21:2 bakabambila mu Shilo mu buloba bua Bena Kanâna ne, Yehowa wakela mukenji wandi kudi Mose bua kutuha misoko ya kushikamamu ne miaba ya kudishamu bimuna bietu." 
Joshua21:3 Bena Isalele bakaha Bena Lewi misoko ei ne miaba ei munkatshi mua buhianyi buabo bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa. 
Joshua21:4 Meku a Bena Kohata akangata tshiabo tshituha; bana ba Alona muakuidi, Bena Lewi mene mene, bakangata tshiabo tshituha munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Yuda ne mu tshisamba tshia Shimeona ne mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina, bimenga dikumi ne bisatu." 
Joshua21:5 Bakuabo ba Bena Kohata bakangata tshiabo tshituha munkatshi mua meku a tshisamba tshia Efelayima ne mu tshisamba tshia Dana ne mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe, bimenga dikumi." 
Joshua21:6 Bena Gêshona bakangata tshiabo tshituha munkatshi mua meku a tshisamba tshia Yisakâ ne mu tshisamba tshia Ashê ne mu tshisamba tshia Nafatale ne mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe tshia mu Bashana, bimenga dikumi ne bisatu." 
Joshua21:7 Bena Melali ku meku abo bakangata tshiabo tshituha munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Lubena ne mu tshisamba tshia Gada ne mu tshisamba tshia Zebuluna, bimenga dikumi ne bibidi." 
Joshua21:8 Bena Isalele bakaha Bena Lewi bimenga ebi ne miaba ya ku matshika bu muakambila Yehowa Mose. 
Joshua21:9 Bakabaha bimenga ebi biakatelabo mena munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Bena Yuda ne mu tshisamba tshia Bena Shimeona; 
Joshua21:10 biakadi bia bana ba Alona ba mu meku a Bena Kohata, bakadi bana ba Lewi; tshituha tshiabo tshiakadi tshia kumudia." 
Joshua21:11 Bakabaha Kîyata-âba, Aba wakadi tatu wa Anaka (udi tshimenga tshia Hebelone) ku mikuna ya Yuda ne miaba ya ku matshika idi mitshinyunguluke." 
Joshua21:12 Kadi bakaha Kaleba, muana wa Yefune, madimi adi ha buihi ne tshimenga ne misoko yatshi bu buhianyi buandi." 
Joshua21:13 Bakaha bana ba Alona muakuidi, Hebelone, tshimenga tshia kunyemenabo kudi mushihianganyi, ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Libina ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:14 ne Yati ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Eshetemo ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:15 ne Holona ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Debî ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:16 Ayina ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Yuta ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Bete-shemeshe ne miaba ya ku matshika; bimenga tshitema munkatshi mua bisamba ebi bibidi." 
Joshua21:17 Mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina, Gibeona ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Geba ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:18 Anatota ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Alamona ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:19 Bimenga bionso bia bana ba Alona bakuidi biakadi bimenga dikumi ne bisatu ne miaba yabi ya ku matshika. 
Joshua21:20 Meku a Bena Kohata, Bena Lewi, bakashala, bakangata bimenga bia mu tshituha tshiabo tshia mu tshisamba tshia Efelayima." 
Joshua21:21 Bakabala Shekeme ne miaba ya ku matshika mu mikuna ya Efelayima, tshimenga tshia kunyemenamu, ne Gezê ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:22 ne Kibesayima ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Bete-holona ne miaba ya ku matshika; bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:23 Munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Dana, Eleteke ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Gibetona ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:24 Ayalona ne miaba ya ku matshika, Gata-limona ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:25 Munkatshi mua tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe, Tanaka ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Gata-limona ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga bibidi." 
Joshua21:26 Bimenga bionso biakashikama meku a Bena Kohata akashala biakadi dikumi ne miaba yabi ya ku matshika. 
Joshua21:27 Bakaha bana ba Geshona ba mu meku a Bena Lewi bimenga bia munkatshi mua tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe: Golana wa mu Bashana ne miaba ya ku matshika, tshimenga tshia kunyemenabo kudi mushihianganyi, ne Bêshetela ne miaba ya ku matshika; bimenga bibidi." 
Joshua21:28 Mu tshisamba tshia Yisakâ, Kishona ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Dabelata ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:29 Yâmuta ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Ene-ganima ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:30 Mu tshisamba tshia Ashê, Mishala ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Abidona ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:31 Halekata ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Lehoba ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:32 Mu tshisamba tshia Nafatale, Kedeshe wa mu Galela ne miaba ya ku matshika, tshimenga tshia kunyemenabo kudi mushihianganyi, ne Hamata-dô ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Kâtana ne miaba ya ku matshika; bimenga bisatu." 
Joshua21:33 Bimenga bionso bia Bena Gêshona ku meku abo biakadi dikumi ne bisatu ne miaba yabi ya ku matshika. 
Joshua21:34 Bakaha meku a Bena Melali, bakashala ba Bena Lewi, Yokenama ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Kâta ne miaba ya ku matshika, munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Zebuluna:" 
Joshua21:35 Dimana ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Nahalala ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:36 Munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Lubena: Besê ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Yahasa ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemota ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Mefata ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga binai." 
Joshua21:38 Munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Gada: Lamota wa mu Gilada ne miaba ya ku matshika, tshimenga tshia kunyemenabo kudi mushihianganyi, ne Mahanayima ne miaba ya ku matshika," 
Joshua21:39 Heshebona ne miaba ya ku matshika, ne Yazê ne miaba ya ku matshika: bimenga bionso binai." 
Joshua21:40 Bimenga ebi bionso biakadi bia Bena Melali, bakashala ba mu meku a Bena Lewi, bimenga dikumi ne bibidi." 
Joshua21:41 Bimenga bionso bia Bena Lewi munkatshi mua buhianyi bua Bena Isalele biakadi bimenga makumi anai ne muanda mukulu ne miaba yabi ya ku matshika. 
Joshua21:42 Bimenga ebi bionso biakadi ne miaba yabi ya ku matshika mibinyunguluke: bimenga bionso biakadi nunku. 
Joshua21:43 Nunku Yehowa wakaha Bena Isalele buloba buonso buakalayeye bankambua babo; bakabunyenga, bakashikamamu." 
Joshua21:44 Yehowa wakabaha dikisha ku nseke yonso bu muakalayeye bankambua babo; kakuakadi umue wa bena lukuna babo bonso wakamanya mua kubatantamena; Yehowa wakafua bena lukuna babo bonso mu bianza biabo. 
Joshua21:45 Kabakahanga tshintu tshimpe tshimue tshiakalaya Yehowa Bena Isalele; bakaheta bintu ebi bionso. 
Joshua22:1 Yoshua wakabikila Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe," 
Joshua22:2 wakabambila ne, Nuenu nuakatumikila mei onso akanuambila Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, nuakunyua dî dianyi mu malu onso anakunuambila;" 
Joshua22:3 kanuakalekela bana benu matuku au onso tô ne ku dituku edi, kadi nuakatumikila mei a Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Joshua22:4 Katataka Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, wakaha bana benu dikisha bu muakabambileye; nunku nuhingane, yai bienu ku ntenta yenu, ku buloba bua buhianyi buenu, buakanuha Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, dishiya dia Yadene." 
Joshua22:5 Nuikale ne dinanukila dia kutumikila mei ne mikenji biakanuambila Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, bua kusua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, ne bua kuenda mu nshila yandi yonso, ne bua kutumikila mikenji yandi, ne bua kulamata kudiye, ne bua kumukuatshia mudimu ne mitshima yenu yonso ne mioyo yenu yonso." 
Joshua22:6 Nunku Yoshua wakabandisha a disanka, wakalayangana nʼabo; bakaya ku ntenta yabo." 
Joshua22:7 Mose wakamana kuha tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe buhianyi mu Bashana; kadi Yoshua wakaha tshituha tshiabo tshikuabo buhianyi dishiya dia Yadene ku wesete. Hakabatuma Yoshua ku ntenta yabo, hashishe yeye wakabandisha disanka," 
Joshua22:8 wakabambila ne, Yai bienu ne biuma bia bungi ku ntenta yenu, ne bimuna bia bungi, ne tshiamu tshia argent ne or ne tshiamu tshia mitaku ne tshiamu tshifike, ne bilulu bia bungi; nuabanyangane ne bana benu bintu binuakanyenga kudi bena lukuna benu." 
Joshua22:9 Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe bakumuka munkatshi mua Bena Isalele mu Shilo wa mu buloba bua Kanâna, bakaya ku buloba ba Gilada ku buloba bua buhianyi buakangatabo bu muakadi di dia Yehowa kudi Mose." 
Joshua22:10 Hakafuabo ku luseke ludi hehi ne Yadene mu buloba bua Kanâna, Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe, bakasa tshioshelu ku Yadene, tshioshelu tshinene tshia dikema." 
Joshua22:11 Bena Isalele bakuabo bakunvua lumu ne, Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bakasa tshioshelu ku mukalu wa buloba bua Kanâna hehi ne Yadene ku luseke lua Bena Isalele aba." 
Joshua22:12 Hakunvua Bena Isalele lumu alu, tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele aba tshiakadisangisha ku Shilo, bua kuluangana nʼabo." 
Joshua22:13 Bena Isalele aba bakatuma Pinehasa, muana mulume wa Eleazâ muakuidi, kudi Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe," 
Joshua22:14 bakamutuma ne bukelenge dikumi, mukelenge wa ku tshisamba mukelenge wa ku tshisamba; muntu ne muntu wakadi ku mutu bua binunu bia meku a Bena Isalele a mu tshisamba tshiandi." 
Joshua22:15 Bakalua kudi Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe mu buloba bua Gilada, bakabambila ne," 
Joshua22:16 Tshisumbu tshionso tshia bantu ba Yehowa tshidi tshianza ne, Bualu ebu bubi bunuakuenzela Nzambi wa Isalele budi munyi? Munyi munuakulekela kulonda Yehowa hanuakadiashila tshioshelu bua kutombokela Yehowa lelu?" 
Joshua22:17 Bualu bubi bua Peô budi bututamba bukese, anyi? Katuyi banze kudilengesha, tô ne ku dituku edi, bua mulau wakela Yehowa tshisumbu tshia bantu," 
Joshua22:18 nuenu nudi basue kuhambuka lelu ne kuhanga kulonda Yehowa, anyi? Binuatombokela Yehowa lelu, makelela yeye neakuatshile tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele tshiji." 
Joshua22:19 Bikala buloba bua buhianyi buenu kabuyi buimpe, nusabuke mu buloba bua buhianyi bua Yehowa, kudi tshitendelelu tshia Yehowa, nuangate buhianyi munkatshi muetu; kadi kanutombokedi Yehowa anyi tuetu bua kudiashila tshioshelu tshikuabo ha mutu ha tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wetu." 
Joshua22:20 Akana, muana wa Zela, kakenza bualu bubi hakangateye tshintu tshia tshijila, ne mulau kawakakuata tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Isalele, anyi? Muntu au kakafua nkayandi bua bualu bubi buakenzeye." 
Joshua22:21 Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bakambila bakadi ku mutu kua binunu bia Bena Isalele ne," 
Joshua22:22 Nzambi Umue Munene, Yehowa, Nzambi Umue Munene, Yehowa, udi mumanye; Bena Isalele nebamanye biabo ne, Bikalaku ditomboka, anyi bikalaku buhidia bua kuhidia Yehowa, kanutusungidi lelu." 
Joshua22:23 Bituikala badiashile tshioshelu bua kuhambuka ne bua kuhanga kulonda Yehowa, ne bua kufila milambu ya kuoshilahu, ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, Yehowa nkayandi ashikishe bualu." 
Joshua22:24 Tuakenza bualu ebu tuela meji ne, Halua matuku makuabo bana benu nebakonke bana betu ne, Nuenu nudi ne Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, bualu, anyi?" 
Joshua22:25 Bualu bua Yehowa wakateka Yadene bu mukalu hankatshi hetu nʼenu, nuenu Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada; kanuena ne buhianyi kudi Yehowa: nunku bana benu nebakande bana betu bua kutshinabo Yehowa." 
Joshua22:26 Nunku tuakuambilangana ne, Tudiashile tshioshelu, kambualu bua kuoshilahu nyama, anyi mulambu;" 
Joshua22:27 kadi netshikale bu mumanyi wa bualu hankatshi hetu nʼenu, ne hankatshi ha milongo idi ilonda ku nyima kuetu, bua tuetu kuenzela Yehowa mudimu ku mpala kuandi ne milambu ya kuosha ne milambu yetu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala; ne bua bana benu kabambidi bana betu mu matuku alualua ku mpala ne, Nuenu kanuena ne buhianyi kudi Yehowa." 
Joshua22:28 Nunku tuakuambilangana ne, Hatuambilabo anyi hambilabo milongo idi ilonda ku nyima mei â, netuambe ne, Monai tshifuanyikishi tshia tshioshelu tshia Yehowa tshiakenza batatu betu, kambualu bua kuoshelahu milambu ya kuosha, anyi nyama mishiha; kadi tshidi bu mumanyi wa bualu hankatshi hetu nʼenu." 
Joshua22:29 Yehowa atukande bua katumutombokedi, katubambuki kudiye, katuhangi kumulonda, ne katuashi tshioshelu tshia milambu ya kuosha ne ya bukula, ne ya nyama mishiha, anu tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, tshidi ku mpala kua tshitendelelu tshiandi." 
Joshua22:30 Pinehasa muakuidi, ne bukelenge ba tshisumbu tshia Bena Isalele bakadi ku mutu kua binunu bia Bena Isalele bakadi nʼandi hakunvuabo mei akabambila Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne Bena Manashe, bakadi ne disanka." 
Joshua22:31 Pinehasa, muana wa Eleazâ, muakuidi, wakambila Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne Bena Manashe ne, Lelu tudi bamanye ne, Yehowa udi munkatshi muetu, bualu bua nuenu kanuakenzela Yehowa bualu bubi ebu: katataka nuakasungila Bena Isalele mu tshianza tshia Yehowa." 
Joshua22:32 Pinehasa, muana wa Eleazâ, muakuidi, ne bukelenge bakumuka kudi Bena Lubena ne kudi Bena Gada mu buloba bua Gilada, bakahingana ku buloba bua Kanâna kudi Bena Isalele, bakabalondela mei kabidi." 
Joshua22:33 Bualu ebu buakasankisha Bena Isalele; Bena Isalele bakatumbisha Nzambi, kabakamba dî dikuabo bua kuluangana nʼabo, ne bua kubutula buloba buakadi Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada bashikama." 
Joshua22:34 Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada bakidika tshioshelu ne Ede, bualu bua hankatshi betu nʼabo tshidi bu mumanyi wa bualu ne, Yehowa udi Nzambi." 
Joshua23:1 Hakahita matuku a bungi, ne hakamana Yehowa kuha Bena Isalele dikisha kudi bena lukuna babo bonso bakadi babanyunguluka, ne hakalua Yoshua muntu mununu ne bidimu biandi biakakumbana," 
Joshua23:2 Yoshua wakabikila Bena Isalele bonso ne bakulu babo ne bakadi ku mutu kua bisamba biabo ne balumbuluishi babo ne tuhita tuabo, wakabambila ne, Meme ndi muntu mununu, ne bidimu bianyi biakukumbana:" 
Joshua23:3 nuenu nuakatangila malu onso akenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bisamba ebi bionso bua bualu buenu; bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, yeye mene wakanuluila nvita." 
Joshua23:4 Monai, meme nakanuha bisamba ebi bidi bishala bu buhianyi bua bisamba bienu, kutuadishila ku Yadene, ne bisamba bionso binakatamba bukole, tô ne ku mai manene kudi kubuelela diba." 
Joshua23:5 Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, neabumushe ku mpala kuenu, neabihate ku mesu kuenu: nuenu nenunyenge buloba buabo bu muakanuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wenu." 
Joshua23:6 Nunku nuikale ne mitshima ya dikima bua kutumikila ne kuenza mei onso adi mafunda mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose; kanusesuki ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi; 
Joshua23:7 kanubuelakanyi ne bisamba ebi bidi bishala munkatshi muenu; kanutedi mena a nzambi yabo, kanuditshihi kudiyi, kanuyikuatshidi mudimu, kanuyikukuidi;"
