1Samuel9:12 Bakabakudimuna di ne, E, udiku; monai, udi ku mpala kuenu, endeshai mpindiu, bualu bua yeye wakalua ku musoko anu lelu; bantu badi ne bualu bua kufilabo milambu lelu ku mutu kua mukuna." 
1Samuel9:13 Hanuabuela mu musoko, hashishe numukebe diambedi yeye kayi muanze kuya ku mukuna bua kudieye bidia: bualu bua bantu kabena badia bidia diambedi yeye kayi muanze kulua, bualu bua yeye udi uvudishila milambu yabo disanka, hashishe bantu bakabikilabo badi badia bidia. Nunku nuye bienu bualu bua nenumusangane ha diba edi." 
1Samuel9:14 Nunku bakaya ku musoko: hakambabo kubuela mu musoko, Samuele wakasungila nʼabo bua kuyeye ku mutu kua mukuna." 
1Samuel9:15 Yehowa wakamana kusokoluela Samuele dituku dia ku mpala kua Shaula kayi muanze kulua, wamba ne," 
1Samuel9:16 Makelela ha diba edi mene nenkutumine muntu mufume ku buloba bua Benyamina ne wewe neumuele manyi ha mutu handi bua kuikaleye mukelenge wa bantu banyi Bena Isalele; yeye neasungile bantu banyi mu bianza bia Bena Peleshete; bua nakatangila bantu banyi bualu bua muadi wabo wakufika kundi. 
1Samuel9:17 Hakatangila Samuele Shaula, Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Mona muntu unakukuambila, kayeye au! Yeye mene neakokeshe bantu banyi." 
1Samuel9:18 Hashishe Shaula wakasemena ha buihi ne Samuele ku tshibi, wakamuebesha ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Ungambile kudi nsubu kua mumonyi wa malu." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuele wakakudimuna Shaula dî ne, Meme ndi mumonyi wa malu; ya ku mpala kuanyi ku mukuna bualu bua bûdi nʼabu mbua kudia nʼanyi bidia lelu; kadi hatshiabu nenkutume, nenkuambile malu onso adi mu mutshima webe." 
1Samuel9:20 Kadi kunyingalashi mutshima bualu bua nyama ya mpunda yakadi mijimine matuku asatu ahitshi, bualu bua hakamana kuyisangana. Mitshima ya Bena Isalele bonso idi kudi nganyi? Kenkûdi ne kudi bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu webe, anyi?" 
1Samuel9:21 Shaula wakamukudimuna dî ne, Meme tshiena Muena Benyamina, tshisamba tshidi tshihita bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele bukese, anyi? Diku dianyi kadiena dihita meku onso a tshisamba tshia Benyamina bubale, anyi? Udi ungambila meme malu au munyi?" 
1Samuel9:22 Samuele wakangata Shaula ne muena mudimu wandi, wakaya nʼabo mu nsubu wa tshiala benyi, wakabashiha mu miaba ya butumbi munkatshi mua bantu bonso bakabikilabo bua kudia, bakadi bantu makumi asatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Samuele wakambila mulambi ne, Lua ne tshituha tshinakukuha, tshinakukuambila ne, Utshiteke." 
1Samuel9:24 Mulambi wakangata tshibelu ne biakadihu, wakatshiteka ku mesu kua Shaula. Samuele wakamuambila ne, Mona, tshintu tshiakakushilabo, utshiteke ku mesu kuebe, utshidi; tshiakadi tshikutekela tô ne ku diba edi, bualu bua meme nakamba ne, Nakabikila bantu. Nunku Shaula wakadia ne Samuele dituku adi." 
1Samuel9:25 Hakafumabo ku mutu kua mukuna, bakahingana ku musoko, yeye wakasomba ne Shaula ha mutu ha nsubu." 
1Samuel9:26 Bakabika hatshiatshia honso: hakatshiabu, Samuele wakabikila Shaula ha mutu ha nsubu, wamba ne, Juka, bua meme nkutume. Shaula wakajuka, bubidi buabo bakahatuka, yeye ne Samuele." 
1Samuel9:27 Hakambabo kufika kunfudilu kua musoko, Samuele wakambila Shaula ne, Ambile muena mudimu webe ahite ku mpala kuetu (ne yeye wakahita), kadi wimane biebe bua meme kutunyuisha mei a Nzambi." 
1Samuel10:1 Hashishe Samuele wakangata mulondo wa manyi, wakâhongolola ha mutu handi, wakamutua mishiku, wakamba ne, Yehowa kakakuela manyi bua wewe wikale mukelenge ku mutu kua buhianyi buandi, anyi?" 
1Samuel10:2 Haumuka kundi lelu, wewe neusungile ne balume babidi ha majambu a Lakele ku Selesa ku mukata wa buloba bua Benyamina; bobo nebakuambile ne, Nyama ya mpunda îwakaya kukeba yakamueneka; mona, tatu webe wakalekela kunyingalasha mutshima bua nyama ya mpunda, udi unyingalasha mutshima bualu buebe, wamba ne, Nengenze tshinyi bua muanʼanyi wa balume?" 
1Samuel10:3 Hashishe bûdi nʼabu mbua kumuka ku muaba au tô ne hawafika ku mutshi wa telebinta wa ku Tabô; wewe neusangileku ne balume basatu baya ku Betele bua kutendelela Nzambi, umue mutuale bana ba mbushi basatu, mukuabo muambule mitanda ya bidia isatu, ne mukuabo muambule mulondo wa nvinyo;" 
1Samuel10:4 bobo nebakuele muoyo, nebakuhe mitanda ya bidia ibidi, bûdi nʼabu mbua kuyangata ku bianza biabo." 
1Samuel10:5 Hashishe bûdi nʼabu mbua kuya ku mukuna wa Nzambi, kudi masalayi a Bena Peleshete; hawafika ha buihi ne musoko, neusangile ne tshisumbu tshia baprofete bafume ku mutu kua mukuna badi ne lunzenze lua nshinga dikumi ne dizele ne lushiba ne tshisanji; bobo mene nebikale bamba dî dia Nzambi." 
1Samuel10:6 Nyuma wa Yehowa neakutulukile bikole, wewe newambe nʼabo dî dia Nzambi, wewe neukudimuke bu mu ntu mukuabo." 
1Samuel10:7 Hashishe, halua bimanyinu ebi bionso kûdi, enza muonso mûdi mua kuenza, bualu bua Nzambi udi nʼebe." 
1Samuel10:8 Bûdi nʼabu mbua kudianjila ku mpala kuanyi ku Gilegala; ne mona, meme nempueke kûdi bua kufila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne milambu ya kuvuishila nʼai bantu ditalala; ungindileku matuku muanda mutekete ne hanalua bua kukulesha bualu bûdi ne bua kuenza." 
1Samuel10:9 Bulelela, hakeleye nyima bua kumuka kudi Samuele, Nzambi wakamuha mutshima mukuabo; ne bimanyinu abi bionso biakalua dituku adi." 
1Samuel10:10 Hakafikabo ku mukuna, monai, tshisumbu tshia baprofete tshikasangila nʼandi: Nyuma wa Nzambi wakatulukila Shaula bikole, ne yeye wakamba dî dia Nzambi munkatshi muabo." 
1Samuel10:11 Hakatangila bantu bakadi bamumanye diambedi ne, Monai, yeye udi wamba dî dia Nzambi ne baprofete, bakakonkangana ne, Bualu ebu buakulua kudi muana wa Kishi budi tshinyi? Shaula udi munkatshi mua baprofete, anyi?" 
1Samuel10:12 Muena muaba au wakabakonka ne, Tatu wabo udi nganyi? Nunku dî edi diakalua bu lusumuinu ne, Shaula udi munkatshi mua baprofete, anyi?" 
1Samuel10:13 Hakashikisheye kuamba dî dia Nzambi, yeye wakabanda ku mukuna." 
1Samuel10:14 Mansebʼa Shaula wakamuambila ne muena mudimu wandi ne, Nuakaya kudi kunyi? Wakamba ne, Ku dikeba dia nyama ya mpunda; hatuakamona ne kayena imueneka, tuakulua kudi Samuele." 
1Samuel10:15 Mansebʼa Shaula wakamba ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne ungambileku tshiakakuambila Samuele." 
1Samuel10:16 Shaula wakambila mansebʼandi ne. Yeye wakatujukuila ne, Nyama ya mpunda yakamueneka. Kadi yeye kakamuambila bualu bua bukelenge buakamuambila Samuele." 
1Samuel10:17 Samuele wakabikila bantu bua kudisangishabo kudi Yehowa ku Misepa. 
1Samuel10:18 Yeye wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi wamba ne, Nakumuka ne Isalele mu Ejipitu, nakanusungila mu bianza bia Bena Ejipitu ne mu bianza bia makelenge onso akadi anukengesha;" 
1Samuel10:19 kadi nuenu nuakahidia Nzambi wenu udi unusungila mu makenga enu ne mu ntatu yenu lelu, nuakangambila ne, Nansha, utusungile mukelenge bua bikaleye ku mutu kuetu. Nunku numueneke ku mesu kua Yehowa ku bisamba bienu ne ku binunu bienu." 
1Samuel10:20 Samuele wakabikila bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele ha buihi, bakasungula tshisamba tshia Benyamina." 
1Samuel10:21 Bakabikila tshisamba tshia Benyamina ha buihi ku meku abo ne ku meku abo: bakasungula diku dia Bena Mâteli; bakasungula Shaula, muana mulume wa Kishi. Kadi hakayabo bua kumubikila, kabakamusangana." 
1Samuel10:22 Nunku bakebesha Yehowa ne, Muntu mukuabo ulualua, anyi? Yehowa wakabambila ne, Monai, yeye wakadisokoka munkatshi mua bintu." 
1Samuel10:23 Bakaya lubilu, bakaha handi: hakimaneye munkatshi mua bantu, yeye wakafuta buonso buabo bule ku makaya ne ku mutu." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuele wakambila bantu bonso ne, Tangilai, yeye wakadi Yehowa musungule kakuena mukuabo bu yeye munkatshi mua bantu bonso. Bantu bonso bakela mbila ne, Mukelenge ikale ne muoyo!" 
1Samuel10:25 Samuele wakajinguluila bantu mushindu wa bukelenge, wakafunda mu mukanda, wakauteka ku mpala kua Yehowa. Samuele wakatuma bantu bonso muntu ku nsubu wandi muntu ku nsubu wandi." 
1Samuel10:26 Shaula wakahingana ku nsubu kuandi ku Gibea; ne tshisumbu tshia bantu bakole bakadi Nzambi ulamakasha mitshima yabo kudiye tshiakaya nʼandi. 
1Samuel10:27 Kadi bantu bakuabo balembakane bakakonkangana ne, Muntu eu neatusungile munyi? Nunku bakamulengulula, kabakamuha kantu kakese. Kadi yeye wakahuwa biandi talalâ." 
1Samuel11:1 Nahasha, Muena Amona, wakalua, wakasa tshitudilu bua kuluangana ne musoko wa Yabesha-gilada: bantu bonso ba mu Yabesha bakatumina Nahasha dî ne, Uhunge nʼetu tshihungidi, neakukuatshile mudimu." 
1Samuel11:2 Nahasha, Muena Amona, wakabambila ne, Netuhunge nʼenu dî ku bualu ebu ne buonso buenu nutule mesu enu a ku bianza bia balume: bualu ebu nebuikale bu kusamina kua Bena Isalele bonso." 
1Samuel11:3 Bakulu ba mu Yabesha bakamuambila ne, Utuheshe matuku muanda mutekete bua tuetu kutuma bamessager ku nseke yonso ya Isalele; nunku bikala kakuyi muntu wa kutusungila, netulue kudi." 
1Samuel11:4 Hashishe ba-messager bakalua kudi Shaula ku Gibea, bakamba mei au onso mu matshu a bantu: bantu bonso bakabisha mei abo, bakadila." 
1Samuel11:5 Shaula wakafuma ku budimi, wenda ulonda ngombe, wakakonka ne, Bantu badi badidila tshinyi? Bakamuambila mei onso akabambila Bena Yabesha." 
1Samuel11:6 Hakunvua Shaula mei â, Nyuma wa Nzambi wakamutulukila bikole, ne tshiji tshiandi tshiakatema bikole." 
1Samuel11:7 Wakangata ngombe ibidi yakadi ku mutshi wa tshikokedi, wakayisaya munyinyi, wakayituma mu bianza bia miloho ei ku matshika onso a Isalele, Wamba ne, Yonso udi kayi ulonda Shaula ne Samuele, nebenzele ngombe yandi nunku. Ditshina dia Yehowa diakakuata bantu bonso, bakaluhuka diatshimue." 
1Samuel11:8 Yeye wakababala mu Bezeke: Bena Isalele bakadi binunu nkama isatu, ne Bena Yuda bakadi binunu makumi asatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Bakambila miloho yakalua kudibo ne, Nuambile Bena Yabesha-gilada nunku ne, Makelela hafika diba munda munya, nuenu nenusungidibue. Miloho yakalua, yakambila Bena Yabesha dî edi, ne bobo bakasanka." 
1Samuel11:10 Bena Yabesha bakambila Nahasha ne, Makelela netulue kûdi, neubenzele muonso ûdi umona ne mbimpe." 
1Samuel11:11 Hakatshiabu, Shaula wakatahulula bantu mu bisumbu bisatu; bakafika ku tshitudilu dinda dionso, bakashiha Bena Amona tô ne ku munda munya; bakadi bashala ne muoyo bakamuangalaka, nansha bantu babidi bakashala kaba kamue." 
1Samuel11:12 Bena Isalele bakakonka Samuele ne, Nganyi wakamba ne, Shaula neatukokeshe? Lua ne bantu aba, tubashihe." 
1Samuel11:13 Shaula wakamba ne, Kabena bashiha muntu lelu, bualu bua Yehowa wakamenesha luhandu luandi mu Isalele." 
1Samuel11:14 Samuele wakambila bantu ne, Luai, tuye ku Gilegala, netujadikileku bukelenge." 
1Samuel11:15 Bantu bonso bakaya ku Gilegala: bakasungula Shaula mukelenge ku mpala kua Yehowa mu Gilegala; bakafilaku milambu idi ivuisha bantu ditalala ku mpala kua Yehowa; Shaula ne Bena Isalele bonso bakatamba kusankaku. 
1Samuel12:1 Samuele wakambila Bena Isalele bonso ne, Monai, nakunvua dî dienu mu malu onso anuakungambila, nakateka mukelenge ku mutu kuenu." 
1Samuel12:2 Katataka monai, mukelenge udi wenda ku mpala kuenu, ne meme ndi muntu mununu, nsuki yanyi idi mitoke tô; bana banyi balume badi nʼenu; meme nakuenda ku mpala kuenu ku buana buanyi tô ne ku dituku edi." 
1Samuel12:3 Ndiku: numpishe ku mesu kua Yehowa ne ku mesu kua wandi wakedibua manyi: Meme nakunyenga ngombe wa nganyi? Nakunyenga nyama wa mpunda wa nganyi? Nakuiba bintu bia nganyi? Nakukengesha muntu kai tshianana? Nakuitabusha bintu bia mbueshilu kudi nganyi bua meme kubuikila mesu anyi kudiye? Nungambile, ne meme nemuhingishilebi." 
1Samuel12:4 Bobo bakamba ne, Wewe kuakuiba bintu bietu, kuakutukengesha tshianana, kuakuangata tshintu ku tshianza tshia muntu." 
1Samuel12:5 Wakabambila ne, Yehowa udi mumanyi wa bualu kunudi, ne wandi wakedibua manyi udi mumanyi wa bualu dituku edi ne kanuakasangana tshintu tshia bende mu tshianza tshianyi. Bakamba ne, Yeye udi mumanyi." 
1Samuel12:6 Samuele wakambila bantu ne, Yehowa wakasungula Mose ne Alona, nyeye wakafuma ne bankambua benu mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
1Samuel12:7 Nunku nuimane talalâ bua meme kunuambila ku mesu a Yehowa malu mimpe onso a Yehowa, akenzeleye bankambua benu ne nuenu kabidi." 
1Samuel12:8 Hakaya Yakoba mu Ejipitu, ne bakadila bankambua benu kudi Yehowa, hashishe Yehowa wakatuma Mose ne Alona, bobo bakafuma ne bankambua benu mu Ejipitu, bakabateka mu muaba eu." 
1Samuel12:9 Kadi bobo bakahua Yehowa, Nzambi wabo, muoyo ne yeye wakabahana mu bianza bia Sisela, kapitene ka masalayi a Hazô ne mu bianza bia Bena Peleshete ne mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Moaba: bobo bakabaluisha." 
1Samuel12:10 Bobo bakadila kudi Yehowa, bakamba ne, Tuakenza bibi, bualu bua tuetu tuakalekela Yehowa, tuakakuatshila Babâla ne Bashatelota mudimu; kadi katataka utusungile mu bianza bia badi nʼetu lukuna, ne tuetu netukukuatshile mudimu." 
1Samuel12:11 Yehowa wakantumina Yelubâla ne Bedana ne Yefeta ne Samuele, wakanusungila mu bianza bia bakadi nʼenu lukuna ku nseke yonso; nuenu nuakashikama talalâ." 
1Samuel12:12 Hanuakatangila Nahasha, mukelenge wa Bena Amona, ulua bua kunuluisha, nuenu nuakangambila ne, Nansha, mukelenge utukokeshe, hakatshidi Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, mukelenge wenu." 
1Samuel12:13 Nunku nutangile mukelenge unuakasungula, unuakalomba; monai, Yehowa wakateka mukelenge ku mutu kuenu." 
1Samuel12:14 Binuatshina Yehowa, binuamukuatshila mudimu, binuatumikila dî diandi, ne binuikala kanuyi nubenga mikenji ya Yehowa, ne binualonda Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, nuenu ne mukelenge udi unukokesha, mbimpe:" 
1Samuel12:15 kadi binuikala kanuyi nutumikila dî dia Yehowa, binuahidia mikenji ya Yehowa, nunku tshianza tshia Yehowa netshikale kunudi bu muakaditshi kudi bankambua benu." 
1Samuel12:16 Nunku nuimane talalâ, nutangile bualu ebu bunene budi Yehowa wenza ku mesu kuenu." 
1Samuel12:17 Kabena banowa blé lelu, anyi? Kadi meme nembikile Yehowa bua yeye anutumine nvula ne mikungulu; nuenu nenumanye, nenutangile ne bubi buenu budi bunene bunuakuenza ku mesu kua Yehowa hanuakadilombela mukelenge." 
1Samuel12:18 Nunku Samuele wakabikila Yehowa, ne Yehowa wakatuma nvula ne mikungulu dituku adi; bantu bonso bakatamba kutshina Yehowa ne Samuele." 
1Samuel12:19 Bantu bonso bakambila Samuele ne, Ulombele bantu bebe Yehowa, Nzambi webe, bua tuetu katufu, bualu bua tuetu tuakavudisha bualu ebu bubi bua kudilombela mukelenge ha mutu ha mibi yonso ituakuenza." 
1Samuel12:20 Samuele wakambila bantu ne, Kanutshinyi: bulelela, nuakuenza bualu ebu bubi, kadi kanulekedi kulonda Yehowa, kadi nukuatshile Yehowa mudimu ne mitshima yenu yonso;" 
1Samuel12:21 kanusesuki mu nshila mukuabo: binuenza nunku nenulonde bintu bia tshianana bidi kabiyi bimanye mua kunukuatshisha ne kunusungila, bualu bua bidi bia hatuhu." 
1Samuel12:22 Yehowa kena ulekela bantu bandi bualu bua dina diandi dinene, bualu bua Yehowa wakasungula bua kunuvuisha bantu bandi mene." 
1Samuel12:23 Bua bualu buanyi, tshiena ngitabusha bua kuenzela Yehowa bibi bua kulekela kunulombela Nzambi; kadi meme nennuleshe nshila muimpe ne muakane." 
1Samuel12:24 Anjai kutshina Yehowa, numukuatshile mudimu mu bulelela ne mitshima yenu yonso; elanganai meji a malu manene akanuenzeleye." 
1Samuel12:25 Kadi binuananukila kuenza bibi, neanubutule ne mukelenge wenu kabidi." 
1Samuel13:1 Shaula wakadi ne bidimu makumi anai hakabangeye kukokesha mu Isalele. Hakakokesheye bidimu bibidi," 
1Samuel13:2 Shaula wakadisunguila Bena Isalele binunu bisatu: binunu bibidi biakadi ne Shaula mu Mikemasha ne ku mukuna wa Betele, ne tshinunu tshikuabo tshiakadi ne Yonatana mu Gibea wa mu buloba bua Benyamina; yeye wakatuma mundi ne mundi ku ntenta wandi wa mu bantu bakashala." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonatana wakashiha masalayi a Bena Peleshete akadi mu Geba; Bena Peleshete bakunvua lumu elu. Shaula wakelesha mpungi ku nseke yonso ya buloba, wamba ne, Bena Ebelu bonso, unvuai." 
1Samuel13:4 Bena Isalele bonso bakunvua lumu ne, Shaula wakashiha masalayi a Bena Peleshete ne Bena Isalele bakahetudibua kudi Bena Peleshete. Bantu bonso bakadisangisha kudi Shaula mu Gilegala." 
1Samuel13:5 Bena Peleshete bakadisangisha bua kuluanganabo nvita ne Bena Isalele, bungi bua bena makalu buakadi binunu makumi asatu, ne bua bakadi babanda ha nyima ha tubalu buakadi binunu bisambombo, ne bungi bua bantu bakadi benda hanshi buakadi bu nsenga ya ku muelelu wa mai manene; bakalua, bakasa tshitudilu tshiabo mu Mikemasha ku esete kua Bete-awena." 
1Samuel13:6 Hakatangila Bena Isalele ne didi munkatshi mua malu makole (bualu bua bantu bakadi ne ntatu), nunku bakasokoma mu mbuebue ne mu bisuku ne mu mabue ne mu miaba mikuabo ya kusokoma ne mu mena a mikela." 
1Samuel13:7 Bena Ebelu bakuabo bakadi basabuka musulu wa Yadene ku buloba bua Gada ne bua Gilada; kadi Shaula wakatshidi mushale mu Gilegala, ne bantu bonso bakadi bamulonda bazakala." 
1Samuel13:8 Yeye wakindilaku Samuele matuku muanda mutekete bu muakahungeye nʼandi dî; kadi Samuele kakaha ku Gilegala; bantu bakabanga kumumuangalala. 
1Samuel13:9 Shaula wakamba ne, Balue ne milambu ya kuosha ne ya kuvuisha nʼai bantu ditalala kundi. Yeye wakafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia." 
1Samuel13:10 Hakashikisheye kufila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, monai, Samuele wakafika; Shaula wakaya bua kumuakidila bua kumuela muoyo." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuele wakamba ne, Wewe wakuenza tshinyi? Shaula ne, Bualu bua nakatangila bantu babanga kummuangalala, ne wewe kuakulua mu dituku dituakasungula, ne Bena Peleshete hakamana kudisangisha ku Mikemasha;" 
1Samuel13:12 nunku nakamba ne, Bena Peleshete nebalue kunduisha ku Gilegala diambedi tshiyi muanze kukeba diakalengele kudi Yehowa: nunku nakadienzesha nkayanyi ku bukole, nakafila mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia." 
1Samuel13:13 Samuele wakambila Shaula ne, Wewe wakenza buhote: wewe kuakanemeka mukenji wa Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakakuambileye; bu wewe muenze nunku, Yehowa wakadi kujadika bukelenge buebe mu Isalele tshiendelele." 
1Samuel13:14 Kadi katataka bukelenge buebe kabuena buikalaku; Yehowa wakamana kudikebela muntu udi mutshima wandi musue, Yehowa wakamana kumusungula mukelenge ku mutu kua bantu bandi bualu bua wewe kuakanemeka mukenji wakabambila Yehowa." 
1Samuel13:15 Samuele wakajuka ku Gilegala, wakaya ku Gibea wa mu buloba bua Benyamina. Shaula wakabala bantu bakashala nʼandi bakadi bu nkama isambombo." 
1Samuel13:16 Shaula ne muanʼandi wa balume Yonatana ne bantu hakadibo nʼabo bakashala mu Geba wa mu buloba bua Benyamina; kadi Bena Peleshete bakasa tshitudilu tshiabo mu Mikemasha. 
1Samuel13:17 Bahaudi ba bintu bakafuma mu tshitudilu tshia Bena Peleshete ku bisumbu bisatu: tshisumbu tshimue tshiakayila mu nshila wa ku Ofela wa mu buloba bua Shuala," 
1Samuel13:18 tshinga tshisumbu tshiakayila ku nshila wa ku Bete-holona, tshisumbu tshikuabo tshiakayila ku nshila wa ku mukalu wakatangila ku tshibanda tshia Seboyima ku luseke lua tshihela." 
1Samuel13:19 Kamuakadi mufudi wa biamu mu buloba buonso bua Bena Isalele: bualu bua Bena Peleshete bakadi bamba ne, Bena Ebelu kabadifudidi miele ya nvita anyi mafuma:" 
1Samuel13:20 kadi Bena Isalele bonso bakaya kudi Bena Peleshete bua kusakisha bikasu biabo ne miele yabo ne bisui biabo ne nkasu yabo ya kumbula nʼai buloba; 
1Samuel13:21 kadi bakadi ne makangu a kusakisha nʼau nkasu ne bikasu, ne biamu bia kuboya nʼabi bisonsa, ne bisui ne misonsolo." 
1Samuel13:22 Nunku hakalua dituku dia nvita kakuakadi muele anyi difuma mu bianza bia bantu bakadi ne Shaula ne Yonatana; kadi Shaula ne muanʼandi Yonatana bakadi nʼabi," 
1Samuel13:23 Masalayi a Bena Peleshete hakaya kuala mu nshila mubumbakane wa ku Mikemasha. 
1Samuel14:1 Dituku dikuabo Yonatana, muana mulume wa Shaula, wakambila nsongalume, muambudi wa ngabu wandi ne, Lua, tuye bietu kudi masalayi a Bena Peleshete adi dishiya dia muamua. Kadi yeye kakambila tatu wandi nansha." 
1Samuel14:2 Shaula wakadi mushikame kunfudilu kua buloba bua Gibea muinshi mua mutshi wa grenade udi mu Migelona: bantu bakadiye nʼabo bakadi bu balume nkama isambombo: 
1Samuel14:3 ne Ahiya, muana mulume wa Ahituba, muanʼabo ne Ikaboda, muana mulume wa Pinehasa, muana mulume wa Eli, muakuidi wa Yehowa wa mu Shilo, wakadi nʼandi muluate tshilulu tshia efoda. Bantu kabakamanya ne, Yonatana wakaya." 
1Samuel14:4 Yonatana wakasua kuya kudi masalayi a Bena Peleshete mu nshila mubumbakane, dibue disongoloka diakadi ku tshianza tshia balume, dikuabo disongoloka diakadi ku tshianza tshia bakashi: dina dia dikuabo diakadi Bosese, dina dia dinga diakadi Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Dibue dikuabo diakadi ku node ku mpala kua Mikemasha, ne dinga dibue diakadi ku sude ku mpala kua Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatana wakambila nsongalume, muambudi wa ngabu wandi, ne, Lua, tuye bietu kudi masalayi au adi kâyi matengula, biasua Yehowa kutukuatshisha; bualu bua kakuena mukandu kudi Yehowa bua kusungila bantu kudi ba bungi anyi kudi bakese." 
1Samuel14:7 Muambudi wa ngabu wandi wakamuambila ne, Enze biebe malu onso adi mu mutshima webe; tuye bietu, mona, ndi nʼebe anu bua kukuenzela bu mudi mutshima webe musue." 
1Samuel14:8 Hashishe Yonatana wakamba ne, Mona, netuye kudi bantu aba, netudimueneshe kudibo." 
1Samuel14:9 Biatuambilabo ne, Anjai kuimana, netulue kunudi aku, hashishe netuimane anu ha wetu muaba, katuena tuya kudibo." 
1Samuel14:10 Kadi biatuambilabo ne, Luai kunoko, hashishe netuye bualu bua Yehowa wakamana kubafila mu bianza bietu; bualu ebu nebuikale bu tshimanyinu kutudi." 
1Samuel14:11 Bubidi buabo bakadimuenesha kudi masalayi a Bena Peleshete; Bena Peleshete bakambilangana ne, Monai, Bena Ebelu bakuhatuka mu mena akadibo badisokoke." 
1Samuel14:12 Masalayi akambila Yonatana ne muambudi wa ngabu wandi ne, Luai kunoko, neanuleshe bualu. Yonatana wakambila muambudi wa ngabu wandi ne, Lua, undonde, bualu bua Yehowa wakamana kubafila mu bianza bia Bena Isalele." 
1Samuel14:13 Yonatana wakabanda kudibo wenda ukalaba bianza ne makasa; muambudi wa ngabu wandi wakamulonda mu nyima; Bena Peleshete bakashihibua kudi Yonatana, ne muambudi wa ngabu wandi wakashiha bakuabo kabidi." 
1Samuel14:14 Mu nvita ya ku mpala Yonatana ne muambudi wa ngabu wandi bakashiha balume bu makumi abidi bakadi badisangisha kaba kamue kakadi bu bunene bua tshituha tshia hectare wa buloba. 
1Samuel14:15 Bantu bonso bakadi mu tshitudilu ne mu madimi kabidi bakazakala; ne masalayi ne bambudi ba bintu bakazakala; buloba buakakanka kabidi, nunku kukanka kunene kua buloba kuakadiku." 
1Samuel14:16 Batentekedi ba Shaula ba mu Gibea wa mu buloba bua Benyamina bakatangila, ne monai, tshisumbu tshia Bena Peleshete tshiakamuangalaka, bakaya eku ne eku." 
1Samuel14:17 Hashishe Shaula wakambila bantu bakadi nʼandi ne, Nubale, numone wakumuka kutudi. Hakabalabo nunku, monai, Yonatana ne muambudi wa ngabu wandi kabakadiku." 
1Samuel14:18 Shaula wakambila Ahiya ne, Lua ne mushete wa Nzambi kundi. Bualu bua mushete wa Nzambi wakadi ne Bena Isalele tshikondo atshi." 
1Samuel14:19 Hakadi Shaula uyikila ne muakuidi, tshintompatompa tshiakadi mu tshitudilu tshia Bena Peleshete tshiakavulangana; Shaula wakambila muakuidi ne, Huekesha bianza biebe." 
1Samuel14:20 Shaula ne bantu honso bakadi nʼandi bakunguila hamue, bakalua bua kuluangana nvita; ne monai, muntu ne muntu wakatuisha mukuandi, kuakadi tshintompatompa tshinene." 
1Samuel14:21 Bena Ebelu bakadi badisangisha ne Bena Peleshete, bakadi bafuma ku buloba buabo habuela nʼabo mu tshitudilu tshiabo, katataka bakakudimuka, bakadisangisha ne Bena Isalele bakadi ne Shaula ne Yonatana." 
1Samuel14:22 Bena Isalele bakuabo bakadi busokoma ku mikuna ya Efelayima, hakunvuabo lumu ne Bena Peleshete bakanyema, bobo mene bakalonda mu nvita." 
1Samuel14:23 Nunku Yehowa wakasungila Bena Isalele dituku adi; bakaluangana nʼabo tô ne ku Bete-awena. 
1Samuel14:24 Bantu ba mu Isalele bakadi ne ntatu dituku adi bualu bua Shaula wakakandisha bantu ne, Muntu udi udia tô ne ku dilolo diambedi tshiyi muanze kusombuela badi nʼanyi lukuna, udi ne mulau. Nunku bantu kabakalabula bia kudia." 
1Samuel14:25 Bantu bonso bakabuela muitu, buitshi buakadi hanshi ha buloba." 
1Samuel14:26 Hakabuela bantu muitu, monai, buitshi buakamata hanshi: nansha muntu wakela tshianza mukana muandi bualu bua bakatshina mutshihu." 
1Samuel14:27 Kadi Yonatana kakunyua hakakandika tatu wandi bantu ne mutshihu: nunku yeye wakatua lusongo lua mulangala wakadi mu tshianza tshiandi mu dihula dia buitshi, wakela tshianza mukana muandi; mesu andi akatanduka." 
1Samuel14:28 Hashishe umue wabo wakamba ne, Tatu webe wakukandika bantu ne mutshihu ne, Muntu udi udia lelu udi ne mulau. Bantu bakadi bahungile." 
1Samuel14:29 Hashishe Yonatana wakamba ne, Tatu wanyi wakutatshisha buloba. Ndi nnusengelela ne, Tangilai bu mudi mesu anyi matanduke bualu bua meme nakumbula buitshi ebu bukese." 
1Samuel14:30 Tuakadi kubahita misangu bungi munyi bu bantu badie lelu bintu bia bena lukuna biakasanganabo? Bualu bua katuena bashihe ba bungi ba munkatshi mua Bena Peleshete. 
1Samuel14:31 Bakashiha Bena Peleshete dituku adi ku Mikemasha tô ne ku Ayalona. Bantu bakadi batamba kuhungila; 
1Samuel14:32 bakaya bua kuhaula bintu bia Bena Peleshete, bakakuata mikoko ne ngombe ne bana ba ngombe, bakaushiha, bakayidia ne mashi ai." 
1Samuel14:33 Bakambila Shaula ne, Mona, bantu badi benzela Yehowa bibi, bualu bua badi badia mashi. Yeye wakamba ne, Nuakuenza bualu bubi; bungulushai dibue dinene kundi eku." 
1Samuel14:34 Shaula wakamba ne, Muangalalai munkatshi mua bantu, nubambile ne, Muntu yonso alue kundi ne ngombe wandi ne mukoko wandi, netushihe, netuyidie kunoko: katuenzedi Yehowa bibi bua kudia mashi. Bantu bonso bakalua ne ngombe yabo butuku abu, bakayishihaku." 
1Samuel14:35 Shaula wakashila Yehowa tshioshelu; tshiakadi tshioshelu tshia diambedi tshiakashileye Yehowa. 
1Samuel14:36 Shaula wakamba ne, Tuyai, tulonde Bena Peleshete butuku ebu, tukuate bintu biabo tô ne hatshiabu: katubashidi nansha muntu wabo umue. Bakamba ne, Wenze tshionso tshidi tshimpe ku mesu kuebe. Hashishe muakuidi wakamba ne, Tusemenai ha buihi ne Nzambi." 
1Samuel14:37 Shaula wakakonka Yehowa lungenyi ne, Nenye kulonda Bena Peleshete, anyi? Wewe neubafile mu bianza bia Bena Isalele, anyi? Kadi Yehowa bakamukudimuna dî dituku adi." 
1Samuel14:38 Shaula wakamba ne, Nuenu bukelenge ba bantu, Semenai ha buihi, tumanye bietu, tujingulule bilengele kuakafuma bualu ebu bubi lelu eu." 
1Samuel14:39 Bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo, udi usungila Bena Isalele, biafuma bualu ebu kudi Yonatana, muanʼanyi mulume, yeye neafue biandi bulelela. Kadi kakuakadi muntu wa munkatshi mua bantu bonso wakamuandamuna." 
1Samuel14:40 Hashishe yeye wakambila Bena Isalele ne, Nuenu nuikale ku luseke lumue, meme ne Yonatana, muanʼanyi mulume netuikale ku luseke lukuabo. Bantu bakambila Shaula ne, Wenze tshidi tshimpe ku mesu kuebe." 
1Samuel14:41 Nunku Shaula wakambila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ne, Utumanyishe bualu bulelela. Nshobo yakakuata Yonatana ne Shaula, kadi bantu bakabinga." 
1Samuel14:42 Shaula wakamba ne, Batuelele ne Yonatana, muanʼanyi mulume nshobo. Nshobo yakakuata Yonatana." 
1Samuel14:43 Hashishe Shaula wakambila Yonatana ne, Ungambile tshiwakuenza. Yonatana wakamukudimuna dî ne, Bulelela, nakalabula buitshi bukese buakadi ku lusongo lua mulangala wakadi mu tshianza tshianyi; mona, bundi nʼabu mbua kufua." 
1Samuel14:44 Shaula wakamba ne, Nzambi angenzele bualu ebu ne bukuabo ha mutu, bualu bua wewe Yonatana neufue bulelela." 
1Samuel14:45 Bantu bakambila Shaula ne, Yonatana, nguakadi Usungila Bena Isalele ne luhandu elu lunene, neafue biandi, anyi? Nansha, bualu ebu kabuikadiku; bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo, lusuki lumue lua ku mutu kuandi kalumatshi hanshi; bualu bua wakamatshisha ngana ne Nzambi mudimu lelu eu. Nunku bantu bakasungila Yonatana, kakafua nansha." 
1Samuel14:46 Hashishe Shaula wakalekela kulonda Bena Peleshete; Bena Peleshete bakaya ku muaba wabo. 
1Samuel14:47 Hakabuela Shaula mu bukelenge bua Isalele, yeye wakaluangana nvita ne bena lukuna bandi bonso ba ku nseke yonso: wakaluangana ne Bena Moaba ne Bena Amona ne Bena Edome ne bakalenge ba mu Seba ne Bena Peleshete; ku miaba yonso yakayeye, yeye wakabahita bukole." 
1Samuel14:48 Wakadi ne dikima dikole: wakashiha Bena Amaleka, wakasungila Bena Isalele mu bianza bia bakadi bahaula." 
1Samuel14:49 Bana ba balume ba Shaula bakadi Yonatana ne Yishewi ne Malekishua; au mmena a bana bandi ba bakashi babidi: dina dia muanʼa bute wandi diakadi Melaba, ne dina dia muana muakunyi diakadi Mikalu." 
1Samuel14:50 Dina dia mukashi wa Shaula diakadi Abinoama, muana mukashi wa Ahimasa. Dina dia kamanda ka masalayi andi diakadi Abinê, muana mulume wa Nê, tatu mukuabo wa Shaula." 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi wakadi tatu wa Shaula; ne Nê, tatu wa Abinê, wakadi muana mulume wa Abiele." 
1Samuel14:52 Shaula wakaluangana nvita mikole ne Bena Peleshete matuku andi onso; bakatangila Shaula muntu mukole anyi muntu wa bukitu, yeye wakamuangata bu muntu wandi." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuele wakambila Shaula ne, Yehowa wakantuma kûdi bua kukuela manyi ha mutu bua wewe kuikala mukelenge ku mutu kua bantu bandi Bena Isalele; nunku unvue biebe mei a Yehowa." 
1Samuel15:2 Yehowa wa misumba udi wamba ne, Nakavuluka malu akenzela Bena Amaleka Bena Isalele bu muakabatantamenabo mu nshila hakaluhukabo mu Ejipitu." 
1Samuel15:3 Katataka ya, ushihe Bena Amaleka, ubutule bionso bidibo nʼabi; kubafuidi luse; ubashihe ne balume ne bakashi ne bana bakese ba mu tshiadi ne ngombe yabo ne mikoko ne tumelo ne nyama ya mpunda." 
1Samuel15:4 Shaula wakabikila bantu, wakababala mu Telaima, bakadi benda hanshi bakadi binunu nkama ibidi; Bena Yuda bakadi binunu dikumi." 
1Samuel15:5 Shaula wakalua ku musoko wa Bena Amaleka, wakabalamina mu tshibanda." 
1Samuel15:6 Shaula wakambila Bena Kena ne, Yai bienu, umukai munkatshi mua Bena Amaleka, bua tuetu katunushihi nʼabo; bualu bua nuenu nuakafuila Bena Isalele luse hakaluhukabo mu Ejipitu. Nunku Bena Kena bakumuka munkatshi mua Bena Amaleka." 
1Samuel15:7 Shaula wakashiha Bena Amaleka ku Hawila tô ne ku Shû udi ku mpala kua Ejipitu. 
1Samuel15:8 Wakakuata Agaga, mukelenge wa Bena Amaleka, ne muoyo; wakashiha bantu bonso ku miele ya nvita." 
1Samuel15:9 Kadi Shaula ne bantu bandi bakasungula Agaga ne mikoko ne ngombe ne biakadi ne manyi a bungi ne bana ba mikoko biakatamba buimpe, ne bintu bionso biakadi bimpe, bakahidia kubishiha; kadi bintu bionso bia tshianana, bakaushiha." 
1Samuel15:10 Hashishe dî dia Yehowa diakalua kudi Samuele ne," 
1Samuel15:11 Nakakudimuna mutshima bua nakasungula Shaula mukelenge, bualu bua yeye wakasesuka, kena undonda, kena utumikila mikenji yanyi. Samuele wakadi ne tshiji tshikole, wakadila kudi Yehowa butuku abu buonso." 
1Samuel15:12 Hakatshiabu Samuele wakabika bua kusambakeneye ne Shaula. Bakambila Samuele ne, Shaula wakalua ku Kâmele, ne mona, wakimanyikaku dibue dia tshivulukidi, wakatshunguluka, wakalota, wakaya ku Gilegala." 
1Samuel15:13 Samuele wakalua kudi Shaula. Shaula wakamuambila ne, Yehowa akuvudishile disanka; nakatumikila mukenji wa Yehowa." 
1Samuel15:14 Samuele wakamba ne, Muadi wa mikoko ne wa ngombe unakunvua ku matshu anyi udi bishi?" 
1Samuel15:15 Shaula wakamba ne, Bakulua nʼai kudi Bena Amaleka bualu bua bantu katuakashiha mikoko ne ngombe biakatamba bulengele, bua kuyishihela Yehowa, Nzambi webe; kadi tuakashiha bintu bionso bikuabo." 
1Samuel15:16 Samuele wakambila Shaula ne, Imana, nenkuambile tshiakungambila Yehowa butuku ebu. Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ambaku." 
1Samuel15:17 Samuele wakamba ne, Bawakadi bu muntu muhuekele ku mesu kuebe, kabena bakuteka ku mutu kua bisamba bia Bena Isalele, anyi? Yehowa wakakuela manyi ha mutu, wakasungula mukelenge wa Isalele;" 
1Samuel15:18 Yehowa wakantuma ku luendu, wakamba ne, Ya biebe, ushihe bantu habi bonso ba Bena Amaleka, uluangane nʼabo nvita tô ne hahatukabo." 
1Samuel15:19 Nunku wewe kuakatumikila dî dia Yehowa bua tshinyi? Kadi wakahana bintu, Wakenza bualu bubi ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
1Samuel15:20 Shaula wakambila Samuele ne, Bulelela, nakatumikila dî dia Yehowa, nakaya mu nshila wakantuma Yehowa; nakakuata Agaga, mukelenge wa Bena Amaleka, nakashiha Bena Amaleka bonso." 
1Samuel15:21 Kadi bantu bakangata bia mu bintu biakahaulabo, mikoko ne ngombe biakatamba bulengele bua kuyishihelabo Yehowa, Nzambi webe, mu Gilegala." 
1Samuel15:22 Samuele wakakonka ne, Yehowa udi utamba kusanka bua milambu ya kuosha ne nyama mishiha bu mudiye usanka bua kutumikila kua dî dia Yehowa, anyi? Tangila, kutumikila kudi kuhita mulambu wa kuosha ne kunvua kudi kuhita manyi a bimpanga bulengele." 
1Samuel15:23 Kutomboka kudi bualu bubi bu butempi bua mbuku ne tshitshu tshidi bu kutendelela kua mpingu ne manga a hatuhu. Bualu bua wewe wakahidia dî dia Yehowa yeye kabidi wakakuhidia bua wewe kuikala mukelenge. 
1Samuel15:24 Shaula wakambila Samuele ne, Nakuenza bualu bubi bualu bua nakuhidia mukenji wa Yehowa ne mei ebe kabidi; nakatshina bantu, nakatumikila mei abo." 
1Samuel15:25 Katataka ndi nkusengelela ne, Umbuikidile bubi buanyi, uhingane nʼanyi bua meme kutendelela Yehowa." 
1Samuel15:26 Samuele wakambila Shaula ne, Tshiena mpingana nʼebe nansha, bualu bua wewe wakahidia dî dia Yehowa, ne Yehowa wakakuhidia bua wewe kuikala mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele." 
1Samuel15:27 Hakatshunguluka Samuele bua kuya, Shaula wakamukuata kuinshi kua tshikowelu tshiandi, tshiakahandika." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuele wakamuambila ne, Yehowa wakahanda bukelenge bua Isalele buakadi kûdi lelu, wakabuha mukuenu udi ukuhita buakane." 
1Samuel15:29 Bukole bua Isalele kabuena bujima anyi bukudimuka, bualu bua yeye kena bu muntu bua kukudimukeye." 
1Samuel15:30 Hashishe Shaula wakamba ne, Nakuenza bibi, kadi unnemeshe katataka, ndi nkusengelela, ku mesu kua bakulu ba bantu banyi ne kua Bena Isalele, uhingane nʼanyi kabidi bua meme kutendelela Yehowa, Nzambi webe." 
1Samuel15:31 Nunku Samuele wakakudimuka bua kulonda Shaula; ne Shaula wakatendelela Yehowa. 
1Samuel15:32 Hashishe Samuele wakamba ne, Nulue kundi ne Agaga, mukelenge wa Bena Amaleka. Agaga wakalua kudiye ne disanka. Agaga wakamba ne. Bulelela, kanyinganyinga ka lufu kakashika." 
1Samuel15:33 Samuele wakamba ne, Bulelela, bu muakadi muele webe wa nvita mushiye bakashi kabayi ne bana, nunku mamu webe neikale munkatshi mua bakashi kayi ne bana. Samuele wakakosa Agaga bituha bituha ku mpala kua Yehowa mu Gilegala." 
1Samuel15:34 Hashishe Samuele wakaya ku Lama; Shaula wakabanda ku nsubu wandi ku Gibea wa Shaula. 
1Samuel15:35 Samuele kakalua kutangila Shaula kabidi tô ne muakafueye; kadi Samuele wakadila muadi bualu bua Shaula; ne Yehowa wakakudimuna mutshima bualu bua yeye wakasungula Shaula mukelenge wa Bena Isalele. 
1Samuel16:1 Yehowa wakambila Samuele ne, Wewe neudile muadi bua Shaula musangu bule munyi bualu bua meme nakamuhidia mu bukelenge bua Isalele? Ûshe lusengu luebe ne manyi tente, uye biebe, nenkutume kudi Yishai, Muena Beteleheme, bualu bua nakadisunguila mukelenge munkatshi mua bana bandi ba balume." 
1Samuel16:2 Samuele wakamba ne, Nenye munyi? Biunvua Shaula lumu elu, yeye neanshihe. Yehowa wakamba ne, Uye ne lukungulu lua ngombe, Wamba ne, Nyaya bua kushihela Yehowa." 
1Samuel16:3 Ubikile Yishai ku tshishihelu, nenkuleshe bualu bûdi ne bua kuenza; wewe newele manyi ha mutu ha undi nkuambila dina diandi." 
1Samuel16:4 Samuele wakenza muakamba Yehowa, wakaya ku Beteleheme. Bakulu ba musoko bakalua kumuakidila, benda bazakala, bakakonka ne, Ulualua ne ditalala, anyi?" 
1Samuel16:5 Yeye wakamba ne, Ditalala didiku, nakulala bua kushihela Yehowa nyama; nudilengeshe, nulue kundi ku tshishihelu. Yeye wakalengesha Yishai ne bana bandi ba balume, wakababikila ku tshishihelu." 
1Samuel16:6 Hakaluabo, yeye wakatangila Eliaba, wakamba ne, Bulelela, udi Yehowa musungule udi ku mpala kuandi." 
1Samuel16:7 Kadi Yehowa wakambila Samuele ne, Kutangidi mpala wandi, anyi bule buandi, bualu bua meme nakamuhidia; Yehowa kena utangila bu mudi bantu batangila, bualu bua bantu badi batangila anu mubidi, kadi Yehowa udi utangila mu mutshima." 
1Samuel16:8 Hashishe Yishai wakabikila Abinadaba, wakamuhitshisha ku mpala kua Samuele. Wakamba ne, Yehowa kena musungule eu." 
1Samuel16:9 Yishai wakatatshisha Shama ku mpala kuandi. Yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa kena musungule eu." 
1Samuel16:10 Yishai wakahitshisha bana bandi ba balume muanda mutekete ku mpala kua Samuele. Samuele wakambila Yishai ne, Yehowa kena musungule aba." 
1Samuel16:11 Samuele wakakonka Yishai ne, Bana bebe bonso badiku, anyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Muanʼa mukala utshidi mushale; mona, yeye udi ulama mikoko. Samuele wakambila Yishai ne, Bamubikile, bualu bua katuena tushikama tô ne halueye kunoko." 
1Samuel16:12 Yeye wakatuma di, bakalua nʼandi. Yeye wakadi ne mpala lukunjila-kunjila, wakadi ne mesu mimpe, wakadi muakane kumona. Yehowa wakamba ne, Bika, umuele manyi ha mutu, eu nyeye mene." 
1Samuel16:13 Hashishe Samuele wakangata lusengu lua manyi, wakamuela manyi ha mutu handi munkatshi mua bana babo; Nyuma wa Yehowa wakatulukila Davidi bikole ku dituku adi. Nunku Samuele wakajuka, wakahingana ku Lama." 
1Samuel16:14 Nyuma wa Yehowa wakumuka kudi Shaula ne nyuma mubi mufume kudi Yehowa wakamutatshisha. 
1Samuel16:15 Bena mudimu ba Shaula bakamuambila ne, Tangila, nyuma mubi kudi Nzambi udi ukutatshisha." 
1Samuel16:16 Mukelenge wetu ambile bena mudimu badi ku mpala kuandi ne, Nuye, nunkebele muntu udi mumanye mua kungimbila tshisanji bimpe: hashishe halua nyuma mubi mufume kudi Nzambi kudi, yeye neimbe tshisanji ne tshianza tshiandi ne wewe newikale bimpe." 
1Samuel16:17 Shaula wakambila bena mudimu bandi ne, Nunkebele muntu udi mumanye mua kuimba bimpe, nulue nʼandi kundi." 
1Samuel16:18 Hashishe umue wa bansongalume bandi wakamba ne, Mona, nakatangila muana wa balume wa Yishai, Muena Beteleheme, udi mumanye mua kuimba tshisanji bimpe, udi muntu wa bukitu, muena nvita mene, udi Wamba mei a lungenyi, udi ne mpala mulengele: Yehowa udi nʼandi kabidi." 
1Samuel16:19 Nunku Shaula wakatuma ba-messager kudi Yishai, bamba ne, Untumine Davidi, muanʼebe, udi ulama mikoko." 
1Samuel16:20 Yishai wakangata nyama wa mpunda, wakateka mampa ne mulondo wa nvinyo, ne muana wa mukoko ha nyima handi, wakatuma nʼabi Davidi, muanʼandi, kudi Shaula." 
1Samuel16:21 Davidi wakalua kudi Shaula, wakimana ku mpala kuandi: yeye wakatamba kumunanga; ne yeye wakalua mutuadi wa ngabu wandi." 
1Samuel16:22 Shaula wakatumina Yishai di ne, Witabushe, ndi nkusengelela, bua Davidi ikale nʼanyi, bualu bua yeye udi ne diakalengele ku mesu kuanyi." 
1Samuel16:23 Hakalua nyuma mubi mufume kudi Nzambi kudi Shaula, hashishe Davidi wakangata tshisanji, wakatshimba ne tshianza tshiandi: Shaula wakadi usangala, wakalua bimpe, ne nyuma mubi wakumuka kudiye." 
1Samuel17:1 Bena Peleshete bakasangisha bena nvita babo bua kuluanganabo, bakadisangisha mu Soko, udi mu buloba bua Yuda: bakadi ne tshitudilu tshiabo hankatshi ha Soko ne Azeka mu Efese-damima." 
1Samuel17:2 Shaula ne Bena Isalele bakadisangisha, bakadi ne tshitudilu tshiabo mu tshibanda tshia Ela; bakela mualu wa nvita ku mpala kua Bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel17:3 Bena Peleshete bakadi ku mutu kua mukuna ku luseke lumue ne Bena Isalele bakadi ku mutu kua mukuna ku luseke lukuabo, tshibanda tshiakadi hankatshi habo." 
1Samuel17:4 Tshilobo tshiakaluhuka mu tshitudilu tshia Bena Peleshete, dina diatshi Goleyata wa mu Gata, bule buandi buakadi coudées isambombo ne ntanta wa tshianza." 
1Samuel17:5 Wakadi ne tshifulu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku ku mutu kuandi, wakatata tshikowelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku, bujitu buatshi buakadi bu nshekele ya tshiamu tshia mitaku binunu bitanu." 
1Samuel17:6 Wakadi ne nkete ya tshiamu tshia mitaku ku mikolo yandi, wakadi ne difuma dia tshiamu tshia mitaku ha diaha diandi." 
1Samuel17:7 Mutondo wa difuma wakadi bu mbungu wa mukumi wa bilulu; lusongo lua difuma luakadi ne bujitu bua nshekele ya tshiamu tshifike nkama isambombo; mutuadi wa ngabu wandi wakaya ku mpala kuandi. 
1Samuel17:8 Yeye wakimana biandi, wakela bena nvita ba Bena Isalele dî ne, Nuakuluhuka bua kuela mualu wenu wa nvita bishi? Meme tshiena Muena Peleshete, anyi? Nuenu kanuena bantu ba Shaula, anyi? Nusungule muntu wa munkatshi muenu, alue biandi kundi." 
1Samuel17:9 Biamanyeye mua kuluangana nʼanyi ne bua kunshiha, nunku tuetu netuikale bahika benu; kadi binamuhita bukole, binamushiha, nunku nuenu nenuikale bahika betu, nenutukuatshile mudimu." 
1Samuel17:10 Muena Peleshete wakamba ne, Ndi ntukisha bena nvita ba Bena Isalele lelu eu; bantumine mulume bua tuetu tuluangane." 
1Samuel17:11 Kakunyua Shaula ne Bena Isalele bonso mei a Muena Peleshete, bakakema, bakatamba kutshina." 
1Samuel17:12 Davidi wakadi muana wa balume wa Muena Efelata wa mu Beteleheme-yuda, dina diandi diakadi Yishai, wakadi ne bana ba balume muanda mukulu; mu matuku a Shaula yeye wakadi muntu mununu, mukoke munkatshi mua bantu." 
1Samuel17:13 Bakulu basatu ba Davidi bakadi baya ku nyima kua Shaula bua kuluanganabo nvita: mena a bana balume basatu ba Yishai bakaya ku nvita akadi Eliaba, muanʼa bute, ne Abinadaba wakamulonda, ne muisatu Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Davidi wakadi muanʼa mukala; bakulu bandi basatu bakadi balonda Shaula. 
1Samuel17:15 Davidi wakadi Umuka kudi Shaula misangu mikuabo bua kudisheye mikoko ya tatu wandi mu Beteleheme. 
1Samuel17:16 Muena Peleshete au wakadi usemena ha buihi dinda ne dilolo wakamuenekamueneka matuku makumi anai. 
1Samuel17:17 Yishai wakambila muanʼandi Davidi ne, Angatshila bana benu epha wa blé mikanga ne mitanda ei ya bidia dikumi, uye nʼabi lubilu ku tshitudilu kudi bana benu;" 
1Samuel17:18 uye ne fromage ei dikumi kudi kapitene kabo ka tshinunu; utangile bu mudi bana benu, uhingane ne dî diabo." 
1Samuel17:19 Shaula ne bobo ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi mu tshibanda tshia Ela, baluangana ne Bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel17:20 Hakatshiabu Davidi wakabika, wakashiya mikoko mu bianza bia mulami, wakangata bintu abi, wakaya bu muakamuambila Yishai; wakalua ku muaba wakadi makalu a nvita hakadi bena nvita baye ku nvita, hele mbila bua nvita." 
1Samuel17:21 Bena Isalele ne Bena Peleshete bakela mualu wa nvita, mulongo ne mulongo." 
1Samuel17:22 Davidi wakashiya bintu biandi mu bianza bia mulami wa makalu, wakaya lubilu kudi bena nvita, wakela bana babo muoyo." 
1Samuel17:23 Hakadi Davidi uyikila nʼabo, mona, tshilobo, Muena Peleshete wa mu Gata, dina diatshi Goleyata, tshiakumuka munkatshi mua Bena Peleshete, tshiamba mei bu muakuambatshi diambedi; ne Davidi wakûnvua." 
1Samuel17:24 Hakatangila Bena Isalele bonso muntu au, bakamunyema, bakatamba kutshina." 
1Samuel17:25 Bena Isalele bakamba ne, Wakatangila muntu au wakulua, anyi? Bulelela, yeye wakulua bua kufuna bulobo ku mpala kua Bena Isalele: muntu wamushiha, mukelenge neanumushe mubanji munene, neamuhe muana wandi mukashi, neahe ba mu nsubu wa tatu wandi budishikaminyi mu Isalele." 
1Samuel17:26 Davidi wakakonka bantu bakadi bimana ha buihi nʼandi ne, Nebenzele muntu washiha Muena Peleshete eu ne wumusha bundu ku mesu kua Bena Isalele tshinyi? Muena Peleshete eu udi kayi mutengula, udi nganyi bua kufuneye bulobo ku mpala kua bena mata ba Nzambi wa muoyo?" 
1Samuel17:27 Bantu bakamukudimuna dî ne, Nebenzele muntu nunku biamushiyeye." 
1Samuel17:28 Eliaba mukuluʼandi wakunyua hakambileye bantu nunku, Eliaba wakakuatshila Davidi tshiji, wakamba ne, Wewe wakuluila kunoko tshinyi? Wakashiya mikoko ai mikese mu tshihela kudi nganyi? Ndi mumanye kudisua kuebe ne kudibandisha kua mutshima webe: wewe wakuluila anu bualu bua kutangila mata." 
1Samuel17:29 Davidi wakamba ne, Nakuenza tshinyi? Nakuamba anu dî nansha?" 
1Samuel17:30 Wakamukuma nyima, wakebesha mukuabo; bantu bakamuambila kabidi anu muomumue." 
1Samuel17:31 Hakunvuabo mei akamba Davidi, bakâmbila Shaula, ne yeye wakamubikila." 
1Samuel17:32 Davidi wakambila Shaula ne, Mitshima ya bantu kayihampakanyi bualu buandi; meme muntu webe, nenye kuluangana ne Muena Peleshete eu." 
1Samuel17:33 Shaula wakambila Davidi ne, Wewe kuena mua kuya bua kuluangana ne Muena Peleshete eu bualu bua wewe utshidi nsongalume ne yeye wakadi muena mata ku bunsongalume buandi tô ne katataka." 
1Samuel17:34 Davidi wakambila Shaula ne, Muntu webe wakadi ulama mikoko ya tatu wandi: ne hakaha nansha nyama wa ntambue nansha nkashama bua kukuata muana wa mukoko," 
1Samuel17:35 nakamulonda, nakamushiha, nakasungila muana wa mukoko mukana muandi; hakabikeye bua kunduisha, meme nakamukuata ku buoya buandi, nakamutaha, nakamushiha." 
1Samuel17:36 Muntu webe wakashiha nyama wa ntambue ne nkashama; ne Muena Peleshete eu udi kayi mutengula neikale nʼai diatshimue bualu bua yeye wakafuna bulobo ku mpala kua bena nvita ba Nzambi wa muoyo. 
1Samuel17:37 Davidi wakamba ne, Yehowa, nguakansungila ku dikama dia nyama wa ntambue ne dia nkashama, neansungile mu tshianza tshia Muena Peleshete eu. Shaula wakambila Davidi ne, Ya biebe, Yehowa ikale nʼebe." 
1Samuel17:38 Shaula wakaluatshisha Davidi bintu biandi bia mata, wakateka tshifulu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku ku mutu kuandi, wakamuluatshisha tshikowelu tshia mata." 
1Samuel17:39 Davidi wakabisha muele wandi wa nvita ku mukaba wandi, wakakeba kuya, kadi yeye kakanza kubadisha. Davidi wakambila Shaula ne, Tshiena mumanye mua kuya ne bintu ebi, bualu bua tshiena muanze kubadisha. Davidi wakabivula." 
1Samuel17:40 Davidi wakangata tshibangu tshiandi mu tshianza tshiandi, wakasungula mabue atanu a busenu mu kasulu, wakaela mu mpaya wandi wa bulami bua mikoko wakadiye nʼandi, mu kabombi kandi mene; tshieledi tshiandi tshia mabue tshiakadi mu tshianza tshiandi; wakasemena ha buihi ne Muena Peleshete." 
1Samuel17:41 Muena Peleshete wakasemena ha buihi ne Davidi: mutuadi wa ngabu wandi wakaya ku mpala kuandi. 
1Samuel17:42 Muena Peleshete wakakenzakana, hakatangileye Davidi, wakamulengulula bualu bua yeye wakatshidi nsongalume, wakadi ne mpala lukunjila-kunjila, wakadi ne mpala muimpe." 
1Samuel17:43 Muena Peleshete wakambila Davidi ne, Meme ndi mbua bua wewe udi ulua kundi ne bibangu, anyi? Muena Peleshete wakela Davidi mulau mu mena a nzambi yandi." 
1Samuel17:44 Muena Peleshete wakambila Davidi ne, Lua kundi, nendishe nyunyu ya mulu ne nyama ya mu tshisuku munyinyi webe." 
1Samuel17:45 Hashishe Davidi wakambila Muena Peleshete ne, Wewe udi ulua kundi ne muele wa nvita ne difuma ne difuma dia kabenda, kadi meme ndualua kudi mu dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa bena nvita ba Bena Isalele uwakafunyina bulobo ku mpala kuandi." 
1Samuel17:46 Yehowa neakufile mu tshianza tshianyi lelu eu: nenkushihe, nenkutule mutu webe; nendishe nyunyu ya mulu ne nyama ya mu tshisuku bitalu bia bena nvita ba Bena Peleshete lelu; bantu bonso ba ha buloba nebamanye ne, Nzambi udi munkatshi mua Bena Isalele bulelela;" 
1Samuel17:47 ne bantu bonso ba mu tshisumbu etshi nebamanye ne, Yehowa kena Usungila bantu bua muele wa nvita ne bua difuma, bualu bua nvita idi mu bianza bia Yehowa, yeye nennufile mu bianza bietu." 
1Samuel17:48 Bakabika Muena Peleshete, hakasemeneye ha buihi bua kusangakeneye ne Davidi, hashishe Davidi wakabika lukasa, wakalumbila lubilu kudi bena nvita bua kusangakeneye ne Muena Peleshete." 
1Samuel17:49 Davidi wakabuesha tshianza tshiandi mu mpaya wandi, wakambula dibue, wakadiela, wakataha Muena Peleshete mu mpala wandi; dibue diakajika mu mpala wandi, yeye wakadishinda mutue mpala hanshi." 
1Samuel17:50 Nunku Davidi wakalota Muena Peleshete bukole ku tshieledi ne dibue; wakataha Muena Peleshete, wakamushiha; kadi Davidi kakadi ne muele wa nvita mu tshianza tshiandi." 
1Samuel17:51 Hashishe Davidi wakambila lubilu, wakimana hamʼbidi ha Muena Peleshete, wakahatula muele wandi wa nvita mu luhuhu, wakamutaha, wakatula nʼau mutu wandi. Hakatangila Bena Peleshete ne, Tshilobo tshietu tshiakadia, bakanyema." 
1Samuel17:52 Bena Isalele ne Bena Yuda bakajuka, bakela mbila, bakihata Bena Peleshete tô ne ku Gata ne ku bibi bia Ekelona. Nunku batahike ba Bena Peleshete bakahona mu nshila wa ku Shâlayima tô ne ku Gata ne ku Ekelona." 
1Samuel17:53 Bena Isalele bakalekela kuihata Bena Peleshete bakalukila, bakahaula tshitudilu tshiabo." 
1Samuel17:54 Davidi wakangata mutu wa Muena Peleshete, wakalua nʼau ku Yelushalema, kadi wakateka bintu biandi bia nvita mu ntenta wandi." 
1Samuel17:55 Hakatangila Shaula Davidi uya bua kuluangana ne Muena Peleshete, yeye wakakonka Abinê, kapitene ka masalayi andi, ne, Abinê, eu mmuana wa nganyi? Abinê wakamukudimuna dî ne, Bu mudi mutshima webe ne muoyo, mukelenge, tshiena mumanye." 
1Samuel17:56 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Ukonke bantu muena muana eu." 
1Samuel17:57 Hakadi Davidi ufuma kuakashiheye Muena Peleshete, Abinê wakamuangata, wakaya nʼandi kudi Shaula muambule mutu wa Muena Peleshete mu tshianza tshiandi." 
1Samuel17:58 Shaula wakamukonka ne, Wewe nsongalume, udi muana wa nganyi? Davidi wakamukudimuna ne, Ndi muana wa muntu webe Yishai, Muena Beteleheme." 
1Samuel18:1 Hakamana Davidi kuyikilangana ne Shaula, mutshima wa Yonatana wakakuatakana ne mutshima wa Davidi; Yonatana wakamunanga bu mutshima wandi mene." 
1Samuel18:2 Shaula wakamuangata dituku adi, kakitabusha bua yeye ahingane ku nsubu wa tatu wandi kabidi." 
1Samuel18:3 Hashishe Yonatana ne Davidi bakahungakasha tshihungidi, bualu bua yeye wakamunanga bu mutshima wandi mene." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonatana wakavula tshilulu tshiandi tshiakadiye muluate, wakatshiha Davidi; wakamuha muele wandi wa nvita ne buta buandi ne mukaba wandi kabidi." 
1Samuel18:5 Davidi wakaya mu miaba yonso yakamutuma Shaula, wakadilama bu muena lungenyi; Shaula wakamuteka ku mutu kua bena nvita bandi: bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kua bantu bonso ne ku mesu kua bahika ba Shaula kabidi." 
1Samuel18:6 Mu matuku au kakahingana Davidi kuakashiheye Muena Peleshete, bakashi bakaluhuka mu misoko yonso ya Bena Isalele bua kusambakenabo ne mukelenge Shaula, bakadi bimba misambu, bakadi baja maja, bakadi ne makasa ne bintu bikuabo bia kuimba nʼabi misambu, bakadi ne disanka dinene." 
1Samuel18:7 Bakashi bakimba, bambilangane ne, Shaula wakashiha binunu bia bantu, Davidi wakashiha binunu makumi bia bantu." 
1Samuel18:8 Shaula wakadi ne tshiji tshikole; bualu ebu biuakanyingalasha mutshima wandi. Yeye wakamba ne, Bakutumbisha Davidi bua binunu makumi bia bantu, kadi bakuntumbisha meme anu bua binunu bia bantu. Tshinyi tshikuabo tshidiye mua kuangata, anu bukelenge nansha?" 
1Samuel18:9 Shaula wakabanga kuteka mesu andi kudi Davidi ku dituku adi. 
1Samuel18:10 Hakatshiabu nyuma mubi mulume kudi Nzambi wakatulukila Shaula bikole, yeye wakalubakana mu nsubu muandi; Davidi watamba tshisanji ne tshianza tshiandi bu muakadiye wenza ku dituku ku dituku. Shaula wakadi ne difuma mu tshianza tshiandi." 
1Samuel18:11 Shaula wakela difuma diandi; bualu bua wakamba ne, Neushihe Davidi, difuma dimusompoke dikuate ku tshimanu tshia nsubu. Kadi Davidi wakahanduka ku mesu kuandi misangu ibidi." 
1Samuel18:12 Shaula wakadi utshina Davidi bualu bua Yehowa wakadi nʼandi, ne wakadi mumuke kudi Shaula." 
1Samuel18:13 Nunku Shaula wakamûmusha kudiye, wakamuteka kapitene ka tshinunu tshia bantu; yeye wakaya ne wakalua ku mpala kua bantu." 
1Samuel18:14 Davidi wakadilama bu muena lungenyi mu nshila yandi yonso; Yehowa wakadi nʼandi. 
1Samuel18:15 Hakatangila Shaula ne yeye wakadilama bikole bu muena lungenyi, buowa buakamukuata bualu buandi." 
1Samuel18:16 Kadi Bena Isalele bonso ne Bena Yuda bakananga Davidi, bualu bua yeye wakaya ne wakalua ku mpala kuabo." 
1Samuel18:17 Shaula wakambila Davidi ne, Mona, muanʼanyi muanʼa bute wa bakashi, Melaba, nenkuheye bua ikale mukashi webe; kadi wewe wikale ne dikima dia kuluila Yehowa nvita yandi. Bualu bua Shaula wakamba ne, Tshiena musue kumulenga tshianza, kadi Bena Peleshete bamulenge bianza." 
1Samuel18:18 Davidi wakambila Shaula ne, Meme ndi nganyi, ne muoyo wanyi udi tshinyi, ne ba mu nsubu wa tatu wanyi badi banganyi mu Isalele bua meme kuikala muku wa mukelenge?" 
1Samuel18:19 Kadi hakalua dituku diakasungulabo bua kufila Melaba, muana wa bakashi wa Shaula, kudi Davidi bu mukashi wandi, bakamuha kudi Adaliele, Muena Meholata, bu mukashi wandi." 
1Samuel18:20 Kadi Mikala, muana wa bakashi wa Shaula, wakananga Davidi; bakambila Shaula, ne bualu ebu buakamusankisha." 
1Samuel18:21 Shaula wakamba ne, Nemmufile kudiye bua yeye ikale bu buteyi kudiye ne bianza bia Bena Peleshete nebikale hamʼbidi handi. Nunku Shaula wakambila Davidi ne, Wewe newikale muku wanyi lelu musangu muibidi." 
1Samuel18:22 Shaula wakambila bahika bandi ne, Nuenu nuyikile ne Davidi mu musokoko, numuambile ne, Mona, mukelenge udi utamba kusanka bualu buebe ne bahika bandi bonso badi bakunanga; nunku witabushe bua kuikala muku wa mukelenge." 
1Samuel18:23 Bahika ba Shaula bakamba mei au mu matshu a Davidi. Davidi wakakonka ne, Bualu ebu bua kuikala muku wa mukelenge budi bumueneka kunudi bu bualu bukese, anyi? Bualu bua meme ndi muntu muhele, ne tshiena ne butumbi." 
1Samuel18:24 Bahika ba Shaula bakamumanyisha ne, Davidi wakadi wamba nunku." 
1Samuel18:25 Shaula wakamba ne, Nuambile Davidi ne, Mukelenge kena ukeba biuma bia dibaka anu tukoba tua Bena Peleshete lukama: bua kusombuela bena lukuna ba mukelenge. Shaula wakadi wela meji munda muandi bua kushihesheye Davidi ku bianza bia Bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel18:26 Hakadi bahika bambila Davidi mei â, mutshima wandi wakatamba kusanka bua kuikala muku wa mukelenge. Matuku kâkanza kuleha," 
1Samuel18:27 Davidi wakajuka ne bantu bandi, bakashiha Bena Peleshete nkama ibidi; Davidi wakalua ne tukoba, wakafila buonso buatu kudi mukelenge bua kuikaleye muku wa mukelenge. Shaula wakamuha Mikala, muanʼandi wa bakashi, bu mukashi wandi." 
1Samuel18:28 Shaula wakatangila, wakajingulula ne Yehowa wakadi ne Davidi; Mikala, muana mukashi wa Shaula, wakamunanga." 
1Samuel18:29 Shaula wakatamba kutshina Davidi; Shaula wakadi muena lukuna wa Davidi matuku onso. 
1Samuel18:30 Hashishe baminyampala ba Bena Peleshete bakatambakana; ne hakadibo benza nunku, Davidi wakahita bahika bonso ba Shaula kudilama bu muena lungenyi; nunku dina diandi diakatamba kutumbishibua." 
1Samuel19:1 Shaula wakambila Yonatana, muanʼandi mulume, ne bahika bandi bonso bua kushihabo Davidi. Kadi Yonatana, muana mulume wa Shaula, wakatamba kusanka bua Davidi." 
1Samuel19:2 Yonatana wakambila Davidi ne, Tatu wanyi Shaula udi ukeba kukushiha; nunku ndi nkusengelela ne, Udimuke biebe ne dinda, wikale ha muaba musokome, mubutame;" 
1Samuel19:3 ne meme nenye kuimana ha buihi ne tatu wanyi mu budimi bûdi; meme nenyikile ne tatu wanyi bualu buebe; binamona bualu nenkuambile. 
1Samuel19:4 Yonatana wakatumbisha Davidi kudi tatu wandi Shaula, wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge kenzedi muntu wandi Davidi bualu bubi, bualu bua yeye kena muanze kukuenzela wewe bibi, ne bualu bua malu onso akakuenzeleye adi matambe buimpe;" 
1Samuel19:5 bualu bua yeye wakateka muoyo wandi mu tshianza tshiandi hakashiheye Muena Peleshete, ne Yehowa wakaha Bena Isalele luhandu lunene: wewe wakatangila bualu ebu, wakasanka; wewe udi musue kumatshisha mashi a muntu muakane bua kushiha Davidi udi kayi ne bualu tshinyi?" 
1Samuel19:6 Shaula wakunyua dî dia Yonatana; Shaula wakaditshiha ne, Bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo, kabena bamushiha." 
1Samuel19:7 Yonatana wakabikila Davidi, wakamuambila malu â onso. Yonatana wakalua ne Davidi kudi Shaula, yeye wakadi ku mesu kuandi bu muakadiye diambedi." 
1Samuel19:8 Nvita yakadiku kabidi; Davidi wakaluhuka, wakaluangana ne Bena Peleshete, wakabashiha ba bungi: bakanyema ku mesu kuandi." 
1Samuel19:9 Nyuma mubi mutume kudi Yehowa wakadi kudi Shaula hakashikameye mu nsubu muandi ne difuma mu tshianza tshiandi; Davidi wakadi wimba tshisanji ne tshianza tshiandi. 
1Samuel19:10 Shaula wakakeba kuasa Davidi difuma dimusompoke dikuate mu tshimanu tshia nsubu; kadi Davidi wakehela, wakumuka ku mesu kua Shaula, difuma diakakuata mu tshimanu tshia nsubu; Davidi wakanyema, wakahanduka butuku ebu." 
1Samuel19:11 Shaula wakatuma bantu ku nsubu wa Davidi bua kumutentekelabo ne bua kumushihabo dinda; Mîkala, mukashi wa Davidi, wakamuambila ne, Biwahidia kusungila muoyo webe butuku ebu, hatshiabu nebakushihe." 
1Samuel19:12 Nunku Mikala wakahuekeshila Davidi ku disoso dia nsubu; wakanyema biandi, wakahanduka." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikata wakangata luhingu, wakajadika mu bulalu, wakateka musamu wa miosa ya mbushi ku mutu kualu, wakalubuikila bilulu." 
1Samuel19:14 Hakatuma Shaula ba-messager bua kukuatabo Davidi, yeye wakamba ne, Udi usama." 
1Samuel19:15 Shaula wakatuma bantu bakuabo bua kutangilabo Davidi, wamba ne, Luanʼandi kundi mu bulalu bua meme kumushiha." 
1Samuel19:16 Hakabuela bamessager mu nsubu, bakatangila luhingu mu bulalu ne musamu wa miosa ya mbushi ku mutu kualu." 
1Samuel19:17 Shaula wakakonka Mikala ne, Bualu kai wakundinga nunku, wakulekela muena lukuna wanyi ne yeye wakuhanduka? Mikala wakakudimuna Shaula dî ne, Yeye wakungambila ne, Undekele, nenkushihe wewe bua tshinyi?" 
1Samuel19:18 Davidi wakanyema, wakahanduka, wakaya kudi Samuele mu Lama, wakamuambila malu onso akamuenzela Shaula. Yeye ne Samuele bakaya, bakashikama mu Nayota." 
1Samuel19:19 Bakambila Shaula ne, Mona, Davidi udi mu Nayota hehi ne Lama." 
1Samuel19:20 Shaula wakatuma ba-messager bua kukuatabo Davidi; kadi hakatangilabo tshisumbu tshia baprofete bamba dî dia Nzambi ne Samuele muimane ku mutu kuabo, Nyuma wa Nzambi wakatulukila ba-messager ba Shaula, bobo bakamba dî dia Nzambi kabidi." 
1Samuel19:21 Hakambilabo Shaula bualu ebu, yeye wakatuma ba-messager bakuabo, bobo bakamba dî dia Nzambi kabidi. Wakatuma ba-messager tshiakasatu, ne bobo bakamba dî dia Nzambi kabidi." 
1Samuel19:22 Hashishe yeye nkayandi wakaya ku Lama, wakafika ku dina dinene dia mai didi mu Seku, wakakonka bantu ne, Samuele ne Davidi badi banyi? Muntu mukuabo wakamuambila ne, Badi mu Nayota hehi ne Lama." 
1Samuel19:23 Yeye wakaya ku Nayota hehi ne Lama; ne Nyuma wa Nzambi wakamutulukila kabidi, yeye wakenda wamba dî dia Nzambi tô ne hakafikeye ku Nayota hehi ne Lama." 
1Samuel19:24 Yeye wakavula bilulu biandi bionso, wakamba dî dia Nzambi ku mesu kua Samuele, wakalala hanshi butaka munya mujima ne butuku bujima. Nunku bakakonkangana ne, Shaula kabidi udi munkatshi mua baprofete, anyi?" 
1Samuel20:1 Davidi wakanyema ku Nayota hehi ne Lama, wakaya kudi Yonatana, wakamukonka ne, Nakuenza tshinyi? Dihanga dianyi didi tshinyi? Nakuenza bualu bubi kai ku mesu kua tatu webe bua yeye udi ukeba muoyo wanyi?" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonatana wakamuambila ne, Bualu ehu kabuikadiku, wewe kuena ufua; tatu wanyi katu wenza bualu bunene anyi bukese diambedi yeye kayi muanze kungambila; tatu wanyi neansokoke bualu ebu bishi? Bualu ebu kabuena bulelela." 
1Samuel20:3 Davidi wakaditshiha ne, Tatu webe udi mumanye ne, Meme nakasangana luse ku mesu kuebe ne yeye udi wamba ne, Yonatana kimanyi bualu ebu, anyi yeye neanyingalashe mutshima wandi; kadi bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo ne bu mudi mutshima webe ne muoyo anu katuha kihi kadi kashala hankatshi hanyi ne lufu." 
1Samuel20:4 Yonatana wakambila Davidi ne, Tshionso tshidi mutshima webe musue, nenkuenzele tshi." 
1Samuel20:5 Davidi wakambila Yonatana ne, Mona, makelela ngondo udi ubala, ne bundi nʼabu mbua kudia bidia ku mesa a mukelenge; kadi witabushe bua meme kuya kubulama mu budimi tô ne hahita matuku asatu." 
1Samuel20:6 Biangebesha tatu webe, hashishe wewe umuambile ne, Davidi wakunsengelela bua kuyeye ku Beteleheme, musoko wandi, bualu bua tshidimu etshi ntshidimu tshia kushihela Nzambi nyama kudi bonso ba mu diku diandi." 
1Samuel20:7 Biambeye ne, Mbimpe, hashishe muntu webe neikale talalâ, kadi biakuateye tshiji, Umanye biebe ne yeye wakahangidisha bua kungenzela bibi." 
1Samuel20:8 Nunku ufuile muntu webe luse, bualu bua wewe wakamana kuhunga nʼanyi tshihungidi mu dina dia Yehowa; bikala bualu bubi munda muanyi, unshihe nkayebe; udi musue kulua nʼanyi ku mesu kua tatu webe bishi?" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonatana wakamuambila ne, Bualu ebu kabuikadi kûdi. Binamanya ne tatu wanyi ndi musue kukuenzela bualu bubi, tshiena nkumanyisha, anyi?" 
1Samuel20:10 Davidi wakakonka Yonatana ne, Biakuambila tatu webe mei makole, wakambila nganyi?" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonatana wakambila Davidi ne. Lua, tuye bietu mu budimi. Bubidi buabo bakaya mu budimi." 
1Samuel20:12 Yonatana wakambila Davidi ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ikale bu mumanyi wa bualu: banabuela tatu wanyi munda bua bualu ebu ha diba edi nansha makelela nansha dia ha nyima; mona, biambeye bualu buimpe bua Davidi, tshiena nkutumina dî bua kukumanyisha bualu ebu, anyi?" 
1Samuel20:13 Yehowa atambe kuenzela Yonatana bibi biamba tatu wanyi kukuenzela wewe bibi ne meme tshiyi nkuambila, tshiyi nkutuma ha bula bua wewe uye ne ditalala; Yehowa ikale nʼebe bu muakadiye ne tatu wanyi." 
1Samuel20:14 Wewe kabidi, kuhanga kundesha kalolo ka Yehowa hantshidi ne muoyo, bua meme tshihi nansha;" 
1Samuel20:15 ne wewe kumushi luse luebe ku nsubu wanyi tshiendelele nansha habutula Yehowa bena lukuna bonso ba Davidi ha buloba. 
1Samuel20:16 Nunku Yonatana wakahunga tshihungidi ne ba mu nsubu wa Davidi, Wamba ne, Yehowa neatshimone ku bianza bia bena lukuna ba Davidi." 
1Samuel20:17 Yonatana wakatshihisha Davidi tshiakabidi bualu bua dinanga diakadiye nʼadi kudiye; bualu bua yeye wakamunanga bu muakanangeye mutshima wandi mene. 
1Samuel20:18 Yonatana wakamuambila ne, Ngondo udi ubala makelela, nebamanye ne wewe kuenaku bualu bua nkuasa webe neikale hatuhu." 
1Samuel20:19 Hawalalaku matuku asatu, hashishe uye biebe lubilu ku muaba kuwakasokoma didiku dikuabo, ushaleku hehi ne dibue dia Ezele." 
1Samuel20:20 Nengele mikete isatu ku mpenge kuadi bu mundi ngela muludikile tshintu. 
1Samuel20:21 Nunku nentume nsongalume, nemmuambile ne, Ya biebe, ukebe mikete. Bingambila nsongalume ne, Tangila, mikete idi luseke lûdi, uyangate, ulue nʼai; bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo ditalala didi kûdi, kakuena bualu bubi." 
1Samuel20:22 Kadi bingambila nsongalume ne, Mona, mikete idi ku mpala kuebe, hashishe ya mu nshila webe, bualu bua Yehowa wakakumina kule." 
1Samuel20:23 Bua bualu ebu bunakukuambila, Mona, Yehowa udi hankatshi hetu nʼebe tshiendelele." 
1Samuel20:24 Nunku Davidi wakasokoma mu budimi; bakabala ngondo mukelenge wakashikama bua kudieye bia kudia. 
1Samuel20:25 Mukelenge wakashikama mu nkuasa wandi hehi ne tshimanu tshia nsubu bu muakenzeye matuku makuabo; Yonatana wakimana ha muaba wandi, ne Abinê wakashikama ku luseke lua Shaula; kadi nkuasa wa Davidi wakadi mushale hatuhu." 
1Samuel20:26 Shaula kakamba bualu dituku edi, wakelangana meji munda ne, Bualu buakukuata Davidi, yeye kena muakane bua kudieye; bulelela, kena muakane." 
1Samuel20:27 Hakatshiabu, hakahita dituku diakabala ngondo, nkuasa wa Davidi wakadi mushale anu hatuhu; Shaula wakambila Yonatana, muanʼandi, ne, Muana wa Yishai kakuena nʼetu lelu ne makelela bua tshinyi?" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatana wakakudimuna Shaula ne, Davidi wakunsengelela bikole bua kuyeye ku Beteleheme;" 
1Samuel20:29 yeye wakungambila ne, Witabushe bua meme kuya, bualu bua badi mu tshiota tshietu badi bashihela Yehowa nyama mu musoko; muanʼetu wakumbikilaku: binasangana luse ku mesu kuebe, witabushe bua meme kuya kutangila bana betu. Nunku yeye kena mulue ku mesa a mukelenge." 
1Samuel20:30 Hashishe tshiji tshia Shaula tshiakatema kudi Yonatana, wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi muana wa mukashi mubi, muena mampaka, meme tshiena mumanye ne, Wewe wakasungula muana wa Yishai bua kufuisheye wewe ne mamuʼebe wakakula bundu, anyi?" 
1Samuel20:31 Bualu bua batshidi muana wa Yishai ne muoyo ha buloba, wewe ne bukelenge buebe kabiena bijadikibue. Nunku utume bantu, balue nʼandi kundi, bualu bua yeye neafue biandi bulelela." 
1Samuel20:32 Yonatana wakebesha tatuʼandi Shaula ne, Neumushihe bualu kai? Yeye Wakenza tshinyi?" 
1Samuel20:33 Shaula wakamuela difuma bua kumushiheye; nunku Yonatana wakamanya ne tatu wandi wakamana kusungula bua kushiheye Davidi. 
1Samuel20:34 Nunku Yonatana wakabika ku mesa ne tshiji tshikole, yeye kakadia bia kudia dituku dibidi dia ngondo au; mutshima wandi wakatamba kunyingalala bua Davidi bualu bua tatu wandi wakamuenzela bibi." 
1Samuel20:35 Hakatshiabu Yonatana wakaya ne nsongalume mu budimi ha muaba wakambileye Davidi. 
1Samuel20:36 Yeye wakambila nsongalume ne, Ya biebe lubilu, ukebe mikete indi ngela. Hakadi nsongalume uya, yeye wakela mukete ku mpala kuandi." 
1Samuel20:37 Hakafika nsongalume ku muaba wakadi mukete wakela Yonatana, wakela nsongalume dî ne, Mukete kawena ku mpala kuebe, anyi?" 
1Samuel20:38 Yonatana wakela nsongalume dî ne, Endesha, ya biebe lubilu, kujanguluki. Nsongalume wa Yonatana wakambila mikete, wakahingana kudi mukelenge wandi." 
1Samuel20:39 Kadi nsongalume kakadi mumanye bualu, anu Yonatana ne Davidi bakadi bamanye bualu." 
1Samuel20:40 Yonatana wakahesha nsongalume bintu biandi, wakamuambila ne, Uye nʼabi ku musoko." 
1Samuel20:41 Hakaya nsongalume, Davidi wakajuka ku muaba wandi wa ku luseke lua Sude, wakakuma mpala wandi hanshi, wakakukuila Yonatana misangu isatu, bakasangana mishiku, bakadilangana tô ne hakahita Davidi." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonatana wakambila Davidi ne, Waya biebe talalâ bualu bua tuetu tuakahungakasha mei ne, Yehowa neikale hankatshi hetu nʼebe ne hankatshi ha bana bebe ne bana banyi tshiendelele. Yeye wakabika, wakaya; Yonatana wakahingana ku musoko." 
1Samuel21:1 Davidi wakaya ku Nobo kudi Ahimeleke, muakuidi wa Nzambi. Ahimeleke wakalua kuakidila Davidi, wenda uzakala; wakamuebesha ne, Muwakulua mukuabo kayi nʼebe mmunyi?" 
1Samuel21:2 Davidi wakambila Ahimeleke muakuidi ne, Mukelenge wakuntuma bua mudimu wandi: yeye wakungambila ne, Kumanyishi muntu bua mudimu unakakutumina anyi bua mei anakakuambila; nakamana kutuma bantu ku muaba ne ku muaba." 
1Samuel21:3 Udi ne tshinyi mu tshianza tshiebe? Umpe mitanda ya bidia itanu mu tshianza tshianyi, anyi bintu bikuabo biudi nʼabi." 
1Samuel21:4 Muakuidi wakambila Davidi ne, Kakuena bidia bia hatuhu mu tshianza tshianyi, kadi anu bidia bia tshijila, bikala bantu aha kabayi basangile ne bakashi." 
1Samuel21:5 Davidi wakambila muakuidi ne, Bulelela, katuena basangile ne bakashi tô matuku asatu; hanakumuka ku musoko, bintu bia bantu aba biakadi bijidika, nebitambe kujidibua tô ne lelu nansha?" 
1Samuel21:6 Nunku muakuidi wakamuha bidia bia tshijila, bidia bikuabo kabiyiku anu bidia bia tshijila biakumushabo ku mesu kua Yehowa hakatekabo bidia bihia-bihia ku dituku ku dituku." 
1Samuel21:7 Muena mudimu wa Shaula wakadiku dituku adi, mukandibue ku mesu kua Yehowa, dina diandi Doege, Muena Edome, kahita ka balami ba mikoko ya Shaula." 
1Samuel21:8 Davidi wakebesha Ahimeleke ne, Udi ne difuma anyi muele wa nvita mu tshianza tshiebe, anyi? Tshiakalua ne muele anyi bintu bianyi bia nvita bikuabo, bualu bua mudimu wa mukelenge udi bualu bua lubilu." 
1Samuel21:9 Muakuidi wakamuambila ne, Muele wa nvita wa Goleyata, Muena Peleshete, uwakashiha mu tshibanda tshia Ela, udiku, udi mujingila mu tshilulu ku nyima kua efoda; biwasua kuwangata, uwangate, bualu bua kakuena muele mukuabo kunoko. Davidi wakamba ne, Kakuena mukuabo bu au, ûmpe." 
1Samuel21:10 Davidi wakajuka dituku adi, wakanyema bualu bua ditshina dia Shaula, wakaya kudi Akisha, mukelenge wa mu Gata." 
1Samuel21:11 Bantu ba Akisha bakamuebesha ne, Eu ke nDavidi, mukelenge wa buloba, anyi? Kabakamuimbila musambu hakadibo baja maja dituku dikuabo hakambabo ne, Shaula wakashiha binunu bia bantu, Davidi wakashiha binunu makumi bia bantu, anyi?" 
1Samuel21:12 Davidi wakateka mei au onso mu mutshima wandi, wakatamba kutshina Akisha, mukelenge wa mu Gata." 
1Samuel21:13 Yeye wakakudimuna bienzedi biandi ku mpala kuabo, wakadingisha bu muhale mu bianza biabo: wakafunda tshifundafunda ku bibi bia musoko, lute luandi luakahueka ku muedi wandi." 
1Samuel21:14 Hashishe Akisha wakambila bantu bandi ne, Monai, muntu eu udi muhale, nuakalua nʼandi kundi munyi?" 
1Samuel21:15 Meme ndi nkengela bahale bua nuenu nuakalua ne muntu eu bua kuenzeye bu muhale ku mesu kuanyi, anyi? Muntu eu nealue mu nsubu wanyi, anyi?" 
1Samuel22:1 Davidî wakumukaku, wakaya ku lubuebue lua Adulama; hakunvua bana babo ne bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi lumu elu, bakaya kudiye." 
1Samuel22:2 Bantu bonso bakadi ne ntatu ne bakadi ne mabanza ne bakadi ne kutontolola bakadisangisha kudiye; yeye wakadi kapitene kabo: bantu bakadi nʼandi bakadi bu nkama inai. 
1Samuel22:3 Davidi wakumukaku, wakaya ku Misepa wa mu Moaba; yeye wakambila mukelenge wa Moaba ne, Witabushe bua tatuʼanyi ne mamuʼanyi balue, bashikame nʼebe tô ne hanamanya tshidi Nzambi musue kungenzela." 
1Samuel22:4 Yeye wakalua nʼabo kudi mukelenge wa Moaba: bakashikama nʼandi tô matuku onso akadi Davidi mushale mu musoko wa ngumbu. 
1Samuel22:5 Gada muprofete wakambila Davidi ne, Kushadi mu musoko wa ngumbu nansha, Umuke biebe, uye mu buloba bua Yuda, Davidi wakumukaku, wakaya mu ditu dia Helete." 
1Samuel22:6 Shaula wakunyua ne, Bakasangana Davidi ne bantu bakadiye nʼabo; Shaula wakadi mushikame muinshi mua mutshi mu Gibea wa mu Lama, wakadi ne difuma diandi mu tshianza tshiandi, bantu bandi bonso bakadi bimane kudiye." 
1Samuel22:7 Shaula wakebesha bantu bandi bakadi bimane kudiye ne, Nuenu Bena Benyamina, unvuai, Muana eu wa Yishai neanuhe madimi ne madimi a tumuma tukese, anyi? Yeye neanusunguile tupitene tua binunu bia bantu ne tupitene tua nkama ya bantu, anyi?" 
1Samuel22:8 Bualu kai buonso buenu nuakungelela tshifufu, nansha umue wenu wakummanyisha ne, Muana webe mulume wakahunga dî ne muana wa Yishai? Bualu kai nansha umue wenu udi unyingalasha mutshima wandi bualu buanyi? Bualu kai nansha umue wenu wakummanyisha ne, Muanʼebe mulume wakatombosha muntu webe kûdi, bua kualamineye bu mudiye wenza lelu?" 
1Samuel22:9 Hashishe Doege, Muena Edome, wakadi muimane munkatshi mua bantu ba Shaula, wakamuambila ne, Meme nakatangila muana wa Yishai mulue ku Nobo kudi Ahimeleke, muana wa Ahituba." 
1Samuel22:10 Yeye wakebesha Yehowa bualu buandi, wakamuha bintu bia kudia ne muele wa nvita wa Goleyata, Muena Peleshete." 
1Samuel22:11 Mukelenge wakatuma dî, wakabikila Ahimeleke muakuidi, muana wa Ahituba, ne bantu bonso bakadi mu nsubu wandi, bakadi bakuidi ba mu Nobo; buonso buabo bakalua kudi mukelenge." 
1Samuel22:12 Shaula wakamba ne, Unvua, wewe muana wa Ahituba. Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Ndiku, mukelenge wanyi." 
1Samuel22:13 Shaula wakamuebesha ne, Wewe wakungelela tshifufu ne muana wa Yishai bua kumuha bintu bia kudia ne muele wa nvita, wakuebesha Nzambi bualu buandi, bua yeye antombokele, andadile bu mualaminyi bu mudiye wenza lelu bualu kai?" 
1Samuel22:14 Hashishe Ahimeleke wakakudimuna mukelenge dî, wakamba ne, Muntu kai wa munkatshi mua bantu bebe udi ne kanemu bu Davidi? Udi muku wa mukelenge, wakadi ne butumbi mu nsubu muebe ne wewe wakamuebeshaku lungenyi." 
1Samuel22:15 Meme nakabanga kuebesha Nzambi bualu buandi lelu, anyi? Bualu ebu kabuikadi kundi: mukelenge kabishi muntu wandi bua bualu ebu anyi bonso badi mu nsubu wa tatu wandi; bualu bua muntu webe kena mumanye bualu ebu buonso, ne makese ne a bungi." 
1Samuel22:16 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Ahimeleke, wewe neufue ne bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu webe bulelela." 
1Samuel22:17 Mukelenge wakambila bantu bandi bakadi bimane kudiye ne, Shihai bakuidi ba Yehowa, bualu bua bianza biabo bidi kudi Davidi; bobo bakamanya ne, Davidi wakadi munyeme, kabakungambila. Kadi bantu ba mukelenge bakahidia kulenga bakuidi ba Yehowa bianza biabo." 
1Samuel22:18 Mukelenge wakambila Doege ne, Wewe ushihe bakuidi. Doege, Muena Edome, wakatshunguluka, wakashiha bakuidi dituku adi makumi muanda mukulu ne batanu bakadi baluata efoda ya lin." 
1Samuel22:19 Wakabutula Nobo, musoko wa bakuidi, wakashiha balume ne bakashi ne bana ne tuana tuakadi tuamua mabele ne ngombe ne nyama ya mpunda ne mikoko ne muele wa nvita." 
1Samuel22:20 Umue wa bana ba Ahimeleke, muana wa Ahituba, dina diandi Ebeyatâ, wakahanduka, wakalonda Davidi." 
1Samuel22:21 Ebeyatâ wakambila Davidi ne, Shaula wakashiha bakuidi ba Yehowa." 
1Samuel22:22 Davidi wakambila Ebeyatâ ne, Dituku adi diakadiku Doege, Muena Edome, nakamanya ne, Yeye neamanyishe Shaula bulelela. Bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu webe bakafua bualu buanyi." 
1Samuel22:23 Ushale nʼanyi, kutshinyi, bualu bua udi ukeba muoyo wanyi ngudi ukeba muoyo webe kabidi; biwashala nʼanyi, neulamibue bimpe." 
1Samuel23:1 Bakambila Davidi ne, Bena Peleshete badi baluangana ne Bena Kila, badi biba bintu bia bishihuidi." 
1Samuel23:2 Davidi wakakonka Yehowa ne, Nenye bua kushiha Bena Peleshete aba, anyi? Yehowa wakambila Davidi ne, Ya, ushihe Bena Peleshete, usungile Kila." 
1Samuel23:3 Bantu ba Davidi bakamuambila ne, Mona, tuetu ludi tutshina kunoko mu Yuda, nunku ludi tutamba kutshina bua kuya ku Kila bua kuluangana ne Bena Peleshete nansha?" 
1Samuel23:4 Hashishe Davidi wakebesha Yehowa tshiakabidi. Yehowa wakamukudimuna dî ne, Juka, uye ku Kila, bualu bua meme nenfile Bena Peleshete mu tshianza tshiebe." 
1Samuel23:5 Davidi ne bantu bandi bakaya ku Kila, bakaluangana ne Bena Peleshete, bakabashiha ne kushiha kukole, bakahingana ne ngombe yabo. Nunku Davidi wakasungila Bena Kila." 
1Samuel23:6 Hakanyema Ebeyatâ, muana wa Ahimeleke, kudi Davidi mu Kila, yeye wakadi mulue ne efoda mu tshianza tshiandi." 
1Samuel23:7 Bakamanyisha Shaula ne, Davidi wakaya ku Kila. Shaula wakamba ne, Nzambi wakamufila mu tshianza tshianyi; bualu bua yeye wakabuela mu musoko udi ne bibi bidi bibaka bikole." 
1Samuel23:8 Shaula wakasangisha bantu bandi ba nvita, bua kuya ku Kila bua kutshintshimika Davidi ne bantu bandi." 
1Samuel23:9 Davidi wakamanya ne, Shaula udi ungelela tshifulu: nunku yeye wakabikila Ebeyatâ muakuidi, wakamuambila ne, Lua kundi ne efoda." 
1Samuel23:10 Hashishe wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, bulelela, muntu webe wakunvua lumu ne, Shaula udi ukeba mua kulua ku Kila bua kubutula musoko bualu buanyi." 
1Samuel23:11 Bena Kila nebaufile mu tshianza tshiandi, anyi? Shaula nealue bu lumu luakunvua muntu webe, anyi? Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ndi nkusengelela ne, Umanyishe muntuʼebe. Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Yeye ulualua." 
1Samuel23:12 Hashishe Davidi wakakonka ne, Bena Kila nebaufile ne bantu banyi mu tshianza tshia Shaula, anyi? Yehowa wakamba ne, Nebanufile." 
1Samuel23:13 Hashishe Davidi ne bantu bandi bu nkama isambombo bakajuka, bakumuka mu Kila, bakaya kuakamanyabo mua kuya. Bakamanyisha Shaula ne, Davidi wakumuka mu Kila; yeye wakalekela kuyaku." 
1Samuel23:14 Davidi wakashikama mu tshihela mu misoko ya ngumbu; wakashala mu mikuna mu tshihela tshia Zifa. Shaula wakamukeba ku dituku ku dituku, kadi Nzambi kakamufila mu tshianza tshiandi." 
1Samuel23:15 Davidi wakamanya ne, Shaula wakalua kukeba muoyo wanyi. Davidi wakadi mushikame mu tshihela tshia Zifa mu ditu." 
1Samuel23:16 Yonatana, muana wa Shaula, wakajuka, wakaya kudi Davidi hakadiye muitu, wakakolesha maboko andi mu Nzambi." 
1Samuel23:17 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Kutshinyi, bualu bua tshianza tshia Shaula, tatuʼanyi, katshiena tshikusangana; wewe newikale mukelenge wa Isalele, ne meme nengikale muibidi nʼebe; Shaula, tatuʼanyi, udi mumanye bualu ebu." 
1Samuel23:18 Bubidi buabo bakahunga tshihungidi ku mpala kua Yehowa; Davidi wakashala muitu, Yonatana wakahingana ku nsubu kuandi." 
1Samuel23:19 Hashishe Bena Zifa bakaya kudi Shaula mu Gibea, bakamuambila ne, Davidi kena musokome nʼetu mu misoko ya ngumbu idi muitu ku mukuna wa Hakila udi ku Sude kua tshihela, anyi?" 
1Samuel23:20 Nunku mukelenge, ulue biebe bu mudi mutshima webe musue kulua; bualu buetu nebuikale bua tuetu tumufile mu tshianza tshia mukelenge." 
1Samuel23:21 Shaula wakabambila ne, Nusankishibue kudi Yehowa, bualu bua nuenu nuakanfuila luse." 
1Samuel23:22 Ndi nnusengelela ne, Yai bienu, nutangile bimpe muaba mudiye musokome ne bantu bakamutangilaku; bualu bua nakunvua lumu ne, Yeye udi ne budimu bua bungi." 
1Samuel23:23 Nunku yai bienu, numukebe mu miaba yonso misokome yakadiye musokome, nulue bienu, nungambile bimpe; hashishe nenye nʼenu, ne bikaleye mu buloba nemmukebulule munkatshi mua binunu bia meku a mu Yuda." 
1Samuel23:24 Bakabika, bakaya ku Zifa ku mpala kua Shaula; kadi Davidi ne bantu bandi bakadi mu tshihela tshia Maona mu Alabâ ku Sude kua tshihela." 
1Samuel23:25 Shaula ne bantu bandi bakayaku bua kumukeba. Bakamanyisha Davidi; nunku yeye wakaya ku dibue dinene, wakashikama mu tshihela tshia Maona. Shaula wakunyua lumu elu, nunku yeye wakamulonda mu tshihela tshia Maona." 
1Samuel23:26 Shaula ne bantu bandi bakayila ku luseke elu lua mukuna, ne Davidi ne bantu bandi bakayila ku luseke lualua; Davidi wakaya lubilu bua kuhanduka, bualu bua yeye wakatshina Shaula; bualu bua Shaula ne bantu bandi bakadi bela Davidi ne bantu bandi munkatshi bua kubakuata." 
1Samuel23:27 Kadi messager wakalua kudi Shaula ne, Ulue biebe lubilu, kujanguluki, bualu bua Bena Peleshete badi bahaula buloba." 
1Samuel23:28 Nunku Shaula wakalekela kulonda Davidi, wakaya kuluangana ne Bena Peleshete. Nunku wakabikila muaba au ne, Sela-hamalekota." 
1Samuel23:29 Nunku Davidi wakumukaku, wakashikama mu musoko wa mu Ene-gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Hakahingana Shaula ku mata ya ku Bena Peleshete, bakamuambila ne, Mona, Davidi udi mu tshihela tshia Ene-gedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Hashishe Shaula wakasungula bantu binunu bisatu munkatshi mua Bena Isalele bonso, bakaya kukeba Davidi ne bantu bandi munkatshi mua mabue akadi mbushi ya mu mpata yendelahu." 
1Samuel24:3 Yeye Wakafika ku mpangu ya mikoko yakadi mu nshila: lubuebue luakadiku, Shaula wakabuelamu bua kubuikileye makasa andi. Davidi ne bantu bandi bakadi basokome mu luseke lukuabo lua lubuebue elu." 
1Samuel24:4 Bantu ba Davidi bakamuambila ne, Mona, dituku diakakuambila Yehowa ne, Mona neufile muena lukuna webe mu tshianza tshiebe, diakufika; wewe umuenzele bu mûdi umona ne mbimpe. Hashishe Davidi wakajuka, wakakosa tshihesa tshia tshikowelu tshia Shaula mu musokoko." 
1Samuel24:5 Ku nyima mutshima wa Davidi wakanyingalala bualu bua yeye wakakosa tshihesa tshia tshikowelu tshia Shaula. 
1Samuel24:6 Davidi wakambila bantu bandi ne, Yehowa ampidishe tshienzedi mukelenge wanyi, wakela Yehowa manyi ha mutu, bualu ebu, tshiolodi tshianza tshianyi kudiye, bualu bua yeye udi muntu muedibue manyi kudi Yehowa." 
1Samuel24:7 Nunku Davidi wakahanda bantu bandi ne mei â; kakitabusha bua bobo kuluangana ne Shaula. Shaula wakabika, wakumuka mu lubuebue, wakaya mu nshila wandi." 
1Samuel24:8 Hashishe Davidi wakabika, wakaluhuka mu lubuebue, wakela dî kudi Shaula ne. Mukelenge wanyi. Hakatshunguluka Shaula, Davidi wakatua mpala wandi hanshi, wakamukukuila." 
1Samuel24:9 Davidi wakambila Shaula ne, Bualu kai wewe wakitabusha mei a bantu ne, Davidi udi ukeba kukuenzela bibi?" 
1Samuel24:10 Mona, lelu mesu ebe adi amona bu mutu Yehowa mukufile mu tshianza tshianyi mu lubuebue; bakuabo bakungambila ne, Umushihe. Kadi nakamba ne, Tshiena ndenga mukelenge wanyi tshianza, bualu bua yeye udi muedibue manyi kudi Yehowa." 
1Samuel24:11 Bualu bukuabo, tatu wanyi, tangila ne tshihesa tshia tshikowelu tshiebe tshidi mu tshianza tshianyi; bualu bua meme nakukosa tshikowelu tshiebe, tshiakukushiha, nunku umanye biebe ne, Kakuena bualu bubi mu tshianza tshianyi: tshiakukuenzela bibi, kadi wewe ngûdi ukeba muoyo wanyi bua kûnyenga." 
1Samuel24:12 Yehowa atulumbuluishe hankatshi hetu nʼebe, Yehowa ansombuele bualu buebe, kadi tshianza tshianyi katshiena tshikala kudi." 
1Samuel24:13 Lusumuinu lua bankambua betu ludi luamba ne, Bualu bubi budi bufuma kudi bantu babi; katu tshianza tshianyi katshiena tshikulenga nansha." 
1Samuel24:14 Mukelenge wa Isalele udi ukeba nganyi? Wewe udi ulonda neanyi? Udi ukeba mbua mulue, anyi mukenya!" 
1Samuel24:15 Nunku Yehowa ikale mulumbuluishi, akose tshilumbu tshidi hankatshi hetu nʼebe Yehowa atangile, akule bualu buanyi, ansungile mu tshianza tshiebe." 
1Samuel24:16 Hakashikisha Davidi kuambila Shaula mei â onso, Shaula wakakonka ne, Muanʼanyi Davidi, edi ndi diebe, anyi? Shaula wakabandisha dî diandi, wakadila." 
1Samuel24:17 Yeye wakambila Davidi ne, Wewe udi untambe meme buimpe: wewe wakungenzela anu malu mimpe, kadi meme nakukuenzela wewe malu mabi." 
1Samuel24:18 Wewe wakungambila bu muwakungenzela bimpe lelu, bualu bua hakuila Yehowa mu tshianza tshiebe, kuakunshiha nansha." 
1Samuel24:19 Basangana mundi muena lukuna wandi, neumulekele aye, anyi? Nunku Yehowa akufute bimpe bua bualu buwakungenzela lelu." 
1Samuel24:20 Katataka ndi mumanye ne, Wewe newikale mukelenge bulelela ne bukelenge bua Isalele nebujadikibue mu tshianza tshiebe." 
1Samuel24:21 Nunku uditshihe kundi ku mesu kua Yehowa ne, Kuena ushiha bana banyi badi balonda ku nyima, ne kuena ujimisha dina dianyi munkatshi mua nsubu wa tatu wanyi." 
1Samuel24:22 Davidi wakaditshiha kudi Shaula. Shaula wakahingana kuandi, katu Davidi ne bantu bandi bakaya ku musoko wa lumbu."
