2Samuel13:5 Yonadaba wakamuambila ne, Lala ha bulalu buebe bu muntu udi ne disama; halua tatu webe kukutangila, umuambile ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Anji kuitabusha bua muanʼetu wa bakashi Tamâ alue bua kundisheye bidia, alongolole bia kudia anu ku mesu kuanyi, bua meme mbitangile, mbidie anu ku tshianza tshiandi." 
2Samuel13:6 Nunku Amenona wakalala hanshi, wakadifuanyisha bu muena disama; hakabuela mukelenge bua kumutangila, Amenona wakambila mukelenge ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Anji kuitabusha bua muanʼetu Tamâ andambile mikata ibidi ku mesu kuanyi bua meme nyidie anu ku tshianza tshiandi." 
2Samuel13:7 Hashishe Davidi wakatuma dî ku nsubu kuakadi Tamâ ne, Uye biebe ku nsubu wa muanʼenu Amenona, umulambile bia kudia." 
2Samuel13:8 Nunku Tamâ wakaya ku nsubu wa muanʼabo Amenona, wakamusangana mulale hanshi. Yeye wakangata bukula, wakabulongolola, wakenza mikata ku mesu kuandi, wakalamba mikata." 
2Samuel13:9 Yeye wakangata dilonga, wakayiteka ku mesu kuandi, kadi yeye wakahidia kuyidia. Amenona wakamba ne, Bantu bonso bakuabo bumuke kundi. Bantu bonso bakumuka kudiye." 
2Samuel13:10 Amenona wakambila Tamâ ne, Ulue ne mikata ai mu nsubu wa bulalu bua meme kuyidia ku tshianza tshiebe. Tamâ wakangata mikata yakeleye, wakaya nʼai mu nsubu wa bulalu kudi muanʼabo Amenona." 
2Samuel13:11 Hakalueye nʼai kudiye bua kumudisha, yeye wakamukuata, wakamuambila ne, Lua, muanʼetu mukashi, ulale nʼanyi." 
2Samuel13:12 Yeye wakamukudimuna dî ne, Nansha, muanʼetu mulume, kunkuatshi ku bukole nunku, bualu ebu kabuena mua kuenjibua mu Isalele; kuenji bualu ebu buhote." 
2Samuel13:13 Meme nenteke bundu buanyi kudi kunyi? Ne bua bualu buebe wewe newikale bu umue wa bahote mu Isalele. Nunku ndi nkusengelela ne, Webeshe mukelenge bualu ebu, yeye kena uhidia kunfila kûdi." 
2Samuel13:14 Kadi yeye kakunyua dî diandi; kadi bualu bua yeye wakamuhita bukole, yeye wakamukuata ku bukole, wakalala nʼandi." 
2Samuel13:15 Hashishe Amenona wakatamba kumukina ne lukinu lukole, lukinu luakamukineye nʼalu tuakahita dinanga diakadiye nʼadi kudiye bukole. Amenona wakamuambila ne, Juka, ya biebe." 
2Samuel13:16 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Nansha, tshiena nya, bualu ebu bua kungumusha nunku budi butamba bukuabo buwakungenzela bubi. Kadi yeye kakunyua dî diandi." 
2Samuel13:17 Hashishe yeye wakabikila muena mudimu wandi wakadi umukuatshila mudimu, wakamuambila ne, Umushe mukashi eu kundi, wele nsahi ku tshibi." 
2Samuel13:18 Yeye wakadi muluate bilulu bia bibaka bibaka, bualu bua bana ba bakashi ba mukelenge bakatshidi tumama bakadi ne tshilele tshia kuluata bilulu nunku. Hashishe muena mudimu wandi wakamûmusha, wakela nsahi ku tshibi." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamâ wakela butue mu mutu wandi, wakadihanda bilulu biandi bia bibaka bibaka biakadiye muluate; yeye wakateka tshianza tshiandi ha mutu handi, wakaya wenda udila bikole." 
2Samuel13:20 Abashaloma, muanʼabo mulume, wakamuebesha ne, Muanʼetu Amenona wakadi nʼebe, anyi? Udiholeshe, muanʼetu mukashi, yeye udi muanʼenu mulume, kuteki bualu ebu mu mutshima webe. Nunku Tamâ wakashala ne kanyinganyinga mu nsubu wa muanʼabo Abashaloma." 
2Samuel13:21 Kadi hakunvua mukelenge Davidi malu â onso, wakadi ne tshiji tshikole." 
2Samuel13:22 Abashaloma kakambila Amenona mei mimpe anyi mei mabi; Abashaloma wakadi ne Amenona lukuna bualu bua yeye wakakuata muanʼabo mukashi Tamâ ku bukole. 
2Samuel13:23 Hakahita bidimu bibidi bijima, Abashaloma wakasangisha bakoshi ba miosa ya mikoko ku Bâla-hasô, udi hehi ne Efelayima; Abashaloma wakabikilaku bana balume bonso ba mukelenge." 
2Samuel13:24 Abashaloma wakaya kudi mukelenge, wakamuambila ne, Mona, muntu webe udi ne bakoshi ba miosa ya mikoko, ndi nkusengelela ne, Mukelenge ne bantu bandi baye ne muntu wandi." 
2Samuel13:25 Mukelenge wakambila Abashaloma ne, Nansha, muanʼanyi, bituaya buonso buetu bualu ebu nebuikale bu bujitu kûdi. Yeye wakamusengelela, kadi yeye kakitabusha kuya; kadi wakamuvudishila disanka." 
2Samuel13:26 Hashishe Abashaloma wakamba ne, Biwahidia kuya, ndi nkusengelela ne, Witabushe bua muanʼetu Amenona aye nʼetu. Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Yeye udi ne bua kuya nʼebe bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel13:27 Abashaloma wakamusengelela tô; nunku yeye wakitabusha, bua Amenona ne bana balume bonso ba mukelenge baye nʼandi." 
2Samuel13:28 Abashaloma wakelela bantu bandi mukenji ne, Nutangile Amenona bimpe ne hasanka mutshima wandi mu kukuatshika kua maluvu. Hananuambila ne, Nutahe Amenona, bimpe nu mushihe, kanutshinyi; meme tshiakunuambila dî, anyi? Nukoleshe mitshima, nuikale ne dikima." 
2Samuel13:29 Bantu ba Abashaloma bakenzela Amenona bu muakabambila Abashaloma. Hashishe bana balume bonso ba mukelenge bakabika, bakabanda ha nyima ha nyama ya mpunda, bakanyema." 
2Samuel13:30 Hakatshidibo baya mu nshila, lumu luakafika kudi Davidi ne, Abashaloma wakashiha bana balume bonso ba mukelenge, nansha umue wabo udi mushale." 
2Samuel13:31 Hashishe mukelenge wakabika, wakahanda bilulu biandi, wakalala hanshi mu buloba; bantu bandi bonso bakimana ha buihi nʼandi ne bilulu biabo bihanda." 
2Samuel13:32 Yonadaba, muana wa Shimea, muanʼabo ne Davidi, wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge kedi meji ne, Bakashiha bansongalume bonso, bana ba mukelenge, bualu bua anu Amenona nkayandi wakafua; bualu bua Abashaloma wakahangidisha bualu ebu ku didiku diakakuateye muanʼabo mukashi Tamâ ku bukole." 
2Samuel13:33 Nunku mukelenge kateki bualu ebu mu mutshima wandi bua kuelangana meji ne, Bana balume bonso ba mukelenge bakafua; bualu bua anu Amenona nkayandi wakafua." 
2Samuel13:34 Kadi Abashaloma wakanyema. Nsongalume wakadi mutentekedi, wakabanduluka, wakatangila ne, monai, bantu ba bungi balualua mu nshila wa ku mukuna ku nyima kuandi." 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadaba wakambila mukelenge ne, Tangila, bana balume ba mukelenge bakulua bu muakamba muntu webe." 
2Samuel13:36 Hakashikisheye kuamba dî edi, monai, bana ba mukelenge bakafika, bakabandisha mei abo, bakadila; mukelenge ne bantu bandi bonso bakadila bikole kabidi." 
2Samuel13:37 Kadi Abashaloma wakanyema, wakaya kudi Talemai, muana wa Amihû, mukelenge wa mu Geshû. Davidi wakajuka muanʼandi ku dituku ku dituku." 
2Samuel13:38 Abashaloma wakanyema nunku, wakaya ku Geshû, wakashikamaku bidimu bisatu." 
2Samuel13:39 Mutshima wa mukelenge Davidi wakasua kuya kudi Abashaloma: bualu bua yeye wakasambibua bualu bua Amenona, bua yeye wakafua." 
2Samuel14:1 Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, wakatangila bu muakadi mutshima wa mukelenge muikale kudi Abashaloma." 
2Samuel14:2 Yoaba wakatuma dî ku Tekoa, wakabikilaku mukashi wakadi ne lungenyi lule, wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Udifuanyishe bu muena madilu, uluate bilulu bia muena madilu, kulabi manyi hamʼbidi nansha, kadi wikale bu mukashi wakadi ne madilu a bafue musangu mule;" 
2Samuel14:3 uye kudi mukelenge, umuambile nunku. Yoaba wakateka mei mukana muandi." 
2Samuel14:4 Hakadi mukashi wa ku Tekoa uyikila ne mukelenge, yeye wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ha buloba, wakamukukuila, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, unkuatshishe." 
2Samuel14:5 Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Bualu kai budi bukutatshisha? Yeye wakamukudimuna dî ne, Bulelela, ndi mukashi wa mu lufuila, bayanyi wakafua." 
2Samuel14:6 Muntu webe wakadi ne bana balume babidi, bubidi buabo bakaluangana hakadibo mu budimi, nansha muntu wakadiku bua kubasunga, nunku umue wakakuma mukuabo, wakamushiha." 
2Samuel14:7 Nunku, mona, bantu bonso ba mu diku dietu bakadisangisha kudi muntu webe bamba ne, Ufile wakashiha muanʼabo bua tuetu tumushihe bua muoyo wa muanʼabo wakashiheye; nunku nebashihe muhianyi kabidi; nunku nebajimishe dikala dianyi dia kahia didi dishala, nebashiye bayanyi kayi ne dina hanshi ha buloba." 
2Samuel14:8 Mukelenge wakambila mukashi ne Ya ku nsubu kuebe, nendonde tshilumbu tshiebe." 
2Samuel14:9 Mukashi wa ku Tekoa wakambila mukelenge ne, Mukelenge, bualu ebu bubi buikale kundi ne ku nsubu wa tatu wanyi; mukelenge ne nkuasa wandi wa butumbi kabikadi ne bualu." 
2Samuel14:10 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Biakuambila muntu dî dimue, alue nʼandi kundi, ne yeye kena ukulenga tshianza kabidi." 
2Samuel14:11 Hashishe yeye wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge avuluke Yehowa, Nzambi wandi, bua musombuedi wa mashi kashihi kabidi, kabashihi muanʼanyi. Yeye wakamba ne, Bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo, lusuki lumue lua ku mutu kua muanʼebe kaluena luhona hanshi." 
2Samuel14:12 Hashishe mukashi wakamba ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Witabushe bua muntu webe ambile mukelenge wandi dî. Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ambaku." 
2Samuel14:13 Mukashi wakamba ne, Wewe wakelangana meji bua kuenzela bantu ba Nzambi nunku bualu kai? Bualu bua hamba mukelenge dî edi, yeye udi mudihishe bualu bua mukelenge kena uhingisha muntu wakihateye ku mbelu kuandi kabidi." 
2Samuel14:14 Bualu bua butudi nʼabu mbua kufua; tudi bu mai akelabo ha buloba, kabena bamanye mua kuasuna kabidi; Nzambi kena unyenga muoyo wa muntu, kadi udi ulongolola bua muntu udibo bihata kikadi bu muntu mubengibue kudiye." 
2Samuel14:15 Nunku nakulua bua kuambila mukelenge dî edi, bualu bua bantu bakamba kuntshinyisha; nunku muntu webe mukashi wakamba ne, Nengambile mukelenge bualu ebu; bumue mukelenge neitabushe kuenza kulomba kua muntu wandi." 
2Samuel14:16 Mukelenge neunvue biandi bua kusungila muntu wandi mu tshianza tshia muntu udi ukeba kungumusha hohamue ne muanʼanyi mu buhianyi bua Nzambi. 
2Samuel14:17 Hashishe muntu webe mukashi wakamba ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Dî dia mukelenge wanyi dinsambe; bualu bua mukelenge udi bu muanjelo wa Nzambi bua kujingululeye malu mimpe ne malu mabi. Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ikale nʼebe." 
2Samuel14:18 Hashishe mukelenge wakambila mukashi ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Kunsokoki bualu bundi musue kukuebesha. Mukashi wakamba ne, Mukelenge wanyi ambe dî diandi." 
2Samuel14:19 Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Tshianza tshia Yoaba tshidi nʼebe mu bualu ebu buonso, anyi? Mukashi wakamukudimuna dî ne, Mukelenge wanyi, bu mudi mutshima webe ne muoyo kakuena muntu udi mua kusesuka ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi ku dî diakunkonka mukelenge wanyi; bualu bua Yoaba muntu webe wakantuma, wakateka mei â onso mukana mua muntu webe mukashi;" 
2Samuel14:20 muntu webe Yoaba wakenza nunku bua kukudimuneye bualu ebu; ne mukelenge wanyi udi ne lungenyi lule bu mudi muanjelo wa Nzambi nʼalu bua kujingululeye malu onso adi hanshi ha buloba. 
2Samuel14:21 Mukelenge wakambila Yoaba ne, Mona, nakuitabusha bualu ebu; nunku uye biebe, uhingishe nsongalume Abashaloma." 
2Samuel14:22 Yoaba wakatua mpala wandi hanshi, wakamukukuila, wakavudishila mukelenge disanka; Yoaba wakamba ne, Lelu muntu webe udi mumanye ne yeye wakasangana luse ku mesu kua mukelenge wandi bualu bua yeye wakunyua kulomba kua muntu wandi." 
2Samuel14:23 Nunku Yoaba wakajuka, wakaya ku Geshû, wakahingana ne Abashaloma ku Yelushalema." 
2Samuel14:24 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Aye biandi ku nsubu kuandi, katangidi mpala wanyi. Nunku Abashaloma wakaya ku nsubu wandi, kakatangila mpala wa mukelenge." 
2Samuel14:25 Kakuakadi muntu mukuabo wakatumbishabo mu Isalele bua bulengele buandi bu Abashaloma; bualu bua yeye kakadi ne katoba kakese mu lubombo lua mutu wandi tô ne munda mua makasa andi. 
2Samuel14:26 Hakabeyeye nsuki ya ku mutu (bualu bua yeye wakadi ne tshilele tshia kubeya nsuki yandi ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, bualu bua bujitu buai), hakidikisheye bujitu bua nsuki yandi buakadi bu nshekele nkama ibidi, bu mudi tshidikishilu tshia mukelenge." 
2Samuel14:27 Abashaloma wakalela bana ba balume basatu ne muana wa bakashi umue, dina diandi Tamâ, wakadi mukashi mulengele kumona." 
2Samuel14:28 Abashaloma wakashikama mu Yelushalema bidimu bibidi bijima, yeye kakatangila mpala wa mukelenge." 
2Samuel14:29 Hashishe Abashaloma wakabikila Yoaba bua kumutumeye kudi mukelenge; kadi yeye wakahidia kulua kudiye; yeye wakamubikila tshiakabidi, kadi yeye wakahidia kulua." 
2Samuel14:30 Nunku yeye wakambila bantu bandi ne, Budimi bua Yoaba budi ha buihi ne buanyi, yeye udi ne orge mikunamu; yai, nuyoshe ne kahia. Bantu ba Abashaloma bakayosha ne kahia." 
2Samuel14:31 Hashishe Yoaba wakajuka, wakaya kudi Abashaloma ku nsubu kuandi, wakamuebesha ne, Bualu kai bantu bebe bakosha budimi buanyi?" 
2Samuel14:32 Abashaloma wakakudimuna Yoaba dî ne, Mona, nakakubikila ne, Lua kunoko, bua kukutuma kudi mukelenge bua kumuebesha ne, Wakumbikidila ku Geshû bua tshinyi? Biakadi bimpe bua meme kushalaku. Nunku witabushe bua meme kutangila mpala wa mukelenge; ne bingikala ne bualu bubi, anshihe." 
2Samuel14:33 Nunku Yoaba wakaya kudi mukelenge, wakamuambila mei â. Hakabikileye Abashaloma, yeye wakaya kudi mukelenge, wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ku mpala kua mukelenge; mukelenge wakatua Abashaloma mishiku." 
2Samuel15:1 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu Abashaloma wakadilongoluela dikalu ne tubalu ne bantu makumi atanu bua kuyabo ku mpala kuandi. 
2Samuel15:2 Abashaloma wakabika dinda dionso, wakimana ha buihi ne nshila wa ku tshibi tshia musoko; nunku hakalua muntu ne tshilumbu bua kuyeye nʼatshi ku tshilumbuluidi tshia mukelenge, Abashaloma wakamubikila, wakamuebesha ne, Wewe udi wa ku musoko kai? Yeye wakadi umuambila ne, Muntu webe udi wa mu tshisamba tshia Bena Isalele." 
2Samuel15:3 Hashishe Abashaloma wakamuambila ne, Mona, malu ebe adi malengele ne makane, kadi kakuena muntu musungula kudi mukelenge bua kunvueye malu ebe." 
2Samuel15:4 Abashaloma wakamba kabidi ne, Bu meme muikale mulumbuluishi wa buloba, muntu yonso udi ne tshilumbu anyi bualu wakadi kumanya mua kulua kundi bua meme kumulumbuluila biakane." 
2Samuel15:5 Nunku hakasemena muntu ha buihi nʼandi bua kumukukuila, yeye wakolola tshianza tshiandi, wakamutua mishiku." 
2Samuel15:6 Abashaloma wakenzela Bena Isalele bonso nunku, hakaluabo ku tshilumbuluidi tshia mukelenge; nunku Abashaloma wakiba mitshima ya Bena Isalele." 
2Samuel15:7 Hakahita bidimu binai, Abashaloma wakambila mukelenge ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Witabushe bua meme kuya kushikisha kuditshiha kuanyi kunakaditshiha kudi Yehowa mu Hebelone." 
2Samuel15:8 Bualu bua hakadi muntu webe mushikame mu Geshû wa mu Sulia wakaditshiha mutshihu ne, Biampingisha Yehowa mu Yelushalema, meme nentendelele Yehowa." 
2Samuel15:9 Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe talalâ. Nunku wakajuka, wakaya ku Hebelone." 
2Samuel15:10 Kadi Abashaloma wakatuma batentekedi ku bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele, benda bamba ne, Hanunvua dî dia mpungi, nenuambe ne, Abashaloma udi mukelenge mu Hebelone." 
2Samuel15:11 Bantu nkama ibidi bakitaba kudi Abashaloma, bakumuka mu Yelushalema, bakaya nʼandi; bakaya bu mu mpukahuka, kabakadi bamanye bualu." 
2Samuel15:12 Abashaloma wakatuma dî, wakabikila Ahitofele, Muena Gilo, muena lungenyi wa Davidi, ku musoko wandi, ku Gilo mene, hakadiye ufila milambu. Tshifufu tshiakatamba bukole, bualu bua bantu bakavulangana kudi Abashaloma." 
2Samuel15:13 Messager wakafika kudi Davidi wamba ne, Mitshima ya Bena Isalele idi kudi Abashaloma." 
2Samuel15:14 Davidi wakambila bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi mu Yelushalema ne, Jukai, tunyemai; bituashala, nansha umue wetu neahanduke mu bianza bia Abashaloma; tuyai lubilu, yeye katshetshi; biatuheteye neabenzele bibi, neabutule musoko ne miele ya nvita." 
2Samuel15:15 Bantu ba mukelenge bakamuambila ne, Mona, bantu bebe bakamana kudilongolola bua kuenzabo malu onso adi mukelenge wabo musungule." 
2Samuel15:16 Mukelenge wakumuka, ne bonso ba mu nsubu muandi bakamulonda. Mukelenge wakashiya bakashi bahika babakibue dikumi bua kulamabo nsubu." 
2Samuel15:17 Mukelenge wakumuka, ne bantu bonso bakamulonda, bakashikama mu Bete-mêhaka." 
2Samuel15:18 Bantu bandi bonso bakenda nʼandi hohamue; Bena Kelete bonso ne Bena Pelete bonso ne Bena Giti bonso, bantu nkama isambombo bakamulonda bafume mu Gata, bakadianjila ku mpala kua mukelenge." 
2Samuel15:19 Hashishe mukelenge wakambila Itai, Muena Giti ne, Wewe uyaya nʼetu kabidi bua tshinyi? Walukile, ushikame ne mukelenge; bualu bua wewe udi muntu wa bende, wakihatabo kabidi; uhingane ku muaba webe." 
2Samuel15:20 Bualu bua wewe wakalua anu makelela eu, bûdi nʼabu mbua kubanda nʼetu ne kuhueka nʼetu lelu, anyi? Bualu bua meme nyaya kundi mua kuya; hingana biebe, uye ne bana benu, luse ne bulelela bikale nʼebe." 
2Samuel15:21 Itai wakakudimuna mukelenge dî ne, Bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo ne bu mudi mukelenge wanyi ne muoyo, bulelela, mu miaba yonso idi mukelenge wanyi uya, nansha mu muaba wa lufu nansha mu muaba wa muoyo, muntu wandi neikaleku kabidi." 
2Samuel15:22 Davidi wakambila Itai ne, Ya, hita ku mpala. Itai, Muena Giti, wakahita ku mpala ne bantu bandi bonso ne bana bakese bonso bakadi nʼandi." 
2Samuel15:23 Bena buloba bonso bakadila ne dî dikole; bantu bonso bakahita; mukelenge biandi kabidi wakasabuka kasulu ka Kidilona ne bantu bonso bakasabuka, bakaya mu nshila wa mu tshihela." 
2Samuel15:24 Monai, Sadoka ne Ebayatâ bakatua ne Bena Lewi bonso bakadi nʼabo, batuale mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi; bakateka mushete wa Nzambi hanshi; Ebeyatâ wakayaku tô ne hakumuka bantu bonso mu musoko." 
2Samuel15:25 Mukelenge wakambila Sadoka ne, Hingisha mushete wa Nzambi mu musoko; binasangana luse ku mesu kua Yehowa, yeye neampingishe kabidi, neaundeshe ne musoko wandi kabidi;" 
2Samuel15:26 kadi biangambileye ne, Tshiena nʼebe disanka kabidi, mona, meme ndiku, angenzele budi buimpe kudiye." 
2Samuel15:27 Mukelenge wakambila Sadoka muakuidi kabidi ne, Wewe kuena mumonyi wa malu, anyi? Hingana ku musoko talalâ, wewe ne bana bebe balume babidi, Ahimasa, muana webe, ne Yonatana, muana wa Ebeyatâ." 
2Samuel15:28 Meme nenshale mu mpata ya tshihela tô ne hangunvua dî kûdi dia kummanyisha malu. 
2Samuel15:29 Sadoka ne Eyebatâ bakaya ne mushete wa Nzambi ku Yelushalema kabidi: bakashikamaku. 
2Samuel15:30 Davidi wakabanda mukuna wa Olive, wenda udila; wakabuikila mutu wandi, wakashiya makasa andi hatuhu, bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi bakabuikila mitu yabo, badile hakabandabo." 
2Samuel15:31 Bakambila Davidi ne, Ahitofele udi munkatshi mua bena tshifufu ba Abashaloma. Davidi wakamba ne, Yehowa, ndi nkusengelela ne, Kudimuna lungenyi lua Ahitofele lulue luhote." 
2Samuel15:32 Hakafika Davidi ku mutu kua mukuna kuakadibo batendelela Nzambi, monai, Hushai, Muena Aka, wakalua kusangakena nʼandi ne tshikowelu tshiandi tshihandika ne buloba mu mutu wandi." 
2Samuel15:33 Davidi wakamuambila ne, Biwaya nʼanyi, wewe newikale bu bujitu kundi;" 
2Samuel15:34 kadi biwahingana ku musoko, biwambila Abashaloma ne, Mukelenge, nengikale muntu webe, bu munakadi muntu wa tatu webe diambedi, nunku nengikale muntu webe katataka; hashishe udi mumanye mua kukuatshisha bua kukudimuna lungenyi lua Ahitofele." 
2Samuel15:35 Sadoka ne Ebeyatâ, bakuidi, kabena nʼebe, anyi? Nunku mei onso audi unvua mu nsubu wa mukelenge, wâmbile Sadoka ne Ebeyatâ, bakuidi." 
2Samuel15:36 Mona, badiku ne bana babo balume babidi, Ahimasa, muana wa Sadoka, ne Yonatana, muana wa Ebeyatâ; nunku nudi bamanye mua kubatuma kundi ne mei onso anudi nunyua." 
2Samuel15:37 Nunku Hushai, mulunda wa Davidi, wakalua mu musoko; ne Abashaloma wakabuela mu Yelushalema." 
2Samuel16:1 Hakafika Davidi ha mutu ha mukuna, monai, Siba, muena mudimu wa Mefibosheta, wakasangakena nʼandi; wakadi ne nyama ya mpunda ibidi ne biseba bisuike ha nyima hai ne mitanda ya mampa nkama ibidi ne bisumbu bia tumuma tukese tûme lukama ne lukama lua mamuma makuabo ne mulondo wa nvinyo." 
2Samuel16:2 Mukelenge wakakonka Siba ne, Udi wenza tshinyi ne bintu ebi? Siba wakamba ne, Nyama ya mpunda nya ba mu nsubu wa mukelenge kubandabu; mampa ne mamuma mbua bansongalume kudia; ne nvinyo nya badi bahanga mu tshihela banue." 
2Samuel16:3 Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Muana mulume wa mukelenge webe udi hanyi? Siba wakambila mukelenge ne, Mona, yeye udi mushale mu Yelushalema; bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Lelu Bena Isalele nebampingishe mu bukelenge bua tatu wanyi." 
2Samuel16:4 Hashishe mukelenge wakambila Siba ne, Mona, bintu bionso bia Mefibosheta mbiebe. Siba wakamba ne, Meme ndi nkukukuila; mukelenge wanyi, nsangane diakalengele ku mesu kuebe." 
2Samuel16:5 Hakafika Davidi ku Bahulima, monai, muntu wa mu nsubu wa Shaula, dina diandi Shimei, muan? wa Gela, wakaluhuka, wenda umuhenda hakatshidiye ulua." 
2Samuel16:6 Wakela Davidi ne bantu bonso ba mukelenge Davidi mabue; bantu bandi bonso ne bena bukitu bonso bakadi ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku tshianza tshia bakashi. 
2Samuel16:7 Hakamuhenda Shimei, wakamba ne, Umuke, Umuke, wewe udi muntu wa mashi, udi muntu wa tshidingidingi;" 
2Samuel16:8 Yehowa wakahingisha mashi a bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa Shaula ha mutu hebe; bua wewe udi ukokesha mu muaba wandi, ne Yehowa wakafila bukelenge mu bianza bia Abashaloma muanʼebe, ne mona, bakakukuata mu malu mabi ebe, bualu bua wewe udi muena mashi." 
2Samuel16:9 Hashishe Abishai, muana wa Seluya, wakakonka mukelenge ne, Mbua eu mufue udi ne bua kuhenda mukelenge wanyi nunku bua tshinyi? Ndi nkusengelela ne, Witabushe bua meme kuya kudiye bua kukosa mutu wandi." 
2Samuel16:10 Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Nuenu bana balume ba Seluya, ndi nʼenu bualu kai? Biampendeye bualu bua Yehowa wakamutuma ne, Uhende Davidi, udi nganyi bua kumuebesha ne, Udi wenza nunku bualu kai?" 
2Samuel16:11 Davidi wakambila Abishai ne bantu bandi bonso ne, Monai, muanʼanyi mulume wakaluhuka munda muanyi udi ukeba muoyo wanyi; nunku Muena Benyamina eu kena mua kutamba kuenza nunku, anyi? Mulekela, ampende, bualu bua Yehowa wakamutuma." 
2Samuel16:12 Biasua Yehowa, yeye udi mumanye mua kutangila bubi buakungenzeleye; Yehowa udi mumanye mua kungenzela bimpe bua bihendu biandi biakumpendeye nʼabi lelu." 
2Samuel16:13 Nunku Davidi ne bantu bandi bakaya mu nshila. Shimei wakaya mu nshila wa ku mpenge, wenda umuhenda; wakamuela mabue ne luhuishi." 
2Samuel16:14 Mukelenge ne bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi bakalua bahungile; wakikishaku. 
2Samuel16:15 Abashaloma ne bantu bonso, Bena Isalele, bakabuela mu Yelushalema; Ahitofele wakadi nʼandi." 
2Samuel16:16 Hakafika Hushai, Muena Aka, mulunda wa Davidi, kudi Abashaloma, Hushai wakambila Abashaloma ne, Mukelenge ikale ne muoyo musangu mule! Mukelenge ikale ne muoyo musangu mule!" 
2Samuel16:17 Abashaloma wakebesha Hushai ne, Elu nduse luebe kudi mulunda webe, anyi? Kuakaya ne mulunda webe bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai wakakudimuna Abashaloma dî ne, Nansha; kadi muntu wakasungulabo kudi Yehowa ne kudi Bena Isalele bonso, meme nengikale wandi, nenshikame nʼandi." 
2Samuel16:19 Bundi nʼabu mbua kukuatshila nganyi mudimu? Tshikuatshi mudimu ku mesu kua muanʼandi mulume, anyi? Bu munakakuata mudimu ku mesu kua tatu webe, neakuate mudimu ku mesu kuebe kabidi." 
2Samuel16:20 Hashishe Abashaloma wakambila Ahitofele ne, Utuambile tshiadi mua kuenza." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofele wakambila Abashaloma ne, Ubuele mu nsubu kudi bakashi bahika babakibue kudi tatu webe bakashiyeye bua kulamabo nsubu; Bena Isalele bonso nebunvue lumu ne, Wewe udi mulenguludibue kudi tatu webe, nunku maboko a bantu bonso badi nʼebe neakoleshibue." 
2Samuel16:22 Nunku bakashimika ntenta wa Abashaloma ha mutu ha nsubu; Abashaloma wakabuela kudi bakashi bahika babakibue kudi tatu wandi ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso. 
2Samuel16:23 Mei akamba Ahitofele mu matuku au akadi bu muntu mukonke dî dia Nzambi. Lungenyi luonso bakambila Ahitofele Davidi ne Abashaloma luakadi nunku. 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofele wakambila Abashaloma ne, Witabushe bua meme nsungule bantu binunu dikumi ne bibidi, nenjuke butuku ebu mene bua kulonda Davidi;" 
2Samuel17:2 nemmuhete hatshidiye muhungile ne mutekete, nemmutshinyishe; bantu bonso badi nʼandi nebanyeme, Nenshihe anu mukelenge nkayandi," 
2Samuel17:3 nempingishe bantu bonso kûdi wewe. Muntu ûdi ukeba udi bu bantu bonso bakahingana; nunku bantu bonso nebikale talalâ. 
2Samuel17:4 Dî edi diakasankisha Abashaloma ne bakulu bonso ba mu Isalele bimpe. 
2Samuel17:5 Hashishe Abashaloma wakamba ne, Bikilai Hushai, Muena Aka, kabidi, tunvue tshidiye Wamba kabidi." 
2Samuel17:6 Hakafika Hushai kudi Abashaloma, yeye wakamuambila ne, Ahitofele wakamba nunku; netulonde dî diandi, anyi? Biwahidia, utuambile dî diebe." 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai wakambila Abashaloma ne, Dî diakukuambila Ahitofele tshikondo etshi kadiena dimpe nansha." 
2Samuel17:8 Hushai wakamba kabidi ne, Wewe udi mumanye tatu webe ne bantu bandi badi bena bukitu, badi ne tshiji mu mitshima yabo bu nkashama wa muitu wakangatabo bana bandi; tatu webe udi muena nvita, yeye katu walala munkatshi mua bantu bandi." 
2Samuel17:9 Mona, yeye udi musokome mu lubuebue anyi mu muaba mukuabo; nunku hashihabo bantu bakuabo diambedi, yonso udi unvua lumu elu neambe ne, Kushiha kudi munkatshi mua bantu badi balonda Abashaloma." 
2Samuel17:10 Ne yeye kabidi, udi ne bukitu, udi ne mutshima bu mutshima wa nyama wa ntambue, nênguluke; bualu bua Bena Isalele bonso badi bamanye ne tatu webe udi muntu mukole ne bantu badi nʼandi badi bena bukitu." 
2Samuel17:11 Nunku dî dindi nkuambila didi nunku ne, Usangishe Bena Isalele bonso ku Dana tô ne ku Bê-sheba, bungi buabo nebuikale bu nsenga ya ku muelelu wa mai manene; wewe nkayebe uye nʼabo mu nvita." 
2Samuel17:12 Nunku netumuhete mu muaba mudiye, netumunguile bu mume mukuate ku mashinde; ne yeye ne bantu bonso badi nʼandi, katuena tushiya umue wabo ne muoyo." 
2Samuel17:13 Biabueleye mu musoko mukuabo. Bena Isalele bonso nebalue ne mionshi ku musoko au, nebaukoke mu musulu tô ne hadibo kabayi basanganamu lusoka lukese." 
2Samuel17:14 Abashaloma wakambila Bena Isalele bonso ne, Lungenyi luakatuambila Hushai, Muena Aka, ludi luhita lua Ahitofele buimpe. Bualu bua Yehowa wakahangidisha bua kukudimuna mei mimpe akamba Ahitofele bua Yehowa enzele Abashaloma bualu bubi." 
2Samuel17:15 Hashishe Hushai wakambila Sadoka ne Ebeyatâ bakuidi ne, Ahitofele wakuambila Abashaloma ne bakulu ba mu Isalele nunku ne nunku; ne meme nakubambila nunku ne nunku." 
2Samuel17:16 Nunku utume dî lubilu, wambile Davidi ne, Kuladi butuku ebu mu mpata wa mu tshihela, kadi usabuke ku luseke lukuabo; kabajimishi mukelenge ne bantu bonso badi nʼandi." 
2Samuel17:17 Yonatana ne Ahimasa bakadi bashikama mu Ene-logela, ne muena mudimu mukashi wakaya kubambila, ne bobo bakaya, bakambila mukelenge Davidi; bualu bua bobo kabakamanya mua kubuela mu musoko ku mesu kua bantu." 
2Samuel17:18 Kadi nsongalume mukuabo wakabatangila, wakamanyisha Abashaloma; nunku bubidi buabo bakaya lubilu, bakafika ku nsubu wa muntu wa mu Bahulima, wakadi ne dina dia mai mu luhangu luandi; bakabuela mu dina adi." 
2Samuel17:19 Mukashi mukuabo wakabuikila mushiku wa dina ne tshilulu, wakabadilahu blé wakatueye; bualu ebu kabuakamanyibua." 
2Samuel17:20 Bantu ba Abashaloma bakafika ku nsubu wa mukashi eu, bakamuebesha ne, Ahimasa ne Yonatana badi kudi kunyi? Mukashi wakabambila ne, Bakamana kuhita, bakasabuka musulu wa mai. Bobo bakakebakeba, kabakabasa ngana, nunku bakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
2Samuel17:21 Hakayabo, Ahimasa ne Yonatana bakahatuka mu dina, bakaya, bakamanyisha mukelenge Davidi; bakambila Davidi ne, Juka, usabuke mai lubilu, bualu bua Ahitofele wakamba mei adi kâyi mimpe bua bualu buebe." 
2Samuel17:22 Hashishe Davidi wakajuka ne bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi, bakasabuka dishiya dia Yadene; hakatshiabu nansha umue wabo wakashala, buonso buabo bakadi basabuka." 
2Samuel17:23 Hakatangila Ahitofele ne, Bakahidia lungenyi luanyi, yeye wakela tshiseba ha nyima ha nyama wandi wa mpunda, wakajuka, wakaya kuandi ku musoko wandi, wakalongolola malu a mu nsubu wandi, wakadiowa, wakafua, bakamujika mu lukita lua tatu wandi." 
2Samuel17:24 Davidi wakafika ku Mahanayima. Abashaloma ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi bakasabuka Yadene. 
2Samuel17:25 Abashaloma wakateka Amasa ku mutu kua masalayi andi mu muaba wa Yoaba. Amasa wakadi muana wa muntu dina diandi Yitela, Muena Isalele, wakabuela kudi Abigayila, muana wa Nahasha, muanʼabo mukashi ne Seluya, mamu wa Yoaba." 
2Samuel17:26 Abashaloma ne Bena Isalele bakasa tshitudilu tshiabo mu buloba bua Gilada. 
2Samuel17:27 Hakafika Davidi ku Mahanayima, Shobi, muana mulume wa Nahasha wa mu Laba wa Bena Amona, ne Makî, muana wa Amiele wa mu Lo-debâ, ne Bâzilai, Muena Gilada wa mu Logelima," 
2Samuel17:28 bakalua ne malalu ne malonga, ne bihanza ne blé ne orge ne bukula ne blé mukanga ne nkunde ne nkunde ya kahelele ne nkunde ya tshikunde-kunde" 
2Samuel17:29 ne buitshi ne manteke ne mikoko ne fromage bua Davidi ne bantu bakadi nʼandi badie. Bualu bua bakamba ne, Bantu badi ne nzala, badi bahungile ne badi ne nyota mu tshihela." 
2Samuel18:1 Davidi wakabala bantu bakadi nʼandi, wakateka tupitene ku mutu kua binunu bia bantu ne ku mutu kua nkama ya bantu." 
2Samuel18:2 Davidi wakatuma bantu ku nvita, tshituha tshisatu tshia kumudilu mu bianza bia Yoaba, ne tshituha tshisatu tshikuabo mu bianza bia Abishai, muana wa Seluya, muanʼabo ne Yoaba, ne tshituha tshisatu tshikuabo mu bianza bia Itai, Muena Giti. Mukelenge wakambila bantu ne, Bulelela, meme bianyi nenye nʼenu kabidi." 
2Samuel18:3 Kadi bantu bakamuambila ne, Kuyi nansha; bualu bua bituanyema, kabena nʼetu bualu; biashihabo tshituha tshia buonso buetu, kabena nʼetu bualu nansha; wewe udi uhita binunu bietu dikumi mushinga mukole; bidi bitamba buimpe bua wewe kudilongolola bua kutukuatshisha ku musoko." 
2Samuel18:4 Mukelenge wakabambila ne, Nengenze tshinudi basue. Mukelenge wakimana ku luseke lua tshibi, ne bantu bakaluhuka ku nkama ku nkama, ku binunu ku binunu." 
2Samuel18:5 Mukelenge wakambila Yoaba ne Abishai ne Itai ne, Kanuenzedi nsongalume Abashaloma bibi bua bualu buanyi. Bantu bonso bakunvua mukenji wakelela mukelenge tupitene tuonso bualu bua Abashaloma." 
2Samuel18:6 Nunku bantu bakaluhuka bua kuya mu mpata bua kuluanganabo ne Bena Isalele; bakadi baluila mu ditu dia Efelayima. 
2Samuel18:7 Bantu ba Davidi bakahita Bena Isalele bukole; kushiha kunene kua bantu binunu makumi abidi kuakadiku dituku adi. 
2Samuel18:8 Bualu bua nvita yakadi ku nseke yonso ya buloba; bantu bakafua mu ditu bakahita bantu bakashihibua ku miele ya nvita bungi. 
2Samuel18:9 Abashaloma wakasangila ne bantu ba Davidi ku mpukahuka. Abashaloma wakadi wenda ha nyima ha nyama wandi wa mpunda; nyama wandi wakabuela muinshi mua matamba a mutshi munene wa telebinta; mutu wandi wakakuata ku ditamba dia mutshi, ne yeye wakakanana hankatshikatshi kulu kule, hanshi hale, ne nyama wakadiye nʼandi wakahita." 
2Samuel18:10 Muntu mukuabo wakatangila bualu ebu, wakamanyisha Yoaba ne, Mona, nakatangila Abashaloma mulembelele ku mutshi." 
2Samuel18:11 Yoaba wakambila muntu wakamuambila ne, Mona, wakatangila bualu ebu, kuakamushiha, kuakamuhonesha bua tshinyi? Meme nakadi kukuha argent dikumi ne mukaba." 
2Samuel18:12 Muntu au wakambila Yoaba ne, Nansha wewe mumpe binunu dikumi bia argent mu tshianza tshianyi, tshiakadi kulenga tshianza tshianyi hamʼbidi ha muana wa mukelenge; bualu bua mukelenge wakanuambila ne Abishai ne Itai mu matshu etu ne, Dimukai, kanulengi nsongalume Abashaloma tshianza." 
2Samuel18:13 Bu meme muenze nunku, nakadi kudinga muoyo wanyi (kakuena bualu bubi busokoka kudi mukelenge), hashishe wewe nkayebe wakadi kuluangana nʼanyi." 
2Samuel18:14 Yoaba wakamba ne, Tshiena mua kujanguluka nʼebe bua bualu ebu. Yeye wakangata mikete isatu mu tshianza tshiandi, wakayasa ha muoyo wa Abashaloma hakadiye mulembelele mutshikale ne muoyo munkatshi mua matamba a mutshi." 
2Samuel18:15 Bansongalume dikumi bakadi batuala bintu bia nvita bia Yoaba, bakela Abashaloma munkatshi, bakamuasa, bakamushiha." 
2Samuel18:16 Yoaba wakela mpungi ne bantu bakalekela kulonda Bena Isalele, bualu bua Yoaba wakakanda bantu." 
2Samuel18:17 Bakangata Abashaloma, bakamuha mu lubuebue lunene luakadi muitu, bakamungushila mushiki munene wa mabue; Bena Isalele bonso bakanyema muntu ne muntu ku ntenta wandi." 
2Samuel18:18 Hakadi Abashaloma ne muoyo, yeye wakadishimikila dibue dinene mu tshibanda tshia mukelenge, wamba ne, Tshiena ne muana mulume bua kujadikeye dina dianyi; yeye wakidika dibue adi dina diandi; badi badibikila ne, Tshivulukidi tshia Abashaloma tô ne katataka." 
2Samuel18:19 Hashishe Ahimasa, muana wa Sadoka, wakamba ne, Nye lubilu bua kumanyisha mukelenge ne, Yehowa wakakusombuela kudi bena lukuna bebe." 
2Samuel18:20 Yoaba wakamuambila ne, Kuena uya ne lumu elu lelu eu, kadi neuye nʼalu dituku dikuabo, bualu bua muana wa mukelenge wakafua." 
2Samuel18:21 Yoaba wakambila Muena Kushi ne, Ya biebe, Wambile mukelenge malu awakatangila. Muena Kushi wakakukuila Yoaba, wakaya." 
2Samuel18:22 Hashishe Ahimasa, muana wa Sadoka, wakambila Yoaba kabidi ne, Bialua malu onso kundi, anji kuitabusha bua meme ndonde Muena Kushi. Yoaba wakamuebesha ne, Muanʼanyi, wewe udi musue kumulonda bua tshinyi? Kuena mua kuangata difutu dia lumu, anyi?" 
2Samuel18:23 Kadi yeye wakamba ne, Bialua malu onso kundi, nyaya. Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ya. Ahimasa wakayila mu nshila wa mu Mpata, wakahita Muena Kushi lubilu." 
2Samuel18:24 Davidi wakadi mushikame hankatshi ha bibi bibidi; mutentekedi wakabanda ha mutu ha tshibi tshia lumbu, wakabanduluka, ne monai, muntu udi ulua lubilu nkayandi." 
2Samuel18:25 Mutentekedi wakela dî, wakambila mukelenge. Mukelenge wakamba ne, Bialueye nkayandi, udi ne lumu mukana muandi. Yeye wakamba kufika ha buihi." 
2Samuel18:26 Mutentekedi wakatangila muntu mukuabo ulua lubilu; mutentekedi wakambila mulami wa tshibi ne, Mona muntu mukuabo udi ulua lubilu nkayandi. Mukelenge wakamba ne, Yeye udi ulua ne lumu kabidi." 
2Samuel18:27 Mutentekedi wakamba ne, Ndi ngelangana meji ne luendu lua muntu udi ku mpala ludi bu lua Ahimasa, muana wa Sadoka. Mukelenge wakamba ne, Yeye udi muntu muimpe, udi ulua ne lumu luimpe." 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimasa wakela dî, wakambila mukelenge ne, Malu onso adi talalâ. Wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ku mesu kua mukelenge, wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakafila bantu bakatombokela mukelenge mu bianza bia mukelenge, avudishibue disanka." 
2Samuel18:29 Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Nsongalume Abashaloma udi talalâ, anyi? Ahimasa wakakudimuna ne, Hakatuma Yoaba muntu webe kûdi, nakunvua diyoyo dinene, kadi tshiakamanya muakadi bualu." 
2Samuel18:30 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Semena, wimane aha. Yeye wakasemena, wakimana." 
2Samuel18:31 Monai, Muena Kushi wakafika; Muena Kushi wakamba ne, Ndi ne lumu lua kuambila mukelenge, bualu bua Yehowa wakakusombuela lelu kudi bonso bakabika bua kukutombokela." 
2Samuel18:32 Mukelenge wakebesha Muena Kushi ne, Nsongalume Abashaloma udi talalâ, anyi? Muena Kushi wakamukudimuna ne, Bena lukuna ba mukelenge wanyi ne bonso bakabika bua kukuenzela bibi bikale bu nsongalume au." 
2Samuel18:33 Kanyinganyinga kakole kakakuata mukelenge, yeye wakabanda ku nsubu wakadi ku mutu kua tshibi, wakadila; hakadiye uya, wakamba ne, Muanʼanyi Abashaloma, muanʼanyi, muanʼanyi Abashaloma! Meme nakadi kukufuila, Abashaloma, muanʼanyi, muanʼanyi!" 
2Samuel19:1 Bakambila Yoaba ne, Mona, mukelenge udi udila madilu bua Abashaloma." 
2Samuel19:2 Luhandu lua dituku adi luakandamuka madilu, bualu bua bantu bonso bakulua lumu ne, Mukelenge udi ne kanyinganyinga bua muanʼandi." 
2Samuel19:3 Bantu bakahingana ku musoko mu musokoko dituku adi, bu bantu badi ne bundu batshimukabo mu nvita." 
2Samuel19:4 Mukelenge wakabuikila mutu wandi, wakadila ne dî dikole ne, Muanʼanyi Abashaloma, Abashaloma muanʼanyi, muanʼanyi!" 
2Samuel19:5 Yoaba wakabuela mu nsubu wa mukelenge, wakamuambila ne, Wewe wakafuisha bantu bebe bonso bundu lelu, bakusungila muoyo webe lelu, ne mioyo ya bana bebe balume ne ya bana bebe bakashi, ne mioyo ya bakashi bebe ne ya bakashi bahika babakibue kudi," 
2Samuel19:6 bualu bua wewe udi unanga badi bakuona, udi ukina badi bakunanga. Bualu bua wewe wakuamba lelu ne, Baminyampala ne bantu badi tshianana ku mesu kuanyi; ndi ngelangana meji munda ne, Bu Abashaloma muikale ne muoyo, ne bu tuetu bonso bafue, bualu ebu buakadi kunsankisha." 
2Samuel19:7 Nunku juka biebe, uluhuke, wambile bantu bebe mei a kubasamba nʼau; bualu bua ndi muditshihe kudi Yehowa ne, Biwahidia kuluhuka kudibo, nansha muntu umue neikale nʼebe butuku ebu; dikenga edi neditambe makenga onso akakukuata ku buana buebe tô ne katataka bubi." 
2Samuel19:8 Hashishe mukelenge wakabika, wakashikama ku tshibi tshia musoko. Bakambila bantu bonso ne, Monai, mukelenge udi ushikama ku tshibi; ne bantu bonso bakalua ku mpala kua mukelenge. Bena Isalele bonso bakadi banyema muntu ne muntu ku ntenta wandi." 
2Samuel19:9 Bantu bonso ba mu bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele bakatandangana bamba ne, Mukelenge wakatusungila mu bianza bia bena lukuna betu; wakatusungila mu bianza bia Bena Peleshete kabidi, ne katataka yeye wakanyema mumuke mu buloba bualu bua Abashaloma." 
2Samuel19:10 Abashaloma utuakela manyi bua kuikaleye ku mutu kuetu wakafua mu mata. Bualu kai kanuena ne di bua kuhingisha mukelenge? 
2Samuel19:11 Mukelenge Davidi wakatuma mukenji kudi Sadoka ne Ebeyatâ bakuidi wamba ne, Nukonke bakulu ba mu Yuda ne, Nuenu nutshidi bashadile ku nyima bua kuhingisha mukelenge ku nsubu wandi bualu kai? Bualu bua Bena Isalele bonso hakamana kuhunga dî bua kuhingisha mukelenge ku nsubu wandi." 
2Samuel19:12 Nuenu nudi bana betu, nudi bu mifuba ya mifuba yanyi ne musunyi wa mu misunyi yanyi; nunku nutshidi bashadile ku nyima bua kuhingisha mukelenge bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel19:13 Nuenu nukonke Amasa kabidi ne, Wewe kuena mufuba wa mu mifuba yanyi ne musunyi wa mu misunyi yanyi, anyi? Nzambi angenzele malu onso adiye musue, binahanga kukuhingishila kapitene ka masalayi mu muaba wa Yoaba." 
2Samuel19:14 Yeye wakalekesha mitshima ya Bena Yuda bonso, wakakasha mitshima yabo bu mutshima umue; nunku bakatumina mukelenge di ne, Hingana ne bantu bebe bonso." 
2Samuel19:15 Davidi wakalukila, wakafika ku Yadene. Bena Yuda bakaya ku Gilegala bua kusangakenabo ne mukelenge wabo, ne bua kusambula mukelenge Yadene." 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei, muana wa Gela, Muena Benyamina wa mu Bahulima, wakaya lubilu ne Bena Yuda bakuabo bua kusangakeneye ne mukelenge Davidi." 
2Samuel19:17 Bena Benyamina tshinunu bakadi nʼandi, ne Siba, muena mudimu wa Shaula, ne bana bandi balume dikumi ne batanu, ne bena mudimu bandi makumi abidi bakadi nʼandi; bakasabuka Yadene ku mesu kua mukelenge." 
2Samuel19:18 Bakatuma buatu bunene bua kusambula ba mu nsubu wa mukelenge, ne bua kuenza nʼabu bu muakasueye. Hakasabuka mukelenge Yadene, Shimei, muana wa Gela, wakamukukuila." 
2Samuel19:19 Yeye wakambila mukelenge ne, Mukelenge wanyi kanfunkununyi bua bubi buanyi, kavuluki bualu buhote buakakuenzela muntu webe dituku diakumuka mukelenge mu Yelushalema, mukelenge kateki bualu ebu mu mutshima wandi." 
2Samuel19:20 Muntu webe udi mumanye ne, Nakuenza bibi; nunku, mena, nakadianjila ku mpala kua bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa Yosefe lelu bua kusangakena ne mukelenge wanyi." 
2Samuel19:21 Kadi Abishai, muana wa Seluya, wakakonka ne, Kabena bashiha Shimei bualu bua yeye wakahenda muntu wakela Yehowa manyi ha mutu, anyi?" 
2Samuel19:22 Davidi wakamba ne, Nuenu bana ba Seluya, nakanuenzela bualu kai bua nuenu nuikale bena lukuna kundi lelu? Nebashihe muntu mu Isalele lelu, anyi? Meme tshiena mumanye ne, Ndi mukelenge wa ku mutu kua Bena Isalele lelu, anyi?" 
2Samuel19:23 Mukelenge wakambila Shimei ne, Wewe kuena utua. Mukelenge wakaditshiha kudiye." 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibosheta, muana wa Shaula, wakalua bua kusangakeneye ne mukelenge; yeye kakanza kulongolola makasa andi anyi kubeya muedi wandi anyi kuvuwa bilulu biandi ku dituku diakumuka mukelenge tô ne hakahinganeye talalâ." 
2Samuel19:25 Hakafikeye ku Yelushalema bua kusangakeneye ne mukelenge, mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Mefibosheta, kuakumuka nʼanyi bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel19:26 Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Mukelenge wanyi, muena mudimu wanyi wakundinga; bualu bua muntu webe wakamba ne, Nendielele tshiseba ha nyima ha nyama wa mpunda, bua meme mbande ha nyima handi, nye ne mukelenge; bualu bua muntu webe udi mulema." 
2Samuel19:27 Ne yeye wakashiminyina muntu webe kudi mukelenge wanyi; kadi mukelenge wanyi udi bu muanjelo wa Nzambi, wenze malu adi mimpe ku mesu kuebe." 
2Samuel19:28 Bualu bua bantu bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu wanyi bakadi bu bantu bafue ku mesu kua mukelenge wanyi, kadi wewe wakashilaku muntu webe munkatshi mua bantu bakadi badia ku mesa ebe mene. Nunku ntshidi ne bua kudila kudi mukelenge kabidi bualu kai?" 
2Samuel19:29 Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Utshidi ungambila bualu buebe bua tshinyi? Ndi ngamba ne, Wewe ne Siba nuabanyangane buloba." 
2Samuel19:30 Mefibosheta wakambila mukelenge ne, Bimpe, yeye angate buloba buonso, bualu bua mukelenge wanyi wakahingana mu nsubu muandi talalâ." 
2Samuel19:31 Bâzilai, Muena Gilada, wakafuma ku Logelima, wakasabuka Yadene ne mukelenge, bua kumusambula Yadene." 
2Samuel19:32 Bâzilai wakadi muntu mununu, bidimu biandi biakadi makumi muanda mukulu; yeye wakadisha mukelenge hakadiye mushale ku Mahanayima, bualu bua yeye wakadi muntu mubanji be." 
2Samuel19:33 Mukelenge wakambila Bâzilai ne, Lua, usabuka nʼanyi ne meme nenkudishe mu Yelushalema." 
2Samuel19:34 Bâzilai wakebesha mukelenge ne, Matuku a muoyo wanyi adi bungi munyi bua meme kuya ne mukelenge ku Yelushalema?" 
2Samuel19:35 Lelu eu bidimu bianyi bidi makumi muanda mukulu; ndi mumanye mua kujingulula ne bidi bimpe ne bidi bibi, anyi? Muntu webe udi mumanye mua kulabula bintu bidiye udia ne bidiye unua, anyi? Ntshidi kabidi mua kunvua mei a balume anyi bakashi himbabo misambu, anyi? Muntu webe udi ne bua kuikala bujitu kudi mukelenge wandi bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel19:36 Muntu webe udi musue anu bua kusabuka Yadene ne mukelenge; mukelenge udi ne bua kunfuta difutu bunene nunku bualu kai? 
2Samuel19:37 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Witabushe bua muntu webe alukile, bua meme kufuila mu musoko wanyi, hehi ne lukita lua tatu wanyi ne mamu wanyi. Kadi tangila muntu webe Kimehama; aye biandi ne mukelenge wanyi, umuenzele budi buimpe kûdi." 
2Samuel19:38 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Kimehama neaye nʼanyi, nemmuenzele budi buimpe kûdi; nenkuenzele tshionso tshiudi ungebesha." 
2Samuel19:39 Bantu bonso bakasabuka Yadene, ne mukelenge wakasabuka; mukelenge wakatua ne Bâzilai mishiku, wakamuvudishila disanka; yeye wakahingana kuandi." 
2Samuel19:40 Nunku mukelenge wakaya ku Gilegala, ne Kimehama wakaya nʼandi; Bena Yuda bonso ne tshituha tshia Bena Isalele kabidi bakalua ne mukelenge." 
2Samuel19:41 Monai, Bena Isalele bonso bakalua kudi mukelenge, bakamuebesha ne, Bualu kai bana betu, Bena Yuda, bakakeba, bakasambula mukelenge ne bonso ba mu nsubu wandi ne bantu bonso ba Davidi dia munemu dia Yadene?" 
2Samuel19:42 Bena Yuda bonso bakakudimuna Bena Isalele dî ne, Bualu bua mukelenge udi muikulu wetu wa mu diku dietu; nudi nufuila tshiji bua bualu ebu tshinyi? Mukelenge wakatudisha tshianana, anyi? Yeye wakatuha bukenji, anyi?" 
2Samuel19:43 Bena Isalele bakakudimuna Bena Yuda dî ne, Tuetu tudi bituha dikumi bia mukelenge, nunku tudi tunuhita bungi bualu bua Davidi; nuakatulengulula bua tshinyi? Kanuakatukonka diambedi hanuakahingisha mukelenge wetu bualu kai? Kadi mei a Bena Yuda akatamba mei a Bena Isalele bukole." 
2Samuel20:1 Muntu mubi wakadiku, dina diandi Sheba, muana wa Bikili, Muena Benyamina; yeye wakela mpungi, Wamba ne, Tuetu katuena ne tshituha kudi Davidi, katuena ne buhianyi kudi muana wa Yishai, nuenu Bena Isalele, muntu ne muntu ahingane ku ntenta wandi." 
2Samuel20:2 Nunku Bena Isalele bonso bakalekela kulonda Davidi, bakalonda Sheba, muana wa Bikili; kadi Bena Yuda ba ku Yadene tô ne ku Yelushalema bakalamata mukelenge wabo." 
2Samuel20:3 Davidi wakabuela mu nsubu wandi mu Yelushalema; mukelenge wakangata bakashi bahika dikumi babakibue kudiye, bakashiyeye bua kulamabo nsubu, wakabateka ha buabo, wakabadisha, kadi yeye kakaya kudibo. Bakashala ha muaba au tô ne ku dituku dia lufu luabo bu bakashi ba mu lufuila." 
2Samuel20:4 Hashishe mukelenge wakambila Amasa ne, Umbikidile Bena Yuda bonso, badisangishe kunoko hahita matuku asatu, wewe wikaleku." 
2Samuel20:5 Nunku Amasa wakaya kusangisha Bena Yuda; kadi yeye wakashala musangu mutambe wakamuambila mukelenge. 
2Samuel20:6 Davidi wakambila Abishai ne, Katataka Sheba, muana wa Bikili, neatuenzele bibi bidi bihita biakatuenzela Abashaloma; wangate bantu ba mukelenge webe, umulonde, yeye kabuedi mu misoko ya ngumbu, kahanduki kutudi." 
2Samuel20:7 Bantu ba Yoaba ne Bena Kelete ne Bena Pelete ne bena bukitu bonso bakamulonda; bakumuka mu Yelushalema bua kulonda Sheba, muana wa Bikili." 
2Samuel20:8 Hakafikabo ku dibue dinene dia mu Gibeona, Amasa wakasangila habo. Yoaba wakadi muluate bintu biandi bia nvita, wakadi ne muele wa nvita mubuesha ha lukundu luandi mu tshibubu tshiau; hakayeye, muele wakahatuka, wakahona hanshi." 
2Samuel20:9 Yoaba wakebesha Amasa ne, Muanʼetu, udi mukole, anyi? Yoaba wakakuata Amasa ku muedi ne tshianza tshiandi tshia balume bua kumutua mishiku." 
2Samuel20:10 Kadi Amasa kakadimuka bua muele wakadi mu tshianza tshia Yoaba; yeye wakamutua muele mu mbale, ne mala andi akahatuka hanshi; yeye kakamutua tshiakabidi, wakafua. Yoaba ne muanʼabo Abishai bakalonda Sheba, muana wa Bikili." 
2Samuel20:11 Umue wa bansongalume ba Yoaba, wakadi muimane ha buihi handi, wakamba ne, Muntu yonso udi musue Yoaba, udi ku luseke lua Davidi, alonde biandi Yoaba." 
2Samuel20:12 Amasa wakadi mubunguluke mu mashi andi munkatshi mua nshila. Hakatangila nsongalume ne bantu bonso bakadi bimanaku, yeye wakumusha Amasa mu nshila, wakaya nʼandi mu mpata, wakamubuikila tshilulu; bualu bua yeye wakatangila ne muntu yonso wakafika hakadiye wakimanaku." 
2Samuel20:13 Hakamûmusheye mu nshila, bantu bonso bakaya ne Yoaba bua kulondabo Sheba, muana wa Bikili." 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba wakahitshila munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele tô ne ku Abele ne Bete-mâka ne kudi Bena Beli bonso; bakadisangisha hamue, bakamulonda." 
2Samuel20:15 Bakamutshintshimikila mu Abele wa Bete-mâka; bakunguisha mushiki wa mabue ku buludiludi ne lumbu; bantu bonso bakadi ne Yoaba bakumbula kuinshi kua lumbu, bua kulushimbula." 
2Samuel20:16 Hashishe mukashi wa lungenyi wa mu musoko, wakela dî diandi ne, Unvuai! Telejai! Ndi nnusengelela ne, Ambilai Yoaba alue kunoko bua meme kuyikila handi." 
2Samuel20:17 Yeye wakalua ha buihi handi ne mukashi wakamuebesha ne, Wewe udi Yoaba, anyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Mmeme. Hashishe yeye wakamuambila ne, Unvua mei a muntu webe mukashi. Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Ndi munvue." 
2Samuel20:18 Hashishe yeye wakamuambila ne, Bantu ba kale bakadi ne lusumuinu ne, Bulelela, nebakonke lungenyi ku Abele, nunku bualu nebushike." 
2Samuel20:19 Meme ndi wa munkatshi mua badi bakeba ditalala ne badi ne kanemu mu Isalele; wewe udi ukeba kushiha musoko ne muledi wa bana wa mu Isalele; wewe udi musue kumina buhianyi bua Yehowa bua tshinyi? 
2Samuel20:20 Yoaba wakamukudimuna ne, Bualu ebu kabuikadi kundi bua kumina anyi bua kushiha." 
2Samuel20:21 Bualu kabuena nunku, kadi muntu wa ku mikuna ya Efelayima, dina diandi Sheba, muana wa Bikili, wakatombokela mukelenge Davidi mene; anji kumufila mu bianza bianyi, tuetu netumuke tushiya musoko. Mukashi wakambila Yoaba ne, Mona, nebele mutu wandi kûdi ku nyima ha lumbu." 
2Samuel20:22 Hashishe mukashi wakaha kudi bantu bonso ne lungenyi luandi. Bakakosa Sheba, muana wa Bikili, mutu, bakawela kudi Yoaba. Yeye wakela mpungi, bantu bonso bakumuka ku musoko, bakaya muntu ne muntu ku ntenta wandi. Yoaba wakahingana kudi mukelenge mu Yelushalema." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoaba wakadi ku mutu kua masalayi onso a Bena Isalele; Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Kelete ne Bena Pelete;" 
2Samuel20:24 Adolama wakadi ku mutu kua bena mudimu; Yehoshafata, muana wa Ahiluda, wakadi mufundi wa malu a bukelenge;" 
2Samuel20:25 Sewa wakadi mufundi; Sadoka ne Ebeyatâ bakadi bakuidi; 
2Samuel20:26 ne Ila, Muena Yaî, wakadi muakuidi ku mutu kua miloho ya Davidi." 
2Samuel21:1 Tshiole tshiakadi ku buloba mu matuku a Davidi bidimu bisatu bilondangane; Davidi wakebesha Yehowa bualu ebu. Yehowa wakamba ne, Bualu ebu buakalua bua Shaula ne bua mashi akamatshishabo mu nsubu wandi, bualu bua wakashiha Bena Gibeona." 
2Samuel21:2 Mukelenge wakabikila Bena Gibeona, wakayikila nʼabo. Bena Gibeona kabakadi ba mu bisamba bia Bena Isalele mene, bakadi ba mu tshisamba tshia Bena Amole; diambedi Bena Isalele bakahunga nʼabo tshihungidi, kadi Shaula wakakeba kubashiha bua lukunukunu biakadiye nʼalu kudi Bena Isalele ne Bena Yuda." 
2Samuel21:3 Davidi wakakonka Bena Gibeona ne, Nennuenzele tshinyi? Nendengeshe nʼenu ne tshinyi bua nuenu nuvudishile buhianyi bua Yehowa disanka?" 
2Samuel21:4 Bena Gibeona bakamuambila ne, Ebu kambualu bua argent anyi or hankatshi hetu ne Shaula ne ba mu nsubu wandi; ne kambualu bua tuetu tushiheshe muntu wa Bena Isalele. Yeye wakamba ne, Tshinudi nuamba, nennuenzeletshi." 
2Samuel21:5 Bakambila mukelenge ne, Muntu wakatushiha, wakabelela tshifufu bua kutûmusha munkatshi mua Bena Isalele," 
2Samuel21:6 bimpe ufile bana bandi muanda mutekete mu bianza bietu, tuetu netubowe ku mesu kua Yehowa mu Gibea wa Shaula wakadi musungula kudi Yehowa. Mukelenge wakamba ne, Nembafile." 
2Samuel21:7 Kadi mukelenge wakasungila Mefibosheta, muana wa Yonatana, muana wa Shaula, bualu bua kuditshiha kuakaditshiheye nʼaku kudi Yehowa bualu buabo, kuakadi hankatshi ha Davidi ne Yonatana, muana wa Shaula." 
2Samuel21:8 Kadi mukelenge wakangata bana balume babidi ba Lisepa, muana mukashi wa Aya, bakaleleleye Shaula, mena abo Amoni ne Mefibosheta; ne bana balume batanu ba Melaba, muana mukashi wa Shaula, bakaleleleye Adaliele, muana wa Bâsilai, Muena Meholata;" 
2Samuel21:9 wakabafila mu bianza bia Bena Gibeona, bakabowela ku mukuna ku mesu kua Yehowa; bakahona hanshi buonso buabo muanda mutekete; bakabashiha mu matuku a kunowa, mu matuku a tshibangidilu tshia kunowa kua orge." 
2Samuel21:10 Lisepa, muana mukashi wa Aya, wakangata tshilulu tshikayabala, wakatshibikila ha mutu ha dibue ku tshibangidilu tshia kunowa tô ne hakabalokela nvula ya mu diulu; yeye kakitabusha bua nyunyu yikilehu mu munya, anyi bua nyama ya mu tshisuku isemene ha buihi butuku." 
2Samuel21:11 Bakambila Davidi bualu buakenza Lisepa, muana mukashi wa Aya, umue wa mu bakashi bahika babakibue kudi Shaula." 
2Samuel21:12 Davidi wakaya, wakangata mifuba ya Shaula ne ya Yonatana muanʼandi kudi Bena Yabesha-gilada, bakayiba mu misesu ya Bete-shana kuakabowa Bena Peleshete ku dituku diakashiha Bena Peleshete Shaula mu Gileboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Wakasaku ne mifuba ya Shaula ne ya Yonatana muanʼandi mulume; bakayisangisha ne mifuba ya bantu bakowabo. 
2Samuel21:14 Bakajika mifuba ya Shaula ne ya Yonatana muanʼandi mu lukita lua Kishi, tatu wandi, mu Sela mu buloba bua Benyamina. Bakenza malu onso akabambila mukelenge. Ku nyima kua bualu ebu Nzambi wakasengeledibua bualu bua buloba." 
2Samuel21:15 Bena Peleshete bakaluangana ne Bena Isalele kabidi; Davidi wakahueka ne bantu bandi bakadi nʼandi, bakaluangana ne Bena Peleshete; Davidi wakahungila." 
2Samuel21:16 Yishebi-benoba, wakadi wa bana ba bantu bale ba nfiondo, bujitu bua difuma diandi buakadi bua nshekele ya tshiamu tshia mitaku nkama isatu; wakadi mubueshe muele wa nvita muhia-muhia ku mukaba, wakela meji bua kushiha Davidi." 
2Samuel21:17 Kadi Abishai, muana wa Seluya, wakanusungila, wakataha Muena Peleshete, wakamushiha. Hashishe bantu ba Davidi bakaditshiha kudiye ne, Wewe kuyi nʼetu mu nvita kabidi bua wewe kujimishi muinda wa Isalele." 
2Samuel21:18 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu bakaluangana ne Bena Peleshete mu Gobo; Sibekai, Muena Husha, wakashiha Safa, wakadi wa bana ba bantu bale ba nfiondo." 
2Samuel21:19 Bakaluangana ne Bena Peleshete ku Gobo kabidi; Elehanana, muana wa Yâle-olezima, Muena Beteleheme, wakashiha muanʼabo ne Goleyata, Muena Giti; mutondo wa difuma diandi wakadi bu mbungu wa madiba." 
2Samuel21:20 Bakaluangana ku Gata kabidi; muntu munene wa nfiondo wakadiku, wakadi ne minu ya nonu isambombo ku tshianza ne tshianza ne bana ba nkasa basambombo ku dikasa ne dikasa, kusangisha makumi abidi ne inai; yeye kahidi wakadi muledibue kudi bantu bale ba nfiondo." 
2Samuel21:21 Hakahendeye Bena Isalele, Yonatana, muana wa Shimei, muanʼabo ne Davidi, wa kamushiha." 
2Samuel21:22 Aba banai bakaledibua mu Gata kudi bantu bale ba nfiondo, bakashihibua ku bianza bia Davidi ne bia bantu bandi." 
2Samuel22:1 Mu dituku diakasungila Yehowa Davidi mu bianza bia bantu bakadi nʼandi lukuna ne mu bianza bia Shaula kabidi, Davidi wakimbila Yehowa mei a musambu eu;" 
2Samuel22:2 yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa udi dibue dianyi, ne musoko wanyi wa lumbu, ne musungidi wanyi mene," 
2Samuel22:3 Nzambi, dibue dianyi, nengeyemene kudiye, ngabu wanyi, ne lusengu lua luhandu luanyi, tshibumba tshianyi tshile ne tshinyemenu tshianyi, musungidi wanyi, udi usungila ku malu makole onso." 
2Samuel22:4 Nembikile dina dia Yehowa, udi ne bua kutumbishibua, nunku nensungidibue kudi badi nʼanyi lukuna." 
2Samuel22:5 Mavuala a lufu akungela munkatshi, bantu babi bu mai adi atuntumuka bakuntshinyisha." 
2Samuel22:6 Nshinga ya mu Muaba wa Bafue yakunjingila, mateyi a lufu akamba kunkuata." 
2Samuel22:7 Mu kunyingalala kuanyi nakabikila Yehowa; e, nakadila kudi Nzambi wanyi. Yeye wakunyua dî dianyi mu ntempelo wandi, muadi wanyi wakafika mu matshu andi." 
2Samuel22:8 Hashishe buloba buakakanka, buakazakala; makunshi a diulu akanyunga, akazakishibua, bualu bua yeye wakadi ne tshiji." 
2Samuel22:9 Muishi wakahatuka mu diulu diandi, kahia ka mukana muandi kakosha bintu; makala a kahia akatemeshibue kudiku." 
2Samuel22:10 Yeye wakatubula diulu kabidi wakahueka hanshi; mîdima mikole yakadi munda mua makasa andi. 
2Samuel22:11 Wakabanda ha nyima ha mukeluba, wakahahala; e, bakamutangila wenda ha mahuahua a luhehele." 
2Samuel22:12 Yeye Wakenza midima bu ntenta wandi, mai masangisha ne matutu mafike a mu diulu." 
2Samuel22:13 Ku dinkenka diakadi ku mpala kuandi, makala a kahia akatemeshibua" 
2Samuel22:14 Yehowa wakakunguisha mikungulu ya mu diulu, Mutambe Bunene wa mulu wakela dî diandi." 
2Samuel22:15 Wakela mikete, yakabamuangalasha; wakahenyisha miele ya nvula, yakabatatshisha." 
2Samuel22:16 Hashishe lusenga lua mu mai manene luakamueneka, ntakunshi a buloba akasokoloka, bualu bua kubela kua Yehowa, bua bukole bua muhuya wakahatuka mu diulu diandi." 
2Samuel22:17 Wakolola tshianza tshiandi mu diulu, wakangata, wakankoka mu mai manene a bungi." 
2Samuel22:18 Wakasungila kudi muena lukuna wanyi mukole, mu bianza bia bakadi bankina, bualu bua bobo bakampita bukole." 
2Samuel22:19 Bobo bakantulukisha mu didiku dia dikenga dianyi; kadi Yehowa wakadi tshieyemenu tshianyi. 
2Samuel22:20 Yeye wakalua nʼanyi mu muaba munene; wakasungila, bualu bua wakadi ne disanka bualu buanyi." 
2Samuel22:21 Yehowa wakanfuta ku buimpe buanyi; wakampingishila bintu ku butoke bua bianza bianyi. 
2Samuel22:22 Bualu bua meme nakalamata nshila ya Yehowa; tshiakenza bibi bua kusesuka kudi Nzambi wanyi. 
2Samuel22:23 Bualu bua mikenji yandi yonso mijalame yakadi ku mpala kuanyi; tshiakasesuka ku mikenji yandi mifunda. 
2Samuel22:24 Nakadi ne mutshima mutoke kudiye, nakadilama ku bubi buanyi." 
2Samuel22:25 Nunku Yehowa wakanfuta ku buimpe buanyi, ne ku butoke kunakadi nʼabu ku mesu kuandi." 
2Samuel22:26 Wewe neuleshe luse kudi badi ne luse, neuleshe mutshima mutoke kudi badi ne mutshima mutoke." 
2Samuel22:27 Wewe neudileshe muakane kudi badi ne buakane; neuleshe mutshima mukole kudi badi ne mutshima mukole. 
2Samuel22:28 Wewe neusungile bantu badi mu dikenga; kadi mesu ebe adi kudi badi badisue anu bua wewe kubahuekesha. 
2Samuel22:29 Wewe Yehowa, udi muinda wanyi; Yehowa neatokeshile mîdima yanyi." 
2Samuel22:30 Bua bualu buebe ndi mumanye mua kuihata tshisumbu tshia bantu; bua Nzambi wanyi ndi mua kutuhika lumbu. 
2Samuel22:31 Nshila wa Nzambi udi muakane tshishiki; dî dia Yehowa didi ditetshibua; yeye udi ngabu kudi bantu bonso badi banyemena kudiye. 
2Samuel22:32 Nganyi udi Nzambi bikaleye kayi Yehowa? Nganyi udi dibue, bikaleye kayi Nzambi wetu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Nzambi udi musoko wanyi wa lumbu; udi ulombola badi bakane mu nshila yandi. 
2Samuel22:34 Yeye udi uvuisha makasa anyi bu makasa a ngulungu; udi unshikika ha miaba yanyi mibanda. 
2Samuel22:35 Udi uyisha bianza bianyi mua kuluangana nvita; nunku maboko anyi adi mamanye mua kunana buta bua tshiamu tshia mitaku. 
2Samuel22:36 Wewe wakumpa ngabu wa luhandu luebe; lutulu luebe luakunvuisha munene. 
2Samuel22:37 Wewe wakadimusha biendedi bianyi, nunku makasa anyi kakahalamuka." 
2Samuel22:38 Nakihata bakadi nʼanyi lukuna, nakabashiha, tshiakalukila kabidi tô ne hanakabashiha." 
2Samuel22:39 Nakabajimisha, nakababutula, ne kabakamanya mua kubika kahidi; e, bakahona muinshi mua makasa anyi." 
2Samuel22:40 Bualu bua wewe wakunduatshisha ne bukole bua kuluangana nʼabu; wewe wakuntekeshila bakajuka bua kunduisha. 
2Samuel22:41 Wewe wakangelesha nyima ya bakadi nʼanyi lukuna, bua meme kushiha bakadi bankina." 
2Samuel22:42 Bakakebulula, kadi kakuakadi wa kubasungila; bakadila kudi Yehowa, kadi yeye kakabitaba." 
2Samuel22:43 Hashishe nakababotesha bu kasoka ka buloba, nakabadiata bu bitotshi bia mu misesu, nakabamuanga lasha." 
2Samuel22:44 Wewe wakasungila kabidi ku matandu a bantu banyi; wakajadika bua meme kuikala ku mutu kua bisamba bia bantu; bantu bandi tshiyi mumanye nebankuatshile mudimu. 
2Samuel22:45 Bantu ba bende nebadikokeshe kundi; hunvuabo lumu luanyi nebatumikile. 
2Samuel22:46 Bantu ba bende nebashinguke, nebumuke mu bisokomenu biabo, bazakale." 
2Samuel22:47 Yehowa udi ne muoyo; dibue dianyi disankishibue, Nzambi atumbishibue, dibue dia luhandu luanyi." 
2Samuel22:48 Nzambi mene udi unsombuela, udi untekeshila bantu," 
2Samuel22:49 udi ungumusha kudi badi nʼanyi lukuna; e, udi umbandisha ku mutu kua bantu bakajuka bua kunduisha, wewe udi usungila mu bianza bia muntu mubuluke." 
2Samuel22:50 Nunku Yehowa, nenkusakidile munkatshi mua bisamba bionso, nengimbile dina diebe misambu ya butumbi." 
2Samuel22:51 Yeye udi uhesha mukelenge wandi luhandu lunene, yeye udi ulesha wakeleye manyi ha mutu luse lujalame, kudi Davidi ne kudi tunkanuniuna tuandi tshiendelele." 
2Samuel23:1 Â adi mei a kunshikidilu a Davidi: Davidi, muana wa Yishai, nyeye muntu wakabandishibua, wakedibua manyi ha mutu kudi Nzambi wa Yakoba, muimbi wa misambu mimpe wa mu Isalele, udi wamba ne," 
2Samuel23:2 Nyuma wa Yehowa wakungakuila, dî diandi diakadi ha ludimi luanyi." 
2Samuel23:3 Nzambi wa Isalele wakamba, dibue dia Isalele diakangambila ne, Udi ukokesha bantu ne buimpe, udi ukokesha mu ditshina dia Nzambi," 
2Samuel23:4 neikale bu munya wa misasa habanda diba, mbu dinda didi kadiyi ne matutu kulu, hamena mashinde a lutende ha buloba, hakenka diba hakumuka nvula." 
2Samuel23:5 Bulelela, nsubu wanyi kena nunku ku mesu kua Nzambi, kadi yeye wakahunga nʼanyi tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele, tshilongolodibue mu malu onso, ne tshijadikibue, bualu bua tshidi luhandu luanyi luoso ne disua dianyi dionso, yeye kena ubidiundisha, anyi?" 
2Samuel23:6 Kadi bantu babi bonso nebikale bu meba adibo bimasha, bualu bua kabena bamanye mua kuakuata ne tshianza." 
2Samuel23:7 Kadi muntu udi walenga, udi ne bua kuluata biamu ne difuma, bobo neboshibue ne kahia mu muaba wabo." 
2Samuel23:8 Â adi mena a bena nvita ba bukitu bakadi nʼabo Davidi: Yoshebashebeta, Muena Takemona, wakadi ku mutu kua tupitene tuonso; dina diandi dikuabo Adino, Muena Esene, wakela bantu nkama muanda mukulu difuma diandi, wakabashiha tshikondo tshimue." 
2Samuel23:9 Eleazâ, muana wa Dodai, Muena Ahoa, wakamulonda, umue wa bena bukitu basatu bakadi nʼabo Davidi, hakafuna Bena Peleshete bulobo bakadi badisangisha bua kuluangana nvita, hakumuka Bena Isalele;" 
2Samuel23:10 yeye wakajuka, wakashiha Bena Peleshete tô ne bakateketa diboko diandi, ne tshianza tshiandi tshiakala mata tshilabi tshia muele wandi wa nvita: Yehowa wakabayuisha luhandu lunene dituku adi; bantu bakalonda ku nyima kuandi anu bua kuhaula bintu." 
2Samuel23:11 Shama, muana wa Age, Muena Halala, wakamulonda. Bena Peleshete bakadisangisha mu tshisumbu mu budimi bua nkunde; bantu bakanyema Bena Peleshete." 
2Samuel23:12 Kadi yeye wakimana munkatshi mua budimi, wakabusungila, wakashiha Bena Peleshete; Yehowa wakabayuisha luhandu lunene." 
2Samuel23:13 Bantu basatu bakuabo ba munkatshi mua bena bukitu makumi asatu bakaya kudi Davidi hakadiye mu lubuebue lua Adulama mu tshikondo tshia kunowa; Bena Peleshete bakasa tshitudilu tshiabo mu tshibanda tshia Lefayima. 
2Samuel23:14 Ku tshikondo atshi Davidi wakadi mu musoko wa lumbu, ne masalayi Bena Peleshete akadi mu Beteleheme." 
2Samuel23:15 Mutshima wa Davidi wakamusamina bua mai a kunua; wakamba ne, Bampeku mai a kunua a dî mu dina dia mu Beteleheme, didi ha buihi ne tshibi!" 
2Samuel23:16 Bena bukitu basatu bakahita munkatshi mua ma salayi a Bena Peleshete, bakasuna mai mu dina dia mu Beteleheme diakadi ha buihi ne tshibi, bakalua nʼau kudi Davidi. Yeye wakabenga bua kunueye mai a, kadi wakâhongolola ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
2Samuel23:17 Yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa, bualu ebu kabuikadi kundi, bua meme kuenza nunku: ndi mua kunua mashi a bantu bakamba kujimisha mioyo yabo, anyi? Nunku yeye wakabenga kuanua, A mmalu akenza bena bukitu basatu." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai, muanʼabo ne Yoaba muana wa Seluya, wakadi ku mutu kua bantu basatu. Yeye wakela bantu nkama isatu difuma diandi, wakabashiha; nunku wakadi ne dina dinene munkatshi mua aba basatu," 
2Samuel23:19 Yeye kakadi ne dina dia butumbi munkatshi mua aba makumi asatu, anyi? Nunku bakamusungula kapitene kabo; kadi yeye kakadi wa mu mulongo wa basatu ba ku mpala." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, muana wa muena bukitu wa mu Kabesele, Wakenza biandi malu manene, wakashiha bana balume babidi ba Aliele wa mu Moaba. Yeye wakahueka kabidi, wakashiha nyama wa ntambue mu lubuebue mu tshikondo tshia neige." 
2Samuel23:21 Yeye wakashiha Muena Ejipitu, wakadi muena bukitu; Muena Ejipitu wakadi ne difuma mu tshianza tshiandi; kadi Benaya wakaya kudiye ne mulangala, wakanyenga difuma dia Muena Ejipitu mu tshianza tshiandi, wakamushiha ne difuma diandi mene." 
2Samuel23:22 A mmalu akenza Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, ne wakadi ne dina dinene munkatshi mua bantu basatu ba bukitu." 
2Samuel23:23 Yeye wakahita bantu aba makumi asatu butumbi, kadi yeye kakadi wa mu mulongo wa basatu ba ku mpala. Davidi wakamuteka ku mutu kua balami bandi." 
2Samuel23:24 Asahele, muanʼabo ne Yoaba, wakadi wa bantu aba makumi asatu; ne Elehanana, muana wa Dodo, wa mu Beteleheme," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama, Muena Haloda, ne Elika, Muena Haloda," 
2Samuel23:26 Helese, Muena Palati, ne Ila, muana wa Ikeshe, Muena Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiesê, Muena Anatota, ne Mebunai, Muena Husha," 
2Samuel23:28 Salemona, Muena Ahoa, ne Mahalai, Muena Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebe, muana wa Bana, Muena Nefota, ne Itai, muana wa Libai wa mu Gibea wa Bena Benyamina," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya, Muena Pilatona, ne Hidai wakafuma ku tusulu tua mu Gâsha," 
2Samuel23:31 Abi-alabona, Muena Âba, ne Asemaweta, Muena Bâhuma," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba, Muena Shâlebona, bana ba Yashena, Yonatana," 
2Samuel23:33 Shama, Muena Halala, ne Ahiyama, muana wa Shala, Muena Alala," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifelete, muana wa Ahasabai, muana wa Mâka, ne Eliyama, muana wa Ahitofele, Muena Gilona," 
2Samuel23:35 ne Heselo Muena Kâmele, ne Pâlai, Muena Âba," 
2Samuel23:36 Igala, muana wa Natana wa mu Soba, ne Bani, Muena Gada," 
2Samuel23:37 ne Seleke, Muena Amona, ne Nahalai, Muena Bêlota, batuadi ba ngabu wa Yoaba, muana wa Seluya," 
2Samuel23:38 ne Ha, Muena Yitela, ne Galeba, Muena Yitela," 
2Samuel23:39 ne Uliya, Muena Hiti: buonso buabo bakadi bantu makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete." 
2Samuel24:1 Tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakatemena Bena Isalele kabidi, wakenzesha Davidi bualu buabo, wamba ne, Ya, bala bungi bua Bena Isalele ne bua Bena Yuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Mukelenge wakambila Yoaba, kapitene ka masalayi andi, wakadi nʼandi ne, Wendakane munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia Bena Isalele, ku Dana tô ne ku Bê-sheba, ubale bantu, bua meme kumanya bungi buabo." 
2Samuel24:3 Yoaba wakambila mukelenge ne, Yehowa, Nzambi webe, akumbashe bantu bu mudiye musue, nansha misangu lukama lukama, mesu a mukelenge wanyi atangile bualu ebu; kadi mukelenge wanyi udi ukeba disanka ku bualu ebu bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel24:4 Kadi dî dia mukelenge diakahita mei a Yoaba ne tupitene tua masalayi bukole. Yoaba ne tupitene tua masalayi bakumuka ku mesu kua mukelenge bua kubalabo bungi bua Bena Isalele. 
2Samuel24:5 Bakasabuka Yadene, bakasa tshitudilu tshiabo ku Aloê, ku luseke lua tshianza tshia balume tshia musoko tshiakadi munkatshi mua tshibanda tshia Gada mu nshila wa ku Yasê." 
2Samuel24:6 Hashishe bakafika ku Gilada mu buloba bua Tatima-hodeshi; bakafika ku Dana-yana, bakahitshila mu buloba bua Sidona;" 
2Samuel24:7 bakafika ku musoko wa lumbu wa Tulo, ne ku misoko yonso ya Bena Hiwi ne ya Bena Kanâna; bakanyunguluka ku luseke lua Sude lua Yuda tô ne ku Bê-sheba." 
2Samuel24:8 Nunku hakendakanabo ku buloba buonso, bakalua ku Yelushalema hakahita ngondo tshitema ne matuku makumi abidi." 
2Samuel24:9 Yoaba wakamanyisha mukelenge bungi bua bantu: bena bukitu bakadi batuale miele ya nvita ba mu Bena Isalele bakadi bantu binunu nkama muanda mukulu, ne ba mu Bena Yuda bakadi bantu binunu nkama itanu." 
2Samuel24:10 Hakabala Davidi bantu, mutshima wandi wakamuhisha. Davidi wakambila Yehowa ne, Nakenza bubi mu bualu ebu bunakenza; kadi Yehowa, ndi nkusengelela ne, Ubuikile bubi bua muntu webe, bualu bua nakenza bualu buhote." 
2Samuel24:11 Bakabika Davidi ne dinda dionso, dî dia Yehowa diakalua kudiye kudi muprofete wandi Gada, mumonyi wa malu wa Davidî, ne," 
2Samuel24:12 Ya, wambile Davidi ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Ndi nteka malu asatu ku mpala kuebe, udisunguile bumue buau bûdi musue meme kukuenzelabu." 
2Samuel24:13 Nunku Gada wakafika kudi Davidi, wakamuambila malu au, wakamukonka ne, Udi musue batume bidimu bia tshiole muanda mutekete mu buloba buebe? Anyi udi musue kunyema ku mesu kua badi nʼebe lukuna tô ngondo isatu? Anyi udi musue batume disama dikole mu buloba buebe tô matuku asatu? Ela meji, ungambile tshindi mua kuitaba kudi wakuntuma kûdi." 
2Samuel24:14 Davidi wakambila Gada ne, Ndi munkatshi mua malu manene: tuhone mu bianza bia Yehowa, bualu bua luse luandi ludi lunene; tshihonyi mu bianza bia bantu." 
2Samuel24:15 Nunku Yehowa wakatumina Bena Isalele disama dikole dinda adi tô ne bakafika tshikondo tshiakasunguleye; bantu bakafua ku Dana tô ne ku Bê-sheba bakadi binunu makumi muanda mutekete. 
2Samuel24:16 Hakamba muanjelo kuolola tshianza tshiandi ku Yelushalema bua kubutula, Yehowa wakakudimuna dî diandi, wakambila muanjelo wakadi ushiha bantu ne, Bualu abu buakukumbana; katataka kandisha tshianza tshiebe. Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakadi hehi ne tshishihuidi tshia Alauna, Muena Yebuse." 
2Samuel24:17 Hakatangila Davidi muanjelo wakadi ushiha bantu, yeye wakambila Yehowa ne, Mona, nakenza bibi, nakenza bualu buhote; kadi mikoko ei yakenza tshinyi? Ndi nkusengelela ne, Tshianza tshiebe tshikale kundi ne ku tshiota tshia tatu wanyi." 
2Samuel24:18 Dituku adi Gada wakalua kudi Davidi, wakamuambila ne, Ya, washile Yehowa tshioshelu ku tshishihuidi tshia Alauna, Muena Yebuse." 
2Samuel24:19 Davidi wakabanda bu mu dî dia Gada diakamba Yehowa. 
2Samuel24:20 Alauna wakabanduluka, wakatangila mukelenge ne bantu bandi balue kudiye; Alauna wakaluhuka, wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ku mesu kua mukelenge." 
2Samuel24:21 Alauna wakakonka ne, Mukelenge wanyi wakalua kudi muntu wandi bua tshinyi? Davidi wakamba ne, Bua kusumba tshishihuidi tshiebe, ne bua kuashilaku Yehowa tshioshelu, bua disama edi dishike munkatshi mua bantu." 
2Samuel24:22 Alauna wakambila Davidi ne, Mukelenge wanyi angate bintu bionso bidiye musue, abifile bu mulambu; tangila ngombe ya kuosha ha kahia kayiyi; wangate bintu bidibo bahehula nʼabi ne bikokedi bia ngombe bua nkunyi:" 
2Samuel24:23 Alauna neahe mukelenge bintu ebi bionso. Alauna wakambila mukelenge kabidi ne, Yehowa, Nzambi webe, akuitabushe." 
2Samuel24:24 Mukelenge wakambila Alauna ne, Nansha, nengule bintu ebi kûdi ku mushinga; tshiena nfila mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi, milangala hatuhu. Nunku Davidi wakula tshishihuidi ne ngombe ku nshekele ya argent makumi atanu." 
2Samuel24:25 Davidi wakashilaku Yehowa tshioshelu, wakafilahu milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala. Yehowa wakasengeledibua nunku bua buloba, ne disama diakashika munkatshi mua Bena Isalele." 
1Kings1:1 Mukelenge Davidi wakadi muntu mununu, mukoke wa bidimu bia bungi; bakamubikila ne bilulu bia bungi, kadi yeye kakunyua luya." 
1Kings1:2 Nunku bantu bandi bakamuambila ne, Bakebele mukelenge wanyi nsongakashi utshidi kamama, imane biandi ku mesu kua mukelenge, akukube, alale mu tshiadi tshiebe bua mukelenge wanyi unvue luya." 
1Kings1:3 Bakakebakeba nsongakashi mulengele ku matshika onso a buloba bua Isalele; bakasangana Abishaga, Muena Shunama, bakalua nʼandi kudi mukelenge." 
1Kings1:4 Nsongakashi eu wakadi mulengele be; yeye wakakuba mukelenge, wakamuenzela mudimu; kadi mukelenge kakamumanya." 
1Kings1:5 Hashishe Adoniya, muana wa Hagita, wakadibandisha, wamba ne, Meme nengikale mukelenge: yeye wakadilongoluela makalu ne badi benda ha tubalu ne bantu makumi atanu bua kunyemabo ku mpala kuandi." 
1Kings1:6 Tatu wandi kakanza kumufikisha munda tô matuku andi onso bua kumukonka ne, Wewe wakuenza nunku bua tshinyi? Yeye wakadi muntu mulengele, wakaledibua ku nyima kua Abashaloma." 
1Kings1:7 Yeye wakahunga dî ne Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, ne Ebeyatâ muakuidi; bobo bakalonda Adoniya, bakanutatshisha." 
1Kings1:8 Kadi Sadoka, muakuidi mukuabo, ne Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, ne Natana muprofete, ne Shimei ne Lei, ne bena bukitu ba Davidi kabakalamata Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Adoniya wakashihela Nzambi mikoko ne ngombe ne bana ba ngombe ba manyi hehi ne dibue dia mu Soheleta, didi ku luseke lua Ene-logela; yeye wakabikilaku bana babo bonso, bana ba balume ba mukelenge, ne Bena Yuda bonso ne bantu ba mukelenge;" 
1Kings1:10 kadi yeye kakabikila Natana muprofete, ne Benaya ne bena bukitu ne muanʼabo Solomo." 
1Kings1:11 Hashishe Natana wakambila Betasheba, mamu wa Solomo, ne, Kuakunvua lumu ne, Adoniya, muana wa Hagita, udi ukokesha, ne mukelenge wetu Davidi kena mumanye bualu ebu, anyi?" 
1Kings1:12 Nunku lua biebe kundi, ndi nkusengelela, bua meme kukuha lungenyi lua mua kusungila muoyo webe ne muoyo wa muanʼebe Solomo." 
1Kings1:13 Ya biebe kudi mukelenge Davidi, umuambile ne, Mukelenge wanyi, wewe kuakuditshiha kudi muntu webe mukashi ne, Muanʼebe Solomo neakokeshe bantu ku nyima kuanyi bulelela, ne yeye neashikame mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge, anyi? Munyi mudi Adoniya ukokesha bantu?" 
1Kings1:14 Mona, hautshidi wakulaku ne mukelenge, meme kabidi nembuelemu ku nyima kuebe ne nenjadike mei ebe." 
1Kings1:15 Betasheba wakaya muakadi mukelenge mu nsubu wa bulalu: mukelenge wakadi muntu mununu be, ne Abishaga, Muena Shunama, wakadi ukuatshika mukelenge mudimu." 
1Kings1:16 Betasheba wakatua mpala wandi hanshi, wakakukuila mukelenge. Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Wewe udi ukeba tshinyi?" 
1Kings1:17 Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Mukelenge wanyi wakaditshiha kudi muntu wandi mukashi ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi webe, ne, Bulelela, Solomo, muanʼebe wa balume, neakokeshe bantu ku nyima kuanyi, ne yeye neashikame mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge." 
1Kings1:18 Kadi katataka, mona, Adoniya udi ukokesha, ne wewe, mukelenge wanyi, kuena mumanye bualu ebu;" 
1Kings1:19 yeye wakushihela Nzambi ngombe ne bana ba ngombe ba manyi ne mikoko ya bungi; wakabikila bana ba balume bonso ba mukelenge, ne Ebeyatâ muakuidi, ne Yoaba, kapitene ka masalayi; kadi yeye kukubikila muntu webe Solomo." 
1Kings1:20 Katataka, mukelenge wanyi, mesu a Bena Isalele bonso adi kûdi bua wewe kubambila washikama mu nkuasa wa mukelenge wanyi ku nyima kuandi." 
1Kings1:21 Biwabenga kuenza nunku, hashishe, halala mukelenge wanyi tulu ne bankambua bandi, nebatubale meme ne muanʼanyi Solomo bu bantu badi balenduisha bakuabo." 
1Kings1:22 Mona, hakadiye uyikila ne mukelenge nunku, Natana muprofete wakabuela." 
1Kings1:23 Bakambila mukelenge ne, Ka Natana muprofete au. Hakabueleye kudi mukelenge, yeye wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ku mesu kuandi." 
1Kings1:24 Natana wakambila mukelenge ne, Wewe, mukelenge wanyi, wakuamba ne, Adoniya neakokeshe ku nyima kuanyi, neashikame mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge, anyi?" 
1Kings1:25 Bualu bua yeye wakuhuka lelu, wakushihela Nzambi ngombe ne bana ba ngombe ba manyi ne mikoko ya bungi, wakuhaula bana ba balume bonso ba mukelenge, ne tupitene tua masalayi andi, ne Ebeyatâ muakuidi. Katataka mona, badiadia, banuanua ku mpala kuandi bamba ne, Mukelenge Adoniya ikale ne muoyo musangu mule!" 
1Kings1:26 Kadi meme mene, muntu webe, ne Sadoka muakuidi mukuabo, ne Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, ne muntu webe Solomo, kakatubikila." 
1Kings1:27 Bualu ebu buakuenjibua kudi mukelenge wanyi, ne wewe kuena muanze kumanyisha bantu bebe washikama mu nkuasa wa mukelenge wanyi ku nyima kuandi, anyi?" 
1Kings1:28 Hashishe mukelenge Davidi wakamba ne, Umbikidile Betasheba. Yeye wakasemena ha buihi ne mukelenge, wakimana ku mpala kua mukelenge." 
1Kings1:29 Mukelenge wakaditshiha ne, Bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo, wakuhikula muoyo wanyi mu makenga onso," 
1Kings1:30 bulelela, bu munakuditshiha kûdi ku mpala kua Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ne, Bulelela, Solomo muanʼebe neakokeshe ku nyima kuanyi, neashikame mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge, nunku nengenze bualu ebu lelu." 
1Kings1:31 Hashishe Betasheba wakatua mpala wandi hanshi, wakakukuila mukelenge, wamba ne, Mukelenge wanyi Davidi, ikale ne muoyo tshiendelele!" 
1Kings1:32 Mukelenge Davidi wakamba ne, Umbikidile Sadoka muakuidi, ne Natana muprofete, ne Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada. Bakalua kudi mukelenge." 
1Kings1:33 Mukelenge wakabambila ne, Angatai bantu ba mukelenge wenu, nuendeshe Solomo, muanʼanyi, ha nyima ha mpunda wanyi mene, nuye nʼandi ku Gihona." 
1Kings1:34 Sadoka muakuidi ne Natana muprofete bamueleku manyi ha mutu bua kumubuesha mu bukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele; elai mpungi, nuambe ne, Mukelenge Solomo ikale ne muoyo tshiendelele!" 
1Kings1:35 Hashishe, nulonde ku nyima kuandi, ne yeye nealue, neashikame mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge, bualu bua yeye neikale mukelenge mu muaba wanyi: nakamusungula mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele ne kua Bena Yuda." 
1Kings1:36 Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, wakakudimuna mukelenge ne, Amen. Yehowa, Nzambi wa mukelenge wanyi, ambe biandi nunku kabidi." 
1Kings1:37 Bu muakadi Yehowa ne mukelenge wanyi, ikale kabidi ne Solomo bua nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge ahite wa mukelenge Davidi bunene." 
1Kings1:38 Nunku Sadoka muakuidi, ne Natana muprofete, ne Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, ne Bena Kelete ne Bena Pelete bakaya, bakabandisha Solomo ha nyima ha mpunda wa mukelenge Davidi, bakaya nʼandi ku Gihona." 
1Kings1:39 Sadoka muakuidi wakangata lusengu lua manyi lua mu Ntenta, wakela manyi ha mutu ha Solomo. Bakela mpungi; bantu bonso bakamba ne, Mukelenge Solomo ikale ne muoyo tshiendelele!" 
1Kings1:40 Bantu bonso bakalonda ku nyima kuandi: bonso bakadi bela nshiba, bakasanka ne disanka ditamba bunene; buloba buakahandika bua mbila yabo." 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya ne bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi bakunvua mbila ku ndekelu kua kudia. Hakunvua Yoaba mei a mpungi, wakamba ne, Ahu diyoyo dinene didi ku musoko ndia tshinyi?" 
1Kings1:42 Hakatshidiye wakula nunku, Yonatana, muana wa Ebeyatâ muakuidi, wakafika kudibo; Adoniya wakamuambila ne, Buela biebe, bualu bua wewe udi muena kalolo, udi ulua ne lumu luimpe." 
1Kings1:43 Yonatana wakambila Adoniya ne, Bulelela, mukelenge wetu Davidi wakusungila Solomo mukelenge:" 
1Kings1:44 mukelenge wakatuma Sadoka muakuidi, ne Natana muprofete, ne Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, ne Bena Kelete ne Bena Pelete, bakaya nʼandi, bakamubandisha ha nyima ha mpunda wa mukelenge;" 
1Kings1:45 Sadoka muakuidi, ne Natana muprofete, bakumana kumuela manyi ha mutu mu Gihona, bua kuikaleye mukelenge; bakumana kufumaku ne disanka dinene nunku musoko udi mule tente ne tshianga. Adi ndiyoyo dinuakunvua." 
1Kings1:46 Solomo kabidi udi ushikama mu nkuasa wa bukelenge. 
1Kings1:47 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, bantu ba mukelenge bakatua bua kuvudishilabo mukelenge wetu Davidi disanka, bamba ne, Nzambi webe avuishe dina dia Solomo ditambe dina diebe bunene, ne nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge atambe webe bunene. Mukelenge wakakudimana ha bulalu buandi." 
1Kings1:48 Mukelenge wakamba kabidi ne, Nunku disanka dinene dikale kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, wakumpa umue bua kushikameye mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge lelu, mesu anyi atangile bualu ebu." 
1Kings1:49 Bantu bonso bakadi ne Adoniya bakatshina, bakabika, bakaya muntu nshila wandi muntu nshila wandi." 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya wakatshina bualu bua Solomo; wakajuka, wakaya, wakakuata ku nsengu ya ku tshishihelu." 
1Kings1:51 Bakambila Solomo ne, Monaku, Adoniya udi utamba kutshina mukelenge Solomo, bualu bua yeye wakukuata ku nsengu ya ku tshishihelu wamba ne, Mukelenge Solomo adianjile kuditshiha kundi ne, Tshiena nshiha muntu wanyi ku muele wa nvita." 
1Kings1:52 Solomo wakamba ne, Bienzeye malu a kalolo, lusuki lumue lua ku mutu kuandi kaluena luhona hanshi; kadi bikaleye ne malu mabi munda muandi, neafue." 
1Kings1:53 Nunku mukelenge Solomo wakatuma bantu, bakalua nʼandi ku tshishihelu. Yeye wakalua, wakakukuila mukelenge Solomo. Solomo wakamuambila ne, Ya ku nsubu kuebe." 
1Kings2:1 Matuku a Davidi akasemena ha buihi bua yeye afue; yeye wakadimusha muanʼandi Solomo, wamba ne," 
1Kings2:2 Nyaya mu nshila udi ba ha buloba bonso baya: nunku wikale ne bukole, udivuishe mulume wa bushuwa." 
1Kings2:3 Utumikile mei a Yehowa, Nzambi webe, bua kuenda mu nshila yandi, ne bua kulamata mikenji yandi ne mei andi onso ne mikandu yandi ne mianda yandi yonso bu mudibi bifunda mu mikanda ya Mose, bua wewe wikale ne diakalengele mu malu onso audi wenza, ne mu nshila yonso ludi wenda;" 
1Kings2:4 bua Yehowa kujadikeye di diandi diakangambileye ne, Bikala bana bebe badimuke mu nshila yabo, benda ku mpala kuanyi mu bulelela ne mitshima yabo yonso ne mioyo yabo yonso, hashishe, wewe kuena uhanga muntu wa kushikama mu nkuasa wa bukelenge wa Isalele tshiendelele." 
1Kings2:5 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, udi mumanye buakangenzela Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, ne bu muakenzeleye tupitene tubidi tua masalayi a Isalele, Abinê, muana wa Nê, ne Amasa, muana wa Yetê, bakashiheye: nunku wakamatshisha mashi a nvita hatuakadi ne ditalala, wakalaba mashi a nvita ku mukaba wakadi mu tshifuka tshiandi ne ku bisabata biakadi ku makasa andi." 
1Kings2:6 Wenze bu mudi lungenyi luebe; kuitabushi bua mutu wandi udi ne nsuki mitoke tô ubuele mu Muaba wa Bafue ne ditalala. 
1Kings2:7 Kadi uleshe bana balume ba Bâzilai, Muena Gilada, luse: bobo bikale munkatshi mua badi badia ku mesa ebe; bualu bua bobo bakankuatshisha hanakanyema ku mpala kua muanʼenu Abashaloma." 
1Kings2:8 Bualu bukuabo, Shimei, muana wa Gela, udi nʼebe kabidi, Muena Benyamina wa mu Bahulima, wakampenda ne bihendu bibi mu dituku dinakafuma ku Mahanayima, udi nʼebe; yeye wakalua kusangakena nʼanyi ku Yadene; nakaditshiha kudiye ku mesu kua Yehowa ne, Tshiena nkushiha ne muele wa nvita." 
1Kings2:9 Kadi kumubadi bu muntu udi kayi ne bualu, bualu bua wewe udi muena lungenyi; neumanye bualu bûdi nʼabu mbua kumuenzela: wewe neutume mutu wandi udi ne nsuki mitoke tô mu Muaba wa Bafue ne mashi." 
1Kings2:10 Davidi wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi." 
1Kings2:11 Matuku onso akakokesha Davidi Bena Isalele akadi bidimu makumi anai: wakakokesha mu Hebelone bidimu muanda mutekete; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu. 
1Kings2:12 Solomo wakashikama mu nkuasa wa bukelenge wa Davidi, tatu wandi; bukelenge buandi buakajadikibua bikole." 
1Kings2:13 Hashishe Adoniya, muana wa Hagita, wakalua kudi Betasheba, mamu wa Solomo. Yeye wakamuebesha ne, Wewe ulualua ne ditalala, anyi? Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Ditalala didiku." 
1Kings2:14 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Ndi ne bualu bua kukuambila. Wakamuambila ne, Ambaku." 
1Kings2:15 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi mumanye ne, Bukelenge ebu buakadi buanyi, ne Bena Isalele bonso bakateka mesu abo kundi bua meme kubakokesha; kadi bukelenge buakukudimuka mpindiu buakulua bua muanʼetu, bualu bua Yehowa wakamuhabu." 
1Kings2:16 Katataka ndi nkulomba anu bualu bumue, kumbengi nansha. Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ambaku." 
1Kings2:17 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Ungakuile kudi mukelenge Solomo (bualu bua yeye kena ubenga dî diebe) bua yeye ampe Abishaga, Muena Shunema, ikale mukashi wanyi." 
1Kings2:18 Betasheba wakamuambila ne, Kakuena bualu, ne nku akuhe kudi mukelenge."
