2Kings7:15 Bakabihata tô ne ku Yadene; monai, nshila wakadi mûle tente ne bilulu ne bintu biakimasha Bena Sulia mu lubilu luabo. Bantu hakahingana, bakamanyisha mukelenge." 
2Kings7:16 Bantu bakaluhuka, bakahaula tshitudilu tshia Bena Sulia. Nunku bakahana tshihiminu tshia bukula bubotesha ku nshekele umue, ne bihiminu bia bukula bua orge bibidi ku nshekele umue bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa." 
2Kings7:17 Mukelenge wakasungula kapitene kakadiye weyemena ku tshianza tshiandi bua kulameye tshibi tshia musoko; bantu bakamudiata mu makasa ku tshibi; wakafua bu muakadi dî dia muntu wa Nzambi diakamuambileye hakahueka mukelenge kudiye. 
2Kings7:18 Bualu bua bakambila muntu wa Nzambi mukelenge ne, Makelela ba diba edi nebahane bihiminu bia bukula bua orge bibidi ku nshekele umue ne tshihiminu tshia bukula bubotesha ku nshekele umue ku tshibi tshia Samalea;" 
2Kings7:19 kapitene kakambila muntu wa Nzambi ne, Biatunzuluila Yehowa bibi bia mu diulu bualu ebu nebuikale munyi? Elisha wakamuitaba ne, Mesu ebe neamone bualu ebu, kadi wewe kuena uhidia nansha." 
2Kings7:20 Bualu buakalua nunku kudiye; bantu bakamudiata mu makasa ku tshibi, yeye wakafua." 
2Kings8:1 Elisha wakambila mukashi, muena muana wakabisbeye ku lufu, ne, Juka, uye ne ba mu nsubu webe, ya ushikame kuonso kûdi mua kushikama, bualu bua Yehowa neatume tshiole mu buloba tô bidimu muanda mutekete." 
2Kings8:2 Mukashi wakajuka, wakenza bu muakadi dî dia muntu wa Nzambi; wakaya ne ba mu nsubu wandi, bakashikama mu buloba bua Bena Peleshete tô bidimu muanda mutekete." 
2Kings8:3 Hakahita bidimu abi muanda mutekete, mukashi au wakafuma mu buloba bua Bena Peleshete; wakadila kudi mukelenge bua nsubu wandi ne bua buloba buandi." 
2Kings8:4 Mukelenge wakadi uyikila ne Gehazi, muena mudimu wa muntu wa Nzambi, wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Ungambileku malu manene onso akenza Elisha." 
2Kings8:5 Hakadiye umuambila muakabisha Elisha muana ku lufu, mukashi muena muana wakabisheye ku lufu wakadila kudi mukelenge bua nsubu wandi ne bua buloba buandi. Gehazi wakamba ne. Mukelenge wanyi, eu udi mukashi ne eu udi muana wandi wakabisha Elisha ku lufu." 
2Kings8:6 Hakebesha mukelenge mukashi bualu ebu, yeye wakamuambilabu. Mukelenge wakambila umue wa ba tuhita tuandi ne, Umuhingishile bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi diambedi ne bintu bionso biakadiunda mu madimi andi katshia umukamu tô ne katataka." 
2Kings8:7 Elisha wakaya ku Damaseke. Bene-hadada, mukelenge wa Bena Sulia, wakadi usama; bakamuambila ne, Muntu wa Nzambi wakulua." 
2Kings8:8 Mukelenge wakambila Hazaele ne, Wangate tshintu mu tshianza tshiebe, uye kusangakena ne muntu wa Nzambi; yeye ebeshe Yehowa bualu buanyi ne, Meme nensangale ku disama edi, anyi?" 
2Kings8:9 Nunku Hazaele wakaya kusangakena nʼandi, wakaya ne kuha kua bintu biakane bionso bia mu Damaseke bikumbane bujitu buakadi tumelo makumi anai mua kutuala, wakimana ku mesu kuandi, wakamba ne, Muanʼebe Benehadada, mukelenge wa Sulia, wakuntuma kûdi bua kukuebesha ne, Meme nensangale ku disama edi, anyi?" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha wakamuambila ne, Ya umuambile ne, Wewe neusangale bulelela, kadi Yehowa wakundesha ne, Yeye neafue bulelela." 
2Kings8:11 Yeye wakamutangila talalâ tô ne bakamukuata bundu. Muntu wa Nzambi wakadila. 
2Kings8:12 Hazaele wakamuebesha ne, Mukelenge wanyi, udi udidila tshinyi? Yeye wakamuambila ne. Bualu bua ndi mumanye malu mabi audi muenzele Bena Isalele; wewe newoshe misoko yabo idi ne ngumbu ne kahia, wewe neushihe bansongalume babo ku miele ya nvita, wewe neukosolole bana babo bakese bituha bituha, neuhande bakashi babo badi ne mafu." 
2Kings8:13 Hazaele wakamba ne, Kadi muntu webe udi mbua bua yeye udi mua kuenza bualu ebu bunene, anyi? Elisha wakamuitaba ne, Yehowa wakundesha ne, Wewe newikale mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Sulia." 
2Kings8:14 Hashishe yeye wakumuka kudi Elisha, wakahingana kudi mukelenge wandi. Yeye wakamuebesha ne, Elisha wakukuambila tshinyi? Wakamuitaba ne, Yeye wakungambila ne, Wewe neusangale bulelela." 
2Kings8:15 Hakatshiabu, Hazaele wakangata tshilulu tshia ha bulalu, wakatshina mu mai, wakatshibuikila ha mpala ha Bene-hadada tô ne hakafueye. Hazaele wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings8:16 Mu tshidimu tshitanu tshia bukelenge bua Yolama, muana wa Ahaba, mukelenge wa Isalele, hakadi Yehoshafata mukelenge wa Yuda, Yeholama, muana wa Yehoshafata, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings8:17 Wakadi ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu muanda mukulu. 
2Kings8:18 Yeye wakenda mu nshila ya hakelenge ba Isalele bu muakenza ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, bualu bua muana wa Ahaba wakadi mukashi wandi; yeye wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
2Kings8:19 Kadi Yehowa wakabenga bua kubutula Bena Yuda, anu bualu bua muntu wandi Davidi, bualu bua wakamulaya bua kumushileye bana bandi muinda tshiendelele." 
2Kings8:20 Mu matuku andi Bena Edome bakatombokela Bena Yuda, bakadisunguila mukelenge." 
2Kings8:21 Hashishe Yolama wakahitshila ku Saî ne makalu andi onso; bakabika butuku, bakashiha Bena Edome bakadi babanyunguluka ne tupitene tua makalu; bantu bakanyema ku ntenta yabo." 
2Kings8:22 Nunku Bena Edome bakatombokela Bena Yuda tô ne ku difuku edi. Mu tshikondo atshi tshimue Bena Libena bakatomboka kabidi. 
2Kings8:23 Bienzedi bia Yolama biakenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings8:24 Yolama wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi. Ahazaya, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings8:25 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bibidi tshia bukelenge bua Yolama, muana wa Ahaba, mukelenge wa Isalele, Ahazaya, muana wa Yeholama, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings8:26 Ahazaya wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema tshidimu tshimue. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Atalaya, muana wa Omeli, mukelenge wa Isalele." 
2Kings8:27 Wakenda mu nshila wa ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, bualu bua yeye wakadi bayandi-tshina wa ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba." 
2Kings8:28 Yeye wakaya ne Yolama, muana wa Ahaba, bua kuluanganabo ne Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia, ku Lamota-gilada; Bena Sulia bakataha Yolama mputa." 
2Kings8:29 Mukelenge Yolama wakaya ku Yizelele bua kumuondahabo mputa yakamutaha Bena Sulia mu Lama, hakaluanganeye ne Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia. Ahazaya, muana wa Yeholama, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakayaku bua kutangila Yolama, muana wa Ahaba, mu Yizelele, bualu bua yeye wakadi usama." 
2Kings9:1 Elisha wakabikila umue wa bana ba baprofete, wakamuambila ne, Suika mukaba webe, wangate kalondo aka ka manyi mu tshianza tshiebe, ya biebe ku Lamota-gilada." 
2Kings9:2 Hawafikaku, ukebe Yehu, muana wa Yehoshafata, muana wa Nimishi; ubuele mu nsubu, umujule munkatshi mua bana babo, uye nʼandi mu nsubu wa munda." 
2Kings9:3 Hashishe hatula kalondo ka manyi, wahongoluela ha mutu handi, umuambile ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Nakukusungula mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele. Hashishe unzulula tshibi, ya lubilu, kujingakanyi." 
2Kings9:4 Nunku nsongalume eu, muprofete mene, wakaya ku Lamota-gilada." 
2Kings9:5 Hakafikeyeku, wakasangana tupitene tua masalayi tuonso tushikame hanshi. Wakambila kapitene kakuabo ne, Ndi nʼebe dî. Yehu wakamuebesha ne, Udi ne nganyi dî munkatshi muetu? Yeye wakamuitaba ne, Wewe, kapitene." 
2Kings9:6 Wakajuka, wakabuela nʼandi mu nsubu; wakahongolola manyi ha mutu handi, wakamuambila ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi Wamba ne, Nakukusungula mukelenge ku mutu kua bantu ba Yehowa, Bena Isalele mene." 
2Kings9:7 Bûdi nʼabu mbua kushiha ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, mukelenge webe, bua kusombuela mashi a bantu banyi baprofete ne a bantu bonso ba Yehowa akamatshisha tshianza tshia Izebele hanshi." 
2Kings9:8 Bualu bua bonso ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba nebafue; nenshihe bana balume bonso ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, ne badishikamine ne bahika, badi mu Isalele." 
2Kings9:9 Nenvuishe ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba bu nsubu wa Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, ne bu nsubu wa Bâsha, muana wa Ahiya." 
2Kings9:10 Mbua mene neyidie mubidi wa Izebele mu Yizelele, kabena bamujika nansha. Yeye wakunzulula tshibi, wakaya lubilu." 
2Kings9:11 Hashishe Yehu wakahingana kudi bantu ba mukelenge wandi; umue wabo wakamuebesha ne, Malu kai? Muntu au muhote wakakufila bua tshinyi? Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu nudi bamanye muntu au ne mei akadiye wamba." 
2Kings9:12 Bobo bakamba ne, Yeye udi ushima, utuambile. Yeye wakamba ne, Yeye wakungambila nunku ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Nakukusungula mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele." 
2Kings9:13 Hashishe bakaya lubilu, muntu ne muntu, wakangata tshilulu tshiandi, bakabijingila muinshi mua makasa andi hanshi ha tshibandilu, bakela mpungi, bamba ne, Yehu udi mukelenge." 
2Kings9:14 Nunku Yehu, muana wa Yehoshafata, muana wa Nimishi, wakelela Yolama tshifufu. Yolama ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi halama Lamota-gilada bualu bua Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia;" 
2Kings9:15 kadi mukelenge Yolama wakahingana ku Yizelele bua kumuondahabo mputa wakamutahabo kudi Bena Sulia, hakuluanganeye ne Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia. Yehu wakamba ne, Bikala bualu ebu mu mitshima yenu, muntu kumuki mu musoko hua kuambeye bualu ebu mu Yizelele." 
2Kings9:16 Nunku Yehu wakabanda mu dikalu diandi, wakaya ku Yizelele. Ahazaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakamana kuyaku bua kutangileye Yolama." 
2Kings9:17 Mutentekedi wakadi wimana ha tshibumba tshia mu Yizelele, wakatangila Yehu ne bantu bandi hakadibo balua mu nshila, wakamba ne, Ndi mutangile tshisumbu tshia bantu. Yolama wakamba ne, Tuma muntu ha nyima ha kabalu bua kusangileye nʼabo, abebeshe ne, Nulualua talalâ, anyi?" 
2Kings9:18 Nunku muntu wakaya ha nyima ha kabalu bua kusangakeneye nʼabo, wakamba ne, Mukelenge udi ukonka ne, nulualua talalâ, anyi? Yehu wakamukudimuna ne, Wewe udi ukeba ditalala bua tshinyi? Londa ku nyima kuanyi. Mutentekedi wakamba ne, Messager wetu wakafika kudibo, kadi kena uhingana." 
2Kings9:19 Hashishe bakatuma muntu muibidi ha nyima ha kabalu; hakafikeye kudibo, wakamba ne, Mukelenge udi ukonka ne, Nulualua talalâ, anyi? Yehu wakamuebesha ne, Udi ukeba ditalala bua tshinyi? Londa ku nyima kuanyi." 
2Kings9:20 Mutentekedi wakamba ne, Yeye wakafika kudibo, kadi kena uhingana; tshiendeshilu tshia dikalu tshidi tshifuanangana ne tshiendeshilu tshia Yehu, muana wa Nimishi, bualu bua yeye udi wendesha dikalu lukasa lukasa." 
2Kings9:21 Yolama wakamba ne, Balongolole dikalu. Bakalongolola dikalu diandi. Yolama, mukelenge wa Isalele, ne Ahazaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, bakaluhuka, muntu mu dikalu diandi muntu mu dikalu diandi, bua kusangakenabo ne Yehu. Bakamusangana mu budimi bua Nabota, Muena Yizelele." 
2Kings9:22 Hakatangila Yolama Yehu, yeye wakamuebesha ne, Yehu, ulualua talalâ, anyi? Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Tudi ne ditalala kudi kunyi hatshidi malu a masandi a mamu webe ne mbuku yandi bikumbane bia bungi?" 
2Kings9:23 Yolama wakamuela nyima, wakanyema, wakambila Ahazaya ne, Ahazaya, kusonguela kudiku!" 
2Kings9:24 Yehu wakanana buta buandi ne bukole buandi buonso, wakasa Yolama ha masangu a nyima, mukete wakasompoka ha dimuma diandi dia muoyo, yeye wakadishinda hanshi mu dikalu diandi." 
2Kings9:25 Hashishe Yehu wakambila Bidikâ, kapitene kandi, ne, Umuamhule, umuele mu budimi bua Nabota, Muena Yizelele; uvuluke ne, Hatuakadi meme ne wewe tulonda Ahaba, tatu wandi, Yehowa wakanunemeshila bujitu ebu." 
2Kings9:26 Yehowa wakamba ne, Bulelela, makelela nakatangila mashi a Nabota ne a bana bandi balume, nunku nenkusombuele mu muaba eu mene kabidi. Nunku umuambule, umuele mu muaba eu, bu mu dî dia Yehowa." 
2Kings9:27 Hakatangila Ahazaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, bualu ebu, yeye wakanyema mu nshila wa ku nsubu wa mu budimi ebu. Yehu wakamulonda, wakamba ne, Mushihelai kabidi mu dikalu diandi. Bakamuasa mukete hakadiye ubanda mukuna wa Gû hehi ne Yibelama. Yeye wakanyema ku Megido, wakafuilaku." 
2Kings9:28 Bantu bandi bakamuambula mu dikalu bua kuya ku Yelushalema, bakamujika mu lukita lua bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi." 
2Kings9:29 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshia bukelenge bua Yolama, muana wa Ahaba, Ahazaya wakabanga kukokesha mu Yuda." 
2Kings9:30 Hakafika Yehu ku Yizelele, Izebele wakunvua lumu elu; wakalaba mukubu ku mesu, wakasuika tshitambala ku mutu, wakatangila ha disoso dia nsubu." 
2Kings9:31 Hakabuela Yehu ku tshibi tshia musoko, yeye wakamuebesha ne, Wewe Zimeli, mushihi wa mukelenge webe, ulualua talalâ, anyi?" 
2Kings9:32 Yeye wakambula mpala wandi bua kutangila ha disoso, wakakonka ne, Udi ku luseke luanyi nganyi? Bantu batungula nansha babidi nansha basatu bakamutangila ha mbelu." 
2Kings9:33 Yehu wakabambila ne, Numuele hanshi. Nunku hakamuela hanshi, ne mashi andi makuabo akamatshila ha lumbu ne ha tubalu; tuakamudiata muinshi mua bikono." 
2Kings9:34 Wakabuela mu nsubu, wakadia, wakanua. Yeye wakamba ne, Batangile mukashi eu wakedibua mulau, bamujike bualu bua yeye wakadi muana wa mukelenge." 
2Kings9:35 Bakaya bua kumujika. Kadi bakasangana anu kabalubalu ka mutu wandi ne makasa ne munda mua bianza. 
2Kings9:36 Nunku bakahingana, bakamuambila. Yeye wakamba ne, Edi ndî dia Yehowa diakambeye kudi muntu wandi Eliya, Muena Tishebe, ne, Mbua neyidie Izebele mu muaba wa Yizelele;" 
2Kings9:37 ne mubidi wa Izebele newikale bu tunvi ha mutu ha buloba bua Yizelele nunku kabena mua kuamba ne, Eu udi Izebele kabidi." 
2Kings10:1 Ahaba wakadi ne bana balume makumi muanda mutekete mu Samalea. Yehu wakafundila bakadi ne bukokeshi mu Yizelele, bakulu bakadi badiundisha bana ba Ahaba, mikanda mu Samalea ne," 
2Kings10:2 Hafika mikanda ei kunudi, bualu bua bana balume ba mukelenge wenu batshidi nʼenu, ne nudi ne makalu ne tubalu ne musoko wa lumbu ne bintu bia nvita;" 
2Kings10:3 nunku nudisunguile umue wa bana balume ba mukelenge wenu udi utamba buakane, numushikike mu nkuasa wa bukelenge wa tatu wandi, nuluile ba mu nsubu wa mukelenge wenu nvita." 
2Kings10:4 Kadi bobo bakatamba kutshina; bakambilangana ne, Bakelenge babidi kabakamanya mua kuimana ku mpala kuandi, nunku tuetu netuimane munyi?" 
2Kings10:5 Nunku muntu wakadi ku mutu kua nsubu, ne wakadi ku mutu kua musoko ne bakulu bakadi badiundisha bana ba Ahaba, bakatumina Yehu dî ne, Tuetu tudi bantu bebe, netuenze bu mu dî diebe; katuena tudisunguila muntu bu mukelenge; enza muonso mûdi umona ne muimpe." 
2Kings10:6 Hashishe yeye wakabandila mukanda musangu muibidi, wakabambila ne, Binuikala ku luseke luanyi, binuasua kunvua dî dianyi, hashishe nutule mitu ya bana balume ba mukelenge wenu, nulue n ai kundi ku Yizelele makelela ha diba edi. Ku tshikondo atshi bana balume ba mukelenge makumi muanda mutekete bakadi ne bantu banene ba mu musoko bakadi babadiundisha." 
2Kings10:7 Hakafika mukanda kudibo, bakakuata bana balume ba mukelenge makumi muanda mutekete, bakabashiha, bakateka mitu yabo mu bisaka, bakamutuminayi ku Yizelele." 
2Kings10:8 Messager wakafika kudiye, wakamuambila ne, Bakalua ne mitu ya bana balume ba mukelenge. Yeye wakamba ne, Bayiteke bisumbu bibidi ku tshibi tshia ku musoko tô ne dinda." 
2Kings10:9 Hakatshiabu, yeye wakaluhuka, wakimana, wakambila bantu bonso ne, Nuenu nudi bakane; meme nakelela mukelenge wanyi tshifufu, nakamushiha; kadi wakashiha bonso aba nganyi?" 
2Kings10:10 Nunku numanye bienu ne, Nansha dî dimue dia mei onso akambila Yehowa bualu bua nsubu wa Ahaba nedihone hanshi hatuhu; bualu bua Yehowa wakenza malu onso akambeye mukana mua muntu wandi Eliya." 
2Kings10:11 Nunku Yehu wakashiha bonso bakashala mu nsubu wa Ahaba mu Yizelele, ne bantu bandi banene bonso, ne balunda bandi bonso ne bakuidi bandi bonso tô ne hakamushiyeye hatuhu." 
2Kings10:12 Wakajuka, wakumuka, wakaya ku Samalea. Hakafikeye ku nsubu wa bakoshi ba miosa ya mikoko wakadi mu nshila," 
2Kings10:13 Yehu wakasangila ne bana babo ne Ahazaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabebesha ne, Nudi banganyi? Bakamuitaba ne, Tudi bana babo ne Ahazaya, tuyaya bua kuela bana ba mukelenge ne bana ba mukelenge mukashi muoyo." 
2Kings10:14 Yeye wakamba ne, Bakuatai ne muoyo. Bakabakuata ne muoyo, bakabashiha ku dina dia mai dia mu nsubu wa bakoshi ba miosa, bu bantu makumi anai ne babidi. Kabakashiya umue wabo." 
2Kings10:15 Hakumukeye ku muaba au, wakasangila ne Yehonadaba, muana wa Lekaba, wakadi ulua kusangakena nʼandi. Yeye wakamuela muoyo, wakamuebesha ne, Mutshima webe udi muakanangane ne mutshima wanyi bu mudi mutshima wanyi muakanangane ne mutshima webe, anyi? Yehonadaba wakamukudimuna ne, E, budi nunku. Bikalau bu nunku, unkuate ku tshianza. Yeye wakamukuata ku tshianza tshiandi, wakamubuesha mu dikalu diandi." 
2Kings10:16 Wakamuambila ne, Ulue nʼanyi, umone lukunukunu lundi nʼalu kudi Yehowa. Nunku bakamushikika mu dikalu diandi." 
2Kings10:17 Hakafikabo ku Samalea, Yehu wakashiha bonso bakashala ba Ahaba mu Samalea tô ne hakababutuleye bonso bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa diakambileye Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Yehu wakasangisha bantu bonso diatshimue, wakabambila ne, Ahaba wakakuatshila Bâla mudimu mukese, kadi Yehu neamukuatshile mudimu wa bungi." 
2Kings10:19 Nunku mbikidilai baprofete bonso ba Bâla ne batendeledi bandi bonso ne bakuidi bandi bonso: nansha umue wabo kashadi, bualu bua bundi nʼabu mbua kufila mulambu munene kudi Bâla; yonso washala kena wikala ne muoyo. Kadi Yehu wakenza bualu ebu ne budimu bua yeye amanye mua kushiha batendeledi ba Bâla." 
2Kings10:20 Yehu wakamba ne, Basungule dituku dia kujidila Bâla. Bakadisungula." 
2Kings10:21 Yehu wakatuma dî ku nseke yonso ya Isalele; batendeledi ba Bâla bonso bakadisangisha diatshimue, nansha umue wabo wakashala. Bakabuela mu nsubu wa Bâla: bakatamba kûsha nsubu wa Bâla tente tô ne kundekelu kuandi." 
2Kings10:22 Wakambila mulami wa bilulu ne, Hatula bilulu bia batendeledi ba Bâla bonso. Yeye wakahatula bilulu." 
2Kings10:23 Yehu wakabuela mu nsubu wa Bâla ne Yehonadaba, muana wa Lekaba, wakambila batendeledi ba Bâla ne, Nukebe, nutangile ne anu batendeledi ba Bâla badimu, ne kamuikadi bantu ba Yehowa." 
2Kings10:24 Bakabanga kufila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia. Yehu wakadianjila kusungula bantu makumi muanda mukulu, wakabateka ha mbelu, wakabambila ne, Binualekela muntu undi mufile mu bianza bienu, meme nendombe muoyo wenu ku muoyo wandi." 
2Kings10:25 Hakamanabo kufila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, Yehu wakambila balami ne tupitene ne, Buelai, nubashihe, nansha umue kahatuki, Bakabashiha ku miele ya nvita; balami ne tupitene bakabimasha ha mbelu, bakabuela mu musoko muakadi nsubu wa Bâla." 
2Kings10:26 Bakangata makunshi akadi mu nsubu wa Bâla, bakaosha mu kahia." 
2Kings10:27 Bakatonkolola makunshi a mabue a Bâla hanshi, bakashimbula nsubu wa Bâla, bakamuvuisha bu diala tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Kings10:28 Nunku Yehu wakajimisha bualu bua Bâla munkatshi mua Bena Isalele. 
2Kings10:29 Kadi Yehu kakabenga malu mabi onso a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele; wakashala ne tuana tua ngombe tua or tuakadi mu Betele ne mu Dana." 
2Kings10:30 Yehowa wakambila Yehu ne, Bualu bua wewe wakuenza malu akadi mimpe ku mesu kuanyi, wakuenzela ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba malu anakasungula mu mutshima wanyi, nunku bana bebe ba balume nebashikame mu nkuasa wa bukelenge wa Isalele tô ne ku bikondo binai." 
2Kings10:31 Kadi Yehu kakatamba kuenda mu nshila wa mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ne mutshima wandi wonso; yeye kakabenga malu mabi a Yalobama akenzesheye Bena Isalele." 
2Kings10:32 Mu matuku au Yehowa wakabanga kukehesha Bena Isalele. Hazaele wakabashiha mu nseke yonso ya Isalele: 
2Kings10:33 ku Yadene kua ku esete ne buloba buonso bua Gilada ne bua Bena Gada ne bua Bena Lubena ne bua Bena Manashe ne ku Aloê udi mu tshibanda tshia Ânona tô ne ku Gilada ne Bashana. 
2Kings10:34 Bienzedi bia Yehu bikuabo biakenzeye ne bukole buandi buonso kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Kings10:35 Yehu wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi; bakamujika mu Samalea. Yehoaza, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings10:36 Musangu wakakokesha Yehu Bena Isalele mu Samalea wakadi bidimu makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu. 
2Kings11:1 Hakatangila Atalaya, mamu wa Ahazaya, ne, Muanʼanyi mulume udi mufue, yeye wakajuka, wakashiha bana balume bonso ba mukelenge." 
2Kings11:2 Kadi Yehosheba, muana wa mukelenge Yolama, muanʼabo mukashi ne Ahazaya, wakangata Yoasha, muana wa balume wa Ahazaya, wakamuangata munkatshi mua bana ba mukelenge bakashihabo, wakamuteka ne mulami wandi mu nsubu wandi wa bulalu; bakamusokoka kudi Atalaya, yeye kakashihibua." 
2Kings11:3 Yeye wakamusokoka nunku mu nsubu wa Yehowa tô bidimu bisambombo. Atalaya wakakokesha mu buloba. 
2Kings11:4 Mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia Yoasha Yehoyada wakabikila tupitene tua bantu nkama bantu nkama ba Bena Kala ne ba balami, bakalua kudiye mu nsubu wa Yehowa; yeye wakahunga nʼabo tshihungidi, wakabatshihisha mu nsubu wa Yehowa, wakabalesha muana wa mukelenge." 
2Kings11:5 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bunudi nʼabu mbua kuenza nunku: tshituha tshienu tshisatu tshialua dituku dia Lumingu netshikale balami ba nsubu wa mukelenge," 
2Kings11:6 tshituha tshisatu tshikuabo netshikale ku tshibi tshia ku Sû; ne tshituha tshisatu tshikuabo netshikale ku tshibi ku nyima kua balami aba; nunku nenumanye mua kulama nsubu bua muntu kabuedi. 
2Kings11:7 Nunku bisumbu bienu bibidi bidi biluhuka dituku dia Lumingu nebikale balami ba nsubu wa Yehowa mudi mukelenge muana. 
2Kings11:8 Nenunyunguluke mukelenge nunku, muntu yonso ne bintu bia nvita mu bianza biandi; biakela muntu kubuela munkatshi muenu, nebamushihe. Nunku nenuikale ne mukelenge haluhukeye ne habueleye." 
2Kings11:9 Tupitene tua bantu nkama bantu nkama tuakenza bu muakadi dî dia Yehoyada, muakuidi wa Nzambi. Bakangata muntu ne muntu bantu bandi, bakuabo bakadi ne bua kubuela dia Lumingu, bakuabo bakadi ne bua kuluhuka dia Lumingu, bakaya kudi Yehoyada, muakuidi wa Nzambi." 
2Kings11:10 Muakuidi wa Nzambi wakafila mafuma ne ngabu bia mukelenge Davidi, biakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, mu bianza bia tupitene tua bantu nkama bantu nkama." 
2Kings11:11 Balami aba bakimana muntu ne muntu ne bintu bia nvita mu bianza biabo ku luseke lua nsubu lua ku tshianza tshia balume tô ne ku luseke lua nsubu lua ku tshianza tshia bakashi, bakanyunguluka tshioshelu ne nsubu ne mukelenge." 
2Kings11:12 Hashishe bakaluhuka ne muana wa mukelenge, bakateka tshifulu tshia butumbi ha mutu handi; bakamuha mukanda wa dihungila, bakamujadika mukelenge, bakamuela manyi ha mutu handi; bakamututshila nkashi, bamba ne, Mukelenge ikale ne muoyo!" 
2Kings11:13 Hakunvua Atalaya mbila ya balami ne ya bantu, yeye wakaya kudi bantu mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings11:14 Yeye wakamona mukelenge muimane ha tshiambidi bu mudi tshilele tshiabo ne tupitene ne bedi ba mpungi bimane ha buihi ne mukelenge; bantu bonso bakadi hasanka, bela mpungi. Hashishe Atalaya wakadihanda bilulu biandi, wakela dî diandi ne, Bakungelela tshifufu! Bakungelela tshifufu!" 
2Kings11:15 Yehoyada, muakuidi wa Nzambi, wakela tupitene tua masalayi dî ne, Balue nʼandi munkatshi mua balami; muntu wamulonda bamushihe ne muele wa nvita. Bualu bua muakuidi wakamba ne, Kabamushihi mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings11:16 Nunku bakamushila mpunga, wakenda mu nshila wa tubalu wa ku nsubu wa mukelenge, bakamushihelaku." 
2Kings11:17 Yehoyada wakahunga tshihungidi hankatshi ha Yehowa ne mukelenge ne bantu ne, Tuetu netuikale bantu ba Yehowa; wakahunga tshihungidi tshikuabo hankatshi ha mukelenge ne bantu." 
2Kings11:18 Bantu bonso ba mu ditunga bakaya ku nsubu wa Bala, bakamushimbula; bakabutula bioshelu biandi ne mpingu yandi bituha bituha; bakashiha Matana, muakuidi wa Bâla, ku mpala kua tshioshelu. Muakuidi wa Nzambi wakasungula balami ba nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings11:19 Wakasangisha tupitene tua bantu nkama bantu nkama, ne Bena Kala ne balami ne bantu bonso ba mu ditunga; bakafuma ne mukelenge mu nsubu wa Yehowa, bakaya nʼandi mu nshila wa ku tshibi tshia balami tô ne mu nsubu wa mukelenge, Yeye wakashikama mu nkuasa wa butumbi wa bakelenge." 
2Kings11:20 Nunku bantu bonso ba mu ditunga bakasanka, bakashikama talalâ. Bakashiha Atalaya ne muele wa nvita hehi ne nsubu wa mukelenge." 
2Kings11:21 Yoasha wakadi ne bidimu muanda mutekete hakabangeye kukokesha. 
2Kings12:1 Mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia bukelenge bua Yehu, Yoasha wakabanga kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi anai: dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Sibeya wa mu Besheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoasha wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa matuku andi onso akadi Yehoyada, muakuidi wa Nzambi, umuyisha." 
2Kings12:3 Kadi yeye kakumusha bitendelelu bia ku mikuna; bantu batshivua bafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, batshivua bosha musenga wa manananshi ha mutu ha mikuna." 
2Kings12:4 Yoasha wakambila bakuidi ba Nzambi ne, Argent yonso ya bintu bidibo balua nʼabi mu nsubu wa Yehowa bua kumujidilabi, ne argent yonso idibo bangata kudi muntu yonso hamubalabo, ne argent yonso idi bantu basue kufila mu nsubu wa Yehowa bua mitshima yabo," 
2Kings12:5 bakuidi bitabushe bintu ebi kudi bana babo, balongolole miaba ya mu nsubu wa Yehowa yakashimbuka hanshi." 
2Kings12:6 Kadi hakahita bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu bia bukelenge bua Yoasha, bakuidi kabakanza kulongolola miaba ei." 
2Kings12:7 Hashishe mukelenge Yoasha wakabikila Yehoyada ne bakuidi bakuabo bakadi nʼandi, wakabebesha ne, Bualu kai kanuena nulongolola miaba ei mishimbuke mu nsubu wa Yehowa? Kanuitabushi argent mikuabo kudi bana benu, kadi nuyifile bua kulongolola miaba ei idi mishimbuke mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings12:8 Bakuidi bakitabusha ne, Katuena tuangata argent kudi bantu kabidi, kadi katuena tulongolola miaba mishimbuke ya mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings12:9 Kadi Yehoyada muakuidi wakangata mushete munene, wakela tubulu mu tshibuiku tshiau, wakauteka ha buihi ne tshioshelu ku tshianza tshia balume tshia ku tshibi tshia mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bakuidi bakadi balama tshibi bakatekamu argent yonso yakatuabo nʼai mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings12:10 Hakamanyabo ne argent ya bungi idi mu mushete, secrétaire wa mukelenge ne muakuidi munene bakatua ne bibombi, bakabala argent yakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings12:11 Bakafila argent yakabalabo mu bianza bia bena mudimu ne mu bianza bia bantu bakadi balama nsubu wa Yehowa; bakahita nʼai bena mabaya ne bibaki ba nsubu bakadi benza mudimu wa nsubu wa Yehowa," 
2Kings12:12 ne bena tushola ne basongi ba mabue; bakasumba nʼai mabaya ne mabue masonga ne bintu bionso bia kulongololabo nʼabi miaba mishimbuke mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings12:13 Kadi kabakenza nʼai makoho a argent ne bijimishi bia minda ne malonga ne mpungi; kabakenza tshintu tshia argent anyi tshia or ku argent yakaluabo nʼai mu nsubu wa Yehowa; 
2Kings12:14 kadi bakayifila anu kudi bakenza mudimu ne bakalongolola nʼai nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings12:15 Kabakalonda dibala dia argent kudi bafutshi ba bena mudimu eu, bualu bua bakadi mua kueyemenyibua." 
2Kings12:16 Kabakalua ne argent yakangatabo ku milambu ya bisambukidi ne ku milambu ya kubuikila nʼai mibi mu nsubu wa Yehowa; ei yakadi ya bakuidi. 
2Kings12:17 Mu tshikondo atshi Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia, wakaya kuluangana ne bena musoko wa Gata, wakaunyenga; Hazaele wakatangila mpala wandi bua kuyeye ku Yelushalema." 
2Kings12:18 Yoasha, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakangata bintu bia tshijila wakafila Yehoshafata ne Yeholama ne Ahazaya batatu bandi, bakelenge ba Yuda, mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne bintu bionso biakajidileye ne biamu bia or bionso biakadi mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge, wakabituma kudi Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia; nunku yeye wakumuka ku Yelushalema." 
2Kings12:19 Bienzedi bia Yoasha bikuabo ne malu onso akenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings12:20 Bantu ba Yoasha bakabika, bakamuelela tshifufu, bakamutaha mputa ku nsubu wa Milo, wa mu nshila wa ku Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Bualu bua Yozakâ, muana wa Shimeta, ne Yehozabada, muana wa Shomê, bantu bandi bakamutaha mputa; wakafua. Bakamujika ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi; Amasaya, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings13:1 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne bisatu tshia bukelenge bua Yoasha, muana wa Ahazaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Yehoaza, muana wa Yehu, wakabanga kukokesha Bena Isalele mu Samalea; wakabakokesha bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete." 
2Kings13:2 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; wakalonda mu nshila wa malu mabi a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele; yeye kakasesukaku nansha." 
2Kings13:3 Tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakadi kudi Bena Isalele, yeye wakabafila mu bianza bia Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia, ne mu bianza bia Bene-hadada, muana wa Hazaele, tô matuku abo onso." 
2Kings13:4 Yehoaza wakadila kudi Yehowa ne Yehowa wakamunvuila; bualu bua yeye wakatangila dikenga dia Bena Isalele diakabakengeshabo nʼadi kudi mukelenge wa Sulia. 
2Kings13:5 Yehowa wakabishila Bena Isalele musungidi, nunku bakahanduka mu bianza bia Bena Sulia. Bena Isalele bakashikama mu ntenta yabo bu muakenzabo diambedi," 
2Kings13:6 Kadi kabakumuka ku malu mabi a ba mu nsubu wa Yalobama akenzesheye Bena Isalele; batshivua bendamu. Bakashiya Bashela mu Samalea kabidi. 
2Kings13:7 Mukelenge wa Sulia wakashila Yehoaza anu bantu makumi atanu bakadi benda ha nyima ha tubalu, ne makalu dikumi, ne binunu dikumi bia bantu bakadi benda ku makasa; mukelenge wa Sulia wakababutula, wakabavuisha bu luhuishi lua ku tshituilu." 
2Kings13:8 Bienzedi bia Yehoaza bikuabo ne malu onso akenzeye ne bukole buandi kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Kings13:9 Yehoaza wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu Samalea; Yoasha muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings13:10 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete tshia bukelenge bua Yoasha, mukelenge wa Yuda, Yehoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, wakabanga kukokesha Bena Isalele mu Samalea; wakabakokesha bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo." 
2Kings13:11 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; yeye kakasesuka ku malu malu onso a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele, kadi utshivua wendamu." 
2Kings13:12 Bienzedi bia Yoasha bikuabo ne malu onso akenzeye ne bukole buakaluanganeye nʼabu ne Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Kings13:13 Yoasha wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu Samalea diatshimue ne bakelenge ba Isalele; Yalobama wakashikama mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge." 
2Kings13:14 Disama diakakuata Elisha, ne bua disama diandi wakafua. Yoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakaya kumutangila, wakadila muadi, wakamba ne, Tatu wanyi, tatu wanyi, makalu a Isalele ne badi benda ha nyima ha tubalu!" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha wakamuambila ne, Wangate buta ne mikete; wakangata buta ne mikete." 
2Kings13:16 Yeye wakambila mukelenge wa Isalele ne, Teka tshianza tshiebe ha buta; yeye wakatshiteka. Elisha wakateka bianza biandi ha bianza bia mukelenge." 
2Kings13:17 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Unzulula tshibi tshia ku esete; wakatshiunzulula. Hashishe Elisha wakamba ne, Ela; yeye wakela. Yeye wakamba ne, Eu mmukete wa dihita dia Yehowa, mukete wa dihitshibua dia Bena Sulia; bualu bua wewe neutahe Bena Sulia bikole mu Afeke, tô ne hawahabutula." 
2Kings13:18 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Wangata mikete; wakayangata. Wakambila mukelenge wa Isalele ne, Yasai mu buloba. Yeye wakasa misangu isatu, wakalekela." 
2Kings13:19 Muntu wa Nzambi wakadi nʼandi tshiji, wakamuambila ne, Wakadi ne bua kuasa misangu itanu nansha misangu isambombo; nunku wakadi kuhita Bena Sulia bukole to ne hawakababutula bonso; kadi katataka wewe neuhite Bena Sulia bukole anu misangu isatu." 
2Kings13:20 Elisha wakafua, bakamujika. Ku tshibangidilu tshia tshidimu tshikuabo Bena Moaba bakalua mu bisumbu, bakahaula buloba." 
2Kings13:21 Hakadibo bajika muntu mukuabo, bakatangila tshisumbu tshia Bena Moaba; bakimasha tshitalu tshiandi mu lukita lua Elisha; hakalengangana tshitalu tshiandi ne mifuba ya Elisha, wakafuluka, makasa andi." 
2Kings13:22 Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia, wakakengesha Bena Isalele matuku onso a Yehoaza." 
2Kings13:23 Kadi Yehowa wakabalesha dinanga, wakabafila luse, wakabalesha kalolo, bualu bua tshihungidi tshiakahungeye ne Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba, yeye wakabenga bua kubabutula, kakabihata ku mesu kuandi." 
2Kings13:24 Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia, wakafua; Benehadada, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings13:25 Yehoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, wakanyenga kabidi misoko mu bianza bia Bene-hadada, muana wa Hazaele, yakanyengeye mu bianza bia Yehoaza, tatu wandi, mu mata. Yoasha wakamuhita bukole misangu isatu, wakasungila misoko ya Bena Isalele." 
2Kings14:1 Mu tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukelenge bua Yoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, mukelenge wa Isalele, Amasaya, muana wa Yoasha, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings14:2 Wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema; dina dia mamu wandi dia kadi Yehoadina wa mu Yelushalema. 
2Kings14:3 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa; kadi kakenza malu onso bu muakenza Davidi, kaku wandi; Wakenza malu onso bu muakenza Yoasha, tatu wandi." 
2Kings14:4 Kadi kakumusha bitendelelu bia ku mikuna; bantu batshivua bafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne musenga wa manananshi ha mutu ha mikuna 
2Kings14:5 Hakajadikabo bukelenge mu bianza biandi, yeye wakashiha bena mudimu, bashihi ba tatu wandi, mukelenge." 
2Kings14:6 Kadi yeye kakashiha bana ba bashihi aba, bu muakamba Yehowa mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose ne, Kabashihi batatu bualu bua malu a bana bakalelabo; kabashihi bana bua malu a batatuʼabo, kadi muntu yonso neafue anu bua bubi buandi." 
2Kings14:7 Wakashiha binunu dikumi bia Bena Edome mu Tshibanda tshia Luehu; wakanyenga musoko wa Sela mu nvita, wakawidika ne, Yoketele tô ne ku difuku edi." 
2Kings14:8 Hashishe Amasaya wakatumina Yehoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, muana wa Yehu, mukelenge wa Isalele, ba-messager bamba ne, Lua biebe, tutangilangane mpala ha mpala" 
2Kings14:9 Yehoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakatumina Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, dî ne, Dieba diakadi mu Lebanona diakatumina mutshi wa cèdre wa mu Lebanona dî ne, Umpe muanʼebe wa bakashi bu mukashi wa muanʼanyi wa balume. Kadi nyama wa mu Lebanona wakahitaku, wakadiata dieba munda mua dikama." 
2Kings14:10 Bulelela, wewe wakuhita Bena Edome bukole, wakadibandisha mu mutshima webe, wakadisua; Shala biebe kuebe, uditumbishe nkayebe. Udi musue kudibuesha mu malu bua kudikengesha ne bua kuhona, wewe ne Bena Yuda hebe, bua tshinyi?" 
2Kings14:11 Kadi Amasaya kakitabusha. Nunku Yehoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakaya, wakamonangana ne Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, ku mesu mu Bete-shemeshe wa ku luseke lua Yuda." 
2Kings14:12 Bena Yuda bakahitshibua bukole kudi Bena Isalele, bakanyemena ku ntenta yabo." 
2Kings14:13 Yehoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakakuata Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, muana wa Yehoasha, muana wa Ahazaya, ku Bete-shemeshe; wakaya ku Yelushalema, wakashimbula lumbu lua Yelushalema ku tshibi tshia Efelayima tô ne ku tshibi tshikuabo tshia ku ditumba ntanta wa coudées nkama mai." 
2Kings14:14 Wakahaula biamu bionso bia or ne bia argent ne malonga onso akadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne bintu bimpe bionso bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge; wakakuata bantu lukola, wakahingana ku Samalea." 
2Kings14:15 Bienzedi bia Yehoasha bikuabo biakenzeye ne bukole buandi ne muakaluanganeye ne Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Kings14:16 Yehoasha wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu Samalea diatshimue ne bakelenge ba Isalele; Yalobama, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings14:17 Amasaya, muana wa Yoasha, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakikala ne muoyo bidimu dikumi ne bitanu ku nyima kua lufu lua Yehoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, mukelenge wa Isalele." 
2Kings14:18 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Amasaya kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings14:19 Bakamuelela tshifufu mu Yelushalema, kadi yeye wakanyemena ku Lakisha, bakamuihata ku Lakisha, bakamushihelaku." 
2Kings14:20 Bakalua nʼandi ha nyima ha tubalu, bakamujika ne bankambua bandi mu Yelushalema, musoko wa Davidi." 
2Kings14:21 Bena Yuda bonso bakangata Uziya, wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo, bakamujadika mukelenge mu muaba wa Amasaya, tatu wandi." 
2Kings14:22 Yeye wakasa musoko wa Elata, wakauhingisha kudi Bena Yuda; ku nyima kua bualu ebu yeye wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi." 
2Kings14:23 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bitanu tshia bukelenge bua Amasaya, muana wa Yoasha, mukelenge wa Yuda, Yalobama, muana wa Yoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakabanga kukokesha mu Samalea, wakabakokesha tô bidimu makumi anai ne tshimue." 
2Kings14:24 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; kakasesuka ku malu mabi onso a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele." 
2Kings14:25 Wakahingisha mukalu wa Isalele ku tshibi tshia ku Hamata tô ne ku dishiha dia mu Alabâ, bu mu dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, diakambeye mukana mua muntu wandi Yona muprofete, muana wa Ambai wa mu Gata-hefê." 
2Kings14:26 Bualu bua Yehowa wakamona dikenga dia Bena Isalele ne diakadi dikole; kabakashala ne bantu mu nsubu anyi ku mbelu, kabakashila Bena Isalele mukuatshishi nansha." 
2Kings14:27 Yehowa kakanza kuamba ne, Nenjimishe dina dia Isalele muinshi mua diulu, kadi yeye wakatuma Yalobama, muana wa Yoasha, bua kubasungileye." 
2Kings14:28 Bienzedi bia Yalobama bikuabo biakenzeye ne bukole buandi ne nvita yandi, ne muakanyengeye Damaseke ne Hamata, misoko ya Yuda, wakayihingisha mu bianza bia Bena Isalele, kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Kings14:29 Yalobama wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakelenge ba Isalele; Zekâya, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings15:1 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete tshia bukelenge bua Yalobama, mukelenge wa Isalele, Uziya, muana wa Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings15:2 Wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema tô bidimu makumi atanu ne bibidi; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Yekoliya wa mu Yelushalema. 
2Kings15:3 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Amasaya, tatu wandi." 
2Kings15:4 Kadi kakumusha bitendelelu bia ku mikuna; bantu batshivua bafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne musenga wa manananshi ha mutu ha mikuna. 
2Kings15:5 Yehowa wakasamisha mukelenge ne disama dia nsudi tô ne ku dituku dia lufu luandi; wakashikama mu nsubu ha buandi. Yotama, muana wa mukelenge, wakadi ku mutu kua nsubu wandi ulumbulula malu a bantu ba mu buloba." 
2Kings15:6 Bienzedi bia Uziya bikuabo ne malu onso biakenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ha Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings15:7 Uziya wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika hohamue ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi. Yotama, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings15:8 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge bua Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Zekâya, muana wa Yalobama, wakakokesha Bena Isalele mu Samalea anu ngondo isambombo." 
2Kings15:9 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza batatuʼandi; kakasesuka ku malu mabi a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele." 
2Kings15:10 Shaluma, muana wa Yabesha, wakamuelela tshifufu, wakamukuma ku mesu kua bantu, wakamushiha, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings15:11 Bienzedi bia Zekâya bikuabo bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele. 
2Kings15:12 Edi ndi diakambila Yehowa Yehu ne, Bana bebe nebashikame ku nkuasa wa bukelenge wa Isalele tô ne ku tshikondo tshinai. Bualu ebu buakenjibua." 
2Kings15:13 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshitema tshia bukelenge bua Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Shaluma, muana wa Yabesha, wakabanga kukokesha; wakabakokesha mu Samalea ngondo umue." 
2Kings15:14 Menahema, muana wa Gadi, wakafuma ku Tîsa, wakaya ku Samalea, wakakuma Shaluma, muana wa Yabesha, mu Samalea, wakamushiha, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings15:15 Bienzedi bia Shaluma bikuabo ne tshifufu tshiakeleye bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele. 
2Kings15:16 Hashishe Menahema wakahaula musoko wa Tifesa, wakashiha bantu bakadiku tô ne ku Tîsa; bualu bua bobo kabakunzulula bibi ku mpala kuandi, yeye wakabashiha; bakashi bonso bakadi ne mafu, yeye wakabahanda." 
2Kings15:17 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshitema tshia bukelenge bua Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Menahema, muana wa Gadi, wakabanga kukokesha Bena Isalele; wakakokesha mu Samalea bidimu dikumi." 
2Kings15:18 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; kakasesuka mu malu mabi a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele matuku andi onso." 
2Kings15:19 Pula, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakalua bua kuhaula buloba. Menahema wakaha Pula ntalanta ya argent tshinunu, bua yeye amukuatshishe bua kujadikeye bukelenge mu tshianza tshiandi." 
2Kings15:20 Menahema wakalambuisha Bena Isalele, bantu babanji bonso, nshekele ya argent makumi atanu kudi muntu ne muntu, bua kulambuleye mukelenge wa Ashû. Nunku mukelenge wa Ashû wakahingana kuabo, kakashikama mu buloba bua Isalele." 
2Kings15:21 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Menahema ne malu onso akenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Kings15:22 Menahema wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi; Pekaya, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings15:23 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi atanu tshia bukelenge bua Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Pekaya, muana wa Menahema, wakabanga kukokesha Bena Isalele mu Samalea; wakabakokesha bidimu bibidi." 
2Kings15:24 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; kakasesuka mu malu mabi a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele." 
2Kings15:25 Peka, muana mulume wa Lemalaya, kapitene ka masalayi andi wakamuelela tshifufu, wakamukuma mu Samalea mu nsubu wa mukelenge; Âgoba ne Aliye ne Bena Gilada makumi atanu bakadi nʼandi; yeye wakamushiha, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings15:26 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Pekaya ne malu onso akenzeye bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele. 
2Kings15:27 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi atanu ne bibidi tshia bukelenge bua Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, wakabanga kukokesha Bena Isalele mu Samalea; wakabakokesha bidimu makumi abidi." 
2Kings15:28 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; kakasesuka mu malu mabi a Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, akenzesheye Bena Isalele." 
2Kings15:29 Mu matuku a Peka, mukelenge wa Isalele, Tigelata-pilesê, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakalua, wakahaula Iyona ne Abele-bete-mâka ne Yanoa ne Kedeshe ne Hasô ne Gilada ne Galela ne buloba buonso bua Nafatale, wakaya nʼabo ku Ashû mu buhika." 
2Kings15:30 Hoshea, muana wa Ela, wakelela Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, tshifufu, wakamukuma, wakamushiha, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi tshia bukelenge bua Yotama, muana wa Uziya." 
2Kings15:31 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Peka ne malu onso akenzeye bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Isalele. 
2Kings15:32 Mu tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukelenge bua Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, mukelenge wa Isalele, Yotama, muana wa Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings15:33 Wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Yelusha, muana wa Sadoka." 
2Kings15:34 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, bu muakenza Uziya, tatu wandi." 
2Kings15:35 Kadi kakumusha bitendelelu bia ku mutu kua mikuna; bantu batshivua bafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne musenga wa manananshi ha mutu ha mikuna. Yeye wakalongolola tshibi tshia ku nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings15:36 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yotama ne malu onso akenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings15:37 Mu matuku au Yehowa wakabanga kutuma Lesinyi, mukelenge wa Sulia, ne Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, bua kuluanganabo ne Bena Yuda." 
2Kings15:38 Yotama wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika hohamue ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi, tatu wandi; Ahaza, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings16:1 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mutekete tshia bukelenge bua Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, Ahaza, muana wa Yotama, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings16:2 Ahaza wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo. Yeye kakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wandi, bu muakenza Davidi, tatu wandi." 
2Kings16:3 Kadi yeye wakenda mu nshila wa bakelenge ba Isalele; wakahitshisha muanʼandi wa balume mu kahia bu mu malu a bundu a bantu ba mu bisamba bia bende bakihatabo kudi Yehowa ku mesu kua Bena Isalele. 
2Kings16:4 Wakafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne musenga wa manananshi ha mutu ha mikuna ne ha tukuna ne muinshi mua mitshi mibishi yonso. 
2Kings16:5 Hashishe Lesinyi, mukelenge wa Sulia, ne Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, mukelenge wa Isalele, bakalua kuluangana ne Bena Yelushalema; bakatshintshimika Ahaza kadi kabakamanya mua kumutshimuna." 
2Kings16:6 Ku tshikondo atshi Lesinyi, mukelenge wa Sulia, wakahingisha Elata ku Sulia; wakihata Bena Yuda mu Elata; Bena Sulia bakalua ku Elata, bakashikamamu tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Kings16:7 Nunku Ahaza wakatuma ba-messager kudi Tigelata-pilesê, mukelenge wa Ashû, ne, Meme ndi muntu webe ne muana webe mulume; lua biebe, ansungile mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Sulia ne bia mukelenge wa Isalele, badi baluangana neanyi." 
2Kings16:8 Ahaza wakangata biamu bia argent ne bia or biakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bintu bilengele biakadi mu nsubu wa mukelenge, wakabituma bu matabisha kudi mukelenge wa Ashû." 
2Kings16:9 Mukelenge wa Ashû wakamunvuila; mukelenge wa Ashû wakaya kuluangana ne musoko wa Damaseke, wakaunyenga, wakaya ne bantu ku Kî mu buhika; wakashiha Lesinyi kabidi." 
2Kings16:10 Ahaza wakaya ku Damaseke bua kusangileye ne Tigelata-pilesê, mukelenge wa Ashû; wakatangilaku tshioshelu tshiakadi mu Damaseke. Ahaza wakatuma tshinfuanyi tshia tshioshelu ne luidi luatshi ne buakane buatshi buonso kudi Uliya muakuidi." 
2Kings16:11 Uliya muakuidi wakenza tshioshelu tshikuabo; wakatshifuanyikisha bu bintu bionso biakamutumina mukelenge Ahaza ku Damaseke. Uliya muakuidi wakatshienza ku mpala kua dihingana dia mukelenge Ahaza ku Damaseke. 
2Kings16:12 Hakafuma mukelenge ku Damaseke, yeye wakatangila tshioshelu; wakasemena ha buihi ne tshioshelu, wakafilahu milambu." 
2Kings16:13 Wakafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne milambu ya bukula; wakahongolola milambu ya bintu bia kunuabo, wakamiamina mashi a milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala ha tshioshelu." 
2Kings16:14 Yeye wakumusha tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku tshiakadi ku mpala kua Yehowa hankatshi ha tshioshelu tshiandi ne nsubu wa Yehowa, wakatshiteka ku luseke lua ku node lua tshioshelu tshiandi." 
2Kings16:15 Mukelenge Ahaza wakelela Uliya muakuidi mukenji ne, Ufile milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ya dinda ha tshioshelu tshinene, ne milambu ya bukula ya dilolo ne milambu ya kuosha ne milambu ya bukula ya mukelenge, ne milambu ya kuosha ne milambu ya bukula ne milambu ya bintu bidibo banua ya bantu bonso; umiaminehu mashi a milambu yonso idibo bosha ha kahia; kadi meme nkayanyi nendifidile milambu ha tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
2Kings16:16 Uliya muakuidi wakenza malu onso akamba mukelenge Ahaza. 
2Kings16:17 Mukelenge Ahaza wakakosa biamu bia ku nseke ya bitekelu, wakumusha biowelu biakadi ha mitu habi, wakumusha tshiowelu tshinene tshiakadi ha nyima ha ngombe ya tshiamu tshia mitaku, wakatshiteka ha mutu ha mabue." 
2Kings16:18 Bualu bua Ahaza wakatshina mukelenge wa Ashû, wakandamuna mu nsubu wa Yehowa tshibuelelu tshiakadi ne tshibuikilu ku mutu, tshiakadi bantu babuelamu dituku dia Lumingu tshiakibakabo mu nsubu ne tshibi tshia ku mbelu tshiakadi mukelenge mubuele." 
2Kings16:19 Bienzedi bia Ahaza bikuabo biakenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings16:20 Ahaza wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika hohamue ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi; Hezikiya, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings17:1 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bibidi bia bukelenge bua Ahaza, mukelenge wa Yuda, Hoshea, muana wa Ela, wakabanga kukokesha Bena Isalele mu Samalea; wakabakokesha bidimu tshitema." 
2Kings17:2 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa; kadi kakenza bu muakenza bakelenge ba Isalele bakadi ku mpala kuandi. 
2Kings17:3 Shalamanese, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakaluangana nʼandi; Hoshea wakalua muntu wandi, wakamulambula milambu." 
2Kings17:4 Mukelenge wa Ashû wakamanya ne, Hoshea udi ungelela tshifufu; bualu bua yeye wakatuma ba-messager kudi So, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, kakafila milambu kudi mukelenge wa Ashû bu muakadiye wenza ku tshidimu ku tshidimu; nunku mukelenge wa Ashû wakamukuata, wakamusuika mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
2Kings17:5 Hashishe, mukelenge wa Ashû wakalua ku nseke yonso ya buloba, wakafika hehi ne musoko wa Samalea, wakautshintshimika tô bidimu bisatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mu tshidimu tshia tshitema tshia bukelenge bua Hoshea, mukelenge wa Ashû wakahaula Samalea, wakaya ne Bena Isalele ku Ashû, wakabashikika mu Halaha ne kukala kua musulu wa Habo wa mu Gozana ne mu misoko ya Bena Madai." 
2Kings17:7 Bualu bua Bena Isalele bakadi benza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wabo, wakabaluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu mu bianza bia Palo, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, ne bakatshina nzambi mikuabo," 
2Kings17:8 bakenda mu mikenji ya bisamba bikuabo biakihata Yehowa ku mesu kua Bena Isalele, ne mu mikenji ya bakelenge ba Bena Isalele yakenzabo." 
2Kings17:9 Bena Isalele bakenza mu musokoko malu akadi kâyi mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, Nzambi wabo; bakadiashila bitendelelu mu misoko yabo yonso ku tshibumba tshia batentekedi tô ne ku misoko yakadi ne ngumbu;" 
2Kings17:10 bakadijadikila makunshi ne Bashela ku mutu kua mikuna yonso ne muinshi mua mitshi mibishi yonso. 
2Kings17:11 Bakosha musenga wa manananshi ku mutu kua mikuna, bu muakenza bisamba biakihata Yehowa ku mesu kuabo; bakenza malu mabi a kufuisha nʼau Yehowa tshiji." 
2Kings17:12 Bakakuatshila mpingu mudimu yakabambila Yehowa ne, Kanuenji bualu ebu." 
2Kings17:13 Kadi Yehowa wakadimusha Bena Isalele ne Bena Yuda mukana mua muprofete yonso ne mua mumonyi yonso ne, Kudimunai mitshima yenu ku malu mabi enu; nutumikile mikenji yanyi ne mikandu yanyi bu mudi mikenji makelela bankambua benu mukana mua bantu banyi baprofete." 
2Kings17:14 Kadi kabakunvua, bakakolesha mitshima yabo bu muakenza bankambua babo bakadi kabayi bitabusha Yehowa, Nzambi wabo." 
2Kings17:15 Bakabenga mikenji yandi ne tshihungidi tshiakahungeye ne bankambua babo ne mei andi akabambileye; bakalonda malu a hatuhu, bakalua bahote, bakalonda bisamba biakadi ha buihi nʼabo biakabambila Yehowa diambedi ne, Kanuenji bu mudibo benza." 
2Kings17:16 Bakabenga mikenji yonso yakabambila Yehowa, Nzambi wabo, bakadienzela mpingu ya tshiamu tshiakafulabo, tuana tua ngombe tubidi mene mene; bakadienzela Bashela, bakatendelela bintu bionso bia mu diulu, bakakuatshila Bâla mudimu kabidi." 
2Kings17:17 Bakahitshisha bana bakalelabo, balume ne bakashi, mu kahia, bakatempa mbuku, bakabandangana buloshi, bakadihanyisha bua kuenzabo malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa, bua kumufuisha nʼau tshiji." 
2Kings17:18 Nunku Yehowa wakadi ne Bena Isalele tshiji tshikole, wakabumusha ku mesu kuandi; anu tshisamba tshia Yuda nkayatshi tshiakashala." 
2Kings17:19 Bena Yuda kabidi kabakatumikila mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi wabo, kadi bakenda mu mikenji ya Bena Isalele yakenzabo." 
2Kings17:20 Yehowa wakabenga bonso ba mu tshisamba tshia Bena Isalele, wakabakengesha, wakabafila mu bianza bia bahaudi, tô ne hakabumusheye ku mesu kuandi." 
2Kings17:21 Bualu bua yeye wakahandu tula Bena Isalele kudi nsubu wa Davidi; bakadisunguila Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, mukelenge wabo; Yalobama wakasesuisha Bena Isalele kudi Yehowa, wakabenzesha bualu bubi bunene." 
2Kings17:22 Bena Isalele bakenda mu malu mabi onso a Yalobama akenzeye, kabakasesukaku nansha;" 
2Kings17:23 tô ne hakumusha Yehowa Bena Isalele ku mesu kuandi, bu muakabambileye kudi bantu bandi bonso baprofete. Nunku bakumusha Bena Isalele mu buloba buabo, bakaya nʼabo ku buloba bua Ashû tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Kings17:24 Mukelenge wa Ashû wakangata bantu ba mu Babulona ne ba mu Kuta ne ba mu Awa ne ba mu Hamata ne ba mu Sefâwayima, wakabateka mu misoko ya Samalea mu miaba ya Bena Isalele; bobo bakaheta misoko ya Samalea, bakashikamamu." 
2Kings17:25 Ku tshibangidilu tshia dishikama diaboku kabakatshina Yehowa; nunku Yehowa wakatuma nyama ya ntambue munkatshi muabo, yakashiha bakuabo babo." 
2Kings17:26 Nunku bakambila mukelenge wa Ashû ne, Ba bisamba biwakalua nʼabi bua kuteka mu misoko ya Samalea kabena bamanye mikenji ya nzambi wa mu buloba abu: nunku yeye wakatuma nyama ya ntambue munkatshi muabo, monai, idi ibashiha, bualu bua kabena bamanye mikenji ya nzambi wa buloba abu." 
2Kings17:27 Hashishe mukelenge wa Ashû wakela mukenji ne, Hingisha umue wa bakuidi banuakumushaku, yeye aye, ashikame munkatshi muabo, abayishe mikenji ya nzambi wa buloba ahu." 
2Kings17:28 Nunku umue wa bakuidi wakumushabo wakahingana, wakashikama mu Betele, wakabayisha mua kutshinabo Yehowa." 
2Kings17:29 Kadi bantu ba mu tshisamba ne tshisamba bakadienzela nzambi yabo, bakayiteka mu nsubu yakibaka Bena Samalea ha mutu ha mikuna; bakenza nunku kudi tshisamba ne tshisamba mu misoko yonso yakadibo bashikama." 
2Kings17:30 Nunku Bena Babulona bakenza Sukota-benota, ne Bena Kuta bakenza Nêgala ne Bena Hamata bakenza Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 Bena Awa bakenza Nibehaza ne Tâtaka; ne Bena Sefâwayima bakoshila Adelameleke ne Anameleke, nzambi ya Bena Sefâwayima, bana bakalelabo mu kahia." 
2Kings17:32 Nunku bakatshina Yehowa, kadi bakadisunguila bakuidi ba munkatshi muabo, bakabafidila milambu mu nsubu yakadi ku mutu kua mikuna." 
2Kings17:33 Bakatshina Yehowa, kadi bakakuatshila nzambi yabo mudimu, bu muakenza bantu ba mu bisamba biakabumusha." 
2Kings17:34 Nunku tô ne ku dituku edi badi benza bu muakenzabo diambedi: Kabena batshina Yehowa, kabena batumikila mikandu ne mei ne mikenji biakambila Yehowa bana ba Yakoba bakidikeye ne, Bena Isalele." 
2Kings17:35 Yehowa wakahunga nʼabo tshihungidi, wakabadimusha ne, Kanuena ne bualu bua kutshina nzambi mikuabo, kanuyinaminyi, kanuyikuatshidi mudimu, kanuyifididi milambu ya kuosha ha kahia." 
2Kings17:36 Kadi Yehowa wakafuma nʼenu mu buloba bua Ejipitu ne bukole bua bungi ne tshianza tshiandi tshiolola, numutshine yeye, numuinamine, nufile milambu kudiye;" 
2Kings17:37 ne mikandu yandi ne mei andi ne mikenji yandi biakanufundileye, nubitumikile tô tshiendelele; kanutshinyi nzambi mikuabo." 
2Kings17:38 Kanuhu tshihungidi tshinakahunga nʼenu muoyo; kanuena ne bualu bua kutshina nzambi mikuabo; 
2Kings17:39 kadi bunudi nʼabu mbua kutshina Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; yeye neanusungile mu bianza bia bantu bonso badi nʼenu lukuna." 
2Kings17:40 Kadi kabakamunvuila, bakenza bu mu bilele biabo bia diambedi." 
2Kings17:41 Nunku ba bisamba ebi bikuabo bakatshina Yehowa, bakatendelela mpingu yakasongabo; nunku bana bakalelabo ne bana bakadi bana babo balele badi benza bu muakenza batatu babo tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Kings18:1 Mu tshidimu tshisatu tshia bukelenge bua Hoshea, muana wa Ela, mukelenge wa Isalele, Hezikiya, muana wa Ahaza, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakabanga kukokesha." 
2Kings18:2 Wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Abi, muana wa Zekâya." 
2Kings18:3 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Davidi, nkambua wandi." 
2Kings18:4 Wakumusha bitendelelu biakadi ku mutu kua mikuna, wakashimbula makunshi akatendelelabo, wakatahila Bashela hanshi, wakabutula nyoka wa tshiamu tshia mitaku Wakenza Mose, bualu bua mu matuku au Bena Isalele bakadi boshila nyoka au musenga wa manananshi; wakamubikila ne, Nehushetana." 
2Kings18:5 Yeye wakeyemena Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele; kakuakadi muntu mukuabo bu yeye munkatshi mua bakelenge ba Yuda bakalonda ku nyima kuandi, anyi munkatshi mua bakadi ku mpala kuandi." 
2Kings18:6 Bualu bua yeye wakalamata Yehowa; kakasesuka mu nshila wandi, kadi wakatumikila mikenji yandi yakambila Yehowa Mose." 
2Kings18:7 Yehowa wakadi nʼandi, wakamuvuisha diakalengele kuonso kuakayeye; yeye wakatombokela mukelenge wa Ashû, kakamukuatshila mudimu." 
2Kings18:8 Yeye wakahita Bena Peleshete bukole ku luseke lua Gaza ku tshibumba tshia batentekedi tô ne ku musoko wakadi ne lumbu. 
2Kings18:9 Mu tshidimu tshinai tshia bukelenge bua Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia bukelenge bua Hoshea, muana wa Ela, mukelenge wa Isalele, Shalamanesê, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakalua bua kuluangana ne Bena Samalea; wakabatshintshimika." 
2Kings18:10 Hakahita bidimu bisatu, bakahaula musoko; mu tshidimu tshisambombo tshia bukelenge bua Hezikiya ne tshia tshitema tshia bukelenge bua Hoshea, mukelenge wa Isalele, bakanyenga musoko wa Samalea." 
2Kings18:11 Mukelenge wa Ashû wakaya ne Bena Isalele mu Ashû; wakabateka mu Halaha ne kukala kua musulu wa Habo mu Gozana ne mu misoko ya Bena Madai," 
2Kings18:12 bualu bua kabakatumikila dî dia Yehowa, Nzambi wabo, kadi bakashiha tshihungidi tshiandi; bakabenga mikenji yonso yakabambila Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, kabakayunvua, kabakayenza." 
2Kings18:13 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne binai tshia bukelenge bua Hezikiya, Saneheliba, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakalua, wakaluangana ne bena misoko yonso ya Yuda yakadi ne ngumbu, wakayinyenga." 
2Kings18:14 Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakatumina mukelenge wa Ashû dî mu Lakisha ne Nakukuenzela bibi; usesuke kundi, nenkuhe mulambu udi ungambila Mukelenge wa Ashû wakafutshisha Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, milambu ya ntalanta ya argent nkama isatu ne ntalanta ya or makumi asatu." 
2Kings18:15 Hezikiya wakamuha argent yonso yakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne bintu bionso bia mushinga mukole bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge." 
2Kings18:16 Mu tshikondo atshi Hezikiya wakumusha or yonso ya ku bibi bia mu ntempelo wa Yehowa ne ya ku makunshi yakalamika Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda; wakabifila kudi mukelenge wa Ashû." 
2Kings18:17 Mukelenge wa Ashû wakatuma Tâtana ne Labasalisa ne Labashake, bafume ku Lakisha ne masalayi a bungi bua kuluanganabo ne Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, mu Yelushalema Bakafika ku Yelushalema. Hakafikabo, bakimana ku mushimi wa mai udi hehi ne nshila wa mu muaba wa muvu wa bilulu." 
2Kings18:18 Hakabikilabo mukelenge, Eleyakima, muana wa Hilekiya, wakadi ku mutu kua nsubu wa mukelenge, ne Shebena secrétaire, ne Yoa, muana wa Asafa, mufundi wa malu a bukelenge, bakaluhuka kudiye." 
2Kings18:19 Labashake wakabambila ne, Numanyishe Hezikiya ne, Mukelenge munene wa Ashû udi ukuebesha ne, Udi ne tshieyemenu kai tshiudi weyemena?" 
2Kings18:20 Wewe udi Wamba (kadi udi wamba mei a hatuhu) ne, Hatuahunga dî, tudi ne bukole bua kuluangana nʼabu. Udi weyemena nganyi, hawakuntombokela?" 
2Kings18:21 Wewe udi weyemena ku mulangala mutshibuke, bukelenge bua Ejipitu mene: bieyemenahu muntu tshianza tshiandi, neubuele mu tshianza tshiandi, neutshisompoke; Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, udi nunku kudi bonso badi bamueyemena." 
2Kings18:22 Binuangambila ne, Netueyemene Yehowa, Nzambi wetu; kanyeye mene wakumusha Hezikiya bitendelelu biandi ku mikuna ne bioshelu biandi, wakambila Bena Yuda ne Bena Yelushalema ne, Bunudi nʼabu mbua kutendelela ku mpala kua tshioshelu etshi mu Yelushalema, anyi?" 
2Kings18:23 Nunku ndi nnusengelela ne, Nuhunge dî ne mukelenge wanyi, mukelenge wa Ashû, hashishe nennuhe tubalu binunu bibidi binuamanya mua kushikika bantu ha nyima hatu." 
2Kings18:24 Munyi mudi mumanye mua kusesuisha kapitene kamue kadi katamba kuhuekela munkatshi mua bantu ba mukelenge wanyi bua kutekemenaku Bena Ejipitu bua kunuhabo makalu ne badi benda ha nyima ha tubalu? 
2Kings18:25 Meme nakuluila bua kuhaula muaba eu Yehowa kayi nʼanyi, anyi? Yehowa wakungambila ne, Uye biebe, uhaule buloba ebu." 
2Kings18:26 Hashishe Eleyakima, muana wa Hilekiya, ne Shebena ne Yoa bakambila Labashake ne, Tudi tukusengelela ne, Uyikile ne bantu bebe mu muaku wa Bena Sulia, bualu bua tuetu tudi baumanye; kuyikidi nʼetu mu muaku wa Bena Yuda mu matshu a bantu badi ha lumbu." 
2Kings18:27 Kadi Labashake wakabambila ne, Mukelenge wanyi wakuntuma anu kudi mukelenge wenu ne kunudi kabidi bua kunuambila mei au nkayenu? Yeye kakuntuma kudi bantu badi bashikame ha mutu ha lumbu, bua bobo hadie tunvi tuabo, banue menyi abo diatshimue nʼenu, anyi?" 
2Kings18:28 Hashishe Labashake wakimana, wakela dî diandi bikole nu muaku wa Bena Yuda, wakamba ne; Unvuai dî dia mukelenge munene wa Bena Ashû." 
2Kings18:29 Mukelenge udi wamba ne, Hezikiya kanudingi, bualu bua yeye kena ne bukole bua kunusungila mu tshianza tshiandi;" 
2Kings18:30 kanueyemenyi Yehowa bualu hua dî dia Hezikiya ne, Yehowa neatusungile, kabena bafila musoko eu mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Ashû." 
2Kings18:31 Kanunvu dî dia Hezikiya nansha: bualu bua mukelenge wa Ashû udi wamba ne, Nuhunge nʼanyi dî, nuluhuke kundi, muntu ne muntu adie bintu muinshi mua mitshi yandi ya tumuma tukese ne mitshi ya nfigi, anue mai a mu mena andi kabidi;" 
2Kings18:32 tô ne hanaya nʼenu ku buloba budi bifuana buloba buenu, buloba bua blé ne nvinyo mihia-mihia ne mampa ne mitshi ya tumuma tukese, ne mitshi ya olive ne buitshi; bua nuenu nuikale ne muoyo, kanufu; kanunvu dî dia Hezikiya hanuambileye ne, Yehowa neatusungile." 
2Kings18:33 Munga nzambi wa mu bisamba bikuabo wakusungila buloba buandi mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Ashû, anyi?" 
2Kings18:34 Nzambi ya Hamata ne ya Âpada idi kudi kunyi? Nzambi ya Sefâwayima ne ya Hena ne ya Iwa idi kudi kunyi? Yakasungila Samalea mu tshianza tshianyi, anyi?" 
2Kings18:35 Nganyi wa munkatshi mua nzambi yonso ya bisamba wakasungila buloba buabo mu tshianza tshianyi, bua Yehowa amanye mua kusungila Yelushalema mu tshianza tshianyi?" 
2Kings18:36 Kadi bantu bakahuwa, kabakamukudimuna dî; bualu bua mukelenge wakadianjila kubambila ne, Kanumukudimunyi dî nansha." 
2Kings18:37 Hashishe Eleyakima, muana wa Hilekiya, ne Shebena secrétaire, ne Yoa, muana wa Asafa, mufundi wa malu a bukelenge, bakahingana kuai Hezikiya ne bilulu biabo bihanda, bakamuambila mei a Labashake." 
2Kings19:1 Kakunyua mukelenge Hezikiya mei au, wakadihanda bilulu biandi, wakaluata bilulu bikayabala, wakabuela mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings19:2 Yeye wakatuma Eleyakima, wakadi ku mutu kua nsubu wandi, ne Shebena secrétaire ne bakulu ba munkatshi mua bakuidi baluate bilulu bikayabala, kudi Yeshaya muprofete, muana wa Amoza." 
2Kings19:3 Bakamuambila ne, Hezikiya udi wamba ne, Edi ndituku dia ntatu ne dia kutubela ne dia kutufuisha bundu; bualu bua diba dia kulela bana diakufika, ne kabena ne bukole bua kubalela." 
2Kings19:4 Biasua Yehowa, Nzambi webe, kunvua mei a Labashake, wakatuma mukelenge wa Ashû, mukelenge wandi, bua kubendeye nʼau Nzambi wa muoyo, neamubele bua mei akunvua Yehowa, Nzambi webe; nunku ulombele difuka dia bantu didi dishala Nzambi." 
2Kings19:5 Nunku bantu ba mukelenge Hezikiya bakafika kudi Yeshaya. 
2Kings19:6 Yeshaya wakabambila ne, Nuambile mukelenge wenu ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Kanutshinyi mei anuakunvua akumpenda nʼau bantu ba mukelenge wa Ashû." 
2Kings19:7 Meme nenteke nyuma wanyi munda muandi, yeye neunvue ngumu, neahingane ku buloba buandi; meme nemmushiheshe ku muele wa nvita mu buloba buandi." 
2Kings19:8 Labashake wakahingana, wakasangana mukelenge wa Ashû uluangana ne Bena Libena; wakadianjila kunvua lumu ne, Yeye wakumuka ku Lakisha." 
2Kings19:9 Hakunvueye lumu ne, Tîhaka, mukelenge wa Atiopa, ulualua bua kuluangana nʼebe, wakatuma ba-messager kudi Hezikiya kabidi ne," 
2Kings19:10 Nuambile Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne, Nzambi webe ûdi weyemena kakudingi nansha ne, Kabena bafila musoko wa Yelushalema mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Ashû." 
2Kings19:11 Monai, wewe wakumana kunvua lumu bu muakenzela bakelenge ba Ashû bantu ba mu bisamba bionso, bakababutula tô; wewe neuhanduke, anyi?" 
2Kings19:12 Nzambi ya bisamba abi biakabuela batatuʼanyi yakabasungila, anyi? Bisamba bia Gozana ne bia Halana ne bia Lesefe ne bia Edene biakadi mu Telasâ." 
2Kings19:13 Bakelenge ba Hamata ne ba Âpada ne ba Sefâwayima ne ba Hena ne ba Iwa badi kudi kunyi? 
2Kings19:14 Hezikiya wakangata mukanda mu bianza bia ba-messager, wakaubala; Hezikiya wakabuela mu nsubu wa Yehowa, wakaubulula ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
2Kings19:15 Hezikiya wakatendelela Yehowa, wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, utu washikama ha mutu ha bakeluba, wewe udi Nzambi nkayebe wa makelenge onso a ha buloba; wewe wakafuka diulu ne buloba." 
2Kings19:16 Yehowa, teleja matshu, unvue biebe; Yehowa, ubulule mesu ebe, umone; unvue biebe mei a Saneheliba akatumeye bua kuhenda nʼau Nzambi wa muoyo." 
2Kings19:17 Bulelela, Yehowa, bakelenge ba Ashû bakabutula bisamba bikuabo, bakahaula buloba buabo," 
2Kings19:18 bakela nzambi yabo mu kahia, bualu bua yakadi nzambi ya mitshi ne ya mabue yakasongabo ku bianza bia bantu; kayakadi nzambi milelela, nunku bakaushiha." 
2Kings19:19 Nunku ndi nkusengelela, Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, ne, Utusungile mu bianza biandi, bua bisamba bionso bia ha buloba bimanye ne, Wewe Yehowa, udi Nzambi nkayebe." 
2Kings19:20 Hashishe Yeshaya, muana wa Amoza, wakatumina Hezikiya dî ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi wamba ne, Bualu bua wewe wakundombela hua Saneheliba, mukelenge wa Ashû, meme nakukunvuila." 
2Kings19:21 Edi ndî diakamba Yehowa bualu buandi: Mukashi utshidi kamama wa mu Siona wakakulengulula, wakakuseka; muana mukashi wa Yelushalema wakakukuila mutu." 
2Kings19:22 Wewe wakafunyina nganyi bukole, wakahenda nganyi? Wakabandisha dî diebe kudi nganyi? Wakatangisha mesu ebe kulu kudi nganyi? Wakenzela Wa Tshijila mene wa mu Isalele nunku!" 
2Kings19:23 Wakafunyina Mukelenge bukole kudi ba-messager bebe bamba ne, Nakabanda ku mutu kua mikuna ne tshisumbu tshia makalu anyi tshinene, nakafika tô ne ku Lebanona; nenkoseku mitshi ya cèdre minene ne mitshi ya cyprès; nenfike tô ne ku nsubu wandi udi musokome mu metu a mamuma andi." 
2Kings19:24 Meme nakumbula mena, nakunua mai a bende, nengumishe misulu ya Ejipitu munda mua makasa anyi." 
2Kings19:25 Kuena muanze kunvua lumu munakenza bualu ebu kale, anyi? Meme nakenza bualu ebu bua wewe wakahaula misoko ya ngumbu; wakayivuisha mishiki." 
2Kings19:26 Nunku bena buloba abu bakadi ne bukole bukese, bakazakala, bakabondakana; bakadi bu mashinde a mu madimi, bakadi bu midioko, bakadi bu mashinde adi amena ha mitu ya nsubu, bakadi bu blé idi ibola diambedi kayiyi mianze kumena bimpe." 
2Kings19:27 Kadi ndi mumanye kûdi mushikame, ne kûdi uluhuka ne kûdi ubuela, ne bu mûdi ufunyina bukole kundi." 
2Kings19:28 Bualu bua wewe wakafunyina bukole kundi, ne bualu bua kudisua kuebe ku mesu kuanyi, ka meme nenteke ndobo ku diulu diebe ne lukanu ku mishiku yebe, nenkuhingishe mu nshila kuwakufuma." 
2Kings19:29 Etshi netshikale tshimanyinu kunudi: tshidimu etshi nenudie bintu bidi bidimenena mu buloba, mu tshidimu tshibidi nenudie bintu ebi muomumue kabidi; mu tshidimu tshisatu nenukune bintu, nenubihuole; nenukune mitshi ya tumuma tukese, nenudie tumuma tuai." 
2Kings19:30 Difuka dia bantu didi dishala ku tshisamba tshia Bena Yuda, nediele miji muinshi, nedikuame mamuma kulu." 
2Kings19:31 Bualu bua difuka dia bantu nediluhuke mu Yelushalema, nedihanduke ku mukuna wa Siona; lukunukunu lua Yehowa nebimane bualu ebu." 
2Kings19:32 Nunku Yehowa udi Wamba bualu bua mukelenge wa Ashû ne, Yeye kena ufika ha buihi ne musoko eu, kena welaku mukete umue, kena umueneka ku mpala kuau ne ngabu wandi, kena wela mushiki wa buloba ku musoko eu." 
2Kings19:33 Yeye neahingane anu mu nshila kuakafumeye; Yehowa udi wamba ne, Yeye kena ufika ha buihi ne musoko eu." 
2Kings19:34 Meme nensungile musoko eu bualu buanyi, ne bualu bua muntu wanyi Davidi." 
2Kings19:35 Butuku abu mene muanjelo wa Yehowa wakaya munkatshi mua tshitudilu tshia Bena Ashû, wakashiha bantu binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne bitanu; hakabika bantu ne dinda dionso, bakasangana bitalu bia bantu bamane kufua bonso." 
2Kings19:36 Nunku Saneheliba, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakumuka, wakahingana, wakashikama ku Ninewe." 
2Kings19:37 Hakadiye utendelela nzambi wandi Niseloka mu nsubu wandi, Adelameleke ne Shalese bakamushiha ne muele wa nvita; bakanyemena mu buloba bua Alalata. Esâ-hadona, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings20:1 Mu matuku au disama dikole diakakuata Hezikiya, diakamutonda; Yeshaya muprofete, muana wa Amoza, wakalua kudiye, wakamuambila ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Ulongolole nsubu webe, bualu bua wewe neufue, kuena wikala ne muoyo." 
2Kings20:2 Hashishe yeye wakakudimuna mpala wandi ku tshimanu tshia nsubu, wakatendelela Yehowa, wakamba ne," 
2Kings20:3 Yehowa, ndi nkusengelela ne, Uvuluke bu munakuenda ku mpala kuebe mu bushuwa ne mutshima mutoke, nakuenza malu mimpe ku mesu kuebe. Hezikiya wakatamba kudila." 
2Kings20:4 Nunku diambedi Yeshaya kayi muanze kumuka ku tshiendedi, dî dia Yehowa diakalua kudiye ne," 
2Kings20:5 Walukile, Wambile Hezikiya, mukelenge wa bantu banyi, ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Davidi tatu webe, udi wamba ne, Nakunvua kulomba kuebe ne nakutangila binsonshi biebe, nenkuondahe; hahita matuku asatu, wewe neubuele mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings20:6 Nenkumbashe matuku ebe tô bidimu dikumi ne bitanu; nenkusungile ne musoko eu mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Ashû, nensungile musoko eu bualu buanyi ne bua muntu wanyi Davidi." 
2Kings20:7 Yeshaya wakamba ne, Wenze tshiata tshia mamuma a nfigi, batshiteke ha tshiuja, bua yeye asangale." 
2Kings20:8 Hezikiya wakebesha Yeshaya ne, Nempete tshimanyinu kai bua ne Yehowa neangondahe, ne nembuele mu nsubu wa Yehowa hahita matuku asatu?" 
2Kings20:9 Yeshaya wakamuambila ne, Etshi ntshimanyinu tshia Yehowa kudi bua kukutuisha ne, Yehowa nênze bualu ebu buakuambeye: mundidimbi neuye ku mpala biendedi dikumi, anyi neuhingane biendedi dikumi?" 
2Kings20:10 Hezikiya wakamba ne, Mbualu bukese bua mundidimbi uye ku mpala biendedi dikumi; mbimpe mundidimbi uhingane biendedi dikumi." 
2Kings20:11 Yeshaya muprofete wakadila kudi Yehowa, yeye wakahingisha mundidimbi wakamana kuhueka ku tshibandilu tshia diba tshia Ahaza ku nyima biendedi dikumi." 
2Kings20:12 Ku tshikondo atshi Melodaka-baladana, muana wa Baladana, mukelenge wa Babulona, wakatumina Hezikiya mikanda ne bintu, bualu bua yeye wakunvua lumu ne, Hezikiya wakadi ne disama." 
2Kings20:13 Hezikiya wakunvua mei a bantu aba, wakabalesha bintu bionso bia mu bibutshilu biandi, bintu bia argent ne bia or ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne manyi a mushinga mukole ne nsubu wa bintu biandi bia nvita ne bintu bionso biakadiye nʼabi; Hezikiya kakabenga bua kubalesha bintu bionso bia mu nsubu wandi ne mu bukelenge buandi." 
2Kings20:14 Hashishe Yeshaya muprofete wakafika kudi Hezikiya mukelenge, wakamuebesha ne, Bantu aba bakuamba tshinyi? Bobo bakafuma kudi kunyi? Hezikiya wakamuambila ne, Bakafuma ku buloba budi kule, ku Babulona mene." 
2Kings20:15 Yeye wakamuebesha ne, Bakatangila bintu kai mu nsubu webe? Hezikiya wakamuambila ne, Bakatangila bintu bionso bia mu nsubu wanyi; kakuena tshintu tshimue tshia mu bintu bianyi tshinakahanga kubalesha." 
2Kings20:16 Yeshaya wakambila Hezikiya ne, Unvue biebe dî dia Yehowa." 
2Kings20:17 Mu matuku alualua ku nyima bintu bionso bidi mu nsubu webe ne bintu bionso biakabutshila batatuʼebe mu musoko eu, nebiye mu Babulona. Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Nansha tshintu tshimue netshishale." 
2Kings20:18 Nebayeku ne bana bebe ba balume baudi ulela; nebikale bantu batungula mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa Babulona. 
2Kings20:19 Hashishe Hezikiya wakambila Yeshaya ne, Dî dia Yehowa diwakungambila ndimpe. Wakamba kabidi ne, Kakuena bualu, bikalaku ditalala kakuyi ditshina mu matuku andi nshala ne muoyo." 
2Kings20:20 Bienzedi bia Hezikiya bikuabo ne bukole buandi buonso ne bu muakumbuleye dina dinene ne mitubu bia kutuma mai munda mua musoko, kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings20:21 Hezikiya wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi; Manashe, muanʼandi mulume, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings21:1 Manashe wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi atanu ne bitanu. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Hefesiba. 
2Kings21:2 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa, wakalonda malu a bundu a bantu ba mu bisamba abi biakihatabo kudi Yehowa ku mesu kua Bena Isalele." 
2Kings21:3 Wakasa bitendelelu bia ku mikuna biakashimbula Hezikiya, tatu wandi; wakashila Bâla ne Bashela tshioshelu bu muakenza Ahaba, mukelenge wa Isalele; wakatendelela bintu bionso bia mu diulu, wakabikuatshila mudimu." 
2Kings21:4 Wakasa bioshelu bikuabo mu nsubu wa Yehowa wakamba Yehowa ne, Meme nenjadike dina dianyi mu Yelushalema." 
2Kings21:5 Yeye wakashila bintu bionso bia mu diulu bioshelu mu biendedi bibidi bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings21:6 Yeye kabidi wakahitshisha muanʼandi wa balume mu kahia, wakatempa mbuku; wakadisunguila bena muhongo ne bena buloshi; wakenza malu mabi a bungi ku mesu kua Yehowa bua kumufuisha nʼau tshiji." 
2Kings21:7 Wakateka luhingu lua Bashela luakasongeye mu nsubu wa Yehowa, mu nsubu mene wakambila Yehowa Davidi ne muanʼandi Solomo ne, Nenjadike dina dianyi mu nsubu eu ne mu Yelushalema unakasungula munkatshi mua bisamba bia Bena Isalele tshiendelele;" 
2Kings21:8 tshiena ngendakasha makasa a Bena Isalele ku buloba ebu bunakaha bankambua babo, biatumikilabo mei onso anakabambila ne mikenji yonso inakabelela mukana mua muntu wanyi Mose." 
2Kings21:9 Kadi bobo kabakangunvuila; Manashe wakabenzesha malu mabi akahita a bisamba biakabutula Yehowa ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bubi. 
2Kings21:10 Yehowa wakambila dî mukana mua bantu bandi baprofete ne," 
2Kings21:11 Bualu bua Manashe, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakuenza malu â onso a bundu, wakutamba Bena Amole kuenza malu mabi, wakutamba bonso bakadi ku mpala kuandi kuenza malu mabi, wakuenzesha Bena Yuda kabidi malu mabi ne mpingu yandi;" 
2Kings21:12 nunku Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi wamba ne, Nentume malu mabi kudi Bena Yelushalema ne Bena Yuda adi ahatshisha matshu a bantu bonso badi baunvua." 
2Kings21:13 Nengolole muonshi wa Samalea ha mutu ha Yelushalema, ne luidi lunakateka kudi nsubu wa Ahaba; nenkuhule Yelushalema bu mudi muntu ukuhula dilonga, udi udikuhula, udi udiandamuna." 
2Kings21:14 Nengumushe difuka dia buhianyi buanyi didi dishale, nendifile mu bianza bia bantu badi nʼadi lukuna; bobo nebalue bambudibue ne bahaudibue kudi bena lukuna bonso;" 
2Kings21:15 bualu bua bobo bakuenza malu mabi ku mesu kuanyi, bakunfuisha tshiji ku difuku dinakafuma ne bankambua babo mu Ejipitu tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Kings21:16 Manashe wakamatshisha mashi a bantu bakadi kabayi ne bilumbu hanshi, tô ne hakûsheye Yelushalema tente; wakenza malu au ha mutu ha malu mabi makuabo akenzeye ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
2Kings21:17 Bienzedi bia Manashe bikuabo ne malu onso akenzeye ne bubi buandi buakenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukandu wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings21:18 Manashe wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu tshibunda tshiandi tshiakadi hehi ne nsubu wandi, mu tshibunda tshia Uza mene. Amona, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings21:19 Amona wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu bibidi. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Meshulemete, muana mukashi wa Halusa wa mu Yoteba." 
2Kings21:20 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Manashe, tatu wandi." 
2Kings21:21 Wakenda mu nshila yonso ya tatu wandi: wakakuatshila mpingu yakasonga tatu wandi mudimu, wakayitendelela." 
2Kings21:22 Wakabenga Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua bandi; kakenda mu nshila wa Yehowa nansha." 
2Kings21:23 Bantu bandi bakelela Amona tshifufu, bakashiha mukelenge mu nsubu wandi." 
2Kings21:24 Kadi bantu bonso ba mu buloba bakashiha bantu bonso bakelela mukelenge Amona tshifufu; bena buloba aba bakasungula Yoshiya, muana wandi, mukelenge mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings21:25 Bienzedi bia Amona bikuabo biakenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings21:26 Bakamujika mu lukita luandi lua mu tshibunda tshia Uza; Yoshiya, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings22:1 Yoshiya wakadi ne bidimu muanda mukulu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi asatu ne tshimue. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Yedida, muana wa Adaya wa mu Bosakata." 
2Kings22:2 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, wakenda mu nshila yonso ya Davidi, nkambua wandi; kakasesuka ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
2Kings22:3 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge bua mukelenge Yoshiya, mukelenge wakatuma Shafana, muana wa Asalaya, muana wa Meshulama secrétaire mu nsubu wa Yehowa wamba ne," 
2Kings22:4 Ya biebe kudi Hilekiya, muakuidi munene, bua yeye a bale argent yakafilabo mu nsubu wa Yehowa, yakasangisha balami ba ku mbelu kudi bantu;" 
2Kings22:5 bayifile mu bianza bia badi ku mutu kua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bobo bayifile mu bianza bia bena mudimu badi balongolola miaba minya nguke mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings22:6 Bayifile kudi bena mabaya ne bibaki ba nsubu ne bahandi ba mabue, ne bua kusumba nʼai mabaya ne mabue masonga a kulongolola nʼau nsubu." 
2Kings22:7 Kadi kababadi nʼabo argent yakafilabo mu bianza biabo, bualu bua bobo badi beyemenyibue." 
2Kings22:8 Hilekiya muakuidi munene wakambila Shafana secrétaire ne, Nakusangana mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose mu nsubu wa Yehowa. Hilekiya wakafila mukanda mu bianza bia Shafana; yeye wakaubala." 
2Kings22:9 Shafana secrétaire wakahingana kudi mukelenge, wakalua ne dî kudi mukelenge ne, Bantu bebe bakangata argent yakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, bakayifila mu bianza bia badi ku mutu kua bena mudimu mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Kings22:10 Shafana secrétaire wakambila mukelenge ne, Hilekiya, muakuidi munene, wakumpesha mukanda. Shafana wakaubala ku mpala kua mukelenge." 
2Kings22:11 Hashishe, hakunvua mukelenge mei a mu mukandu wa mikenji, yeye wakadihanda bilulu biandi." 
2Kings22:12 Mukelenge wakambila Hilekiya, muakuidi munene, ne Ahikama, muana wa Shafana, ne Akabo, muana wa Mikaya, ne Shafana secrétaire ne Asaya, muena mudimu wa mukelenge, ne," 
2Kings22:13 Yai bienu, nutuebeshile ne Bena Yuda bonso Yehowa bua malu onso adi mafunda mu mukanda wakasanganabo; bualu bua Yehowa wakakuatshila tshiji tshikole bualu bua bankambua betu kabakatumikila mei adi mu mukanda eu bua kuenzabo malu onso adi mafunda bua bualu buetu." 
2Kings22:14 Nunku Hilekiya, muakuidi munene, ne Ahikama ne Akabo ne Shafana ne Asaya bakaya kudi Huleda, muprofete mukashi, wakadi mukashi wa Shaluma, muana wa Tikewa, muana wa Hâhasa, mulami wa bilulu bia mukelenge; (yeye wakadi mushikame mu luseke luibidi lua mu Yelushalema); bakasomba nʼandi." 
2Kings22:15 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi wamba ne, Nuambile muntu wakantuma kundi ne," 
2Kings22:16 Yehowa udi wamba ne, Monai, meme nentume malu makole ku muaba eu ne kudi bena buloba abu bu mudi mei onso adi mafunda mu mukanda eu wakabala mukelenge wa Yuda." 
2Kings22:17 Bualu bua bobo bakundekela, bakuoshila nzambi mikuabo musenga wa manananshi bua kunfuishabo tshiji ku bienzedi bia bianza biabo; nunku tshiji tshianyi netshikale, katshiena tshijima ku muaba eu nansha." 
2Kings22:18 Kadi nuambile mukelenge wa Yuda wakanutuma bua nuenu kuebesha Yehowa ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi wamba ne, Bualu bua mei awakunvua," 
2Kings22:19 wewe wakalekesha mutshima webe, wakadihuekesha ku mpala kua Yehowa; hawakunvua mei anakamba bua muaba eu ne bua bena muaba eu bua bobo balue bu bantu badi bedibue mulau ne badi babutudibue, wewe wakadihanda bilulu biebe, wakadila ku mpala kuanyi; nunku Yehowa udi wamba ne, Nakukunvuila." 
2Kings22:20 Nunku nenkusangishe ne bankambua bebe, wewe neubuele mu lukita luebe talalâ; mesu ebe kaena atangila malu mabi onso andi ngenzela muaba eu. Bakamanyisha mukelenge mei au." 
2Kings23:1 Mukelenge wakatuma dî bua bakulu bonso ba mu Yuda ne Yelushalema badisangishe kudiye.
