2Kings23:2 Mukelenge wakabuela mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bantu bonso ba mu Yuda ne bonso ba mu Yelushalema bakadi nʼandi, ne bakuidi ne baprofete ne bantu bonso, ne bakese ne banene; yeye wakababadila mei onso a mu mukanda wa tshihungidi wakasanganabo mu nsubu wa Yehowa mu matshu abo." 
2Kings23:3 Mukelenge wakimana hehi ne dikunshi dia mu nsubu, wakahunga tshihungidi ku mpala kua Yehowa bua kuendeye ku mpala kua Yehowa ne bua kutumikila mikenji yandi ne mei andi ne mikandu yandi ne mutshima wandi wonso ne muoyo wandi wonso, ne hua kuenzeye mei onso a tshihungidi akadi mafunda mu mukanda eu; bantu bonso bakajadika tshihungidi." 
2Kings23:4 Mukelenge wakela dî kudi Hilekiya, muakuidi munene, ne kudi bakuidi ba mu mulongo muibidi ne kudi balami ba nsubu bua bobo bumushe malonga onso a Bâla ne a Bashela ne a kutendelela nʼau misumba yonso ya mu diulu mu nsubu wa Yehowa; wakayosha ku mpenge kua Yelushalema mu madimi a ku Kidelona; bakaya ne butue buabi ku Betele." 
2Kings23:5 Wakumusha bakuidi batendeledi ba mpingu, bakasungula bakelenge ba Yuda bua kuoshabo musenga wa manananshi mu bitendelelu bia ku mikuna bia mu misoko ya Yuda ne ku miaba yakanyungulula Yelushalema; wakumusha bakuidi bakadi boshela Bâla ne diba ne ngondo ne mitoto ne misumba yonso ya mu diulu manananshi." 
2Kings23:6 Wakumusha luhingu lua Ashela mu nsubu wa Yehowa, wakaya nʼalu ku mpenge ya Yelushalema ku kasulu ka Kidelona, wakaluosha ku kasulu ka Kidelona, wakalubutula bu luhuishi, wakela luhuishi ha nkita ya bantu ba tshianana." 
2Kings23:7 Wakashimbula nsubu ya bena Sodoma yakadi ha buihi ne nsubu wa Yehowa kuakadi bakashi bakuma bilulu bia Bashela. 
2Kings23:8 Wakumusha bakuidi bonso mu misoko yonso ya mu Yuda, wakanyanga bitendelelu biakadi bakuidi boshahu musenga wa manananshi ku Geba tô ne ku Bê-sheba; wakashimbula bitendelelu biakadi ku tshibuelelu tshia ku tshibi tshia Yoshua, mukelenge wa musoko, biakadi ku tshianza tshia bakashi tshia ku tshibi tshia musoko." 
2Kings23:9 Kadi bakuidi ba ku bitendelelu abi kabakalua ku tshioshelu tshia Yehowa tshia mu Yelushalema; bakadia bidia biakadi kabiyi ne luevene munkatshi mua bana habo. 
2Kings23:10 Wakanyanga Tofete wakadi mu tshibanda tshia bana ba Hinoma, bua muntu kahitshishi muanʼandi wa balume anyi muanʼandi wa bakashi mu kahia ka Moleke." 
2Kings23:11 Wakumusha tubalu tuakajidila bakelenge ba Yuda kudi diba, tuakadi ku tshibuelelu tshia nsubu wa Yehowa, hehi ne nsubu wa Natana-meleke, mulami wa nsubu, wakadi mu luhangu lua nsubu; wakosha makalu a diba mu kahia." 
2Kings23:12 Mukelenge wakashimbula bioshelu biakadi ku mutu kua nsubu wa Ahaza, biakenza bakelenge ba Yuda; ne bioshelu biakenza Manashe mu biendedi bibidi bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa; wakaubutula, wakela lufuishi luabi mu kasulu ka Kidelona." 
2Kings23:13 Mukelenge wakanyanga bitendelelu bia ku mikuna biakadi ku mpala kua Yelushalema, biakadi ku tshianza tshia balume tshia ku mukuna wa dibutuka wakashila mukelenge Solomo Bashatolete, nzambi wa bundu wa Bena Sidona, ne wa Kemoshe, nzambi wa bundu wa Bena Moaba, ne wa Milekoma, nzambi wa bundu wa Bena Amona." 
2Kings23:14 Wakambula makunshi ne wakashimbula mpingu bia Bashela; wakanyanga miaba ei ne mifuba ya bantu bafue. 
2Kings23:15 Wakashimbula kabidi tshioshelu tshiakadi ku Betele ne tshitendelelu tshiakenza Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, wakenzesha Bena Isalele malu mabi; wakosha tshitendelelu, wakatshibutula bu luhuishi, wakosha mpingu ya Bashela mu kahia." 
2Kings23:16 Hakatshunguluka Yoshiya, yeye wakatangila nkita yakadi ku mikuna; wakatuma bantu, bakangata mifuba yakadi mu nkita, bakayosha ha tshioshelu, wakatshinyanga bu mu dî dia Yehowa diakamba muntu wa Nzambi wakadi wamba ne, Malu â alualua." 
2Kings23:17 Hashishe wakebesha ne, Atshi ntshivulukidi tshia nganyi tshindi ntangila? Bena musoko bakamuambila ne, Alu ndukita lua muntu wa Nzambi wakafuma mu Yuda, wakamba malu awakenzela tshioshelu etshi tshia mu Betele." 
2Kings23:18 Yeye wakamba ne, Bamulekele; muntu kumushi mifuba yandi nansha. Nunku bakalekela mifuba yandi ne mifuba ya muprofete wakafuma ku Samalea." 
2Kings23:19 Yoshiya wakumusha nsubu yonso ya bitendelelu bia ku mikuna bia mu misoko ya Samalea biakenza bakelenge ba Isalele bia kufuisha nʼabi Yehowa tshiji, wakatuenzela bu muakenzeleye bintu bia mu Betele." 
2Kings23:20 Wakashiha bakuidi ba bitendelelu abi ha bioshelu biabo, wakoshahu mifuba ya bantu; nunku wakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
2Kings23:21 Mukelenge wakelela bantu bonso mukenji ne. Nudie bidia bia kuhita kua Yehowa, Nzambi wenu, bu mudibo bafunde mu mukanda eu wa tshihungidi." 
2Kings23:22 Bulelela, kabakudia bidia bia kuhita kua Yehowa nunku ku matuku a balumbuluishi bakalumbuluila Bena Isalele nansha mu matuku onso a bakelenge ba Isalele nansha a bakelenge ba Yuda;" 
2Kings23:23 kadi bakadila Yehowa bidia bia kuhita kua Yehowa mu Yelushalema mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge bua Yoshiya. 
2Kings23:24 Yoshiya wakumusha kabidi bena mbuku ne bena muhongo ne mpingu yonso ne malu a bundu onso biakadi mu Yuda ne mu Yelushalema bua yeye ajadike mei onso a mikenji akadi mafunda mu mukanda wakasangana Hilekiya muakuidi mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings23:25 Kakuakadi mukelenge mukuabo ku mpala kuandi wakakudimuna mutshima wandi ne muoyo wandi ne bukole buandi kudi Yehowa bua kutumikileye mikenji yonso ya Mose bu muakenzeye; kakuakadi mukelenge mukuabo wakalonda ku nyima kuandi bu yeye. 
2Kings23:26 Kadi Yehowa kakandamuka ku bukole bua tshiji tshiandi tshikole tshiakadiye nʼatshi kudi Bena Yuda, bualu bua malu mabi onso akenza Manashe akamufuisheye nʼau tshiji." 
2Kings23:27 Yehowa wakamba ne, Nengumushe Bena Yuda kabidi ku mesu kuanyi bu munakumusha Bena Isalele, nenyenge musoko eu wa Yelushalema mene unakusungula, ne nsubu unakuamba ne, Nenjadikemu dina dianyi." 
2Kings23:28 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yoshiya ne malu onso akenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings23:29 Mu matuku andi Palô-neko, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, wakaya ku musulu wa Pelata bua kuluanganeye ne mukelenge wa Ashû; mukelenge Yoshiya wakaluhuka bua kuluanganeye nʼandi, Palô-neko wakamushiha ku Megido hakamutangileye." 
2Kings23:30 Bantu bandi bakamuambila mu dikalu diandi mufue, bumuke ku Megido, bakalua nʼandi ku Yelushalema, bakamujika mu lukita luandi. Bena buloba bakangata Yehoaza, muana wa Yoshiya, bakamuela manyi ha mutu, bakamusungula mukelenge mu muaba wa tatu wandi." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoaza wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema ngondo isatu. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Hamutula, muana mukashi wa Yelemiya wa mu Libena." 
2Kings23:32 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza bankambua bandi. 
2Kings23:33 Pâlo-neko wakamuela mu lukanu mu Libela mu buloba bua Hamata bua yeye kakokeshi mu Yelushalema; yeye wakalambuisha bena buloba milambu ya ntalanta ya argent lukama ne ntalanta wa or umue. 
2Kings23:34 Palô-neko wakasungula Eleyakima, muana wa Yoshiya, mukelenge mu muaba wa Yoshiya, tatu wandi; wakamuidika dina dikuabo ne, Yehoyakima; yeye wakumusha Yehoaza, wakamutuma mu Ejipitu, wakafuilamu." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakima wakafila argent ne or kudi Palô; kadi wakalambuisha bena buloba bu muakamba Palô; wakalambuisha muntu ne muntu bu mu bintu biakadiye nʼabi, bua kulambuleye Palô-neko." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakima wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne tshimue; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Zebida, muana mukashi wa Pedaya wa mu Luma." 
2Kings23:37 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza bankambua bandi mu malu abo onso. 
2Kings24:1 Mu matuku andi Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, wakalua, ne Yehoyakima wakalua muntu wandi bidimu bisatu, hashishe wakamutombokela." 
2Kings24:2 Yehowa wakamutumina bisumbu bia Bena Kasada ne Bena Sulia ne Bena Moaba ne Bena Amona bua kuluanganabo ne Bena Yuda ne bua kubabutula bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa diakabambileye mukana mua bantu bandi baprofete. 
2Kings24:3 Bualu ebu buakalua kudi Bena Yuda bu mukenji wa Yehowa bua kubumusha ku mesu kuandi bua malu mabi onso a Manashe akenzeye; 
2Kings24:4 ne bua mashi a bantu bakadi kabayi ne bilumbu akamatshisheye hanshi; bualu bua yeye wakûsha Yelushalema tente ne mashi a bantu bakadi kabayi ne bilumbu; nunku Yehowa wakabenga bua kubabuikidila mibi yabo. 
2Kings24:5 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yehoyakima ne malu onso akenzeye kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Yuda, anyi?" 
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakima wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi; Yehoyakina, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Kings24:7 Mukelenge wa Ejipitu kakumuka mu buloba buandi kabidi, bualu bua mukelenge wa Babulona wakanyenga makelenge onso akadi malamate mukelenge wa Ejipitu ku kasulu ka Ejipitu tô ne ku musulu wa Pelata." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakina wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema ngondo isatu; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Nehusheta, muana mukashi wa Elenatana wa mu Yelushalema." 
2Kings24:9 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa, bu muakenza tatu wandi mu malu andi onso." 
2Kings24:10 Mu matuku au bantu ba Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, bakalua ku Yelushalema, bakatshintshimika musoko." 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, wakalua ku musoko hakadi bantu bandi batshintshimika musoko;" 
2Kings24:12 ne Yehoyakina, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne mamu wandi ne bantu bandi ne tuhita tuandi ne tupitene tuandi bakaluhuka, bakaya kudi mukelenge wa Babulona. Mukelenge wa Babulona wakamukuata mu tshidimu tshia muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge buandi." 
2Kings24:13 Wakatuala bintu bimpe bionso bia mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge; wakakosa bintu bia or bionso bituha bituha biakenza Solomo, mukelenge wa Isalele, mu ntempelo wa Yehowa, bu muakamba Yehowa." 
2Kings24:14 Wakaya ne Bena Yelushalema bonso ne baminyampala bonso ne bena bukitu banso ne bena mudimu bonso ne batudi ba biamu bu binunu dikumi bia bantu; anu bantu bakatamba buhele bakashala mu buloba. 
2Kings24:15 Bakaya ne Yehoyakina ku Babulona; ne mamu wa mukelenge ne bakashi ba mukelenge ne tupitene tuandi ne bantu bandi banene bakaya ne buonso buabo ba mu Yelushalema ku Babulona mu buhika. 
2Kings24:16 Mukelenge wa Babulona wakaya ne bena bukitu bonso bu binunu muanda mutekete ku Babulona mu buhika, ne bena mudimu ne hatudi ba biamu tshinunu ne bantu bonso bakadi ne bukole bua kuluangana mata." 
2Kings24:17 Mukelenge wa Babulona wakasungula Matanaya, muanʼabo ne tatu wa Yehoyakina, mukelenge mu muaba wandi, wakamuidika dina ne, Sedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Sedekiya wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne tshimue hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne tshimue; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Hamutala, muana mukashi wa Yelemiya wa mu Libena." 
2Kings24:19 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Yehoyakima mu malu andi onso. 
2Kings24:20 Tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakakumbana kudi Bena Yelushalema ne kudi Bena Yuda tô ne hakumusheye bonso ku mesu kuandi. Sedekiya wakatombokela mukelenge wa Babulona. 
2Kings25:1 Mu tshidimu tshia tshitema tshia bukokeshi buandi ne mu ngondo wa dikumi ne difuku dia dikumi dia mu ngondo eu, Nebuka-denesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, wakalua ne masalayi andi onso ku Yelushalema, bakatshintshimika musoko; bakanyunguluka musoko ne mishiki ya buloba." 
2Kings25:2 Bakatshintshimika musoko tô ne ku tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshia bukelenge hua Sedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Mu difuku dia tshitema dia ngondo muinai tshiole tshiakatamba bukole mu musoko; nunku bena buloba kabakadi ne bia kudia. 
2Kings25:4 Hashishe bakashimbula tshituha tshia lumbu lua musoko, nunku bena nvita bonso bakanyema butuku mu nshila wa hankatshi ha ngumbu ibidi yakanyunguluka ku tshibunda tshia mukelenge; Bena Kasada bakadi banyunguluka musoko ku nseke yonso. Bakanyema mu nshila wa ku Alabâ." 
2Kings25:5 Kadi masalayi a Bena Kasada akihata mukelenge, akamuheta mu mpata ya ku Yeleko; masalayi andi onso akatangadika kudiye." 
2Kings25:6 Hashishe bakakuata mukelenge, bakaya nʼandi kudi mukelenge wa Babulona ku Libela; yeye wakamulumbuluishaku." 
2Kings25:7 Bakashiha bana balume ba Sedekiya ku mesu kuandi; hashishe bakashiha mesu a Sedekiya, bakamubuesha mu lukanu, bakaya nʼandi ku Babulona." 
2Kings25:8 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshitema tshia bukelenge bua Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, mu dituku dia muanda mutekete dia ngondo muitanu, Nebuzaladana, kapitene ka masalayi, muntu wa mukelenge wa Babulona, wakalua ku Yelushalema." 
2Kings25:9 Wakosha nsubu wa Yehowa ne nsubu wa mukelenge ne nsubu minene yonso ya mu Yelushalema mu kahia. 
2Kings25:10 Masalayi onso a Bena Kasada akadi ne kapitene ka masalayi akashimbula lumbu luakadi lunyunguluka Yelushalema. 
2Kings25:11 Bantu bakashiyabo mu musoko diambedi ne bakadi banyema ne bakadi baya kudi mukelenge wa Babulona, Nebuzaladana, kapitene ka masalayi, wakaya ne buonso buabo mu buhika." 
2Kings25:12 Kadi kapitene ka masalayi kakashiya bantu bakatamba buhele bua kulamabo mitshi ya tumuma tukese ne bua kudimabo mu buloba. 
2Kings25:13 Bena Kasada bakakosa makunshi a tshiamu tshia mitaku bituha bituha akadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bitekelu bia tshiowelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku tshinene biakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, bakaya ne tshiamu tshia mitaku tshiabi ku Babulona." 
2Kings25:14 Bakaya kabidi ne ngesu ne bikasu ne bijimishi bia minda ne nkutu ne bintu bionso bia tshiamu tshia mitaku biakenzabo nʼabi mudimu. 
2Kings25:15 Kapitene ka masalayi kakaya ne malonga a kuboya nʼau kahia ne bihanza bia or ne bintu bionso bia argent. 
2Kings25:16 Kabakamanya mua kuidikisha bujitu bua makunshi abidi ne tshiowelu tshinene ne bitekelu biatshi ne malonga onso a tshiamu tshia mitaku biakenza Solomo mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Kings25:17 Bule bua dikunshi dimue buakadi coudées dikumi ne muanda mukulu; tshibuikilu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku tshiakadi ha mutu hadi; bule bua tshibuikilu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku buakadi coudées isatu, tshiakadi tshilengeshibue ne mamuma a grenade ku nseke yonso; dikunshi dibidi diakadi muomumue." 
2Kings25:18 Kapitene ka masalayi kakakuata Selaya muakuidi munene ne Sefanya muakuidi muibidi ne balami basatu ba ku mbelu kua nsubu; 
2Kings25:19 wakumuka ku musoko, wakaya ne muntu wakadi ha mutu ha bena nvita, ne bantu batanu bakadi hamonangana ne mukelenge mpala ha mpala, ne secrétaire wa kapitene ka misumba kakuabo kakadi kasangisha bantu ba mu buloba, ne bena buloba makumi asambombo bakadibo basangana mu musoko." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaladana, kapitene ka masalayi, wakabakuata, wakaya nʼabo kudi mukelenge wa Babulona ku Libela." 
2Kings25:21 Mukelenge wa Babulona wakabashiha mu Libela mu buloba bua Hamata. Nunku bakumusha Bena Yuda mu buloba buabo, bakaya nʼabo mu buhika." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, wakasungula Gedaliya, muana wa Ahikama, muana wa Shafana, mukelenge, wakamuteka ku mutu kua Bena Yuda bakashiyeye mu buloba." 
2Kings25:23 Hakunvua tupitene tuonso ne masalayi atu onso lumu ne, Mukelenge wa Babulona wakasungula Gedaliya mukelenge wa buloba, tuakalua ne bantu batu kudi Gedaliya ku Misepa, mena atu ne, Yishemaele, muana wa Netanya, ne Yohanana, muana wa Kalea, ne Selaya, muana wa Tanehumeta, Muena Netofa, ne Yâzanya, muana wa Muena Mâka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya wakaditshiha kudibo ne kudi bantu babo ne, Kanutshinyi bantu ba Bena Kasada; nushikame mu buloba, nukuatshile mukelenge wa Babulona mudimu, hashishe malu enu neikale makane." 
2Kings25:25 Kadi mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete Yishemaele, muana wa Netanya, muana wa Elishama wa mu tshiota tshia mukelenge, wakalua ne bantu dikumi bakadi nʼandi, bakakuma Gedaliya, bakamushiha ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Kasada bakadi nʼandi ku Misepa." 
2Kings25:26 Bantu bonso, ne bakese ne banene, ne tupitene tua masalayi bakajuka, bakaya mu Ejipitu, bualu bua bakatamba kutshina Bena Kasada." 
2Kings25:27 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete tshia buhika bua Yehoyakina, mukelenge wa Yuda, mu dituku dia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete dia ngondo wa dikumi ne ibidi, mu tshidimu tshiakabanga Ewile-melodaka kukokesha mu Babulona, yeye wakabisha mutu wa Yehoyakina, mukelenge wa Yuda, mu nsubu wa lukanu;" 
2Kings25:28 wakamuambila mei mimpe, wakamushikika mu nkuasa wa butumbi ku mutu kua bakelenge bakuabo bakadiye nʼabo mu Babulona." 
2Kings25:29 Wakamuvula bilulu biakadiye muluate mu nsubu wa lukanu. Yehoyakina wakadia ku mesu kuandi matuku onso a muoyo wandi; 
2Kings25:30 mukelenge wakamuha bintu biandi bia buatshia-buatshia matuku onso a muoyo wandi. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adama, Shete, Enosha," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenana, Mahalalele, Yelede," 
1Chronicles1:3 Hanoka, Metushela, Lameke," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Sheme, Hama, Yefeta." 
1Chronicles1:5 Bana balume ba Yefeta: Gomê ne Magoga ne Madai ne Yawana ne Tubala ne Mesheke ne Tilasa. 
1Chronicles1:6 Bana balume ba Gomê: Ashakenaza ne Difata ne Togâma. 
1Chronicles1:7 Bana balume ba Yawana: Elisha ne Tâshighi ne Bena Kiti ne Lodanima. 
1Chronicles1:8 Bana balume ba Hama: Kusha ne Miselayima ne Puta ne Kanâna. 
1Chronicles1:9 Bana balume ba Kusha: Seba ne Hawila ne Sabeta ne Lâma ne Sabeteka. Bana balume ba Lâma: Sheba ne Dedana. 
1Chronicles1:10 Kusha wakalela Nimeloda, wakabanga kuikala muntu mukole mu buloba." 
1Chronicles1:11 Miselayima wakalela Ludima ne Anamima ne Lehabima ne Nafetuhima 
1Chronicles1:12 ne Patalusima ne Kasaluhima (kuakafuma Bena Peleshete) ne Kafetolima. 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanâna wakalela Sidona, muanʼa bute wandi, ne Hete" 
1Chronicles1:14 ne Bena Yebuse ne Bena Amole ne Bena Gîgashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Âka ne Bena Sina 
1Chronicles1:16 ne Bena Âwada ne Bena Semâ ne Bena Hamata. 
1Chronicles1:17 Bana balume ba Sheme: Elama ne Ashû ne Apakashada ne Luda ne Alama ne Uza ne Hula ne Getê ne Mesheke. 
1Chronicles1:18 Apakashada wakalela Shela; ne Shela wakalela Ebê. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebe wakalela bana balume babidi; dina dia mukuabo Pelege; mu matuku andi bakabanyangana buloba; dina dia muanʼabo mulume diakadi Yoketana. 
1Chronicles1:20 Yoketana wakalela Alamodada ne Shelefe ne Hasâ-maweta ne Yela 
1Chronicles1:21 ne Hadolama ne Uzala ne Dikela 
1Chronicles1:22 ne Ebala ne Abimaele ne Sheba 
1Chronicles1:23 ne Ofî ne Hawila ne Yobaba. Aba bonso mbana balume ba Yoketana. 
1Chronicles1:24 Sheme, Apakashada, Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebê, Pelege, Leu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Seluga, Nahô, Tela," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abalama (udi Abalahama mene). 
1Chronicles1:28 Bana balume ba Abalahama: Isaka ne Yishemaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Etu ntukanunuina tuabo: muanʼa bute wa Yishemaele wakadi Nebayota; hashishe Kedâ ne Adabele ne Mibesama," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishema ne Duma, Masa, Hadada ne Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yetû, Nafisha ne Kedema. Aba mbana balume ba Yishemaele." 
1Chronicles1:32 Bana balume ba Ketula, mukashi muhika mubakibue kudi Abalahama: yeye wakalela Zimelana ne Yokeshana ne Medana ne Midiyana ne Ishebaka ne Shua. Bana balume ba Yokeshana: Sheba ne Dedana." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bana balume ba Midiyana: Efa ne Efê ne Hanoka ne Abida ne Eleda. Aba bonso bakadi bana balume ba Ketula. 
1Chronicles1:34 Abalahama wakalela Isaka. Bana balume ba Isaka: Esau ne Isalele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bana balume ba Esau: Elifaza ne Luele ne Yeusha ne Yalama, ne Kola." 
1Chronicles1:36 Bana balume ba Elifaza: Temana ne Omâ, Sefi ne Gatama, Kenaza ne Timena ne Amaleka." 
1Chronicles1:37 Bana balume ba Luele: Nahata, Zela, Shama ne Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Bana balume ba Sei: Lotana ne Shobala ne Sibiona ne Ana ne Dishona ne Ezê ne Dishana. 
1Chronicles1:39 Bana balume ba Lotana: Holi ne Homama; Timena wakadi muanʼabo mukashi ne Lotana. 
1Chronicles1:40 Bana balume ba Shobala: Abana ne Manahata ne Ebala ne Shefi ne Onama. Bana balume ba Sibiona: Aya ne Ana. 
1Chronicles1:41 Bana balume ba Ana: Dishona. Bana balume ba Dishona: Hamalana ne Eshebana ne Yitelana ne Kelana. 
1Chronicles1:42 Bana balume ba Ezê: Bilehana ne Zawana ne Yakana. Bana balume ba Dishana: Usa ne Alana. 
1Chronicles1:43 Aba mbakelenge bakakokesha mu buloba bua Edome diambedi mukelenge kayi muanze kukokesha Bena Isalele: Bela, muana mulume wa Beô; dina dia musoko wandi diakadi Dinehaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela wakafua ne Yobaba, muana mulume wa Zela wa mu Bosela, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobaba wakafua ne Hushama, wa mu buloba bua Bena Temana, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushama wakafua ne Hadada, muana mulume wa Bedada, wakashiha Midiyana mu buloba bua Moaba, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi; dina dia musoko wandi diakadi Awita." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadada wakafua ne Samala wa mu Maseleka wakakokesha mu muaba wandi. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samala wakafua ne Shaula wa mu Lehobota hehi ne musulu wa Pelata wakakokesha mu muaba wandi. 
1Chronicles1:49 Shaula wakafua ne Bâla-hanana, muana mulume wa Akabo, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
1Chronicles1:50 Bâla-hanana wakafua ne Hadada wakakokesha mu muaba wandi; dina dia musoko wandi diakadi Pai; dina dia mukashi wandi diakadi Mehetabela, muana wa bakashi wa Mateledi, muana wa bakashi wa Me-zahaba." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadada wakafua biandi. Tulala tua mu Edome tuakadi nunku: kalala Timena, kalala Alia, kalala Yetete," 
1Chronicles1:52 kalala Oholibama, kalala Ela, kalala Pinona," 
1Chronicles1:53 kalala Kenaza, kalala Temana, kalala Mi-bezâ," 
1Chronicles1:54 kalala Magadiele, kalala Hama. Etu tuakadi tulala tua mu Edome." 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba mbana balume ba Isalele: Lubena, Shimeona, Lewi, ne Yuda, Yisakâ ne Zebuluna," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dana, Yosefe ne Benyamina, Nafatale, Gada ne Ashê." 
1Chronicles2:3 Bana ba balume ba Yuda: Ele ne Ônana ne Shela: muana mukashi wa Shua, Muena Kanâna, wakamulelela aba basatu. Ele, muanʼa bute wa Yuda, wakadi muntu mubi ku mesu kua Yehowa; yeye wakamushiha." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamâ, mukashi wa muanʼandi, wakamulelela Pelese ne Zela. Bana ba balume ba Yuda bonso bakadi batanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Bana ba balume ba Pelese: Heselona ne Hamula. 
1Chronicles2:6 Bana ba balume ba Zela: Zimeli ne Etana ne Hemana ne Kalakola ne Dala; buonso buabo batanu. 
1Chronicles2:7 Bana ba balume ba Kâmi; Akâ, mutatshi wa Isalele, wakenza bualu bubi ne tshintu tshia tshijila." 
1Chronicles2:8 Bana ba balume ba Etana: Azâya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Bana ba balume ba Heselona bakaleleye bakadi Yelamele ne Lama ne Kelubai. 
1Chronicles2:10 Lama wakalela Aminadaba ne Aminadaba wakalela Nashona, muntu munene wa munkatshi mua Bena Yuda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashona wakalela Salama ne Salama wakalela Boaza; 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaza wakalela Obeda, ne Obeda wakalela Yishai;" 
1Chronicles2:13 Yishai wakalela muanʼa bute wandi Eliaba ne Abinadaba muana muibidi ne Shimea muana muisatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanele muana muinai ne Ladai muana muitanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 Osema muana muisambombo ne Davidi muana wa muanda mutekete; 
1Chronicles2:16 bana babo ba bakashi bakadi Seluya ne Abigayila. Bana ba balume ba Seluya bakadi Abishai ne Yoaba ne Asahele, bana basatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayila wakalela Amasa; tatu wa Amasa wakadi Yete, Muena Yishemaele." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaleba, muana wa balume wa Heselona, wakalela bana ne mukashi wandi Azuba ne mukashi wandi Yeliota; bana bandi ba balume bakadi Yeshê ne Shobaba ne Âdona." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba wakafua, ne Kaleba wakabaka Efelata, wakamulelela Hû." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hû wakalela Uli ne Uli wakalela Bezalele. 
1Chronicles2:21 Hashishe Heselona wakaya kudi muana mukashi wa Maki, tatu wa Gilada, wakamuangata bu mukashi wandi hakadiye ne bidimu makumi asambombo; yeye wakamulelela Seguba." 
1Chronicles2:22 Seguba wakalela Yaî, wakadi ne misoko makumi abidi ne isatu mu buloba bua Gilada." 
1Chronicles2:23 Geshû ne Alama bakanyenga misoko ya bena Yai ne Kenata ne misoko yai yonso bu misoko makumi asambombo. Aba bonso bakadi bana ba balume ba Maki, tatu wa Gilada." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hakafua Heselona mu Kaleba-efalata, hashishe Abiya, mukashi wa Heselona, wakamulelela Ashehû, tatu wa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bana ba balume ba Yelamele, muanʼa bute wa Heselona, bakadi Lama, muanʼa bute wandi, ne Buna ne Olena ne Ozema ne Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yelamele wakadi ne mukashi mukuabo, dina diandi Atala; yeye wakadi mamu wa Onama." 
1Chronicles2:27 Bana ba balume ba Lama, muanʼa bute wa Yelamele, bakadi Mâsa ne Yamina ne Ekê." 
1Chronicles2:28 Bana ba balume ba Onama bakadi Shamai ne Yada. Bana ba balume ba Shamai: Nadaba ne Abishû. 
1Chronicles2:29 Dina dia mukashi wa Abishû diakadi Abihayila; yeye wakamulelela Abana ne Moliya. 
1Chronicles2:30 Bana ba balume ba Nadaba: Selede ne Apaima; kadi Selede wakafua kayi ne bana ba balume. 
1Chronicles2:31 Bana ba balume ba Apaima: Yishi. Bana ba balume ba Yishi: Sheshana. Bana ba balume ba Sheshana: Ahalai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Bana ba balume ba Yada, muanʼabo wa balume ne Shamai: Yete ne Yonatana; Yete wakafua kayi ne bana ba balume." 
1Chronicles2:33 Bana ba balume ba Yonatana: Pelete ne Zaza. Aba mbana ba balume ba Yelamele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshana kakadi ne bana ba balume, anu bana ba bakashi. Sheshana wakadi ne muena mudimu, Muena Ejipitu, dina diandi Yaha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshana wakafila muanʼandi mukashi, kudi Yaha, muena mudimu wandi, bu mukashi wandi; yeye wakamulelela Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai wakalela Natana ne Natana wakalela Zabada," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabada wakalela Efelala, ne Efelala wakalela Obeda," 
1Chronicles2:38 ne Obeda wakalela Yehu, ne Yehu wakalela Azâya," 
1Chronicles2:39 ne Azâya wakalela Helese, ne Helese wakalela Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 ne Eleasa wakalela Sisemai, ne Sisemai wakalela Shaluma," 
1Chronicles2:41 ne Shaluma wakalela Yakameya, ne Yakameya wakalela Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Bana ba, balume ba Kaleba, muanʼabo wa balume ne Yelamele, bakadi Mesha, muanʼa bute wandi tatu wa Zifa; ne bana ba balume ba Malesha: Hebelone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bana ba balume ba Hebelone: Kola ne Tapua ne Lekeme ne Shema. 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema wakalela Lahama, tatu wa Yôkeama; Lekeme wakalela Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Muana wa balume wa Shamai wakadi Maona; Maona wakadi tatu wa Bete-sû. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa, mukashi muhika mubakibue kudi Kaleba, wakamulelela Halana ne Mosa ne Gazeza; Halana wakalela Gazeza." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bana ba balume ba Yadai: Legeme ne Yotana ne Geshana ne Pelete ne Efa ne Shâfa. 
1Chronicles2:48 Mâka, munga mukashi muhika mubakibue kudi Kaleba, wakamulelela Shebê ne Tîhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Yeye wakamulelela kabidi Shâfa, tatu wa Mademana, ne Shewa tatu wa Makebena ne tatu wa Gibea; muana wa bakashi wa Kaleba wakadi Akasa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Aba mbana balume ba Kaleba, Bana ba balume ba Hû, muanʼa bute wa Efelata: Shobala, tatu wa Kîyata-yalima;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Salama, tatu wa Beteleheme, Halefe, tatu wa Bete-gadê." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobala, tatu wa Kîyata-yalima, wakadi ne bana ba balume kabidi, Haloe, tshituha tshia Bena Menuhota." 
1Chronicles2:53 Meku a Kîyata-yalima akadi Bena Yitela ne Bena Puta ne Bena Shumati ne Bena Mishete; Bena Solea ne Bena Eshetaola bakafuma kudibo. 
1Chronicles2:54 Bana ba balume ba Salama: Beteleheme ne Bena Netofa, Atalota-bete-yoaba ne tshituha tshia Bena Manahata, Bena Sola mene." 
1Chronicles2:55 Au mmeku a bafundi akashikama mu Yabesa: Bena Tila ne Bena Shimeata ne Bena Sukata. Aba mBena Kene bakafuma kudi Hamata, tatu wa ba mu nsubu wa Lekaba." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bana ba balume ba Davidi bakamulelelabo mu Hebelone: Amenona, muanʼa bute, muana wa Ahinoama, Muena Yizelele; muana muibidi Danyele, muana wa Abigayila, Muena Kâmele;" 
1Chronicles3:2 muana muisatu Abashaloma, muana wa Mâka, muana wa bakashi wa Talemai, mukelenge wa mu Geshû; muana muinai Adoniya, muana wa Hagita;" 
1Chronicles3:3 muana muitanu Shefatiya, muana wa Abitala; muana muisambombo Itelema, muana wa mukashi wandi Egela:" 
1Chronicles3:4 hakamulelela bana basambombo mu Hebelone kuakakokesheye bidimu muanda mutekete ne ngondo isambombo. Yeye wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu; 
1Chronicles3:5 bakamulelela mu Yelushalema: Shimea ne Shobaba ne Natana ne Solomo, bana banai kudi Bata-shua, muana wa bakashi wa Amiele," 
1Chronicles3:6 ne Ibeha ne Elishama ne Elifelete 
1Chronicles3:7 ne Noga ne Nefege ne Yafia 
1Chronicles3:8 ne Elishama ne Eliada ne Elifelete, buonso buabo tshitema." 
1Chronicles3:9 Aba bonso mbana balume ba Davidi ha mutu ha bana balume ba bakashi bahika babakibue kudiye; Tamâ wakadi muanʼabo mukashi. 
1Chronicles3:10 Muana wa balume wa Solomo wakadi Lehabama, Abiya wakadi muanʼandi, Asa wakadi muanʼandi, ne Yehoshafata wakadi muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yolama wakadi muanʼandi, Ahazaya wakadi muanʼandi, ne Yoasha wakadi muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amasaya wakadi muanʼandi, ne Azaya wakadi muanʼandi, ne Yotama wakadi muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahaza wakadi muanʼandi, Hezikiya wakadi muanʼandi, ne Manashe wakadi muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amona wakadi muanʼandi, ne Yoshiya wakadi muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles3:15 Bana ba balume ba Yoshiya: Yohanana muanʼa bute wandi, Yehoyakima muana muibidi, Sedekiya muana muisatu ne Shaluma muana muinai." 
1Chronicles3:16 Bana ba balume ba Yehoyakima: Yekoniya ne Sedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bana ba balume ba Yekoliya, muena lukanu: Shalatiele" 
1Chronicles3:18 ne Malekilama ne Pedaya ne Shenasâ ne Yekamiya, Hoshama ne Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Bana ba balume ba Pedaya: Zelubabela ne Shimei. Bana ba balume ba Zelubabela: Meshulama ne Hananiya; (Shelomita wakadi muanʼabo wa bakashi)," 
1Chronicles3:20 Hashuba ne Ohela ne Belekiya ne Hasadeya ne Yushaba-heseda, buonso buabo batanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Bana ba balume ba Hananiya: Pelatiya ne Yeshaya; muanʼandi wa balume Lefaya, muanʼandi wa balume Anana, muanʼandi wa balume Obadiya, muanʼandi wa balume Shekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Bana ba balume ba Shekaniya: Shemaya. Bana ba balume ba Shemaya: Hatusha ne Igala ne Baliya ne Nealiya ne Shafata, basambombo bonso." 
1Chronicles3:23 Bana ba balume ba Nealiya: Eleyehoenai ne Hizikiya ne Azalikama, basatu bonso." 
1Chronicles3:24 Bana ba balume ba Eleyehoenai: Hodawiya ne Eleyashiba ne Pelaya ne Akuba ne Yohanana ne Delaya ne Anani, muanda mutekete bonso." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bana ba balume ba Yuda: Pelese, Heselona ne Kâmi ne Hula ne Shobala." 
1Chronicles4:2 Leaya, muana wa Shobala, wakalela Yahata; Yahata wakalela Ahumai ne Lahada. Au mmeku a Bena Solea." 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba mbana ba tatu wa Etama: Yizelele ne Yishema ne Yidebasha; dina dia muanʼabo wa bakashi diakadi Haselele-poni; 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuele, tatu wa Gedô, ne Ezê, tatu wa Husha. Aba mbana ba balume ba Hû, muanʼa bute wa Efelata, tatu wa Beteleheme." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashehû, tatu wa Tekoa, wakadi ne bakashi babidi, Hela ne Nâla." 
1Chronicles4:6 Nâla wakamulelela Ahuzama ne Hefê ne Temeni ne Hâhashatali. Aba bakadi bana ba balume ba Nâla. 
1Chronicles4:7 Bana ba balume ba Hela bakadi Selete, Yisheâ ne Etenana." 
1Chronicles4:8 Hakosa wakalela Anuba ne Sobeba ne ba mu meku a Ahahele, muana wa balume wa Haluma." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabesa wakatamba bana babo mu butumbi; mamu wandi wakamuidika dina ne, Yabesa, wamba ne, Nakamulela ne kanyinganyinga." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabesa wakatendelela Nzambi wa Isalele wamba ne, Nakadi kusua bua wewe kunsankisha ne kulehesha mikalu yanyi ne bua tshianza tshiebe tshikale nʼanyi, bua wewe kundama bua tshibuedi mu malu mabi ne bua meme tshikadi ne kanyinganyinga! Nzambi wakamuha malu akalombeye." 
1Chronicles4:11 Keluba, muanʼabo wa balume ne Shuha, wakalela Mehî wakadi tatu wa Eshetona." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshetona wakalela Bete-lafa ne Pasea ne Tehina, tatu wa Inahasha. Aba mbantu ba Leka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Bana ba balume ba Kenaza; Oteniele ne Selaya. Bana ba balume ba Oteniele: Hatata. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai wakalela Ofela; ne Selaya wakalela; Yoaba, tatu wa Bena Ge-halashima; bualu bua bobo bakadi bansenda." 
1Chronicles4:15 Bana ba balume ba Kaleba, muana wa Yefune: Ilu, Ela ne Nâma; bana ba balume ba Ela: Kenaza." 
1Chronicles4:16 Bana ba balume ba Yehalelele: Zifa ne Zifaha, Tileya ne Asalele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Bana ba balume ba Ezela: Yete ne Melede ne Efê ne Yalona; mukashi wandi wakamulelela kabidi Mîyama ne Shamai ne Yisheba, tatu wa Eshetemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mukashi wandi, Muena Yuda, wakalela Yelede, tatu wa Gedô, ne Hebê, tatu wa Soko, ne Yekutiele, tatu wa Zanoa. Aba mbana ba balume ba Bitiya, muana wa bakashi wa Palo, wakabakibua kudi Melede." 
1Chronicles4:19 Bana ba balume ba mukashi wa Hodiya, muanʼabo wa bakashi ne Nahama, bakadi batatu ba Keila, Muena Gâma, ne Eshetemoa, Muena Mâka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Bana ba balume ba Shimona: Amenona ne Lina, Bene-hanana ne Tilona. Bana ba balume ba Ishi: Zoheta ne Bene-zoheta." 
1Chronicles4:21 Bana ba balume ba Shela, muana wa Yuda: Ele, tatu wa Leka, ne Lâda, tatu wa Malesha ne ba mu nsubu wa bakumi ba bilulu bia lin, ba mu nsubu wa Ashabea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 Yolama ne Bena Kozeba ne Yoasha ne Salafa wakakokesha mu buloba bua Moaba, ne Yashubi-lehema. Eku nkulondolola kua kale kale." 
1Chronicles4:23 Aba mbafumbi ba bivuadi ne bakadi bashikama mu Netaima ne Gedela; bakashikamaku ne mukelenge bua mudimu wandi. 
1Chronicles4:24 Bana ba balume ba Shimeona: Nemuele ne Yamina, Yaliba, Zela, Shaula;" 
1Chronicles4:25 Shaluma muanʼandi, Mibesama muanʼandi, Mishema muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles4:26 Bana ba balume ba Mishema: Hamuele muanʼandi, Zakû muanʼandi, Shimei muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei wakadi ne bana ba balume dikumi ne basambombo ne bana ba bakashi basambombo; kadi bana babo kabakadi ne bana ba bungi, ne bobo bonso kabakavulangana ba bungi bu muakenza bana ba Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Bobo bakashikama mu Bê-sheba ne mu Molada ne mu Hasâ-shuala 
1Chronicles4:29 ne mu Bileha ne mu Eseme ne mu Tolada 
1Chronicles4:30 ne mu Betuele ne Hôma ne mu Sikelaga," 
1Chronicles4:31 ne mu Bete-makabota ne mu Hasâsu-sima ne mu Bete-bili ne mu Shâla-yima. Ebi biakadi bimenga biabo tô ne ku bukokeshi bua Davidi. 
1Chronicles4:32 Misoko yabo yakadi Etama ne Ayina, Limona ne Tokene ne Ashana, misoko itanu;" 
1Chronicles4:33 ne misoko yabo yonso yakadi ha buihi ne bimenga biobimue tô ne ku Bâla. Ei yakadi miaba yabo yakashikamabo, ne bobo bakafunda kulondolola kuabo." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobaba ne Yameleke ne Yoasha, muana wa balume wa Amasaya," 
1Chronicles4:35 ne Yoele ne Yehu, muana wa balume wa Yoshibeya, muana wa balume wa Selaya, muana wa balume wa Asiele," 
1Chronicles4:36 ne Eleyehoenai ne Yâkoba ne Yeshohaya ne Asaya ne Adiele ne Yesimiele ne Benaya 
1Chronicles4:37 ne Ziza, muana wa balume wa Shifi, muana wa balume wa Alono, muana wa balume wa Yedaya, muana wa balume wa Shimeli, muana wa balume wa Shemaya;" 
1Chronicles4:38 bantu aba batuakutela menʼabo nunku bakadi bakelenge ba mu meku abo ne ba mu nsubu yabo bakatamba kuyisangana. 
1Chronicles4:39 Bakamuangalaka tô ne ku tshibuelelu tshia Gedô ku luseke lua ku esete kua tshibanda bua kukebabo mashinde a kudisha nʼau bimuna biabo. 
1Chronicles4:40 Bakasangana mashinde a bungi ne mimpe, buloba abu buakadi bunene, buakadi kabuyi ne diyoyo, buakadi talalâ; bantu bakadi bashikamaku diambedi bakadi bantu ba Hama." 
1Chronicles4:41 Badi ne mena abo mafunda nunku bakalua mu matuku a Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, bakashiha ntenta yabo ne Bena Meunima bakadi bashikamaku, bakababutula tô ne ku dituku edi, bakashikama mu miaba yabo; bualu bua bakasanganamu mashinde a kudisha nʼau bimuna biabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Bakuabo babo, bana ba balume ba Shimeona mene bu nkama itanu, bakaya ku mukuna wa Seî, bakadi ne Pelatiya ne Nealiya ne Lefaya ne Uziele, bana ba balume ba Ishi, bu tupitene tuabo." 
1Chronicles4:43 Bakashiha difuka dia Bena Amaleka bakahanduka diambedi, badi bashikamaku tô ne ku dituku edi." 
1Chronicles5:1 Bana ba balume ba Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Isalele (yeye wakadi muanʼa bute; kadi bualu bua yeye wakanyanga bulalu bua tatu wandi, bakaha bana ba balume ba Yosefe, muana wa Isalele, bintu biandi bia buanʼa bute; kulondolola kuandi kakuena bu kua buanʼa bute." 
1Chronicles5:2 Bualu bua Yuda wakatamba bana babo bukole ne mukelenge wakafuma kudiye; kadi bintu bia buanʼa bute biakadi bia Yosefe). 
1Chronicles5:3 Bana ba balume ba Lubena, muanʼa bute wa Isalele: Hanoka ne Palu, Heselona ne Kâmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Bana ba balume ba Yoele: Shemaya muanʼandi, ne Gogo muanʼandi, ne Shimei muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika muanʼandi, ne Leaya muanʼandi, ne Bâla muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles5:6 ne Bela muanʼandi; Tigelata-pilenesê wakaya nʼandi mu buhika; yeye wakadi mukelenge wa Bena Lubena. 
1Chronicles5:7 Bana babo ba mu meku abo, hakabalabo kulondolola kuabo, bakadi tulala Yiele ne Zekâya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ne Bêla, muana wa balume wa Azaza, muana wa balume wa Sheme, muana wa balume wa Yoele, wakashikama mu Aloe tô ne ku Nebo ne Bâla-meona;" 
1Chronicles5:9 ne ku esete bakamuangalaka tô ne ku tshibuelelu tshia tshihela ku musulu wa Pelata, bualu bua bimuna biabo biakavulangana mu buloba bua Gilada." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mu matuku a Shaula bobo bakaluangana ne Bena Hageli, bakabashiha; bakashikama mu ntenta yabo mu buloba buonso ku esete kua Gilada." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bana ba balume ba Gada bakashikama ha buihi nʼabo mu buloba bua Bashana ku Saleka; 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoele wakadi ha mutu habo ne Shafama wakamulonda, ne Yanai ne Shafata mu Bashana." 
1Chronicles5:13 Bana babo ba mu nsubu wa batatuʼabo: Mikaele ne Meshulama ne Sheba ne Yolai ne Yakana ne Zia ne Ebê, muanda mutekete bonso." 
1Chronicles5:14 Aba bakadi bana ba balume ba Abihayila, muana wa balume wa Huli, muana wa balume wa Yaloa, muana wa balume wa Gilada, muana wa balume wa Mikaele, muana wa balume wa Yeshishai, muana wa balume wa Yado, muana wa balume wa Buza;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, muana wa balume wa Abediele, muana wa balume wa Guni, wakadi ha mutu ha nsubu ya batatuʼabo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Bakashikama mu Gilada mu Bashana ne mu misoko yai ne mu miaba yonso ya ku matshika a Shalona tô ne ku mpenge yabo. 
1Chronicles5:17 Buonso buabo bakabadibua mu kulondolola kuabo mu matuku a Yotama, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne mu matuku a Yalobama, mukelenge wa Isalele." 
1Chronicles5:18 Bana ba balume ba Lubena ne ba Bena Gada ne ba tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe, bantu ba bukitu, bantu bakadi ne bukole bua kutuala nʼabu ngabu ne muele wa nvita, ne bua kuela nʼabu buta, ne bakadi ne dikima dia nvita, bakadi binunu makumi anai ne binai ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asambombo, bakadi bena nvita." 
1Chronicles5:19 Bobo bakaluangana ne Bena Hageli ne Yetû ne Nafisha ne Nodaba. 
1Chronicles5:20 Bakuabo bakakuatshishangana nʼabo, ne bobo ne bakadi nʼabo bakahita Bena Hageli bukole; bualu bua bobo bakadila kudi Nzambi mu nvita, ne yeye wakabunvuila, bualu bua bobo bakamueyemena." 
1Chronicles5:21 Bobo bakanyenga bimuna biabo; tumelo tuabo bu binunu makumi atanu, ne mikoko bu binunu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, ne nyama ya mpunda binunu bibidi, ne bantu binunu lukama." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ba bungi bakashihibua bualu bua nvita ei yakadi ya Nzambi. Bobo bakashikama mu miaba yabo tô ne hakayabo mu buhika. 
1Chronicles5:23 Bantu ba mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe bakashikama mu buloba; bakavulangana ku Bashana tô ne ku Bâla-hêmona ne ku Senî ne ku mukuna wa Hêmona. 
1Chronicles5:24 Aba bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo: Efê ne Ishi ne Ebele ne Azeliele ne Yelemiya ne Hodaweya ne Yadiele, bena bukitu ne ba butumbi ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Bobo bakenzela Nzambi wa batatuʼabo bibi, bakalonda malu a masandi ne nzambi ya bantu ba mu buloba abu bakashihibua kudi Nzambi ku mpala kuabo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Nzambi wa Isalele wakasonsola mutshima wa Pula, mukelenge wa Ashû, ne mutshima wa Tigelata-pilenesê, mukelenge wa Ashû, ne bobo bakaya nʼabo, Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe mene mu buhika; bakaya nʼabo tô ne ku Halaha ne Habo ne Hala ne ku musulu wa Gozana tô ne ku didiku edi." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bana ba balume ba Lewi: Gêshona, Kohata ne Melali." 
1Chronicles6:2 Bana ba balume ba Kohata; Amalama, Yisehâ ne Hebelone ne Uziele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Bana ba Amalama: Alona ne Mosê ne Miyama. Bana ba balume ba Alona: Nadaba ne Abihu ne Eleazâ ne Itamâ. 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazâ wakalela Pinehasa, Pinehasa wakalela Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 ne Abishua wakalela Buki, ne Buki wakalela Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 ne Uzi wakalela Zelaya ne Zelaya wakalela Melayota," 
1Chronicles6:7 ne Melayota wakalela Amalia, ne Amalia wakalela Ahituba," 
1Chronicles6:8 ne Ahituba wakalela Sadoka, ne Sadoka wakalela Ahimâsa," 
1Chronicles6:9 ne Ahimâsa wakalela Azaya, ne Azaya wakalela Yohanana," 
1Chronicles6:10 ne Yohanana wakalela Azaya (yeye Wakenza mudimu wa buakuidi mu nsubu wakasabo kudi Solomo mu Yelushalema)," 
1Chronicles6:11 ne Azaya wakalela Amalia, ne Amalia wakalela Ahituba," 
1Chronicles6:12 ne Ahituba wakalela Sadoka, ne Sadoka wakalela Shaluma," 
1Chronicles6:13 ne Shaluma wakalela Hilekiya, ne Hilekiya wakalela Azaya," 
1Chronicles6:14 ne Azaya wakalela Selaya, ne Selaya wakalela Yehosadaka;" 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehosadaka wakaya mu buhika hakaya Yehowa ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Yelushalema ku tshianza tshia Nebukadenesâ. 
1Chronicles6:16 Bana ba balume ba Lewi: Gêshoma ne Kohata ne Melali. 
1Chronicles6:17 Au mmena a bana ba balume ba Gêshoma: Libeni ne Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Bana ba balume ba Kohata bakadi Amalama ne Yisehâ ne Hebelone ne Uziele," 
1Chronicles6:19 Bana ba balume ba Melali: Mali ne Mushi. Au mmeku a Bena Lewi ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ya Gêshoma: Libeni muanʼandi, ne Yahata muanʼandi, ne Zima muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:21 ne Yoa muanʼandi, ne Yido muanʼandi, ne Zela muanʼandi, ne Yatelai muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bana ba balume ba Kohata: Aminadaba muanʼandi, ne Kola muanʼandi, ne Asî muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:23 ne Elekana muanʼandi, ne Ebiyasafa muanʼandi, ne Asî muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:24 ne Tahata muanʼandi, ne miele muanʼandi, ne Uziya muanʼandi, ne Shaula muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles6:25 Bana ba balume ba Elekana: Amasai ne Ahimota. 
1Chronicles6:26 Bana ba Elekana: Sofai muanʼandi, ne Nahata muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:27 ne Eliaba muanʼandi, ne Yelohama muanʼandi, ne Elekana muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles6:28 Bana ba balume ba Samuele: muanʼa bute wandi Yoele ne Abiya muana muibidi. 
1Chronicles6:29 Bana ba balume ba Melali: Mali ne Libeni muanʼandi, ne Shemei muanʼandi, ne Uza muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:30 ne Shimea muanʼandi, ne Hagiya muan andi, ne Asaya muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:31 Aba mbantu bakateka Davidi ku mutu kua bimbi ba misambu mu nsubu wa Yehowa hakikishilaku mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa. 
1Chronicles6:32 Bobo bakimba misambu mu nsubu wa kusambakena tô ne hakasa Solomo nsubu wa Yehowa mu Yelushalema; bakenza mudimu wabo bu muakadi milongo yabo. 
1Chronicles6:33 Aba mbantu bakenza mudimu au ne bana babo ba balume: Bana ba balume ba Bena Kohata: Hemana, muimbi wa misambu, muana wa Yoele, muana wa Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:34 muana wa Elekana, muana wa Yelohama, muana wa Eliele, muana wa Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 muana wa Sufa, muana wa Elekana, muana wa Mahata, muana wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 muana wa Elekana, muana wa Yoele, muana wa Azaya, muana wa Sefanya," 
1Chronicles6:37 muana wa Tahata, muana wa Asî, muana wa Ebiyasafa, muana wa Kola," 
1Chronicles6:38 muana wa Yisehâ, muana wa Kohata, muana wa Lewi, muana wa Isalele." 
1Chronicles6:39 Muanʼabo wa balume wakimana ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume, Asafa mene, muana wa Belekiya, muana wa Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 muana wa Mikaele, muana wa Bâseya, muana wa Malakiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 muana wa Eteni, muana wa Zela, muana wa Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 muana wa Etana, muana wa Zima, muana wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 muana wa Yahata, muana wa Gêshoma, muana wa Lewi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ku tshianza tshia bakashi tshia bana babo bakimana bana ba balume ba Melali: Etana, muana wa Kishi, muana wa Abedi, muana wa Maluke," 
1Chronicles6:45 muana wa Hashabeya, muana wa Amasaya, muana wa Hilekiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 muana wa Amasi, muana wa Bani, muana wa Shemê," 
1Chronicles6:47 muana wa Mali, muana wa Mushi, muana wa Melali, muana wa Lewi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Bana babo Bena Lewi bakadi ku mutu kua midimu yonso ya mu nsubu wa kusambakena wa Nzambi. 
1Chronicles6:49 Kadi Alona ne bana bandi ba balume bakafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne ku tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi ne ya midimu yonso ya mu muaba wa tshijila ne ya kubuikila nʼai mibi ya Bena Isalele bu muakadi mikenji yonso yakela Mose, muntu wa Nzambi." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aba mbana ba balume ba Alona: Eleazâ muanʼandi, ne Pinehasa muanʼandi, ne Abishua muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:51 ne Buki muanʼandi, ne Uzi muanʼandi, ne Zelaya muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:52 ne Melayota muanʼandi, ne Amalia muanʼandi, ne Ahituba muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles6:53 ne Sadoka muanʼandi, ne Ahimâsa muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Ei mmiaba yakashikamabo ku bitudilu biabo mu mikalu yabo; kudi bana ba balume ba Alona ba mu meku a Bena Kohata (bualu bua bobo bakangata tshituha tshiabo ku mpala)," 
1Chronicles6:55 bakabaha bobo Hebelone mu buloba bua Yuda ne miaba yau ya ku matshika yakadi ha buihi; 
1Chronicles6:56 kadi bakaha Kaleba, muana wa Yefune, madimi a mu tshimenga ne misoko yatshi." 
1Chronicles6:57 Bakaha bana ba balume ba Alona misoko ya kunyemena, Hebelone, Libena ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Yati ne Eshetemoa ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:58 ne Hilene ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Debî ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:59 ne Ashana ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Bete-shemeshe ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:60 ne mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina, Geba ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Alemeta ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Anatota ne miaba ya ku mpenge. Misoko yabo yonso ya meku abo onso yakadi dikumi ne isatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Hakelabo nshobo, bakaha bana ba balume bakuabo ba Kohata, ku meku abo, misoko dikumi ya mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe." 
1Chronicles6:62 Bakaha bana ba balume ba Gêshoma, ku meku abo, misoko dikumi ne isatu ya mu tshisamba tshia Yisakâ ne tshia Ashe ne tshia Nafatale ne tshia Manashe mu buloba bua Bashana." 
1Chronicles6:63 Bakayifila ku nshobo kudi bana ba balume ba Melali, ku meku abo, misoko dikumi ne ibidi mu tshisamba tshia Lubena ne tshia Gada ne tshia Zebuluna." 
1Chronicles6:64 Bena Isalele bakaha Bena Lewi misoko ei ne miaba ya ku mpenge. 
1Chronicles6:65 Bakabaha misoko ei ituakutela mena ai ku nshobo mu tshisamba tshia Yuda ne tshia Shimeona ne tshia Benyamina. 
1Chronicles6:66 Bakuabo ba mu meku a bana ba balume ba Kohata bakadi ne misoko yabo mu buloba bua Efelayima. 
1Chronicles6:67 Bakabaha misoko ya kunyemena, Shekeme wa ku mikuna ya Efelayima ne miaba ya ku mpenge; Gezê kabidi ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokemama ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Bete-holona ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:69 ne Ayalona ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Gata-limona ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:70 ne mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe, Anê ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Bilama ne miaba ya ku mpenge, kudi bakuabo ba mu meku a Bena Kohata." 
1Chronicles6:71 Bakaha bana ba balume ba Gêshoma mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe, Golana mu buloba bua Bashana ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Ashetalota ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:72 mu tshisamba tshia Yisakâ, Kedeshe ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Dabelata ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:73 ne Lamota ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Anema ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:74 ne mu tshisamba tshia Ashê, Mashala ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Abidona ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:75 ne Hukoko ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Lehoba ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ne mu tshisamba tshia Nafatale, Kedeshe mu Galela ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Hamona ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Kîyata-ayima ne miaba ya ku mpenge." 
1Chronicles6:77 Bakaha Bena Lewi bakuabo, bana ba balume ba Melali, mu tshisamba tshia Zebuluna, Limono ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Tabô ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:78 dishiya dia Yadene ku Yeleko ku esete kua Yadene, bakabaha mu tshisamba tshia Lubena, Besê mu tshihela ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Yasa ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:79 ne Kedemota ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Mefâta ne miaba ya ku mpenge;" 
1Chronicles6:80 mu tshisamba tshia Gada, Lamota mu Gilada ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Mahanayima ne miaba ya ku mpenge," 
1Chronicles6:81 ne Heshebona ne miaba ya ku mpenge, ne Yasê ne miaba ya ku mpenge." 
1Chronicles7:1 Bana ba balume ba Yisakâ: Tola ne Pua ne Yashuba ne Shimelona, banai." 
1Chronicles7:2 Bana ba balume ba Tola: Uzi ne Lefaya ne Yeliele ne Yamai ne Ibisama ne Shemuele, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ya Tola mene, bena bukitu ba dikima mu bikondo biabo; bungi buabo mu matuku a Davidi buakadi binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi ne nkama isambombo." 
1Chronicles7:3 Bana ba balume ba Uzi: Yizelaya. Bana ba balume ba Yizelaya: Mikaele ne Obadaya ne Yoele ne Yishiya, batanu; buonso buabo bakadi bakelenge." 
1Chronicles7:4 Bena nvita binunu makumi asatu ne bisambombo bakadi basangisha nʼabo mu bikondo biabo mu nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bualu bua bobo bakadi ne bakashi ba bungi ne bana ba balume ba bungi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Bana babo ba munkatshi mua meku onso a Yisakâ, bena nvita ba dikima bakabalabo mu bikondo biabo, bakadi binunu makumi muanda mukulu ne muanda mutekete." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bana ba balume ba Benyamina: Bela ne Bekê ne Yediele, basatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bana ba balume ba Bela: Ezebona ne Uzi ne Uziele ne Yelimota ne Ili, batanu; bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bena nvita ba dikima; bakaledibua mu bikondo biabo binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi ne makumi asatu ne bantu banai." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bana ba balume ba Bekê: Zemila ne Yosha ne Eliezê ne. Eleyehoenai ne Omeli ne Yelemota ne Abiya ne Anatota ne Alemeta. Aba bonso bakadi bana ba Bekê. 
1Chronicles7:9 Bakadi babadibua mu kulondolola kuabo, mu bikondo biabo, bu ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo bena nvita ba dikima bakadi binunu makumi abidi ne nkama ibidi." 
1Chronicles7:10 Bana ba balume ba Yediele: Bilehana. Bana ba balume ba Bilehana: Yeusha ne Benyamina ne Ehuda ne Kenana ne Zetana ne Tâshishi ne Ahishahâ. 
1Chronicles7:11 Aba bonso bakadi bana ba balume ba Yediele bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo bena nvita ba dikima binunu dikumi ne muanda mutekete ne nkama ibidi bakadi ne bukole bua kuluangana nvita. 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupima kabidi, ne Hupima, bana ba balume ba Ili, ne Hushima, muana wa Ahe." 
1Chronicles7:13 Bana ba balume ba Nafatale: Yasiele ne Guni ne Yesê ne Shaluma, bana ba balume ba Bileha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Bana ba balume ba Manashe: Aseliele wakamulelela mukashi, Muena Alama, muhika mubakibue kudi Manashe; yeye wakalela Maki, tatu wa Gilada." 
1Chronicles7:15 Maki wakabaka mukashi wa Hupima ne Shupima, dina dia muanʼabo wa bakashi diakadi Mâka; dina dia mukashi wandi mukuabo diakadi Selofehada; Selofehada wakalela bana ba bakashi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Mâka, mukashi wa Maki, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Peleshe; dina dia muanʼabo nʼandi diakadi Sheleshe; ne bana ba balume bandi bakadi Ulama ne Lakema." 
1Chronicles7:17 Bana ba balume ba Ulama: Bedana. Aba mbana ba balume ba Gilada, muana wa Makî, muana wa Manashe." 
1Chronicles7:18 Muanʼabo wa bakashi Hamolekete wakalela Ishehodo ne Abiezê ne Mahala. 
1Chronicles7:19 Bana ba balume ba Shemida bakadi Ahiana ne Shekeme ne Likihi ne Aniama. 
1Chronicles7:20 Bana ba balume ba Efelayima: Shutela, ne Belede muanʼandi, ne Tahata muanʼandi, ne Eleada muanʼandi, ne Tahata muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles7:21 ne Zabada muanʼandi, ne Shutela muanʼandi, ne Ezê, ne Eleada, bakadi bashihibua kudi Bena Gata bakaledibua mu buloba, bualu bua bobo bakatua bua kunyenga bimuna biabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efelayima, tatu wabo, wakasa muadi matuku a bungi, ne bana babo bakatua bua kumusambabo." 
1Chronicles7:23 Yeye wakasangila ne mukashi wandi, yeye wakimita difu, wakalela muana wa balume, wakamuidika dina ne, Belia, bualu bua makenga akakuata ba mu nsubu muandi." 
1Chronicles7:24 Muana wandi wa bakashi wakadi Shela, wakasa Bete-holona wa ku tshibanda ne wa ku mukuna, ne Uzeneshêla." 
1Chronicles7:25 Lefa wakadi muanʼandi wa balume, ne Leshefe muanʼandi, ne Tela muanʼandi, ne Tahana muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles7:26 ne Ladana muanʼandi, ne Amihuda muanʼandi, ne Eleshama muanʼandi," 
1Chronicles7:27 ne Nuna muanʼandi, ne Yoshua muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles7:28 Miaba yabo yakashikamabo yakadi Betele ne misoko yakadi ha buihi, ne Nâlana ku esete, ne Gezê ku wesete ne misoko yakadi ha buihi; Shekeme ne misoko yakadi ha buihi tô ne ku Aza ne misoko yakadi ha buihi;" 
1Chronicles7:29 ne ku mikalu ya Bena Manashe, Bete-sheana ne misoko yakadi ha buihi, ne Tânaka ne misoko yakadi ha buihi, ne Megido ne misoko yakadi ha buihi, ne Dô ne misoko yakadi ha buihi. Mu miaba ei yakashikama bana ba Yosefe, muana wa Isalele." 
1Chronicles7:30 Bana ba balume ba Ashê: Yimena ne Yishewa ne Yishewi ne Beliya, ne Sela wakadi muanʼabo wa bakashi." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bana ba balume ba Beliya: Hebe ne Malekiele, wakadi tatu wa Bîzawita." 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebê wakalela Yafeleta ne Shomê ne Hotama, ne Shua wakadi muanʼabo wa bakashi." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bana ba balume ba Yafeleta: Pasaka ne Bimehala ne Ashawata. Aba mbana ba Yafeleta. 
1Chronicles7:34 Bana ba balume ba Shemê: Ahi ne Loga ne Yehuba ne Alama. 
1Chronicles7:35 Bana ba balume ba Heleme, muanʼabo wa balume: Sofâ ne Yimena ne Sheleshe ne Amala." 
1Chronicles7:36 Bana ba balume ba Sofâ: Sua ne Hânefê ne Shuala ne Beli ne Yimela 
1Chronicles7:37 ne Bezê ne Hodo ne Shama ne Shilesha, ne Yitelana ne Bela." 
1Chronicles7:38 Bana ba balume ba Yetê: Yefune ne Pisepa ne Ala. 
1Chronicles7:39 Bana ba balume ba Ula: Ala ne Haniele ne Lisia. 
1Chronicles7:40 Aba bonso bakadi bana ba Ashê ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo, bena nvita basungula ba bukitu ne tulala tua ha mutu. Bungi buabo buakabalabo mu kulondolola kuabo bua kuluangana nvita bakadi binunu makumi abidi ne bisambombo." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamina wakalela Bela muanʼa bute wandi, ne Ashabele muana muibidi, ne Ahala muana muisatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 ne Noha muana muinai, ne Lafa muana muitanu." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela wakalela bana ba balume: Adâ ne Gela ne Abihuda 
1Chronicles8:4 ne Abishua ne Nâmana ne Ahoa 
1Chronicles8:5 ne Gela ne Shefufana ne Hulama. 
1Chronicles8:6 Aba mbana ba balume ba Ehuda; aba bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo ba Bena Geba; bakaya nʼabo mu buhika ku Manahata: 
1Chronicles8:7 Nâmana ne Ahiya ne Gela bakaya nʼabo mu buhika kabidi; yeye wakalela Uza ne Ahihuda. 
1Chronicles8:8 Shahalayima wakalela bana mu buloba bua Moaba, bakatumeye bakashi bandi Hushima ne Bâla kuabo." 
1Chronicles8:9 Mukashi wandi Hodesha wakamulelela Yobaba ne Zibia ne Mesha ne Malakama 
1Chronicles8:10 ne Yeuse ne Shakaya ne Mîma. Aba bakadi bana bandi ba balume ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo. 
1Chronicles8:11 Hushima wakamulelela Ahituba ne Elepâla. 
1Chronicles8:12 Bana ba balume ba Elepâla: Ebê ne Mishama ne Shemede, wakasa Ono ne Lodo ne misoko yakadi ha buihi;" 
1Chronicles8:13 Belia ne Shema, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo ba Bena Ayalona, bakihata Bena Gata mu nvita;" 
1Chronicles8:14 ne Ahio ne Shashaka ne Yelemota 
1Chronicles8:15 ne Zebadaya ne Alada ne Edê 
1Chronicles8:16 ne Mikaele ne Yisepa ne Yoha, bana ba balume ba Belia;" 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadaya ne Meshulama ne Hiziki ne Hebê 
1Chronicles8:18 ne Yishemelai ne Yizela ne Yobaba, bana ba balume ba Elepâla;" 
1Chronicles8:19 ne Yakima ne Zikeli ne Zabedi 
1Chronicles8:20 ne Elienai ne Ziletai ne Ebele 
1Chronicles8:21 ne Adaya ne Belaya ne Shimelata, bana ba balume ba Shimei;" 
1Chronicles8:22 Yishe-pana ne Ebê ne Ebele 
1Chronicles8:23 ne Abidona ne Zikeli ne Hanana 
1Chronicles8:24 ne Hananya ne Elama ne Anetotiya 
1Chronicles8:25 ne Yifedeya ne Penuele, bana ba balume ba Shashaka;" 
1Chronicles8:26 ne Shameshelai ne Shemaya ne Atalaya 
1Chronicles8:27 ne Yalesheya ne Eliya ne Zikeli, bana ba balume ba Yelohama." 
1Chronicles8:28 Aba bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo mu bikondo biabo bionso, bantu banene; bakadi bashikama mu Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles8:29 Mu Gibeona muakadi Yiele, tatu wa Gibeona, wakadi ne mukashi, dina diandi Mâka;" 
1Chronicles8:30 muanʼa bute wandi wakadi Abidona, bakunyi bandi bakadi Sû ne Kishi ne Bâla ne Nadaba" 
1Chronicles8:31 ne Gedô ne Ahio ne Zekê. 
1Chronicles8:32 Mikelota wakalela Shimea. Bobo kabidi bakashikama mu Yelushalema mu buludiludi ne bana babo. 
1Chronicles8:33 Nê wakalela Kishi; Kishi wakalela Shaula; Shaula wakalela Yonatana ne Maleki-shua ne Abinadaba ne Eshebâla. 
1Chronicles8:34 Muana wa balume wa Yonatana wakadi Meliba-bâla; Meliba-bâla wakalela Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Bana ba balume ba Mika: Pitona ne Meleke ne Talea ne Ahaza. 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaza wakalela Yehoada; ne Yehoada wakalela Alemeta ne Asemaweta ne Zimeli; ne Zimeli wakalela Mosa. 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa wakalela Binea; Lafa wakadi muanʼandi ne Eleasa wakadi muanʼandi ne Asela wakadi muanʼandi. 
1Chronicles8:38 Asela wakadi ne bana ba balume basambombo, mena abo: Azelikama ne Bokelu ne Yishemaele ne Shealeya ne Obadaya ne Hanana. Aba bonso bakadi bana ba balume ba Asela." 
1Chronicles8:39 Bana ba balume ba Esheke muanʼabo: Ulama muanʼa bute wandi, ne Yeusha muana muibidi ne Elifelete muisatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bana ba balume ba Ulama bakadi bena nvita ba bukitu, bena mata, bakadi ne bana ba balume ba bungi, ne bana ba bana babo balela, bu lukama ne makumi atanu. Aba bonso bakadi bana ba balume ba Benyamina." 
1Chronicles9:1 Nunku Bena Isalele bakadi babadibua ku kulondolola kuabo; ne monai, badi bafundibue mu mukandu wa bakelenge ba Isalele; bakaya ne Bena Yuda mu buhika ku Babulona bualu bua ditomboka diabo." 
1Chronicles9:2 Bantu ba diambedi bakashikama mu buhianyi buabo mu misoko yabo ya Isalele bakadi bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne Bena Netinima. 
1Chronicles9:3 Mu Yelushalema nuakashikama bana ba Yuda ne ba Benyamina ne ba Efelayima ne ba Manashe: 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai, muana wa Amihuda, muana wa Omeli, muana wa Imeli, muana wa Bani, wa bana ba Pelese, muana wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ba Bena Shilona: Asaya, muanʼa bute wandi ne bana bandi ba balume." 
1Chronicles9:6 Bana ba balume ba Sela: Yeule ne bana babo nkama isambombo ne makumi tshitema," 
1Chronicles9:7 Bana ba balume ba Benyamina: Salu, muana wa balume wa Meshulama, muana wa Hodaweya, muana wa Hasenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 ne Yibeneya, muana wa Yelohama, ne Ela, muana wa Uzi, muana wa Mikela ne Meshulama, muana wa Shefataya, muana wa Leule, muana wa Yibeniya;" 
1Chronicles9:9 ne bana babo mu bikondo biabo nkama tshitema ne makumi atanu ne bantu basambombo. Aba bonso bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ba bakuidi: Yedaya ne Yehoyada ne Yakina 
1Chronicles9:11 ne Azâya, muana wa Hilekiya, muana wa Meshulama, muana wa Sadoka, muana wa Melayota, muana wa Ahituba, mukokeshi wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi;" 
1Chronicles9:12 ne Adaya, muana wa Yelohama, muana wa Pashû, muana wa Malakiya, ne Mâsai, muana wa Adiele, muana wa Yakela, muana wa Meshulama, muana wa Meshilemita, muana wa Imê;" 
1Chronicles9:13 ne bana babo ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo tshinunu ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asambombo, bantu bakole ba kukuatabo mudimu mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ba Bena Lewi: Shemaya, muana wa Hashuba, muana wa Azelikama, muana wa Hashabeya wa bana ba balume ba Melali;" 
1Chronicles9:15 ne Bakabaka, Heleshi ne Galela ne Mataniya, muana wa Mika, muana wa Zikeli, muana wa Asafa," 
1Chronicles9:16 ne Obadaya, muana wa Shemaya, muana wa Galala, muana wa Yedutuna, ne Belekiya, muana wa Asa, muana wa Elekana, bakadi bashikama mu misoko ya Bena Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Batuadi ba majitu: Shaluma ne Akuba ne Talemona ne Ahimana ne bana babo (Shaluma wakadi ku mutu kuabo)," 
1Chronicles9:18 bakadi bimana ku tshibi tshia mukelenge ku esete; bobo bakadi batuadi ba majitu a mu tshitudilu tshia Bena Lewi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shaluma, muana wa Kole, muana wa Ebiyasafa, muana wa Kola, ne bana babo nʼandi ba mu nsubu wa tatu wandi, Bena Kola, bakadi ku mutu kua mudimu eu, balami ba ku bibuelelu bia mu ntenta wa kusambakena; batatu babo bakadi ku mutu kua tshitudilu tshia Yehowa, balami ba ku bibuelelu." 
1Chronicles9:20 Diambedi Pinehasa, muana wa Eleazâ, wakadi ku mutu kuabo ne Yehowa wakadi nʼandi." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekâya, muana wa Meshelemiya, wakadi mulami wa ku tshibuelelu tshia mu nsubu wa kusambakena." 
1Chronicles9:22 Buonso buabo bakasungulabo bua kulamabo bibuelelu bia mu nsubu bakadi nkama ibidi ne dikumi ne bantu babidi. Bobo bakadi babadibua mu bikondo biabo mu misoko yabo bakadi bajidibua mu midimu yabo kudi Davidi ne Samuele, mumonyi wa malu." 
1Chronicles9:23 Nunku bobo ne bana babo balela bakadi batangila bibuelelu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa, nsubu wa kusambakena mene, bu balami babi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Batuadi aba bakadi ku nseke inai, ku esete ne ku wesete ne ku nôde ne ku Sude." 
1Chronicles9:25 Bana babo bakadi mu misoko yabo bakadi ne bua kubuela kudibo hakahita matuku muanda mutekete ku lumingu ku lumingu bua kuikalabo nʼabo; 
1Chronicles9:26 bualu bua balama banene banai, Bena Lewi, bakadi bajidibua mu mudimu eu, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ne bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
1Chronicles9:27 Bobo bakadi balala banyunguluke nsubu wa Nzambi, bualu bua bobo bakadi bajidibue mu mudimu eu; bakadi ne bua kunzulula bibi hatshiatshia ku dituku ku dituku." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bakuabo babo bakadi ne mudimu wa kulamabo malonga a mu nsubu; bakadi babala malonga hakabuelabo nʼau ne hakahatukabo nʼau. 
1Chronicles9:29 Bakuabo babo bakadi balami ba bintu bia mu nsubu, ne bivuadi bionso bia mu tshitendelelu, ne ba bukula bubotesha, ne ba nvinyo, ne ba manyi, ne ba musenga wa manananshi, ne ba bintu bia muhuya muimpe." 
1Chronicles9:30 Bana ba balume bakuabo ba bakuidi bakadi balongolodi ba bintu bia muhuya muimpe. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitiya, umue wa Bena Lewi, muanʼa bute wa Shaluma, Muena Kola, wakadi ne mudimu wa kulama bintu biakalambabo mu malonga." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bakuabo babo, bana ba Kohata, bakadi ne bua kulama bidia bia kulesha ku lumingu ku lumingu." 
1Chronicles9:33 Aba mbimbi ba misambu ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo ba Bena Lewi bakadi bashikama mu nsubu ei; bakadi kabayi ne mudimu mukuabo, bualu bua bakadi ne mudimu wabo munya ne butuku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Bobo bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo ba Bena Lewi mu bikondo biabo bionso, bantu banene; bakadi bashikama mu Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles9:35 Mu Gibeona nuakashikama Yiele, tatu wa Gibeona; dina dia mukashi wandi diakadi Mâka;" 
1Chronicles9:36 Abidona wakadi muanʼa bute wandi, ne Sû ne Kishi ne Bâla ne Nê ne Nadaba" 
1Chronicles9:37 ne Gedô ne Ahio ne Zekâya ne Mikelota. 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikelota wakalela Shimeama. Bobo bakashikama mu Yelushalema kabidi ha buihi ne bana babo. 
1Chronicles9:39 Nê wakalela Kishi; Kishi wakalela Shaula; Shaula wakalela Yonatana ne Malekishua ne Abinadaba ne Eshebâla. 
1Chronicles9:40 Meliba-bâla wakadi muana wa Yonatana; Meliba-bâla wakalela Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Bana ba balume ba Mika: Pitona ne Meleke ne Talea ne Ahaza. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaza wakalela Yala; Yala wakalela Alemeta ne Asemaweta ne Zimeli; Zimeli wakalela Mosa; 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa wakalela Binea; ne Lefaya muanʼandi, ne Eleasa muanʼandi, ne Asela muanʼandi." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asela wakadi ne bana ba balume basambombo; mena abo: Azelikama, Bokelu ne Yishemaele ne Shealeya ne Obadaya ne Etenana; aba bakadi bana ba balume ba Asela." 
1Chronicles10:1 Bena Peleshete bakaluangana nvita ne Bena Isalele; Bena Isalele bakanyema ku mpala kua Bena Peleshete, bakadishinda hanshi bafue ku mukuna wa Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Bena Peleshete bakihata Shaula ne bana bandi balume; Bena Peleshete bakashiha Yonatana ne Abinadaba ne Maleki-shua, bana balume ba Shaula." 
1Chronicles10:3 Bakatamba Shaula mu nvita, bena mata a mikete bakamuheta mu nshila; yeye wakatahibua kudi bena mata." 
1Chronicles10:4 Hashishe Shaula wakambila muambudi wa ngabu wandi ne, Hatula muele wa nvita webe, untahe, unsompole; bua bantu aba badi kabayi batengula kabalu ha buihi nʼanyi bua kutekabo. Kadi muambudi wa ngabu wandi wakahidia; bualu bua yeye wakatamba kutshina. Nunku Shaula wakahatula muele wa nvita wandi, wakadishindahu." 
1Chronicles10:5 Hakamona muambudi wa ngabu wandi ne, Shaula wakamana kufua, yeye kabidi wakadishinda ha muele wandi, wakafua." 
1Chronicles10:6 Nunku Shaula wakafua ne bana bandi balume basatu; bonso ba mu nsubu wandi bakafua diatshimue. 
1Chronicles10:7 Hakatangila Bena Isalele bakadi bashikama mu tshibanda ne, Bakadi ku mukuna bakanyema, ne Shaula ne bana bandi balume bakafua, bakahatuka mu misoko yabo, bakanyema kabidi; Bena Peleshete bakatua, bakashikamamu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Hakatshiabu, hakalua Bena Peleshete bua kunyengabo bintu bia bantu bafue, bakasangana Shaula ne bana bandi ba balume bahone hanshi ku mukuna wa Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Bakamunyenga bintu biandi; bakatuma mutu wandi ne bintu biandi bia nvita mu buloba buonso bua Bena Peleshete bua kumanyishabo nzambi yabo ne bantu babo bonso lumu elu. 
1Chronicles10:10 Bakateka bintu biandi bia nvita mu nsubu wa nzambi yabo; bakakumina mutu wandi mu nsubu wa Dagona. 
1Chronicles10:11 Hakunvua Bena Yabesha-gilada lumu lua malu onso akenzela Bena Peleshete Shaula," 
1Chronicles10:12 hashishe bena bukitu bonso bakabika, bakangata tshitalu tshia Shaula ne bia bana bandi ba balume, bakatua nʼabi ku Yabesha, bakajika mifuba yabo muinshi mua mitshi ya telebinta ya mu Yabesha, bakajila bia kudia matuku muanda mutekete." 
1Chronicles10:13 Nunku Shaula wakafua bualu bua bubi buandi buakenzeleye Yehowa ne bua dî dia Yehowa diakahidieye; ne bualu bua yeye wakakeba lungenyi kudi muena buloshi," 
1Chronicles10:14 bakebesha Yehowa; nunku yeye wakamushiha, wakaha Davidi, muana wa Yishai, bukelenge buandi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Hashishe Bena Isalele bonso bakadisangisha kudi Davidi mu Hebelone bamba ne, Mona, tudi bu mifuba yebe ne misunyi yebe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Diambedi hakadi Shaula mukelenge mene, nguewe wakahatuka, wakahingana ne Bena Isalele; Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakukuambila ne, Wewe newikale mulami wa bantu banyi Bena Isalele, ne wewe newikale mukelenge ku mutu kua bantu banyi Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles11:3 Nunku bakulu bonso ba Bena Isalele bakatua kudi mukelenge mu Hebelone; Davidi wakahunga nʼabo tshihungidi mu Hebelone ku mpala kua Yehowa; bakela manyi ha mutu ha Davidi bua kuikaleye mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele, bu mu dî dia Yehowa diakambileye Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Davidi ne Bena Isalele bonso Bakaya ku Yelushalema (udi Yebuse mene); Bena Yebuse, bena buloba bakadiku." 
1Chronicles11:5 Bena Yebuse bakambila Davidi ne, Wewe kuena ubuela kunoko. Kadi Davidi wakanyenga musoko wa Siona wakadi munyungulula ne ngumbu; eu udi musoko wa Davidi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Davidi wakamba ne. Wadianjila kushiha Bena Yebuse yeye neikale mukelenge ne kapitene. Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, wakadianjila kufikaku, wakayuishibua kapitene." 
1Chronicles11:7 Davidi wakashikama mu musoko eu wa lumbu, nunku bakabikila musoko eu ne, Musoko wa Davidi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Yeye wakasa musoko, wakanyunguluka tô ne ku Milo; ne Yoaba wakalongolola tshituha tshikuabo tshia musoko tshiakashala." 
1Chronicles11:9 Davidi wakadiundadiunda, wakalua muntu munene, bualu bua Yehowa wa misumba wakadi nʼandi." 
1Chronicles11:10 Aba mbantu banene bakadi ne Davidi, bakadi nʼandi ne bukole mu bukelenge buandi; bakadisangisha ne Bena Isalele bonso bua kubueshabo Davidi mu bukelenge, bu mu dî dia Yehowa diakambeye bua Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ebu mbungi bua bantu ba bukitu bakadi ne Davidi: Yashobeama, muana wa Muena Hakemoni, wakadi ha mutu ha bantu makumi asatu; yeye wakambula difuma diandi kudi bantu nkama isatu, wakabashiha diatshimue." 
1Chronicles11:12 Eleazâ, muana wa Dodo, Muena Ahoa, wakadi umue wa bena bukitu bandi basatu wakadi ku nyima kuandi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Yeye wakadi ne Davidi ku Pasa-damima kuakadisangisha Bena Peleshete bua kuluangana mu budimi bua orge; bantu bakanyema ku mpala kua Bena Peleshete. 
1Chronicles11:14 Bobo bakimana munkatshi mua budimi ebu, bakaluangana nʼabo, bakashiha Bena Peleshete; Yehowa wakabasungila ne luhandu lunene." 
1Chronicles11:15 Bantu basatu ba bantu aba banene makumi asatu bakaya kudi Davidi ku dibue dia mu lubuebue lua Adulama; bena nvita ba Bena Peleshete bakasa tshitudilu tshiabo mu tshibanda tshia Bena Lefa. 
1Chronicles11:16 Davidi wakadi mu musoko wakadi ne lumbu, ne bena nvita ba Bena Peleshete bakadi mu Beteleheme." 
1Chronicles11:17 Davidi wakamba ne, Nakadi kusua bua muntu ampe mai a kunua a mu dina dia mu Beteleheme didi hehi ne tshibuelelu tshia musoko." 
1Chronicles11:18 Bantu aba basatu bakahitshila munkatshi mua Bena Peleshete bakakoka mai a mu dina dia mu Beteleheme diakadi ha buihi ne tshibuelelu tshia musoko, bakatua nʼau kudi Davidi; kadi Davidi wakahidia kuanua, wakâhongolola kudi Yehowa," 
1Chronicles11:19 wakamba ne, Nzambi wanyi ampidishe bua meme tshienji nunku; nennue mashi a bantu aba bakuamba kufua bua bualu buanyi, anyi? Bualu bua bobo bakuamba kufila mioyo yabo hakuluabo nʼau. Nunku yeye wakahidia kuanua. Ebu bualu buakenza bantu aba banene basatu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai, muanʼabo ne Yoaba, wakadi ku mutu kua bantu basatu; yeye wakela difuma diandi kudi bantu nkama isatu, wakabashiha, wakadi ne dina dia butumbi munkatshi mua bantu aba basatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Munkatshi mua bantu aba basatu yeye wakatamba babidi aba bakuabo bunene, bakamuvuisha kapitene kabo; kadi yeye kakalua munene bu bantu aba basatu bakadi ku mpala." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, muana wa muena bukitu wa mu Kabesele, wakadi muenze malu manene, wakashiha bana babidi ba Aliele wa mu Moaba; yeye kabidi wakabuela mu lubuebue, wakashiha nyama wa ntambue hakadi neige hanshi ha buloba." 
1Chronicles11:23 Wakashiha Muena Ejipitu, muntu munene wa nfiondo, bule buandi buakadi coudées itanu; mu tshianza tshia Muena Ejipitu muakadi difuma bu mutshi udibo bakuma nʼau bilulu; yeye wakaya kudiye ne tshibonge mu tshianza tshiandi, wakahatula difuma mu tshianza tshia Muena Ejipitu, wakamushiha ne difuma diandi." 
1Chronicles11:24 Au mmalu akenza Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, wakadi ne dina dinene munkatshi mua bantu banene basatu;" 
1Chronicles11:25 yeye wakatamba bantu makumi asatu butumbi, kadi yeye kakalua munene bu bantu aba basatu bakadi ku mpala; Davidi wakamuteka ku mutu kua bena nvita bakadi ha buihi nʼandi." 
1Chronicles11:26 Aba mbena bukitu ba munkatshi mua bena nvita: Asahele, muanʼabo ne Yoaba, Elehanana, muana wa Dodo wa mu Beteleheme," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamota, Muena Halola, Helese, Muena Pelona," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ila, muana wa Ikishe, Muena Tekoa, Abiezê, Muena Anatota," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai, Muena Husha, Hai, Muena Ahoa," 
1Chronicles11:30 Mahalai, Muena Netofa, Helede, muana wa Bâna, Muena Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai, muana wa Libai wa mu Gibea, wa bana ba Benyamina, Benaya, Muena Pilatona," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hulai, wa ku misulu ya Gâsha, Abiele, Muena Âba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azemaweta, Muena Bahaluma, Eliaba, Muena Shâlabona," 
1Chronicles11:34 bana balume ba Hashema, Muena Gizona, Yonatana, muana wa Shage, Muena Halala," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiama, muana wa Sakâ, Muena Halala, Elifala, muana wa Ula," 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefê, Muena Mekelata, Ahiya, Muena Pelona," 
1Chronicles11:37 Heselo, Muena Kâmele, Nâlai, muana wa Ezebai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoele, muanʼabo ne Natana, Mibehâ, muana wa Hageli," 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleke, Muena Amona, Nahalai, Muena Belota, muambudi wa ngabu wa Yoaba, muana wa Seluya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ila, Muena Yitela, Galeba, Muena Yitela," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uliya, Muena Hiti, Zabada, muana wa Ahalai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina, muana wa Shiza, Muena Lubena, mukelenge wa mu Bena Lubena, ne bantu makumi asatu bakadi nʼandi," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanuna, muana wa Mâka, ne Yoshafata, Muena Mitena," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya, Muena Ashetelata, Shama ne Yiyele, bana ba balume ba Hotama, Muena Aloê," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediele, muana wa Shimeli, ne Yoha muanʼabo, Muena Tiso," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliele, Muena Mahawa, ne Yelibai ne Yoshawia ne bana ba balume ba Elenâma, ne Yitema, Muena Moaba," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliele ne Obeda ne Yâsiele, Muena Mesobaya." 
1Chronicles12:1 Aba mbantu bakatua kudi Davidi ku Sikelaga hakadiye musokome bualu bua Shaula, muana wa Kishi; bakadi munkatshi mua bena bukitu bandi, bakadi bakuatshisha bandi mu nvita." 
1Chronicles12:2 Bakadi batuadi ba mata a mikete, bakamanya mua kuela mabue ne tshianza tshia balume ne tshia bakashi, bakamanya mua kuela mata abo nunku kabidi; bakadi bana babo ne Shaula, Bena Benyamina." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiezê wakadi kapitene kabo; hashishe Yoasha, ne bana balume ba Shemâ, Muena Gibea, ne Yeziele ne Pelete, bana balume ba Asemaweta, ne Belaka ne Yehu, Muena Anatota," 
1Chronicles12:4 ne Yishemaya, Muena Gibeona, muena bukitu wa munkatshi mua bantu makumi asatu ne ku mutu kua bantu makumi asatu, ne Yelemiya ne Yahaziele ne Yohanana ne Yozabada, Muena Gedela," 
1Chronicles12:5 ne Eluzai ne Yelimota ne Bealeya ne Shemaliya ne Shefataya, Muena Halufa," 
1Chronicles12:6 ne Elekana ne Yishiya ne Azalele ne Yoezê ne Yashobeama, Bena Kola," 
1Chronicles12:7 ne Yoela ne Zebadaya, bana ba Yelohama wa mu Gedô." 
1Chronicles12:8 Bena Gada bakuabo bakaya kudi Davidi ku musoko wa lumbu wa mu tshihela, bena bukitu bakayishibua malu onso a nvita, bakamanya mua kuluangana ne ngabu ne mafuma; mpala yabo yakadi bu mpala ya nyama ya ntambue, bakamanya mua kunyema lubilu bu ntole ya mu mikuna;" 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezê wakadi ha mutu habo, Obadaya muibidi, ne Eliaba muisatu," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishemana muinai, ne Yelemiya muitanu," 
1Chronicles12:11 ne Atai muisambombo, ne Eliele wa muanda mutekete," 
1Chronicles12:12 ne Yohanana wa muanda mukulu, ne Elezabada wa tshitema," 
1Chronicles12:13 Yelemiya wa dikumi, Makebanai wa dikumi ne umue." 
1Chronicles12:14 Aba mba mu bana balume ba Gada bakadi tupitene tua masalayi; wakatamba buhuekele wakadi ku mutu kua bantu lukama; wakatamba bunene wakadi ku mutu kua bantu tshinunu. 
1Chronicles12:15 Aba mbantu bakasabuka dishiya dia Yadene mu ngondo wa kumudilu hakadi musulu mûle muhatuke mu mielelu yau; bakihata bantu bonso bakadi mu bibanda ku esete ne ku wesete. 
1Chronicles12:16 Bantu ba Benyamina ne ba Yuda bakalua ku musoko wa lumbu wa Davidi. 
1Chronicles12:17 Davidi wakahatuka bua kusambakena nʼabo, wakabambila ne, Bulualua kundi ne ditalala bua kukuatshishangana neanyi, mutshima wanyi neunvuangane ne mitshima yenu; kadi bulualua bua kuntangila tshitungu kudi bena lukuna banyi, hashishe Nzambi wa batatu betu atangile bualu ebu, anuhele, bualu bua tshiena ne bualu bubi mu bianza bianyi." 
1Chronicles12:18 Hashishe Nyuma wakatulukila Amasai, wakadi ku mutu kua bantu makumi asatu, yeye wakamba ne, Tudi bantu bebe, Davidi; tudi ku luseke luebe, wewe muana wa Yishai! Ditalala, ditalala dikale kûdi, ditalala dikale kudi bakuatshishi bebe! Bualu bua Nzambi webe udi ukukuatshisha. Hashishe Davidi wakabitabusha, wakabavuisha tupitene tua masalayi andi makuabo." 
1Chronicles12:19 Bakuabo ba Bena Manashe bakalua kudi Davidi hakayeye ne Bena Peleshete bua kuluangana ne Shaula; kadi bobo kabakabakuatshisha nansha; bualu bua bakelenge ba Bena Peleshete hakamanyabo bualu ebu bakabatuma kuabo, bamba ne, Yeye neaye kudi mukelenge wandi Shaula bua kufueye mioyo yetu kudiye." 
1Chronicles12:20 Hakadiye uya ku Sikelaga, bakuabo ba Bena Manashe bakalamata kudiye, Adena ne Yozabada ne Yediele ne Mikaele ne Yozabada ne Elihu ne Siletai, tupitene tua binunu bia bantu ba Manashe." 
1Chronicles12:21 Bobo bakahitshisha Davidi kudi bisumbu bia bena tshinyangu; bualu bua buonso buabo bakadi bena bukitu, bakadi tupitene tua masalayi." 
1Chronicles12:22 Bantu bakalua kudi Davidi ku difuku ku dituku bua kunukuatshisha; bakalua tshisumbu tshinene tshia masalayi bu misumba ya Nzambi. 
1Chronicles12:23 Ebu mbungi bua bakadi ku mutu kua bena nvita bakalua kudi Davidi mu Hebelone bua kukudimunabo bukelenge bua Shaula kudiye bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa. 
1Chronicles12:24 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Yuda bakadi bambila ngabu ne mafuma bakadi bena nvita binunu bisambombo ne nkama muanda mukulu. 
1Chronicles12:25 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Shimeona bena nvita ba bukitu bakadi binunu muanda mutekete ne lukama. 
1Chronicles12:26 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Lewi binunu binai ne nkama isambombo. 
1Chronicles12:27 Yehoyada wakadi muenyampala wa mu nsubu wa Alona; bantu binunu bisatu ne nkama muanda mutekete bakadi nʼandi," 
1Chronicles12:28 ne Sadoka, nsongalume muena bukitu, ne ba mu nsubu wa tatu wandi bakadi tupitene makumi abidi ne tubidi." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Benyamina, bana babo ne Shaula, binunu bisatu; bualu bua diambedi bungi buabo bakalamata kudi Shaula." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Efelayima, bena nvita ba bukitu, bantu ba butumbi mu nsubu ya batatuʼabo binunu makumi abidi ne nkama muanda mukulu." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ba munkatshi mua tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Manashe binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu bakadi ne menʼabo mafunda bua kusungulabo Davidi mukelenge. 
1Chronicles12:32 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Yisakâ, bakamanya mua kujingulula malu a tshikondo atshi, bua kumanyabo malu akadi Bena Isalele ne bua kuenza, bakadi nkama ibidi ku mutu kuabo; bana babo bonso bakalonda mikenji yabo." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Zebuluna bakadi ne bukole bua kuluangana nvita mu musumba, bakamanya mua kuasa mualu wa nvita ne bintu bia nvita bionso, bakadi binunu makumi atanu; bakamanya mua kuluangana bimpe, kabakadi ne mitshima ibidi." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Nafatale bakadi tupitene tshinunu, ne bantu binunu makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete bambudi ba ngabu ne mafuma." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Dana bakamanya mua kuasa mualu wa nvita bakadi binunu makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu ne nkama isambombo. 
1Chronicles12:36 Ba munkatshi mua Bena Ashê bakamanya mua kuluangana nvita mu musumba ne mua kuasa mualu wa nvita bakadi binunu makumi anai. 
1Chronicles12:37 Dishiya dia Yadene ba Bena Lubena ne ba Bena Gada ne ba mu tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe bakadi binunu lukama ne makumi abidi bakadi ne bintu bia nvita bionso. 
1Chronicles12:38 Bantu aba bonso, bena nvita bakamanya mua kuasa mualu wa nvita, bakatua ne mitshima mitoke ku Hebelone bua kuhingishabo Davidi mu bukelenge bua Isalele mujima; ne bonso bakuabo ba Isalele bakadi ne mutshima umue bua kuhingisha Davidi mu bukelenge." 
1Chronicles12:39 Bakashala ne Davidi matuku asatu, bakadia ne bakanua nʼandi; bualu bua bana babo bakamana kubalongoluela bia kudia." 
1Chronicles12:40 Bakadi ha buihi nʼabo tô ne ku Yisakâ ne Zebuluna ne Nafatale bakatua ne bia kudia ha nyima ha nyama ya mpunda ne ya tumelo ne ya mpunda mikuabo, ne ya ngombe, bintu bia kudia bia bukula ne bia nfigi ne bia tumuma tukese ne bia nvinyo ne bia manyi ne ngombe ne mikoko ya bungi; bualu bua disanka diakadi mu Isalele." 
1Chronicles13:1 Davidi wakahunga dî ne tupitene tua bantu tshinunu ne tua bantu lukama ne muntu yonso wakadi ku mutu kua bantu bakuabo. 
1Chronicles13:2 Davidi wakambila Bena Isalele bonso ne, Binuelangana meji ne mbimpe, ne biasua Yehowa Nzambi wetu nunku, tubikile bana betu bonso badi bashala mu nseke yonso ya buloba bua Isalele ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi badi mu misoko yabo ne ku mpenge ya misoko yabo, badisangishe kutudi;" 
1Chronicles13:3 tuye bietu, tuangate mushete wa Nzambi wetu, tulue nʼau munkatshi muetu; bualu bua tuetu katuakûkeba mu matuku a Shaula." 
1Chronicles13:4 Bantu bonso bakamba ne, Netuenze nunku; bua bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kuabo." 
1Chronicles13:5 Nunku Davidi wakabikila Bena Isalele bonso hamue ku Shihô, kasulu kakese ka ku luseke lua Ejipitu tô ne ku tshibuelelu tshia Hamata, bua kuangatabo mushete wa Nzambi ku Kîyata-yalima." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davidi ne Bena Isalele bakaya ku Bâla, udi Kîyata-yalima mene, ku luseke lua Yuda, bua kuangatabo mushete wa Nzambi, udi mushikame ku mutu kua bakeluba kudibo babikila Dina dia Yehowa." 
1Chronicles13:7 Bakateka mushete wa Nzambi ha dikalu dihia-dihia, bakafuma nʼau mu nsubu wa Abinadaba; Uza ne Ahio bakendesha dikalu."
