1Chronicles13:8 Davidi ne Bena Isalele bonso bakimba misambu ne bisanji ne nzenze ne nkumbi ne makasa ne mpungi ne bukole buabo buonso. 
1Chronicles13:9 Hakafikabo ku tshihehuidi tshia Kidona, Uza wakolola tshianza tshiandi bua kukuateye mushete; bualu bua ngombe yakadishinda hanshi." 
1Chronicles13:10 Tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakatema kudiye, yeye wakamushiha bualu bua yeye wakolola tshianza tshiandi bua kulengeye mushete; yeye wakafuilaku ku mpala kua Yehowa." 
1Chronicles13:11 Davidi wakafua tshiji bualu bua Yehowa wakenzela Uza nunku; yeye wakabikila muaba au ne, Pelese-uza tô ne ku dituku edi." 
1Chronicles13:12 Davidi wakatshina Nzambi dituku adi, wakamba ne, Nenye ne mushete wa Nzambi kuanyi bishi?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Nunku Davidi kakaya ne mushete wa Nzambi ku musoko wa Davidi, kadi wakasesuka, wakaya nʼau ku nsubu wa Obeda-edome, Muena Giti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Mushete wakashala kudi ba mu nsubu wa Obeda-edome ngondo isatu; Yehowa wakavudishila ba mu nsubu wa Obeda-edome ne bintu biabo bionso disanka. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hilama, mukelenge wa Tulo, wakatuma ba-messager kudi Davidi, ne mitshi ya cèdre ne bena tushola ne bena mabaya bua kumuashilabo nsubu." 
1Chronicles14:2 Davidi wakamanya ne, Nzambi wakunjadika mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele; bualu bua bukelenge buandi buakadi bubandishibue kulu bua bantu bandi Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Davidi wakabaka bakashi bakuabo mu Yelushalema; Davidi wakalela bana ba balume ne bana ba bakashi bakuabo. 
1Chronicles14:4 Aba mbana bakaleleye mu Yelushalema: Shamua ne Shobaba ne Natana ne Solomo 
1Chronicles14:5 ne Yibehâ ne Elishua ne Elepeleta 
1Chronicles14:6 ne Noga ne Nefege ne Yafia 
1Chronicles14:7 ne Elishama ne Bêleyada ne Elifelete. 
1Chronicles14:8 Hakunvua Bena Peleshete lumu ne, Bakuela Davidi manyi ha mutu bua kuikaleye mukelenge wa Bena balele bonso, Bena Peleshete bonso nakaya kukeba Davidi; hakunvua Davidi lumu elu, yeye wakaya bua kuluangana nʼabo." 
1Chronicles14:9 Bena Peleshete hakamana kuhaula misoko ya mu tshibanda tshia Bena Lefa. 
1Chronicles14:10 Davidi wakebesha Nzambi ne, Nye bua kuluangana ne Bena Peleshete, anyi? Wewe neubafile mu tshianza tshianyi, anyi? Yehowa wakamuambila ne, Uye biebe, bualu bua meme nembafile mu tshianza" 
1Chronicles14:11 Nunku bobo bakafika ku Bâla-pelasima; Davidi wakabashihelaku. Davidi wakamba ne, Nzambi wakahatuka kudi bena lukuna banyi bu mudi mai ahatuka. Nunku badi babikila muaba au ne, Bâla-pelasima." 
1Chronicles14:12 Bakashiyaku mpingu yabo; Davidi wakela mukenji wandi, bakayosha ne kahia." 
1Chronicles14:13 Bena Peleshete wakahaula misoko ya mu tshibanda kabidi. 
1Chronicles14:14 Davidi wakebesha Nzambi kabidi; Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Kuyi, kubalondi; usesuke kudibo, yila kudibo ku luseke lua mitshi ya mûrier." 
1Chronicles14:15 Hashishe haunvua tshiona mu mitu ya mitshi ya mûrier, uluangane nʼabo; bualu bua Nzambi wakadianjila ku mpala kuebe bua kushiheye musumba wa Bena Peleshete." 
1Chronicles14:16 Davidi Wakenza muakamuambila Nzambi; bakashiha musumba wa Bena Peleshete ku Gibeona tô ne ku Gezê. 
1Chronicles14:17 Lumu lua Davidi tuakamuangalaka ku maloba onso; Yehowa wakavuisha ba mu bisamba bionso ditshina bua bualu buandi. 
1Chronicles15:1 Davidi wakibaka nsubu mu musoko wa Davidi; wakalongolola muaba wa kuteka mushete wa Nzambi, wakashimikaku ntenta wa kûteka." 
1Chronicles15:2 Hashishe Davidi wakamba ne, Anu Bena Lewi badi ne bua kutuala mushete wa Nzambi; bualu bua Yehowa wakabasungila bua kutualabo mushete ne bua kumukuatshilabo mudimu tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles15:3 Davidi wakabikila Bena Isalele bonso ku Yelushalema bua kuangata mushete wa Yehowa, balue nʼau ku muaba wakaulongolueleye." 
1Chronicles15:4 Davidi wakasangisha bana balume ba Alona ne Bena Lewi: 
1Chronicles15:5 ba bana ba Kohata, Uliele mukelenge, ne bana babo lukama ne makumi abidi;" 
1Chronicles15:6 ba bana ba Melali, Asaya mukelenge wabo, ne bana babo nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi;" 
1Chronicles15:7 ba bana ne bana babo lukama ne makumi asatu; 
1Chronicles15:8 ba bana balume ba Elisafana, Shemaya mukelenge wabo, ne bana babo nkama ibidi;" 
1Chronicles15:9 ba bana ba Hebelone, Eliele mukelenge wabo, ne bana babo makumi muanda mukulu;" 
1Chronicles15:10 ba bana ba Uziele, Aminadaba mukelenge wabo, ne bana babo lukama ne dikumi ne babidi." 
1Chronicles15:11 Davidi wakabikila Sadoka ne Ebeyatâ bakuidi, ne Bena Lewi ne miele ne Asaya ne Yoele ne Shemaya ne Eliele ne Aminadaba," 
1Chronicles15:12 wakabambila ne, Nuenu nudi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu ba mu nsubu ya Bena Lewi; nudijidile ne nuenu ne bana benu, bua nuenu nulue ne mushete wa Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ku muaba unakûlongoluela." 
1Chronicles15:13 Bualu bua nuenu kanuakautuala diambedi, Yehowa Nzambi wetu wakahatuka kutudi bua kukukengesha, bualu bua tuetu katuakakeha disua diandi mu mukenji eu." 
1Chronicles15:14 Nunku bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadijidila bua kuluabo ne mushete wa Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
1Chronicles15:15 Bena Lewi bakatuala mushete wa Nzambi ha maha abo ne mitshi, bu muakamba Mose bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa." 
1Chronicles15:16 Davidi wakambila wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Lewi bua kusunguleye bimbi ba misambu munkatshi mua bana babo ne bintu bia kuimba nʼabi misambu, nzenze ne bisanji ne biamu bia kukumakasha, bua kuimbabo misambu ne dî dinene dia disanka." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nunku Bena Lewi bakasungula Hemana, muana wa Yoele; ne ba bana babo, Asafa, muana wa Belekiya; ne ba bana ba Melali, Etana, muana wa Kushaya;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ne bana babo ba mu mulongo muibidi, Zekâya ne Bena ne Yaziele ne Shemilamota ne Yehiele ne Uni ne Eliaba ne Benaya ne Mâseya ne Matitiya ne Elifelehu ne Mikeneya ne Obeda-edome ne Yiele, balami ba ku bibi." 
1Chronicles15:19 Nunku bakasungula bimbi ba misambu, Hemana ne Asafa ne Etana bua kuimbabo bikole ne biamu bia mitaku bia kukumakasha;" 
1Chronicles15:20 ne Zekâya ne Aziele ne Shemilamota ne Yehiele ne Uni ne Eliaba ne Mâseya ne Benaya bakadi ne nzenze bua kuimbabo tshimbidi tshia Alamota; 
1Chronicles15:21 ne Matitiya ne Elifelehu ne Mikeneya ne Obeda-edome ne Yiele ne Azazaya bakadi ne bisanji bua kuimbabo tshimbidi tshia Sheminita, bua kubishabo misambu." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya, mukelenge wa Bena Lewi, wakadi ku mutu kua bimbi ba misambu; yeye wakabayisha mua kuimba bualu bua yeye wakadi ne lungenyi elu." 
1Chronicles15:23 Belekiya ne Elekana bakadi balami ba bibi bia nsubu wakadi mushete. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebanya ne Yoshafata ne Netanele ne Amasai ne Zekâya ne Benaya ne Eliezê bakuidi bakela mpungi ku mpala kua mushete wa Nzambi; Obeda-edome ne Yehiya bakadi balami ba bibi bia nsubu wakadi mushete. 
1Chronicles15:25 Nunku Davidi ne bakulu ba mu Isalele ne tupitene tua binunu bia bantu bakaya bua kuangatabo mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa ku nsubu wa Obeda-edome ne disanka dinene. 
1Chronicles15:26 Hashishe bakakuatshisha Nzambi Bena Lewi bakadi batuala mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa, bobo bakamushihela balume ba ngombe muanda mutekete ne bimpanga muanda mutekete." 
1Chronicles15:27 Davidi wakadi uluata tshilulu tshia lin muimpe, ne Bena Lewi bonso bakadi batuala mushete ne bimbi ba misambu ne Kenaniya, mulombodi wa bimbi ba misambu, bakaluata lin muimpe; Davidi wakadi uluata efoda wa lin kabidi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Nunku Bena Isalele bonso bakalua ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa bela mbila ne tshiona tshikole tshia nshiba ne mpungi ne tshia biamu bia kukumakasha, bakadi bimba nzenze ne bisanji ne dî dikole." 
1Chronicles15:29 Hakaluabo ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa ku musoko wa Davidi, Mikala, muana wa bakashi wa Shaula, wakatangila ha disoso dia nsubu, ne hakamoneye Davidi uja maja utuhika, yeye wakamulengulula mu mutshima wandi." 
1Chronicles16:1 Bakalua ne mushete wa Nzambi, bakauteka munkatshi mua ntenta wakadi Davidi mûshimikile; bakafila milambu ya kuosha ne ya kutuisha nʼai ditalala ku mpala kua Nzambi." 
1Chronicles16:2 Hakashikisha Davidi kufila milambu ya kuosha ne ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, yeye wakavudishila bantu disanka mu dina dia Yehowa." 
1Chronicles16:3 Yeye wakaha muntu yonso wa mu Isalele ne balume ne bakashi mutanda wa bidia ne tshihesa tshia munyinyi ne tshisumbu tshia tumuma tûme. 
1Chronicles16:4 Yeye wakasungula Bena Lewi bakuabo bua kuenzelabo mudimu ku mpala kua mushete wa Yehowa, ne bua kutendekenabo ne bua kusakidilabo ne bua kutumbishabo Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele;" 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafa wakadi ku mutu kuabo, ne ku nyima kuandi kuakadi Zekâya ne Yiele ne Shemilamota ne Yehiele ne Matitiya ne Eliaba ne Benaya ne Obeda-edome ne Yiele, bakadi ne nzenze ne bisanji; Asafa wakimba biamu bia kukumakasha bikole;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaya ne Yahaziele bakuidi bakela mpungi misangu yonso ku mpala kua mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa. 
1Chronicles16:7 Dituku adi Davidi wakadianjila kuela mukenji bua kusakidilabo Yehowa kudi Asafa ne bana babo ne musambu eu, ne," 
1Chronicles16:8 Nusakidile bienu Yehowa, nubikile dina diandi, numanyishe bienzedi biandi munkatshi mua bukua bantu." 
1Chronicles16:9 Numuimbile misambu, numuimbile misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai, nuyikilangane bua malu andi onso a kukema." 
1Chronicles16:10 Nutumbile mu dina diandi dia tshijila; mitshima ya badi bakeba Yehowa isanke. 
1Chronicles16:11 Kebai bienu Yehowa ne bukole buandi, kebai mpala wandi matuku onso." 
1Chronicles16:12 Nuvuluke bienu bienzedi bia kukema biakuenzeye, malu andi a kukema, ne dilumbulula dia mukana muandi," 
1Chronicles16:13 nuenu tunkanunuma tua Isalele muntu wandi, nuenu bana ba Yakoba, bantu bakasunguleye." 
1Chronicles16:14 Yeye udi Yehowa Nzambi wetu; dilumbulula diandi diakenjibua mu buloba buonso. 
1Chronicles16:15 Udi uvuluka tshihungidi tshiandi kashidi, ndî mene diakajadikeye tô ne ku bikondo tshinunu," 
1Chronicles16:16 tshihungidi tshiakahungeye ne Abalahama, mmutshihu wandi wakaditshiheye kudi Isaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 Wakaujadika kudi Yakoba bu mukenji ne kudi Isalele bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele. 
1Chronicles16:18 Wakamba ne, Nenkuhe buloba bua Kanâna, bua kuikalabu tshituha tshia nuenu kuhiana." 
1Chronicles16:19 Hakadibo anu bantu banya-banya bua bungi buabo, e, hakadibo bantu banya-banya be, ne hakashikamabo mu buloba bu benyi;" 
1Chronicles16:20 hakendakanabo ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba, ne ku bukelenge bumue tô ne kudi bantu bakuabo ba bende," 
1Chronicles16:21 kakitabusha bua muntu umue kubenzela bibi. E, wakabela bakelenge bualu buabo." 
1Chronicles16:22 Wakamba ne, Kanulengi bantu banyi bedibue manyi ha mutu tshianga, kanuenzedi baprofete banyi bibi." 
1Chronicles16:23 Nuimbile Yehowa musambu, nuenu bonso ba ha buloba! Nuambile bantu lumu lua luhandu luandi ku dituku ku dituku." 
1Chronicles16:24 Nuambile ba munkatshi mua bantu ba bende butumbi buandi, numanyishe ba munkatshi mua bantu bonso malu a kukema akenzeye!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Bualu bua Yehowa udi munene, budiye nʼabu mbua kutumbishibua bikole; budiye nʼabu mbua kunemeshibua ha mutu ha nzambi yonso ya hatuhu." 
1Chronicles16:26 Bualu bua nzambi yonso ya bantu ba bende idi mpingu; kadi Yehowa wakafuka bia mu diulu. 
1Chronicles16:27 Butumbi ne buneme bidi ku mpala kuandi; bukole ne disanka bidi mu tshitendelelu tshiandi. 
1Chronicles16:28 Nuenu ba mu biota bia bantu, nuambike Yehowa malu andi, nuambike Yehowa butumbi ne bukole." 
1Chronicles16:29 Nuambike Yehowa butumbi budi buakanangane ne dina diandi. Luai ne mulambu kudiye, luai ku mpala kuandi! Tendelelai Yehowa baluate bivualu bia tshijila." 
1Chronicles16:30 Zakalai ku mpala kuandi, nuenu bonso ba ha buloba. E, buloba budi bujadikibue, kabuena mua kunyungishibua." 
1Chronicles16:31 Diulu dikale ne disanka, buloba busanke kabidi. Bambe munkatshi mua bisamba ne, Yehowa udi ukokesha!" 
1Chronicles16:32 Mai manene enze tshiona, ne bionso bidimu bibile; budimi bua mu mpata busanke, ne bionso bidimu bisanke kabidi!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Hashishe mitshi yonso ya muitu neyimbe misambu bua disanka ku mpala kua Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi ulua kulumbuluisheye buloba." 
1Chronicles16:34 Nusakidile Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi muimpe; bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Nuambe ne, Utusungile, wewe Nzambi wa luhandu luetu, utûmushe munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende bua kutusangisha hamue, bua tuetu tusakidile dina diebe dia tshijila, ne bua tutumbile mu butumbi buebe." 
1Chronicles16:36 Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, avudishibue disanka, ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu! Bantu bonso bakamba ne, Amen; bakatumbisha Yehowa." 
1Chronicles16:37 Yeye wakashiya Asafa ne bana babo ku mpala kua mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa, bua kuenzelabo mudimu ku mpala kua mushete bikondo bionso bu muakadi mudimu wa buatshia-buatshia," 
1Chronicles16:38 ne Obeda-edome ne bana babo makumi asambombo ne muanda mukulu, ne Obeda-edome, muana wa Yedutuna, ne Hosa bua kuikalabo balami ba bibi." 
1Chronicles16:39 Wakashiya Sadoka muakuidi ne bana babo bakuabo bakuidi ku mpala kua nsubu wa Yehowa ku mutu kua mukuna wa Gibeona," 
1Chronicles16:40 bua kufilabo milambu ya kuosha ha tshioshelu ku dituku ku dituku dinda ne dilolo, bu muakafundabo mikenji ya Yehowa yakeleleye Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles16:41 Hemana ne Yedutuna bakadi nʼabo ne bakuabo bakadi basungudibue bakadi ne mena abo mafunda bua kusakidilabo Yehowa bualu bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele; 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemana ne Yedutuna bakadi nʼabo ne mpungi ne biamu bia kukumakasha bua kulombolabo misambu ne bua kuimbabo nʼabi misambu ya Nzambi; bana balume ba Yedutuna bakadi ku bibi. 
1Chronicles16:43 Bantu bonso bakamuangalaka muntu ne muntu ku nsubu wandi; Davidi wakahingana bua kuvudishileye ba mu nsubu wandi disanka. 
1Chronicles17:1 Hakadi Davidi mushikame mu nsubu muandi, Davidi wakambila Natana, muprofete ne, Mona, meme ndi mushikame mu nsubu wa mitshi ya cèdre, kadi mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa udi mushale mu ntenta." 
1Chronicles17:2 Natana wakambila Davidi ne, Wenze malu onso adi mu mutshima webe; bualu bua Nzambi udi nʼebe." 
1Chronicles17:3 Butuku abu mene dî dia Nzambi diakalua kudi Natana diamba ne," 
1Chronicles17:4 Ya, Wambile Davidi muntu wanyi ne, Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Wewe kuena ungibakile nsubu bua meme kushikamamu nansha;" 
1Chronicles17:5 bualu bua meme tshiena muanji kushikama mu nsubu katshia nahatuka ne Bena Isalele tô ne ku dituku edi, kadi nakendakana ku ntenta ne ntenta ne ku tshisombelu ne tshisombelu." 
1Chronicles17:6 Mu miaba yonso inakendakana ne Bena Isalele bonso nakambila umue wa balumbuluishi bonso ba Bena Isalele unaka mbila bua kulameye bantu banyi ne, Wewe kuakungibakila nsubu wa cèdre bualu kai, anyi?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Nunku newambile muntu wanyi Davidi ne, Yehowa wa mu diulu udi wamba ne, Nakakubikila mu mpangu ya mikoko hawakadi ulama mikoko, nakakuvuisha mukelenge ku mutu kua bantu banyi Bena Isalele;" 
1Chronicles17:8 nakadi nʼebe kuonso kuwakaya, nakashiha bena lukuna bebe bonso ku mpala kuebe; nenkuvuishe dina dinene bu mena a badi ne butumbi hanshi ha buloba." 
1Chronicles17:9 Nensunguile bantu banyi Bena Isalele muaba, nembajadike bimpe, bua bobo bashikame mu muaba wabo, kabena bumushibue kabidi; bena tshimbambila kabena babahaula kabidi bu muakenzabo diambedi;" 
1Chronicles17:10 bu munakenza ku dituku dinakela mukenji wanyi bua balumbuluishi bikale ku mutu kua bantu banyi Bena Isalele, ne nempite bantu bonso bakadi nʼebe lukuna bukole. Ndi nkuambila kabidi ne, Yehowa neakuibakile nsubu." 
1Chronicles17:11 Hakumbana matuku ebe bua wewe kuya kudi bankambua bebe, nenjadike umue wa bana bebe balume badi bakulonda ku nyima; nenjadike bukelenge buandi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Yeye neangibakile nsubu, nenjadike nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles17:13 Meme nengikale tatu wandi, yeye neikale muana wanyi; tshiena ngumusha luse luanyi lujalame kudiye bu munakalûmusha kudi wakadi ku mpala kuebe;" 
1Chronicles17:14 luidi nemmujadike mu nsubu muanyi ne mu bukelenge buanyi tshiendelele; nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge neajadikibue tshiendelele. 
1Chronicles17:15 Nunku Natana wakambila Davidi mei â onso, wakamuawila tshikena kumona etshi tshionso." 
1Chronicles17:16 Hashishe mukelenge Davidi wakabuela mu nsubu, wakashikama ku mpala kua Yehowa, wakamba ne, Yehowa Nzambi, meme nganyi ne ba mu nsubu muanyi mbanganyi bua wewe wakulua nʼanyi tô ne ku dituku edi?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Nzambi, bualu ebu buakadi bukese ku mpala kuebe; kadi wewe wakuamba bua nsubu wa mundi webe musangu mule, wewe wakuntumbisha bu muntu munene, wewe Yehowa Nzambi." 
1Chronicles17:18 Davidi udi mumanye mua kukuambila mei kai makuabo bua butumbi buwakuvuisha muntu webe? Bualu bua wewe udi mumanye muntu webe. 
1Chronicles17:19 Yehowa, bua muntu webe, ne bua malu adi mu mutshima webe, wewe wakuenza malu â onso manene bua kumumanyisha malu â onso." 
1Chronicles17:20 Yehowa, kakuena mukuabo bu wewe, kakuena Nzambi mukuabo ku mpala kuebe, bu mudi malu onso atuakunvua ku matshu etu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Tshisamba kai tshikuabo tshia hanshi ha buloba tshidi bu bantu bebe Bena Isalele, tshiakaya Nzambi kudihikula bu bantu bandi mene, bua kubavuisha dina dinene ku malu manene ne a kukema hawakihata bisamba bikuabo ku mpala kua bantu bebe bawakahikula mu Ejipitu?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Bualu bua wewe wakasungula bantu bebe Bena Isalele bua kubavuisha bantu bebe tshiendelele; ne wewe, Yehowa, wakalua Nzambi wabo." 
1Chronicles17:23 Yehowa, dî diwakamba bua mundi webe ne bua nsubu wandi, dijadikibue tshiendelele; wenze bu muwakuamba." 
1Chronicles17:24 Dina diebe dijadikibue, ditumbishibue tshiendelele, ne, Yehowa wa misumba udi Nzambi wa Isalele, Nzambi mene kudi Bena Isalele; ne nsubu wa Davidi muntu webe udi mujadikibue ku mpala kuebe tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles17:25 Bualu bua wewe, Nzambi wanyi, wakumanyisha muntu webe ne, Nenkuibakile nsubu; nunku muntu webe wakadi ne dianyisha bua kutendeleleye ku mpala kuebe." 
1Chronicles17:26 Katataka, Yehowa, wewe udi Nzambi ne wakalaya muntu webe bualu ebu buimpe;" 
1Chronicles17:27 katataka uvudishile nsubu wa muntu webe disanka, bua kushaleye ku mpala kuebe tshiendelele; bualu bua tshiudi uvudishile disanka, Yehowa, netshikale ne disanka tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles18:1 Ku nyima kua malu â Davidi wakaluangana ne Bena Peleshete, wakabahita bukole, wakanyenga Gata ne misoko yakadi ha buihi mu bianza bia Bena Peleshete." 
1Chronicles18:2 Wakahita Bena Moaba bukole; Bena Moaba bakatua bahika ba Davidi, bakafila milambu kudiye." 
1Chronicles18:3 Davidi wakahita Hadadezê, mukelenge wa Zoba, bukole tô ne ku Hamata, hakayeye bua kujadika bukelenge buandi kukala kua musulu wa Pelata." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davidi wakamunyenga tshinunu tshia makalu ne bena nvita binunu muanda mutekete bakadi benda ha nyima ha tubalu ne bena nvita binunu makumi abidi bakadi benda hanshi; Davidi wakakosa tubalu tuabo tua makalu mijilu yatu ya bikono, kadi wakasungula tukuabo tuakakumbana ku makalu andi lukama." 
1Chronicles18:5 Hakafuma Bena Sulia ku Damaseke bua kukuatshishabo Hadadezê, mukelenge wa Zoba, Davidi wakashiha Bena Sulia binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
1Chronicles18:6 Hashishe Davidi wakateka masalayi andi mu Damaseke wa mu Sulia; Bena Sulia bakatua bahika ba Davidi, bakafila milambu kudiye. Yehowa wakaha Davidi bakole bua kutamba bena lukuna bandi kuonso kuakayeye." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davidi wakanyenga ngabu ya or yakadi nʼai bantu ba Hadadezê, wakalua nʼai ku Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles18:8 Davidi wakanyenga biamu bia mitaku bia bungi ku Tibehata ne ku Kunu, misoko ya Hadadezê; Solomo wakatula nʼabi tshiowelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku ne makunshi ne mpanza ya tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
1Chronicles18:9 Hakunvua Tou, mukelenge wa Hamata, ne, Davidi wakashiha masalayi onso a Hadadezê, mukelenge wa Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 yeye wakatuma Hadolama muanʼandi mulume kudi mukelenge Davidi bua kumuela muoyo, ne bua kumuvudishileye disanka bualu bua yeye wakadi muluangane ne Hadadezê, wakamuhita bukole; bualu bua Hadadezê wakadi uluangana ne Tou; yeye wakalua ne mpanza ya mishindu yonso ya or ne ya argent ne ya tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
1Chronicles18:11 Davidi wakabijidila kudi Yehowa ne argent ne or biakanyengeye kabidi kudi bisamba bionso: kudi Bena Edome ne kudi Bena Moaba ne kudi Bena Amona ne kudi Bena Peleshete ne kudi Bena Amaleka. 
1Chronicles18:12 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, Abishai, muana wa Seluya, wakashiha Bena Edome binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu mu Tshibanda tshia Luehu." 
1Chronicles18:13 Wakateka masalayi mu misoko ya Edome; Bena Edome bonso bakalua bahika ba Davidi. Yehowa wakaha Davidi bukole bua kutamba bena lukuna bandi kuonso kuakayeye. 
1Chronicles18:14 Davidi wakakokesha Bena Isalele bonso mu kulumbulula kuimpe ne mu buakane kudi bantu bandi bonso. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, wakadi ku mutu kua masalayi andi onso; Yehoshafata, muana wa Ahiluda, wakadi mufundi wa malu a tshisamba;" 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoka, muana wa Ahituba, ne Abimeleke, muana wa Ebeyatâ, bakadi bakuidi; Shawesha wakadi secrétaire;" 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Kelete ne Bena Pelete; bana balume ba Davidi bakadi tuhita ha buihi ne mukelenge." 
1Chronicles19:1 Ku nyima kua malu â Nahasha, mukelenge wa Bena Amona, wakafua, ne muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
1Chronicles19:2 Davidi wakamba ne, Nenfuile Hanuna, muana wa Nahasha, luse, bualu bua tatu wandi wakadi nʼanyi luse. Nunku Davidi wakamutumina ba-messager bua kumusamba bua lufu lua tatu wandi. Ba-messager ba Davidi bakafika ku buloba bua Bena Amona kudi Hanuna bua kumusamba." 
1Chronicles19:3 Kadi baminyampala ba Bena Amona bakambila Hanuna ne, Udi wela meji ne, Davidi udi utumbisha tatu webe bualu bua yeye wakutuma basambi aba kûdi, anyi? Bantu bandi kabakuluila bua kukebakeba ne bua kuhaula ne bua kutentekela buloba, anyi?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Nunku Hanuna wakakuata bantu ba Davidi, wakababeya nsuki, wakabakosa bilulu biabo hankatshi ku mataku abo mene, wakabihata." 
1Chronicles19:5 Hashishe bantu bakuabo bakaya, bakamanyisha Davidi muakenzeleye bantu bandi. Yeye wakatuma bantu bua kusangakenabo nʼabo; bualu bua bantu bandi aba bakadi ne bundu bunene. Mukelenge wakabambila ne, Nushale ku Yeleko tô ne hamena nsuki yenu kabidi, hashishe nuhingane." 
1Chronicles19:6 Hakamona Bena Amona ne, Tuakadivuisha bu tshintu tshibi kudi Davidi, Hanuna ne Bena Amona bakatuma tshinunu tshia ntalanta ya argent bua kusumbabo makalu ne bena nvita badi benda ha nyima ha tubalu ku Mesopotamia ne ku Alama-mâka ne ku Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Nunku bakasumba makalu binunu makumi asatu ne bibidi; ne mukelenge wa Mâka ne bantu bandi bakalua, bakashimika ntenta yabo ku mpala kua Medeba. Bena Amona bakadisangisha ku misoko yabo yonso bua kuluanganabo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Hakunvua Davidi lumu elu, yeye wakatuma Yoaba ne bena nvita bandi bonso ba bukitu." 
1Chronicles19:9 Bena Amona bakaluhuka, bakasa mualu wa nvita ku tshibuelelu tshia musoko; ne bakelenge bakalua kudibo bakadi ha buabo mu tshisuku." 
1Chronicles19:10 Hakamona Yoaba ne, Bakasa mualu wa nvita ku mpala kuandi ne ku nyima kuandi, yeye wakasungula bena bukitu ba munkatshi mua Bena Isalele bonso, wakasa mualu wa nvita kudi Bena Sulia." 
1Chronicles19:11 Wakafila Bena Isalele bakuabo mu bianza bia Abishai muanʼabo; bobo bakasa mualu wa nvita kudi Bena Amona. 
1Chronicles19:12 Yeye wakamba ne, Biampita Bena Sulia bukole, hashishe nuenu nulue kumatshisha; ne bianuhita Bena Amona bukole, hashishe nendue bua kunukuatshisha." 
1Chronicles19:13 Muikale ne dikima, tuikale balume mene bualu bua bana betu ne bua misoko ya Nzambi wetu; Yehowa enze malu adi mimpe ku mesu kuandi." 
1Chronicles19:14 Nunku Yoaba ne bantu bakadi ha buihi nʼandi bakasemena ha buihi ne Bena Sulia bua kuluanganabo nʼabo; bobo bakanyema ku mpala kuandi. 
1Chronicles19:15 Hakamona Bena Amona ne, Bena Sulia badi banyema, bobo kabidi bakanyema ku mpala kua Abishai, muanʼabo ne Yoaba, bakabuela mu musoko. Hashishe Yoaba wakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Hakamona Bena Sulia ne, Tuakutambibua bukole kudi Bena Isalele, bobo bakatuma ba-messager bua kubikila Bena Sulia bakuabo bakadi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata ne Shofaka, kapitene ka masalayi, a Hadadezê wakadi ku mutu kuabo." 
1Chronicles19:17 Bakamanyisha Davidi bualu ebu; yeye wakasangisha Bena Isalele bonso, wakasabuka dishiya dia Yadene, Wakafika kudibo, wakasa mualu wa nvita. Nunku hakasa Davidi mualu wa nvita kudi Bena Sulia, bobo bakaluangana nʼandi." 
1Chronicles19:18 Bena Sulia bakanyema ku mpala kua Bena Isalele; Davidi wakashiha Bena Sulia bakadi benda mu makalu binunu muanda mutekete ne binunu makumi anai bakadi benda hanshi; wakashiha Shofaka, kapitene ka masalayi, kabidi." 
1Chronicles19:19 Hakamona bantu ba Hadadezê ne, Tuakutambibua bukole kudi Bena Isalele, bakanvuangana ne Davidi, bakamukuatshila mudimu; Bena Sulia bakahidia kukuatshisha Bena Amona kabidi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Hashishe mu tshikondo tshidi bakelenge baluhuka bua kuluanganabo, Yoaba wakaya ne masalayi andi, wakahaula buloba bua Bena Amona, wakatshintshimika musoko wa Laba. Kadi Davidi wakashala mu Yelushalema. Yoaba wakahita Laba bukole, wakahaula musoko." 
1Chronicles20:2 Davidi wakangata tshifulu tshia butumbi ku mutu kua mukelenge wabo, walu dikisha bujitu buatshi bu ntalanta wa or, tshiakadi tshilengeshibue ne mabue a mushinga mukole; bakatshiteka ha mutu ha Davidi; bakalua ne bintu bia bungi biakanyengabo mu musoko." 
1Chronicles20:3 Yeye wakahatuka ne bantu bakadimu, wakabatuma ku mudimu ne scies ne nkasu ya biamu ne bisui. Davidi wakenzela ba mu misoko yonso ya Bena Amona nunku. Davidi ne bantu bandi bonso bakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ku nyima kua malu â Bena Peleshete ba mu Gezê bakabanga kuluangana; hashishe Sibekai, Muena Husha, wakashiha Sipai, umue wa bana balume ba nfiondo; bobo bakateketa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Bena Peleshete bakaluangana kabidi; Elehanana, muana wa Yaî, wakashiha Lami, muanʼabo ne Goleyata, Muena Gata; mulabi wa difuma diandi wakadi bu mutshi udibo bakuma nʼau bilulu." 
1Chronicles20:6 Nvita yakadi mu Gata kabidi, kuakadi muntu munene wakadi ne minu ne bana ba makasa makumi abidi ne binai, minu isambombo ku tshianza ne ku tshianza, ne bana ba makasa basambombo ku dikasa ne ku dikasa; wakaledibua kudi muntu wa nfiondo." 
1Chronicles20:7 Hakafuneye bulobo kudi Bena Isalele, Yonatana, muana wa Shimea, muanʼabo ne Davidi, wakamushiha." 
1Chronicles20:8 Bobo bakadi baledibue kudi muntu wa nfiondo wa mu Gata; bakashihibua ku tshianza tshia Davidi ne ku bianza bia bantu bandi. 
1Chronicles21:1 Satana wakimana ku mpala kua Bena Isalele, wakasonsola mutshima wa Davidi bua kubaleye Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles21:2 Davidi wakambila Yoaba ne tuhita tua bantu ne, Yai bienu, nubale Bena Isalele ku Bê-sheba tô ne ku Dana; nulue kundi ne dî bua meme kumanya bungi buabo." 
1Chronicles21:3 Yoaba wakamba ne, Yehowa avudishe bantu bandi misangu lukama bu mudibo katataka; kadi, mukelenge wanyi, bobo kabena bantu bebe, anyi? Mukelenge wanyi udi musue bualu ebu bishi? Yeye udi musue kubuesha Bena Isalele mu bualu bubi bishi?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kadi dî dia mukelenge diakahita dî dia Yoaba bukole. Nunku Yoaba wakahatuka, wakaya ku nseke yonso ya buloba bua Isalele, Wakafika ku Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yoaba wakamanyisha Davidi bungi bua bantu bakabalabo. Bena Isalele bonso bakadi binunu tshinunu ne binunu lukama bakadi bena nvita; Bena Yuda bakadi binunu nkama inai ne binunu makumi muanda mutekete bakadi bena nvita. 
1Chronicles21:6 Kadi kabakabala Bena Lewi ne Bena Benyamina, bualu bua dî dia mukelenge diakatondesha Yoaba." 
1Chronicles21:7 Bualu ebu buakafikisha Nzambi munda; nunku yeye wakashiha Bena Isalele bakuabo. 
1Chronicles21:8 Davidi wakambila Nzambi ne, Nakuenza bibi hanakuenza bualu ebu; kadi katataka ndi nkusengelela ne, Ubuikidile bubi bua muntu webe; bualu bua nakuenza bualu buhote." 
1Chronicles21:9 Yehowa wakambila Gada, mumonyi wa malu wa Davidi, ne," 
1Chronicles21:10 Ya, Wambile Davidi ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Ndi nteka malu asatu ku mpala kuebe; usungule bumue buau bua meme kukuenzelabu." 
1Chronicles21:11 Nunku Gada wakalua kudi Davidi, wakamuambila ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Usungule bûdi musue:" 
1Chronicles21:12 bua tshiole tshikale tô bidimu bisatu; anyi bua bena lukuna bakuhite bukole ngondo isatu ne miele yabo ya nvita; anyi bua muele wa Yehowa wikale mu buloba bu tshihuhu matuku asatu, ne muanjelo wa Yehowa ashihe bantu mu nseke yonso ya buloba bua Isalele. Nunku wele meji a dî dindi mua kuikala nʼadi bua kuambila wakuntuma." 
1Chronicles21:13 Davidi wakambila Gada ne, Ndi hankatshikatshi ha malu makole, ndi nkusengelela bua meme kudishinda mu bianza bia Yehowa, bualu bua luse luandi ludi lunene; kuitabushi bua meme kudishinda mu bianza bia bantu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Nunku Yehowa wakatumina Bena Isalele tshihuhu; Bena Isalele binunu makumi muanda mutekete bakafua. 
1Chronicles21:15 Nzambi wakatuma muanjelo ku Yelushalema bua kushiheye bantu bakadimu; ne hakambeye kushiha bantu, Yehowa wakamona, wakakudimuna mutshima wandi ku bualu ebu bubi; wakambila muanjelo wa lufu ne, Kuakushika, ukande tshianza tshiebe. Muanjelo wa Yehowa wakadi wimana ku tshihehuidi tshia Ônana, Muena Yebuse." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davidi wakabanduluka, wakamona muanjelo wa Yehowa muimane hankatshi ha diulu ne buloba ne muele wa nvita mu tshianza tshiandi tshiolola ha mutu ha Yelushalema. Hashishe Davidi ne bakulu baluate bilulu bikayabala bakatua mpala yabo hanshi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davidi wakambila Nzambi ne, Ka meme eu wakuela mukenji bua kubala bantu. Meme mene nakenza bualu ebu bubi; kadi mikoko ei, yoyi yakenza tshinyi? Yehowa, ndi nkusengelela bua tshianza tshiebe tshikale kundi ne ku nsubu wa tatu wanyi; kadi katshikadi kudi bantu bebe bua bobo bikale ne tshihuhu etshi." 
1Chronicles21:18 Hashishe muanjelo wa Yehowa wakelela Gada mukenji bua kuambileye Davidi, bua Davidi kuya kuashila Yehowa tshioshelu ku tshihehudi tshia Ônana, Muena Yebuse." 
1Chronicles21:19 Nunku Davidi wakaya ku dî dia Gada diakambeye mu dina dia Yehowa. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ônana wakalukila, wakamona muanjelo, ne bana bandi balume banai bakadi nʼandi bakasokoma, Ônana wakadi uhehula blé." 
1Chronicles21:21 Hakalua Davidi kudi Ônana, Ônana wakamona Davidi, wakaluhuka ku tshihehudi, wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ku mpala kua Davidi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Hashishe Davidi wakambila Ônana ne, Umpe muaba wa tshihehuidi etshi, bua meme kuashilahu Yehowa tshioshelu; utshimpe ku mushinga muakane bua tshihuhu etshi tshikandikibue kudi bantu." 
1Chronicles21:23 Ônana wakambila Davidi ne, Utshiangate, mukelenge wanyi enze biandi malu adi mimpe ku mesu kuandi; mona, ndi nkuha ngombe ya mulambu wa kuosha ne mitshi ya mu tshihehuidi bua nkunyi ne blé bua mulambu wa bukula; ndi nkuha bionso." 
1Chronicles21:24 Davidi wakambila Ônana ne, Nansha. Nenkuhe mushinga udi muakane; bualu bua tshiena ngangatshila Yehowa bintu biebe, tshiena nfila mulamba undi tshiyi mufidile mushinga." 
1Chronicles21:25 Nunku Davidi wakaha Ônana nshekele ya or nkama isambombo bua muaba wandi. 
1Chronicles21:26 Davidi wakashilahu Yehowa tshioshelu, wakafilahu milambu ya kuosha ne ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, wakabikila dina dia Yehowa; yeye wakitaba ne kahia ka mu diulu ha mutu ha tshioshelu." 
1Chronicles21:27 Yehowa wakela muanjelo dî; yeye wakabuesha muele wandi wa nvita mu luhuhu. 
1Chronicles21:28 Hakamona Davidi ne, Yehowa wakitaba kundi ku tshihehudi tshia Ônana, Muena Yebuse, yeye wakafilaku milambu." 
1Chronicles21:29 Bualu bua nsubu wa kusambakena wa Yehowa wakasabo kudi Mose mu tshihela ne tshioshelu tshiandi biakadi ku mutu kua mukuna wa Gibeona mu tshikondo atshi. 
1Chronicles21:30 Kadi Davidi kakamanya mua kuyaku bua kuebesheye Nzambi bualu bua yeye wakadi utshina muele wa mata wa muanjelo wa Yehowa. 
1Chronicles22:1 Hashishe Davidi wakamba ne, Eu udi nsubu wa Yehowa Nzambi, etshi ntshioshelu tshia Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles22:2 Davidi wakela mukenji wandi bua kusangishabo bantu bakadi bashikama mu buloba bua Isalele diambedi; wakasungula bahandi ba mabue bua kusongabo mabue a kuibaka nʼau ntempelo wa Nzambi. 
1Chronicles22:3 Davidi wakalongolola biamu bifike bia bungi bua kufulabo nʼabi misamadi ya kuenzabo nʼai bibi ne mabaya makuabo; wakasangisha biamu bia mitaku biakadibo kabayi bamanye mua kubala bujitu buabi; 
1Chronicles22:4 ne mitshi ya cèdre yakadi bungi buakadibo kabayi bamanye; bualu bua Bena Sidona ne Bena Tulo bakalua kudi Davidi ne mitshi ya cèdre ya bungi. 
1Chronicles22:5 Davidi wakamba ne, Muanʼanyi Solomo utshidi nsongalume udi mutekete, ne nsubu utudi tuibakila Yehowa udi ne bua kuikala muakane ne wa butumbi ku nseke yonso ya buloba; nunku meme nembange kusangisha bintu. Nunku Davidi wakasangisha bintu bia bungi diambedi yeye kayi muanze kufua." 
1Chronicles22:6 Hashishe yeye wakabikila Solomo muanʼandi, wakamuelela mukenji bua kuibakileye Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, nsubu." 
1Chronicles22:7 Davidi wakambila Solomo muanʼandi ne. Bualu buakadi mu mutshima wanyi bua kuibaka nsubu mu dina dia Yehowa Nzambi wanyi. 
1Chronicles22:8 Kadi dî dia Yehowa diakalua kundi ne, Wewe wakamatshisha mashi a bungi hanshi, wakaluangana nvita ya bungi; wewe kuena ungibakila nsubu bua meme kutekamu dina dianyi nansha, bualu bua wewe wakamatshisha mashi a bungi hanshi ha buloba ku mesu kuanyi." 
1Chronicles22:9 Kadi mona, wewe neulele muana wa balume, neikale muena ditalala; nemmuhe ditalala kudi bena lukuna bonso badi bamunyunguluke; bualu bua dina diandi nedikale Solomo; nenvuishe ditalala ne dikisha mu buloba bua Isalele mu matuku andi." 
1Chronicles22:10 Yeye neibakile dina dianyi nsubu; yeye neikale muanʼanyi, meme nengikale tatu wandi; nenjadike nkuasa wa bukelenge buandi mu Isalele tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles22:11 Katataka, muanʼanyi, Yehowa ikale nʼebe; wikale ne diakalengele, wibakile Yehowa, Nzambi webe, nsubu bu muakuambeye bualu buebe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kadi Yehowa akuhe lungenyi ne meji a kujingulula nʼau malu, akuteke ku mutu kua Bena Isalele; bua wewe kutumikila mikenji ya Yehowa, Nzambi webe." 
1Chronicles22:13 Hashishe wewe newikale ne diakalengele biwadimuka bua kutumikila mikenji ne mei biakambila Yehowa Mose bua Bena Isalele; wikale ne dikima ne mutshima mukole; kutshinyi, kukuatshiki buowa." 
1Chronicles22:14 Mona, mu kuhuekela kuanyi nakamana kulongoluela nsubu wa Yehowa binunu lukama lua ntalanta ya or ne binunu tshinunu bia ntalanta ya argent ne biamu bia mitaku ne biamu bifike bidibo kabayi bamanye mua kubala, bualu bua bidi bia bungi; nakalongolola mabaya ne mabue kabidi; wewe udi mumanye mua kusangishila bintu ha mutu habi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, bena mudimu ba bungi badi nʼebe, bahandi ba mabue ne ba mabaya ne bantu bonso badi ne meji a kuenza midimu yonso," 
1Chronicles22:16 ya or ne ya argent ne ya tshiamu tshia mitaku ne ya tshiamu tshifike, bidi kabiyi mua kubadibua. Juka, ubange mudimu eu; Yehowa ikale nʼebe." 
1Chronicles22:17 Davidi wakelela baminyampala bonso ba mu Isalele mukenji bua kukuatshishabo Solomo muanʼandi, wamba ne," 
1Chronicles22:18 Yehowa Nzambi wenu kena nʼenu, anyi? Yeye kakanuha ditalala mu nseke yonso, anyi? Bualu bua yeye wakafila bena buloba ebu mu bianza bienu; bena buloba bakateketa ku mpala kua Yehowa ne ku mpala kua bantu bandi." 
1Chronicles22:19 Nunku nutokeshe mitshima yenu ne mioyo yenu bua kukeba Yehowa, Nzambi wenu; jukai, nuashile Yehowa Nzambi muaba wandi wa tshijila, bua nuenu nulue ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa ne bintu bia tshijila bia Nzambi mu nsubu unudi mubaka mu dina dia Yehowa." 
1Chronicles23:1 Davidi wakadi muntu mununu wa matuku a bungi; yeye wakahingisha Solomo muanʼandi mu bukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele. 
1Chronicles23:2 Yeye wakasangisha baminyampala bonso mu Isalele ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Bakabala Bena Lewi babange kudi bakamana kukumbana bidimu makumi asatu tô ne ku mutu; bungi buabo bakabalabo muntu ne muntu buakadi binunu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu. 
1Chronicles23:4 Bakasungula binunu makumi abidi ne binai bua kuikalabo tuhita tua bena mudimu ba mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bantu binunu bisambombo biabo bakadi balami ne balumbuluishi; 
1Chronicles23:5 bantu binunu binai bakadi balami ba ku bibi; bantu binunu binai bakatumbisha Yehowa ne bintu biakenza Davidi bia kumutumbisha nʼabi. 
1Chronicles23:6 Davidi wakabatahulula mu milongo bu muakadi bana balume ba Lewi: Gêshona ne Kohata ne Melali. 
1Chronicles23:7 Ba Bena Gêshona: Ladana ne Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bana balume ba Ladana: Yehiele wakadi kahita, ne Zetama ne Yoele, basatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Bana balume ba Shimei: Shelomota ne Haziele ne Halana, basatu. Aba bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu ba Ladana." 
1Chronicles23:10 Bana balume ba Shimei: Yahata ne Zina ne Yeusha ne Belia. Aba banai bakadi bana balume ba Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahata wakadi kahita, Ziza muibidi; kadi Yeusha ne Belia kabakadi ne bana balume ba bungi; nunku bobo bakadi babadibue mu nsubu umue wa batatu babo." 
1Chronicles23:12 Bana balume ba Kohata: Amalama, Yisehâ, Hebelone, Uziele, banai." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bana balume ba Amalama: Alona ne Mose; Alona wakadi mujidibue bua yeye ajidile bintu bia tshijila, yeye ne bana bandi balume tshiendelele, bua kuoshelabo Yehowa musenga wa manananshi, ne bua kumukuatshilabo mudimu ne bua kuvudishilabo bantu disanka mu dina diandi tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kadi bualu bua Mose, muntu wa Nzambi, bana bandi bakadi babadibue munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia Lewi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Bana balume ba Mose: Gêshoma ne Eliezê. 
1Chronicles23:16 Bana balume ba Gêshoma: Shebuele kahita. 
1Chronicles23:17 Bana balume ba Eliezê bakadi Lehabeya kahita; Eliezê kakadi ne bana bakuabo nansha; kadi bana ba Lehabeya bakadi ba bungi. 
1Chronicles23:18 Bana ba Yisehâ: Shelomita kahita. 
1Chronicles23:19 Bana ba Hebelone: Yeliya kahita, Amalia muibidi ne Yahaziele muisatu ne Yakemama muinai." 
1Chronicles23:20 Bana balume ba Uziele: Mika kahita ne Yishiya muibidi. 
1Chronicles23:21 Bana ba Melali: Mali ne Mushi. Bana ba Mali: Eleazâ ne Kishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazâ wakafua kayi ne bana balume; wakadi anu ne bana bakashi; ne bana babo balume, bana ba Kishi, bakababaka bu bakashi babo." 
1Chronicles23:23 Bana ba Mushi: Mali ne Edê ne Yelemota, basatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Aba bakadi bana balume ba Lewi ku nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo bu bantu bakabalabo ku mena abo ku muntu ne muntu, bakadi benza mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa, bakadi ne bidimu bikumbane makumi abidi tô ne ku mutu." 
1Chronicles23:25 Bualu bua Davidi wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, wakaha bantu bandi ditalala; yeye udi mushikame mu Yelushalema tshiendelele;" 
1Chronicles23:26 ne Bena Lewi kabena ne bualu bua kutuala kabidi nsubu wa tshitendelelu ne bintu biakadimu bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu. 
1Chronicles23:27 Bualu bua bakabala bana balume ba Lewi bakadi bakumbana bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ku mutu, bu muakadi mei a kunshikidilu a Davidi." 
1Chronicles23:28 Mudimu wabo wakadi wa kukuatshisha bana ba Alona mu midimu yabo ya mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne mu biendedi ne mu nsubu mikese ne mu kujidila kua bintu bionso ne mu midimu yonso yakenzabo mu nsubu wa Nzambi; 
1Chronicles23:29 ne bua kulongololabo bidia bioshibue ne bukula bua milambu ya bukula bubotesha, nansha bua mikata idi kayiyi ne luevene, nansha bua bidia biakalambabo mu malonga, nansha bua bidia biakinabo mu mai ne bua bihikidi bia mishindu yonso;" 
1Chronicles23:30 ne bua kuimanabo lunkelu ku difuku ku dituku bua kusakidilabo Yehowa ne bua kumutumbishabo, ne dilolo kabidi;" 
1Chronicles23:31 ne bua kufilabo milambu ya kuosha kudi Yehowa ku matuku a lumingu ne bakabala ngondo ne ku matuku akatuabo bidia bia disanka ku tshikondo tshiau misangu yonso ku mpala kua Yehowa; 
1Chronicles23:32 ne bua bobo balame nsubu wa kusambakena ne muaba wa tshijila, ne bana balume ba Alona, bana babo, mu mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
1Chronicles24:1 Milongo ya bana balume ba Alona yakadi nunku. Bana balume ba Alona: Nadaba ne Abihu, Eleazâ ne Itamâ." 
1Chronicles24:2 Kadi Nadaba ne Abihu bakafua diambedi tatu wabo kayi muanji kufua; kabakadi ne bana nansha; nunku Eleazâ ne Itamâ bakenza mudimu wa buakuidi. 
1Chronicles24:3 Davidi wakasungula Sadoka wa bana balume ba Eleazâ ne Ahimeleke wa bana balume ba Itamâ, wakabatahulula mu milongo yabo mu midimu yabo." 
1Chronicles24:4 Bantu banene ba munkatshi mua bana balume ba Eleazâ bakahita bana balume ba Itamâ bungi; bakabatahulula nunku: ba bana balume ba Eleazâ ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo bakadi dikumi ne basambombo; ne ba bana balume ba Itamâ bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo bakadi muanda mukulu. 
1Chronicles24:5 Bakabatahulula ku nshobo ku mudimu ne ku mudimu; bualu bua bakadi ne tuhita tua mu muaba wa tshijila ne tua Nzambi tua munkatshi mua bana ba Eleazâ ne tua Itamâ kabidi. 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaya, muana wa Netanele, mufundi, wakadi Muena Lewi, wakafunda menʼabo ku mpala kua mukelenge ne ku mpala kua baminyampala ne Sadoka muakuidi, ne Ahimeleke, muana wa Ebeyatâ, ne ku mpala kua nakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu abo ne ya bakuidi ne ya Bena Lewi; bakasungula nsubu umue wa batatuʼabo ba Eleazâ, ne umue wa batatuʼabo ba Itamâ." 
1Chronicles24:7 Nshobo ya kumudilu yakakuata Yehoyada, mibidi yakakuata Yedaya;" 
1Chronicles24:8 misatu yakakuata Halima, mmai yakakuata Seolima," 
1Chronicles24:9 mitanu yakakuata Malakiya, Disambombo yakakuata Miyamina," 
1Chronicles24:10 ya muanda mutekete yakakuata Hakosa, ya muanda mukulu yakakuata Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 ya tshitema yakakuata Yeshua, ya dikumi yakakuata Shekanya," 
1Chronicles24:12 ya dikumi ne umue yakakuata Eleyashiba, ya dikumi ne ibidi yakakuata Yakima," 
1Chronicles24:13 ya dikumi ne isatu yakakuata Hupa, ya dikumi ne inai yakakuata Yeshebaba," 
1Chronicles24:14 ya dikumi ne itanu yakakuata Bilega, ya dikumi ne isambombo yakakuata Imê," 
1Chronicles24:15 ya dikumi ne muanda mutekete yakakuata Hezî, ya dikumi ne muanda mukulu yakakuata Hapisese," 
1Chronicles24:16 ya dikumi ne tshitema yakakuata Petahiya, ya makumi abidi yakakuata Yehekezele," 
1Chronicles24:17 ya makumi abidi ne umue yakakuata Yakina, ya makumi abidi ne ibidi yakakuata Gamula," 
1Chronicles24:18 ya makumi abidi ne isatu yakakuata Delaya, ya makumi abidi ne inai yakakuata Mâzaya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Bakabatahulula nunku mu midimu yabo bua kuhuolabo mu nsubu wa Yehowa bu muakadi mikenji yakangatabo kudi Alona tatu wabo, bu muakamuambila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
1Chronicles24:20 Bana balume bakuabo ba Lewi: ba bana ba Amalama, Shubaele; ba bana ba Shubaele, Yedeya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Ba bana ba Lehabeya, Yishiya wakadi kahita." 
1Chronicles24:22 Ba Bena Yisehâ, Shelomota; ba bana ba Shelomota, Yahata." 
1Chronicles24:23 Ba bana ba Hebelone; Yeliya wakadi kahita, Amalia muibidi, Yahaziele muisatu, Yekamama muinai." 
1Chronicles24:24 Ba bana ba Uziele: Mika; ba bana ba Mika: Shamî. 
1Chronicles24:25 Yishiya wakadi muanʼabo ne Mika; ba bana ba Yishiya: Zekâya. 
1Chronicles24:26 Bana ba Melali: Mali ne Mushi; ba bana ba Yâziya: Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Ba bana ba Melali: ba Yâziya, Beno, ne Shohama ne Zakû ne Ibeli." 
1Chronicles24:28 Ba bana ba Mali: Eleazâ wakadi kayi ne bana. 
1Chronicles24:29 Ba Kishi; bana ba Kishi: Yelamele. 
1Chronicles24:30 Ba bana ba Mushi: Mali ne Edê ne Yelimota. Aba bakadi bana balume ba Bena Lewi bu muakadi nsubu ya batatuʼabo. 
1Chronicles24:31 Bobo bakela nshobo bu muakenza bana babo bana ba Alona ku mpala kua Davidi mukelenge, ne Sadoka ne Ahimeleke, ne ku mpala kua bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo ya bakuidi ne ya Bena Lewi, nsubu ya batatuʼabo bakadi tuhita tô ne ku nsubu ya bakunyi babo." 
1Chronicles25:1 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, Davidi ne tupitene tua masalayi bakasungula bana balume bakuabo ba Asafa ne ba Hemana ne ba Yedutuna, bua kuimbabo misambu ne nzenze ne bisanji ne biamu bia kukumakasha; bungi buabo bakenza mudimu eu mu milongo yabo buakadi nunku:" 
1Chronicles25:2 ba bana ba Asafa: Zakû ne Yosefe ne Netanya ne Ashalela, bana ba Asafa, bakadi ku nyima kua Asafa, wakimba bu muakadi mukenji wa mukelenge." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ba Yedutuna, bana ba Yedutuna: Gedaliya ne Seli ne Yeshaya ne Hashabeya ne Matitiya, basambombo bakadi ku nyima kua tatu wabo Yedutuna ne nzenze, bakimba misambu ya kusakidila ne ya kutumbisha nʼai Yehowa." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ba Hemana, bana ba Hemana: Bukia, Matanaya, Uziele, Shebuele ne Yelimota, Hananya, Hanani, Eliata, Gidaleti ne Lomameti-ezê, Yoshebe-kasha, Maloti, Hotî, Mahaziota." 
1Chronicles25:5 Aba bonso bakadi bana balume ba Hemana, mumonyi wa malu a Nzambi kudi mukelenge, bakadi bela mpungi. Nzambi wakaha Hemana bana ba balume dikumi ne banai ne bana ba bakashi basatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Aba bonso bakadi ku nyima kua tatu wabo bua kuimbabo misambu mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne biamu bia kukumakasha ne bisanji ne nzenze bua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi; Asafa, Yedutuna ne Hemana bakadi mu mulongo wa mukelenge." 
1Chronicles25:7 Bungi buabo basangisha ne bana babo bakadi bayishibue bua kuimbilabo Yehowa misambu, bonso bakadi ne tshimbidi tshiakane, bakadi nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mukulu ne muanda mukulu." 
1Chronicles25:8 Buonso buabo, banene ne bakese, bayishi ne bayidi, bakela nshobo bua kusungulabo mudimu wabo." 
1Chronicles25:9 Nshobo ya kumudilu wa Asafa yakakuata Yosefe; mibidi yakakuata Gedaliya; yeye ne bana babo bakadi dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:10 misatu yakakuata Zakû ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:11 mmai yakakuata Yiseli ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:12 mitanu yakakuata Netanya ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:13 misambombo yakakuata Bukia ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:14 ya muanda mutekete yakakuata Yeshalela ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:15 ya muanda mukulu yakakuata Yeshaya ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:16 ya tshitema yakakuata Matanaya ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:17 ya dikumi yakakuata Shimei ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:18 ya dikumi ne umue yakakuata Azalele ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:19 ya dikumi ne ibidi yakakuata Hashabeya ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:20 ya dikumi ne isatu yakakuata Shubaele ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:21 ya dikumi ne inai yakakuata Matitiya ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:22 ya dikumi ne itanu yakakuata Yelemota ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:23 ya dikumi ne isambombo yakakuata Hananya ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:24 ya dikumi ne muanda mutekete yakakuata Yoshebekasha ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:25 ya dikumi ne muanda mukulu yakakuata Hanani ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:26 ya dikumi ne tshitema yakakuata Maloti ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:27 ya makumi abidi yakakuata Eliata ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:28 ya makumi abidi ne umue yakakuata Hotî ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:29 ya makumi abidi ne ibidi yakakuata Gidaleti ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:30 ya makumi abidi ne isatu yakakuata Mahaziota ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi; 
1Chronicles25:31 ya makumi abidi ne inai yakakuata Lomameti-ezê ne bana bandi ne bana babo dikumi ne babidi. 
1Chronicles26:1 Mudimu wa balami ba bibi: ba Bena Kola, Meshelemeya, muana wa Kole, wa bana ba Asafa." 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemeya wakalela bana balume: Zekâya muanʼa bute, Yediele muibidi, Zebadaya muisatu, Yatamele muinai," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elama muitanu, Yehohanana muisambombo, Eleyahoenai wa muanda mutekete." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obeda-edome wakalela bana balume: Shemaya muanda bute, Yehozabada muibidi, Yoa muisatu, Sakâ muinai, Netanele muitanu," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiele muisambombo, Yisakâ wa muanda mutekete, Peuletai wa muanda mukulu; bualu bua Nzambi wakamusankisha." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaya muanʼandi wa balume wakalela bana ba balume kabidi bakakokesha mu nsubu wa tatu wabo bualu bua bobo bakadi bantu ba bukitu. 
1Chronicles26:7 Bana ba Shemaya: Oteni ne Lefaele ne Obeda ne Elezabada, bana babo Elihu ne Semakaya bakadi bena bukitu." 
1Chronicles26:8 Aba bonso bakadi bana ba Obeda-edome; bobo ne bana babo balela ne bana babo bakadi ne bukole bua kuenza nʼabu mudimu; ba Obeda-edome bakadi makumi asambombo ne bantu bahidi. 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemeya wakadi ne bana balume ne bana babo, bena bukitu dikumi ne muanda mukulu." 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa wa bana balume ba Melali wakadi ne bana balume: Shimeli wakadi kahita (yeye kakadi muanʼa bute kadi tatu wandi wakamuhingisha kahita)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilekiya muibidi, Tebalaya muisatu, Zekâya muinai; bana balume bonso ba Hosa ne bana babo bakadi dikumi ne basatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Munkatshi mua bantu aba bakasungula balami ba bibi, tuhita mene tuakadi ne mudimu watu bu bana babo mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
1Chronicles26:13 Buonso buabo ne banene ne bakese bakela nshobo bu muakadi nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ku tshibi ne ku tshibi." 
1Chronicles26:14 Nshobo ya ku esete yakakuata Shelemeya. Bakelela muanʼandi Zekâya, muena meji makane, nshobo; nshobo yandi yakakuata ku nôde." 
1Chronicles26:15 Yakakuata Obeda-edome ku sude; ne bana bandi ku tshiluminu. 
1Chronicles26:16 Yakakuata Shupima ne Hosa ku wesete, ku tshibi tshia Shalekete ku tshibandilu tshidi tshibandaku, muntu ne muntu mulamate ku kutentekela kuandi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Bena Lewi basambombo bakadi ku esete; banai ku node ku dituku ku dituku; banai ku Sude ku dituku ku dituku, ne babidi babidi ku tshilaminu." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ku Pâbâ ku wesete banai ku tshibandilu, ne babidi ku Pâbâ." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ei yakadi milongo ya balami ba bibi, ba bana balume ba Bena Kola ne ba Melali." 
1Chronicles26:20 Ahiya wa Bena Lewi wakadi mulami wa bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Nzambi ne wa bibutshilu bia bintu bia tshijila. 
1Chronicles26:21 Bana ba Lâdana, bana ba Bena Gêshona ba Lâdana, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo ba Lâdana, Muena Gêshona: Yehieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bana ba Yehieli: Zetama ne Yoele muanʼabo bakadi balami ba bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
1Chronicles26:23 Ba Bena Amalama ne ba Bena Yisehâ ne ba Bena Hebelone ne ba Bena Uziele: 
1Chronicles26:24 Shebuele, muana wa Gêshoma, muana wa Mose, wakadi kahita ka balami ba bibutshilu." 
1Chronicles26:25 Bana babo: Eliezê ne muanʼandi Lehabeya ne Yeshaya muanʼandi ne Yolama muanʼandi ne Zikeli muanʼandi ne Shelomota muanʼandi. 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomota eu ne bana babo bakadi ku mutu kua bibutshilu bia bintu bionso bia tshijila biakajidilabo kudi Davidi mukelenge ne kudi ba ku mutu kua nsubu ya hatatu babo, ne kudi tupitene tua bantu tshinunu ne tua bantu lukama ne kudi tupitene tua masalayi." 
1Chronicles26:27 Bakajidila bia mu bintu biakanyengabo mu nvita bua kulongololabo nʼabi nsubu wa Yehowa. 
1Chronicles26:28 Bintu bionso biakajidila Samuele, mumonyi wa malu a Nzambi, ne Shaula, muana wa Kishi, ne Abinê, muana wa Nê, ne Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, ne muntu yonso wakajidila bintu, biobi biakadi mu bianza bia Shelomota ne bia bana babo." 
1Chronicles26:29 Ba Bena Yisehâ; Kenanya ne bana bandi balume bakadi ne mudimu wabo ha mbelu ha ntempelo mu Isalele bu bakokeshi ne balumbuluishi. 
1Chronicles26:30 Ba Bena Hebelone: Hashabeya ne bana babo, bena bukitu tshinunu ne nkama muanda mutekete, bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Isalele dishiya dia Yadene ku wesete mu malu onso a Yehowa ne a mudimu wa mukelenge." 
1Chronicles26:31 Wa Bena Hebelone: Yeliya wakadi kahita ka Bena Hebelone mene bu muakadi bikondo bia batatuʼabo. Bakabakeba mu tshidimu tshia makumi anai tshia mu bukelenge bua Davidi, bakasangana munkatshi muabo bena bukitu ku Yazê wa mu Gilada." 
1Chronicles26:32 Bana babo, bena bukitu bakadi binunu bibidi ne nkama muanda mutekete, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bakasungudibua kudi Davidi bua kuikalabo balongolodi ba Bena Lubena ne Bena Gada ne ba tshituha tshia tshisamba tshia Bena Manashe mu malu onso a Nzambi ne a mukelenge kabidi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Bena Isalele mu bungi buabo, bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ne tupitene tua bantu tshinunu ne tua bantu lukama, ne bakokeshi bakadi bakuatshila mukelenge wabo mudimu mu milongo yonso ya mu ngondo ne ngondo ya mu ngondo yonso ya mu tshidimu, mu tshisumbu ne tshisumbu muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:2 Yashobama, muana wa Zabediele, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisumbu tshia ngondo wa kumudilu; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:3 Yeye wakadi umue wa bana ba Pelese, wakadi ku mutu kua tupitene tuonso tua mu ngondo wa kumudilu." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai, Muena Ahoa, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo muibidi; Mikelota wakadi ku mutu kuabo; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:5 Benaya, muana wa Yehoyada muakuidi, wakadi ku mutu kua tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo muisatu; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya eu wakadi umue wa bantu aba bakole makumi asatu, wakadi ku mutu kuabo mene; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi muanʼandi Amizabada." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asahele, muanʼabo ne Yoaba, wakadi kapitene ka mu ngondo muinai; Zebadaya muanʼandi wakamulonda ku nyima; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:8 Shamehuta, Muena Yisela, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo muitanu; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:9 Ila, muana wa Ikeshe, Muena Tekoa, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo muisambombo; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:10 Helese, Muena Pelona wa bana ba Efelayima, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:11 Sibekai, Muena Husha wa Bena Zela, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo wa muanda mukulu; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:12 Abiezê, Muena Anatota wa Bena Benyamina, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo wa tshitema; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:13 Mehalai, Muena Netofa wa Bena Zela, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo wa dikumi; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:14 Benaya, Muena Pilatona wa Bena Efelayima, wakadi kapitene ka mu tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo wa dikumi ne umue; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:15 Heledai, Muena Netofa wa Oteniele, wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia mu ngondo wa dikumi ne muibidi; mu tshisumbu tshiandi muakadi bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binai." 
1Chronicles27:16 Tupitene tua bisamba bia Bena Isalele: Eliezê, muana wa Zikeli, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Lubena; Shefataya, muana wa Mâka, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Shimeona;" 
1Chronicles27:17 Hashabeya, muana wa Kemuele, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Lewi; Sadoka wakadi ku mutu kua bana ba Alona;" 
1Chronicles27:18 Elihu, muanʼabo ne Davidi, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Yuda; Omeli, muana wa Mikaele, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Yisakâ;" 
1Chronicles27:19 Yishemaya, muana wa Obadaya, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Zebuluna; Yelemota, muana wa Azazele, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Nafatale;" 
1Chronicles27:20 Hoshea, muana wa Azazaya, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Efelayima; Yoele, muana wa Pedaya, wakadi ku mutu kua tshituha tshia Bena Manashe;" 
1Chronicles27:21 Ido, muana wa Zekâya, wakadi ku mutu kua tshituha tshia Bena Manashe ba mu Gilada; Yâsiele, muana wa Abinê, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Benyamina;" 
1Chronicles27:22 Azalele, muana wa Yelohama, wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Dana. Etu ntupitene tua bisamba bia Bena Isalele." 
1Chronicles27:23 Kadi Davidi kakabala bantu bakadi kabayi bakumbane bidimu makumi abidi; bualu bua Yehowa wakabalaya ne, Nenkumbashe Bena Isalele bu mitoto ya mu diulu." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoaba, muana wa Seluya, wakabanga kutubala, kadi yeye kakashikisha mudimu eu; tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakahatukila Bena Isalele bua bualu ebu; kabakafunda bungi buabo mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a mukelenge Davidi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azemaweta, muana wa Adiele, wakadi ku mutu kua bibutshilu bia mukelenge; Yonatana, muana wa Uziya, wakadi ku mutu kua bibutshilu bia mu madimi ne bia mu bimenga ne bia mu misoko mikese ne bia mu nsubu ya mukelenge;" 
1Chronicles27:26 Ezeli, muana wa Keluba, wakadi ku mutu kua mudimu wonso wa madimi;" 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei, Muena Lamata, wakadi ku mutu kua madimi a tumuma tukese; Zabedi, Muena Shefemi, wakadi ku mutu kua bintu biakakumbana mu madimi a tumuma tukese biakatekabo mu bitekelu bia nvinyo;" 
1Chronicles27:28 Bâla-hanana, Muena Gedê, wakadi ku mutu kua mitshi ya diye ne ya sycomore ya mu bibanda; Yoasha wakadi ku mutu kua bitekelu bia manyi;" 
1Chronicles27:29 Shitelai, Muena Shalona, wakadi ku mutu kua bimuna biakadishabo mu Sifiona; Shafata, muana wa Adelai, wakadi ku mutu kua bimuna bia mu bibanda;" 
1Chronicles27:30 Obila, Muena Yishemaele, wakadi ku mutu kua tumelo; Yedeya, Muena Melonita, wakadi ku mutu kua nyama ya mpunda; Yaziza, Muena Hageli, wakadi ku mutu kua mikoko." 
1Chronicles27:31 Aba bonso bakadi ku mutu kua bintu bia Davidi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatana, manseba wa Davidi, muntu wa lungenyi lule ne mufundi kabidi, wakadi mufidi wandi wa meji; Yehiele, muana wa Hakemoni, wakadi mukuatshishi wa bana ba mukelenge;" 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofele wakadi mufidi wa meji wa mukelenge; Hushai, Muena Eleke, wakadi mulunda wa mukelenge;" 
1Chronicles27:34 ku nyima kua Ahitofele kuakadi Yehoyada, muana wa Benaya, ne Ebeyatâ; Yoaba wakadi kapitene ka masalayi a mukelenge." 
1Chronicles28:1 Davidi wakabikila bantu banene bonso ba mu Isalele, bakadi ku mutu kua bisamba, ne tupitene tua bisumbu bia bantu tuakakuatshila mukelenge mudimu mu milongo yatu, ne tupitene tua bantu tshinunu ne tua bantu lukama, ne bakadi ku mutu kua bintu bionso bia mukelenge ne bimuna biandi ne bia bana bandi ne tuhita ne bena bukitu mu Yelushalema." 
1Chronicles28:2 Hashishe mukelenge Davidi wakajuka hanshi, wakimana ku makasa andi, wakamba ne, Unvuai, bana betu ne bantu banyi; meme nakadi ne bualu mu mutshima wanyi bua kuibakila mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa nsubu wa kuikisha ne tshitekelu tshia muinshi mua makasa a Nzambi wetu; nakabanga kulongolola bintu bia kuasa nʼabi nsubu." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kadi Nzambi wakangambila ne, Wewe kuena wibakila dina dianyi nsubu nansha, bualu bua wewe udi muena nvita, wakamatshisha mashi hanshi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Kadi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, wakansungula munkatshi mua bonso ba mu nsubu wa tatu wanyi, wakampingisha mu bukelenge bua Isalele tshiendelele; bualu bua yeye wakasungula Yuda bua kuikaleye ku mutu; wakasungula tshiota tshia tatu wanyi mu tshisamba tshia Yuda; munkatshi mua bana ba tatu wanyi yeye wakalesha diakalengele kundi bua kumpingisha mu bukelenge bua Isalele;" 
1Chronicles28:5 ne munkatshi mua bana banyi balume (Nzambi wakumpa bana ba bungi) yeye wakasungula Solomo muanʼanyi bua kushikameye mu nkuasa wa bukelenge bua Yehowa ku mutu kua Bena Isalele. 
1Chronicles28:6 Yeye wakangambila ne, Solomo muanʼebe neibake nsubu wanyi ne biendedi bianyi; bualu bua meme nakamusungula bua kuikaleye muanʼanyi, ne meme nengikale tatu wandi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Nenjadike bukelenge buandi tshiendelele, biananukileye kutumikila mikenji yanyi ne mei anyi bu mudibi lelu." 
1Chronicles28:8 Nunku ku mesu kua Bena Isalele bonso ba mu tshisumbu tshia Yehowa, ne mu matshu a Nzambi wetu, nuenze, nukebe mikenji yonso ya Yehowa Nzambi wetu; bua nuenu nuhiane buloba ebu buimpe, bua nuenu nubushile bana benu bu buhianyi buabo tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles28:9 Wewe, muanʼanyi Solomo, Umanye Nzambi wa tatuʼebe, umukuatshile mudimu ne mutshima mutoke ne didikokela kudiye; bualu bua Yehowa udi ukebakeba mitshima ya bantu bonso; udi ujingulula meji onso adibo bela munda muabo; biwamukeba, neumuhete; kadi biwamulekela, yeye neakuhidie tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles28:10 Udimuke biebe, bualu bua Yehowa wakukusungula bua wewe kuibaka nsubu udi mua kuikala muaba wandi wa tshijila; wikale ne bukole, wenze nsubu eu." 
1Chronicles28:11 Hashishe Davidi wakaha Solomo muanʼandi luidi lua mbalanda wa ntempelo, ne lua nsubu wandi, ne lua bibutshilu biandi, ne lua nsubu ya ku mutu, ne lua nsubu ya munda muandi, ne lua muaba wa tshibuikilu tshia or;" 
1Chronicles28:12 ne luidi lua ngenyi yandi yonso ya biendedi bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne ya nsubu yandi yonso, ne ya bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne ya bitekelu bia bintu bia tshijila;" 
1Chronicles28:13 ne ya milongo ya bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, ne ya midimu yonso ya mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne ya mpanza yonso ya mu nsubu ya Yehowa." 
1Chronicles28:14 Wakidikisha bujitu bua mpanza ya or, ne bua mpanza ya mishindu yonso; ne bua mpanza ya argent, ne bua mpanza ya mishindu yonso." 
1Chronicles28:15 Wakidikisha bujitu bua bitekelu bia minda bia or ne minda yabi kabidi, ne bua bitekelu bia minda bia argent wakidikisha bujitu bua tshitekelu ne tshitekelu ne bua muinda ne muinda." 
1Chronicles28:16 Wakidikisha bujitu bua mesa a bidia bilesha, ku mesa ne mesa; ne bua argent ya mesa ne mesa;" 
1Chronicles28:17 ne bua or ya bitubuidi bia munyinyi ne malonga ne makoho, ne bujitu bua or ya bihanza bionso, ne bua bihanza bia argent kabidi." 
1Chronicles28:18 Wakidikisha bujitu bua or ya tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi ne or ya kuenza nʼai luidi lua dikalu dia bakeluba bakadi bolola mahuahua abo, bakabuikila mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa." 
1Chronicles28:19 Davidi wakamba ne, Nakamanya malu au onso ku tshifundidi tshia tshianza tshia Yehowa tô ne ku bintu bionso bia mu luidi elu." 
1Chronicles28:20 Davidi wakambila Solomo muanʼandi ne, Wikale ne bukole ne mutshima wa dikima, wenze bualu ebu; kutshinyi, kuhangi bualu ebu; bualu bua Yehowa Nzambi, Nzambi wanyi mene, udi nʼebe; yeye kena ukuhanga, kena ukulekela tô ne hawashikisha mudimu eu wonso wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
1Chronicles28:21 Tangila milongo ya bakuidi ne ya Bena Lewi ya mu midimu yonso ya mu nsubu wa Nzambi; muntu yonso udi ne mutshima wa kuenza ne lungenyi lua kuenza midimu yonso neikale nʼebe; tupitene ne bantu bonso nebatumikile mikenji yebe yonso kabidi. 
1Chronicles29:1 Davidi mukelenge wakambila tshisumbu tshia bantu ne, Solomo muanʼanyi, wakasungulabo kudi Nzambi nkayandi, utshidi nsongalume mutekete, ne mudimu eu udi munene; bualu bua mbalasa eu kena wa muntu, udi wa Yehowa Nzambi." 
1Chronicles29:2 Meme nakamana kulongolola bintu bia mu nsubu wa Nzambi wanyi ne bukole buonso bundi nʼabu, or ya bintu bia tshiamu tshia or, ne argent ya bintu bia tshiamu tshia argent, ne tshiamu tshia mitaku tshia bintu bia tshiamu tshia mitaku, ne tshiamu tshifike tshia bintu bia tshiamu tshifike, ne mitshi ya bintu bia mitshi; ne mabue a onyx ne mabue adibo balengesha nʼau bintu ne mabue a mishindu yonso ne mabue onso a mushinga mukole ne mabue manene matoke a bungi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, bualu bua meme nakateka mutshima wanyi kudi nsubu wa Nzambi wanyi, meme nakafila mu nsubu wa Nzambi wanyi bibutshilu bianyi bia or ne bia argent ku mutu kua bintu binakalongolola bua muaba eu wa tshijila;" 
1Chronicles29:4 bu ntalanta ya or binunu bisatu ya or ya ku Ofî, ne ntalanta ya argent yakatulabo binunu muanda mutekete ya kuteka ha bimanu bia nsubu;" 
1Chronicles29:5 ya or ya bintu bia or, ne ya argent ya bintu bia argent ya midimu yonso ya bantu badi ne lungenyi lule. Muntu kai neadijidile lelu eu kudi Yehowa?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Hashishe bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, ne bakadi ku mutu kua bisamba bia Bena Isalele, ne tupitene tua bantu tshinunu ne tua bantu lukama, ne bakadi ku mutu kua midimu ya mukelenge bakafila bintu ne disanka." 
1Chronicles29:7 Bakafila bua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi ntalanta ya or binunu bitanu ne dariques binunu dikumi, ne ntalanta ya argent binunu dikumi, ne ntalanta ya tshiamu tshia mitaku binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, ne ya tshiamu tshifike binunu lukama." 
1Chronicles29:8 Bakadi ne mabue a mushinga mukole, bakafila mu bibutshilu bia nsubu wa Yehowa mu tshianza tshia Yehiele, Muena Gêshona." 
1Chronicles29:9 Hashishe bantu bakasanka bualu bua bobo bakadifila bintu biabo; bualu bua bakafila bintu biabo ne mitshima mitoke kudi Yehowa; mukelenge Davidi wakatamba kusanka kabidi. 
1Chronicles29:10 Nunku Davidi wakavudishila Yehowa disanka ku mpala kua bantu bonso; Davidi wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele tatu wetu, wikale ne disanka tshiendelele." 
1Chronicles29:11 Yehowa, bunene ne bukole ne butumbi ne kutamba ne bulengele butambe mbiebe; bualu bua bintu bionso bia mu diulu ne bia ha buloba mbiebe; Yehowa, bukelenge mbuebe, ne wewe udi ubandishibua ku mutu kua bionso." 
1Chronicles29:12 Bubanji ne butumbi bidi bifuma kûdi, wewe udi ukokesha bionso; bukole ne bunene bidi mu tshianza tshiebe; tshianza tshiebe tshidi tshivuisha bantu bunene ne bukole." 
1Chronicles29:13 Nunku, Nzambi wetu, tudi tukusakidila, tudi tutumbisha dina diebe dia butumbi." 
1Chronicles29:14 Kadi meme nganyi ne bantu banyi mbanganyi, bua tuetu tuakadifidila bintu bietu nunku? Bualu bua bintu bionso bidi bifuma kûdi, tuakafila anu bintu biebe kûdi." 
1Chronicles29:15 Bualu bua tuetu tudi benyi ku mpala kuebe, tudi anu bu bahitshi ba mu buloba bu muakadi bankambua betu; matuku etu a ha buloba adi bu mundidimbi, katuena ne ditekemena dia kushalaku." 
1Chronicles29:16 Yehowa Nzambi wetu, bintu ebi bionso bituakulongolola bua kukuibakila nʼabi nsubu wa dina diebe dia tshijila biakafuma mu tshianza tshiebe, bionso bidi biebe mene." 
1Chronicles29:17 Nzambi wanyi, ndi mumanye kabidi ne wewe udi uteta mitshima ya bantu, udi usanka mu butoke bua mutshima. Meme nakudifidila bintu ebi bionso mu butoke bua mutshima wanyi; nakumona bantu bebe bonso badi kunoko badifidila bintu biabo ne disanka." 
1Chronicles29:18 Yehowa, Nzambi wa Abalahama ne wa Isaka ne wa Yakoba, bankambua betu, witabushe bua bantu bebe bikale ne meji â onso munda muabo tshiendelele, ujadike mitshima yabo kûdi;" 
1Chronicles29:19 uvuishe Solomo muanʼanyi mutshima mutoke, bua kutumikileye mikenji yebe ne mei ebe ne mikandu yebe, bua kuenzeye malu â onso, ne bua kuibakeye mbalasa eu unakabanga kulongolola bintu." 
1Chronicles29:20 Davidi wakambila bantu bonso ne, Tuvudishilai Yehowa Nzambi wetu disanka. Bantu bonso bakavu-dishila Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, disanka, bakinama mitu yabo, bakatendelela Yehowa, bakakukuata mukelenge." 
1Chronicles29:21 Bakafila milambu kudi Yehowa; bakafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia kudi Yehowa, ne lunkelu kabidi bakafila tshinunu tshia balume ba ngombe ne tshinunu tshia bimpanga ne tshinunu tshia bana ba mikoko ne milambu idibo banua; Bena Isalele bonso bakafila milambu ya bungi;" 
1Chronicles29:22 bakadia, bakanua ku mpala kua Yehowa dituku adi ne disanka dinene. Bakahingishila Solomo, muana wa Davidi, mu bukelenge tshiakabidi, bakamuela manyi ha mutu bua kuikaleye mukokeshi, ne ha mutu ha Sadoka bua kuikaleye muakuidi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Hashishe Solomo wakashikama mu nkuasa wa Yehowa bu mukelenge mu muaba wa Davidi tatu wandi, wakadi ne diakalengele; Bena Isalele bonso bakamutumikila." 
1Chronicles29:24 Bonso bakadi ku mutu kua bantu, ne bena bukitu bonso, ne bana balume bonso ba mukelenge Davidi bakadikokela kudi mukelenge Solomo." 
1Chronicles29:25 Yehowa wakatamba kudiundisha Solomo ku mpala kua Bena Isalele bonso, wakamuambika butumbi buakatamba bua bakelenge bonso ba mu Isalele bakadi badianjila ku mpala kuandi." 
1Chronicles29:26 Davidi, muana wa Yishai, wakadi ukokesha mu Isalele." 
1Chronicles29:27 Matuku onso akakokesheye mu Isalele akadi bidimu makumi anai; wakakokesha mu Hebelone bidimu muanda mutekete; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu. 
1Chronicles29:28 Wakafua muntu mununu mukole, wakadi ne bubanji ne butumbi; Solomo muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
1Chronicles29:29 Bienzedi bia mukelenge Davidi, bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu, monai, bidi bifunda mu mei a Samuele, mumonyi wa malu a Nzambi, ne mu mei a Natana muprofete, ne mu mei a Gada, mumonyi wa malu a Nzambi, kabidi;" 
1Chronicles29:30 ne malu onso a mu bukelenge buandi ne bukole buandi hakadiye ukokesha mu Isalele ne ku mutu kua makelenge onso a mu miaba mikuabo. 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomo, muana wa Davidi, wakakoleshibua mu bukelenge buandi; Yehowa Nzambi wandi wakadi nʼandi, wakatamba kumuvuisha bunene." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomo wakasomba ne Bena Isalele bonso, ne tupitene tua bantu tshinunu ne tua bantu lukama, ne balumbuluishi bonso, ne bantu banene bonso ba mu Isalele, ne bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo." 
2Chronicles1:3 Nunku Solomo ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi nʼandi bakaya ku mutu kua mukuna wa mu Gibeona; bualu bua ntenta wa kusambakena wa Nzambi wakasabo kudi Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, mu tshihela wakadiku." 
2Chronicles1:4 Kadi Davidi wakadi mumane kuangata mushete wa Nzambi wakadi ku Kîyata-yalima, wakaya nʼau ku muaba wakalongolola Davidi; bualu bua yeye wakaushimikila nsubu wa ntenta mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles1:5 Kadi tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku tshiakenzabo kudi Besalele, muana wa Uli, muana wa Hû, tshiakadiku ku mpala kua nsubu wa tshitendelelu wa Yehowa; ne Solomo ne bantu bakadi nʼandi bakakebelamu Yehowa." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomo wakasemena ha buihi ne tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku tshia Yehowa tshiakadi ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, wakafilahu tshinunu tshia milambu ya kuosha." 
2Chronicles1:7 Mu butuku abu Nzambi wakamueneka kudi Solomo, wakamuambila ne, Ulombe tshinakuha." 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomo wakambila Nzambi ne, Wewe wakalesha Davidi tatu wanyi luse lunene lujalame, wakumpuisha mu bukelenge mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles1:9 Katataka, Yehowa Nzambi, witabushe bua mulayi webe kudi Davidi tatu wanyi ujadikibue; bualu bua wewe wakumpingisha mu bukelenge ku mutu kua bantu badi bungi bua dinfuenkenya dia buloba." 
2Chronicles1:10 Umpe meji ne lungenyi bua meme kumanya mua kuluhuka ne kulua ku mpala kua bantu aba; bualu bua udi mumanye mua kukokesha bantu aba banene nganyi? 
2Chronicles1:11 Nzambi wakambila Solomo ne, Bua bualu ebu buakadi mu mutshima webe, wewe kuakundomba bubanji ne biuma, nansha butumbi, nansha mioyo ya badi nʼebe lukuna, nansha matuku a bungi ha buloba, kadi wakundomba meji ne lungenyi bia kukokesha nʼabi bantu banyi banakukuhingishila mukelenge ku mutu kuabo." 
2Chronicles1:12 Nakakuha meji ne lungenyi; nenkuhe bubanji ne biuma ne butumbi biakadi bakelenge bonso ku mpala kuebe kabayi nʼabi; kakuena mukuabo udi nkulonda ku nyima neikale nʼabi kabidi. 
2Chronicles1:13 Nunku Solomo wakafuma ku mukuna wa mu Gibeona ku mpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, wakahingana ku Yelushalema; wakakokesha Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomo wakasangisha makalu ne bena tubalu; wakadi ne makalu tshinunu ne nkama inai, ne bena tubalu binunu dikumi ne bibidi biakatekeye mu misoko yakadi ne makalu ne hamue ne mukelenge mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles1:15 Mukelenge wakakumbasha argent ne or mu Yelushalema bu mabue; ne mitshi ya cèdre yakadi bu mitshi ya sycomore ya mu bibanda, bualu bua bungi buabi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Tubalu tuakadi nʼatu Solomo tuakafuma mu Ejipitu; bendi ba mushinga ba mukelenge bakatusumba mu bisumbu, tshisumbu ku mushinga watshi, tshisumbu ku mushinga watshi." 
2Chronicles1:17 Bakasumba dikalu mu Ejipitu ku nshekele ya argent nkama isambombo, ne kabalu ku nshekele lukama ne makumi atanu; bakabisumbila Bena Hiti ne Bena Sulia kabidi ku mushinga wabi." 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomo wakasua kuibakila dina dia Yehowa nsubu ne bukelenge buandi nsubu. 
2Chronicles2:2 Solomo wakabala bantu binunu makumi muanda mutekete bua kutualabo majitu, ne binunu makumi muanda mukulu bua kutahabo mitshi ku mikuna, ne tuhita binunu bisatu ne nkama isambombo bua kuikalatu ku mutu kuabo." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomo wakatumina Hulama, mukelenge wa mu Tulo, dî ne, Bu muwakenzela Davidi tatuʼanyi, wakamutumina mitshi ya cèdre bua kuibakeye nsubu wandi, ungenzele meme nunku kabidi." 
2Chronicles2:4 Tangila, meme ndi ngamba kuibakila dina dia Yehowa Nzambi wanyi nsubu wa kumujidila ne bua kuoshelamu musenga wa manananshi, ne bua kutekamu bidia bia kulesha, ne bua kuoshelamu milambu dinda ne dilolo ne ku dituku dia lumingu ne habala ngondo ne hadiabo bidia bia disanka ku mpala kua Yehowa Nzambi wetu. Eu udi mukenji mujalame wa Bena Isalele tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles2:5 Nsubu undi ngibaka udi munene; bualu bua Nzambi wetu udi munene ku mutu kua nzambi yonso. 
2Chronicles2:6 Kadi nganyi udi mua kumuibakila nsubu, bualu bua yeye udi uhita diulu ne diulu didi ku mutu kua diulu bunene? Meme nganyi bua kumuibakila nsubu, anu bua kuoshelamu musenga wa manananshi ku mpala kuandi?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Nunku untumine bantu badi ne lungenyi bua kuenza mudimu mu or ne mu argent ne mu tshiamu tshia mitaku ne mu tshiamu tshifike ne mu bilulu bikunzubile ne bikunzu-kunzû ne bia bleu; ne badi bamanye mua kusonga bintu bionso, bua kuikalabo ne bena lungenyi banyi badi nʼanyi mu Yuda ne Yelushalema bakasungulabo kudi Davidi tatu wanyi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Untumine mitshi ya cèdre ne ya cyprès ne ya sandal ku Lebanona; bualu bua ndi mumanye ne bantu bebe badi bamanye mua kutaha mitshi mu Lebanona; ne mona, bantu banyi nebakuatshilangane ne bantu bebe," 
2Chronicles2:9 bua kutahabo mitshi ya bungi; bualu bua nsubu undi ngibaka newikale munene ne wa butumbi. 
2Chronicles2:10 Nempe bantu bebe badi bataha mitshi bihiminu bia bukula binunu makumi abidi ne bia orge binunu makumi abidi; ne bihiminu bia nvinyo binunu makumi abidi ne bia manyi binunu makumi abidi. 
2Chronicles2:11 Hashishe Hulama, mukelenge wa Tulo, wakafundila Solomo mukanda ne, Bualu bua Yehowa udi unanga bantu bandi, yeye wakakuhingisha mu bukelenge." 
2Chronicles2:12 Hulama wakamba kabidi ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ikale ne disanka; yeye nguakafuka diulu ne buloba, wakaha Davidi muana wa lungenyi udi ne meji makane ne mutshima muimpe bua kuibakileye dina dia Yehowa nsubu ne bukelenge buandi nsubu." 
2Chronicles2:13 Nakamana kukutumina muntu wa meji udi ne lungenyi lule, muana wa Hulama, tatu wanyi mene," 
2Chronicles2:14 udi muana wa mukashi wa Bena Dana; tatu wandi wakadi Muena Tulo, wakadi ne lungenyi lua kuenza mudimu mu or ne mu argent ne mu tshiamu tshia mitaku ne mu tshiamu tshifike ne mu mabue ne mu mabaya ne mu bilulu bikunzubile ne bia bleu ne mu lin muimpe ne bilulu bikunzu-kunzû; wakamanya mua kusonga bintu bionso ne bua kuenzeye bintu bionso; bua wewe kumuha muaba munkatshi mua bantu bebe ba lungenyi bakasungula mukelenge wanyi Davidi, tatu webe." 
2Chronicles2:15 Blé ne orge ne manyi ne nvinyo biakuambila mukelenge wanyi, anji kutuminabi bantu bandi;" 
2Chronicles2:16 tuetu nenutahe mitshi ya mu Lebanona bungi bûdi musue; netulue nʼai mu matu ha mutu ha mai manene tô ne ku Yopa; wewe neuye nʼai ku Yelushalema. 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomo wakabala benyi bonso bakadi mu buloba bua Isalele, bu muakababala Davidi, tatu wandi; bakabala bantu nunku binunu lukama ne makumi atanu ne bisatu ne nkama isambombo." 
2Chronicles2:18 Yeye wakasungula binunu makumi muanda mutekete bua kutualabo majitu, ne binunu makumi muanda mukulu bua kutahabo mitshi mu mikuna ne tuhita binunu bisatu ne nkama isambombo bua kuenzeshatu bantu mudimu." 
2Chronicles3:1 Hashishe Solomo wakabanga kuibaka ntempelo wa Yehowa mu Yelushalema ha mutu ha mukuna wa Moliya kuakamuenekela Yehowa kudi Davidi tatuʼandi ha muaba wakasungula Davidi ku tshihehuidi tshia Ônana, Muena Yebuse." 
2Chronicles3:2 Wakabanga mudimu mu dituku dibidi dia mu ngondo muibidi, mu tshidimu tshinai tshia bukelenge buandi." 
2Chronicles3:3 Â mmalu akayishabo Solomo mua kuibakeye nsubu wa Yehowa. Bule buandi bua luidi lua kumudilu buakadi coudées makumi asambombo; butshiama buandi buakadi coudées makumi abidi. 
2Chronicles3:4 Mbalanda wakadi ku mpala kua nsubu, bule buandi buakadi bu butshiama bua nsubu coudées makumi abidi; bule buandi bua mulu buakadi coudées lukama ne makumi abidi; wakalamika or mutambe buimpe munda muandi ku nseke yonso." 
2Chronicles3:5 Wakateka mabaya a cyprès ku tshisasa tshia nsubu ne or muimpe ha mutu; wakadilengesha ne bifuanyikishi bia mabue a ngashi ne nkanu ya or. 
2Chronicles3:6 Wakalengesha nsubu mujima ne mabue a mushinga mukole; or wakadi wa mu Pâwayima. 
2Chronicles3:7 Wakalamika or ku nseke yonso ya munda mua nsubu, ku mabaya ne ku bilua bia bibi ne ku bimanu ne ku bibi kabidi; bakasonga bifuanyikishi bia bakeluba ku bimanu." 
2Chronicles3:8 Wakalongolola muaba mutambe wa tshijila; bunene buandi buakadi bu butshiama bua nsubu coudées makumi abidi; ne butshiama buandi buakadi coudées makumi abidi; wakateka or ku nseke yonso; mushinga wandi wakadi bu ntalanta ya or nkama isambombo. 
2Chronicles3:9 Bujitu bua misamadi buakadi bu nshekele ya or makumi atanu. Wakalamika or munda mua nsubu yonso yakadi ha mutu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Wakatula bakeluba babidi bua kutekeye mu muaba mutambe wa tshijila; wakalamika or ku nseke yabo yonso. 
2Chronicles3:11 Bule bua mahuahua a bakeluba buakadi coudées makumi abidi; dihuahua dia mukeluba mukuabo diakadi bule bua coudées itanu; lusongo luadi luakafika tô ne ku tshimanu tshia nsubu; dihuahua dikuabo diakadi bule bua coudées itanu, diakafika tô ne ku dihuahua dia mukuabo." 
2Chronicles3:12 Dihuahua dia mukeluba mukuabo diakadi bule hua coudées itanu diakafika tô ne ku tshimanu tshia nsubu; dihuahua dikuabo diakadi bule bua coudées itanu diakatuangana ne dihuahua dia mukuabo. 
2Chronicles3:13 Mahuahua a bakeluba akololodibua tô coudeês makumi abidi; bakeluba bakadi bimana ne makasa abo; mpala yabo yakatangilangana. 
2Chronicles3:14 Wakakuma tshilulu tshikudika ne buanda bua bleu ne bukunzubile ne bukunzu-kunzû ne bua lin muimpe; bakenzamu bifuanyikishi bia bakeluba. 
2Chronicles3:15 Wakajadika makunshi abidi ku mpala kua nsubu, bule buau buakadi coudées makumi asatu ne itanu; bunene bua mutu wa dikunshi ne dikunshi buakadi coudées itanu." 
2Chronicles3:16 Wakatula nkanu mu muaba wa tshijila, wakayiteka ha mutu ha makunshi; wakatula bifuanyikishi bia mamuma a grenade lukama, wakabiteka ha nkanu." 
2Chronicles3:17 Wakajadika makunshi ku mpala kua nsubu; dimue ku tshianza tshia balume, ne dikuabo ku tshianza tshia bakashi; wakidika dina dia ku tshianza tshia balume ne, Yakina, ne dina dia ku tshianza tshia bakashi ne, Boaza." 
2Chronicles4:1 Wakenza tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku, bunene buatshi buakadi coudées makumi abidi, ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudées makumi abidi, ne bule buatshi buakadi coudées dikumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Wakenza kabidi tshiowelu tshia tshiamu, bunene buatshi ku mubangu ne ku mubangu buakadi coudées dikumi; bule buatshi buakadi coudées itanu; bule bua dinyungulula diatshi buakadi coudées makumi asatu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Muinshi muatshi muakadi bifuanyikishi bia ngombe yakanyunguluka ku nseke yonso, ku coudées dikumi ku nseke yonso ya tshiowelu. Ngombe yakadi mu milongo ibidi, yakatudibua diatshimue nʼatshi." 
2Chronicles4:4 Tshiotshi tshiakimana ha nyima ha ngombe dikumi ne ibidi; isatu yakatangila ku nôde, isatu ku wesete, isatu ku sude ne isatu ku esete; tshiowelu tshiakadi ha nyima hai; mikila yai yakadi mituangane muinshi mua tshiowelu." 
2Chronicles4:5 Muhimbu watshi wakadi bu ntanta wa tshianza; wakalengeshibua bu mubangu wa luhanza, bu tshifuanyikishi tshia tshilongo; tihiakûla tente ne bihiminu bia mai binunu bisatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Wakenza biowelu bikuabo dikumi, wakateka bitanu ku tshianza tshia halume ne bitanu ku tshianza tshia bakashi, bua kuoweshamu bintu biakafilabo bu milambu ya kuosha; kadi bakuidi bakowela mu tshiowelu tshinene." 
2Chronicles4:7 Wakatula bitekelu bia minda bia or dikumi bu muakamba mukenji wakabiteka mu ntempelo, bitanu ku tshianza tshia balume ne bitanu ku tshianza tshia bakashi."
