2Chronicles4:8 Wakenza mesa dikumi; wakâteka mu ntempelo, atanu ku tshianza tshia balume ne atanu ku tshianza tshia bakashi. Wakatula mpanza ya or lukama." 
2Chronicles4:9 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, wakalongoluela bakuidi tshiendedi tshinene; wakenza bibi bia tshiendedi, wakalamika tshiamu tshia mitaku ha mutu hahi." 
2Chronicles4:10 Wakajadika tshiowelu ku tshianza tshia balume tshia ntempelo ku luseke lua ku sude-esete. 
2Chronicles4:11 Hulama wakatula bivuadi ne nkasu ne mpanza. Nunku Hulama wakashikisha mudimu wakakuatshileye mukelenge Solomo mu nsubu wa Nzambi; 
2Chronicles4:12 makunshi au abidi ne mpanza ne bintu bilengele biakadi ku mutu kua makunshi, ne bintu bia kulengesha nʼabi mitu ya makunshi au," 
2Chronicles4:13 ne bifuanyikishi bia mamuma a grenade nkama inai bia kulengesha nʼabi makunshi, milongo ibidi ya grenade ku dikunshi ku dikunshi bia kuteka ku bintu bilengele biakadi ku mutu kua makunshi." 
2Chronicles4:14 Wakenza biowelu ne bitekelu biabi kabidi; 
2Chronicles4:15 Wakenza tshiowelu tshinene ne ngombe dikumi ne ibidi yakadi muinshi muatshi kabidi. 
2Chronicles4:16 Bivuadi ne nkasu ne bitubuidi bia munyinyi ne mpanza yonso, Hulama tatu wandi wakatudila Solomo bintu ebi bionso ne tshiamu tshia mitaku tshiakadi tshikenka bia kutekeye mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mukelenge wakabitula mu mpata wa Yadene, mu muaba muakadi dima, hankatshi ha Sukota ne Zeleda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Nunku Solomo wakatula bintu ebi bia bungi bionso; kabakamanya mua kubala bujitu bua tshiamu tshia mitaku. 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomo wakatula bintu bionso bia kuteka mu nsubu wa Nzambi, ne tshioshelu tshia or ne mesa a bidia bilesha;" 
2Chronicles4:20 ne bitekelu bia minda bia or mimpe bia kutemenabi mu nsubu bu muakadi mukenji; 
2Chronicles4:21 ne bilongo ne minda ne mpandu bia or mimpe; 
2Chronicles4:22 ne bijimishi bia minda ne mpanza ne nkutu ne bivuadi bia kutekamu kahia, bia or mimpe; ne ku bibuelelu bia nsubu wakateka bibi bia ku muaba wa tshijila ne bibi biakadi munda mua nsubu, ntempelo mene, biakadi bia or." 
2Chronicles5:1 Nunku mudimu wonso wakenza Solomo wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa wakashikishibua. Solomo wakalua ne bintu biakajidila Davidi tatu wandi ne argent ne or ne mpanza yonso, wakabiteka mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
2Chronicles5:2 Hashishe Solomo wakabikila bakulu bonso ba Bena Isalele, ne bonso bakadi ku mutu kua bisamba, ne bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatuʼabo ba mu Isalele ku Yelushalema, bua kuangatabo mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Yehowa ku musoko wa Davidi, Siona mene." 
2Chronicles5:3 Bantu bonso ba mu Isalele bakadisangisha kudi mukelenge ku dituku diakadiabo bidia bia disanka mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete. 
2Chronicles5:4 Bakulu bonso ba Bena Isalele bakalua; Bena Lewi bakambula mushete wa Nzambi; 
2Chronicles5:5 bakalua ne mushete wa Nzambi ne ntenta wa kusambakena ne bintu bionso bia tshijila biakadi mu nsubu wa ntenta; bakuidi Bena Lewi bakalua ne bintu ebi bionso. 
2Chronicles5:6 Mukelenge Solomo ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadi badisangisha kudiye, bakaya ku mpala kua mushete wa Nzambi, bafile milambu ya mikoko ne ya ngombe idibo kabayi bamanye mua kubala bualu bua bungi buai." 
2Chronicles5:7 Bakuidi bakalua ne mushete wa tshihungidi tshia mei a Nzambi mu muaba wau, mu muaba wa tshijila mene muinshi mua mahuahua a bakeluba." 
2Chronicles5:8 Bualu bua bakeluba bakadi bolola mahuahua abo ha mutu ha muaba wa mushete; bakeluba bakabuikila mushete ne mitshi yau kabidi. 
2Chronicles5:9 Mitshi ei yakatamba bule, bakamanya mua kumona nsongo yai mu muaba wa tshijila ku mpala kua mushete; kadi kabakamanya mua kuyitangila ha mbelu; udiku tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Chronicles5:10 Nansha tshintu tshikuabo tshiakadi munda mua mushete, anu mabue abidi akatekamu Mose ku Holeba kuakahunga Yehowa tshihungidi ne Bena Isalele, hakaluhukabo mu Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles5:11 Hashishe bakahatuka bakuidi ku muaba wa tshijila (bualu bua bakuidi bonso bakadiku bakadijidila, kabakenza mudimu wa mu milongo yabo tshikondo atshi;" 
2Chronicles5:12 ne Bena Lewi kabidi bakadi bimbi ba misambu, buonso buabo mene, Asafa ne Hemana ne Yedutuna, ne bana babo balela ne bana babo balume baluate bilulu bia lin muimpe, bakadi ne biamu bia kukumakasha ne nzenze ne bisanji, bakimana ku luseke lua tshioshelu tshia ku esete, ne bakuidi lukama ne makumi abidi bakadi nʼabo bela mpungi);" 
2Chronicles5:13 hakelabo mpungi kudi bena mpungi ne bimbi ba misambu diatshimue bua kutumbishabo ne bua kusakidilabo Yehowa, ne hakimbabo ne mpungi ne biamu ne biombelu bia kutumbishabo nʼabi Yehowa, bamba ne Yeye udi muimpe, bualu bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele, nsubu wakûla tente ne ditutu, nsubu wa Yehowa mene." 
2Chronicles5:14 Nunku bakuidi kabakamanya mua kuimana bua kuenzabo mudimu wabo bualu bua ditutu; bualu bua butumbi bua Yehowa buakûsha nsubu wa Nzambi tente. 
2Chronicles6:1 Hashishe Solomo wakamba ne, Yehowa wakuamba ne, Ndi mushikame mu midima mikole." 
2Chronicles6:2 Kadi meme nakakuibakila nsubu ne muaba wa wewe kushikama tshiendelele. 
2Chronicles6:3 Mukelenge wakanyunguluka, wakavudishila Bena Isalele bonso disanka; Bena Isalele bonso bakadi bimane kulu." 
2Chronicles6:4 Wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ikale ne disanka; yeye wakambila Davidi tatu wanyi dî mukana muandi, wakadishikisha ne bianza biandi ne," 
2Chronicles6:5 Ku dituku adi dinakafuma ne bantu banyi mu buloba bua Ejipitu, tshiakasungula musoko mukuabo munkatshi mua bisamba bia Bena Isalele bionso bua kuasamu nsubu bua dina dianyi dikalemu; tshiakasungula muntu mukuabo bua kuikaleye mukelenge ku mutu kua bantu banyi Bena Isalele;" 
2Chronicles6:6 kadi katataka nakusungula Yelushalema bua dina dianyi dikalemu; nakusungula Davidi bua kuikaleye ku mutu kua bantu banyi, Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles6:7 Bualu buakadi munda mua mutshima mua tatu wanyi Davidi bua kuibakileye dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, nsubu." 
2Chronicles6:8 Kadi Yehowa wakambila Davidi tatu wanyi ne, Wewe wakuenza bimpe bua bualu ebu buakadi mu mutshima webe bua kuibakila dina dianyi nsubu;" 
2Chronicles6:9 kadi wewe kuena ungibakila nsubu nansha; kadi muana webe mulume udi uhatuka munda muebe, yeye neibakile dina dianyi nsubu." 
2Chronicles6:10 Yehowa wakashikisha dî diakambeye; bualu bua meme nakajuka mu muaba wa Davidi tatu wanyi, bua kushikama mu nkuasa wa bukelenge bua Isalele, muakalaya Yehowa; nakamana kuibakila dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, nsubu." 
2Chronicles6:11 Nakatekamu mushete wa Nzambi muakadi tshihungidi tshia Yehowa tshiakahungeye ne Bena Isalele. 
2Chronicles6:12 Yeye wakimana ku mpala kua tshioshelu tshia Yehowa ku mpala kua Bena Isalele bonso, wakolola bianza biandi" 
2Chronicles6:13 (bualu bua Solomo Wakenza tshiambidilu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku: bule buatshi buakadi coudées itanu, ne butshiama buatshi buakadi coudées itanu, ne bule buatshi bua mulu buakadi coudées isatu, wakatshidika mu tshiendedi; yeye wakimana ha mutu hatshi, wakatua binu biandi hanshi ku mpala kua Bena Isalele bonso, wakolola bianza biandi kulu)," 
2Chronicles6:14 wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, kakuena Nzambi mukuabo bu wewe mu diulu anyi hanshi ha buloba; udi ulama tshihungidi tshiebe ne luse lujalame ne bantu bebe badi benda ku mpala kuebe ne mitshima yabo yonso;" 
2Chronicles6:15 wakashikisha kudi Davidi tatu wanyi milayi yonso wakamulaya; bulelela, wewe udi wamba dî mukana muebe, udi udishikisha ne bianza biebe, bu muakuenjibua lelu eu." 
2Chronicles6:16 Nunku Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ushikishe dî diwakalaya muntu webe Davidi tatu wanyi ne, Kuena uhanga muntu mulume wa kushikama ku mpala kuanyi mu nkuasa wa bukelenge bua Isalele, biadimuke bana bebe mu nshila yabo bua kuendabo mu mikenji yanyi bu muwakuenda ku mpala kuanyi." 
2Chronicles6:17 Katataka Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, dî diwakambila muntu webe Davidi dijadikibue." 
2Chronicles6:18 Kadi Nzambi mene neashikame munkatshi mua bantu ba ha buloba bulelela, anyi? Tangila, wewe udi uhita diulu ne muaba udi ha mutu ha diulu bunene; ka bu mudi nsubu eu unakukuibakila neatambe bukese!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kadi witabushe kutendelela ne kutendekena kua muntu webe, Yehowa Nzambi wanyi, bua wewe kunvua dî ne kulomba bidi muntu webe ulomba ku mpala kuebe;" 
2Chronicles6:20 bua mesu ebe atabale, atangile ku nsubu eu munya ne butuku, ku muaba eu mene uwakalaya bua kutekamu dina diebe; bua wewe kunvua kulomba kudi muntu webe ulomba ku muaba eu." 
2Chronicles6:21 Witabushe kutendekena kua muntu webe, ne kua bantu bebe Bena Isalele, hatendelelabo ku muaba eu; bulelela, unvue biebe mu muaba webe, mu diulu mene; ne haunvua, utubuikidile mibi yetu." 
2Chronicles6:22 Bienzela muntu muena kuabo bibi, ne biamutshihishabo mitshihu, ne bialueye bua kuditshiha kudi tshioshelu tshidi mu nsubu muebe," 
2Chronicles6:23 unvue biebe mu diulu, wenze biebe, ulumbuluishe bantu bebe, ukengeshe muntu mubi bua kuhingisha bienzedi biandi ha mutu handi; ubingishe muntu muakane bua kumufutshila bu muakadi buakane buandi." 
2Chronicles6:24 Bikala bena lukuna bahite Bena Isalele bukole, bualu bua bobo bakukuenzela wewe bibi, ne bialukilabo bua kutonda mibi yabo kudi dina diebe, biakutendelelabo ne biakutendekenabo mu nsubu eu," 
2Chronicles6:25 unvue biebe mu diulu, ubuikidile bantu bebe Bena Isalele mibi yabo, ulue nʼabo kabidi mu buloba buwakabaha ne batatuʼabo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Hawabuikila diulu, ne nvula kena uloka bualu bua bobo bakukuenzela wewe bibi, biatendelelabo ku muaba eu, ne biatondabo mibi yabo kudi dina diebe, ne bialekelabo mibi yabo bualu bua wewe wakabakengesha," 
2Chronicles6:27 unvue biebe mu diulu, ubuikidile bantu bebe ne Bena Isalele mibi yabo, hawabayisha nshila muimpe udibo ne bua kuendela; ulokeshe nvula ha buloba buwakaha bantu bebe bu buhianyi buabo." 
2Chronicles6:28 Bialua tshiole nansha tshihuhu anyi biakuata bintu mamoma ne butu, nansha mikumbi nansha meshi, biatshintshimika bena lukuna misoko yabo; bialua makenga ne masama onso;" 
2Chronicles6:29 biakutendelela ne biakutendekena muntu yonso, nansha Bena Isalele bonso, bualu bua muntu yonso udi mumanye disama diandi ne ntatu yandi, ne biololabo bianza biabo ku nsubu eu;" 
2Chronicles6:30 unvue biebe mu muaba webe mu diulu; ubabuikidile mibi yabo, ufute muntu yonso bu muakadi bienzedi biandi, nguewe udi mumanye mutshima wandi (bualu bua wewe nkayebe udi mumanye mitshima ya bantu);" 
2Chronicles6:31 bua bobo bakutshine, bende mu nshila yebe hatshidibo bashikame mu buloba buwakaha batatu betu." 
2Chronicles6:32 Bualu bua muenyi udi kayi wa munkatshi mua bantu bebe Bena Isalele, hafumeye ku buloba budi kule bua dina diebe dinene ne bua tshianza tshiebe tshikole ne bua diboko diebe diolola, halueye kutendelela ku nsubu eu," 
2Chronicles6:33 unvue biebe mu muaba webe mu diulu, witabushe malu onso adi muenyi eu ukulomba; bua bantu bonso ba ha buloba bamanye dina diebe, bakutshine, bu mudi bantu bebe Bena Isalele; bamanye kabidi ne nsubu eu unakukuibakila udi ubikidibua dina diebe." 
2Chronicles6:34 Biaya bantu bebe bua kuluanganabo ne bena lukuna babo, mu nshila yonso ûdi ubatumina, ne biakutendelelabo ku musoko eu uwakusungula, ne ku nsubu eu unakuibakila dina diebe," 
2Chronicles6:35 unvue kulomba kuabo ne kutendekena kuabo mu diulu, ujadike malu abo." 
2Chronicles6:36 Biakuenzelabo bibi (bualu bua kakuena muntu udi kayi ne mibi) ne biwikala nʼabo tshiji, biwabafila kudi bena lukuna babo, ne biayabo nʼabo mu buhika ku buloba budi kule anyi budi ha buihi;" 
2Chronicles6:37 kadi bielanganabo meji mu buloba buwakabatuma mu buhika, biakudimunabo mitshima yabo, biakutendekenabo mu buloba bua buhika buabo bamba ne, Tuakuenza bibi, tuakubambuka mu nshila, tuakasesuka mu malu mabi;" 
2Chronicles6:38 biakudimunabo mitshima yabo yonso ne mioyo yabo kûdi mu buloba bua buhika buabo kuakaya bantu nʼabo mu buhika, ne biatendelelabo bua buloba buabo buwakaha batatuʼabo ne bua musoko eu uwakusungula, ne bua nsubu eu unakuibakila dina diebe;" 
2Chronicles6:39 unvue biebe mu diulu, muaba webe ûdi mushikame mene, kutendelela kuabo ne kutendekena kuabo, ujadike malu abo, ubuikidile bantu bebe bakukuenzela bibi mibi yabo." 
2Chronicles6:40 Katataka, Nzambi wanyi, ndi nkusengelela ne, Utabale mesu ebe, teleja matshu ebe ku kulomba kundi ndomba mu muaba eu." 
2Chronicles6:41 Katataka, Yehowa Nzambi, juka, ubuele mu muaba webe wa kuikisha, wewe ne mushete wa bukole buebe; Yehowa Nzambi, bakuidi bebe baluatshishibue ne luhandu; bansanto bebe basanke mu buimpe buebe." 
2Chronicles6:42 Yehowa Nzambi, kukudimushi mpala wa muntu webe wakelabo manyi ha mutu handi; uvuluke luse luebe lujalame kudi Davidi, muntu webe." 
2Chronicles7:1 Hakashikisha Solomo kutendelela Nzambi, kahia kakahona mu diulu, kakosha milambu ya kuosha ne milambu mikuabo; butumbi bua Yehowa buakûsha nsubu tente." 
2Chronicles7:2 Bakuidi kabakadi mua kubuela mu nsuhu wa Yehowa, bualu bua butumbi bua Yehowa buakûsha nsubu tente." 
2Chronicles7:3 Bena Isalele bonso bakatangila bakahona kahia mu diulu, ne hakûsha butumbi bua Yehowa nsubu tente; bobo bakakukuila hanshi, bakatendelela, bakasakidila Yehowa, bamba ne, Yeye udi muimpe, bualu bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles7:4 Hashishe mukelenge ne bantu bonso bakafila milambu kudi Yehowa. 
2Chronicles7:5 Mukelenge Solomo wakafila milambu ya ngombe binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi, ne ya mikoko binunu lukama ne makumi abidi. Nunku mukelenge ne bantu bonso bakajidila nsubu wa Nzambi." 
2Chronicles7:6 Bakuidi bakimana mu milongo muakadi midimu yabo; Bena Lewi bakadi ne bintu bia kuimbila nʼabi Yehowa misambu, biakenzabo kudi Davidi bua kusakidila nʼabi Yehowa (bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele) hakadi Davidi utumbisha nʼabi Nzambi; bakuidi bakela mpungi ku mpala kuabo; Bena Isalele bonso bakadi bimana kulu." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomo wakajidila tshiendedi tshiakadi ku mpala kua nsubu wa Yehowa; bualu bua yeye wakafilaku milambu ya kuosha ne dianyi dia milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala; bualu bua tshioshelu tshia tshiamu tshia mitaku tshiakenzela Solomo katshiakadi mua kukumbana bunene bua milambu ya kuosha ne ya bukula ne ya dianyi. 
2Chronicles7:8 Solomo wakalambishila bantu bidia bia disanka tô matuku muanda mutekete; Bena Isalele ba bungi bakadi nʼandi ku tshibuelelu tshia Hamata tô ne ku kasulu ka Ejipitu. 
2Chronicles7:9 Dituku dia muanda mukulu diakadi dia disangisha dia tshijila; bualu bua bakadi bajidila tshioshelu matuku muanda mutekete, ne bakadia bidia bia disanka matuku muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ku dituku dia makumi abidi ne asatu dia mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete yeye wakatuma bantu kuabo ku nsubu yabo ya ntenta, bakadi ne disanka dinene mu mitshima yabo, bua buimpe buakalesha Yehowa Davidi ne Solomo ne Bena Isalele, bantu bandi." 
2Chronicles7:11 Nunku Solomo wakashikisha nsubu wa Yehowa ne nsubu wa mukelenge; Solomo wakamana malu onso bimpe akadi mu mutshima wandi bua nsubu wa Yehowa ne bua nsubu wandi kabidi. 
2Chronicles7:12 Yehowa wakamueneka kudi Solomo butuku, wakamuambila ne, Nakunvua kulomba kuebe, nakadisunguila muaba eu bu nsubu wanyi wa milambu." 
2Chronicles7:13 Binabuikila diulu bua nvula kayiloki, anyi binatuma mikumbi bua kudiayi bintu biakamena mu buloba, anyi binatuma tshihuhu munkatshi mua bantu banyi," 
2Chronicles7:14 biadihuekesha bantu banyi badi babikila dina dianyi, biatendelelabo, biakebabo mpala wanyi, ne biakudimunabo mitshima yabo bua mibi yabo, nengunvuile mu diulu, nembabuikidile mibi yabo, nensangashe buloba buabo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Nentabale mesu anyi, nenteleje matshu anyi ku kulomba kudibo balomba mu nsubu eu." 
2Chronicles7:16 Bualu bua nakusungula, nakajidila nsubu eu, bua dina dianyi dikalemu tshiendelele; mesu anyi ne mutshima wanyi nebikalemu tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles7:17 Wewe, bienda ku mpala kuanyi bu muakenza Bayidi tatuʼebe, biwatumikila mikenji yonso inakukuambila, biwananukila kulonda mei anyi mafunda ne mei anyi, majalame," 
2Chronicles7:18 nenjadike nkuasa wa bukelenge buebe, bu munakahunga tshihungidi ne Davidi tatuʼebe ne, Kuena uhanga muntu wa kukokesha Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles7:19 Kadi biwasesuka, biwalekela mei anyi mafunda ne mikenji yanyi binakateka ku mpala kuebe, biwaya kukuatshila nzambi mikuabo mudimu ne bua kuyitendelela," 
2Chronicles7:20 nenjule bantu aba tô ne ku miji mu buloba buanyi bunakabaha; ne nsubu eu unakajidila dina dianyi, nemmûmushe ku mesu kuanyi, nemmuvuishe bu lusumuinu ne tshihendu munkatshi mua bantu bonso." 
2Chronicles7:21 Nsubu eu udi munene, muntu yonso wahitaku neakeme, wamba ne, Yehowa wakenzela buloba ebu ne nsubu eu nunku bishi?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Nebabakudimune ne, Bualu bua bobo bakahidia Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatuʼabo, wakafuma nʼabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu, bakatendelela nzambi mikuabo, bakayitendelela, bakayikuatshila mudimu; nunku yeye wakabatumina makenga â onso." 
2Chronicles8:1 Hakahita bidimu makumi abidi hakamana Solomo kuibaka nsubu wa Yehowa ne nsubu wandi kabidi," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomo wakasa misoko yakamuha Hulama, wakashikikamu Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles8:3 Solomo wakaya ku Hamatasoba, wakauhita bukole." 
2Chronicles8:4 Yeye wakasa Tademô mu tshihela, ne misoko mikuabo ya mu Hamata bua kutekelamu bintu biandi." 
2Chronicles8:5 Yeye wakasa kabidi Bete-holona ku mutu kua mukuna ne Bete-holona mukuabo mu tshibanda, misoko ya ngumbu, ne bibi bia biamu;" 
2Chronicles8:6 wakasa Balata ne misoko mikuabo yakadi nʼai Solomo bua kutekamu bintu biandi ne misoko ya makalu andi ne misoko ya bena nvita bandi bakadi benda ha nyima ha tubalu ne misoko yonso yakasua Solomo kuasa mu Yelushalema ne mu Lebanona, ne mu nseke yonso yakakokesheye." 
2Chronicles8:7 Bantu bakuabo ba Bena Hiti ne Bena Amole ne Bena Pelese ne Bena Hiwi ne Bena Yebuse bakadi bashala, bakadi kabayi Bena Isalele;" 
2Chronicles8:8 Solomo wakabuesha bana babo bakadi bashala ku nyima kuabo, bakadi kabayi bashihibue kudi Bena Isalele, mu buhika tô ne ku dituku edi." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kadi Solomo kakabuesha bana ba Bena Isalele bu bahika mu mudimu wandi; kadi bobo bakadi bena nvita ne tupitene ne tuhita tua bena makalu ne ba bakadi benda ha nyima ba tubalu. 
2Chronicles8:10 Bobo bakadi tupitene tua Solomo ku mutu kua Bena Isalele, tuakadi nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomo wakumusha muana mukashi wa Palô mu musoko wa Davidi, ku nsubu wakamuibakileye; bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Mukashi wanyi kena mushikame mu nsubu wa Davidi, mukelenge wa Bena Isalele, bualu bua ei idi miaba ya tshijila yakadi mushete wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles8:12 Hashishe Solomo wakahia milambu ya kuosha ba tshioshelu tshia Yehowa tshiakaseye mu mbalanda 
2Chronicles8:13 buatshia-buatshia bu muakadi mikenji ya Mose, ku matuku a lumingu, ne hakabala ngondo, ne hakadiabo bidia bia disanka misangu isatu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, hakadiabo bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene, ne bidia bia disanka dia mbingu, ne bidia bia disanka dia bitandatanda." 
2Chronicles8:14 Yeye wakasungula milongo ya bakuidi mu midimu yabo, ne Bena Lewi mu midimu yabo bu muakadi mikenji ya Davidi, bua kuimbabo misambu, ne bua kuenzabo midimu ya bakuidi buatshia-buatshia; ne balami ba bibi ku milongo yabo ku tshibi ne ku tshibi; bualu bua Davidi, muntu wa Nzambi, wakela mikenji nunku." 
2Chronicles8:15 Kabakasesuka ku mikenji ya mukelenge kudi bakuidi ne Bena Lewi mu malu au onso nansha mu bibutshilu bia bintu. 
2Chronicles8:16 Bakalongolola midimu yonso ya Solomo ya mu nsubu wa Yehowa ku makunshi tô ne hakamanabo nsubu mujima. Nunku nsubu wa Yehowa wakashikishibua. 
2Chronicles8:17 Hashishe Solomo wakaya ku muelelu wa mai manene ku Esione-gebê, ne ku Elota mu buloba bua Edome." 
2Chronicles8:18 Hulama wakamutumina matu ku bianza bia bantu bandi, mbantu bakamanya mua kuendesha matu; bakaya ne bantu ba Solomo ku Ofî, bakafumaku ne ntalanta ya or nkama inai ne makumi atanu, bakalua nʼai kudi Solomo." 
2Chronicles9:1 Hakunvua mukelenge mukashi wa Sheba lumu lua Solomo, yeye wakalua ku Yelushalema ne tshisumbu tshia bantu tshinene bua kuteteye Solomo ne makonka makole; wakadi ne tumelo tua bungi tutuala bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne or ya bungi ne mabue a mushinga mukole. Hakafikeye kudi Solomo, yeye wakamuambila malu onso akadi mu mutshima wandi." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomo wakitaba ku makonka andi onso; yeye kakamusokoka bualu bumue, wakamuambila malu onso." 
2Chronicles9:3 Hakamona mukelenge mukashi wa Sheba lungenyi lua Solomo, ne nsubu wakaseye," 
2Chronicles9:4 ne bintu bia kudia bia ku mesa andi, ne muakushikikeye bena mudimu bandi ne bakuatshishi bandi, ne bilulu biabo, ne batuadi ba makoho andi ne bilulu biabo, ne tshibandilu tshiakadiye ubandila ku nsubu wa Yehowa, yeye kakadi ne mutshima wa kumukudimuna di." 
2Chronicles9:5 Yeye wakambila mukelenge ne, Lumu lunakunvua mu buloba buanyi lua bienzedi biebe ne lua lungenyi luebe luakadi lua bushuwa." 
2Chronicles9:6 Kadi meme tshiakitabusha mei a bantu tô ne hanakulua nkayanyi ne hanakubimona ne mesu anyi; tangila, kabakungambila tshituha tshia bunene bua lungenyi luebe; wewe udi uhita lumu lunakunvua bunene." 
2Chronicles9:7 Bantu aba ne bena mudimu bebe badi bimana ku mpala kuebe badi bunvua lungenyi luebe badi ne disanka dinene. 
2Chronicles9:8 Yehowa Nzambi webe, wakasanka bualu buebe bua kukushikika ha nkuasa wandi wa butumbi bua wewe kuikala mukelenge ku mpala kua Yehowa Nzambi webe, avudishibue disanka! Bualu bua Nzambi webe wakananga Bena Isalele bua kubajadika tshiendelele, nunku yeye wakakuhingisha mukelenge ku mutu kuabo bua wewe kuenza malu mimpe ne makane." 
2Chronicles9:9 Mukelenge mukashi wakamuha ntalanta ya or lukama ne makumi abidi, ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe bia bungi, ne mabue a mushinga mukole; kakuakadi bintu bia muhuya muimpe bikuabo bu biakaha mukelenge mukashi wa Sheba mukelenge Solomo." 
2Chronicles9:10 Bantu ba Hulama ne bantu ba Solomo bakalua ne or wa ku Ofî, bakalua ne mitshi ya sandal ne mabue a mushinga mukole." 
2Chronicles9:11 Mukelenge wakenza bintu bilengele bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bia mu nsubu wandi ne bisanji ne nzenze bia bimbi ba misambu ku mitshi ei ya sandal; kabakatangila bintu bu ebi diambedi mu buloba bua Yuda. 
2Chronicles9:12 Mukelenge Solomo wakaha mukelenge mukashi wa Sheba bintu bionso biakanangeye, tshionso tshiakalombeye ha mutu ha bintu biakalueye nʼabi kudi mukelenge. Nunku yeye ne bantu bandi bonso bakahingana ku buloba buandi." 
2Chronicles9:13 Bujitu bua or buakasangisha Solomo mu tshidimu tshimue buakadi bua ntalanta ya or nkama isambombo ne makumi asambombo ne isambombo," 
2Chronicles9:14 ha mutu ha or yakalua nʼai bendi ba mushinga; bakelenge bonso ba mu Alabâ ne ba-gouverneur ba mu nseke ai yonso bakalua ne or ne argent kudi Solomo. 
2Chronicles9:15 Mukelenge Solomo wakatula ngabu ya or nkama ibidi; bakatula ngabu ne ngabu ku nshekele ya or nkama isambombo. 
2Chronicles9:16 Wakatula ngabu ya or nkama isatu mikuabo; wakatula ngabu ne ngabu ku nshekele ya or nkama isatu; mukelenge wakayiteka mu nsubu wa ditu dia Lebanona. 
2Chronicles9:17 Bualu bukuabo, mukelenge wakenza nkuasa wa bukelenge ne mibanga, wakateka or ku nseke yonso." 
2Chronicles9:18 Nkuasa wa bukelenge wakadi ne tshibandilu tshia bidiatshilu bisambombo, ne tshitekelu tshia makasa tshia or tshitue ne nkuasa; bitekelu bibidi bia maboko biakadi ku luseke ne luseke lua nkuasa; tshifuanyikishi tshia nyama wa ntambue tshiakadi tshilamata ku tshitekelu ne tshitekelu tshia maboko." 
2Chronicles9:19 Bifuanyikishi bia nyama ya ntambue dikumi ne bibidi biakadi biteka ku bidiatshilu bisambombo, bibidi ku tshidiatshilu ne tshidiatshilu, tshimue ku luseke, tshimue ku luseke. Kabakadi benza tshintu bu etshi mu bukelenge bukuabo to!" 
2Chronicles9:20 Mpanza yonso ya kunuina mukelenge Solomo yakadi ya or, ne mpanza yonso ya mu nsubu wandi wa ditu dia Lebanona yakadi ya or kabidi; kabakabala argent bu tshintu tshia mushinga mukole mu matuku a Solomo." 
2Chronicles9:21 Bualu bua mukelenge wakadi ne matu akaya ku Tâshishi ne bantu ba Hulama; matu au akafuma ku Tâshishi musangu umue mu bidimu bisatu ne or ne argent ne mibanga ne nkima ne nyunyu ya kayiba. 
2Chronicles9:22 Nunku mukelenge Solomo wakatamba bakelenge bonso ba ha buloba bubanji ne mu meji. 
2Chronicles9:23 Bakelenge bonso ba ha buloba bakalua kudi Solomo bua kunvuabo meji akamuha Nzambi mu mutshima wandi. 
2Chronicles9:24 Bakalua muntu ne muntu ne mulambu wandi, mpanza ya or ne ya argent ne bilulu ne bintu bia nvita ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne tubalu ne nyama ya mpunda ku tshidimu ku tshidimu," 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomo wakadi ne nsubu ya tubalu ne ya makalu binunu binai, ne bantu bakadi benda ha nyima ha tubalu binunu dikumi ne bibidi bakatekeye mu misoko yakadi ne makalu andi ne mu Yelushalema muakadi mukelenge." 
2Chronicles9:26 Yeye wakakokesha bakelenge bonso ku musulu wa Pelata tô ne ku buloba bua Bena Peleshete ne ku mukalu wa buloba bua Ejipitu. 
2Chronicles9:27 Mukelenge wakakumbasha argent mu Yelushalema bu mabue; wakakumbasha mitshi ya cèdre bu bungi bua mitshi ya sycomore ya mu bibanda. 
2Chronicles9:28 Bakangatshila Solomo tubalu mu Ejipitu ne mu maloba onso. 
2Chronicles9:29 Bienzedi bia Solomo bikuabo, bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu, kabiena bifunda mu kulondolola kua Natana muprofete, ne kua Ahiya, Muena Shiloa, ne mu kulondolola kua bikena kumona bia Ido, mumonyi wa malu, biakamoneye bia Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, anyi?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomo wakakokesha mu Yelushalema ku mutu kua Bena Isalele bidimu makumi anai. 
2Chronicles9:31 Solomo wakalala tulu diatshimue ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi, tatuʼandi. Lehabama, muanʼandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles10:1 Lehabama wakaya ku Shekeme; bualu bua Bena Isalele bonso bakadisangisha ku Shekeme bua kumuhingisha mu bukelenge. 
2Chronicles10:2 Hakunvua Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, lumu elu (bualu bua yeye wakadi munyemene mu Ejipitu ku mesu kua Solomo), Yalobama wakahingana mufume mu Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles10:3 Bakamubikila; Yalobama ne Bena Isalele bonso bakalua, bakambila Lehabama ne," 
2Chronicles10:4 Tatu webe wakanvudisha mutshi wetu wa tshikokedi bujitu bukole; nunku wewe uheheshe mudimu mukole wakatukengesha nʼau tatu webe ne tshikokedi etshi tshikole tshiakatekeye mu nshingu yetu, hashishe netukukuatshile mudimu." 
2Chronicles10:5 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuhingane hahita matuku asatu. Nunku bantu bakumuka ku mpala kuandi." 
2Chronicles10:6 Mukelenge Lehabama wakasangisha dî ne bantu banunu bakadi bimane ku mpala kua tatu wandi Solomo hakadiye ne muoyo ne, Nuenu nudi nungambile lungenyi kai lua kukudimuna nʼalu bantu aba?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Bobo bakamuambila ne, Biwalesha bantu aba kalolo, biwabasankisha, biwabambila mei mimpe, bobo nebikale bena mudimu bebe tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles10:8 Kadi yeye wakalengulula dî diakamuambila bantu banunu, wakasangisha di ne bansongalume bakadi bakela nʼandi, bakadi bimana ku mpala kuandi." 
2Chronicles10:9 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nuenu nudi nungambile lungenyi kai lua kukudimuna nʼalu bantu aba badi bangambila ne, Uheheshe tshikokedi tshiakatukengesha nʼatshi tatuʼebe?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Bansongalume bakadi bakola nʼandi bakamuambila ne, Ukudimune bantu aba bakabambila di adi ne, Tatu webe wakatuvudisha tshikokedi tshiakanemesha bujitu, kadi wewe utuheheshetshi; wewe ubambile ne, Kantengenene kanyi nekahite tshimono tshia tatuʼanyi bunene." 
2Chronicles10:11 Tatuʼanyi wakavudisha tshikokedi tshienu, kadi meme nenkumbashe bintu ha mutu hatshi; tatuʼanyi wakanukengesha ne nsokotshi, kadi meme nennukengeshe ne tuminyiminyi." 
2Chronicles10:12 Nunku Yalobama ne bantu bonso bakahingana kudi Lehabama hakahita matuku asatu bu muakabambila mukelenge ne, Nuhingane kundi hahita matuku asatu." 
2Chronicles10:13 Mukelenge wakabakudimuna mei makole; mukelenge Lehabama wakalengulula dî diakamuambila bantu banunu," 
2Chronicles10:14 wakabambila anu mei akamuyisha bansongalume ne, Tatu wanyi wakavudisha mutshi wenu wa tshikokedi bujitu, kadi meme nenkumbashe bintu ha mutu hatshi; tatu wanyi wakanukengesha ne nsokotshi, kadi meme nennukengeshe ne tuminyiminyi." 
2Chronicles10:15 Nunku mukelenge kakunvua dî dia bantu; bua bualu ebu buakafuma kudi Nzambi bua kujadika dî dia Yehowa diakambileye Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, mukana mua Ahiya, Muena Shiloa." 
2Chronicles10:16 Hakamona Bena Isalele bonso ne, Mukelenge kena witabusha dî dietu, bobo bakebesha mukelenge ne, Tuetu tudi ne luseke luetu lua bintu mu Davidi kudi kunyi? Katuena ne buhianyi buetu kudi muana wa Yishai; Bena Isalele, hinganai muntu ne muntu ku nsubu wandi wa ntenta; nuenu ba Davidi nulame nsubu yenu. Nunku Bena Isalele bonso bakahingana ku nsubu yabo ya ntenta." 
2Chronicles10:17 Kadi Lehabama wakakokesha Bena Isalele bakadi bashikame mu misoko ya mu Yuda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Hashishe Lehabama wakatuma Hadolama wakadi ku mutu kua bena mudimu, ne Bena Isalele bakamushiha ne mabue. Mukelenge Lehabama wakabuela mu dikalu diandi lukasa bua kunyemeneye ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles10:19 Nunku Bena Isalele bakutombokela ba mu nsubu wa Davidi tô ne ku dituku edi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Hakahingana Lehabama ku Yelushalema, yeye wakasangisha Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina, bena nvita binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu, bua kuluanganabo ne Bena Isalele ne bua kuhingisha bukelenge kudi Lehabama kabidi." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kadi dî dia Yehowa diakalua kudi Shemaya, muntu wa Nzambi, ne," 
2Chronicles11:3 Wambile Lehabama, muana wa Solomo, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne Bena Isalele bonso ba mu Yuda ne Benyamina ne," 
2Chronicles11:4 Yehowa udi wamba ne, Kanuyi, kanuluanganyi ne bana benu; nuhingane muntu ne muntu ku nsubu wandi bua bualu ebu budi bufuma kundi. Nunku bakitabusha dî dia Yehowa, bakalukila, kabakaya kuluangana ne Yalobama." 
2Chronicles11:5 Lehabama wakashikama mu Yelushalema, wakibaka misoko ya mabue mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles11:6 Yeye wakasa Beteleheme ne Etama ne Tekoa 
2Chronicles11:7 ne Betesû ne Soko ne Adulama 
2Chronicles11:8 ne Gata ne Malesha ne Zifa 
2Chronicles11:9 ne Adolayima ne Lakisha ne Azeka 
2Chronicles11:10 ne Solea ne Ayalona ne Hebelone, idi mu Yuda ne Benyamina, misoko yakadi ne ngumbu." 
2Chronicles11:11 Yeye wakajadika misoko ya ngumbu bikole, wakatekamu tupitene tua masalayi ne bintu bia kudia ne manyi ne nvinyo." 
2Chronicles11:12 Yeye wakateka ngabu ne mafuma mu misoko yonso, wakayidika bikole. Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina bakadi ku luseke luandi." 
2Chronicles11:13 Bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadi mu nseke yonso ya Isalele bakalamata kudiye. 
2Chronicles11:14 Bualu bua Bena Lewi bakashiya misoko yabo ne mahianyi abo, bakalua ku Yuda ne Yelushalema; bualu bua Yalobama ne bana bandi balume bakabihata, bua bobo kabenzedi Yehowa mudimu wandi wa buakuidi;" 
2Chronicles11:15 yeye wakadisunguila bakuidi bua kufilabo milambu ha mutu ha mikuna ne milambu ya mpumbu ya mbushi ne ya bana ba ngombe yakeleye. 
2Chronicles11:16 Bantu bonso ba mu Isalele bakadi bakeba Yehowa Nzambi wa Isalele ne mitshima yabo yonso bakalonda ku nyima kuabo ku Yelushalema bua kufilabo milambu kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Nunku bakajadika bukelenge bua Yuda, baka-vuisha Lehabama, muana wa Solomo, bukole bidimu bisatu; bualu bua bakenda mu nshila wa Davidi ne wa Solomo bidimu ebi bisatu." 
2Chronicles11:18 Lehabama wakabaka mukashi, dina diandi Mahalata, muana mukashi wa Yelimota, muana wa Davidi ne wa Abihayila, muana mukashi wa Eliaba, muana wa Yishai;" 
2Chronicles11:19 yeye wakamulelela bana ba balume, Yeusha ne Shemaliya ne Zahama." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ku nyima kuandi yeye wakabaka Mâka, muana mukashi wa Abashaloma: yeye wakamulelela Abiya ne Atai ne ne Shelomita." 
2Chronicles11:21 Lehabama wakananga Mâka, muana wa Abashaloma, ha mutu ha bakashi bandi bonso ne bakashi bahika bakadiye mubake (bualu bua yeye wakabaka bakashi dikumi ne muanda mukulu ne bakashi bahika makumi asambombo; wakalela nʼabo bana ba balume makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu ne ba bakashi makumi asambombo)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Lehabama wakasungula Abiya, muana wa Mâka muenyampala ku mutu kua bana babo balume; bualu bua yeye wakasua kumuhingisha mu bukelenge." 
2Chronicles11:23 Yeye wakadi ne budimu, wakamuangalasha bana bandi balume bonso mu misoko ya Yuda ne Benyamina, mu misoko yakadi ne ngumbu; yeye wakabaha bintu bia kudia bia bungi. Yeye wakabakebela bakashi ba bungi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Hakadi bukelenge hua Lehabama bujadikibue bimpe, ne hakakoleye biakane, yeye wakasesuka ku mikenji ya Yehowa, ne Bena Isalele bakamulonda." 
2Chronicles12:2 Mu tshidimu tshitanu tshia bukelenge bua Lehabama, Shishaka, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, wakalua hua kuluisha Bena Yelushalema, bualu bua bobo bakenzela Yehowa bibi." 
2Chronicles12:3 Wakadi ne mikalu tshinunu ne nkama ibidi ne bantu bakadi benda ha nyima ha tubalu binunu makumi asambombo. Kabakamanya mua kubala bungi bua bantu bakuabo bakafuma nʼandi mu bululu: Bena Lubima ne Bena Sukiya ne Bena Atiopa. 
2Chronicles12:4 Yeye wakanyenga misoko ya ngumbu ya Yuda, wakafika ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles12:5 Hashishe Shemaya muprofete wakalua kudi Lehabama ne bantu banene ba mu Yuda, bakadi badisangisha mu Yelushalema bualu bua Shishaka, wakabambila ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Nuenu nuakundekela, nunku nakunushiya mu bianza bia Shishaka." 
2Chronicles12:6 Hashishe bantu banene ba mu Isalele ne mukelenge bakadihuekesha; bakamba ne. Yehowa udi muakane 
2Chronicles12:7 Hakamona Yehowa ne bobo bakadihuekesha, dî dia Yehowa diakalua kudi Shemaya kabidi ne, Bobo bakadihuekesha; tshiena mbashiha, kadi nembahandishe tshituha tshihi, tshiena mpatula tshiji tshianyi ku Yelushaluma ku tshianza tshia Shishaka." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kadi bobo nebikale bena mudimu bandi, bua bobo bamanye mudimu wanyi ne mudimu ya makelenge makuabo." 
2Chronicles12:9 Nunku Shishaka, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, wakalua bua kuluisha Bena Yelushalema wakanyenga bintu bia mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge; wakaya nʼabi bionso; wakangata ngabu ya or yakatulabo kudi Solomo kabidi." 
2Chronicles12:10 Mukelenge Lehabama wakatula ngabu ya tshiamu tshia mitaku mu miaba yai, wakayiteka mu bianza bia tupitene tua balami ba bibi bia nsubu wa mukelenge." 
2Chronicles12:11 Misangu yonso yakabuela mukelenge mu nsubu wa Yehowa tupitene tuakamema ngabu, tuakalua nʼai, hashishe tuakayihingisha mu nsubu wa bulami." 
2Chronicles12:12 Hakadihuekesheye tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakumuka kudiye, nunku kabakamubutula; kuakadi malu makuabo numpe mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Nunku mukelenge Lehabama wakadikolesha mu Yelushalema, wakakokesha bantu; Lehabama wakadi ne bidimu makumi anai ne tshimue hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete mu Yelushalema, musoko wakasungula Yehowa munkatshi mua bisamba bia Bena Isalele bionso bua kutekamu dina diandi; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Nâma, Muena Amona." 
2Chronicles12:14 Yeye wakenza malu mabi, bualu bua yeye kakajadika mutshima wandi bua kukebeye Yehowa." 
2Chronicles12:15 Bienzedi bia Lehabama, bia kumudia ne bia kunshikidilu kabiena bifunda mu kulondolola kua Shemaya muprofete, ne kua Ido mumonyi wa malu, bu mudibo bafunda mikanda ya kulondolola anyi? Lehabama ne Yalobama bakadi baluangana nvita misangu yonso," 
2Chronicles12:16 Lehabama wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi; Abiya, muana wandi, wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles13:1 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshia mu bukelenge bua Yalobama, Abiya wakabanga kukokesha mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Yeye wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu bisatu; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Mikaya, muana mukashi wa Uliele wa mu Gibea. Abiya ne Yalobama bakadi baluangana nvita." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya wakasa mualu wa nvita ne bena nvita ba bukitu binunu nkama inai; Yalobama wakaluangana nʼandi ne bena nvita ba bukitu binunu nkama muanda mukulu. 
2Chronicles13:4 Abiya wakimana ha mutu ha mukuna wa Semalayima mu luseke lua mikuna ya Efelayima, wakamba ne, Unvuai, Yalobama ne Bena Isalele bonso;" 
2Chronicles13:5 kanuena bamanye ne, Yehowa Nzambi wa Isalele, wakaha bukelenge bua Isalele kudi Davidi tshiendelele, kudiye ne kudi bana bandi balume ku tshihungidi tshia luehu, anyi?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Kadi Yalobama, muana wa Nebata, muena mudimu wa Solomo, muana wa Davidi, wakajuka, wakatombokela mukelenge wandi." 
2Chronicles13:7 Bilumelume ne bantu ba hatuhu bakadisangisha kudiye, bakadikolesha bua kuhidia Lehabama, muana wa Solomo, hakadi Lehabama nsongalume wa mutshima mutekete, kakadi ne bukole bua kubakandamena." 
2Chronicles13:8 Katataka nuenu nudi nuelangana meji bua kuhumbisha bukelenge bua Yehowa budi mu bianza bia bana ba Davidi; nuenu nudi tshisumbu tshinene, nudi ne bana ba ngombe ba or bakatulabo kudi Yalobama bu nzambi yenu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Kanuakibata bakuidi ba Yehowa, bana ba Alona, ne Bena Lewi, kanuakadisunguila bakuidi bu mudi tshilele tshia bantu ba mu makelenge makuabo, anyi? Nunku muntu yonso walua kudijidila ne muana mulume wa ngombe ne bimpanga muanda mutekete, yeye mene udi mua kuikala muakuidi kudi nzambi ya hatuhu." 
2Chronicles13:10 Kadi bua tuetu, Yehowa udi Nzambi wetu, katuakamulekela; tudi ne bakuidi, bana ba Alona, ne Bena Lewi badi bakuatshila Yehowa mudimu;" 
2Chronicles13:11 bobo badi bafila milambu ya kuosha ne musenga wa manananshi kudi Yehowa ku dinda ku dinda ne ku dilolo ku dilolo; badi bateka bidia bilesha ha mesa a tshijila kabidi; badi batemesha minda idi ha bitekelu bia or ku dilolo ku dilolo kabidi; bualu bua tuetu tudi tulonda mukenji wa Yehowa Nzambi wetu; kadi nuenu nuakumlekela. 
2Chronicles13:12 Tangilai, Nzambi udi nʼetu ku mutu kuetu, ne bakuidi bandi badi ne mpungi ya kuela bua kunudimusha. Nuenu Bena Isalele, kanuluanganyi ne Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu; bualu bua kanuena mua kumuhita bukole." 
2Chronicles13:13 Kadi Yalobama wakamana kuteka bâlaminyi ku nyima kuabo; nunku bakuabo bakadi ku mpala kua Bena Yuda, ne bâlaminyi bakadi ku nyima kuabo." 
2Chronicles13:14 Hakatangila Bena Yuda ku nyima, monai, bakadi baluangana ku nyima kuabo ne ku mpala kuabo kabidi; bakadila kudi Yehowa, ne bakuidi bakela mpungi." 
2Chronicles13:15 Ha diba adi Bena Yuda bakela mbila; hakela Bena Yuda mbila, Nzambi wakalekesha Yalobama ne Bena Isalele bonso ku mpala kua Abiya ne Bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Bena Isalele bakanyema ku mpala kua Bena Yuda; Nzambi wakabafila mu bianza biabo. 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya ne bantu bandi bakabashiha ne kushiha kukole; Bena Isalele ba bukitu binunu nkama itanu bakadishinda hanshi bafue. 
2Chronicles13:18 Nunku Bena Isalele bakateketa tshikondo atshi, ne Bena Yuda bakabahita bukole bualu bua bobo bakeyemena Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya wakalonda ku nyima kua Yalobama, wakamunyenga misoko yandi; Betele ne misoko yakadi ha buihi, ne Yeshana ne misoko yakadi ha buihi, ne Efelona ne misoko yakadi ha buihi." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yalobama kakaheta bukole kabidi mu matuku a Abiya; Yehowa wakamushiha, wakafua." 
2Chronicles13:21 Kadi Abiya wakalua muena bukole bua bungi; wakabaka bakashi dikumi ne banai, wakalela nʼabo bana ba balume makumi abidi ne babidi ne bana ba bakashi dikumi ne basambombo." 
2Chronicles13:22 Bienzedi bia Abiya bikuabo ne midimu yandi ne mei andi bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola wa Ido muprofete. 
2Chronicles14:1 Abiya wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi; Asa muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi. Mu matuku andi buloba buakadi ne ditalala bidimu dikumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa Wakenza malu akadi mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa Nzambi wandi; 
2Chronicles14:3 bualu bua yeye wakumusha bioshelu bia bantu ba bende ne bitendelelu biakadi ba mutu ha mikuna, wakabutula makunshi, wakataha mitshi ya Bashela," 
2Chronicles14:4 wakelela Bena Yuda mukenji wa kukebabo Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, ne wa kutumikila mikenji ne mei andi." 
2Chronicles14:5 Yeye kabidi wakumusha mpingu yakadi mu misoko ya Yuda ne mpingu ya ku mutu kua mikuna yakatendelelabo nʼai diba; bukelenge buakadi ne ditalala ku mpala kuandi. 
2Chronicles14:6 Yeye wakasa misoko ya ngumbu mu Yuda; bualu bua buloba buakadi ne ditalala, yeye kakadi ne nvita bidimu abi, bualu bua Yehowa wakadi mumuhe ditalala." 
2Chronicles14:7 Bualu bua yeye wakambila Bena Yuda ne, Tuase misoko ei, tuyinyunguluke ne ngumbu ne bibumba ne bibi bia biamu; buloba butshidi ku mpala kuetu bualu bua tuetu tuakakeba Yehowa Nzambi wetu; tuakamukeba, ne yeye wakutuha ditalala ku nseke yonso. Nunku bakasa misoko, bakadi ne diakalengele." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa wakadi ne bena nvita mu Yuda binunu nkama isatu bakatuala mafuma ne ngabu, ne mu Benyamina binunu nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mukulu bakatuala ngabu ne mata; aba bonso bakadi bena nvita ba bukitu." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zela, Muena Atiopa, wakalua kudiye ne bena nvita binunu tshinunu ne makalu nkama isatu; wakafika ku Malesha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Hashishe Asa wakaya kusangakena nʼandi, wakasa mualu wa nvita mu tshibanda tshia Sefata ku Malesha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa wakadila kudi Yehowa Nzambi wandi, wakamba ne, Yehowa, kakuena mukuabo bu wewe udi mua kukuatshisha badi ne bukole ne badi kabayi ne bukole; utukuatshishe, Yehowa Nzambi wetu; bualu bua tuetu tudi tukueyemena, tuakuluila mu dina diebe bua kuluangana ne tshisumbu etshi tshinene. Yehowa, wewe udi Nzambi wetu; kuitabushi bua bantu bakuhite bukole." 
2Chronicles14:12 Nunku Yehowa wakatekesha Bena Atiopa ku mpala kua Asa ne kua Bena Yuda; Bena Atiopa hakanyema. 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa ne bantu bakadiye nʼabo bakabihata to ne ku Gela; Bena Atiopa ba bungi bakashihibua, kabakamanya mua kudisangisha kabidi; bualu bua bobo bakadi bashihibue ku mpala kua Yehowa ne bantu bandi; Bena Yuda bakanyenga bintu bia bungi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Bobo bakahaula misoko yonso yakadi ha buihi ne Gela, bualu bua ditshina dia Yehowa diakabakuata. Bakahaula misoko ei yonso, bualu bua mu misoko ei muakadi bintu bia bungi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Bakashimbula nsubu ya ntenta yakadi ya ngombe kabidi, bakaya ne mikoko ya bungi ne tumelo, bakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles15:1 Nyuma wa Nzambi wakatulukila Azaya, muana wa Odede;" 
2Chronicles15:2 wakaya kusangakena ne Asa, wakamuambila ne, Unvuai, Asa ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina; Yehowa udi nʼenu, hantshidi nʼandi; binuamukeba, nenumuhete; kadi binuamulekela, yeye neanulekele." 
2Chronicles15:3 Bena Isalele kabakadi ne Nzambi mulelela tô musangu mule, kabakadi ne muakuidi wa kubayisha, kabakadi ne mikenji ya Nzambi;" 
2Chronicles15:4 kadi mu ntatu yabo hakakudimunabo mitshima yabo kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, bobo bakamuheta." 
2Chronicles15:5 Mu matuku au ditalala kadiakadi kudi bakaluhuka anyi kudi bakahingana, kadi ntatu mikole yakadi kudi bena buloba bonso." 
2Chronicles15:6 Bakadi babutudibue, tshisamba kudi tshisamba tshikuabo, ne musoko kudi musoko mukuabo; bualu bua Nzambi wakabatatshisha ne ntatu yonso." 
2Chronicles15:7 Kadi nuenu nuikale ne bukole, kanutekeshi maboko enu; bualu bua nebanufute ku midimu yenu." 
2Chronicles15:8 Hakunvua Asa mei â akamuambila Odede muprofete, yeye wakakolesha mutshima wandi, wakumusha malu mabi onso akadi mu buloba bua Yuda ne Benyamina, ne mu misoko yonso yakanyengeye mu mikuna ya Efelayima; yeye wakashila kabidi tshioshelu tshia Yehowa tshiakadi ku mpala kua tshibuelelu tshia ku nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles15:9 Yeye wakasangisha Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina ne bonso bakadi bashikama mu Efelayima ne Manashe ne Shimeona; bualu bua ba bungi ba mu Bena Isalele bakalamata kudiye hakamonabo ne Yehowa Nzambi wandi wakadi nʼandi. 
2Chronicles15:10 Nunku bakadisangisha mu Yelushalema mu ngondo muisatu wa mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bitanu tshia mu bukelenge bua Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Bakafila milambu kudi Yehowa dituku adi ya bintu biakanyengabo, ngombe nkama muanda mutekete ne mikoko binunu muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles15:12 Bakahunga tshihungidi bua kukebabo Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, ne mitshima yabo yonso ne mioyo yabo yonso;" 
2Chronicles15:13 bua muntu yonso wahidia kukeba Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ashihibue, nansha muntu mukese nansha muntu munene, nansha mulume nansha mukashi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Bakaditshiha kudi Yehowa ne mei makole, bela mbila ne mpungi ne nsengu." 
2Chronicles15:15 Bualu bua Bena Yuda bonso bakasanka bua tshihungidi tshiabo; bualu bua bobo bakaditshiha ne mitshima yabo yonso, bakamukeba ne dinanga diabo dionso; bobo bakamuheta; Yehowa wakabaha ditalala ku nseke yonso." 
2Chronicles15:16 Asa wakumusha Mâka mamu wandi mumuledi kabidi, bua yeye kikadi mukelenge mukashi, bualu bua yeye wakenza luhingu lua bundu lua kutendelela nʼalu Bashela; Asa wakashimbula luhingu luandi, wakalusunsula tuhese tukese, wakaluosha ne kahia ku musulu wa Kidilona." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kadi kabakumusha bitendelelu bionso biakadi ha mutu ha mikuna ya mu Isalele; kadi mutshima wa Asa wakadi muakane matuku andi onso. 
2Chronicles15:18 Yeye wakateka bintu biakajidila tatu wandi ne bintu biakajidileye nkayandi bia argent ne bia or ne mpanza mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Chronicles15:19 Kabakadi ne nvita kabidi tô ne ku tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshitanu tshia mu bukelenge bua Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshisambombo tshia mu bukelenge bua Asa, Bâsha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakaya kuluangana ne Bena Yuda; yeye wakasa Lama bua yeye ahidishe bantu bua kabahatuki ne kabahinganyi kudi Asa, mukelenge wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Hashishe Asa wakangata argent ne or bia mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne mu nsubu wa mukelenge, wakabitumina kudi Bene-hadada, mukelenge wa Sulia, wakadi ushikama mu Damaseke, ne," 
2Chronicles16:3 Tshihungidi tshidi hankatshi hetu bu muakaditshi hankatshi ha tatu wanyi ne tatu webe; mona, nakakutumina argent ne or; ya biebe, ushihe tshihungidi tshiwakahunga ne Bâsha, mukelenge wa Isalele, bua yeye Umuke kundi." 
2Chronicles16:4 Bene-hadada wakitabusha dî dia mukelenge Asa, wakatuma tupitene tua masalayi andi bua kuluangana ne bena misoko ya mu Isalele; bakahaula Iyona ne Dana ne Abele-maima ne misoko ya bibutshilu bia mu Nafatale." 
2Chronicles16:5 Hakunvua Bâsha lumu elu, yeye wakalekela kuasa Lama; mudimu wakashika." 
2Chronicles16:6 Hashishe mukelenge Asa wakaya ne Bena Yuda, bakangata mabue ne mitshi biakadi ku Lama biakadi Bâsha wasa nʼabi; bobo bakasa nʼabi Geba ne Misepa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Mu tshikondo atshi Hanani, mumonyi wa malu, wakalua kudi Asa, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakamuambila ne, Bualu bua wewe wakueyemena mukelenge wa Sulia, kuakueyemena Yehowa Nzambi webe, nunku bantu ba mukelenge wa Sulia bakahanduka mu bianza biebe." 
2Chronicles16:8 Bena Atiopa ne Bena Lubima kabakadi tshisumbu tshinene ne makalu ne bena tubalu bia bungi, anyi? Kadi bualu bua wewe wakueyemena Yehowa, yeye wakabafila mu bianza biebe." 
2Chronicles16:9 Bualu bua mesu a Yehowa adi akenzekana ku nseke yonso ya buloba bua kulesha bakole buandi kudi bantu badi ne mitshima miakane kudiye. Wewe wakuenza buhote mu bualu ebu, kubangila mu dituku edi wewe newikale ne nvita." 
2Chronicles16:10 Ha diba adi Asa wakadi ne mumonyi wa malu tshiji, wakamubuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu; bualu bua tshiji tshikole tshiakamukuata bua bualu ebu. Asa wakakengesha bantu bakuabo mu tshikondo atshi tshiotshimue." 
2Chronicles16:11 Monai, bienzedi bia Asa bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Yuda ne Isalele." 
2Chronicles16:12 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshitema tshia bukelenge buandi disama diakakuata Asa ku makasa andi; disama edi diakadi dikole; kadi mu disama diandi yeye kakakeba Yehowa, kadi wakakeba bangangabuka." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, wakafua mu tshidimu tshia makumi anai ne tshimue tshia bukelenge buandi." 
2Chronicles16:14 Bakamujika mu lukita luakadiumbuileye mu musoko wa Davidi; bakamuladika ha bulalu buakadi ne bintu bia bungi bia muhuya muimpe biakalongololabo kudi bantu ba lungenyi lule; bakamuelela bintu bia bungi mu madilu andi. 
2Chronicles17:1 Yehoshafata muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi, wakadikolesha bua kuluisha Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles17:2 Yeye wakateka masalayi mu misoko yonso ya ngumbu ya mu Yuda; wakateka milongo ya masalayi mu buloba bua Yuda ne mu misoko ya Efelayima yakanyenga Asa tatuʼandi. 
2Chronicles17:3 Yehowa wakadi ne Yehoshafata bualu bua yeye wakenda mu nshila ya diambedi ya Davidi, nkambua wandi, kakakeba nzambi ya Bâla," 
2Chronicles17:4 wakakeba Nzambi wa tatu wandi, wakatumikila mikenji yandi, kakalonda bilele bia Isalele." 
2Chronicles17:5 Nunku Yehowa wakajadika bukelenge mu bianza biandi; Bena Yuda bonso bakalua ne milambu kudi Yehoshafata; yeye wakadi ne bubanji ne butumbi bua bungi. 
2Chronicles17:6 Mutshima wandi wakakoleshibua mu nshila ya Yehowa; yeye wakumusha bitendelelu biakadi ku mutu kua mikuna ne Bashela bakadi mu Yuda. 
2Chronicles17:7 Mu tshidimu tshisatu tshia bukelenge buandi yeye wakatumina bantu bandi banene, Bene-hayila ne Obadaya ne Zekâya ne Netanele ne Mikaya bua kuyishabo mu misoko ya Yuda;" 
2Chronicles17:8 wakatumina nʼabo kabidi Bena Lewi: Shemaya ne Netanya ne Zebadaya ne Asahele ne Shemilamota ne Yehonatana ne Adoniya ne Tobiya ne Toba-adoniya, mBena Lewi; ne Elishama ne Yeholama, bakuidi bakadi nʼabo." 
2Chronicles17:9 Bakayisha mu Yuda; bakadi ne mutanda wa mikenji ya Yehowa; bakaya ku misoko yonso ya Bena Yuda, bayisha bantu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Ditshina dia Yehowa diakakuata bantu ba mu makelenge akadi ha buihi ne Bena Yuda, nunku bobo kabakaluangana nvita ne Yehoshafata." 
2Chronicles17:11 Bena Peleshete bakuabo bakalua ne bintu kudi Yehoshafata ne argent ya milambu; Bena Alabâ bakalua kudiye ne bimuna biabo, bimpanga binunu muanda mutekete ne nkama muanda mutekete, ne mpumbu ya mbushi binunu muanda mutekete ne nkama muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles17:12 Butumbi bua Yehoshafata buakadiundadiunda bikole; yeye wakasa bibumba ne misoko ya bibutshilu mu Yuda. 
2Chronicles17:13 Yeye wakenza midimu ya bungi mu misoko ya Bena Yuda; wakadi ne bena nvita ba bukitu mu Yelushalema. 
2Chronicles17:14 Ebu mbungi buabo bu muakadi nsubu ya batatuʼabo: bua Bena Yuda, tupitene tua binunu bia bantu: Adena wakadi kapitene ne bena bukitu binunu nkama isatu bakadi nʼandi;" 
2Chronicles17:15 ku nyima kuandi Yehohanana wakadi kapitene ne bantu binunu nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mukulu bakadi nʼandi; 
2Chronicles17:16 ku nyima kuandi Amasaya, muana wa Zikeli, wakadifila kudi Yehowa; bena bukitu binunu nkama ibidi bakadi nʼandi." 
2Chronicles17:17 Ba mu Benyamina: Eliada, muena bukitu, ne bantu binunu nkama ibidi bakadi ne mata ne ngabu bakadi nʼandi;" 
2Chronicles17:18 ku nyima kuandi Yehozabada ne bantu binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu bakadi ne bintu bia nvita bilongolola bakadi nʼandi. 
2Chronicles17:19 Bantu aba bakalamata kudi mukelenge, ha mutu ha bantu bakateka mukelenge mu misoko yakadi ne ngumbu kuonso mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yehoshafata wakadi ne bubanji ne butumbi bua bungi; wakahunga tshihungidi ne Ahaba. 
2Chronicles18:2 Hakahita bidimu bikuabo, yeye wakaya kudi Ahaba ku Samalea. Ahaba wakamushihela ne bantu bakadi nʼandi mikoko ne ngombe ya bungi; wakamuitabushisha bua kuyeye nʼandi ku Lamota-gilada." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahaba, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakebesha Yehoshafata, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne, Wewe neuye nʼanyi ku Lamota-gilada, anyi? Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Meme ndi bu wewe, bantu banyi badi bu bantu bebe; tuetu netuye nʼebe mu nvita." 
2Chronicles18:4 Yehoshafata wakambila mukelenge wa Isalele ne, Ndi nkusengelela ne, Udianjile kukonka dî dia Yehowa." 
2Chronicles18:5 Hashishe mukelenge wa Isalele wakasangisha baprofete nkama inai, wakabebesha ne, Tuye ku Lamota-gilada bua kuluangana nʼabo, anyi tushale? Bakamuambila ne, Uye biebe; bualu bua Nzambi neafile musoko mu bianza bia mukelenge." 
2Chronicles18:6 Kadi Yehoshafata wakakonka ne, Kakuena muprofete mukuabo wa Yehowa bua tuetu tumuebeshe, anyi?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Mukelenge wa Isalele wakakudimuna Yehoshafata ne, Muprofete mukuabo udiku; kadi ndi nʼandi lukuna, bualu bua yeye katu wamba malu mimpe bualu buanyi, anu malu mabi; yeye mene udi Mikaya, muana wa Yimela. Yehoshafata wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge kambi nunku nansha." 
2Chronicles18:8 Hashishe mukelenge wa Isalele wakabikila kahita, wakamuambila ne, Ya lubilu, ubikile Mikaya, muana wa Yimela." 
2Chronicles18:9 Mukelenge wa Isalele ne Yehoshafata, mukelenge wa Yuda, bakadi bashikama, muntu mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge muntu mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge, baluate bilulu biabo bia bukelenge; bakadi bashikama mu muaba wa hatuhu ku tshibuelelu tshia ku Samalea; baprofete bonso bakadi bambangana mei ku mpala kuabo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Sedekiya, muana wa Kenâna, wakadidila nsengu ya tshiamu, wakamba ne, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Wewe newihate nʼai Bena Sulia tô ne habutukabo." 
2Chronicles18:11 Baprofete bonso bakamba mei nunku ne, Uye biebe ku musoko wa Lamota-gilada, ubahite bukole; bualu bua Yehowa neaufile mu bianza bia mukelenge." 
2Chronicles18:12 Kahita kakaya kubikila Mikaya, kakamuambila ne, Mona, baprofete bonso badi bambila mukelenge mei mimpe mukana mumue; ndi nkusengelela ne, Di diebe dikale bu diabo, wambe biebe mei mimpe." 
2Chronicles18:13 Mikaya wakamba ne, Bu mudi Yehowa ne muoyo, nengambe anu mei adi Nzambi wanyi wamba." 
2Chronicles18:14 Hakafikeye kudi mukelenge, yeye wakamukonka ne, Mikaya, netuye ku Lamota-gilada bua kuluangana, anyi tushale? Yeye wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe, ubatambe bukole; nebafidibue mu bianza biebe." 
2Chronicles18:15 Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Bundi nʼabu mbua kukudimusha misangu bungi munyi bua wewe kungambila anu malu malelela mu dina dia Yehowa?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Yeye wakamba ne, Nakamona Bena Isalele bonso batangadishibue ha mutu ha mikuna bu mikoko idi kayiyi ne mulami; Yehowa wakamba ne, Bobo kabena ne mukokeshi, nunku bahingane muntu ne muntu ku nsubu wandi ne ditalala." 
2Chronicles18:17 Mukelenge wa Isalele wakambila Yehoshafata ne, Tshiakukuambila ne, Yeye katu Wamba malu mimpe bualu buanyi, kadi anu malu mabi, anyi?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya wakamba ne, Nunku unvuai dî dia Yehowa: Nakamona Yehowa mushikame mu nkuasa wandi wa butumbi ne bonso ba mu diulu bimane ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ne tshia bakashi." 
2Chronicles18:19 Yehowa wakakonka ne, Wadinga Ahaba bua kuyeye kuhona ku Lamota-gilada nganyi? Mukuabo wakamba dî dikuabo ne mukuabo dî dikuabo." 
2Chronicles18:20 Hashishe nyuma wakalua, wakimana ku mpala kua Yehowa, wakamba ne, Meme nemmudinge. Yehowa wakamuebesha ne, Munyi?" 
2Chronicles18:21 Yeye wakamuitaba ne, Nenye, nenteke nyuma wa mashimi mukana mua baprofete bandi bonso. Yeye wakamba ne, Wewe neumudinge, neumuhite bukole; ya, wenze biebe nunku." 
2Chronicles18:22 Katataka Yehowa wakumana kuteka nyuma wa mashimi mukana mua baprofete bebe aba; Yehowa wakuamba malu mabi bua bualu buebe. 
2Chronicles18:23 Hashishe Sedekiya, muana wa Kenâna, wakasemena ha buihi, wakatula Mikaya dihi ku ditama diandi, wakamuebesha ne, Nyuma wa Yehowa wakaya kudi kunyi hakumukeye kundi bua kusomba nʼebe?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya wakamuambila ne, Tangila, wewe neumone bualu ebu hawabuela mu tshisokomenu bua kusokoma." 
2Chronicles18:25 Mukelenge wa Isalele wakamba ne, Kuatai Mikaya, nuye n andi kudi Amona, gouverneur wa musoko ne kudi Yoasha, muenyampala;" 
2Chronicles18:26 nuambile gouverneur ne, Mukelenge udi wamba ne, Buesha muntu eu mu nsubu wa lukanu, umudishe bidia bia dikenga ne mai a dikenga tô ne hanahingana ne ditalala." 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya wakamuambila ne, Biwahingana ne ditalala, Yehowa kakungambila di. Yeye wakamba ne, Unvuai, nuenu bantu bonso." 
2Chronicles18:28 Nunku mukelenge wa Isalele ne Yehoshafata bakaya ku Lamota-gilada. 
2Chronicles18:29 Mukelenge wa Isalele wakambila Yehoshafata ne, Meme nendivuishe bu muntu mukuabo hanaya mu nvita, kadi wewe uluate bilulu biebe bia mukelenge. Nunku mukelenge wa Isalele wakadivuisha bu muntu mukuabo, wakaya mu nvita." 
2Chronicles18:30 Mukelenge wa Bena Sulia wakadianjila kuelela tupitene tua makalu andi mukenji ne, Kanuluanganyi ne bantu bakese anyi bantu banene, anu ne mukelenge wa Isalele." 
2Chronicles18:31 Hashishe bakamona tupitene tua makalu Yehoshafata, tuakambilangana ne, Kayeu mukelenge wa Isalele. Nunku tuakamunyungulula bua kuluangana nʼandi; kadi Yehoshafata wakadila kudi Yehowa, ne Yehowa wakamukuatshisha; Nzambi wakabenzesha bua bobo kumukabo kudiye." 
2Chronicles18:32 Hakamona tupitene tua makalu ne, Yeye kena mukelenge wa Isalele, tuakalekela kumuihata." 
2Chronicles18:33 Muntu mukuabo wakela buta buandi ku mpukahuka, wakatata mukelenge wa Isalele kuakadi bintu biandi bia nvita bituangana, nunku yeye wakambila muendeshi wa dikalu diandi ne, Usesuishe dikalu, bualu bua meme ndi mutahe mputa bikole." 
2Chronicles18:34 Nvita yakadi minene dituku adi; kadi mukelenge wa Isalele wakatantamana mu dikalu diandi kudi Bena Sulia tô ne ku dilolo; bakamba diba kubuela, yeye wakafua." 
2Chronicles19:1 Yehoshafata, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakahingana ku nsubu wandi mu Yelushalema ne ditalala." 
2Chronicles19:2 Yehu, muana wa Hanani, mumonyi wa malu a Nzambi, wakaya kusangakena nʼandi, wakambila mukelenge Yehoshafata ne, Bûdi nʼabu mbua kukuatshisha bantu babi ne bua kunanga badi ne Yehowa lukuna, anyi? Bua bualu ebu Yehowa wakakulesha tshiji tshiandi." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kadi malu mimpe makuabo adi munda muebe bualu bua wewe wakumusha mpingu ya Bashela ku buloba, wakajadika mutshima webe bua kukeba Yehowa." 
2Chronicles19:4 Yehoshafata wakashikama mu Yelushalema; yeye wakendakana munkatshi mua bantu ku Bê-sheba tô ne ku mikuna ya Efelayima, wakabaluisha kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatuʼabo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Yeye wakateka balumbuluishi mu misoko yonso ya ngumbu ya mu buloba buonso bua Yuda, ku musoko ku musoko," 
2Chronicles19:6 wakambila balumbuluishi ne, Nuelangane meji bimpe bua malu anudi nuenza; kanulumbuluishi mu dinu dia bantu, kadi mu dina dia Yehowa; yeye udi nʼenu mu kulumbulula kuenu." 
2Chronicles19:7 Nunku ditshina dia Yehowa dikale kunudi; nudimuke bimpe bu munudi nuenza bualu bua kakuena malu mabi kudi Yehowa Nzambi wetu, yeye kena ne kansungusungu, kena witabusha bintu bia mbueshilu kudi muntu." 
2Chronicles19:8 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, Yehoshafata wakateka Bena Lewi ne bakuidi ne bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatuʼabo ba mu Isalele mu Yelushalema bua kulumbuluishabo mu dina dia Yehowa ne bua kukosabo bilumbu. Bakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles19:9 Yeye wakabatshihisha ne, Nuenze malu mu ditshina dia Yehowa ne lulamatu ne mitshima miakane." 
2Chronicles19:10 Bialua bana benu ba ku misoko yonso kunudi ne tshilumbu tshia mashi ne mashi, nansha tshia mikenji, nansha tshia mei mafunda a Yehowa, nansha tshia mei andi majalame, bunudi nʼabu mbua kubadimusha bua bobo kabahidi kudi Yehowa, bua Yehowa kaleshi tshiji tshiandi kunudi ne kudi bana benu; binuenza nunku, kanuena nuhila." 
2Chronicles19:11 Monai, Amalia, muakuidi munene, udi ku mutu kuenu mu malu onso a Yehowa, ne Zebadaya, muana wa Yishemaele, mukokeshi wa tshisamba tshia Bena Yuda, udi ku mutu kuenu mu malu onso a mukelenge; Bena Lewi kabidi nebikale tuhita ku mpala kuenu. Nuikale ne mitshima mikole, Yehowa ikale ne bantu bimpe." 
2Chronicles20:1 Ku nyima kua malu â Bena Moaba ne Bena Amona ne Bena Meunima bakuabo bakalua kuluangana ne Yehoshafata. 
2Chronicles20:2 Hashishe bantu bakuabo bakalua, bakambila Yehoshafata ne, Tshisumbu tshia bantu tshinene tshidi tshilua kûdi tshifuma ku Sulia dishiya dia dishiha dia Luehu; monai, tshitshidi ku Hazazona-tamâ (udi Ene-gedi mene)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Yehoshafata wakatshina, wakahangidisha bua kukeba Yehowa; wakela mukenji wa bantu bajile bia kudia mu nseke yonso ya Yuda." 
2Chronicles20:4 Bena Yuda bakadisangisha bua kukeba Yehowa; bakatula kukeba Yehowa, bafume ku misoko yonso ya Bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles20:5 Yehoshafata wakimanaku mpala kua tshisumbu tshia Bena Yuda ne Bena Yelushalema, mu nsubu wa Yehowa, mu tshiendedi tshihia-tshihia," 
2Chronicles20:6 wakamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa hatatu betu, wewe kuena Nzambi wa mu diulu, anyi? Wewe kuena mukokeshi wa makelenge onso a ha buloba, anyi? Bukokeshi ne bukole bidi mu tshianza tshiebe, nunku kakuena muntu udi mua kukukolela." 
2Chronicles20:7 Wewe Nzambi wetu, kuakihata bena buloba aba ku mpala kua bantu bebe Bena Isalele, kuakabuha bana ba Abalahama, mulunda webe, tshiendelele, anyi?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Bobo bakashikamamu, bakuashila dina diebe tshitendelelu tshia tshijila, bamba ne," 
2Chronicles20:9 Bialua malu makole kutudi, nansha muele wa nvita, nansha kulumbulula, nansha tshihuhu, nansha tshiole, tuetu netuimane ku mpala kua nsubu eu ne ku mpala kuebe, bualu bua dina diebe didi mu nsubu eu, netudile kudi mu makenga etu, ne wewe neutunvuile, neusungile." 
2Chronicles20:10 Katataka, mona, Bena Amona ne Bena Moaba ne ba ku mikuna ya Seî bawakakandika Bena Isalele bualu buabo ne, Kanuluanganyi nʼabo, hakadibo bafuma mu Ejipitu nunku bakasesuka kudibo, kabakabashiha;" 
2Chronicles20:11 kadi mona, mudibo batufuta, bakuluila bua kutuihata mu buhianyi buebe buwakutuha bua tuetu kubuhiana." 
2Chronicles20:12 Nzambi wetu, kuena ubalumbuluishe, anyi? Bualu bua tuetu katuena ne bukole bua kuluangana ne tshisumbu etshi tshinene tshilualua kutuluisha, katuena bamanye mua kuenza; kadi mesu etu adi kûdi." 
2Chronicles20:13 Bena Yuda bonso bakadi bimane ku mpala kua Yehowa ne bana babo bakese ne bakashi babo ne bana babo balume. 
2Chronicles20:14 Hashishe Nyuma wa Yehowa wakatulukila Yahaziele, muana wa Zekâya, muana wa Benaya, muana wa Yiele, muana wa Matanaya, Muena Lewi wa bana ba Asafa, munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bantu." 
2Chronicles20:15 Yeye wakamba ne, Unvuai, Bena Yuda bonso ne bonso ba mu Yelushalema, ne wewe mukelenge Yehoshafata, Yehowa udi wamba ne, Kanutshinyi, kanukemi hua tshisumbu etshi tshinene; bualu bua nvita ei kanyenu, nya Nzambi." 
2Chronicles20:16 Makelela nuye kudibo; monai, bobo badi baluila ku mukuna wa Sisi; nenusangakene nʼabo kunfudilu kua tshibanda, ku mpala kua tshihela tshia Yeluele." 
2Chronicles20:17 Kanuena ne bua kuluangana nvita ei; nudijadike, nuimane talalâ, numone luhandu lua Yehowa ludi nʼenu, nuenu Bena Yuda ne Bena Yelushalema; kanutshinyi, kanukemi; nuye kudibo hatshiabu; bualu bua Yehowa udi nʼenu." 
2Chronicles20:18 Yehoshafata wakinama mutu wandi hanshi ha buloba; Bena Yuda bonso ne bonso ba mu Yelushalema bakatua mpala yabo hanshi, bakatendelela Yehowa." 
2Chronicles20:19 Bena Lewi ne bana ba Kohata ne bana ba Kola bakajuka, bakatumbisha Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele ne dî dikole." 
2Chronicles20:20 Bakabika hatshiatshia, bakaya ku tshihela tshia Tekoa; hakadibo baye, Yehoshafata wakimana, wakamba ne, Unvuai, Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema! Nueyemene Yehowa Nzambi wenu, bua nuenu nujadikibue; nuitabushe baprofete bandi, bua nuenu nuikale ne diakalengele." 
2Chronicles20:21 Hakahungeye dî ne bantu, yeye wakasungula bantu bua kuimbilabo Yehowa misambu ne bua kumutumbishabo mu buakane buandi hakadibo baye ku mpala kua bena nvita, bamba ne, Tumbishai Yehowa, bualu bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles20:22 Hakabangabo kuimba misambu ne kutumbisha Nzambi, Yehowa wakateka balaminyi kudi Bena Amona ne kudi Bena Moaba ne ba ku mikuna ya Seî, bakaluila kuluisha Bena Yuda; bakadi bashihibue." 
2Chronicles20:23 Bualu bua Bena Amona ne Bena Moaba bakimana ku mpala kua ba ku mikuna ya Seî, bua kubabutula ne kubashiha; hakashikishabo kushiha ba ku mikuna ya Seî, bakashihangana nkayabo." 
2Chronicles20:24 Hakahita Bena Yuda ku tshibumba tshia mu tshihela, bakatangila kuakadi tshisumbu tshia bantu, monai, anu bitalu bilale hanshi ha buloba, nansha muntu wakahanduka," 
2Chronicles20:25 Hakalua Yehoshafata ne bantu bandi bua kuhaulabo bintu, bakasangana bubanji ne bilulu bia bungi, ne bintu bia mushinga mukole biakanyengabo; kabakamanya mua kubituala; bakashalaku matuku asatu bua kuhaulabo bintu, bualu bua biakadi bia bungi." 
2Chronicles20:26 Dituku dinai bakadisangisha mu tshibanda tshia Belaka; bualu bua bakatumbishaku Yehowa; nunku bakidika muaba au ne, Tshibanda tshia Belaka tô ne ku dituku edi," 
2Chronicles20:27 Hashishe Bena Yuda ne ha mu Yelushalema bakahingana ku Yelushalema ne disanka, ne Yehoshafata wakadi wenda ku mpala kuabo; bualu bua Yehowa wakabayuisha disanka ku mpala kua bakadi nʼabo lukuna." 
2Chronicles20:28 Bakalua ku Yelushalema mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bisanji ne nzenze ne mpungi. 
2Chronicles20:29 Ditshina dia Nzambi diakakuata ba mu bisamba bionso hakunvuabo ne, Yehowa wakaluangana nvita ne bena lukuna ba Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles20:30 Nunku bukelenge bua Yehoshafata buakadi ne ditalala; bualu bua Nzambi wakamuha ditalala mu nseke yonso. 
2Chronicles20:31 Yehoshafata wakakokesha mu Yuda; wakadi ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu mu Yelushalema; bina dia mamu wandi diakadi Azuba, muana mukashi wa Shilihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Yeye wakenda mu nshila ya Asa tatuʼandi, kakasesukamu, wakenza malu akadi mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
2Chronicles20:33 Kadi yeye kakumusha bitendelelu biakadi ku mutu kua mikuna; bantu bonso kabakafila mitshima yabo kudi Nzambi wa batatuʼabo. 
2Chronicles20:34 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yehoshafata, bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu, bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua Yehu, muana wa Hanani, biakafundeye mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Isalele." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ku nyima kua malu â, Yehoshafata, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakahunga tshihungidi ne Ahazaya, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakadi wenza malu mabi be;" 
2Chronicles20:36 wakadisangisha nʼandi hua kuasa matu a kuya nʼau ku Tâshishi; bakasa matu mu Esione-gebê. 
2Chronicles20:37 Hashishe Eliezê, muana wa Dodawahu wa mu Malesha, wakamba dî bua Yehoshafata ne, Bualu bua wewe wakadisangisha ne Ahazaya Yehowa wakumana kushiha midimu yebe. Matu akatshibudibua, kakamanya mua kuya ku Tâshishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yehoshafata wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika diatshimue ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Davidi; Yeholama muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yeye wakadi ne bana babo, bana halume ba Yehoshafata: Azaya ne Yehiele ne Zekâya ne Azaya ne Mikaele ne Shefataya; aba bonso bakadi bana ba Yehoshafata, mukelenge wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Tatu wabo wakabaha maha manene a argent ne or a bungi ne bintu bia mushinga mukole ne misoko ya ngumbu mu buloba bua Yuda; kadi wakahingisha bukelenge kudi Yeholama, bualu bua yeye wakadi muanʼa bute." 
2Chronicles21:4 Hakadia Yeholama bukelenge bua tatuʼandi ne hakadikolesheye, yeye wakashiha bana babo bonso ne muele wa nvita ne bantu banene bakuabo kabidi hakadi mu Isalele." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yeholama wakadi ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu muanda mukulu. 
2Chronicles21:6 Yeye wakenda mu nshila ya bakelenge ba Isalele, bu muakenza ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba; bualu bua yeye wakabaka muana mukashi wa Ahaba; wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
2Chronicles21:7 Kadi Yehowa kakabutula tshiota tshia Davidi, bualu bua tshihungidi tshiakahungeye ne Davidi, bua yeye wakamulaya muinda ne bana bandi tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles21:8 Mu matuku andi Bena Edome bakatombokela Bena Yuda, bakadisunguila mukelenge." 
2Chronicles21:9 Hashishe Yeholama wakasabuka ne tupitene tuandi ne makalu onso akadiye nʼau; bakajuka butuku, bakashiha Bena Edome bakadi babanyunguluka ne tupitene tua makalu." 
2Chronicles21:10 Nunku Bena Edome badi batombokela Bena Yuda tô ne ku dituku edi; hashishe Bena Libina bakamutombokela kabidi, bualu bua yeye wakahidia Yehowa, Nzambi wa batatuʼandi." 
2Chronicles21:11 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, yeye Wakenza bitendelelu ku mutu kua mikuna ya Yuda, wakenzesha Bena Yelushalema malu a masandi, wakahambuisha Bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Mukanda wakafika kudiye mutume kudi muprofete Eliya ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Davidi tatuʼebe, udi wamba ne, Bualu bua wewe kuena wenda mu nshila ya Yehoshafata tatuʼebe, ne ya Asa mukelenge wa Yuda," 
2Chronicles21:13 kadi udi wenda mu nshila ya bakelenge ba Isalele, wakenzesha Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema malu a masandi bu muakenza ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, ne bualu bua wewe wakashiha bana benu ba mu nsubu wa tatuʼebe bakadi bakuhita buakane;" 
2Chronicles21:14 mona, Yehowa neatume tshihuhu tshikole kudi bantu bebe ne kudi bana bebe ne kudi bakashi bebe ne kudi bintu bionso biudi nʼabi;" 
2Chronicles21:15 disama dikole nedikukuate munda muebe, tô ne hahatuka maja ebe onso bualu bua disama edi ku dituku ku dituku." 
2Chronicles21:16 Yehowa wakasonsola mitshima ya Bena Peleshete ne ya Bena Alabâ badi ha buihi ne Bena Atiopa bua kuluanganabo ne Yeholama; 
2Chronicles21:17 bakalua kudi Bena Yuda, bakahaula buloba, bakaya ne bintu bionso biakadi mu nsubu wa mukelenge ne bana bandi balume ne bakashi bandi; bakamushila anu muana umue, Yehoaza, muanʼandi wa mukala." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu Yehowa wakamutumina disama dia mu mala andi diakadibo kabayi bamanye mua kuondaha. 
2Chronicles21:19 Hakahita bidimu bibidi, mala andi akahatuka bualu bua disama diandi; yeye wakafua bua masama makole. Bantu kabakamuoshela bintu mu madilu andi bu muakenzelabo batatu bandi." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yeye wakadi ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu muanda mukulu; yeye wakumuka, bantu kabayi bamunange; bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi, kadi kabakamujika mu nkita ya bakelenge." 
2Chronicles22:1 Bena Yelushalema bakahingisha Ahazaya, muanʼa mukala wa mukelenge, mu bukelenge mu muaba wandi; bualu bua bantu bakalua ne Bena Alabâ mu tshitudilu, bakashiha bakulu bandi bonso. Nunku Ahazaya, muana wa Yeholama, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakakokesha bantu." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazaya wakadi ne bidimu makumi anai ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema tshidimu tshimue; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Atalaya, muana mukashi wa Omeli." 
2Chronicles22:3 Yeye wakenda mu nshila ya bakadi mu nsubu wa Ahaba; bualu bua mamu wandi wakamulombola mua kuenza malu mabi. 
2Chronicles22:4 Yeye wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba; bualu bua bobo bakadi bafidi bandi ba meji bua kumubutula hakafua tatu wandi. 
2Chronicles22:5 Yeye wakalonda mei abo, wakaya ne Yeholama, muana wa Ahaba, mukelenge wa Isalele, bua kuluangana ne Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia, ku Lamota-gilada; Bena Sulia bakataha Yolama mputa." 
2Chronicles22:6 Yeye wakaya ku Yizelele bua kuondahisha mputa yandi yakamutahabo ku Lama hakadiye uluangana ne Hazaele, mukelenge wa Sulia. Ahazaya, muana wa Yeholama, mukelenge wa Yuda wakaya kumona Yeholama, muana wa Ahaba, ku Yizelele, bualu bua yeye wakadi usama." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kubutuka kua Ahazaya kuakadi bua Nzambi, bualu bua yeye wakaya kudi Yolama; bualu bua hakafikeye kudiye, yeye wakaya ne Yeholama bua kuluangana ne Yehu, muana wa Nimishi, nguakelabo manyi ha mutu kudi Yehowa bua kubutuleye ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba." 
2Chronicles22:8 Hakadi Yehu ulumbuluisha ba mu nsubu wa Ahaba, yeye wakasangana bantu banene bi Bena Yuda ne bana balume ba bana babo ne Ahazaya bakuatshile Ahazaya mudimu; yeye wakabashiha." 
2Chronicles22:9 Yeye wakakeba Ahazaya; bakamukuata, musokome mu Samalea bakalua n andi kudi Yehu, yeye wakamushiha; bakamujika, bamba ne, Yeye udi muana wa Yehoshafata, nguakakeba Yehowa ne mutshima wandi wonso. Ba mu nsubu wa Ahazaya kabakadi ne bukole bua kujadika nʼabu bukelenge." 
2Chronicles22:10 Hakamona Atalaya, mamu wa Ahazaya, ne muanʼandi udi mufue yeye wakajuka, wakashiha bana balume bonso ba bakelenge ba Bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kadi Yehoshabata, muana mukashi wa mukelenge, wakangata Yoasha, muana wa Ahazaya, munkatshi mua bana ba mukelenge bakadi bashihibue, wakamusokoka ne mulami wandi mu nsubu wa bulalu. Nunku Yehoshabata, muana mukashi wa mukelenge Yeholama, mukashi wa Yehoyada muakuidi (bualu bua yeye wakadi muanʼabo mukashi dî Ahazaya) wakamusokoka kudi Atalaya; nunku yeye kakamushiha." 
2Chronicles22:12 Yeye wakadi nʼabo musokome mu nsubu wa Nzambi bidimu bisambombo; Atalaya wakadi ukokesha mu buloba. 
2Chronicles23:1 Mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete Yehoyada wakadikolesha, wakangata tupitene tua bantu lukama, Azaya, muana wa Yelohama, ne Yishemaele, muana wa Yehohanana, ne Azalaya, muana wa Obeda, ne Maseya, muana wa Adaya, ne Elishafata, muana wa Zikeli, wakahunga nʼabo tshihungidi." 
2Chronicles23:2 Bobo bakendakana ku nseke yonso ya Yuda, bakasangisha Bena Lewi ba mu misoko yonso ya Yuda ne bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo mu Isalele, bakalua nʼabo ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles23:3 Bantu aba bonso bakahunga ne mukelenge tshihungidi mu nsubu wa Nzambi. Yeye wakabambila ne, Monai, muana wa mukelenge neakokeshe bu muakamba Yehowa bua bana ba Davidi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Nuenu nenuenze bualu ebu: tshituha tshienu tshisatu tshia bakuidi ne Bena Lewi badi babuelamu dituku dia lumingu netshikale bu bambudi ba bintu ku bibuelelu bia nsubu; 
2Chronicles23:5 tshituha tshienu tshisatu tshikuabo netshikale ku nsubu kua mukelenge; ne tshituha tshienu tshisatu tshikuabo netshikale ku tshibi tshidi kumanda kua nsubu; bantu bonso bakuabo nebikale mu biendedi bia nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Chronicles23:6 Kanubueshi muntu mukuabo mu nsubu wa Yehowa mene, anu bakuidi ne Bena Lewi badi ne mudimu wabo; bobo nebabuele bualu bua bobo badi bantu ba tshijila; kadi bantu bonso bakuabo batumikile mukenji wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles23:7 Bena Lewi bonso nebanyunguluke mukelenge, muntu ne muntu ne bintu bia nvita mu bianza biandi; muntu yonso udi ubuela mu nsubu bamushihe; nuenu nuikale ne mukelenge habueleye mu nsubu ne humukeye." 
2Chronicles23:8 Nunku Bena Lewi ne Bena Yuda bonso bakenza muakamba Yehoyada muakuidi; muntu ne muntu wakaya ne bantu bakadiye nʼabo, bakadi babuela dituku dia lumingu ne bakadi bahatuka dituku dia lumingu; bualu bua Yehoyada kakihata milongo ya bena mudimu." 
2Chronicles23:9 Yehoyada muakuidi wakafila mafuma ne ngabu ne bintu bia nvita biakadi bia mukelenge Davidi, biakadi mu nsubu wa Nzambi, kudi tupitene tua lukama lua bantu." 
2Chronicles23:10 Yeye wakimanyika bantu bonso, muntu ne muntu ne bintu bia nvita mu bianza biandi, ku tshianza tshia balume tshia nsubu tô ne ku tshianza tshia bakashi tô ne ku tshioshelu, banyunguluke mukelenge." 
2Chronicles23:11 Hashishe bakalua ne muana wa mukelenge, bakamuashila tshifulu tshia bukelenge, bakamuha mukanda wa dihungila; bakamuhingisha mu bukelenge; Yehoyada ne bana bandi bakamuela manyi ha mutu, bakamba ne, Mukelenge ikale ne muoyo musangu mule!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Hakunvua Atalaya tshiono tshia bantu balumbile lubilu, batumbishe mukelenge, yeye wakabuela kudi bantu mu nsubu wa Yehowa;" 
2Chronicles23:13 yeye wakabanduluka, wakamona mukelenge muimane ku dikunshi diandi dia ku tshibuelelu, ne tupitene ne bena mpungi bimane ha buihi ne mukelenge, ne bena buloba bonso bakadi basanka, bela mpungi, bimbi ba misambu bakadi bimba bisanji, bakadi bimbisha misambu. Hashishe Atalaya wakadihanda bilulu biandi, wakamba ne, Kutungila kua tshitungu, kutungila kua tshitungu!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yehoyada muakuidi wakahatuka ne tupitene tua bantu lukama tuakadi ku mutu kua bantu, wakatuambila ne, Muihatai hadiye wenda munkatshi mua bantu, muntu wamulonda, numushihe ne muele wa nvita; bualu bua muakuidi wakamba ne, Kanumushihi mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles23:15 Nunku bakamushila mpunga; yeye wakaya ku tshibuelelu tshia tubalu tshia ku tshibi tshia mukelenge; bakamushihelaku. 
2Chronicles23:16 Yehoyada wakahunga tshihungidi ne bantu bonso ne mukelenge, bua bobo bikale bantu ba Yehowa." 
2Chronicles23:17 Bantu bonso bakaya ku nsubu wa Bâla, bakamushimbula, bakatshibula mpingu yandi ne bioshelu biandi bituha, bakashiha Matana, muakuidi wa Bâla, ku mpala kua tshioshelu." 
2Chronicles23:18 Yehoyada wakasungula bena mudimu ba mu nsubu wa Yehowa bakadi mu bukokeshi bua bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakasungulabo kudi Davidi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, bua kufilabo milambu ya kuosha kudi Yehowa, bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose; bakimba misambu ne disanka bu muakadi mukenji wa Davidi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Yeye wakateka balami ku bibi bia ku nsubu wa Yehowa, bua muntu wakadi kayi muakane kabuedi mu nsubu." 
2Chronicles23:20 Yeye wakangata tupitene tua bantu lukama ne bantu banene bonso ne bakokeshi ba bantu ba mu buloba, bakafuma ne mukelenge mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bakabuela ku tshibi tshia ku mutu mu nsubu wa mukelenge, bakashikika mukelenge mu nkuasa wa bukelenge." 
2Chronicles23:21 Nunku bantu bonso ba mu buloba bakasanka, musoko wakadi ne ditalala bakashihabo Atalaya ne muele wa nvita." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoasha wakadi ne bidimu muanda mutekete hakababangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi anai; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Sibeya wa mu Bê-sheba. 
2Chronicles24:2 Yoasha wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa matuku onso a Yehoyada muakuidi. 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyada wakamubakisha bakashi babidi; yeye wakalela nʼabo bana ba balume ne bana ba bakashi. 
2Chronicles24:4 Ku nyima kua malu â Yoasha wakasua kukankamasha nsubu wa Yehowa kabidi. 
2Chronicles24:5 Yeye wakasangisha bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, wakabambila ne, Yai bienu ku misoko yonso ya Yuda, nusangishe argent kudi Bena Isalele bonso ya kulongolola nʼai nsubu wa Nzambi wenu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu; nudimuke bua nuenu nuenzeshe bualu ebu lukasa. Kadi Bena Lewi kabakenzesha bualu ebu lukasa." 
2Chronicles24:6 Mukelenge wakabikila Yehoyada muakuidi, wakamuambila ne, Wewe kuakuenzesha Bena Lewi bua bobo balue ne milambu ya Mose, muntu wa Yehowa, kudi Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema ne ba mu nseke yonso ya Isalele, mu ntenta wa bumanyishi bishi?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Bualu bua bana balume ba Atalaya, mukashi au mubi, bakadi habutula nsubu wa Nzambi, bakaha Bâla bintu bia tshijila biakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles24:8 Nunku mukelenge wakela mukenji, bakalongolola mushete; bakauteka ha mbelu ku tshibi tshia ku nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles24:9 Bakela mukenji ku nseke yonso ya Yuda ne Yelushalema bua bantu balue kudi Yehowa ne milambu yakambila Mose Bena Isalele mu tshihela. 
2Chronicles24:10 Bantu banene ne bantu bonso bakasanka, bakatua nʼai, bakayela mu mushete tô ne hakasangishabo yonso." 
2Chronicles24:11 Hakadibo balue ne mushete kudi bena mudimu ba mukelenge ku bianza bia Bena Lewi, ne hakamonabo ne argent ya bungi yakadi mu mushete, secrétaire wa mukelenge ne mukuatshishi wa muakuidi bakahatula bintu mu mushete, bakauhingisha mu muaba wau kabidi. Bakenza nunku ku dituku ku dituku, bakasangisha argent ya bungi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Mukelenge ne Yehoyada bakayifila kudi bantu bakadi benza mudimu mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bobo bakabikila bahandi ba mabue ne bena mabaya bua kulongololabo nsubu wa Yehowa, ne bena biamu bifike ne bena biamu bia mitaku kabidi bua kulongololabo nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles24:13 Bena mudimu bakenza mudimu wabo; mudimu wakenda bimpe mu bianza biabo, bakalongolola nsubu wa Nzambi bu muakadiye diambedi, bakamuakasha." 
2Chronicles24:14 Hakamanabo mudimu wonso, bakalua ne argent yakashala kudi mukelenge ne kudi Yehoyada, bakatula nʼai mpanza ya kuteka mu nsubu wa Yehowa, mpanza mene ya kuenza nʼai mudimu ne nkutu ne mpanza ya or ne ya argent. Bakafila milambu ya kuosha ha kahia mu nsubu wa Yehowa misangu yonso mu matuku a Yehoyada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Kadi Yehoyada wakalua muntu mununu, wakadi ne matuku a bungi; wakafua; wakadi ne bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu hakafueye." 
2Chronicles24:16 Bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi diatshimue ne bakelenge, bualu bua yeye wakenza bimpe mu Isalele, ne kudi Nzambi ne ku nsubu wandi." 
2Chronicles24:17 Ku nyima kua lufu lua Yehoyada bantu banene ba mu Yuda bakalua, bakakukuila mukelenge. Mukelenge wakunvua mei abo." 
2Chronicles24:18 Bakalekela nsubu wa Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, bakakuatshila Bashela ne mpingu mudimu; tshiji tshia Nzambi tshiakadi kudi Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema bualu bua bobo bakenza bualu ebu bubi." 
2Chronicles24:19 Kadi yeye wakabatumina baprofete bandi bua kubahingisha kudi Yehowa kabidi; bobo bakababela; kadi kabakateleja matshu abo kudibo. 
2Chronicles24:20 Nyuma wa Nzambi wakatulukila Zekâya, muana wa Yehoyada muakuidi; yeye wakimana ku mpala kua bantu, wakabambila ne, Nzambi udi wamba ne, Nuenu nudi mishiha mikenji ya Yehowa bua tshinyi? Kanuena ne diakalengele bishi? Bualu bua nuenu nuakulekela Yehowa, ka yeye wakunulekela." 
2Chronicles24:21 Bobo bakamuela tshifufu, bakamuela mabue ku mukenji wa mukelenge mene mu tshiendedi tshia mu nsubu wa Yehowa."
