2Chronicles24:22 Nunku mukelenge Yoasha kakavuluka luse luakamulesha Yehoyada tatu wandi; kadi wakashiha muanʼandi. Hakafueye, yeye wakamba ne, Yehowa atangile bualu ebu, anufute." 
2Chronicles24:23 Kunshikidilu kua tshidimu atshi masalayi a Bena Sulia bakatua bua kuluangana nʼandi; bakafika ku Yuda ne Yelushalema, bakashiha bantu banene bonso ba munkatshi mua bantu, bakatuma bintu biabo bionso kudi mukelenge wa Damaseke." 
2Chronicles24:24 Bena Sulia bakalua ne tshisumbu tshikese tshia masalayi; Yehowa wakafila tshisumbu tshia bantu tshinene mu bianza biabo, bualu bua bobo bakadi bahidie Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo. Nunku bakalumbuluisha Yoasha." 
2Chronicles24:25 Hakumukabo kudiye (bualu bua bakamushiya ne disama dikole), bantu bandi mene bakamuelela tshifufu, bualu bua mashi a bana balume ba Yehoyada muakuidi, bakamushiha mu bulalu buandi, wakafua; bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi, kadi kabakamujika mu nkita ya bakelenge." 
2Chronicles24:26 Aba mbantu bakamuelela tshifufu: Zabada, muana wa Shimeata, Muena Amona mukashi, ne Yehozabada, muana wa Shimelite, Muena Moaba mukashi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Malu a bana bandi balume, ne bunene bua majitu akadiye nʼau ne muakalongololeye nsubu wa Nzambi, monai, adi mafunda mu mukanda wa bakelenge. Amasaya muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amasaya wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Yehoadana wa mu Yelushalema. 
2Chronicles25:2 Yeye wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, kadi kakadi ne mutshima mutoke tô." 
2Chronicles25:3 Hakamuhingishabo mu bukelenge, yeye wakashiha bena mudimu aba bakashiha mukelenge, tatu wandi." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kadi yeye kakashiha bana babo balela, kadi wakalonda mukenji udi mufunda mu mukanda wa Mose, muakamba Yehowa ne, Batatu kabena bafuila bana babo; bana kabena bafuila batatuʼabo; kadi muntu ne muntu neafue bua mibi yandi." 
2Chronicles25:5 Amasaya wakabikila Bena Yuda bonso, wakabasangisha bu muakadi nsubu ya batatuʼabo, wakateka tupitene ku mutu kua bantu tshinunu ne bantu lukama, mu nseke yonso ya Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina; yeye wakababala ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ku mutu, bakakumbasha bena nvita binunu nkama isatu bakamanya mua kuluangana ne mafuma ne ngabu." 
2Chronicles25:6 Yeye wakasungula bena bukitu binunu lukama ba mu Isalele ku difutu dia lukama lua ntalanta ya argent. 
2Chronicles25:7 Kadi muntu wa Nzambi wakalua kudiye, wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, kuitabushi bua Bena Isalele kuya nʼebe; bualu bua Yehowa kena ne Bena Isalele, bana bonso ba Efelayima mene." 
2Chronicles25:8 Kadi biwaya, wikale ne mutshima mukole bua kuluangana; bualu bua Nzambi neakuhoneshe ku mpala kua bena lukuna; bualu bua Nzambi udi ne bukole bua kukukuatshisha ne bua kukuhonesha nʼabu." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amasaya wakakonka muntu wa Nzambi ne, Netuenze tshinyi ne ntalanta ai lukama inakafuta Bena Isalele? Muntu wa Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Yehowa udi mua kukuha bintu bidi bihita ebi bungi." 
2Chronicles25:10 Hashishe Amasaya wakatahulula bantu bakalua kudiye ku Efelayima bua kubahingisha kuabo; nunku tshiji tshiabo tshiakadia kudi Bena Yuda; bakahingana kuabo bûla-ngane ne tshiji tshikole. 
2Chronicles25:11 Amasaya wakakolesha mutshima wandi, wakaya ne bantu bandi ku Tshibanda tshia Luehu, wakashiha Bena Seî binunu dikumi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Bena Yuda bakakuata bantu bakuabo binunu dikumi ne muoyo, bakaya nʼabo ha mutu ha dibue dinene, bakabela hanshi ha mutu ha dibue, nunku bobo bakabakosolola bituha bituha." 
2Chronicles25:13 Kadi bantu aba bakahingisha Amasaya bua bobo kabayi nʼandi mu nvita, bakaluangana ne ba mu misoko ya Bena Yuda ku Samalea tô ne ku Bete-holona, bakashiha bantu binunu bisatu, bakanyenga bintu bia bungi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Hakafuma Amasaya ku kushiha kua Bena Edome, yeye wakalua ne mpingu ya Bena Seî, wakayimanyika bu nzambi yandi, wakakukuila ku mpala kuai, wakayoshela musenga wa manananshi." 
2Chronicles25:15 Nunku tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakadi kudi Amasaya, yeye wakamutumina muprofete, wakamuambila ne, Wewe wakakeba nzambi ya bantu yakadi kayiyi ne bukole bua kusungila nʼabu bantu babo mu bianza biebe bishi?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Hashishe, hakadiye wakula nʼandi, mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Tuetu tuakukuvuisha mufidi wa meji wa mukelenge, anyi? Uhuwe biebe, butudi nʼabu mbua kukutaha bishi? Hashishe muprofete wakahuwa, wamba ne, Ndi mumanye ne, Nzambi wakulongolola bua kukushiha bua wewe wakuenza bualu ebu, kuena mutumikile mei anyi." 
2Chronicles25:17 Hashishe Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakebesha bantu lungenyi, wakatumina Yoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, muana wa Yehu, mukelenge wa Isalele, dî ne, Lua biebe, tumonangane ku mesu." 
2Chronicles25:18 Yoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakakudimuna dî kudi Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne, Dieba diakadi ku Lebanona diakatumina mutshi wa cèdre wa mu Lebanona dî ne, Ufile muanʼebe mukashi kudi muanʼanyi mulume bu mukashi wandi; kadi nyama wa luonji wa mu Lebanona wakadiata dieba munda mua dikama diandi." 
2Chronicles25:19 Wewe udi wamba ne, Meme nakashiha Bena Edome; udi unanga tshiadi tshiebe bua kufunafuna; anji kushala kuebe. Bualu kai udi udibuesha mu malu a bakuabo bua kudikengesha ne bua kudilenduisha nʼau, wewe ne Bena Yuda?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Kadi Amasaya kakasua kumunvuila; bualu ebu buakadi bua Nzambi bua yeye kubafila mu bianza bia bena lukuna babo, bualu bua bobo bakalonda nzambi ya Bena Edome." 
2Chronicles25:21 Nunku Yoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakaya; yeye ne Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, bakamonangana ku mesu ku Bete-shemeshe wa ku luseke lua Yuda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Bena Isalele bakahita Bena Yuda bukole; bakanyema muntu ne muntu ku nsubu wandi wa ntenta. 
2Chronicles25:23 Yoasha, mukelenge wa Isalele, wakakuata Amasaya, mukelenge wa Yuda, muana wa Yoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, ku Bete-shemesha, wakalua nʼandi ku Yelushalema, wakashimbula lumbu lua Yelushalema ku tshibi tshia Efelayima tô ne ku tshibi tshia ku ditumba bu coudées nkama inai." 
2Chronicles25:24 Yeye wakangata or ne argent ne mpanza yonso yakadi mu nsubu wa Nzambi mu bulami bua Obeda-edome, ne bintu bia mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge, ne bantu bakuabo; wakahingana ku Samalea." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amasaya, muana wa Yoasha, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakikala ne muoyo ku nyima kua lufu lua Yoasha, muana wa Yehoaza, mukelenge wa Isalele, bidimu dikumi ne bitanu." 
2Chronicles25:26 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Amasaya, bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu, monai, kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Yuda ne ba Isalele, anyi?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Mu dituku diakalekela Amasaya kulonda Yehowa, bantu bakamuelela tshifufu mu Yelushalema; yeye wakanyema ku Lakisha, kadi bakamulonda ku Lakisha, bakamushihelaku." 
2Chronicles25:28 Bakalua nʼandi ha nyima ha tubalu, bakamujika diatshimue ne bankambua bandi mu musoko wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles26:1 Bantu bonso ba mu Yuda bakangata Uziya, wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo, bakamuhingisha mu bukelenge mu muaba wa tatuʼandi Amasaya." 
2Chronicles26:2 Yeye wakasa Elota, wakahingisha musoko eu ku luseke lua Yuda; ku nyima kua bualu ebu mukelenge wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi atanu ne bibidi. Dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Yekoliya wa mu Yelushalema. 
2Chronicles26:4 Yeye Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, bu muakenza Amasaya tatuʼandi." 
2Chronicles26:5 Yeye wakajadika mutshima wandi bua kukebeye Nzambi mu matuku a Zekâya nguakamanya mua kujingulula bikena kumona bia Nzambi; musangu wonso wakadiye ukeba Yehowa, Nzambi wakamuvudishila diakalengele." 
2Chronicles26:6 Yeye wakaya kuluangana ne Bena Peleshete, wakashimbula ngumbu ya Gata ne ya Yabene ne ya Ashedodo; yeye wakasa misoko mikuabo mu buloba bua Ashedodo munkatshi mua Bena Peleshete." 
2Chronicles26:7 Nzambi wakamukuatshisha bua kuluanganeye ne Bena Peleshete, ne Bena Alabâ bakadi bashikama mu Gû-bâla ne Bena Meunima." 
2Chronicles26:8 Bena Amona bakalambula Uziya; lumu luandi luakamanyibua tô ne ku tshibuelelu tshia ku Ejipitu, bualu bua yeye wakalua muena bukole bua bungi." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uziya wakasa bibumba mu Yelushalema ku tshibi tshia ku ditumba dia lumbu, ne ku tshibi tshia mu tshibanda, ne ku ditumba dikuabo dia lumbu, wakatekamu bintu bia nvita." 
2Chronicles26:10 Yeye wakasa bibumba mu tshihela kabidi, wakimba mena a mai, bualu bua yeye wakadi ne bimuna bia bungi; Wakenza nunku mu bibanda ne mu mpata kabidi; yeye wakadi ne bidime ne balami ba mionshi ya tumuma tukese mu mikuna ne mu maloba mimpe; bualu bua yeye wakananga mudimu wa budimi," 
2Chronicles26:11 Uziya wakadi ne bena nvita ba bungi, bakaya bua kuluangana mu bisumbu biabo bu muakabatahulula Yeiele mufundi ne Mâseya kahita, bakadi mu bianza bia Hananya, kapitene kakuabo ka mukelenge." 
2Chronicles26:12 Bungi bua bantu bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bena nvita ba bukitu, buakadi binunu bibidi ne nkama isambombo." 
2Chronicles26:13 Bena nvita binunu nkama isatu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama itanu bakadi mu bianza biabo, bakadi baluangana nvita bikole, bua kukuatshisha mukelenge bua kudisheye bena lukuna bandi." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya wakabalongoluela, buonso buabo mene, ngabu ne mafuma, ne bifulu bia tshiamu ne bikowelu bia tshiamu ne mata ne mabue a kuela mu bielelu." 
2Chronicles26:15 Yeye wakenzesha mashine mu Yelushalema kudi bantu ba lungenyi lule, bua kuteka mu bibumba ne ha mutu ha ngumbu a kuela nʼau mikete ne mabue manene. Dina diandi diakamanyibua kuonso; bualu bua Nzambi wakamukuatshisha bikole, tô ne bakalueye muena bukole bua bungi." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kadi hakalueye muena bukole bua bungi yeye wakadisua mu mutshima wandi, wakenza malu mabi, wakatombokela Yehowa Nzambi wandi; bualu bua yeye wakabuela mu ntempelo wa Yehowa bua kuosheleye Yehowa musenga wa manananshi ku tshioshelu tshia manananshi." 
2Chronicles26:17 Azaya muakuidi wakamulonda ne bakuidi ba Yehowa makumi muanda mukulu bakadi bena bukitu; 
2Chronicles26:18 bobo bakakandisha Uziya mukelenge, bakamuambila ne, Uziya, kambualu buebe bua kuoshela Yehowa musenga wa manananshi, kadi mbua bakuidi, bana ba Alona, badi bajidibue bua kuoshela Yehowa manananshi; umuka mu muaba eu wa tshijila, bualu bua wewe wakuenza bibi; bualu ebu kabuena bukuvuisha butumbi kudi Yehowa Nzambi nansha." 
2Chronicles26:19 Hashishe Uziya wakakuata tshiji; yeye wakadi ne dilonga dia kuoshelamu musenga wa manananshi mu tshianza tshiandi; hakadiye ne bakuidi tshiji, nsudi yakahatuka ha mpala wandi ku mesu kua bakuidi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, hehi ne tshioshelu tshia musenga wa manananshi." 
2Chronicles26:20 Azaya, muakuidi munene, ne bakuidi bonso bakamutangila ne, monai, yeye wakadi ne nsudi ha mpala handi, bakamûmusha lukasa; yeye kabidi wakahatuka lukasa, bualu bua Yehowa wakamana kumukengesha." 
2Chronicles26:21 Uziya mukelenge wakadi muena nsudi tô ne ku dituku dia lufu luandi; wakashikama mu nsubu ha nkayandi, bualu bua yeye wakadi muena nsudi; bualu bua yeye wakadi mukandibue ne, Kubuedi mu nsubu wa Yehowa; Yotama muanʼandi wakadi ha mutu ha ba mu nsubu wa mukelenge, wakakokesha bena buloba." 
2Chronicles26:22 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Uziya bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu, Yeshaya, muprofete, muana wa Amoza, wakabifunda." 
2Chronicles26:23 Nunku Uziya wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi; bakamujika diatshimue ne bankambua bandi mu muaba udibo bajika bakelenge, bualu bua bakamba ne, Yeye udi muena nsudi; Yotama muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotama wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Yelusha, muana mukashi wa Sadoka." 
2Chronicles27:2 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, bu muakenza Uziya tatuʼandi; kadi yeye kakabuela mu ntempelo wa Yehowa. Bantu bakatshidi benza malu mabi." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yeye wakalongolola tshibi tshiakatamba kuikala kulu ku nsubu wa Yehowa; wakasa lumbu lua ku Ofele. 
2Chronicles27:4 Yeye wakasa misoko ya ku mikuna ya Yuda kabidi; wakasa nsubu ya mukelenge ne bibumba muitu. 
2Chronicles27:5 Yeye wakaluangana ne mukelenge wa Bena Amona, wakabahita bukole. Bena Amona bakafila kudiye tshidimu atshi lukama lua ntalanta ya argent ne bihiminu bia blé binunu dikumi ne bia orge binunu dikumi. Bakafila bintu ebi kabidi tshidimu tshibidi ne tshisatu." 
2Chronicles27:6 Nunku Yotama wakalua muena bukole bualu bua yeye wakalongolola nshila yandi ku mpala kua Nzambi wandi. 
2Chronicles27:7 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yotama ne nvita yandi yonso ne malu akenzeye bidi bifundibue mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Isalele ne ba Yuda. 
2Chronicles27:8 Wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo. 
2Chronicles27:9 Yotama wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu musoko wa Davidi; Ahaza muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaza wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne bisambombo; yeye kakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Davidi nkambua wandi. 
2Chronicles28:2 Kadi yeye wakenda mu nshila ya bakelenge ba Isalele; wakadidila Bala mpingu ya biamu kabidi. 
2Chronicles28:3 Yeye wakosha musenga wa manananshi mu tshibanda tshia muana wa Hinoma kabidi; wakosha bana bandi mu kahia, bu muakadi tshilele tshibi tshia bisamba biakadi Yehowa muihate ku mpala kua Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles28:4 Yeye wakafila milambu, wakosha musenga wa manananshi ha mutu ha mikuna ne muinshi mua mitshi mibishi yonso." 
2Chronicles28:5 Nunku Yehowa Nzambi wandi wakamufila mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Sulia; bakamubutula, bakaya ne bantu bandi ba bungi mu buhika ku Damaseke. Yeye wakafidibua mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Isalele; bakashiha bantu bandi ba bungi." 
2Chronicles28:6 Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, wakashiha bantu binunu lukama ne makumi abidi mu Yuda dituku dimue, buonso buabo bakadi bena bukitu; bualu bua bobo bakahidia Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo." 
2Chronicles28:7 Zikeli, muntu mukole wa mu Efelayima, wakashiha Mâseya, muana wa mukelenge, ne Azelikama, mukokeshi wa nsubu wandi, ne Elekana, muenyampala wa mukelenge." 
2Chronicles28:8 Bena Isalele bakaya ne bana babo binunu nkama ibidi ne bakashi ne bana babo balume ne bana babo bakashi mu buhika; bakanyenga bintu biabo bia bungi kabidi, bakaya nʼabi ku Samalea." 
2Chronicles28:9 Kadi muprofete wa Yehowa wakadiku, dina diandi Odede; yeye wakaya kusangakena ne tshisumbu tshia bantu bakadi bahingana ku Samalea, wakabambila ne, Monai, bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu, wakadi ne Bena Yuda tshiji, yeye wakabafila mu bianza bienu, nuenu nuakabashiha ne tshiji tshikole tshiakafika tô ne mu diulu." 
2Chronicles28:10 Katataka nudi basue kubuesha Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema bu bahika benu bakashi ne balume; kadi nuenu kanuakenzela Yehowa Nzambi wenu bibi, anyi?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Nunku unvuai dî dianyi, nuhingishe bahika aba banuakukuata kudi bana benu; bualu bua tshiji tshikole tshia Yehowa tshidi kunudi." 
2Chronicles28:12 Hashishe bantu bakuabo bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Efelayima, Azaya, muana wa Yohanana, ne Belekiya, muana wa Meshilemota, ne Yehizikiya, muana wa Shaluma, ne Amasa, muana wa Hadelai, bakimana ku mpala kua bantu bakadi bafuma ku nvita." 
2Chronicles28:13 Bakabambila m, Kanuena nuhitaku ne bantu banuakukuata mu nvita; bualu bua nudi nukeba kutubuesha mu malu mabi kudi Yehowa ha mutu ha mibi yetu ne malu mabi etu; bualu bua mibi yetu idi minene, ne tshiji tshikole tshidi kudi Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles28:14 Nunku bena nvita bakashiya bantu bakakuatabo ne bintu biakanyengabo ku mpala kua bantu aba banene ne tshisumbu tshia bantu. 
2Chronicles28:15 Bantu aba batuakutela mena abo bakajuka, bakangata bantu aba bakakuatabo ne bilulu biakanyengabo, bakabiluatshisha bonso bakadi butaka munkatshi muabo, bakabuesha bisabatu ku makasa abo, bakabadisha, bakabanuisha mai, bakabela manyi ha mutu, bakashikika bantu batekete ha nyima ha nyama ya mpunda, bakaya nʼabo ku Yeleko, musoko wa mabue a ngashi, kudi bana babo; hashishe, bakahingana ku Samalea." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ku tshikondo atshi mukelenge Ahaza wakatumina mukelenge wa Bena Ashû dî bua yeye kunukuatshisha. 
2Chronicles28:17 Bualu bua Bena Edome bakadi balue kabidi, bakadi babutule Bena Yuda, bakadi baye ne bakuabo babo mu buhika." 
2Chronicles28:18 Bena Peleshete kabidi bakadi bahaule misoko ya mu bibanda ne ku luseke lua ku Sude kua Yuda, bakadi banyenge Bete-shemeshe ne Ayalona ne Gedelote ne Soko ne misoko yandi, ne Timena ne misoko yandi, ne Gimezo ne misoko yandi; bakashikamamu." 
2Chronicles28:19 Bualu bua Yehowa wakahuekesha Bena Yuda bualu bua Ahaza, mukelenge wa Isalele, bualu bua yeye wakalekela kukandika Bena Yuda, wakenzela Yehowa bibi." 
2Chronicles28:20 Tilegata-pilenese, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakalua kudiye, wakamutatshisha, kakamukuatshisha nansha." 
2Chronicles28:21 Bualu bua Ahaza wakangata bintu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bia mu nsubu wa mukelenge ne bia mu nsubu ya bantu banene, wakabifila kudi mukelenge wa Ashû, kadi bualu ebu kabuakamukuatshisha." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ahaza, mukelenge eu mene, wakatamba kuenzela Yehowa bibi mu matuku a ntatu yandi." 
2Chronicles28:23 Bualu bua yeye wakashihela nzambi ya mu Damaseke yakamubutula milambu; yeye wakamba ne, Bualu bua nzambi ya Bena Sulia yakabatatshisha, nunku nenyishihele milambu bua yoyo kukuatshisha meme. Kadi yoyo yakamulenduisha ne Bena Isalele bonso." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahaza wakasangisha mpanza yonso yakadi mu nsubu wa Nzambi, wakataha mpanza ya mu nsubu wa Nzambi bituha bituha, wakinshila bibi bia ku nsubu wa Yehowa; wakashila bioshelu mu miaba yonso ya mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles28:25 Yeye wakasa bioshelu bia ku mutu kua mikuna mu misoko yonso ya Yuda bua kuoshelahu musenga wa manananshi bua kufuisha Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua bandi, tshiji." 
2Chronicles28:26 Bienzedi biandi bikuabo ne malu andi onso, bia kumudilu ne bia kunshikidilu, bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Yuda ne ba Isalele." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahaza wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu musoko wa Yelushalema mene; kadi kabakamujika mu nkita ya bakelenge ba Isalele; Hezikiya muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezikiya wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema; dina dia mamu wandi diakadi Abiya, muana mukashi wa Zekâya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Yeye wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza nkambua wandi Davidi mu malu onso. 
2Chronicles29:3 Mu tshidimu tshia kumudilu tshia bukelenge buandi, mu ngondo wa kumudilu, yeye wakunzulula bibi bia nsubu wa Yehowa, wakabilongolola." 
2Chronicles29:4 Yeye wakabuelamu ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, wakabasangisha mu muaba munene wa ku esete," 
2Chronicles29:5 wakabambila ne, Unvuai dî dianyi, nuenu Bena Lewi; nudijidile, nujidile nsubu wa Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu, umushai bukoya buonso budi mu nsubu wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles29:6 Bualu bua batatuʼetu bakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa Nzambi wetu, bakamuhidia, bakakema nsubu wa Yehowa nyima, bakatangisha mpala yabo kukuabo." 
2Chronicles29:7 Bobo kabidi bakinshila bibi bia ku mbalanda, bakajima minda; kabakosha musenga ya manananshi, kabakafila milambu ya kuosha kudi Nzambi wa Isalele mu muaba wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles29:8 Nunku tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakadi kudi Bena Yuda ne Yelushalema, ne yeye wakabafila bua bobo batatshishibue ne bua bobo bikale bu tshintu tshidi tshituisha bantu mikemu ne tshihendu, bu mutudi tumona ne mesu etu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Tangilai, batatu hetu bakashihibua ku miele ya nvita, ne bana betu balume ne bana betu bakashi ne bakashi betu hadi mu buhika bua bualu ebu." 
2Chronicles29:10 Katataka bualu budi mu mutshima wanyi bua kuhunga tshihungidi ne Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, bua tshiji tshiandi tshikole tshiumuke kutudi." 
2Chronicles29:11 Bana banyi balume, kanujangaluki; bualu bua Yehowa wakanusungula bua nuenu nuimane ku mpala kuandi bua kumukuatshila mudimu, ne bua nuenu nuikale bena mudimu bandi ne bua kumuoshela musenga wa manananshi." 
2Chronicles29:12 Hashishe Bena Lewi bakajuka, Mahata, muana wa Amasai, ne Yoele, muana wa Azaya wa bana ba Kohata; ne ba bana ba Melali, Kishi, muana wa Abedi, ne Azaya, muana wa Yehalelele; ne ba bana ba Gêshona, Yoa, muana wa Zima, ne Edene, muana wa Yoa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ne ba bana ba Elisafana, Shimeli ne Yeule; ne ba bana ba Asafa, Zekâya ne Mataniya;" 
2Chronicles29:14 ne ba bana ba Hemana, Yehuele ne Shimei; ne ba bana ba Yedutuna, Shemaya ne Uziele." 
2Chronicles29:15 Bobo bakasangisha bana babo, bakadijidila, bakabuela bua kulengesha nsubu wa Yehowa bu muakadi mukenji wa mukelenge ku mei a Yehowa." 
2Chronicles29:16 Bakuidi bakabuela munda mua nsubu wa Yehowa bua kumulengesha, bakalua ne bukoya buonso buakamonabo mu ntempelo wa Yehowa ku tshiendedi tshia mu nsubu wa Yehowa. Bena Lewi bakabuambula, bakabutuala ku musulu wa Kidilona." 
2Chronicles29:17 Bakabanga ku dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa kumudilu kumulengesha, ne ku dituku dia muanda mukulu bakafika ku mbalanda wa nsubu wa Yehowa; bakalengesha nsubu wa Yehowa matuku muanda mukulu; bakamana mudimu eu ku dituku dia dikumi ne disambombo dia ngondo wa kumudilu." 
2Chronicles29:18 Hashishe bakaya kudi mukelenge Hezikiya ku nsubu wandi, bakamuambila ne, Tuakumana kulengesha nsubu wa Yehowa wonso, ne tshioshelu ne mpanza yatshi yonso, ne mesa a bidia bilesha ne mpanza yau yonso." 
2Chronicles29:19 Tuakujidila kabidi mpanza yonso yakimasha mukelenge Ahaza mu bukelenge buandi bubi; Iliona, idi ku mpala kua tshioshelu tshia Yehowa." 
2Chronicles29:20 Hashishe mukelenge Hezikiya wakabika hatshiatshia, wakasangisha bantu banene ba mu musoko, wakabanda nʼabo ku nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles29:21 Bakalua ne balume ba ngombe muanda mutekete ne bimpanga muanda mutekete ne mikoko muanda mutekete ne mpumbu ya mbushi muanda mutekete bu milambu ya kubuikila nʼai mibi ya bantu bua bukelenge ne bua nsubu ne bua ba mu Yuda. Yeye wakelela bakuidi, bana ba Alona, mukenji bua kuyifila kudi Yehowa ha tshioshelu." 
2Chronicles29:22 Bakashiha balume ba ngombe, bakuidi bakangata mashi, bakamiamina ha tshioshelu; bakashiha bimpanga, bakamiamina mashi ha tshioshelu; bakashiha mikoko kabidi, bakamiamina mashi ha tshioshelu." 
2Chronicles29:23 Bakalua ne mpumbu ya mbushi ya milambu ya kubuikila nʼai mibi ku mpala kua mukelenge ne kua bantu bonso; bakatentekasha bianza biabo ha mutu hai; 
2Chronicles29:24 bakuidi bakayishiha, bakafila mashi ai ha tshioshelu bua kubuikila nʼau mibi ya Bena Isalele bonso; bualu bua mukelenge wakela mukenji wandi bua bobo bafidile Bena Isalele bonso milambu ya kuosha ne ya kubuikila nʼai mibi." 
2Chronicles29:25 Yeye wakateka Bena Lewi mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne biamu bia kukumakasha ne nzenze ne bisanji bu muakadi mukenji wa Davidi ne wa Gada, mumonyi wa malu wa mukelenge, ne wa Natana muprofete; bualu bua mukenji wakadi wa Yehowa mukana mua baprofete bandi." 
2Chronicles29:26 Bena Lewi bakimana ne bintu bia misambu bia Davidi, ne bakuidi bakadi ne mpungi." 
2Chronicles29:27 Hezikiya wakela mukenji bua kufilabo milambu ya kuosha ha tshioshelu. Hakabangabo kuosha milambu, bakabanga kutumbisha Yehowa ne misambu ne mpungi ne bintu bia kuimba nʼabi bia Davidi, mukelenge wa Isalele." 
2Chronicles29:28 Bantu bonso bakatendelela, bimbi ba misambu bakimba, bena mpungi bakela mpungi; bakenza nunku tô ne hakahia milambu ya kuosha yonso." 
2Chronicles29:29 Hakamanabo kufila milambu, mukelenge ne bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi bakinama mitu yabo, bakatendelela." 
2Chronicles29:30 Mukelenge Hezikiya ne bantu banene bakela mukenji kabidi bua Bena Lewi batumbishe Yehowa ne misambu ya mei a Davidi ne a Asafa, mumonyi wa malu. Bakimba misambu ne disanka, bakinama mitu yabo, bakatendelela." 
2Chronicles29:31 Hashishe Hezikiya wakamba ne, Tuakadi idila kudi Yehowa; semenai ha buihi ne milambu ya kusakidila nʼai Yehowa mu nsubu wandi. Bantu bakalua ne milambu ya kumusakidila nʼai; bantu bakasua kuenza nunku mu mitshima yabo bakalua ne milambu ya kuosha kabidi." 
2Chronicles29:32 Milambu ya kuosha yakalua nʼai bantu yakadi balume ba ngombe makumi muanda mutekete ne bimpanga lukama ne mikoko nkama ibidi; yoyo yonso yakadi milambu ya kuoshela Yehowa. 
2Chronicles29:33 Bintu bia tshijila biakadi ngombe nkama isambombo ne mikoko binunu bisatu. 
2Chronicles29:34 Kadi bakuidi bakatamba bukese, kabakamanya mua kûbula biseba bia milambu yonso ya kuosha; nunku bana babo Bena Lewi bakabakuatshisha tô ne hakamanabo mudimu wonso ne hakadijidila bakuidi bonso; bualu bua Bena Lewi bakadi ne mitshima miakane bua kudijidila bakahita bakuidi kudifila." 
2Chronicles29:35 Milambu ya kuosha yakadi ya bungi, ne manyi a milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, ne milambu ya bintu bia kunua bia milambu yonso ya kuosha. Nunku bakalongolola mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezikiya wakasanka ne bantu bonso kabidi, bua malu akalongoluela Nzambi bantu; bualu bua bakenza bualu ebu lukasa." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezikiya wakatumina Bena Isalele ne Bena Yuda bonso dî; wakafundila Bena Efelayima ne Bena Manashe mikanda bua bobo balue ku nsubu wa Yehowa mu Yelushalema, bua kudiabo bidia bia disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
2Chronicles30:2 Bualu bua mukelenge wakadianjila kuhunga dî ne bantu banene ne bantu bonso ba bu Yelushalema bua kudiabo bidia bu disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa mu ngondo muibidi. 
2Chronicles30:3 Bualu bua kabakamanya mua kuhidia ku tshikondo tshiabi, bualu bua bakuidi bakuabo kabakanji kudijidila bungi bakumbane ne bantu kabakanji kudisangisha ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles30:4 Bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kua mukelenge ne kua bantu bonso. 
2Chronicles30:5 Nunku bakahunga dî diabo bua kuela mukenji ku nseke yonso ya Isalele ku Bê-sheba tô ne ku Dana, bua bantu balue ku disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ku Yelushalema; bualu bua bantu ba bungi kabakadia bidia ebi bu muakadi mukenji." 
2Chronicles30:6 Nunku miloho yakaya ne mikanda ya mukelenge ne ya bantu banene ku nseke yonso ya Bena Isalele ne ya Bena Yuda, bu muakadi mukenji wa mukelenge ne, Nuenu Bena Isalele, kudimunai mitshima yenu kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Abalahama ne wa Isaka ne wa Isalele, bua yeye ahingane kudi difuka dienu diakahanduka mu bianza bia bakelenge ba Ashû." 
2Chronicles30:7 Kanuikadi bu batatuʼenu ne bu bana benu, bakenzela Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, bibi, nunku yeye wakabafila bua bobo batuishe bakuabo mikemu, bu munudi numone." 
2Chronicles30:8 Kanukoleshi mitshima yenu bu muakenza batatu benu; kadi neuhuekeshe kudi Yehowa, nubuele ku muaba wandi wa tshijila wakajidileye tshiendelele; nukuatshile Yehowa Nzambi wenu mudimu bua tshiji tshiandi tshikole tshiumuke kunudi." 
2Chronicles30:9 Bualu bua binuakudimuna mitshima yenu kudi Yehowa kabidi, bakuenu ne bana benu balela nebahete luse ku mesu kua bantu bakaya nʼabo mu buhika, nebahingane ku buloba ebu kabidi; bualu bua Yehowa Nzambi wenu udi mûle tente ne luse ne dinanga, kena unukoma nyima binuahingana kudiye." 
2Chronicles30:10 Nunku miloho yakaya ku musoko ne musoko ya mu Efelayima ne Manashe tô ne ku Zebuluna; kadi bobo bakabaseka, bakabalonda." 
2Chronicles30:11 Kadi bantu bakuabo ba mu Ashe ne Manashe ne Zebuluna bakadihuekesha, bakalua ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles30:12 Tshianza tshia Yehowa tshiakadi kudi Bena Yuda bua kubavuisha mutshima umue, bua bobo batumikile mukenji wa mukelenge ne wa bantu bandi banene ku dî dia Yehowa." 
2Chronicles30:13 Bantu ba bungi bakadisangisha ku Yelushalema bua kudiabo bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene mu ngondo muibidi; tshisumbu tshiakadi tshinene. 
2Chronicles30:14 Bobo bakajuka, bakumusha bioshelu biakadi mu Yelushalema ne mpanza ya kuoshelamu musenga wa manananshi, bakabiela mu musulu wa Kidilona." 
2Chronicles30:15 Bakashiha mikoko ku dituku dia dikumi ne dinai dia mu ngondo muibidi; bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakakuatshika bundu, bakadijidila, bakatua ne milambu ya kuosha ha-kahia mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles30:16 Bakimana muntu ne muntu mu muaba wandi bu muakadi mukenji wa Mose, muntu wa Nzambi; bakuidi bakamiamina mashi akangatabo ku bianza bia Bena Lewi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Bualu bua ba bungi bakadi munkatshi muabo bakadi kabayi badidila; nunku Bena Lewi bakadi ne bua kushihela muntu ne muntu wakadi kayi muakane mulambu bua kubajidila kudi Yehowa. 
2Chronicles30:18 Bualu bua bantu ba bungi ba mu Efelayima ne ba mu Manashe ne ba mu Yisakâ ne ba mu Zebuluna kabakanji kudilengesha, kadi bakadia bidia bia disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa kabayi batumikila mukenji wakafundabo. Bualu bua Hezikiya wakadianjila kutulombela Nzambi ne, Yehowa muimpe abuikile mibi ya muntu yonso" 
2Chronicles30:19 wakudimuna mutshima wandi bua kukebeye Nzambi, Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua bandi, bikaleye kayi mudilengeshe bu mudi mukenji wa mu muaba wa tshijila wamba." 
2Chronicles30:20 Yehowa wakunvuila Hezikiya, wakasangasha bantu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Bena Isalele bakadi mu Yelushalema bakadia bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene matuku muanda mutekete ne disanka dinene; Bena Lewi ne bakuidi bakatumbisha Yehowa ku dituku ku dituku, bakela bintu bia kuimba nʼabi bikole." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezikiya wakasamba Bena Lewi bonso bakadi ne meji makane mu mudimu wa Yehowa. Nunku bakadia bidia abi matuku muanda mutekete, bafile milambu ya kuosha ne milambu ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, batonde mibi yabo kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Bantu bonso bakahunga dî diabo bua kudiabo bidia tô matuku muanda mutekete makuabo; bakenza nunku ne disanka. 
2Chronicles30:24 Bualu bua Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, wakaha bantu balume ba ngombe tshinunu ne mikoko binunu muanda mutekete bua kufilabo bu milambu; ne bantu banene bakaha bantu balume ba ngombe tshinunu ne mikoko binunu dikumi; bakuidi ba bungi bakadijidila." 
2Chronicles30:25 Bena Yuda bonso ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bantu bonso bakafuma mu Isalele, ne bantu ba bende bakadi bafume mu buloba bua Isalele bakashikama mu Yuda, bakasanka." 
2Chronicles30:26 Nunku disanka dinene diakadi mu Yelushalema; kabakadi ne disanka dinene mu Yelushalema katshia mu matuku a bukelenge bua Solomo, muana wa Davidi, mukelenge wa Isalele." 
2Chronicles30:27 Bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakajuka, bakavudishila bantu disanka; Nzambi wakunvua dî diabo, ne kutendelela kuabo kuakafika tô ne mu diulu ku muaba wandi wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles31:1 Hakashika malu â, Bena Isalele bonso bakadiku bakamuangalaka ku misoko yonso ya Yuda, bakashimbula makunshi onso a bitendelelu bia mpingu, bakataha mitshi ya Bashela, bakashimbula bioshelu bionso biakadi ha mutu ha mikuna ya mu Yuda ne mu Benyamina, ne ya mu Efelayima ne mu Manashe kabidi, tô ne hakabishimbulabo bionso. Hashishe Bena Isalele bonso bakahingana, muntu ne muntu ku buhianyi buandi ne ku musoko wandi." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezikiya wakasungula bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bu muakadi milongo yabo, muntu ne muntu ku mudimu wandi, ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, bua kufilabo milambu ya kuosha ne ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala, ne bua kuenzabo midimu yabo, ne bua kusakidilabo ne bua kutumbishabo Nzambi mu bibi bia ku tshitudilu tshia Yehowa." 
2Chronicles31:3 Yeye wakafila luseke lua bintu bia mukelenge lua milambu ya kuosha dinda ne dilolo ne ku dituku dia lumingu ne habala ngondo ne ku matuku a bidia bia disanka, bu muakafundabo mu mikenji ya Yehowa." 
2Chronicles31:4 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, yeye wakelela bantu bakadi bashikama mu Yelushalema mukenji bua bobo bafile bintu biabo bikuabo kudi bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, bua bobo badijidile ku mukenji wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles31:5 Hakambeye mukenji eu, Bena Isalele bakafila bintu bia bungi bia bintu biakahuolabo diambedi ne bia nvinyo ne bia manyi ne bia buitshi ne bia bintu bionso biakamena mu madimi abo; bakalua ne tshia dikumi tshia bintu biabo bia bungi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Bena Isalele ne Bena Yuda bakadi bashikama mu misoko ya Yuda bakalua ne tshia dikumi tshia ngombe ne tshia mikoko, ne tshia dikumi tshia bintu biakajidilabo Yehowa Nzambi wabo; bakabiteka hanshi mu bisumbu." 
2Chronicles31:7 Bakabanga kuteka bintu hanshi mu bisumbu mu ngondo muisatu, bakamana mudimu eu mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles31:8 Hakalua Hezikiya ne bantu banene, bakamona bisumbu ebi, bakavudishila Yehowa ne bantu bandi Isalele disanka." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hashishe Hezikiya wakebesha bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bua bisumbu ebi. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azaya, muakuidi munene, wa mu nsubu wa Sadoka, wakamukudimuna ne, Katshia bantu bahanga kufila bintu mu nsubu wa Yehowa, tuetu tuakudia, tuakukuta, ne bintu ebi biakushala bia ha mutu; bualu bua Yehowa wakasankisha bantu bandi; bintu ebi bia bungi bidi bishala." 
2Chronicles31:11 Hezikiya wakela dî diandi bua bantu balongolole nsubu ya mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bakenza nunku. 
2Chronicles31:12 Bakalua ne milambu ne bia dikumi bia bintu bia tshijila ne lulamatu lua mitshima yabo; Kenaniya, Muena Lewi, wakadi ku mutu kuabi, ne Shemei muanʼabo wakamulonda." 
2Chronicles31:13 Yehiele ne Azaziya ne Nahata ne Asahele ne Yelimota ne Yozabada ne Eliele ne Yisemakaya ne Mahata ne Benaya bakadi batangidi mu bianza bia Konaniya ne bia Shemei muanʼabo, bua mukenji wa mukelenge Hezikiya ne wa Azaya, mukokeshi wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kole, muana wa Yimena, Muena Lewi, mulami wa tshibi tshia ku esete, wakadi ku mutu kua bintu bia disanka biakafilabo kudi Nzambi, bua kuabanyanganeye milambu ya Yehowa ne bintu bia tshijila." 
2Chronicles31:15 Edene ne Miyamina ne Yeshua ne Shemaya ne Amalia ne Shekanya bakadi ku nyima kuandi mu misoko ya bakuidi ba mu midimu yabo, bua kuabanyangana ne bana babo bintu, ne banene ne bakese." 
2Chronicles31:16 Ha mutu ha balume bakabalabo mu kulondolola kuabo ku bidimu bisatu tô ne ku mutu, muntu yonso wakadi ubuela mu nsubu wa Yehowa, bu muakadi mudimu wa buatshia-buatshia wa ku mulongo wa muntu ne muntu." 
2Chronicles31:17 Bantu bakabalabo bakadi ku kulondolola kuabo kua bakuidi ba mu nsubu ya batatu babo ne Bena Lewi ku bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ha mutu ha bidimu ebi mu midimu yabo; 
2Chronicles31:18 ne bantu bakuabo bakabalabo bakadi ku kulondolola kuabo, bana bakese bonso, ne bakashi, ne bana balume ne bana bakashi, ba mu tshisumbu tshiabo tshionso; bualu bua bobo bakadijidila mu mudimu wabo wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles31:19 Bakatela mena a bantu bakuabo bua kufilabo bintu kudi bana balume ba Alona, bakuidi bakadi bashikame mu madimi akadi ku mpenge kua musoko ne musoko, ne bua kuhabo balume bonso ba bakuidi bintu biabo ne kudi bonso bakadi babadibue mu kulondolola kua Bena Lewi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Hezikiya Wakenza nunku ku nseke yonso ya Bena Yuda; yeye wakenza malu mimpe ne makane ne a lulamatu ku mpala kua Yehowa Nzambi wandi. 
2Chronicles31:21 Malu onso akabangeye mu mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi ne a mu mikenji ne mei bua kukeba Nzambi wandi, yeye wakaenza ne mutshima wandi wonso, wakadi ne diakalengele." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ku nyima kua malu â ne lulamatu elu lua Nzambi, Saneheliba, mukelenge wa Bena Ashû, wakalua ku buloba bua Yuda, wakasa tshitudilu tshiandi ku misoko ya ngumbu, wakelangana meji bua kuyibutula." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hakamona Hezikiya ne Saneheliba wakalua, wakasua kuluangana ne Yelushalema," 
2Chronicles32:3 yeye wakahunga dî ne bantu bandi banene ne hena bukitu bandi bua kujibika mishimi ya mai yakadi ku mpenge kua musoko; bobo bakamukuatshisha. 
2Chronicles32:4 Nunku bantu ba bungi bakadisangisha hamue, bakajibika mishimi ya mai yonso ne musulu mukese wakadi muhitshile mu buloba, bamba ne, Bakelenge ba Ashû badi ne bua kulua kusangana mai a bungi bishi?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Yeye wakakolesha mutshima wandi, wakasa lumbu luakadi lushimbuka, wakajadika bibumba ne lumbu luakadi ku mpenge, wakakolesha Milo mu musoko wa Davidi, wakatula bintu bia nvita ne ngabu bia bungi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Yeye wakateka tupitene ku mutu kua bantu, wakabasangisha kudiye mu muaba wa hatuhu ku tshibi tshia musoko, wakabasamba ne," 
2Chronicles32:7 Nuikale ne dikima, kanutshinyi, kanukemi bualu bua mukelenge wa Ashû, ne bua bantu bonso badiye nʼabo; bualu bua udi nʼetu udi umuhita bunene;" 
2Chronicles32:8 bualu bua yeye udi anu ne maboko a bantu, kadi Yehowa Nzambi wetu udi nʼetu bua kutukuatshisha ne bua kutufila nvita. Bantu bakeyemena mei a Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ku nyima kua malu â, Saneheliba, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakatuma bantu bandi ku Yelushalema, (yeye wakadi ku mpala kua musoko wa Lakisha ne bantu bandi bonso) kudi Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda, ne kudi Bena Yuda bonso bakadi mu Yelushalema, bamba ne," 
2Chronicles32:10 Saneheliba, mukelenge wa Ashû, udi ukonka ne, Nudi nueyemena nganyi bua nuenu nudi nushala mu musoko wa Yelushalema udibo bamba kubutula?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezikiya kena unuitabushisha bua kunuluisha ne tshiole ne nyota, wamba ne, Yehowa Nzambi wetu neatuhandishe mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Ashû, anyi?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hezikiya eu kakumusha bioshelu biakadi ku mutu kua mikuna, kakelela Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema mukenji ne, Nenutendelele ku mpala kua tshioshelu tshimue, nenuoshelehu musenga wa manananshi, anyi?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Nuenu kanuena bamanye malu atuakenzela, meme ne batatu banyi, bantu ba mu maloba makuabo, anyi? Nzambi ya bisamba abi yakadi ne bukole bua kuhandisha nʼabu buloba buabo mu bianza bianyi, anyi?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Nzambi kai wa munkatshi mua bisamba biakabutula batatu banyi, wakadi ne bukole bua kuhandisha bantu bandi mu bianza bianyi? Nudi nuelangana meji ne, Nzambi wenu udi ne bukole bua kunuhandisha mu bianza bianyi, anyi?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Nunku kanuitabushi bua Hezikiya anudinge, anyi bua kunuitabushisha bua nuenu kueyemena mei andi; bualu bua nansha nzambi umue wa tshisamba tshimue anyi wa bukelenge bumue wakadi ne bukole bua kuhandisha nʼabu bantu bandi mu tshianza tshianyi, ne mu tshianza tshia batatu banyi; Nzambi wenu neanuhandishe bishi?" 
2Chronicles32:16 Bantu bandi bakadifila Yehowa Nzambi ne muntu wandi Hezikiya ne mei makuabo. 
2Chronicles32:17 Yeye wakafunda mikanda ya kuhenda nʼai Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ne ya kumudiula nʼai, wamba ne, Bu muakadi nzambi ya bisamba bia mu maloba makuabo kayiyi ne bukole bua kuhandisha bantu mu bianza bianyi, nunku Nzambi wa Hezikiya kena mua kuhandisha bantu bandi mu tshianza tshianyi." 
2Chronicles32:18 Bakela mei makole mu muaku wa Bena Yuda kudi bantu ba mu Yelushalema bakadi ha mutu ha ngumbu, bua kubatshinyisha ne bua kubatatshisha, bua bobo banyenge musoko." 
2Chronicles32:19 Bakamba mei bua Nzambi wa Yelushalema akamuvuisha bu nzambi ya ba ha buloba, idibo basonga ku bianza bia bantu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Hezikiya mukelenge, ne Yeshaya muprofete, muana wa Amoza, bakalomba Nzambi bua bualu ebu, bakadila kudiye mu diulu." 
2Chronicles32:21 Yehowa wakatuma muanjelo wandi, nguakashiha bena bukitu ne tupitene ne bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Ashû mu tshitudilu tshia mukelenge wa Ashû. Nunku yeye wakahingana ku buloba buandi ne bundu ku mesu. Hakabueleye ku nsubu wa nzambi wandi, bana bandi mene bakahatuka munda muandi, bakamushiha ne muele wa nvita." 
2Chronicles32:22 Nunku Yehowa wakahandisha Hezikiya ne Bena Yelushalema mu bianza bia bena lukuna bandi bonso, wakabalama ku nseke yonso." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ba bungi bakalua ne kuha kudi Yehowa ku Yelushalema, ne bintu bia mushinga mukole kudi Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda; nunku yeye wakadi utumbishibua ku mesu kua bantu ba mu bisamba bionso kubangila ku dituku adi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Mu matuku au Hezikiya wakadi usama, lufu luakamutonda; yeye wakalomba Yehowa; yeye wakamukudimuna dî, wakamulesha bualu bua kukema." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kadi Hezikiya kakenzela Nzambi bimpe bu muakamuenzeleye bimpe, bualu bua yeye wakadisua mu mutshima wandi, nunku tshiji tshia Nzambi tshiakadi kudiye ne kudi Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles32:26 Kadi Hezikiya wakadihuekesha bua kudisua kuakadiye nʼaku mu mutshima wandi, ne yeye ne bantu ba mu Yelushalema, nunku tshiji tshia Yehowa katshiakafika kudibo mu matuku a Hezikiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezikiya wakadi ne biuma bia bungi ne butumbi bua bungi; yeye Mulongolola bibutshilu bia kutekamu argent yandi ne or yandi ne mabue andi a mushinga mukole ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne ngabu yandi ne mpanza yandi yonso; 
2Chronicles32:28 wakasa nsubu ya kutekamu bintu biakamena mu madimi ne nvinyo ne manyi ne nsubu ya kuladikamu bimuna biandi bia mishindu yonso ne mikoko yandi. 
2Chronicles32:29 Wakalongoluela bimuna biandi ne ngombe yandi misoko ya bungi, bualu bua Nzambi wakakumbasha bintu biandi." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezikiya eu wakakanga mushimi wa mai a ku mutu kua Gihona, wakâlombola ku luseke lua ku wesete kua musoko wa Davidi. Hezikiya wakadi ne diakalengele mu midimu yandi yonso." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kadi hakalua miloho kudi bantu banene ba mu Babulona yakatumabo bua kumuebesha bua malu a kukema akenjibua mu buloba buandi, Nzambi wakamulekela bua kumuteta, bua yeye amanye malu onso akadi munda mua mutshima wandi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Hezikiya, ne malu mimpe akenzeye, monai, bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa tshikena kumona wa Yeshaya muprofete, muana wa Amoza, ne mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Yuda ne ba Isalele." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezikiya wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika ku mukuna mu nkita ya bana ba Davidi; Bena Yuda bonso ne ba mu Yelushalema bakamutumbisha mu lufu luandi. Manashe muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manashe wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi atanu ne bitanu. 
2Chronicles33:2 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza bisamba biakalonda malu a bundu, biakadi Yehowa muihate ku mpala kua Bena Isalele." 
2Chronicles33:3 Bualu bua yeye wakasa kabidi bioshelu ha mutu ha mikuna biakashimbula Hezikiya tatuʼandi; wakashila Bâla bioshelu, wakakuna mitshi ya Bashela, wakatendelela bintu bia mu diulu, wakabikuatshila mudimu." 
2Chronicles33:4 Yeye wakasa bioshelu mu nsubu wa Yehowa, muakadi Yehowa wamba ne, Dina dianyi nedikale mu Yelushalema tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles33:5 Wakashila bintu bionso bia mu diulu bioshelu mu biendedi bibidi bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa. 
2Chronicles33:6 Yeye wakahitshisha bana bandi mu kahia mu tshibanda tshia muana wa Hinoma; wakatempa matempu, wakatendelela bakishi, wakahaka manga, wakasangisha dî ne batempeshanganyi ba mbuku ne bena buloshi; yeye wakenza malu mabi a bungi ku mesu kua Yehowa bua kumufuisha nʼau tshiji." 
2Chronicles33:7 Yeye wakateka luhingu luakasongeye mu nsubu wa Nzambi, muakadi Nzambi wamhila Davidi ne Solomo muanʼandi ne, Nenteke dina dianyi mu nsubu eu wa mu Yelushalema unakasungula munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia mu Isalele, nentekemu dina dianyi tshiendelele." 
2Chronicles33:8 Tshiena ngumusha makasa a Bena Isalele ku buloba bunakaha bankambua babo, biatumikilabo mei onso anakabambila, mikenji ne mei mafunda ne mei majalame binakabambila mukana mua Mose." 
2Chronicles33:9 Manashe wakibidisha Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema bua kuenzabo malu mabi; nunku bakahita bantu ba mu bisamba biakashihabo kudi Yehowa ku mpala kua Bena Isalele kuenza malu mabi. 
2Chronicles33:10 Yehowa wakambila Manashe ne bantu bandi dî diandi; kadi bobo bakamuhetula. 
2Chronicles33:11 Nunku Yehowa wakatuma tupitene tua masalayi a mukelenge wa Ashû kudibo, bakakuata Manashe, bakamusuika nkanu, bakaya nʼandi ku Babulona." 
2Chronicles33:12 Hakadiye mu ntatu nunku yeye wakakeba Yehowa Nzambi wandi, wakatamba kudihuekesha ku mesu kua Nzambi wa bankambua bandi." 
2Chronicles33:13 Wakamutendelela; Nzambi wakamunvuila, wakitabusha kutendekena kuandi, wakamuhingisha ku Yelushalema mu bukelenge buandi kabidi. Hashishe Manashe wakamanya ne, Yehowa udi Nzambi." 
2Chronicles33:14 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu yeye wakasa lumbu luakadi ku mpenge kua musoko wa Davidi ku luseke lua ku wesete kua Gihona, mu tshibanda, tô ne ku tshibuelelu tshia bahanyishi ba minyinyi ya mu mai; wakanyunguluka nʼalu Ofele, wakalulungakasha tô ne kulu; wakateka tupitene tua bukitu mu misoko yonso ya Yuda yakadi ne ngumbu." 
2Chronicles33:15 Yeye wakumusha nzambi ya bende ne luhingu luakatekeye mu nsubu wa Yehowa, ne bioshelu biakaseye ku mukuna kuakadi nsubu wa Yehowa ne mu Yelushalema, wakabimasha ku mpenge kua musoko." 
2Chronicles33:16 Yeye wakalongolola tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, wakafilahu milambu ya kuosha ne ya kuvuisha nʼai ditalala ne ya kusakidila nʼai Nzambi; wakelela Bena Yuda mukenji bua bobo batendelele Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
2Chronicles33:17 Kadi bantu bakatshidi bashiha milambu ha mutu ha mikuna, kadi bakayishihela anu Yehowa Nzambi wabo." 
2Chronicles33:18 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Manashe ne mei akalombeye nʼau Nzambi, ne mei akamuambila bamonyi ba malu mu dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, monai, bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa bienzedi bia bakelenge ba Isalele." 
2Chronicles33:19 Mei akalombeye nʼau Nzambi bakitabusha Nzambi kutendekena kuandi, ne malu mabi onso akenzeye, ne ditomboka diandi, ne bioshelu biakaseye ha mutu ha mikuna, ne mitshi ya Bashela yakakuneye, ne mpingu yakasongeye diambedi yeye kayi muanji kudihuekesha, monai, bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa bamonyi ba malu." 
2Chronicles33:20 Nunku Manashe wakalala tulu ne bankambua bandi, bakamujika mu nsubu muandi; Amona muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amona wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu bibidi. 
2Chronicles33:22 Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Manashe tatuʼandi; Amona wakashihela mpingu yonso yakasonga tatuʼandi milambu, wakayikuatshila mudimu." 
2Chronicles33:23 Yeye kakadihuekesha ku mesu kua Yehowa bu muakenza Manashe tatu wandi hakadihuekesheye; kadi Amona eu wakatamba kuenzenza malu mabi. 
2Chronicles33:24 Bantu bandi mene bakamuelela tshifufu, bakamushiha mu nsubu wandi." 
2Chronicles33:25 Kadi bena buloba bakashiha bantu aba bakelela Amona tshifufu; bena buloba bakahingisha Yoshiya muanʼandi mu bukelenge mu muaba wandi. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yoshiya wakadi ne bidimu muanda mukulu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu makumi asatu ne tshimue. 
2Chronicles34:2 Wakenza malu mimpe ku mesu kua Yehowa, wakenda mu nshila ya Davidi, nkambua wandi; yeye kakasesuka ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
2Chronicles34:3 Bualu bua mu tshidimu tshia muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge buandi, hakatshidiye muana, yeye wakabanga kukeba Yehowa, Nzambi wa Davidi, nkambua wandi; mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bibidi yeye wakabanga kumusha bioshelu biakadi ha mutu ha mikuna ne mitshi ya Bashela ne mpingu yakasongabo ne mpingu yakatulabo mu Yuda ne Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles34:4 Bakashimbula bioshelu bia Bâla ku mesu kuandi; yeye wakataha mpingu yakatendelelabo nʼai diba yakadi ha mutu ha mikuna ne mitshi ya Bashela ne mpingu yakasongabo ne mpingu yakatulabo, yeye wakabitshibula bituha bituha, wakabivuisha bu lusenga, wakalumuangalasha ha nkita ya bantu bakadi babishihela milambu." 
2Chronicles34:5 Yeye wakosha mifuba ya bakuidi ha bioshelu biabo, wakalengesha Yuda ne Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles34:6 Wakenza nunku mu misoko ya Manashe ne Efelayima ne Shimeona tô ne ku Nafatale, wakabibutula." 
2Chronicles34:7 Wakashimbula bioshelu, wakabotesha Bashela ne mpingu bu bukula; wakataha mpingu yakadibo batendelela nʼai diba mu nseke yonso ya buloba bua Isalele, wakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles34:8 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge buandi hakamaneye kulengesha buloba ne nsubu, yeye wakatuma Shafana, muana wa Azalaya, ne Mâseya, mukelenge wa musoko, ne Yoa, muana wa Yoahaza mufundi wa malu a bukelenge, bua kulongololabo nsubu wa Yehowa Nzambi wandi." 
2Chronicles34:9 Bakafika kudi Hilekiya muakuidi munene, bakafila kudiye argent yakaya nʼai Bena Lewi, balami ba ku bibuelelu, yakasangishabo ku bianza bia Bena Manashe ne Bena Efelayima ne kudi difuka dia Bena Isalele ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina ne bonso ba mu Yelushalema mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
2Chronicles34:10 Bakayifila mu bianza bia bena mudimu bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu wa Yehowa; bena mudimu bakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa bakayifila kudi balongolodi ba nsubu: 
2Chronicles34:11 kudi bena mabaya ne kudi bibaki bua kusumba nʼai mabue masonga ne mabaya a mikamba ne a kusuika nʼau bintu bia nsubu yakashihabo kudi bakelenge ba Yuda. 
2Chronicles34:12 Bantu aba bakenza mudimu ne disuminyina; Yahata ne Obadaya, Bena Lewi bana ba Melali, bakadi tuhita ku mutu kuabo; Zekâya ne Meshulama, bana ba Bena Kohata, bakenzesha mudimu; Bena Lewi bakuabo bakadiku bakadi bamanye mua kuimba bimpe." 
2Chronicles34:13 Bobo kabidi bakadi ku mutu kua batuadishi ba majitu, bakenzesha bena midimu bonso mu mudimu wa mushindu wonso, Bena Lewi bakadi bafundi ne tuhita ne batuadishi ba bintu." 
2Chronicles34:14 Hakaluabo ne argent mu nsubu wa Yehowa, Hilekiya muakuidi wakasangana mukanda wa mikenji wakafundabo kudi Mose." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilekiya wakambila Shafana secrétaire ne, Nakusangana mukanda wa mikenji wa Mose mu nsubu wa Yehowa. Hilekiya wakafila mukanda kudi Shafana." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafana wakaya ne mukanda kudi mukelenge, wakamanyisha mukelenge kabidi ne, Bantu bebe badi benza malu onso awakatuambila." 
2Chronicles34:17 Tuakuangata argent yonso yakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, tuakuyifila mu bianza bia tuhita ne mu bianza bia bena mudimu." 
2Chronicles34:18 Shafana secrétaire wakambila mukelenge ne, Hilekiya muakuidi wakumpa mukanda." 
2Chronicles34:19 Shafana wakaubala ku mpala kua mukelenge. Hashishe, hakunvua mukelenge mei a mu mikenji, yeye wikadihanda bilulu biandi." 
2Chronicles34:20 Mukelenge wakambila Hilekiya ne Ahikama, muana wa Shafana, ne Abidona, muana wa Mika, ne Shafana secrétaire, ne Asaya, muena mudimu wa mukelenge, ne," 
2Chronicles34:21 Yai bienu, nunkonkele Yehowa ne bantu badi bashala mu Isalele ne Yuda bua mei adi mu mukanda eu unuakasangana; bualu bua tshiji tshikole tshia Yehowa tshidi kutudi bualu bua batatuʼetu kabakatumikila mei a Yehowa bua kuenza malu onso adi mafunda mu mukanda eu." 
2Chronicles34:22 Nunku Hilekiya ne bantu bakabikilabo kudi mukelenge bakaya kudi Huleda muprofete mukashi, mukashi wa Shaluma, muana wa Tokata, muana wa Hasela, mulami wa bilulu bia mukelenge (mukashi eu wakadi mushikame mu Yelushalema ku luseke luibidi;) bakamuambila bualu ebu." 
2Chronicles34:23 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, udi wamba ne, Nuambile muntu wakanutuma kundi ne," 
2Chronicles34:24 Yehowa udi wamba ne, Mona, nentumine muaba eu ne bantu badi bashikamamu milau yonso idi mifunda mu mukanda wakubalabo ku mpala kua mukelenge wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Bualu bua bobo bakumpidia, bakuoshela nzambi mikuabo musenga wa manananshi, bua kunfuishabo tshiji ku bienzedi bionso bia bianza biabo; nunku tshiji tshianyi tshidi ku muaba eu, katshiena tshijima nansha." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kadi nuambile mukelenge wa Yuda wakanutuma bua kukonka Yehowa ne, Yehowa Nzambi wa Isalele udi wamba ne, Bua mei awakunvua," 
2Chronicles34:27 bualu bua mutshima webe wakanyingalala ne bua wewe wakadihuekesha ku mpala kua Nzambi hawakunvua mei andi akambeye bua muaba eu ne bua bantu badi bashikamamu, wakadihuekesha ku mpala kuanyi, wakadihanda bilulu biebe, wakadila ku mpala kuanyi, Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Meme kabidi nakunvua mei ebe." 
2Chronicles34:28 Mona, nenkusangishe diatshimue ne bankambua bebe, neubuele mu lukita ne ditalala; mesu ebe kaena amona malu makole andi ntuma ku muaba eu ne kudi bantu badi bashikamamu. Bakalua ne dî adi kudi mukelenge." 
2Chronicles34:29 Hashishe mukelenge wakabikila bakulu bonso ba mu Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema. 
2Chronicles34:30 Mukelenge wakabuela mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne Bena Yuda bonso ne bantu ba mu Yelushalema ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bantu bonso, ne banene ne bakese; yeye wakababadila mei onso a mu mukanda wa tshihungidi wakasanganabo mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles34:31 Mukelenge wakimana mu muaba wandi, wakahunga ne Yehowa tshihungidi bua kulonda ku nyima kua Yehowa ne bua kutumikila mikenji yandi ne mei andi ne malu adiye musue muntu enze, ne mutshima wandi wonso ne muoyo wandi wonso, ne bua kutumikila mei a tshihungidi akadi mafunda mu mukanda eu." 
2Chronicles34:32 Yeye wakitabushisha bantu bonso ba mu Yelushalema ne Benyamina bualu ebu kabidi. Bantu ba mu Yelushalema bakatumikila tshihungidi tshia Nzambi, Nzambi wa bankambua babo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yoshiya wakumusha malu a bundu onso akadi mu maloba a Bena Isalele; wakenzesha bantu bonso ba mu Isalele bua bobo bakuatshile Yehowa Nzambi wabo mudimu. Mu matuku andi onso kabakalekela kulonda Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Yoshiya wakadila Yehowa bidia bia disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa; bakashiha mikoko ku dituku dia dikumi ne dinai dia mu ngondo wa kumudilu. 
2Chronicles35:2 Yeye wakateka bakuidi mu miaba yabo, wakakolesha mitshima yabo mu mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
2Chronicles35:3 Yeye wakambila Bena Lewi bakadi bayisha Bena Isalele bonso ne bakadi bajidila kudi Yehowa ne, Nuteke mushete wa tshijila mu nsubu wakasa Solomo, muana wa Davidi, mukelenge wa Isalele; bujitu ebu kabuikadi ha maha enu kabidi; katataka nukuatshile Yehowa ne bantu bandi Bena Isalele mudimu." 
2Chronicles35:4 Nudilongolole ku nsubu ya batatuʼenu mu milongo yenu, bu muakafunda Davidi, mukelenge wa Isalele, ne bu muakafunda Solomo muanʼandi." 
2Chronicles35:5 Nuimane mu muaba wa tshijila bu muakatahululabo nsubu ya batatuʼenu, bana ba mu ditunga, bua muntu ne muntu wa mu nsubu ya batatuʼenu Bena Lewi ikale ne tshituha tshiandi." 
2Chronicles35:6 Nushihe mikoko ya kuhita kua Yehowa, nudijidile, nujidile bana benu, bu muakadi dî dia Yehowa diakambabo kudi Mose." 
2Chronicles35:7 Yoshiya wakaha bantu bonso bakadiku milambu ya kufila mu kuhita kua Yehowa, mikoko ne bana ba mikoko binunu makumi asatu ne balume ba ngombe binunu bisatu; ebi biakadi munkatshi mua bintu bia mukelenge." 
2Chronicles35:8 Bantu banene bakaha bantu ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bintu biakasuabo mu mitshima yabo. Hilekiya ne Zekâya ne Yehiele, bakokeshi ba nsubu wa Nzambi, bakaha bakuidi milambu ya kufila: mikoko binunu bibidi ne nkama isambombo ne ngombe nkama isatu." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniya ne Shemaya ne Netanele ne bana babo ne Hashabeya ne Yiele ne Yozabada, bantu banene ba Bena Lewi, bakaha Bena Lewi milambu ya kufila: bana ba mikoko binunu bitanu ne ngombe nkama itanu." 
2Chronicles35:10 Nunku bakalongolola midimu yabo, ne bakuidi bakimana mu miaba yabo ne Bena Lewi ku milongo yabo bu muakadi mukenji wa mukelenge." 
2Chronicles35:11 Bakashiha mikoko ya kuhita kua Yehowa, bakuidi bakamiamina mashi akangatabo ku bianza biabo; Bena Lewi bakûbula biseba biai." 
2Chronicles35:12 Bakumusha milambu ya kuosha bua kuyifila kudi Yehowa bu muakadi kutahulula kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo, bana ba mu ditunga, bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa Mose. Bakenza nunku ne balume ba ngombe kabidi." 
2Chronicles35:13 Bakanyika mikoko ya kuhita kua Yehowa ha kahia bu muakadi mukenji; bakalamba milambu ya tshijila mu ngesu, mu bivuadi ne mu mpanza, bakaya nʼai kudi bantu bonso lukasa." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ku nyima bakadilongoluela bintu biabo ne bia bakuidi, bualu bua bakuidi, bana ba Alona, bakadi bafila milambu ya kuosha ne ya dianyi tô ne hatula butuku; nunku Bena Lewi bakadilongoluela bintu biabo ne bintu bia bakuidi, bana ba Alona." 
2Chronicles35:15 Bimbi ba misambu, bana ba Asafa, bakadi mu miaba yabo bu muakadi mukenji wa Davidi ne wa Asafa ne wa Hemana ne wa Yedutuna, mumonyi wa malu wa mukelenge; batanu bakadi ku tshibi ne ku tshibi; kabakadi ne bua kumuka ku mudimu wabo, bualu bua bana babo Bena Lewi bakabalongoluela bintu biabo." 
2Chronicles35:16 Nunku bakalongolola malu onso dituku adi bua kudia bidia bia disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa, ne bua kufila milambu ya kuosha ha tshioshelu tshia Yehowa, bu muakadi mukenji wa mukelenge Yoshiya." 
2Chronicles35:17 Bena Isalele bakadiku bakadia bidia bia kuhita kua Yehowa ku tshikondo atshi ne bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene tô matuku muanda mutekete. 
2Chronicles35:18 Kabakadi ne kuhita kua Yehowa munkatshi mua Bena Isalele bu eku, katshia mu matuku a Samuele muprofete; bakelenge bakuabo kabakadi ne kuhita kua Yehowa bu eku kuakenza Yoshiya ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Isalele bakadiku, ne bantu ba mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles35:19 Bakadia bidia bia kuhita kua Yehowa mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshia bukelenge bua Yoshiya," 
2Chronicles35:20 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu, bakamana Yoshiya kulongolola ntempelo, Neko, mukelenge wa Ejipitu, wakaya bua kuluangana ne ba mu Kâkemisha ku muelelu wa musulu wa Pelata; Yoshiya wakaya bua kuluangana nʼandi." 
2Chronicles35:21 Kadi yeye wakamutumina miloho yamba ne, Ndi nʼebe bualu kai, wewe mukelenge wa Yuda? Tshiakuluila bua kuluangana nʼebe lelu eu, kadi ndi nduangana ne badi nʼanyi lukuna; Nzambi wakungambila kahidi ne, Uye lukasa; nunku kudibuesha mu malu a Nzambi udi nʼanyi, bua yeye kakushihi." 
2Chronicles35:22 Kadi Yoshiya wakahidia kumukoma nyima, wakadifuanyikisha bu mukuabo, bua yeye aluangane nʼandi, kakitabusha mei a Neko akamuambilabo kudi Nzambi; wakaya kuluangana nʼandi mu tshibanda tshia Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Bena mata bakelela Yoshiya mikete; mukelenge wakambila bantu bandi ne, Nuye nʼanyi, bualu bua ndi mutaha mputa munene." 
2Chronicles35:24 Nunku bantu bandi bakamûmusha mu dikalu diandi, bakamuteka mu dikalu diandi dikuabo diakadiye nʼadi, bakaya nʼandi ku Yelushalema; yeye wakafumaku, bakamujika mu nkita ya bankambua bandi. Bena Yuda bonso ne ba mu Yelushalema bakashila Yoshiya madilu." 
2Chronicles35:25 Yelemiya wakashila Yoshiya madilu kabidi; bimbi ba misambu ne balume ne bakashi hadi batela dina dia Yoshiya mu miadi yabo tô ne ku dituku edi, bakayijadika bu tshilele mu Isalele, ne monai, mei au adi mafunda mu mukanda wa miadi." 
2Chronicles35:26 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yoshiya ne malu mimpe akenzeye bu muakadi mikenji ya Yehowa," 
2Chronicles35:27 ne malu andi a kumudilu ne a kunshikidilu, monai, bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Isalele ne ba Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Hashishe bantu ba mu buloba bakangata Yehoaza, muana wa Yoshiya, bakamuhingisha mu bukelenge mu muaba wa tatuʼandi mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoaza wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema ngondo isatu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Mukelenge wa Ejipitu wakamûmusha mu bukelenge mu Yelushalema, wakafutshisha bena buloba ntalanta ya argent lukama ne wa or kabidi." 
2Chronicles36:4 Mukelenge wa Ejipitu wakahingisha muanʼabo Eleyakima mu bukelenge bua Yuda ne Yelushalema; wakamuidika dina ne Yehoyakima. Neko wakakuata Yehoaza muanʼabo, wakaya nʼandi mu Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakima wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne tshimue; wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa Nzambi wandi. 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, wakalua bua kuluangana nʼandi, wakamusuika nkanu bua kuya nʼandi ku Babulona." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadenesâ wakaya kabidi ne mpanza mikuabo yakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa, wakayiteka mu ntempelo wandi wa mu Babulona." 
2Chronicles36:8 Bienzedi bikuabo bia Yehoyakima ne malu a bundu akenzeye ne akadi munda muandi bidi bifunda mu mukanda wa bakelenge ba Isalele ne ba Yuda; Yehoyakina muanʼandi wakakokesha mu muaba wandi. 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakina wakadi ne bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema ngondo isatu ne matuku dikumi; Wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa. 
2Chronicles36:10 Hakabanga tshidimu tshikuabo, mukelenge Nebuka-denesâ wakatuma bantu, bakaya nʼandi ku Babulona ne bintu bia mushinga mukole biakadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa; bakahingisha Sedekiya muanʼabo mu bukelenge bua Yuda ne Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekiya wakadi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne tshimue hakabangeye kukokesha; wakakokesha mu Yelushalema bidimu dikumi ne tshimue; 
2Chronicles36:12 wakenza malu mabi ku mesu kua Yehowa Nzambi wandi; kakadihuekesha ku mesu kua Yelemiya muprofete hakamuambileye mei a kudi Yehowa. 
2Chronicles36:13 Yeye kabidi wakatombokela mukelenge Nebukadenesâ, nguakamutshihisha kudi Nzambi; kadi yeye wakadi ne mampaka, wakakolesha mutshima wandi kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
2Chronicles36:14 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, bakuidi banene bonso ne bantu bakananukila kulonda malu onso a bundu a bantu ba bisamba bikuabo bakanyanga nsubu wa Yehowa wakajidileye mu Yelushalema." 
2Chronicles36:15 Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua babo, wakananukila kubatumina bambi bandi; bualu bua wakadi ne bantu bandi ne muaba wandi luse;" 
2Chronicles36:16 kadi bobo bakaseka bambi ba Nzambi; bakahetula mei andi, bakahenda baprofete bandi tô ne hakamueneka tshiji tshia Yehowa kudi bantu bandi tshidi katshiyi tshishika." 
2Chronicles36:17 Nunku yeye wakatuma mukelenge wa Bena Kasada bua kuluanganeye nʼabo, bakashiha bansongalume babo ne muele wa nvita mu muaba wabo wa tshijila; kabakafuila bansongalume ne bansongakashi bakatshidi kamama nansha bantu banunu bakoke luse; wakabafila bonso mu bianza biandi." 
2Chronicles36:18 Bakaya ne mpanza yonso yakadi mu nsubu wa Nzambi, ne minene ne mikese ne bintu biakadi mu bibutshilu bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa ne bia mukelenge ne bia baminyampala bandi, bakaya nʼabi bionso ku Babulona." 
2Chronicles36:19 Bakosha nsubu wa Nzambi ne kahia, bakashimbula ngumbu ya Yelushalema, bakosha mbalasa yau yonso ne kahia, bakahaula bintu bionso bia mushinga mukole." 
2Chronicles36:20 Bakaya ne bantu bakahanduka ku muele wa nvita ku Babulona; bakadi bahika ba mukelenge ne ba bana bandi tô ne hakalua bukelenge bua Pelasa; 
2Chronicles36:21 bua kujadika dî dia Yehowa mukana mua Yelemiya, bua buloba busanke mu matuku abu a lumingu; bualu bua hakadibu bubutula, bakavuluka matuku a lumingu tô ne hakakumbana bidimu makumi muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles36:22 Mu tshidimu tshia kumudilu tshia Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, bua kujadika di dia Yehowa diakambeye mukana mua Yelemiya, Yehowa wakasonsola mutshima wa Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, bua kueleye mukenji mu bukelenge buandi buonso, wakafunda nunku ne," 
2Chronicles36:23 Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, udi wamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa mu diulu, wakumpa makelenge onso a ha buloba; wakungelela mukenji bua kumuashila nsubu mu Yelushalema udi mu Yuda. Muntu yonso wa bantu bandi bonso badi munkatshi muenu aye biandi, ne Yehowa Nzambi wandi ikale nʼandi." 
Ezra1:1 Mu tshidimu tshia kumudilu tshia Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, bua kushikishabo dî dia Yehowa diakambeye mukana mua Yelemiya, Yehowa wakatabulusha mutshima wa Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa; nunku yeye wakela mukenji ku nseke yonso ya bukelenge buandi, wakaufunda kabidi ne," 
Ezra1:2 Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, udi Wamba ne, Yehowa, Nzambi wa mu diulu, wakumpa makelenge onso a ha buloba; nyeye wakungelela mukenji bua meme kumuashila nsubu mu Yelushalema, udi mu buloba bua Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Nzambi ikale ne yonso wa bantu bandi bonso udi munkatshi muenu, aye ku Yelushalema mu buloba bua Yuda, bua kuashila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, nsubu, bua yeye udi Nzambi udi mushikame mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra1:4 Yonso udi ushala mu muaba wonso udiye mushikame, bantu ba mu muaba wandi bamukuatshishe ne argent ne or ne biuma bikuabo ne nyama, ha mutu ha bintu bidi mitshima yabo misue kufila bua nsubu wa Nzambi wa mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra1:5 Hashishe bakajuka kudi ba ku mutu kua biota bia batatu ba mu Bena Yuda ne bia batatu ba mu Bena Benyamina, ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi, buonso buabo mene bakadi ne mitshima mitabulushibue kudi Nzambi, bua kuyabo bua kulongolola nsubu wa Yehowa udi mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra1:6 Bonso bakadi bashikama nʼabo bakakolesha maboko abo ne bintu bia argent ne bia or ne biuma bikuabo ne nyama ne bintu bia mushinga mukole, ha mutu ha bionso biakasuabo kufila." 
Ezra1:7 Mukelenge Kolesha kabidi wakalua ne malonga akadi mu nsubu wa Yehowa akalua nʼau Nebukadenesâ ku Yelushalema, akadiye muteke mu nsubu wa nzambi wandi." 
Ezra1:8 Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, wakalua nʼau mikale mu tshianza tshia Miteledata, mulami wa tshibutshilu, wakâbala kudi Sheshebasâ, muntu munene wa mu Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Ebu mbungi buau buakabalabo: malonga a or makumi asatu ne malonga a argent tshinunu ne tuele makumi abidi ne tshitema 
Ezra1:10 ne mpanza ya or makumi asatu ne mpanza ya argent nkama inai ne dikumi ne malonga makuabo tshinunu. 
Ezra1:11 Malonga onso a or ne a argent akadi binunu bitanu ne nkama inai. Sheshebasâ wakalua nʼau onso, hakumuka bakadi mu buhika ku Babulona bua kuyabo ku Yelushalema." 
Ezra2:1 Aba mbantu ba ku luseke lua bakumuka mu buhika bakadi Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, muye nʼabo ku Babulona, bakahingana kabidi ku Yelushalema ne Yuda, muntu ne muntu ku musoko wandi:" 
Ezra2:2 hakahia ne Zelubabela bakadi Yeshua, Nehemiya, Selaya, Lêlaya, Môdekai, Bileshana, Misepâ, Bigewai, Lehuma ne Bâna. Bungi bua bantu ba mu Bena Isalele bakadi:" 
Ezra2:3 Bana ba Palosha, binunu bibidi ne lukama ne makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi." 
Ezra2:4 Bana ba Shefataya, nkama isatu ne makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi." 
Ezra2:5 Bana ba Ala, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi muanda mutekete ne batanu." 
Ezra2:6 Bana ba Pahata-moaba, bana ba Yeshua ne ba Yoaba, binunu bibidi ne nkama muanda mukulu ne dikumi ne babidi." 
Ezra2:7 Bana ba Elama, tshinunu tshimue ne nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ne banai." 
Ezra2:8 Bana ba Zatu, nkama tshitema ne makumi anai ne batanu." 
Ezra2:9 Bana ba Zakai, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asambombo." 
Ezra2:10 Bana ba Bani, nkama isambombo ne makumi anai ne babidi." 
Ezra2:11 Bana ba Bebai, nkama isambombo ne makumi abidi ne basatu." 
Ezra2:12 Bana ba Azagada, tshinunu tshimue ne nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi ne babidi." 
Ezra2:13 Bana ba Adonikama, nkama isambombo ne makumi asambombo ne basambombo." 
Ezra2:14 Bana ba Bigewai, binunu bibidi ne makumi atanu ne basambombo." 
Ezra2:15 Bana ba Adina, nkama inai ne makumi atanu ne banai." 
Ezra2:16 Bana ba Atê wa Hezikiya, makumi tshitema ne muanda mukulu." 
Ezra2:17 Bana ba Bezai, nkama isatu ne makumi abidi ne basatu." 
Ezra2:18 Bana ba Yola, lukama ne dikumi ne babidi." 
Ezra2:19 Bana ba Hashuma, nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi ne basatu." 
Ezra2:20 Bana ba Gibâ, makumi tshitema ne batanu." 
Ezra2:21 Bana ba Beteleheme, lukama ne makumi abidi ne basatu." 
Ezra2:22 Bantu ba mu Netofa, makumi atanu ne basambombo." 
Ezra2:23 Bantu ba mu Anatota, lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu." 
Ezra2:24 Bana ba Azemaweta, makumi anai ne babidi." 
Ezra2:25 Bana ba Kîyata-alima ne ba Kefila ne ba Bêlota, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi anai ne basatu." 
Ezra2:26 Bana ba Lama ne Geba, nkama isambombo ne makumi abidi ne umue." 
Ezra2:27 Bantu ba mu Mikemasa, lukama ne makumi abidi ne babidi." 
Ezra2:28 Bantu ba mu Betele ne Ai, nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi ne basatu." 
Ezra2:29 Bana ba Nebo, makumi atanu ne babidi." 
Ezra2:30 Bana ba Magebisha, lukama ne makumi atanu ne basambombo." 
Ezra2:31 Bana ba Elama mukuabo, tshinunu tshimue ne nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ne banai." 
Ezra2:32 Bana ba Halima, nkama isatu ne makumi abidi." 
Ezra2:33 Bana ba Loda ne ba Hadidi ne ba Ono, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi abidi ne batanu." 
Ezra2:34 Bana ba Yeleko, nkama isatu ne makumi anai ne batanu." 
Ezra2:35 Bana ba Sena, binunu bisatu ne nkama isambombo ne makumi asatu." 
Ezra2:36 Bakuidi: bana ba Yedaya, ba mu nsubu wa Yeshua, nkama tshitema ne makumi muanda mutekete ne basatu." 
Ezra2:37 Bana ba Imê, tshinunu tshimue ne makumi atanu ne babidi." 
Ezra2:38 Bana ba Pashû, tshinunu tshimue ne nkama ibidi ne makumi anai ne muanda mutekete." 
Ezra2:39 Bana ba Halima, tshinunu tshimue ne dikumi ne muanda mutekete." 
Ezra2:40 Bena Lewi: bana ba Yeshua ne Kadamiele ne ba Hodaweya, makumi muanda mutekete ne banai." 
Ezra2:41 Bimbi ba misambu, bana ba Asafa, lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu." 
Ezra2:42 Bana ba batuadi ba bintu: bana ba Shaluma ne ba Atê ne ba Talemona ne ba Akuba ne ba Hatita ne ba Shobai, buonso buabo bakadi lukama ne makumi asatu ne tshitema." 
Ezra2:43 Bena Netinima: bana ba Siha ne bana ba Hasufa ne ba Tabaota," 
Ezra2:44 bana ba Kelosa, bana ba Siaha, bana ba Padona," 
Ezra2:45 bana ba Lebana, bana ba Hagaba, bana ba Akuba," 
Ezra2:46 bana ba Hagaba, bana ba Shamelai, bana ba Hanana," 
Ezra2:47 bana ba Gidela, bana ba Gahâ, bana ba Leaya," 
Ezra2:48 bana ba Lesini, bana ba Nekoda, bana ba Gasama," 
Ezra2:49 bana ba Uza, bana ba Pasea, bana ba Besai," 
Ezra2:50 bana ba Asena, bana ba Meunima, bana ba Nefisima," 
Ezra2:51 bana ba Bakâhuka, bana ba Hakufa, bana ba Hâhû," 
Ezra2:52 bana ba Baseluta, bana ba Mehida, bana ba Hâsha," 
Ezra2:53 bana ba Bâkosa, bana ba Sisela, bana ba Tema," 
Ezra2:54 bana ba Nesiya ne bana ba Hatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Bana ba bena mudimu ba Solomo: bana ba Sotai, bana ba Hasofeleta, bana ba Peluda," 
Ezra2:56 bana ba Yâla, bana ba Dâkona, bana ba Gidele," 
Ezra2:57 bana ba Shefatiya, bana ba Hatila, bana ba Pokeleta-hasebayima, bana ba Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Bena Netinima bonso ne bana ba bahika ba Solomo bakadi nkama isatu ne makumi tshitema ne babidi. 
Ezra2:59 Aba mbakafuma ku Tele-mela, ku Tele-halesha, ku Keluba, ku Adana ne ku Imê; kabakamanya mua kujadika biota bia batatu babo ne tunkanunuma tuabo ne mBena Isalele mene:" 
Ezra2:60 bana ba Delaya ne bana ba Tobiya ne bana ba Nekoda bakadi nkama isambombo ne makumi atanu ne babidi. 
Ezra2:61 Bana ba bakuidi: bana ba Habaya, bana ba Hakosa, bana ba Bâzilai, nguakabaka mukashi wa mu bana ba Bâzilai, Muena Gilada, wakidikibua dina diabo." 
Ezra2:62 Bobo bakakeba mena abo mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua bankambua, kadi kabakâsangana; nunku bakadi bu bantu banyanguke, bakabumusha mu buakuidi." 
Ezra2:63 Gouvemeur wakabambila ne, Kanuena mua kudia bintu bitambe bia tshijila tô ne habika muakuidi bua kukonkeye bualu ebu ne Ulima ne Tumima." 
Ezra2:64 Bonso bakadi badisangisha bakadi binunu makumi anai ne bibidi ne nkama isatu ne makumi asambombo," 
Ezra2:65 ha mutu ha bena mudimu babo balume ne bakashi bakadi binunu muanda mutekete ne nkama isatu ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete; bakadi ne bimbi ba misambu balume ne bakashi nkama ibidi. 
Ezra2:66 Tubalu tuabo tuakadi nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asatu ne tusambombo; nyama yabo ya mpunda nkama ibidi ne makumi anai ne itanu; 
Ezra2:67 nyama yabo ya tumelo, nkama inai ne makumi asatu ne tutanu; nyama yabo ya mpunda binunu bisambombo ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi abidi." 
Ezra2:68 Hakafika bakuabo bakadi ku mutu kua meku abo ku nsubu wa Yehowa wa mu Yelushalema, bakafila bintu biabo bu muakasua mitshima yabo kufila bia kuasabo nʼabi nsubu wa Nzambi mu muaba wandi;" 
Ezra2:69 bu muakadibo bamanye mua kufila, bakafila bintu mu tshibutshilu tshia bintu bia mudimu, dariques ya or binunu makumi asambombo ne tshimue, mines ya argent binunu bitanu ne bilulu lukama bia bakuidi." 
Ezra2:70 Nunku bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bantu bakuabo ne bimbi ba misambu ne batuadi ba bintu ne Bena Netinima bakashikama mu misoko yabo ne Bena Isalele bonso bakashikama mu misoko yabo. 
Ezra3:1 Hakafika ngondo wa muanda mutekete, hakadi Bena Isalele bashikame mu misoko yabo, buonso buabo bakadisangisha bu muntu umue ku Yelushalema." 
Ezra3:2 Hashishe Yeshua, muana wa Yozadaka, wakimana ne bakuidi bakuabo, ne Zelubabela, muana wa Shaletiele, ne bana babo bakajuka, bakasa tshioshelu tshia Nzambi wa Isalele, bua kufilahu milambu ya kuosha bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose, muntu wa Nzambi." 
Ezra3:3 Bakajadika tshioshelu ha tshitekelu tshiatshi, bualu bua ditshina diakabakuata bua bantu bakadi mu misoko ai; bakafilaku milambu ya kuosha kudi Yehowa dinda ne dilolo." 
Ezra3:4 Bakadia bidia bia disanka dia mu nsubu ya bitandatanda bu muakafundabo; bakafila milambu ya kuosha ya buatshia-buatshia bu mudi bungi buai, bu mudi dî dijalame, bu muakadibo ne bua kuenza buatshia-buatshia;" 
Ezra3:5 ku nyima bakananukila kufila milambu ya kuosha ne milambu ya ngondo mihia-mihia ne ya masanka onso majadika a Yehowa akadi majidibue ne wa muntu yonso wakadi ne mutshima wa disua dia kufila kudi Yehowa. 
Ezra3:6 Dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa muanda mutekete bakabanga kufila milambu ya kuosha kudi Yehowa; kadi kabakanza kujadika bishimikidi bia ntempelo wa Yehowa. 
Ezra3:7 Bakafila argent yabo kudi bahandi ba mabue ne bena mabaya; bakafila bia kudia ne bia kunua ne manyi kudi ba mu Sidona ne ba mu Tulo bua kuluabo ne mitshi ya cêdre, bafume ku Lebanona, balue ku mai manene ku Yopa, bu muakadi mukenji wakabelela Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa." 
Ezra3:8 Mu tshidimu tshibidi tshia dihingana diabo ku nsubu wa Nzambi mu Yelushalema, mu ngondo muibidi, Zelubabela, muana wa Shaletiele, ne Yeshua, muana wa Yozadaka, ne bana babo bakadi bashala ba bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bonso bakumuka mu buhika ne bakahingana ku Yelushalema, bakabanga kusungula Bena Lewi ba bidimu makumi abidi tô ne ku mutu bua kuikalabo ku mutu kua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
Ezra3:9 Hashishe Yeshua ne bana bandi balume ne bana babo ne Kadamiele ne bana bandi balume ne bana balume ba Yuda bakajuka diatshimue bua kuikalabo ku mutu kua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi; bana ba Henedada ne bana babo, Bena Lewi, bakadi nʼabo." 
Ezra3:10 Hakajadika bibaki bishimikidi bia ntempelo wa Yehowa, bakuidi baluata bilulu biabo bakalua ne mpungi, ne Bena Lewi, bana balume ba Asafa, bakalua ne makasa bua kutumbishabo Yehowa bu muakadi dî dijadika kudi Davidi, mukelenge wa Isalele." 
Ezra3:11 Bakimba misambu, bakuabo batume, bakuabo bahungidishe, bakasakidila Yehowa bamba ne, Yeye udi muimpe, bualu bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele kudi Bena Isalele. Bantu bonso bakela mbila ne dî dikole hakatumbishabo Yehowa, bualu bua bakajadika bishimikidi bia nsubu wa Yehowa." 
Ezra3:12 Kadi bakuidi bakuabo ne Bena Lewi ne bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatu babo, bantu banunu bakadi batangile nsubu wa diambedi, hakatangilabo bishimikidi bia nsubu eu bijadikibue ku mesu kuabo, bakadila ne dî dikole; bakuabo bakela mbila bua disanka;" 
Ezra3:13 nunku bantu kabakamanya mua kutahulula mbila ya disanka ku muadi wa bantu bakadi badila; bualu bua bantu bakabandisha mbila bikole, mbila yakunvuika kule." 
Ezra4:1 Hakunvua bena lukuna ba Bena Yuda ne Bena Benyamina lumu ne, Bantu bakahingana ku buhika badi bashila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, ntempelo," 
Ezra4:2 bakalua kudi Zelubabela ne kudi bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatu babo, bakabambila ne, Tuase bietu nʼenu; bualu bua tuetu tudi tukeba Nzambi wenu bu nuenu, tuakufila milambu kudiye ku dituku diakalua Esâ-hadona, mukelenge wa Ashû, nʼetu kunoko tô ne ku dituku edi." 
Ezra4:3 Kadi Zelubabela ne Yeshua ne bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatu babo ba mu Bena Isalele bakabambila ne, Nuenu kanuena mua kuasa nʼetu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu; kadi tuetu nkayetu netuashile Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, nsubu bu muakatuambila Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa." 
Ezra4:4 Hashishe bena buloba bakatekesha maboko a Bena Yuda, bakatatshisha mu mudimu wabo," 
Ezra4:5 bakatatshisha bantu anu bua kubahumbishabo matuku onso a Kolesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa, tô ne ku bukokeshi bua Dayawesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa." 
Ezra4:6 Mu bukokeshi bua Ahashawelosha, ku tshibangidilu tshia bukokeshi buandi, bakatanda mukanda bua kubanda ba mu Bena Yuda ne ba mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra4:7 Mu matuku a Atashasete, Bishilama ne Miteledata ne Tabêla ne ba ku mulongo wabo bakafundila Atashasete, mukelenge wa Pelasa, mukanda; mukanda eu wakadi mufundibue mu maleta a Bena Sulia, mufundibue mu muaku wa Bena Sulia." 
Ezra4:8 Lehuma, mumanyi wa mikenji, ne Shimeshai secrétaire bakafundila Atashasete mukelenge mukanda wa kubanda Bena Yelushalema;" 
Ezra4:9 hashishe Lehuma, mumanyi wa mikenji, ne Shimeshai secrétaire ne bena mulongo wabo, ne Bena Dina ne Bena Afâsateka ne Bena Tâpela ne Bena Afâseka ne Bena Âkewa ne Bena Babulona ne Bena Shushanaka ne Bena Dahaye ne Bena Elama," 
Ezra4:10 ne bisamba bikuabo bia bantu biakalua nʼabi Osenapâ, muntu munene wa butumbi, wakabateka mu musoko wa Samalea ne mu dishiya dia muamua dia musulu wa Pelata." 
Ezra4:11 Eu mmukanda wakatuminabo mukelenge Atashasete: Bantu bebe ba ku buloba bua dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata ne ba ku tshikondo etshi badi bakutumina muoyo. 
Ezra4:12 Mukelenge amanye biandi ne, Bena Yuda aba bakafuma kûdi bakafika kutudi mu musoko wa Yelushalema; badi basa musoko au mubi wakakutombokela, bakamana kushikisha ngumbu ne bishimikidi biai." 
Ezra4:13 Mukelenge amanye biandi kabidi ne, Bikala musoko muashibue ne ngumbu mijadikibue, kabena bafila milambu ne bia bungendʼa mushinga ne mpunga; nunku neunyanyishe luhetu lua hakelenge." 
Ezra4:14 Bualu bua tuetu tutu tuadia luehu lua ku nsubu wa mukelenge, kambimpe bua tuetu kutangila bundu bua mukelenge, nunku tuakufunda mukanda eu bua kumanyisha mukelenge wetu;" 
Ezra4:15 bua yeye atangile mu mikanda yakafunda batatuʼandi ne habaleye mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu a musoko eu, neamanye biandi ne musoko eu udi wa batomboki batu benzela hakelenge ne nseke bibi kale tô ne katataka; anu bua bualu ebu bakabutuisha musoko eu." 
Ezra4:16 Tudi tumanyisha mukelenge ne, Bikala musoko eu muashibue, ne bikala ngumbu mishikishibue, wewe kuena ne buebe buhianyi dishiya dia munemu dia musulu wa Pelata." 
Ezra4:17 Hashishe mukelenge wakatumina Lehuma, mumanyi wa mikenji, ne Shimeshai secrétaire ne bena mulongo wabo bakadi bashikama mu Samalea ne mu buloba bua dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata mukandu ne, Ditalala dikale kunudi." 
Ezra4:18 Bakumbadila mukanda unuakuntumina. 
Ezra4:19 Nakuela mukenji wanyi, ne bakukeba mu mikanda ya kulondolola kua malu, bakasangana ne, Musoko eu wakatombokela bakelenge musangu wa kale ne ditomboka ne diela dia bifufu biakadimu." 
Ezra4:20 Bakelenge banene bakadi ku mutu kua Yelushalema, bakadi bakokesha buloba buonso bua dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata; bakadi bafila milambu ne bungendʼa mushinga ne mpunga kudibo." 
Ezra4:21 Nunku nuelele bantu aba mukenji ne, Balekele mudimu, kabashi musoko au tô ne hangamba dî dikuabo." 
Ezra4:22 Nudimuke, kanujingakanyi ku bualu ebu; badi ne bua kudiundisha dikehesha dia bakelenge bua tshinyi?" 
Ezra4:23 Hakabalabo mukanda wa mukelenge Atashasete ku mesu kua Lehuma ne Shimeshai secrétaire ne bena mulongo wabo, bakaya kudi Bena Yuda mu Yelushalema lubilu, bakakandisha mudimu ku bukole." 
Ezra4:24 Nunku bakalekela mudimu wa nsubu wa Nzambi wa mu Yelushalema; bakalekela mudimu nunku tô ne ku tshidimu tshibidi tshia mu bukokeshi bua Dayawesha, mukelenge wa Pelasa." 
Ezra5:1 Nunku baprofete Hagai ne Zekâya, muana wa Ido, bakambila Bena Yuda bakadi mu Yuda ne mu Yelushalema dî dia Nzambi; bakabambila dî mu dina dia Nzambi wa Isalele." 
Ezra5:2 Hashishe Zelubabela, muana wa Shaletiele, ne Yeshua, muana wa Yozadaka, bakajuka, bakabanga kuasa nsubu wa Nzambi udi mu Yelushalema; baprofete ba Nzambi bakadi nʼabo, bakabakuatshisha." 
Ezra5:3 Ku tshikondo atshi Tatenai, gouverneur wa buloba bua dishiya dia muamua dia musulu wa Pelata, ne Shetâ-bozenai ne bena mulongo wabo, bakalua kudibo, bakabakonka ne, Wakunuelela mukenji bua kuasa nsubu eu ne bua kushikisha lumbu nganyi?" 
Ezra5:4 Hashishe tuakabambila mena a bantu bakadi basa nsubu eu. 
Ezra5:5 Kadi mesu a Nzambi wabo akadi kudi bakulu ba Bena Yuda, kabakabakandisha mu mudimu tô ne hakayabo ne bualu ebu kudi Dayawesha, ne hakabafundileye mukanda bua bualu ebu." 
Ezra5:6 Eu mmukanda wakadi Tatenai, gouverneur wa buloba bua dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, ne Shetâbozenai ne Bena Afâsateka, bena mulongo wandi, bakadi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, batumine mukelenge Dayawesha;" 
Ezra5:7 bakamutumina mukanda wakadi mufunda nunku: Ditalala dionso dikale kudi mukelenge Dayawesha. 
Ezra5:8 Mukelenge amanye biandi ne, Tuetu tuakuya ku buloba bua Yuda ku nsubu wa Nzambi munene udibo babikila ne mabue manene ne mabaya adi majadikibue mu bimanu bia nsubu; badi benza mudimu eu ne disuminyina ne badi batuma mudimu eu ku mpala ne bianza biabo." 
Ezra5:9 Hashishe tuakebesha bakulu aba ne, Wakanuelela mukenji bua nuenu nuase nsubu eu ne bua nuenu numane lumbu elu nganyi?" 
Ezra5:10 Tuakabebesha mena abo kabidi bua tuetu kukumanyisha ne bua tuetu tukufundile mena a bantu badi ku mutu kuabo.
