Ezra5:11 Bakatuandamuna dî diabo nunku ne, Tuetu tudi bena mudimu ba Nzambi wa diulu ne buloba; tudi tuasa nsubu wakasabo bidimu bia bungi bimane kuhita, nsubu wakasabo, wakashikishabo kudi mukelenge munene wa Isalele." 
Ezra5:12 Kadi hakafuisha bankambua betu Nzambi wa mu diulu tshiji, yeye wakabafila mu bianza bia Nebukadenesâ, Muena Kasada, mukelenge wa mu Babulona, nguakahaula nsubu eu ne nguakaya ne bantu aba mu Babulona." 
Ezra5:13 Kadi mu tshidimu tshia kumudilu tshia bukelenge bua Kolesha, mukelenge wa Babulona, mukelenge Kolesha mene wakela mukenji bua kuasabo nsubu eu wa Nzambi." 
Ezra5:14 Malonga a or kabidi ne a argent a mu nsubu wa Nzambi, akangata Nebukadenesâ mu ntempelo wakadi mu Yelushalema, wakaya nʼau mu ntempelo wa mu Babulona, mukelenge Kolesha wakangata malonga au mene mu ntempelo wa mu Babulona, wakâfila kudi muntu, dina diandi Sheshebasâ, nguakasunguleye gouverneur;" 
Ezra5:15 wakamuambila ne, Angata malonga â, uye nʼau, wâteka mu ntempelo udi mu Yelushalema, base nsubu wa Nzambi mu muaba wandi." 
Ezra5:16 Hashishe Sheshebasâ eu mene wakalua, wakajadika bishimikidi bia nsubu wa Nzambi udi mu Yelushalema; batshidi basa nsubu au ku musangu au tô ne katataka, kabena banji kumumana." 
Ezra5:17 Biamona mukelenge ne mbimpe, bakebe mu nsubu wa tshibutshilu tshia mukelenge udi kuakua ku Babulona ne, Mukelenge Kolesha wakela mukenji bua kuasa nsubu eu wa Nzambi mu Yelushalema, anyi? Hashishe, mukelenge atuambile bu mudi disua diandi mu bualu ebu." 
Ezra6:1 Hashishe mukelenge Dayawesha wakela mukenji, bakakebakeba mu nsubu wa mikanda wakadibo babutshila bintu bia mushinga mukole mu Babulona." 
Ezra6:2 Bakasangana mukandu ku Akemeta mu nsubu wa mukelenge udi mu buloba bua Bena Madai, wakadi mufunda nunku:" 
Ezra6:3 Mu tshidimu tshia kumudilu tshia bukelenge bua mukelenge Kolesha mene, mukelenge Kolesha wakela mukenji eu bua nsubu wa Nzambi wa mu Yelushalema ne: Base nsubu au mu muaba wakadibo bafila milambu, bajadike bishimikidi biandi bikole; bule buabi nebuikale coudées makumi asambombo ne butshiama buabi nebuikale coudées makumi asambombo;" 
Ezra6:4 base ne milongo ya mabue manene isatu ne mulongo wa mabaya mahia-mahia; difutu dia mudimu eu difume mu nsubu wa mukelenge. 
Ezra6:5 Bahingishe malonga a or ne a argent mu nsubu wa Nzambi, akangata Nebukadenesâ mu ntempelo udi mu Yelushalema, akalueye nʼau ku Babulona; baye nʼau kabidi mu ntempelo udi mu Yelushalema, bateke dilonga ne dilonga mu muaba wadi; bateke mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
Ezra6:6 Nunku wewe Tatenai, gouver-neur wa buloba bua dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, ne Shetâ-bozenai ne Bena Afâsateka, bena mulongo webe badi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, kanufiki ha buihi nʼabo;" 
Ezra6:7 kanuhumbishi mudimu wa nsubu eu wa Nzambi; gouverneur wa Bena Yuda ne bakulu ba Bena Yuda base nsubu eu wa Nzambi mu muaba wandi. 
Ezra6:8 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, ndi mulelela mukenji unudi ne bua kuenzela bakulu aba ba Bena Yuda badi basa nsubu eu wa Nzambi ne, Nuangate biuma bia mukelenge bia mu milambu ya mu buloba bua dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, nubifile kudi bantu aba lubilu bua kubakuatshisha; kabahumbishibu kabidi." 
Ezra6:9 Babahe kabidi bintu bidibo nʼabi bualu, bana balume ba ngombe ne bimpanga ne bana ba mikoko bu milambu ya kuoshila Nzambi wa mu diulu; ne blé, luehu, nyinyo ne manyi, bu mudi bakuidi ba mu Yelushalema bamba; babahebi ku dituku ne ku dituku, kabahangi;" 
Ezra6:10 bua bobo bafile milambu idi mitue dihembu kudi Nzambi wa mu diulu, balombele muoyo wa mukelenge ne wa bana bandi ba balume Nzambi." 
Ezra6:11 Nakela mukenji mukuabo kabidi ne, Yonso udi ukudimuna dî edi, batule dibaya dinene dia ku nsubu wandi, bamuoweleku, muasa ku dibaya; bavuishe nsubu wandi bu diala bua bualu ebu;" 
Ezra6:12 Nzambi nguakajadikishaku dina diandi abutule hakelenge bonso ne bantu bonso badi bolola bianza biabo bua kukudimunabo bualu ebu ne bua kuhaulabo nsubu eu wa Nzambi udi mu Yelushalema. Meme Dayawesha, nakela mukenji eu; batumikile mukenji eu ne mitshima yabo yonso." 
Ezra6:13 Hashishe Tatenai, gouverneur wa buloba budi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, ne Shetâ-bozenai ne bena mulongo wabo bakenza bualu buakabambila mukelenge Dayawesha ne mitshima yabo yonso." 
Ezra6:14 Bakulu ba Bena Yuda bakasa nsubu, bakadi ne diakalengele bualu bua dî dia Nzambi diakabambila Hagai muprofete ne Zekâya, muana wa Ido. Bakasa nsubu, bakamushikisha bu muakadi mukenji wa Nzambi wa Bena Isalele, ne bu muakadi mukenji wa Kolesha ne Dayawesha ne Atashasete, mukelenge wa Pelasa." 
Ezra6:15 Bakamana nsubu eu ku dituku disatu dia mu ngondo wa Adâ mu tshidimu tshisambombo tshia bukokeshi bua mukelenge Dayawesha. 
Ezra6:16 Bena Isalele ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bantu bakuabo bakahingana ku buhika bakajidila nsubu eu wa Nzambi ne disanka. 
Ezra6:17 Hakajidilabo nsubu eu wa Nzambi bakafila milambu ya ngombe lukama ne bimpanga nkama ibidi ne bana ba mikoko nkama inai; bakafila milambu ya kubuikila nʼai mibi ya Bena Isalele bonso mpumbu ya mbushi dikumi ne ibidi bu bungi bua bisamba bia Bena Isalele. 
Ezra6:18 Bakateka bakuidi mu bisumbu biabo ne Bena Lewi mu milongo yabo bua kukuatshilabo Nzambi mudimu mu nsubu udi mu Yelushalema, bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa Mose." 
Ezra6:19 Bantu bakahingana ku buhika bakadia bidia bia disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa ku dituku dia dikumi ne inai dia ngondo wa kumudilu. 
Ezra6:20 Bualu bua bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadianjila kudilengesha diatshimue; buonso buabo bakadi balengeshibue; bakashihela bantu bonso bakahingana ku buhika ne bana babo bakuidi mikoko ya disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa; bakadishihelayi kabidi. 
Ezra6:21 Bena Isalele bonso bakadi bumuka mu buhika ne bantu bonso bakadi baditahulule ku malu a bundu a bisamba bia bantu ba ha buloba bua kukebabo Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, bakabidia;" 
Ezra6:22 bakadia bidia bidi kabiyi ne luevene ne disanka matuku muanda mutekete; bualu bua Yehowa wakabavudishila disanka, wakakudimusha mutshima wa mukelenge wa Ashû kudibo bua kukolesheye maboko abo mu mudimu wa nsubu wa Nzambi, Nzambi wa Bena Isalele." 
Ezra7:1 Ku nyima kua malu â, mu bukokeshi bua Atashasete, mukelenge wa Pelasa, Ezela, muana wa Selaya, muana wa Azaya, muana wa Hilekiya," 
Ezra7:2 muana wa Shaluma, muana wa Sadoka, muana wa Ahituba," 
Ezra7:3 muana wa Amalia, muana wa Azaya, muana wa Melayota," 
Ezra7:4 muana wa Zelaya, muana wa Uzi, muana wa Buki," 
Ezra7:5 muana wa Abishua, muana wa Pinehasa, muana wa Eleazâ, muana wa Alona, muakuidi mutambe bakuabo;" 
Ezra7:6 Ezela eu mene wakafuma mu Babulona; wakadi mufundi muakane wa mikenji ya Mose yakafila Yehowa, Nzambi wa Bena Isalele; mukelenge wakamunvuila mu malu onso akamuebesheye bualu bua tshianza tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wandi, tshiakadi kudiye." 
Ezra7:7 Bena Isalele bakuabo ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bimbi ba misambu ne batuadi ba bintu ne Bena Netinima bakaya nʼandi ku Yelushalema mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia bukokeshi bua mukelenge Atashasete. 
Ezra7:8 Yeye Wakafika ku Yelushalema mu ngondo muitanu wa mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia bukokeshi bua mukelenge. 
Ezra7:9 Wakabanga luendu luandi dituku dia kumudilu mu ngondo wa kumudilu mu Babulona; Wakafika ku Yelushalema ku dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo muitanu bualu bua tshianza tshimpe tshia Nzambi wandi tshiakadi kudiye. 
Ezra7:10 Bualu bua Ezela wakadi mujadike mu mutshima wandi bua kukeba mikenji ya Yehowa ne bua kuyenza ne bua kuyisheye Bena Isalele mikenji ne mei majalame. 
Ezra7:11 Eu mmukanda wakaha mukelenge Atashasete Ezela muakuidi ne mufundi, mufundi mene wa mei a mikenji ya Yehowa ne wa malu akadiye musue benze kudi Bena Isalele:" 
Ezra7:12 Atashasete, mukelenge wa bakelenge, kudi Ezela, muakuidi, mufundi wa mikenji ya Nzambi wa mu diulu udi muakane:" 
Ezra7:13 Meme ndi ngela mukenji ne, Bena Isalele bonso ne bakuidi babo ne Bena Lewi badi mu bukelenge buanyi badi basue mu mitshima yabo bua kuya ku Yelushalema, baye nʼebe." 
Ezra7:14 Bualu bua wewe udi mutumibue kudi mukelenge ne bena lungenyi bandi muanda mutekete, bua wewe kuebesha bua Yuda ne Yelushalema bu mudi mikenji ya Nzambi webe idi mu bianza biebe," 
Ezra7:15 bua wewe kutuala argent ne or biakafua mukelenge ne bena lungenyi bandi bu mudi disua diabo kudi Nzambi wa Isalele, udi mushikame mu Yelushalema," 
Ezra7:16 ne argent yonso ne or yonso biudi usangana mu bukelenge bua Babulona, ne bintu bia bantu bonso ne bakuidi biakasuabo kufila bua nsubu wa Nzambi wabo udi mu Yelushalema;" 
Ezra7:17 nunku bûdi nʼabu mbua kusumba ne argent ei ngombe ne bimpanga ne bana ba mikoko ne milambu yabi ya bukula ne ya bintu bia kunua, biudi ufila ha tshioshelu tshidi mu nsubu wa Nzambi webe udi mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra7:18 Tshionso tshidi tshimueneka tshimpe kûdi ne kudi bana benu tshia mua kuenza ne argent ne or bidi bishala, nuenze bu mudi disua dia Nzambi wenu." 
Ezra7:19 Malonga adibo bafila kûdi bua kuenza nʼau mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi webe, wâfila ku mpala kua Nzambi mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra7:20 Tshionso tshiudi ukengela bua nsubu wa Nzambi webe, tshiudi ne bua kufila, utshiangate mu tshibutshilu tshia mu nsubu wa mukelenge." 
Ezra7:21 Meme, mukelenge Atashasete mene, Ndi ndelela balami bonso ba bintu badi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata mukenji ne, Nuhe Ezela muakuidi ne mufundi wa mikenji ya Nzambi wa diulu tshionso tshidiye unulomba lubilu," 
Ezra7:22 tô ne ku ntalanta ya argent lukama, ne ku bihiminu bia blé lukama, ne ku bihiminu bia nvinyo lukama ne ku bihiminu bia manyi lukama; ne luehu ludi kaluyi lubadibue bungi bualu." 
Ezra7:23 Tshionso tshidi Nzambi wa mu diulu wamba tshienjibue mene mene bua nsubu wa Nzambi wa mu diulu; bua tshiji netshikale ku bukokeshi bua mukelenge ne bana bandi ba balume bua tshinyi? 
Ezra7:24 Tuditunuelela mukenji kabidi ne, Kanulambuishi bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bimbi ba misambu ne batuadi ba bintu ne Bena Netinima anyi bena mudimu bonso ba mu nsubu wa Nzambi milambu, ya bia bungendʼa mushinga ne ya mpunga." 
Ezra7:25 Wewe, Ezela, bu mudi lungenyi lua Nzambi webe lûdi nʼalu mu tshianza tshiebe, sungula balumbuluishi banene ne ba-juge bua bobo balumbuluile bantu bonso badi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, bonso badi bamanye mikenji ya Nzambi webe; uyishe yonso udi kayi muyimanye." 
Ezra7:26 Muntu yonso udi ubenga mua kutumikila mikenji ya Nzambi webe ne mikenji ya mukelenge, bamulumbuluishe lubilu, bamuhishe bua lufu anyi bua kumuihatabo mu buloba buandi, anyi bua kumunyengabo bintu biandi anyi bua kumuelabo mu lukanu." 
Ezra7:27 Disanka dikale kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua betu, nguakateka bualu ebu mu mutshima wa mukelenge bua kulengesheye nsubu wa Yehowa udi mu Yelushalema," 
Ezra7:28 nguakanvuisha diakalengele ku mesu kua mukelenge ne bena lungenyi bandi ne ku mesu kua bantu banene bonso ba mukelenge. Nakakoleshibua bualu bua tshianza tshia Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi, tshiakadi kundi; nakasangisha bantu banene ba mu Isalele bua kuyabo nʼanyi." 
Ezra8:1 Au mmena a bakadi ku mitu ya nsubu ya batatu babo, eku nkulondolola kua bakafuma nʼanyi ku Babulona, mu bukokeshi bua mukelenge Atashasete:" 
Ezra8:2 wa bana balume ba Pinehasa, Gêshoma; wa bana ba Itamâ, Danyele; wa bana ba Davidi, Hatusha;" 
Ezra8:3 wa bana ba Shekanya ne ba Palosha, Zekâya; bakamubalabo nʼabo bakadi balume lukama ne makumi atanu." 
Ezra8:4 Wa bana ba Pahata-moaba, Eleyehoenai, muana wa Zelaya; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume nkama ibidi." 
Ezra8:5 Wa bana balume ba Zatu, Shekanya, muana wa Yahaziele; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume nkama isatu." 
Ezra8:6 Wa bana ba Adina, Ebede, muana wa Yonatana; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume makumi atanu." 
Ezra8:7 Wa bana ba Elama, Yeshaya, muana wa Atalaya; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume makumi muanda mutekete." 
Ezra8:8 Wa bana ba Shefataya, Zebadaya, muana wa Mikaele; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume makumi muanda mukulu." 
Ezra8:9 Wa bana ha Yoaba, Obadaya, muana wa Yehiele; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume nkama ibidi ne dikumi ne muanda mukulu." 
Ezra8:10 Wa bana ba Bani, Shelomita, muana wa Yosifiya; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume lukama ne makumi asambombo." 
Ezra8:11 Wa bana ba Bebai, Zekâya, muana wa Bebai; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu." 
Ezra8:12 Wa bana ba Azegada, Yohanana, muana wa Hakatana; bakadi nʼandi bakadi balume lukama ne dikumi." 
Ezra8:13 Ba bana ba Adonikama, bakadi ba kunshikidilu, â mmena abo, Elefilete, Yeule ne Shemaya; bakadi nʼabo bakadi balume makumi asambombo." 
Ezra8:14 Ba bana ba Bigewai, Utai ne Zabuda; bakadi nʼabo bakadi balume makumi muanda mutekete." 
Ezra8:15 Nakabasangisha ku musulu udi uya ku Ahawa; tuakashikamaku matuku asatu; hanakatangila bantu ne bakuidi, tshiakasangana bana ba Lewi." 
Ezra8:16 Hashishe nakabikila Elieze ne Aliele ne Shemaya ne Elenatana ne Yaliba ne Elenatana mukuabo ne Natana ne Zekâya ne Meshulama, bakadi ne lungenyi luhita; ne Yoyaliba ne Elenatana mukuabo bakadi bayishi." 
Ezra8:17 Nakabatuma kudi Ido, muntu munene, ku muaba wa Kasifaya; nakabambila mei a kuambilabo Ido ne bana babo, Bena Netinima, ku muaba wa Kasifaya, bua bobo balue kutudi ne benji ba mudimu wa nsubu wa Nzambi wetu." 
Ezra8:18 Bu muakadi tshianza tshimpe tshia Nzambi kutudi, bakahingana ne muntu wa lungenyi, umue wa bana ba Mali, muana wa Lewi, muana wa Isalele; ne Shelebaya ne bana bandi balela ne bana babo dikumi ne muanda mukulu;" 
Ezra8:19 ne Hashabaya ne bakadi nʼandi, Yeshaya wa bana balume ba Melali ne bana babo ne bana babo balela makumi abidi;" 
Ezra8:20 ne Bena Netinima bakajidila Davidi ne miloho bua kuenzabo mudimu wa Bena Lewi, Bena Netinima nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi: mena a buonso buabo akadi matedibue." 
Ezra8:21 Hashishe nakela mukenji bua tuetu kujila bia kudia ku musulu wa Ahawa, bua tuetu kudihuekesha ku mesu kua Nzambi wetu, ne bua yeye atuleshe ne bana betu bakese ne bintu bietu nshila mululame." 
Ezra8:22 Bualu bua bundu buakadi bunkuata bua kulomba mukelenge masalayi ne badi benda ha tubalu bua kutusungilabo kudi bena lukuna bakadi mu nshila; bualu bua tuetu tuakadianjila kuambila mukelenge ne, Tshianza tshia Nzambi wetu tshidi kudi bonso badi bamukeba bua kubenzela bimpe; kadi bukole ne tshiji tshiandi bidi kudi bonso badi bamubenga." 
Ezra8:23 Nunku tuakajila bia kudia, tuakananukila kulomba Nzambi wetu bualu ebu; yeye wakatunvuila." 
Ezra8:24 Hashishe nakatahulula bakuidi banene dikumi ne babidi, Shelebaya ne Hashabaya ne bana babo dikumi bakadi nʼabo," 
Ezra8:25 nakidikisha nʼabo bujitu bua argent ne or ne malonga ne bintu bionso biakafilabo mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu kudi mukelenge ne bena lungenyi bandi ne bantu bandi banene ne Bena Isalele bonso bakadiku. 
Ezra8:26 Nakidikisha bujitu bua ntalanta ya argent nkama isambombo ne makumi atanu, nakayiteka mu bianza biabo; ne malonga a argent, bujitu bua ntalanta lukama; ne or, bujitu bua ntalanta lukama;" 
Ezra8:27 malonga a or makumi abidi, bujitu bua dariques tshinunu; ne malonga abidi a tshiamu tshia mitaku akadi a mushinga mukole bu or mene." 
Ezra8:28 Nakabambila ne, Nuenu nuakajidibua kudi Yehowa, ne malonga â adi majidila kabidi, ne argent ne or bidi bifidibue bu muakadi disua dia mitshima kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu." 
Ezra8:29 Nubilame bimpe tô ne hanuidikisha bujitu buabi ku mesu kua bakuidi banene ne Bena Lewi ne bantu banene badi ku mutu kua nsubu ya bankambua babo mu Isalele ku Yelushalema mu nsubu ya munda mua nsubu wa Yehowa. 
Ezra8:30 Nunku bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakangata bujitu bua argent ne or ne malonga onso bua kuya nʼabi ku Yelushalema ku nsubu wa Nzambi wetu. 
Ezra8:31 Hashishe tuakumuka ku musulu wa Ahawa mu dituku dia dikumi ne abidi dia ngondo wa kumudilu bua kuya ku Yelushalema; tshianza tshia Nzambi wetu tshiakadi kutudi, wakatusungila mu bianza bia bena lukuna ne kudi balaminyi bakadi mu nshila." 
Ezra8:32 Tuakafika ku Yelushalema, tuakashikamaku matuku asatu." 
Ezra8:33 Mu dituku dinai tuakidikisha bujitu bua argent ne or ne malonga onso mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu, tuakabiteka mu tshianza tshia Melemota, muana wa Uliya muakuidi; Eleazâ, muana wa Pinehasa, wakadi nʼandi; Yozabada, muana wa Yeshua, ne Noadaya, muana wa Binui, Bena Lewi, bakadi nʼabo kabidi;" 
Ezra8:34 tuakabala bintu bionso ne bujitu buabi; bakafunda bujitu bua bintu bionso tshikondo atshi. 
Ezra8:35 Bantu bakumuka mu buhika bakafila milambu ya kuosha kudi Nzambi wa Isalele, balume ba ngombe dikumi ne babidi bua Bena Isalele bonso, ne bimpanga makumi tshitema ne bisambombo ne bana ba mikoko makumi muanda mutekete ne muanda mutekete, ne mpumbu ya mbushi dikumi ne ibidi bu milambu ya kubuikila nʼai mibi yabo: bionso ebi biakadi milambu ya kuoshela Yehowa." 
Ezra8:36 Bakafila mikenji ya mukelenge mu bianza bia miloho ya mukelenge ne kudi ba-gouverneur bakadi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata; bobo bakakuatshisha bantu ne mudimu wa nsubu wa Nzambi. 
Ezra9:1 Hakashikishabo malu â, bantu banene bakalua kundi, bamba ne, Bena Isalele ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi kabena baditahulula kudi bena buloba ebu, badi benza malu a bundu a Bena Kanâna ne a Bena Hiti ne a Bena Pelese ne a Bena Yebuse ne a Bena Amona ne a Bena Moaba ne a Bena Ejipitu ne a Bena Amole." 
Ezra9:2 Bualu bua bobo ne bana babo balume bakadiangatshila bana bakashi ba bantu aba bu bakashi babo; nunku bantu ba tshijila bakabuelakana ne bena maloba â; bulelela, bantu banene ne bakokeshi bakadianjila kuenza bubi ebu." 
Ezra9:3 Hanakunvua bualu ebu, nakadihanda bilulu bianyi ne tshikowelu tshianyi, nakadila nsuki yanyi ne muedi wanyi; akashikama hanshi ntua mikemu." 
Ezra9:4 Hashishe bakadisangisha kundi, muntu ne muntu, bakadi bazakala bua mei a Nzambi wa Isalele bualu bua bubi bua bantu aba bakumuka mu buhika; nakashikama hanshi ntua mikemu tô ne ku diba dia kufila mulambu wa ku dilolo." 
Ezra9:5 Hakafika diba dia kufila mulambu wa ku dilolo, nakajuka mu kudihuekesha kuanyi ne bilulu bianyi ne tshikowelu tshianyi bihandika; nakatua binu bianyi hanshi, nakolola bianza bianyi kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi;" 
Ezra9:6 nakamba ne, O Nzambi wanyi, bundu budi bunkuata bikole bua meme kuhandisha mesu anyi kûdi, Nzambi wanyi; bualu bua malu mabi etu akavulangana ha mitu hetu, ne kuhila kuetu kuakamana kufika mu diulu." 
Ezra9:7 Ku matuku a bankambua betu tô ne ku lelu tuakutamba kuhila; bua malu mabi etu, tuetu ne bakelenge betu ne bakuidi betu tuakafidibua mu bianza bia bakelenge ba maloba makuabo ku muele wa nvita, ku buhika ne ku kuhaula kua bintu bietu ne ku kufuishibua kua bundu ku mesu, bu mudibiku lelu eu," 
Ezra9:8 Katataka mu tshituha tshikese Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, wakutulesha luse luandi bua kutushila difuka dikese dia bantu ne bua kutuha mutshi wa tshikuminu mu muaba wandi wa tshijila, bua Nzambi wetu atabashe mesu etu, bua kutusangasha mu buhika buetu." 
Ezra9:9 Bualu bua tudi bahika; kadi Nzambi kakutulekela mu buhika buetu, wakutuvuisha ne luse ku mesu kua bakelenge ba Pelasa bua kutusangashabo ne bua kutuashilabo nsubu wa Nzambi wetu, ne bua kulongololabo miaba idi mihaula ne bua kutahabo lumbu mu Yuda ne mu Yelushalema." 
Ezra9:10 Ku nyima kua malu â onso, Nzambi wetu, netuambe tshinyi? Bualu bua tuetu tuakubenga mikenji yebe" 
Ezra9:11 iwakuelela bantu bebe baprofete ne, Buloba bunudi nuya bua kuhiana budi bunyanguka bua malu mabi a bena buloba ne malu abo a bundu; bakûsha buloba abu tente ne dinyanguka diabo ku mukala umue tô ne kunfudilu kuabu." 
Ezra9:12 Nunku kanufidi bana benu bakashi kudi bana babo balume; kanuangatshidi bana benu balume bana babo bakashi; kanukebi ditalala diabo anyi diakalengele diabo tô ne tshiendelele; bua nuenu nuikale ne bukole, bua nuenu nudie bintu bimpe bia mu buloba abu, ne bua nuenu nubushile bana benu bu buhianyi buabo bua tshiendelele." 
Ezra9:13 Ku nyima kua makenga onso atuakakenga bua malu mabi etu ne kuhila kuetu kunene, bualu bua wewe Nzambi wetu kuakatamba kutukengesha bu muakadi mibi yetu, ne wakutushila difuka edi dia bantu," 
Ezra9:14 netushihe mikenji yebe kabidi bua kubuelakana ne bantu aba mu malu abo a bundu munyi? Bituenza nunku wewe kuena wikala nʼetu tshiji tô ne hawatubutula buonso buetu, nunku difuka dikese dia bantu kadiena mua kushala anyi kuhanduka, anyi?" 
Ezra9:15 Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, wewe udi muakane; bualu bua wewe wakatahila difuka dihanduka bu mudidi lelu eu; mona, tudi ku mesu kuebe mu kuhila kuetu; kakuena udi mumanye mua kuimana ku mpala kuebe bua bualu ebu." 
Ezra10:1 Hakadi Ezela utendelela, utondela bantu mibi, udila, udikuma hanshi ku mpala kua nsubu wa Nzambi, tshisumbu tshinene tshia Bena Isalele, ne balume ne bakashi ne bana, tshiakadisangisha kudiye; bantu bakadila bikole." 
Ezra10:2 Shekanya, muana wa Yehiele, umue wa bana balume ba Elama, wakambila Ezela ne, Tuakenzela Nzambi wetu bibi, bualu bua tuakabaka bakashi ba bende ba mu buloba ebu, kadi katataka ditekemena didi kudi Bena Isalele mu bualu ebu." 
Ezra10:3 Tuhunge tshihungidi ne Nzambi wetu bua tuetu tûmushe bakashi aba bonso ne bana bakalelabo, bu mudi lungenyi lua mukelenge wanyi ne lua aba bonso badi bazakala ku mukenji wa Nzambi wetu; tuenze bualu ebu bu mukenji." 
Ezra10:4 Juka biebe, bualu ebu budi kûdi, tuetu tudi nʼebe; wikale ne mutshima mukole, ubuenze." 
Ezra10:5 Hashishe Ezela wakajuka, wakatshihisha bantu banene ba bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne Bena Isalele bonso ne, Tuetu netuenze bu mu dî edi." 
Ezra10:6 Bakaditshiha nunku. Ezela wakajuka ku mpala kua nsubu wa Nzambi, wakabuela mu nsubu wa Yehohanana, muana wa Eleyashiba; hakabueleyemu, kakadia, kakanua, bualu bua yeye wakajinga bua bualu bubi buakenza bantu bakumuka mu buhika." 
Ezra10:7 Bakelela bantu bonso bakumuka mu buhika mu nseke yonso ya Yuda ne Yelushalema mukenji bua kudisangishabo ku Yelushalema; 
Ezra10:8 ne yonso wahidia kulua mu matuku â asatu bu mudi mukenji wa bantu banene ne bakulu, nebamunyenge bintu biandi bionso, nebamutahulule munkatshi mua bantu bakumuka mu buhika." 
Ezra10:9 Hashishe Bena Yuda bonso ne Bena Benyamina bonso bakadisangisha mu Yelushalema mu matuku a asatu; bakadisangisha nunku mu dituku dia makumi abidi dia ngondo wa tshitema; bantu bonso bakashikama mu muaba munene wakadi ku mpala kua nsubu wa Nzambi, bazakale bua bualu ebu ne bua nvula munene." 
Ezra10:10 Ezela muakuidi wakajuka, wakabambila ne, Nuakuenza bibi, hanuakabaka bakashi ba bende, nunku nuakakumbasha kuhila kua Bena Isalele." 
Ezra10:11 Nunku nutonde mibi yenu kudi Yehowa, Nzambi wa bankambua benu, nuenze bu mudi disua diandi; nuditahulule kudi bena buloba ne kudi bakashi ba bende." 
Ezra10:12 Hashishe bantu bonso bakela dî dikole ne, Butudi nʼabu mbua kuenza malu onso awakutuambila." 
Ezra10:13 Kadi bantu badi ba bungi ne etshi ntshikondo tshia nvula ya bungi, katuena bamanye mua kuimana ha bula; kemmudimu wa dituku dimue anyi wa matuku abidi; bualu bua tuakatamba kuenza bibi mu bualu ebu." 
Ezra10:14 Nunku batusunguile bantu banene ba munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshietu, hashishe bonso aba bakabaka bakashi ba bende baye kudibo mu misoko yabo mu bikondo bidibo basungule; bakulu ne balumbuluishi ba musoko ne musoko baye nʼabo, tô ne hashikishabo bualu ebu bua kukudimuna tshiji tshikole tshia Nzambi wetu kutudi." 
Ezra10:15 Anu Yonatana, muana wa Asahele, ne Yahezeya, muana wa Tikewa, bakabanga bualu ebu; Meshulama ne Shabetai, Muena Lewi, bakabakuatshisha." 
Ezra10:16 Bantu bakumuka mu buhika bakenza nunku; bakasungula Ezela muakuidi ne bakuabo bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatu babo ne buonso buabo ku mena abo bakadi batahuluke, bakashikama mu dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa dikumi bua kulongolola bualu ebu." 
Ezra10:17 Hakafika dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa kumudilu, bakashikisha malu a balume bonso bakadi babake bakashi ba bende." 
Ezra10:18 Munkatshi mua bana ba bakuidi bakadi babake bakashi ba bende bakasangana bantu nunku: ba bana ba Yeshua, muana wa Yozadaka, ne bana babo Mâseya ne Eliezê ne Yaliba ne Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 Bakabisha bianza biabo bua kuditshiha ne, Tuetu netûmushe bakashi betu; bakafila tshimpanga tshia mu bisumbu biabo bua dihila diabo." 
Ezra10:20 Ba bana ba Imê: Hanani ne Zebedaya. 
Ezra10:21 Ba bana ba Halima: Mâseya ne Eliya ne Shemaya ne Yehiele ne Uziya. 
Ezra10:22 Ba bana ba Pashû: Eleyehoenai ne Mâseya ne Yishemaele ne Netanele ne Yozabada ne Elasa. 
Ezra10:23 Ba Bena Lewi bakadi Yozabada ne Shimeyi ne Kelaya (udi Kelita kabidi) ne Petahiya ne Yuda ne Eliezê. 
Ezra10:24 Ba mu bimbi ba misambu: Eleyashiba. Ba batuadi ba bintu: Shaluma ne Teleme ne Uli. 
Ezra10:25 Ba Bena Isalele: ba bana ba Palosha: Lamaya ne Yiziya ne Malakiya ne Miyamina ne Eleazâ ne Malakiya mukuabo ne Benaya; 
Ezra10:26 ba bana ba Elama: Matanaya ne Zekâya ne Yehiele ne Abedi ne Yelemota ne Eliya; 
Ezra10:27 ba bana ba Zatu: Eleyehoenai ne Eleyashiba ne Matanaya ne Yelemota ne Zabada ne Aziza; 
Ezra10:28 ba bana ba Bebai; Yehohanana ne Hananya ne Zabai ne Atalai; 
Ezra10:29 ba bana ba Bani: Meshulama ne Maluki ne Adaya ne Yashuba ne Sheala ne Yelemota; 
Ezra10:30 ba bana ba Pahata-moaba: Adena ne Zelala ne Benaya ne Mâseya ne Matanaya ne Besalele ne Binui ne Manashe; 
Ezra10:31 ba bana ba Halima: Eliezê ne Yishiya ne Malakiya ne Shemaya ne Shimeona," 
Ezra10:32 Benyamina ne Maluki ne Shemaliya; 
Ezra10:33 ba bana ba Hashuma: Matenai ne Matata ne Zabada ne Elifelete ne Yelemai ne Manashe ne Shimei; 
Ezra10:34 ba bana ba Bani: Mâdai ne Amalama ne Wele," 
Ezra10:35 ne Benaya ne Bediya ne Keluhu," 
Ezra10:36 Wanya ne Melemota ne Eleyashiba," 
Ezra10:37 Matanaya ne Matenai ne Yâsu," 
Ezra10:38 ne Bani ne Binui ne Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 ne Shelemeya ne Natana ne Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makenadebai ne Shashai ne Shalai," 
Ezra10:41 ne Azalele ne Shelemeya ne Shemaliya," 
Ezra10:42 ne Shaluma ne Amalia ne Yosefe; 
Ezra10:43 ba bana ba Nebo: Yiele ne Matitiya ne Zabada ne Zebina ne Yido ne Yoele ne Benaya. 
Ezra10:44 Aba bonso mbakadi babake bakashi ba bende; bakashi bakuabo bakabalelela bana. 
Nehemiah1:1 Mei a Nehemiya, muana wa Hakaleya. Mu ngondo wa Kiseleu mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi hanakadi mu Shushana, nsubu wa mukelenge," 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani, umue wa bana betu, wakalua kundi ne bakuabo bakadi bafume nʼandi mu Yuda; nakabakonka bualu bua Bena Yuda bakadi bashale bakumuka mu buhika ne bua Yelushalema kabidi." 
Nehemiah1:3 Bakangambila ne, Bantu bakumuka mu buhika mu buloba bukuabo badi bashalaku badi mu dikenga dikole, badi bafuishibua bundu; lumbu lua Yelushalema kabidi tutshidi hanshi, ne bibi bialu bidi bioshibua ne kahia." 
Nehemiah1:4 Hanakunvua mei â, nakashikama hanshi, nakadila, nakajinga matuku makuabo; nakajila bia kudia, nakatendelela ku mpala kua Nzambi wa mu diulu," 
Nehemiah1:5 nakamba ne, Ndi nkusengelela, Yehowa, Nzambi wa mu diulu, Nzambi munene ne wa ditshina, utu walama tshihungidi tshiandi ne luse luandi kudi badi bamunanga ne badi batumikila mikenji yandi," 
Nehemiah1:6 teleja matshu ebe, ubulule mesu ebe bua wewe unvue kulomba kua muntu webe kudiye ukulomba munya ne butuku bualu bua Bena Isalele bantu bebe, hantshidi ntonda mibi ya Bena Isalele yakukuenzelabo. Bulelela, meme ne ba mu nsubu wa tatu wanyi tuakuenza bibi;" 
Nehemiah1:7 tuakukuenzela malu a bundu, katuakutumikila mikenji ne mei mafunda ne mei majadika biwakambila muntu webe Mose." 
Nehemiah1:8 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Uvuluke dî diebe diwakambila muntu webe Mose ne, Binuenza malu mabi, nennumuangalashe munkatshi mua ba ha buloba;" 
Nehemiah1:9 kadi binuakudimuna mitshima yenu kundi, binuatumikila mikenji yanyi bua kuyenza, binuikala bamuangalashibue kunfudilu kua diulu, nennusangisheku, nennuhingashe ku muaba unakusungula bua kujadikaku dina dianyi." 
Nehemiah1:10 Aba mbena mudimu bebe ne bantu bebe bawakahikula ku bukole buebe bunene ne ku tshianza tshiebe tshikole. 
Nehemiah1:11 Mukelenge, ndi nkusengelela ne, Teleja matshu ebe ku kulomba kua muntu webe ne ku kulomba kua bantu bebe badi ne disanka bua kutshina dina diebe; ndi nkusengelela ne, Uhe muntu webe diakalengele lelu, umufile luse ku mesu kua muntu eu. (Bualu bua meme nakadi mutuadi wa luhanza lua mukelenge)." 
Nehemiah2:1 Mu ngondo wa Nisana mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi tshia bukokeshi bua mukelenge Atashasete hakadibo balua ne nyinyo ku mesu kuandi, meme nakangata nvinyo, nakamuha mukelenge. Diambedi tshiakadi mbungama ku mesu kuandi." 
Nehemiah2:2 Hashishe mukelenge wakangebesha ne, Udi ubungamina tshinyi, bualu bua tshiena nkumona ne udi usama? Ebu kambualu bukuabo anu kunyingalala kua mutshima. Hashishe nakatamba kutshina bikole." 
Nehemiah2:3 Nakambila mukelenge ne, Mukelenge ikale biandi ne muoyo tshiendelele; meme tshiena mua kubungama munyi, bualu bua musoko udi nkita ya bankambua banyi udi muhaula ne bibi biau bidi bioshibua ne kahia?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Hashishe mukelenge wakangebesha ne, Udi ulomba tshinyi? Nunku nakatendelela Nzambi wa mu diulu." 
Nehemiah2:5 Nakambila mukelenge ne, Bikala bualu ebu buimpe ku mesu kuebe ne biasangana muntu webe luse ku mesu kuebe, anji kuitabusha bua kuntuma meme ku buloba bua Yuda, ku musoko udi nkita ya bankambua banyi bua meme kuwibaka." 
Nehemiah2:6 Mukelenge wakangebesha (mukelenge mukashi wakadi ushikama nʼandi) ne, Wewe udi ulomba luendu lua matuku bungi munyi? Neuhingane tshikondo kai? Nunku mukelenge wakitabusha bua kuntuma; nakamulaya tshikondo." 
Nehemiah2:7 Nakambila mukelenge kabidi ne, Bitabusha mukelenge, bampe mikanda kudi ba-gouverneur badi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, bua bobo bitabushe bua meme kuhitshila mu maloba abo tô ne hanafika ku buloba bua Yuda," 
Nehemiah2:8 ne mukanda mukuabo kudi Asafa, mulami wa metu a mukelenge, bua yeye ampe mabaya a kuenza nʼau mikamba ya bibi bia nsubu wa mukelenge udi hehi ne nsubu wa Nzambi, ne a lumbu lua musoko, ne a nsubu undi mua kulalamu. Mukelenge wakitabusha malu au onso bualu bua tshianza tshimpe tshia Nzambi wanyi tshiakadi kundi." 
Nehemiah2:9 Hashishe nakalua kudi ba-gouverneur bakadi dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata, nakabaha mikanda ya mukelenge. Mukelenge wakantuma ne tupitene tua masalayi ne badi benda ha tubalu." 
Nehemiah2:10 Hakabunvua Sanebalata, Muena Holona, ne Tobiya, Muena Amona, muena mudimu wandi, ne, Muntu wakalua bua kukuatshisheye Bena Isalele, mitshima yabo yakanyingalala." 
Nehemiah2:11 Nakafika ku Yelushalema, nakashikamamu matuku asatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Nakabika butuku, meme ne bantu bakuabo bakese bakadi nʼanyi; tshiakambila muntu mukuabo malu akateka Nzambi wanyi mu mutshima wanyi bua kuenza ku Yelushalema; kakuakadi nyama mukuabo nʼanyi anu nyama unakadi mubande ha nyima handi." 
Nehemiah2:13 Nakaluhuka butuku ku tshibi tshia ku luseke lua tshibanda, ku dina dia mai a mibuabua ku luseke lua diala, nakatangila lumbu lua Yelushalema luakadi lushimbuka hanshi ne bibi bialu biakadi bioshibua ne kahia." 
Nehemiah2:14 Hashishe nakaya ku tshibi tshia ku luseke lua mpokolo wa mai ne tshiowelu tshia mukelenge; kadi kakuakadi muaba wa nyama unakadi mubande ha nyima handi kuhitshilaku. 
Nehemiah2:15 Hashishe nakaya butuku ku kasulu ka mai, nakatangila lumbu; nakalukila, nakabuelela ku tshibi tshia mu tshibanda; nunku nakahingana." 
Nehemiah2:16 Bantu bakadi ku mutu kua musoko kabakamanya kunakaya anyi malu anakenza; tshiakanza kuambila Bena Yuda anyi bakuidi anyi bantu banene anyi bakadi ku mutu kua musoko anyi benji ba mudimu. 
Nehemiah2:17 Hashishe nakabambila ne, Nudi batangile dikenga ditudi nʼadi ne bu mudi Yelushalema muhaula, ne bu mudi bibi biau bioshibue ne kahia; luai, tuibake kabidi lumbu lua Yelushalema, bua katuikadi ne bundu kabidi." 
Nehemiah2:18 Nakabambila bua tshianza tshia Nzambi wanyi tshiakadi tshimpe kundi, ne bua mei a mukelenge akangambileye. Bobo bakamba ne, Tubikai, tuasai. Nunku bakakolesha maboko abo bua mudimu eu muimpe." 
Nehemiah2:19 Kadi hakabunvua Sanebalata, Muena Holona, ne Tobiya, Muena Amona, muena mudimu wandi, ne Gesheme, Muena Alabâ, bakatuseka, bakalengulula, bakatukonka ne, Bualu ebu bunudi nuenza budi tshinyi? Nudi basue kutombokela mukelenge, anyi?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Hashishe nakitaba kudibo, nakabambila ne, Nzambi wa mu diulu neakuatshishangane nʼetu; nunku tuetu bantu bandi netubike, netuase lumbu elu; kadi nuenu kanuena ne buhianyi, nansha tshituha, nansha tshivulukidi mu Yelushalema." 
Nehemiah3:1 Hashishe Eleyashiba muakuidi munene wakabika ne hana babo bakuidi, bakibaka lumbu lua ku luseke lua tshibi tshia mikoko; bakalujidila, bakateka bibi bialu, bakalujidila tô ne ku tshibumba tshia Hamea ne ku tshibumba tshia Hananele." 
Nehemiah3:2 Ku luseke luandi lukuabo bakadi bibaka kudi Bena Yeleko. Ne ku luseke luandi bakadi bibaka kudi Zakû, muana wa Imele." 
Nehemiah3:3 Bana ba Hasena bakasa luseke lua ku tshibi tshia minyinyi ya mu mai; bakajadika makunshi, bakateka bibi bialu ne milonda yabi ne biamu biabi." 
Nehemiah3:4 Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Melemota, muana wa Uliya, muana wa Hakosa. Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Meshulama, muana wa Belekiya, muana wa Meshezabela. Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Sadoka, muana wa Bâna." 
Nehemiah3:5 Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Bena Tekoa; kadi bantu babo banene kabakalenga bianza biabo ku mudimu wa Mukelenge wabo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Yehoyada, muana wa Pasea, ne Meshulama, muana wa Besodaya, bakasa ku luseke lua mushiku wa mbelu mukulukulu, bakajadika mikamba, bakateka bibi ne milonda ne biamu biabi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Melataya, Muena Gibeona, ne Yadona, Muena Melonita, ne Bena Gibeona bakuabo ne Bena Misepa ba ku luseke lua gouverneur wa dishiya dia musulu wa Pelata." 
Nehemiah3:8 Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Uziele, muana wa Hâhaya, batudi ba biamu bia or. Ku luseke luandi lukuabo bakasa kudi Hananya, umue wa benji ba manananshi. Bakakolesha lumbu lua Yelushalema tô ne ku lumbu lua muhimbu munene." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Lefaya, muana wa Hû, mukokeshi wa tshituha tshia luseke lua Yelushalema." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ku luseke luabo lukuabo bakasa kudi Yedaya, muana wa Halumafa, ku luseke lua nsubu wandi mene. Ku luseke luandi lukuabo bakasa kudi Hatusha, muana wa Hashabaneya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malakiya, muana wa Halima, ne Hashuba, muana wa Pahata-moaba, bakasa tshituha tshikuabo ne tshibumba tshia bikulu." 
Nehemiah3:12 Ku luseke luandi lukuabo bakalongolola kudi Shaluma, muana wa Halohesha, mukokeshi wa tshituha tshia luseke lua Yelushalema, yeye ne bana bandi ba bakashi." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuna ne Bena Zanoa bakalongolola mushiku wa mbelu mutangile tshibanda, bakawasa, bakateka bibi biau ne milonda ne biamu biau; bakasa mutantshi wa coudées tshinunu wa lumbu tô ne ku tshibi tshia ku luseke lua diala." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malakiya, muana wa Lekaba, mukokeshi wa luseke lua Bete-hakeleme, wakalongolola mushiku wa mbelu wa ku luseke lua ku diala; wakawasa, wakateka bibi ne milonda ne biamu biau." 
Nehemiah3:15 Mushiku wa mbelu wa ku mpokolo wa mai bakalongolola kudi Shaluma, muana wa Kole-hosa, mukokeshi wa luseke lua Misepa; wakawasa, wakaubulula, wakateka bibi ne milonda ne biamu; wakalongolola lumbu lua ku dina dia mai a Shela hehi ne tshibunda tshia mukelenge tô ne ku tshibandilu tshidi tshihueka ku musoko wa Davidi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ku nyima kuandi Nehemiya, muana wa Azabuka, mukokeshi wa luseke lua Bete-sû, wakalongolola tô ne ku muaba wa nkita ya Davidi ne ku dina dia mai diakumbulabo ne ku nsubu wa bena bukitu." 
Nehemiah3:17 Ku nyima kuandi Bena Lewi bakalongolola: Lehuma, muana wa Bani, wakalongolola. Ku luseke luandi lukuabo bakalongolola kudi Hashabiya, mukokeshi wa tshituha tshia luseke lua Kila, bua luseke luandi." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ku nyima kuandi bakalongolola kudi bana babo, Bawai, muana wa Henedada, mukokeshi wa tshituha tshia luseke lua Kila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ku luseke luandi lukuabo Ezê, muana wa Yeshua, mukokeshi wa Misepa, wakalongolola tshituha tshikuabo, buludiludi ne nsubu wa bintu bia nvita ku ditumba dia lumbu." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ku nyima kuandi Baluka, muana wa Zabai, wakananukila kulongolola tshituha tshikuabo ku ditumba dia lumbu tô ne ku tshibi tshia nsubu wa Eleyashiba muakuidi munene." 
Nehemiah3:21 Ku nyima kuandi Melemota, muana wa Uliya, muana wa Hakosa, wakalongolola tshituha tshikuabo ku tshibi tshia ku nsubu wa Eleyashiba tô ne ku ndekelu wa nsubu wandi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ku nyima kuandi bakuidi, bantu ba ku Mpata, bakalongolola." 
Nehemiah3:23 Ku nyima kuabo Benyamina ne Hashuba bakalongolola buludiludi ne nsubu wabo. Ku nyima kuabo Azaya, muana wa Mâseya, muana wa Ananiya, wakalongolola ku luseke lua nsubu wandi." 
Nehemiah3:24 Ku nyima kuandi Binui, muana wa Henedada, wakalongolola tshituha tshikuabo, ku nsubu wa Azaya tô ne ku ditumba dia lumbu tô ne ku tshibumba." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palala, muana wa Uzai, wakalongolola buludiludi ne ditumba dia lumbu tô ne ku tshibumba tshiakadi tshiasa hehi ne nsubu wa mukelenge wakadi ku mukuna, tshidi ku luseke lua luhangu lua balami ba ku bibi. Ku nyima kuandi Pedaya, muana wa Palosha, wakalongolola." 
Nehemiah3:26 Bena Netinima hakadi bashikama mu Ofele ku muaba wa buludiludi ne mushiku wa mbelu wa ku mai ku luseke lua esete ne ku tshibumba tshiakadi tshisompoka. 
Nehemiah3:27 Ku nyima kuandi Bena Tekoa bakalongolola tshituha tshikuabo buludiludi ne tshibumba tshinene tô ne ku lumbu lua Ofele. 
Nehemiah3:28 Ku mutu kua mushiku wa mbelu wa tubalu bakuidi bakalongolola, mu ntu ne muntu buludiludi ne nsubu wandi." 
Nehemiah3:29 Ku nyima kuabo Sadoka, muana wa Imê, wakalongolola buludiludi ne nsubu wandi. Ku nyima kuandi Shemaya, muana wa Shekanya, mulami wa ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ku esete, wakalongolola." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ku nyima kuandi Hananya, muana wa Shelemeya, ne Hanuna, muana muisambombo wa Salafa, bakalongolola tshituha tshikuabo. Ku nyima kuabo Meshulama, muana wa Belekiya, wakalongolola buludiludi ne nsubu wandi." 
Nehemiah3:31 Ku nyima kuandi Malakiya, umue wa batudi ba biamu bia or, wakalongolola ku nsubu wa Kena Netinima ne wa bangendʼa mushinga, buludiludi ne mushiku wa mbelu wa Hamifekada tô ne ku luseke ludi lubanda ku tshibumba." 
Nehemiah3:32 Hankatshi ha luseke ludi lubanda ku tshibumba ne mushiku wa mbelu wa mikoko batudi ba biamu bia or ne bangendʼa mushinga bakalongolola. 
Nehemiah4:1 Hakunvua Sanebalata ne, Badi basa lumbu, wakadi ne tshiji tshikole, Wakafika munda, wakaseka Bena Yuda." 
Nehemiah4:2 Yeye wakamba ku mpala kua bana babo ne kua masalayi a Bena Samalea, wakabebesha ne, Bena Yuda aba batekete badi benza tshinyi? Nebadiashile lumbu anyi? Nebafile milambu ya kuosha, anyi? Nebamane bualu ebu dituku dimue, anyi? Nebasangashe mabue adi bu mishiki mu diala akamanabo kuosha, anyi?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobiya, Muena Amona, wakadi hehi nʼandi, wakamba ne, Babanda mubuabua ha mutu ha lumbu lua mabue ludibo basa udi mua kulushimbula." 
Nehemiah4:4 O Nzambi wetu, unvua bu mudibo batulengulula, ukudimune bihendu biabo ha mutu habo, ubafile mu buloba bua bahika bu bintu biakahaulabo;" 
Nehemiah4:5 kubabuikididi mibi yabo, kumushi malu mabi abo ku mesu kuebe nansha; bualu bua bobo bakakufuisha tshiji ku mesu kua bibaki ba lumbu." 
Nehemiah4:6 Nunku tuakasa lumbu; lumbu luonso luakatuangana tô ne ku tshituha tshia bule bualu, bualu bua bantu bakadi ne mitshima ya kuenza mudimu." 
Nehemiah4:7 Kadi hakunvua Sanebalata ne Tobiya ne Bena Alabâ ne Bena Amona ne Bena Ashedodo ne, Badi bananukila kuasa ngumbu ya Yelushalema ne badi bamba kukanda miaba yakadi mishimbuka, bakadi ne tshiji tshikole;" 
Nehemiah4:8 hashishe buonso buabo bakatuelela tshifufu bua kuluanganabo ne Bena Yelushalema ne bua kutompakasha malu etu. 
Nehemiah4:9 Kadi tuetu tuakatendelela Nzambi wetu tuakasungula batentekedi bua kutentekelabo munya ne butuku. 
Nehemiah4:10 Bena Yuda bakamba ne, Bukole bua batuadi ba majitu buakukehela, bilu bia bungi bidi bishala, katuena bamanye mua kuasa lumbu." 
Nehemiah4:11 Bakadi nʼetu lukuna bakamba ne, Kabena bamanye bualu, kabena batutangila tô ne hatuamueneka munkatshi muabo bua kubashiha ne bua kubalekesha mudimu." 
Nehemiah4:12 Hashishe, hakalua Bena Yuda kutudi bakadi bashikama ha buihi nʼabo, bakatuambila misangu dikumi ku nseke yonso ne, Bunudi nʼabu mbua kuhingana kutudi." 
Nehemiah4:13 Nunku nakateka bantu ku meku abo kuinshi kua lumbu mu muaba munene ne miele ya nvita ne mafuma ne mata mu bianza biabo. 
Nehemiah4:14 Nakatangila ne nakajuka, nakambila bantu banene ne bakokeshi ne bantu bakuabo ne, Kanubatshinyi, nuvuluke Mukelenge wenu munene, mukole, nuluangane bikole bualu bua bana benu ne bana benu ba balume ne bana benu ba bakashi baledibue ne bua bakashi benu ne nsubu yenu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Hakunvua bena lukuna betu ne, Badi bamanye malu etu, ne Nzambi wabo wakukudimuna tshifufu tshietu, tshiakalua tshianana, tuakahingana buonso buetu ku lumbu, muntu ne muntu ku mudimu wandi." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ku tshikondo atshi tshituha tshia bantu banyi bakenza mudimu ne tshituha tshikuabo tshiakakuata mafuma ne ngabu ne mata ne bikowelu bia nvita; bakokeshi bakashala ku nyima kua tshisamba tshionso tshia Bena Yuda. 
Nehemiah4:17 Bibaki ba lumbu ne batuadi ba bintu bakadiangatshila bintu bia nvita; muntu ne muntu wakenza mudimu ne tshianza tshimue, wakakuata bintu bia nvita mu tshianza tshikuabo;" 
Nehemiah4:18 bibaki ba lumbu muntu ne muntu wakadi ne muele wandi wa nvita mubuesha mu mukaba; bakenza mudimu nunku. Muedi wa mpungi wakadi ha buihi nʼanyi. 
Nehemiah4:19 Nakambila bantu banene ne bakokeshi ne bantu bakuabo ne, Mudimu udi mukole ne munene, ne tuetu tudi bahanduluke ba mutu ha lumbu bashilangane umue kudi mukuabo;" 
Nehemiah4:20 nunku mu miaba yonso mudi nunyua muadi wa mpungi, nudisangisheku kutudi; Nzambi wetu neatuluile nvita." 
Nehemiah4:21 Tuakenza mudimu nunku: tshituha tshia bantu tshiakakuata mafuma ku dinda tô ne ku butuku hakamueneka mitoto. 
Nehemiah4:22 Ku musangu umue eu nakambila bantu ne, Muntu ne muntu ashikame ne muena mudimu wandi mu Yelushalema bua bobo bamanye mua kutulama butuku ne bua kukuata mudimu mu munya." 
Nehemiah4:23 Nunku meme ne bana betu ne bena mudimu banyi ne bena nvita bakadi bandonda katuakavula bilulu bietu; muntu yonso wakaya ne bintu biandi bia nvita ku mai. 
Nehemiah5:1 Bantu bakuabo ne bakashi babo bakadi ne muadi munene, bakafunda bana babo, Bena Yuda." 
Nehemiah5:2 Bualu bua bakuabo bakamba ne, Tuetu ne bana betu balume ne bana betu bakashi tudi ba bungi; tuangate blé bua tuetu kudia, tuikale ne muoyo." 
Nehemiah5:3 Bakuabo bakamba ne, Tudi tueyeka madimi etu ne madimi a tumuma ne nsubu yetu, bua tusumbe blé bualu bua tshiole tshidiku." 
Nehemiah5:4 Bakuabo bakamba ne, Tuetu tuakasomba argent bua kulambula mukelenge, tuakeyeka madimi etu ne madimi a tumuma." 
Nehemiah5:5 Kadi musunyi wetu udi bu musunyi wa bana betu ne bana betu baledibue badi bu bana babo; tuetu tudi tubuesha bana betu balume ne bana betu bakashi mu huhika, ne bana betu bakashi bakuabo bakamana kuya mu buhika; katuena ne bukole bua kubakuatshisha, bualu bua bantu bakuabo bakamana kuangata madimi etu ne madimi a tumuma." 
Nehemiah5:6 Hanakunvua muadi wabo ne mei â, nakadi ne tshiji tshikole." 
Nehemiah5:7 Nakadielela meji munda muanyi, nakatandangana ne bantu banene ne bakokeshi, nakabambila ne, Muntu ne muntu udi ulomba tshia kasombela kudi muanʼabo. Nakashikika tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu ku mpala kuabo." 
Nehemiah5:8 Nakabambila ne, Tuetu bua bukole butuakadi nʼabu tuakuhikula bana betu Bena Yuda bakadi bahanyibue mu buhika kudi bisamba bia bantu; nuenu nudi basue kuhana bana benu, anyi? Nudi basue tuetu kubasunga, anyi? Hashishe bobo bakahuwa, kabakadi ne dî dia kungandamuna." 
Nehemiah5:9 Nakamba kabidi ne Bualu ebu bunudi nuenza kabuena buimpe; kanuena ne buabi bua kuenda mu ditshina dia Nzambi wetu bualu bua bihendu bia bisamba bia bantu, bena lukuna betu, anyi?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Muomumue meme ne bana betu ne bena mudimu banyi tuakadi mua kubasombesha argent ne blé bua kuheta tshia kasombela. Ndi nnusengelela ne, Tulekelai tshia kasombela aka." 
Nehemiah5:11 Ndi nnusengelela ne, Nuhingishe madimi abo ne madimi a tumuma ne madimi a olive ne nsubu yabo ne tshia lukama lua argent ne blé ne nyinyo ne manyi binuakangata kudibo, anu lelu eu." 
Nehemiah5:12 Hashishe bobo bakamba ne, Netubahingishilebi, katuena tubalomba kasombela; netuenze bu muwakuamba. Hashishe nakabikila bakuidi, nakabatshihisha bua bobo benze bu muakadi mulayi eu." 
Nehemiah5:13 Nunku nakatutula bilulu bianyi, nakamba ne, Nzambi neatutushe muntu yonso ku nsubu wandi ne ku mudimu wandi nunku biahangeye kumana mulayi eu; nebamumushe nunku, yeye neikale hatuhu. Bantu bonso bakamba ne, Amen; bakatumbisha Yehowa. Bantu bakenza bu muakadi mulayi eu." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ku tshikondo tshiakansungulabo gouverneur wabo mu buloba bua Yuda, ku tshidimu tshia makumi abidi tshia bukelenge bua mukelenge Atashasete tô ne ku tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne bibidi, bu bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, meme ne bana betu katuakanza kudia bidia bia gouverneur." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kadi ba-gouverneur bakadi ku mpala kuanyi bakangata difutu diabo kudi bantu; bakadiangatshila bidia ne nvinyo kudibo ha mutu ha nshekele ya argent makumi anai; bena mudimu babo mene bakakokesha bantu, kadi meme tshiakenza nunku bualu bua dishina dia Nzambi." 
Nehemiah5:16 Meme mene mene nakananukila kulamata mudimu wa lumbu elu, katuakadisumbila madimi; bena mudimu banyi bonso bakadisangishaku bua kuenzabo mudimu." 
Nehemiah5:17 Bena Yuda ne bakokeshi bakuabo lukama ne makumi atanu bakadia ku mesa anyi ha mutu ha bakalua kutudi kudi ba munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu biakadi bitunyunguluke. 
Nehemiah5:18 Bintu bituakadia bia dituku dimue biakadi ngombe umue ne mikoko ya manyi isambombo; bakandambila nsolo; tuakanua nvinyo yonso musangu umue bu wa matuku dikumi; kadi mu malu â onso tshiakalomba bia kudia bia gouverneur bualu bua mudimu wakadi bujitu kudi bantu aba. 
Nehemiah5:19 Nzambi wanyi, unvuluke bua kungenzela bimpe bua malu onso anakuenzela bantu aba." 
Nehemiah6:1 Hakambilabo Sanebalata ne Tobiya ne Gesheme, Muena Alabâ, ne bena lukuna betu bakuabo ne, Yeye wakumana lumbu, ne kakuena muaba mushimbuke mushaleku (kadi ku tshikondo atshi tshiakanza kuela bibi bionso ku lumbu)," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanebalata ne Gesheme bakantumina dî ne, Lua, tusangakene nʼebe mu umue wa misoko ya mu mpata wa Ono. Kadi bakadi belangana meji bua kungenzela bibi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Nakabatumina ba-messager ne, Meme ndi ngenza mudimu munene, nunku tshiena mua kulua; bundi nʼabu mbua kuhumbisha mudimu hanumuka bianyi bua kulua kunudi bua tshinyi?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bobo bakantumina dî adi misangu inai, kadi meme nakabakudimuna anu dî diodimue." 
Nehemiah6:5 Hashishe Sanebalata wakatuma muntu wandi kundi musangu muitanu ne mukanda mubulula mu tshianza tshiandi," 
Nehemiah6:6 ne mei mafunda nunku ne, Lumu luakatangadika munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia bantu ne, Gesheme udi wamba bualu ebu ne, Wewe ne Bena Yuda nudi nuelangana meji bua kutomboka; bua bualu ebu wewe udi wibaka lumbu elu; wewe udi musue kuikala mukelenge wabo bu mudi mei â." 
Nehemiah6:7 Wewe kabidi wakamana kudisunguila baprofete hua kukuakuilabo mu Yelushalema, bamba ne, Mukelenge udi mu Yuda; katataka nebaye kuambila mukelenge mei â. Lua, tusangishe lungenyi." 
Nehemiah6:8 Hashishe nakamutumina dî ne, Kabena benza malu bu mudi wamba, kadi wewe wakâfuanyikisha mu mutshima webe nkayebe." 
Nehemiah6:9 Bualu bua bobo bonso bakasua kututshinyisha, bamba ne, Netutekeshe maboko abo mu mudimu, kabawenji nansha. Kadi, Nzambi wanyi, ukoleshe maboko anyi." 
Nehemiah6:10 Nakaya ku nsubu wa Shemaya, muana wa Delaya, muana wa Mehetabela, wakadi mudinshidile mu nsubu; yeye wakamba ne, Tusangakene nʼebe mu nsubu wa Nzambi, mu ntempelo mene, tuinshile bibi, bualu bua nebalue kukushiha; bulelela, nebalue butuku ebu bua kukushiha." 
Nehemiah6:11 Nakamba ne, Muntu bu meme udi ne bua kunyema bua tshinyi? Nganyi udi bu meme neanyemene mu ntempelo bua kusungila muoyo wandi? Tshiena nyamu nansha." 
Nehemiah6:12 Nakujingulula bualu ebu ne, Nzambi kakamutuma, kadi yeye nkayandi wakadiambila bualu ebu kuadi bualu bua Tobiya ne Sanebalata bakamuha mbueshilu." 
Nehemiah6:13 Bakamuha mbueshilu bua kuntshinyisha bua meme kuenza bualu ebu bubi bua bobo bikale ne lumu elu lubi lua kunfuisha nʼalu bundu. 
Nehemiah6:14 Nzambi wanyi, uvuluke Tobiya ne Sanebalata bu mudi bienzedi biabo; uvuluke Noadaya muprofete mukashi ne baprofete bakuabo badi bakeba kuntshinyisha." 
Nehemiah6:15 Nunku lumbu luakashika mu matuku makumi abidi ne atanu a ngondo wa Elula, tuakashikisha mudimu mu matuku makumi atanu ne abidi." 
Nehemiah6:16 Hakunvua bena lukuna betu bonso lumu elu, bisamba bionso bia bantu biakatunyunguluka biakatshina, biakadi ne bundu bunene ku mesu; bualu bua bobo bakajingulula ne, Nzambi wabo nguakenzesha mudimu eu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Mu matuku au bantu banene ba mu Yuda bakatumina Tobiya mikanda ya bungi, ne yeye kabidi wakabatumina mikanda." 
Nehemiah6:18 Bualu bua bantu ba bungi ba mu Yuda bakaditshiha kudiye bualu bua yeye wakadi muku wa Shekanya, muana wa Ala; Yehohanana, muana wandi mulume, wakadi mubake muana mukashi wa Meshulama, muana wa Belekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Bobo bakangambila malu andi mimpe, bakamuambila mei anyi kabidi. Tobiya wakantumina mikanda bua kuntshinyisha nʼai." 
Nehemiah7:1 Hakamanabo lumbu ne hakelabo bibi ne hakasungulabo batuadi ba bintu ne bimbi ba misambu ne Bena Lewi," 
Nehemiah7:2 nakasungula muanʼetu Hanani ne Hananya, mulami wa nsubu wa mukelenge, balami ba Yelushalema, bualu bua Hananya wakadi muntu wa kueyemenyibua, wakatamba bakuabo kutshina Nzambi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Nakabambila ne, Kanunzuludi bibi bia ku Yelushalema anu habanda diba mulu; nuinshile bibi hatshidiku balami, bele nsahi, nusungule batentekedi ba munkatshi mua Bena Yelushalema, muntu ne muntu mu muaba wandi, muntu yonso ikale buludiludi ne nsubu wandi." 
Nehemiah7:4 Musoko wakadi munene ne mubaluluke, kadi bantu bakadimu bakadi banya-banya, kabakanza kuibakamu nsubu." 
Nehemiah7:5 Nzambi wanyi wakateka bualu mu mutshima wanyi bua kusangisha bantu banene ne bakokeshi ne bantu bonso bua kubabala ku milongo ya bankambua babo. Nakasangana mukanda wa kulondolola kua bankambua ba bantu bakadianjila kuhingana, malu akadi mafundamu nunku:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Aba mbantu ba luseke bakumuka mu buhika, bakadi bangatshibue, bakadi Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, muangate, bakahingana ku Yelushalema ne ku Yuda, muntu yonso ku mosoko wandi;" 
Nehemiah7:7 bakalua ne Zelubabela ne Yeshua ne Nehemiya ne Azaya ne Lâmeya ne Nahamani ne Môdekai ne Bileshana ne Misepelete ne Bigewai ne Nehuma ne Bâna. Abu mbungi bua balume ba mu Bena Isalele: 
Nehemiah7:8 Bana ba Palosha binunu bibidi ne lukama ne makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:9 Bana ba Shefataya nkama isatu ne makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:10 Bana ba Ala nkama isambombo ne makumi atanu ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:11 Bana ba Pahata-moaba ne bana ba Yeshua ne Yoaba binunu bibidi ne nkama muanda mukulu ne dikumi ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:12 Bana ba Elama tshinunu tshimue ne nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ne banai. 
Nehemiah7:13 Bana ba Zatu nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi anai ne batanu. 
Nehemiah7:14 Bana ba Zakai nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asambombo. 
Nehemiah7:15 Bana ba Binui nkama isambombo ne makumi anai ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:16 Bana ba Bebai nkama isambombo ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:17 Bana ba Azagada binunu bibidi ne nkama isatu ne makumi abidi ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:18 Bana ba Adonikama nkama isambombo ne makumi asambombo ne muanda mutekete. 
Nehemiah7:19 Bana ba Bigewai binunu bibidi ne makumi asambombo ne muanda mutekete. 
Nehemiah7:20 Bana ba Adina nkama isambombo ne makumi atanu ne batanu. 
Nehemiah7:21 Bana ba Atê wa Hezikiya makumi tshitema ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:22 Bana ba Hashuma nkama isatu ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:23 Bana ba Bezai nkama isatu ne makumi abidi ne banai. 
Nehemiah7:24 Bana ba Halifa lukama ne dikumi ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:25 Bana ba Gibeona makumi tshitema ne batanu. 
Nehemiah7:26 Bantu ba mu Beteleheme ne ba mu Netofa lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:27 Bantu ba mu Anatota lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:28 Bantu ba mu Bete-azamawete makumi anai ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:29 Bantu ba mu Kîyata-yalima ne ba mu Kefila ne ba mu Belota nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi anai ne basatu. 
Nehemiah7:30 Bantu ba mu Lama ne ba mu Geba nkama isambombo ne makumi abidi ne umue. 
Nehemiah7:31 Bantu ba mu Mikemasa lukama ne makumi abidi ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:32 Bantu ba mu Betele ne ba mu Ai lukama ne makumi abidi ne basatu. 
Nehemiah7:33 Bantu ba mu Nebo mukuabo makumi atanu ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:34 Bana ba Elama mukuabo tshinunu ne nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ne banai. 
Nehemiah7:35 Bana ba Halima nkama isatu ne makumi abidi. 
Nehemiah7:36 Bantu ba mu Yeleko nkama isatu ne makumi anai ne batanu. 
Nehemiah7:37 Bana ba Lodo ne ba Hadidi ne ba Ono nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi abidi ne umue. 
Nehemiah7:38 Bana ba Sena binunu bisatu ne nkama tshitema ne makumi asatu. 
Nehemiah7:39 Bakuidi: Bana ba Yedaya ba mu nsubu wa Yeshua nkama tshitema ne makumi muanda mutekete ne basatu. 
Nehemiah7:40 Bana ba Imê tshinunu ne makumi atanu ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:41 Bana ba Pashû tshinunu tshimue ne nkama ibidi ne makumi anai ne muanda mutekete. 
Nehemiah7:42 Bana ba Halima tshinunu ne dikumi ne muanda mutekete. 
Nehemiah7:43 Bena Lewi: Bana ba Yeshua ne ba Kadamiele, bana ba Hodewa, makumi muanda mutekete ne banai." 
Nehemiah7:44 Bimbi ba misambu: Bana ba Asafa lukama ne makumi anai ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:45 Batuadi ba majitu: Bana ba Shaluma ne bana ba Atê ne bana ba Talemona ne bana ba Akuba ne bana ba Hatita ne bana ba Shobai lukama ne makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah7:46 Bena Netinima: Bana ba Ziha, bana ba Hasufa, bana ba Tabaota," 
Nehemiah7:47 bana ba Kelosa, bana ba Sia, bana ba Padona," 
Nehemiah7:48 bana ba Lebana, bana ba Hagaba, bana ba Salamai," 
Nehemiah7:49 bana ba Hanana, bana ba Gidele, bana ba Gahâ," 
Nehemiah7:50 bana ba Leaya, bana ba Lesini, bana ba Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 bana ba Gazama, bana ba Uza, bana ba Pasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 bana ba Besai, bana ba Meunima, bana ba Nefushesima," 
Nehemiah7:53 bana ba Bakabuka, bana ba Hakufa, bana ba Hâhû," 
Nehemiah7:54 bana ba Baselita, bana ba Mehida, bana ba Hâsha," 
Nehemiah7:55 bana ba Bâkosa, bana ba Sisela, bana ba Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 bana ba Nesia, bana ba Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Bana ba bena mudimu ba Solomo: Bana ba Sotai, bana ba Sofeleta, bana ba Pelida," 
Nehemiah7:58 bana ba Yâla, bana ba Dâkona, bana ba Gidele," 
Nehemiah7:59 bana ba Shefataya, bana ba Hatila, bana ba Pokeleta-hasebayima, bana ba Amona." 
Nehemiah7:60 Bena Netinima bonso ne bana ba bena mudimu ba Solomo bakadi nkama isatu ne makumi tshitema ne babidi. 
Nehemiah7:61 Aba mbantu bakafuma mu Tele-mela, Tele-hâsha, Keluba, Adona ne Imê, bobo kabakadi mua kujadika biota biabo ne bankambua babo ne tunkanuniuna tuabo ne, Tudi Bena Isalele:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Bana ba Delaya, bana ba Tobiya, bana ba Nekoda nkama isambombo ne makumi anai ne babidi." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ba bakuidi: Bana ba Hobaya, bana ba Hakosa, bana ba Bâzilai, wakabaka mukashi wa bana bakashi ba Bâzilai, Muena Gilada, wakidikibua ku dina diabo." 
Nehemiah7:64 Bobo bakakeba mena abo mu mikanda ya kulondolola kua bankambua, kadi kabakâsangana; nunku bakadi banyanguke, bakumushibua ku mudimu wa buakuidi." 
Nehemiah7:65 Gouverneur wakabambila ne, Kanuena mua kudia bintu bia tshijila anu bimana muakuidi ne Ulima ne Tumima bua kukonka." 
Nehemiah7:66 Buonso buabo bakadi binunu makumi anai ne bibidi ne nkama isatu ne makumi asambombo," 
Nehemiah7:67 ha mutu ha bena mudimu babo balume ne bena mudimu babo bakashi bakadi binunu muanda mutekete ne nkama isatu ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete; bakadi ne bimbi ba misambu ne balume ne bakashi nkama ibidi ne makumi anai ne batanu. 
Nehemiah7:68 Tubalu tuabo tuakadi nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asatu ne tusambombo; nyama yabo ya mpunda nkama ibidi ne makumi anai ne itanu; 
Nehemiah7:69 tumelo tuabo tuakadi nkama mai ne makumi asatu ne tutanu; nyama yabo ya mpunda yakadi binunu bisambombo ne nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi abidi. 
Nehemiah7:70 Bakuabo ba ku mutu kua biota bia batatuʼabo bakafila bintu biabo bia kuenza nʼabi mudimu. Gouverneur wakafila dariques ya or tshinunu ne malonga makumi atanu ne bilulu bia bakuidi nkama itanu ne makumi asatu mu tshibutshilu tshia mudimu. 
Nehemiah7:71 Bakuabo ba ku mutu kua biota bia batatuʼabo bakafila mu tshibutshilu tshia mudimu dariques ya or binunu makumi abidi ne mines ya argent binunu bibidi ne nkama ibidi. 
Nehemiah7:72 Bakuabo bakafila dariques ya or binunu makumi abidi ne mines ya argent binunu bibidi ne bilulu bia bakuidi makumi asambombo ne muanda mutekete. 
Nehemiah7:73 Nunku bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne batuadi ba majitu ne bimbi ba misambu ne Bena Netinima ne bantu bakuabo ba munkatshi muabo ne Bena Isalele bonso bakashikama mu misoko yabo. Hakalua ngondo wa muanda mutekete, Bena Isalele bakadi mu misoko yabo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Bantu bonso bakadisangisha bu muntu umue mu muaba mubaluluke wakadi ku mpala kua tshibi tshia ku luseke lua mai; bakambila Ezela mufundi ne, Ulue ne mukanda wa mikenji ya Mose yakambila Yehowa Bena Isalele." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ezela muakuidi wakalua ne mukanda wa mikenji ku mesu kua bantu bakadi badisangishaku ne balume ne bakashi ne bonso bakadi ne matshu a kunvua mu dituku dia kumudilu dia ngondo wa muanda mutekete. 
Nehemiah8:3 Yeye wakaubala mu muaba mubaluluke wakadi ku mpala kua tshibi tshia ku luseke lua mai, ku dinda tô ne ku munda munya, ku mpala kua balume ne bakashi ne kua bonso bakadi ne matshu a kunvua; bantu bonso bakateleja matshu abo ku mei a mu mukanda wa mikenji." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezela mufundi wakimana ha tshiambidilu tshia mabaya tshiakalongololabo bua bualu ebu; Matitiya ne Shema ne Anaya ne Uliya ne Hilekiya ne Mâseya bakimana ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume; Pedaya ne Mishaele ne Malekiya ne Hashuma ne Hashebadana ne Zekâya ne Meshulama bakimana ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi. 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezela wakavungulula mukanda ku mesu kua bantu, bualu bua yeye wakadi ku muaba wakadi kulu kua bonso; hakavungululeye mukanda, bantu bonso bakimana kulu;" 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezela wakavudishila Yehowa Nzambi munene disanka. Bantu bonso bakamuitaba ne, Amen, Amen, bele maboko abo mulu; bakinyika mitu yabo, bakatendelela Yehowa ne mesu abo minangile hanshi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Yeshua ne Bani ne Shelebaya ne Yamina ne Akuba ne Shabetai ne Hodaya ne Mâseya ne Kelita ne Azaya ne Yozabada ne Hanana ne Pelaya ne Bena Lewi bakajingulula bantu mikenji; bantu bonso bakimana mu muaba wabo. 
Nehemiah8:8 Bakadi babala mu mukanda, mu mikenji ya Nzambi, bakajingulula biakane; bakayijinguluila bantu kabidi, nunku buonso buabo bakunvua biakane." 
Nehemiah8:9 Nehemiya gouverneur wakadi ne Ezela muakuidi ne mufundi ne Bena Lewi, bakadi bayisha bantu, bakambila bantu bonso ne, Dituku edi didi dia tshijila kudi Yehowa Nzambi wenu, kanujingi, kanutedi mua dî. Bualu bua bantu bonso bakadi badila hakunvuabo mei a mu mikenji." 
Nehemiah8:10 Hashishe yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu kuenu, nudie bintu bia manyi, mume bintu bidi bishemakane, nutumine bantu badi hatuhu bintu bia kudia; bualu bua edi ndituku dia tshijila kudi Mukelenge wetu; kanunyingalashi mitshima yenu, bualu bua disanka dia Yehowa mbukole buenu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Nunku Bena Lewi bakahuwisha bantu bonso ne, Nuikale talalâ, bualu bua edi ndituku dia tshijila, kanunyingalashi mitshima yenu." 
Nehemiah8:12 Nunku bantu bonso bakaya kuabo bua kudiabo ne bua kunuabo ne bua kutuminabo bantu bakadi hatuhu bintu bia kudia ne bua kusankabo, bualu bua bobo bakajingulula mei akabambilabo." 
Nehemiah8:13 Mu dituku dibidi bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia bantu bonso ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadisangisha kudi Ezela mufundi bua kunvuabo mei a mikenji mene. 
Nehemiah8:14 Bakasangana bualu mu mukanda wa mikenji buakambila Yehowa Mose bua Bena Isalele bashikame mu bitandatanda, badie bidia bia disanka mu ngondo wa muanda mutekete;" 
Nehemiah8:15 bua bobo batumine bantu bonso mu misoko yonso ne mu Yelushalema ne, Yai bienu ku mikuna, nuangate matamba a olive ne matamba a olive ya muitu, ne matamba a mitshi ya myrte ne malala a mabue, ne matamba a mitshi mikuabo bua kuenza nʼau bitandatanda bu muakafundabo." 
Nehemiah8:16 Nunku bantu bakaya, bakalua nʼau, bakadienzela bitandatanda, muntu ne muntu ha mutu ha nsubu wandi ne mu mpangu yabo ne mu mpangu ya ku nsubu wa Nzambi ne mu muaba mubaluluke wakadi ku mpala kua tshibi tshia ku luseke lua mai ne mu muaba mubaluluke wakadi ku mpala kua tshibi tshia Efelayima." 
Nehemiah8:17 Bantu bonso bakadi bafume mu buhika bakenza bitandatanda, bakashikama mu bitandatanda; bualu bua Bena Isalele kabakanza kuenza nunku ku matuku a Yoshua, muana wa Nuna, tô ne ku dituku edi. Bakadi ne disanka dinene be." 
Nehemiah8:18 Yeye wakabala mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Nzambi ku dituku ku dituku, ku dituku dia kumudilu tô ne ku dituku dia nshikidilu. Bakadia bidia bia disanka matuku muanda mutekete; dituku dia muanda mukulu diakadi dituku dinene dia disangisha, bu muakadi mukenji mujadike." 
Nehemiah9:1 Bena Isalele bakadisangishaku mu dituku dia makumi abidi ne anai dia ngondo eu, bakajila bia kudia, baluate bilulu bikayabala, bakadiela luhuishi hamʼbidi." 
Nehemiah9:2 Bena Isalele bakadilamununa kudi bantu ba bende bonso, bakimana ha buabo batonde mibi yabo ne malu mabi akenza bankambua babo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Bakimana mu muaba wabo, bakabala mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Yehowa Nzambi wabo tshituha tshinai tshia dituku; mu tshituha tshinai tshikuabo bakatonda mibi yabo, bakatendelela Yehowa Nzambi wabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Hashishe Yeshua ne Bani ne Kadamiele ne Shebanya ne Buni ne Shelebaya ne Bani mukuabo ne Kenani bakimana ha tshibandilu tshia Bena Lewi, bakadila kudi Yehowa Nzambi wabo ne mei makole." 
Nehemiah9:5 Hashishe Bena Lewi, Yeshua ne Kadamiele ne Bani ne Hashabeneya ne Shelebaya ne Hodiya ne Shebanya ne Petehiya, bakamba ne, Jukai bienu, nuvudishile Yehowa Nzambi wenu disanka ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu. Bavudishile dina diebe dia butumbi disanka, didi ditumbishibue ha mutu ha masanka onso ne butumbi buonso." 
Nehemiah9:6 Wewe udi Yehowa, wewe nkayebe mene; wewe wakafuka diulu ne diulu dia mu diulu ne misumba yau yonso ne buloba ne bintu bionso bidimu ne mai manene ne bionso bidimu, wewe utu wabilama buonso buabi; misumba ya mu diulu idi ikutendelela." 
Nehemiah9:7 Wewe Yehowa Nzambi nguakasungula Abalama, nguakafuma nʼandi mu buloba bua Ula wa Bena Kasada, wakamuidika dina dia Abalahama;" 
Nehemiah9:8 wewe wakamusangana ne mutshima wa kukueyemena, wakahunga nʼandi tshihungidi bua kumuha buloba bua Bena Kanâna, bua Bena Hiti, bua Bena Amole, bua Bena Pelese, bua Bena Yebuse ne bua Bena Gîgashi, bua kubuha tunkanunuma tuandi; wewe wakenza mei ebe onso, bualu bua wewe udi muakane." 
Nehemiah9:9 Wewe wakatangila dikenga dia bankambua betu mu Ejipitu, wakunvua muadi wabo kukala kua mai a Dishiba Dikunze," 
Nehemiah9:10 wakalesha Palô ne bena mudimu bandi ne bantu bandi bonso bimanyinu ne malu a kukema, bualu bua wewe wakamanya ne, Bobo bakadi bafunyina batatu betu bulobo, ne wewe wakangata dina dinene bu mudi nʼadi lelu." 
Nehemiah9:11 Wewe wakahandulula mai ku mpala kuabo, nunku bakahita munkatshi mua mai manene ha buloba bume; wakela bakadi babalonda mu bunene bua mai bu mudibo bela dibue mu mai manene." 
Nehemiah9:12 Bualu bukuabo, wewe wakabalombola mu munya mu ditutu ne mu butuku mu dî tutu diakatema kahia bua kubatokeshila nshila wa kuakadibo ne bua kuya." 
Nehemiah9:13 Wewe wakumuka ku mukuna wa Sinai, wakahueka mu tshibanda, wakuakula nʼabo mu diulu, wakabaha mei majalame ne mikenji milelela ne mayisha mimpe ne mikandu," 
Nehemiah9:14 wewe wakabamanyisha dituku diebe dia Lumingu lua tshijila; wakabelela mikenji yebe ne mei ebe ne mikandu yebe kudi Mose muntu webe," 
Nehemiah9:15 wewe wakabaha bidia bia mu diulu bia kumana nʼabi nzala yabo, wakabahatuila mai mu mabue a kumana nʼau nyota yabo; wewe wakabelela mukenji bua bobo baye kuhiana buloba buwakabalaya bua kubahabu." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kadi bobo ne bankambua betu bakadisua, bakambula mpala yabo, kabakunvua mikenji yebe," 
Nehemiah9:17 bakabenga mua kuyitumikila, kabakelangana meji a malu a kukema awakenza munkatshi muabo; kadi bakambula mpala yabo; mu kutomboka kuabo bakadisunguila mulombodi wa kubahingisha mu buhika buabo. Kadi wewe udi Nzambi utu wasua kubuikidila bantu mibi yabo, udi ne diakalengele ne luse, kutu wakihata tshiji lubilu, udi mûle tente ne dinanga, kuakabalekela." 
Nehemiah9:18 Bulelela, hakadifudilabo kana ka ngombe, hakambabo ne, Eu nNzambi wetu wakatuluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu, ne hakakutatshishabo bikole," 
Nehemiah9:19 wewe mu bunene bua luse luebe kuakabalekela mu tshihela; ditutu diakadi dibalombola mu munya kadiakumuka kudibo, bua kubalombola mu nshila; ne ditutu diakadi ditema kahia butuku bua kubatokeshila nshila wa kuakadibo ne bua kuya kadiakumuka kudibo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wewe kabidi wakabaha Nyuma webe muimpe bua kubayisha, wewe kuakakandisha mana ebe mukana muabo, wewe wakabaha mai a kumana nʼau nyota yabo." 
Nehemiah9:21 Bulelela, wewe wakabalama mu tshihela bidimu makumi anai, kabakadi bakengela tshintu; bilulu biabo kabiakasunsuka ne makasa abo kakûla nansha." 
Nehemiah9:22 Wewe wakabaha makelenge ne ba ha buloba biwakababanyina bu muakadi bituha biabo; nunku bakahiana buloba bua Sihona ne buloba mene bua mukelenge wa Heshebona ne buloba bua Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wewe wakakumbasha tunkanunuma tuabo bu mitoto ya mu diulu; wewe wakalua nʼabo mu buloba buwakalaya bankambua babo ne, Nenubuhiane." 
Nehemiah9:24 Nunku Bena Isalele bakabuela, bakahiana buloba; wewe wakatekesha Bena Kanâna, bena buloba, ku mesu kuabo, wakafila bakelenge babo ne bena buloba mu bianza biabo, bua kuenza nʼabo bu muakasuabo." 
Nehemiah9:25 Bakanyenga misoko ya ngumbu ne buloba buimpe ne nsubu miule tente ne bintu biakane ne mena a mai akumbulabo ne madimi a tumuma tukese ne madimi a olive ne mitshi ya mamuma ya bungi; nunku bakadia, bakukuta, bakalonda, bakasenena, bakasanka bua buimpe buebe bunene." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kadi kabakatumikila dî diebe, bakakutombokela, bakakema mikenji yebe nyima, bakashiha baprofete bebe bakasua kubabela bua kukudimusha mitshima yabo kûdi kabidi; bakakutatshisha ne ntatu mikole." 
Nehemiah9:27 Nunku wewe wakabafila mu bianza bia bena lukuna babo, bakabakengesha; mu tshikondo tshia dikenga diabo hakadilabo kûdi, wewe wakabunvuila mu diulu; bu mudi bunene bua luse luebe wewe wakabaha basungidi bakabasungila mu bianza bia bena lukuna babo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kadi bakahetabo ditalala, bakenza malu mabi ku mesu kuebe kabidi; nunku wewe wakabashiya mu bianza bia bena lukuna babo bua kubakokeshabo; kadi hakakudimunabo mitshima ne hakadilabo kûdi, wewe wakabunvuila mu diulu; bua luse luebe lunene wewe wakabasungila misangu ya bungi," 
Nehemiah9:29 wewe wakabadimusha bua kubahingisha ku mikenji yebe kabidi. Kadi bobo bakadisua, kabakatumikila mikenji yebe, bakashiha mei ebe majalame (biâtumikila muntu, yeye neikale ne muoyo kudiu), bakasaka makaya, bakambula mpala yabo, kabakunvua." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kadi wewe wakabafuila luse bidimu bia bungi, wakabadimusha kudi Nyuma webe mukana mua baprofete bebe; kadi bobo kabakateleja matshu abo; nunku wewe wakabafila mu bianza bia bena maloba makuabo." 
Nehemiah9:31 Kadi hua luse luebe lunene wewe kuakababutula buonso buabo, kuakabalekela; bualu bua wewe udi Nzambi wa diakalengele ne wa luse." 
Nehemiah9:32 Nunku Nzambi wetu munene, Nzambi mukole ne wa dishina, utu walama bihungidi ne luse lujalame, dikenga edi dikole diakatukuata ne bakelenge betu ne bantu betu banene ne bakuidi betu ne baprofete betu ne batatu betu ne bantu bebe bonso kadikadi dikese ku mesu kuebe, ku tshikondo tshia bakelenge ba Ashû tô ne ku dituku edi." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kadi wewe udi muakane mu malu onso akatukuata; wakatuenzela anu malu a bushuwa, kadi tuetu tuakenza bibi;" 
Nehemiah9:34 bualu hua bakelenge betu ne bantu betu banene ne bakuidi betu ne batatu betu kabakatumikila mikenji yebe, kabakunvua mei ebe ne himanyishilu biebe biwakabadimusha nʼabi." 
Nehemiah9:35 Bobo kabakakukuatshila mudimu mu bukelenge buabo, ne mu buimpe buebe bunene buwakabaha ne mu buloba bunene buakane buwakafila ku mpala kuabo, kabakalekela malu mabi abo." 
Nehemiah9:36 Mona, tuetu tudi bena mudimu lelu eu, ne bua buloha buwakaha bankambua betu bua kudiabo mamuma abu ne bintu biabu biakane, mona, tuetu tudi bena mudimu mu buloba ebu." 
Nehemiah9:37 Budi bulua ne bintu bia bungi kudi bakelenge bawakateka ku mutu kuetu bua malu mabi etu; bobo badi ne bukokeshi bua mibidi yetu ne bua bimuna bietu, bu mudi disua diabo, ne tuetu tudi mu dikenga dikole." 
Nehemiah9:38 Kadi bua malu â onso netujadike nʼebe tshihungidi, netutshifunde, bantu betu banene ne Bena Lewi betu ne bakuidi betu nebatekeku tshimanyinu tshiabo." 
Nehemiah10:1 Bantu bakateka tshimanyinu tshiabo ku tshihungidi bakadi Nehemiya gouverneur, muana wa Hakaleya, ne Sedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 Selaya, Azaya, Yelemiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashû, Amalia, Malakiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatusha, Shebanya, Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Halima, Melemota, Obadaya," 
Nehemiah10:6 Danyele, Ginetona, Baluka," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshulama, Abiya, Miyamina," 
Nehemiah10:8 Mâzaya, Bilegai, ne Shemaya: aba bakadi bakuidi." 
Nehemiah10:9 Bena Lewi; Yeshua, muana wa Azanaya, ne Binui, umue wa bana ba Henadada, ne Kadamiele," 
Nehemiah10:10 ne bana babo, Shebanya, Hodiya, Kelita, Pelaya, Hanana," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Lehoba, Hashabeya," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zaku, Shelebaya, Shebanya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodiya, Bani ne Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Bakadi ku mutu kua bantu: Palosha, Pahata-moaba, Elama, Zatu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Azagada, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigewai, Adina," 
Nehemiah10:17 Atê, Hezikiya, Azû," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodiya, Hashuma, Bezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Halifa, Anatota, Nobai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magapiasha, Meshulama, Hezi," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshezabele, Zadoka, Yadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelataya, Hanana, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hananya, Hashuba," 
Nehemiah10:24 Halohesha, Pileha, Shobeka," 
Nehemiah10:25 Lehuma, Hashabena, Mâseya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia, Hanana, Anana," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Halima ne Bâna." 
Nehemiah10:28 Bantu bakuabo ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne batuadi ba majitu ne bimbi ba misambu ne Bena Netinima ne bonso bakadilamununa kudi bena buloba bua kulondabo mikenji ya Nzambi ne bakashi babo ne bana babo balume ne bana babo bakashi ne muntu yonso wakadi ne lungenyi lua kujingulula malu 
Nehemiah10:29 bakalamata kudi bana babo ne kudi bantu babo banene, bakadiela mulau, bakaditshiha bua kulondabo mikenji ya Nzambi yakabambileye kudi Mose, muntu wa Nzambi, ne bua kutumikilabo mikenji yonso ya Yehowa, Mukelenge wetu, ne mikenji yandi mijalame ne mei andi mafunda." 
Nehemiah10:30 Katufidi bana betu bakashi kudi bena buloba, katuangatshidi bana betu balume bakashi kudibo;" 
Nehemiah10:31 bialua bena buloba kutudi ne bintu biabo anyi blé yabo bua kutubanyishabi dituku dia lumingu, katuena tubiula dituku dia lumingu anyi dituku dikuabo dia tshijila; netujile tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, netulekelelangane mabanza." 
Nehemiah10:32 Tuakadielela mikenji kabidi bua kufila tshituha tshia nshekele bua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu; 
Nehemiah10:33 ne bua kufila bintu bia mampa ne bia mulambu wa bukula ne bia dituku dia lumingu ne bia ngondo mihia-mihia ne bia bidia bia disanka ne bia bintu bia tshijila ne bia milambu ya kubuikidila nʼai Bena Isalele mibi yabo ne bia mudimu wonso wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu. 
Nehemiah10:34 Tuetu ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne bantu tuakela nshobo bua mulambu wa nkunyi bua kulua nʼau mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu, bu muakadi biota bia batatuʼetu bua kuwosha ha tshioshelu tshia Yehowa Nzambi wetu mu bikondo biakasungulabo ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, bu muakafundabo mu mikenji;" 
Nehemiah10:35 ne bua kulua ne bintu bia diambedi bia mu buloba buetu ne mamuma a diambedi a mitshi yonso, ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, mu nsubu wa Yehowa;" 
Nehemiah10:36 ne bua kulua ne banʼa bute ba bana baledibue ne ba bimuna, bu muakadibo bafunde mu mikenji, ne ba ngombe ne ba mikoko, mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu kudi bakuidi badi benza mudimu mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu;" 
Nehemiah10:37 ne bua kulua ne bintu bia diambedi bia mampa etu ne bia milambu ya kukuha ne bia mamuma a mitshi yetu yonso ne bia nvinyo mihia-mihia ne bia manyi mahia-mahia kudi bakuidi mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu; ne bua kulua kudi Bena Lewi ne tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionso bidi bimena mu buloba buetu; bualu bua Bena Lewi batu bangata tshia dikumi tshia bintu bietu bidi bimena mu buloba mu misoko yonso. 
Nehemiah10:38 Muakuidi, muana wa Alona, neikale ne Bena Lewi hangatabo tshia dikumi; Bena Lewi nebalue ne tshia dikumi tshia mu bintu bia tshia dikumi, mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu mu tshibutshilu tshiandi." 
Nehemiah10:39 Bualu budi Bena Isalele ne Bena Lewi nʼabu mbua kulua ne milambu ya bintu bidibo bakuha bia blé ne ya nvinyo mihia-mihia ne ya manyi mu nsubu idi bintu bia tshijila, ne kudi bakuidi badi benza mudimu, ne kudi batuadi ne kudi bimbi ba misambu; katuena tulekela nsubu wa Nzambi wetu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Bantu banene bakashikama mu Yelushalema; bantu bakuabo bakela nshobo ya kusungulabo umue wa ku dikumi bua kushikameye mu Yelushalema, musoko wa tshijila, ne bakuabo tshitema bakashikama mu misoko mikuabo." 
Nehemiah11:2 Bantu bakuabo bakavudishila bantu bakadi ne disua dia kushikama mu Yelushalema disanka. 
Nehemiah11:3 Aba mbakelenge ba luseke bakashikama mu Yelushalema; kadi Bena Isalele ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi ne Bena Netinima ne bana ba bena mudimu ba Solomo bakashikama mu misoko ya mu Yuda, muntu ne muntu mu buhianyi buandi." 
Nehemiah11:4 Kadi bakuabo ba Bena Yuda ne ba Bena Benyamina bakashikama mu Yelushalema. Bena Yuda bakadi Ataya, muana wa Uziya, muana wa Zekâya, muana wa Amaliya, muana wa Shefataya, muana wa Mahalalele wa mu bana ba Pelese;" 
Nehemiah11:5 ne Mâseya, muana wa Bahika, muana wa Kole-hose, muana wa Hazaya, muana wa Adaya, muana wa Yoyaliba, muana wa Zekâya, muana wa Muena Shiloa." 
Nehemiah11:6 Bana bonso ba Pelese bakashikama mu Yelushalema bakadi bena bukitu nkama inai ne makumi asambombo ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah11:7 Aba mbana ba Benyamina: Salu, muana wa Meshulama, muana wa Yoede, muana wa Pedaya, muana wa Kolaya, muana wa Mâseya, muana wa Itele, muana wa Yeshaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Gabai ne Salai bakadi ku nyima kuabo bu bantu nkama tshitema ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu. 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoele, muana wa Zikeli, wakadi kahita kabo; Yuda, muana wa Hasenua, wakadi muibidi ku mutu kua musoko." 
Nehemiah11:10 Bakuidi bakadi nunku: Yedaya, muana wa Yoyaliba, ne Yakina," 
Nehemiah11:11 Selaya, muana wa Hilekiya, muana wa Meshulama, muana wa Sadoka, muana wa Melayota, muana wa Ahituba, wakadi ku mutu kua malu a mu nsubu wa Nzambi;" 
Nehemiah11:12 bana babo bakadi benza mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi bakadi nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi abidi ne babidi; Adaya, muana wa Yeholama, muana wa Pelalaya, muana wa Amasi, muana wa Zekâya, muana wa Pashû, muana wa Malakiya;" 
Nehemiah11:13 bana babo bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatuʼabo bakadi nkama ibidi ne makumi anai ne babidi; Amashai, muana wa Azalele, muana wa Azai, muana wa Meshilemota, muana wa Imê," 
Nehemiah11:14 bana babo, bena bukitu, bakadi lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu; Zabediele, muana wa Hagedolima, wakadi kahita kabo." 
Nehemiah11:15 Ba Bena Lewi: Shemaya, muana wa Hashuba, muana wa Azelikama, muana wa Hashabeya, muana wa Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Shabetai ne Yozabada, bantu banene ba munkatshi mua Bena Lewi, bakadi ku mutu kua mudimu wa ha mbelu ha nsubu wa Nzambi;" 
Nehemiah11:17 Matanaya, muana wa Mika, muana wa Zabedi, muana wa Asafa, wakadi muntu munene wakabanga kutendelela kua kusakidila nʼaku Nzambi; Bakabukiya wakadi muibidi munkatshi mua bana babo; Abeda, muana wa Shamua, muana wa Galala, muana wa Yedutuna." 
Nehemiah11:18 Bena Lewi honso ba mu musoko wa tshijila bakadi nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mukulu ne banai. 
Nehemiah11:19 Batuadi ba majitu bakadi Akuba ne Talemona ne bana babo bakadi balame bibi bia musoko bakadi lukama ne makumi muanda mutekete ne babidi. 
Nehemiah11:20 Bena Isalele bakuabo bonso ne bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadi mu misoko yonso ya Yuda, muntu ne muntu mu buhianyi buandi." 
Nehemiah11:21 Kadi benji ba mudimu wa mu ntempelo bakashikama mu Ofele; Ziha ne Gishepa bakadi ku mutu kuabo. 
Nehemiah11:22 Wakadi ku mutu kua Bena Lewi bakadi ku Yelushalema wakadi Uzi, muana wa Bani, muana wa Hashabeya, muana wa Matanaya, muana wa Mika, umue wa bana balume ba Asafa, bimbi ba misambu, wakadi ku mutu kua mudimu wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi." 
Nehemiah11:23 Mukelenge wakela mukenji bua bualu buabo bua kuha bimbi ba misambu bintu biakadibo nʼabi bualu buatshia-buatshia. 
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya, muana wa Meshezabele, wa mu bana ba Zela, muana wa Yuda, wakadi ha buihi ne mukelenge mu malu onso a bantu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Bena Yuda bakuabo bakashikama mu Kîyata-âba ne mu misoko yau ne madimi au, ne mu Dibona ne mu misoko yau, ne mu Yekabesele ne mu misoko yau," 
Nehemiah11:26 ne mu Yeshua ne mu Molada ne mu Bete-pelete," 
Nehemiah11:27 ne mu Hasâ-shuala, ne mu Bê-sheba ne mu misoko yau," 
Nehemiah11:28 ne mu Sikelaga, ne mu Mekona ne mu misoko yau," 
Nehemiah11:29 ne mu Enelimona ne mu Solea ne mu Yâmuta 
Nehemiah11:30 ne mu Zanoa ne mu Adulama ne mu misoko yai, ne mu Lakisha ne mu madimi au, ne mu Azeka ne mu misoko yau. Nunku bakashikama mu Bê-sheba tô ne ku tshibanda tshia Hinoma." 
Nehemiah11:31 Bena Benyamina kabidi bakashikama mu Geba ne mu Mikemasha ne mu Aya ne mu Betele ne mu misoko yai," 
Nehemiah11:32 ne mu Anatota ne mu Nobo ne mu Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 ne mu Hasô ne mu Lama ne mu Gitayima," 
Nehemiah11:34 ne mu Hadida ne mu Seboima ne mu Nebalata," 
Nehemiah11:35 ne mu Lodo ne mu Ono mu tshibanda tshia bansenda. 
Nehemiah11:36 Milongo ya Bena Lewi bakuabo ba mu Yuda bakalamata kudi Bena Benyamina. 
Nehemiah12:1 Aba mbakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakaya ne Zelubabela, muana wa Shealatiele, ne Yeshua: Selaya ne Yelemiya ne Ezela," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amalaya ne Maluki ne Hatusha," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekanya ne Lehuma ne Melemota," 
Nehemiah12:4 ne Ido ne Ginetoi ne Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 ne Miyamina ne Mâdaya ne Bilega," 
Nehemiah12:6 ne Shemaya ne Yoyaliba ne Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 ne Salu ne Amoka ne Hilekiya ne Yedaya. Aba mbakuidi banene ne bana babo ba mu matuku a Yeshua. 
Nehemiah12:8 Bena Lewi: Yeshua ne Binui ne Kadamiele ne Shelebaya ne Yuda ne Matanaya, yeye ne bana babo bakadi ku mutu kua kutendelela bua kusakidila nʼaku Nzambi." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakabukiya ne Uno, bana babo, bakadi ha buihi nʼabo mu midimu yabo." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshua wakalela Yoyakima, ne Yoyakima wakalela Eleyashiba, ne Eleyashiba wakalela Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 ne Yoyada wakalela Yonatana, ne Yonatana wakalela Yadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Mu matuku a Yoyakima bakuidi bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo: Melaya wa mu nsubu wa Selaya; Hananya wa mu nsubu wa Yelemiya; 
Nehemiah12:13 Meshulama wa mu nsubu wa Ezela; Yehohanana wa mu nsubu wa Amalia; 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonatana wa mu nsubu wa Maluki; Yosefe wa mu nsubu wa Shebanya; 
Nehemiah12:15 Adena wa mu nsubu wa Halima; Helekai wa mu nsubu wa Melayota; 
Nehemiah12:16 Zekâya wa mu nsubu wa Ido; Meshulama wa mu nsubu wa Ginetona; 
Nehemiah12:17 Zikeli wa mu nsubu wa Abiya; Piletai wa mu nsubu wa Minyamina wa Moadiya; 
Nehemiah12:18 Shamua wa mu nsubu wa Bilega; Yehonatana wa mu nsubu wa Shemaya; 
Nehemiah12:19 Matenai wa mu nsubu wa Yoyaliba; Uzi wa mu nsubu wa Yedaya; 
Nehemiah12:20 Kalai wa mu nsubu wa Salai; Ebê wa mu nsubu wa Amoka; 
Nehemiah12:21 Hashabeya wa mu nsubu wa Hilekiya; Netanele wa mu nsubu wa Yedaya. 
Nehemiah12:22 Bena Lewi bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu ya batatuʼabo mu matuku a Eleyashiba ne Yoyada ne Yohanana ne Yadua; bakuidi kabidi bakadi nunku mu bukokeshi bua Dayawesha, Muena Pelasa." 
Nehemiah12:23 Bena Lewi bakadi ku mutu kua biota bia batatuʼabo bakadi ne mena abo mafunda mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua bankambua tô ne ku matuku a Yohanana, muana wa Eleyashiba." 
Nehemiah12:24 Bena Lewi banene bakadi Hashebeya ne Shelebaya ne Yeshua, muana wa Kadamiele, ne bana babo bakadi nʼabo bua kutumbishabo ne bua kusakidilabo Nzambi bu muakadi mukenji wa Davidi, muntu wa Nzambi, muntu mu muaba wandi muntu mu muaba wandi." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matanaya ne Bakabukiya ne Obadaya ne Meshulama ne Talemona ne Akuba bakadi batuadi ba majitu, bakalama bibutshilu biakadi hehi ne bibi."
