Nehemiah12:26 Bakadiku mu matuku a Yoyakima, muana wa Yeshua, muana wa Yozadaka, ne mu matuku a Nehemiya gouver-neur, ne a Ezela muakuidi ne mufundi." 
Nehemiah12:27 Hakajidilabo lumbu lua Yelushalema, bakabikila Bena Lewi bakadi ku nseke yonso, bakalua nʼabo ku Yelushalema bua kubakuatshishabo mu disanka dia kujidila kua lumbu ne bua kusakidilabo Nzambi ne bua kumutumbishabo ne misambu ne makasa ne bisanji ne nzenze." 
Nehemiah12:28 Bana balume ba bimbi ba misambu bakadisangisha hohamue, bafume ku nseke yonso yakadi minyunguluke Yelushalema ne ku misoko ya Bena Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 ne ku Bete-gilegala ne ku nseke ya Geba ne Azamaweta; bualu bua bimbi ba misambu bakasa misoko yabo minyunguluke Yelushalema. 
Nehemiah12:30 Bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadilengesha; bakalengesha bantu ne bibi ne lumbu kabidi. 
Nehemiah12:31 Hashishe nakalua ne bantu banene ba mu Yuda ku lumbu, nakabatabulula mu bisumbu binene bibidi, bakenda mu milongo, basakidila Nzambi; tshisumbu tshimue tshiakaya ku tshianza tshia balume tshia ha lumbu tô ne ku tshibi tshia ku diala;" 
Nehemiah12:32 Hoshaya ne tshituha tshia bantu banene ba mu Yuda 
Nehemiah12:33 ne Azaya ne Ezela ne Meshulama 
Nehemiah12:34 ne Yuda ne Benyamina ne Shemaya ne Yelemiya 
Nehemiah12:35 ne bana ba bakuidi bakuabo bakabalonda ku nyima bela mpungi; Zekâya, muana wa Yonatana, muana wa Shemaya, muana wa Matanaya, muana wa Mikaya, muana wa Zaku, muana wa Asafa," 
Nehemiah12:36 ne bana babo Shemaya ne Azalele ne Milalai ne Gilalai ne Mai ne Netanele ne Yuda ne Hanani bakabalonda ku nyima ne bintu bia kuimba nʼabi misambu bia Davidi muntu wa Nzambi; Ezela mufundi wakadi ku mpala kuabo. 
Nehemiah12:37 Bakayila ku luseke lua ku tshibi tshia ku mpokolo wa mai, bakabanda ku tshibandilu tshia ku musoko wa Davidi ha lumbu ba mutu ha nsubu wa Davidi tô ne ku tshibi tshia ku mai ku luseke lua ku esete." 
Nehemiah12:38 Tshisumbu tshiabo tshikuabo tshiakadi tshienda tshisakidila Nzambi, tshiakaya kusangakena nʼabo; meme nakadi ku nyima kuabo ne tshituha tshia bantu ha lumbu ku mutu kua tshibumba tshia matanda tô ne ku lumbu lunene mene," 
Nehemiah12:39 ha mutu ha tshibi tshia Efelayima ne hehi ne tshibi tshia diambedi ne tshibi tshia ku luseke lua minyinyi ya mu mai ne tshibumba tshia Hananele ne tshibumba tshia Hamea tô ne ku tshibi tshia mikoko; bakimana talalâ ku tshibi tshia balami ba musoko. 
Nehemiah12:40 Nunku bîsumbu abi bibidi bia bimbi ba misambu biakimana mu nsubu wa Nzambi; meme ne tshituha tshia bantu banene tuakadiku," 
Nehemiah12:41 ne bakuidi Eleyakima, Mâseya, Minyamina, Mikaya, Eleyehoenai, Zekâya ne Hananya bakadi ne mpungi," 
Nehemiah12:42 ne Mâseya ne Shemaya ne Eleazâ ne Uzi ne Yehohanana ne Malakiya ne Elama ne Ezê. Bimbi ba misambu bakimba bikole ne Yizelaya wakadi ku mutu kuabo," 
Nehemiah12:43 Bakafila milambu ya bungi dituku adi, bakasanka, bualu bua Nzambi wakabasankisha ne disanka dinene; bakashi ne bana bakasanka kabidi; nunku bakunvua disanka dia mu Yelushalema kudi bakadi kule." 
Nehemiah12:44 Mu dituku adi bakasungula bantu bua kulamabo nsuhu ya bibutshilu ne bua kufilabo milambu ya kukuha ne ya mamuma a diambedi akahuolabo ne ya tshia dikumi, bua kubisangishabo mu madimi a ku mpenge ya misoko, bituha biakasuagulabo bia bakuidi ne Bena Lewi; bualu bua Bena Yuda bakasanka bua bakuidi ne Bena Lewi bakadi bakuata mudimu." 
Nehemiah12:45 Bakatumikila; mikenji ya Nzambi waho ne ya kudilengesha kuabo; bimbi ba misambu ne batuadi bakenza nunku, bu muakadi mukenji wa Davidi ne muanʼandi Solomo." 
Nehemiah12:46 Bualu bua mu matuku a kale a Davidi ne Asafa bakadi ne bantu banene ku mutu kua bimbi ba misambu ne misambu ya kutumbisha ne kusakidila nʼai Nzambi. 
Nehemiah12:47 Mu matuku a Zelubabela ne Nehemiya Bena Isalele bonso bakafila bintu bua bimbi ba misambu ne bua batuadi bia ku dituku ne ku dituku; bakabanyangana ne Bena Lewi bintu biabo kabidi; Bena Lewi bakaha bana ba Alona tshituha tshia bintu biabo. 
Nehemiah13:1 Mu dituku adi bakabala mu mukanda wa Mose mu matshu a bantu. Bakasangana bualu ebu bufunda ne, Muena Amona ne Muena Moaba kababuedi mu disangisha dia bantu ba Nzambi tshiendelele," 
Nehemiah13:2 bualu bua bobo kabakaya kusangakena ne Bena Isalele ne bidia ne mai; kadi bakaha Belâma mbueshilu bua kubeleye mulau; kadi Nzambi wetu wakakudimuna mulau bua kuluau disanka. 
Nehemiah13:3 Hakunvuabo mikenji, Bena Isalele bakadilamununa kudi bantu ba hatuhu." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ku mpala kua bualu ebu Eleyashiba muakuidi, wakasungulabo ku mutu kua nsubu mukuabo wa mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu, wakadi mulamatangane ne Tobiya," 
Nehemiah13:5 wakamulongoluela nsubu munene, muakadibo bateka milambu ya bukula ne manananshi ne malonga ne tshia dikumi tshia blé ne nyinyo mihia-mihia ne manyi biakahabo Bena Lewi ne bimbi ba misambu ne batuadi diambedi, ne milambu ya kukuha bua bakuidi, bu muakadi mukenji," 
Nehemiah13:6 Kadi mu tshikondo atshi tahionso meme tshiakadi mu Yelushalema; mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne bibidi tshia bukelenge bua Atashasete, mukelenge wa Babulona, nakaya kudi mukelenge. Hakahita matuku makuabo, nakebesha mukelenge bua luendu luanyi;" 
Nehemiah13:7 nakalua ku Yelushalema, nakunvua bualu bubi buakenza Eleyashiba bua Tobiya bua kumulongolueleye nsubu mu biendedi bia nsubu wa Nzambi." 
Nehemiah13:8 Bualu ebu buakatamba kunyingalasha mutshima wanyi; nunku nakumusha bintu bionso bia Tobiya mu nsubu. 
Nehemiah13:9 Hashishe nakela mukenji, bakalengesha nsubu; nakahingashamu malonga a mu nsubu wa Nzambi ne milambu ya bukula ne manananshi." 
Nehemiah13:10 Nakajingulula kabidi ne Bena Lewi kabakadi bangata bintu biabo; nunku Bena Lewi ne bimbi ba misambu, bakadi benza mudimu, bawahingana muntu ne muntu mu budimi buandi." 
Nehemiah13:11 Hashishe nakatandangana ne bakokeshi, nakabebesha ne, Nsubu wa Nzambi udi muledibue hua tshinyi? Nakabasangisha bohamue, nakabateka mu miaba yabo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Hashishe Bena Yuda bonso bakalua ne tshia dikumi tshia blé ne tshia nyinyo mihia-mihia ne tshia manyi mu nsubu ya bibutshilu. 
Nehemiah13:13 Nakasungula balami ba mutu ha bibutshilu: Shelemeya muakuidi ne Sadoka mufundi ne Pedaya, umue wa Bena Lewi, ne Hanana, muana wa Zakû, muana wa Matanaya, wakadi nʼabo kabidi, bualu bua bobo bakadi babadibue ne mbadi beyemenyibue; bakadi ne mudimu wa kuabanyina bana babo bintu." 
Nehemiah13:14 Nzambi wanyi, unvuluke mu bualu ebu; kujimishi bienzedi bianyi bimpe binakenza bua nsubu wa Nzambi wanyi bua mudimu wandi ku mesu kuebe." 
Nehemiah13:15 Mu matuku au nakatangila Bena Yuda bakuabo bakame tumuma tua nvinyo dituku dia lumingu, basuike bisumbu bia blé, babiteke ha nyima ha nyama ya mpunda; bakadi balua ne nyinyo ne tumuma tukese ne nfigi ne bintu bikuabo ku Yelushalema dituku dia lumingu; meme nakabadimusha mu dituku diakadibo bahana bintu." 
Nehemiah13:16 Bena Tulo bakuabo bakadiku, bakalua ne minyinyi ya mu mai ne bintu bionso, bakabibanyisha kudi Bena Yuda mu Yelushalema dituku dia lumingu." 
Nehemiah13:17 Hashishe nakatandangana ne bantu banene ba mu Yuda, nakabebesha ne, Nudi nuenza bualu ebu bubi bua kunyanga dituku dia lumingu bua tshinyi?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Bankambua benu kabakenza nunku, anyi? Nzambi wetu kakatukengesha ne musoko eu bua bualu ebu, anyi? Kadi nuenu nudi nutamba kumuenesha tshiji kudi Bena Isalele hanuanyanga dituku dia lumingu." 
Nehemiah13:19 Nunku diambedi diba kadiyi dianze kubuela dituku dia lumingu, nakela mukenji bua kuimbilabo bibi, kababiunzuludi tô ne hahita dituku dia lumingu; nakateka bena mudimu banyi bakuabo ku bibi, kabitabushi bua muntu abuele ne bujitu dituku dia lumingu." 
Nehemiah13:20 Nunku bendi ba mushinga ne bahanyishanganyi ba bintu bakalala ne bintu biabo ku mbelu kua Yelushalema nansha musangu umue nansha ibidi. 
Nehemiah13:21 Hashishe nakabadimusha, nakabakonka ne, Nudi nulala ku mbelu kua musoko bua tshinyi? Binuenza nunku kabidi meme nennukuate. Ku tshikondo atshi kabakalua dituku dia lumingu kabidi." 
Nehemiah13:22 Nakelela Bena Lewi mukenji bua kudilengeshabo ne bua bobo balame ku bibi, bajidile dituku dia lumingu. Nzambi wanyi, unvuluke bua bualu ebu kabidi, unfuile luse bu mudi bunene bua dinanga diebe." 
Nehemiah13:23 Mu matuku au kabidi nakamona ne Bena Yuda bakadi babake bakashi ba Bena Ashedodo ne Bena Amona ne Bena Moaba; 
Nehemiah13:24 bana babo baledibue bakakula tshituha tshia muaku wa Bena Ashedodo, kabakamanya mua kuakula muaku wa Bena Yuda, kadi bakakula miaku ya bantu ne ya bantu." 
Nehemiah13:25 Nunku nakatanda nʼabo, nakabela mulau, nakabakuma, nakatua nsuki yabo, nakabatshihisha kudi Nzambi ne, Kanufidi bana benu bakashi kudi bana babo balume, kanuangatshidi bana benu balume bakashi kudibo, kanudiangatshidibo nuenu kabidi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Solomo, mukelenge wa Bena Isalele, kakenza bibi mu malu â, anyi? Kadi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bungi bia bantu kamuakadi muikale mukelenge bu yeye, wakadi munangibue kudi Nzambi wandi, ne Nzambi wakamuvuisha mukelenge ku mutu kua Bena Isalele bonso; kadi bakashi ba bende bakamuenzesha yeye mene malu mabi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Tuetu netununvuile bua nuenu nuenze bualu ebu bubi bunene buonso ku mesu kua Nzambi wetu bua kubaka bakashi ba bende, anyi?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Umue wa bana balume ba Yoyada, muana wa Eleyashiba muakuidi munene, wakadi muku wa Sanebalata, Muena Holona; nunku nakamuihata ku mesu kuanyi." 
Nehemiah13:29 Nzambi wanyi, ubavuluke bualu bua bobo bakanyanga buakuidi ne tshihungidi tshia buakuidi ne tshia Bena Lewi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Nunku nakabalengesha kudi bantu ba bende bonso, nakasungila bakuidi ne Bena Lewi midimu yabo, muntu ne muntu mu mudimu wandi," 
Nehemiah13:31 ne bua milambu ya nkunyi, ku misangu yakasungulabo, bua mamuma a diambedi. Nzambi wanyi, unvuluke bua kungenzela bimpe." 
Esther1:1 Mu matuku a Ahashawelosha (Ahashawelosha eu nguakakokesha bantu ku Inde tô ne ku Atiopa ba mu nseke lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete)," 
Esther1:2 mu matuku au mene hakashikama Ahashawelosha mu nkuasa wa bukelenge buandi wakadi mu nsubu wandi wa mu Shushana," 
Esther1:3 mu tshidimu tshisatu tshia bukokeshi buandi yeye wakalambishila bantu bandi banene ne bena mudimu bandi bidia bia disanka; bena bukole ba Bena Pelasa ne Bena Madai, bantu banene ne bana ba bakelenge ba mu nseke yonso, bakadi ku mpala kuandi;" 
Esther1:4 yeye wakabalesha bubanji bua butumbi, ne bu mudiye ne buneme mu bukelenge, matuku a bungi bu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu mene." 
Esther1:5 Hakahita matuku â, mukelenge wakalambishila bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi mu nsubu wandi wa mu Shushana, ne banene ne bakese, bidia bia disanka, mu tshiendedi tshia mu tshibunda tshia ku mbalasa wa mukelenge matuku muanda mutekete." 
Esther1:6 Bakalembelesha bilulu bitoke ne bia mai a matamba ne bia bleu bilamakasha ne mionshi ya lin mikunzubile ku nkanu ya argent, misuika ku makunshi a mabue a marbre; matanda akadi a or ne a argent mateke ha tshiendedi tshia mabue a marbre makunze ne matoke ne makunzubile ne mafike." 
Esther1:7 Bakabanuisha nvinyo mu makoho a or (dikoho ha buadi dikoho ha buadi), bakadi ne nvinyo ya bukelenge ya bungi bu muakadi bubanji bua mukelenge." 
Esther1:8 Bakanua nvinyo bu muakadi mukenji; kawakadi wa ku bukole, bualu bua mukelenge wakadianjila kuelela bakadi ku mutu kua nsubu wandi mukenji bua kuenzabo bu muakadi disua dia muntu ne muntu." 
Esther1:9 Washeti, mukelenge mukashi, wakalambishila bakashi bakadi nʼandi mu nsubu wa bukelenge wakadi wa mukelenge Ahashawelosha bidia bia disanka." 
Esther1:10 Mu dituku dia muanda mutekete hakadi mutshima wa mukelenge musanke ne nvinyo yeye wakatuma mukenji kudi Mehumana ne Bizeta ne Hâbona ne Bigata ne Abagata ne Zetâ ne Kakasa, bantu batungula muanda mutekete bakadi benza mudimu ku mesu kua mukelenge Ahashawelosha," 
Esther1:11 bua kuluabo ne Washeti, mukelenge mukashi, ku mpala kua mukelenge muluate tshifulu tshia bukelenge bua kulesheye bantu ne bantu banene bulengele buandi; bualu bua yeye wakadi muimpe kumona." 
Esther1:12 Kadi Washeti, mukelenge mukashi, wakabenga kulua ku mukenji wa mukelenge wakatumeye kudi bantu batungula; nunku mukelenge wakadi ne tshiji tshikole, ne tshiji tshiandi tshiakatema munda muandi." 
Esther1:13 Hashishe mukelenge wakabikila bena meji bakamanya bikondo, bualu bua mukelenge wakadi ne tshilele nunku kudi bamanyi ba mikenji ne dilumbulula:" 
Esther1:14 Kâshena ne Sheta ne Ademata ne Tâshishi ne Melese ne Mâsena ne Memukana, bantu aba banene muanda mutekete ba mu Pelasa ne Madai, bakadi batangila mpala wa mukelenge, ne bakadi bashikama mu muaba wa ku mpala mu bukelenge," 
Esther1:15 wakabakonka ne, Netuenzele mukelenge mukashi Washeti tshinyi bualu bua yeye wakabenga kuenza mukenji wa mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakatumeye kudi bantu batungula?" 
Esther1:16 Memukana wakitaba ku mesu kua mukelenge ne bantu banene ne, Washeti, mukelenge mukashi, kakenzela anu mukelenge nkayandi bibi kadi wakenzela bantu banene bonso ne bantu bonso ba mu nseke yonso ya mukelenge Ahashawelosha bibi kabidi." 
Esther1:17 Bualu bua bualu ebu buakenza mukelenge mukashi nebufike kudi bakashi bonso, nebufuishe balume babo bundu ku mesu kuabo hamanyabo ne, Mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakatumina Washeti, mukelenge mukashi, mukenji bua kulueye ku mesu kuandi, kadi yeye kakalua." 
Esther1:18 Dituku edi bakashi ba bantu banene ba mu Pelasa ne Madai bakunvua bualu buakenza mukelenge mukashi nebambile bantu banene ba mukelenge muomumue. Nunku nebikale ne bundu ne tshiji bia bungi. 
Esther1:19 Nunku biasua mukelenge kuela mukenji wandi, baufunde mu mikenji ya Bena Pelasa ne Bena Madai idibo kabayi bamanye mua kukudimuna ne, Washeti kalu ku mesu kua mukelenge Ahashawelosha kabidi tshiendelele; mukelenge afile muaba wandi wa bukelenge kudi mukuabo udi umuhita buakane." 
Esther1:20 Hashishe, hatumabo mukenji eu wa mukelenge ku nseke ya bukelenge buandi yonso, bualu bua budi bunene, bakashi bonso, ne banene ne bakese, nebatumbishe babayabo." 
Esther1:21 Bualu ebu buakasankisha mutshima wa mukelenge ne bantu banene; mukelenge Wakenza bu muakadi dî dia Memukana; 
Esther1:22 bualu bua yeye wakatuma mikanda ku nseke yonso, bafundile bantu bonso mu muaku wabo ne, Mulume yonso akokeshe ba mu nsubu wandi, akule mu muaku wa bantu bandi." 
Esther2:1 Ku nyima kua malu â bakalekela mukelenge Ahashawelosha tshiji tshiandi, yeye wakavuluka Washeti ne bualu buakenzeye, ne bua mukenji wakeleye bualu buandi." 
Esther2:2 Hashishe bantu bakadi bakuatshila mukelenge mudimu bakamuambila ne, Bakebele mukelenge bansongakashi balengele batshidi tumama;" 
Esther2:3 mukelenge asunguile tuhita tuandi mu nseke yonso ya bukelenge buandi bua bobo basangishe bansongakashi bonso balengele batshidi tumama mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana; babafile mu bianza bia Hegai, muntu mutungula wa mukelenge, mulami wa bakashi ba mukelenge, bashikame mu luhangu lua bakashi, babahe bintu bia kubalengesha nʼabi." 
Esther2:4 Nsongakashi udi usankisha mutshima wa mukelenge ikale mukelenge mukashi mu muaba wa Washeti. Bualu ebu buakasankisha mutshima wa mukelenge; yeye wakenza nunku. 
Esther2:5 Muena Yuda mukuabo wakadi mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana, dina diandi diakadi Môdekai, muana wa Yai, muana wa Shimei, muana wa Kishi, Muena Benyamina." 
Esther2:6 Bakafuma nʼandi mu Yelushalema ne bahika ne Yekonya, mukelenge wa Yuda, bakadi Nebukadenesâ, mukelenge wa Babulona, ulua nʼabo," 
Esther2:7 Yeye wakadiundisha Hadasa, eu udi Esetê mene, muana wa mansebʼandi mu nsubu wandi, bualu bua yeye kakadi ne tatu ne mamu; nsongakashi eu wakadi mulengele muakane ku mesu; hakafua tatu wandi ne mamu wandi, Môdekai wakamuangata bu muanʼandi mukashi mene." 
Esther2:8 Nunku hakunvuabo mukenji wa mukelenge ne dî diandi, ne hakasangishabo bansongakashi ba bungi mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana mu bianza bia Hegai, Esetê wakadi mufidibue mu nsubu wa mukelenge; bakamufila mu bianza bia Hegai, mulami wa bakashi." 
Esther2:9 Nsongakashi eu wakasankisha mutshima wandi, yeye wakasangana luse ku mesu kuandi; yeye wakamuha bintu bia kumulengesha nʼabi lubilu ne bansongakashi muanda mutekete basungula mu nsubu wa mukelenge bua kumukuatshila mudimu; yeye wakamuladika ne bansongakashi bandi muanda mutekete mu muaba wakatamba buakane mu nsubu wa bakashi." 
Esther2:10 Esetê kakanji kubamanyisha bua tshisamba tshiandi anyi bua bana babo; bualu bua Môdekai wakamuambila ne, Kubamanyishibi." 
Esther2:11 Môdekai wakendenda ku luhangu lua bakashi ku dituku ku dituku bua kunvueye lumu lua Esetê ne malu akamukuata. 
Esther2:12 Hakakumbana tshikondo tshia nsongakashi ne nsongakashi kubuela kudi mukelenge Ahashawelosha, hakashikishabo kumuenzela bu muakadi mukenji bualu bua bakashi bua ngondo dikumi ne ibidi, (nunku matuku a kulengeshibua kuabo akashika; akadi nunku: ngondo isambombo bakabalengesha ne manyi a mula, ne ngondo isambombo bakabalengesha ne bintu bia dihembu dimpe ne bintu bikuabo bia kulengesha nʼabi bakashi);" 
Esther2:13 nunku nsongakashi ne nsongakashi wakabuela kudi mukelenge; bakamuha tshintu tshionso tshikasueye hakumukeye mu nsubu wa bakashi bua kuyeye mu nsubu wa mukelenge. 
Esther2:14 Mu dilolo wakabuelamu, hakatshiabu yeye wakahingana mu nsubu muibidi wa bakashi mu bianza bia Shâshagaza, muntu mutungula wa mukelenge wakadi ulama bakashi bandi bahika bakabakeye; yeye kakadi ubuela kudi mukelenge kabidi bikala mukelenge kayi musanke bualu buandi, ne bikaleye kayi mumubikile mu dina." 
Esther2:15 Hakafika dituku dia Esetê, muana wa Abihayila, manseba wa Môdekai, wakangateye bu muanʼandi mukashi, kubuela kudi mukelenge, yeye kakalomba bintu bikuabo ha mutu ha bintu biakasungula Hegai, muntu mutungula wa mukelenge, mulami wa bakashi. Esetê wakasangana luse ku mesu kua bantu bonso bakamutangila." 
Esther2:16 Nunku bakaya ne Esetê kudi mukelenge Ahashawelosha mu nsubu muandi mu ngondo wa dikumi, ngondo wa Tebeta, mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia bukokeshi buandi." 
Esther2:17 Mukelenge wakananga Esetê ku mutu kua bakashi bonso, yeye wakatamba bansongakashi bonso kusangana luse ku mesu kuandi; nunku yeye wakateka tshifulu tshia bukelenge ha mutu handi, wakamudisha mukelenge mukashi mu muaba wa Washeti." 
Esther2:18 Nunku mukelenge wakalambishila bantu bandi banene bonso ne benji bandi ba mudimu bidia bia disanka dinene bua Esetê; yeye wakaha ba mu nseke yandi dikisha ne maha bu mudi bubanji bua mukelenge. 
Esther2:19 Hakasangishabo bansongakashi musangu muibidi, Môdekai wakadi mushikame ku tshibi tshia mukelenge." 
Esther2:20 Esetê kakanza kumanyisha mukelenge tshisamba tshiandi ne bantu bandi bu muakamuambila Môdekai, bualu bua Esetê wakatumikila dî dia Môdekai bu muakenzeye hakadiye mudiundishibue kudiye." 
Esther2:21 Mu matuku au hakadi Môdekai mushikame ku tshibi tshia mukelenge, bantu batungula babidi ba mukelenge, Bigatana ne Teleshe, ba munkatshi mua balami ba ku tshibi, bakadi ne tshiji, bakakeba kushiha mukelenge Ahashawelosha." 
Esther2:22 Bualu ebu buakamanyibua kudi Môdekai; yeye wakabuesha kudi Esetê, mukelenge mukashi; Esetê wakabuambila mukelenge mu dina dia Môdekai." 
Esther2:23 Hakadibo balumbulula, bakabusangana ne mbua bushuwa; bakabowa bubidi buabo ku mutshi umue; bakafunda bualu ebu mu mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu ku mpala kua mukelenge." 
Esther3:1 Ku nyima kua malu a mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakabandisha Hamana, muana wa Hamedata, Muena Agaga, wakamuteka ku mutu kua bantu banene bonso bakadi nʼandi." 
Esther3:2 Bena mudimu ba mukelenge bonso bakadi ku tshibi tshia mukelenge bakatua binu hanshi, bakakukuila Hamana; bualu bua mukelenge wakela mukenji nunku bua bualu buandi. Kadi Môdekai kakatua binu hanshi, kakamukuila." 
Esther3:3 Hashishe bena mudimu ba mukelenge bakadi bashikame ku tshibi tshia mukelenge bakebesha Môdekai ne, Wewe udi ushiha mukenji wa mukelenge bua tshinyi?" 
Esther3:4 Hakadibo bamukonka nunku ku dituku ku dituku ne hakadiye kayi mubunvuile, bakambila Hamana bua kutangilabo ne malu a Môdekai neajalame. Bualu bua yeye wakabambila ne, Meme ndi Muena Yuda." 
Esther3:5 Hakamanya Hamana ne, Môdekai kena utua binu hanshi, kena unkukuila, yeye wakûlangana ne tshiji tshikole." 
Esther3:6 Hakelanganeye meji, yeye wakabenga kukuata Môdekai nkayandi, bualu bua bakamumanyisha bua tshisamba tshia Môdekai; nunku Hamana wakakeba bua kushiheye Bena Yuda bonso bakadi mu bukelenge bua Ahashawelosha, ba mu tshisamba tshia Môdekai mene." 
Esther3:7 Mu ngondo wa kumudilu, ngondo wa Nisana mene, mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne bibidi tshia bukelenge bua mukelenge Ahashawelosha bakadi bela Pû, eu nnshobo mene, ku mesu kua Hamana ku dituku ku dituku ne ku ngondo ku ngondo tô ne ku ngondo wa dikumi ne ibidi udi ngondo wa Ada mene." 
Esther3:8 Hamana wakambila mukelenge Ahashawelosha ne, Kudi bantu bakuabo bakamuangalaka munkatshi mua bantu ba mu nseke yonso ya bukelenge buebe; mikenji yabo idi mitahuluke ku ya bantu bonso; kabena batumikila mikenji ya mukelenge; nunku kambimpe bua mukelenge abitabushe." 
Esther3:9 Nunku biasua mukelenge, bafunde mukanda bua babutudibue; hashishe meme nenfile ntalanta ya argent binunu dikumi mu bianza bia bantu badi benzela mukelenge mudimu eu, balue nʼai mu tshibutshilu tshia mukelenge." 
Esther3:10 Mukelenge wakakohola kakanu ka ku munu wandi, wakakafila kudi Hamana, muana wa Hamedata, Muena Agaga, muena lukuna wa Bena Yuda." 
Esther3:11 Mukelenge wakambila Hamana ne, Bakakuha argent, ne bantu kabidi; enza nʼabi bu mudi umona ne mbimpe." 
Esther3:12 Hashishe bakabikila bafundi ba mukelenge mu ngondo wa kumudilu mu dituku dia dikumi ne asatu dia ngondo; bakafundila miloho ya mukelenge ne ba-gouverneur ba ku nseke yonso ne bantu banene bakadi ku mutu kua bantu bonso, bantu mu muaku wabo bantu mu muaku wabo, bu muakamba Hamana; bakafunda malu â mu dina dia mukelenge Ahashawelosha, bakatekahu tshimanyinu tshia ku kakanu ka mukelenge." 
Esther3:13 Bakatuma mikanda ei mu bianza bia bantu ku nseke yonso ya mukelenge bua kushihabo ne bua kubutulabo Bena Yuda bonso ne batekete ne banunu ne bana bakese ne bakashi dituku dimue, mu dituku dia dikumi ne asatu dia ngondo wa dikumi ne ibidi, ngondo wa Adâ mene, ne bua kuhaulabo bintu biabo bionso." 
Esther3:14 Bakatuma mikanda ei ku nseke yonso, bakamanyisha bantu bonso bua bikale bamane kudilongolola bua dituku adi." 
Esther3:15 Bena mikanda bakaya lubilu bua mukenji wa mukelenge, ne mukenji wakaledibua mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana. Mukelenge ne Hamana bakashikama bua kunuabo nvinyo, kadi bonso ba mu musoko wa Shushana bakadi bakema." 
Esther4:1 Hakamanya Môdekai malu onso akenzabo, Môdekai wakadihanda bilulu biandi, wakadiluatshisha bilulu bikayabala, wakadiela butue hamʼbidi, wakaya munkatshi mua musoko, wenda, udila bikole;" 
Esther4:2 wakalua ku mpala kua tshibi tshia mukelenge, bualu bua muntu kakamanya mua kubuela mu tshibi tshia mukelenge muluate bilulu bikayabala." 
Esther4:3 Mu nseke yonso yakaya mukenji wa mukelenge ne dî diandi, muadi munene wakadi munkatshi mua Bena Yuda, bakajila bia kudia, bakasa muadi, bakadila, ba bungi bakaluata bilulu bikayabala, bakadiela butue hamʼbidi." 
Esther4:4 Bena mudimu bakashi ba Esetê ne bantu bandi batungula bakalua kudiye, bakamuambila bualu ebu; mukelenge mukashi wakatamba kunyingalasha mutshima wandi; yeye wakatuma bilulu bua Môdekai aluate, ne bua kumusheye bilulu biandi bikayabala; kadi yeye kakabiangata." 
Esther4:5 Hashishe Esetê wakabikila Hataka, umue wa bantu batungula ba mukelenge wakasunguleye bua kumukuatshileye mudimu, wakamutuma kudi Môdekai bua kujingululeye ne, Buakadi tshinyi ne buakadi bualu kai." 
Esther4:6 Nunku Hataka wakaya kudi Môdekai mu muaba mubaluluke wakadi ku mpala kua tshibi tshia mukelenge. 
Esther4:7 Môdekai wakamuambila malu onso akadi mamukuate ne bungi bua argent mene yakalaya Hamana balami ba bintu bia mukelenge bua kubutuleye Bena Yuda. 
Esther4:8 Wakamuha kabidi umue wa mikanda yakafundabo mu Shushana wakadi ne mukenji wa kubabutula mufundamu, bua kûlesheye Esetê; wakamuambila dî diandi kabidi bua kuyeye kudi mukelenge bua kumuakuila ne bua kuakuileye bantu bandi ku mesu kuandi." 
Esther4:9 Hataka wakalua, wakambila Esetê mei a Môdekai." 
Esther4:10 Hashishe Esetê wakambila Hataka, wakamuha mukenji wa kuyeye nʼau kudi Môdekai ne," 
Esther4:11 Bena mudimu bonso ba mukelenge ne bantu ba mu bukelenge buandi badi bamanye ne, Muntu yonso, ne mulume ne mukashi, wabuela mu tshiendedi tshia munda mua nsubu wa mukelenge, udi kayi mubikidibue kudi mukelenge, mukenji umue udi kudiye bua kumushiheye, anu muntu yonso udi mukelenge wolola dikombo dia or kudiye bua yeye ashale ne muoyo; kadi kabakambikila bua kubuela kudi mukelenge tô matuku â makumi asatu." 
Esther4:12 Bakambila Môdekai mei a Esetê. 
Esther4:13 Hashishe Môdekai wakabahingisha ne dî kudi Esetê ne, Kuedi meji ne. Wewe neuhanduke munkatshi mua Bena Yuda bonso bualu bua udi mu nsubu wa mukelenge," 
Esther4:14 bualu bua biwahuwa biebe ku tshikondo etshi, dikuatshisha ne luhandu nebimueneke kudi Bena Yuda bifume ku muaba mukuabo, kadi wewe ne ba mu nsubu wa tatu webe nenufue; nganyi udi mumanye ne, Wewe wakabuela mu bukelenge anu bua tshikondo etshi mene?" 
Esther4:15 Hashishe Esetê wakabahingisha kudi Môdekai ne dî edi ne," 
Esther4:16 Ya biebe, usangishe Bena Yuda bonso badi mu Shushana, bajile bia kudia bualu buanyi matuku asatu; kabadi tshintu, kabanu tshintu tô matuku â asatu butuku ne munya; meme ne bena mudimu banyi bakashi netujile bia kudia diatshimue; hashishe nenye kudi mukelenge bu mudi kamuyi mu mikenji; binafua, nenfue." 
Esther4:17 Nunku Môdekai wakaya, Wakenza malu onso akamuambila Esetê." 
Esther5:1 Hakahita matuku asatu, Esetê wakadiluatshisha bilulu biandi bia bukelenge, wakimana mu tshiendedi tshia munda mua nsubu wa mukelenge ku mbelu kua nsubu wa mukelenge; mukelenge wakadi mushikame mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge mu nsubu wa bukelenge, ku tshibueledi tshia nsubu." 
Esther5:2 Hakadi mukelenge utangila Esetê mukelenge mukashi muimane mu tshiendedi, yeye wakasangana luse ku mesu kuandi, mukelenge wakoluela Esetê dikombo dia or diakadi mu tshianza tshiandi. Nunku Esetê wakasemena ha buihi, wakalenga lusongo lua dikombo." 
Esther5:3 Hashishe mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Wewe Esetê, mukelenge mukashi, udi musue tshinyi? Dilomba diebe didi tshinyi? Nebakuhedi tô ne ku tshituha tshia bukelenge." 
Esther5:4 Esetê wakamukudimuna ne, Bikalabi bimpe kudi mukelenge, mukelenge ne Hamana balue ku disanka dinakalongoluela mukelenge." 
Esther5:5 Hashishe mukelenge wakamba ne, Babikile Hamana lubilu, benze bu muakuamba Esetê. Nunku mukelenge ne Hamana bakalua ku bidia bia disanka biakabalongoluela Esetê." 
Esther5:6 Hakadibo banue nvinyo ya ku bidia bia disanka, mukelenge wakebesha Esetê ne, Tshiudi ulomba ntshinyi? Nebakuhetshi. Dilomba diebe didi tshinyi? Nebakuhedi, tô ne ku tshituha tshia bukelenge." 
Esther5:7 Hashishe Esetê wakamukudimuna ne, Dikonka ne dilomba dianyi bidi nunku:" 
Esther5:8 bingikala ne luse ku mesu kua mukelenge, ne biasua mukelenge kuitaba ku dikonka dianyi ne kuenza bu mudi dilomba dianyi, mukelenge ne Hamana balue ku disanka dinene dindi mbalongoluela, ne makelela nengenze bu muakuamba mukelenge." 
Esther5:9 Hashishe Hamana wakaluhuka ne disanka dia bungi mu mutshima wandi; kadi hakatangila Hamana Môdekai mushikame ku tshibi tshia mukelenge ne yeye kayi mubike, kayi mumushile muaba, wakasangana ne tshiji tshikole kudi Môdekai." 
Esther5:10 Kadi Hamana wakadikanda, wakaya kuandi; wakatuma dî, wakabikila balunda bandi ne mukashi wandi Zeleshe." 
Esther5:11 Hamana wakabamanyisha bua butumbi bua bubanji buandi, ne bungi bua bana bandi bakaleleye, ne ku mutu kua malu onso kuakamuteka mukelenge ne bu muakamubandisheye ku mutu kua bantu banene bonso ne bena mudimu ba mukelenge." 
Esther5:12 Hamana wakamba dî dikuabo kabidi ne, Bulelela, Esetê mukelenge mukashi kakitabusha bua muntu mukuabo aye ne mukelenge ku bidia bia disanka biakalongololeye anu meme; ne makelela kabidi wakumbikila meme ne mukelenge bua kudia nʼandi." 
Esther5:13 Kadi malu a onso kaena asankisha handi ntangila Môdekai, Muena Yuda, mushikame ku tshibi tshia mukelenge." 
Esther5:14 Hashishe mukashi wandi Zeleshe ne balunda bandi bakamuambila ne, Balongolole tshiowelu bule bua coudées makumi atanu, hatshiabu wewe wambile mukelenge bua kuowelaku Môdekai; hashishe neumanye mua kuya ne mukelenge ne disanka ku bidia bia disanka dinene. Bualu ebu buakasankisha mutshima wa Hamana; yeye wakalongololesha tshiowelu." 
Esther6:1 Butuku abu mukelenge kakamanya mua kulala tulu; wakamba dî diandi, bakalua ne mukanda wa kulondolola kua malu, bakaubala ku mesu kua mukelenge." 
Esther6:2 Bakasangana bualu bufundamu ne, Môdekai wakamba bua Bigetana ne Telesha, babidi ba bantu batungula ba mukelenge ba munkatshi mua balami ba tshibi bakadi bakeba bua kushiha mukelenge Ahashawelosha." 
Esther6:3 Mukelenge wakabebesha ne, Kutumbisha kai kuakatumbishabo nʼaku Môdekai bua bualu ebu? Hashishe bena mudimu ba mukelenge bakadi bamukuatshila mudimu bakamuambila ne, Kabena bamuenzele tshintu." 
Esther6:4 Mukelenge wakakonka ne, Udi mu tshiendedi nganyi? Ha diba adi Hamana wakabuela mu tshiendedi tshia mu nsubu wa mukelenge bua kumuebesha bualu bua kuoweye Môdekai ku tshiowelu tshiamulongolueleye." 
Esther6:5 Bena mudimu ba mukelenge bakamuambila ne, Hamana udi muimane mu tshiendedi. Mukelenge wakamba ne, Abuele biandi," 
Esther6:6 Nunku Hamana wakabuela. Mukelenge wakamuebesha ne, Nebenzele muntu udi mukelenge musue kunemeka tshinyi? Nunku Hamana wakadi wamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Nganyi udi mukelenge usanka bua kunemeka muntambe meme?" 
Esther6:7 Hashishe Hamana wakambila mukelenge ne, Bua muntu udi mukelenge usanka kunemeka," 
Esther6:8 balue ne bilulu bidi mukelenge uluata ne kabalu kadi mukelenge wenda ha nyima haku ne tshifulu tshia bukelenge tshidiye wasa ku mutu kuandi; 
Esther6:9 bafile bintu ebi ne kabalu mu bianza bia umue wa bantu ba mukelenge badi batamba buneme, baluatshishe muntu udi mukelenge usanka bua kunemeka, bendeshe muntu au ha nyima ha kabalu aka mu musesu wa musoko, bele dî ku mpala kuandi ne, Nebenzele muntu udi mukelenge usanka bua kunemeka nunku." 
Esther6:10 Hashishe mukelenge wakambila Hamana ne, Ya lubilu, wangate bilulu ne kabalu, bu muwakuamba, wenzele Môdekai, Muena Yuda, udi mushikame ku tshibi tshia mukelenge nunku; kuhangi nansha dî dimue dia mu mei onso awakuamba." 
Esther6:11 Hashishe Hamana wakangata bilulu ne kabalu, wakabiluatshisha Môdekai, wakamuendesha ha nyima ha kabalu mu musesu wa musoko, wakela dî ku mpala kuandi ne. Nebenzele muntu udi mukelenge usanka bua kunemeka nunku." 
Esther6:12 Môdekai wakahingana ku tshibi tshia mukelenge. Kadi Hamana wakaya ku nsubu wandi lubilu, udila muadi ne mutu wandi mubuikila tshilulu." 
Esther6:13 Hamana wakambila mukashi wandi Zeleshe ne balunda bandi bualu buonso buakamukuata. Hashishe bena meji bandi ne mukashi wandi Zeleshe bakamuambila ne, Bikala Môdekai, uwakabanga kulekela ku mesu kuandi, wa bana ba Bena Yuda, wewe kuena mumanye mua kumuhita bukole; kadi wewe neuhone ku mpala kuandi bulelela." 
Esther6:14 Hakadibo bayikila nʼandi, muntu mutungula wa mukelenge wakalua bua kubikileye Hamana ku bidia bia disanka dinene biakalongolola Esetê." 
Esther7:1 Mukelenge ne Hamana bakalua bua kudiabo ne Esetê mukelenge mukashi. 
Esther7:2 Hakadibo banua nvinyo ya bidia bia disanka dituku dibidi, mukelenge wakebesha Esetê kabidi ne, Esetê mukelenge mukashi, dilomba diebe didi tshinyi? Nenkuhedi. Disengelela diebe didi tshinyi? Nenkuhedi tô ne ku tshituha tshia bukelenge." 
Esther7:3 Hashishe Esetê mukelenge mukashi wakamukudimuna ne, Bingikala musangane luse ku mesu kuebe, mukelenge, biasua mukelenge, basungile muoyo wanyi ku dilomba dianyi ne basungile bantu banyi ku disengelela dianyi;" 
Esther7:4 bualu bua didi bahanyibue, meme ne bantu banyi, bua kubutudibua ne bua kushihibua ne bua kujimishibua. Kadi bu tuetu bahanyibue bu bahika balume ne bahika bakashi, nakadi kuhuwa, kadi muena lukuna kakadi mua kufuta mukelenge ku bualu ebu bubi." 
Esther7:5 Hashishe mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakebesha Esetê mukelenge mukashi ne, Yeye udi nganyi, yeye udi hanyi, udi welangana meji mu mutshima wandi bua kuenza nunku?" 
Esther7:6 Esetê wakamba ne, Muhumbishi ne muena lukuna wetu udi muntu eu mubi Hamana mene. Hashishe Hamana wakatamba kutshina ku mesu kua mukelenge ne kua mukelenge mukashi." 
Esther7:7 Mukelenge wakajuka ku nvinyo ya bidia bia disanka ne tshiji tshikole, wakaluhuka, wakendakana mu tshibunda tshia mu luhangu luandi; Hamana wakajuka bua kulombeye muoyo wandi kudi Esetê mukelenge mukashi; bualu bua yeye wakajingulula ne, Mukelenge neakebe kungenzela bibi." 
Esther7:8 Mukelenge wakafuma ku tshibunda tshiandi, wakabuela mu nsubu wa kudia kabidi; Hamana wakamana kudiela ha ditanda hakadi Esetê. Hashishe mukelenge wakakonka ne, Yeye udi ukeba kukuata mukelenge mukashi ku bukole ku mesu kuanyi mu nsubu wanyi, anyi? Hakahatuka dî adi mukana mua mukelenge, bakabuikila mutu wa Hamana tshilulu." 
Esther7:9 Hashishe Hâbona, umue wa bantu batungula bakadi ku mpala kua mukelenge, wakamba ne, Monai, kabidi, tshiowelu atshi bule bua coudées makumi atanu tuakalongoluela Hamana Môdekai, nguakambila mukelenge malu mimpe, tshidi ku nsubu wa Hamana. Mukelenge wakamba ne, Bamuoweleku." 
Esther7:10 Nunku bakowa Hamana ku tshiowelu tshiakalongolueleye Môdekai. Hashishe tshiji tshia mukelenge tshiakalekela. 
Esther8:1 Mu dituku adi mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakafila ba mu nsubu wa Hamana, muena lukuna wa Bena Yuda, kudi Esetê mukelenge mukashi. Môdekai wakalua ku mpala kua mukelenge, bualu bua Esetê wakamuambila bu muakadiye kudiye." 
Esther8:2 Mukelenge wakakohola kakanu kakanyengeye kudi Hamana, wakakaha Môdekai. Esetê wakateka Môdekai ha mutu ha nsubu wa Hamana." 
Esther8:3 Esetê wakayikila ne mukelenge kabidi, wakahona ku makasa andi, wakamusengelela ne binsonshi ku mesu bua kukudimuneye bualu bubi buakamba Hamana, Muena Agaga, kuenzela Bena Yuda." 
Esther8:4 Hashishe mukelenge wakolola dikombo dia or kudi Esetê. Nunku Esetê wakajuka hanshi, wakimana ku mesu kua mukelenge." 
Esther8:5 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Biasua mukelenge, bingikala musangane luse ku mesu kuandi, bikala bualu buimpe ku mesu kua mukelenge, ne binasankisha mesu andi, bafunde mikanda mikuabo ya kukudimunabo nʼai mikanda yakafunda Hamana, muana wa Hamedata, Muena Agaga, yakafundeye bua kubutulabo Bena Yuda ba mu nseke yonso ya mukelenge." 
Esther8:6 Munyi mundi mua kutangila bualu bubi budi bulua kudi bantu banyi? Munyi mundi mua kutangila dibutuka dia bana betu? 
Esther8:7 Hashishe mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakambila Esetê, mukelenge mukashi, ne Môdekai, Muena Yuda, ne, Monai, nakamana kufila ba mu nsubu wa Hamana kudi Esetê, bakamana kumuowa yeye ku tshiowelu bualu bua yeye wakalenga Bena Yuda ne tshianza tshiandi." 
Esther8:8 Nunku nufunde bualu bua Bena Yuda bunudi basue mu dina dia mukelenge, nutekehu tshimanyinu tshia ku kakanu ka mukelenge; bualu bua kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kukudimuna dî didi difundibua mu dina dia mukelenge, didi ne tshimanyinu tshia ku kakanu ka mukelenge tshitekahu." 
Esther8:9 Hashishe mu tshikondo atshi bakabikila bafundi ba mukelenge mu ngondo muisatu, ngondo wa Siwana mene, mu dituku dia makumi abidi ne asatu dia ngondo; bakafundila miloho ne ba-gouverneur ne bantu banene bakadi mu buloba bua Inde tô ne ku Atiopa, mu nseke lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, bantu mu tshifundilu tshiabo ne mu muaku wabo bantu mu tshifundilu tshiabo ne mu muaku wabo, malu onso akamba Môdekai bualu bua Bena Yuda; bakafundila Bena Yuda mu tshifundilu tshiabo ne mu muaku wabo kabidi." 
Esther8:10 Wakafunda malu au mu dina dia mukelenge Ahashawelosha, wakatekahu tshimanyinu tshia ku kakanu ka mukelenge, wakatuma mikanda ei mu bianza bia bantu badi benda ha nyima ha tubalu tudi tuenda lukasa tuakadi mu nsubu wa mukelenge tuakalelabo kudi kabalu kandi kanene; ne ha nyima ha nyama ya mpunda ne ha tumelo;" 
Esther8:11 mu mikanda ei mukelenge wakitabusha bua Bena Yuda badisangishe ku musoko ne ku musoko ne bua kuluangana ne kushiha ne kubutula ne kujimisha bukole buonso bua bantu bakadi bakeba kubaluisha, ne bakashi babo ne bana babo bakese, ne bua kubahaula;" 
Esther8:12 bakadi mua kuenza nunku mu nseke yonso ya mukelenge Ahashawelosha mu difuku dia dikumi ne asatu dia ngondo wa dikumi ne ibidi, ngondo wa Adâ mene." 
Esther8:13 Bakatuma mikanda ei ya kumanyisha nʼabi bantu bonso ba mu nseke yonso ne, Budi Bena Yuda nʼabu mbua kudilongolola bua dituku adi bua kudisombuelabo kudi bena lukuna babo." 
Esther8:14 Nunku bakaya ne mikanda bakadi benda ha nyima ha tubalu tuabo tuakenda lubilu tuakadi mu mudimu wa mukelenge, bakaya lukasa bendeshibue ku mukenji wa mukelenge; bakela mukenji eu mu Shushana, musoko wa mukelenge." 
Esther8:15 Môdekai wakumuka ku mesu kua mukelenge muluate bilulu bia bleu ne bitoke bia bukelenge, ne tshifulu tshia butumbi tshia or, ne tshikowelu tshikunzubile tshia bilulu bia lin; bena musoko bakadi mu Shushana bakela mbila, bakasanka." 
Esther8:16 Bena Yuda bakadi ne munya ne musangelu ne disanka ne butumbi. 
Esther8:17 Mu nseke yonso ne mu misoko yonso yakafika mikanda ya mukenji, Bena Yuda bakadi ne musangelu ne disanka, bakalongolola bia kudia bia disanka, bakadi ne dituku dimpe. Bantu bakuabo ba bungi ba mu buloba bakandamuka bu Bena Yuda; bualu bua ditshina dia Bena Yuda diakabakuata." 
Esther9:1 Mu ngondo wa dikumi ne ibidi, ngondo wa Adâ mene, mu dituku dia dikumi ne asatu dia ngondo eu, bakamba diba dia kumana mukenji wa mukelenge kufika, mu dituku diakatekemenabo kudi bena lukuna ba Bena Yuda bua kubakokeshabo (kadi bualu buakakudimuka, ne Bena Yuda bakakokesha bena lukuna babo)," 
Esther9:2 Bena Yuda bakadisangisha mu misoko yabo mu nseke yonso ya mukelenge Ahashawelosha bua kukuatabo honso bakasua kubenzela bibi; nansha muntu wakamanya mua kuimana ku mpala kuabo, bualu bua ditshina diabo diakakuata bantu bonso." 
Esther9:3 Bantu banene bonso ba mu nseke yonso ne miloho ne ba-gouverneur ne bonso bakadi benzela mukelenge mudimu bakakuatshisha Bena Yuda; bualu bua ditshina dia Môdekai diakabakuata. 
Esther9:4 Bualu bua Môdekai wakadi muntu munene mu nsubu wa mukelenge, ne lumu luandi luakafika ku nseke yonso; bualu bua muntu eu Môdekai wakadiundadiunda mu butumbi buandi." 
Esther9:5 Bena Yuda bakashiha bena lukuna babo bonso ne miele ya nvita, bakabashiha ne bakababutula ne bakenzela bakadi nʼabo lukinu bu muakasuabo." 
Esther9:6 Mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana Bena Yuda bakashiha ne bakabutula bantu balume nkama itanu. 
Esther9:7 Bakashiha Pâsha-nedata ne Dalafona ne Asepata," 
Esther9:8 Polata ne Adalia ne Alidata," 
Esther9:9 ne Pâmashata ne Alisai ne Alidai ne Wayezata," 
Esther9:10 bana halume dikumi ba Hamana, muana wa Hamedata, muena lukuna wa Bena Yuda; kadi kabakahaula bintu biabo." 
Esther9:11 Mu dituku adi bakamanyisha mukelenge bua bungi bua bantu bakashihabo mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana. 
Esther9:12 Mukelenge wakambila Esetê mukelenge mukashi ne, Bena Yuda bakashiha ne bakabutula bantu balume nkama itanu ba mu nsubu wa mukelenge wa mu Shushana ne bana balume ba Hamana dikumi; bakenza tshinyi mu nseke mikuabo ya mukelenge? Mpindiu dilomba diebe didi tshinyi? Nenkuhedi. Disengelela diebe dikuabo didi tshinyi? Nedienjibue." 
Esther9:13 Hashishe Esetê wakamba ne, Biasua mukelenge, itabushe bua Bena Yuda badi mu Shushana benze makelela kabidi bu mudi mukenji wa lelu, balembeleshe bana balume ba Hamana dikumi ku tshiowelu atshi kabidi." 
Esther9:14 Mukelenge wakela mukenji bua kuenzabo nunku; mukenji eu wakafuma mu Shushana, bakalembelesha bana balume ba Hamana dikumi ku tshiowelu atshi." 
Esther9:15 Bena Yuda ba mu Shushana bakadisangisha mu dituku dia dikumi ne anai dia ngondo wa Adâ, bakashiha bantu balume ba mu Shushana nkama isatu; kadi kabakahaula bintu biabo." 
Esther9:16 Bena Yuda bakuabo bakadi mu nseke yonso ya mukelenge bakadisangisha hamue, bakaluangana bua kusungilabo mioyo yabo, bakadi ne dikisha bua bena lukuna babo, ne bakashiha bena lukinu babo binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu; kadi kabakahaula bintu biabo." 
Esther9:17 Bakenza bualu ebu mu dituku dia dikumi ne asatu dia ngondo wa Adâ; bakikisha mu dituku dia dikumi ne anai, bakasungula dituku adi bua kudiabo bidia bia disanka ne musangelu." 
Esther9:18 Kadi Bena Yuda ba mu Shushana bakadisangisha hamue mu dituku dia dikumi ne asatu ne mu dituku dia dikumi ne anai kabidi; bakikisha mu dituku dia dikumi ne atanu, bakadisunguila dituku dia kudiabo bidia bia disanka ne musangelu." 
Esther9:19 Nunku Bena Yuda bakadi bashikame mu misoko idi kayiyi ne ngumbu bakasungula dituku dia dikumi ne anai dia ngondo wa Adâ dituku dia kudiabo bidia bia disanka ne musangelu, ne dia kuhanganabo bintu." 
Esther9:20 Môdekai wakafunda malu â, wakatumina Bena Yuda bonso bakadi ku nseke yonso ya mukelenge Ahashawelosha mikanda, ne bakadi ha buihi ne ba kule," 
Esther9:21 ya kubamanyisha ne, Bunudi nʼabu mbua kuvuluka dituku dia dikumi ne anai dia ngondo wa Adâ, ne dituku dia dikumi ne atanu dia ngondo au kabidi ku tshidimu ku tshidimu," 
Esther9:22 bu matuku akaheta Bena Yuda dikisha kudi bena lukuna babo ne bu ngondo wakakudimunabo kanyinganyinga kalua bu disanka, ne muadi ulua bu dituku dilengele; bajidile matuku â bu matuku a kudiabo bidia bia disanka ne musangelu ne bua kuhanganabo bintu ne bua kuhabo bahele bintu." 
Esther9:23 Bena Yuda bakakeba kuenza bu muakabangabo kuenza, ne bu muakadi Môdekai mubafundile;" 
Esther9:24 bualu bua Hamana, muana wa Hamedata, Muena Agaga, muena lukuna wa Bena Yuda bonso, wakatungila Bena Yuda tshitungu bua kubabutuleye, wakadi wela Pû, eu nnshobo mene, bua kubashiha ne bua kubabutula;" 
Esther9:25 kadi hakamanya mukelenge bualu ebu, yeye wakafundila mikanda bua kukudimuneye bualu bubi buakadiye musue kuenzela Bena Yuda ha mutu handi, ne yeye ne bana bandi balume bakowibua ku tshiowelu." 
Esther9:26 Nunku badi babikila matuku a ne, Pulima, bu mudi dina dia Pû, Nunku bua mei onso akatuabo mu mukanda eu, ne bua malu onso akatangilabo ku mesu ne bua malu onso akadi abakuata," 
Esther9:27 Bena Yuda bakahunga dî diabo bualu buabo ne bua bana babo baledibue ne bua bantu bonso bakalamata kudibo ne, Tuetu katuena tuhanga kuvuluka matuku â abidi bu muakafundabo, ne mu tshikondo tshiakasungulabo, ku tshidimu ku uhidimu;" 
Esther9:28 netuvuluke matuku â ne netualame ku bikondo bionso kudi ba mu meku onso ne ba ku nseke yonso ne ba mu misoko yonso; matuku â a Pulima kaena mua kuhanga munkatshi mua Bena Yuda nansha kuvuluka kuau kudi tunkanunuina tuabo tshiendelele. 
Esther9:29 Hashishe Esetê mukelenge mukashi, muana wa Abihayila, ne Môdekai, Muena Yuda, bakafunda ne bukokeshi buonso bua kujadikabo mukanda eu muibidi bualu bua Pulima." 
Esther9:30 Bakatumina Bena Yuda bonso ba mu nseke ei lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete ya mu bukelenge bua Ahashawelosha mikanda ya mei a ditalala ne a bushuwa," 
Esther9:31 bua kujadika matuku â a Pulima mu bikondo biakasungulabo bu muakadi dî dia Môdekai, Muena Yuda, ne Esetê mukelenge mukashi, babelele mukenji, bu muakadibo badielela mukenji ne tunkanunuma tuabo, mu malu a kujila kua bia kudia ne muadi wabo." 
Esther9:32 Mukenji wa Esetê wakajadika malu â a Pulima; bakaufunda mu mukanda. 
Esther10:1 Mukelenge Ahashawelosha wakalambuisha bantu ba mu buloba ne mu bisanga bia mu mai manene milambu. 
Esther10:2 Bienzedi bionso bia bukole buandi ne bia bukokeshi buandi ne dilongolola dia bunene bua Môdekai wakadi mukelenge mubandishe kabiena bifunda mu mukanda wa kulongolola kua malu a bakelenge ba Madai ne Pelasa, anyi?" 
Esther10:3 Bualu bua Môdekai, Muena Yuda, wakadi muntu muibidi ku nyima kua mukelenge Ahashawelosha, ne wakadi munene munkatshi mua Bena Yuda, wakadi muitabushibue kudi tshisumbu tshia bana babo, mukebe diakalengele dia bana babo, muambile bana babo mei a ditalala." 
Job1:1 Muntu wakadiku mu buloba bua Usa, dina diandi Yobo. Wakadi muntu wa mutshima mutoke ne wa malu makane, wakatshina Nzambi, wakehuka ku malu mabi." 
Job1:2 Bakamulelela bana ba balume muanda mutekete ne bana ba bakashi basatu. 
Job1:3 Bimuna biandi biakadi mikoko binunu muanda mutekete ne tumelo binunu bisatu, ngombe ibidi ibidi ku bikokedi nkama itanu, bakashi ba nyama ya mpunda nkama itanu. Wakadi ne bantu ba bungi mu nsubu muandi kabidi. Nunku muntu eu wakahita bantu bonso ba ku luseke lua Esete buneme." 
Job1:4 Bana bandi ba balume bakadi ne tshilele tshia kulambishilangana bia kudia mu nsubu yabo, muntu ne muntu dituku diandi; bakadi batuma dî bua kubikila bana ba bakashi basatu bua kudia nʼabo, kunua nʼabo." 
Job1:5 Hakashika matuku a kudia bidia kudi muntu ne muntu nunku, Yobo wakadi ubabikila kudiye, ubajidila. Wakabika ne dinda dionso, wakafila milambu ya kuosha bu muakadi bungi buabo bonso. Bualu bua Yobo wakamba ne, Bumue bana banyi ba balume bakuenza malu mabi, bakuhenda Nzambi mu mitshima yabo. Yobo wakadi wenza nunku misangu yonso." 
Job1:6 Dituku dikuabo hakadisangisha bana balume ba Nzambi ku mesu kua Yehowa, Satana kabidi wakamueneka munkatshi muabo," 
Job1:7 Yehowa wakakonka Satana ne, Udi ufuma kudi kunyi? Satana wakakudimuna Yehowa dî ne, Ndi nfuma ha buloba, nakadi ntambakana, ngendakana eku ne eku." 
Job1:8 Yehowa wakakonka Satana ne, Wakumona muntu wanyi Yobo, anyi? Kakuena muntu mukuabo bu yeye ha buloba; bu mudiye muntu wa mutshima mutoke ne wa malu makane, udi utshina Nzambi ne udi wehuka ku malu mabi." 
Job1:9 Satana wakandamuna Yehowa, wakamukonka ne, Yobo udi utshina Nzambi hatuhu, anyi?" 
Job1:10 Wewe kuakumunyunguluka ne nsubu wandi ne bintu biandi bionso ne bulami buebe, anyi? Wewe wakuvudishila mudimu wa bianza biandi disanka, ne bimuna biandi biakuvulangana ha buloba." 
Job1:11 Kadi mpindiu olola tshianza tshiebe, lenga bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi, ne yeye neakudiule ku mesu kuebe." 
Job1:12 Nunku Yehowa wakambila Satana ne, Mona, bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi bidi mu bianza biebe; kadi kumulengi tshianza tshiebe. Nunku Satana wakaluhuka ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Job1:13 Dituku dikuabo hakadi bana bandi ba balume ne bana bandi ba bakashi badia bidia ne banua nvinyo mu nsubu wa mukulu wabo," 
Job1:14 messager wakalua kudi Yobo, wamba ne, Bakadi badima mu madimi ne lukasu lukoka kudi ngombe, ne nyama ya mpunda yakadi idia mashinde ha buihi nʼai." 
Job1:15 Bena Seba bakabikuata, bakaya nʼabi; bakashiha bansongalume bakadi bayilama ku muele wa nvita. Anu meme nkayanyi nakuhanduka bua kukuambila." 
Job1:16 Hakatshidiye wakula, mukuabo wakalua, wakamba ne, Kahia kafuma kudi Nzambi kakatuluka mu diulu, kakosha mikoko ne bansongalume bakadi bayilama, kakabishidisha. Anu meme nkayanyi nakuhanduka bua kukuambila." 
Job1:17 Hakatshidiye wakula, mukuabo wakalua, wakamba ne, Bena Kasada bakaditahulula mu bisumbu bisatu, bakakuata tumelo, bakaya nʼatu, bakashiha bansongalume bakadi batulama ku muele wa nvita; anu meme nkayanyi nakuhanduka bua kukuambila." 
Job1:18 Hakatshidiye wakula, mukuabo kabidi wakalua, wakamba ne, Hakadi bana bebe ba balume ne bana bebe ba bakashi badia bidia ne banua nvinyo mu nsubu wa mukulu wabo," 
Job1:19 mena, tshihehele tshikole tshiakafumina ku tshihela, tshiakakuma ku matumba a nsubu anai, nsubu wakuhukila bansongalume, bakafua biabo. Anu meme nkayanyi nakuhanduka bua kukuambila." 
Job1:20 Hashishe, Yobo wakajuka, wakahanda muzabi wandi, wakabeya nsuki ya ku mutu, wakatua mpala wandi hanshi, wakatendelela Nzambi." 
Job1:21 Wakamba biandi ne, Nakaluhuka mu difu dia mamuʼanyi butaka, nempingane butaka. Yehowa wakampa bintu, Yehowa wakangata bintu; dina dia Yehowa ditumbishibue." 
Job1:22 Mu malu au onso Yobo kakenza bibi, kakabanda Nzambi ne, Udi wenza bibi." 
Job2:1 Dituku dikuabo, hakalua bana halume ba Nzambi kudimuenesha ku mesu kua Yehowa, Satana kabidi wakalua munkatshi muabo bua kudimuenesha ku mesu kua Yehowa." 
Job2:2 Yehowa wakakonka Satana ne, Udi ufuma kudi kunyi? Satana wakakudimuna Yehowa dî ne, Ndi nfuma ha buloba, nakadi ntambakana, ngendakana eku ne eku." 
Job2:3 Yehowa wakakonka Satana ne, Wakumona muntu wanyi Yobo, anyi? Kakuena muntu mukuabo bu yeye ha buloba; bu mudiye muntu wa mutshima mutoke ne wa malu makane, udi utshina Nzambi ne udi wehuka ku malu mabi. Yeye utshidi unanukila kulamata ku buakane buandi, kadi wewe wakanshikila bualu buandi bua kumubutula kayi ne bualu," 
Job2:4 Satana wakakudimuna Yehowa ne, Dikoba ku dikoba! Bulelela, bionso bidi muntu nʼabi yeye neabifile bua kusungila muoyo wandi." 
Job2:5 Kadi anji kuolola tshianza tshiebe, ulenge mifuba yandi ne misunyi yandi, ne yeye neakudiule ku mesu kuebe." 
Job2:6 Yehowa wakambila Satana ne, Ke yeye au udi mu tshianza tshiebe; kadi usungile muoyo wandi." 
Job2:7 Nunku Satana wakaluhuka ku mpala kua Yehowa, wakasamisha Yobo ne biusha binene hamʼbidi bonso, munda mua makasa tô ne ku lubombo lua mutu wandi." 
Job2:8 Yeye wakangata tshiyoyi tshia luesu bua kudikuanya nʼatshi hakadiye ushikama mu diala dia butue. 
Job2:9 Mukashi wandi wakamukonka ne, Wewe utshidi unanukila kulamata ku buakane buebe, anyi? Diula Nzambi ne fuaku biebe!" 
Job2:10 Kadi Yobo wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi wakula bu mukashi muhote. Kia! Tudi mua kuitabusha anu masanka ku tshianza tshia Nzambi, ne katuitabushi makenga, anyi? Mu malu au onso Yobo kakamba bualu bubi ku mishiku yandi nansha." 
Job2:11 Hakunvua balunda basatu ba Yobo lumu lua makenga au onso akamukuata, bakalua biabo, muntu ne muntu mufume ku muaba wandi, Elifaza, Muena Temana, Biledada, Muena Shuhi, ne Sofa, Muena Nâmata. Bualu bua bakahunga dî bua kulua hohamue bua kudila nʼandi ne bua kumusamba." 
Job2:12 Hakadibo kule ne hakabandulukabo, kabakamumanya; nunku bakadila ne mei makole. Bakadihanda, muntu ne muntu, muzabi wandi, bakela buloba mulu mu mitu yabo." 
Job2:13 Hashishe, bakashikama nʼandi mu buloba tô minya muanda mutekete ne mafuku muanda mutekete. Kakuena muntu mukuabo wakamuambila dî, bualu bua bakamona bu muakadi dikenga diandi dihita bukole." 
Job3:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakabulula mukana muandi, wakela dituku dia kuledibua kuandi mulau." 
Job3:2 Yobo wakabanga kuamba dî ne," 
Job3:3 Dituku diakandelabo dijimine, ne butuku buakamba ne, Muana mulume udi muimitshibue, bujimine." 
Job3:4 Dituku adi dikale mîdima; Nzambi wa mu diulu kadikebi; munya kauditemenyi. 
Job3:5 Mîdima ne mufidi mufike fitutû bidiangate. Difutu dishikamehu; bintu bionso bidi bifikisha difuku adi biditshinyishe. 
Job3:6 Bua bufuku abu, mîdima mikole ibukuate; kabuikadi ne disanka munkatshi mua matuku a tshidimu; kabubadibu munkatshi mua ngondo." 
Job3:7 E, bufuku abu buikale hatuhu; dî dia disanka kadibuedimu." 
Job3:8 Badi bamanye mua kuela matuku mulau bele butuku abu mulau, mbadi ne bukole mene bua kualula nyoka munene." 
Job3:9 Mitoto yakadi ikenka dilolo ikuate mîdima; didiku adi dindile munya, kadi kadiuhetshi; kadimonyi hatshiatshia." 
Job3:10 Bualu bua kadiakinshila bibi bia difu dia mamu wanyi, kadiakasokoka kanyinganyinga ku mesu kuanyi." 
Job3:11 Bualu kai tshiakaha diba diakandelabo? Bualu kai tshiakahuela muoyo diba dinakaluhuka munda mua mamu wanyi? 
Job3:12 Bualu kai tatu wanyi wakitabusha bua banteke ha bibelu biandi? Bualu kai mabele akadiku bua meme kuâmua? 
Job3:13 Nunku nakadi kulala hanshi diba adi, nakadi kuikala holâ; nakadi kulala tulu; nunku nakadi kuikisha" 
Job3:14 hohamue ne bakelenge ne bena meji ba ha buloba, bakadiashila majambu ku mishiki ya mabue;" 
Job3:15 anyi hohamue ne bakokeshi bakadi ne biamu bia or, bakûsha nsubu yabo tente ne tshiamu tshia argent." 
Job3:16 Nakadi kuikala bu muana wa kabishi musokoka, bu bana badi kabayi banze kutangila munya." 
Job3:17 Ku muaba au bantu babi badi halekela kutatshisha banga bantu, badi bahungila badi bikishaku." 
Job3:18 Ku muaba au bena lukanu badi bashikama talalâ, kabena bunvua dî dia mubenzeshi wa mudimu." 
Job3:19 Bahuekele ne baneme badiku, muhika udi ne budishikaminyi kudi mukelenge wandi." 
Job3:20 Bualu kai yeye udi uha muntu udi mu dikenga munya, ne udi uha muntu udi ne kanyinganyinga mu mutshima wandi muoyo?" 
Job3:21 Badi bajinga lufu, ne kaluena tulua kudibo, badi bumbula mu buloba bua kulukeba ne dikeba dihite dia biuma bisokoka bukole." 
Job3:22 Bobo badi basanka bikole, badi basanka, hasanganabo lukita." 
Job3:23 Bua tshinyi Nzambi udi uhesha muntu udi ne nshila wandi musokoka munya, ne udiye munyunguluke ne luhangu?" 
Job3:24 Kuhumuna kuanyi kudi kulua ku mpala kua bia kudia bianyi, ne kutua kuanyi kua mikemu kukole kudi kuhumuka bu mai." 
Job3:25 Bualu bua tshindi utshina tshidi tshinkuata; ne tshiakunkuatshisha buowa tshidi tshilua kundi. 
Job3:26 Tshiena ne ditalala, tshiena mua kushikama holâ; tshiena ne dikisha; kadi dikenga didi dinkuata." 
Job4:1 Hashishe, Elifaza, Muena Temana, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job4:2 Biakeba muntu kukuambila dî mpindiu, neukuate tshiji, anyi? Kadi muntu kai udi mua kudikanda bua kakudi?" 
Job4:3 Tangila, wewe wakuyisha bantu ba bungi, wakukolesha bianza biakadi bitekete." 
Job4:4 Mei ebe akubisha muntu wakadi wamba kudishinda, wakukolesha binu biakadi bitekete." 
Job4:5 Kadi mpindiu bualu ebu budi bukukuata, mutshima webe udi unema bujitu; budi bukulenga, buowa budi bukukuata." 
Job4:6 Kutshina kuebe kua Nzambi kakuena tshieyemenu tshiebe, anyi? Buakane bua bienzedi biebe kabuena ditekemena diebe, anyi?" 
Job4:7 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Uvuluke, utuambile ne, Muntu kai wakafua kayi ne tshilumbu? Bakabutula bantu bakane kudi kunyi?" 
Job4:8 Bu munakamana kutangila, badi bihila malu mabi, ne badi bakuna ntatu, nebahuole malu â muomumue." 
Job4:9 Badi bafua ku muhuya udi uhatuka mukana mua Nzambi, bua bukole bua tshiji tshiandi badi babutudibua." 
Job4:10 Muadi wa nyama wa ntambue ne dî dia nyama wa ntambue udi ne luonji biakuhuwa; ne menu a bana ba nyama ya ntambue onso akutshibuka. 
Job4:11 Nyama wa ntambue mukulukashi udi ufua bualu bua kena ukuata tshia kudieye, ne bana ba mukashi wa nyama wa ntambue badi batangadika." 
Job4:12 Dî diakafika kundi mu busokoko, nakunvua anu manunganyi adi." 
Job4:13 Mu meji a ku bikena kumona bufuku, hadi tulu tukole tukuata bantu," 
Job4:14 buowa buakankuata ne muzakalu, biakanyungisha mifuba yanyi yonso." 
Job4:15 Muhuya wakahita ha mpala hanyi, miosa ya hamʼbidi hanyi yakavuayila." 
Job4:16 Tshintu atshi tshiakimana, kadi meme tshiakamanya mua kumona tshinfuanyi tshiatshi; tshinfuanyi tshiakadi ku mesu kuanyi. Nakunvua dî ditekete diamba ne," 
Job4:17 Muntu wa ha buloba udi mua kuikala muakane ku mesu kua Nzambi, anyi? Muntu udi mua kuikala ne mutshima mutoke ku mesu kua Mufuki wandi, anyi?" 
Job4:18 Tangila, kena mua kueyemena ba mu diulu badi bamukuatshila mudimu, ne udi ubanda banjelo bandi ne, Badi ne mahanga." 
Job4:19 Nunku neatambe kumona mahanga kudi badi ne mibidi ya ha buloba, badi ne bishimikidi biabo mu dinfuenkenya, hadi baboteshibua bu tshibayibayi!" 
Job4:20 Ku dinda tô ne ku dilolo badi babatshibula bituha bituha, hadi bafua tshiendelele ne kakuena muntu udi umona lufu luabo." 
Job4:21 Bikala muonshi wa ntenta wabo mutuka munda muabo, kabena bafua, kabayi banze kuheta meji, anyi?" 
Job5:1 Ela di diebe mpindiu; mukuabo udiku udi mua kuitaba kûdi, anyi? Neuye kudi muntu kai wa munkatshi mua ba tshijila?" 
Job5:2 Bulelela, kanyinganyinga kadi kashiha muhote, ne tshiji tshidi tshishika mujibale." 
Job5:3 Nakumona muhote hakadiye ubanga kuela miji yandi mu buloba; kadi nakela nsubu wandi mulau lukasa. 
Job5:4 Bana bandi badi kule ne luhandu, badi babutudibua mu tshilumbuluidi tshia ku tshibi, kabayi ne muntu wa kubahandisha." 
Job5:5 Udi ne nzala udi udia bintu biakahuolabo, udi ubinyenga munkatshi mua meba mene; ne banyenga badi bubulula mukana bua kumina bintu biabo." 
Job5:6 Bualu bua makenga kaena atoloka mu dinfuenkenya, lutatu kaluena lumena mu buloba;" 
Job5:7 Kadi muntu udi uledibua bua kukengeye, bu mudi nsase iya mulu." 
Job5:8 Kadi meme hanyi nakadi kukeba Nzambi, nakadi kufila tshilumbu tshianyi mu bianza bia Nzambi," 
Job5:9 udi wenza malu manene ne malu adi bantu kabayi mua kujingulula, ne malu a kukema adi kâyi mua kubadibua:" 
Job5:10 udi Ulokesha nvula ha buloba, udi utuma mai mu madimi;" 
Job5:11 udi ubandisha bantu bahuekele mulu, udi ujula badi badila bua bobo bikale ne luhandu;" 
Job5:12 udi uhumbisha malu adi bena budimu bahangidisha, nunku bianza biabo kabiena bimanye mua kubalubuluila bualu buakuhangabo;" 
Job5:13 udi ukuata bena meji mu budimu buabo; ne meji adi bena budimu bahangidisha adi malekedibue. 
Job5:14 Badi basangakana ne mîdima mu munya, badi benda babubuta munda munya bu mudibo benza mundankulu." 
Job5:15 Kadi Nzambi udi Usungila bahele ku muele wa nvita wa mukana muabo, udi ubasungila mu bianza bia bantu bakole." 
Job5:16 Nunku bahele badi ne diteke mena, ne bubi budi bubuikila mukana muabu." 
Job5:17 Mona, muntu udi Nzambi ubela udi ne disanka; nunku kubengi dikengesha didi Wa Bukole Buonso ukuyisha nʼadi." 
Job5:18 Bualu bua yeye udi utaha mputa, kadi udi umujingila kabidi; udi ukuma, kadi bianza biandi bidi bishikisha disama." 
Job5:19 Neakuhandishe ku makenga asa mbombo, e, nansha mu makenga muanda mutekete bualu bubi kabuena bukulenga." 
Job5:20 Halua tshiole, yeye neakuhandishe ku lufu; halua nvita, neakuhandishe ku bukole bua muele wa nvita." 
Job5:21 Neakusokoke halua bena bunsonge, kuena utshina kabutu haluaku." 
Job5:22 Neuseke kabutu ne tshiole, kuena utshina nyama ya ha buloba." 
Job5:23 Bualu bua neuhunge tshihungidi ne mabue bua kânyangi madimi ebe, ne nyama ya mu mpata neyikale nʼebe ditalala." 
Job5:24 Neumanye ne, Ntenta wanyi udi ne diakalengele, ne hawaya kutangila luhangu luebe lua bimuna, kuena usangana tshintu tshimue tshijimine." 
Job5:25 Neumanye kabidi ne, Tunkanu nuina tuanyi tudi tuvulangana, ne bana banyi baledibue badi bu mashinde a ha buloba." 
Job5:26 Neubuele mu lukita luebe hawalua muntu mukole, bu tshisumbu tshia blé tshidibo babanda nʼatshi ku tshishihuidi mu tshikondo tshiabobeye." 
Job5:27 Ke muanda eu: tuakumana kukeba kûjingulula, ne udi wa bushuwa; Wewe ûnvue, ûmanye kabidi bua wowo wikale bu diakalengele diebe." 
Job6:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakandamuna ne," 
Job6:2 Nakadi kusua bua bujitu bua ntatu yanyi buidikishibue bimpe, ne bua bateke makenga anyi onso mu tshiamu tshia kuidikisha nʼatshi bujitu!" 
Job6:3 Nunku biakadi kutamba nsenga ya ku mai manene bujitu; bua bualu ebu mei anyi akadi a lukasa lukasa. 
Job6:4 Bualu bua mikete ya Wa Bukole Buonso idi munda muanyi, muoyo wanyi udi unua lulengu luai; malu adi Nzambi untshinyisha nʼau adi mela mualu wa nvita ku mpala kuanyi." 
Job6:5 Mpunda wa mu tshisuku udi udila muadi hikaleye ne mashinde a kudia, anyi? Ngombe kabidi udi udila muadi hikaleye ne bia kudia, anyi?" 
Job6:6 Badi badia tshintu tshitshihala tshianana kabayi belamu luehu, anyi? Kutua kuimpe kudi mu milembulembu ya makela, anyi?" 
Job6:7 Mutshima wanyi udi ubenga kubilenga; bidi bu bia kudia bidi butonda! 
Job6:8 Nakadi kusua bua bualu bundi ndomba buenjibue, ne bua Nzambi itabushe bua kumpa muanda undi njinga!" 
Job6:9 Nakadi kusua bua Nzambi ikale ne disanka bua kumbutula; bua yeye alekele kukanda tshianza tshiandi ne ahempe muonshi wa muoyo wanyi! 
Job6:10 Nunku busambi buakadi kuikala kundi; nakadi kutungila mu kanyinganyinga kadi kakayi kandekela, bua muanda eu ne, Tshiakubenga mei a Wa Tshijila." 
Job6:11 Ndi ne bukole kai bua meme kumanya mua kuindila talalâ? Nshikidilu wanyi neikale tshinyi bua meme ngikale ne lutulu? 
Job6:12 Bukole buanyi budi bu bua mabue, anyi? Mubidi wanyi udi bu wa tshiamu tshia mitaku, anyi?" 
Job6:13 Bushuwa, kakuena bualu munda muanyi budi mua kunkuatshisha, ne meji akadi mua kunsungila akûmushibua kundi." 
Job6:14 Kudi muntu udi wamba kuhanga bidi bimpe bua mulunda wandi kumulesha luse, anyi bumue nealekele dishina dia Wa Bukole Buonso." 
Job6:15 Bana betu bakundinga bu musulu wa mai udi uhasalala, udi ûma ku nyima, bu nshila wa misulu ya mai idi ikama." 
Job6:16 Idi ne mai mafike bualu bua mabue a mashika adimu, ne bua neige udi usokomamu." 
Job6:17 Mu tshikondo tshidi munya utema idi ijimina; hatema munya bikole, idi ikama ne idi yumushibua mu miaba yai." 
Job6:18 Bisumbu bia bena luendu bidi bisesuka mu nshila yabo; bidi bibuela mu tshihela tshia lusenga, bidi bifua." 
Job6:19 Bena luendu ba ku Tema bakakeba mai, bisumbu bia bena luendu ba ku Sheba biakâtekemena." 
Job6:20 Bakafuishibua bundu bualu bua bakâeyemena, bakafika kudiu, bakatamuka." 
Job6:21 Nuenu nudi nanku kundi mpindiu, nudi numona dikenga dianyi, ne buowa budi bunukuata." 
Job6:22 Nakunulomba bua kumpa tshintu, anyi? Nakunulomba bua kunfidila mbueshilu, anyi?" 
Job6:23 Nakunulomba bua kunsungila mu bianza bia muena lukuna, anyi? Nakunulomba bua kumpikula mu bianza bia banyengi ba bintu, anyi?" 
Job6:24 Nunyishe, meme nempuwe bianyi; nundeshe bimpe bu mundi muhange." 
Job6:25 Monai mudi mei malelela ne bukole bua kutuisha muntu! Kadi kubela kuenu kudi kunfuisha ku bubi kai? 
Job6:26 Nudi nuelangana meji bua kungela bua mei anakuamba, anyi? Kadi mei a muntu udi ne bualu budi kumuhita bukole adi bu luhehele." 
Job6:27 Bulelela, nuenu nudi basue kuelela muanʼa nshiya nshobo, nudi basue kuenduluka mushinga ne mulunda wenu!" 
Job6:28 Nuanji kuitabusha bua kuntangila ku mesu; bulelela, tshiena ndinga ku mesu kuenu nansha." 
Job6:29 Ndi nnusengelela ne, Lekelai bualu budi kabuyi buakane; e, vulukai, buakane buanyi butshidi bujalame munda muanyi." 
Job6:30 Bualu bubi budi buambibua ku ludimi luanyi, anyi? Meme tshiena mua kujingulula malu adi kâyi makane mukana muanyi, anyi?" 
Job7:1 Muntu kena ne tshikondo tshia kuenzeye mudimu mukole hanshi ha buloba, anyi? Matuku andi kaena bu a muena mudimu wa difutu, anyi?" 
Job7:2 Bu mudi muhika ujinga mundidimbi wa dihueka dia diba, bu mudi muena mudimu wa difutu windila difutu diandi," 
Job7:3 nunku badi bampesha ngondo idi anu ne malu a hatuhu, badi bakunguila mafuku adi ne ntatu." 
Job7:4 Hanalala hanshi, ndi ndikonka ne, Nembike diba kai, nsangana butuku bumane kutshia? Ndi nsumpakana eku ne eku tô ne hatshia butuku." 
Job7:5 Bikusu ne mabuwa a buloba bidi hamʼbidi hanyi bonso; dikoba dianyi didi dihandika, dihatuka mai." 
Job7:6 Matuku anyi adi ahita mundongo wa mukumi wa bilulu kuenda lubilu, adi afika kunshikidilu kuau tshiyi ne ditekemena." 
Job7:7 Nzambi, uvuluke biebe ne muoyo wanyi udi anu muhuya, disu dianyi kadiena dimona diakalengele kabidi" 
Job7:8 Disu dia udi untangila kadiena dintangila kabidi, mesu ebe neikale kundi, meme tshitshiyihu." 
Job7:9 Bu mudi ditutu ditangadika ne dijimina, nunku muntu wahueka mu Muaba wa Bafue kena uhingana kabidi," 
Job7:10 kena uhingana kabidi mu nsubu muandi, ba ku muaba wakadiye ushikama diambedi kabena bamumona kabidi." 
Job7:11 Meme kabidi tshiena mbuikila mukana muanyi; nengambe di ne kanyinganyinga ka mutshima wanyi; nentontolole bua ntatu ya mu muoyo wanyi. 
Job7:12 Ndi mai manene anyi nyama wa mu mai manene bua wewe udi uteka mutentekedi bua kuntentekela, anyi?" 
Job7:13 Hangamba bianyi ne, Bulalu buanyi nebunsambe, ditanda dianyi dia kulala nediholeshe meji adi annyingalasha;" 
Job7:14 wewe udi untshinyisha ne bilota, udi unkuatshisha buowa bukole ne bikena kumona." 
Job7:15 Nunku mutshima wanyi udi utamba kusungula bua kunfiekelabo mu nshingu; ndi nsungula lufu ku mpala kua makenga anyi. 
Job7:16 Muoyo wanyi udi untonda! Tshiena musue kuikala ne muoyo tshiendelele. Undekele, bualu bua matuku anyi adi anu bu muhuya." 
Job7:17 Muntu udi tshinyi, bua wewe udi umutumbisha, ne bua wewe udi uteka mutshima webe kudiye;" 
Job7:18 bua wewe udi ulua kumutangila ku dinda ku dinda, ne udi umuteta meba onso?" 
Job7:19 Musangu neulehe bule munyi wewe kuyi muanji kumusha mesu ebe kundi? Neundekele musangu bule munyi bua meme kumina mate anyi? 
Job7:20 Bingikala muenze bibi, ndi mua kukuenzela tshinyi, wewe, mulami wa bantu? Bualu kai wewe wakunteka bu tshimanyinu tshia kuasaku mikete yebe, tô ne hakalua bualu ebu bujitu kundi?" 
Job7:21 Wewe kuena umbuikidila bubi buanyi, kuena ungumusha malu mabi anyi bua tshinyi? Bualu bua mpindiu nendale hanshi mu dinfuenkenya, ne wewe neunkebe ne disuminyina, kadi tshiena ngikalaku." 
Job8:1 Hashishe, Biledada, Muena Shuhi, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job8:2 Wewe newambe mei â musangu bule bishi? Mei a mukana muebe neikale bu tshihehele tshikole musangu bule bishi? 
Job8:3 Nzambi udi ukonyangasha kulumbulula kuakane, anyi? Wa Bukole Buonso udi ukonyangasha buakane, anyi?" 
Job8:4 Bikala bana bebe bamuenzele bibi, yeye wakubafila mu dikenga dikole bua bubi buabo;" 
Job8:5 biwasua kukeba Nzambi ne disuminyina, biwasua kulomba Wa Bukole Buonso ne disengelela diebe," 
Job8:6 biwikala ne mutshima mutoke, biwikala muakane; bulelela, yeye neabike bua kukukuatshisha mu bualu buebe, neahingashe diakalengele ku nsubu webe wa buakane." 
Job8:7 Nansha bikala tshibangidilu tshiebe tshikese, nshikidilu webe neahite bunene." 
Job8:8 Ndi nkusengelela bua kukonka bantu ba mu milongo ya kale, teka mutshima webe ku malu akakeba batatu babo kujingulula." 
Job8:9 Bualu bua tuetu ludi anu bu bantu bakalelabo makelela, katuena bamanye bualu, bualu bua matuku etu a ha buloba adi anu bu mundidimbi." 
Job8:10 Bobo kabena bakuyisha, kabena bakuambila, kabena bamba mei a mu mitshima yabo, anyi?" 
Job8:11 Lutuhu ludi mua kudiunda bimpe hadi kahayi lunteke, anyi? Disele didi mua kudiunda hadi kahayi mai, anyi?" 
Job8:12 Hatshididi dihia-dihia, kabayi banze kudikosa, didi ditamba midioko yonso kufubidila lubilu." 
Job8:13 Nshikidilu wa bonso badi bahua Nzambi muoyo udi nunku; ne ditekemena dia muntu udi ubenga Nzambi didi difua; 
Job8:14 bualu bua ditekemena diandi didi dijimina, ne tshieyemenu tshiandi tshidi bu butande." 
Job8:15 Yeye udi weyemena nsubu wandi, kadi nsubu kena ushindama; neamuobokele ne bianza biandi, kadi kena ukandamana." 
Job8:16 Yeye udi bu mudioko mubishi mu munya, ntonga yandi idi ilamba mu tshibidi tshiandi." 
Job8:17 Miji yandi idi ijingila ku mushiki wa mabue, ne yeye udi udiunda munkatshi mua mabue." 
Job8:18 Biamubutulabo mu muaba wandi, muaba eu neumubenge ne, Tshiena muanze kukumona." 
Job8:19 Tangila, edi ndisanka didiye nʼadi mu nshila wandi! Ne bakuabo badi batoloka mu buloba kabidi." 
Job8:20 Bulelela, Nzambi kena uhidia muntu udi muakane tshishiki, kena ujadika benji ba malu mabi." 
Job8:21 Yeye neanji kûsha mukana muebe ne tuseku ne mishiku yebe ne mbila ya disanka. 
Job8:22 Bena lukuna bebe nebafuishibue bundu, ne ntenta wa bantu babi kena wikalaku kabidi." 
Job9:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakamukudimuna ne," 
Job9:2 Ndi mumanye bimpe ne, Bualu ebu mbulelela; kadi muntu neamanye mua kuikala muakane ku mpala kua Nzambi munyi?" 
Job9:3 Biasueye kuelangana nʼandi mpata, kena mumanye mua kuitaba ku dikonka dimue munkatshi mua makonka tshinunu." 
Job9:4 Yeye udi ne meji mu mutshima, ne udi ne bukole buhite, muntu kai wakukolesha mutshima wandi ku mpala kuandi ne wakutula dikasa dimpe?" 
Job9:5 Yeye udi umusha mikuna minene kayiyi mimanye bualu, hayikudimuneye mu tshiji tshiandi." 
Job9:6 Udi uzakasha buloba, ubûmusha mu muaba wabu, ne bishimikidi biabu bidi bikanka." 
Job9:7 Udi welela diba mukenji, ne kadiena dibanda, udi ubuikila mitoto, utekahu tshimanyishilu tshiandi." 
Job9:8 Udi uvungulula bintu bia mu diulu nkayandi, udi wenda ha mavuala a mu mai manene." 
Job9:9 Udi ufuka mitoto ya Ourse Munene, ya Nyama ne Mbua ne Muntu ne ya Tshidiminanzashi, ne mitoto ya ku sude." 
Job9:10 Udi wenza malu manene ne adi bantu kabayi bamanye mua kujingulula, udi wenza malu a kukema adi kâyi mua kubadibua." 
Job9:11 Tangila, yeye udi uhita hehi nʼanyi, tshiena mmutangila nansha, udi utambaku, tshiena mmumona to." 
Job9:12 Tangila, bîanyengeye tshintu, udi mua kumukanda nganyi? Muntu kai udi mua kumukonka ne, Udi wenza tshinyi?" 
Job9:13 Nzambi kena ukanda tshiji tshia ndi; bakuatshishi ba Lahaba badi binama ku mpala kuandi. 
Job9:14 Nunku meme hanyi ndi mua kuandamuna dî kudi kunyi anyi kusungula mei bua kuelangana nʼandi mpata? 
Job9:15 Bu meme muikale muakane, tshiakadi kumanya mua kumufuisha; nakadi kutendekena mulumbuluishi wanyi." 
Job9:16 Bu meme mumubikile ne bu yeye muitabe kundi, tshiakadi kuitabusha ne, Yeye udi mua kunvua dî dianyi." 
Job9:17 Bualu bua yeye udi mutshibula ne tshihehele, udi uvudisha mputa yanyi tshiyi ne bualu." 
Job9:18 Kena witabusha bua meme kueyela, kadi udi ûsha mutshima wanyi tente ne bululu." 
Job9:19 Bituakula bua bukole, monai, yeye udi muhite bukole! Bituakula bua kulumbulula kuakane, yeye udi wamba ne, Wambikila nganyi?" 
Job9:20 Bingikala mubinge, mukana mua nyi nemumpishe; bingikala muakane, nemungambile ne, Udi ne bualu bubi." 
Job9:21 Meme muakane! Tshiena mua kudimanya nkayanyi; muoyo wanyi udi untondesha. 
Job9:22 Malu au onso adi muomumue kundi—nunku ndi ngamba ne, Yeye udi ushiha bantu bakane ne bantu babi." 
Job9:23 Biashiha tshihuhu bantu lubilu, yeye udi useka bua dikenga dikole dia bantu badi kabayi ne tshilumbu." 
Job9:24 Buloba budi bufidibua mu bianza bia bantu babi; yeye udi ubuikila mesu a balumbuluishi babu. Bikaleye kayi wenza nunku,— udi wenza bualu ebu nganyi?" 
Job9:25 Matuku anyi adi ahita luendu lua messager lubilu, adi anyema lubilu, kaena atangila diakalengele." 
Job9:26 Adi ahita bu mudi matu a ntuhu enda, bu nyunyu wa mukanku udi wauka ha tshintu tshia kubakuleye." 
Job9:27 Bingamba ne, Nempue meji adi annyingalasha muoyo, nendekele kubungama kuanyi, nengikale ne disanka," 
Job9:28 ndi ntshina makenga anyi onso, ndi mumanye ne, Wewe kuena umbingisha." 
Job9:29 Nempishibue; nunku ndi ukuata mudimu hatuhu bua tshinyi? 
Job9:30 Binowa ne neige, binatokesha bianza bianyi ne binshindimba," 
Job9:31 wewe neungele mu mutubu wa bintampi kabidi, ne bivualu bianyi mene nebindengulule." 
Job9:32 Bualu bua yeye kena muntu bu meme bua meme kumukudimuna dî, bua tuetu kulua hamue mu tshilumbuluidi." 
Job9:33 Kakuena musungi hankatshi betu udi mua kutulenga bubidi buetu tshianza. 
Job9:34 Umushe biandi mulangala wandi kundi, ne buowa buandi kabuntshinyishi;" 
Job9:35 hashishe, nakadi kuakula ne tshia kadi kumutshina, bualu bua tshiena bu muntu ngikala." 
Job10:1 Mutshima wanyi wakutondeshibua bua muoyo wanyi; nengambe meji adi annyingalasha hatoke tô, nengambe dî mu kanyinganyinga ka mutshima wanyi." 
Job10:2 Nengambile Nzambi ne, Kumpishi nansha; undeshe bualu butudi tufuila nʼebe." 
Job10:3 Bidi bimpe ku mesu kuebe bua wewe kunkengesha, bua wewe kubenga mudimu wa bianza biebe, ne bua wewe kutemesha munya webe ku meji a bantu babi, anyi?" 
Job10:4 Wewe udi ne mesu bu a muntu wa ha buloba, anyi? Udi umona bu mudi bantu bamona, anyi?" 
Job10:5 Matuku ebe adi bu matuku a muntu, anyi? Bidimu biebe bidi bu matuku a muntu, anyi?" 
Job10:6 Bua wewe udi ukeba kumanya malu adi ampisha, ne udi ukeba kumanya bubi buanyi," 
Job10:7 kadi wewe udi mumanye ne, Tshiena muntu mubi; ne kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kunsungila mu tshianza tshiebe." 
Job10:8 Bianza biebe biakanfuka ne biakangenza mundi emu, ne wewe udi musue kunshiha." 
Job10:9 Ndi nkutendekena ne, Uvuluke ne, Wewe wakasumba bu dima; neampingishe mu dinfuenkenya dia buloba kabidi, anyi?" 
Job10:10 Kuakampongolola bu mabele, anyi? Kuakankuatakasha bu fromage, anyi?" 
Job10:11 Wakangasa dikoba ne munyinyi, wakansuikakasha ne mifuba ne mifungu." 
Job10:12 Wewe wakumpa muoyo ne wakundesha luse lujalame, ne bulami buebe buakulama muoyo wanyi;" 
Job10:13 kadi wewe wakadi usokoka malu â mu mutshima webe. Ndi mumanye ne, Bualu buanyi ebu buakadi mu mutshima webe ne," 
Job10:14 Bingenza bualu bubi, wewe neuntangile talalâ, ne kuena umbingisha ku bubi buanyi." 
Job10:15 Bingikala ne bubi, ndi ne mulau; nansha bingikala muakane, tshiena mbisha mutu wanyi, bualu bua nakûshibua tente ne bundu handi ntangila makenga anyi." 
Job10:16 Bingikala ne bukitu bua kubisha mutu wanyi, wewe neunkebe bu mudi nyama wa ntambue wenza; neangenzele malu manene a kukema kabidi." 
Job10:17 Udi ubisha bamonyi bahia-bahia bua bobo kumbanda, udi ukumbasha tshiji tshiebe kundi, udi uvuisha bisumbu bihia-bihia bia makenga hamʼbidi hanyi." 
Job10:18 Wakampatula munda mua mamu wanyi bua tshinyi? Nakadi kuhuola muoyo, ne disu dia muntu kadiakadi kuntangila." 
Job10:19 Nakadi kuikala bu munakadi tshidiku; bakadi kungangata munda mua mamu wanyi bantuale tô ne ku lukita. 
Job10:20 Matuku a muoyo wanyi kaena manya-manya, anyi? Yeye anji kundekela tshituha, yeye anji kumuka kundi, bua meme ngikale ne busambi bukese," 
Job10:21 diambedi tshiyi muanji kuya kundi tshiyi mua kuhingana kabidi, ku buloba bua mîdima ne bua mundidimbi wa lufu." 
Job10:22 Budi buloba budi ne mufitu bu midima mikole, bua mundidimbi wa lufu ne bua kutompakasha kua malu, kudi munya bu midima mikole." 
Job11:1 Hashishe, Sofâ, Muena Namata, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job11:2 Katuena ne bua kuitaba kudi muena mei a bungi, anyi? Nebabingishe muntu udi utamba kuakula, anyi?" 
Job11:3 Kufunafuna kuebe kudi kumanya mua kuhuwisha bantu, anyi? Hawaseka Nzambi, kakuena muntu udi ukufuisha bundu, anyi?" 
Job11:4 Bua wewe udi wamba ne, Diyisha dianyi didi diakane, ne ndi ne mutshima mutoke ku mesu kuebe." 
Job11:5 Kadi nakadi kusua bua Nzambi ambe dî diandi, ne abutule mukana muandi bua kukutuisha," 
Job11:6 ne bua yeye akuleshe malu masokoka a mu meji andi! Bualu bua yeye udi ne lungenyi lule, umanye biebe ne, Nzambi kena ukumbasha dikenga diebe bu mudi bubi buebe." 
Job11:7 Wewe udi mumanye mua kumona ndekelu wa ndondo wa malu a Nzambi, anyi? Neumanye mua kufika ku nshikidilu wa meji a Wa Bukole Buonso, anyi?" 
Job11:8 Adi ahita diulu bule, udi mua kuenza tshinyi? Adi atamba Muaba wa Bafue ku ndondo; udi mua kumanya tshinyi?" 
Job11:9 Adi atamba buloba bule ku tshidikishilu tshiau, adi atamba mai manene bunene buau." 
Job11:10 Biahileye mu nshila, biakuateye muntu mu lukanu, biamubikileye ku tshilumbuluidi, wamuhumbisha nganyi?" 
Job11:11 Bualu bua yeye udi mumanye bantu badi ne mashimi; udi umona malu mabi nansha bikaleye kayi wela meji a malu â. 
Job11:12 Kadi muntu udi kayi ne meji neahete lungenyi, anu biamanya muana wa nyama wa mpunda wa mu mpata mua kuledibua bu muntu." 
Job11:13 Biwafila mutshima webe kudi Nzambi, wolola bianza biebe kudiye." 
Job11:14 Bikala bualu bubi mu tshianza tshiebe, ubûmushe kule; kuitabushi bua malu mabi ikale mu ntenta webe." 
Job11:15 Hashishe, neumanye mua kubandisha mpala webe kayi ne tshilema bulelela, wewe neutantamane ne kuena utshina." 
Job11:16 Bualu bua tshihua muoyo netshikukuate bua dikenga diebe, neudivuluke anu bu mai mamane kuhueka." 
Job11:17 Muoyo webe neubike ne dinkenka dihite dia munda munya; nansha bikalaku mîdima, yoyi neyilue bu dinda." 
Job11:18 Newikale ne tshieyemenu, bualu bua ditekemena didiku; neutentekele miaba yonso diambedi, hashishe, newikishe talalâ." 
Job11:19 Neumanye mua kulala hanshi, kakuyi muntu wa kukutshinyisha; e, ba bungi nebakebe diakalengele kûdi." 
Job11:20 Kadi mesu a bantu babi nealue bitayitayi; tshinyemenu tshiabo netshijimme ku mpala kuabo, ne ditekemena diabo nedikale anu kuhuola kua muoyo." 
Job12:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakakudimuna Sofâ ne," 
Job12:2 Kakuena mpata mu bualu ebu ne, Nuenu nudi bukua bantu, ne meji neafue nʼenu diatshimue!" 
Job12:3 Kadi meme ndi ne lungenyi bu munudi nʼalu; lungenyi luanyi kaluena lushadila ku luenu; bulelela, muntu kai udi kayi mumanye malu anudi nuamba?" 
Job12:4 Nakulua bu muntu udibo basekaseka kudi muena mutumba nʼandi, meme mene nguakubikila Nzambi, ne yeye wakitaba kundi. Muntu muakane, muntu muakane tshishiki, wakulua tshintu tshia bantu kuseka!" 
Job12:5 Muntu udi kayi ne ntatu udi uhetula muntu udi ututa dikasa dibi; dihetu diandi didi dialamina badi ne makasa amba kuselemuka. 
Job12:6 Ntenta ya banyengi ba bintu idi anu ne diakalengele, ne badi bakuatshisha Nzambi tshiji badi bashikama talalâ, nansha yonso mulue ne nzambi wandi mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Job12:7 Kadi ukonke nyama mene, ne yoyi neyikuyishe; ukonke nyunyu ya mulu ne yoyi neyikuambile;" 
Job12:8 anyi akule ne buloba, ne buobu nebukuyishe; ne minyinyi ya mu mai manene neyikuambile dî." 
Job12:9 Muntu kai udi kayi mumanye bintu ebi bionso ne, Tshianza tshia Yehowa tshiakenza bualu ebu," 
Job12:10 ne mu tshianza tshiandi mudi muoyo wa bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo ne muhuya wa bukua bantu bonso? 
Job12:11 Ditshu kadiena diteta mei, bu mudi ludimi lulabula bia kudia bialu, anyi?" 
Job12:12 Meji adi kudi bantu bakoke, ne dijingulula dia malu didi kudi badi ne matuku a bungi." 
Job12:13 Kudi Nzambi kudi meji ne bukole; yeye udi ne lungenyi ne dijingulula dia malu. 
Job12:14 Yeye udi usasula ne kabena ba manye mua kuibaka kabidi; udi winshidila muntu mu nsubu wa lukanu ne kakuena disoso dia yeye kuhatukila. 
Job12:15 Monai, yeye udi ukanda mai a mbila, ne mai adi akama; udi watuma kabidi, ne adi abumbula buloba." 
Job12:16 Kudi yeye kudi bukole ne meji makane; muhambuki ne muhambuishi badi mu bianza biandi. 
Job12:17 Yeye udi utuma bena meji mu buhika butaka, udi uvuisha balumbuluishi bu bahote." 
Job12:18 Udi usulula nkanu idi banfumu basuika nʼai bakuabo, udi ubasuika mikaba mu bifuka." 
Job12:19 Udi utuma bakuidi mu buhika butaka, udi ubutula bantu badi ne bukole." 
Job12:20 Udi ukanda mei a ku mishiku ya badibo beyemena, udi unyenga bakulumpe lungenyi." 
Job12:21 Udi ulengulula bakokeshi, udi usulula mukaba wa bantu bakole." 
Job12:22 Udi usokolola malu adi masokoma mu mîdima, udi uhatula mufitu mufike fitutû bua kumuenekau mu munya." 
Job12:23 Udi uvuisha bisamba bia bantu binene, ne udi ubishiha; udi ulehesha mikalu ya bisamba bia bantu, ne udi ubituma mu buhika." 
Job12:24 Udi unyenga lungenyi lua bakelenge ba bantu ba ha buloba, udi ubendesha mu tshihela mudi kamuyi nshila." 
Job12:25 Badi benda babubuta mu mîdima kabayi ne muinda, udi ubendesha bu bakuatshila ba maluvu." 
Job13:1 Monai, mesu anyi akumona malu â onso, matshu anyi akûnvua ne akuajingulula." 
Job13:2 Malu anudi bamanye meme ndi muamanye kabidi; lungenyi luanyi kaluena lushadila ku luenu. 
Job13:3 Kadi ndi musue kuakula ne Wa Bukole Buonso, ndi musue kuyikilangana ne Nzambi bualu buanyi." 
Job13:4 Kadi nuenu nudi bafuki ba malu a mashimi, buonso buenu nudi bondahi ba hatuhu." 
Job13:5 Nakadi kusua bua nuenu kuhuwa talalâ, ne bua kuhuwa kuenu kuikale bu lungenyi luenu." 
Job13:6 Nunku, unvuai mei andi nnubela nʼau, telejai matshu ku disengelela dia ku mishiku yanyi." 
Job13:7 Nudi basue kuakuila Nzambi ne mei adi kâyi makane, anyi? Nudi basue kuamba mei a mashimi bua bualu buandi, anyi?" 
Job13:8 Nudi basue kumunemeka ne kundesha meme kansungusungu, anyi? Nudi basue kuakuila Nzambi, anyi?" 
Job13:9 Bidi bimpe bua yeye anukebekebe, anyi? Nenumanye mua kumudinga bu mudi muntu udinga mukuabo, anyi?" 
Job13:10 Yeye neanubele bikole, binuikala ne kansungusungu mu musokoko." 
Job13:11 Butumbi buandi kabuena bunutshinyisha, anyi? Buowa bua bualu buandi kabuena bunukuata, anyi?" 
Job13:12 Nsumuinu yenu idi anu nsumuinu ya butue, mei anudi nudividila nʼau adi anu bu ngabu ya dima." 
Job13:13 Nuanji kutulesha, nundekele bua meme ngakule bianyi; bualu budi busue kunkuata bunkuate." 
Job13:14 Kakuena bualu; nensume munyinyi wanyi ku menu anyi, nenteke muoyo wanyi mu tshianza tshianyi." 
Job13:15 Monai, yeye neanshihe; tshiena ne ditekemena; kadi nennanukile kudijidila ku mesu kuandi bua bienzedi bianyi." 
Job13:16 Kadi bualu ebu nebuikale luhandu luanyi ne, Muntu udi ubenga Nzambi kena ne bukitu bua kulua ku mpala kuandi." 
Job13:17 Unvuai dî dianyi bimpe, mei andi ngamba abuele mu matshu enu." 
Job13:18 Tangilai mpindiu ne, Nakuteka tshilumbu tshianyi ku mpala kuandi; ndi mumanye ne, Nembingishibue." 
Job13:19 Nganyi udi mua kuelangana nʼanyi mpata? Nunku nakadi kuhuwa talalâ ne kuhuola muoyo. 
Job13:20 Kuandi kungenzela malu abidi, nunku tshiena nsokoma ku mesu kuebe;" 
Job13:21 umushe tshianza tshiebe namʼbidi hanyi; tshikuatshiki buowa bua bualu buebe. 
Job13:22 Hashishe, umbikile, ne meme nengitabe kudi, anyi meme ngambe dî dianyi, ne wewe witabe kundi." 
Job13:23 Mibi yanyi ne malu mabi anyi bidi bungi munyi? Ummanyishe ditomboka dianyi ne bualu bubi buanyi. 
Job13:24 Bualu kai wewe udi usokoka mpala webe kundi, ne udi umbala bu muena lukuna webe?" 
Job13:25 Udi musue kuzakasha dibeshi didi luhehele lumane kunyungisha, anyi? Newihate bisonsa biume, anyi?" 
Job13:26 Bualu bua wewe udi ufunda malu makole bua kumbanda nʼau, ne udi umpingishila makenga bua malu mabi anakadi nʼau ku bunsongalume buanyi." 
Job13:27 Udi ubuesha makasa anyi mu tshikunyi, udi utentekela nshila yanyi yonso; udi ufunda mukalu ku makasa anyi;"
