Job13:28 kadi meme ndi bu tshintu tshibole tshidi tshinyanguke, bu tshilulu tshidi tubayibayi tumane kudia." 
Job14:1 Muntu udi muledibue kudi mukashi udi ne matuku makese a muoyo wandi ne udi mûle tente ne ntatu. 
Job14:2 Udi umena bu tshilongo ne udi ufubidila, udi uhita lubilu bu mundidimbi ne kena ushalaku." 
Job14:3 Udi ubulula mesu ebe kudi muntu wa nunku, udi umbikila ku mpala kuebe bua kulumbulula nʼebe, anyi?" 
Job14:4 Udi mua kuhatula tshintu tshia kane ku tshintu tshidi katshiyi tshiakane nganyi? Kakuena muntu. 
Job14:5 Bikala matuku a muntu mamane kuhangidisha, bikala bungi bua ngondo yandi mu bianza biebe; biwikala mujadike mikalu yandi bua yeye kayisambuki," 
Job14:6 anji kumusha mesu ebe kudiye bua yeye amanye mua kuikisha biandi, tô ne hamanyeye mua kusanka kundekelu kua dituku diandi, bu mudi muena mudimu wa difutu usanka." 
Job14:7 Bualu bua badi bamanye mua kutekemena mutshi ne, Biakatulabo kuinshi, neusangile kabidi, ne ntonga yau kayena ilekela kusangila." 
Job14:8 Biafubidila muji wau mu buloba, biafua tshikuku tshiau mu buloba," 
Job14:9 hashishe, hunvuau mai, newele bilongo, neusampile ntonga bu mutshi utshidi mutekete." 
Job14:10 Kadi muntu udi ufua ne bukole buandi budi bujimina; e, muntu udi uhuola muoyo wandi, hashishe, udi kudi kunyi?" 
Job14:11 Bu mudi mai a mu dishiha akama, ne bu mudi musulu ûma ne ukamuka," 
Job14:12 nunku muntu udi ulala hanshi kena ubika kabidi; tô ne hajimina diulu kabena batabala, kabena ba bahisha ku tulu tuabo." 
Job14:13 Nakadi kusua bua wewe unsokoke mu Muaba wa Bafue, bua wewe unsokoke to ne bumuka tshiji tshiebe, bua wewe unsunguile tshikondo tshijalame ne bua wewe unvuluke!" 
Job14:14 Biafua muntu, neikale ne muoyo kabidi, anyi? Nakadi kuindila matuku onso a tshikondo tshianyi tshia kuluangana nvita, tô ne hakadi kulua tshikondo tshia kundekela." 
Job14:15 Wewe wakadi ku mbikila ne meme nakadi kuitaba kûdi, wewe wakadi kunjinga, meme mudimu wa bianza biebe." 
Job14:16 Kadi katataka wewe udi ubala bungi bua biendedi bianyi; kuena utentekela bualu bubi buanyi, anyi?" 
Job14:17 Dihanga dianyi didi disuikibua mu mpaya, ne wewe udi ubuwa bubi buanyi." 
Job14:18 Kadi biuhuka mukuna mule, udi ujimina hatuhu; ne dibue didi diumuka mu muaba wadi." 
Job14:19 Mai adi aheula mabue; kuhasalala kua mai kudi kumusha dinfuenkenya dia buloba; wewe udi ujimisha ditekemena dia bantu muomumue. 
Job14:20 Wewe udi umutamba bukole misangu yonso ne yeye udi ujimina; wewe udi ukudimuna mpala wandi ne udi umuihata. 
Job14:21 Bana bandi badi baheta butumbi, kadi yeye kena mumanye bualu ebu; badi bahuekeshibua, kadi yeye kena ubamona." 
Job14:22 Kadi mubidi wandi udi unvua dikenga anu bua bualu buandi nkayandi, ne mutshima wandi udi unyingalala anu bua bualu buandi mene." 
Job15:1 Hashishe, Elifaza, Muena Temana, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job15:2 Bidi bimpe bua muena meji itabe ne lungenyi lua hatuhu, anyi? Bidi bimpe bua yeye adiûshe tente ne luhehele lua ku esete, anyi?" 
Job15:3 Bidi bimpe bua yeye kuelangana mpata ne muaku udi kauyi mua kukuatshisha mukuabo, ne mei adiye kayi mumanye mua kuenza nʼau bimpe, anyi?" 
Job15:4 Wewe mene udi uvuisha ditshina dietu dia Nzambi bu muanda wa hatuhu, ne udi ukanda muntu bua kutendelela Nzambi mu mutshima wandi." 
Job15:5 Bualu bua bubi buebe budi buyisha mukana muebe, ne wewe udi udisunguila ludimi lua muena budimu." 
Job15:6 Mukana muebe mudi mukuhisha, kemmeme; ne mishiku yebe idi ikubanda." 
Job15:7 Wewe mene wakadi muntu wa kumudilu wakalelabo, anyi? Bakakulela diambedi mikuna kayiyi mianze kufukibua, anyi?" 
Job15:8 Wewe udi uteleja matshu ebe ku tshifufu tshidi Nzambi wela, anyi? Wewe udi ubala bakuabo meji bua kuikala nʼau nkayebe, anyi?" 
Job15:9 Wewe udi mumanye bualu kai butudi katuyi bamanye? Udi ujingulula bualu kai budi kabuyi bumanyibue kutudi? 
Job15:10 Munkatshi muetu mudi badi ne nvî mitoke tô ne banunu bahite tatu webe bununu ku bungi bua matuku abo. 
Job15:11 Busambi bua Nzambi budi buta mba bukese kûdi, anyi? Dî dituakuakulangana nʼebe dia luse didi bualu bukese kûdi, anyi?" 
Job15:12 Bualu kai tshiji tshia mutshima webe tshidi tshikuata bukole? Mesu ebe adi abajakana ne tshiji munyi," 
Job15:13 bua wewe udi utekela Nzambi tshiji tshiebe ne udi uhatula mei a nunku mukana muebe? 
Job15:14 Muntu udi tshinyi bua yeye ikale ne mutshima mutoke, ne bua muntu muledibue kudi mukashi ikale muakane?" 
Job15:15 Tangila mudi Nzambi kayi weyemena bandi ba tshijila, ne diulu kadiena ditoke tô ku mesu kuandi;" 
Job15:16 ke mudi muntu udi umutondesha udi munyanguke, udi unua malu mabi bu mai, utamba kuhanga buakane." 
Job15:17 Nenkuleshe malu, unvua dî dianyi; nenkuambile malu anakutangila bianyi;" 
Job15:18 malu mene adi bena meji bamba, akunvuabo kudi batatu babo, kabakuasokoka;" 
Job15:19 buloba buakafidibua kudibo nkayabo, ne kakuakadi muntu wa bende wakahita munkatshi muabo." 
Job15:20 Muntu mubi udi ukenga ne didinyenga matuku andi onso, ne badi batekela mukengeshi wa bantu anu bidimu bidibo bamubadila." 
Job15:21 Tshiona tshia malu adi amukuatshisha buowa tshidi mu matshu andi; hadiye mushikame talalâ, mushihianganyi udi ulua kumubunda." 
Job15:22 Yeye kena witabusha ne, Nempanduke kabidi mu mîdima; badi bamuindila bua kufueye ku muele wa nvita." 
Job15:23 Udi wendakana ukeba bia kudia, ukonka ne, Bidi kudi kunyi? Udi mumanye ne dituku dia midima didi dimuindila." 
Job15:24 Dikenga ne kanyinganyinga bidi bimutshinyisha; bidi bimuhita bukole bu mukelenge mudilongolole bua kuluangana nvita. 
Job15:25 Bualu bua wakuolola tshianza tshiandi bua kutombokela Nzambi, ne udi udifunyisha kudi Wa Bukole Buonso." 
Job15:26 Udi uya kuluangana nʼandi muinyike mutu, mutekemene ngabu yandi ya bukole." 
Job15:27 Bualu bua matama andi akulua mafuta, ne milemba yandi yakudiunda ne mafuta hamʼbidi hai." 
Job15:28 Wakushikama mu misoko yakubutulabo, mu nsubu idi kayiyi mimpe bua muntu kushikama, yakadi yamba kulua mishiki ya mabue." 
Job15:29 Yeye kena wikala mubanji, ne biuma biandi kabiena bishala kudiye; ne miehu ya bia kudia biandi kayena inama mu buloba." 
Job15:30 Yeye kena wehuka midima; ludimi lua kahia nelufubishe ntonga yandi; ku muhuya wa mukana mua Nzambi yeye neahehuke. 
Job15:31 Keyemenyi biandi malu a hatuhu, kadidingi biandi, bualu bua malu a hatuhu neikale difutu diandi." 
Job15:32 Nebamufute difutu diandi dionso diambedi dituku diandi kadiyi dianze kufika, ne dilala diandi dia dibue kadiena dishala dibishi kabidi." 
Job15:33 Neanyange tumuma tuandi tua nvinyo tubishi, bu mudi muonshi watu wenza, neamatshishe tshilongo tshiandi hanshi bu mudi mutshi wa olive wenza." 
Job15:34 Bualu bua tshisumbu tshia babengi ba Nzambi katshiena tshitanta, ne kahia nekashidishe ntenta ya bena mbueshilu." 
Job15:35 Badi bimita ntatu, badi balela makenga, ne mitshima yabo idi ibalongoluela kudinga." 
Job16:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakakudimuna Elifaza ne," 
Job16:2 Nakunvua malu a bungi bu nunku, nudi basambi badi bantatshisha, buonso buenu!" 
Job16:3 Mei a hatuhu adi ne nshikidilu, anyi? Bualu kai budi bukufikisha munda bua wewe udi witaba?" 
Job16:4 Meme kabidi nakadi kumanya mua kuakula bu munudi nuakula, bu nuenu bikale mu muaba wanyi. Nakadi mua kubambakasha nʼenu mei bua kunudiula, nakadi mua kunukuhila mutu wanyi." 
Job16:5 Nakadi mua kukolesha mitshima yenu ne mei a mukana muanyi, ne busambi bua ku mishiku yanyi buakadi kunuholesha." 
Job16:6 Bingamba di, kanyinganyinga kanyi kakena kaholeshibua; binahuwa bianyi, nekumuke kundi, anyi?" 
Job16:7 Kadi mpindiu yeye wakuntekesha, wewe wakubutula bonso banakadi nʼabo." 
Job16:8 Wewe wakunshinguisha; muanda eu wakulua dibandibua dianyi; dinyana dianyi didi dibika bua kunkanda, didi dimbanda ku mesu kuanyi." 
Job16:9 Tshiji tshiandi tshiakumpanda ne tshiakunduisha, yeye wakundiangena menu andi, muena lukuna wanyi wakuntshika mesu andi bikole." 
Job16:10 Bakela miau bua bualu buanyi; bakuntaha mahi ku matama hakumpetulabo; badi badisangisha hamue bua kungelela tshifufu. 
Job16:11 Nzambi udi unfila mu bianza bia bantu babi, udi umbuesha mu bianza bia benji ba malu mabi." 
Job16:12 Nakadi nshikama talalâ, kadi yeye wakuntshibula bituha bituha. Wakunkuata ku nshingu, wakunkanda bihesa. Wakungimanyika bu tshimanyinu tshiandi tshia kuasaku mikete." 
Job16:13 Mikete yandi idi innyunguluka nseke yonso. Udi uhanda tumuma tua tuonyi tuanyi hankatshi, kayi unfuila luse. Udi uhumuna nyongangandu wanyi hanshi ha buloba." 
Job16:14 Udi untaha mputa mu miaba yonso, udi ulua kundi lubilu bu mudi umena bukitu." 
Job16:15 Nakuditelela bilulu bikayabala bindi nduata hamʼbidi hanyi, nakuladika lusengu luanyi mu buloba." 
Job16:16 Mpala wanyi wakulua mukunzekunzû bualu bua kudila kuanyi, ne ha bilafinyi bianyi hadi mundidimbi ya lufu." 
Job16:17 Kadi kakuena bienzedi bia tshimbambila ku bianza bianyi, kulomba kuanyi kakuena ne lubombo." 
Job16:18 Wewe buloba, kubuikidi mashi anyi, muadi wanyi kausanganyi muaba wa kuhuwilau talalâ!" 
Job16:19 Kadi mpindiu mene, monai, mumonyi wa bualu buanyi udi mu diulu, ne mujadiki wa dî dianyi udi mulu kabidi." 
Job16:20 Balunda banyi badi bambuidia; kadi mesu anyi adi ahumuina Nzambi binsonshi," 
Job16:21 bua yeye ajadike buakane bua muntu mu tshilumbu tshiandi ne Nzambi, ne buakane bua muntu mu tshilumbu tshiandi ne muena mutumba nʼandi." 
Job16:22 Bualu bua hahita bidimu bikese, nenye bianyi mu nshila undi tshiyi mua kuhingana kabidi." 
Job17:1 Muoyo wanyi wakubutuka, matuku anyi adi ahuwa; lukita ludi lungalamina." 
Job17:2 Bulelela, banseki badi ha buihi nʼanyi, ne disu dianyi ditu diamona ditatshisha diabo." 
Job17:3 Mpindiu ungeyeke tshieya, wikale mueyeki wa tshieya bua bualu buetu nʼebe, nganyi watutakasha nʼanyi bianza bua kuhunga tshihungidi?" 
Job17:4 Bualu bua wewe wakubuikila mitshima yabo bua kabikadi ne lungenyi, nunku wewe kuena witabusha bua bobo bahite bukole." 
Job17:5 Muntu udi unyoka balunda bandi bua tshituha tshia bintu, mesu a bana bandi mene neahange." 
Job17:6 Yeye wakunvuisha bu lusumuinu lua bantu kuelabo, ndi bu muntu udibo batuila lute ku mesu." 
Job17:7 Mesu anyi akulua bitayitayi bualu bua kanyinganyinga, ne bituha bianyi bionso bia mubidi bidi bu mundidimbi." 
Job17:8 Bantu bakane badi bakema bua muanda eu, muntu udi kayi ne tshilumbu udi ujuka bua kukanda bantu babi." 
Job17:9 Kadi muntu muakane neananukile kuenda mu nshila wandi, ne udi ne bianza bitoke neadiundediunde mu bukole buandi." 
Job17:10 Kadi buonso buenu hinganai kabidi ku mei enu a diambedi! Tshiena nsangana muena meji munkatshi muenu. 
Job17:11 Matuku anyi akumana kuhita; malu anakuhangidisha mu mutshima akulua tshianana, meji mene a mu mutshima wanyi." 
Job17:12 Badi bandamuna butuku bua kuikalabu munya, badi bamba ne, Munya udi hehi, hamba butuku kuila." 
Job17:13 Binatekemena ne, Muaba wa Bafue newikale nsubu wanyi, binalongolola bulalu buanyi mu midima," 
Job17:14 bingambila Dijimba dia Bafue ne, Wewe udi tatu wanyi; bingambila tshikusu ne, Wewe mmamu wanyi ne muanʼetu wa bakashi;" 
Job17:15 ditekemena dianyi didi kudi kunyi? Muntu kai neamone ditekemena dianyi? 
Job17:16 Neuhueke nʼanyi tô ne ku bibi bia ku Muaba wa Bafue, anyi? Netuhueke nʼabi mu buloba hohamue, anyi?" 
Job18:1 Hashishe, Biledada, Muena Shuhi, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job18:2 Neukebe mei a kuamba musangu bule bishi? Wele meji, hashishe nenyikile." 
Job18:3 Bualu kai wewe udi utubala bu nyama? Bualu kai ludi bu batshimbakanyi ku mesu kuebe? 
Job18:4 Wewe udi udituanya mu tshiji tshiebe, buloba nebushale tshianana kabuyi ne bantu bua bualu buebe, anyi? Anyi dibue nediumushibue mu muaba wadi, anyi?" 
Job18:5 Bulelela, muinda wa bantu babi neujime, ne ludimi lua kahia kandi kaluena lukenka." 
Job18:6 Munya neulue mîdima mu ntenta wandi, ne muinda wa mulu mua nsubu wandi neujime." 
Job18:7 Biendedi bia bukole buandi nebibumbakane, ne meji adiye uhangidisha neamulenduishe." 
Job18:8 Bualu bua makasa andi mene neamubueshe mu bukuondo, nênde ha mutu ha dijimba." 
Job18:9 Buteyi nebumukuate ku tshikankanyi; neahie ku disoka. 
Job18:10 Badi bamusokokela disoka mu buloba bua kumukuata nʼadi, badi bamuteya ne buteyi bua tshilamba mu nshila wandi." 
Job18:11 Malu a buowa adi amutshinyisha ku nseke yonso, adi amulonda ku nyima, adi amuihata." 
Job18:12 Nzala neidie bukole buandi buonso, dibutuka nedimuindile mu nshila." 
Job18:13 Disama nedidie dikoba diandi; muanʼa bute wa lufu neadie hidimba biandi. 
Job18:14 Nebamuhatule mu ntenta wandi wakadiye weyemena, nebalue nʼandi ku mpala kua mukelenge udi ukuatshisha buowa." 
Job18:15 Mu ntenta wandi nemuikale bintu bidi kabiyi biandi, nebamuangalashe soufre mu muaba wakadiye ushikama." 
Job18:16 Miji yandi neyume muinshi, nebahempe matamba andi kulu." 
Job18:17 Tshivulukidi tshia bualu buandi netshijimine ha buloba, dina diandi kadiena dimanyibue mu ditunga." 
Job18:18 Nebamuihate mu munya bua kuyeye mu mîdima, nebamuihate ha buloba." 
Job18:19 Yeye kena ne muana anyi kankanunuina munkatshi mua bantu bandi, kakuena muntu washala ne muoyo mu miaba yakadiye ushikama." 
Job18:20 Badi bamulonda nebakeme bua dituku diandi dia lufu, bakadianjila ku mpala kuandi nebakuatshike buowa bukole." 
Job18:21 Bulelela, ebu mbualu budi bukuata nsubu ya bantu babi, eu mmuaba wa muntu udi kayi mumanye Nzambi." 
Job19:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakandamuna ne," 
Job19:2 Musangu bule munyi nenunyingalashe mutshima wanyi, nenuntshibule bituha bituha ne mei enu?" 
Job19:3 Misangu ei dikumi nuakumana kumbela; kanuena ne bundu bualu bua nudi nungenzela bibi. 
Job19:4 Bingikala muhange bulelela, dihanga dianyi didi dishala kundi nkayanyi." 
Job19:5 Binuadibandisha ku mpala kuanyi bulelela, binuakeba kuntuisha bua bundu bundi nʼabu," 
Job19:6 nuamanya bienu ne, Nzambi wakutamba bukole, wakunnyunguluka ne bukuondo buandi." 
Job19:7 Monai, ndi ngela dî dikole ne, Badi bakeba kunshiha, kadi kabena bunvua dî dianyi; ndi ngela di dikole ne, Unkuatshishe, kadi kulumbulula kuakane kakuenaku." 
Job19:8 Yeye wakuasa luhangu lunyunguluka nshila wanyi bua meme tshihitshi; udi uteka mîdima mu nshila yanyi. 
Job19:9 Wakunvula butumbi buanyi, wakangumusha tshifulu tshia bukelenge ku mutu kuanyi." 
Job19:10 Wakalubutula ne bujima buanyi, nakamana kufua; wakutula ditekemena dianyi bu mudibo bajomona mutshi." 
Job19:11 Wakatemesha tshiji tshiandi kundi, udi umbala bu muena lukuna wandi." 
Job19:12 Misumba ya masalayi andi adi alua hamue, adi ela mushiki wa buloba bua kutshintshimika, adi anyunguluka ntenta wanyi ne bitudilu biabo." 
Job19:13 Wakûmusha bana betu kundi, balunda banyi bonso bakulua bu bantu ba bende kundi." 
Job19:14 Ba mu diku dianyi bakumpanga, bantu bakadi bammanye bimpe bakumana kumpua muoyo." 
Job19:15 Badi bashikame mu nsubu muanyi ne bakashi benji ba mudimu wanyi badi bambala bu muenyi; ndi bu muntu wa bende ku mesu kuabo. 
Job19:16 Binabikila muena mudimu wanyi, kena witaba kundi nansha; bundi nʼabu mbua kumusengelela ne mukana muanyi." 
Job19:17 Muhuya wa mukana muanyi udi ulonda mukashi wanyi, ndi ntonda kabidi bana betu ba difu dimue." 
Job19:18 Bana bakese mene badi bampetula; binajuka, badi bampenda." 
Job19:19 Bantu bonso banakeyemena badi bandengulula, banakunanga bakungela nyima." 
Job19:20 Mifuba yanyi idi ilamatangana ne dikoba dianyi ne munyinyi wanyi, nakuhanduka anu ne nyama ya mu menu." 
Job19:21 Nunfuile luse, nuenu balunda banyi; nunfuile luse; bualu bua tshianza tshia Nzambi tshiakundenga." 
Job19:22 Bualu kai nudi basue kundonda ne kunkengesha bu mudi Nzambi wenza, kanuena banze kukuta munyinyi wanyi?" 
Job19:23 Nakadi kusua bua bafunde mei anyi! Nakadi kusua bua bâfunde mu mukanda muvunga! 
Job19:24 Nakadi kusua bua mei â asongibue ha dibue tshiendelele ku tshiamu tshia kusonga nʼatshi maleta, ne ku tshiamu tshia lutende!" 
Job19:25 Kadi meme hanyi ndi mumanye ne, Muakudi wanyi udi ne muoyo; ne mu matuku a kunshikidilu yeye neimane ha buloba." 
Job19:26 Habutuka dikoba dianyi, hashishe, tshiyi ne mubidi wanyi, nemmonangane ne Nzambi." 
Job19:27 Meme mene nemmumone nkayanyi, ne mesu anyi neamumone yeye mene, kayi bu muenyi kundi. Mutshima wanyi udi mule tente ne dijinga dia bualu ebu!" 
Job19:28 Binuamba ne, Monai bu mutulualua kumukengesha! Binuamba ne, Bualu bua muji wa bualu bua makenga andi udi umueneka munda muandi!" 
Job19:29 Nutshine bienu muele wa nvita: bualu bua tshiji tshikole tshia Nzambi tshidi tshivuisha makengesha adi alua ku muele wa nvita, bua nuenu numanye ne, Kulumbulula kudiku." 
Job20:1 Hashishe, Sofâ, Muena Nâmata, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job20:2 Bua mei â meji anyi adi ampesha diandamuna kûdi; bua muanda eu ndi musue kuamba dî lukasa. 
Job20:3 Nakunvua kumbela eku kudi kunfuisha bundu; kadi mutshima wanyi udi ukudimuna dî bu mudi dijingulula dianyi. 
Job20:4 Kuena mumanye bualu ebu bua kale, katshia bateka muntu ha buloba," 
Job20:5 ne, Kutumba kua muenji wa malu mabi kudiku anu musangu muihi, ne disanka dia badi bahidia Nzambi didiku anu tshituha tshia diba?" 
Job20:6 Nansha biafikeye tô ne mu diulu, nansha mutu wandi mulenge matutu," 
Job20:7 hashishe, yeye neafue tshiendelele bu mudi tunvi tuandi tujimine; bakamumona diambedi nebakonke ne. Udi kudi kunyi?" 
Job20:8 Neaye biandi lubilu bu mudi tshilota tshihita, kabena bamusangana kabidi. E, nebamuihate bu mudi tshikena kumona tshijimina butuku." 
Job20:9 Disu diakamumona kadiena dimumona kabidi, ne muaba wandi kawena umumona kabidi." 
Job20:10 Bana bandi nebakebe diakalengele kudi bahele, ne bianza biandi nebihingishe biuma biandi biakanyengeye." 
Job20:11 Mifuba yandi idi miule tente ne bukole bua bunsongalume buandi, kadi buobu nebulale nʼandi mu buloba." 
Job20:12 Nansha biashemakana malu mabi mukana muandi, nansha biâsokokeye muinshi mua ludimi luandi;" 
Job20:13 nansha biânangeye bimpe ne kayi witabusha bua kualekela, kadi biashaleye nʼau mukana muandi," 
Job20:14 hashishe, bia kudia bia munda muandi bidi bikudimuka, bidi bilua lulengu lua nyoka ya mbanvu munda muandi." 
Job20:15 Yeye udi umina biuma, ne udi ubiluka kabidi; Nzambi udi ubihatula mu difu diandi." 
Job20:16 Udi unua lulengu lua nyoka ya mbanvu; ludimi lua nyoka wa ntoka ludi lumushiha. 
Job20:17 Kena umona misulu, misulu idi miule tente ne buitshi ne manteke." 
Job20:18 Neahingishe bintu biakakuatshileye mudimu bua kubiheta, ne kena mua kubimina; kena usanka bua bungi bua luhetu ludiye wangata ku kuenduluka kuandi kua mushinga." 
Job20:19 Bualu bua wakukengesha bahele ne wakubashiya hatuhu, wakunyenga nsubu ku bukole udiye kayi muibake." 
Job20:20 Bualu bua kakunvua ditalala munda muandi, kena mumanye mua kusungila tshintu tshia mu bintu bidiye mutambe kusua." 
Job20:21 Kakuakadi tshintu tshimue tshiakadiye kayi udia bua lukuka luandi; nunku diakalengele kadiena dishala kudiye. 
Job20:22 Mu dikumbana dia bintu biandi yeye neakengele bintu; tshianza tshia muntu yonso udi mu dikenga netshimukengeshe. 
Job20:23 Hambeye kukuta, Nzambi neatemeshe tshiji tshiandi kudiye, neamuhumuinetshi bu bia kudia biandi." 
Job20:24 Neanyeme bua kuhanduka ku tshielelu tshia nvita tshia tshiamu tshifike, nebamuase mukete ne buta bua tshiamu tshia mitaku, mumusompoke." 
Job20:25 Udi uhatula mukete mu mubidi wandi, lusongo luau ludi luengelela ludi luhatuka mu kanyonga kandi; buowa bua lufu budi bunukuata." 
Job20:26 Mîdima mikole neyikale mu tshibutshilu tshiandi, kahia kadi muntu kayi mutemeshe nekamushidishe; nekabutule bintu bionso bidi bishala mu ntenta wandi." 
Job20:27 Diulu nedisokolole bubi buandi, buloba nebujuke bua kumuhisha." 
Job20:28 Bintu biakabutshileye mu nsubu muandi nebajimine; nebajimine mu dituku dia tshiji tshikole tshia Nzambi. 
Job20:29 Elu nduseke Iudi muntu mubi uhela kudi Nzambi, ne buhianyi budi Nzambi mumusunguile." 
Job21:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakakudimuna Sofâ ne," 
Job21:2 Telejai matshu enu ku dî dianyi bimpe, ne bua kuteleja kuenu kuikale bu busambi kundi." 
Job21:3 Itabusha ngakule, hanamana kuakula, wewe udi mua kunseka." 
Job21:4 Meme hanyi, ndi utontolola muntu, anyi? Tshiena mua kuzuka ne muoyo bua tshinyi?" 
Job21:5 Nuntangile, nukeme, tekai bianza ku mishiku." 
Job21:6 Hanavuluka muanda eu, ndi ne dishina, buowa budi bunkuata." 
Job21:7 Bualu kai bantu babi badi bashala ne muoyo, balua banunu ne bikala ne bukole bua bungi?" 
Job21:8 Bana bakalelabo ne tunkanunuma tuabo badi bajadikibua ku mesu kuabo ne badi ha buihi nʼabo, maminu abo adi enjibua nunku: ku mesu kuabo." 
Job21:9 Mu nsubu yabo mudi ditalala, kamuyi buowa, mulangala wa Nzambi kawena uyikuma." 
Job21:10 Mulume wabo wa ngombe udi wimitshisha mafu, kena uhanga; mukashi wabo wa ngombe udi ulela bana, kena utula difu." 
Job21:11 Badi balekela bana babo bakese bua bendakane bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko, ne bana bakalelabo badi baja maja." 
Job21:12 Badi bimba misambu ne mazele ne lunzenze, badi basanka helabo nshiba." 
Job21:13 Matuku abo onso adi ahita anu ne diakalengele, mu katuha kihi badi bahueka mu Muaba wa Bafue." 
Job21:14 Kadi badi bambila Nzambi ne, Umuka kutudi; katuena basue kumanya nshila yebe." 
Job21:15 Wa Bukole Buonso udi tshinyi, bua tuetu kumukuatshila mudimu? Bidi bitukuatshisha munyi bua tuetu kumutendelela?" 
Job21:16 Tangilai, diakalengele diabo kadiena dilua kudibo ku bukole buabo, meji a bantu babi adi kule nʼanyi." 
Job21:17 Misangu bungi munyi idibo bajima muinda wa bantu babi, anyi makenga adi afika kudibo anyi Nzambi udi ubatahuluila ntatu mu tshiji tshiandi?" 
Job21:18 Misangu ya bungi idibo bu bisonsa ku luhehele, ne bu bisote bidi nvunde uhehula?" 
Job21:19 Nudi nuamba ne, Nzambi udi ukengesha bana ba muntu mubi bua bubi bua tatu wabo; mbimpe akengeshe muntu eu nkayandi, bua yeye amanye mua kunvua dikenga bu mudidi." 
Job21:20 Mesu andi mene amone kubutuka kuandi, yeye mene anue tshiji tshikole tshia Wa Bukole Buonso." 
Job21:21 Bua yeye udi ne disanka kai kudi ba mu nsubu muandi badi bashala ku nyima kuandi hashika ngondo yandi ha buloba? 
Job21:22 Muntu neamanye mua kuyisha Nzambi lungenyi, anyi, yeye ngudi ulumbuluisha ba mu diulu?" 
Job21:23 Muntu udi ufua hashika bukole buandi, kayi ne lutatu, muikale ne ditalala." 
Job21:24 Mpanza yandi idi miule tente ne mabele, ne buongo bua mu mifuba yandi butshidi buhishi." 
Job21:25 Mukuabo udi ufua ne mutshima unyingalala bikole, kayi muanze kuheta tshintu tshimpe nansha musangu umue." 
Job21:26 Bubidi buabo badi balala mu buloba muomumue, ne bikusu bidi bibadia." 
Job21:27 Bushuwa, ndi mumanye meji enu, ne meji a budimu anudi nʼau munda muenu bua kungenzela bibi." 
Job21:28 Bualu bua nudi nuamba ne. Nsubu wa mukokeshi udi kudi kunyi? Ntenta wakadi bantu babi bashikame udi kudi kunyi? 
Job21:29 Kanuakukonka bahitshi ba mu nshila, anyi? Kanuena bamanye bifuanyikishi bidibo banulesha bua bualu ebu ne," 
Job21:30 Badi basungila muntu mubi dituku dia dikenga, ne badi bahehula dituku dia tshiji tshikole, anyi?" 
Job21:31 Muntu kai wamubela ku mesu kuandi bua bienzedi biandi? Muntu kai wamufuta bua malu akenzeye? 
Job21:32 Badi baya nʼandi ku lukita, ne banga bantu badi balama majambu andi." 
Job21:33 Mabuwa a mu tshibanda adi amusankisha, ne bantu bonso badi bamulonda, bu muakenzabo kudi bakuabo ku mpala kuandi badi kabayi mua kubadibua." 
Job21:34 Nunku nudi nukeba kunsamba ne mei a hatuhu munyi? Bualu bua mei anudi nunkudimuna adi anu mei a kundinga. 
Job22:1 Hashishe, Elifaza, Muena Temana, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job22:2 Muntu udi mua kukuatshisha Nzambi ne tshintu, anyi? Nansha; muntu udi ne meji udi udikuatshisha yeye nkayandi." 
Job22:3 Biwikala muakane bualu ebu budi bukuatshisha Wa Bukole Buonso, anyi? Biwenda ne mutshima mutoke, bualu ebu budi bumuhetesha tshintu, anyi?" 
Job22:4 Yeye udi ukukengesha bualu bua wewe udi umutshina, ne udi ulumbulula nʼebe, anyi?" 
Job22:5 Bubi buebe kabuena bunene, anyi? Kakuena kunfudilu kua malu mabi ebe." 
Job22:6 Bualu bua wewe udi witabusha bieya kudi bana benu hatuhu; udi uvula bilulu bia badi butaka. 
Job22:7 Kuena unuisha badi bahungila mai, ne udi uhala udi ne nzala bia kudia." 
Job22:8 Kadi muena diboko dikole wa kaheta buloba, ne muena butumbi wakadi ushikamamu." 
Job22:9 Wewe wakuhingisha bakashi ba mu lufuila kuabo ne bianza bituhu, maboko adi atuala bana ba nshiya akutshibuka." 
Job22:10 Nunku mateyi adi akunyunguluka, ne buowa budi bukukuata lubilu." 
Job22:11 Midima idi ikukuata, ne kuena mua kumona, ne mai mahite bungi adi akubuikila." 
Job22:12 Nzambi kena mulu mu diulu, anyi? Tangila mitoto idi mitambe kuikala mulu mule!" 
Job22:13 Kadi wewe udi wamba ne, Nzambi udi mumanye tshinyi? Hadiye utangila mu midima mikole, yeye udi mua kulumbulula bilumbu, anyi?" 
Job22:14 Matutu mafike adi amubuikila bua yeye kamonyi; udi wenzela anu ha mutu ha matutu a mu diulu. 
Job22:15 Wewe udi musue kunanukila kuenda mu nshila wa kale, wakadi bantu babi bendela, anyi?" 
Job22:16 Bobo bakumushibua ha buloba diba diabo kadiyi dianze kufika, bishimikidi biabo biakashimbuka ne biakahumuka bu musulu wa mai." 
Job22:17 Bakambila Nzambi ne, Umuka kutudi; bakakonka ne, Wa Bukole Buonso udi mua kutuenzela tshinyi?" 
Job22:18 Kadi yeye mene wakûsha nsubu yabo tente ne bintu bimpe. Kadi meji a bantu babi adi kule nʼanyi! 
Job22:19 Bantu bakane badi bamona malu â ne badi basanka, badi kabayi ne tshilumbu badi baseka bantu babi," 
Job22:20 bamba ne, Bushuwa, hakadi nʼetu lukuna bakubutuka, kahia kakushidisha bintu biabo bia bungi." 
Job22:21 Unvuangane biebe ne Nzambi, wikale ne ditalala; nunku diakalengele nedilue kûdi." 
Job22:22 Itabusha diyisha dia mukana muandi, buesha mei andi mu mutshima webe," 
Job22:23 Biwahingana kudi Wa Bukole Buonso, biadihuekesha, biûmusha malu adi kayi makane mu ntenta webe," 
Job22:24 biwela tshiamu tshia or ha buloba, biwela or wa ku Ofî munkatshi mua mabue a mu tusulu," 
Job22:25 Wa Bukole Buonso neikale tshiamu tshiebe tshia or ne tshiamu tshia argent tshia mushinga mukole kûdi. 
Job22:26 Mu diba adi neusanke mu Wa Bukole Buonso, neubishe mpala webe kudi Nzambi." 
Job22:27 Neumutendelele ne yeye neakunvuile, nushikishe mitshihu yebe." 
Job22:28 Neuhangidishe bualu, nebujalame bua bualu buebe; munya neutemene mu nshila yebe." 
Job22:29 Bualu bua Nzambi udi uhuekesha badi badibandisha, udi ubandisha udi ne mesu andi minama." 
Job22:30 Neabandishe muntu mene udi kayi mubingishibue, e, neanuhandishe bua butoke bua bianza biebe." 
Job23:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakakudimuna Elifaza ne," 
Job23:2 Lelu mene kutontolola kuanyi kutshidi bu kutomboka, tshianza tshianyi tshidi tshinemena bujitu handi ntua mikemu." 
Job23:3 Nakadi kusua kumanya kundi mua kusangakana nʼandi, ne bua meme kufika kudiye mushikame!" 
Job23:4 Nakadi kuteka bualu buanyi buonso hatoke ku mpala kuandi, nakadi kûsha mukana muanyi ne mei a kulumbulula nʼau." 
Job23:5 Nakadi kusua kumanya mei adiye ungandamuna, ne kujingulula mei angambileye." 
Job23:6 Yeye wakadi kufuilangana nʼanyi mu bukole buandi bunene, anyi? Nansha; wakadi kungunvuila." 
Job23:7 Kuakua muntu muakane wakadi kumanya mua kutetangana nʼandi mei, ne meme nakadi kumanya mua kudibandisha kudi mulumbuluishi wanyi tshiendelele." 
Job23:8 Kadi ndi nya ku mpala, ne yeye kenaku; ndi ngalukila ku nyima, kadi tshiena mua kumumona." 
Job23:9 Ndi mmukeba ku luseke lua tshianza tshia bakashi, kadi tshiena mua kumumona; udi utshinguluka ku tshianza tshia balume ne tshiena mua kumumona." 
Job23:10 Kadi yeye udi mumanye nshila undi ngendela; ne hamaneye kunteta, nempatuke bu tshiamu tshia or." 
Job23:11 Dikasa dianyi diakulamata biendedi biandi; nakananukila kuenda mu nshila wandi, tshiakasesuka nansha." 
Job23:12 Tshiakulekela kutumikila mukenji wa ku mishiku yandi; nakubuta mei a mukana muandi mu mutshima wanyi. 
Job23:13 Kadi yeye wakadisunguila bualu bumue, ne muntu kai udi mua kukudimuna meji andi? Bualu budi mutshima wandi Usungula mbudiye wenza." 
Job23:14 Bualu bua neashikishe buakumpangidishileye, ne malu makuabo a bungi bu â adi mu mutshima wandi." 
Job23:15 Nunku nakukuatshika buowa ku mpala kuandi; hangelangana meji a bualu ebu, ndi mmutshina." 
Job23:16 Nzambi wakutekesha mutshima wanyi; Wa Bukole Buonso wakuntshinyisha. 
Job23:17 Bualu bua tshiena mutambibue bukole ku mîdima, ne mîdima kayakubuikila mpala wanyi." 
Job24:1 Bualu kai Wa Bukole Buonso kena uteka bikondo bia kulumbuluisheye bantu? Bualu kai badi bamumanye kabena bamona matuku andi? 
Job24:2 Bakuabo badi bumusha mikalu; badi biba bisumbu bia mikoko ne badi bayidisha mu madimi abo a mashinde. 
Job24:3 Badi banyenga nyama wa mpunda wa muanʼa nshiya; badi bangata ngombe wa mukashi wa mu lufuila bu tshieya. 
Job24:4 Badi basesuisha hakengi mu nshila ku bukole; bahele bonso ba ha buloba badi basokoma. 
Job24:5 Bulelela, bu mudi nyama ya mpunda ya mu tshisuku yendakana mu tshihela, bobo badi baluhuka bua kuya ku mudimu wabo, bakebakeba bia kudia; tshihela tshidi tshibameneshila bia kudia bua bana bakalelabo." 
Job24:6 Badi bahuolela bimuna bia kudia bidi bishala mu budimi, badi bahumbulula tumuma tua nvinyo mu budimi bua muenji wa malu mabi." 
Job24:7 Badi balala butaka butuku bujima kabayi ne tshilulu, kabayi ne tshia kudibuikila nʼatshi bua mashika." 
Job24:8 Badi baboleshibua ku nvula ya ku mikuna, badi buhukila mabue bituha bualu bua kabena ne tshinyemenu tshikuabo." 
Job24:9 Bakuabo badi bumusha muanʼa nshiya ku dibele, ne badi banyenga tshitalu tshia muhele bu tshieya." 
Job24:10 Nunku bahele badi bendakana butaka; badi ne nzala, kadi badi batuala bisumbu bia blé." 
Job24:11 Badi baka ma mafuta mu mpangu ya bantu aba; badi hadiata tumuma tua nvinye mu bikaminu biabo badi ne nyota. 
Job24:12 Mu musoko mudi munvuika mikemu ya bantu bafuafua, ne mutshima wa muntu mutahibue mputa udi usasabala; kadi Nzambi udi ulengulula malu mabi au." 
Job24:13 Aba mbantu badi batombokela munya; kabena bamanye nshila yau, ne kabena bananukila kuenda mu nshila yau." 
Job24:14 Mushihianganyi udi ubika hahatuka diba, yeye udi ushiha bahele ne bakengi; mu butuku yeye udi bu muibi." 
Job24:15 Mesu a muena masandi adi indila kajimbʼa buenyi, yeye udi wamba ne, Kakuena disu dilualua kummona. Udi usokoka mpala wandi ne tshilulu tshikudika." 
Job24:16 Bibi badi batubula nsubu masoso butuku; mu munya badi badinshidila mu nsubu yabo; kabena bamanye munya. 
Job24:17 Bualu bua mundankulu mudi bu dinda kudibo bonso, bua bobo badi bamanye malu a mundankulu adi akuatshisha bantu buowa." 
Job24:18 Bantu babi badi bahueka lubilu, balelema ha mutu ha mai; badi bela buhianyi buabo mulau ha buloba. Kabena bahingana kabidi mu madimi a tumuma tua nvinyo." 
Job24:19 Munanga ne luya lukole bidi bikamisha mai a ku neige; muomumue, Muaba wa Bafue udi unyenga bantu bakuenza bibi." 
Job24:20 Difu dia muledi wandi didi dimuhua muoyo; tshikusu tshidi tshimudia ne disanka; bantu kabena bamuvuluka kabidi; bubi budi butshibudibue bu mutshi. 
Job24:21 Udi udia bintu bia mukashi wa nkumba udi kayi ne muana, kena wenzela mukashi wa mu lufuila bimpe." 
Job24:22 Nzambi udi ulehesha matuku a muoyo wa muntu mukole ku bukole buandi; badi kabayi ne ditekemena dia muoyo badi bajuka. 
Job24:23 Nzambi udi ubaha ditekemena, ne badi bajadikibuamu; mesu andi adi atangila nshila yabo." 
Job24:24 Badi batumbishibua tshituha tshihi, badi bajimine; badi bahuekeshibua, badi bumushibua mu nshila bu bakuabo. Badi babakosa bu mudibo bakosa miehu ya mponda." 
Job24:25 Bikala bualu ebu kabuyi nunku, nganyi neantuishe ne, Udi ushima? Nganyi neandeshe ne, Mei ebe adi a hatuhu?" 
Job25:1 Hashishe, Biledada, Muena Shuhi, wakakudimuna Yobo ne," 
Job25:2 Bukokeshi ne ditshina bidi kudiye, udi uvuisha ditalala mu miaba yandi ya mu diulu." 
Job25:3 Misumba ya bena nvita bandi idi mua kubadibua, anyi? Munya wandi kawena utemena bonso, anyi?" 
Job25:4 Nunku muntu wa ha buloba udi mua kubingishibua ku mesu kua Nzambi munyi? Udi muledibue kudi mukashi udi mua kuikala ne mutshima mutoke munyi? 
Job25:5 Ngondo mene mene kena ne dinkenka, mitoto kayena mulengele ku mesu kuandi." 
Job25:6 Monai mudi muntu mutambe kukeheshibua, udi bu tshikusu, ne mudi muana wa muntu mukeheshibue, udi bu musanda!" 
Job26:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakakudimuna Biledada ne," 
Job26:2 Mona muwakukuatshisha wakadi kayi ne bukole, ne muwakusungila dihoko diakadi kadiyi ne bukole!" 
Job26:3 Mona muwakulesha meji kudi wakadi kayi ne meji, ne muwakumumanyisha lungenyi luakane ne mei mavule!" 
Job26:4 Wakuambila nganyi mei ebe, ne nyuma wa nganyi wakufumina kudi?" 
Job26:5 Bakishi ba bafue badi bazakala muinshi mua mai ne mua bintu bidimu. 
Job26:6 Muaba wa Bafue udi hatoke tô ku mpala kua Nzambi, ne Abadona kena ne tshibuikilu." 
Job26:7 Wakavungulula luseke lua nôde ha muaba mutuhu, wakafuka buloba kabuyi bukudika ku tshintu." 
Job26:8 Udi uteka mai mu matutu andi manene; ditutu kadiena dihandika bua bujitu buau. 
Job26:9 Udi ubuikila nkuasa wandi wa butumbi, udi ubalula ditutu diandi ha nkuasa." 
Job26:10 Wakafunda tshijengu ha mutu ha mai, bu mukalu hankatshi ha munya ne mîdima." 
Job26:11 Makunshi a diulu adi azakala, adi atua mikemu bua kubela kuandi." 
Job26:12 Ku bukole buandi yeye udi utalasha mai manene; ku lungenyi luandi udi ukuma Lahaba, udi umusompola." 
Job26:13 Ku muhuya wandi diulu didi dilengeshibua; tshianza tshiandi tshiakusompola nyoka munene udi wenda lubilu. 
Job26:14 Monai, malu â adi anu kukala kua bienzedi biandi; monai mutudi tunvua anu dinunganyi dikese kudiye! Kadi mukungulu wa bukole buandi—nganyi udi mua kûjingulula?" 
Job27:1 Yobo wakabanga mei andi kabidi ne," 
Job27:2 Bu mudi Nzambi ne muoyo, wakunyenga kulumbulula kuakane kundi, ne bu mudi Wa Bukole Buonso, wakunyingalasha mutshima wanyi bikole;" 
Job27:3 tô ne hantshidi ne muoyo munda muanyi, ne hatshidi muhuya wa Nzambi mu mihembu ya diulu dianyi," 
Job27:4 bulelela, mishiku yanyi kayena yamba mei a mashimi ne ludimi luanyi kaluena luamba di dia kudinga nʼadi!" 
Job27:5 Bualu ebu kabuikadi kundi bua meme kunubingisha. Tô ne hanafua bianyi tshiena ngitabusha bua mutshima wanyi mutoke ûmuke kundi. 
Job27:6 Nennanukile kukuata buakane buanyi ne tshiena mkulekela nansha. Mutshima wanyi kawena umpisha bua dituku dimue dia ku matuku anyi onso. 
Job27:7 Muena lukuna wanyi ikale bu muntu mubi, ne muntu udi ubika bua kumbanda ikale bu muntu udi kayi muakane." 
Job27:8 Muntu udi uhidia Nzambi udi ne ditekemena kai halua Nzambi kukosa matuku andi, halua Nzambi kunyenga muoyo wandi musûke?" 
Job27:9 Nzambi neunvue muadi wandi halua dikenga kudiye, anyi?" 
Job27:10 Yeye neadisankishe mu Wa Bukole Buonso, anyi? Neubikile dina dia Nzambi misangu yonso, anyi?" 
Job27:11 Nennuyishe bualu bua tshianza tshia Nzambi, tshiena nsokoka malu adi mu meji a Wa Bukole Buonso." 
Job27:12 Monai, buonso buenu nuakumona bualu ebu; nunku nudi nuelangana meji a hatuhu bua tshinyi?" 
Job27:13 Ebu mbuhianyi budi muntu mubi uheta kudi Nzambi, buhianyi budi bakengeshi ba bakuabo bangata kudi Wa Bukole Buonso." 
Job27:14 Biavulangana bana bandi, mbua bobo kushihibua ku muele wa nvita; ne tunkanunuma tuandi katuena ne bia kudia bikumbane." 
Job27:15 Badi bashala ku nyima kua lufu luandi nebajikibue ku tshihuhu, ne bakashi babo ba mu lufuila kabena babashila madilu." 
Job27:16 Nansha biadibutshileye biamu bia argent bu luhuishi, nansha biadilongolueleye bivualu bu bitahikidi;" 
Job27:17 yeye udi mua kubilongolola, kadi bantu bakane nebabiluate, ne badi kabayi ne tshilumbu nebabanyangane biamu biandi bia argent." 
Job27:18 Yeye udi wasa nsubu wandi bu tshibayibayi, ne bu tshitandatanda tshidi mutentekedi wa mu budimi wasa." 
Job27:19 Udi ulala hanshi bu muntu mubanji, kadi kena wenza nunku kabidi; udi ubulula mesu andi, bionso biakujimina." 
Job27:20 Malu a buowa adi amuhita bukole bu mai mavule; tshihehele tshikole tshidi tshimuangata butuku. 
Job27:21 Luhehele lua ku esete ludi luya nʼandi, ne yeye udi umukaku; ludi lumûmusha mu muaba wandi." 
Job27:22 Bualu bua Nzambi udi wela mikete yandi kudiye, kayi umufuila luse; yeye wakadi kusua kuhanduka ku tshianza tshia Nzambi." 
Job27:23 Bantu badi batuta bikashi bua dibutuka diandi, badi bamubingila bua kumuihata mu muaba wandi." 
Job28:1 Bulelela, tshina tshidiku tshia bantu kumbula tshiamu tshia argent, ne ditanda didiku dia kufulamu tshiamu tshia or bua kutshilengesha." 
Job28:2 Badi bumbula tshiamu tshifike mu buloba, badi bafula tshiamu tshia mitaku tshifume ku mabue." 
Job28:3 Bantu badi bihata midima, badi baya ne minda tô ne kunfudilu kua tshina, badi bakeba tubanda ludi mu mufitu ne mîdima mikole." 
Job28:4 Yeye udi umbula tshina mu muaba udi kauyi hehi ne miaba idi bantu bashikame, mu miaba idi bantu kabayi bavuluka; badi kule, kabayi hehi ne bantu bakuabo, badi balembelela eku ne eku." 
Job28:5 Buloba budi bumenesha bia kudia, kadi munda muabu mene mudi mukudimuka bua kahia kadi kabuandamuna." 
Job28:6 Mabue abu adi ne mabue a saphir munda muau, ne munda muabu mudi musenga wa tshiamu tshia or." 
Job28:7 Nyunyu itu yadia bintu biakubakulayi kayena mimanye nshila wa ku tshina atshi, mesu a nyunyu wa nkumbi-kumbi kaena manze kumumona." 
Job28:8 Nyama minene kayena mianze kumuihata, ne nyama wa ntambue kena muanze kuhitshilamu." 
Job28:9 Muntu udi wolola tshianza tshiandi bua kulenga mabue makole; yeye udi umbula mikuna minene ku bitaku biai. 
Job28:10 Udi uhanda nshila munkatshi mua mabue; mesu andi adi amona bintu bionso bia mushinga mukole. 
Job28:11 Udi wela misulu nkila bua mai kâhueki, tshidi tshisokoka ntshidiye usokolola." 
Job28:12 Kadi meji nebâsangane kudi kunyi? Muaba wa kujingulula malu udi kudi kunyi? 
Job28:13 Muntu kena mumanye mushinga wau; kabena bâsangana mu buloba bua badi ne muoyo. 
Job28:14 Ndondo wa muinshi mua buloba udi wamba ne, Kaena munda muanyi; mai manene adi amba ne, Kaena nʼanyi." 
Job28:15 Kabena bamanye mua kufila tshiamu tshimpe tshia or bua kuaheta; kabena bamanye mua kuidikisha tshiamu tshia argent bu mushinga wau. 
Job28:16 Kabena bamanye mua kuelekesha mushinga wau ne wa or wa ku Ofî, anyi wa mabue a onyx a mushinga mukole, anyi wa dibue dia saphir." 
Job28:17 Or ne ntalatala kabiena nʼau muomumue, ne kabena bamanye mua kushintakasha bilenga bia or bia mushinga mukole bua kuangata." 
Job28:18 Katuena mua kutela mena a mabue a corail ne a cristal diatshimue nʼau. Diheta dia meji didi ditamba dia mabue a perles mushinga mukole. 
Job28:19 Dibue dia topaze dia ku Atiopa kadiena muomumue nʼau; kabena bamanye mua kubala mushinga wau diatshimue ne wa or wakufulabo mu ditanda. 
Job28:20 Meji adi mafume kudi kunyi? Muaba wa kujingulula kua malu udi kudi kunyi? 
Job28:21 Bualu bua muaba wau udi masokoka kudi bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo, ne udi musokoka kudi nyunyu ya mu diulu." 
Job28:22 Kubutuka ne Lufu bidi biamba ne, Tuakunvua lumu luau ku matshu etu." 
Job28:23 Nzambi udi ujingulula nshila wa kudiu, ne yeye udi mumanye muaba wau." 
Job28:24 Bualu bua yeye udi umona tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba, ne udi umona miaba yonso ya muinshi mua diulu." 
Job28:25 Hakidikisheye luhehele bujitu bualu, hakidikisheye bungi bua mai ne luidi luandi," 
Job28:26 hakeleye nvula mukenji wandi, hakalongolueleye miele ya nvula ne muku ngulu nshila," 
Job28:27 Mu diba adi yeye wakamona meji ne wakâlondela bantu; wakajadika ne wakâkononona. 
Job28:28 Hashishe, wakambila bantu ne, Monai, ditshina dia Mukelenge didi meji; ne kumuka ku malu mabi kudi kujingulula kua malu." 
Job29:1 Yobo wakabanga mei andi kabidi ne," 
Job29:2 Nakadi kusua kuikala bu munakadi mu ngondo ya kale, bu munakadi mu matuku akadi Nzambi undama;" 
Job29:3 hakadi muinda wandi utemena ha mutu hanyi, ne hanakahita mu mîdima bualu bua munya wandi." 
Job29:4 Nakadi kusua kuikala bu munakadi mu matuku a bukole buanyi, hakadi bulunda bua Nzambi mu ntenta wanyi;" 
Job29:5 hakatshidi Wa Bukole Buonso nʼanyi, ne bana banyi bakadi bannyunguluka;" 
Job29:6 hakadi makasa anyi muvuwa ne mabele, ne dibue diakampatuila tusulu tua manyi." 
Job29:7 Hanakaluhuka ku tshibi tshianyi bua kuya ku musoko, hanakalongolola nkuasa wanyi wa bulumbuluishi mu muaba wandi munene," 
Job29:8 bansongalume bakantangila ne bakumuka ku mpala kuanyi, bantu banunu bakajuka, bakimana kulu." 
Job29:9 Bakokeshi bakalekela kuakula, bakateka bianza ku mishiku yabo." 
Job29:10 Dî dia bena butumbi diakahuwa, ne ndimi yabo yakalamata mu bilakalaka biabo." 
Job29:11 Bualu bua hakunvua matshu dî dianyi, akanvudishila disanka; hakammona mesu, akammanyishisha kudi bakuabo." 
Job29:12 Bualu bua nakasungila bahele bakadila dikuatshisha, ne muanʼa nshiya ne mukuabo yonso wakadi kayi ne mukuatshishi." 
Job29:13 Disankisha dia kudi muntu wakadi wamba kufua diakalua kundi; nakimbisha mutshima wa mukashi wa mu lufuila musambu wa disanka. 
Job29:14 Nakaluata buakane bu tshivualu. Buakane buanyi buakadi bu muzabi ne bu tshitambala tshia ku mutu. 
Job29:15 Nakadi bu mesu kudi bantu bafofo, nakadi bu makasa kudi bantu balema." 
Job29:16 Nakadi bu tatu kudi bakengi, nakakeba kujingulula tshilumbu tshia muntu unakadi tshiyi muanze kumanya." 
Job29:17 Nakatshibula menu a ku tshinyanganyanga a muntu mubi, nakanyenga tshiakakuateye ku bukole ku menu andi." 
Job29:18 Hashishe, nakamba ne, Nenfuile mu nsubu muanyi; nenvudishe matuku anyi bu dinfuenkenya dia buloba;" 
Job29:19 muji wanyi udi ulamba tô ne ku mai, mume udi ukuata ditamba dianyi bufuku bujima;" 
Job29:20 butumbi buanyi budi buhia-buhia munda muanyi, buta buanyi budi bukoleshibua mu tshianza tshianyi." 
Job29:21 Bantu bakateleja matshu abo kundi, bakindila di dianyi, bakahuwa talalâ bua kunvua lungenyi luanyi." 
Job29:22 Hanakamba mei anyi, kabakankudimuna; mei anyi akabamatshila bu nvula." 
Job29:23 Bakangindila bu mudibo bindila nvula, bakabuela mukana muabo bu mudibo bindila nvula ya mishisha." 
Job29:24 Nakabatuila mimuemue hakadibo kabayi ne tshieyemenu, kabakakanda munya wa mpala wanyi." 
Job29:25 Nakabasunguila nshila bua bobo kuendela, nakashikama bu nfumu wabo, nakashikama bu mukelenge munkatshi mua masalayi andi, bu muntu udi usamba badi badila." 
Job30:1 Kadi katataka bantu bandi mpita bidimu badi banseka, bena batatu babo banakadi ne bundu bua kuteka hamue ne mbua idi ilama mikoko yanyi." 
Job30:2 Bukole bua bianza biabo budi mua kunkuatshisha munyi? Munda muabo muakufua bukole bua bunsongalume buabo. 
Job30:3 Badi banyana bua dikengela dia bia kudia ne nzala; badi bakunya buloba bume bua mu tshihela, budi kabuyi buhuka ne budi buatuke." 
Job30:4 Badi baka mabeshi a buanji hehi ne mitshi mihi, ne bia kudia biabo bikuabo bidi miji ya mitshi ya genêts." 
Job30:5 Badi babihata munkatshi mua bantu bakuabo, badi bahela mbila bu mudibo bela muibi mbila." 
Job30:6 Bua nunku badi bashikame mu mpongo, mu mikele ya mu buloba ne munkatshi mua mabue." 
Job30:7 Munkatshi mua bihuka bia mu tshihela badi bela mikunda yabo, muinshi mua mingonge badi babutama hohamue." 
Job30:8 Badi bana ba batshimbakanyi ne bana ba badi kabayi bamanyibue, bakabihata ne nsokotshi ha buloba." 
Job30:9 Mpindiu nakulua musambu wabo wa kuimbimba, ndi bu lusumuinu lua bobo kuela." 
Job30:10 Badi bandengulula ne dihetu, badi bimana bashilangana nʼanyi kule, kabena badikanda bua kuntuila lute mu mesu." 
Job30:11 Bualu bua Nzambi wakusulula mulemu wa ku buta buanyi, ne wakunfuisha bundu, bobo bakudiumushila bualu buonso budi bubakanda ku mpala kuanyi." 
Job30:12 Bantu ba tshianana badi babika ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume; badi benda basakila makasa anyi mu nshila, badi bangelela mishiki yabo ya buloha mu nshila bua kumbutula nʼai." 
Job30:13 Badi bashiha nshila wanyi, badi bendesha kubutuka kuanyi, mbantu badi kabayi ne mukuatshishi wabo." 
Job30:14 Badi baya ku mpala bu mudibo babuela mu muaba wa lumbu wakushimbulabo, mu muaba wakushimbuka badi bankuata." 
Job30:15 Malu a buowa adi antshintshimika; adi ihata buneme buanyi bu mudi luhehele lubuhehula; diakalengele dianyi diakuhita bu ditutu. 
Job30:16 Mpindiu mutshima wanyi udi uhumuna kanyinganyinga kau munda muanyi; matuku a makenga anyi adi ankuata. 
Job30:17 Butuku budi batubula mifuba yanyi, buyihatula hamʼbidi hanyi, makenga adi ankunyakunya, kaena alala hanshi bua kuikisha." 
Job30:18 Ku bukole bua disama dianyi tshivualu tshianyi tshidi tshinyanguka; tshidi tshinsuika bu mudi nshingu wa kazaku kanyi mukuate. 
Job30:19 Yeye wakungela mu bitahikidi, nakulua bu luhuishi ne butue." 
Job30:20 Ndi ndila kûdi ne kuena witaba kundi, ndi ngimana kulu ne udi unjoja talalâ." 
Job30:21 Wewe wakakudimuka bu muena lukisu kundi; udi unkengesha ku bukole bua tshianza tshiebe. 
Job30:22 Wewe udi ungambula mu luhehele, udi ungendeshamu, udi unvingutula mu tshihuhu." 
Job30:23 Bua ndi mumanye ne, Wewe neunfikishe ku lufu, ne ku nsubu wakusunguila Nzambi bonso badi ne muoyo." 
Job30:24 Kadi muntu udi wamba kukuluka kena wolola tshianza tshiandi mulu, anyi? Anyi bikaleye ne dikenga, kena wela dî diandi kudi bakuabo bua bamukuatshishe, anyi?" 
Job30:25 Tshiakadila bualu bua muntu mukuabo wakadi mu dikenga, anyi? Mutshima wanyi kawakanyingalala bualu bua bakengi, anyi?" 
Job30:26 Hanakatekemena diakalengele, dikenga diakalua; hanakindila munya, butuku buakila." 
Job30:27 Munda muanyi mudi mukungulu, kamuena muhuwa; matuku a dikenga dianyi akulua kusambakena nʼanyi." 
Job30:28 Ndi ngendakana mufikishibue, kadi kembua munya; ndi mbika mu disangisha dia bantu, ndila dikuatshisha diabo." 
Job30:29 Nakulua muanʼabo ne nyama ya mibuabua, ne mulunda wa nyunyu ya nfiondo." 
Job30:30 Dikoba dianyi diakulua difike, diakuhuluka, ne mifuba yanyi idi mioshibue ku munya mukole." 
Job30:31 Kuimba kua lunzenze luanyi kuakuandamuka madilu, ne muadi wa lushiba luanyi wakandamuka dî dia badi badila." 
Job31:1 Nakahunga tshihungidi ne mesu anyi, nunku nakadi kumanya mua kutuhika mesu anyi kudi mushikankunde utshidi kamama bishi?" 
Job31:2 Bua buhianyi bua kudi Nzambi wa mu diulu budi mua kuikala tshinyi? Buhianyi bua kudi Wa Bukole Buonso wa mu diulu budi mua kuikala tshinyi? 
Job31:3 Kabuena dikenga kudi bantu babi, anyi? Kabuena dibutuka kudi benji ba malu mabi, anyi?" 
Job31:4 Yeye kena umona nshila yanyi, kena ubala bungi bua biendedi bianyi bionso, anyi?" 
Job31:5 Bingikala muende ne mashimi, bikala dikasa dianyi diye lubilu bua kudinga bantu," 
Job31:6 (Yeye angidikishe mu tshidikishilu tshidi tshidikisha biakane, bua Nzambi amanye buakane buanyi!)" 
Job31:7 bikala dikasa dianyi disesuke mu nshila, bikala mutshima wanyi mulonde lukuka lua mesu anyi, bikala ditoba dilamate ha bianza bianyi;" 
Job31:8 hashishe meme nkune ntete, mukuabo adie bidi bitoloka; e, bia kudia bianyi bionso bijudibue." 
Job31:9 Bikala mutshima wanyi muteyibue bua mukashi, ne bingikala mualamine ku mbelu kua muena mutumba nʼanyi," 
Job31:10 nunku, mukashi wanyi ahelele bakuabo bukula, ne bakuabo bantu bamuinangile mu mutu!" 
Job31:11 Bua muanda eu wakadi kuikala tshilumbu tshifike bukole; bulelela, wakadi kuikala bualu bubi budi balumbuluishi ne bua kukengesha benji bau." 
Job31:12 Bua udi bu kahia kadi mua kungosha tô ne ku Kubutuka; ne udi mua kujula biuma bianyi bionso. 
Job31:13 Bingikala muhetule tshilumbu tshia muhika wanyi mulume anyi mukashi, hakadibo balumbulula nʼanyi," 
Job31:14 nunku, nengenze tshinyi habika Nzambi bua kundumbuluisha? Halueye kunkonka muanda eu, nemmukudimune dî kai?" 
Job31:15 Wakunfuka munda mua mamu wanyi kakamufuka biandi, anji? Wakatufuanyikisha mu difu kena Mufuki umue, anyi?" 
Job31:16 Bingikala muhidie kuha muhele tshintu tshiakasueye, bingikala muvuishe mesu a mukashi wa mu lufuila bitayitayi," 
Job31:17 bingikala mu dî e tshituha tshianyi tshia bia kudia nkayanyi, ne bana ba nshiya kabayi badie tshituha tshiabo;" 
Job31:18 nansha, katshia ku matuku a bunsongalume buanji yeye wakakola mu bianza bianyi bu mudiye mukole kudi tatu wandi, nakalombela mukashi wa mu lufuila katshia mamu wanyi wandela," 
Job31:19 bingikala mumone muntu ufua bualu bua kena ne bia kuluata, anyi bingikala mumone bakengi kabayi ne bia kudibuikila nʼabi," 
Job31:20 bikala tshifuka tshiandi katshiyi tshinvudishila disanka, bikaleye kayi munvue luya hamʼbidi handi bualu bua miosa ya mikoko yanyi," 
Job31:21 bingikala mubishe tshianza tshianyi bua kukuma muanʼa nshiya, bualu hua nakamona bankuatshishi mu tshilumbuluidi tshia ku tshibi," 
Job31:22 tshikayakaya tshianyi tshihatuke ku diaha, tshimate hanshi, diboko dianyi diumuke mu ntuangenu yadi." 
Job31:23 Bualu bua dikenga difume kudi Nzambi diakankuatshisha buowa, tshiakadi ne bukole ku mpala kua butumbi buandi." 
Job31:24 Bingikala muvuishe or bu ditekemena dianyi, muambile or wakafulabo ne, Wewe udi tshieyemenu tshianyi," 
Job31:25 bingikala musanke bualu bua bubanji buanyi buakadi bunene, anyi bualu bua tshianza tshianyi tshiakaheta biuma bia bungi," 
Job31:26 bingikala mumone diba hakatemadi, anyi ngondo hakendeye mu dinkenka diandi," 
Job31:27 bikala mutshima wanyi muteyibue mu busokoko, bikala tshianza tshianyi tshitue ku mishiku yanyi bua kubitendelela," 
Job31:28 bualu ebu kabidi buakadi kuikala tshilumbu tshibi tshidi balumbuluishi ne bua kukengesha bahidi ba Nzambi, bualu bua nakadi kubenga Nzambi wa mu diulu." 
Job31:29 Bingikala musanke bualu bua dibutuka dia muntu wakankina, bikala mutshima wanyi mutambe kusanka hakalua dikenga kudiye," 
Job31:30 (tshiakuitabusha bua mukana muanyi muenze bualu bubi bua kulomba muoyo wandi wedibua mulau,)" 
Job31:31 bikala bantu ba mu ntenta wanyi kabayi bambilangane ne, Muntu kai udiku udi kayi muanze kukuta ne bia kudia biandi?" 
Job31:32 (Muenyi kakalala mu musesu butuku, kadi nakunzuluila bahitshi ba mu nshila bibi bianyi.)" 
Job31:33 Bingikala mubuikile malu mabi anyi bu mu tshilele tshia bantu, hanakasokoka bualu buanyi bubi mu tshiadi tshianyi," 
Job31:34 bualu bua nakatshina tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, ne bualu bua dihetu dia bena meku diakantshinyisha, ne bua bualu ebu nakahuwa bianyi, tshiakahatuka ha mbelu." 
Job31:35 Nakadi kusua bua umue ikaleku bua kungunvuileye! Mona tshifundilu tshianyi tshia dina, Wa Bukole Buonso itabe kundi! Nakadi kusua kuikala ne mukanda wakufunda mumbandi wanyi bua kumbanda nʼau!" 
Job31:36 Bulelela, nakadi kûtuala ha diaha dianyi; nakadi kuwasa ku mutu wanyi bu tshifulu tshianyi tshia butumbi." 
Job31:37 Nakadi kumubadila bungi bua biendedi bianyi; nakadi kusemena ha buihi nʼandi bu mudi muana wa mukelenge mua kuenza. 
Job31:38 Bikala buloba buanyi budile bua kumbanda, bikala mabula abu mase muadi diatshimue," 
Job31:39 bingikala mudie bia kudia biabu tshianana, tshiyi mufile argent, bingikala mujimishishe mioyo ya banfumu babu," 
Job31:40 nunku, meba adiunde mu muaba wa blé, bisonsa bia tshianana bunene mu muaba wa orge. Mei a Yobo akuhuwa." 
Job32:1 Nunku bantu aba basatu bakalekela kukudimuna Yobo mei, bualu bua yeye wakadi muakane ku mesu kuandi." 
Job32:2 Hashishe tshiji tshia Elihu, muana wa Balakela, Muena Buzi, wa diku dia Lama, tshiakatema. Tshiakatemena Yobo, bualu bua yeye wakadingisha, kakabingisha Nzambi." 
Job32:3 Tshiji tshiandi tshiakatemena balunda bandi basatu kabidi, bualu bua bobo kabakamona mei a kukudimuna nʼau Yobo, kadi bakaosha Yobo." 
Job32:4 Elihu wakadi muindile Yobo ne mei a kumuambila, bualu bua bantu aba bakadi ne bidimu bihite biandi bungi." 
Job32:5 Hashishe, hakatangila Elihu ne kakuakadi ditaba kudi Yobo mukana mua bantu aba basatu, tshiji tshiandi tshiakatema kudibo." 
Job32:6 Elihu, muana wa Balakela, Muena Buzi, wakabanga kuakula ne, Meme ndi anu nsongalume, ne nuenu nudi banunu, bua muanda eu nakadikanda, nakatshina kunulesha munakadi ngela meji." 
Job32:7 Nakamba munda munda ne, Wa matuku a bungi udi ne bua kuakula, ne bena bidimu bivule badi ne bua kuyisha bantu meji." 
Job32:8 Kadi nyuma udi munda mua muntu, ne muhuya wa munda mua Wa Bukole Buonso udi ubaha lungenyi." 
Job32:9 Kembantu badi ne bidimu bia bungi mbadi ne meji, kembanunu mbadi bajingulula kulumbulula kuakane." 
Job32:10 Nunku ndi ngamba ne, Unvuai dî dianyi; nennuleshe lungenyi lundi nʼalu, meme mene." 
Job32:11 Monai, nakindila bua kunvua mei enu, nakateleja matshu bua kunvua meji enu, tô ne hanuakadi nukebakeba mei a kumukudimuna nʼau." 
Job32:12 E, nakateleja matshu anyi kunudi, ne monai, kakuakadi muntu umue wakatuisha Yobo, kakuakadi umue wenu wakandamuna mei andi." 
Job32:13 Nudimuke bua nuenu kanuambi bienu ne, Tuakusangana meji munda muandi; Nzambi udi mua kumutamba bukole, muntu kena mua kuenza nunku." 
Job32:14 Bualu bua yeye kena muanze kulongolola mei andi bua kuntuisha nʼau; tshiena mmukudimuna dî ne mei anuakuamba. 
Job32:15 Badi ne ditshina, kabena bamuandamuna dî kabidi; kabena ne dî dia kuamba." 
Job32:16 Nengindile bualu bua bobo kabena bakula, bualu bua badi bimana talalâ, ne kabena bamuandamuna dî kabidi, anyi?" 
Job32:17 Meme kabidi nengandamune tshituha tshianyi tshia mei, meme kabidi nengambe lungenyi lundi nʼalu." 
Job32:18 Bualu bua ndi mule tente ne mei; nyuma udi munda muanyi udi ungenzesha. 
Job32:19 Monai, munda muanyi mudi bu maluvu adi kayi ne mushiku wa kuhatukila; mudi bu milondo ya biseba mihia-mihia idi ne maluvu munda muai ne idi yamba kuhandika." 
Job32:20 Nengambe dî dianyi bua meme mmanye mua kuhuyakana bimpe; nembuele mukana muanyi bua kumukudimuna dî dianyi. 
Job32:21 Ndi nnusengelela ne, Meme tshikadi ne kansungusungu kudi muntu yonso nansha; tshitumbishi muntu ne mei a lubombo." 
Job32:22 Bualu bua tshiena mumanye mua kubomba muntu ne mei a lubombo; bingenza nunku, Mufuki wanyi neangumushe lukasa." 
Job33:1 Kadi Yobo, ndi nkusengelela ne, Unvua mei anyi; teleja matshu ebe ku mei anyi onso." 
Job33:2 Mona biebe, nakubuela mukana muanyi; ludimi lua mukana muanyi luakuamba dî." 
Job33:3 Mei anyi neikale bu buakane bua mutshima wanyi, mishiku yanyi neyambe malu adiyi mi manye kayiyi ne lubombo." 
Job33:4 Nyuma wa Nzambi wakunfuka, muhuya wa Wa Bukole Buonso wakumpa muoyo." 
Job33:5 Biwamanya mua kuenza nunku, kudimuna dî dianyi; longolola mei ebe ku mualu wa nvita ku mpala kuanyi, imanaku!" 
Job33:6 Mona, ndi ku mesu kua Nzambi bu mûdi wewe; ndi mufuanyikisha ku dima muomumue nʼebe." 
Job33:7 Mona, buowa bua bualu buanyi kabuena mua kuntshinyisha nansha; kukuenzesha kuanyi kakuena kukunemeshila bujitu." 
Job33:8 Bulelela, wewe wakuamba dî dinakunvua mu matshu anyi, nakunvua tshiona tshia mei a ne," 
Job33:9 Ndi ne mutshima mutoke, tshiena ne bualu bubi; ndi muakane, tshiena ne dihila bua malu mabi." 
Job33:10 Mona, yeye udi ukeba malu a kunkanda nʼau, udi umbala bu muena lukuna wandi." 
Job33:11 Udi ubuesha makasa anyi mu muomba, udi utentekela nshila yanyi yonso." 
Job33:12 Kadi mu muanda eu wewe kuena wamba dî dilelela; nenkukudimune dî; bualu bua Nzambi udi muhite bantu bunene. 
Job33:13 Bualu kai wewe udi musue kufuilangana nʼandi, umubanda ne, Kena usokoluela bantu bienzedi biandi?" 
Job33:14 Bualu bua Nzambi udi wamba dî diandi mu tshiambidi tshimue, misangu mikuabo mu biambidi bibidi, kadi muntu kena udiunvua." 
Job33:15 Mu tshilota mene, mu tshikena kumona tshia butuku, hakuatshike bantu tulu tukole, halalabo tulu ha malalu;" 
Job33:16 mu diba adi yeye udi ujikula matshu a bantu, udi ubayisha mu busokoko," 
Job33:17 bua yeye umushe muntu ku bienzedi bibi, ne bua yeye akande muntu ku dihetu;" 
Job33:18 bua yeye akande muoyo wandi musûke bua kauhonyi mu Dijimba dia Bafue, bua kusungila muoyo wandi bua kaufu ku muele wa nvita." 
Job33:19 Yeye udi ukengeshibua bua bamulengeshe ne disama ha bulalu buandi, ne difuilangana dia mifuba yandi didiku tshiendelele." 
Job33:20 Bua muanda eu bidia bidi bitonda muoyo wandi, ne bia kudia bimpe bidi bitonda mutshima wandi." 
Job33:21 Munyinyi wa hamʼbidi handi udi mukuatshike tshinyanu tô ne hajiminau ku mesu kua bantu; mifuba yandi yakadi kayiyi imueneka idi imueneka. 
Job33:22 Nunku musûke wandi udi usemena ha buihi ne Dijimba dia Bafue, ne muoyo wandi udi usemena ha buihi ne bashihi." 
Job33:23 Bikala muanjelo ha buihi nʼandi, muakuidi wandi mene, umue munkatshi mua tshinunu tshia banjelo bakuabo, bua yeye kulesha muntu buakane budiye ne bua kuenza," 
Job33:24 hashishe, yeye udi umulesha luse, udi wamba ne, Umusungile bua kahueki biandi mu Dijimba dia Bafue, bualu bua nakusangana tshia kumuhikula nʼatshi." 
Job33:25 Munyinyi wa hamʼbidi handi neuhite wa muana bulengele, udi uhingana ku matuku a bunsongalume buandi." 
Job33:26 Udi utendelela Nzambi, yeye udi uluangana nʼandi bimpe, nunku udi umona mpala wa Nzambi ne disanka; yeye udi uhingishila muntu buakane buakadiye nʼabu." 
Job33:27 Udi wimba ku mpala kua bantu, wamba ne, Nakuenza bibi, nakukonyangasha malu akadi malulame diambedi, Nzambi kakanfutshisha dikenga diakanangane ne bubi buanyi." 
Job33:28 Wakuhikula musûke wanyi bua kauhueki mu Dijimba dia Bafue, muoyo wanyi neumone munya." 
Job33:29 Monai, Nzambi udi wenzela muntu malu â onso, udi umuenzela malu â misangu ibidi, e, misangu isatu mene;" 
Job33:30 bua kuhingisha muoyo wandi kauhonyi mu Dijimba dia Bafue, bua yeye atanduke ne munya wa muoyo." 
Job33:31 Teleja bimpe, Yobo, ungunvuile; huwa talalâ, nengakule bianyi." 
Job33:32 Biwikala ne dî dikuabo dia kuamba, udinkudimune; ambaku, bualu bua ndi musue kukubingisha." 
Job33:33 Biwikala kuyi ne dî, ungunvuile; anji kuhuwa, nenkuyishe meji." 
Job34:1 Elihu wakandamuna dî diandi kabidi ne," 
Job34:2 Nuenu bena meji, unvuai mei anyi, nuenu bena lungenyi, telejai matshu enu kundi." 
Job34:3 Bualu bua ditshu didi diteta mei bu mudi ludimi lulabula bia kudia. 
Job34:4 Tudisunguile bualu budi buakane, tumanye munkatshi muetu bualu budi buimpe." 
Job34:5 Bualu bua Yobo udi wamba ne, Ndi muakane; Nzambi wakunyenga kulumbulula kuakane kundi." 
Job34:6 Ndi mubinge kadi badi bambala bu muena mashimi, kabena bamanye mua kûmisha mputa wanyi, kadi tshiakuenza bualu bubi." 
Job34:7 Muntu kai udi bu Yobo, udi unua bihendu bu mai," 
Job34:8 udi ukuata bulunda ne benji ba malu mabi, udi wenda mu nshila ne bantu babi?" 
Job34:9 Bualu bua yeye udi wamba ne, Kuikala ne disanka kudi Nzambi kakuena kukuatshisha muntu nansha ku bualu bumue." 
Job34:10 Nunku nungunvuile, nuenu badi bajingulula malu; bualu ebu kabuikadi kudi Nzambi bua yeye kuenza malu mabi, anyi bua Wa Bukole Buonso kuenzeye bibi!" 
Job34:11 Bualu bua Nzambi neafute muntu bu mudi bienzedi biandi, yeye neavuishile muntu yonso bualu bu muakenzenzeye." 
Job34:12 E, bulelela, Nzambi kena wenza bibi, Wa Bukole Buonso kena unyanga kulumbulula kuakane." 
Job34:13 Wakamuha bukokeshi ha mutu ha buloba nganyi? Wakamuha buloba bujima bua yeye kubulama nganyi? 
Job34:14 Biumusheye mutshima wandi bua kuhinganau kudiye, biasangisheye nyuma wandi ne muhuya wandi munda muandi nkayamu," 
Job34:15 ba ha buloba bonso nebajimine diatshimue, ne bantu nebahingane ku dinfuenkenya." 
Job34:16 Biwikala ne dijingulula dia malu unvua dî edi; teleja matshu ebe ku mei andi nkuambila. 
Job34:17 Udi ukina kulumbulula kuakameka udi mua kukokesha bakuabo anyi? Neubishe udi mukole ne udi muakane, anyi?" 
Job34:18 Neubishe udi wambila mukelenge ne, Wewe udi muntu wa tshianana, udi wambila bantu banene ne, Nudi babi, anyi?" 
Job34:19 Neuhishe udi ubenga kunemeka anu bana ba bakelenge, udi kayi ubala babanji ne, Badi ku mpala kua bahele; bualu bua buonso buabo badi mudimu wa ku bianza biandi?" 
Job34:20 Mu tshituha tshia diba badi bafua; nansha ha diba dia mundankulu mene bantu badi bazakashibua ne badi bajimina; bakole badi bumushibua tshianza tshia muntu katshiyi tshibumusha. 
Job34:21 Bualu bua yeye udi uteka mesu andi ku nshila idi muntu wendela, udi umona biendedi biandi bionso." 
Job34:22 Kakuena midima, kakuena mufitu mukole kudi benji ba malu mabi bamanye mua kusokomena." 
Job34:23 Bualu bua yeye kena ne bualu bua kusunguila muntu tshikondo tshijalame bua yeye kuya ku mpala kua Nzambi bua kulumbuluishibua. 
Job34:24 Udi utshibula bantu banene bituha bituha, kayi muanze kukonkonona malu abo, udi ujadika bakuabo mu miaba yabo." 
Job34:25 Bualu bua udi mumanye midimu yabo, udi ubatonkola mu butuku, nunku badi babutudibua." 
Job34:26 Udi ubakuma bua bubi buabo ku mesu kua bantu bonso," 
Job34:27 bualu bua bakasesuka mu nshila, kabayi balonda Nzambi, kabakasua kuenda mu nshila yandi yonso." 
Job34:28 Bua bualu ebu bakafikisha muadi wa bahele kudiye, ne yeye wakunvua muadi wa bakengi." 
Job34:29 Biahuweye talalâ, muntu kai wamubisha? Biasokokeye mpala wandi, muntu kai wamanya mua kumumona? Yeye udi wenzela tshisamba tshijima ne muntu umue muomumue," 
Job34:30 bua muntu udi ubenga Nzambi kamanyi mua kukokesha, kamanyi mua kukuata bantu mu buteyi." 
Job34:31 Muntu kai wakuambila Nzambi dî edi ne, Nakumana kukenga, tshiena ngenza bualu bubi kabidi," 
Job34:32 wewe unyishe bualu bundi tshiyi muanze kumona; bingikala muenze bualu bubi, tshiena mbuenza kabidi?" 
Job34:33 Yeye neakuenzele bu mûdi musue bualu bua wakabenga dikosa diandi dia nsambu, anyi? Bûdi nʼabu mbua kusungula, kembualu buanyi to. Nunku utuambile bualu bûdi mumanye." 
Job34:34 Bantu badi bajingulula malu nebangambile, e, muena meji yonso udi unvua dî dianyi neambe ne," 
Job34:35 Yobo udi wakula bu udi kayi ne lungenyi, ne mei andi kaena mei a meji." 
Job34:36 Tuakadi kusua bua Yobo atetshibue tô ne ku ndekelu, bualu bua wakuitaba bu mudi bantu babi bitaba." 
Job34:37 Bualu bua udi utentekasha ditomboka ha mutu ha bubi buandi; udi ututa tshikashi munkatshi muetu, ne udi uvudisha mei andi adiye ubanda nʼau Nzambi." 
Job35:1 Elihu wakakudimuna Yobo kabidi ne," 
Job35:2 Udi welangana meji ne ebu mbualu buakane, anyi? Udi wamba ne, Udi muakane ku mpala kua Nzambi, anyi," 
Job35:3 hawamba ne. Bualu ebu budi bukuatshisha kudi kunyi? Anyi hawamba ne, Ndi mpeta mushinga kai mutambe wa hanakuenza bualu bubi?" 
Job35:4 Nengitabe kûdi, ne kudi balunda bebe diatshimue nʼebe." 
Job35:5 Tangila mu diulu, mona biebe; tangila matutu adi makuhite bule!" 
Job35:6 Biwikala muenze bibi, udi umuenzela yeye bualu kai? Bikala malu mabi ebe makumbane, udi umuenzela yeye tshinyi?" 
Job35:7 Biwikala muakane, udi umulesha tshintu kai? Anyi yeye udi wangata tshinyi ku tshianza tshiebe?" 
Job35:8 Bubi buebe budi mua kukengesha muntu bu wewe, ne buakane buebe budi bumanye mua kukuatshisha muana wa muntu." 
Job35:9 Bualu bua makengesha mavule adi alua kudibo, bakuabo badi badila; badi badila bua kuheta dikuatshisha kudi bakuabo bua kuhanduka mu bianza bia muena tshimbambila." 
Job35:10 Kadi kakuena umue udi wamba ne, Nzambi Mufuki wanyi udi kudi kunyi? Nyeye udi utuha misambu ya kuimba butuku," 
Job35:11 udi utuyisha lungenyi luhite lua nyama ya ha buloba, udi utuvuisha bena meji bahite nyunyu ya mulu." 
Job35:12 Hashishe, badi badila, kadi yeye kena witaba, bualu bua dihetu dia mu mitshima ya bantu babi." 
Job35:13 Bulelela, Nzambi kena unvua muadi wa hatuhu, Wa Bukole Buonso kena uteleja matshu andi kudiu." 
Job35:14 Nunku neatambe kuhidia kunyua hawamba ne, Tshiena mmumona; bualu buebe budi ku mpala kuandi, umuindile!" 
Job35:15 Ne mpindiu bualu bua tshiji tshiandi katshiena tshianze kukengesha bantu babi, ne bualu bua yeye kena muanze kubala buhote bua muntu," 
Job35:16 Yobo udi ubulula mukana muandi hatuhu, udi ukumbasha mei bu mudiye kayi ne lungenyi." 
Job36:1 Hashishe, Elihu wakamba mei andi kabidi ne," 
Job36:2 Anji kungindila tshituha bua meme mmanye mua kukulesha manga malu; bualu bua ndi ne mei makuabo a kuamba bua kuhingisha nʼau Nzambi. 
Job36:3 Nengambe lungenyi luanyi lunakuangata ku miaba ya kule, nennuleshe ne, Mufuki wanyi udi ne buakane." 
Job36:4 Bulelela, mei anyi kaena a mashimi, muntu udi ne lungenyi tshishiki udi wimana ku mpala kuebe." 
Job36:5 Mona, Nzambi udi ne bukole buhite ne kena uhetula muntu, udi ne bukole buhite bua kujingulula malu." 
Job36:6 Kena Usungila mioyo ya bantu babi, ne udi uha badi mu dikenga malu makane a bobo kuangata." 
Job36:7 Kena umusha mesu andi kudi bantu bakane; kadi udi ubashikika hohamue ne bakelenge mu nkuasa ya bukelenge tshiendelele, ne badi batumbishibue." 
Job36:8 Bikalabo bedibue mu nkanu, bikalabo bakuatshibue mu mionshi ya makenga;" 
Job36:9 yeye udi ubalesha bienzedi biabo ne malu mabi abo; udi ubalesha ne, Badi badibandisha." 
Job36:10 Udi ujikula matshu abo bua bamanye mua kunvua diyisha, udi ubelela mukenji bua bobo balekele malu mabi bua kuhingana kudiye." 
Job36:11 Biunvuabo dî diandi ne biamukuatshilabo mudimu, badi hashikisha matuku abo munkatshi mua diakalengele, ne bidimu biabo munkatshi mua masanka." 
Job36:12 Kadi bikalabo kabayi bunvua dî diandi, nebashihibue ku muele wa nvita, nebafue kabayi banze kuheta lungenyi." 
Job36:13 Badi babenga Nzambi mu mitshima yabo badi baditekelamu tshiji; kabena badila dikuatshisha diandi habakengesheye. 
Job36:14 Badi bafua mu bunsongalume buabo, ne mioyo yabo idi ijimina munkatshi mua benji ba malu a bundu." 
Job36:15 Udi ubandisha bakengi ku dikenga diabo, ne udi ujikula matshu abo ku tshinyangu." 
Job36:16 E, wakasua kukukoka bua kukumusha mu makenga, bua kulua nʼebe mu muaba munene udi kauyi mubumbakane; ne bintu bidibo bateka ha mesa hebe bidi ne manyi tente." 
Job36:17 Kadi wewe udi mule tente ne kulumbuluisha kua bantu babi; kulumbulula ne dikosa dia nsambu bidi bikukuata. 
Job36:18 Kuitabushi bua tshiji tshiebe tshikuteye bua wewe kuhetula Nzambi; kuitabushi bua bunene bua buhikudi bukusesuishe mu nshila muakane. 
Job36:19 Muadi webe neumanye mua kukumbana bua wewe kukengi, anyi? Bienzedi bionso bia bukole buebe bidi mua kuenza nunku, anyi?" 
Job36:20 Kujingi biebe ne, Butuku buile, humushabo bantu ku miaba yabo." 
Job36:21 Udimuke bua wewe kukudimunyi mutshima webe ku bualu bubi, bualu bua wewe wakusungula bubi ebu ku mpala kua makenga." 
Job36:22 Monai, Nzambi udi wenza bienzedi bihite bunene mu bukole buandi; nganyi udi muyishi bu yeye?" 
Job36:23 Wakamusunguila nshila idiye ne bua kuendela nganyi? Udi mumanye mua kumuambila ne, Wewe wakuenza bienzedi bidi kabiyi biakane nganyi?" 
Job36:24 Uvuluke bua wewe kutumbisha mudimu wandi udi bantu batumbisha mu misambu yabo. 
Job36:25 Bantu bonso bakaumona; bantu badi bautangidila kule. 
Job36:26 Mona, Nzambi udi munene, ne katuena bamumanye nansha; bungi bua bidimu biandi kabuena mua kumanyibua." 
Job36:27 Bualu bua udi ukoka mamata a mai mulu; adi enguluka, andamuka mula mufume ku dibungi," 
Job36:28 udi matutu alokesha; nvula wa bungi udi umatshila bantu. 
Job36:29 Muntu kai udi mua kujingulula ditangalaka dia matutu, ne mikungulu idi ihatuka mu ntenta wandi?" 
Job36:30 Mona, yeye udi udinyungulula ne nuele ya nvula, udi ubuikila ndondo wa mai manene." 
Job36:31 Ku dikuatshisha dia bintu ebi yeye udi ulumbuluisha bantu; udi ubaha bia kudia bivulangana. 
Job36:32 Udi ubuikila bianza biandi bibidi ne miele ya nvula, udi uyelela mikenji bua yoyo ikume muaba udiye musue." 
Job36:33 Tshiona tshia mukungulu wa nvula tshidi tshiambila bantu lumu luandi; tshidi tshiambila bimuna mene ne, Yeye udi ha buihi." 
Job37:1 E, bua muanda eu mutshima wanyi udi uzakala, udi ukanka, umuka mu muaba wau." 
Job37:2 Unvua biebe, unvua tshiona tshia dî diandi ne mukungulu udi uhatuka mukana muandi." 
Job37:3 Yeye udi utuma bua kukungulau muinshi mua diulu dionso, udi utuma muele wandi wa nvula tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Job37:4 Ku nyima kuau tshiona tshia mukungulu wa nvula tshidiku; yeye udi ukunguisha mukungulu ne dî dia butumbi buandi; kena ukanda miele ya nvula bunvuabo dî diandi. 
Job37:5 Nzambi udi ukunguisha mukungulu ne dî diandi didi dikemesha bantu; udi wenza malu manene atudi katuyi bamanye mua kujingulula. 
Job37:6 Bualu bua udi wamhila neige ne, Mata ha buloba; udi wamhila kabidi nvula udi uloka bitulu bitulu ne nvula yandi idi iloka bikole ne, Lokai." 
Job37:7 Udi ukonyisha bianza bia muntu yonso, bua bantu bonso bakafumeye bamanye mudimu wandi." 
Job37:8 Mu diba adi nyama ya mu tshisuku idi ibuela mu bisokomenu, ne idi ishala mu mikele yai." 
Job37:9 Nvunde udi ufuma ku sude, mashika makole adi afuma ku nôde." 
Job37:10 Ku muhuya wa Nzambi kudi kuhatuka mabue a mashika, mai akadi mahasalala adi akuatakana." 
Job37:11 Yeye udi ûsha matutu mafike ne tshitelele tente; udi utangalasha ditutu diandi didi ne muele wa nvula. 
Job37:12 Adi anyunguluka ne adi akudimuka ku bulombodi buandi, bua wowo enze malu onso adiye wâmbila bua kuenzau hanshi ha buloba hadi bantu." 
Job37:13 Nansha bikalau mulangala wa kututa nʼau buloba, anyi bua kulesha luse luandi, yeye udi uwendesha bua kumuenekau." 
Job37:14 Unvua dî edi, Yobo; imana biebe talalâ, elangana meji a midimu ya kukema idi Nzambi wenza." 
Job37:15 Wewe udi mumanye bu mudi Nzambi welela matutu mukenji wandi, ne bu mudiye wenzesha munya wa mu ditutu diandi bua kutemau, anyi?" 
Job37:16 Udi ujingulula bu mudi matutu alembelela mulu, ne malu a kukema a udi ne lungenyi lukumbane tshishiki, anyi?" 
Job37:17 Wewe muena bivualu bia luya, hikala buloba talalâ bualu bua luhehele lua ku sude;" 
Job37:18 wewe udi mumanye mua kubalulula nʼandi diulu didi dikole bu ludimuenu luakufulabo mu kahia, anyi?" 
Job37:19 Utuyishe dî ditudi bamanye mua kumuambila! Katuena bamanye mua kulongolola mei etu bualu bua mîdima idiku. 
Job37:20 Bidi bimpe bua meme kumuambila ne, Ndi musue kuakula, anyi? Muntu kai udi wamba ne, Ndi musue kuminyibua?" 
Job37:21 Mpindiu bantu kabena bamanye mua kumona munya udi ukenka mu diulu, kadi luhehele ludi luhita ne ludi luditokesha." 
Job37:22 Ku luseke lua nôde kudi kuhatuka dinkenka didi bu dia or. Hamʼbidi ha Nzambi hadi butumbi budi bukuatshisha bantu buowa. 
Job37:23 Katuena bamanye mua kujingulula malu onso a Wa Bukole Buonso; yeye udi munene mu bukole buandi, ne bualu bua yeye udi ne buakane bukumbane bua bungi, kena ukengesha muntu tshianana." 
Job37:24 Bua muanda eu bantu badi bamutshina; yeye kena utangila muntu udi udibala ne meji mu mutshima wandi yeye. 
Job38:1 Hashishe, Yehowa wakandamuna Yobo dî dihatuka mu nvunde ne," 
Job38:2 Eu nganyi udi usokoka meji mu mîdima ku mei adi kâyi ne lungenyi? 
Job38:3 Suika mukaba webe mu tshimono bu muntu mulume; bualu bua nenkukonke ma makuabo, ne wewe ummanyisheu." 
Job38:4 Wewe wakadi kudi kunyi hanakujadika bishimikidi bia buloba? Amba biebe, biwikala ne lungenyi lua kujingulula bua ebu." 
Job38:5 Wakasungula bidikishilu biabu nganyi, biwamanya mua kungambila? Anyi wakolola muonshi wa luidi ha mutu habu nganyi?" 
Job38:6 Bakajadika bitekelu bia makunshi abu ha binganyi, ne wakaladika dibue dia ku ditumba diabu mu muaba wadi nganyi," 
Job38:7 bakimba mitoto ya nkesha misambu diatshimue, ne hakela bana balume bonso ba Nzambi mbila yabo bua disanka diabo?" 
Job38:8 Nganyi wakinshidila mai manene bibi, hakahatukau, mûmuke munda mua buloba bu mudi muana umuka mu difu dia mamu wandi;" 
Job38:9 hanakavuisha matutu bu tshivualu tshiau, ne mîdima mikole bu mukaba wa kuajingila;" 
Job38:10 hanakâjadikila mukulu wanyi unakausunguila diambedi, ne hanakautekela nkanu a kuakanyika ne bibi kabidi;" 
Job38:11 ne hanakamba bianyi ne, Nuemanye mua kufika aku, kadi kuhitshi nansha; ne kunu mene nebalekeshe kudibandisha kua mavuala ebe?" 
Job38:12 Katshia wabanga matuku ebe wewe wakuelela lunkelu mukenji, anyi? Wakalesha kabundubundu muaba waku uwakakasunguila," 
Job38:13 bua koko kakuate matengu a buloba, ne bua koko kitshikishilemu bantu babi, anyi?" 
Job38:14 Buloba budi buandamuka bu mudi dima diandamuka muinshi mua tshiamu tshidi tshifundahu tshimanyinu, bintu biabu bionso bidi bimueneka bu tshivualu tshilengele." 
Job38:15 Munya wabu udi umushibua kudi benji ba malu mabi, ne diboko didi didibandisha didi ditshibuka." 
Job38:16 Wewe wakuya tô ne ku mishimi ya muinshi mua mai manene, anyi? Wakuendakana mu mikele ya mu ndondo wa mai manene, anyi?" 
Job38:17 Bakusokoluela bibi bia ku lufu, anyi? Wewe wakumona bibi bia ku mundidimbi wa lufu, anyi?" 
Job38:18 Wakajingulula butshiama bua buloba, anyi? Ungambileku, biwamanya malu au onso." 
Job38:19 Nshila wa ku muaba udi munya mushikame udi hanyi? Midima kabidi idi ne muaba wai kudi kunyi 
Job38:20 bua wewe Umanye mua kuyifila tô ne ku butshika buai, ne bua wewe umanye nshila ya ku nsubu wai?" 
Job38:21 Wewe udi mumanye muanda eu, bualu bua bakakulela mu diba adi, ne bungi bua matuku ebe budi bukumbane be!" 
Job38:22 Wakufika ku nsubu idibo babutshilamu neige, anyi wakumona nsubu idibo babutshilamu mabue a mashika," 
Job38:23 bindi inulame tô ne hafika tshikondo tshia dikenga, hafika dituku dia nvita ne dia kubishangana, anyi?" 
Job38:24 Nshila kai udi uya ku muaba udi munya muabanyibua ha buloba? Luhehele lua ku esete ludi ludimuangalasha ha buloba mu muaba kai? 
Job38:25 Nganyi wakabandila mai a nvula nshila yau, ne nshila ya makubakuba kuyialamu," 
Job38:26 bua kulokesheye nvula ha buloba budi kabuyi ne bantu, ne mu tshihela mudi kamuyi muntu;" 
Job38:27 bua kukutshisha buloba budi binyanguke ne buatuke, ne bua kutolosha mashinde a lutende?" 
Job38:28 Nvula udi ne tatu wandi, anyi? Wakalela mamata a mume nganyi?" 
Job38:29 Mabue a mai makuatakasha kudi mashika akahatuka mu difu dia nganyi? Wakalela dibungi dia mu diulu udi mukuatakasha kudi mashika nganyi? 
Job38:30 Mai adi akuatakana bikole bu mabue, ha mutu ha mai hadi hakuatakana bu dibue." 
Job38:31 Wewe udi mumanye mua kusuika nkanu ya ku mitoto ya Tshidiminanzashi, anyi kusulula mukaba wa mitoto ya nyama ne mbua ne muntu?" 
Job38:32 Udi mua kulombela mitoto ya mu Mazalota mu tshikondo tshiai, anyi? Udi mua kulombela mutoto wa Ourse Munene ne bana bandi, anyi?" 
Job38:33 Wewe udi mumanye mikenji idi Nzambi welela bintu bia mu diulu, anyi? Udi mua kubilongoluela bukokeshi buabi ha buloba, anyi?" 
Job38:34 Udi mua kuhandisha dî diebe tô ne ku matutu, bua mai a nvula a bungi akubuikile, anyi?" 
Job38:35 Udi mua kutuma miele ya nvula bua yoyo iye, ne bua ikuambile kabidi ne, Ka tuetu aba?" 
Job38:36 Wakuteka meji munda mua mu ntu nganyi? Wakuha mutshima wandi dijingulula dia malu nganyi? 
Job38:37 Udi mua kubala bungi bua matutu ku meji andi nganyi? Udi uhumuna mai a nvula mafume mu diulu 
Job38:38 halua lusenga kudiungusha mu mishiki, ne halua mabuwa kulamatangana nganyi?" 
Job38:39 Wewe udi mua kukebela mukashi wa nyama wa ntambue bintu bia kudieye, anyi udi mua kumana nzala ya bana ba ntambue" 
Job38:40 habutamabo mu mikele yabo, ne halaminabo bia kudia mu tshihuka, anyi?" 
Job38:41 Udi uhesha nyunyu wa tshikololo tshia kudia tshiandi, hadila bana hatshi kudi Nzambi, ne hendakanabo kabayi ne bia kudia nganyi?" 
Job39:1 Udi mumanye tshikondo tshidi mbushi idi yenda ha mutu ha mikuna mile ilela bana, anyi? Udi mua kutentekela bua kumona didinyenga dia kulela kua ngulungu, anyi?" 
Job39:2 Udi mumanye mua kubala ngondo idiyi ikumbasha bua kulela, ne udi mumanye tshikondo tshidiyi ilela, anyi?" 
Job39:3 Idi inama hanshi, idi ilela bana bai, idi idiumushila didinyenga diai." 
Job39:4 Bana bai badi bakola, badi baheta bukole mu mpata, badi banyema ne kabena bahingana kabidi." 
Job39:5 Wakutuma nyama wa mpunda wa mu mpata bua kuyeye mu budishikaminyi buandi nganyi? Anyi wakusulula nkanu ya mpunda udi unyema lubilu nganyi? 
Job39:6 Nyeye unakusungula tshihela bu nsubu wandi, ne buloba budi ne miu ya luehu bu muaba wandi wa kushikama." 
Job39:7 Yeye udi useka diyoyo didi mu musoko, kena unvua mei makole a muenzeshi wa mudimu." 
Job39:8 Udi wendakana ha mutu ha mikuna bu muaba wandi wa kudileye mashinde, ne udi ukebakeba midioko yonso mibishi." 
Job39:9 Mbowa udi witabusha bua kukukuatshila mudimu, anyi? Yeye neitabushe bua kulala butuku hehi ne tshidilu tshiebe tshia nyama, anyi?" 
Job39:10 Udi mua kusuika mbowa ne mionshi bua yeye kuela mabula mu budimi, anyi? Yeye neitabushe bua kuenda ku nyima kuebe ukukokela lukasu lua kushiha nʼalu mabuwa a buloba a mu tshibanda, anyi?" 
Job39:11 Wewe udi mua kumueyemena bualu bua bukole buandi budi bua bungi, ne udi mua kumushila mudimu webe wa mu budimi bua yeye kuwenza, anyi?" 
Job39:12 Udi mua kumueyemena bua yeye kuhingana ne maminu ebe, ne bua kuasangisheye ha tshishihuidi, anyi?" 
Job39:13 Dihuahua dia nyunyu wa nfiondo didi dihahala ne disanka, kadi yeye udi ne mahuahua ne masala adi alesha bana bandi luse, anyi?" 
Job39:14 Bualu bua udi ushiya makela andi ha buloba, udi wâkuatshisha luya mu dinfuenkenya dia buloba," 
Job39:15 udi uhua muoyo bualu buau ne, Bumue dikasa dia mualu didi mua kuashila; anyi nyama wa mu mpata udi mua kuadiata." 
Job39:16 Yeye udi wenzela bana bandi bibi bitambe, bu badi kabayi bandi mene; mudimu wandi wa kutoya kua bana udi hatuhu, kadi yeye kena utata bua muanda eu." 
Job39:17 Bualu bua Nzambi wakamuhuisha meji muoyo, ne kakamuha tshituha tshiandi tshia lungenyi." 
Job39:18 Mu tshikondo tshidiye ujuka bua kunyema lubilu, yeye udi ulengulula kabalu ne muntu udi ubanda ha nyima haku bua kuenda." 
Job39:19 Wewe wakuha kabalu bukole buaku, anyi? Wakukavuadika buoya budi bulembelela mu nshingu muaku, anyi?" 
Job39:20 Wakukenzesha bua kutuhikaku bu mudi mukumbi utuhika, anyi? Kadi ne butumbi ne kuhembula kudi kukuatshisha bantu buowa." 
Job39:21 Kadi katua mikono mu tshibanda ne kadi kasanka bua bukole buaku. Kadi kaya ku mpala bua kusangakanaku ne badi ne bielelu bia nvita. 
Job39:22 Kadi kaseka buowa, kakena katshinyishibua; kakena kahingana ku nyima hua kuhanduka ku muele wa nvita." 
Job39:23 Musaka wa mikete udi uvuma, ututa hamʼbidi haku, difuma dibalakane ne kabenda bidi bikatuta kabidi." 
Job39:24 Mu luonji luaku ne tshiji kadi kamina buloba mu lubilu luaku; kakena kumana talalâ hunvuaku tshiona tshia mpungi. 
Job39:25 Misangu yonso idibo bela mpungi kadi kamba ne, Eyo, tuyai! Kadi kunyua muhuya wa nvita hatshidiku kule, kadi kunyua dî dikole dia tupitene ne mbila ya bena nvita." 
Job39:26 Nkumbikumbi udi alembelela mulu bua dikuatshisha dia meji ebe hololeye mahuahua andi matangishe ku luseke lua sude, anyi?" 
Job39:27 Nyunyu wa mukanku udi ubanda mulu, udi wibaka disua diandi kulu bua mukenji webe, anyi?" 
Job39:28 Udi mushikame ha dibue didi ha mukuna mule, udi wibakahu disua diandi, ku mutu kua lusongo lua dibue ne ku muaba mukole munkatshi mua mabue." 
Job39:29 Kule kuakua yeye udi utentekela ha buloba, ukebakeba tshintu tshia kubakuleye! mesu andi adi atangila bintu bidi kule." 
Job39:30 Bana bandi badi banua mashi; hadi bitalu bia bantu bishihibue, nyunyu ei idiku." 
Job40:1 Yehowa wakakudimuna Yobo dî ne," 
Job40:2 Muntu udi udiula mei andi neasue kubambakasha mei ne Wa Bukole Buonso, anyi? Muntu udi utetangana mei ne Nzambi, itabe makonka andi." 
Job40:3 Hashishe, Yobo wakandamuna Yehowa dî ne," 
Job40:4 Mona, ndi muntu muhuekele; nenkukudimune wewe dî kai? Ndi nteka tshianza tshianyi ku mishiku yanyi." 
Job40:5 Nakuamba dî dianyi musangu umue, tshiena ukudimuna dî kabidi; e, nakuamba di misangu ibidi, kadi tshiena ngamba mei makuabo." 
Job40:6 Hashishe, Yehowa wakitaba kudi Yobo ne dî dihatuke mu nvunde ne," 
Job40:7 Suika mukaba webe mu tshimono bu muntu mulume; nenkukonke malu makuabo, ne wewe ummanyishe malu â." 
Job40:8 Wewe udi musue kuvuisha kulumbuluisha kuanyi kuakane ne, Kudi tshianana, anyi? Udi musue kunuisha meme bua wewe umanye mua kubingishibua, anyi?" 
Job40:9 Wewe udi ne diboko bu dia Nzambi, anyi? Udi mua kuela dî diebe bu mukungulu wa nvula bu mudiye wenza, anyi?" 
Job40:10 Udilengeshe ne bulengele ne bunene, udiluatshishe ne butumbi ne buneme." 
Job40:11 Lesha tshiji tshiebe tshikole; tangila muntu yonso udi mudisue ne umuhuekeshe. 
Job40:12 Tangila muntu yonso udi mudisue, umuhuekeshe hanshi; diata bantu babi mu makasa mu miaba yonso idibo bimana." 
Job40:13 Ubajike hohamue mu dinfuenkenya dia buloba, jingila mpala yabo mu miaba misokome." 
Job40:14 Hashishe, nenkutumbishe kahidi ne, Diboko diebe dia tshianza tshia balume didi dimanye mua kunsungila." 
Job40:15 Tangila biebe nguvu, unakafuka nʼebe diatshimue. Yeye udi udia mashinde bu mudi ngombe wenza." 
Job40:16 Bukole buandi budi mu bidimba biandi, ngulu yandi idi mu mifungu ya mu difu diandi." 
Job40:17 Yeye udi ukonya mukila wandi, ûkolesha bu ditamba dia ku mutshi wa cèdre. Mifungu ya ku bibelu biandi idi misuikakasha." 
Job40:18 Mifuba yandi idi bu mishiba ya tshiamu tshia mitaku, mikolo yandi idi bu milonda ya tshiamu tshifike." 
Job40:19 Yeye udi wa ku mpala munkatshi mua bintu biakenza Nzambi; anu yeye wakamufuka ngudi umuha muele wandi wa nvita. 
Job40:20 Bulelela, mikuna idi imuvuishila bia kudia biandi, mu miaba idi nyama yonso ya mu tshisuku inaya." 
Job40:21 Yeye udi ulala muinshi mua mitshi ya ku muelelu wa musulu, mu tshisokomenu tshia mu malenga ne mu bintampi." 
Job40:22 Mitshi ya ku muelelu wa mai idi mubuikila ne dileshi diai; malenga a ku kasulu adi amunyunguluka. 
Job40:23 Mona, biahasalala musulu bikole, kena uzakala; yeye udi ushala holâ, nansha biula musulu bu wa Yadene ne mai tô ne hafikau mukana muandi." 
Job40:24 Mukuabo udi mua kumukuata hadiye untangila ku mesu, anyi? Mukuabo udi mua kutubula diulu diandi ne lukanu, anyi?"
