Job41:1 Udi mumanye mua kuhatula ngandu mu mai ne ndobo, anyi? Udi mumanye mua kushindika ludimi luandi ne muonshi, anyi?" 
Job41:2 Udi mumanye mua kuela muonshi wa mukudi wa ntuhu mu diulu diandi, anyi kutubula lubanga luandi ne lukanu, anyi?" 
Job41:3 Yeye neakutendekene ne mitendekenu ya bungi, anyi? Neakule hebe ne mei a kalolo, anyi?" 
Job41:4 Neahunge nʼebe tshihungidi, bua wewe umuangate bu muena mudimu webe tshiendelele, anyi?" 
Job41:5 Udi mua kunaya handi bu mûdi unaya ne nyunyu, anyi? Udi mua kumusuika bua mishikankunde yebe inaye nʼandi, anyi?" 
Job41:6 Bilembi nebienduluke handi mushinga, anyi? Nebamuabanyangane munkatshi mua benduluki ba mushinga, anyi?" 
Job41:7 Wewe udi mua kûsha tshiseba tshiandi tente ne biamu bidi ne milonda mitue, anyi mutu wandi tente ne tubenda, anyi?" 
Job41:8 Lenga tshianza tshiebe hamʼbidi handi; elangana meji a nvita ei; kuena wenza muanda eu kabidi kashidi! 
Job41:9 Mona, ditekemena dia muntu udi ukeha kumukuata didi hatuhu. Mutshima wa muntu kawena uhanga munda muandi anu biamumoneye ku mesu, anyi?" 
Job41:10 Kakuena muntu udi ne tshimbambila bua yeye amusonsole; nunku nganyi udi mua kuimana ku mpala kuanyi? 
Job41:11 Muntu kai wakadianjila kumpa tshintu, bua meme mmufute kabidi? Bintu bionso bidi muinshi mua diulu mbianyi." 
Job41:12 Tshiena mpuwa talalâ bua bidimba biandi, anyi bua bukole buandi ne bua bulengele bua mubidi wandi." 
Job41:13 Muntu kai udi mua kuvula bivualu biandi bidi hamʼbidi handi? 
Job41:14 Muntu kai udi mua kubuela mu mbanga yandi? Muntu kai udi mua kubulula mukana muandi? Kunyunguluka kua menu andi kudi buowa bukole. 
Job41:15 Nyima wandi udi ne milongo ya mabamba adi bu ngabu yandi, mikuatakane hohamue bu mituangashe bikole." 
Job41:16 Diamba dimue didi ditamba kukuatakana ne dikuabo, ne bua muanda eu luhehele kaluena lumanye mua kuhita hankatshi hau nansha." 
Job41:17 Dinga didi dilamatangana ne dikuabo; onso adi alamatangana bikole, kaena mua kuhanduludibua." 
Job41:18 Kuela kuandi kua nyashi kudi kukenkesha dinkenka bu munya, mesu andi adi bu bilafinyi bia kabundubundu ka dinda." 
Job41:19 Ndimi ya kahia idi ihatuka mukana muandi, nsase ya kahia idi ihatuka munda muandi kabidi." 
Job41:20 Muishi wa kahia udi uhatuka mu mihembu ya diulu diandi, bu mudiu uhatuka mu tshivuadi tshidi tshisaba ha kahia ka ntuhu idi ihia muinshi muatshi." 
Job41:21 Muhuya wandi udi utemesha makala a kahia, ludimi lua kahia ludi luhatuka mukana muandi kabidi." 
Job41:22 Bukole budi bujalama mu nshingu wandi, buowa budi buja maja ku mpala kuandi." 
Job41:23 Bituha bia munyinyi wandi bidi mu difu diandi bidi bilamatangana, bidi bikole hamʼbidi handi ne kabiena mua kunyunguishibua." 
Job41:24 Mutshima wandi udi mukole bu dibue; e, udi mukole bu dibue dia kuhelelahu manvua." 
Job41:25 Hajukeye, bantu bakole badi batshina, bualu bua buowa budi bubakuata, badi balua bu bahale." 
Job41:26 Bakeba muntu kumutaha ne muele wa nvita, kawena umuenzela bualu. Difuma anyi kabenda anyi mukete kabiena binuenzela bualu." 
Job41:27 Yeye udi ubala tshiamu tshifike bu nsona, ne tshiamu tshia mitaku bu mutshi mubole." 
Job41:28 Mukete kawena mumanye mua kumuihata. Yeye udi wandamuna mabue a bieledi alue bu bihatu kudiye. 
Job41:29 Bikau bidi bibadibue kudiye bu bisonsa; udi useka tshiona tshia kabenda hamuelaboku. 
Job41:30 Tshiseba tshia mu tshiadi tshiandi ne tshia mu difu bidi bu biyoyi bia ngesu; udi ushiya tshikoka hanshi ha bintampi bu mudi tshiamu tshia kushihula nʼatshi tshishiya. 
Job41:31 Yeye udi uhunja mai male bua asa be bu mudi mai asaba mu tshivuadi. Udi utuntumika mai manene bu mudi manyi a kulaba ha mputa atutuka mu mulondo. 
Job41:32 Udi ushiya mulanjilanji mu mai ukenka ku nyima kuandi, mukuabo wakadi welangana meji ne. Mai manene adi ne nvi mitoke tô." 
Job41:33 Kakuena nyama mukuabo bu yeye hanshi ha buloba, udi mufukibue kayi ne buowa." 
Job41:34 Yeye udi utangila bintu bionso bidi bidibandisha, ubihetula; udi mukelenge wa nyama yonso idi iditumbisha." 
Job42:1 Hashishe, Yobo wakakudimuna Yehowa dî ne," 
Job42:2 Ndi mumanye ne, Wewe udi ne bukole bua kuenza malu onso, ne kakuena muntu udi mua kukanda bualu buwakuhangidisha." 
Job42:3 Nganyi udi usokoka meji hadiye kayi ne lungenyi? Nunku nakuamba malu andi tshiyi mujingulule bimpe, malu adi atamba kunkemesha anakadi tshiyi mumanye." 
Job42:4 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Unvue, nenkuambile bualu; nenkukonke, ne wewe ummanyishe." 
Job42:5 Nakunvua lumu luebe diambedi anu ku matshu, kadi mpindiu mesu anyi akukumona." 
Job42:6 Bua muanda eu ndi mudihishe, ndi ukudimuna mutshima wanyi, ndi nsomba mu luhuishi ne mu butue." 
Job42:7 Kakambila Yehowa Yobo mei â, Yehowa wakambila Elifaza, Muena Temana, ne, Tshiji tshianyi tshidi tshitema kudi ne kudi balunda bebe babidi. Bualu bua kanuakuamba mei malelela bua bualu buanyi, bu mudi muntu wanyi Yobo wamba." 
Job42:8 Nunku nudiangatshile balume ba ngombe muanda mutekete ne bimpanga muanda mutekete, nuye nʼabi kudi muntu wanyi Yobo. Nubifile bu milambu ya kuosha bua bualu buenu; ne muntu wanyi Yobo nennulombele Nzambi. Bualu bua ne-ngunvue disengelela diandi bua bualu buenu, bua tshinuenzedi bibi bua buhote buenu. Bua kanuakuamba mei malelela bua bualu buanyi, bu muakuamba muntu wanyi Yobo." 
Job42:9 Hashishe, Elifaza, Muena Temana, Biledada, Muena Shuhi, ne Sofa, Muena Namata, bakaya kuenza bu muakabambila Yehowa; ne Yehowa wakitabusha disengelela dia Yobo." 
Job42:10 Yehowa wakakudimuna dikenga dia Yobo, wakamu hingishila diakalengele, hakalombeleye balunda bandi Nzambi. Yehowa wakavudisha bintu bia Yobo bihite bia diambedi misangu ibidi." 
Job42:11 Hashishe, bana babo ba balume bonso ne bana babo ba bakashi bonso ne bonso bakadi balunda bandi diambedi bakalua kumumona, bakadia nʼandi bia kudia mu nsubu muandi. Bakamulesha luse luabo, bakamusamba bua makenga onso akadi Yehowa mumutumine. Muntu yonso wakamuha tshituha tshimue tshia tshiamu tshia or ne kakanu ka or ka ku munu." 
Job42:12 Yehowa wakasankisha Yobo mu matuku andi a kunshikidilu ne disanka dihite diakadiye nʼadi mu matuku a ku tshibangidilu. Yeye wakadi ne mikoko binunu dikumi ne binai, tumelo binunu bisambombo, ne ngombe ibidi ibidi ku tshikokedi tshimue bu bikokedi tshinunu ne bakashi ba nyama ya mpunda tshinunu." 
Job42:13 Yobo wakaheta bana ba balume muanda mutekete ne bana ba bakashi basatu. 
Job42:14 Wakidika muanʼa bute wa bakashi dina ne, Yemima; muibidi ne, Kesia; ne muanʼa mukala ne, Kelene-hapuka." 
Job42:15 Mu buloba abu buonso kabakâsangana bakashi bakuabo ne mpala milengele bu muakadi bana ba bakashi ba Yobo. Tatu wabo wakabaha buhianyi munkatshi mua bana babo ba balume. 
Job42:16 Ku nyima kua malu au Yobo wakashala ne muoyo bidimu lukama ne makumi anai; ne bua muanda eu wakamona bana bandi ba balume ne bana ba bana bandi ba balume, tô ne ku milongo inai." 
Job42:17 Nunku Yobo wakafua, muntu mununu, matuku andi mule tente ne disanka." 
Psalms1:1 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi kayi ulonda lungenyi lua bantu babi, udi kayi wimana mu nshila diatshimue ne benji ba malu mabi, udi kayi mushikame mu tshisombelu tshia babuidi." 
Psalms1:2 Kadi disanka diandi didi mu mikenji ya Yehowa, ne mu mikenji yandi mudiye welangana meji munya ne butuku." 
Psalms1:3 Yeye udi bu mutshi wakukunabo kukala kua misulu ya mai, udi ukuama mamuma au mu tshidimu tshiau; dibeshi diau kadiena difubidila. Malu onso adiye wenza adi atuta diakalengele." 
Psalms1:4 Bantu babi kabena nunku nansha, kadi badi bu bisote bidi luhehele luhehula." 
Psalms1:5 Nunku bantu babi kabena bajalame halua kulumbuluisha kuabo. Benji ba malu mabi kabena bamanye mua kushala mu disangisha dia bantu bakane. 
Psalms1:6 Bualu bua Yehowa udi mumanye nshila wa bantu bakane, kadi nshila wa bantu babi neajimine." 
Psalms2:1 Bualu kai ba mu bisamba bia bende badi badisangisha hohamue bua bafune bulobo, ne bantu ba bende badi bahangidisha meji a malu a hatuhu?" 
Psalms2:2 Bakelenge ba ha buloba badi badijadika, ne bakokeshi badi bela tshifufu, bua kutombokela Yehowa ne wandi muedibue manyi, bamba ne," 
Psalms2:3 Tutshibule nkanu yabo bituha, tumushe mionshi yabo hamʼbidi hetu." 
Psalms2:4 Yeye udi mushikame mu diulu udi useka, Mukelenge udi uhahetula." 
Psalms2:5 Hashishe, yeye neakule nʼabo mu tshiji tshiandi, neabatshinyishe mu tshiji tshiandi tshikole, wamba ne," 
Psalms2:6 Meme hanyi nakujadika Mukelenge wanyi ha mutu ha Siona, mukuna wanyi wa tshijila." 
Psalms2:7 Nengambile bantu mukenji wandi; Yehowa wakungambila ne, Wewe udi muana wanyi; lelu eu nakuelela." 
Psalms2:8 Ulombe, nenkuhe bantu ba bisamba bia bende bu buhianyi buebe, ne ba kunfudilu kua buloba bu bantu bebe." 
Psalms2:9 Wewe neubatshibule ne dikombo dia tshiamu; neubasunsulule bu mudibo basunsula luesu lua mufumbi wa ngesu. 
Psalms2:10 Nunku, nuenu bakelenge, nuikale ne meji; nuyishibue, nuenu bakokeshi ba ha buloba." 
Psalms2:11 Nukuatshile Yehowa mudimu ne dishina, nusanke nʼandi ne nuzakale diatshimue." 
Psalms2:12 Nuluangane mishiku ne muana wandi wa balume, bua yeye kikadi ne tshiji, ne bua nuenu kanujiminyi mu nshila. Bualu bua tshiji tshiandi tshidi tshitemeshibua lukasa. Disanka didi kudi bonso badi bamueyemena!" 
Psalms3:1 Yehowa, mona mudi bena lukuna banyi basangane nunku! Ba bungi badi bajuka bangimanyina bua kunduisha." 
Psalms3:2 Ba bungi badiku badi bambila mutshima wanyi ne, Kakuena luhandu luebe kudi Nzambi." 
Psalms3:3 Kadi wewe, Yehowa, udi ngabu udi undama nseke yonso, wewe mbutumbi buanyi ne mujudi wa mutu wanyi." 
Psalms3:4 Ndi ndila kudi Yehowa ne dî dianyi dikole, ne yeye udi witaba kundi ne dî difuma ku mukuna wandi wa tshijila." 
Psalms3:5 Nakalala hanshi, nakadila tulu; nakabika ku tulu, bualu bua Yehowa wakundama." 
Psalms3:6 Tshiena ntshina mbombo ya bantu badi bantshintshimika ku nseke yonso. 
Psalms3:7 Juka bieba, Yehowa, ansungile, Nzambi wanyi. Bualu bua wewe wakakuma bena lukuna banyi bonso ku matama abo, Wakatshibula menu a bantu babi." 
Psalms3:8 Luhandu ludi lufuma kudi Yehowa. Disankisha diebe dikale kudi bantu bebe! 
Psalms4:1 Hanakuela dî, ungitabe, wewe Nzambi wa buakane buanyi; wewe wakunshikika mu muaba munene hanakadi mu dikenga; unfuile luse, unvue kulomba kuanyi." 
Psalms4:2 Nuenu bana balume ba bantu, nenuandamune butumbi buanyi bua kuluabu bundu musangu bule bishi? Nenusue malu a hatuhu, nenukebe mashimi musangu bule bishi?" 
Psalms4:3 Kadi mimanye ne, Yehowa wakudijidila muntu muakane bua bualu buandi; Yehowa neangunvuile hanamuela dî." 
Psalms4:4 Nuikale ne tshiji, kanuenji malu mabi; nuelangane meji a bualu ebu mu mitshima yenu hanuikala ha malulu enu, ne huwai." 
Psalms4:5 Nufile milambu ya buakane, nueyemene Yehowa." 
Psalms4:6 Ba bungi badi bamba ne, Muntu kayi watulesha diakalengele? Yehowa, utubandishile munya wa mpala webe." 
Psalms4:7 Wewe Wakuteka disanka mu mutshima wanyi, ditamba dia mu tshikondo tshia kuyisangana kua maminu abo ne nyinyo yabo mihia-mihia." 
Psalms4:8 Nendale hanshi, nendale tulu mu ditalala kabidi, bualu bua wewe nkayebe, Yehowa, udi unvuishila muaba wa kusomba talalâ." 
Psalms5:1 Yehowa, teleja matshu ebe ku mei anyi, unvua meji andi ngela." 
Psalms5:2 Unvua dî dia muadi wanyi, Mukelenge wanyi ne Nzambi wanyi; bualu hua kudi wewe nkundi ndomba." 
Psalms5:3 Yehowa, mu dinda neunvue di dianyi; mu dinda nenteke kulomba kuanyi ku mpala kuebe, nengindile ditaba diebe." 
Psalms5:4 Bualu bua wewe kuena Nzambi udi usanka mu malu mabi; malu mabi kaena mamanye mua kushala nʼebe kaba kamue. 
Psalms5:5 Bantu badi bafunafuna kabena bamanye mua kuimana ku mesu kuebe. Wewe udi ne benji ba malu mabi bonso lukuna. 
Psalms5:6 Wewe neubutule bena mashimi. Yehowa udi ukenuka bantu badi bamatshisha mashi hanshi ne badi badinga bakuabo. 
Psalms5:7 Kadi meme hanyi nembuele mu nsubu muebe bua kukumbana kua luse luebe; nenkuinamine mu ntempelo webe ne dikutshina dianyi. 
Psalms5:8 Yehowa, undombole mu buakane buebe bualu bua bena lukuna banyi; ululamishe nshila webe ku mesu kuanyi." 
Psalms5:9 Bualu bua kakuena mei mukana muabo atudi mua kueyemena, mitshima yabo idi miule tente ne malu mabi; miminu yabo idi bu nkita mibulula, badi babomba bakuabo ne ndimi yabo." 
Psalms5:10 Nzambi, ubahishe; bua bobo bine badishinde ku malu adibo bahangidisha. Bualu bua malu mabi abo akuvulangana, ubihate; bualu bua bakukutombokela." 
Psalms5:11 Nunku bonso badi banyemena kudi basanke, bele mbila ya disanka tshiendelele; ne wewe neubalame; bonso badi bananga dina diebe bikale ne disanka kûdi." 
Psalms5:12 Bualu bua wewe, Yehowa, udi uvudishila muntu muakane disanka; udi amunyunguluka ne diakalengele bu mudibo benza ne ngabu." 
Psalms6:1 Yehowa, kumbedi mu tshiji tshiebe, ne kunkengeshi mu kufika kuebe kua munda bikole." 
Psalms6:2 Yehowa, unfuile luse, bualu bua ndi ngamba kuteketa; Yehowa, unsangashe, bualu bua mifuba yanyi idi izakala." 
Psalms6:3 Mutshima wanyi udi unyingalala bikole. Ne wewe, Yehowa, neunshiye nunku musangu bule bishi?" 
Psalms6:4 Alukila, Yehowa, usungile muoyo wanyi; usungile bualu bua luse luebe." 
Psalms6:5 Bualu bua kakuena dikuvuluka mu lufu. Mu Muaba wa Bafue wakutumbisha nganyi? 
Psalms6:6 Kutua kuanyi kua mikemu kudi kuntonda; butuku buonso ndi mpumuna binsonshi bu mai mu bulalu buanyi, ne mu kudila kuanyi ndi mbolesha bulalu buanyi." 
Psalms6:7 Mesu anyi adi mondoke ne tshinyanu bualu bua kanyinganyinga kanyi, adi alua bileshileshi bualu bua bena lukuna banyi." 
Psalms6:8 Nuenu, benji ba malu mabi bonso, umukai kundi; bualu bua Yehowa wakunvua dî dia muadi wanyi." 
Psalms6:9 Yehowa wakunvua kusengelela kuanyi. Yehowa neitabushe kutendelela kuanyi. 
Psalms6:10 Bena lukuna banyi bonso nebafuishibue bundu, nebikale ne buowa bukole. Nebalukile tshianyima; nebafuishibue bundu ku mesu lukasa." 
Psalms7:1 Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi, ndi munyemene kûdi. Unsungile kudi bantu bonso badi bangihata, umpandishe." 
Psalms7:2 Bua kabampandi bu mudi nyama wa ntambue mua kuenza, badi bantuanya bihesa bihesa handi tshiyi ne musungidi." 
Psalms7:3 Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi, bingikala muenze bualu ebu; bingikala ne bualu bubi mu bianza bianyi;" 
Psalms7:4 bingikala mufute muntu malu mabi hakadiye nʼanyi talalâ; (e, nakusungila muena lukuna wanyi, meme tshiyi nʼandi bualu);" 
Psalms7:5 bua malu â udi nʼanyi lukuna angihate, ampete; e, adiatakashe muoyo wanyi mu buloba, aladike butumbi buanyi hanshi mu dinfuenkenya." 
Psalms7:6 Yehowa, ujuke biebe mu tshiji tshiebe, udibisbe bua kutamba tshiji tshia bena lukuna banyi bukole, utabale bua bualu buanyi mu kulumbulula kuwakusungula." 
Psalms7:7 Disangisha dia bantu ba ha buloba dikunyunguluke; ne hawikala ku mutu kuadi, hingana biebe mu diulu." 
Psalms7:8 Yehowa udi ulumbuluisha bantu ba ha buloba. Undumbuluishe meme, Yehowa, bu mudi buakane buanyi ne bu mudi butoke bua mutshima wanyi." 
Psalms7:9 Bubi bua bantu babi bushike, kadi ujadike bantu bakane; bualu bua Nzambi muakane udi uteta meji abo ne mitshima yabo." 
Psalms7:10 Ngabu wanyi udi kudi Nzambi, udi usungila badi ne mitshima miakane." 
Psalms7:11 Nzambi udi mulumbuluishi muakane, Nzambi mene udi ufua tshiji ku dituku ku dituku." 
Psalms7:12 Biabenga muntu kukudimuna mutshima wandi, yeye neasakishe muele wandi wa nvita; wakunana buta buandi, wakubulongolola bimpe." 
Psalms7:13 Wakumulongoluela bielelu bia nvita bia lufu kabidi; udi ukudimuna mikete yandi hua kuluayi mikete idi ne kahia kasuikaku. 
Psalms7:14 Monai, muntu eu mubi udi utantamana ne malu mabi; wakimita bubi, wakulela mashimi." 
Psalms7:15 Wakumbula dijimba, wakudidiundisha, wakuhona mu mutubu wakambileye." 
Psalms7:16 Bualu buandi bubi nebuhingane ha mutu handi mene, ne tshimbambila tshiandi netshihingane ha lubuyangala lua mutu wandi mene." 
Psalms7:17 Nensakidile Yehowa bu mudi buakane buandi, nengimbile dina dia Yehowa Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms8:1 Yehowa, Mukelenge wetu, ke mudi dina diebe ne butumbi ha buloba buonso nunku! Wewe Wakuteka butumbi buebe ha mutu ha diulu!" 
Psalms8:2 Mukana mua bana ne mua batshidi bamua mabele mmuwakujadika bukole buebe, bualu bua bena lukuna bebe, bua wewe mumanye mua kuhuwisha muena lukuna ne mudisombuedi." 
Psalms8:3 Handi ntangila diulu diebe, didi mudimu wa bianza biebe, ne ngondo ne mitoto biwakufuka;" 
Psalms8:4 Muntu udi nganyi bua wewe kumuelela meji? Ne muana wa muntu udi nganyi bua wewe udi umulama ne dinanga? 
Psalms8:5 Bualu hua wakunfuisha ku nyima kua Nzambi anu kakese, wakamuasa tshifulu tshia butumbi ne buneme." 
Psalms8:6 Wakumuvuisha mukokeshi wa ha mutu ha midimu ya bianza biebe, wakuteka bintu bionso muinshi mua makasa andi:" 
Psalms8:7 mikoko yonso ne ngombe, ne nyama ya mu tshisuku;" 
Psalms8:8 ne nyunyu ya mulu ne minyinyi ya mu mai manene, bintu bionso mene bidi bihitakana mu nshila ya mu mai manene." 
Psalms8:9 Yehowa, Mukelenge wetu, ke mudi dina diebe butumbi ha buloba buonso nunku!" 
Psalms9:1 Nensakidile Yehowa ne mutshima wanyi wonso; nengambile bantu bua malu ebe onso a kukema. 
Psalms9:2 Nengikale ne disanka ne musangelu bua bualu buebe; nengimbile dina diebe misambu ya kuhumbisha nʼai, wewe Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu." 
Psalms9:3 Bualu bua bena lukuna banyi badi babikila ku nyima, badi balenduka ne badi bajimina ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms9:4 Buala bua wakujadika buakane buanyi mu tshilumbu; wakushikama mu mkuasa wa bukelenge ulumbulula ne kulumbulula kuakane. 
Psalms9:5 Wakabela bisamba bia bantu, wakubutula bantu babi; wakujimisha dina diabo tshiendelele." 
Psalms9:6 Bena lukuna bakubutidibua; misoko yabo lwakushimbula yakulua bikulu tshiendelele. Tshivulukidi tshiai mene tshiakajimina. 
Psalms9:7 Kadi Yehowa udi mushikame bu Mukelenge tshiendelele. Wakulongolola nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge bua kulumbulula kuandi. 
Psalms9:8 Nealumbuluishe ba ha buloba mu buakane buandi, neakose bilumbu bia bantu, kayi ne kansungusungu." 
Psalms9:9 Nunku Yehowa neikale tshibumba tshile kudi bantu badi bakengeshibua. Neikale tshibumba tshile kudi bantu mu tshikondo tshia ntatu. 
Psalms9:10 Badi bamanye dina diebe nebakueyemene; buala bua wewe, Yehowa, kuena muanze kulekela bantu badi bakukeba." 
Psalms9:11 Nuimbile Yehowa udi mushikame mu Siona misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai; numanyishe bienzedi biandi munkatshi mua bantu ba ha buloba. 
Psalms9:12 Bualu bua yeye udi usombuela mashi abo udi ubavuluka; kena uhua muadi wa bahele muoyo. 
Psalms9:13 Yehowa, unfuile luse, tangila dikenga dindi nʼadi kudi badi nʼanyi lukuna; wewe udi umbisha bua kungumusha ku bibi bia ku lufu;" 
Psalms9:14 bua meme kumanyisha bantu bua butumbi buebe buonso, bua meme kusanka bua luhandu luebe ku bibi bia muana wa bakashi wa Siona." 
Psalms9:15 Ba mu bisamba bia bantu bakuhona mu dijimba diakumbulabo; dikasa diabo diakukuatshibua mu bukuondo buakusokokabo: 
Psalms9:16 Yehowa wakudimanyisha kudi bantu, wakukosa bilumbu biabo; bantu babi badi bakuatshibua mu mateyi akenzabo ne bianza biabo." 
Psalms9:17 Budi bantu babi nʼabu mbua kualukila mu Muaba wa Bafue; bonso mene ba mu bisamba bia bantu badi bahua Nzambi muoyo nebenze nunku. 
Psalms9:18 Bualu bua kabena bahua badi bakengela bintu muoyo tshiendelele, ne ditekemena dia badi ne mitshima mihuekele kadiena dijimina kashidi." 
Psalms9:19 Yehowa, juka biebe; kuitabushi bua bantu bakutambe bukole, balumbuluishe ba mu bisamba bia bantu ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms9:20 Yehowa, ubakuatshishe buowa, ba mu bisamba bia bantu bamanye biabo ne, Tudi anu bantu." 
Psalms10:1 Yehowa, wewe udi wimana kule kuakua bua tshinyi? Udi usokoma mu bikondo bia makenga bua tshinyi?" 
Psalms10:2 Muntu mubi mu kudisua kuandi udi wihata bantu bahele bikole; witabushe bua bantu babi bakuatshibue mu mateyi akuhangidishabo. 
Psalms10:3 Bualu bua muntu mubi udi ufunafuna bua malu adi mutshima wandi musue, munyengi wa bintu udi uhenda Yehowa ne udi umuhetula." 
Psalms10:4 Muntu mubi udi wamba mu diambu diandi ne, Nzambi kena ukengesha muntu. Meji andi onso adi anu nunku ne, Kakuena Nzambi." 
Psalms10:5 Bienzedi biandi bidi bimuvuishila diakalengele misangu yonso; kulumbulula kuebe kudi kule kudiye, kudi mesu andi kâyi mua kukumona. Ne mutudi tumona bua bena lukuna bandi bonso, yeye udi ubela muhuya." 
Psalms10:6 Udi wamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Kabena bannyungisha; tô ne mu bikondo bionso tshiena ntuta dikasa dibi." 
Psalms10:7 Mukana muandi mudi mûle tente ne bihendu ne kudinga ne nvita; muinshi mua ludimi luandi mudi lukinu ne malu mabi. 
Psalms10:8 Udi ushikama mu miaba misokoma ya mu misoko, walamina bantu; mu bisokomenu udi ushiha badi kabayi ne tshilumbu. Mesu andi adi atentekela badi kabayi mua kudikuatshisha." 
Psalms10:9 Udi ulala walamina bu mudi nyama wa ntambue walamina mu tshihuka; udi walamina nunku bua kukuata muena dikenga. Udi ukuata muena dikenga hamukokeye mu bukuondo buandi. 
Psalms10:10 Udi ubutama, udi winama hanshi; badi kabayi ne dikuatshisha badi babona ku mpala kua bantu bandi bakole." 
Psalms10:11 Yeye udi udiamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Nzambi wakuhua muoyo; udi usokoka mpala wandi, kena utangila bualu ebu kashidi." 
Psalms10:12 Yehowa, juka biebe, Nzambi wetu, bisha tshianza tshiebe. Kuhu hadi mu dikenga muoyo." 
Psalms10:13 Muntu mubi udi ulengulula Nzambi bua tshinyi, ne udi wamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Wewe kuena unkengesha?" 
Psalms10:14 Wewe wantangila bualu ebu, bualu bua utu watangila kanyinganyinga ne dikenga, bua kubikanda ku tshianza tshiebe. Udi kayi ne dikuatshisha udi udifila mu bianza biebe; wewe wakumana kuikala mukuatshishi wa bana ba nshiya." 
Psalms10:15 Utshibule diboko dia muntu mubi, bakebekebe bubi bua muenji wa malu mabi tô ne hawikala kuyi mua kubumona kabidi." 
Psalms10:16 Yehowa udi Mukelenge tô ne tshiendelele; bisamba bia bantu biakujimina mu buloba buandi. 
Psalms10:17 Yehowa, wewe wakunvua kulomba kua badi ne mitshima mihuekele; udi ujadika mitshima yabo, udi uteleja matshu ebe kudibo." 
Psalms10:18 Bua wewe kulumbulula bilumbu bia bana ba nshiya ne bia badi bakengeshibua ne kulumbulula kuakane; bua muntu wa ha buloba kamanyi mua kukuatshisha bakuabo buowa kabidi tshiendelele. 
Psalms11:1 Ndi nyemena kudi Yehowa; munyi munudi nungambila ne, Unyeme bu nyunyu ku mukuna webe?" 
Psalms11:2 Bua mona mudi bantu babi banana buta buabo, hadi bahayika mukete ku mulemu, bua kuwela mu mîdima bua kuasa nʼau badi ne mitshima mitoke." 
Psalms11:3 Hashimbulabo bishimikidi bia nsubu, muntu muakane udi mua kuenza tshinyi?" 
Psalms11:4 Yehowa udi mu ntempelo wandi wa tshijila, Yehowa mene udi ne nkuasa wandi wa butumbi mu diulu. Mesu andi adi amena, bilafinyi biandi bidi biteta bana ba bantu." 
Psalms11:5 Yehowa udi uteta muntu muakane; kadi mutshima wandi udi ne muntu mubi ne muntu udi musue malu a tshimbambila lukuna. 
Psalms11:6 Yeye nealokeshile bantu babi makala a kahia; kahia ne soufre ne luhehele ludi luosha nebikale tshituha tshia luhanza luabo tshidibo baheta. 
Psalms11:7 Bualu bua Yehowa udi muakane; udi unanga buakane; bantu badi bakane nebamonangane nʼandi ku mesu. 
Psalms12:1 Yehowa, unkuatshishe; bualu bua muntu muakane kenaku kabidi; bualu bua badi mua kueyemenyibua badi bajimina munkatshi mua bukua bantu." 
Psalms12:2 Badi bambilangana mashimi, muntu ne muntu ne muena mutumba nʼandi. Badi bakula ne mishiku ya lubombo ne mitshima ibidi." 
Psalms12:3 Yehowa udi umushe bonso badi ne mishiku ya lubombo, ne ludimi ludi lufunafuna malu manene." 
Psalms12:4 Badi bamba ne, Netudivuishe bantu bakole ku ndimi yetu; mishiku yetu itudi nʼai nyetu; mukelenge ku mutu kuetu nganyi?" 
Psalms12:5 Bualu bua badi bakengesha bahele, bualu bua badi bakengela bintu badi balua mikemu, Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Nembike bianyi; nemmushikike mu muaba wa luhandu udiye ukebakeba." 
Psalms12:6 Mei a Yehowa adi mimpe; adi bu tshiamu tshia argent tshiakufulabo mu ditanda dia ha buloba, tshiakufulabo misangu muanda mutekete." 
Psalms12:7 Wewe Yehowa, neubalame; neubalame bua kubasungila ku tshikondo etshi tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms12:8 Bantu babi badi bendakana ku nseke yonso, hatumbishabo malu a bundu munkatshi mua bukua bantu." 
Psalms13:1 Yehowa, musangu bule munyi wewe neuhue bualu buanyi muoyo? Ntshiendelele, anyi? Neusokoke mpala webe kundi musangu bule bishi?" 
Psalms13:2 Musangu bule munyi undi mua kuikala ne ntatu munda muanyi, ne kanyinganyinga mu mutshima wanyi ku dituku ku dituku? Muena lukuna wanyi neadibandishe ku mutu kuanyi musangu bule munyi?" 
Psalms13:3 Untangile ne witabe kundi, Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi. Utandule mesu anyi, bua tshiadi tulu tua lufu;" 
Psalms13:4 bua muena lukuna wanyi kambi biandi ne, Nakumutamba bukole; ne bua bahumbishi banyi kabasanki bualu bua nakudishinda." 
Psalms13:5 Kadi nakueyemena luse luebe; mutshima wanyi neusanke bua luhandu luebe. 
Psalms13:6 Nengimbile Yehowa musambu, bualu bua wakungenzela malu mimpe makumbane." 
Psalms14:1 Muhote udi wamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Kakuena Nzambi. Bobo badi banyanguke, badi benza malu mabi adi afuisha bundu; kakuena nansha umue wabo udi wenzaku malu mimpe." 
Psalms14:2 Yehowa wa mu diulu wakatangila hanshi hadi bana ha bantu, bua kumoneye ne, Umue wabo udi wenza bu muena meji, anyi? Umue wabo udi ukeba Nzambi, anyi?" 
Psalms14:3 Buonso buabo bakusesuka mu nshila; buonso buabo bakumana kunyanguka hamue. Kakuena umue wabo udi wenza bimpe; kakuena nansha umuehele udi muimpe. 
Psalms14:4 Benji ba malu mabi bonso kabena ne meji, anyi? Badi badia bantu banyi bu mudibo badia bidia, ne kabena babikila dina dia Yehowa." 
Psalms14:5 Ku muaba wawa badi ne buowa bukole; bualu bua Nzambi udi mu mulongo wa bantu bakahe. 
Psalms14:6 Nuenu nudi basue kufuisha malu akudihangidishila muhele bundu, kadi Yehowa udi tshinyemenu tshiandi." 
Psalms14:7 Nakadi kusua bua luhandu lua Bena Isalele lufume ku Siona! Hakudimuna Yehowa buhika bua bantu bandi bua kubaha diakalengele, Yakoba neasanke, ne Bena Isalele nebikale ne disanka kabidi." 
Psalms15:1 Yehowa, muntu kai neashikame mu nsubu webe wa ntenta? Washikama mu mukuna webe wa tshijila nganyi?" 
Psalms15:2 Nyeye udi wenda mu buakane, udi wenza malu makane, udi wamba mei malelela mu mutshima wandi." 
Psalms15:3 Nyeye udi kayi wela mukoso ne ludimi luandi, udi kayi wenzela mulunda wandi bibi, udi kayi unvua mei a bunsonge adibo bamba bua muena mutumba nʼandi." 
Psalms15:4 Ku mesu andi muntu mubi udi mulenguludibue; kadi udi utumbisha bantu badi banemeka Yehowa. Biaditshiheye ne bualu bubi budi bumukuata, yeye kena wandamuka ku dî diandi." 
Psalms15:5 Kena usombesha bakuabo argent yandi bua kuangateye kasombela kudibo, kena witabusha dibueshila bua kunyangeye tshilumbu tshia muntu udi kayi ne bualu. Muntu udi wenza malu â kena unyungishibua tshiendelele." 
Psalms16:1 Nzambi undame, bualu bua ndi nkeba tshinyemenu tshianyi kûdi." 
Psalms16:2 Nakuambila Yehowa ne, Wewe udi Mukelenge wanyi, tshiena ne diakalengele didi dikuhita wewe." 
Psalms16:3 Ndi ngamba bua bansanto ba ha buloba ne, Badi bantu bimpe bandi ne disanka bualu buabo." 
Psalms16:4 Tunyinganyinga tuabo netukumbane kudi badi baha nzambi mikuabo maha abo bua kubenga Yehowa. Meme tshiena nfila milambu yabo ya mashi idibo bahumuna, tshiena ntela mena ai ku mishiku yanyi." 
Psalms16:5 Yehowa udi luanyi luseke lua buhianyi buanyi ne lua luhanza luanyi; wewe mene udi unjadikila luseke luanyi lua buhianyi. 
Psalms16:6 Mionshi ya luidi yakubona mu miaba mimpe bua bualu buanyi; bulelela, ndi ne buhianyi bulengele." 
Psalms16:7 Nenvudishile Yehowa disanka, wakumpa lungenyi; bulelela, mu meba a butuku mutshima wanyi udi unyisha." 
Psalms16:8 Nakuteka Yehowa ku mpala kuanyi misangu yonso; bualu bua yeye udi ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume tshiena nyungishibua. 
Psalms16:9 Nunku mutshima wanyi udi usanka, ne nyuma wanyi udi usanka kabidi Mubidi wanyi udi mushikame muhandishibue." 
Psalms16:10 Bualu bua wewe kuena ushiya muoyo wanyi mu Muaba wa Bafue; kuena witabusha bua muntu webe wa tshijila atangile Dijimba dia Bafue. 
Psalms16:11 Wewe neundeshe nshila wa muoyo. Tshiuwidi tshia masanka tshidi ha buihi nʼebe; masanka adi mu tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshiendelele. 
Psalms17:1 Yehowa, unvua bualu budi buakane; teleja matshu ebe ku kudila kuanyi; teleja matshu ebe ku kulomba kuanyi kudi kuhatuka ku mishiku idi kayiyi ne lubombo." 
Psalms17:2 Dikosa dia nsambu yanyi difume kuebe kûdi mushikame; mesu ebe atangile bualu budi buakane. 
Psalms17:3 Wewe wakuteta mutshima wanyi; wewe wakulua kundi mu butuku; wewe wakunteta, kukumangana ne meji mabi. Mukana muanyi kabidi kamuena muamba malu mabi." 
Psalms17:4 Mu bikadilu bia bantu nakudimuka, bualu bua dî dia ku mishiku yebe, bua tshilondi nshila ya bena dibutuka." 
Psalms17:5 Bienzedi bianyi biakulamata nshila yebe bikole, makasa anyi kâkuselemuka." 
Psalms17:6 Nzambi, ndi nkubikila, bualu bua wewe newitabe kundi. Teleja matshu ebe kundi, unvua dî dianyi." 
Psalms17:7 Lesha luse luebe ludi lutukemesha, wewe udi Usungila badi bakeba tshinyemenu ku tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole bua kuhanduka kudi badi bajuka bua kubaluisha." 
Psalms17:8 Undame bu kamonyi ka disu diebe; unsokoke muinshi mua mundidimbi wa mahuahua ebe," 
Psalms17:9 kudi bantu babi badi bankengesha, kudi bena lukuna banyi badi bannyunguluka ku nseke yonso bakeba kunshiha," 
Psalms17:10 Bakukanda mitshima yabo bua kabikadi ne luse, badi bamba mei a diambu mukana muabo." 
Psalms17:11 Miaba yonso itudi basue kuenda bakutunyungulukaku mpindiu, badi bateka mesu abo kutudi bua kutuhonesha hanshi," 
Psalms17:12 mbu mudi nyama wa ntambue hadiye ne lukuka lua kukuata tshintu, ne bu mudi muana wa nyama wa ntambue walamina mu miaba misokoma." 
Psalms17:13 Yehowa, ujuke biebe, wimane ku mpala kuandi, umuele hanshi; usungile muoyo wanyi kudi muntu mubi ne muele webe wa nvita." 
Psalms17:14 Yehowa, unsungile kudi bantu ne tshianza tshiebe, kudi bantu badi ne luseke luabo lua muoyo anu ha buloba ebu, ne bena mafu awakûsha tente ne bintu bia mu tshibutshilu tshiebe. Bana hadibo balela badi bûkuta, badi bashila bana babo bakese bintu bidi bishala ha mutu." 
Psalms17:15 Kadi meme hanyi, mu kubingishibua kuanyi, nemmone mpala webe: nengikale ne disanka dikumbane hanatabala ne hanatangila tshifuanyikishi tshiebe." 
Psalms18:1 Ndi nkunanga, wewe Nzambi, bukole buanyi." 
Psalms18:2 Yehowa udi dibue dianyi, musoko wanyi wa ngumbu ya nvita, ne musungidi wanyi. Udi Nzambi wanyi, dibue dianyi mundi nnyemenamu. Udi ngabu wanyi, ne lusengu lua luhandu luanyi, tshibumba tshianyi tshile." 
Psalms18:3 Nembikile Yehowa, udi muakanangane ne butumbi bua bantu bamutumbisha. Nunku nakusungidibua mu bianza bia bena lukuna banyi." 
Psalms18:4 Makuondo a lufu akanyunguluka, kubutuka kuakadi bu mai mahasalala kuakantshinyisha." 
Psalms18:5 Makuondo a Muaba wa Bafue akanyunguluka, mateyi a lufu akadi ku mpala kuanyi." 
Psalms18:6 Mu kanyinganyinga kanyi nakadibikila Yehowa, nakadila kudi Nzambi wanyi. Yeye wakunua dî dianyi hakadiye mu ntempelo wandi, muadi wanyi kudiye wakafika ku matshu andi." 
Psalms18:7 Ka buloba buakazakala ne buakanyunga, bishimikidi bia mikuna mile biakazakala kabidi ne biakakanka, bualu bua yeye wakadi ne tshiji." 
Psalms18:8 Muishi wa kahia mufume mu diulu diandi wakabanda mulu, kahia kakahatuka mukana muandi kakosha bintu. Makala a kahia matemesha kudiye akakalundula." 
Psalms18:9 Yeye wakinamisha diulu kabidi, wakahueka biandi hanshi; midima mikole yakadi muinshi mua makasa andi." 
Psalms18:10 Wakenda mubande ha nyima ha mukeluba, wakahahala; e, wakaya lubilu ne mahuahua a luhehele." 
Psalms18:11 Wakavuisha midima tshisokomenu tshiandi, wakavuisha matutu manene akadi mafike bua mai akadimu bu ntenta mumunyunguluke." 
Psalms18:12 Mu dikenka diakadi ku mpala kuandi muakahatuka matutu andi manene akadi ne mabue a nvula ne makala a kahia. 
Psalms18:13 Yehowa wakakunguisha mikungulu ya nvula kabidi mu diulu, Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu wakamba dî diandi, mabue a nvula ne makala a kahia." 
Psalms18:14 Wakela mikete yandi, wakamuangalasha bena lukuna banyi; wakahenyisha miele ya nvula, wakabahita bukole." 
Psalms18:15 Hashishe, nshila ya mu mai manene yakamueneka ku mesu, ne bishimikidi bia buloba biakasokolodibua, bua kubela kuebe, Yehowa, ne bua kuhuja kua muhuya wa mu diulu diebe." 
Psalms18:16 Wakatuma tshianza tshiandi tshifume mu diulu, wakankuata, wakampa tula mu mai a bungi." 
Psalms18:17 Wakansankisha mu bianza bia muena lukuna wanyi mukole, ne bia bantu bakankina, bualu bua bakampita bukole." 
Psalms18:18 Bakalua ne nvita ku mpala kuanyi mu dituku dia dikenga dianyi; kadi Yehowa wakadi tshieyemenu tshianyi. 
Psalms18:19 Wakaluhuka nʼanyi, wakanteka mu muaba munene, wakampandisha, bualu bua wakasanka bua bualu buanyi." 
Psalms18:20 Yehowa wakanfuta difutu diakadi dikumbana buakane buanyi; wakampingashila difutu bu muakadi butoke bua bianza bianyi. 
Psalms18:21 Bualu bua nakalamata nshila ya Yehowa, ne tshiakumuka kudi Nzambi wanyi bua kumuenzela malu mabi." 
Psalms18:22 Mikenji yandi yonso mijalame yakadi ku mpala kuanyi, ne tshiakumusha mikenji yandi kundi." 
Psalms18:23 Tshiakadi ne tshilumbu ku mpala kuandi, nakadikanda bua tshienji bualu bubi." 
Psalms18:24 Bua malu â Yehowa wakanfuta bu muakadi buakane buanyi ne bu muakadi butoke bua bianza bianyi ku mesu kuandi. 
Psalms18:25 Wewe udi udimuenesha bu muena luse kudi badi ne luse, udi udimuenesha kuyi mua kubandibua kudi muntu udi kayi ne tshilumbu." 
Psalms18:26 Udi udimuenesha muena mutshima mutoke kudi muntu udi ne mutshima mutoke; udi udimuenesha muena budimu kudi muntu udi ne tshitshu. 
Psalms18:27 Bualu bua udi ubandisha bantu badi badihuekesha; kadi udi uhuekesha badi ne mesu a dihetu," 
Psalms18:28 E, udi untemeshila muinda wanyi; Yehowa Nzambi wanyi udi untokeshila midima yanyi." 
Psalms18:29 E binuikala nʼebe, ndi mua kutshimuna mualu wa bena nvita, ne ku dikuatshisha dia Nzambi wanyi ndi mua kutuhika lumbu." 
Psalms18:30 Au mmalu a Nzambi — nshila wandi udi muakane tshishiki; dî dia Yehowa diakatetshibua ne, Didi dia bushuwa. Yeye udi ngabu wa banso badi banyemena kudiye." 
Psalms18:31 Bualu bua Nzambi udi nganyi, bikaleye kayi Yehowa nkayandi? Udi dibue nganyi, bikaladi kadiyi Nzambi wetu?" 
Psalms18:32 Nzambi mene udi unjingila ne bukole, udi uvuisha nshila wanyi mululame tshishiki." 
Psalms18:33 Udi uvuisha makasa anyi bu mikono ya ngulungu mukashi, udi ungimanyika ha mutu ha mikuna yanyi mile." 
Psalms18:34 Udi uyisha bianza bianyi mua kuluanganabi nvita; nunku maboko anyi adi mua kunana buta bua tshiamu tshia mitaku. 
Psalms18:35 Wewe wakumpa ngabu wa luhandu luebe, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshiakungimanyika, ne kudihuekesha kuebe kuakunvuisha muntu munene." 
Psalms18:36 Wakadiundisha muaba undi ngendela muinshi mua makasa anyi, bua makasa anyi kâselemuki." 
Psalms18:37 Nakihata badi nʼanyi lukuna, nakabaheta; tshiakalukila kabidi tô ne hanakamana kubashiha." 
Psalms18:38 Nakabasa, nakabasompola, nunku kabakamanya mua kujuka kabidi; bakahona muinshi mua makasa anyi." 
Psalms18:39 Bualu bua wewe wakajingila ne bukole bua kuluangana nvita; wakinamisha bantu bakabika bua kuntantamena muinshi muanyi. 
Psalms18:40 Wewe wakenzesha bena lukuna banyi bua kunkomabo nyima, nakadimusha bakadi nʼanyi lukuna." 
Psalms18:41 Bakadila; kadi kakuakadi muntu wakabasungila, bakadila kudi Yehowa mene, kadi yeye kakitaba kudibo." 
Psalms18:42 Ka nakababotesha balue bu luhuishi ku mpala kua luhehele, nakabimasha bu bitahikidi bia mu misesu." 
Psalms18:43 Wewe wakansungila ku mafuilangana a bantu; wakanteka ku mutu kua bisamba bia bantu. Bantu banakadi tshiyi muanze kumanya diambedi bakankuatshila mudimu. 
Psalms18:44 Mu diba diakunvuabo lumu luanyi bakantumikila; ba mu bisamba bia bende bakulua kunkokela ne lubombo. 
Psalms18:45 Ba mu bisamba bia bende bakateketa, bakaluhuka mu miaba yonso ya ngumbu bazakala." 
Psalms18:46 Yehowa udi ne muoyo; dibue dianyi divudishibue disanka, ne Nzambi wa luhandu luanyi atumbishibue," 
Psalms18:47 Nzambi eu mene udi usombuela, udi uhuekesha bantu muinshi mua bukokeshi buanyi." 
Psalms18:48 Udi unsungila mu bianza bia bena lukuna banyi; e, wewe udi umbandisha ku mutu kua badi bajuka ne nvita ku mpala kuanyi; udi umpandisha kudi bena tshimbambila." 
Psalms18:49 Bua malu â nenkutumbishe munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu, Yehowa, nengimbile dina diebe misambu." 
Psalms18:50 Yeye udi uhesha mukelenge wakasunguleye luhandu lunene, udi ulesha muntu wandi muedibue manyi ha mutu luse lunene, udi ulesha Davidi ne tunkanunuma tuandi luse tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms19:1 Diulu didi diamba butumbi bua Nzambi; bia mu diulu bibaluluke bidi bimuenesha midimu ya bianza biandi. 
Psalms19:2 Dituku dimue didi diakulangana ne dikuabo dituku, ne butuku budi bumanyisha bukuabo lungenyi." 
Psalms19:3 Kakuena muaku, kakuena mei; dî diabi kadiena diunvuibua;" 
Psalms19:4 mukunda wabi udi uya mu miaba yonso ya ha buloba, ne mei abi adi aya tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba. Munkatshi muabi muakashimikileye diba nsubu wa ntenta," 
Psalms19:5 didi bu mubaki wa mukashi haluhukeye mu nsubu muandi, ne didi disanka bua kuendadi luendu luadi bu mudi muntu mukole usanka." 
Psalms19:6 Dihatuka diadi didi kunfudilu kua diulu, ne kunyunguluka kuadi kudi kufika kundekelu kua diulu; kakuena tshintu tshidi tshisokoka ku munya wadi." 
Psalms19:7 Mikenji ya Yehowa idi miakane tshishiki isangasha muoyo wa muntu; Tshimanyishilu tshia Yehowa tshidi mua kueyemenyibua, tshidi tshivuisha muntu udi mudibakane muena meji." 
Psalms19:8 Mei a Yehowa adi malelela, adi asankisha mutshima; mukenji wa Yehowa udi mulengele, udi utandula mesu a bantu." 
Psalms19:9 Ditshina dia Yehowa didi ditoke, didi dishindama tshiendelele; dî dijalame dia Yehowa didi dia bushuwa, didi ne buakane misangu yonso." 
Psalms19:10 Kubinanga kudi kuhita kunanga or buimpe; e, kudi kuhita kunanga or wa mushinga mukole wa bungi buimpe. Bidi bihita buitshi ne mamata a buitshi a ku dihula kushemakana." 
Psalms19:11 Muntu webe udi mudimushibue kabidi kudibi; ne mu kutumikila kuabi mudi bukenji bunene. 
Psalms19:12 Udi mumanye mua kujingulula mahanga andi nganyi? Umbingishe ku malu mabi andi tshiyi mumone ku mesu. 
Psalms19:13 Ukande muntu webe kabidi bua kenji malu mabi mu tshitshu tshiandi; malu â mabi kânkokeshi nansha! Nunku nengikale tshiyi ne bualu bua kumbandabo nʼabu, nembingishibue ku malu mabi manene." 
Psalms19:14 Mei a mukana muanyi ne meji andi ngela mu mutshima wanyi ikale mitabushibue ku mesu kuebe, Yehowa, dibue dianyi ne muhikudi wanyi." 
Psalms20:1 Yehowa itabe kudi mu dituku dia dikenga diebe! Dina dia Nzambi wa Yakoba dikushikike ku muaba wa kulu! 
Psalms20:2 Yeye akutumine dikuatshisha difume ku nsubu wandi wa tshijila, akukoleshe ne bukole bufume ku Siona!" 
Psalms20:3 Yeye avuluke milambu yonso ya bia kudia iudi ufila, ne itabushe milambu yebe ya kumuoshila ne disanka!" 
Psalms20:4 Akuhe malu adi mutshima webe munange, akushikishile malu onso awahangidisha!" 
Psalms20:5 Netuele mbila ya disanka bua luhandu luebe mu nvita yetu, ne mu dina dia Nzambi wetu netuimanyike mabendela etu. Yehowa akushikishile milombu yebe yonso." 
Psalms20:6 Katataka ndi mumanye ne, Yehowa neasungile wakueleye manyi ha mutu handi, neitabe kudiye ne ditaba difume mu diulu diandi dia tshijila, ku bienzedi bikole bia tshianza tshiandi tshia balume tshidi tshimusungila." 
Psalms20:7 Bakuabo badi beyemena makalu a nvita, bakuabo badi beyemena tubalu; kadi tuetu netutele dina dia Yehowa Nzambi wetu." 
Psalms20:8 Bobo nebiname, nebadishinde hanshi; kadi tuetu nenjuke, netujalame." 
Psalms20:9 Yehowa, usungile mukelenge; witabe kutudi hatu a kubikila." 
Psalms21:1 Yehowa, mukelenge neasanke mu bukole buebe, ke, mudiye usanka bikole bua luhandu luebe!" 
Psalms21:2 Wewe wakanuha bualu buakadi mutshima wandi musue, kuakuhidia kunyua dilomba dia ku mishiku yandi." 
Psalms21:3 Bualu bua udi umuakidila ne masanka mimpe; udi wasa tshifulu tshia bukelenge tshia or wa mushinga mukole ha mutu handi. 
Psalms21:4 Yeye wakakulomba muoyo, wewe wakamuhau, wakamuha matuku awakamuleheshila tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms21:5 Butumbi buandi budi bunene bualu bua luhandu luebe, udi uteka buneme ne butumbi hamʼbidi handi." 
Psalms21:6 E, wewe udi umuvisha bu udibo batamba kuvudishila masanka tshiendelele; udi umusankisha ne disanka dia kuikaleye nʼebe ku mpala kuebe." 
Psalms21:7 Bualu bua mukelenge udi weyemena Yehowa; ne bualu bua luse lua Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu yeye kena unyungishibua. 
Psalms21:8 Tshianza tshiebe netshihete bonso badi nʼebe lukuna; tshianza tshiebe tshia balume netshihete badi bakukina. 
Psalms21:9 Neubavuishe bu tshikutu tshidi tshitema ne kahia mu tshikondo tshiwamueneka. Yehowa neabamine mu tshiji tshiandi, ne kahia nekabashidishe." 
Psalms21:10 Wewe neubutule bana baledibue kudibo, neubumushe ha buloba, neumushe tunkanunuma tuabo munkatshi mua bukua bantu." 
Psalms21:11 Bualu bua bakuhunga di bua kukuenzela bibi; bakakuhangidishila bualu munda muabo, kadi kabena bamanye mua kubushikisha." 
Psalms21:12 Bualu bua wewe neubakomeshe nyima bua kubanyemesha; muludikile mikete mu milemu yebe ya buta bua kubasa mu mpala yabo. 
Psalms21:13 Wewe Yehowa, utumbishibue mu bukole buebe! Netuimbe misambu, netutumbishe bukole buebe!" 
Psalms22:1 Nzambi wanyi, Nzambi wanyi, wakundekela tshinyi? Bualu kai wewe udi aku kule kuyi unkuatshisha, kuyi unvua mei a kutua kuanyi kua mikemu?" 
Psalms22:2 Aka, Nzambi wanyi, ndi ndila kûdi mu munya, kadi wewe kuena witaba; ndi ndila kûdi mu diba dia butuku, kadi tshiena nsangana dikisha." 
Psalms22:3 Kadi wewe udi wa tshijila, udi mushikika mu nkuasa wa butumbi munkatshi mua butumbi bua Bena Isalele." 
Psalms22:4 Batatu betu bakakueyemena, bakakueyemena, ne wewe wakabasungila," 
Psalms22:5 Bakadila kûdi, bakahandishibua; bakakueyemena, kabakafuishibua bundu." 
Psalms22:6 Kadi meme hanyi ndi munanyi, tshiena muntu; ndi tshidibo bahetula kudi bantu, ndi mulenguludibue kudi bantu." 
Psalms22:7 Bonso badi bantangila badi banseka, badi banfunkuna mishiku, badi bakuha mitu, bamba ne," 
Psalms22:8 Wakadifila kudi Yehowa; yeye amusungile, yeye amuhandishe, bualu bua udi usanka bualu buandi!" 
Psalms22:9 Kadi wewe nyeye wakampatula mu difu dia mamu wanyi; wewe wakauyisha mukueyemenyi hanakadi mu tshiadi tshia mamu wanyi. 
Psalms22:10 Bakanua bua dindama diebe ku dituku diakandelabo; wewe udi Nzambi wanyi katshia mamu wanyi wandela. 
Psalms22:11 Kuikadi nʼanyi kule; bualu bua dikenga didi ha buihi, ne kakuena munkuatshishi." 
Psalms22:12 Balume ba ngombe ba bungi badi bannyunguluka, balume ba ngombe bakole ba mu Bashana badi banjika nseke yonso." 
Psalms22:13 Badi bambuluila mukana muabo bitongatonga, bu mudi nyama wa ntambue utuanya wenda udila." 
Psalms22:14 Ndi muhongoloke bu mai, mifuba yanyi yonso idi mihauke mu manungu ai; mutshima wanyi udi bu dihula, wakufingatuka munda muanyi." 
Psalms22:15 Bukole buanyi buakûma bu tshiyoyi tshia luesu, ne ludimi luanyi ludi lulamatu tshilakalaka tshianyi. Wewe udi undadika mu dinfuenkenya dia lufu." 
Psalms22:16 Bualu bua mbua yakunnyunguluka, tshisumbu tshia benji ba malu mabi tshidi tshingela munkatshi; bakuntaha mputa misompoke mu bianza ne mu makasa." 
Psalms22:17 Ndi mua kubala mifuba yanyi yonso. Badi banjosha talalâ, badi bangosha mesu." 
Psalms22:18 Badi babanyangana bilulu bianyi munkatshi muabo, badi belela bivualu bianyi nshobo." 
Psalms22:19 Kadi wewe, Yehowa, kuikadi kule nansha! Wewe, udi bukole buanyi, ulue lukasa bua kunkuatshisha!" 
Psalms22:20 Usungile muoyo wanyi musûke bua kaufu ku muele wa nvita, usungile muoyo wanyi muine ku bukole bua mbua." 
Psalms22:21 Unsungile mukana mua nyama wa ntambue, usungile muoyo wanyi mukengeshibue ku lufu lua ku nsengu ya mbowa!" 
Psalms22:22 Nengambile bana betu bua dina diebe; nenkutumbishe munkatshi mua ba mu disangisha dia bantu ba Nzambi. 
Psalms22:23 Nuenu badi batshina Yehowa, numutumbishe! Nuenu, bana bonso ba Yakoba, numutumbishe; nuenu, bana bonso ba Isalele, nukuatshike buowa ku mpala kuandi!" 
Psalms22:24 Bualu bua yeye kakahetula ne kakakenuka makenga a wakadi mu dikenga; kakasokoka mesu andi kudiye, kadi wakamunvuila hakadieye kudiye." 
Psalms22:25 Kukutumbisha kuanyi mu disangisha dinene dia bantu ba Nzambi kudi kufuma anu kûdi wewe; nemmane mitshihu yanyi ku mpala kua badi bamutshina. 
Psalms22:26 Badi ne mitshima mihuekele nebadie, nebûkute; badi bakeba Yehowa nebamutumbishe. Mitshima yenu ikale ne muoyo tshiendelele!" 
Psalms22:27 Ba mu kunfudilu kua buloba nebamuvuluke, nebakudimune mitshima yabo kudi Yehowa. Ba mu biota bionso bia bisamba bia bantu nebatendelele ku mpala kuebe." 
Psalms22:28 Bualu bua bukelenge budi bualu bua Yehowa, ne yeye udi mukokeshi wa bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms22:29 Bulelela, bonso badi badibandisha ha buloba nebamuinamine; bonso badi bahueka tô ne mu dinfuenkenya nebamukukuile, yeye mene udi kayi mumanye mua kudisungila muoyo wandi nênze nunku." 
Psalms22:30 Tunkanunuina tua bantu netumukuatshile mudimu. Bantu nebambile bena mulongo udi ubalonda ku nyima bualu bua Mukelenge. 
Psalms22:31 Nebambile bantu badi kabayi banze kuedibua bua buakane buandi, nebabandile ne, Yeye wakubuenza." 
Psalms23:1 Yehowa udi mulami wanyi, tshiena nkengela tshintu;" 
Psalms23:2 Yeye udi undadika mu mitoloka ya mashinde. Udi undombola hehi ne mai adi talalâ; 
Psalms23:3 udi ukankamasha mutshima wanyi. Udi undombola mu nshila ya buakane bualu bua dina diandi. 
Psalms23:4 Nansha bingenda muhitshile mu luhongo lua mundidimbi wa lufu, tshiena ntshina bualu bubi; bualu bua wewe udi nʼanyi; tshibongo tshiebe ne tshibangu tshiebe bidi binsamba." 
Psalms23:5 Wewe udi ulongolola mesa ku mesu kuanyi ku mpala kua badi nʼanyi lukuna; udi wela manyi ha mutu hanyi, luhanza luanyi ludi luhongoloka." 
Psalms23:6 Bulelela, buimpe ne luse nebindonde matuku onso a muoyo wanyi; nengikale mu nsubu wa Yehowa tshiendelele." 
Psalms24:1 Buloba budi bua Yehowa ne tshiuwidi tshiabu, buloba buine ne badi bashikamamu." 
Psalms24:2 Bualu bua yeye wakabushikika ha mai manene, wakabujadika ha misulu ya mai." 
Psalms24:3 Wabanda mukuna wa Yehowa nganyi? Wimana mu muaba wandi wa tshijila nganyi? 
Psalms24:4 Nyeye udi ne bianza bidi kabiyi bienza bualu bubi ne udi ne mutshima mutoke, udi kayi mubandishile muoyo wandi ku malu a mashimi, udi kayi muditshihe mitshihu bua kudingeye nʼai." 
Psalms24:5 Yeye neangate disanka diamuvudishilabo kudi Yehowa, ne buakane budi Nzambi wa luhandu luandi umubingisha nʼabu." 
Psalms24:6 Aba mbantu ba mu tshikondo etshi badi bamukeba, badi bakeba mpala webe, wewe Nzambi wa Yakoba." 
Psalms24:7 Ambulai mitu yenu, nuenu bibi bia musoko; banuambule, nuenu bibi bia kale, bua Mukelenge wa Butumbi abuelemu!" 
Psalms24:8 Mukelenge wa butumbi nganyi? NYehowa, udi ne dikanda ne bukole buhite, Yehowa udi mukole mu nvita!" 
Psalms24:9 Ambulai mitu yenu, nuenu bibi bia musoko! E, banuambule, nuenu bibi bia kale, bua Mukelenge wa Butumbi abuelemu." 
Psalms24:10 Mukelenge eu wa butumbi nganyi? NYehowa wa misumba, Yeye udi Mukelenge wa Butumbi!" 
Psalms25:1 Yehowa, ndi muambule mutshima wanyi kûdi." 
Psalms25:2 Nzambi wanyi, nakukueyemena wewe; kuitabushi bua banfuishe bundu; kuitabushi bua bena lukuna banyi bampite bukole." 
Psalms25:3 Bulelela, nansha umue wa badi bakuindila neafuishibue bundu; nebafuishe badi benzela bantu malu a bunsonge hatuhu bundu." 
Psalms25:4 Yehowa, ummanyishe bienzedi biebe! unyishe nshila yebe." 
Psalms25:5 Undombele biebe mu bulelela buebe, unyishe; bualu bua wewe udi Nzambi wa luhandu luanyi; ndi nkuindila wewe dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Psalms25:6 Yehowa, uvuluke luse luebe ne dinanga diebe dijalame, bualu bua biakadiku kale tô ne mpindiu." 
Psalms25:7 Kuvuluki malu mabi anakenza mu bunsongalume buanyi, anyi matomboka anyi; Yehowa, bu mudi luse luebe lujalame, unvuluke bualu bua buimpe buebe." 
Psalms25:8 Yehowa udi muimpe ne muakane; nunku udi uyisha bantu babi nshila wa bobo kuendela. 
Psalms25:9 Udi ulombola badi ne mitshima mihuekele mu malu adi makane; udi uyisha badi ne mitshima mihuekele nshila wandi 
Psalms25:10 Nshila yonso ya Yehowa idi ya luse lujalame ne lulamatu kudi badi batumikila tshihungidi tshiandi ne mikenji yandi. 
Psalms25:11 Bualu bua dina diebe, Yehowa, umbuikidile bubi buanyi, bualu bua budi bunene." 
Psalms25:12 Muntu kai udi utshina Yehowa? Yehowa neamumanyishe nshila udiye ne bua kusungula. 
Psalms25:13 Muoyo wandi muine newikale ne diakalengele, ne tunkanunuina tuandi netuhiane buloba." 
Psalms25:14 Bulunda bujalame bua Yehowa budi kudi badi bamutshina, ne yeye udi ubamanyisha tshihungidi tshiandi." 
Psalms25:15 Mesu anyi atu atangila kudi Yehowa misangu yonso, bualu hua yeye neahatule makasa anyi mu bukuondo." 
Psalms25:16 Ukudimuke bua kuntangila, undeshe luse luebe; bualu bua ndi nkayanyi ne ndi ne dikenga." 
Psalms25:17 Uholeshe tunyinganyinga tua mu mutshima wanyi, ne umpatule mu makenga anyi." 
Psalms25:18 Wele meji a dinyingalala dianyi ne a dikenga dianyi, ne umbuikidile mibi yanyi yonso." 
Psalms25:19 Wele meji a bena lukuna banyi, mudibo ba bungi, ne mudibo bankina ne lukuna lukole." 
Psalms25:20 Ulame muoyo wanyi, umpandule; kuitabushi hua meme kufuishibua bundu, bualu bua ndi munyemene kûdi." 
Psalms25:21 Lulamatu luanyi kûdi ne buakane buanyi bindame; bualu bua ndi nkuindila. 
Psalms25:22 Nzambi, uhikule Bena Isalele, ubahandule mu makenga abo onso." 
Psalms26:1 Yehowa, unkosele tshilumbu tshianyi ne kulumbulula kuakane, bualu bua nakuenda mu buakane buanyi, nakueyemena Yehowa tshiyi ndembakana." 
Psalms26:2 Tangila munda muanyi, Yehowa, untete; untete mu mutshima wanyi ne mu meji anyi." 
Psalms26:3 Bualu bua luse luebe lujalame ludi ku mesu kuanyi, ne ndi ngenda mu bulelela buebe." 
Psalms26:4 Tshiena mushikame ne bantu badi balonda malu a mashimi, tshiena mbuelakana ne badi basokoka malu mabi abo mu lubombo." 
Psalms26:5 Ndi nkina disangisha dia benji ba malu mabi, tshiena mushikame ne bantu babi." 
Psalms26:6 Ndi ngowa bianza bianyi tshiyi ne tshilumbu; nunku, Yehowa, ndi nyunguluka tshioshelu tshiebe;" 
Psalms26:7 bua meme kunvuisha bantu dî dia kusakidila, ne bua kubambila bienzedi biebe bionso bia kukema." 
Psalms26:8 Yehowa, ndi nnanga muaba ûdi mushikame mu nsubu muebe, ne muaba udi butumbi buebe bushikame." 
Psalms26:9 Kumushi muoyo wanyi musûke ne bantu babi diatshimue, kumushi muoyo wanyi diatshimue ne bantu badi bakeba kumatshisha mashi," 
Psalms26:10 badi ne malu mabi mu bianza biabo adibo bahangidisha, ne badi ne bianza biabo bia balume biule tente ne mbueshilu." 
Psalms26:11 Kadi meme hanyi ndi ngenda mu buakane buanyi; umpikule, unfuile luse." 
Psalms26:12 Dikasa dianyi didi dimana mu muaba muhunga; nenvudishile Yehowa disanka mu masangisha a bantu bandi. 
Psalms27:1 Yehowa udi munya wanyi ne luhandu luanyi; nentshine nganyi? Yehowa udi ngumbu ya nvita mu muoyo wanyi; udi mua kunkuatshisha buowa nganyi? 
Psalms27:2 Hakalua benji ba malu mabi ha buihi nʼanyi bua kumbunda, bua kudiabo munyinyi wa mubidi wanyi, bakadi bakengeshi banyi ne bena lukuna banyi bakalenduka; bakadishinda hanshi." 
Psalms27:3 Nansha bialua musumba wa bena nvita kuasabo tshitudilu tshiabo bua kuntshintshimika, mutshima wanyi kawena ukuatshika buowa. Nansha biajuka nvita ku mesu kuanyi, mu muanda eu mene nengikale ne dieyemena dianyi." 
Psalms27:4 Nakulomba Yehowa bualu bumuehele, mbuobu bundi ukebakeba: bua meme kushikama mu nsubu wa Yehowa matuku onso a muoyo wanyi, bua kumona buimpe bua Yehowa, ne bua kuelangana meji a malu a mu ntempelo wandi." 
Psalms27:5 Bualu bua halua dituku dia diakabi, yeye neansokoke mu tshisokomenu tshiandi; yeye neansokoke munda mua nsubu wandi wa ntenta, neambandishe, neanshikike ha mutu ha dibue." 
Psalms27:6 Ka yeye neabandishe mutu wanyi mulu mpindiu ha mutu ha bena lukuna banyi badi banyunguluka; nenfile milambu mu nsubu wandi wa ntenta diatshimue ne mbila ya disanka. Nengimbe misambu; e, nengimbile Yehowa misambu bua kumutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms27:7 Yehowa, ungunvuile hanadila ne dî dianyi kûdi; unfuile luse, witabe kundi!" 
Psalms27:8 Wewe wakuamba ne, Ukebe mpala wanyi. Mutshima wanyi wakukuambila ne, Yehowa, nenkebe mpala webe." 
Psalms27:9 Kusokoki mpala webe kundi nansha. Kumushi muntu webe ku mpala kuebe mu tshiji, wewe wakadi mukuatshishi wanyi. Kungihatshi, kundekedi, wewe Nzambi wa luhandu luanyi!" 
Psalms27:10 Nansha biandekela tatu wanyi ne mamu wanyi, Yehowa neangambule." 
Psalms27:11 Yehowa, unyishe nshila webe, undombele mu nshila mulandakane, bualu bua bena lukuna banyi." 
Psalms27:12 Kunfidi mu bianza bia bena lukuna banyi bua bangenzele bu mudibo basue; bualu bua bantemu badi ne mashimi badi bajuka bua kumbanda, badi bafunyina ne bukole." 
Psalms27:13 Ndi ngitabusha ne, Nemmone buimpe bua Yehowa mu buloba bua badi ne muoyo." 
Psalms27:14 Windile Yehowa; wikale ne bukole, ne mutshima webe wikale ne dikima; e, windile biebe Yehowa!" 
Psalms28:1 Kûdi wewe, Yehowa nkundi ngela dî dianyi; dibue dianyi, kuikadi ne bitshi kundi; bua, biwahuwa, kuyi ungunvuila, nengikale bu badi bahueka mu Dijimba dia Bafue." 
Psalms28:2 Unvua dî dia kutendekena kuanyi, hanadila kûdi, longolola bianza bianyi ku muaba webe mutambe wa tshijila." 
Psalms28:3 Kunkoki bua kuya nʼanyi diatshimue ne bantu babi, diatshimue ne badi benji ba malu mabi; badi bambila bena mutumba nʼabo mei a luvuenge, kadi mu mitshima yabo mudi meji a malu mabi." 
Psalms28:4 Ubafute bu mudi mudimu wabo, ne bu mudi bubi bua bienzedi biabo, ubafute bu mudi mudimu wa bianza biabo; ufile bukenji kudibo budibo ne bua kuangata." 
Psalms28:5 Bualu bua kabena banemeka bienzedi bia Yehowa, anyi mudimu wa bianza biandi, yeye neabashimbule hanshi, kena ubibaka kabidi." 
Psalms28:6 Yehowa avudishibue disanka, bualu bua wakunvua biandi dî dia kutendekena kuanyi!" 
Psalms28:7 Yehowa udi bukole buanyi ne ngabu wanyi; mutshima wanyi wakumueyemena, ndi mukuatshishibue. Nunku mutshima wanyi udi utamba kusanka, nemmutumbishe ne musambu wanyi." 
Psalms28:8 Yehowa udi bukole bua bantu bandi, udi lumbu lua luhandu kudi wandi muedibue manyi ha mutu." 
Psalms28:9 Usungile bantu bebe, uvudishile badi buhianyi buebe disanka; wikale mulami wabo, ubatuale tshiendelele." 
Psalms29:1 Samunai Yehowa, nuenu ba mu diulu, samunai Yehowa ne mei a butumbi buandi ne bukole buandi." 
Psalms29:2 Samunai Yehowa ne butumbi budi buakanangane ne dina diandi; tendelelai Yehowa, nuvuale bienu bivualu bilengele bia tshijila." 
Psalms29:3 Di dia Yehowa didi ha mai; Nzambi wa butumbi udi ukungusha mikungulu ya nvula, Yehowa mene udi uyikungusha ha mutu ha mai mangi." 
Psalms29:4 Dî dia Yehowa didi dî dikole, dî dia Yehowa didi diule tente ne butumbi." 
Psalms29:5 Di dia Yehowa didi ditshibula mitshi ya cèdre, e, Yehowa udi utshibula mitshi ya cèdre ya mu Lebanona bituha." 
Psalms29:6 Yeye udi utuhisha mukuna wa Lebanona bu mudi muana wa ngombe utuhika, udi utuhisha mukuna wa Sileona bu mudi muana wa mbowa utuhika." 
Psalms29:7 Di dia Yehowa didi dihenyisha miele ya nvula bu ndimi ya kahia. 
Psalms29:8 Di dia Yehowa didi dizakasha tshihela, Yehowa udi uzakasha tshihela tshia Kadesha." 
Psalms29:9 Dî dia Yehowa didi dilelesha ngulungu bana, didi diubula mitshi ya metu, divuisha metu matuhu. Mu ntempelo wandi bonso badi bela mbila ne, Mutumbishai!" 
Psalms29:10 Yehowa wakashikama mu nkuasa wa butumbi mu tshikondo tshia nvula munene; e, Yehowa udi mushikame bu Mukelenge tshiendelele." 
Psalms29:11 Yehowa neaheshe bantu bandi bukole, Yehowa neasankishe bantu bandi ne ditalala." 
Psalms30:1 Yehowa, nenkutumbishe, bualu bua wakutula, kuakuitabusha bua badi nʼanyi lukuna basanke ku mutu kuanyi." 
Psalms30:2 Ke, Yehowa Nzambi wanyi, nakadila kudi bua wewe unkuatshishe, ne wewe wakunsangasha." 
Psalms30:3 Ke, Yehowa, wakuhaula muoyo wanyi mu Muaba wa Bafue, wakumpingashila muoyo wanyi bua meme tshikadi munkatshi mua badi bahueka mu Dijimba dia Bafue." 
Psalms30:4 Imbilai Yehowa misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai, nuenu bansanto bandi, sakidilai dina diandi dia tshijila." 
Psalms30:5 Bualu bua tshiji tshiandi tshidiku anu tshituha tshihi, luse luandi ludiku matuku onso a muoyo wa muntu. Muadi udi mua kulua bu muladi butuku, kadi disanka didi dilua hatshiabu." 
Psalms30:6 Meme hanyi, hanakadi ne diakalengele, nakamba ne, Tshiena nyungishibua tshiendelele." 
Psalms30:7 Wewe Yehowa, bua luse luebe wakadi mujadike mukuna wanyi bua kushindamau bikole; wakasokoka mpala webe; nakatshina." 
Psalms30:8 Yehowa nakadi ndila kûdi, nakadi ntendekena Yehowa ne," 
Psalms30:9 Kumatshisha kua mashi anyi kudi mua kukukuatshisha munyi, binahueka mu Dijimba dia Bafue? Luhuishi nenkutumbishe, anyi? Neluambile bantu hua lulamatu luebe ku bushuwa, anyi?" 
Psalms30:10 Yehowa, ungunvuile, undeshe luse luebe! Yehowa, wikale biebe mukuatshishi wanyi!" 
Psalms30:11 Wewe wakungandamuina muadi wanyi bua kuluau kuja kua maja; wakusulula bilulu bianyi bikayabala, wakubinyula, wakunjingila ne mukaba wa disanka;" 
Psalms30:12 Bua muoyo wanyi ukuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai, kauhuwu. Yehowa Nzambi wanyi, nenkusakidile tshiendelele." 
Psalms31:1 Yehowa, ndi nnyemena kûdi; kuitabushi bua meme kufuishibua bundu kashidi, unsungile bua buakane buebe." 
Psalms31:2 Teleja matshu ebe kundi, umpandishe lubilu! Wikale dibue dia luhandu kundi, wikale musoko wa ngumbu ya nvita bua kunsungila!" 
Psalms31:3 Bualu bua wewe udi dibue dianyi ne ngumbu yanyi ya nvita; nunku, bualu bua dina diebe wikale mulombodi wanyi, undombele mu nshila." 
Psalms31:4 Umpatule mu bukuondo buakungandabo mu musokoko, bualu bua wewe udi ngumbu yanyi ya nvita." 
Psalms31:5 Ndi nteka muoyo wanyi mu bianza biebe; wewe wakumpikula, Yehowa, wewe Nzambi udi ulamata ku bushuwa." 
Psalms31:6 Ndi nkina badi banemeka bintu bia hatuhu bidi bidinga bantu; kadi ndi ngeyemena Yehowa. 
Psalms31:7 Nengikale ne disanka, nensanke bua luse luebe lujalame, bualu bua wakumona dikenga dianyi, wakumanya malu adi amatshisha mu muoyo wanyi;" 
Psalms31:8 ne kuakunfila mu bianza bia udi nʼanyi lukuna; wakujadika makasa anyi mu muaba munene. 
Psalms31:9 Unfuile luse, Yehowa, bualu bua ndi mu dikenga; mesu anyi adi mondoke ne tshinyanu bualu bua kanyinganyinga, muoyo wanyi ne mubidi wanyi bidi bienza nunku kabidi." 
Psalms31:10 Bualu bua muoyo wanyi udi ufika kunshikidilu kuau ne kanyinganyinga, ne bidimu bianyi biakuhita mu kuhumuna. Bukole buanyi budi buhanga bua bubi buanyi, mifuba yanyi idi mifingutuke." 
Psalms31:11 Nakulua muntu wa kubishabo tshihendu kudi badi nʼanyi lukuna, nakutamba kulua tshihendu kudi bena mutumba nʼanyi, ne bu tshintu tshia kubakuatshisha buowa kudi bilongo bianyi. Badi batangila ha bule ha nsubu badi banyema." 
Psalms31:12 Badi bampua muoyo mu mitshima yabo, bu mudibo bahua muntu mufue muoyo. Nakulua bu luesu ludi luhandike." 
Psalms31:13 Bualu bua ndi ngunvua dinunganyi dia mei a bunsonge a bantu ba bungi — buowa ku nseke yonso — hadibo badisangisha hohamue bua kungelela tshifufu, hadibo basangisha dî bua kunyengabo muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms31:14 Kadi ndi ngeyemena kudi, Yehowa, ndi ngamba ne, Wewe udi Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms31:15 Bikondo bianyi bidi mu bianza biebe; umpandishe mu bianza bia badi nʼanyi lukuna, kudi badi bankengesha." 
Psalms31:16 Mpala webe atemene muntu webe, unsungile bua luse luebe lujalame." 
Psalms31:17 Yehowa, kuitabushi bua meme kufuishibua bundu, bualu bua ndi nkubikila. Bantu babi bafuishibue bundu, bahueke, babuwe talalâ, mu Muaba wa Bafue." 
Psalms31:18 Mishiku idi yamba mashimi ilue tumama, idi idiula bantu bakane ne dikamakama, ne mu diambu ne dihetu." 
Psalms31:19 Ke mudi buimpe buebe bukumbane, buwakubutshila badi bakutshina, buwakuenzela badi banyemena kûdi, buwakubenzela ku mesu kua bukua bantu!" 
Psalms31:20 Wewe udi ubasokoka mu tshisokomenu tshiebe ku bifufu bidi bantu babelela. Udi ubalama mu musokoko mu tshitandatanda ku matandu adi ahatuka ku ndimi yabo. 
Psalms31:21 Yehowa avudishibue disanka, bualu bua wakundesha luse luandi lujalame ludi lunkemesha hanakadi mu musoko wa ngumbu ya nvita." 
Psalms31:22 Meme hanyi nakamba mu ditshina dianyi ne, Nakumushibua ku mesu kuebe, kadi wewe wakunvua di dia kutendekena kuanyi, hanakadila kûdi." 
Psalms31:23 Nangai Yehowa, nuenu bansanto bandi bonso. Yehowa udi ulama badi bananukila kumueyemena, kadi udi ufuta muntu udi wenza malu a diambu difutu didi dikumbana." 
Psalms31:24 Nuikale ne bukole, ne mitshima yenu ikale ne dikima, nuenu bonso badi bindila Yehowa!" 
Psalms32:1 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi ne ditomboka diandi diumushibue, ne udi ne bubi buandi bubuikidibue!" 
Psalms32:2 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi Yehowa kayi ubadila dihambuka diandi dia ku buakane, ne udi kayi ne lubombo mu mutshima wandi!" 
Psalms32:3 Hanakadi muhuwe, mifuba yanyi yakafingutuka bualu bua kutua kuanyi kua mikemu dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Psalms32:4 Bualu bua munya ne butuku tshianza tshiebe tshiakanemena bujitu hamʼbidi hanyi; tshitelele tshianyi tshiakulua bu munanga wa mushihu. 
Psalms32:5 Nakatonda bubi buanyi kûdi, tshiakasokoka dihambuka dianyi ku buakane. Nakamba ne, Nentonde matomboka anyi kudi Yehowa; ne wewe wakandekelela dihila dia bubi buanyi." 
Psalms32:6 Bua bualu ebu muntu yonso udi unanga Nzambi akulombe mu tshikondo tshidiye mumanye mua kukusangana; bulelela, halua mai manene kuhasalala, kaena afika ha buihi nʼandi." 
Psalms32:7 Wewe udi tshisokomenu tshianyi; neundame bua tshikadi ne dikenga; neunnyunguluke ne misambu ya luhandu. 
Psalms32:8 Nenkuyishe lungenyi, nenkuleshe nshila udi ne bua kuendela, nenkuhe meji hatshidi disu dianyi kudi." 
Psalms32:9 Kanuikadi bu kabalu anyi bu nyama wa mpunda bidi kabiyi ne lungenyi, bidi ne bua kukandibua ne lukanu mukana muabi ne mionshi ya kubilombola nʼai, anyi kabiena bilua ha buihi nʼebe." 
Psalms32:10 Muntu mubi udi ne tunyinganyinga tua bungi, kadi muntu udi weyemena Yehowa udi munyunguluka ne luse lijalame." 
Psalms32:11 Nuikale ne disanka mu Yehowa, nusanke bikole, nuenu bantu bakane; elai mbila bua disanka dienu, buonso buenu badi bakane mu mitshima yenu!" 
Psalms33:1 Nuenu bantu bakane, nusanke mu Yehowa. Kutumbisha Nzambi kudi kuakanangana ne bantu bakane." 
Psalms33:2 Nusakidile Yehowa ne tshisanji, numuimbile misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai ne lunzenze ludi ne nshinga dikumi." 
Psalms33:3 Numuimbile musambu muhia-muhia, numuimbile ne tshimbilu tshimpe ne kuela kua mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms33:4 Bualu bua dî dia Yehowa didi diakane, udi wenza mudimu wandi wonso ne lulamatu lua bushuwa." 
Psalms33:5 Yeye udi unanga buakane ne kulumbulula kuakane, buloba budi bûle tente ne luse lujalame lua Yehowa." 
Psalms33:6 Ku dî dia Yehowa bintu bia mu diulu bia kufukibua, tshisumbu tshiabi tshionso tshiakafukibua ku muhuya wa mukana muandi." 
Psalms33:7 Udi ukungisha mai a mu mai manene mimane dibula; udi ubutshila ndondo ya mai manene mu bibutshilu. 
Psalms33:8 Ba ha buloba bonso batshine Yehowa; bonso badi bashikame ha buloba bikale ne buowa ku mpala kuandi. 
Psalms33:9 Bualu bua yeye wakamba dî diandi, ne buloba buakadiku; wakela mukenji, buakajalama." 
Psalms33:10 Yehowa udi uvuisha meji adi ba mu bisamba bia bantu bahangidisha malu a hatuhu; udi uhumbisha malu adi bantu bahangidisha bua kuenzabo. 
Psalms33:11 Lungenyi ludi Yehowa usungula ludi lujalama tshiendelele, meji adiye uhangidisha mu mutshima wandi adi ajalama tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms33:12 Disanka didi kudi tshisamba tshidi ne Yehowa bu Nzambi watshi, mbantu bakusunguleye bua kuikalabo buhianyi buandi mene!" 
Psalms33:13 Yehowa udi utangila hanshi, hadiye mu muaba wandi wa mu diulu, udi umona bana bonso ba bantu." 
Psalms33:14 Ku muaba udiye mushikame udi ujosha talalâ bonso badi bashikame ha buloba," 
Psalms33:15 yeye udi ufuka mitshima ya buonso buabo, udi umona bienzedi biabo bionso." 
Psalms33:16 Mukelenge kena usungidibua ku tshisumbu tshinene tshia masalayi, muena bukitu kena uheta luhandu ku bukole buandi bunene." 
Psalms33:17 Kabalu ka nvita kadi tshintu tshia hatuhu kudi badi batekemena luhandu kudiku; kakena mua kusungila bantu ku bukole buaku bunene. 
Psalms33:18 Monai, mesu a Yehowa adi kudi badi bamutshina, adi kudi badi ne ditekemena diabo mu luse luandi lujalame," 
Psalms33:19 bua yeye asungile mioyo yabo ku lufu, ne bua kubalama bua bikale ne muoyo halua tshiole." 
Psalms33:20 Muoyo wetu udi windila Yehowa; yeye udi dikuatshisha dietu ne ngabu wetu. 
Psalms33:21 Bua mitshima yetu idi isanka kudiye, bualu bua tudi tueyemena dina diandi dia tshijila." 
Psalms33:22 Yehowa, luse luebe lujalame luikale kutudi, bu mutudi tutekemena kudi." 
Psalms34:1 Nenvudishile Yehowa disanka bikondo bionso, kumutumbisha kuanyi nekuikale mukana muanyi misangu yonso." 
Psalms34:2 Muoyo wanyi neutumbile mu Yehowa; badi bahuekele nebunvue lumu elu, nebasanke." 
Psalms34:3 Tumbishai nʼanyi Yehowa, tunemeke bietu dina diandi diatshimue." 
Psalms34:4 Nakakeba Yehowa, ne yeye wakitaba kundi, wakansungila ku malu onso anakatshina." 
Psalms34:5 Bantu bakatangila kudiye bakadi ne mpala yabo mikenke ne disanka; mpala yabo kayena ikuatshika bundu tshiendelele. 
Psalms34:6 Muena dikenga eu wakadila kudiye, ne Yehowa wakamunvuila, wakamusungila ku makenga andi onso." 
Psalms34:7 Muanjelo wa Yehowa udi wasa tshitudilu tshiandi tshinyunguluke badi bamutshina, udi ubasungila." 
Psalms34:8 Teta, ulabule, unvue ne, Yehowa udi muakane; disanka didi kudi muntu udi unyemena kudiye!" 
Psalms34:9 Nuenu bansanto bandi, nutshine Yehowa; bualu bua badi bamutshina kabena bakengela tshintu." 
Psalms34:10 Bana balume ba nyama ya ntambue badi bakengela bia kudia, nzala idi ibasuma; kadi badi bakeba Yehowa kabena bakengela tshintu tshimpe tshimue." 
Psalms34:11 Luai bienu, nuenu bana banyi ba balume, telejai matshu enu kundi; nennuyishe mudi ditshina dia Yehowa." 
Psalms34:12 Muntu kai udiku udi unanga muoyo, udi musue matuku andi alehe bua yeye amonemu diakalengele?" 
Psalms34:13 Kanda ludimi luebe bua kaluambi malu mabi, kanda mishiku yebe bua kayambi mei a kudinga nʼau." 
Psalms34:14 Umuka ku malu mabi, enza malu mimpe; ukebe ditalala, udilonde." 
Psalms34:15 Mesu a Yehowa adi kudi bakane, ne matshu andi adi buashi ku kudila kuabo." 
Psalms34:16 Mpala wa Yehowa udi mutangisha kudi benji ba malu mabi bua kubakengesha, bua kujimisheye tshivulukidi tshiabo ha buloba." 
Psalms34:17 Bantu bakane badi badila dikuatshisha, Yehowa udi ubunvuila, udi ubahandula mu makenga abo onso." 
Psalms34:18 Yehowa udi ha buihi ne bantu badi ne mitshima idi itamba kunyingalala, udi Usungila badi ne mitshima ya majia." 
Psalms34:19 Makenga a muntu muakane adi a bungi; kadi Yehowa udi umusungila ku buonso buau. 
Psalms34:20 Yeye udi ulama mifuba yanyi yonso; kakuena umue wai udi utshibuka. 
Psalms34:21 Malu mabi neashihe muntu mubi; badi ne bantu bakane lukuna nebahishibue. 
Psalms34:22 Yehowa udi uhikula mioyo ya badi bamukuatshila mudimu; kakuena umue wa badi banyemena kudiye wahishibua. 
Psalms35:1 Yehowa, ufuilakane ne badi bafuilangana nʼanyi; uluishe badi baluangana nʼanyi." 
Psalms35:2 Ukuate ngabu mukese ne ngabu munene, ujuke biebe bua kunkuatshisha." 
Psalms35:3 Hatula difuma ne tshisola bua kukanda nʼabi badi bangihata. Ambila muoyo wanyi ne, Meme ndi luhandu luebe." 
Psalms35:4 Badi bakeba muoyo wanyi bafuishibue bundu, bakeheshibue. Badi bahangidisha malu mabi a kungenzela, bahingashibue ne babuandakashibue." 
Psalms35:5 Bikale biabo bu bisote ku mpala kua luhehele, hatshidi muanjelo wa Yehowa ubihata." 
Psalms35:6 Nshila wabo ikale ne mîdima ne busenu, hatshidi muanjelo wa Yehowa ubihata." 
Psalms35:7 Bualu bua hanakadi tshiyi ne tshilumbu, bakunsokokela bukuondo buabo mu dijimba; hanakadi tshiyi ne tshilumbu, bakumbuila muoyo wanyi tshina." 
Psalms35:8 Dibutuka dimukuate mu mpukahuka; bukuondo buandi buasokokeye bumukuate yeye muine; abuele biandi mu dibutuka adi mene. 
Psalms35:9 Ka muoyo wanyi newikale ne disanka mu Yehowa, neusanke mu luhandu luandi." 
Psalms35:10 Mifuba yanyi yonso neyambe ne, Yehowa, udi bu wewe nganyi? Wewe udi usungila muena makenga kudi muntu udi umuhita bukole, udi usungila muntu udi muena makenga ne muhele kudi muntu udi mumunyenge." 
Psalms35:11 Bantemu badi bena tshikisu badi bajuka; badi bankonka bua malu andi tshiyi mumanye. 
Psalms35:12 Badi bampingashila malu mabi ku malu mimpe; banshiya ne muoyo munyingalala. 
Psalms35:13 Kadi meme hanyi, hakadibo ne disama, nakaluata bilulu bikayabala; nakakengesha muoyo wanyi ne kujila kua bia kudia; kutendelela kuanyi nekuhingane mu tshiadi tshianyi nkayatshi." 
Psalms35:14 Nakendakana ne majia bu munakadi mua kudila mulunda wanyi anyi muanʼetu; nakinama mutu wanyi bua kudila bu munakadi kuashila mamu wanyi muadi. 
Psalms35:15 Kadi hanakalenduka, bakasanka, bakadisangisha kaba kamue; bena bunsonge ne bantu banakadi tshiyi mumanye bakadisangisha hamue bua kungenzelabo bibi, bakampenda kabayi mua kulekela." 
Psalms35:16 Bu mudi baseki badi ne dikamakama benza bua kuhetabo tshituha tshia mampa, bakandiangena ku menu abo." 
Psalms35:17 Mukelenge, neutangile bualu ebu hatuhu musangu bule bishi? Usungile muoyo wanyi musûke ku kubutula kuabo, usungile muoyo wanyi muine kudi nyama ya ntambue." 
Psalms35:18 Nenkusakidile mu disangisha dinene dia bantu; nenkutumbishe munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshinene tshia bakole. 
Psalms35:19 Kuitabushi bua badi nʼanyi lukuna bualu bua bunsonge buabo basanke ku mutu kuanyi. Kuitabushi bua badi bankina handi tshiyi ne bualu banjibe disu. 
Psalms35:20 Bualu bua kabena bamba mei a ditalala, kadi badi bahangidisha mei a mashimi bua kusonguelabo nʼau bantu badi bashikame talalâ mu buloba." 
Psalms35:21 E, badi babulula mukana muabo bitongatonga bua kunseka; badi bamba ne, Eyo, eyo, mesu etu akukumona!" 
Psalms35:22 Yehowa, wewe wakumona bualu ebu; kuhuwu nansha. Mukelenge, kuikadi nʼanyi kule." 
Psalms35:23 Udisonsole, utabale bua kukosa nsambu yanyi biakane; bua kunkuatshisha mu tshilumbu tshianyi, Nzambi wanyi ne Mukelenge wanyi." 
Psalms35:24 Yehowa Nzambi wanyi, unkosele tshilumbu tshianyi bu mudi buakane buebe; bobo kabasanki bualu buanyi." 
Psalms35:25 Kabambi mu mitshima yabo ne, Eyo, ebu mbualu butudi basue. Kabambi ne, Tuakumumina." 
Psalms35:26 Badi basanka bualu bua dikenga dianyi bafuishibue bundu, babuandakashibue, buonso buabo hohamue. Badi badibandisha ku mpala kuanyi baluatshishibue bundu ne dikeheshibua." 
Psalms35:27 Badi basanka bua bualu buanyi buakane bele mbila ne bikale ne disanka. E bambe biabo matuku onso ne, Yehowa atumbishibue, yeye mene udi usanka mu diakalengele dia muntu udi umukuatshila mudimu." 
Psalms35:28 Ka ludimi luanyi nebambile bantu bua buakane buebe ne bua butumbi buebe dinda tô ne ku dilolo. 
Psalms36:1 Ditomboka diandi didi diambila muntu mubi dî munda mua mutshima wandi; kakuena ditshina dia Nzambi ku mesu kuandi. 
Psalms36:2 Bualu bua didi dimubomba ku mesu kuandi ne, Kabena bamuenesha dihambuka diebe dia ku buakane, kabena badikina." 
Psalms36:3 Mei a mukana muandi adi a kuenza malu a tshianana ne a kudinga; wakulekela kuikala muena meji ne mua kuenza malu mimpe. 
Psalms36:4 Udi uhangidisha bua kuenza malu a dihambuka halaleye mu bulalu buandi; udi udijadika mu nshila udi kayi muakane; kena ulengulula malu mabi. 
Psalms36:5 Yehowa, luse luebe lujalame ludi lufika tô ne mu diulu, lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ludi lufika tô ne mu matutu." 
Psalms36:6 Buakane buebe budi bu mikuna ya Nzambi, kulumbulula kuebe kuakane kudi bu ndondo wa mu mai manene. Yehowa, wewe udi ulama bantu ne nyama bua kuikalabi ne muoyo." 
Psalms36:7 Nzambi, ke mudi luse luebe lujalame luikale lua mushinga mukole! Bana ba bantu badi banyemena muinshi mua mundidimbi wa mahuahua ebe." 
Psalms36:8 Badi bukuta ne bintu bia manyi bikumbana bia mu nsubu muebe, wewe udi ubanuisha ku musulu wa masanka ebe." 
Psalms36:9 Kûdi wewe kudi mushimi wa mai a muoyo; mu munya webe, tudi tumona munya." 
Psalms36:10 Unanukile kulesha luse luebe lujalame kudi badi bakumanye, ne buakane buebe kudi badi ne mitshima miakane." 
Psalms36:11 Dikasa dia diambu kadifiki kundi bua kundiata, ne tshianza tshia bantu babi katshingihatshi kule." 
Psalms36:12 Mu muaba wawa benji ba malu mabi badi balala hanshi, bakedibua hanshi, kabayi bamanye mua kujuka kabidi." 
Psalms37:1 Kunyingabadi bua benji ba malu mabi, kuikadi ne badi benza bienzedi bibi mukau." 
Psalms37:2 Bualu bua nebafubidile tshituha tshihi bu mashinde mataha, nebafubidile bu midioko mitekete." 
Psalms37:3 Eyemena Yehowa ne enza malu mimpe; nunku neushikame mu buloba, neudie bia kudia mu dimueyemena diebe." 
Psalms37:4 Wikale ne disanka diebe mu Yehowa, ne yeye neakuhe milombu idi mutshima webe ulomba." 
Psalms37:5 Uteke nshila webe mu bianza bia Yehowa; umueyemene yeye kabidi, ne yeye nênze malu andi." 
Psalms37:6 Yeye neumueneshe buakane buebe bu mudi munya umueneka, neamueneshe dibingishibua diebe bu diba dia munda munya." 
Psalms37:7 Shala holâ ku mpala kua Yehowa, umuindile ne lutulu. Kunyingabadi bualu bua muntu udi ututa dikasa dimpe mu nshila muandi, ne bua muntu udi ujadika malu mabi adiye uhangidisha." 
Psalms37:8 Lekela kufua tshiji, uhidie kuikala ne njiya. Kunyingabadi; bualu ebu budi mua kukuenzesha anu bualu bubi." 
Psalms37:9 Bualu bua benji ba malu mabi nebabutudibue; kadi badi bindila Yehowa nebahiane buloba. 
Psalms37:10 Tshituha tshihi katshiyi tshianji kuleha, muntu mubi kena wikalaku kabidi; e, neukebe kumona muaba wandi ne disuminyina, kena wikalaku." 
Psalms37:11 Kadi badi ne mitshima mihuekele nebahiane buloba, mioyo yabo neyisanke mu ditalala dikumbane." 
Psalms37:12 Muntu mubi udi welela muntu muakane tshifufu, udi umudiangena ku menu." 
Psalms37:13 Mukelenge udi umuseka, bualu bua udi umona ne, Dituku dia kumukengesha dilualua." 
Psalms37:14 Bantu babi badi bahatula muele wa nvita, badi banana buta buabo, bua kuhonesha bahele ne bakengedi ba bintu hanshi, bua kushihabo badi bakane mu nshila udibo bayamu." 
Psalms37:15 Muele wabo wa nvita neutubule mitshima yabo, mata abo neatshibuke." 
Psalms37:16 Bintu bikese bidi muntu muakane nʼabi bidi bitamba bintu bia bungi bia bantu babi bangi bulengele. 
Psalms37:17 Bualu bua maboko a bantu babi neatshibudibue, kadi Yehowa udi ukolesha bantu bakane." 
Psalms37:18 Yehowa udi mumanye matuku a bantu badi ne mitshima miakane, buhianyi buabo nebushale tshiendelele." 
Psalms37:19 Kabena bafuishibua bundu bikondo bia diakabi; mu matuku a tshiole nebukute. 
Psalms37:20 Kadi bantu babi nebajimine, ne badi ne Yehowa lukuna nebikale bu bulengele bua mashinde a mu madimi; nebajimine — bu mudi muishi wa kahia ujimina, nebajimine biabo." 
Psalms37:21 Muntu mubi udi usomba bintu, kena ubifuta kabidi; kadi muntu muakane udi ulesha bantu luse, udi ubaha bintu." 
Psalms37:22 Bualu bua badi Yehowa uvudishila disanka nebahiane buloba, ne badiye wela mulau nebajimishibue." 
Psalms37:23 Biendedi bia muntu bidi bijadikibua kudi Yehowa, ne yeye udi usanka bua nshila wandi." 
Psalms37:24 Biatankukeye, kena udishinda tshiula, bualu bua Yehowa udi umukuata ne tshianza tshiandi." 
Psalms37:25 Nakadi nsongalume, katataka nakulua muntu mukole; kadi tshiena muanze kutangila muntu muakane mushale hatuhu, anyi bana bandi baledibue balombe bia kudia." 
Psalms37:26 Dinda tô ne ku dilolo yeye udi ulesha bantu luse, udi ubasombesha bintu; tunkanuniuna tuandi tudi tuvudishibua disanka." 
Psalms37:27 Umuka ku malu mabi, enza malu mimpe; nunku neushale tshiendelele." 
Psalms37:28 Bualu bua Yehowa udi unanga kulumbulula kuakane, kena ulekela bansanto bandi. Bantu bakane nebalamibue tshiendelele, kadi bana ba bantu babi nebajimishibue." 
Psalms37:29 Bantu bakane nebahiane buloba, nebashikamemu tshiendelele." 
Psalms37:30 Mukana mua muntu muakane mudi muamba mei a lungenyi, ludimi luandi ludi luamba kulumbulula kuakane." 
Psalms37:31 Mukenji wa Nzambi wandi udi mu mutshima wandi; biendedi biandi kabiena biselemuka. 
Psalms37:32 Muntu mubi udi utentekela muntu muakane, udi ukeba kumushiha." 
Psalms37:33 Yehowa kena umushiya mu tshianza tshiandi, kena witabusha bua bamuhishe haluabo kumulumbuluisha." 
Psalms37:34 Windile Yehowa, ulamate nshila wandi, yeye neakubandishe bua wewe kuhiana buloba. Habutulabo bantu babi, wewe neumone muanda eu." 
Psalms37:35 Nakumona muntu mubi muikale ne bukole buandi bua bungi, mudituntumushe bu mutshi mubishi udi udiunda mu buloba buau," 
Psalms37:36 kadi nakahitshilaku, ne mona, yeye kakadiku; e, hanakamukeba, tshiakamanya mua kumusangana." 
Psalms37:37 Tangila muntu udi ne mutshima mutoke bimpe, mona muntu udi muakane; bualu bua tunkanunuma netuikale kudi muena ditalala." 
Psalms37:38 Kadi batomboki nebabutudibue, buonso buabo mene. Tunkanunuina tua bantu babi netujimishibue." 
Psalms37:39 Kadi luhandu lua bantu bakane ludi lufuma kudi Yehowa; yeye udi tshinyemenu tshiabo halua tshikondo tshia dikenga. 
Psalms37:40 Yehowa udi ubakuatshisha, udi ubasungila; udi ubabandisha mu bianza bia bantu babi, udi ubasungila, bualu bua badi banyemena kudiye." 
Psalms38:1 Yehowa, kumbedi mu tshiji tshiebe, kunkengesha mu kufika kuebe kua munda." 
Psalms38:2 Bualu bua mikete yebe yakubuela munda muanyi; tshianza tshiebe tshiakuhueka hamʼbidi hanyi bikole. 
Psalms38:3 Kakuena bukole mu misunyi yanyi bualu bua tshiji tshiebe; kakuena bukole kabidi mu mifuba yanyi bualu bua bubi buanyi. 
Psalms38:4 Bualu bua malu mabi anyi akûla, akuhita ha mutu hanyi. Bu bujitu bunene, adi atamba kunnemena bujitu." 
Psalms38:5 Mputa yanyi idi inunka muhuya mubi idi ihatula tufina, bualu bua buhote buanyi." 
Psalms38:6 Ndi ne nyima mukobame ne dikenga, ndi muhuekeshibue bikole; ndi ngendakana ndila dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Psalms38:7 Bualu bua mulemba wanyi udi mûle tente ne disama didi dingosha, kakuena bukole mu misunyi yanyi." 
Psalms38:8 Nakubanga ne ndi mutshibuke bikole; ndi ntua mikemu bualu bua dihampakana dia mu mutshima wanyi. 
Psalms38:9 Mukelenge, malu onso andi musue adi ku mpala kuebe; kuhumuna kuanyi kakuena kusokokibua kûdi." 
Psalms38:10 Mutshima wanyi udi ukuma, bukole buanyi budi bumuka kundi; munya wa mu mesu anyi kawenaku — wowo kabidi wakumuka kundi." 
Psalms38:11 Banangi banyi ne balunda banyi badi bashilangana nʼanyi bualu bua disama dindi nʼadi, ne bana betu badi bimana ha bule." 
Psalms38:12 Bantu badi bakeba kumana muoyo wanyi badi banteyela ndende yabo, badi bakeba kungenzela bibi badi bamba mei bualu bua kabutu, ne badi belangana meji a kudinga nʼau dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Psalms38:13 Kadi meme hanyi ndi bu muena bitshi, tshiena ngunvua; ndi bu kamama kadi kakayi kabulula mukana muaku." 
Psalms38:14 Bulelela, ndi bu muntu udi kayi unvua, ne udi kayi ne mei mukana muandi a kukudimuna nʼau badi bamubanda." 
Psalms38:15 Bualu bua kûdi wewe, Yehowa, kundi ntekemena; wewe neubakudimune dî, Mukelenge Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms38:16 Bualu bua nakamba ne, Kabasanki bua bualu buanyi, badi badibandisha ku mpala kuanyi, haselemuka dikasa dianyi." 
Psalms38:17 Bualu bua ndi ngamba kudishinda, ne kanyinganyinga kanyi kadi ku mpala kuanyi matuku onso." 
Psalms38:18 Bualu hua ndi ntonda dihambuka dianyi ku buakane, ndi nyingalala bualu bua bubi buanyi." 
Psalms38:19 Kadi bena lukuna banyi badi batantamena, badi bakole; badi bankina hatuhu badi bavulangana." 
Psalms38:20 Badi bampingashila malu mabi ku malu mimpe badi nʼanyi lukuna, bualu bua ndi ndonda muanda udi muimpe." 
Psalms38:21 Yehowa, kundekedi nansha! Nzambi wanyi, kuikadi nʼanyi kule!" 
Psalms38:22 Udiendeshe lubilu bua kunkuatshisha, Mukelenge, luhandu luanyi!" 
Psalms39:1 Nakamba ne, Nendame mundi ngenda mu nshila yanyi, bua tshienji bibi ku ludimi luanyi. Nenteke tshintu tshia kujibika nʼatshi mukana muanyi, tô ne hatshidi muntu mubi ku mpala kuanyi." 
Psalms39:2 Nakadi kamama, nakahuwa talalâ nakahuwa tshiyi ne disanka, ne kanyinganyinga kanyi kakajudibua." 
Psalms39:3 Mutshima wanyi wakahiakana munda muanyi; hanakadi ngelangana meji munda muanyi, kahia kakatemamu; hashishe, nakamba di ne ludimi luanyi." 
Psalms39:4 Yehowa, ummanyishe nshikidilu wa muoyo wanyi, ne tshidikishilu tshia matuku anyi ne, Adi bungi munyi? Ummanyishe mudi muoyo wanyi uhita tshituha tshihi." 
Psalms39:5 Mona, wakunvuisha matuku anyi bu ntanta ya tshianza mu tshidikishilu tshiau, ne hidimu bia muoyo wanyi bu tshintu tshia hatuhu ku mesu kuebe. Bulelela, muntu yonso hadiye wimana mujalame udi anu bu muhuya." 
Psalms39:6 Bulelela, muntu yonso udi bu mundidimbi hadiye wendakana. Bulelela, badi batatakana anu bua bualu bua hatuhu. Muntu udi ubumba mishiki ya bintu, kadi kena mumanye ne, Wabisangisha nganyi?" 
Psalms39:7 Mpindiu, Mukelenge, ndi ngindila tshinyi? Ditekemena dianyi didi anu kûdi." 
Psalms39:8 Umpandishe ku matomboka anyi onso. Kunvuishi muntu udi muhote uhenda. 
Psalms39:9 Ndi kamama, tshiena mbulula mukana muanyi; bualu bua wewe wakuenza bualu ebu."
