Psalms39:10 Ungumusha mukumu webe wa disama uwakunkuma; ndi ngamba kujimina bua dituta dia tshianza tshiebe. 
Psalms39:11 Hawabulukila muntu ne kubela kuebe bualu bua malu mabi andi, udi ujimisha bualu budiye utamba kusua bu mudi tshibayabaya tshienza. Bulelela, muntu yonso udi anu muhuya." 
Psalms39:12 Yehowa, unvua kulomba kuanyi, uteleje matshu ebe ku muadi wanyi. Kuhuwu talalâ nansha bua binsonshi bianyi. Bualu bua ndi muenyi udi nʼebe tshituha, ndi mushikame anu tshituha tshihi, bu muakadi batatu banyi bonso." 
Psalms39:13 Umusha mesu ebe kundi, bua meme kumanya mua kusanka kabidi; diambedi tshiyi muanze kumukaku, tshikadihu kabidi." 
Psalms40:1 Nakindila Yehowa ne lutulu, wakatelela matshu andi kundi, wakunvua muadi wanyi." 
Psalms40:2 Wakampa tula mu dijimba dia kabutu mu bintampi muakadi bitoshi. Wakimanyika makasa anyi ha dibue, wakajadika biendedi bianyi." 
Psalms40:3 Wakateka musambu muhia-muhia mukana muanyi, musambu wa kutumbisha nʼau Nzambi wetu. Bantu ba bungi nebamone luhandu luanyi, nebatshine, nebeyemene Yehowa." 
Psalms40:4 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi uvuisha Yehowa tshieyemenu tshiandi, udi kayi ukudimuna kudi badi badisue, anyi kudi badi hasesuka bua kulondabo mashimi." 
Psalms40:5 Yehowa Nzambi wanyi, wakuvudisha malu a kukema awakuenza ne malu awakuhangidisha bua kutuenzela, kakuena mukuabo utudi bamanye mua kuelekesha nʼebe. Binakeba kualondolola ne bua kuambila bantu malu â, neampite bua kuabala." 
Psalms40:6 Wewe kuena unanga mulambu wa nyama mushiha ne mulambu wa bia kudia; wewe wakujikula matshu anyi. Kuakulomba mulambu wa kuosha ha tshioshelu ne mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau mibi. 
Psalms40:7 Hashishe, nakamba ne, Mona, ndi ndua; mu mukanda muvunga mudi mufunda bua bualu buanyi;" 
Psalms40:8 ndi ne disanka bua kuenza disua diebe, Nzambi wanyi, bulelela, mukenji webe udi mu mutshima wanyi." 
Psalms40:9 Nakuamba lumu luimpe lua buakane buebe mu disangisha dinene dia bantu, mona, tshiakukanda mishiku yanyi, wewe Yehowa, udi mumanye bualu ebu." 
Psalms40:10 Tshiakusokoka buakane buebe munda muanyi hawakumbingisha, nakuambila bantu bua lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ne bua luhandu luebe. Tshiakusokokela ba mu disangisha dinene dia bantu luse luebe lujalame ne lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa." 
Psalms40:11 Yehowa, kunkandidi luse luebe lunene; luse luebe lujalame ne lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa bindame tshiendelele." 
Psalms40:12 Bua malu mabi adi kâyi mua kubadibua akunyunguluka; mahambuka anyi a ku buakane akundonda, akumpeta, tô ne handi tshiyi mua kutangila. Adi atamba nsuki ya ku mutu kuanyi bungi; mutshima wanyi wakumpangishila bukole." 
Psalms40:13 Yehowa, wikale ne disanka bua kumpandisha; Yehowa, ulue lukasa bua kunkuatshisha." 
Psalms40:14 Bantu aba bafuishibue bundu ne babuandakashibue, buonso buabo diatshimue, badi bakeba muoyo wanyi bua kûmushaku. Balukishibue tshianyima ne bakeheshibue, bobo mene badi basue kungenzela bibi." 
Psalms40:15 Badi bamba ne, Eyo, eyo! bakuatshike buowa bualu bua bundu buabo." 
Psalms40:16 Bonso badi bakukeba basanke ne bikale ne disanka bua bualu buebe. Bonso badi bananga luhandu luebe bambe matuku onso ne, Yehowa atumbishibue." 
Psalms40:17 Ahu meme hanyi ndi muhele ne mukengi, kadi Mukelenge udi wela meji a bualu buanyi. Wewe udi mukuatshishi wanyi ne musungidi wanyi; kujanguluki, Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms41:1 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi wela meji a luse bua muntu udi ne mubidi mutekete! Yehowa neamuhandishe mu dituku dia dikenga. 
Psalms41:2 Yehowa neamulame, neamukube bua yeye ashale ne muoyo. Nebamubale bu muntu udi muvudishibue disanka ha buloba; ne wewe kumufidi mu bianza bia badi nʼandi lukuna bua bamuenzele bu mudibo basue." 
Psalms41:3 Yehowa neamukoleshe hadiye ulala ha bulalu bua butekete bua mubidi wandi; wewe wakukudimuna bulalu buandi bua disama buonso bua yeye asangale. 
Psalms41:4 Meme hanyi nakamba ne, Yehowa, unfuile luse; usangashe muoyo wanyi, bualu bua nakukuenzela bibi." 
Psalms41:5 Badi nʼanyi lukuna badi bamba mei mabi bua bualu buanyi ne, Yeye neafue diba kai, ne dina diandi nedijimine diba kai?" 
Psalms41:6 Bialua umue wabo kuntangila, udi Wamba mei a kumbomba nʼau. Mutshima wandi udi uditekela malu a bunsonge. Haluhukeye bua kuya ha bule, udi wamba malu â." 
Psalms41:7 Bonso badi nʼanyi lukuna badi banungana hohamue bua bualu buanyi. Badi bangelela tshifufu bua dikenga dianyi, bamba ne," 
Psalms41:8 Bualu budi buvuisha lufu budi bulamata bikole kudiye, ne mpindiu yeye mumane kulala hanshi kena ujuka kabidi." 
Psalms41:9 Mulunda wanyi mene unakadi nʼandi ditalala ne unakeyemena, wakadi udia bidia bianyi wakuntua museba." 
Psalms41:10 Kadi wewe, Yehowa, unfuile luse, umbishe kabidi; bua meme kumanya mua kubahingashila difutu diabo." 
Psalms41:11 Ku muanda eu ndi mumanye ne, Wewe udi usanka bua bualu buanyi, bualu bua muena lukuna wanyi kakumpita bukole." 
Psalms41:12 Kadi mundi ngamba bua bualu buanyi, wewe udi unkolesha bualu bua buakane buanyi, udi unshikika ku mesu kuebe tshiendelele." 
Psalms41:13 Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, avudishibue disanka ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu! Amen! Amen!" 
Psalms42:1 Bu mudi ngulungu uhuyakana, ujinga mai adi a musulu udi uhueka, nunku muoyo wanyi udi uhuyakana, ukujinga, wewe, Nzambi." 
Psalms42:2 Muoyo wanyi udi ne nyota ya kumona Nzambi, ya kumona Nzambi udi ne muoyo. Nenye kumueneka ku mesu kua Nzambi tshikondo kai?" 
Psalms42:3 Binsonshi bianyi biakulua bia kudia bianyi munya ne butuku, hatshidi bantu bankonka dinda tô ne ku dilolo ne, Nzambi webe udi hanyi?" 
Psalms42:4 Ndi nvuluka malu â handi mpumuna muoyo munda muanyi: bu munakaya ne tshisumbu tshia bantu, bu munakabalombola benda mu mulongo bua kuyabo ku nsuhu wa Nzambi, bela biabo mbila ya disanka ne bimba misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai. Bakadi tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu bavuluka biabo dituku dia tshijila." 
Psalms42:5 Mutshima wanyi, wewe udi muitshikile bua tshinyi? Udi ulubakana munda muanyi bua tshinyi? Wikale ne ditekemena diebe mu Nzambi; bualu bua nemmutumbishe kabidi, bualu bua yeye udi luhandu luanyi ne Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms42:6 Mutshima wanyi udi muitshikile munda muanyi, bua bualu ebu ndi nkuvuluka wewe, Nzambi, mubange ku buloba bua Yadene ne bua mu mikuna ya Hêmona, ne ku mukuna wa Misâ." 
Psalms42:7 Ndondo wa mai udi Ubikila ndondo mukuabo hunvueye tshiona tshia bibila biebe. Mavuala ebe ne mambuanka ebe onso akuhita ha mutu hanyi. 
Psalms42:8 Mu munya Yehowa neantumine luse luandi lujalame ku dî diandi, ne butuku musambu undi mmuimbila nengikale nʼau, mutendelelu mene undi utendelela nʼau Nzambi wa muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms42:9 Nengambile Nzambi, dibue dianyi, ne, Wakuhua bualu buanyi muoyo bualu kai? Ndi ngenda ndila bua dinkengesha kudi muena lukuna bua tshinyi" 
Psalms42:10 Bu mudibo batshibula mifuba yanyi, bena lukuna banyi badi bampenda, hatshidibo bankonka dinda tô ne ku dilolo ne, Nzambi webe udi hanyi?" 
Psalms42:11 Mutshima wanyi, wewe udi muitshikile bua tshinyi? Udi ulubakana munda muanyi bua tshinyi? Wikale ne ditekemena diebe mu Nzambi; bualu bua nemmutumbishe kabidi bualu bua yeye udi luhandu luanyi ne Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms43:1 Nzambi, ukose nsambu yanyi biakane, ungakuile tshilumbu tshianyi ku mpala kua ba mu tshisamba tshia bantu badi bahidia Nzambi. Umpandishe mu bianza bia bantu badi badinga ne badi ne malu mabi." 
Psalms43:2 Bualu bua wewe udi Nzambi wa tshieyemenu tshianyi; wakungumushila tshinyi? Ndi ngenda ndila bua dinkengesha dia muena lukuna bua tshinyi? 
Psalms43:3 Utume munya webe ne bushuwa buebe ku mpala kuebe; bindombole, binfile tô ne ku mukuna webe wa tshijila, ne ku muaba webe kûdi mushikame." 
Psalms43:4 Ka nenye ku tshioshelu tshia milambu tshia Nzambi, kudi Nzambi udi disanka dianyi dihite bunene. Nenkutumbishe ne lunkombe, Nzambi, Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms43:5 Mutshima wanyi, wewe udi muitshikile bua tshinyi? Udi ulubakana munda muanyi bua tshinyi? Wikale ne ditekemena diebe mu Nzambi; bualu bua nemmutumbishe kabidi, bualu bua yeye udi luhandu luanyi ne Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms44:1 Nzambi, tuakunvua ku matshu etu, batatu betu bakuambila, bua malu awakenza mu matuku abo, mu matuku akahita kale." 
Psalms44:2 Wewe wakihata bisamba bia bantu ne tshianza tshiebe; kadi wakashilaku batatu mu buloba. Wakakengesha bantu bakuabo, kadi wakavudisha batatu mu miaba yonso." 
Psalms44:3 Bualu bua kabakadinyengela buloba abu ku muele wabo wa nvita, ne diboko diabo kadiakabasungila mu nvita; kadi tshianza tshiebe tshia balume ne diboko diebe ne munya wa ha mpala hebe biakabasungila. Bualu bua wewe wakadi nʼabo luse." 
Psalms44:4 Nzambi, wewe udi Mukelenge wanyi; wele dî diebe bua Yakoba ahite bukole mu nvita." 
Psalms44:5 Ku dikuatshisha diebe tudi mua kushindika badi nʼetu lukuna hanshi. Mu dina diebe tudi mua kudiata badi babika kutuluisha muinshi mua makasa etu. 
Psalms44:6 Bualu bua tshiena ngeyemena buta buanyi, ne muele wanyi wa nvita kawena mua kunsungila." 
Psalms44:7 Kadi wewe wakusungila mu bianza bia badi nʼetu lukuna, wakufuisha badi batulama bundu." 
Psalms44:8 Tuakuditumbisha bualu bua Nzambi dinda tô ne ku dilolo, netuele dina diebe tuasakidila tshiendelele." 
Psalms44:9 Kadi mpindiu wewe wakutûmusha, wakutukehesha; kuena uluhuka bua kulombela bisumbu bietu bia bena nvita." 
Psalms44:10 Udi utuhingasha tshianyima bua kunyema badi nʼetu lukuna. Badi nʼetu lukinu badi badinyengela bintu bietu. 
Psalms44:11 Wakutuvuisha bu mikoko misungula bua kudia, wakutumuangalasha munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms44:12 Udi uhana bantu bebe ku mushinga wa hatuhu, kuakuheta luhetu lua bungi ku mushinga wabo." 
Psalms44:13 Udi utuvuisha bu tshintu tshia kulondabo kudi bena mutumba nʼetu, bu tshintu tshia kuhetulabo ne kusekabo kudi bantu badi batunyunguluka." 
Psalms44:14 Udi utuyisha bu lusumuinu ludibo bela munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu, bu tshintu tshia kukuhilabo mitu munkatshi mua bantu." 
Psalms44:15 Dinda tô ne ku dilolo kukeheshibua kuanyi kudi ku mpala kuanyi, ne bundu budi bunkuata ku mesu kuanyi," 
Psalms44:16 bualu bua dî dia muntu udi unseka ne umpenda ne mei mabi, bualu bua mpala wa muena lukuna ne musombuedi udi umueneka kundi." 
Psalms44:17 Malu â onso akufika kutudi, kadi katuakukuhua muoyo, katuakushiha mei a tshihungidi tshiebe ne mashimi etu." 
Psalms44:18 Mitshima yetu kayakuhinguluka, biendedi bietu kabiena bisesuka bua kumukabi mu nshila webe," 
Psalms44:19 bua wewe wakuntshibula bituha bituha bua muanda eu mu muaba wa mizeu, ne bua wewe wakutubuikila mu mîdima mikole." 
Psalms44:20 Bituahua dina dia Nzambi wetu muoyo, anyi bituolola bianza bietu kudi nzambi wa bende," 
Psalms44:21 Nzambi kena ukeba bualu ebu bua kubusokolola, anyi? Bualu bua yeye udi mumanye meji adi masokoka mu mutshima." 
Psalms44:22 E, bua bualu buebe tudi tushihibua dinda tô ne ku dilolo; tudi lubadibue bu mikoko ya kushihabo." 
Psalms44:23 Mukelenge, utabale! Udi ulala tulu bua tshinyi? Bika; kumbengi tshiendelele!" 
Psalms44:24 Udi usokoka mpala webe bua tshinyi? Udi uhua dikenga dietu ne dikengeshibua dietu muoyo bua tshinyi? 
Psalms44:25 Bualu bua muoyo wetu udi muiname hanshi mu dinfuenkenya, mibidi yetu idi milamike ku buloba." 
Psalms44:26 Juka biebe bua kutukuatshisha, utuhikule bua luse luebe lujalame." 
Psalms45:1 Mutshima wanyi udi uhumuna mei adi mimpe. Ndi ngamba ne, Musambu wanyi udi bualu bua mukelenge. Ludimi luanyi ludi bu mutshi wa mai wa mufundi udi ufunda lubilu." 
Psalms45:2 Wewe udi uhita bana balume ba bantu bonso bulengele; badi bateka kalolo mukana muebe; nunku Nzambi wakukuvudishila disanka tshiendelele. 
Psalms45:3 Luata muele webe wa nvita ha lubese luebe, wewe muena bukitu; luata butumbi buebe ne buneme buebe." 
Psalms45:4 Mu butumbi buebe wende biebe utamba bukole mu nvita bua malu a bushuwa, a kalolo ne a buakane. Tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshikuyishe bienzedi bidi bikuatshisha bantu buowa." 
Psalms45:5 Mikete yebe idi mitue — bantu badi bahona ku mpala kuebe — idi ibuela mu mitshima ya bena lukuna ba mukelenge. 
Psalms45:6 Nzambi, nkuasa webe wa bukelenge udiku tô ne tshiendelele; dikombo dia buakane ndikombo dia bukelenge buebe." 
Psalms45:7 Udi unanga malu makane ne udi ne malu mabi lukuna. Bua bualu ebu Nzambi, Nzambi webe mene, wakukuna manyi a disanka ha mutu hebe ne diela dia manyi ditamba diakeleye bakuebe." 
Psalms45:8 Bivualu biebe bionso bidi binunka muhuya wa myrrhe, wa aloes ne wa casse. Tshiona tshia bisanji tshidi tshifuma mu mbalasa ya mibanga tshidi tshikusankisha." 
Psalms45:9 Bana bakashi ba bakelenge badi bashikama munkatshi mua bakashi bebe badi ne butumbi. Mukelenge mukashi webe udi wimana ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume muluate or wa ku Ofî. 
Psalms45:10 Wewe, muanʼanyi mukashi, ungunvuile, welangane meji, ne uteleje matshu ebe. Uhue bantu bebe ne nsubu wa tatu webe muoyo;" 
Psalms45:11 nunku mukelenge neasue bulengele buebe. Bualu bua yeye udi mukelenge webe, umukukuile." 
Psalms45:12 Ba mu Tulo nebalue kûdi ne diha, badi bahita bubanji munkatshi mua bantu nebakebe diakalengele kûdi." 
Psalms45:13 Muana mukashi wa mukelenge udi ne butumbi buonso mu nsubu wa munda mua mbalasa wa mukelenge. Bilulu biandi bidi bitedibue ne buanda bua or. 
Psalms45:14 Badi baya nʼandi kudi mukelenge muluate bilulu bitedibue ne malenda. Bansongakashi batshidi tumama, balunda bandi, badi bamulonda, badi bafidibua kûdi." 
Psalms45:15 Badi babafila ne disanka ne musangelu, badi babuela mu mbalasa wa mukelenge." 
Psalms45:16 Bana bebe ba balume ba wakalela nebahingane mu muaba wa batatuʼebe; neubavuishe bakokeshi mu miaba yonso ya ha buloba. 
Psalms45:17 Nenvuishe dina diebe bu dina didibo bavuluka mu bikondo bionso; nunku bantu nebakutumbishe tô ne kashidi. 
Psalms46:1 Nzambi udi tshinyemenu tshietu ne bukole buetu, udi dikuatshisha dietu mu makenga didi kadiyi dihanga tshiendelele." 
Psalms46:2 Nunku katuena tutshina, nansha biandamuka buloba, nansha biatenkakana mikuna mile idi munkatshi mua mai manene;" 
Psalms46:3 nansha biabila mai a mu mai manene ne biatutukau ntutu; nansha biazakala mikuna mile bualu bua kutuntumuka kuau. 
Psalms46:4 Musulu udiku, ne tusulu tuau tudi tusankisha musoko wa Nzambi, muaba wa tshijila udi ne nsubu ya Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu." 
Psalms46:5 Nzambi udi munkatshi muau, kabena bamanye mua kûnyungisha; Nzambi neaukuatshishe hatshia butuku." 
Psalms46:6 Ba mu bisamba bia bantu bakajula diyoyo, makelenge akatenkakana; yeye wakamba dî diandi, buloba buakafingatuka." 
Psalms46:7 Yehowa wa misumba udi nʼetu; Nzambi wa Yakoba udi tshinyemenu tshietu. 
Psalms46:8 Luai bienu, nutangile bienzedi bia Yehowa, bu muakuenzesheye dibutuka dia bungi ha buloba." 
Psalms46:9 Yeye udi ulekesha nvita bua ishike tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba; udi utshibula buta, udi ukosa difuma bituha bituha; udi wosha makalu a nvita mu kahia." 
Psalms46:10 Imanai talalâ, numanye bienu ne, Meme ndi Nzambi. Nentumbishibue munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu, nentumbishibue ha buloba." 
Psalms46:11 Yehowa wa misumba udi nʼetu; Nzambi wa Yakoba udi tshinyemenu tshietu. 
Psalms47:1 Nuenu bantu bonso, hitai nkashi; elai mbila kudi Nzambi ne dî dia disanka." 
Psalms47:2 Bualu bua Yehowa, Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu, udi ukuatshisha bantu buowa, udi Mukelenge munene wa ha mutu ha buloba buonso." 
Psalms47:3 Udi ubuesha bantu muinshi mua bukokeshi buetu, udi uteka bisamba bia bantu muinshi mua makasa etu." 
Psalms47:4 Udi utusunguila buhianyi buetu, budi butumbi bua Yakoba udiye nʼandi dinanga." 
Psalms47:5 Nzambi wakubanda mu diulu munkatshi mua mbila, Yehowa wakubanda mu tshiona tshia dî dia mpungi." 
Psalms47:6 Nuimbile Nzambi misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai, imbai! Nuimbile Mukelenge wetu misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai, imbai!" 
Psalms47:7 Bualu bua Nzambi udi Mukelenge wa ba ha buloba bonso; numuimbile musambu ne meji. 
Psalms47:8 Nzambi udi ukokesha ku mutu kua bisamba bia bantu; Nzambi udi mushikame mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge ne iya tshijila. 
Psalms47:9 Bakokeshi ba bantu badi badisangisha hamue ne bantu ba Nzambi wa Abalahama. Bualu bua ngabu ya ha buloba idi ya Nzambi; yeye udi mutumbishibue bikole. 
Psalms48:1 Yehowa udi munene, udi muakane bua kumutumbisha bikole mu musoko wa Nzambi wetu, mu mukuna wandi wa tshijila." 
Psalms48:2 Mukuna wa Siona udi mulengele mu kubanda kuau mulu, ku nseke ya ku nôde, disanka dia ba ha buloba bonso, musoko wa Mukelenge munene." 
Psalms48:3 Nzambi wakudimanyisha mu mbalasa yau bu tshinyemenu tshile. 
Psalms48:4 Bua monai muakadisangisha bakelenge hamue, bakahitshilaku hohamue." 
Psalms48:5 Bakaumona, hashishe bakakema, bakakuatshika buowa, bakanyema lubilu." 
Psalms48:6 Dizakala diakabakuataku; kanyinganyinga kakabakuata bu ka mukashi udi ne didinyenga dia ha kuleleye. 
Psalms48:7 Wewe wakatshibula matu manene a ku Tâshishi ne luhelele luakafuma ku luseke lua esete. 
Psalms48:8 Bu mutuakunvua lumu, mbu mutuakumona mu musoko wa Yehowa wa misumba, mu musoko wa Nzambi wetu: Nzambi neajadike bua kuikalaku tshiendelele." 
Psalms48:9 Nzambi, tuakuelangana meji a luse luebe lujalame munda mua ntempelo webe." 
Psalms48:10 Nzambi, bu mudi dina diebe dimanyibue, mbu mudi ditumbishibua diebe difika tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba. Tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi tshiule tente ne buakane." 
Psalms48:11 Mukuna wa Siona wikale ne disanka; bana bakashi ba Bena Yuda basanke bualu bua mikenji yebe mijalame. 
Psalms48:12 Endakanai ku nseke yonso ya Siona, numunyunguluke, balai bungi bua bibumba biandi." 
Psalms48:13 Tangilai bimpe ngumbu yandi ya nvita, nubuele mu nsubu yandi mikole, bua numanye mua kuambila ba mu tshikondo tshidi tsnmulonda ku nyima ne," 
Psalms48:14 Eu udi Nzambi, Nzambi wetu tô ne tshiendelele. Yeye neikale mulombodi wetu tô ne hatuafua." 
Psalms49:1 Unvuai bualu ebu, nuenu bantu bonso! Telejai matshu enu, bonso ba ha buloba," 
Psalms49:2 ne bahuekele ne banene, babanji ne bahele diatshimue." 
Psalms49:3 Mukana muanyi nemuambe mei a lungenyi; meji andi ngela mu mutshima wanyi neikale meji a dijingulula dia malu. 
Psalms49:4 Nenteleje matshu anyi ku lusumuinu, nengandule dijimbu dianyi ku kuimba kua lunkombe." 
Psalms49:5 Bualu kai ndi ne bua kutshina mu matuku a makenga, hadi dihambuka dia ku buakane dia bena lukuna banyi dinnyunguluka nseke yonso?" 
Psalms49:6 Mbantu badi beyemena luhetu luabo, badi baditumbisha bua bungi bua biuma biabo." 
Psalms49:7 Bulelela, kakuena muntu udi mua kuhikula muanʼabo ku tshintu tshiandi tshimue, anyi kufila mushinga wa kumuhikula nʼau kudi Nzambi," 
Psalms49:8 bualu bua mushinga wa kuhikula nʼau mioyo yabo udi mukole, udi uhanga kukumbana tshiendelele," 
Psalms49:9 bua yeye ashale ne muoyo tshiendelele, bua kamonyi biandi Dijimba dia Bafue." 
Psalms49:10 E, yeye neamone ne, Bena meji badi bafua; muhote ne muntu mujibale badi bafua muomumue ne badi bashila banga bantu biuma biabo." 
Psalms49:11 Meji adibo bela munda muabo adi ne, Nsubu yetu neyishaleku tshiendelele, miaba itudi tushikama neyikaleku tô ne ku bikondo bionso. Badi binyika maloba abo ku mena abo mine." 
Psalms49:12 Kadi muntu kena mua kushala mu butumbi buandi, udi bu nyama idi ijimina." 
Psalms49:13 Eu nnshila udi badi bahote mu kudieyemena kuabo bayamu; kadi badi balua ku nyima kuabo badi basanka bua mei akambabo. 
Psalms49:14 Badi basungudibua bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko bua kubuelabo mu Muaba wa Bafue; Lufu neluikale mulami wabo. Bantu bakane nebabakokeshe ne lunkelu. Mibidi yabo neyinyane, neyijimine; Muaba wa Bafue newikale muaba wa bobo kushikama." 
Psalms49:15 Kadi Nzambi, neahikule muoyo wanyi ku bukole bua Muaba wa Bafue, bua yeye neangangate." 
Psalms49:16 Kutshinyi havuishibua muntu bubanji, havulangana biuma bia mu nsubu muandi." 
Psalms49:17 Bualu bua, hafueye, kena uya ne tshintu tshimue nansha, butumbi buandi kabuena buhueka nʼandi bua kumulonda ku nyima kuandi." 
Psalms49:18 Nansha biavudishileye mutshima wandi disanka hatshidiye ne muoyo, nansha hikala bantu bamutumbishe haditutshisheye dikasa dimpe," 
Psalms49:19 yeye neaye anu ku mulongo wa bankambua bandi, kabena bamona munya kabidi tshiendelele." 
Psalms49:20 Muntu udi ne butumbi, kadi kena ujingulula, udi bu nyama idi ijimina." 
Psalms50:1 Wa Bukole, Nzambi, Yehowa mene, wakuamba dî diandi, wakubikila buloba kudi kuhatuka diba tô ne kudi kubueladi." 
Psalms50:2 Mu muaba wandi wa mu Siona, udi mulengele tshishiki, Nzambi udi utema biandi." 
Psalms50:3 Nzambi wetu udi ulua, kena uhuwa talalâ, kahia kadi ku mpala kuandi kadi kosha bintu, tshihuhu tshitambe bukole tshidi tshimunyunguluka." 
Psalms50:4 Yeye udi wela dî kudi diulu didi mulu ne kudi buloba, bua yeye kulumbuluisha bantu bandi, wamba ne," 
Psalms50:5 Sangishai bienu bantu banyi ba tshijila kundi, bantu aba mene bakuhunga neanyi tshihungidi ku difila dia mulambu." 
Psalms50:6 Diulu didi diamba bua buakane buandi, bualu bua Nzambi muine udi mulumbuluishi." 
Psalms50:7 Unvuai, nuenu bantu banyi, nengakule; Bena Isalele, nennubande. Meme ndi Nzambi, Nzambi wenu mene." 
Psalms50:8 Tshiena nnubela bua milambu yenu; milambu yenu ya kuosha idi ku mpala kuanyi matuku onso. 
Psalms50:9 Tshiena ngitabusha ngombe umuehele wa ku nsubu yenu, anyi mpumbu ya mbushi ya mu mpangu yenu." 
Psalms50:10 Bualu bua nyama yonso wa muitu nguanyi, bimuna bia ha mikuna tshinunu mbianyi kabidi." 
Psalms50:11 Ndi mumanye nyunyu yonso ya ha mikuna, ne tshionso tshidi tshiendakana mu mpata ntshianyi." 
Psalms50:12 Bu meme muikale ne nzala, tshiakadi kukuambila; bualu bua buloba mbuanyi ne tshiuwidi tshiabu tshionso ntshianyi." 
Psalms50:13 Ntu ngadia munyinyi wa ngombe, anyi? Ntu nganua mashi a mbushi, anyi?" 
Psalms50:14 Fila mulambu wa disakidila kudi Nzambi, futa mitshihu yebe kudi Udi Mutambe Bunene wa mu Diulu." 
Psalms50:15 Umbikile mu dituku dia makenga; nenkuhandishe, ne wewe neuntumbishe." 
Psalms50:16 Kadi Nzambi udi webesha muntu mubi ne, Wewe udi ne bukokeshi kai bua kumanyisha bantu mikenji yanyi, anyi bua kubuesha mei a tshihungidi tshianyi mukana muebe?" 
Psalms50:17 Bualu bua wewe udi ukina diyisha, udi wimasha mei anyi ku nyima kuebe." 
Psalms50:18 Hawamona muibi, udi usanka bua kuikala nʼandi; ne udi ukuata bulunda ne bendi ba masandi." 
Psalms50:19 Udi ufidisha mukana muebe bua kuambau malu mabi, ludimi luebe ludi lusangakasha mei a kudinga." 
Psalms50:20 Udi ushikama hanshi, udi usonguela muanʼenu; udi wela muana wa mamu webe mene mukoso." 
Psalms50:21 Wewe wakuenza malu â, ne meme nakuhuwa talalâ. Wakuela meji munda muebe ne, Nzambi udi bu meme mu malu onso. Kadi ndi ngamba kukubela mpindiu ne kukulondela malu â ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms50:22 Telejai matshu enu ku dî edi, nuenu badi bahua Nzambi muoyo, bua meme tshinuhandi bihesa bihesa, kakuena wa mua kunuhandisha!" 
Psalms50:23 Udi ufila disakidila bu mulambu wandi udi untumbisha; nendeshe luhandu lua Nzambi kudi muntu udi ulongolola nshila wandi bimpe. 
Psalms51:1 Nzambi, unfuile luse, bu mudi luse luebe lujalame; ku divulangana dia luse luebe, unjimishile matomboka anyi." 
Psalms51:2 Unguvuwe tshishiki ku mahambuka anyi, untokeshe ku bubi buanyi." 
Psalms51:3 Bualu bua ndi mumanye matomboka anyi, ne buanyi butu buikala ku mpala kuanyi matuku onso." 
Psalms51:4 Nakukuenzela wewe, wewe nkayebe, bibi; nakuenza bualu bubi abu ku mesu kuebe; bua wewe Umanye mua kubingishibua hawamba dî dia kumpisha nʼadi, ne mua kuikala ne mutshima mutoke mu kulumbulula kuebe." 
Psalms51:5 Mona, nakaledibua mu dihambuka, ne mu bubi mamu wanyi wakangimita munda muandi." 
Psalms51:6 Mona, wewe udi musue bushuwa buikale munda mua muntu; udi ummanyisha mua kuikala ne meji munda muanyi." 
Psalms51:7 Untokeshe ne hysope, nengikale mutoke; unguvuwe, nempite neige butoke tô." 
Psalms51:8 Ungunvuishe mei a disanka ne a musangelu mu matshu anyi; bua mifuba iwakutshibula isanke. 
Psalms51:9 Usokoke mpala webe ku malu mabi anyi, unjimishile mahambuka anyi onso." 
Psalms51:10 Nzambi, unfukile mutshima mutoke munda muanyi, ungenzele nyuma mujalame munda muanyi." 
Psalms51:11 Kungihatshi bua tshikadi ku mpala kuebe, kungumushidi Nyuma webe Muimpe." 
Psalms51:12 Umpingishile disanka dia luhandu luebe, ushindike ne mutshima wa mua kuenza bu mu disua diebe." 
Psalms51:13 Hashishe, nenyishe badi bahambuke nshila yebe, ne bantu babi nebahingane kûdi." 
Psalms51:14 Wewe Nzambi, Nzambi wa luhandu luanyi, unsungile ku dihila dia dimatshisha dia mashi, ne ludimi luanyi neluimbe musambu ne dî dikole bua buakane buebe." 
Psalms51:15 Mukelenge, ubulule mishiku yanyi, ne mukana muanyi nemumanyishe bantu butumbi buebe." 
Psalms51:16 Bualu bua wewe kuena usanka bua difila dia milambu, anyi nakadi kuyifila, wewe kuena usanka bua mulambu wa kuosha ha kahia." 
Psalms51:17 Milambu idi Nzambi mua kuitabusha idi mutshima wa majia. Wewe Nzambi, kuena uhetula mutshima wa majia ne udi unyingalala bua bubi buau." 
Psalms51:18 Wenzele Siona bimpe mu disanka diebe dimpe, wibake ngumbu ya Yelushalema." 
Psalms51:19 Hashishe, newikale ne disanka bua milambu mifidibue mu buakane, neusanke bua milambu ya kuosha ha kahia ne ya nyama ya kuosha mijima. Hashishe, nebafile bana balume ba ngombe ha tshioshelu tshiebe." 
Psalms52:1 Wewe, muena tshinyangu mukole, udi ufuna bulobo mu malu mabi ebe bua tshinyi? Luse lujalame lua Nzambi ludiku matuku onso." 
Psalms52:2 Ludimi luebe ludi luamba malu a kabutu awakuhangidisha, ludi bu dihaya ditue, wewe muenji wa malu a lubombo." 
Psalms52:3 Wewe udi utamba kunanga malu mabi ku mpala kua malu mimpe; wewe udi utamba kunanga kuamba kua mashimi ku mpala kua kuamba kua mei a bushuwa. 
Psalms52:4 Wewe, ludimi ludi ludinga bantu, udi unanga mei onso adi abutula bantu." 
Psalms52:5 Nzambi neakubetekashe tshiendelele. Neakukuate, neakubatule mu ntenta webe; neakujomone, neakûmushe mu buloba bua badi ne muoyo." 
Psalms52:6 Bantu bakane nebatangile bualu ebu, nebatshine, nebamuseke ne," 
Psalms52:7 Mona muntu eu wakadi kayi uvuisha Nzambi tshieyemenu tshiandi, kadi wakeyemena dilengama dia biuma biandi, wakadikolesha mu malu mabi andi." 
Psalms52:8 Kadi meme hanyi ndi bu mutshi wa olive utshidi usampila mu nsubu wa Nzambi. Ndi ngeyemena luse lua Nzambi tô ne tshiendelele. 
Psalms52:9 Nenkusakidile tô ne tshiendelele, bualu bua wakuenza bualu ebu. Nentekemene dina diebe ku mpala kua bansanto bebe, bualu bua didi dimpe." 
Psalms53:1 Muhote udi wamba mu mutshima wandi ne, Kakuena Nzambi. Badi banyanguke, badi benza malu mabi adi afuisha bundu; kakuena nansha umue wabo udi wenzaku malu mimpe." 
Psalms53:2 Nzambi wa mu diulu wakatangila hanshi hadi bana ba bantu, bua kumoneye ne, Umue wabo udi wenza bu muena meji, anyi? Umue wabo udi ukeba Nzambi, anyi?" 
Psalms53:3 Buonso buabo bakusesuka mu nshila, buonso buabo bakumana kunyanguka hamue. Kakuena umue wabo udi wenza bimpe; kakuena nansha umuehele udi muimpe." 
Psalms53:4 Benji ba malu mabi kabena ne meji, anyi? Badi badia bantu banyi bu mudibo badia bidia, ne kabena babikila dina dia Nzambi." 
Psalms53:5 Ku muaba wawa badi ne buowa bukole, bakuatshike buowa buakadi kabuyiku diambedi. Bualu bua Nzambi neatangadishe mifuba ya muntu udi wasa tshitudilu tshiandi bua kukuluisha. Wewe neubafuishe bundu ku mesu bualu bua Nzambi wakubabenga." 
Psalms53:6 Nakadi kusua bua luhandu lua Bena Isalele lufume ku Siona! Hakudimuna Nzambi buhika bua bantu bandi bua kubaha diakalengele, Yakoba neasanke, ne Bena Isalele nebikale ne disanka kabidi." 
Psalms54:1 Nzambi, unsungile mu dina diebe, umbingishe ku bukole buebe." 
Psalms54:2 Nzambi, unvue kulomba kuanyi; uteleje matshu ebe ku mei a mukana muanyi." 
Psalms54:3 Bualu bua bana ba bende bakunjukila bua kuntantamena, bena tshimbambila badi bakeba muoyo wanyi. Kabena bateka Nzambi ku mpala kuabo." 
Psalms54:4 Mona, Nzambi udi mukuatshishi wanyi; Mukelenge udi mukoleshi wa muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms54:5 Yeye neahingashile bena lukuna banyi difutu dia bubi buabo; ubabutule mu lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa. 
Psalms54:6 Nenfile mulambu wanyi kûdi ne mulambu wa kukusakidila nʼau; nensakidile dina diebe, Yehowa, bualu bua didi dimpe." 
Psalms54:7 Bualu bua wakumpandisha mu makenga anyi onso, ne mesu anyi akumona ne disanka mudi bena lukuna banyi batambibue bukole." 
Psalms55:1 Nzambi, teleja matshu ku kulomba kuanyi, kusokomi bua kunvu biebe kutendekena kuanyi." 
Psalms55:2 Teleja matshu ebe, witabe kundi. Ndi nsasakata ne meji adi antatshisha, ndi ne bualu bua kutua mikemu bikole," 
Psalms55:3 bualu bua dî dia muena lukuna, bualu bua dinkengesha dia bantu babi. Bualu bua badi bavuisha malu mabi bua kukulukau hamʼbidi hanyi, ne mu tshiji tshiabo badi bangenzela bibi." 
Psalms55:4 Mutshima wanyi udi unyingalala munda muanyi, buowa bua lufu budi bunkuate." 
Psalms55:5 Kutshina ne kuzakala kudi kufika kundi, kuvuayila kudi kukuata mubidi wanyi wonso." 
Psalms55:6 Ndi ngamba ne, Nakadi kusua kuikala ne mahuahua a nyunyu bu mudi nyunyu wa nkutshi nʼau! Nunku nakadi kutua mulelu bua kuya kule, nakadi kushikamaku mu ditalala," 
Psalms55:7 eyo, nakadi kunyema kule, nakadi kushikama mu tshihela." 
Psalms55:8 Nakadi kudiendesha lubilu bua kuheta bianyi tshinyemenu bua kunyema tshihehele tshikole ne tshihuhu. 
Psalms55:9 Mukelenge, ubutule malu adibo bahangidisha, uhandulule ndimi yabo, bualu bua ndi mmona tshimbambila ne ditandangana mu musoko." 
Psalms55:10 Munya ne butuku badi banyunguluka musoko, benda ha mutu ha ngumbu yau. Kunyanguka ne mukodi bidi munkatshi muau," 
Psalms55:11 kubutuka kudi munkatshi muau. Kunyenga kua bintu ku bukole ne mashimi kabiena biumuka mu muaba wau wa tshisalu. 
Psalms55:12 Keni muena lukuna udi umpenda — nakadi kumanya mua kuitabusha muanda wawa; kem muntu udi unkina udi udibandisha ne diambu ku mpala kuanyi — ka nakadi kumanya mua kusokoma bua tshikadi ku mesu kuandi. 
Psalms55:13 Kadi nguewe mene, muntu unakadi mbala ne, Udi muomumue nʼanyi, muntu unakeyemena ne wakadi mulunda wanyi unakamanya bimpe." 
Psalms55:14 Tuakadi tuyikilangana hohamue ne diyiki dimpe; tuakadi tuenda nʼebe diatshimue ne tshisumbu tshia batendeledi bua kubuela mu nsubu wa Nzambi. 
Psalms55:15 Dibutuka dikuluke hamʼbidi habo, bahueke biabo ne muoyo tô ne ku Muaba wa Bafue, bualu bua malu mabi adi mu nsubu yabo ne munkatshi muabo." 
Psalms55:16 Kadi meme hanyi nendibikidile Nzambi; Yehowa neansungile. 
Psalms55:17 Dilolo ne dinda ne ha diba dia munda munya ndi musue kumuambila meji adi antatshisha, ndi ntua mikemu, ne yeye neunvue dî dianyi." 
Psalms55:18 Yeye neuhikule muoyo wanyi talalâ munkatshi mua nvita indi nduangana, bualu bua badi baluangana nʼanyi badi ba bungi." 
Psalms55:19 Nzambi neunvue dî diabo, yeye mene udi mushikame mu nkuasa wa bukelenge hu muakadiye ku tshibangidilu neabakengeshe, bualu bua kabena ne dikudimuka dia malu abo, ne kabena batshina Nzambi." 
Psalms55:20 Eu wakolola bianza biandi bua kulenga bakadi nʼandi talalâ, wakanyanga tshihungidi tshiandi tshiakahungeye nʼabo." 
Psalms55:21 Mukana muandi muakatamba manteke kuikala ne busenu, kadi nvita yakadi mu mutshima wandi. Mei andi akahita manyi kusenunuka, kadi akadi miele ya nvita mihatula mu luhaha." 
Psalms55:22 Teka bujitu buebe hamʼbidi ha Yehowa, ne yeye neakukoleshe; kena witabusha tshiendelele bua bantu bakane banyungishibue." 
Psalms55:23 Kadi wewe Nzambi, neutulule bantu aba hanshi tô ne ku ndondo wa dijimba dia kabutu; bantu badi bamatshisha mashi ne badi badinga kabena bashala ne muoyo tshituha tshia hankatshi tshia matuku abo. Kadi meme nenkueyemene wewe." 
Psalms56:1 Nzambi, unfuile luse, bualu bua bantu badi bandiatakasha muinshi mua makasa; dinda tô ne ku dilolo bena nvita badi bankengesha." 
Psalms56:2 Badi bangalamina badi bandiatakasha muinshi mua makasa dinda tô ne ku dilolo; bualu bua ba bungi badi baluangana nʼanyi mu dihetu diabo. 
Psalms56:3 Handi ntshina, ndi nkueyemena wewe." 
Psalms56:4 Mu Nzambi, ndi ntumbisha dî diandi, mu Nzambi mundi ngeyemena, tshiyi ne buowa. Bantu badi mua kungenzela tshinyi?" 
Psalms56:5 Dinda tô ne ku dilolo badi bakeba kunyanga malu anyi; badi bangelela meji abo onso bua kungenzelabo bibi. 
Psalms56:6 Badi badisangisha hamue mu bifufu, badi bangalamina mu busokoko, badi batentekela biendedi bianyi. Bu muakualaminabo muoyo wanyi," 
Psalms56:7 badi mua kuhanduka ne dikuatshisha dia bubi buabo, anyi? Mu tshiji tshiebe, Nzambi, wele bantu hanshi!" 
Psalms56:8 Wewe udi ubala nsumpakana anyi; wele binsonshi bianyi mu mulondo webe. Kabiena bifundibua mu mukanda webe, anyi?" 
Psalms56:9 Nunku bena lukuna banyi nebahingane ku nyima mu dituku dindi nkubikila. Ndi mumanye bualu ebu ne, Nzambi udi nʼanyi." 
Psalms56:10 Mu Nzambi, undi ntumbisha dî diandi, mu Yehowa, undi ntumbisha di diandi," 
Psalms56:11 mu Nzambi mene mundi ngeyemena, tshiyi ne buowa. Bantu badi bamanye mua kungenzela tshinyi?" 
Psalms56:12 Nzambi, ndi ne bualu bua kumana mitshihu inakuditshiha kûdi; nenfile milambu ya kusakidila nʼai kûdi." 
Psalms56:13 Bualu bua wewe wakuhandisha muoyo wanyi ku lufu, wakulama makasa anyi bua kalenduki bua mmanye mua kuenda ku mpala kua Nzambi mu munya wa muoyo." 
Psalms57:1 Unfuile luse, Nzambi, unfuile luse, bualu bua muoyo wanyi udi unyemena kûdi. Bulelela, nennyemene mu mundidimbi wa mahuahua ebe bua kushalaki tô ne hahita dikenga dia kabutu." 
Psalms57:2 Nendile kudi Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, kudi Nzambi udi ungenzela malu onso akunsunguileye." 
Psalms57:3 Yeye neantumine luhandu lufume mu diulu, neansungile, neafuishe badi bandiatakasha muinshi mua makasa bundu. Nzambi neantumine luse luandi lujalame ne lulamatu luandi lua bushuwa." 
Psalms57:4 Muoyo wanyi udi munkatshi mua nyama ya ntambue; ndi ne bualu bua kulala munkatshi mua bantu badi bu kahia munkatshi mua bana ba bantu mene badi bena menu adi mafuma ne mikete, ne bena ndimi idi miele ya nvita mitue." 
Psalms57:5 Wewe, Nzambi, wikale mubandishibue ne butumbi ha mutu ha diulu dionso! Butumbi buebe buikale ha mutu ha buloba buonso!" 
Psalms57:6 Bakuandila biendedi bianyi bukuondo; muoyo wanyi wakuinamishibua hanshi. Bakunguisha dijimba ku mpala kuanyi, bobo bine bakahona munda muadi." 
Psalms57:7 Mutshima wanyi udi mushindame, Nzambi, mutshima wanyi udi mushindame. Nengimbe misambu, nenkutumbishe ne biombelu." 
Psalms57:8 Wewe, muoyo wanyi, tabala biebe! Tabalai, nuenu lunzenze ne lunkombe! Meme muine nentabashe kabundubundu." 
Psalms57:9 Mukelenge, nenkusakid le munkatshi mua bantu; nenkuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms57:10 Bualu bua luse luebe lujalame ludi lunene lufika tô ne mu diulu, lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ludi lufika tô ne ku matutu." 
Psalms57:11 Wewe, Nzambi, wikale mubandishibue ne butumbi ha mutu ha diulu dionso! Butumbi buebe buikale ha mutu ha buloba buonso!" 
Psalms58:1 Nuenu, bantu banene, nudi nuamba mei makane, anyi? Nudi nulumbuluisha bana ba bantu ne kulumbulula kuakane, anyi?" 
Psalms58:2 Nansha, mu mitshima yenu nudi nuhangidisha malu mabi, ne ha buloba nudi nuidikishila bantu bujitu bua tshimbambila tshia bianza bienu." 
Psalms58:3 Bantu babi badi bahambuka mu diba didibo bahatuka munda mua bamamuʼabo, badi bahambuka mu nshila dituku dia kuledibua kuabo, bamba mei a mashimi." 
Psalms58:4 Lulengu luabo ludi bu lulengu lua nyoka, ludi bu lulengu lua nyoka wa dikala udi ne bitshi udi ujibika matshu andi," 
Psalms58:5 udi kayi unvua dî dia badi bakeba kumuibidisha hanu, anyi dia muntu udi ukeba kumuibidisha ne budimu buhite bukole." 
Psalms58:6 Nzambi, utshibule menu abo mukana muabo; Yehowa, uhuole menu a ku tshikankanyi a bana balume ba nyama ya ntambue!" 
Psalms58:7 Bajimine bu mudi mai ahueka, adi akaminyina; haludikilabo mikete yabo, yoyo ikale bu idi mitshibuke." 
Psalms58:8 Bikale bu dilandi didi disunsuka, didi dijimina, bikale bu muana wa kabishi udi kayi muanze kumona diba." 
Psalms58:9 Diambedi ngesu yenu kayiyi mianze kukuata kahia ka mingongo ya meba, ne itshidi mibishi, ne idi mikuate kahia, yeye ayumushe ne nvunde." 
Psalms58:10 Muntu muakane neasanke hamoneye kudisombuela kuandi, neuvuwe makasa andi mu mashi a bantu babi." 
Psalms58:11 Nunku bakua bantu nebambe ne, Bulelela, difutu didiku bua muntu muakane; bulelela, Nzambi udiku udi ulumbulula bilumbu ha buloba." 
Psalms59:1 Nzambi wanyi, umpandishe mu bianza bia badi nʼanyi lukuna, umbandishe kulu bua badi bajuka bua kunduisha kabafiki kundi." 
Psalms59:2 Umpandishe mu bianza bia benji ba malu mabi, unsungile mu bianza bia badi bamatshisha mashi a bantu." 
Psalms59:3 Bua, mona, badi balamina muoyo wanyi; bena tshimbambila badi badikunguisha hamue bua kutekelabo diyoyo. Yehowa, kambualu bua ditomboka dianyi anyi bua bubi buanyi," 
Psalms59:4 badi banyema lukasa, badilongolola mu mualu wa nvita, meme tshiyi ne dibanda. Utabale, biebe, ungakidile ne dikuatshisha diebe, umone!" 
Psalms59:5 Wewe muine Yehowa, Nzambi wa misumba, udi Nzambi wa Isalele. Juka bua kukengesha bisamba bionso bia bantu; kufuidi umue wa batungidi aba luse." 
Psalms59:6 Badi balukila ku dilolo ku dilolo, bela mikunda bu mbua, badi banyunguluka musoko." 
Psalms59:7 Mona! Badi bahumuna mei mabi mukana muabo, miele ya nvita idi ku mishiku yabo. Badi bamba ne, Nganyi udi mutunvue?" 
Psalms59:8 Kadi wewe Yehowa, udi ubaseka; udi uhetula ba mu bisamba bia bantu bionso." 
Psalms59:9 Wewe, Bukole buanyi, nenkuindile ne ditekemena, bua Nzambi udi tshibumba tshianyi tshile." 
Psalms59:10 Nzambi wanyi nealue kungakidila bua luse luandi lujalame. Nzambi neitabushe bua meme ntangile badi nʼanyi lukuna batambibue bukole. 
Psalms59:11 Kubashihi nansha, bua bantu banyi kabahu muoyo; ubalenduishe ku bukole buebe, ubashindishe hanshi, wewe Mukelenge, ngabu wetu!" 
Psalms59:12 Bua malu mabi adi mukana muabo, bua mei adi ku mishiku yabo mene, bakuatshibue mu buteyi bua diambu diabo. Bua milau idibo bela ne bua mei a mashimi adibo bamba," 
Psalms59:13 ubabutule mu tshiji tshiebe, ubabutule bua kabikadiku kabidi. Bamanye biabo ne, Nzambi udi ukokesha bana ba Yakoba tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Psalms59:14 Badi balukila ku dilolo ku dilolo, bela mikunda bu mbua, badi banyunguluka musoko." 
Psalms59:15 Badi bendakana eku ne eku bakeba bia kudia, ne bikalabo kabayi bûkuta, badi batontolola." 
Psalms59:16 Kadi meme hanyi nengimbe bua bukole buebe, nengimbe ne dî dikole mu dinda bualu bua luse luebe lujalame. Bualu bua wewe wakumana kuikala tshibumba tshianyi tshile ne tshinyemenu mu dituku dia dikenga dianyi." 
Psalms59:17 Bukole buanyi, nenkuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai, bualu bua wewe, Nzambi, udi tshibumba tshianyi tshile, Nzambi udi nʼanyi luse lujalame." 
Psalms60:1 Wewe Nzambi, wakutubenga, wakuhanduka mualu wetu wa nvita; wewe wakadi nʼetu tshiji; utuhingashe kudi kabidi." 
Psalms60:2 Wakuzakasha buloba, wakubuhanda mitanta; utuangashe mitanta yabu kabidi, bualu bua butshidi butenkakana." 
Psalms60:3 Wakumueneshila bantu bebe malu makole akukengabo; wakutunuisha nyinyo yakutulenduisha. 
Psalms60:4 Wakatumikila badi bakunemeka dibendele, bua bobo banyemeneku ku mpala tua buta." 
Psalms60:5 Bua bantu bebe baudi munange babandishibue, ubasungile ne tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole, utunvuile." 
Psalms60:6 Nzambi wakuamba dî mu tshijila tshiandi ne, Nensanke, nenuhaule buloba bua Shekeme, nengabanye Tshibanda tshia Sukota." 
Psalms60:7 Gilada nguanyi; Manashe nguanyi kabidi; Efelayima udi tshifulu tshikole tshia ha mutu hanyi; Yuda udi dikombo dianyi dia bukelenge. 
Psalms60:8 Moaba udi luesu luanyi lua mai a kuowa, ndi ngela tshisabata tshianyi hamʼbidi ha Edome; ndi ngela mbila ha mutu ha Peleshete." 
Psalms60:9 Wanfikisha mu musoko wa ngumbu ya nvita nganyi? Wandombola tô ne ku Edome nganyi? 
Psalms60:10 Wewe Nzambi, kuakutubenga, anyi? Nzambi, kuena uluhuka bua kufila misumba ya masalayi etu." 
Psalms60:11 Utuheshe dikuatshisha diebe mu nvita yetu ne bena lukuna, bualu bua dikuatshisha dia bantu didi hatunu." 
Psalms60:12 Bituikala ne dikuatshisha dia Nzambi, nebenze bienzedi bia bukitu; bualu bua nyeye udi udiatakasha badi nʼetu lukuna muinshi mua makasa andi." 
Psalms61:1 Wewe Nzambi, unvua muadi wanyi, teleja matshu ku kulomba kuanyi." 
Psalms61:2 Kunfudilu kua buloba ndi nkuela dî dianyi, bahanga mutshima wanyi. Undombele ku dibue didi dintamba kulu" 
Psalms61:3 bualu bua wewe udi tshinyemenu tshianyi, udi tshibunda tshikole ku mpala kua badi nʼanyi lukuna." 
Psalms61:4 Witabushe bua meme nshikame bianyi tshiendelele mu nsubu webe wa ntenta; bua meme mpete tshinyemenu mu dibuikila dia mahuahua ebe. 
Psalms61:5 Bualu bua wewe, Nzambi, wakunvua mitshihu yanyi, wakumpa buhianyi bua badi banemeka dina diebe." 
Psalms61:6 Nealeheshele mukelenge matuku a muoyo wandi; bidimu biandi nebivulangane bikondo bia bungi. 
Psalms61:7 Neashikame biandi mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge tshiendelele ku mpala kua Nzambi; Wambile luse lujalame ne lulamatu lua bushuwa dî bimulame. 
Psalms61:8 Nunku nengimbe misambu ya kutumbisha nʼai dina diebe tshiendelele, handi mmana mitshihu yanyi ku dituku ne ku dituku." 
Psalms62:1 Mutshima wanyi udi muhuwe talalâ windila Nzambi nkayandi; luhandu luanyi ludi lufuma kudiye; 
Psalms62:2 Yeye nkayandi udi dibue dianyi ne luhandu luanyi, tshibumba tshianyi tshile; tshiena nyungishibua bikole." 
Psalms62:3 Nenubunde muntu musangu bule munyi bua kumubetekasha, buonso buenu, bu mudiye lumbu ludi lusendama, bu luhangu ludi lutenkakana?" 
Psalms62:4 Bantu aba badi bahunga di diabo anu bua kumutuma hanshi ku muaba wandi wa buneme. Badi basanka mu kuamba kua mashimi; badi bavudishila muntu disanka mukana muabo, kadi munda muabo badi bamuela mulau." 
Psalms62:5 Mutshima wanyi, uhuwe biebe talalâ, windile Nzambi nkayandi; bualu bua ditekemena dianyi didi difuma kudiye." 
Psalms62:6 Yeye nkayandi udi dibue dianyi ne luhandu luanyi, tshibumba tshianyi tshile; tshiena nyungishibua." 
Psalms62:7 Luhandu luanyi ne butumbi buanyi bidi kudi Nzambi; dibue dia bukole buanyi, ntshinyemenu tshianyi mene, tuai kudi Nzambi." 
Psalms62:8 Nuenu bantu, numueyemene misangu yonso, nuhumune milombu ya mu mitshima yenu ku mpala kuandi; Nzambi udi tshinyemenu tshietu." 
Psalms62:9 Bulelela, bantu bahuekele badi anu muhuya, bantu badi ne buneme bunene badi mashimi. Mu tshiamu tshia kuidikisha nʼatshi bujitu badi babanda kulu; buonso buabo basangisha hohamue badi bahita muhuya kuhehela." 
Psalms62:10 Kanueyemenyi tshinyangu, kanuikadi ne ditekemena dia hatuhu mu kunyenga kua bintu; biavulangana luhetu luenu, kanuteki mitshima yenu kudilu." 
Psalms62:11 Nzambi wakuamba dî diandi musangu umue; nakunvua di edi misangu ibidi ne, Bukole mbualu bua Nzambi;" 
Psalms62:12 ne kudi wewe kabidi, Mukelenge, kudi luse lujalame. Bualu bua udi ufuta muntu yonso difutu bu mudi mudimu wandi." 
Psalms63:1 Nzambi, wewe udi Nzambi wanyi; ndi nkukeba bikole; muoyo wanyi udi ne nyota bualu buebe; mubidi wanyi udi uhanga mu dikujinga diau, mu buloba bume ne budi bukama, budi kabuyi mai." 
Psalms63:2 Nunku nakukutangila talalâ mu nsubu webe wa tshijila, bua kumona bukole buebe ne butumbi buebe." 
Psalms63:3 Bualu bua luse luebe lujalame ludi luhita muoyo bulengele, mishiku yanyi neyikutumbishe." 
Psalms63:4 Nunku nenkuvudishile disanka hantshidi ne muoyo; nengolole bianza bianyi kulu bua kutendelela mu dina diebe. 
Psalms63:5 Muoyo wanyi neukute bu mudiu ukuta ne buongo bua mifuba ne manyi, ne mukana muanyi nemukutumbishe ne mishiku idi yela mei a disanka," 
Psalms63:6 handi nkuvuluka ha bulalu buanyi, handi ngelangana meji a bualu buebe mu mpola ya kutentekela butuku." 
Psalms63:7 Bualu bua wakumana kuikala mukuatshishi wanyi, ne mu mundidimbi wa mahuahua ebe nengimbe misambu bua disanka dianyi." 
Psalms63:8 Muoyo wanyi udi ulamata kûdi; tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi tshingimanyika biakane. 
Psalms63:9 Kadi badi bakeba muoyo wanyi bua kûbutula nebahueke muinshi mua ndondo wa buloba. 
Psalms63:10 Nebafidibue ku bukole bua muele wa nvita; nebikale bintu bia kudiabo kudi mizeu. 
Psalms63:11 Kadi mukelenge neusanke mu Nzambi. Muntu yonso udi uditshiha mu dina dia Nzambi neatumbilemu; bualu bua mukana mua badi bamba mei a mashimi nemubuikidibue. 
Psalms64:1 Nzambi, unvua dî dianyi mu ditontolola dianyi, ulame muoyo wanyi bua kautshinyi muntu udi nʼanyi lukuna." 
Psalms64:2 Unsokoke ku bifufu bia mu musokoko bia bantu babi ne ku diyoyo dia benji ba malu a tshinyangu. 
Psalms64:3 Badi basakisha ndimi yabo bua kuikalabu bu miele ya nvita, badi baludikila mei a bululu bu mikete," 
Psalms64:4 bua kuelau muntu mu musokoko udi kayi ne tshilumbu. Badi bamuelau lukasa kabayi batshina. 
Psalms64:5 Badi badikolesha mu bualu bubi buakuhangidishabo; badi bayikilangana bua kuteyabo ndende mu musokoko. Badi bamba ne, Watangila malu â nganyi?" 
Psalms64:6 Badi bahangidisha malu mabi, bamba ne, Tuakumana kuhanga tshihangu tshituakuhangila ne budimu. Meji adi munda ne mutshima bia muntu ne muntu bidi ndondo mule." 
Psalms64:7 Kadi Nzambi neabele mukete wandi; nebatahibue mputa lukasa. 
Psalms64:8 Ka nebabalenduishe, bualu bua ndimi yabo yakubahisha. Bantu bonso badi babatangila nebabakuhile mitu yabo." 
Psalms64:9 Bantu bonso nebatshine, nebambe mudimu udi Nzambi muenze, nebele meji bimpe bua bienzedi biakuenzeye." 
Psalms64:10 Bantu bakane nebasanke mu Yehowa, nebanyemene kudiye; bonso badi bakane mu mitshima yabo nebalumbile kudiye." 
Psalms65:1 Nzambi, kukutumbisha kudi kukuindila talalâ mu Siona; nebakushikishile wewe mitshihu." 
Psalms65:2 Wewe udi unvua milombu, bukua bantu bonso nebufike kûdi." 
Psalms65:3 Malu a dihambuka dianyi adi antamba bukole; wewe udi umbuikidila matomboka etu. 
Psalms65:4 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi usungula ne ûdi ufikisha hehi nʼebe, bua ashikame mu biendelu bia tshitendelelu tshiebe! Tuetu netuikale ne mitshima mitalale bua buimpe bua nsubu webe, ntempelo webe wa tshijila." 
Psalms65:5 Wewe utu witaba kutudi mu buakane ku bienzedi biebe bidi bikuatshilu bantu buowa, wewe Nzambi wa luhandu luetu, wewe ntshieyemenu tshia bonso ba kunfudilu kua buloba, ne tshia badi benda ha mai manene adi atamba kule." 
Psalms65:6 Wewe nyeye wakujadika mikuna ku bukole buebe, udi ne bukole bunyunguluka nseke yonso." 
Psalms65:7 Udi ukolesha tshiono tshia mai manene, ne tshiono tshia mavuala au, ne mutoyi wa bantu." 
Psalms65:8 Badi bashikame mu nseke ya kunfudilu kua buloba badi batshina hamonabo bimanyinu biebe. Wewe udi welesha dihatuka dia diba ne dibuela diadi mbila ya disanka. 
Psalms65:9 Udi ulua kumona buloba, udi ubulokeshila nvula, udi ubumeneshila bia kudia bia bungi, musulu wa Nzambi udi mule tente ne mai, udi ubakuamishila blé, bualu bua wakubulongolola nunku." 
Psalms65:10 Udi ulokeshila mikidi ya mabula nvula ya bungi, udi ulandakasha mabula, udi utekesha buloba ne nvula idi iloka bitekete, udi uvudishila bidi bimenamu disanka." 
Psalms65:11 Udi unyunguluka tshidimu tshia buimpe buebe ne tshifulu tshia butumbi; nshila yebe idi tente ne bia mu madimi ebe. 
Psalms65:12 Bidi bimata mu mpata idi imena mashinde, mikuna mihi idi minyunguluke ne disanka." 
Psalms65:13 Miaba idi mashinde idi miule tente ne bisumbu bia mikoko, bibanda bidi bidibuikile ne blé; bidi biela mbila ya disanka, bidi bimba misambu kabidi." 
Psalms66:1 Nuenu bonso ba ha buloba, nuelele Nzambi mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms66:2 Nuimbe bienu musambu udi ulesha butumbi bua dina diandi, numutumbishe ne ditumbisha dihite bunene." 
Psalms66:3 Nuambile Nzambi ne, Mona mudi bienzedi biebe bikuatshisha bantu buowa! Bualu bua bukole buebe budi bunene, badi nʼebe lukuna badi bakukokela ne lubombo." 
Psalms66:4 Ba ha buloba bonso nebakutendelele; nebakuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai; nebimbile dina diebe misambu. 
Psalms66:5 Luai, numone bienzedi bidi Nzambi muenze: udi ubakuatshisha buowa ne bienzedi bidiye wenza munkatshi mua bukua bantu." 
Psalms66:6 Wakandamuna mai manene bua kuluau buloba bûme; bantu bakahitshila mu musulu benda ku makasa. Tuakasankamu bua malu andi," 
Psalms66:7 Udi ukokesha bantu ku bukole buandi tshiendelele; mesu andi adi atentekela bisamba bia bantu — batombokedi kabadibandishi nansha. 
Psalms66:8 Nuenu bukua bantu, nuvudishile Nzambi wetu disanka; dî dinudi numutumbisha nʼadi diunvuike;" 
Psalms66:9 wakatulama bua tuikale munkatshi mua badi ne muoyo, ne kakitabusha makasa etu aselemuke." 
Psalms66:10 Bualu bua wewe Nzambi wakatuteta; wakatuteta bu mudibo bateta tshiamu tshia argent mu tshikutu tshia kahia. 
Psalms66:11 Wakatufikisha mu bukuondo; wakateka dikenga diakatunemeshila bujitu mu bifuka bietu. 
Psalms66:12 Wakitabusha bua bantu bende babande ha mitu hetu; tuakahitshila mu kahia ne mu mai. Kadi wakatuluhulamu bua tuetu kuikala mu muaha mukumbane. 
Psalms66:13 Nembuele mu nsubu muebe ne milambu ya kuosha ha kahia; nenfile mitshibu yanyi kûdi," 
Psalms66:14 yoyo yakamba mishiku yanyi, yakaditshiha mukana muanyi, hanakadi mu dikenga." 
Psalms66:15 Nenfile milambu ya mikoko idi ne manyi kûdi bu milambu ya kuosha ha kahia, ne dihembu dia muishi wa milambu ya bimpanga diatshimue nʼai. Nenfile milambu ya bana balume ba ngombe ne ya mbushi." 
Psalms66:16 Luai bienu, nunvue, nuenu bonso badi banemeka Nzambi, nennuambile malu akuenzeleye muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms66:17 Nakamuela dî dikole mukana muanyi, nakamutumbisha ne ludimi luanyi." 
Psalms66:18 Bu meme inulame malu mabi mu mutshima wanyi, Mukelenge kakadi kungunvuila." 
Psalms66:19 Kadi bulelela, Nzambi wakangunvuila; wakateleja matshu ku dî dia kulomba kuanyi." 
Psalms66:20 Nzambi avudishibue disanka, udi kayi musesuishe mei a kulomba kuanyi, udi kayi mungumushile luse luandi lujalame!" 
Psalms67:1 Nzambi atufuile luse, atuvudishile disanka, atemeshe munya wa mpala wandi kutudi;" 
Psalms67:2 bua nshila webe amanyibue ha buloba, ne luhandu luebe lumanyibue munkatshi mua bisamba bionso bia bantu." 
Psalms67:3 Nzambi, ba ha buloba bakutumbishe; ba ha buloba bonso bakutumbishe." 
Psalms67:4 Ba mu bisamba bia bantu bikale ne disanka, bimbe biabo misambu bua disanka diabo, bualu bua wewe udi ulumbuluisha bantu ne kulumbulula kuakane, udi ulombola bisamba bia bantu ha buloba." 
Psalms67:5 Nzambi, ba ha buloba bakutumbishe, ba ha buloba bonso bakutumbishe." 
Psalms67:6 Buloba buakukuamisha bintu biabu bivule; Nzambi, Nzambi wetu mene, neatuvudishile disanka." 
Psalms67:7 Nzambi neatuvudishile disanka, ne bonso ba kunfudilu kua buloba nebamutshine!" 
Psalms68:1 Nzambi ajuke, badi nʼandi lukuna bamuangalashibue; bonso badi nʼandi lukuna banyeme ku mpala kuandi." 
Psalms68:2 Bu mudi luhehele lumuangalasha muishi, wewe ubihata; bu mudi dihula dienguluka ku luya lua kahia, bantu babi bajimine ku mpala kua Nzambi muomumue." 
Psalms68:3 Kadi bantu bakane bikale ne disanka, balumbile ku mpala kua Nzambi; e, basanke bikole mu disanka diabo." 
Psalms68:4 Imbilai Nzambi misambu, imbidilai dina diandi misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai. Buwai nshila bualu bua yeye ulualua kuhita mu bihela; dina diandi nYehowa; tumbilai bienu ku mpala kuandi." 
Psalms68:5 Mu muaba wandi wa tshijila mudiye mushikame mudi Nzambi, tatu wa bana ba nshiya ne mulumbuluidi wa bakashi ba mu lufuila." 
Psalms68:6 Nzambi udi uhesha bantu bashiya hatuhu nsubu bua bobo bashikamemu, udi uluhula bena lukanu, udi ubaha diakalengele; kadi badi bamutombokela badi bashikame mu buloba bûme budi munya wosha." 
Psalms68:7 Nzambi, hawakaluhuka bua kuya ku mpala kua bantu bebe, hawakenda uhitshila mu tshihela," 
Psalms68:8 buloba buakazakala, matutu a mu diulu akalokesha nvula hakamuenekau ku mesu kua Nzambi. Sinai au wakakanka ku mesu kua Nzambi, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
Psalms68:9 Wewe, Nzambi, wakalokesha nvula ya bungi; wakakankamasha ba mu buhianyi buebe hakambabo kuhungila." 
Psalms68:10 Tshisumbu tshia bantu bebe tshiakashikama mu buloba abu; bualu bua buimpe buebe, Nzambi, wewe wakasubula bahele." 
Psalms68:11 Mukelenge udi wamba dî diandi, bakashi badi bambila bantu lumu elu badi tshisumbu tshinene, bamba ne," 
Psalms68:12 Bakelenge ba misumba ya masalayi badi banyema, badi banyema! Bakashi badi bashala mu nsubu yabo badi babanyangana bintu binyengibue mu nvita." 
Psalms68:13 Nenulale munkatshi mua mpangu ya mikoko, bu mahuahua a nyunyu wa nkutshi adi mabuikidibue ne tshiamu tshia argent, ne masala andi mabuikidibue ne or mukunze." 
Psalms68:14 Hakamuangalasha Nzambi Mutambe Bunene bakalenge mu buloba abu, neige wakamata ha Salemona." 
Psalms68:15 Wewe, mukuna wa Nzambi, mukuna wa Bashana; mukuna udi ne mitu ya bungi, mukuna wa Bashana!" 
Psalms68:16 Munyi mûdi ne mukau, wewe mukuna udi ne mitu ya bungi, hawamona mukuna udi Nzambi musue bu muaba wandi wa kushikamahu? E, Yehowa neashikamehu tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms68:17 Makalu a nvita a Nzambi adi binunu makumi abidi, adi binunu ha mutu ha binunu mene. Mukelenge udi munkatshi muau; ku Sinai udi mu muaba wandi wa tshijila." 
Psalms68:18 Wewe wakubanda mulu, wakuyamu ukoka bantu bawakukuata mu nvita ku nyima kuebe; wakuangata maha munkatshi mua bantu; e, wakuângata kabidi munkatshi mua badi bakutombokela, bua Yehowa Nzambi ashikameku." 
Psalms68:19 Mukelenge avudishibue disanka, udi ututuadila bujitu buetu ku dituku ku dituku; Nzambi mene udi luhandu luetu." 
Psalms68:20 Nzambi udi Nzambi wa luhandu kutudi, ne kudi Yehowa Mukelenge kudi kufuma kuhanduka ku lufu." 
Psalms68:21 Kadi Nzambi neahande mitu ya bena lukuna bandi bihesa, neahande lubombo lua mutu ludi ne nsuki ya bungi lua muntu udi unanukila kuenda mu bubi buandi." 
Psalms68:22 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Nempinganeku kabidi ne bandi ngumusha mu Bashana, nempinganeku kabidi ne bandi mpatula mu ndondo wa mu mai manene;" 
Psalms68:23 bua wewe Umanye mua kudiatshisha makasa ebe mu mashi, bua ndimi ya mbua yebe ikale ne tshituha tshiai tshia mashi a badi nʼebe lukuna." 
Psalms68:24 Nzambi, bantu bebe bakutangila ngendu yebe, bakutangila ngendu ya Nzambi, Mukelenge wanyi, hakubueleye mu muaba wandi wa tshijila." 
Psalms68:25 Bimbi ba misambu badi badianjila ku mpala, bimbi ba bisanji badi babalonda ku nyima, ne hankatshi habo hadi bansongakashi bimba biabo makasa:" 
Psalms68:26 Bimba ne, Vudishilai Nzambi disanka mu masangisha a bantu; vudishilai Mukelenge disanka, nuenu mushimi wa mai wa Bena Isalele." 
Psalms68:27 Ka Benyamina mukese udiku, mukokeshi wabo; bakokeshi ba Yuda mu tshisumbu tshiabo tshinene, bakokeshi ba Zebuluna ne bakokeshi ba Nafatale badiku." 
Psalms68:28 Nzambi, lesha bukole buebe; Nzambi, jadika malu awakuenza bualu buetu." 
Psalms68:29 Bualu bua ntempelo webe wa mu Yelushalema bakelenge nebalue ne maha abo kûdi. 
Psalms68:30 Ubele biebe nyama ya munkatshi mua ntuhu, ubele tshisumbu tshia balume ba ngombe diatshimue ne bana ba ngombe ba bantu. Udiate bantu aba muinshi mua makasa ebe badi balua kukokela kûdi ne bituha bia tshiamu tshia argent. Umuangalashe bantu badi basanka bua kuluangana nvita." 
Psalms68:31 Bantu banene badi bafume ku Ejipitu, Atiopa udi udiendesha lukasa bua kuololeye bianza biandi kudi Nzambi." 
Psalms68:32 Nuenu ba mu makelenge a ha buloba, nuimbile Nzambi musambu; nuimbile Mukelenge misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms68:33 Nuimbile udi wenda mubande ha mutu ha diulu misambu, ha diulu mene diakadiku kale kale. Monai, udi wela dî diandi, dî diandi dikole mene." 
Psalms68:34 Leshai bantu ne, Nzambi udi ne bukole. Buneme buandi budi ha mutu ha Bena Isalele, ne bukole buandi budi mu diulu." 
Psalms68:35 Wewe Nzambi, udi ukuatshisha bantu buowa ne malu a ku miaba yebe ya tshijila, Nzambi wa Isalele, yeye udi uhesha bantu bandi bukole ne mukanda. Nzambi avudishibue disanka." 
Psalms69:1 Nzambi, usungile! Bualu hua mai akûla to ne mu muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms69:2 Ndi mpueka mu lunteke ludi kaluyi ne muaba wa meme kuimana. Nakafika mu mai a dilembue, mudi mai mashilangane adi ahita ha mutu hanyi." 
Psalms69:3 Ndi muhungile bualu bua kudila kuanyi, mununu wanyi wakûma bikole. Mesu anyi adi ne bileshileshi bua kuindila kua Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms69:4 Badi nʼanyi lukuna kabayi mua kumbanda ne tshilumbu badi bahita nsuki ya ku mutu wanyi bungi. Badi basue kumbutula badi bakole, bikale bena lukuna banyi anu bua mashimi. Tshinakadi tshiyi munyenge ntshindi ne bua kuhingasha." 
Psalms69:5 Nzambi, wewe udi mumanye buhote buanyi; malu mabi anyi kaena masokokibue ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms69:6 Kuitabushi bua badi bakutekemena bafuishibue bundu bua bualu buanyi, Mukelenge Yehowa wa misumba. Kuitabushi bua badi bakukeba bakeheshibue bua bualu buanyi, Nzambi wa Isalele." 
Psalms69:7 Bualu bua nakuitabusha bihendu bua bualu buebe, bundu buakunkuata ku mesu." 
Psalms69:8 Nakulua muenyi kudi bana betu, ne mulungidi kudi bana ba mamu wanyi." 
Psalms69:9 Lukunukunu lua ku nsubu webe luakundia, luakummana, ne bihendu bia bantu bakukuhenda biakuhona hamʼbidi banyi." 
Psalms69:10 Hanakanyingalasha muoyo wanyi ne kujila kua bia kudia, bualu ebu buakalua tshihendu kundi." 
Psalms69:11 Hanakavuisha bilulu bikayabala bivualu bianyi, nakalua bu lusumuinu kudibo." 
Psalms69:12 Badi bashikama mu tshibuelelu tshia ku musoko badi bayikilangana bualu buanyi; bakuatshiki ba maluvu badi bimba misambu bualu buanyi. 
Psalms69:13 Kadi meme hanyi, Yehowa, nenkutendelele ne mulombu wanyi. Mu tshikondo tshidi tshiakane ku mesu kuebe, Nzambi, mu kukumbana kua luse luebe lujalame, witabe kundi ne luhandu luebe ludi mua kueyemenyibua." 
Psalms69:14 Umpatule mu lunteke bua meme tshidinyimu, umpandishe mu bianza bia badi nʼanyi lukuna, umpatule mu mai a dilembue." 
Psalms69:15 Kuitabushi bua mai adi atuntumuka ahite ha mutu hanyi, kuitabushi bua ndondo wa mai ammine; Dijimba dia Bafue kadijibiki mukana muanyi ha mutu hanyi." 
Psalms69:16 Yehowa, witabe kundi, bualu bua luse luebe lujalame ludi luakane; bu mudi divulangana dia luse luebe, ukudimuke kundi." 
Psalms69:17 Kusokoki muntu webe mpala webe; bualu bua ndi mu dikenga, witabe kundi lukasa." 
Psalms69:18 Usemene ha buihi ne muoyo wanyi, ûhikule; umpikule bua bena lukuna banyi." 
Psalms69:19 Wewe udi mumanye bu mudibo bampenda, udi mumanye mudibo banfuisha bundu, ne mudibo bakebesha; bonso badi nʼanyi lukuna badi bamanyibue kudi." 
Psalms69:20 Bihendu biakutamba kubanda mutshima wanyi, dinyingalala diakuntonda. Nakatekemena ne, Muntu neanfuile luse, kadi kakadiku; nakatekemena ne, Basambi nebamueneke, kadi tshiakasangana nansha umue." 
Psalms69:21 Bakumpa bintu bia nyongangandu mu bia kudia bianyi; bua kutalasha nyota yanyi bakannuisha nyinyo wakadi ne buanji. 
Psalms69:22 Mesa adibo nʼau ku mpala kuabo andamuke, alue muba kudibo; hadibo bashikama mu ditalala, alue bukuondo kudibo." 
Psalms69:23 Mesu abo ikale ne bileshileshi, hua kâmonyi, ukankishe bifuka biabo bua kabilekedi kukanka." 
Psalms69:24 Uhumune tshiji tshiebe hamʼbidi habo, ditema dia tshiji tshiebe tshikole difike kudibo, dibakuate." 
Psalms69:25 Tshitudilu tshiabo tshilue muaba wa dibutuka; muntu kashikama mu nsubu yabo ya ntenta. 
Psalms69:26 Bualu bua badi bakengesha muntu uwakukuma; badi bambila bantu bua dikenga dia bawakutaha mputa. 
Psalms69:27 Utenteke tshishiku ha mutu ha tshishiku tshidibo nʼatshi, kabafiki ku buakane buebe." 
Psalms69:28 Mena abo ajimishibue mu mukanda wa muoyo, kabafundibu hohamue ne mena a bantu bakane." 
Psalms69:29 Kadi meme hanyi ndi ne diakabi, ndi ne dikenga; luhandu luebe, Nzambi, lumbandishe kulu!" 
Psalms69:30 Nentumbishe dina dia Nzambi ne musambu, nemmunemeke ne kusakidila kuanyi." 
Psalms69:31 Bualu ebu nebusankishe Yehowa ne disanka dihite dia kufila kua ngombe, anyi diodi dia difila dia mulume wa ngombe udi ne nsengu ne bikono." 
Psalms69:32 Bantu bahuekele bakatangila bualu ebu, bakasanka. Nuenu badi bakeba Nzambi, mitshima yenu ikale ne muoyo kabidi." 
Psalms69:33 Bualu bua Yehowa udi unvua dî dia badi bakengela bintu, kena uhetula bantu bandi badi bakuatshibue mu nkanu." 
Psalms69:34 Diulu ne buloba bimutumbishe, mai manene ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshiendakanamu bimutumbishe." 
Psalms69:35 Bualu bua Nzambi neasungile Siona, nease misoko ya mu Yuda kabidi; bantu bandi nebashikamemu, nebikale nʼandi bu musoko wabo." 
Psalms69:36 Bana ba bantu bandi nebauhiane, ne badi bananga dina diandi nebashikamemu." 
Psalms70:1 Nzambi, wikale ne disanka bua kumpandisha, Yehowa, ulue lukasa bua kunkuatshisha." 
Psalms70:2 Badi bakeba muoyo wanyi, bafuishibue bundu ne babuandakashibue. Badi basanka bua kungenzela bibi, balukishibue tshianyima, bakeheshibue." 
Psalms70:3 Badi bamba ne, Eyo, eyo, balukishibue tshianyima bualu bua bundu budi bubakuata." 
Psalms70:4 Bonso badi bakukeba basanke ne bikale ne disanka bua bualu buebe! Bonso badi bananga luhandu luebe bambe matuku onso ne, Nzambi atumbishibue!" 
Psalms70:5 Kadi meme hanyi ndi muntu muhele, ne mukengedi; Nzambi, ulue kundi lukasa! Wewe udi mukuatshishi wanyi ne musungidi wanyi; Yehowa, kujanguluki nansha!" 
Psalms71:1 Yehowa, ndi nyemena kudi; kabanfuishi bundu ku mesu tshiendelele!" 
Psalms71:2 Bualu bua buakane buebe umpandishe, usungile; teleja matshu ebe kundi; unsungile." 
Psalms71:3 Wikale kundi bu dibue dia meme kushikamahu, dia meme kunyemena kabidi matuku onso. Wewe wakuela mukenji webe ne, Bamusungile; bualu bua udi dibue dianyi ne musoko wanyi wa ngumbu ya nvita." 
Psalms71:4 Nzambi wanyi, unsungile mu bianza bia muntu mubi, unsungile mu tshianza tshiakunkuata tshia muntu udi muenji wa malu mabi ne muena tshinyangu." 
Psalms71:5 Bualu bua wewe, Mukelenge Yehowa, udi ditekemena dianyi; udi tshieyemenu tshianyi ku buana buanyi to ne katataka." 
Psalms71:6 Kûdi wewe mene nkundi mushindame katshia bandela, wewe nyeye wakumpatula munda mua mamu wanyi. Kutumbisha kuanyi kudi bua bualu buebe matuku onso." 
Psalms71:7 Ndi bu muntu udi ukemesha ba bungi; kadi wewe udi tshinyemenu tshianyi tshikole. 
Psalms71:8 Mukana muanyi mudi mûle tente ne butumbi buebe ne buneme buebe dinda tô ne ku dilolo. 
Psalms71:9 Kungumushi kûdi mu tshikondo tshia bununu buanyi; kunshiyi hatuhu hahanga bukole buanyi. 
Psalms71:10 Bualu bua badi nʼanyi lukuna badi bambilangana bualu buanyi, ne badi batentekela muoyo wanyi badi bela tshifufu." 
Psalms71:11 Badi bamba ne, Nzambi wakunulekela; numuihate, numukuate, bualu bua kakuena muntu wa kumuhandisha." 
Psalms71:12 Nzambi, kuikadi nʼanyi kule; wewe Nzambi wanyi, endesha lubilu bua kunkuatshisha." 
Psalms71:13 Badi ne muoyo wanyi lukuna bafuishibue bundu, bajimishibue; badi bakeba kungenzela bibi baluatshishibue bundu ne dikeheshibua." 
Psalms71:14 Kadi meme hanyi nengikale ne ditekemena misangu yonso, nennanukile kukutumbisha musangu ne musangu." 
Psalms71:15 Mukana muanyi nemuambile bantu bua bienzedi bia buakane buebe, nembambile bua malu a luhandu luebe dinda tô ne ku dilolo; bualu bua tshiena mumanye bungi buabi." 
Psalms71:16 Nendue ne mei bua bienzedi binene bia Mukelenge Yehowa, nengambile bantu bua buakane buebe, bua buakane buebe nkayabu." 
Psalms71:17 Nzambi, wewe wakunyisha ku buana buanyi tô ne mpindiu; tô ne mpindiu utshidi ngambila bantu bua bienzedi biebe bia kukema." 
Psalms71:18 Nzambi, kundekedi nansha, tô ne ku bununu buanyi ne hangikala ne nvi; kundekedi tô ne bangambila ba mu tshikondo tshialua bua tshianza tshiebe tshikole, ne hangambila badi bandonda ku nyima bua bukole buebe." 
Psalms71:19 Nzambi, buakane buebe budi bufika tô ne kulu. Wewe wakuenza malu manene, Nzambi, udi bu wewe nganyi?" 
Psalms71:20 Wewe wakundesha makenga makole a bungi neunsangashe kabidi, neumpatule kabidi mu ndondo wa mu buloba." 
Psalms71:21 Uvudishe buneme buanyi, uhingane kabidi kundi, unsambe." 
Psalms71:22 Nenkutumbishe kabidi ne lunzenze, nentumbishe lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa, Nzambi wanyi; nenkuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai ne lunkombe, wewe wa Tshijila wa Isalele." 
Psalms71:23 Mishiku yanyi neyele mbila ya disanka hanakuimbila misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai, ne muoyo wanyi uwakuhikula nenkutumbishe muomumue." 
Psalms71:24 Ludimi luanyi neluambile bantu bua buakane buebe mu kulumbulula dinda tô ne ku dilolo; bualu bua bakadi bakeba kungenzela bibi bakufuishibua bundu, bakutamuka." 
Psalms72:1 Wewe Nzambi, uheshe mukelenge kulumbulula kuebe kuakane, uheshe muana wa mukelenge buakane buebe." 
Psalms72:2 Yeye nealumbuluishe bantu bebe ne buakane, nealumbuluishe bantu bebe bahele ne kulumbulula kuakane." 
Psalms72:3 Mikuna mile neyivuishile bantu ditalala, mikuna mihi neyibavuishiledi bua buakane buebe." 
Psalms72:4 Yeye nealumbuluile bahele bilumbu biabo, neasungile bana ba badi bakengela bintu, neatshibule mukengeshi wabo bituha bituha." 
Psalms72:5 Bantu nebakutshine hatshidi diba ditema, ne hatshidi ngondo ukenka, tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms72:6 Yeye neikale bu nvula udi uloka ha mashinde makoshibue, neikale bu nvula ya tunsense idi imiamina mai ha buloba." 
Psalms72:7 Mu matuku andi bantu bakane nebikale ne diakalengele, ditalala divule nedikaleku tô ne hajimina ngondo tshiendelele." 
Psalms72:8 Yeye neikale ne bukokeshi ku mai manene tô ne ku mai manene makuabo, ne ku Musulu wa Pelata tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Psalms72:9 Badi bashikame mu tshihela nebinyike mitu yabo ku mpala kuandi, ne badi nʼandi lukuna nebalake biabo dinfuenkenya dia buloba." 
Psalms72:10 Bakelenge ba mu Tâshishi ne ba mu bisanga bia mai manene nebafile milambu kudiye; bukelenge ba mu Sheba ne ba mu Seba nebalue ne maha abo kudiye. 
Psalms72:11 E, bakelenge bonso bamukukuile, ba mu bisamba bionso bia bantu bamukuatshile mudimu." 
Psalms72:12 Bualu bua neahandishe mukengedi wa bintu hadileye kudiye, neabandishe muntu muhele udi kayi ne mukuatshishi." 
Psalms72:13 Neafuile udi mutekete ne udi ukengela dikuatshisha luse, neasungile mioyo ya bakengedi." 
Psalms72:14 Neuhikule mioyo yabo ku tshinyangu ne malu makole, ne mashi abo neikale tshintu tshia mushinga mukole ku mesu kuandi." 
Psalms72:15 Yeye ikale ne muoyo, bamuhe bituha bia or wa ku Sheba; bamulombele Nzambi mafuku onso, bamuvudishile disanka dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Psalms72:16 Blé ikale mivule ha buloba, tô ne ha mitu ha mikuna, miehu yai ihehe bu mudi mitshi ya mu Lebanona iheha. Bantu bavulangane mu musoko, badiunde bu mudi mashinde a ha buloba adiunda." 
Psalms72:17 Dina diandi nedishaleku tshiendelele! Dina diandi netushale kudi tunkanunuma tuandi hatshidi diba ditema. Bantu nebadivudishile disanka mu bualu buandi; bisamba bionso bia bantu nebimubikile ne, Udi ne disanka." 
Psalms72:18 Yehowa Nzambi, Nzambi wa Isalele, avudishibue disanka, anu yeye nkayandi udi wenza malu a kukema." 
Psalms72:19 Dina diandi dia butumbi divudishibue disanka tshiendelele; buloba bujima bûshibue tente ne butumbi buandi. Amen ne Amen. 
Psalms72:20 Mitendelelu ya Davidi, muana wa Yishai, yakuhua." 
Psalms73:1 Bulelela, Nzambi udi muimpe mu bienzedi biandi kudi Bena Isalele, kudi badi ne mitshima mitoke." 
Psalms73:2 Kadi mbu mundi ngamba bualu buanyi, makasa anyi akamba kusesuka kaba kabalê; biendedi bianyi biakamba kuselemuka." 
Psalms73:3 Bualu bua nakadi mukuatshile bantu badi badisue mukau, hanakatangila diakalengele dia bantu babi." 
Psalms73:4 Bualu bua kabena ne kanyinganyinga ha kufua kuabo; kadi bukole buabo butshidi bukandamane. 
Psalms73:5 Kabena habo ne makenga adi bantu bakuabo nʼau, kabena bakengeshibua bu mudi banga bantu." 
Psalms73:6 Nunku kudisua kudi bu lukanu ludi lujingila mu nshingu yabo, tshimbambila tshidi tshibabuikila bu tshitalu." 
Psalms73:7 Mesu abo adi atuntumuka bualu bua mafuta abo, bintu bidibo nʼabi bidi bihita bidi mitshima yabo misue." 
Psalms73:8 Badi babuidia bantu, mu bubi buabo badi bamba mei a kukengesha nʼai bakuabo; badi bakula badibandisha." 
Psalms73:9 Badi babandisha mei a mukana muabo tô ne mulu, ndimi yabo idi yendakana ha buloba." 
Psalms73:10 Bua malu â bantu bandi badi bahingana kudibo; badi banua mai mavule, bâmane tô ne bishikishiki biau." 
Psalms73:11 Badi bamba ne, Nzambi udi mumanye munyi? Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu udi ne lungenyi, anyi?" 
Psalms73:12 Monai, aba mbantu babi; ne badi kabayi ne ntatu matuku onso, badi bavudisha biuma biabo." 
Psalms73:13 Bulelela, nakalengesha mutshima wanyi hatuhu, nakôwa bianza bianyi hanakadi tshiyi ne tshilumbu." 
Psalms73:14 Bualu bua dinda tô ne ku dilolo nakukumibua, nakukengeshibua ku dinda ne ku dinda." 
Psalms73:15 Bu meme muambe ne, Nengakule nunku, monai, nakadi kutungila ba mu mulongo wa bana bebe tshitungu." 
Psalms73:16 Hanakela meji bua kumanya bualu ebu, buakuhita kunkengesha," 
Psalms73:17 tô ne hanakabuela mu muaba wa tshijila wa Nzambi, ne nakelanganamu meji a kunshikidilu kuabo." 
Psalms73:18 Bulelela, wewe udi ubateka mu miaba ya busenu; wewe udi ubela hanshi mu dibutuka" 
Psalms73:19 Mona mudibo babutuke kabutu mu katuha ka diba! Badi bajimishibue tshiendelele ku buowa bua bungi. 
Psalms73:20 Bu mudi bualu bua tshilota hatabala muntu, nunku, Mukelenge, hawabika, neulengulule binfuanyi biabo." 
Psalms73:21 Bualu bua mutshima wanyi wakadi unyingalala bikole, ne bualu bua nakadi mutahike munda muanyi," 
Psalms73:22 nakadi mujibale, tshiyi ne lungenyi, nakadi bu nyama ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms73:23 Kadi ntu ngikala nʼebe mafuku onso; wewe udi mikuata ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume. 
Psalms73:24 Wewe neundombole ne meji ebe, hashishe, neumbueshe mu butumbi." 
Psalms73:25 Ndi ne nganyi mu diulu anu wewe nkayebe? Kakuena mukuabo ha buloba undi musue anu wewe. 
Psalms73:26 Mubidi wanyi ne mutshima wanyi bidi bihanga, kadi Nzambi udi dibue dia mutshima wanyi ne buhianyi buanyi tshiendelele." 
Psalms73:27 Bua mona, badi nʼebe kule nebajimine. Wewe wakubutula bonso badi bakulekela bua kulondabo malu a masandi." 
Psalms73:28 Kadi bidi bimpe bua meme kusemena ha buihi ne Nzambi. Nakuvuisha Mukelenge Yehowa tshinyemenu tshianyi, bua mmanye bianyi mua kuambila bantu bua midimu yebe yonso." 
Psalms74:1 Wewe Nzambi, bualu kai wakutubenga tshiendelele? Tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshihatuila mikoko ya mu tshidilu tshiebe tshidi ne mashinde muishi wa kahia bua tshinyi?" 
Psalms74:2 Uvuluke tshisumbu tshia bantu bebe bawakangata kule, bawakahikula bua kuikalabo tshisamba tshia buhianyi buebe. Uvuluke mukuna wa Siona mûdi wewe mushikamemu." 
Psalms74:3 Ambula makasa ebe bua kuya ku miaba yakubutuka tshiendelele; malu mabi onso akenza muena lukuna mu muaba webe wa tshijila. 
Psalms74:4 Badi nʼebe lukuna bakuela Mbingu munkatshi mua muaba wa tshisambakenu tshiebe. Bakushimikamu mabendele abo bobo bu bimanyinu. 
Psalms74:5 Bakamueneka bu bantu badi bahisha bisui bua kutaha nʼabi tshihuka. 
Psalms74:6 Mpindiu badi batshibula mabaya onso adi ne bifuanyikishi bisongahu, bâshimbula ne tusui ne marteaux." 
Psalms74:7 Bakosha tshitendelelu tshiebe ne kahia, bakanyanga muaba wa kuikala wa dina diebe, bakatshishimbula hanshi ha buloba." 
Psalms74:8 Bakamba mu mitshima yabo ne, Tubanyange, buonso buabo diatshimue. Bakosha miaba yonso ya bisambakenu bia Nzambi bidi ha buloba." 
Psalms74:9 Katuena tumona bimanyinu bietu; kakuenaku muprofete kabidi, ne kakuena muntu munkatshi muetu udi mumanye bule bua tshikondo tshia bualu ebu." 
Psalms74:10 Nzambi, muena lukuna neakubuidie musangu bule bishi? Muena lukuna neahende dina diebe tshiendelele, anyi?" 
Psalms74:11 Udi ukanda tshianza tshiebe, tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole mene bua tshinyi? Utshihatule mu tshiadi tshiebe, ubabutule." 
Psalms74:12 Kadi Nzambi udi Mukelenge wanyi wa kale tô ne mpindiu, udi wenza malu a luhandu munkatshi mua ba ha buloba." 
Psalms74:13 Wewe muine wakahandulula mai manene ku bukole buebe, wakatshibula mitu ya nyama minene ya mu mai manene." 
Psalms74:14 Wakabela mitu ya Léviathan, wakamuha bu bia kudia kudi bantu badi bashikame mu tshihela." 
Psalms74:15 Wakahanda nshila bua mishimi ya mai ne tusulu bihuekelemu, wakabaluisha misulu yakadi ihueka misangu yonso." 
Psalms74:16 Munya udi webe, bufuku budi buebe kabidi; wewe wakajadika bia mu diulu bidi bikenka ne diba kabidi." 
Psalms74:17 Wewe wakahanda mikalu yonso ya buloba, wakafuka tshidimu tshia munya ne tshia mashika." 
Psalms74:18 Yehowa, uvuluke bualu ebu ne, Muena lukuna wakukuhenda, ne bantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi bakuhetula dina diebe." 
Psalms74:19 Kufidi muoyo wa nyunyu webe wa nkutshi kudi nyama wa luonji, kuhu muoyo tshiendelele bua bantu bebe ba bungi badi mu dikenga." 
Psalms74:20 Utangile tshihungidi tshiebe bimpe; bualu bua miaba ya mu midima ya mu buloba idi miule tente ne bisokomenu bia bena tshimbambila. 
Psalms74:21 Kuitabushi bua badi badiatshishibue muinshi mua makasa a bantu bahingane ku nyima bafuishibue bundu. Bahele ne badi bakengela bintu batumbishe dina diebe. 
Psalms74:22 Juka biebe, Nzambi, udiakuile bualu buebe; uvuluke mudi bantu badi kabayi ne meji bakuhenda matuku onso." 
Psalms74:23 Kuhu di dia bena lukuna bebe muoyo; mutoyi wa badi bakutombokela utu wabanda kulu matuku onso. 
Psalms75:1 Tudi tukusakidila, Nzambi, tudi tukusakidila; dina diebe didi ha buihi, tudi tuamba bienzedi biebe bia kukema." 
Psalms75:2 Hanafika ku tshikondo tshinakusungula, meme muine nendumbuluishe bantu ne kulumbulula kuakane." 
Psalms75:3 Hafingatuka buloba ne bantu bonso badi bashikamemu, meme muine ndi njadika makunshi abu." 
Psalms75:4 Ndi neambila badi ne diambu ne, Kanuikadi ne diambu; ndi ngambila bantu babi ne, Kanuambudi lusengu luenu mulu;" 
Psalms75:5 Kanuambudi lusengu luenu mulu, kanuambi mei a dikamakama ne nshingu yenu nutantamane." 
Psalms75:6 Bualu bua kubandisha kua muntu kakuena kufuma ku esete anyi ku wesete anyi ku tshihela. 
Psalms75:7 Kadi Nzambi nyeye udi mulumbuluishi; udi uhuekesha munga muntu, udi ubandisha mukuabo." 
Psalms75:8 Bualu bua mu tshianza tshia Yehowa mudi luhanza ne maluvu adi alulukamu; ludi lûle tente ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe bisangisha ne maluvu, ne yeye udi uhumunamu tshituha tshialu. Bulelela, bantu babi bonso ba ha buloba nebanuemu tô ne bishikishiki bialu, nebabinue kabidi." 
Psalms75:9 Kadi meme hanyi nengambe butumbi buebe tshiendelele, nengimbile Nzambi wa Yakoba misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms75:10 Nenkose nsengu yonso ya bantu babi, nenyumushe; kadi nsengu ya bantu bakane neyibandishibue." 
Psalms76:1 Badi bamanye Nzambi mu Yuda, dina diandi didi dinene mu Isalele." 
Psalms76:2 Mu Salema kabidi mudi nsubu wandi wa ntenta mushimikibue, ne muaba wandi wa kuikala udi mu Siona." 
Psalms76:3 Mu muaba au yeye wakatshibula mikete yakadi mu mata ne ngabu ne muele wa nvita ne bielelu bia nvita. 
Psalms76:4 Wewe udi ne butumbi, udi ne buneme buhite mikuna ya banyengi ba bintu binene." 
Psalms76:5 Bena mitshima nutantamane bakulua bu bintu bia kunyenga; bakumana kulala mu tulu tuabo; bena bukitu aba kabakadi ne bukole mu bianza biabo. 
Psalms76:6 Bua kubela kuebe, Nzambi wa Yakoba, muena dikalu dia nvita ne kabalu kadi biakuedibua mu tulu tua kashendende." 
Psalms76:7 Wewe, wewe hebe, udi ukuatshisha bantu buowa; nganyi udi mumanye mua kuimana ku mpala kuebe hawakuata tshiji?" 
Psalms76:8 Wewe wakunvuisha bantu dikosa diebe dia bilumbu difuma mu diulu; buloba buakatshina, buakahuwa talalâ," 
Psalms76:9 bakajuka Nzambi bua kulumbululeye bilumbu, bua kusungileye bahuekele bonso ba ha buloba." 
Psalms76:10 Bulelela, tshiji tshia bantu netshikutumbishe; wewe neudiluatshishe ne tshiji tshidi tshishala." 
Psalms76:11 Uditshihe kudi Yehowa Nzambi webe mitshihu yebe, umufutai; bonso badi bamunyunguluke balue ne maha abo kudi udibo ne bua kutshina;" 
Psalms76:12 udi ukanda kudisua kua bakokeshi, udi ukuatshisha bakelenge ba ha buloba buowa." 
Psalms77:1 Neudile kudi Nzambi ne dî dikole, nendile ne dî dikole kudi Nzambi, ne yeye neateleshe matshu andi kundi." 
Psalms77:2 Mu dituku dia makenga anyi nakakeba Mukelenge. Tshianza tshianyi tshiakadi tshiolola kudiye butuku katshiyi tshihange; muoyo wanyi wakabenga kusambibua. 
Psalms77:3 Ndi nvuluka Nzambi, ndi ntua mikemu; ndi ngelangana meji munda muanyi, nyuma wanyi udi uhanga." 
Psalms77:4 Wewe udi ukuata bilafinyi bia mesu anyi bua ashale matabale; ndi ntata tô ne handi tshiyi mumanye mua kuamba dî. 
Psalms77:5 Nakuelangana meji bua matuku a kale, ne bua bidimu bia bikondo bia diambedimbedi." 
Psalms77:6 Ndi nvuluka musambu unakimba butuku; ndi ngelangana meji mu mutshima wanyi muine; ne nyuma wanyi udi unanukila kukeba mua kujingulula malu. 
Psalms77:7 Mukelenge neabenge tshiendelele, anyi? Kena wikala ne diakalengele kabidi, anyi?" 
Psalms77:8 Luse luandi lujalame luakumana kuhuwa tshiendelele, anyi? Mulayi wandi wakuhanga tshiendelele, anyi?" 
Psalms77:9 Nzambi wakuhua muoyo bua kutufuileye luse luandi, anyi? Wakujibika luse luandi bualu bua udi ne tshiji, anyi?" 
Psalms77:10 Ndi ngamba ne, Ebu mbualu budi busamisha mutshima wanyi ne, Tshianza tshia bukole tshia Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu tshiakukudimuka." 
Psalms77:11 Nentele bienzedi bia Yehowa, bualu bua nenvuluke malu ebe a kukema awakenza kale." 
Psalms77:12 Nengelangane meji a mudimu webe wonso, nengelangane meji munda muanyi a bienzedi biebe." 
Psalms77:13 Nzambi, nshila webe udi wa tshijila. Nzambi kai udi munene bu mudi Nzambi wetu?" 
Psalms77:14 Wewe udi Nzambi udi wenza malu a kukema; wewe wakumuenesha bukole buebe munkatshi mua bantu. 
Psalms77:15 Wewe wakuhikula bantu bebe ne diboko diebe, bana ba Yakoba ne bana ba Yosefe." 
Psalms77:16 Nzambi, mai akakutangila; mai akakutangila, akakuatshika buowa; e, ndondo wa mai wakakanka kabidi." 
Psalms77:17 Matutu akahumuna mai; diulu diakatuma mukungulu; mikete yebe yakendakana kuonso. 
Psalms77:18 Dî dia mukungulu webe wa nvula diakadi mu nvunde, miele yebe ya nvula yakahenyina ba ha buloba. Buloba buakakanka, buakazakala." 
Psalms77:19 Nshila webe wakadi mu mai manene, nshila yebe yakahita mu mai matambe bukole; ne biendedi biebe kabiakamanyibua." 
Psalms77:20 Wakalombela bantu bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko, ku tshianza tshia Mose ne tshia Alona." 
Psalms78:1 Nuenu bantu banyi, telejai matshu enu kudi diyisha dia mikenji yanyi; telejai matshu enu ku mei adi ahatuka mukana muanyi." 
Psalms78:2 Nembulule mukana muanyi bua kunuelela lusumuinu; nennuambile malu masokome akadiku kale. 
Psalms78:3 Mmalu atuakunvua, atuakumanya, ne akutuambila batatu betu." 
Psalms78:4 Katuena tusokokela bana babo baledibue malu â; netuambile ba mu tshikondo tshialua malu a butumbi bua Yehowa, netubambile bua bukole buandi ne bua bienzedi biandi bia kukema biakuenzeye." 
Psalms78:5 Bualu bua yeye wakajadika tshimanyishilu tshia Yakoba, wakasungula diyisha dia mikenji mu Isalele, biakeleleye batatu betu mukenji bualu buabi ne, Nubiyishe kudi bana benu baledibue." 
Psalms78:6 Bua ba mu tshikondo tshiakadi ha kulua, bana mene bakadi kabayi banze kuledibua babimanye, bajuke biabo babiambile bana babo baledibue;" 
Psalms78:7 bua bana aba bajadike ditekemena diabo mu Nzambi, bua kabahu bienzedi bia Nzambi muoyo, kadi batumikile mikenji yandi." 
Psalms78:8 Bua bana aba kabikadi bu muakadi batatu babo, bakadi mulongo wa bena tshitshu ne batomboki, mulongo wa bantu bakadi kabayi ne mitshima yabo nutantamane, ne bakadi ne nyuma yakadi kayiyi nueyemene Nzambi." 
Psalms78:9 Bena Efelayima, bakadi ne mata bu bielelu biabo bia nvita, bakalukila tshianyima mu dituku dia nvita." 
Psalms78:10 Kabakatumikila mei a tshihungidi tshia Nzambi, bakabenga kuenda mu mikenji yandi." 
Psalms78:11 Bakahua bienzedi biandi muoyo, ne malu a kukema akabalesheye." 
Psalms78:12 Yeye wakenza malu a kukema ku mesu kua batatu babo, mu buloba bua Ejipitu, mu madimi a mu Soana." 
Psalms78:13 Wakahanda nshila mu mai manene, wakabahitshishamu; wakimanyika mai bu tshimanu." 
Psalms78:14 Mu munya yeye wakabalombola ne ditutu, butuku tô ne lunkelu wakabalombola ne dinkenke dia kahia." 
Psalms78:15 Wakahanda mabue a mu tshihela, wakabaha mai a kunua a bungi bu muakadiu muhatuke mu ndondo wa mu mai manene." 
Psalms78:16 Wakahatula misulu ya mai kabidi mu dibue, wakahuekeshaku mai bu mudi misulu ihueka." 
Psalms78:17 Kadi bakatamba kunanukila kumuenzela malu mabi, ne bua kutombokela Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu mu tshihela." 
Psalms78:18 Bakatela Nzambi mu mitshima yabo hakalombabo bia kudia biakasamina mitshima yabo. 
Psalms78:19 E, bakajiana Nzambi; bakakonka ne, Nzambi udi mua kulongolola mesa a bia kudia mu tshihela, anyi?" 
Psalms78:20 Monai, yeye wakakuma dibue, ne hua muanda eu mai akahatukamu, ne misulu yakahasalala. Udi mua kutuha bidia kabidi, anyi? Udi mua kulongoluela bantu bandi munyinyi, anyi?" 
Psalms78:21 Nunku Yehowa wakunvua mei abo, wakadi ne tshiji; kahia kakatema bua kuoshaku Yakoba, tshiji tshiakabanda kabidi, tshiakakengesha Bena Isalele;" 
Psalms78:22 bualu bua kabakitabusha mei a Nzambi, kabakeyemena luhandu luandi." 
Psalms78:23 Kadi yeye wakelela matutu a mu diulu mukenji, wakunzulula bibi bia mu diulu;" 
Psalms78:24 wakahuekeshila mana bua bobo bâdie, wakabaha blé wa mu diulu." 
Psalms78:25 Buonso buabo bakadia bidia bia bantu bakole; wakabatumina bia kudia bikumbane. 
Psalms78:26 Wakabaluisha luhehele lua ku esete bua kuhehalu mu diulu, wakalombela luhehele lua ku sude ku bukole buandi."
