Psalms78:27 Wakabalokeshela munyinyi bu luhuishi, wakabatumina nyunyu idi ibuka ne mahuahua, yakadi bu bungi bua nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene." 
Psalms78:28 Wakayihonesha munkatshi mua tshitudilu tshiabo, minyunguluke miaba yakadibo bashikamamu." 
Psalms78:29 Nunku bakadia, bakukuta bimpe, bualu bua yeye wakabaha bintu biakajingabo." 
Psalms78:30 Diambedi kabayi banze kushikisha nzala yakabasuma, hakatshidi bia kudia mukana muabo mene," 
Psalms78:31 tshiji tshia Nzambi tshiakajuka bua kubakengesha, ne yeye wakashiha bantu bakatamba bukole munkatshi muabo, wakakuma bansongalume ba Bena Isalele, wakabahonesha hanshi." 
Psalms78:32 Nansha malu â onso mikanku, bakananukila kuenza bibi, kabakitabusha malu a kukema akenzeye." 
Psalms78:33 Nunku yeye Wakajimisha matuku abo bu mudi muhuya ujimina, Wakajimisha bidimu biabo mu buowa bukole." 
Psalms78:34 Hakabashiheye, hashishe, bakamukeba; bakahingana kudiye, bakakeba Nzambi ne lukunukunu." 
Psalms78:35 Bakavuluka ne, Nzambi udi dibue dietu, ne Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu udi muhikudi wetu." 
Psalms78:36 Kadi bakamubomba ne mukana muabo, bakamudinga ne ndimi yabo." 
Psalms78:37 Bualu bua mitshima yabo kayakadi mikandamane kudiye, kabakanemeka tshihungidi tshiandi ne lulamatu." 
Psalms78:38 Kadi bualu bua yeye wakadi mûle tente ne luse, wakababuikidila tshitshu tshiabo, kakababutula. Bulelela, yeye wakakanda tshiji tshiandi misangu ya bungi, kakasonsola tshiji tshiandi tshionso nansha." 
Psalms78:39 Wakavuluka ne, Badi anu ba ha buloba, badi bu luhehele ludi luhita, kaluena luhingana kabidi." 
Psalms78:40 Monai bungi bua misangu yakamutombokelabo mu tshihela, ne yakanyingalashabo mutshima wandi mu muaba wa hatuhu!" 
Psalms78:41 E, bakahingana ku nyima, bakatela Nzambi, bakatatshisha wa Tshijila wa Bena Isalele." 
Psalms78:42 Kabakavuluka bukole bua tshianza tshiandi, anyi dituku diakabahikuleye mu bianza bia muena lukuna;" 
Psalms78:43 hakatekeye bimanyinu biandi mu Ejipitu, hakenzeye malu andi a kukema mu madimi a mu Soana." 
Psalms78:44 Wakandamuna misulu yabo bua kuluayi mashi, ne bua muanda eu kabakamanya mua kunua mai a mu misulu yabo." 
Psalms78:45 Wakatuma mikongolo ya njiji munkatshi muabo, yakabasuma, yakabadia; wakabatumina biula, biakababutula." 
Psalms78:46 Wakafila bintu biabo bia kunowa kudi meshi, ne wakafila mamuma a ku mudimu wabo kudi mikumbi." 
Psalms78:47 Wakashiha mionshi yabo ya tumuma tua nvinyo ne mabue a nvula, wakashiha mitshi yabo ya sycomore ne mabue manene a nvula." 
Psalms78:48 Wakafila bimuna biabo kabidi ku lufu lua ku mabue a nvula, wakafila bisumbu biabo bia mikoko ku lufu lua ku miele ya nvula." 
Psalms78:49 Wakabela kahia mu tshiji tshiandi, tshiji, difikʼa munda ne makenga, biakadi bu banjelo badi benza malu mabi bakabatumineye." 
Psalms78:50 Wakabatamishila tshiji tshiandi nshila; kakengeleka muoyo wabo bua kaufu, kudi wakafila mioyo yabo ku tshihuhu." 
Psalms78:51 Wakashihesha banʼa bute bonso ba mu Ejipitu, wakashiha bana aba bakadianjilabo kulela mu bukole buabo mu nsubu ya ntenta ya Hama." 
Psalms78:52 Kadi wakendesha bantu bandi mene bu mikoko, wakabalombola mu tshihela bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko." 
Psalms78:53 Wakabalombola kabayi ne bualu bubi bubakuate, ne bua muanda eu kabakadi ne ditshina; kadi mai manene akahita ha mutu ha bakadi nʼabo lukuna." 
Psalms78:54 Wakasankisha ku butshika bua buloba buandi bua tshijila, tô ne ku mukuna eu wakadi tshianza tshiandi tshia bukole tshihete." 
Psalms78:55 Wakihata bisamba bia bantu ku mpala kuabo; wakababanyina buloba bu buhianyi buabo ku muonshi wa luidi, wakashikamisha bisamba bia Bena Isalele mu nsubu yabo ya ntenta." 
Psalms78:56 Kadi bakamuteta ne bakatombokela Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, kabakatumikila bimanyishilu biandi." 
Psalms78:57 Bakalukila tshianyima, bakamutungila tshitungu bu muakenza batatu babo, bakasesuisha a bu mudi buta budi ne buelafi." 
Psalms78:58 Bualu bua bakamufikisha munda ne bitendelelu biabo bia ha mikuna, bakasonsola mukau munda muandi ne mpingu yabo misonga." 
Psalms78:59 Hakunvua Nzambi muanda eu, wakadi ne tshiji, wakatamba kuhidia Bena Isalele." 
Psalms78:60 Bua muanda eu wakumuka mu nsubu wandi wa ntenta wa mu Shilo, nsubu wandi wa ntenta mene wakashimikeye munkatshi mua bantu." 
Psalms78:61 Wakafila bukole buandi bua kubuelabu mu buhika, wakafila butumbi buandi mu bianza bia bena lukuna." 
Psalms78:62 Wakafila bantu bandi ku bukole bua muele wa nvita, wakadi ne bena buhianyi buandi tshiji." 
Psalms78:63 Kahia kakushidisha bansongalume babo, kabakatumbisha bansongakashi babo bakatshidi tumama ne musambu wa kubuela mu dibaka." 
Psalms78:64 Bakuidi babo bakahona ku muele wa nvita, ne bakashi babo ba mu lufuila kabakusa madilu." 
Psalms78:65 Hashishe Mukelenge wakatabala bu mudi muntu mubike ku tulu, bu mudi muena bukitu udi wela mbila bualu bua nyinyo wakamukuata." 
Psalms78:66 Wakalukisha bena lukuna bandi tshianyima; wakabaluisha bundu tshiendelele. 
Psalms78:67 Yeye wakabenga nsubu wa ntenta wa Yosefe, bakasungula tshisamba tshia Efelayima;" 
Psalms78:68 Kadi wakasungula tshisamba tshia Yuda, Mukuna wa Siona mene udiye munange." 
Psalms78:69 Wakasa tshitendelelu tshiandi bua kuikalatshi bu miaba ya mu diulu, ne bu buloba buakujadikeye tshiendelele." 
Psalms78:70 Wakasungula Davidi muntu wandi, wakamûmusha mu mpangu ya mikoko." 
Psalms78:71 Wakalua nʼandi hakadiye ulonda bakashi ba mikoko bakadi bamusha bana babo batekete; wakamuvuisha mulami wa ba mu Yakoba bantu bandi, ne wa Bena Isalele buhianyi buandi." 
Psalms78:72 Nunku yeye wakadi mulami wabo mu buakane bua mutshima wandi; wakabalombola ku meji a bianza biandi. 
Psalms79:1 Nzambi, bisamba bia bantu biakubuela mu buhianyi buebe; kunyanga ntempelo webe wa tshijila; biakubutula Yelushalema bua kulueye mishiki ya mabue." 
Psalms79:2 Biakufila bitalu bia bantu bebe kudi nyunyu ya mu diulu bua kuikalabi bia kudia biai, biakufila minyinyi ya mibidi ya bansanto bebe kudi nyama ya ha buloba." 
Psalms79:3 Biakamatabisha mashi abo bu mai mu miaba idi minyunguluke Yelushalema, kakuakadi wa kubajika." 
Psalms79:4 Tuakulua bu tshintu tshia kulondabo kudi bena mutumba nʼetu, tuakulua bintu bia kubuidia ne kuseka kudi badi batunyunguluka." 
Psalms79:5 Yehowa, bualu ebu nebulehe musangu bule bishi? Newikale ne tshiji tshiendelele, anyi? Mukau webe newoshe bu kahia, anyi?" 
Psalms79:6 Uhumuna njiya yebe hamʼbidi ha bisamba bia bantu bidi kabiyi bikumanye, ne ha mutu ha makelenge adi kâyi abikila dina diebe!" 
Psalms79:7 Bualu bua bakadia Yakoba, bakabutula muaba wandi wa kuikala." 
Psalms79:8 Kuvuluki malu a tshishiku a bankambua betu bua kutulesha nʼau: luse luebe lulue kubakidila lukasa, bualu bua bakutamba kutuhuekesha." 
Psalms79:9 Wewe Nzambi wa luhandu luetu, utukuatshishe bua butumbi bua dina diebe! Utuhandishe, Utubuikidile malu mabi etu, bua bualu bua dina diebe!" 
Psalms79:10 Bua tshinyi ba mu bisamba bia bantu badi batukonka ne, Nzambi wenu udi kudi kunyi? Disombuela dia mashi a bantu bebe akumatshishabo hanshi dimanyishibue ku mesu kuetu munkatshi mua ba mu bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms79:11 Dihumuna dia bena lukanu difike ku matshu ebe. Bu mudi bunene bua bukole buebe usungile bantu aba badi basungudibue bua kufuabo. 
Psalms79:12 Uhingashile bena mutumba nʼetu bihendu mu biadi biabo bivudisha misangu muanda mutekete, biakukuhendabo nʼabi, Mukelenge wetu." 
Psalms79:13 Nunku tuetu bantu bebe, mikoko ya mu tshidilu tshiebe tshidi ne mashinde, netukusakidile tshiendelele; netumanyishe ba mu bikondo bionso butumbi buebe." 
Psalms80:1 Teleja matshu ebe, wewe Mulami wa mikoko wa Bena Isalele, wewe udi ulombola bana ba Yosefe bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko. Wewe udi mushikika mu nkuasa wa butumbi ha mutu ha bakeluba, uteme biebe." 
Psalms80:2 Usonsole bukole buebe ku mpala kua Bena Efelayima, Bena Benyamina ne Bena Manashe, ulue bua kutusungila." 
Psalms80:3 Wewe Nzambi, utuandamune mitshima yetu kabidi; mpala webe ateme, ne netusungidibue!" 
Psalms80:4 Yehowa, Nzambi wa misumba, neukuatshile kutendelela kua bantu bebe tshiji musangu bule bishi?" 
Psalms80:5 Wakabadisha bidia bia binsonshi, wakabanuisha binsonshi bikumbane mu tshihiminu tshinene." 
Psalms80:6 Udi utuvuisha tshintu tshia kufuilangana nʼatshi kudi bena mutumba nʼetu; badi nʼetu lukuna badi basekeshangana bua bualu buetu. 
Psalms80:7 Wewe Nzambi wa misumba, utuandamune mitshima yetu kabidi; mpala webe ateme, ne netusungidibue!" 
Psalms80:8 Wewe wakalufila muonshi wa tumuma tua nvinyo mu Ejipitu; wakihatamu bisamba bia bantu, wakûkuna." 
Psalms80:9 Wakalongolola muaba wau ku mpala kuau, wakela miji mile munda mua buloba, wakatampakana buloba bujima." 
Psalms80:10 Mikuna mile yakabuikidibua ne dileshi diau, matamba au akadi bu mitshi ya cèdre ya Nzambi." 
Psalms80:11 Wakalehesha matamba au, akafika tô ne ku mai manene, ntonga yau yakafika tô ne ku Musulu wa Pelata." 
Psalms80:12 Wakushimbula luhangu luau bualu kai, bua bonso badi bahita mu nshila badi bahuola mamuma au?" 
Psalms80:13 Ngulube wa ditu udi ûnyanga, ne nyama ya mu tshisuku idi yudia." 
Psalms80:14 Nzambi wa misumba, tudi tukusengelela ne, Wandamuke; kûdi mushikame mu diulu utangile hanshi, ûmone, welangane meji a muonshi eu." 
Psalms80:15 Ukube muonshi munene wakadi tshianga tshiebe tshia bukole tshikuna, ne muana eu wa balume uwakukolesha bua bualu buebe." 
Psalms80:16 Bakuwosha ne kahia, bakûtaha, bauhula; badi bafua hamonabo dinyenga dia mpala webe." 
Psalms80:17 Tshianza tshiebe tshikale hamʼbidi ha muntu wa ku tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole, hamʼbidi ha muana wa muntu uwakukolesha bua bualu buebe." 
Psalms80:18 Nunku katuena tualukila tshianyima bua kumuka kûdi. Utuangashe, nembikile dina diebe!" 
Psalms80:19 Yehowa Nzambi wa misumba, utuandamune mitshima yetu kabidi; mpala webe ateme, ne netusungidibue!" 
Psalms81:1 Nuimbile Nzambi udi bukole buetu musambu ne dî dikole; nuelele Nzambi wa Yakoba mbila ya disanka! 
Psalms81:2 Nuambulule mei enu mu musambu, nuakuishe dikasa, nuimbe lunkombe ludi ne tshiona tshimpe, nuimbe hamue ne lunzenze." 
Psalms81:3 Nuele mpungi habala ngondo, ne halua ngondo tshibalu, mu dituku dietu dia bidia bia disanka." 
Psalms81:4 Bualu bua eu mmukenji mufundila Bena Isalele, ne dî dijalame diakela Nzambi wa Yakoba." 
Psalms81:5 Yeye wakajadikila Yosefe mukenji eu bu tshimanyishilu, hakahiteye mu buloba bua Ejipitu. Ndi ngunvua dî mu muaku unakadi tshiyi muanze kumanya ne," 
Psalms81:6 Nakatentumuna diaha diandi ku dituala dia bujitu, bianza biandi biakasululuka ku tshibondo." 
Psalms81:7 Wakungela dî hawakadi mu dikenga, nakakuhidisha; nakitaba kûdi mu tshisokomenu tshianyi tshia mukungulu; nakakuteta ku mai a Meliba." 
Psalms81:8 Unvuai, nuenu bantu banyi, nennudimushe. Nuenu Bena Isalele, nakadi kusua bua nuenu nunvue dî dianyi!" 
Psalms81:9 Nzambi wa bende kikadi munkatshi muenu, kanukukuidi nzambi wa bantu ba bende." 
Psalms81:10 Meme ndi Yehowa Nzambi webe wakakuluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu. Bulula mukana muebe bitongatonga, nemmûshe tente." 
Psalms81:11 Kadi bantu banyi kabakunvua dî dianyi; Bena Isalele kabakasua kungitabusha, nansha kakese." 
Psalms81:12 Nunku nakabalekela bua kulondabo tshitshu tshia mu mitshima yabo, bua kuendabo mu nshila wakadi meji abo masungule." 
Psalms81:13 Nakadi kusua bua bantu banyi bunvue mei anyi, ne bua Bena Isalele bende mu nshila yanyi!" 
Psalms81:14 Nakadi kutekesha bena lukuna babo lukasa, nakadi kukudimuna tshianza tshianyi bua kukengesha nʼatshi badi baluangana nʼabo." 
Psalms81:15 Badi ne Yehowa lukuna bakadi kulua kumukokela ne lubombo, kadi tshikondo tshia Bena Isalele tshiakadi kuleha to ne kashidi." 
Psalms81:16 Yeye wakadi kubadisha ne blé mutambe buimpe, nakadi kubukutshisha ne buitshi bua mu dibue." 
Psalms82:1 Nzambi udi udimanyika mu muaba wandi wa disangisha dia Nzambi, udi ulumbulula bilumbu munkatshi mua nzambi mikuabo." 
Psalms82:2 Nenulumbuluile bilumbu ne kulumbulula kubi, nenunemeke mpala ya bantu babi, musangu bule munyi." 
Psalms82:3 Nulumbulule bantu batekete ne bana ba nshiya ne kulumbulula kuakane; ulumbuluile badi ne dikenga ne badi bakengela bintu bua kubabingisha. 
Psalms82:4 Nusungile bantu batekete ne bahele, nubahandishe mu bianza bia bantu babi." 
Psalms82:5 Kabena bamanye, kabena bajingulula malu; badi bendakana eku ne eku mu midima. Bishimikidi bionso bia buloba bidi bikankishibue." 
Psalms82:6 Meme nakamba ne, Nudi nzambi, buonso buenu nudi bana ba balume ba Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu." 
Psalms82:7 Kadi nenufue bu bantu bakuabo, nenuhone hanshi bu mukokeshi yonso." 
Psalms82:8 Nzambi, bika biebe, ulumbuluishe ba ha buloba; bualu bua wewe neuhiane bisamba bionso bia bantu." 
Psalms83:1 Nzambi, kuikadi biebe talalâ; kuhuwu biebe talalâ, Nzambi, kushikama hatuhu!" 
Psalms83:2 Mona, badi nʼebe lukuna badi bateka diyoyo; badi bakukina bakuambula mitu yabo." 
Psalms83:3 Badi babangila malu a budimu a kuenzela bantu bebe; badi bela bifufu biabo hohamue bua kulekela bantu bawakusokoka diyoyo. 
Psalms83:4 Badi bamba ne, Luai, tubabutule bua kabikadi tshisamba tshia bantu kabidi; bua kabavuluki dina dia Bena Isalele kabidi tshiendelele!" 
Psalms83:5 Bualu bua badi bela bifufu biabo hohamue ne mutshima umue, badi bahunga tshihungidi bua kukuenzela wewe bibi —" 
Psalms83:6 Mbadi bashikame mu ntenta ya mu Edome ne ya Bena Yishemaele. Badi ba mu Moaba ne Bena Hagâ," 
Psalms83:7 mba mu Gebala, Amona ne Amaleka; badi ba mu Peleshete diatshimue ne badi bashikame mu Tulo." 
Psalms83:8 Ba mu Ashû kabidi bakudisangisha nʼabo; bobo badi diboko dikole dia bana ba Lota. 
Psalms83:9 Wenzele bantu aba bu muwakenzela Midiyana; bu muwakenzela Sisela ne Yabina ku musulu wa Kishona," 
Psalms83:10 bakashihibua ku Ene-dô, bakatua bu tunvi tua kuela ha buloba." 
Psalms83:11 Uvuishe bantu babo banene bu Olebe ne Zêbe, uvuishe bakokeshi babo bonso bu Zeba ne Salemuna." 
Psalms83:12 Bakamba biabo ne, Tudinyengele miaba ya kuikala ya Nzambi bua kuikalayi miaba yetu." 
Psalms83:13 Wewe, Nzambi wanyi, ubavuishe bu luhuishi ludi lunyunguluka ku mpala kua nvunde, bu bisote ku mpala kua luhebele." 
Psalms83:14 Bu mudi kahia kosha ditu, bu mudi ludimi lua kahia lutemesha kahia ha mikuna," 
Psalms83:15 wewe ubihate ne tshihuhu tshiebe, ubatshinyishe ne tshihehele tshiebe tshikole." 
Psalms83:16 Ubafuishe bundu ku mesu tente, bua bakebe dina diebe, Yehowa." 
Psalms83:17 Batatshishibue bundu ne batshine tshiendelele; e, batamuke, bajimine biabo." 
Psalms83:18 Mbua bamanye biabo ne wewe nkayebe, ngudi muidike dina dia Yehowa, udi Mutambe Bunene wa ha mutu ha buloba bujima." 
Psalms84:1 Yehowa wa misumba, ke mudi muaba webe ûdi mushikame mulengele nunku!" 
Psalms84:2 Mutshima wanyi udi ujinga, e, ndi muhange ne dijinga dia biendedi bia mu tshitendelelu tshia Yehowa. Mutshima wanyi ne mubidi wanyi bidi biela mbila bua Nzambi wa muoyo." 
Psalms84:3 E, mushamusha wakudisanganyina nsubu, ne kandindi kakadisanganyina disua dia kutekamu bana baku; bidi hehi ne bioshelu biebe, Yehowa wa misumba, Mukelenge wanyi ne Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms84:4 Disanka didi kudi bantu badi bashikame mu nsubu muebe! Batshidi bakutumbisha. 
Psalms84:5 Disanka didi kudi bantu badi ne bukole buabo kûdi, badi ne nshila ya ku Siona mifunda mu mitshima yabo!" 
Psalms84:6 Hahitshiabo mu tshibanda tshia Baka, badi batshivuisha muaba wa mishimi ya mai; e, nvulʼa mbedi udi utshibuikila ne bintu bivuishila bantu disanka." 
Psalms84:7 Badi baya ku bukole ne bukole; muntu yonso wa munkatshi muabo udi umueneka ku mpala kua Nzambi mu Siona. 
Psalms84:8 Wewe Yehowa Nzambi wa misumba, unvua kutendelela kuanyi; wewe Nzambi wa Yakoba, uteleje matshu ebe kundi." 
Psalms84:9 Mona, wewe Nzambi, ngabu wetu, utangile mpala wa muntu webe udi muedibue manyi ha mutu!" 
Psalms84:10 Bualu bua dituku dimue mu biendedi bia mu tshitendelelu tshiebe didi dihita matuku tshinunu a kukuabo buimpe. Nakadi kusungula bua kuimana ku mbelu kua nsubu wa Nzambi wanyi ku mpala kua kushikama mu ntenta ya malu mabi. 
Psalms84:11 Bualu bua Yehowa Nzambi udi diba ne ngabu; Yehowa udi uha bantu luse ne butumbi. Kena uhala badi benda mu buakane tshintu tshimpe tshimue. 
Psalms84:12 Yehowa wa misumba, disanka didi kudi muntu udi ukueyemena!" 
Psalms85:1 Yehowa, wewe wakavuishila buloba buebe diakalengele; wakakudimuna buhika bua Yakoba, wakumuha diakalengele." 
Psalms85:2 Wakumushila bantu bebe tshishiku tshiabo, waka babuikidila malu mabi abo onso." 
Psalms85:3 Wakumusha njiya yebe yonso, wakadikudimuna bua wewe kuikadi ne tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshitema." 
Psalms85:4 Utuhingashe, Nzambi wa luhandu luetu, ulekele tshiji tshiudi nʼatshi kutudi." 
Psalms85:5 Newikale nʼetu tshiji tshiendelele, anyi? Neulunguluishe tshiji tshiebe tô ne ku bikondo bionso, anyi?" 
Psalms85:6 Kuena utusangasha kabidi, bua bantu bebe basanke bualu buebe, anyi?" 
Psalms85:7 Utuleshe luse luebe lujalame, Yehowa, Utuhe luhandu luebe." 
Psalms85:8 Ngunvue bianyi tshidi Nzambi, Yehowa mene, wamba; bualu bua neambile bantu bandi ne bansanto bandi mei a ditalala; kadi kabahinganyi ku nyima bua kulondabo malu a hatuhu." 
Psalms85:9 Bulelela, luhandu luandi ludi ha buihi ne badi bamutshina, bua butumbi bushikame mu buloba buetu." 
Psalms85:10 Luse lujalame ne lulamatu lua bushuwa biakusangakanangana; buakane ne ditalala biakutuangana mishiku. 
Psalms85:11 Lulamatu lua bushuwa ludi lutoloka mu buloba; buakane bua mu diulu budi butangila hanshi. 
Psalms85:12 Bulelela, Yehowa neatuheshe masanka adi mimpe, buloba buetu nebukuame bintu biabu bikumbane." 
Psalms85:13 Buakane nebuende ku mpala kuandi, nebuvuishe biendedi biandi nshila wa kuendelamu." 
Psalms86:1 Yehowa, uteleje matshu ebe, witabe kundi, bualu bua ndi muhele, ndi nkengela bintu." 
Psalms86:2 Ulame muoyo wanyi, bualu bua ndi muntu udi munange Nzambi; wewe Nzambi wanyi, usungile muntu webe udi ukueyemena." 
Psalms86:3 Unfuile luse, Mukelenge, bualu bua ndi ndila kûdi dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Psalms86:4 Usankishe muoyo wa muntu webe, Mukelenge, bualu bua ndi ngambula mutshima wanyi kûdi." 
Psalms86:5 Bualu bua wewe, Mukelenge, udi muimpe, ne mutshima webe udi musue kubuikidila bantu mihi yabo; udi mûle tente ne luse lujalame kudi bonso badi bakubikila," 
Psalms86:6 Yehowa, uteleje matshu ebe ku kutendelela kuanyi, unvue dî dia mitendekenu yanyi." 
Psalms86:7 Mu dituku dia dikenga dianyi nenkubikile; bualu bua wewe newitabe kundi. 
Psalms86:8 Mukelenge, kakuena umue bu wewe munkatshi mua nzambi ya hatuhu; kakuenaku minga midimu bu midimu yebe." 
Psalms86:9 Ba mu bisamba bionso bia bantu biwakufuka nebalue kukukuila ku mesu kuebe, Mukelenge, nebatumbishe dina diebe." 
Psalms86:10 Bualu bua wewe udi munene, ne udi wenza malu a kukema; anu wewe nkayebe udi Nzambi." 
Psalms86:11 Unyishe nshila webe, Yehowa, bua ngende mu bushuwa buebe; uvuishe mutshima wanyi mutshima umue udi utshina dina diebe." 
Psalms86:12 Mukelenge Nzambi wanyi, nenkuele tuasakidila ne mutshima wanyi wonso, nentumbishe dina diebe tshiendelele." 
Psalms86:13 Bua luse luebe lujalame lûdi undesha ludi lunene; bualu bua wakuhandisha muoyo wanyi ku ndondo wa mu Muaba wa Bafue. 
Psalms86:14 Nzambi, badi badisue bakujuka bua kuntantamena, tshisumbu tshia bena tshimbambila tshiakukeba muoyo wanyi, kabakukuteka wewe ku mpala kuabo." 
Psalms86:15 Kadi wewe, Mukelenge, udi Nzambi udi ufuila bantu luse ne diakalengele; udi ne lutulu ludi lukanda tshiji tshiebe, udi mûle tente ne luse lujalame ne lulamatu lua bushuwa." 
Psalms86:16 Uhingane kundi, unfuile luse; uhe muntu webe bukole buebe, usungile muana wa balume wa muntu webe mukashi." 
Psalms86:17 Undeshe tshimanyinu tshia disanka diebe kundi, bua badi nʼanyi lukuna bamanye mua kutshimona, bafuishibua bundu; bualu bua wewe, Yehowa, wakunkuatshisha, wakunsamba." 
Psalms87:1 Bishimikidi bia musoko wandi bidi mu mikuna ya tshijila. 
Psalms87:2 Yehowa udi unanga bibuelelu bia ku Siona ne dinanga dihite didiye nʼadi ku miaba yonso idi Yakoba muikale. 
Psalms87:3 Badi bamba malu a kukutumbisha nʼau, wewe musoko wa Nzambi." 
Psalms87:4 Ndi mela dina dia Lahaba ne dia Babulona munkatshi mua badi bammanye. Monai, Peleshete ne Tulo, ne Atiopa kabidi — eu wakaledibua mu musoko au." 
Psalms87:5 E, nebambe dî edi bualu bua Siona ne, Bakalela muntu eu ne muntu wawa munkatshi muau; bualu bua Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu neajadike." 
Psalms87:6 Yehowa neababale bu bandi, hafundeye mena a bantu, ne, Eu wakaledibua mu musoko au." 
Psalms87:7 Badi bimba misambu ne badi baja maja badi bamba ne, Mishimi yanyi ya mai yonso idi munkatshi muenu." 
Psalms88:1 Yehowa, Nzambi wa luhandu luanyi, nakudila ku mpala kuebe munya ne butuku." 
Psalms88:2 Mutendelelu wanyi ufike ku mpala kuebe, uteleje matshu ebe ku muadi wanyi." 
Psalms88:3 Bualu bua mutshima wanyi udi mûle tente ne ntatu, ne muoyo wanyi udi usemena hehi ne Muaba wa Bafue." 
Psalms88:4 Badi bambala ne bayaya mu Dijimba dia Bafue; ndi bu muntu udi kayi ne bukole. 
Psalms88:5 Udibo bashiya hatuhu munkatshi mua bafue, bu bantu bashihibue badi balala mu nkita, baudi kuyi uvuluka kabidi, kadi badi bumushibue ku tshianza tshiebe." 
Psalms88:6 Wewe wakundadika mu ndondo wa Dijimba, mu miaba ya mu midima, idi munda mua buloba mene." 
Psalms88:7 Tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshinnemeshila bujitu hamʼbidi hanyi, wewe wakukengesha ne mavuala ebe onso." 
Psalms88:8 Wakumusha balunda banyi kundi, wakubateka kule; wakunvuisha tshintu tshia bobo kukenuka. Ndi mukomena, tshiena mua kuluhukamu." 
Psalms88:9 Mesu anyi adi alua bitayitayi bualu bua makenga. Yehowa, nakukubikila ku dituku ku dituku, nakuolola bianza bianyi kûdi." 
Psalms88:10 Udi wenzela bantu bafue malu a kukema, anyi? Bantu bakumana kufua badi mua kujuka bua kukubingisha, anyi?" 
Psalms88:11 Luse luebe lujalame ludi mua kuambibua mu lukita, anyi? Lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ludi mua kuambibua mu Kabutu, anyi?" 
Psalms88:12 Malu ebe a kukema adi mua kumanyibua mu midima, anyi? Buakane buebe budi mua kumanyibua mu buloba budi bantu ne tshihua muoyo, anyi?" 
Psalms88:13 Kadi meme hanyi, Yehowa, nakudila kûdi; hatshia butuku, kutendelela kuanyi nekufike kûdi." 
Psalms88:14 Yehowa, udi umusha muoyo wanyi ku mpala kuebe bua tshinyi? Udi usokoka mpala webe kundi hua tshinyi?" 
Psalms88:15 Ndi mukengeshibue ne nakadi hehi ne lufu ku matuku a buana buanyi tô ne mpindiu. Nakumana kukenga ne malu ebe adi ankuatshisha buowa tô ne handi ngamba kuhanga. 
Psalms88:16 Tshiji tshiebe tshikole tshiakuhita ha mutu hanyi; bienzedi biebe bidi bintshinyisha bikole biakumbutula. 
Psalms88:17 Biakunyunguluka bu mai mavulangane dinda tô ne ku dilolo, biakunyengela nseke yonso, buonso buabi diatshimue." 
Psalms88:18 Wewe wakumusha muntu udi unnanga ne mulunda wanyi kundi, wakubateka kule, bandi ntamba kumanya bimpe badi ba mu mîdima." 
Psalms89:1 Nengimbe bua luse lujalame lua Yehowa kashidi; mukana muanyi nemumanyishe bantu tô ne ku bikondo bionso mudi lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa. 
Psalms89:2 Bualu bua nakuamba ne, Luse luebe lujalame neluibakibue tshiendelele; nenjadike lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa mu diulu mene." 
Psalms89:3 Nakuhunga tshihungidi ne muntu unakusungula, nakuditshiha kudi Davidi muntu wanyi ne," 
Psalms89:4 Nenjadike tunkanunuma tuebe tshiendelele, nengase nkuasa webe wa bukelenge tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms89:5 Yehowa, bia mu diulu nebitumbishe malu ebe a kukema; nentumbishe lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa mu disangisha dia ba tshijila." 
Psalms89:6 Nganyi udi mu diulu udi mua kuelekeshibua ne Yehowa? Nganyi munkatshi mua bana halume ba bakole ba mu diulu udi mua kufuanangana ne Yehowa," 
Psalms89:7 nNzambi udibo batshina bikole mu disangisha dia ba tshijila, Udi utamba bonso badi bamunyunguluka kutshinyishibua?" 
Psalms89:8 Yehowa Nzambi wa misumba, udi ne bukole bu mûdi wewe, Yehowa, nʼabu nganyi? Lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ludi lukunyunguluka." 
Psalms89:9 Udi ukokesha kutuntumuka kua mai manene; habanda mavuala au, wewe udi wabutamisha." 
Psalms89:10 Wewe wakabetekasha Lahaba, wakamuvuisha bu tshitalu tshia muntu mushihibue, wakamuangalasha badi nʼebe lukuna ne diboko diebe dikole." 
Psalms89:11 Diulu ndiebe, buloba mbuebe kabidi; wewe muine wakasa buloba ne bintu bionso bidimu." 
Psalms89:12 Wewe wakafuka luseke lua ku nôde ne lua ku sude; mukuna wa Tabô ne wa Hêmona idi isanka bua dina diebe. 
Psalms89:13 Wewe udi ne diboko didi ne bukole; tshianza tshiebe tshidi tshikole, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi tshibandishibue kulu." 
Psalms89:14 Buakane ne kulumbulula kuakane bidi bishimikidi bia nkuasa webe wa butumbi; luse lujalame ne lulamatu lua bushuwa bidi bienda ku mpala kuebe. 
Psalms89:15 Disanka didi kudi bantu badi bamanye tshiona tshia badi basanka. Yehowa, badi benda biabo mu munya wa ha mpala hebe." 
Psalms89:16 Badi basanka mu dina diebe dinda tô ne ku dilolo, ne bua buakane buebe badi batumbishibue." 
Psalms89:17 Bualu bua wewe muine udi butumbi bua bukole buabo; ne bua dianyisha diebe kutudi wewe udi ubandisha lusengu luetu mulu. 
Psalms89:18 Bualu bua ngabu wetu ngua Yehowa; mukelenge wetu ngua Wa Tshijila wa Isalele. 
Psalms89:19 Mu dituku adi wewe wakambila muntu webe uwakananga dî mu tshikena kumona ne, Nakuteka dikuatshisha dianyi hamʼbidi ha muena bukitu, nakubandisha muntu unakusungula munkatshi mua bantu." 
Psalms89:20 Nakusangana Davidi, muntu wanyi; nakumuela manyi anyi a tshijila ha mutu handi;" 
Psalms89:21 tshianza tshianyi netshimujadike, diboko dianyi kabidi nedimukoleshe." 
Psalms89:22 Muena lukuna kena umubunda yeye kayi muanze kudimuka, muena malu mabi kena umukengesha." 
Psalms89:23 Nembetekashe bena lukuna bandi ku mpala kuandi, nenkume badi nʼandi lukuna ne lufu." 
Psalms89:24 Lulamatu luanyi ne luse luanyi lujalame nebikale nʼandi; ne mu dina dianyi nebabandile lusengu luandi mulu. 
Psalms89:25 Nenteke tshianza tshiandi ha mai manene, ne tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ha misulu ya mai." 
Psalms89:26 Yeye neangele dî ne, Wewe udi Tatu wanyi, Nzambi wanyi, ne Dibue dia luhandu luanyi." 
Psalms89:27 Nemmuvuishe muanʼa bute wanyi, mukelenge udi muhite bakelenge ba ha buloba kutumba." 
Psalms89:28 Nemmutekele luse luanyi lujalame kashidi; tshihungidi tshianyi netshishale tshihungidi tshidiye mua kueyemena. 
Psalms89:29 Nenjadike mulongo wa tunkanuniuna tuandi bua wikaleku tshiendelele, nenjadike nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge bua ikaleku bu mudi diulu dikalaku ne matuku adi." 
Psalms89:30 Biabenga bana bandi diyisha dia mikenji yanyi, bikalabo kabayi benda mu mei andi mbambila;" 
Psalms89:31 bianyangabo mei anakabafundile bua kuenzabo, biahidiabo kutumikila mikenji yanyi;" 
Psalms89:32 hashishe, nembakengeshe bua matomboka abo ne mulangala, nembakengeshe bua mahambuka abo ne mikumu ya nsokotshi" 
Psalms89:33 Kadi tshiena ngumusha luse luanyi lujalame kudiye kashidi, tshiena mudinge ku lulamatu luanyi." 
Psalms89:34 Tshiena nshiha tshihungidi tshianyi, tshiena ukudimuna dî diakahatuka mukana muanyi." 
Psalms89:35 Nakaditshiha mu kudijidila kuanyi musangu umue tshiendelele ne, Tshiena ndinga Davidi nansha." 
Psalms89:36 Milongo ya tunkanunuma tuandi neyilondangane kashidi, nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge neikaleku ku mpala kuanyi bu mudi diba tshiendelele." 
Psalms89:37 Neajadikibue tshiendelele bu mudi bikondo bia ngondo bijadikibue, mumanyi wa mu diulu udi mujalame." 
Psalms89:38 Kadi mpindiu wewe wakumubenga, wakumuhetula, wewe udi nukuatshile ne muntu webe uwakuela manyi ha mutu handi tshiji." 
Psalms89:39 Wakuhidia tshihungidi tshiwakahunga ne muntu webe, wakunyenga tshifulu tshiandi tshia butumbi, wakutshiela hanshi ha buloba." 
Psalms89:40 Wakushimbula ngumbu yandi yonso; wakubutula misoko yandi minyungulula ne ngumbu ya nvita. 
Psalms89:41 Bonso badi bahitaku mu nshila badi banyenga bintu biandi; yeye muine wakulua bu tshintu tshia bena mutumba nʼandi kuhendabo. 
Psalms89:42 Wewe wakubandisha tshianza tshia bukole tshia bena lukuna bandi mulu; wakusankishe mitshima ya bonso badi nʼandi lukuna. 
Psalms89:43 E, wakutshihasha ditua dia muele wandi wa nvita, kuakumujadika bua yeye kudimanyika mu nvita." 
Psalms89:44 Wewe wakuhuwisha butumbi buandi, wakuela nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge hanshi ha buloba." 
Psalms89:45 Wakukehesha matuku a bunsongalume buandi, wakumufuisha bundu ku mesu tente." 
Psalms89:46 Yehowa, bualu ebu nebulehe musangu bule munyi? Neusokome kashidi, anyi? Tshiji tshiebe netshiteme, netshioshe bu kahia, musangu bule munyi?" 
Psalms89:47 Uvuluke bukese bua matuku anyi; uvuluke bu muwakafukila bana bonso ba bantu hatuhu! 
Psalms89:48 Muntu kai wamanya mua kushala ne muoyo kayi utangila lufu? Wamanya mua kuhandisha muoyo wandi mu bukole bua Muaba wa Bafue nganyi? 
Psalms89:49 Mukelenge, luse luebe lujalame luwakadi nʼalu diambedi, luwakaditshiha nʼalu kudi Davidi bualu bua lulamatu luebe kudiye ludi kudi kunyi?" 
Psalms89:50 Mukelenge, uvuluke bihendu bidibo bahenda nʼabi bantu bebe. Uvuluke mundi utuala bihendu bia bantu ba bungi mu tshiadi tshianyi," 
Psalms89:51 biakutuhendabo nʼabi kudi bantu badi nʼebe lukuna, Yehowa, biakusekabo nʼabi biendedi bia makasa a muntu webe muedibue manyi ha mutu." 
Psalms89:52 Yehowa avudishibue disanka tshiendelele! Amen ne Amen. 
Psalms90:1 Mukelenge, wewe udi muikale muaba wa tuetu kushikamamu mu bikondo bionso." 
Psalms90:2 Diambedi mikuna kayiyi mianze kumueneka, diambedi wewe kuyi muanze kufuka buloba ne bifukibua, ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu wewe udi Nzambi." 
Psalms90:3 Wewe udi uhingasha bantu mu dinfuenkenya kabidi, udi Wamba kabidi ne, Hinganai, nuenu bana ba bantu." 
Psalms90:4 Bualu bua bidimu tshinunu bidi ku mesu kuebe bu dituku dia makelela dimane kuhita, anyi bidi bu tshituha tshia diba tshidi mutentekedi utentekelamu butuku." 
Psalms90:5 Wewe udi ubumusha bu muakadi mai mûla ahueka nʼabo; badi bu tshilota, bu mashinde adi akola ne dinda." 
Psalms90:6 Adi adiunda bimpe ne dinda, adi akola; halua dilolo, adi mutahibue ne adi afubidila." 
Psalms90:7 Bualu bua tuakushidishibua mu tshiji tshiebe, bua njiya yebe tuakukuatshika buowa." 
Psalms90:8 Wewe wakuteka malu mabi etu ku mpala kuebe, Wakuteka mihi ituakuenza mu busokoko mu munya wa ha mpala hebe." 
Psalms90:9 Bualu bua matuku etu onso adi ajimina bualu bua tshiji tshiebe; bidimu bietu bidi bishika bu kuhumuna kua muhuya. 
Psalms90:10 Matuku a mu bidimu bietu adi akumbana bu bidimu makumi muanda mutekete; anyi, bituikala ne bukole, bidi mua kukumbana bidimu makumi muanda mukulu; kadi dileha diabi didi dituvuishila anu mudimu mukole ne kanyinganyinga, bualu bua bidi bihita lubilu, ne ludi tuya lukasa." 
Psalms90:11 Udi mumanye bukole bua tshiji tshiebe nganyi? Udi mumanye njiya yebe idi itshinyisha bantu nganyi? 
Psalms90:12 Utuyishe mua kubala matuku etu onso ne dibala edi nunku — bua tuetu kudihetela mutshima udi ne meji. 
Psalms90:13 Yehowa, hingana biebe! Muanda eu neulehe musangu bule munyi? Mutshima webe ufuile bantu bebe luse!" 
Psalms90:14 Ûshe mitshima yetu tente ne luse luebe lujalame ne dinda, bua tuetu tumanye mua kuikala ne musangelu ne disanka matuku etu onso." 
Psalms90:15 Utusankishe ne disanka didi diakanangana ne bungi bua matuku awakutukengeshamu, ne bungi bua bidimu bi tuakatangilamu diakabi." 
Psalms90:16 Mudimu webe umueneke kudi bantu bebe, butumbi buebe kudi bana babo baledibue." 
Psalms90:17 Dianyisha dia Mukelenge Nzambi wetu dikale kutudi, utujadikile mudimu wa bianza bietu; e, bulelela, ujadike mudimu wa bianza bietu tshishiki." 
Psalms91:1 Udi mushikame mu tshisokomenu tshia Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mulu neikale mu mundidimbi wa Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso. 
Psalms91:2 Nengambe bua Yehowa ne, Yeye udi tshinyemenu tshianyi ne musoko wanyi munyunguluke ne Nzambi wanyi undi ngeyemena." 
Psalms91:3 Bualu bua neakuhandishe ku buteyi bua tshilembi tshia nyunyu, neakusungile ku tshihuhu tshidi tshivuisha lufu." 
Psalms91:4 Neakubuikile ne masala andi, neusangane tshinyemenu muinshi mua mahuahua andi; bujalame buandi bua bushuwa budi ngabu wa ha tshiadi ne ngabu wa ku tshianza." 
Psalms91:5 Kuena utshina bualu budi bukuatshisha muntu buowa butuku, anyi mukete udi uhita lubilu mu munya;" 
Psalms91:6 anyi tshihuhu tshidi tshiendakana mu midima, anyi dibutuka didi dibutula bantu munda munya." 
Psalms91:7 Bantu tshinunu badi mua kuhona ku luseke luebe, ne bantu binunu dikumi badi mua kuhona ku luseke lua tshianza tshiebe tshia balume; kadi bualu ebu kabuena bufika ha buihi nʼebe." 
Psalms91:8 Neumone difutu dia bantu babi anu ne mesu ebe, neutangile mudibo babafuta." 
Psalms91:9 Bualu bua wewe, Yehowa, udi tshinyemenu tshianyi, ne wakuvuisha Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mulu muaba webe wa kushikamamu," 
Psalms91:10 nunku bualu bubi kabuena bukukuata, kakuena tshihuhu tshiafika ha buihi ne nsubu webe wa ntenta." 
Psalms91:11 Bualu bua yeye neakufile mu bianza bia banjelo bandi kukulamabo mu nshila yebe yonso. 
Psalms91:12 Nebakuambule mu bianza biabo bua wewe kututshi dikasa diebe ku dibue. 
Psalms91:13 Neudiate ha nyama wa ntambue ne ha nyoka wa dikala, neutue muana wa nyama wa ntambue ne nyoka miseba." 
Psalms91:14 Bualu bua yeye udi ulamata kundi mu dinanga diandi, nemmuhandishe; nemmushikike mu muaba udi kulu, bualu bua yeye udi mumanye dina dianyi." 
Psalms91:15 Hambikileye, nengitabe kudiye; nengikale nʼandi habueleye mu dikenga, nemmuhandishe, nemmutumbishe." 
Psalms91:16 Nensankishe mutshima wandi ne dileha dia matuku andi, nemmuleshe luhandu luanyi." 
Psalms92:1 Bidi bimpe bua kusakidila Yehowa, ne bua kuimba misambu ya kutumbisha nʼai dina diebe, Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mulu." 
Psalms92:2 Bidi bimpe bua kuambila bantu bua luse luebe lujalame ne dinda, ne bua kubamanyisha dilolo bu mûdi wewe mua kueyemenyibua," 
Psalms92:3 hatudi tukuimbila misambu ne lunzenze ludi ne nshinga dikumi ne ku tshisanji mene; hatudi tuimba ne tshiona tshimpe tshia lunkombe. 
Psalms92:4 Bualu bua wewe, Yehowa, wakunsankisha bua bienzedi biebe; bua midimu ya ku bianza biebe nengimbe misambu ya disanka." 
Psalms92:5 Mona mudi bienzedi biebe binene, Yehowa! Meji ebe adi atamba bule!" 
Psalms92:6 Muntu udi kayi ne meji kena mumanye bualu ebu, ne muntu mujibale kena ubujingulula:" 
Psalms92:7 ne, Biadiunda bantu babi bu mudi mashinde atoloka, ne bikala benji ba malu mabi bonso ne diakalengele, budi bua bobo kujimishibua tshiendelele." 
Psalms92:8 Kadi wewe, Yehowa, udi mushikame mu muaba udi kulu kashidi." 
Psalms92:9 Bua mona, hadi nʼebe lukuna, Yehowa; bua mona, badi nʼebe lukuna nebajimine; benji ba malu mabi bonso nebamuangalashibue." 
Psalms92:10 Kadi wewe wakubandisha lusengu luanyi bu lua mbowa, wakungela manyi mahia-mahia ha mutu hanyi." 
Psalms92:11 Mesu anyi akumona mulau wakukuata badi hanyi lukuna; matshu anyi akunvua bua dibutuka dia bakumbunda nvita. 
Psalms92:12 Bantu bakane badi bakola bu dibue dia ngashi, badi baleha bu mutshi wa cèdre wa mu Lebanona." 
Psalms92:13 Badi bakunyibua mu nsubu wa Yehowa, badi bakola mu biendedi bia tshitendelelu tshia Nzambi wetu." 
Psalms92:14 Nebakuame mamuma tô ne mu bununu buabo, nebikale mitshi miule tente ne mai ne idi mibishi tshiendelele," 
Psalms92:15 bua kuleshabo bantu ne, Yehowa udi muakane. Yeye udi dibue dianyi dia mutunda, kakuena bualu bubi munda muandi." 
Psalms93:1 Yehowa udi ukokesha; udi muluate butumbi; Yehowa udi muluate bukole, wakudijingila nʼabu. E, buloba budi bujadikibue, kabuena bunyungishibua." 
Psalms93:2 Nkuasa webe wa butumbi udi mujadikibue katshia ku kale tô ne lelu; wewe udiku ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu. 
Psalms93:3 Mai mûla akubandisha, Yehowa, mai mûla akubandisha dî diau; mai mûla adi abandisha tshiona tshia mavuala au." 
Psalms93:4 Yehowa mu muaba wandi wa kulu udi mukole, muhite biandi tshiona tshia kukungula kua mai mangi bukole, muhite mambuanka makole a mu mai manene." 
Psalms93:5 Bileshilu biebe bidi bia bushuwa, malu a tshijila adi akanangana ne nsubu webe, Yehowa, tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms94:1 Wewe Yehowa, Nzambi wa disombuela, wewe, Nzambi wa disombuela, utemene biebe!" 
Psalms94:2 Udijule, wewe mulumbuluishi wa ba ha buloba; ufute bena dihetu difutu bu mudi bienzedi biabo." 
Psalms94:3 Yehowa, bantu babi nebenze nunku musangu bule munyi? Bantu babi nebatumbe musangu bule munyi?" 
Psalms94:4 Badi bavudisha mei abo, badi bamba mei a diambu; benji ba malu mabi bonso badi baditumbisha." 
Psalms94:5 Badi batshibula bantu bebe bituha, Yehowa, badi bakengesha ba mu buhianyi buebe." 
Psalms94:6 Badi bashiha mukashi wa mu lufuila ne muenyi, badi bashiha bana ba nshiya." 
Psalms94:7 Badi bamba ne, Yehowa kena umona malu etu; Nzambi wa Yakoba kena ubala malu â." 
Psalms94:8 Elanganai meji a bualu ebu, nuenu badi bajibale munkatshi mua bantu! Nuenu bantu bahote, nenulue bena meji dituku kai?" 
Psalms94:9 Yeye wakasa ditshu, kena unvua biandi, anyi? Yeye wakafuka disu, kena umona, anyi?" 
Psalms94:10 Yeye udi uha bantu lungenyi, yeye udi uyisha ba mu bisamba bia bantu, kena mua kubabela ne mitutu, anyi?" 
Psalms94:11 Yehowa udi mumanye meji adi muntu wela ne, Adi anu muhuya." 
Psalms94:12 Yehowa, disanka didi kudi muntu ûdi wewe ukengesha, ûdi wewe uyisha ne diyisha dia ku mikenji yebe" 
Psalms94:13 bua kumuha biebe ditalala, bua yeye katatshi biandi mu matuku a dikenga, tô ne humbuilabo bantu babi dijimba." 
Psalms94:14 Bualu bua Yehowa kena wihata bantu bandi, kena ulekela ba mu buhianyi buandi." 
Psalms94:15 Bualu bua dilumbulula diakane nedihingane kudi badi bakane, ne bonso badi ne mitshima miakane nebadilonde." 
Psalms94:16 Wajuka bua bualu buanyi bua kutantamena bantu babi nganyi? wadimanyika bua bualu buanyi bua kutantamena benji ba malu mabi nganyi? 
Psalms94:17 Bu Yehowa kayi muikale mukuatshishi wanyi, muoyo wanyi wakuamba kufua." 
Psalms94:18 Hanakamba ne, Dikasa dianyi didi diselemuka, luse luebe lujalame, Yehowa, luakangimanyika." 
Psalms94:19 Mu divulangana dia matata munda muanyi, masamba ebe adi asankisha mutshima wanyi." 
Psalms94:20 Bakokeshi babi badi bahangidisha malu mabi adi alonda mikenji yabo, ba mu tshilumbuluidi tshia malu mabi badi mua kudisangisha nʼebe hamue, anyi?" 
Psalms94:21 Badi belela mioyo ya bantu bakane tshifufu, badi bahisha badi kabayi ne bualu." 
Psalms94:22 Kadi Yehowa wakulua tshibumba tshianyi tshile, Nzambi wanyi udi dibue dianyi dia tshinyemenu." 
Psalms94:23 Yeye ueabahingashile malu mabi abo, neabajimishe bua malu mabi abo; Yehowa Nzambi wetu neabajimishe." 
Psalms95:1 Luai bienu, tuimbile Yehowa musambu; tuelele dibue dia luhandu luetu mbila ya disanka!" 
Psalms95:2 Tuye ku mpala kuandi ne disakidila, tumusankidile ne dî dikole ne misambu ya disanka." 
Psalms95:3 Bualu bua Yehowa udi Nzambi munene, udi Mukelenge munene ha mutu ha nzambi yonso ya hatuhu." 
Psalms95:4 Mu tshianza tshiandi mudi mpongo ya ndondo; miaba ya ha mutu ha mikuna idi yandi kabidi. 
Psalms95:5 Mai manene ngandi, bualu bua yeye wakafuka; bianza biandi biakafuka buloba bûme kabidi." 
Psalms95:6 Luai bienu, tumutendelele ne tumukukuile; tutue binu bietu hanshi ku mpala kua Yehowa Mufuki wetu." 
Psalms95:7 Bualu bua yeye udi Nzambi wetu, tuetu tudi bu mikoko ya mu mpata wandi, ne mikoko idi tshianza tshiandi tshilombola. Ndi njinga bua nuenu nunvue dî diandi lelu eu!" 
Psalms95:8 Kanukoleshi mitshima yenu bu munuakenza ku Meliba, bu munuakenza dituku adi ku Masa mu tshihela;" 
Psalms95:9 hakanteta batatu benu, hakantetabo bua kumanya mudi bujalame buanyi, ne bakamona bienzedi bianyi." 
Psalms95:10 Bantu ba mu tshikondo atshi bakantondesha bidimu makumi anai, nunku nakamba ne, Badi bantu badi bahambuka mu mitshima yabo kabena bamanye nshila yanyi." 
Psalms95:11 Nunku nakaditshiha mu tshiji tshianyi ne, Kabena babuela mu dikisha dianyi." 
Psalms96:1 Nuimbile Yehowa musambu muhia-muhia; nuimbile Yehowa musambu, nuenu bonso ba ha buloba." 
Psalms96:2 Nuimbile Yehowa musambu, nuvudishile dina diandi disanka; nuambile bantu lumu lua luhandu luandi ku dituku ku dituku." 
Psalms96:3 Nuambile ba munkatshi mua bantu ba bende butumbi buandi, numanyishe ba munkatshi mua bantu bonso malu a kukemi akenzeye." 
Psalms96:4 Bualu bua Yehowa udi munene, budiye nʼabu mbua kutumbishibua bikole; budiye nʼabu mbua kunemeshibua ha mutu ha nzambi yonso ya hatuhu." 
Psalms96:5 Bualu bua nzambi yonso ya bantu ba bende idi bintu bia hatuhu; kadi Yehowa wakafuka bia mu diulu. 
Psalms96:6 Butumbi ne buneme bidi ku mpala kuandi; bukole ne bulengele bidi mu tshitendelelu tshiandi. 
Psalms96:7 Nuenu ba mu biota bia bantu, nuambike Yehowa malu andi, nuambike Yehowa butumbi ne bukole." 
Psalms96:8 Nuambike Yehowa butumbi budi buakanangane ne dina diandi. Luai ne mulambu kudiye, nubuele mu biendedi bia tshitendelelu tshiandi." 
Psalms96:9 Tendelelai bienu Yehowa baluate bivualu bia tshijila, Zakalai ku mpala kuandi, nuenu bonso ba ha buloba." 
Psalms96:10 Nuambe munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu ne, Yehowa udi ukokesha e, buloba budi bujadikibue, kabuena mua kunyungishibua. Yeye nealumbuluishe bantu kayi ne kansungusungu." 
Psalms96:11 Diulu dikale ne disanka, buloba busanke kabidi. Mai nianene enze tshiona, ne bionso bidimu bibile." 
Psalms96:12 Budimi bua mu mpata busanke, ne bionso bidimu bisanke kabidi. Hashishe mitshi yonso ya muitu neyimbe misambu bua disanka dia" 
Psalms96:13 ku mpala kua Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi ulua, bua udi ulua bua kulumbuluisheye ba ha buloba. Nealumbuluishe ba ha buloba bu mudi buakane buandi, nealumbuluishe bukua bantu bu mudi lulamatu luandi lua bushuwa." 
Psalms97:1 Yehowa udi ukokesha; buloha busanke; maloba mavule a ku muelelu wa mai manene ikale ne disanka. 
Psalms97:2 Matutu ne mîdima bidi bimunyunguluka; buakane ne kulumbulula kuakane bidi bishimikidi bia nkuasa wandi wa butumbi. 
Psalms97:3 Kahia kadi kadianjila ku mpala kuandi, kudi kosha bena lukuna bandi, ka banyunguluka nseke yonso." 
Psalms97:4 Miele yandi ya nvula yakahenyeshila ba ha buloba; buloba buakatangila bualu ebu, buakazakala." 
Psalms97:5 Mikuna mile yakafingatuka bu dihula ku mpala kua Yehowa, ku mpala kua Mukelenge wa buloba bujima." 
Psalms97:6 Bia mu diulu bidi bimanyisha bantu buakane buandi, ba ha buloba bonso bakumona butumbi buandi." 
Psalms97:7 Bonso badi bakuatshila mpingu misonga mudimu bafuishibue bundu ku mesu, badi baditumbisha bua mpingu. Kukuilai bienu Yehowa, nuenu nzambi ya hatuhu." 
Psalms97:8 Siona wakunvua, wakadi ne disanka; bana ba bakashi ba Bena Yuda kabidi bakasanka, bualu bua dilumbulula diebe, Yehowa." 
Psalms97:9 Bualu bua wewe, Yehowa, udi mutambe bunene ha mutu ha buloba buonso; udi mutambe kutumbishibua ha mutu ha nzambi yonso ya hatuhu." 
Psalms97:10 Nuenu badi bunanga Yehowa, nuikale ne malu mabi lukuna. Yeye udi ulama mioyo ya bansanto bandi, udi ubahandisha mu bianza bia bantu babi." 
Psalms97:11 Munya utu watema bua bantu bakane mu buloba, disanka didi dikunyinamu bua badi bakane mu mitshima yabo." 
Psalms97:12 Nusanke bienu mu Yehowa, nuenu bantu bakane; numusakidile hanuavuluka tshijila tshiandi." 
Psalms98:1 Nuimbile Yehowa musambu muhia-muhia, bualu bua wakuenza malu manene a kukema. Tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ne diboko diandi dia tshijila biakumuhetela luhandu." 
Psalms98:2 Yehowa wakumanyisha bantu luhandu luandi, wakumuenesha kudibingisha kuandi ku mpala kua bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms98:3 Wakuyuluka luse luandi lujalame ne lulamatu luandi lua bushuwa kudi ba mu tshisamba tshia Bena Isalele. Badi kunfudilu kua buloba bakumona luhandu lua Nzambi wetu. 
Psalms98:4 Nuelele Yehowa mbila ya disanka, nuenu bonso ba ha buloba; bandishai mei enu mu kuimba kua misambu bua disanka dienu; e, nuimbe misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms98:5 Nuimbile Yehowa misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai ku lunkombe, nuimbe ku lunkombe ne tshiona tshia kuimba kuimpe." 
Psalms98:6 Nuele mbila ya disanka ku mpala kua Mukelenge, Yehowa mene, diatshimue ne kuela kua mpungi ne ku tshiona tshia dî dia lusengu." 
Psalms98:7 Mai manene enze tshiona ne bionso bidimu biele bibila, buloba bua bantu ne bonso badi bashikamemu biele mbila." 
Psalms98:8 Misulu ya mai itutakashe bianza; mikuna mihuekele imbe diatshimue bua disanka diai 
Psalms98:9 ku mpala kua Yehowa; bualu bua udi ulua kulumbuluisheye ba ha buloba. Nealumbuluishe ba ha buloba ne buakane, nealumbuluishe bantu ne kulumbulula kuakane." 
Psalms99:1 Yehowa udi ukokesha; bantu bazakale! Udi mushikame biandi mu nkuasa wa butumbi ha mutu ha bakeluba; buloba butenkakane! 
Psalms99:2 Yehowa udi munene mu Siona; udi mubandishibue kulu ba mutu ha bantu bonso. 
Psalms99:3 Batumbishe biabo dina diebe dinene didi dikuatshisha bantu buowa. Yeye udi wa tshijila! 
Psalms99:4 Bukole bua Mukelenge budi bunanga kulumbulula kuakane. Wewe wakajadika buakane mu kulumbulula; wakulumbulula ne kulumbulula kuakane, wakuenza bienzedi biakane munkatshi mua bana ba Yakoba." 
Psalms99:5 Tumbishai bienu Yehowa Nzambi wetu; numukukuile ku ditanda diandi dia muinshi mua makasa. Yeye udi wa tshijila! 
Psalms99:6 Mose ne Alona bakadi munkatshi mua bakuidi bandi, Samuele kabidi wakadi munkatshi mua badi babikila dina diandi, bakadila kudi Yehowa, yeye wakabitaba." 
Psalms99:7 Yeye wakabambila mei andi mu mulanjilanji wa mu ditutu. Bakatumikila bimanyishilu biandi ne mukenji wakabeleye. 
Psalms99:8 Yehowa Nzambi wetu, wewe wakitaba kudibo; wakadi Nzambi wakababuikidila mihi yabo, kadi wakadisombuela bualu bua bienzedi biabo bibi." 
Psalms99:9 Tumbishai bienu Yehowa Nzambi wetu, numutendelele ku mpala kua mukuna wandi wa tshijila; bualu bua Yehowa Nzambi wetu udi wa tshijila." 
Psalms100:1 Nuelele Yehowa mbila ya disanka, nuenu bonso ba ha buloba!" 
Psalms100:2 Nukuatshile Yehowa mudimu ne disanka. Nuiye ku mpala kuandi ne kuimba kua misambu. 
Psalms100:3 Numanye bienu ne, Yehowa udi Nzambi! Nyeye mene wakatufuka, tudi bantu bandi; tudi bantu bandi ne mikoko ya mu mpata wandi." 
Psalms100:4 Buelai bienu mu bibuelelu biandi ne disakidila, buelai mu biendedi biandi ne misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai. Numusakidile, nuvudishile dina diandi disanka." 
Psalms100:5 Bualu bua Yehowa udi muimpe; luse luandi lujalame ludiku tshiendelele, lulamatu luandi lua bushuwa ludiku tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms101:1 Nengimbe bua luse luebe lujalame ne bua kulumbulula kuebe kuakane. Yehowa, nenkuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms101:2 Nendimuke bua kuyila mu nshila udi mululame tshishiki. Wewe neufike kundi dituku kai? Nengende mu nsubu muanyi ne mutshima udi muakane tshishiki. 
Psalms101:3 Tshiena nteka tshintu tshibi ku mesu kuanyi. Ndi nkina bienzedi bia badi basesuka mu nshila webe; kabiena bindamata. 
Psalms101:4 Mutshima udi ne tshishiku neumuke kundi, tshiena musue kumanya bualu bubi." 
Psalms101:5 Wasonkuela muena mutumba nʼandi mu busokoko, nemmubutule yeye. Wikala ne mesu adi ne dihetu ne mutshima udi ne kudisua, tshiena mmuitabusha." 
Psalms101:6 Mesu anyi neikale kudi badi mua kueyemenyibua mu buloba, bua kushikamabo nʼanyi muaba umue. Muntu udi wenda mu nshila udi mululame tshishiki neankuatshile biandi mudimu." 
Psalms101:7 Muntu udi wenza malu a kudinga kena ushikama mu nsubu muanyi; muntu udi wamba mei a mashimi kena ujadikibua ku mpala kuanyi. 
Psalms101:8 Ku dinda ku dinda nembutule bantu babi bonso ba mu buloba ebu, bua kumusha benji ba malu mabi bonso mu musoko wa Yehowa." 
Psalms102:1 Unvua kulomba kuanyi, Yehowa; muadi wanyi ufike kûdi." 
Psalms102:2 Kusokoki mesu ebe kundi mu dituku dia dikenga dianyi! Teleja matshu ebe kundi, witabe kundi lubilu dituku dindi nkubikila." 
Psalms102:3 Bualu bua matuku anyi adi ajimina bu muishi wa kahia, mifuba yanyi idi mishila bu tshishelele." 
Psalms102:4 Mutshima wanyi udi mutahibue bu mashinde, wakufubidila; bualu bua ndi mpua muoyo bua kudia bidia bianyi." 
Psalms102:5 Bua muadi mukole wa kutua kuanyi kua mikemu mifuba yanyi idi ilamata ku misunyi yanyi. 
Psalms102:6 Ndi bu mpunga tshikola wa mu tshihela, nakulua bu tshihungulu tshia mu miaba ya kubutuka." 
Psalms102:7 Ndi ndala tshitabala, nakulua bu mushamusha udi wikala ha nkayau ha musonga wa nsubu." 
Psalms102:8 Dinda tô ne dilolo badi nʼanyi lukuna badi bampenda, badi nʼanyi lukuna lutambe bukole badi batela dina dianyi helabo bantu milau." 
Psalms102:9 Bua nakudia butue bu mundi ndia bidia, nakusangisha binsonshi ne bia kunua bianyi," 
Psalms102:10 bualu hua njiya yebe ne tshiji tshiebe kundi. Bua wewe wakungambila, wakunguisha." 
Psalms102:11 Matuku anyi adi bu mundidimbi udi uleha hamba diba kubuela; nakufubidila bu mashinde. 
Psalms102:12 Kadi wewe Yehowa, udi mushikame mu nkuasa wa butumbi kashidi; nebakuvuluke tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms102:13 Wewe neujuke, nenfuile musoko wa Siona luse; bua tshikondo tshiakufika tshia kuwanyisha; e, tshikondo tshiwakuamba tshiakufika." 
Psalms102:14 Bualu bua bantu bebe badi ne mabue au dinanga, badi bafuila luhuishi luau luse." 
Psalms102:15 Nunku ba mu bisamba bia bantu nebatshine dina dia Yehowa, bakelenge bonso ba ha buloba nebatshine butumbi buebe." 
Psalms102:16 Bualu bua Yehowa neibake Siona kabidi, neamueneke mu butumbi buandi." 
Psalms102:17 Neateleje matshu andi ku kulomba kua bakengi, kena ulengulula mulombu wabo." 
Psalms102:18 Bafundile ba mu tshikondo tshialua bualu ebu, bua bantu balueye kufuka batumbishe Yehowa." 
Psalms102:19 Bualu bua wakuntangila hanshi ku muaba wandi wa tshijila wa mulu. Mu diulu mudi Yehowa mumone buloba," 
Psalms102:20 bua kunvueye kutua kua mikemu kua bena lukanu, bua kusululeye bantu badi bamane kuhisha bua kufua," 
Psalms102:21 bua bantu bambile ba mu Siona dina dia Yehowa, babamanyishe butumbi buandi mu Yelushalema," 
Psalms102:22 badisangisha bantu hohamue, hadisangisha makelenge kabidi, bua kukuatshilabi Yehowa mudimu." 
Psalms102:23 Wakutekesha bukole buanyi mu nshila mundi nyilamu; wakukehesha matuku anyi. 
Psalms102:24 Ndi ngamba ne, Nzambi wanyi, kungumushi hankatshi ha matuku anyi, wewe muena bidimu bidi bileba tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms102:25 Wewe wakajadika bishimikidi bia buloba kale kale, bia mu diulu bidi bienzedi bia bianza biebe." 
Psalms102:26 Bintu ebi nebijimine, kadi wewe udi ushala tshiendelele; e, buonso buabi nebikulukashe bu tshivualu. Wewe neubishintakashe bu mudibo bashintakasha tshitalu, nebikudimuke." 
Psalms102:27 Kadi wewe udi muomumue, ne bidimu biebe kabiena ne nshikidilu." 
Psalms102:28 Bana baledibue ba bantu bebe nebashikame mu buloba talalâ, ne tunkanunuma tuabo netujadikibue ku mpala kuebe." 
Psalms103:1 Mutshima wanyi, uvudishile Yehowa disanka; bionso bidi munda muanyi bivudishile dina diandi dia tshijila disanka!" 
Psalms103:2 Mutshima wanyi, uvudishile Yehowa disanka; kuhu muoyo bua masanka onso akutuheye:" 
Psalms103:3 Udi umbuikidila malu mabi ebe onso, udi ushikisha mabedi ebe onso;" 
Psalms103:4 udi uhikula muoyo webe ku dibutuka, udi ukuteka luse lujalame ne dinanga ha mutu hebe;" 
Psalms103:5 udi ukuatshisha ne bintu bimpe bidimu biebe bionso, nunku bukole bua bunsongalume buebe budi buhingane bu bua nyunyu wa mukanku." 
Psalms103:6 Yehowa udi wenza bienzedi biakane, udi ulumbulula biakane bua kukuatshisha bonso badi bakengeshibua." 
Psalms103:7 Wakalesha Mose nshila yandi, ne Bena Isalele bienzedi biandi." 
Psalms103:8 Yehowa udi ne luse ne dinanga, kena ukuata tshiji lubilu, ud mûle tente ne dinanga dijalame." 
Psalms103:9 Kena utandangana nʼetu tshiendelele, kena ushala ne tshiji tshiandi kashidi." 
Psalms103:10 Kena mutuenzele bu mudi mibi yetu, kena mutufute bu mudi malu etu a tshishiku." 
Psalms103:11 Bua bu mudi diulu kulu kule ha mutu ha buloba, mbu mudi bunene bua luse luandi lujalame kudi badi bamunemeka." 
Psalms103:12 Bu mudi luseke lua esete kule ku wesete, mbu mudiye mumushe matombokela etu kule kutudi." 
Psalms103:13 Bu mudi tatu ufuila bana bandi luse, mbu mudi Yehowa ufuila badi bamunemeka luse." 
Psalms103:14 Bua yeye udi mumanye buntu buetu, udi uvuluka ne tudi dinfuenkenya." 
Psalms103:15 Bua mundi matuku andi adi bu mashinde, udi utumpuka bu tshilongo tshia mu budimi." 
Psalms103:16 Bualu bua luhehele ludi luheha hamʼbidi hatshi, tshidi tshijimina, muaba watshi kawena mutshimanye kabidi." 
Psalms103:17 Kadi luse lujalame lua Yehowa ludi ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu kudi badi bamunemeka. Buakane buandi budi kudi bana ba bana baledibue. 
Psalms103:18 Bidi kudi badi batumikila tshihungidi tshiandi, ne kudi badi bavuluka mikenji yandi bua kuyenza." 
Psalms103:19 Yehowa wakajadika nkuasa wandi wa butumbi mu diulu, buandi budi bukokesha ku mutu kua bantu bonso." 
Psalms103:20 Nuvudishile Yehowa disanka, nuenu banjelo bandi, badi bena bukitu mu bukole buabo, badi benza dî didiye wamba, badi batumikila dî dia mukenji wandi" 
Psalms103:21 Nuvudishile Yehowa disanka, nuenu ba mu misumba yandi yonso, nuenu bakuatshi bandi ba mudimu badi benza mudiye musue." 
Psalms103:22 Nuvudishile Yehowa disanka, nuenu bifukibua biandi bionso, mu miaba yonso ya bukokeshi buandi. Mutshima wanyi, uvudishile Yehowa disanka!" 
Psalms104:1 Mutshima wanyi, uvudishile Yehowa disanka! Wewe Yehowa, Nzambi wanyi, udi mutambe buneme! Udi muluate buneme ne butumbi," 
Psalms104:2 wewe udi uluata munya bu tshitalu; udi uvungulula bia mu diulu bu tshilulu tshikudika. 
Psalms104:3 Udi ujadika makunshi a nsubu wandi wa mulu mu mai, udi uvuisha matutu bu dikalu diandi, udi wendakana ha mahuahua a luhehele." 
Psalms104:4 Udi uvuisha mpehele bu ba-messager bandi, ne ndimi ya kahia bu bakuatshi bandi ba mudimu." 
Psalms104:5 Wakajadika buloba ha bishimikidi biabu, bua kabunyungi tô ne kashidi." 
Psalms104:6 Wakabiluatshisha ne mai a ndondo bu tshivualu, mai akûla ha mutu ha mikuna." 
Psalms104:7 Hawakabela mai, akanyema; hakunvuau tshiona tshia mukungulu webe, akumukaku lukasa," 
Psalms104:8 mikuna mile yakabanda kulu, bibanda biakahueka hanshi to ne ku muaba uwakubilongoluela." 
Psalms104:9 Wakasungula mai mukalu wakadiu kâyi mua kusambuka, bua kâhinganyi kabidi bua kubuikila buloba." 
Psalms104:10 Udi utuma mishimi idi ihatula mai mu mpongo, misulu idi ihueka munkatshi mua mikuna." 
Psalms104:11 Idi inuisha nyama yonso ya mu mpata mai, nyama ya mpunda ya mu tshisuku idi Imana nyota yai." 
Psalms104:12 Nyunyu ya mulu idi ne masua ai hehi nʼai, idi idila munkatshi mua matamba a mitshi." 
Psalms104:13 Udi utuma mai ha mikuna mafume ku nsubu wandi wa mulu. Buloba budi bûle tente ne mamuma a ku mudimu webe. 
Psalms104:14 Udi umeneshila bimuna mashinde, udi umeneshila bantu midioko bua kuyidiundishabo. Mbua bamanye mua kuhatula bia kudia mu buloba," 
Psalms104:15 ne nyinyo idi isankisha mutshima wa muntu, ne manyi adi akenkesha mpala wandi, ne bidia bidi bikolesha mutshima wandi." 
Psalms104:16 Mitshi ya Yehowa idi miule tente ne tshitelele, mmitshi ya cêdre ya mu Lebanona yakatentuleye." 
Psalms104:17 Nyunyu idi yibakamu masua ai, kasongo nyunyu kadi ne nsubu waku mu mitshi ya cyprès." 
Psalms104:18 Mikuna mile idi bua mbushi ya tshisuku; mabue adi tshinyemenu tshia nyama ya nsenji. 
Psalms104:19 Wakufika biandi ngondo bua kutahulula ngandi bidimu; diba didi dimanye tshikondo tshia kubueladi. 
Psalms104:20 Udi uvuisha biebe mîdima, butuku budi biula, halua nyama yonso ya muitu kuhatuka bua kubombelelai." 
Psalms104:21 Bana ba nyama ya ntambue badi badila tshintu tshia kukuatabo, badi bakeba bia kudia biabo kudi Nzambi." 
Psalms104:22 Diba didi dibanda, badi bumuka bua kuyabo, badi balala mu mena ai." 
Psalms104:23 Bantu badi baluhuka bua kuya ku midimu yabo ne bua kuyenza, tô ne habuela diba." 
Psalms104:24 Yehowa, mona mudi bungi bua mishindu ya midimu yebe! Wewe wakenza buonso buai ne lungenyi luebe; buloba budi bûle tente ne bintu biwakafuka." 
Psalms104:25 Kuakua kudi mai manene, adi manene ne adi ne butshiama bunene, mudi bintu bidi kabiyi mua kubadibua biendakanamu, nnyama mikese ne nyama minene kabidi." 
Psalms104:26 Aha hadi hahita matu manene, ne nyama munene udimu uwakafuka bua kunayamu." 
Psalms104:27 Bintu ebi bionso bidi bikutekemena, bua wewe kubiha bia kudia biabi mu tshikondo tshiabi." 
Psalms104:28 Wewe udi ubihabi, bidi bibisangisha; udi ubulula tshianza tshiebe, bidi biukuta ne bintu bimpe." 
Psalms104:29 Udi usokoka mpala webe, bidi bitshina; udi ubiumushila muhuya wabi, bidi bifua ne bidi bihingana ku dinfuenkenya diabi kabidi." 
Psalms104:30 Udi utumaku Nyuma webe, bidi bifukibua; udi wandamuna mpala wa buloba tshiakabidi bulue buhia-buhia." 
Psalms104:31 Butumbi bua Yehowa buikaleku tshiendelele; Yehowa asanke mu bienzedi biandi. 
Psalms104:32 Udi umona buloba, budi buzakala; udi ulenga mikuna tshianza, idi ihatula muishi wa kadilu." 
Psalms104:33 Nengimbile Yehowa misambu hantshidi ne muoyo; nengimbile Nzambi wanyi misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai hantshidiku. 
Psalms104:34 Meji andi ngela bua bualu buandi amusankishe, bua meme ndi nsanka mu Yehowa." 
Psalms104:35 Benji ba malu mabi bajimine, bumushibue mu buloba, bantu babi kabikadiku kabidi! Mutshima wanyi, uvudishile Yehowa disanka! Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms105:1 Nusakidile bienu Yehowa, nubikile dina diandi, numanyishe bienzedi biandi munkatshi mua bukua bantu." 
Psalms105:2 Numuimbile misambu, numuimbile misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai, nuyikilangane bua malu andi onso a kukema." 
Psalms105:3 Nutumbile mu dina diandi dia tshijila; mitshima ya badi bakeba Yehowa isanke. 
Psalms105:4 Kebai bienu Yehowa ne bukole buandi, kebai mpala wandi matuku onso." 
Psalms105:5 Nuvuluke bienu bienzedi bia kukema biakenzeye, malu andi a kukema ne dilumbulula dia mukana muandi," 
Psalms105:6 nuenu tunkanuniuna tua Abalahama muntu wandi, nuenu bana ba Yakoba, bantu bakasunguleye." 
Psalms105:7 Yeye udi Yehowa Nzambi wetu; dilumbulula diandi diakenjibua mu buloba buonso. 
Psalms105:8 Udi uvuluka tshihungidi tshiandi kashidi, ndi mene diakajadikeye tô ne ku bikondo tshinunu," 
Psalms105:9 tshihungidi tshiakahungeye ne Abalahama, mmutshihu wandi wakaditshiheye kudi Isaka." 
Psalms105:10 Wakajadika kudi Yakoba bu mukenji ne kudi Isalele bu tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele. 
Psalms105:11 Wakamba ne, Nenkuhe buloba bua Kanâna, bua kuikalabu tshituha tshia nuenu kuhiana." 
Psalms105:12 Hakadibo bantu banya-banya bua bungi buabo, e, hakadibo bantu banya-banya be, ne hakashikamabo mu buloba bu benyi;" 
Psalms105:13 hakendakanabo ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba, ne ku bukelenge bumue tô ne ku bantu bakuabo ba bende." 
Psalms105:14 Yeye kakitabusha bua muntu umue kubenzela bibi. E, wakabela bakelenge bualu buabo." 
Psalms105:15 Wakamba ne, Kanulengi bantu banyi bedibue manyi ha mutu tshianza, kanuenzedi baprofete banyi bibi." 
Psalms105:16 Wakabikila tshiole bua kuluatshi ha buloba abu; wakumusha tshintu tshionso tshiakeyemenabo bua kuheta bia kudia. 
Psalms105:17 Wakatuma muntu bua kudianjileye ku mpala kuabo, Yosefe mene wakahanyibua bu muhika." 
Psalms105:18 Bakasamisha makasa andi ne nkanu yakasuikabo nʼai, bakamuela lukanu lua tshiamu tshifike;" 
Psalms105:19 dî dia Yehowa diakamuteta tô ne hakafika tshikondo tshia malu akambeye. 
Psalms105:20 Mukelenge wakatuma dî bua kumusulula, mukokeshi wa bantu mene wakamulekesha." 
Psalms105:21 Wakamuyisha mukelenge ku mutu kua nsubu wandi, ne mukokeshi wa bintu biandi bionso." 
Psalms105:22 Bua kulesheye baminyampala bu muakadiye musue, ne bua kuyisheye bakulu bandi meji." 
Psalms105:23 Isalele kabidi wakabuela mu Ejipitu; Yakoba wakashikama mu buloba bua Hama. 
Psalms105:24 Yehowa wakavudisha bantu bandi bua kukumbanabo ba bungi, wakabavuisha bantu bahite bena lukuna babo bukole." 
Psalms105:25 Wakakudimuna mitshima ya bantu aba bua kuikalabo ne bantu bandi lukuna, bua kuenzela bakuatshi bandi ba mudimu malu a budimu." 
Psalms105:26 Wakatumaku Mose muntu wandi, ne Alona wakasunguleye." 
Psalms105:27 Bobo bakabalesha bimanyinu biandi munkatshi muabo, bakenza malu a kukema mu buloba bua Hama." 
Psalms105:28 Wakatuma mîdima, wakayosha mufitu mu buloba; ne bakatombokela mei andi." 
Psalms105:29 Wakakudimuna mai a misulu yabo bua kuluau mashi, wakashiha minyinyi yabo ya mu mai." 
Psalms105:30 Buloba buabo huakûla tente ne biula, bibuele mu nsubu ya bakelenge babo mene." 
Psalms105:31 Wakamba dî diandi, njiji yakalua mu bisumbu bia bungi, ne nkusu yakamueneka mu nseke yonso ya buloba buabo." 
Psalms105:32 Wakabaha mabue a nvula akabalokela bu nvula, ne miele ya nvula yakahenya mu buloba buabo." 
Psalms105:33 Wakashiha mionshi yabo ya nyinyo kabidi, ne mitshi yabo ya nngi, wakatshibula mitshi yakadi mu buloba buabo." 
Psalms105:34 Wakela dî diandi, mikumbi yakalua, bana ba mikumbi bakadi kabayi mua kubadibua bakahia." 
Psalms105:35 Yakadia midioko yonso ya mu buloba buabo, yakadia bia kudia biakadi buloba buabo budiundisha." 
Psalms105:36 Wakashihesha banʼa bute bonso ba mu buloba buabo, bana aba mene bakadianjilabo kulela mu buloba buabo." 
Psalms105:37 Ka yeye wakaluhula Bena Isalele batuala biabo biamu bia argent ne or; kakuakadi muntu umue munkatshi mua bisamba biabo wakalenduka. 
Psalms105:38 Ba mu Ejipitu bakadi ne disanka hakaya bantu aba; bualu bua buowa buakamana kubakuata bualu buabo. 
Psalms105:39 Yeye wakababaluluila ditutu bu tshibuikidi, ne kahia ka kubatemena butuku." 
Psalms105:40 Bakamulomba ne yeye wakabaha nkuadi, wakabukutshisha ne bidia bia mu diulu." 
Psalms105:41 Yeye wakahanda dibue, mai akahumukamu; akahueka mu miaba miume bu musulu." 
Psalms105:42 Bualu bua wakavuluka biandi dî diandi dia tshijila, ne Abalahama muntu wandi." 
Psalms105:43 Wakaluhula bantu bandi ne disanka, bantu bakasunguleye mene bimba biabo misambu." 
Psalms105:44 Wakabaha maloba a bisamba bia bantu ba bende; bakadiangatshila bintu biakaheta bantu ba bende ku mudimu wabo mukole. 
Psalms105:45 Bua kulondabo mei akabambileye; ne bua kutumikilabo mikenji yandi. Tumbishai Yehowa! 
Psalms106:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Nusakidile Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi muimpe; bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms106:2 Udi mua kuambila bantu bua bienzedi binene bia Yehowa nganyi? Anyi udi mua kubalesha butumbi buandi buonso nganyi? 
Psalms106:3 Disanka didi kudi badi balonda kulumbulula kuakane, ne badi benza malu makane misangu yonso." 
Psalms106:4 Yehowa, unvuluke hawalesha bantu bebe luse, ulue kunkuatshisha ne luhandu lûdi ubaha," 
Psalms106:5 bua utangile bianyi diakalengele dia bantu bawakusungula, bua nsanke bianyi mu disanka dia tshisamba tshiebe, bua ntumbe bianyi diatshimue ne ba mu buhianyi buebe." 
Psalms106:6 Tuakuenza bibi bu muakenza batatu betu; tuakuenza malu a tshishiku, tuakuenza malu mabi." 
Psalms106:7 Batatu betu bakadi mu Ejipitu kabakalama malu ebe a kukema mu mitshima yabo. Kabakavuluka divulangana dia luse luebe lujalame, kadi bakatombokela Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu ku Mai Manene Makunze." 
Psalms106:8 Kadi yeye wakabasungila bualu bua dina diandi, bua kumanyisheye bantu bua bukole buandi bunene." 
Psalms106:9 Wakabela Mai Manene Makunze kabidi ne akakama; nunku wakabalombola bua kubahitshisha mu mai a ndondo bu muakadibo mua kuhita ha buloba bûme. 
Psalms106:10 Ka wakabasungila mu bianza bia wakabakina, wakababikila mu bukole bua bakadi nʼabo lukuna," 
Psalms106:11 Mai akubuikila bakengeshi babo, kakuakadi umue wabo wakashala." 
Psalms106:12 Hashishe, bakitabusha mei andi, bakimba misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai." 
Psalms106:13 Bakahua bienzedi biandi muoyo lukasa; kabakindila dî diandi. 
Psalms106:14 Kadi bakasamina muoyo ne lukuka lukole mu tshihela; bakatela Nzambi mu tshihela tshia lusenga. 
Psalms106:15 Yeye wakabaha tshintu tshiakalombabo, kadi wakatuma tshinyanu mu mitshima yabo." 
Psalms106:16 Bakadi ne Mose mukau kabidi mu tshitudilu; bakadi ne Alona, muntu wa tshijila wa Yehowa, mukau muomumue." 
Psalms106:17 Buloba buakabulula mukana muabu, buakamina Datana, buakabuikila ba mu tshisumbu tshia Abilama." 
Psalms106:18 Kahia kakatema munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshiabo; ludimi lua kahia luakosha bantu babi. 
Psalms106:19 Bakenza kana ka ngombe ku Holeba, bakatendelela luhingu luakatulabo." 
Psalms106:20 Bakashintakasha wabo wa butumbi ku tshifuanyikishi tshia ngombe utu wadia mashinde. 
Psalms106:21 Bakahua Nzambi Musungidi wabo muoyo, wakabenzela malu manene mu Ejipitu," 
Psalms106:22 wakabenzela bienzedi bia kukema mu boloba bua Hama ne malu akamatshisha bantu buowa ku Mai Manene Makunze. 
Psalms106:23 Nunku yeye wakamba ne, Nembabutule; bualu buakadiye kuenza, kadi Mose, muntu wandi musungula, wakimana hankatshi habo ne Nzambi bua kukudimuneye tshiji tshiandi bua kababutudi." 
Psalms106:24 Hashishe, bakahetula buloba abu buimpe, kabakitabusha dî dia mulayi wandi." 
Psalms106:25 Kadi bakatontolola mu nsubu yabo ya ntenta, kabakunvua dî dia Yehowa." 
Psalms106:26 Nunku yeye wakabisha tshianza tshiandi bua kuditshiha bua bualu buabo ne, Nembahoneshe mu tshihela," 
Psalms106:27 nentangadishe tunkanunuma tuabo munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu ba bende, nentumuangalashe mu maloba au." 
Psalms106:28 Bakadilamika kudi Bâla-Peô; bakadia milambu mifila kudi bafue. 
Psalms106:29 Nunku bakakuatshisha Yehowa tshiji bua bienzedi biabo, ne tshihuhu tshiakamueneka munkatshi muabo." 
Psalms106:30 Hashishe, Pinehasa wakajuka, wakashikisha tshilumbu, nunku tshihuhu tshiakalekeshibua." 
Psalms106:31 Bualu ebu buakabadibua kudiye bu buakane ku tshikondo ku tshikondo tô ne tshiendelele. 
Psalms106:32 Bakakuatshisha Yehowa tshiji kabidi ku mai a Meliba, ne muanda eu wakakebela Mose dikenga bua bualu buabo." 
Psalms106:33 Bualu bua bakanyingalasha mutshima wandi, ne wakamba biandi mei akadi kâyi ne meji ku mishiku yandi." 
Psalms106:34 Kabakabutula bena buloba abu bu muakabambila Yehowa," 
Psalms106:35 kadi bakabuelakana ne ba mu bisamba abi bia bantu, bakayila mua kuenza bu muakadibo benza." 
Psalms106:36 Bakakuatshila mpingu yabo mudimu, yakalua buteyi kudibo." 
Psalms106:37 Bulelela, bakashihela bademon bana babo baledibue, balume ne bakashi, bu milambu." 
Psalms106:38 Bakatatshisha mashi a bantu bakadi kabayi ne tshilumbu hanshi, akadi mashi a bana babo baledibue, balume ne bakashi, bakashihelabo mpingu ya mu Kanâna bu milambu. Buloba buakanyanguka ne mashi." 
Psalms106:39 Nunku bakadibihisha ku bienzedi biakenzabo, bakalonda malu a masandi mu bienzedi biabo." 
Psalms106:40 Bua malu â tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakatemena bantu bandi bua kuba kengesha, yeye wakakenuka ba mu buhianyi buandi." 
Psalms106:41 Wakabafila mu bianza bia bisamba bia bantu ba bende; bantu bakadi nʼabo lukuna bakabakokesha. 
Psalms106:42 Bena lukuna babo kabidi bakabakengesha, ne bakinamishibua muinshi mua bukole buabo." 
Psalms106:43 Yeye wakabahandisha misangu ya bungi, kadi bakamutombokela ne malu akahangidishabo, ne bakahuekeshibua hanshi bualu bua malu abo a tshishiku." 
Psalms106:44 Kadi yeye wakamona dikenga diabo hakunvueye muadi wabo. 
Psalms106:45 Wakavuluka tshihungidi tshiandi bua bualu buabo, wakakudimuna mutshima wandi bu mudi divulangana dia luse luandi lujalame." 
Psalms106:46 Yeye wakabayuisha bantu ba kufuidibua luse kudi bonso bakadi babakuata mu buhika. 
Psalms106:47 Utusungile, wewe Yehowa Nzambi wetu, utûmushe munkatshi mua bisamba bia ba bende bua kutusangisha hamue, bua tuetu tusakidile dina diebe dia tshijila, ne bua tutumbile mu butumbi buebe." 
Psalms106:48 Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, avudishibue disanka, ku tshibangidilu tô ne kunshikidilu! Bantu bonso bambe biabo ne, Amen! Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms107:1 Sakidilai bienu Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi muimpe; bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms107:2 Bantu badi Yehowa muhikule bambe biabo nunku, bobo mene badiye muhikule mu bianza bia muena lukuna," 
Psalms107:3 hakumusheye mu maloba onso bua kubasangisha hamue, a ku luseke lua esete ne ku wesete, a ku luseke lua nôde ne ku sude." 
Psalms107:4 Bakendakana mu tshihela, mu tshihela tshia lusenga muakadi kamuyi nshila; kabakasangana musoko bua kushikamamu." 
Psalms107:5 Bakadi ne nzala ne nyota, mitshima yabo yakahanga munda muabo." 
Psalms107:6 Nunku bakadila kudi Yehowa mu ntatu yabo, ne yeye wakabahandisha mu makenga abo." 
Psalms107:7 Yeye wakabalombola mu nshila mululame, bua bamanye mua kufika mu musoko wa kushikamabo." 
Psalms107:8 Basakidile biabo Yehowa bua luse luandi lujalame ne bua bienzedi biandi bia kukema bidiye wenzela bana ba bantu! 
Psalms107:9 Bualu bua yeye udi uha muntu tshidiye ujinga, ne udi ukutshisha muena nzala ne bintu bimpe." 
Psalms107:10 Banga bantu aba bakashikama mu mîdima ne mu mufitu muhite bukole, bakadi basuikibua mu makenga ne mu nkanu ya tshiamu tshifike," 
Psalms107:11 bualu bua bakatombokela mei a Nzambi, bakalengulula lungenyi luakadi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu mubaleshe." 
Psalms107:12 Bua malu â yeye wakahuekesha mitshima yabo ne mudimu mukole; bakadishinda hanshi, kakuakadi wa kubakuatshisha." 
Psalms107:13 Nunku bakadila kudi Yehowa mu ntatu yabo, ne yeye wakabahandisha mu makenga abo." 
Psalms107:14 Wakabaluhula mu midima ne mu mufitu mukole, wakatshibula nkanu yabo bituha." 
Psalms107:15 Basakidile Yehowa bua luse luandi lujalame ne bua bienzedi biandi bia kukema bidiye wenzela bana ba bantu! 
Psalms107:16 Bualu bua wakutshibula bibi bia tshiamu tshia mitaku, wakukosa milonda ya tshiamu tshifike yakabikuata." 
Psalms107:17 Bantu bahote badi badivuishila dikenga bua diya diabo mu nshila wa ditombokela diabo, ne bua malu abo a tshishiku." 
Psalms107:18 Mitshima yabo idi ikenuka mishindu ya bia kudia yonso; badi basemena ha buihi ne bibi bia ku lufu. 
Psalms107:19 Nunku bakadila kudi Yehowa mu ntatu yabo, ne yeye wakabahandisha mu makenga abo." 
Psalms107:20 Wakabatumina dî diandi, wakashikisha masama abo, wakabahandisha mu dibutuka diabo." 
Psalms107:21 Basakidile Yehowa bua luse luandi lujalame ne bua bienzedi biandi bia kukema bidiye wenzela bana ba bantu! 
Psalms107:22 Bafile milambu kudiye ya kumusakidila nʼai, bambile bantu bienzedi biandi ne misambu ya disanka!" 
Psalms107:23 Bakahueka ku mai manene mu matu, bendulula mushinga ha mai manene," 
Psalms107:24 bakamona biabo bienzedi bia Yehowa, ne malu andi a kukema mu mai a ndondo." 
Psalms107:25 Bualu bua wakela mukenji, wakahehesha tshihehele tshiakadi bu tshihuhu, tshiakabandisha mavuala a mu mai manene." 
Psalms107:26 Bakabanda mulu, bakahueka kabidi muinshi mu mai a ndondo, mitshima yabo yakandamuka bu mai bualu bua lutatu." 
Psalms107:27 Bakatenkakana eku ne eku, bakadi balendukalenduka bu muntu mukuatshike maluvu, meji abo onso akabuelakana." 
Psalms107:28 Nunku bakadila kudi Yehowa mu ntatu yabo, ne yeye wakabahandisha mu makenga abo." 
Psalms107:29 Wakaholesha tshihuhu bua tshituye biatshi, mavuala a mai manene akabatama." 
Psalms107:30 Ka bobo bakasanka bualu bua mavuala au akabatama, ne yeye wakabafikisha mu dilobo diakasuabo kufikamu." 
Psalms107:31 Basakidile biabo Yehowa bua luse luandi lujalame ne bua bienzedi biandi bia kukema bidiye wenzela bana ba bantu! 
Psalms107:32 Bamunemeshe mu disangisha dia bantu, bamutumbishe mu tshishikaminu tshia bakulu." 
Psalms107:33 Udi ukudimuna misulu bua kuluayi tshihela tshia lusenga, ne mishimi ya mai bua kuluayi buloba budi kabuyi ne mai." 
Psalms107:34 Udi ukudimuna buloba bufuke bua kuluabu tshihela tshia luehu, bua malu mabi a bantu badi bashikamemu." 
Psalms107:35 Udi ukudimuna tshihela tshia lusenga bua kuluatshi dishiba dia mai, ne buloba bûme bua kuluabu mishimi ya mai." 
Psalms107:36 Mu miaba yaya udi ushikamisha badi ne nzala, bua baseku musoko wa kushikamamu." 
Psalms107:37 Badi bakuna maminu mu madimi, badi batentula mionshi ya tumuma mu manga madimi, badi bahuola mamuma mavulangane." 
Psalms107:38 Udi ubavudishila disanka, badi bavulangana ba bungi; kena witabusha bua bungi bua bimuna biabo bukehe." 
Psalms107:39 Hadi bungi buabo bukeheshibua, ne hadibo bahuekeshibua hanshi bua dikengeshibua diabo ne ntatu ne kanyinganyinga," 
Psalms107:40 yeye udi uhongolola kulengulula kuandi ha baminyampala, udi ubendakasha mu muaba wa hatuhu mudi kamuyi nshila." 
Psalms107:41 Kadi udi ushikika bahele mu muaba wa mulu bumushibue biabo mu dikenga, udi ukumbasha bena meku babo bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko." 
Psalms107:42 Bantu bakane badi batangila bualu ebu, badi basanka; benji ba malu mabi badi bahuwa biabo." 
Psalms107:43 Udi ne meji adimuke biandi bua malu â; bantu belangane meji a luse lujalame lua Yehowa. 
Psalms108:1 Nzambi, mutshima wanyi udi mushindike; nengimbe misambu; bulelela, nengimbe misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai, kukuimbila mbutumbi buanyi." 
Psalms108:2 Tabalai, nuenu lunzenze ne lunkombe! Meme hanyi nentabashe kabundubundu!" 
Psalms108:3 Nenkusakidile wewe, Yehowa, munkatshi mua bantu; nenkuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms108:4 Bualu bua luse luebe lujalame ludi lunene, lufika tô ne ha mutu ha diulu; lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ludi lufika ku matutu." 
Psalms108:5 Nzambi, wikale mubandishibue ne butumbi ha mutu ha diulu! Butumbi buebe buikale ha buloba buonso!" 
Psalms108:6 Bua bantu bebe baudi munange bahandishibue, ubasungile ne tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole, ungitabe." 
Psalms108:7 Nzambi wakuamba dî mu kudijidila kuandi ne, Nentumbe bianyi, nentahulule buloba bua Shekeme, nengabanye tshibanda tshia Sukota." 
Psalms108:8 Gilada nguanyi; Manashe nguanyi kabidi; Efelayima udi tshifulu tshia tshiamu ku mutu wanyi; Yuda udi dikombo dianyi dia bukelenge. 
Psalms108:9 Moaba udi dilonga dianyi dia kuowelamu; nengele Edome tshisabata tshianyi; nengele mbila bua nakutamba Peleshete. 
Psalms108:10 Wanfikisha mu musoko mukolesha ne ngumbu nganyi? Wandombola tô ne ku Edome nganyi? 
Psalms108:11 Wewe Nzambi, kuakutubenga, anyi? Nzambi, kuena uluhuka bua kufila misumba ya masalayi etu." 
Psalms108:12 Utuheshe dikuatshisha diebe mu nvita yetu ne bena lukuna, bua dikuatshisha dia bantu didi hatuhu." 
Psalms108:13 Bituikala ne dikuatshisha dia Nzambi, netuenze bienzedi bia bukitu; bualu bua nyeye udi udiata badi nʼetu lukuna muinshi mua makasa andi." 
Psalms109:1 Nzambi undi ntumbisha kuhuwu biebe talalâ! 
Psalms109:2 Bualu bua mukana mua muntu mubi ne mua mashimi mudi mubulula bua kumbanda. Bakunsonguela ne ndimi idi yamba mashimi. 
Psalms109:3 Bakanyunguluka ne mei a lukuna kabidi, bakumbunda tshiyi ne bualu." 
Psalms109:4 Nansha meme mubanange, badi bambanda hatuhu; kadi ndi mbalombela Nzambi." 
Psalms109:5 Bakumpingashila malu mabi ku malu mimpe kabidi, ne lukuna bu difutu bua dinanga dianyi." 
Psalms109:6 Sungula biebe muntu mubi bua kuikaleye ku mutu kuandi; mumubandi wandi imane ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume. 
Psalms109:7 Hamulumbuluishabo, aluhuke mu tshilumbuluidi mumane kuhila, mulombu wandi ubadibue kudiye bu bubi." 
Psalms109:8 Matuku andi ikale manya-manya; munga muntu angate butangidi buandi 
Psalms109:9 Bana bandi bikale bana ba nshiya, mukashi wandi ikale mukashi wa mu lufuila." 
Psalms109:10 Bana bandi bikale bena tshiendenda, balombe biabo bintu. Badikebele bia kudia biabo kule ku miaba mibutuke idibo bashikame." 
Psalms109:11 Musombeshanganyi angate bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi ku mateyi andi. Benyi bahaule bionso biakuheteye ku mudimu wandi. 
Psalms109:12 Muntu kamufuidi luse; muntu kafuidi bana bandi ba nshiya luse. 
Psalms109:13 Tunkanunuma tuandi tujimishibue; dina diandi dijimine mu tshikondo tshidi tshilonda. 
Psalms109:14 Malu a tshishiku a batatu bandi avulukibue ku mpala kua Yehowa kababuikidi bubi bua mamuʼandi. 
Psalms109:15 Malu â ikale ku mpala kua Yehowa misangu yonso, bua yeye umushe divuluka dia bantu aba ha buloba." 
Psalms109:16 Bualu bua muntu au kakavuluka bua kulesha bantu luse, kadi wakakengesha muena dikenga ne muntu muhele, wakakengesha muena mutshima munyingalala, bua kubashiha." 
Psalms109:17 Wakananga kuela kua mulau kabidi; mulau umukuate yeye! kakasua kuvudishila muntu disanka; disanka dikale kule kudiye! 
Psalms109:18 Wakadiluatshisha kuela kua mulau bu muakadiye uluata tshivualu; mulau ubuele biau tô ne munda muandi bu mai, ubuele biau bu manyi mu mifuba yandi." 
Psalms109:19 Wikale biau kudiye bu tshmialu tshidiye udiluatshisha nʼatshi, bu mukaba udiye udijingila nʼau matuku onso." 
Psalms109:20 Edi nedikale difutu difume kudi Yehowa bua kufuta badi bambanda, dia bantu badi bambilangana malu mabi a kuenzela muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms109:21 Kadi wewe hebe, Yehowa Mukelenge wanyi, ungenzele meme hanyi bimpe bua dina diebe; bua luse luebe lujalame ludi luimpe, umpandishe bianyi." 
Psalms109:22 Bualu bua ndi muena dikenga ne ndi muhele, ne mutshima wanyi udi mutahika ka mputa munda muanyi." 
Psalms109:23 Nyaya bu mundidimbi haleheshibuau, badi bangumusha bu mudibo batutula mukumbi hamʼbidi." 
Psalms109:24 Binu bianyi bidi bitekete bualu bua kujila kuanyi kua bidia; mubidi wanyi wakunyana. 
Psalms109:25 Nakulua tshintu tshidibo badiula; hantangilabo, badi bakuha mitu yabo." 
Psalms109:26 Unkuatshishe, Yehowa Nzambi wanyi; unsungile bua luse luebe lujalame." 
Psalms109:27 Bamanye biabo ne, Etshi tshianza tshiebe; ne wewe muine, Yehowa, wakuenza bualu ebu." 
Psalms109:28 Nansha bobo bangele mulau, kadi wewe unvudishile disanka. Badi bajuka bua kufuilangana nʼanyi bafuishibue bundu, kadi muntu webe asanke biandi." 
Psalms109:29 Badi bambanda bavuale dinyanguka dia lumu luabo, badibuikile ne bundu bu mudi mu ntu mudibuikile tshikowelu:" 
Psalms109:30 Nensakidile Yehowa bikole ne mei a mukana muanji, nemmutumbishe munkatshi mua bantu ba bungi." 
Psalms109:31 Bualu bua yeye udi wimana ku tshianza tshia balume tshia muhele, bua kumusungila mu bianza bia badi bakeba kumuhisha." 
Psalms110:1 Yehowa udi wambila mukelenge wanyi ne, Ushikame biebe ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume tô ne hanavuisha badi nʼebe lukuna ditanda dia muinshi mua makasa ebe." 
Psalms110:2 Yehowa neolole bukokeshi buebe bu dikombo kule bubangile mu Siona. Ukokeshe biebe munkatshi mua badi nʼebe lukuna. 
Psalms110:3 Bantu bebe badi badifila kûdi ne disanka mu dituku diudi ukungisha misumba ya masalayi ebe. Bansongalume bebe badi balua kûdi bu mume, baluate biabo bilenga bia tshijila, bahatuke munda mua lunkelu." 
Psalms110:4 Yehowa wakuditshiha, kena ukudimuna mutshima wandi ne, Wewe udi muakuidi tshiendelele wa ku mulongo wa Melekisedeke." 
Psalms110:5 Mukelenge udi ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume, neatekeshe bakelenge halua dituku dia tshiji tshiandi." 
Psalms110:6 Nealumbuluishe ba mu bisamba bia bantu, neûshe maloba abo tente ne bitalu. Neatekeshe badi ku mutu kua buloba butantakane." 
Psalms110:7 Neanue mai ku kasulu kadi mu nshila, nunku neabishe mutu wandi." 
Psalms111:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Nensakidile Yehowa ne mutshima wanyi mujime, mu tshihangu tshia bantu bakane ne mu disangisha diabo." 
Psalms111:2 Midimu ya Yehowa idi minene, idi mikononona kudi bonso badi basanka bualu buai." 
Psalms111:3 Mudimu udiye wenza udi ne buneme ne butumbi; buakane buandi budiku tô ne kashidi. 
Psalms111:4 Wakayuluisha bantu bua midimu yandi ya kukema. Yehowa udi ne dinanga, udi ufuila bantu luse." 
Psalms111:5 Wakuha badi bamunemeka bia kudia, utu wavuluka tshihungidi tshiandi tshiendelele." 
Psalms111:6 Wakalesha bantu bandi bukole buandi mu kuenza kua midimu yandi, hakabaheye buhianyi bua bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms111:7 Bienzedi bia bianza biandi bidi bilesha bushuwa buandi ne kulumbulula kuandi kuakane, mei onso adiye wambila bantu adi mua kueyemenyibua." 
Psalms111:8 Adi majadikibue tô ne tshiendelele, akenjibua mu lulamatu lua bushuwa ne mu buakane." 
Psalms111:9 Wakatumina bantu bandi luhandu, wakabajadikila tshihungidi tshiandi bua tshikaleku tshiendelele. Dina diandi ndia tshijila ne didi divuishisha bantu dikema." 
Psalms111:10 Ditshina dia Yehowa didi tshibangidilu tshia meji; badi batumikila mikenji yandi badi ne dijingulula dia malu. Butumbi buandi budiku tshiendelele. 
Psalms112:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Disanka didi kudi muntu udi unemeka Yehowa, udi usanka bikole bua mikenji yandi!" 
Psalms112:2 Tunkanunuina tuandi netuikale ne bukitu bua bungi ha buloba; mulongo wa bantu bakane newikale ne disanka. 
Psalms112:3 Luhetu ne bubanji bidi mu nsubu muandi; buakane buandi budiku tô ne tshiendelele. 
Psalms112:4 Munya udi umueneka mu midima bua kutemena bantu bakane; Yehowa udi ne dinanga, udi ufuila bantu luse ne udi muakane." 
Psalms112:5 Muntu udi ulesha bantu luse ne udi ubasombesha bintu udi ne disanka, udi ulonda malu andi anu ha muanda." 
Psalms112:6 Bualu bua kabena bamunyungisha tshiendelele, nebavuluke muntu muakane kashidi." 
Psalms112:7 Kena utshina ngumu mibi; mutshima wandi udi mushindame, udi weyemena Yehowa." 
Psalms112:8 Mutshima wandi udi mukole, kena utshina, tô ne hamoneye bualu budiye musue bukuate bena lukuna bandi." 
Psalms112:9 Yeye wakuabanya bintu, wakuhesha bahele bintu; buakane buandi budiku tô ne tshiendelele; lusengu luandi nelubandishibue mu butumbi." 
Psalms112:10 Muntu mubi neatangile muanda eu, neakuatshike kanyinganyinga; neasumakane menu, neajimine. Disua dia bantu babi nedijimine."
