Psalms113:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Nuenu bantu ba Yehowa, mutumbishai bienu, tumbishai dina dia Yehowa!" 
Psalms113:2 Dina dia Yehowa divudishibue disanka ku dituku edi tô ne tshiendelele. 
Psalms113:3 Ku dihatuka dia diba tô ne ku dibuela diadi dina dia Yehowa didi ne bualu bua kutumbishibua. 
Psalms113:4 Yehowa udi mulu ku mutu kua bisamba bionso bia bantu, butumbi buandi budi ku mutu kua bidi mu diulu." 
Psalms113:5 Udi bu Yehowa wetu nganyi, udi ne nkuasa wandi mulu," 
Psalms113:6 udi winangila hanshi bua kumona diulu ne buloba? 
Psalms113:7 Udi ubisha muhele mu dinfuenkenya, udi ujula mukengi udi mushikame mu diala," 
Psalms113:8 bua kumushikamisha munkatshi mua baminyampala, munkatshi mua bantu bandi baneme." 
Psalms113:9 Udi ushikamisha mukashi udi nkumba mu nsubu, umuvuisha muledi wa bana udi ne disanka. Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms114:1 Hakaluhuka Bena Isalele mu Ejipitu, hakaluhuka ba mu tshiota tshia Yakoba munkatshi mua bakadi bakula muaku wa bende," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda wakalua nsubu wandi wa tshijila, Bena Isalele bakalua bukokeshi buandi." 
Psalms114:3 Mai manene akamona muanda eu, akanyema, musulu wa Yadene wakahingana tshianyima." 
Psalms114:4 Mikuna mile yakatuhika bu bimpanga, mikuna mihuekele yakatuhika bu bana ba mikoko." 
Psalms114:5 Budi bukukuata ntshinyi, wewe mai manene, bua udi unyema? Ne wewe, Yadene, bua udi uhingana tshianyima?" 
Psalms114:6 Budi bunukuata ntshinyi, nuenu mikuna mile, bua nudi nutuhika bu bimpanga? Ne nuenu, mikuna mihuekele, bua nudi nutuhika bu bana ba mikoko?" 
Psalms114:7 Zakala, wewe buloba, ku mesu kua Mukelenge, ku mesu kua Nzambi wa Yakoba," 
Psalms114:8 wakakudimuna dibue bua kuluadi kashiba ka mai, wakakudimuna dibue dia mutemu bua kuluadi mushimi wa mai." 
Psalms115:1 Kututumbishi tuetu, Yehowa, kututumbishi tuetu, kadi utumbishe dina diebe, bualu bua luse luebe lujalame ne bua udi mua kueyemenyibua." 
Psalms115:2 Munyi mudibo bakonka kudi bisamba bia bantu ne, Ahu, Nzambi wabo udi hanyi?" 
Psalms115:3 Kadi Nzambi wetu udi mu diulu, yeye utu wenza malu onso adiye musue." 
Psalms115:4 Mpingu yabo idi ya tshiamu tshia argent ne tshia or, bintu bienza kudi bianza bia bantu." 
Psalms115:5 Idi ne mukana, kadi kayena yakula; idi ne mesu, kadi kayena imona." 
Psalms115:6 Idi ne matshu, kadi kayena yunvua; idi ne mûlu, kadi kayena inunkila." 
Psalms115:7 Idi ne bianza, kadi kayena ilenga tshintu; idi ne makasa, kadi kayena yenda. Kayena yamba dî mu miminu yai." 
Psalms115:8 Bayenji badi bafuanangana nʼai, bulelela, bonso badi bayeyemena badi nunku." 
Psalms115:9 Nuenu, Bena Isalele, nueyemene bienu Yehowa! Yeye udi dikuatshisha diabo ne ngabu wabo." 
Psalms115:10 Nuenu, ba mu nsubu wa Alona, nueyemene Yehowa! Yeye udi dikuatshisha diabo ne ngabu wabo." 
Psalms115:11 Nuenu badi banemeka Yehowa, nueyemene Yehowa! Yeye udi dikuatshisha diabo ne ngabu wabo." 
Psalms115:12 Yehowa wakutuvuluka; yeye neatuvudishile disanka. Yeye neavudishile Bena Isalele disanka; neavudishile ba mu tshiota tshia Alona disanka. 
Psalms115:13 Neavudishile badi banemeka Yehowa disanka, ne badi bahuekele ne badi banene." 
Psalms115:14 Yehowa anuvudishe bua nukumbane ba bungi, nuenu ne bana banudi nulela." 
Psalms115:15 Nusankishibue kudi Yehowa, wakafuka diulu ne buloba." 
Psalms115:16 Diulu ne diulu mbia Yehowa; kadi wakuha bana ba bantu buloba. 
Psalms115:17 Bafue kabena batumbisha Yehowa, ne kakuena muntu wahueka mu muaba wa bahuwa talalâ udi umutumbisha." 
Psalms115:18 Kadi tuetu netuvudishile Yehowa disanka ku dituku edi tô ne tshiendelele. Tumbishai Yehowa! 
Psalms116:1 Ndi munange Yehowa, bualu bua wakunvua dî dianyi ne kutendakena kuanyi." 
Psalms116:2 Bualu bua wakuteleja matshu andi kundi, nunku nendile kudiye matuku onso antshidi ne muoyo." 
Psalms116:3 Mionshi ya lufu yakunyunguluka; makenga a mu Muaba wa Bafue akankuata; nakasangana ntatu ne kanyinganyinga. 
Psalms116:4 Hashishe, nakabikila dina dia Yehowa ne, Yehowa, ndi nkusengelela ne, Uhandishe muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms116:5 Yehowa udi ne dinanga, udi muakane; Nzambi wetu udi ufuila bantu luse." 
Psalms116:6 Yehowa udi ulama badi mua kutshimbakashibua. Nakahuekeshibua ne yeye wakansungila. 
Psalms116:7 Alukila ku dikisha diebe, wewe muoyo wanyi, bualu bua Yehowa wakukuenzela malu mimpe makumbane." 
Psalms116:8 Bualu bua wewe wakumpandisha bua muoyo wanyi kawikadi lufu; ne bua mesu anyi kaikadi ne binsonshi, ne bua makasa anyi kâlenduki." 
Psalms116:9 Nengende ku mpala kua Yehowa mu buloba bua badi ne muoyo. 
Psalms116:10 Nakadi ngeyemena Yehowa, nansha hanakadi ngamba ne, Ndi ntamba kukengeshibua." 
Psalms116:11 Nakamba mu ditenkakana dia mutshima wanyi ne. Bonso badi bandinga. 
Psalms116:12 Nempingashile Yehowa tshinyi bua malu andi mimpe onso akungenzeleye? 
Psalms116:13 Nengambile luhanza lua luhandu, nembikile dina dia Yehowa." 
Psalms116:14 Nemmane mitshihu yanyi kudi Yehowa; bulelela, nenyimane ku mesu kua bantu bandi bonso." 
Psalms116:15 Lufu lua bansanto bandi ludi wa mushinga mukole ku mesu kua Yehowa. 
Psalms116:16 Yehowa, bulelela, ndi muena mudimu webe, ndi muena mudimu webe, muana wa muena mudimu webe mukashi. Wewe wakusulula mionshi yakadi minsuike." 
Psalms116:17 Nenfile mulambu wa disakidila kûdi, nembikile dina dia Yehowa." 
Psalms116:18 Nemmane mitshihu yanyi kudi Yehowa; bulelela, nenyimane ku mesu kua bantu bandi bonso," 
Psalms116:19 mu biendedi bia mu nsubu wa Yehowa, munkatshi muenu, Bena Yelushalema. Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms117:1 Tumbishai Yehowa, nuenu ba mu bisamba bionso bia bantu! Numutumbishe, nuenu bukua bantu bonso!" 
Psalms117:2 Bua luse luandi lujalame luakatufuileye ludi lunene; lulamatu lua Yehowa lua bushuwa ludiku tshiendelele. Tumbishai Yehowa! 
Psalms118:1 Sakidilai Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi muimpe; bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms118:2 Bena Isalele bambe biabo ne, Luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms118:3 Ba mu nsubu wa Alona bambe biabo ne, Luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms118:4 Badi banemeka Yehowa bambe biabo ne, Luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms118:5 Mu makenga anyi nakabikila Yehowa; Yehowa wakitaba kundi, wakansulula, wakanteka mu muaba munene." 
Psalms118:6 Yehowa udi nʼanyi, tshiena ntshina nansha. Muntu udi mua kungenzela tshinyi?" 
Psalms118:7 Yehowa udi nʼanyi, udi mukuatshishi wanyi; nunku nentangile bualu bundi musue bukuata badi nʼanyi lukuna." 
Psalms118:8 Kunyemena kudi Yehowa kudi kuhita kueyemena muntu buimpe. 
Psalms118:9 Kunyemena kudi Yehowa kudi kuhita kueyemena bakelenge buimpe. 
Psalms118:10 Ba mu bisamba bionso badi bannyunguluka; mu dina dia Yehowa nembakose bituha. 
Psalms118:11 Badi bannyunguluka; bulelela, badi bannyunguluka nseke yonso; mu dina dia Yehowa nembakose bituha." 
Psalms118:12 Badi bannyunguluka bu mbulubulu, badi batema bu mudi kadilu ka mingonga ya meba kajikuka. Mu dina dia Yehowa nembakose bituha." 
Psalms118:13 Wewe, muena lukuna, wakanunkila bua meme kuhona hanshi, kadi Yehowa wakankuatshisha." 
Psalms118:14 Yehowa udi bukole buanyi ne musambu wanyi, yeye wakulua luhandu luanyi." 
Psalms118:15 Mbila ya disanka ne ya luhandu lua mu nvita idi yunvuika mu nsubu ya ntenta ya bantu bakane; tshianza tshia bukole tshia Yehowa tshidi tshienza malu a bukitu; 
Psalms118:16 tshianza tshia bukole tshia Yehowa tshiakubandishibua, tshianza tshia bukole tshia Yehowa tshidi tshienza malu a bukitu." 
Psalms118:17 Tshiena ufua nansha, nengikale ne muoyo, nendondele bantu bienzedi bia Yehowa." 
Psalms118:18 Yehowa wakunkengesha bikole, kadi kakanfikisha ku lufu." 
Psalms118:19 Ungunzuluile bibi bia ku buakane; nembuelemu, nengele Yehowa tuasakidila." 
Psalms118:20 Etshi ntshibi tshia Yehowa; bantu bakane nebabueleku. 
Psalms118:21 Nenkuhe tuasakidila, bualu bua wakuitaba kundi, wakulua luhandu luanyi kabidi." 
Psalms118:22 Dibue diakahidiabo kudi bibaki ba nsubu diakulua mutu wa ditumba. 
Psalms118:23 Mudimu eu ngua Yehowa, udi bualu bua kukema ku mesu kuetu." 
Psalms118:24 Edi ndituku didi Yehowa mujadike; tusanke bietu, disanka dietu dikalemu." 
Psalms118:25 Tudi tukusengelela, Yehowa, ne, Utusungile. Yehowa, ludi tukusengelela ne, Ututumme diakalengele." 
Psalms118:26 Udi ubuela mu nsubu wa Yehowa udi muvudishibue disanka! Tuetu tudi tukuvudishila disanka didi difumamu. 
Psalms118:27 Yehowa udi Nzambi, yeye wakututemeshila munya. Suikai nyama wa mulambu ne mionshi, umulombole tô ne ku nsengu ya ha tshioshelu." 
Psalms118:28 Wewe udi Nzambi wanyi, nenkuele tuasakidila; wewe udi Nzambi wanyi, nenkutumbishe." 
Psalms118:29 Sakidilai Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi muimpe; bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele!" 
Psalms119:1 Disanka didi kudi badi bajalame tshishiki mu bienzedi biabo, badi balonda mikenji ya Yehowa!" 
Psalms119:2 Disanka didi kudi badi banemeka mei andi, badi bamukeba ne mitshima yabo mijima." 
Psalms119:3 Bulelela, kabena benza malu mabi, badi benda mu nshila yandi." 
Psalms119:4 Wewe wakajadika mikenji yebe bua tuetu tuyenze ne dinanukila. 
Psalms119:5 Bienzedi bianyi bikale bishindame bua meme kutumikila mikenji iwakunfundila! 
Psalms119:6 Nunku tshifuishibu bundu handi mmona mikenji yebe yonso bimpe. 
Psalms119:7 Nenkuele tuasakidila ne buakane bua mutshima, hanamanya kulumbulula kuebe kuakane." 
Psalms119:8 Nentumikile mikenji iwakunfundila; kundekedi kashidi nansha. 
Psalms119:9 Nsongalume nealengeshe bienzedi biandi munyi? Adimuke biandi bu mudi dî diebe diamba. 
Psalms119:10 Nenkukebe ne mutshima wanyi mujima; kuitabushi bua meme kusesuka ku mikenji yebe. 
Psalms119:11 Nakulama dî diebe mu mutshima wanyi, bua meme tshikuenzedi bibi." 
Psalms119:12 Wewe Yehowa, usankishibue, unyishe mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:13 Mishiku yanyi idi ilondela bantu kulumbulula kuonso kua mukana muebe. 
Psalms119:14 Ndi ne disanka mu dilonda dia mei ebe, bu mundi nsanka mu bubanji buonso." 
Psalms119:15 Nengelangane meji bua mikenji yebe, nendamate mu nshila yebe." 
Psalms119:16 Nendisankishe mu mikenji yebe mifunda, tshiena mpua dî diebe muoyo." 
Psalms119:17 Wenzele muntu webe malu mimpe makumbane, bua meme ngikale ne muoyo, ne bua ntumikile dî diebe." 
Psalms119:18 Utabashe mesu anyi, bua meme kumona malu a kukema a mu mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:19 Ndi muenyi ha buloba ebu; kusokoki mikenji yebe kundi. 
Psalms119:20 Muoyo wanyi udi muhandike bua dijinga dindi nʼadi ku kulumbulula kuebe kuakane misangu yonso. 
Psalms119:21 Wewe udi ubela badi badisue, badi bedibue mulau, badi bahambuka ku mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:22 Ungumushile dihetu ne kulengulula, bualu bua nakulama mei ebe awakummanyisha." 
Psalms119:23 Hashikama baminyampala bangelela tshifufu, muntu webe nêlangane meji a mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:24 Mei ebe awakammanyisha adi disanka dianyi, adi bu bantu badi bandesha meji." 
Psalms119:25 Muoyo wanyi udi ulamata ku luhuishi; unsangashe kabidi bu mudi di diebe. 
Psalms119:26 Nakakulondela bienzedi bianyi, ne wewe wakungitaba. Unyishe mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:27 Unjinguluile nshila wa malu audi musue ngenze, ne nengelangane meji a bienzedi biebe bia kukema." 
Psalms119:28 Muoyo wanyi udi wenguluka bua kanyinganyinga; unkankamishe bu mudi dî diebe. 
Psalms119:29 Ungumushile nshila wa mashimi, unyishe mikenji yebe bua dinanga diebe." 
Psalms119:30 Nakusungula nshila wa lulamatu lua bushuwa, nakuteka mei ebe majalame ku mpala kuanyi." 
Psalms119:31 Ndi ndamata ku mei ebe awakummanyisha; Yehowa kunfuishi bundu nansha. 
Psalms119:32 Nenyemene mu nshila wa mikenji yebe, hawadiundisha mutshima wanyi." 
Psalms119:33 Yehowa, unyishe nshila wa mikenji yebe mifunda, nendamatemu tô ne kunfudilu kuandi." 
Psalms119:34 Umpe lungenyi, bua ndame mikenji yebe; ne bua meme kuyitumikila ne mutshima wanyi mujima." 
Psalms119:35 Ungendeshe mu nshila wa mikenji yebe, bualu bua ndi ne disanka bualu buai." 
Psalms119:36 Inyika mutshima wanyi bua kulondau mei awakummanyisha, kûkumishi ku lukuka lua luhetu." 
Psalms119:37 Ukudimune mesu anyi bua kâtangidi malu a hatuhu, usangashe muoyo wanyi mu nshila yebe." 
Psalms119:38 Ujadikile muntu webe mulayi webe kudiye, wowo udiku bua badi bakunemeka." 
Psalms119:39 Ungumushile tshihendu tshindi ntshina, bualu bua mei ebe majalame adi mimpe." 
Psalms119:40 Mona, nakujinga malu awakunsunguila bua meme kuenza, usangashe muoyo wanyi mu buakane buebe." 
Psalms119:41 Yehowa, luse luebe lujalame lufike kundi, nduhandu luebe mene, bu mudi mulayi webe." 
Psalms119:42 Nunku nengikale ne dî dia kukudimuna muntu udi umpenda, bualu bua ndi ngeyemena dî diebe." 
Psalms119:43 Kungumutshidi dî dia bushuwa mukana muanyi kashidi; bualu bua ndi ne ditekemena mu mei ebe majalame. 
Psalms119:44 Nunku nentumikile mikenji yebe matuku onso, tô ne tshiendelele mene." 
Psalms119:45 Nengendakane mu budishikaminyi, bualu bua nakakeba kuenza malu a wakungambila." 
Psalms119:46 Nengambe kabidi mei ebe awakammanyisha ku mesu kua bakelenge, ne tshiena nkuatshika bundu." 
Psalms119:47 Nendisankishe mu mikenji yebe, indi nnanga." 
Psalms119:48 Nengolole bianza bianyi kabidi ku mikenji yebe, indi nnanga. Nengelangane meji a mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:49 Uvuluke mulayi webe kudi mu ntu webe, uwakubuesha nʼau ditekemena munda muanyi." 
Psalms119:50 Ebu mbusambi buanyi mu dikenga dianyi ne, Mulayi webe udi usangasha muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms119:51 Badi badisue bakutamba kunseka, kadi tshiakusesuka ku mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:52 Nakuvuluka mei ebe majalame a kale, Yehowa, nakukolesha mutshima wanyi." 
Psalms119:53 Tshiji tshikole tshiakunkuata bualu bua bantu babi, badi balekela kutumikila mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:54 Mikenji yebe mifunda yakuikala misambu yanyi mu nsubu mundi mushikame bu muena luendu. 
Psalms119:55 Ndi nvuluka diha diebe butuku, Yehowa, ndi ndonda mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:56 Ebu mbualu buimpe bundi nʼabu, bualu bua nakatumikila mei awakangambila." 
Psalms119:57 Yehowa udi buhianyi buanyi; nakuamba ne, Nendame mei ebe." 
Psalms119:58 Nakulomba luse luebe ne mutshima wanyi mujima; unfuile luse bu mudi mulayi webe. 
Psalms119:59 Nakelangana meji a bienzedi bianyi, nakahingasha makasa anyi ku mei awakatumanyisha." 
Psalms119:60 Nakenda lukasa, tshiakajanguluka, bua kulonda mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:61 Mionshi ya bantu babi yakunjingila, kadi tshiakuhua mikenji yebe muoyo." 
Psalms119:62 Ndi mbika mundankulu bua kukuela tuasakidila, bualu bua mei ebe makane majalame." 
Psalms119:63 Ndi mulunda wa bonso badi bakunemeka, ne wa bonso badi benza bu mudi mei ebe amba." 
Psalms119:64 Yehowa, buloba budi bûle tente ne luse luebe lujalame; unyishe mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:65 Wewe wakuenzela muntu webe bimpe, Yehowa, bu mudi dî diebe." 
Psalms119:66 Unyishe dijingulula dimpe dia malu ne meji, bualu bua nakueyemena mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:67 Diambedi tshiyi muanze kukengeshibua, nkadi mpambuka mu nshila, kadi mpindiu ndi ntumikila dî diebe." 
Psalms119:68 Wewe udi muimpe, utu wenza bimpe; unyishe mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:69 Badi badisue badi banshiminyina bikole, kadi nendame mei awakungambila ne mutshima wanyi mujima." 
Psalms119:70 Mitshima yabo yakuvunda ne manyi, kadi ndi nsanka mu mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:71 Bidi bimpe kundi bua nakukengeshibua, bua nyile bianyi mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:72 Mikenji ya mukana muebe idi ihita bituha binunu bia biamu bia or ne bia argent kundi. 
Psalms119:73 Bianza biebe biakunfuka, biakunvuisha bu mundi; Umpe lungenyi bua meme kuyila mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:74 Badi bakunemeka nebantangile, ne basanke, bualu bua nakutekemena dî diebe." 
Psalms119:75 Yehowa, ndi mumanye ne, Kulumbulula kuebe kudi kuakane, ne bua lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa wewe wakunkengesha." 
Psalms119:76 Ndi nkusengelela ne, Luse luebe lujalame luikale busambi buanyi, bu muwakalaya muntu webe." 
Psalms119:77 Luse luebe lufike kundi, bua ngikale bianyi ne muoyo; bualu bua mikenji yebe idi disanka dianyi." 
Psalms119:78 Badi badisue bafuishibue bundu, bualu bua bakunyanga bualu buanyi ne mashimi abo; meme hanyi nengelangane meji bua mei audi ungambila." 
Psalms119:79 Badi bakunemeka balukile kundi, ne bobo badi bamanye mei ebe awakammanyisha." 
Psalms119:80 Mutshima wanyi wikale muakane tshishiki mu kulamata kua mikenji yebe mifunda bua tshifuishibu bundu ku mesu. 
Psalms119:81 Muoyo wanyi udi muhungile ne dijinga dia luhandu luebe, ndi ntekemena dî diebe." 
Psalms119:82 Mesu anyi adi ateketa handi ngindila mulayi webe, handi nkonka ne, Wewe neunsambe diba kai?" 
Psalms119:83 Bualu bua nakulua bu mulondo wa tshiseba wa nyinyo ba muishi wa kahia; kadi tshiena muhue mikenji yebe mifunda muoyo. 
Psalms119:84 Matuku a muena mudimu webe adi bungi munyi? Wewe neulumbuluishe badi bankengesha dituku kai? 
Psalms119:85 Badi badisue bakungumbuila majimba, badi kabayi balonda mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:86 Mikenji yebe yonso idi mua kueyemenyibua. Badi bankengesha ne bimbandidi bia mashimi; unkuatshishe! 
Psalms119:87 Bakamba kummana kaba kabalê ha buloba, kadi tshiakalekela kutumikila mei ebe mafunda." 
Psalms119:88 Usangashe muoyo wanyi bu mudi luse luebe lujalame, bua ndame mikenji ya mukana muebe." 
Psalms119:89 Yehowa, dî diebe didi dishindame mu diulu tshiendelele." 
Psalms119:90 Lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa ludiku tô ne ku bikondo bionso; wewe wakujadika buloba, ne budi bushindama." 
Psalms119:91 Bidi bishindama tô ne dituku edi, bu mûdi ubielela mikenji bua bintu bionso bidi bikukuatshidi bia mudimu." 
Psalms119:92 Bu mikenji yebe kayiyi mikale disanka dianyi, nakadi kujimina mu makenga anyi." 
Psalms119:93 Tshiena mpua mei audi ungambila muoyo kashidi, bualu bua wewe wakusangasha nʼau muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms119:94 Meme ndi webe, nusungile, bualu bua nakukeba kumanya mei ebe awakungambila." 
Psalms119:95 Bantu babi badi bangalamina bua kunshiha, kadi nengelangane meji a mikenji yebe ne dinanukila." 
Psalms119:96 Nakumona kunfudilu kua malu onso makane, kadi mukenji webe udi ne butshiama budi butamba bunene." 
Psalms119:97 Mona mundi munange mikenji yebe! Ndi ngelangana meji bualu buai dinda tô ne ku dilolo. 
Psalms119:98 Mikenji yebe idi invuisha muhitshi wa bena lukuna banyi meji; bualu bua yoyo itu yikala munda muanyi matuku onso. 
Psalms119:99 Ndi ntamba bayishi banyi bonso kujingulula malu, bualu bua mikenji yebe idi mu meji andi ngela." 
Psalms119:100 Ndi mpita bantu banunu kujingulula malu, bualu bua nakulama mei awakungambila." 
Psalms119:101 Ndi nkanda makasa anyi bua kaendedi mu nshila yonso mubi, bua ntumikile dî diebe." 
Psalms119:102 Tshiakuehuka ku mei ebe majalame, bualu bua wewe muine wakunyisha." 
Psalms119:103 Mona mudi mei ebe mashemakane handi ngalabula, mahite buitshi kushemakana mukana muanyi!" 
Psalms119:104 Ndi mpeta lungenyi ku mei audi ungambila, nunku ndi nkina nshila yonso ya mashimi." 
Psalms119:105 Dî diebe didi muinda ku makasa anyi ne munya muteme mu nshila wanyi. 
Psalms119:106 Nakuditshiha, nengenze munakuditshiha ne, Nentumikile mei ebe makane majalame." 
Psalms119:107 Ndi mukengeshibue bikole; usangashe muoyo wanyi, Yehowa, bu mudi dî diebe." 
Psalms119:108 Yehowa, witabushe mei adi mukana muanyi mufile kûdi bu milambu ya luse; unyishe mei ebe majalame." 
Psalms119:109 Muoyo wanyi udi mu muaba wa njiu matuku onso, kadi tshiena mpua mikenji yebe muoyo." 
Psalms119:110 Bantu babi bakunteya buteyi, kadi tshiakuehuka ku mei awakungambila." 
Psalms119:111 Nakuangata mikenji yebe bu bubianyi tshiendelele, bualu bua idi disanka dia mu mutshima wanyi." 
Psalms119:112 Nakuinyika mutshima wanyi bua kuenzau mikenji yebe mifunda tshiendelele tô ne kunshikidilu mene. 
Psalms119:113 Ndi nkina bena mitshima ibidi; kadi ndi nnanga mikenji yebe. 
Psalms119:114 Wewe udi tshisokomenu tshianyi ne ngabu wanyi; ndi ntekemena dî diebe. 
Psalms119:115 Nuenu benji ha malu mabi, umukai kundi, bua meme kutumikila mikenji ya Nzambi wanyi." 
Psalms119:116 Unjadike bu mudi mulayi webe, bua ngikale bianyi ne muoyo; tshifuishibu bundu mu ditekemena dianyi." 
Psalms119:117 Ungimanyike kulu, bua mpanduke bianyi, ndi nnanukila kutangila mikenji yebe mifunda matuku onso." 
Psalms119:118 Wewe udi ulengulula bonso badi behuka ku mikenji iwakubafundila; bua malu adibo badingangana nʼau adi hatuhu. 
Psalms119:119 Wewe udi umana bantu babi bonso ba ha buloba bu mudi mualu umusha tshikanganya; bua muanda eu ndi nnanga mikenji idi ilesha bu mûdi. 
Psalms119:120 Mubidi wanyi udi uzakala bua dikutshina dianyi; ne ndi ntshina kulumbulula kuebe. 
Psalms119:121 Nakuenza bienzedi bualame ne biakane, kundekedi mu bianza bia bankengeshi." 
Psalms119:122 Wikale tshieya kudi umena mudimu webe bua kumuenzela bimpe; badi badisue kabankengeshi nansha. 
Psalms119:123 Mesu anyi adi ateketa ne ditekemena diau dia luhandu luebe, ne dia dishikisha dia mulayi webe muakane." 
Psalms119:124 Wenzela muena mudimu webe bu mudi luse luebe lujalame; unyishe mikenji yebe mifunda. 
Psalms119:125 Ndi muena mudimu webe; umpeshe lungenyi, bua mmanye bianyi mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi." 
Psalms119:126 Tshikondo tshiakufika bua Yehowa kuenza mudimu wandi wa kulu mbuluisha, bua bantu aba bakavuisha mikenji yebe ne ntshianana." 
Psalms119:127 Bua malu â ndi ntamba kunanga mikenji yebe ku mpala kua tshiamu tshia or; e, ku mpala kua or mufula mu ditanda." 
Psalms119:128 Bua malu a ndi mbala mei ebe onso audi ungambila ne, Adi makane; ndi nkina nshila yonso wa mashimi." 
Psalms119:129 Mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi idi ya dikema, nunku muoyo wanyi udi uyilama." 
Psalms119:130 Kubulula kua mei ebe kudi kutemeshila bantu munya, kudi kuhesha muntu mutshimbakane lungenyi." 
Psalms119:131 Nakubuela mukana muanyi bu tshibalubalu, nakuhuyakana, bualu bua nakujinga mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:132 Ukudimune mpala webe kundi, undeshe dinanga, bu mutu wenzela badi bananga dina diebe." 
Psalms119:133 Ujadike biendedi bianyi mu dî diebe, kuitabushi bua dihambuka dia ku buakane dinkokeshe." 
Psalms119:134 Umpikule ku dikengesha dia bantu, bua ndame mei audi ungambila." 
Psalms119:135 Utemeshile muena mudimu webe mpala webe, unyishe mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:136 Mesu anyi adi ahatula binsonshi bu misulu ya mai; bualu bua bantu kabena batumikila mikenji yebe. 
Psalms119:137 Yehowa, wewe udi muakane, kulumbulula kuebe kudi kuakane kabidi." 
Psalms119:138 Wewe wakujadika mikenji yebe mu buakane buebe ne mu lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa luhita bunene. 
Psalms119:139 Lukunukunu luanyi luakunshiha, bualu bua bena lukuna banyi badi bahua mei ebe muoyo." 
Psalms119:140 Dî diebe didi dilengeshibue tshishiki, nunku muena mudimu webe udi nʼadi dinanga." 
Psalms119:141 Ndi muntu wa hatuhu, ndi muhetudibue, kadi tshiena mpua mei audi ungambila muoyo." 
Psalms119:142 Buakane buebe budi buakane bua kashidi, mikenji yebe idi ya bushuwa." 
Psalms119:143 Dikenga ne kanyinganyinga biakunkuata, kadi mikenji yebe idi disanka dianyi." 
Psalms119:144 Mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi idi miakane tô ne kashidi, umpeshe lungenyi bua ngikale ne muoyo." 
Psalms119:145 Ndi nkubikila ne mutshima wanyi mujima; witabe kundi, Yehowa. Nendame mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:146 Ndi nkubikila; unsungile, bua ntumikile mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi." 
Psalms119:147 Ndi ndianjila kubika butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia, ndi nkubikila, ndi ntekemena mei ebe." 
Psalms119:148 Mesu anyi adi matahale diambedi mpolo ya kutentekela butuku kayiyi mianze kufika, bua ngelangane meji a mulayi webe." 
Psalms119:149 Unvue dî dianyi bua luse luebe lujalame. Yehowa, usangashe muoyo wanyi bu mudi kulumbulula kuebe kuakane." 
Psalms119:150 Badi balengesha bua malu mabi abo badi basemena ha buihi nʼanyi; badi kule ne mikenji yebe. 
Psalms119:151 Wewe Yehowa, udi ha buihi; mikenji yebe yonso idi ya bushuwa." 
Psalms119:152 Katshia matuku mahite kele mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi yakammanyisha ne, Wewe wakajadika kuikalayiku tshiendelele." 
Psalms119:153 Umone dikenga dianyi, umpandishemu, bualu bua tshiena mpua mikenji yebe muoyo." 
Psalms119:154 Ungakuile tshilumbu tshianyi, umpikule; usangishe muoyo wanyi bu mudi mulayi webe." 
Psalms119:155 Luhandu ludi kule ne bantu babi, bualu bua kabena bakeba mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:156 Luse luebe ludi lunene, Yehowa, usangashe muoyo wanyi bu mudi kulumbulula kuebe kuakane." 
Psalms119:157 Bakengeshi banyi ne badi nʼanyi lukuna badi ba bungi, kadi tshiakuehuka ku mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi." 
Psalms119:158 Nakatangila batungidi ba tshitungu, malu abo akantonda, bualu bua kabena batumikila dî diebe." 
Psalms119:159 Elangana meji bu mundi munange mei audi ungambila! Yehowa, usangashe muoyo wanyi bu mudi luse luebe lujalame." 
Psalms119:160 Dishina dia dî diebe mbushuwa, ne kulumbulula kuebe kuonso kudiku tshiendelele." 
Psalms119:161 Baminyampala bakunkengesha kakuyi bualu, kadi mutshima wanyi udi utshina anu mei ebe." 
Psalms119:162 Ndi nsanka bua di diebe, bu mudibo basanka hasanganabo bintu bingi biakunyengabo mu nvita." 
Psalms119:163 Ndi nkina mashimi, ndi ngalengulula, kadi ndi nnanga mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:164 Ndi nkutumbisha misangu muanda mutekete ku dituku ku dituku, bualu bua mei ebe makane majalame." 
Psalms119:165 Badi bananga mikenji yebe badi ne ditalala dinene; kakuena tshidi mua kubalenduisha. 
Psalms119:166 Ndi ntekemena luhandu luebe, Yehowa, ndi ngenza mudi mikenji yebe yamba." 
Psalms119:167 Muoyo wanyi udi ulamata mikenji yebe idi ilesha bu mûdi; ndi ntamba kuyinanga. 
Psalms119:168 Ndi ndama mei ebe ne mikenji yebe; bua nshila yanyi yonso idi ku mpala kuebe. 
Psalms119:169 Kudila kuanyi kufike ku mesu kuebe, Yehowa; umpeshe lungenyi bu mudi dî diebe." 
Psalms119:170 Kutendekena kuanyi kufike ku mesu kuebe; umpandishe bu mudi mulayi webe. 
Psalms119:171 Mishiku yanyi ikutumbishe, bualu bua wewe udi unyisha mikenji yebe mifunda." 
Psalms119:172 Ludimi luanyi luimbe bua dî diebe, bualu bua mikenji yebe yonso idi miakane." 
Psalms119:173 Tshianza tshiebe tshikaleku bua kunkuatshisha, bualu bua nakusungula mei audi ungambila." 
Psalms119:174 Ndi njinga luhandu luebe, Yehowa, ne mikenji yebe idi disanka dianyi." 
Psalms119:175 Mutshima wanyi wikale ne muoyo, ne wowo neukutumbishe; mei ebe majalame ankuatshishe!" 
Psalms119:176 Nakuhambuka bu mukoko mujimine; ukebe muena mudimu webe, bualu bua tshiena mpua mikenji yebe muoyo." 
Psalms120:1 Mu dikenga dianyi ndi ndila kudi Yehowa, ne yeye udi ungunvuila." 
Psalms120:2 Yehowa, uhandishe muoyo wanyi ku mishiku ya mashimi, ku ludimi ludi ludinga." 
Psalms120:3 Nebakuhe tshinyi, nebakutentekele bualu bukuabo kai ha mutu, wewe ludimi ludi ludinga?" 
Psalms120:4 Nebakuase mikete misakisha ya muena bukitu, diatshimue ne makala adi atema bikole a ku mutshi wa mukenyi." 
Psalms120:5 Mulau udi mikuata bua ndi ndala mu Mesheke, bua ndi mushikame munkatshi mua nsubu ya ntenta ya Kedâ!" 
Psalms120:6 Muoyo wanyi wakumana kushikama musangu muhite bule munkatshi mua badi bakina ditalala. 
Psalms120:7 Ndi nnanga ditalala; kadi hanamba dî bualu buadi, bobo badi basue nvita." 
Psalms121:1 Ndi mbandisha mesu anyi ku mikuna mile. Dikuatshisha dianyi didi difuma kudi kunyi? 
Psalms121:2 Dikuatshisha dianyi didi difuma kudi Yehowa, wakafuka diulu ne buloba." 
Psalms121:3 Yeye kena witabusha bua dikasa diebe diselemuke; utu wakinama kena ulala tulu. 
Psalms121:4 Mona, udi ulama Bena Isalele kena ulala tulu, kena ubunga tulu." 
Psalms121:5 Yehowa udi mulami webe; Yehowa udi dileshi diebe ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume. 
Psalms121:6 Diba kadiena dikuenzela bualu mu munya, nansha ngondo mu butuku." 
Psalms121:7 Yehowa neakulame ku malu makole onso; yeye nealame muoyo webe. 
Psalms121:8 Yehowa neakulame hawahatuka ne hawabuela, ku dituku edi tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms122:1 Nakadi ne disanka hakungambilabo ne, Tuye mu nsubu wa Yehowa." 
Psalms122:2 Makasa etu atshidi mimane ku mishiku yebe ya mbelu, Yelushalema." 
Psalms122:3 Yelushalema, udi muasa bu musoko udi ne nsubu yau mituangane bilengele." 
Psalms122:4 Nkudi bisamba bibanda, bisamba bia Yehowa mene, bu muakadi mukenji muelela Bena Isalele, bua kusakidila dina dia Yehowa." 
Psalms122:5 Bua bakajadikamu nkuasa ya bukelenge bua kukoselahu bilumbu, nkuasa ya bukelenge ya ba mu tshiota tshia Davidi." 
Psalms122:6 Nulombele Yelushalema ditalala. Badi bakunanga bikale ne diakalengele. 
Psalms122:7 Eli talalâ dikale munda mua ngumbu yebe, diakalengele dikale mu nsubu ya bakelenge bebe." 
Psalms122:8 Bua malu a bana betu ne a balunda banyi, nengambe bianyi ne, Ditalala dikale munda muebe." 
Psalms122:9 Bualu bua nsubu wa Yehowa, Nzambi wetu, nennukebele diakalengele." 
Psalms123:1 Ndi mbandisha mesu anyi kûdi, wewe udi mushikame mu diulu." 
Psalms123:2 Mona, bu mudi mesu a bena mudimu matangisha ku tshianza tshia nfumu wabo, bu mudi mesu a muenu mudimu mukashi matangisha ku tshianza tshia nfumu wandi mukashi; mbu mudi mesu etu atangila Yehowa Nzambi wetu tô ne hatufuileye luse." 
Psalms123:3 Utufuile luse, Yehowa, utufuile luse, bualu bua tuakutamba kuhetudibua." 
Psalms123:4 Mioyo yetu idi itamba kubuidibua kudi badi bikisha ne kulenguludibua kudi badi badisue. 
Psalms124:1 Yehowa kayi muikale ku luseke luetu, ba mu Isalele bambe nunku ne," 
Psalms124:2 Bu Yehowa kayi muikale ku luseke luetu, hakajuka bantu bua kutuluisha," 
Psalms124:3 ha diba adi bakadi kutumina, tuetu batshikale ne muoyo, hakadi tshiji tshiabo tshitema bua kutuosha;" 
Psalms124:4 ha diba adi mai akadi kuhita ha mitu hetu, musulu mûla wakadi kuhita ha mutu ha mioyo yetu;" 
Psalms124:5 ha diba adi mai matambe kûla akadi kuhita ha mutu ha mioyo yetu. 
Psalms124:6 Yehowa asankishibue, udi kayi mutufile kudibo bu tshintu tshia kukuatabo ku menu." 
Psalms124:7 Mioyo yetu yakuhanduka bu mudi nyunyu uhanduka mu buteyi bua bilembi. Buteyi buakutshibuka, tuakuhanduka." 
Psalms124:8 Dikuatshisha dietu didi mu dina dia Yehowa wakafuka diulu ne buloba. 
Psalms125:1 Badi beyemena Yehowa badi bu mukuna wa Siona, udi kauyi mua kunyungishibua, kadi udi mukandamane kashidi." 
Psalms125:2 Bu mudi mikuna inyunguluka Yelushalema, mbu mudi Yehowa unyunguluka bantu bandi ku dituku edi tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms125:3 Bua dikombo dia malu mabi kadiena dishala kashidi ku luseke lua buhianyi bua bantu bakane, bua bantu bakane kabolodi bianza biabo ku malu adi abahambuisha." 
Psalms125:4 Yehowa, wenzele bantu bakane bimpe, ne badi bakane mu mitshima yabo." 
Psalms125:5 Kadi badi basesuka bua kuya mu nshila mikonyangale, Yehowa neahumushe diatshimue ne benji ba maluʼmabi. Ditalala dikale kudi Bena Isalele!" 
Psalms126:1 Hakakudimuna Yehowa buhika bua Siona bua kuhingashamu bantu bandi, tuakadi bu badi balota tshilota." 
Psalms126:2 Mu diba adi mukana muetu muakadi mûle tente ne tuseku ludimi luetu luakûla tente ne mbila ya disanka. Mu diba adi bakambila ngana munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu ne Yehowa wakabenzela malu manene. 
Psalms126:3 Yehowa wakatuenzela malu manene; tudi ne disanka. 
Psalms126:4 Yehowa, ukudimune buhika buetu bua kutuha diakalengele; bu mûdi ûsha misulu ya mai mu Luseke lua Sude." 
Psalms126:5 Badi bamiamina maminu ne binsonshi ku mesu nebahuole bia kudia ne mbila ya disanka. 
Psalms126:6 Udi uya biandi, wenda udila, mutuale maminu bua kukuna, neahingane bulelela ne mbila ya disanka, mutuale bisumbu biandi bia blé." 
Psalms127:1 Bikala Yehowa kayi wasa nsubu, badi bamuasa badi bakuata mudimu eu hatuhu. Bikala Yehowa kayi ulama musoko, mutentekedi udi utabala hatuhu." 
Psalms127:2 Ebu mbualu bua hatuhu ne, Nudi nubika hatshiatshia, nudi nunenga ha kulala butuku, nudi nudia bidia binuakukuatshila mudimu mukole; bualu bua yeye udi ubifila kudi bananga bandi hatshidibo balala tulu." 
Psalms127:3 Monai, bana badi buhianyi bufume kudi Yehowa, bana badi bahatuka munda mua mamu wabo badi difutu diandi." 
Psalms127:4 Bu mudi mikete ya mu tshianza tshia muena bukitu, nunku mudi bana baledibue mu bunsongalume bua tatu wabo." 
Psalms127:5 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi ne musaka wandi mule tente nʼabo! Kabena bamufuisha bundu hayikileye ne bena lukuna bandi mu tshibuelelu tshia ku musoko. 
Psalms128:1 Disanka didi kudi muntu yonso udi unemeka Yehowa, udi wenda mu nshila yandi!" 
Psalms128:2 Bua wewe neudie bia kudia biwakukuatshila mudimu ku bianza biebe; newikale ne disanka, newikale ne diakalengele." 
Psalms128:3 Mukashi webe neikale bu muonshi wa tumuma udi ukuama bimpe munda mua nsubu muebe. Bana bebe baledibue nebikale bu ntonga ya mitshi ya olive, banyunguluke mesa ebe." 
Psalms128:4 Mona, adi ndisanka dia muntu udi unemeka Yehowa." 
Psalms128:5 Yehowa akuvudishile disanka difume mu Siona! Umone biebe diakalengele dia Yelushalema matuku onso a muoyo webe. 
Psalms128:6 E, umone biebe bana ba bana bebe baledibue. Ditalala dikale kudi Bena Isalele!" 
Psalms129:1 Bakankengesha ku buana buanyi tô ne mpindiu — ba mu Isalele bambe nunku ne," 
Psalms129:2 Bakankengesha ku buana buanyi tô ne mpindiu, kadi kabakumpita bukole." 
Psalms129:3 Bakadi badima ne lukasu lukoka kudi nyama bakendeshila lukasu ha nyima hanyi; bakalehesha nshila yabo. 
Psalms129:4 Yehowa udi muakane; yeye wakakosa mionshi ya bantu babi. 
Psalms129:5 Bonso badi bakina Siona bafuishibue bundu, batshungulushibue luanyima." 
Psalms129:6 Bikale bu bisosa bibishe bidi bimena ha misaka ya nsubu, bidi bifubidila kabiyi bianze kudiunda;" 
Psalms129:7 bidi munowi kayi ubiusha mu tshianza tshiandi, ne musuiki wa bisumbu bia blé kayi ubiusha mu tshiadi tshiandi." 
Psalms129:8 Badi bahita mu nshila kabidi kabena bamba ne, Disanka dia Yehowa dikale kunudi; tudi tunuvudishila disanka mu dina dia Yehowa." 
Psalms130:1 Ndi ndila kûdi, Yehowa, mu dijimba dia kanyinganyinga mundi mushikame." 
Psalms130:2 Mukelenge, unvue dî dianyi. Matshu ebe ateleje dî dia kutendekena kuanyi." 
Psalms130:3 Yehowa, bu wewe mubale dihambuka dia bantu, muntu kai wakadi mua kuimana, Mukelenge?" 
Psalms130:4 Kadi dibuikidila dia mibi didi kûdi, bua wewe unemekibue." 
Psalms130:5 Ndi ngindila Yehowa, muoyo wanyi udi umuindile, ne mu dî diandi mundi ntekemena." 
Psalms130:6 Muoyo wanyi udi windila Yehowa, mutambe dindila dia batentekedi badi bindila kutshia kua butuku; bulelela, mutambe dindila dia batentekedi badi bindila kutshia kua butuku." 
Psalms130:7 Bena Isalele, nuikale ne ditekemena dienu mu Yehowa, bualu hua kudi Yehowa ke kudi luse lujalame, kudiye kudi buhikudi bukumbane kabidi." 
Psalms130:8 Ne yeye neahikule Isalele ku dihambuka diandi dionso. 
Psalms131:1 Yehowa, mutshima wanyi kawena udibandisha, mesu anyi kaena ne dihetu. Tshiena ngela meji anyi ku mianda mitambe bunene, anyi ku mianda mitambe kunkemesha bua meme kuyenza." 
Psalms131:2 Bulelela, nakuholesha mutshima wanyi, nakûtalasha, bu muana mujile mabele utshidi kudi mamuʼandi. Muoyo udi munda muanyi udi bu muana mujile mabele." 
Psalms131:3 Nuenu Bena Isalele, nuikale ne ditekemena dienu mu Yehowa, ku diba edi tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms132:1 Yehowa, mubike Davidi mu ntatu yandi yonso." 
Psalms132:2 Uvuluke muakaditshiheye kudi Yehowa, muakalayeye Nzambi Mukole wa Yakoba ne," 
Psalms132:3 Bulelela, tshiena mbuela mu nsubu wanyi wa ntenta, tshiena mbanda ha bulalu buanyi;" 
Psalms132:4 tshiena ngitabusha bua tulu tunkuate ku mesu anyi, anyi bua tulu tukole tubuikile bilafinyi bianyi;" 
Psalms132:5 tô ne hanaheta muaba wa Yehowa kuikaleyemu, nsubu wa Nzambi Mukole wa Yakoba kuikaleyemu." 
Psalms132:6 Monai, tuakunvua lumu lua muaba eu mu Efelata, tuakûmona mu madimi a mu Yala." 
Psalms132:7 Tubuele mu muaba mudiye muikale, tumutendelele ku ditanda dia muinshi mua makasa andi." 
Psalms132:8 Juka biebe, Yehowa, uye ku tshikishilu tshiebe, wewe muine ne mushete wa tshihungidi wa bukole buebe." 
Psalms132:9 Baluatshishe bakuidi bebe ne buakane, bansanto bebe bele mbila bua disanka diabo." 
Psalms132:10 Bualu bua muena mudimu webe Davidi, kubengi mpala wa webe ûdi muele manyi ha mutu." 
Psalms132:11 Yehowa wakaditshiha kudi Davidi ne mutshima udi wa bushuwa, kena ukudimuka bua kubenga dî diandi ne, Neashikike wahatuka munda muebe mu nkuasa webe wa bukelenge." 
Psalms132:12 Biatumikila hana bebe tshihungidi tshianyi ne mikenji yanyi bindualua kubayisha, bana babo baledibue nebashikame mu nkuasa webe wa bukelenge tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms132:13 Bualu bua Yehowa wakusungula Siona; wakamunanga bu muaba wandi wa kuikaleye, wamba ne," 
Psalms132:14 Etshi ntshikishilu tshianyi tô ne kashidi. Nengikaleku, bualu bua ndi mutshinange." 
Psalms132:15 Nenyudishile bia kudia bia musoko eu disanka dikumbane; nengukutshishe bahele badimu ne bia kudia. 
Psalms132:16 Nenduatshishe bakuidi badimu luhandu, bansanto badimu nebele mbila bua disanka diabo." 
Psalms132:17 Mu musoko au nemmueneshile Davidi lusengu; nakulongoluelamu undi muele manyi muinda. 
Psalms132:18 Nenduatshishe bena lukuna bandi bundu, ka dî tshifulu tshiandi tshia butumbi netshikenke ku mutu wandi." 
Psalms133:1 Monai, bidi bitamba buimpe ne bia disanka bua bukua bantu badikunguishe hamue ne mutshima umue!" 
Psalms133:2 Bidi bu manyi a mushinga mukole medibue ha mutu, ahuekela ha muedi, ha muedi wa Alona mene, ahuekela tô ne ha mubangu wa ha mutu ha bivualu biandi." 
Psalms133:3 Bidi bu mume wa ku mukuna wa Hêmona, udi uhuekela ha mikuna ya Siona. Bualu bua Yehowa wakavudishilaku bantu disanka, disanka mene dia muoyo tshiendelele." 
Psalms134:1 Monai, nuvudishile Yehowa disanka, nuenu bena mudimu bonso ba Yehowa, badi bimana mu nsubu wa Yehowa butuku!" 
Psalms134:2 Bishai bianza bienu ku muaba wa tshijila, nuvudishile Yehowa disanka." 
Psalms134:3 Yehowa akuvudishile disanka difume ku Siona, yeye mene wakafuka diulu ne buloba." 
Psalms135:1 Tumbishai Yehowa. Tumbishai dina dia Yehowa. Numutumbishe, nuenu bena mudimu ba Yehowa," 
Psalms135:2 nuenu badi bimane mu nsubu wa Yehowa, mu biendedi bia mu nsubu wa Nzambi wetu." 
Psalms135:3 Tumbishai Yehowa, bua Yehowa udi muimpe; nuimbe misambu ya kutumbisha nʼai dina diandi, bualu ebu budi bulengele." 
Psalms135:4 Bua Yehowa wakudisunguila Yakoba bua kuikaleye nʼandi, wakadisunguila Isalele bu buhianyi buandi." 
Psalms135:5 Bualu bua ndi mumanye ne, Yehowa udi munene, ne Mukelenge wetu udi ha mutu ha nzambi yonso" 
Psalms135:6 Yehowa wakenza malu onso akasueye kuenza, mu diulu ne ha buloba, mu mai manene ne mu ndondo yonso." 
Psalms135:7 Yeye udi ubandisha dibungi ku matengu a buloba, udi wenzela nvula miele ya nvula, udi uhatula luhehele mu bibutshilu biandi." 
Psalms135:8 Yeye wakashiha banʼa bute ba mu Ejipitu, ba bantu ne ba nyama." 
Psalms135:9 Yeye wakatuma bimanyinu ne malu a kukema munkatshi muenu, nuenu Bena Ejipitu, biakakengesha Palô ne bena mudimu bandi bonso." 
Psalms135:10 Yeye wakabutula bisamba bia bantu bia bungi, wakashiha bakelenge bakadi ne bukole:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, ne bakelenge bonso ba mu Kanâna." 
Psalms135:12 Wakahesha bantu bandi bukole buabo bu buhianyi, bu buhianyi kudi Bena Isalele, bantu bandi." 
Psalms135:13 Yehowa, dina diebe didiku tô ne tshiendelele; Yehowa, divuluka dia dina diebe didiku tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms135:14 Bualu hua Yehowa nealumbuluile bantu bandi ne kulumbulula kuakane, neafuile bena mudimu bandi luse." 
Psalms135:15 Mpingu ya bisamba bia bantu idi ya tshiamu tshia argent ne tshia or, idi bintu bienza ku bianza bia bantu." 
Psalms135:16 Idi ne mukana, kadi kayena yakula; idi ne mesu, kadi kayena imona." 
Psalms135:17 Idi ne matshu, kadi kayena yunvua; mukana muai kamuena muhuya." 
Psalms135:18 Badi bayenza badi bafuanangana nʼai; bulelela, bonso badi bayeyemena badi nunku!" 
Psalms135:19 Nuenu Bena Isalele, nuvudishile Yehowa disanka! Nuenu ba mu tshiota tshia Alona, nuvudishile Yehowa disanka!" 
Psalms135:20 Nuenu ba mu tshiota tshia Lewi, nuvudishile Yehowa disanka! Nuenu badi banemeka Yehowa, nuvudishile Yehowa disanka!" 
Psalms135:21 Badi mu Siona bavudishile Yehowa disanka, Yeye mene udi mushikame mu Yelushalema! Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms136:1 Sakidilai Yehowa, bualu bua yeye udi muimpe, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:2 Sakidilai Nzambi wa nzambi yonso, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:3 Sakidilai Mukelenge wa bakelenge, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:4 Numusakidile bua yeye nkayandi udi wenza malu a kukema, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:5 Numusakidile bua Yeye wakafuka bia mu diulu ne meji andi, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:6 Numusakidile bua yeye wakadisha buloba ha mutu ha mai, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:7 Numusakidile bua yeye wakafuka minda minene, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:8 Wakafuka diba bua kukokeshadi mu munya, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:9 Wakafuka ngondo ne mitoto bua kukokeshabi butuku, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:10 Numusakidile bua yeye wakashiha banʼa bute ba mu Ejipitu, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:11 Wakaluhula Bena Isalele munkatshi muabo, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:12 Wakabaluhula ne tshianza tshikole ne diboko diandi diolola, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:13 Numusakidile bua Yeye wakahandulula mai a mu Mai Manene Makunze hankatshinkatshi, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:14 Wakahitshisha Bena Isalele hankatshi hau, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:15 Kadi wakabutula Palô ne misumba yandi ne masalayi mu Mai Manene Makunze, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:16 Numusakidile bua Yeye wakalombela bantu bandi bua kuhitshilabo mu tshihela, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:17 Numusakidile bua Yeye wakashiha bakelenge banene, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:18 Wakashiha bakelenge bakadi ne lumu lunene, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele:" 
Psalms136:19 Sihona, mukelenge wa Bena Amole, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele," 
Psalms136:20 ne Oga, mukelenge wa Bashana, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:21 Wakafila buloba buabo bu buhianyi kudi bantu bandi, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:22 Wakabufila bu buhianyi kudi Isalele muntu wandi, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:23 Yeye wakatuvuluka hatuakadi bantu bahuekele, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:24 Wakatuhandisha mu bianza bia bakadi nʼetu lukuna, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:25 Yeye utu wafila bia kudia kudi bintu bionso bidi ne muoyo, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms136:26 Sakidilai Nzambi wa mu diulu, bua luse luandi ludi lujalame tshiendelele." 
Psalms137:1 Hatuakadi hehi ne misulu ya mu Babulona, tuakashikamaku, bulelela, tuakadila, hatuakavuluka Siona." 
Psalms137:2 Tuakakudika nkombe yetu ku mitshi ya nshiba yakadi mu buloba abu. 
Psalms137:3 Bualu bua mu buloba abu bakadi batubuesha mu buhika bakasua kutuimbisha mei a misambu; bakadi banukengesha bakasua tuetu tubimbile musambu wa disanka bamba ne, Nutuimbile musambu wa mu misambu ya mu Siona," 
Psalms137:4 Netumanye mua kuimba musambu wa Yehowa mu buloba bua bende munyi? 
Psalms137:5 Yelushalema, binahua bualu buebe muoyo, tshianza tshianyi tshia balume tshihange mudimu watshi!" 
Psalms137:6 Ludimi luanyi lulamate mu tshilakalaka tshianyi, bingikala tshiyi nkuvuluka; bingikala tshiyi ntumbisha Yelushalema ha mutu ha disanka dianyi didi ditamba bunene!" 
Psalms137:7 Yehowa, uvuluke muakenza Bena Edome mu dituku dia makenga a mu Yelushalema, bu muakambabo ne, Ubutulai! Ubutulai, tô ne ku bishimikidi biau!" 
Psalms137:8 Ahu, wewe muana mukashi wa Babulona, udi ne bualu bua kubutudibua, disanka dikale kudi wakuhingashila difutu didi bu bienzedi biwakutuenzela." 
Psalms137:9 Disanka dikale kudi wakuata bana bebe batekete, wabatuta mitu yabo ku mabue." 
Psalms138:1 Ndi nkusakidila ne mutshima wanyi mujima, nenkuindile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai ku mpala kua nzambi ya hatuhu." 
Psalms138:2 Nenkutendelele ne mutu wanyi muinyika mutume ku ntempelo webe wa tshijila, neasakidile dina diebe bua luse luebe lujalame ne bua lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa. Bualu bua wakutumbisha dina diebe ne dî diebe ha mutu ha malu onso." 
Psalms138:3 Mu dituku dinakukubikila, wewe wakitaba kundi, wakankolesha bikole mu muoyo wanyi." 
Psalms138:4 Yehowa, bakelenge bonso ba ha buloba nebakusakidile, bualu bua bakunvua mei a mukana muebe." 
Psalms138:5 Bulelela, nebimbe misambu bua bienzedi bia Yehowa, bua butumbi bua Yehowa budi bunene." 
Psalms138:6 Yehowa udi muhandishibue mulu, kadi udi umona bantu bahuekele; udi mumanye badi ne dihetu hatshidibo kule." 
Psalms138:7 Nansha bingenda munkatshi mua makenga, wewe neusangashe muoyo wanyi. Udi wolola tshianza tshiebe bua kukanda tshiji tshia badi nʼanyi lukuna, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi tshinsungila." 
Psalms138:8 Yehowa neamane malu adiye uhangidisha bua bualu buanyi. Yehowa, luse luebe ludi lujalame tô ne tshiendelele. Kulekedi mudimu uwakenza ne bianza biebe." 
Psalms139:1 Yehowa, wewe wantangila munda muanyi, wakummanya!" 
Psalms139:2 Wewe muine udi mumanye hanashikama hanshi ne hanajuka; udi ujingulula meji anyi hantshidi kule. 
Psalms139:3 Wewe udi ujingulula kuenda kuanyi ne kulala kuanyi hanshi, udi mumanye bienzedi bianyi bionso." 
Psalms139:4 Bua dî kadiyi dianze kuikala ku ludimi luanyi, ne mona, wewe Yehowa udi mudi manye tshishiki." 
Psalms139:5 Wewe udi unnyunguluka ku nyima ne ku mpala, udi uteka tshianza tshiebe hamʼbidi hanyi." 
Psalms139:6 Lungenyi alu nunku ludi lutamba kunkemesha; ludi lutamba bule, tshiena mua kuluheta." 
Psalms139:7 Kunyi kundi mua kuya kudi kakuyi Nyuma webe? Ndi mua kunyemena kudi kunyi kudi mesu ebe kâyi ammona? 
Psalms139:8 Binabanda mu diulu, wewe udiku! Binavuisha Muaba wa Bafue bu muaba wanyi wa kulala, mona wewe udiku!" 
Psalms139:9 Binangata mahuahua a dinda, binaya kushikama mu nseke idi kunfudilu kua mai manene," 
Psalms139:10 tshianza tshiebe netshindomboleku, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume netshinkuateku." 
Psalms139:11 Butamba bianyi ne, Bulelela mîdima neyimbuikile, ne munya udi unnyunguluka newikale bu butuku;" 
Psalms139:12 mîdima mene kayena ijibakasha bintu bua kubisokoka kûdi, butuku budi butema bu munya; bua mîdima idi bu munya kûdi." 
Psalms139:13 Bua wewe wakafuka bituha bianyi bia munda mua mubidi, wakalamakasha bituha bianyi bia mubidi mu difu dia mamuʼanyi." 
Psalms139:14 Ndi nkusakidila, bualu bua difukibua dianyi didi dilengesha meji a mua kukunemeka bikole, didi dikemesha. Midimu yebe yonso idi malu a kukema; mutshima wanyi udi mumanye bualu ebu bimpe." 
Psalms139:15 Mubidi wanyi kawakadi musokoka kûdi, hanakadi nfukibua mu busokoko, hakadi bituha bia mubidi wanyi bilamakasha mu ndondo ya buloba." 
Psalms139:16 Mesu ebe akamona bituha bia mubidi wanyi kabiyi bianze kulamakana. Matuku anyi onso akadi mafunda mu mukanda webe, matuku mene awakahangidisha bua meme ngikale ne muoyo, diambedi dituku dimue dia munkatshi muau kadiyi dianze kuikalaku." 
Psalms139:17 Nzambi, mona mudi meji ebe mikale a mushinga mukole kundi! Mona mudi bungi buau buhite bunene!" 
Psalms139:18 Bu meme muâbale, akadi kuhita lusenga bungi. Hanatabala, ntshidi nʼebe." 
Psalms139:19 Nzambi, bidi bimpe bua wewe ushihe bantu babi, ne bua badi bamatshisha mashi a bantu bumuke kundi." 
Psalms139:20 Badi bakutombokela ne mei abo mabi, badi nʼebe lukuna badi batela dina diebe tshitelatela." 
Psalms139:21 Yehowa, tshiena nkina badi bakukina, anyi? Tshiena nyingalala bua badi bajuka bua kukutantamena, anyi?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndi mbakina ne lukuna lukole lua tshishiki; ndi mbabala bu bena lukuna banyi. 
Psalms139:23 Nzambi, utangile munda muanyi, umanye mutshima wanyi. Untete, Umanye meji anyi." 
Psalms139:24 Umone ne malu mabi adi munda muanyi, undombole mu nshila wa tshiendelele." 
Psalms140:1 Yehowa, umpandishe mu bianza bia bantu babi; undame kudi bena tshimbambila." 
Psalms140:2 Badi bahangidisha malu mabi mu mitshima yabo, badi basonsola bantu bua kuluanganabo nvita matuku onso." 
Psalms140:3 Badi basakisha ndimi yabo bua kutuayi bu ya nyoka, lulengu lua nyoka wa mbanvu ludi mukana muabo." 
Psalms140:4 Yehowa, undame ku bianza bia bantu babi, undame kudi bena tshimbambila, bakuhangidisha bua kuselemusha makasa anyi." 
Psalms140:5 Badi badisue bakasokoka buteyi bua kunkuatamu, bakunsokokela masoka; bakuanda bukuondo ha buihi ne nshila, bakume ya mateyi." 
Psalms140:6 Ndi ngambila Yehowa ne, Wewe udi Nzambi wanyi; Yehowa, teleja matshu ebe ku kutendekena kuanyi." 
Psalms140:7 Yehowa, Mukelenge wanyi, bukole bua luhandu luanyi, wewe wakubuikila mutu wanyi mu dituku dia nvita." 
Psalms140:8 Yehowa, kuheshi mundi mubi malu adiye musue; kulumbuluishi bualu buandi bubi buakuhangidisheye." 
Psalms140:9 Hadi badi bannyunguluke bahisha mitu yabo, malu mabi adi ahatuka mu mishiku yabo ahone ha mutu habo." 
Psalms140:10 Bamatshishe makala a kahia atshidi atema hamʼbidi habo. Bedibue mu kahia, mu majimba male, bua kabajuki kabidi." 
Psalms140:11 Muena mukoso kajadikibu mu buloba; dikenga dibi dikebe muena tshimbambila bua kumubutula. 
Psalms140:12 Ndi mumanye ne, Yehowa neabingishe muena dikenga hamulumbuluishabo, nealumbuluile bahele biakane." 
Psalms140:13 Bulelela, bantu bakane nebasakidile dina diebe; badi ne mitshima miakane nebashikame ku mpala kuebe." 
Psalms141:1 Yehowa, ndi nkubikila; ulue kundi lukasa. Teleja matshu ebe ku dî dianyi handi nkubikila." 
Psalms141:2 Kulomba kuanyi kuikale ku mpala kuebe bu muhuya wa musenga wa manananshi, ne kuolola kua bianza bianyi kuikale bu mulambu udibo bafila dilolo." 
Psalms141:3 Yehowa, uteke mutentekedi bua kukanda mukana muanyi; ulame tshibi tshia ku mishiku yanyi." 
Psalms141:4 Kuinyiki mutshima wanyi ku bualu bubi, ne mu kuenza kuanyi kua bienzedi bibi handi ndamata kudi benji ba malu mabi. Tshidi bianyi bia kudia biabo bilengele." 
Psalms141:5 Muntu muakane antute, muanda eu newikale luse kundi; ambele biandi, kubela kuandi nekuikale bu manyi ha mutu hanyi; mutu wanyi kaubengi manyi au; bua ntshidi ndomba bua malu mabi abo." 
Psalms141:6 Hedibue bakokeshi babo hanshi ha mabue, nebunvue mei anyi, bua adi mashemakane." 
Psalms141:7 Bu mudi muntu ubundulula buloba, ubuhanda ne lukasu, mbu mudi mifuba yetu mimuangalashibue ku mushiku wa Muaba wa Bafue." 
Psalms141:8 Kadi mesu anyi adi kûdi wewe, Yehowa Mukelenge; ndi nkueyemena wewe; kushiyi muoyo wanyi hatuhu." 
Psalms141:9 Undame bua tshikuatshibu mu bukuondo buakungandabo, ne mu mateyi a benji ba malu mabi." 
Psalms141:10 Bantu babi bakuatshibue mu makuondo abo bobo, handi mpanduka." 
Psalms142:1 Ndi ndila ne dî dianyi kudi Yehowa, ndi ntendekena Yehowa ne dî dianyi." 
Psalms142:2 Ndi mpumuna mei a kuabakana kuanyi ku mpala kuandi, ndi mmulondela ntatu yanyi ku mpala kuandi." 
Psalms142:3 Hahanga nyuma wanyi munda muanyi, wewe udi mumanye nshila wanyi. Mu nshila mundi ngendela bakunteya buteyi." 
Psalms142:4 Utangile ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume, umone biebe; bua kakuena muntu udi mummanye; kakuena tshinyemenu tshia meme kunyemena, kakuena muntu udi ne muoyo wanyi bualu." 
Psalms142:5 Ndi ndila kûdi, Yehowa; ndi ngamba ne, Wewe udi tshinyemenu tshianyi, udi buhianyi buanyi mu buloba bua badi ne muoyo." 
Psalms142:6 Unvua kudila kuanyi, bualu bua ndi mutambe kuhuekeshibua hanshi. Umpandishe mu bianza bia bakengeshi banyi, bualu bua badi bampita bukole." 
Psalms142:7 Umushe muoyo wanyi mu nsubu wa lukanu, bua nsakidile dina diebe. Bantu bakane nebalue kunyunguluka; bualu bua wewe neunvudishile diakalengele." 
Psalms143:1 Yehowa, unvua kulomba kuanyi, uteleje matshu ebe ku kutendekena kuanyi, witabe kundi bua lulamatu luebe lua bushuwa, ne bua buakane buebe kabidi." 
Psalms143:2 Kulumbuluishi muena mudimu webe, bualu bua kakuena muntu udi muakane ku mesu kuebe hatshidiye ne muoyo." 
Psalms143:3 Bua muena lukuna wakukengesha muoyo wanyi; wakututa muoyo wanyi hanshi ha buloba; wakunshikamisha mu miaba ya midima bu bantu bakafua kale. 
Psalms143:4 Nunku muoyo wanyi udi uhanga munda muanyi, mutshima wanyi udi mukuatshike buowa munda muanji." 
Psalms143:5 Ndi nvuluka matuku a diambedi, ndi ngelangana meji a bienzedi biebe bionso; ndi ngelangana meji a mudimu wa bianza biebe." 
Psalms143:6 Ndi ngolola bianza bianyi kûdi; muoyo wanji udi ukujinga bu mudi buloba bûme busue mai. 
Psalms143:7 Yehowa, witabe kundi lukasa; nyuma wanyi udi uhanga. Kusokoki mpala webe kundi, bua tshikadi bu badi bahueka mu Dijimba dia Bafue." 
Psalms143:8 Ungunvuishe luse luebe lujalame ne dinda dionso, bua ndi ngeyemena kûdi. Ummanyishe nshila undi ne bualu bua kuendela, bualu bua ndi mbisha muoyo wanyi kûdi." 
Psalms143:9 Yehowa, umpandishe kudi badi nʼanyi lukuna; ndi nyemena kûdi bua kusokoma." 
Psalms143:10 Unyishe mua kuenza bu mudi disua diebe, bualu bua wewe udi Nzambi wanyi. Nyuma webe muimpe andombole mu buloba bulandakane." 
Psalms143:11 Yehowa, usangashe muoyo wanyi bua dina diebe. Mu buakane buebe uhatule muoyo wanyi mu dikenga." 
Psalms143:12 Mu luse luebe lujalame ujimishe badi nʼanyi lukuna, ubutule bonso badi batatshisha muoyo wanji; bualu bua ndi muena mudimu webe." 
Psalms144:1 Yehowa, dibue dianyi, avudishibue disanka; udi uyisha bianza bianyi mua kuluanganabi nvita, ne minu yanyi mua kuelayi bielelu bia nvita." 
Psalms144:2 Yeye udi mundeshi wa luse lujalame, ne musoko wanyi mukoleahibue ne ngumbu, udi tshibumba tshianyi tshile, ne muhandishi wanyi. Udi ngabu wanyi ne ndi mpeta tshinyemenu kudiye. Yeye udi ukokesha bantu banyi ku nyima kuanyi." 
Psalms144:3 Yehowa, muntu udi nganyi, bua wewe udi mumumanye? Muana wa muntu udi nganyi bua wewe udi umuelela meji?" 
Psalms144:4 Muntu udi bu muhuya; matuku andi adi bu mundidimbi udi ujimina. 
Psalms144:5 Yehowa, winyike diulu diebe, uhueke biebe hanshi. Ulenge mikuna bua muishi wa kahia uhatukemu." 
Psalms144:6 Ubahenyishele miele ya nvula, ubamuangalashe; ubele mikete yebe, ubihate." 
Psalms144:7 Olola tshianza tshiebe mulu mûdi mushikame, umpandishe, umpatule munda mua mai mavule, mu bianza bia bantu ba bende." 
Psalms144:8 Mukana muabo mudi muamba mei a mashimi, tshianza tshiabo tshia balume tshidi tshidinga." 
Psalms144:9 Nzambi, nenkuindile musambu muhia-muhia; nenkuimbile misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai ne lunzenze ludi ne nshinga dikumi." 
Psalms144:10 Wewe udi uha bakelenge luhandu mu nvita, udi ubandisha Davidi, muntu webe, ku muele udi ushihangana." 
Psalms144:11 Unsungile, umpandishe mu tshianza tshia bantu ba bende, badi bena mukana mudi muamba mei a mashimi, badi bena tshianza tshia balume tshidi tshidinga." 
Psalms144:12 Bana betu ba balume bikale bakole mu bunsongalume buabo bu mitshi yakumana kudiunda. Bana betu ba bakashi bikale bu makunshi a ku matumba a nsubu masonga bu mabue adibo basa nʼau nsubu wa mukelenge 
Psalms144:13 Mayeba etu ûle tente, atuheshe bia kudia bia mushindu ne mushindu. Mikoko yetu ilele binunu ne binunu bia bana mu madimi etu;" 
Psalms144:14 ngombe yetu ituale bujitu bua bungi. Kabahangi ngumbu, kabaluhukimu; kakuikadi muadi mukole mu misesu yetu." 
Psalms144:15 Disanka didi kudi bantu badi mu tshikadilu atshi! Disanka didi kudi bantu badi ne Yehowa, Nzambi wabo!" 
Psalms145:1 Nenkutumbishe, Nzambi wanyi, Mukelenge wanyi. Nenvudishile dina diebe disanka tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms145:2 Nenkuvudishile disanka ku dituku ku dituku, nentumbishe dina diebe tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms145:3 Yehowa udi munene, budiye nʼabu mbua kutumbishibua bikole. Bunene buandi kabuena mua kujinguludibua." 
Psalms145:4 Ba mu mulongo umue wa bantu nebatumbishile ba mu mulongo wabo mukuabo midimu yebe, nebabamanyishe bienzedi biebe binene." 
Psalms145:5 Nengelangane meji a buneme butambe bua butumbi buebe, ne a midimu yebe ya kukema." 
Psalms145:6 Bantu nebambilangane bua bukole bua bienzedi biebe bidi bibakuatshisha buowa; meme nembalondele bienzedi biebe binene. 
Psalms145:7 Nebatule mei a tshivulukidi tshia buimpe buebe bunene, nebimbe bikole bua buakane buebe." 
Psalms145:8 Yehowa udi ne dinanga, udi ne luse, kena ukuata tshiji lubilu, udi ne luse lujalame lua bungi." 
Psalms145:9 Yehowa udi wenzela bantu bonso bimpe; luse luandi ludi ha mutu ha bintu bionso biakafukeye. 
Psalms145:10 Yehowa, bintu bionso biwakafuka nebikusakidile, bansanto bebe nebakuvudishile disanka." 
Psalms145:11 Nebambilangane bua butumbi bua bukelenge buebe, nebakulangane bua bukole buebe," 
Psalms145:12 bua kumanyishabo bana ba bantu bienzedi biebe binene, ne butumbi bua buneme bua bukelenge buebe." 
Psalms145:13 Bukelenge buebe budi bukelenge bua tshiendelele, ne bukokeshi buebe budi bushala tô ne ku bikondo bionso." 
Psalms145:14 Yehowa udi wimanyika bonso badi bamba kuhona, udi ubisha bonso badi biname hanshi." 
Psalms145:15 Mesu a bifukibua bionso adi akutekemena; wewe udi ubihesha bia kudia biabi mu tshikondo tshiabi. 
Psalms145:16 Udi ubulula tshianza tshiebe, tshintu tshionso tshidi ne muoyo udi utshiukutshisha ne diakalengele." 
Psalms145:17 Yehowa udi muakane mu nshila yonso idiye uyilamu, udi ulesha dinanga mu bienzedi biandi bionso." 
Psalms145:18 Yehowa udi ha buihi ne bonso badi bamubikila, kudi bonso badi bamubikila mu bushuwa." 
Psalms145:19 Yeye udi umana dijinga dionso dia badi bamutshina, udi unvua muadi wabo kabidi, udi ubasungila." 
Psalms145:20 Yehowa udi ulama bonso badi bamunanga, kadi neabutule bantu babi bonso." 
Psalms145:21 Mukana muanyi nemuambe butumbi bua Yehowa, bukua bantu bonso buvudishile dina diandi dia tshijila disanka tô ne kashidi." 
Psalms146:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Wewe muoyo wanyi, utumbishe Yehowa!" 
Psalms146:2 Nentumbishe Yehowa hantshidi ne muoyo; nengimbile Nzambi wanyi misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai ntshidiku. 
Psalms146:3 Kanueyemenyi baminyampala, anyi muana wa muntu, unudi kanuyi mua kusangana dikuatshisha kudiye." 
Psalms146:4 Muhuya wandi udi uhatuka, udi uhingana kabidi ku dinfuenkenya diandi; mu dituku dine adi malu akadiye uhangidisha adi ajimina." 
Psalms146:5 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi ne dikuatshisha diandi kudi Nzambi wa Yakoba, udi ne ditekemena diandi mu Yehowa Nzambi wandi," 
Psalms146:6 wakafuka diulu ne buloba, mai manene ne bintu bionso bidimu, udi ulama bushuwa buandi tô ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms146:7 Udi ulumbuluila badi bakengeshibue ne kulumbulula kuakane; udi uhesha badi ne nzala bia kudia. Yehowa udi ulekesha bena lukuna; 
Psalms146:8 Yehowa udi utabasha mesu a bafofo; Yehowa udi ubisha bantu badi biname hanshi; Yehowa udi unanga bantu bakane. 
Psalms146:9 Yehowa udi ulama benyi, udi ukuatshisha bana ba nshiya ne bakashi ba mu lufuila: kadi udi ukonyangasha nshila wa bantu babi." 
Psalms146:10 Yehowa neakokeshe tô ne kashidi; Siona, Nzambi webe neakokeshe tô ne bikondo bionso. Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms147:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Bua bidi bimpe bua kuimbila Nzambi wetu misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai. Bua yeye udi muimpe, ne kumutumbisha kudi kuakane." 
Psalms147:2 Yehowa udi wasa Yelushalema kabidi; ukungisha ba mu Isalele bakadi bamuangalashibue hohamue. 
Psalms147:3 Udi ukolesha badi ne mitshima minyingalale, udi ujingila bilulu ha mputa yabo." 
Psalms147:4 Udi ujadika bungi bua mitoto, udi uyibikila buonso buai ku mena ai." 
Psalms147:5 Mukelenge wetu udi munene, udi ne bukole bukumbane; dijingulula diandi dia malu kadiena ne kunfudilu kuadi." 
Psalms147:6 Yehowa udi wimanyika bahuekele, udi wela bantu babi hanshi ha buloba." 
Psalms147:7 Imbilai Yehowa misambu ne disakidila dienu; nuimbile Nzambi wetu misambu ne lunkombe. 
Psalms147:8 Udi ubuikila diulu ne matutu, udi ulongoluela buloba nvula, udi umenesha mashinde ha mikuna." 
Psalms147:9 Udi uha nyama bia kudia biai, udi ubihesha bana ba bikololo habididilabo." 
Psalms147:10 Kena ne disanka bua bukole bua kabalu, kena ne disanka bua mikolo ya muntu." 
Psalms147:11 Kadi Yehowa udi usanka bua badi bamutshina, bua badi ne ditekemena diabo mu luse luandi lujalame." 
Psalms147:12 Wewe Yelushalema, tumbisha Yehowa; wewe Siona, tumbisha Nzambi webe." 
Psalms147:13 Bualu bua wakukolesha nkanu idi ikuata bibi biebe, wakuvudishila bana bebe badi munda mua ngumbu yebe disanka." 
Psalms147:14 Udi uvuisha ditalala mu matshika ebe, udi ukûkutshisha ne blé udi mutambe buimpe." 
Psalms147:15 Udi utuma mukenji wandi ha buloba; dî diandi didi diya lubilu. 
Psalms147:16 Udi umatshisha neige mufuane miosa ya mikoko; udi umuangalasha mume mukuatakasha mashika bu butue. 
Psalms147:17 Udi umatshisha mabue andi a mashika bu nkototo. Wamanya mua kuimana talalâ ku mpala kua mashika andi nganyi? 
Psalms147:18 Udi utuma dî diandi, udi ulengulula, udi ulehesha luhehele luandi, mai adi ahueka" 
Psalms147:19 Udi umanyisha Yakoba di diandi, udi uyisha Bena Isalele mikenji yakafundileye ne mei adiye musue benze." 
Psalms147:20 Kena muenzele ba mu tshinga tshisamba nunku nansha; kabena bamanye kulumbulula kuandi. Tumbishai Yehowa! 
Psalms148:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Tumbishai Yehowa, nuenu ba mu diulu; numutumbishe mu miaba ya mulu!" 
Psalms148:2 Numutumbishe, nuenu banjelo bandi bonso; numutumbishe, nuenu misumba yandi yonso!" 
Psalms148:3 Numutumbishe, nuenu diba ne ngondo; numutumbishe, nuenu mitoto yonso idi itema!" 
Psalms148:4 Umutumbisha, wewe diulu dia ha mutu ha diulu; nuenu, mai adi ha mutu ha diulu, numutumbishe!" 
Psalms148:5 Bionso bitumbishe dina dia Yehowa; bua yeye wakela dî diandi, biakafukibua." 
Psalms148:6 Wakabidika kabidi bua kuikalabi tô ne kashidi. Wakabelela mukenji udibi kabiyi bisambuka. 
Psalms148:7 Tumbishai Yehowa, nuenu bia ha buloba, nuenu nyama minene ya mu mai manene, ne ndondo yonso;" 
Psalms148:8 kahia ne mabue a nvula, neige ne dibungi, tshihehele tshikole tshidi tshitumikila mukenji wandi!" 
Psalms148:9 Mikuna mile ne mikuna mihi yonso, mitshi idi ikuama mamuma ne mitshi ya cèdre yonso, himutumbishe!" 
Psalms148:10 Nyama ya mu tshisuku ne bimuna bionso, bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ne nyunyu yonso idi ihahala, bimutumbishe!" 
Psalms148:11 Bakelenge ba ha buloba ne bukua bantu bonso, baminyampala ne balumbuluishi bonso ba ha buloba, bamutumbishe!" 
Psalms148:12 Bansongalume ne bansongakashi kabidi, bantu banunu ne bana, bamutumbishe!" 
Psalms148:13 Batumbishe dina dia Yehowa, bualu bua dina diandi nkayadi didi ditumbishibua; butumbi buandi budi ha mutu ha buloba ne diulu." 
Psalms148:14 Yeye wakuambuila bantu bandi lusengu, wakudivuisha wa kutumbishibua kudi bansanto bandi bonso, kudi bantu ba mu Isalele badi ha buihi nʼandi. Tumbishai Yehowa!" 
Psalms149:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Nuimbile Yehowa musambu muhia-muhia, nuimbe musambu wa kumutumbisha nʼau mu disangisha dia bantu bandi bananga!" 
Psalms149:2 Isalele ikale ne disanka mu Mufuki wandi, bana ba Siona bikale ne disanka mu Mukelenge wabo!" 
Psalms149:3 Batumbishe dina diandi ne maja a disanka, Bamuimbile misambu ya kumutumbisha nʼai ku tshiona tshia mazele ne lunkombe!" 
Psalms149:4 Bualu bua Yehowa udi ne disanka mu bantu bandi. Udi ulengesha badihuekeshi ne luhandu. 
Psalms149:5 Bantu handi bahanga basankile mu butumbi, bimbe ne disanka halalabo ha malalu abo." 
Psalms149:6 Kutumbisha kukole kua Nzambi kuikale mukana muabo; muele wa nvita musakishe nseke ibidi wikale mu bianza biabo," 
Psalms149:7 bua kusombuela bisamba bia bantu, bua kukengeshabo bukua bantu," 
Psalms149:8 bua kusuika banfumu babo ne nkanu, ne bua bakokeshi babo ne bikata bia nkanu." 
Psalms149:9 Bua kushikisheye kulumbuluishibua kuabo kuakamana kufundibua. Ebu mbutumbi budibo nʼabu kudi bananga bandi bonso. Tumbishai Yehowa! 
Psalms150:1 Tumbishai Yehowa! Tumbishai Nzambi mu muaba wandi wa tshijila; numutumbishe mu diulu didi dilesha bukole buandi! 
Psalms150:2 Numutumbishe bua bienzedi biandi binene. Numutumbishe bu mudi bunene buandi buhite bunene! 
Psalms150:3 Numutumbishe ne tshiona tshia dî dia mpungi; numutumbishe ne tshisanji ne lunzenze! 
Psalms150:4 Numutumbishe ne mazele ne maja a disanka; numutumbishe ne biombelu bidi ne nshinga ne lushiba! 
Psalms150:5 Numutumbishe ne biamu bidi bivuma, numutumbishe ne biamu bia kukumakasha bidi biakula ne tshiona tshikole!" 
Psalms150:6 Bintu bionso bidi bihuyakana bitumbishe Yehowa! Tumbishai Yehowa! 
Proverbs1:1 Nsumuinu ya Solomo, muana wa Davidi, mukelenge wa Isalele:" 
Proverbs1:2 Bua bantu bamanye lungenyi ne diyisha, bua bajingulule mei a meji." 
Proverbs1:3 Bua bahete diyisha dia mua kuenza bienzedi bia meji, dia mu buakane, dia mu dikosa diakane dia nsambu, ne dia mu kulumbulula kuakane." 
Proverbs1:4 Bua kuha muntu udi kayi mutantamane mu lungenyi budimu, bua kulesha nsongalume meji ne bukole bua kuhangidisha malu makane." 
Proverbs1:5 Muena meji unvue biandi, adiunde mu malu adibo bamuyisha; muena dijingulula dia malu ahete meji adi amukuatshisha bua kuenza bimpe:" 
Proverbs1:6 bua kujingululeye lusumuinu ne tshifuanyikishi, mei a bena meji ne majimba abo." 
Proverbs1:7 Ditshina dia Yehowa ntshibangidilu tshia lungenyi; bahote badi bahetula meji ne diyisha. 
Proverbs1:8 Muanʼanyi, unvue diyisha dia tatu webe, kuhidi diyisha dia mamu webe." 
Proverbs1:9 Bualu bua biobi nebikale tshitotolo tshilengele tshia ku mutu webe, ne nkanu ya mu nshingu muebe." 
Proverbs1:10 Muanʼanyi, biakuteya bantu babi, kuitabushi nansha." 
Proverbs1:11 Biambabo ne, Lua kutudi, tualamine muntu bua kumatshisha mashi andi hanshi, tulale bu bena lusoko bua kukuata bantu badi kabayi ne bualu," 
Proverbs1:12 tubamine hatshidibo ne muoyo bu mudi Muaba wa Bafue wenza, hatshidibo ne bukole buonso bua mubidi; bu mudi bantu bahueka mu Dijimba dia Bafue." 
Proverbs1:13 Netusangane biuma bionso bia mushinga mukole, netûshe nsubu yetu tente ne bintu bitudi tunyenga." 
Proverbs1:14 Biwaya nʼetu, netusangishe bintu bietu bionso mu tshibutshilu tshimue." 
Proverbs1:15 Muanʼanyi, kuendi nʼabo mu nshila umue nansha, ukande dikasa diebe bua kadidiatshi mu nshila yabo." 
Proverbs1:16 Bua makasa abo adi aya lubilu ku malu mabi, badi baya lukasa bua kumatshisha mashi hanshi." 
Proverbs1:17 Kuanda bukuondo ku mesu kua nyunyu kudi hatuhu; 
Proverbs1:18 ne bantu aba badi balamina mashi abo nkayabo, badi balala bu bena lusoko bua mioyo yabo mene." 
Proverbs1:19 Nshila ya bonso badi ne lukuka lua kunyenga bintu ku bukole idi nunku; ludi lujimisha mioyo ya badi nʼalu. 
Proverbs1:20 Meji adi ela dî dikole mu musesu, adi abandisha dî diau mu bisalu." 
Proverbs1:21 Adi ela dî ku masangu a nshila ya mitoyi. Ku tshibuelelu tshia mu bibi bia mu musoko adi amba mei â ne 
Proverbs1:22 Nuenu batshimbakanyi, nenunange butshimbakane musangu bule munyi? Badi babuidia nebasanke mu kubuidia kuabo, bahote nebakine lungenyi musangu bule munyi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Andamukai bua kunvua kubela kuanyi. Monai! Nennuitshikishile nyuma wanyi hamʼbidi henu, nennumanyishe mei anyi." 
Proverbs1:24 Bualu bua nakunubikila, ne nuenu nuakuhidia kunvua. Nakuolola tshianza tshianyi, kakuakadi muntu wakuitaba." 
Proverbs1:25 Nuakulengulula lungenyi luonso lunakunulesha kabidi, kanuakadi basue kunyua kubela kuanyi." 
Proverbs1:26 Meme kabidi nenseke halua dikenga dienu; nennubingile hanukuata buowa; 
Proverbs1:27 hanukuata buowa bu mudi tshihuhu tshibika, halua dikenga dienu bu mudi tshinvunde tshilua, hanukuata ntatu ne kanyinganyinga." 
Proverbs1:28 Hashishe nebambikile, kadi tshiena ngitaba; nebankebe ne lukunukunu, kadi kabena bansangana." 
Proverbs1:29 Bualu bua bakakula lungenyi, kabakasungula ditshina dia Yehowa." 
Proverbs1:30 Kabakasua kuitabusha lungenyi lunakabalesha, bakahetula kubela kuanyi kuonso." 
Proverbs1:31 Bua malu â nebadie mamuma adi bienzedi biabo bikuama, nebukute ne malu adibo bahangidisha." 
Proverbs1:32 Bualu hua dihingana tshianyima dia batshimbakanyi nedibashihe, ne kalengu ka bahote nekababutule." 
Proverbs1:33 Kadi muntu yonso udi ungunvuila neashikame talalâ, neikale holâ kayi ne ditshina dia dikenga dibi." 
Proverbs2:1 Muanʼanyi, bi witabusha mei anyi, biwateka mikenji yanyi munda muebe," 
Proverbs2:2 bua wewe utelejishe matshu ebe ku meji, bua kufila mutshima webe ku dijingulula dia mianda;" 
Proverbs2:3 e, biwadidila dijingulula dia mianda muadi, biwabandishila kumanya kua malu dî diebe," 
Proverbs2:4 biwakukeba bu mûdi ukeba tshiamu tshia argent, biwakukeja bu mûdi ukeja biuma bisokoka," 
Proverbs2:5 nunku neujingulule ditshina dia Yehowa, neusangane dimanya dia malu a Nzambi." 
Proverbs2:6 Bualu bua Yehowa udi uha bantu meji; mukana muandi mudi muhatuka lungenyi ne dijingulula dia mianda. 
Proverbs2:7 Yeye udi ubutshila bantu bakane lungenyi ludi lubakuatshisha; udi biandi ngabu kudi badi benda ne mitshima mitoke; 
Proverbs2:8 bua yeye alame nshila ya kulu mbulula kuakane, bua alengeshe nshila wa bansanto bandi." 
Proverbs2:9 Hashishe neujingulule buakane ne dikosa diakane dia nsambu, neujingulule kulumbulula kuakane, nshila yonso mene udi uya ku buimpe." 
Proverbs2:10 Bualu bua meji neabuele mu mutshima webe, lungenyi neluikale lulengele mu muoyo webe." 
Proverbs2:11 Budimu nebutangidile malu adi afika kûdi, dijingulula dia malu nedikulame;" 
Proverbs2:12 bua kukuhandisha ku nshila wa malu mabi, mu bianza bia bantu badi bamba mei a tshishiku;" 
Proverbs2:13 badi balekela kuya mu nshila ya buakane bua kuendabo mu nshila ya mîdima. 
Proverbs2:14 Badi basanka bua kuenza bienzedi bibi, badi batamba kusanka mu tshishiku tshia malu mabi." 
Proverbs2:15 Badi bakonyangasha nshila yabo, badi benda eku ne eku." 
Proverbs2:16 Bua bualu ebu budi bua kukuhandisha mu bianza bia mukashi wa bende, mu bianza bia mukashi udi muena tshiendenda udi ukubomba ne mei andi." 
Proverbs2:17 Udi ulekela mulombodi wakamubangila hakadiye nsongakashi, udi uhua tshihungidi tshia Nzambi wandi muoyo." 
Proverbs2:18 Bualu bua nsubu wandi udi uhueka tô ne ku lufu, nshila yandi idi ihueka tô ne ku bantu bafue." 
Proverbs2:19 Kakuena muntu wa badi babuela kudiye uhingana kabidi, kabena basangana nshila ya muoyo kabidi." 
Proverbs2:20 Bua bualu ebu budi bua wewe wende mu nshila ya bantu bimpe, bua ulamate biebe kudi nshila ya bantu bakane." 
Proverbs2:21 Bualu bua badi ne mitshima miakane nebashikame mu buloba, badi ne mutshima umue mutoke nebajalame." 
Proverbs2:22 Kadi nebajimishe bantu babi ha buloba, nebumushehu bena tshitungu." 
Proverbs3:1 Muanʼanyi, kuhu diyisha dianyi muoyo kadi mutshima webe ntumikile mikenji yanyi." 
Proverbs3:2 Bua neyikutentekashile dileha dia matuku ne bidimu bia muoyo ne ditalala. 
Proverbs3:3 Luse ne lulamatu lua ku bushuwa kabiumuki kûdi. Ubisuike mu nshingu muebe, ubifunde mu mutshima webe." 
Proverbs3:4 Nunku neusangane diakalengele ne lumu luimpe ku mesu kua Nzambi ne kua bantu. 
Proverbs3:5 Eyemena Yehowa ne mutshima webe wonso, kueyemenyi dijingulula diebe dia mianda." 
Proverbs3:6 Umumanye yeye bimpe mu bienzedi biebe bionso, yeye neakululamishile nshila yebe." 
Proverbs3:7 Kuikadi umena meji ku mesu kuebe wewe; utshine Yehowa, umuke ku malu mabi." 
Proverbs3:8 Muanda eu neuvuishe kusangasha kudi mubidi webe, neutuishe kukankamasha kudi mifuba yebe." 
Proverbs3:9 Tumbisha Yehowa ne biuma biebe ne mamuma a kumudilu a mu madimi ebe. 
Proverbs3:10 Nunku mayeba ebe neûle tente ne bintu bia bungi, bikaminu biebe nebihongolole nvinyo mihia-mihia." 
Proverbs3:11 Muanʼanyi, kuhetudi dikengesha didi Yehowa ukuyisha nʼadi, kubela kuandi kakukutondi." 
Proverbs3:12 Bualu bua Yehowa udi ubela udiye munange, bu mudi tatu ubela muanʼandi mulume udi umusankisha." 
Proverbs3:13 Disanka didi kudi mundi udi usangana lungenyi, ne kudi muntu udi uheta dijingulula dia mianda." 
Proverbs3:14 Bualu bua kuheta kuau kudi kutamba kuheta kua argent buimpe, ne makasa adilu lubulula adi atamba tshiamu tshia or bulengele." 
Proverbs3:15 Wowo adi ahita mabue a bilenga mushinga mukole; kakuena tshintu tshiudi ujinga tshiudi mua kuelekesha nʼau. 
Proverbs3:16 Dileha dia matuku a muoyo didi mu tshianza tshiau tshia balume; mu tshianza tshiau tshia bakashi mudi bubanji ne butumbi. 
Proverbs3:17 Nshila yau idi nshila ya disanka, nshila yau yonso idi nshila ya ditalala." 
Proverbs3:18 Adi mutshi wa muoyo kudi badi bâkuata mu bianza; bonso badi bâkuata bikole badi ne disanka. 
Proverbs3:19 Yehowa wakafuka buloba ne meji andi; wakajadika bia mu diulu ne lungenyi luandi. 
Proverbs3:20 Bua lungenyi luandi mai male akahatuka, ne matutu a mu diulu adi amatshisha dibungi." 
Proverbs3:21 Muanʼanyi, malu â kaumuki ku mesu kuebe; ulame meji adi akukuatshisha, ne bukole bua kuhangidisha malu." 
Proverbs3:22 Nunku nebikale muoyo ku mutshima webe ne tshilenga mu nshingu muebe. 
Proverbs3:23 Hashishe, newende mu nshila webe kuyi ne ditshina, dikasa diebe kadiena dilenduka." 
Proverbs3:24 Hawalala hanshi, kuena utshina; bulelela, ha wamana kulala hanshi, tulu tuebe netuikale tuimpe." 
Proverbs3:25 Kutshinyi buowa budi bulua kûdi lukasa, anyi kubutuka kua bantu babi hafikaku kudibo." 
Proverbs3:26 Bualu bua Yehowa neikale tshieyemenu tshiebe, nealame dikasa diebe bua kadikuatshibu mu buteyi." 
Proverbs3:27 Kuhadi bantu tshintu tshimpe, badi bakumbane bua kuikala nʼatshi, hawikala ne bukole bua kubaha tshi." 
Proverbs3:28 Kuambidi muena mutumba nʼebe ne, Anji kuya, uhingane kabidi, makelela nenkuhetshi, hautshidi nʼatshi ha buihi." 
Proverbs3:29 Kuhangidisha bualu bubi bua kuenzela muena mutumba nʼebe, hadiye ushikama hehi nʼebe mukueyemene." 
Proverbs3:30 Kufuilanganyi ne muntu hatuhu, bikaleye kayi mukuenzele bibi." 
Proverbs3:31 Kuikadi ne muena tshimbambila mukau, kulondi bualu, nansha bumue, budiye wenza." 
Proverbs3:32 Bualu bua Yehowa udi ukina muntu udi ne tshishiku, kadi bunyana buandi budi kudi badi ne mitshima miakane." 
Proverbs3:33 Mulau wa Yehowa udi mu nsubu wa bantu babi, kadi udi uvudishila nsubu wa bantu bakane disanka." 
Proverbs3:34 Udi ubuidia babuidi, kadi udi ulesha badi bahuekele luse." 
Proverbs3:35 Bena meji nebahiane butumbi, adi bundu budi buhianyi bua bahote." 
Proverbs4:1 Bana banyi balume, unvuai diyisha dia tatu, nuikale ne mbabi bua kumanya dijingulula dia mianda." 
Proverbs4:2 Bualu bua ndi nnulesha diyisha dimpe, kanulekedi kulonda diyisha dianyi." 
Proverbs4:3 Bualu bua nakadi muana mulume mulela kudi tatu wanyi, nakadi muana mutekete ne bu muana umuehele munangibue ku mesu kua mamu wanyi." 
Proverbs4:4 Tatu wakadi unyisha kabidi, wakadi ungambila ne, Mutshima webe ulamate mei anyi bikole; utumikile mikenji yanyi, wikale ne muoyo." 
Proverbs4:5 Heta meji, uhete biebe dijingulula dia mianda; kuhu muoyo, kusesuki ku mei a mukana muanyi." 
Proverbs4:6 Kualekedi nansha, ne wowo neakulame; wanange, neakutangidile malu adi mua kukukuata." 
Proverbs4:7 Tshibangidilu tshia meji tshidi dî edi ne, Angata meji; e, angata dijingulula dia mianda ku mpala kua malu onso makuabo." 
Proverbs4:8 Wabale bu tshintu tshia mushinga mukole, wowo neakubandishe; neakuvuishile butumbi, biwaela tshituha mu nshingu." 
Proverbs4:9 Nease tshitotola tshilengele ku mutu kuebe; neakuhe tshifulu tshia butumbi. 
Proverbs4:10 Unvua, muanʼanyi, witabusha mei anyi, ne bidimu bia muoyo webe nebikale bia bungi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nakukuyisha mua kuenda mu nshila wa meji, nakukulombola mu nshila ya malu makane." 
Proverbs4:12 Hawenda, biendedi biebe kabiena bikandibue; biwanyema, kuena ulenduka." 
Proverbs4:13 Kuata diyisha bikole, kudilekedi nansha; udilame, bualu bua didi muoyo webe." 
Proverbs4:14 Kubuedi mu nshila wa bantu babi nansha; kuendi mu nshila wa benji ba bienzedi bibi. 
Proverbs4:15 Ehuka ku nshila au, kuhitshimu nansha; umukamu, hita ku mpala." 
Proverbs4:16 Bualu bua kabena balala tulu bikalabo kabayi benze bibi; tulu ludi tumuka kudibo bikalabo kabayi bahoneshe muntu. 
Proverbs4:17 Bualu bua badi badia bia kudia bia bubi, badi banua nvinyo ya tshimbambila." 
Proverbs4:18 Kadi nshila wa bantu bakane udi bu diba dia kabundubundu, didi ditema ne dikenkakenka tô ne hakumbana diba dia munda munya." 
Proverbs4:19 Nshila wa bantu babi udi bu mîdima mikole; kabena bamanye tshidi tshibalenduisha. 
Proverbs4:20 Muanʼanyi, unvua mei anyi bimpe, teleja matshu ebe ku mianda indi nkuambila." 
Proverbs4:21 Mei â kaumuki ku mesu kuebe; wâteke munda mua mutshima webe. 
Proverbs4:22 Bualu bua adi muoyo kudi badi bâheta, adi asangasha mibidi yabo yonso." 
Proverbs4:23 Ulame mutshima webe ne dilama dionso, bualu bua munda muau mudi muhatuka mishimi yonso ya muoyo." 
Proverbs4:24 Umusha mei a kusesuisha nʼau bakuabo mukana muebe, umusha mei a kuhambuisha nʼau bantu ku mishiku yebe." 
Proverbs4:25 Mesu ebe atangile ku mpala kuebe, kâkenzakanyi, bilafinyi biebe bishale bitabala bitangila ku mpala." 
Proverbs4:26 Ubatamishile makasa ebe nshila, ne nshila yebe yonso ikale miludika bimpe." 
Proverbs4:27 Kusesuki ku tshianza tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshia bakashi, umushe dikasa diebe ku malu mabi." 
Proverbs5:1 Muanʼanyi, tinvua meji anyi; uteleje matshu ebe ku dijingulula dianyi dia malu," 
Proverbs5:2 bua wewe kushala ne bukole bua kuhangidisha mianda bimpe, ne bua mishiku yebe ilame lungenyi." 
Proverbs5:3 Bua mishiku ya mukashi wa bende idi imata buitshi, mukana muandi mudi muhite manyi busenu." 
Proverbs5:4 Kadi kunshikidilu yeye udi ne bululu bu nyongangandu, udi mutue bu muele wa nvita musakisha nseke ibidi." 
Proverbs5:5 Makasa andi adi ahueka tô ne ku lufu, biendedi biandi bîdi bilamata ku Muaba wa Bafue." 
Proverbs5:6 Bua yeye kena udimuka bua nshila mulandakane wa muoyo, yeye udi utakankana mu nshila yandi kayi mumanye bualu." 
Proverbs5:7 Mpindiu, bana banyi, nungunvuile, kanumuki ku mei a mukana muanyi." 
Proverbs5:8 Semesha nshila webe kule nʼandi, kufika ha buihi ne tshibi tshia ku nsubu kuandi," 
Proverbs5:9 bua wewe kufidi buneme buebe kudi bantu ba bende, ne bidimu biebe kudi muena lukisu," 
Proverbs5:10 bua benyi kabukutshi ne biuma biebe, ne luhetu lua ku mudimu webe kaluikadi mu nsubu wa muntu wa bende." 
Proverbs5:11 Nunku wewe kufu mikemu kunshikidilu kua muoyo webe, hanyanguka misunyi yebe ne mubidi webe," 
Proverbs5:12 ne udi wamba ne, Mona munakukina dikengesha diakadi dinyisha ne muakadi mutshima wanyi uhetula mei a kumbela nʼau!" 
Proverbs5:13 Tshiakunvuila dî dia bayishi banyi, tshiakuteleja matshu anyi kudi bakadi basue kundesha lungenyi." 
Proverbs5:14 Nakamba kubuela mu dikengesha dionso anu kaba kabalê munkatshi mua disangisha dia bantu ne bakadi badikungisha. 
Proverbs5:15 Unue mai a mu tshina tshiebe wewe, ne mai a mushimi audi uhatula mu dina diebe wewe." 
Proverbs5:16 Mishimi yebe ya mai idi ne bua kumuangalashibua mu muaba wa ha bule, anyi? Tusulu tuebe tua mai tudi ne bua kuhueka mu misesu, anyi?" 
Proverbs5:17 Biobi bikale bintu biebe nkayebe, kabikadi bia bantu ba bende diatshimue nʼebe." 
Proverbs5:18 Mushimi webe wa mai uvudishibue disanka; usanke bua mukashi uwakabaka mu bunsongalume buebe. 
Proverbs5:19 Yeye udi bu ntole mukashi udi muena dinanga, udi bu dishina dia ngulungu didi dilengele ku mesu! Mabele andi akusankishe misangu yonso; wikale mukuatshike ne dinanga diandi matuku onso." 
Proverbs5:20 Bua munyi, wewe muanʼanyi, mûdi ne bua kukuatshika ne dinanga dia mukashi wa bende, ne bua kuela tshituha mu tshiadi tshia muena tshiendenda?" 
Proverbs5:21 Bualu bua nshila ya muntu idi ku mesu kua Yehowa, yeye udi widikisha nshila yandi yonso bimpe." 
Proverbs5:22 Malu a tshishiku a muntu mubi adi umukuata mu buteyi, udi musuikibue ne mionshi ya bubi buandi." 
Proverbs5:23 Udi ufua bua dihanga diandi dia kuheta diyisha didi dimuludikila nshila; bua bukole bua buhote buandi udi uhambuka. 
Proverbs6:1 Muanʼanyi, biweyeka tshieya kudi muena mutumba nʼebe; biwoluela muntu wa bende tshianza;" 
Proverbs6:2 biwikala mudijingile mu kahamba bua mei a mukana muebe, mukuatshibue mu buteyi bua mei a mukana muebe;" 
Proverbs6:3 enza nunku, muanʼanyi, bua kudi handisha, bualu bua wakubuela mu tshianza tshia muena mutumba nʼebe: ya, udihuekeshe, wenzeshe muena mutumba nʼebe ne mei a dinanukila." 
Proverbs6:4 Kuitabushi bua tulu tukukuate ku mesu ebe, anyi bua tulu tukole tubuikile bilafinyi biebe." 
Proverbs6:5 Udihandishe bu mudi kabuluku kadisungila mu bianza bia tshilembi, bu mudi nyunyu udihandisha mu bianza bia tshilembi tshia nyunyu." 
Proverbs6:6 Wewe, muntu mufuba, ya kudi kankenene; welangane meji mudiku kaya mu nshila yaku, wikale ne meji." 
Proverbs6:7 Koko, kakayi ne mukelenge, mutangidi, anyi mukokeshi," 
Proverbs6:8 katu kadilongoluela bidia biaku mu tshikondo tshia munya mukole; katu kaditekela bia kudia biaku mu tshikondo tshia kunowa. 
Proverbs6:9 Wewe, mufuba, neulale hanshi musangu bule munyi? Neujuke bua kutabala ku tulu tuebe diba kai?" 
Proverbs6:10 Anu tulu tukese, anu kulala tulu tshituha; anu kudikuata ne bianza bua kuhunga tulu kakese."
