Proverbs6:11 Hashishe buhele buebe nebukukuate bu munyengi, ne tshiole netshikukuate bu muena nvita." 
Proverbs6:12 Muntu wa tshidingidingi, muena tshinyangu, udi wendakana ne mei a kuhambuisha nʼau bantu." 
Proverbs6:13 Udi uhodia ne mesu andi, udi usheta makasa andi, udi uloba muntu ne bianza." 
Proverbs6:14 Udi ne mutshima wa tshishiku, utu wahangidisha malu mabi matuku onso, udi uvudisha matandu." 
Proverbs6:15 Bua malu â neabuluke lubilu; mu katuha ka diba neatshibuke bituha, kayi uheta tshia kumusangasha." 
Proverbs6:16 Mianda isambombo idiku idi Yehowa ukina; e, mianda muanda mutekete idi imunyingalasha:" 
Proverbs6:17 mesu adi ne dihetu, ludimi ludi lushima, ne bianza bidi bimatshiha mashi a badi kabayi ne tshilumbu hanshi," 
Proverbs6:18 mutshima udi uhangidisha mianda ya meji mabi, makasa adi aya lubilu kudibo benza malu mabi," 
Proverbs6:19 mumanyi wa malu udi wamba mei a kudinga, ne muntu udi utudisha matandu munkatshi mua bena muntu." 
Proverbs6:20 Muanʼanyi, lama mukenji wa tatuʼebe, kulekedi diyisha dia mamuʼebe." 
Proverbs6:21 Ubilame matuku onso mu mu tshima webe, ubijingile mu nshingu muebe." 
Proverbs6:22 Hawenda, lungenyi alu nelukulombole; hawalala hanshi, neluikale mulami webe; bawatabala, neluakule nʼebe." 
Proverbs6:23 Bualu bua mukenji udi muinda, diyisha diau didi munya, kubela kudi ne diyisha kudi nshila wa muoyo." 
Proverbs6:24 Biobi nebikulame ku buteyi bua mukashi munyanguke, ku ludimi lua mukashi wa bende ludi luamba mei a lubombo." 
Proverbs6:25 Kusaminyi muoyo ku bulengele buandi nansha, yeye kakukuatshi mu buteyi ne kuvinya kua mesu andi." 
Proverbs6:26 Bua bualu bua mukashi wa ndumba muntu neashale anu ne tshihesa tshia nshima; ne mukashi mubaka udi wenda masandi udi ulemba muoyo wa mushinga mukole wa muntu. 
Proverbs6:27 Muntu udi mua kuteka kahia mu tshiadi tshiandi, bivualu biandi kabiyi bihia, anyi?" 
Proverbs6:28 Muntu udi mua kudiata ha makala a kahia adi atema, makasa andi kâyi ashila, anyi?" 
Proverbs6:29 Bidi muomumue kudi muntu udi ubuela kudi mukashi wa muena mutumba nʼandi; muntu yonso wamulenga bianza neakengeshibue. 
Proverbs6:30 Bantu kabena bahetula muibi, bibeye tshia kudia hunvueye nzala." 
Proverbs6:31 Kadi biamukuatabo, neahingishe bintu bivudisha misangu muanda mutekete; neafile biuma bionso bidi mu nsubu muandi." 
Proverbs6:32 Udi wenda masandi ne mukashi kena ne lungenyi, udi wenza muanda au udi udibutula." 
Proverbs6:33 Neahete mikumu ne dilengulula; bundu buandi kabuena bujimishibua. 
Proverbs6:34 Bualu bua mukau udi ubandisha tshiji tshia mulume, kena unvua luse dituku dia kudisombuela." 
Proverbs6:35 Kena witabusha bintu bia kubuikidila nʼabi bubi buandi, kena ushala ne mutshima muhole, nansha biwamuha mbueshilu ya bungi." 
Proverbs7:1 Muanʼanyi, ulame mei anyi, uteke mikenji yanyi mu mutshima webe." 
Proverbs7:2 Ulame mikenji yanyi, wikale ne muoyo; ulame diyisha dianyi bu mûdi ulama kamonyi ka disu diebe." 
Proverbs7:3 Ubisuike ku minu yebe; ubifunde mu mutshima webe. 
Proverbs7:4 Wambile meji ne, Udi muanʼetu wa bakashi; widike dijingulula dia mianda dina ne, Mukuetu wa bakashi." 
Proverbs7:5 Bua biobi bikulame bua wewe kuebela mukashi wa bende, bua kuehela biebe mukashi wa bende udi wamba mei a tshianyishanyisha." 
Proverbs7:6 Bualu bua ku dididishi dia mu nsubu muanyi nakatangila mu tusoso tua mabaya matshiamakanangane ha mbelu. 
Proverbs7:7 Nakatangila munkatshi mua batshimbakanyi, munkatshi mua bansongalume, nakamona nsongalume wakadi kayi ne lungenyi." 
Proverbs7:8 Wakadi uhitshila mu musesu hehi ne masangu akadi nsubu wa mukashi, wakahuka ku nsubu kuandi," 
Proverbs7:9 mu diba dia kafuanshimba, hakabuela diba, munkatshi mua butuku ne mîdima mikole." 
Proverbs7:10 Monai! Mukashi udi ulua kumuakidila, muluate bivualu bia mukashi wa masandi, muikale ne mutshima wa budimu." 
Proverbs7:11 Udi ne mutoyi, udi ne tshishiku; makasa andi kaena ashala mu nsubu muandi." 
Proverbs7:12 Musangu eu udi mu misesu, musangu mukuabo udi mu bisatu, ne mu masangu onso udi umualamina." 
Proverbs7:13 Hashishe, udi umukuata, udi uluangana nʼandi mishiku, muikale ne mpala wa dikamakama, udi umuambila ne," 
Proverbs7:14 Nakadi ne bua kufuta milambu ya kuyuisha nʼai ditalala; lelu eu nakumana mitshihu yanyi. 
Proverbs7:15 Nunku nakuluhuka bua kumuakidila, bua kukebakeba mpala webe, ne nakukumona." 
Proverbs7:16 Nakulongolola bulalu buanyi ne bilulu bia kububuikila; bilulu bidi ne mihola bia ku buanda bua ku Ejipitu. 
Proverbs7:17 Nakumiamina manananshi ha bulalu buanyi adi a mula, a alo, ne a cinnamone." 
Proverbs7:18 Lua, tumanyangane mu dinanga tô ne ku dinda, tudisankishe mu dinanga." 
Proverbs7:19 Bualu bua mulume wanyi kena ku nsubu, wakuya ku luendu lule." 
Proverbs7:20 Wakuya ne tshibombi tshia argent, neahingane hatentama ngondo." 
Proverbs7:21 Yeye udi umuitabushishe ne mei a bungi a kutekesha nʼau mutshima wandi, udi umuenzesha bua kuya nʼandi hamubombeye ne mei andi." 
Proverbs7:22 Ha diba adi udi umulonda, bu mudi ngombe uya ku tshishihelu, bu mudi muntu muhote musuikibue bua kumukengeshabo," 
Proverbs7:23 tô ne hamuasabo mukete musompoke mutshima wandi. Mbu mudi nyunyu ubuela mu buteyi lubilu, ne kena mumanye ne neajimishe muoyo wandi." 
Proverbs7:24 Nunku nuenu, bana banyi ba balume, unvuai dî dianyi, nuteleje matshu ku mei a mukana muanyi." 
Proverbs7:25 Mutshima webe kausesuki bua kuyila mu nshila yandi, kuhambuki bua kubuela mu nshila idiye wendela." 
Proverbs7:26 Bua bantu bakutaheye bahone hanshi badi ba bungi; e, bonso bakushiheye badi musumba munene." 
Proverbs7:27 Nsubu wandi udi nshila wa ku Muaha wa Bafue, udi uhueka tô ne ku nsubu ya lufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Meji kaena ela dî diau, anyi? Dijingulula dia mianda kadiena dihandisha dî diadi, anyi?" 
Proverbs8:2 Wowo adi mimane ha mutu ha mikuna idi hehi ne nshila, ku masangu a nshila mene." 
Proverbs8:3 Hehi ne bibuelelu bia musoko, kudi bantu babuelela mu bibi nkudiu ela dî diau ne," 
Proverbs8:4 Nuenu bantu, ndi nnuela dî dianyi; ne dî dianyi didi kudi bukua bantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Nuenu batshimbakanyi, nuyile mua kumanya budimu; nuenu bahote, nuyile mua kuikala ne mutshima wa kujingulula malu." 
Proverbs8:6 Unvuai, bualu bua nengambe mianda minene; ne ku mishiku yanyi nekuhatuke mei makane." 
Proverbs8:7 Bualu bua mukana muanyi nemuambe mei malelela; bubi budi tshintu tshidi tshintonda ku mishiku yanyi. 
Proverbs8:8 Mei onso a mukana muanyi adi ambibua mu buakane; kakuena dî dia mashimi anyi dikonyangale munkatshi muau. 
Proverbs8:9 Buonso buau adi mei a bushuwa kudi muntu udi ujingulula mianda, adi mei makane kudi badi baheta lungenyi." 
Proverbs8:10 Nusungule diyisha dianyi, kanusungudi tshiamu tshia argent; nusungule lungenyi bu tshintu tshihite tshiamu tshia or wa mushinga mukole buimpe." 
Proverbs8:11 Bua meji adi ahita mabue a bilenga bulengele; bintu bionso biudi mua kujinga kabiena mua kuelekeshibua nʼau. 
Proverbs8:12 Meme, meji, ndi nvuisha budimu muaba wanyi wa kushikama, ndi mpeta lungenyi ne bukole bua kuhangidisha malu bimpe." 
Proverbs8:13 Kutshina Yehowa nkuikala ne malu mabi lukuna. Kudisua, kudibandisha ne nshila wa malu mabi, mukana mudi muamba mei a tshitshu, ndi mbikina." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndi mua kulesha bantu lungenyi, ndi meji a kukuatshisha nʼau bantu; ndi dijingulula dia mianda, ndi ne bukole." 
Proverbs8:15 Bakelenge badi bakokesha bua bualu buanyi, ne bakokeshi badi balumbulula ne kulumbulula kuakane." 
Proverbs8:16 Bua bualu buanyi bakokeshi badi bakokesha, ne badi ne butumbi badi bakokesha ne balumbuludi bonso ba ha buloba mene." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndi munange badi bannanga, bonso badi bankeba ne lukunukunu nebansangane." 
Proverbs8:18 Biuma ne butumbi bidi kundi, biuma mene bidi bishala musangu mule ne buakane bidi kundi." 
Proverbs8:19 Mamuma anyi adi ahita or buimpe, mahite or yakulengeshabo mu ditanda buimpe; luhetu lundi mpeta ludi lutamba tshiamu tshia argent tshia mushinga mukole buimpe." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndi ngenda mu nshila wa buakane, mu nshila ya kulumbulula kuakane," 
Proverbs8:21 bua kuhesha badi bannanga buhianyi bua biuma, bua kûsha bibutshilu biabo tente." 
Proverbs8:22 Yehowa wakanfuka ku tshibangidilu tshia bufuki buandi, ku mpala kua bintu biandi bionso, ku tshibangidilu mene." 
Proverbs8:23 Nakajadikibua ku tshibangidilu tshia bidimu, ku tshibangidilu mene, diambedi buloba kabuyiku." 
Proverbs8:24 Hakadi ndondo ya mai kayiyi mianze kuikalaku, nakaledibua; hakadi mishimi miule tente ne mai kayiyiku, nakadiku." 
Proverbs8:25 Diambedi mikuna mile kayiyi mianze kujadikibua, ku mpala kua mikuna mihuekele, nakaledibua." 
Proverbs8:26 Hakadiye kayi muanze kufuka buloba ne madimi abu, anyi luhuishi lua kumudilu lua ha buloba, nakadiku." 
Proverbs8:27 Hakashimikeye bia mu diulu, nakadiku. Hakatekeye tshijengu tshibaluluke ha mutu ha ndondo wa mai manene," 
Proverbs8:28 hakashindikeye matutu a mu diulu, hakavula mishimi ya mu ndondo wa mai manene mu miaba yai," 
Proverbs8:29 hakahandileye mai manene mukalu wau, bua mai adimu kâsambuki mukenji wandi, hakasunguleye miaba ya bishimikidi bia buloba," 
Proverbs8:30 ha diba adi nakadi hehi nʼandi bu muena mudimu wandi. Nakadi ne disanka ku dituku ku dituku, nakadi nnaya ku mpala kuandi matuku onso." 
Proverbs8:31 Nakadi nsanka mu buloba buandi budi ne bantu bashikamamu, ne disanka dianyi divule diakadi bua kusomba ne bukua bantu." 
Proverbs8:32 Nunku, bana banyi ba balume nungunvuile: bua badi balamata mu nshila yanyi badi ne disanka." 
Proverbs8:33 Unvuai diyisha, nuikale ne meji, kanudihetudi nansha." 
Proverbs8:34 Muntu udi ungunvuila, udi wimana ku bibi bianyi ku dituku ku dituku, udi windila ku bilua bia ku bibi bianyi, udi ne disanka." 
Proverbs8:35 Bualu bua wansangana udi usangana muoyo, udi uheta diakalengele kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs8:36 Kadi wahanga kunsangana udi wenzela muoyo wandi bibi; bonso badi bankina badi bananga lufu. 
Proverbs9:1 Meji akuasa nsubu wau, akusonga makunshi au muanda mutekete." 
Proverbs9:2 Akushiha nyama yau, akusangisha nvinyo yau ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe; akulongolola mesa au kabidi." 
Proverbs9:3 Akutuma mishikankunde idi yakuatshila mudimu, adi ela dî diau hadiu imana ha mikuna ya mu musoko ne," 
Proverbs9:4 Muntu yonso udi utshimbakana abuele biandi munemu. Adi ambila muntu udi uhanga kuikala ne mutshima wa lungenyi ne," 
Proverbs9:5 Luai, nudie bidia bianyi, nunue nyinyo inakusangisha." 
Proverbs9:6 Lekelai kutshimbakana, nuikale ne muoyo, nuende mu nshila wa dijingulula dia mianda." 
Proverbs9:7 Udi usamina mubuidi udi udiangatshila bihendu, udi ubela muntu mubi udi udifuishisha bundu." 
Proverbs9:8 Kubedi mubuidi, bua yeye kakukinyi; biwabela muena meji, yeye neakunange." 
Proverbs9:9 Uyishe muena meji, yeye neikale ne meji mahite a diambedi; uyishe muntu muakane, yeye neadiunde mu lungenyi." 
Proverbs9:10 Ditshina dia Yehowa ntshibangidilu tshia meji, kumanya Wa Tshijila ndijingulula dia mianda." 
Proverbs9:11 Bua kundi meme matuku ebe neavulangane, ne bidimu bia muoyo webe nebileheshibue." 
Proverbs9:12 Biwikala ne meji, meji ebe nga kudikuatshisha nʼau; biwabuidiangana, mibuidi yebe neyikuandamukile." 
Proverbs9:13 Mukashi muhote udi ne lutoyitoyi, udi muntu mujibale, kena mumanye bualu." 
Proverbs9:14 Udi ushikama ku mbelu kua nsubu wandi, mu tshishikaminu tshia ha mikuna ya mu musoko," 
Proverbs9:15 bua kubikila badi bahita mu nshila, badi benda balulame mu nshila yabo ne," 
Proverbs9:16 Muntu yonso mujibale abuele biandi munemu. Udi wambila muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi ne," 
Proverbs9:17 Mai miba adi mashemakane, bidia bibidi bidia mu musokoko bidi bilengele." 
Proverbs9:18 Kadi muntu au kena mumanye ne, Bafue badimu; kena mumanye ne, Badi bamuendela buenyi badi mu ndondo wa Muaba wa Bafue." 
Proverbs10:1 Nsumuinu ya Solomo. Muana mulume udi ne meji udi usankisha tatuʼandi, kadi muana muhote udi unyingalasha mutshima wa mamuʼandi." 
Proverbs10:2 Biuma biheta ku bubi kabiena bilubuluka, kadi buakane budi buhandisha muntu ku lufu." 
Proverbs10:3 Yehowa kena witabusha bua muntu muakane afue nzala, kadi udi uhidia lukuka lua bantu babi." 
Proverbs10:4 Tshianza tshia mufuba tshidi tshimuvuisha muhele, kadi tshianza tshia muena disuminyina tshidi tshimuvuisha mubanji." 
Proverbs10:5 Udi uhuola mu tshikondo tshia munya mukole udi muana mulume wa meji, kadi walala tulu mu tshikondo tshia kuhuola udi muana mulume udi udifuishisha bundu." 
Proverbs10:6 Masanka adi ha mutu ha muntu muakane, kadi mukana mua bantu babi mudi musokoka mei a tshimbambila." 
Proverbs10:7 Tshivulukidi tshia muntu muakane tshidi tshivudisha disanka, kadi dina dia bantu babi nedibole." 
Proverbs10:8 Muena mutshima wa meji udi witabusha mikenji, kadi muena biakulakula neahone hanshi." 
Proverbs10:9 Udi wenda ne mutshima mutoke kena ne ditshina, kadi udi ukonyangasha nshila yandi neamanyibue." 
Proverbs10:10 Udi uvinya disu diandi udi mbisha kanyinganyinga, ne muena biakulakula neahone hanshi." 
Proverbs10:11 Mukana mua muntu muakane mudi mushimi wa muoyo, kadi mukana mua bantu babi mudi musokoka mei a tshimbambila." 
Proverbs10:12 Lukuna ludi lusonsola nvita, kadi dinanga didi dikanda ditomboka dionso." 
Proverbs10:13 Badi basangana meji mukana mua muntu udi ujingulula mianda, kadi mulangala udiku bua kututa nʼau nyima wa muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi." 
Proverbs10:14 Bena meji badi baditekela lungenyi, kadi tshiakulakula tshia muhote tshidi tshivuisha kubutuka ha buihi." 
Proverbs10:15 Biuma bia mubanji bidi musoko wandi wa ngumbu; buhele bua bantu bahele budi kubutuka kuabo. 
Proverbs10:16 Difutu dia mudimu wa muntu muakane didi dimuvuisha muoyo, luhetu ludi muntu mubi uheta ludi lumubuesha mu malu mabi." 
Proverbs10:17 Udi utumikila diyisha udi mu nshila wa muoyo, kadi udi ubenga bantu bedi udi uhambuka mu nshila." 
Proverbs10:18 Udi usokoka lukuna luandi udi ne mashimi mukana muandi, udi wamba mei a mukoso udi muhote." 
Proverbs10:19 Havulangana mei, kushiha kua mikenji kudiku, kadi udi ukanda mishiku yandi udi ne meji." 
Proverbs10:20 Ludimi lua muntu muakane ludi bu tshiamu tshia argent tshia mushinga mukole, mutshima wa muntu mubi udi wa mushinga mutekete." 
Proverbs10:21 Mishiku ya muntu muakane idi idisha ba bungi, kadi badi bahote badi bafua bua dihanga dia lungenyi." 
Proverbs10:22 Disankisha didi difuma kudi Yehowa didi divuisha bubanji, ne kena utenteka kanyinganyinga ha mutu hadi." 
Proverbs10:23 Budi bu kunaya kudi muntu muhote bienzeye bibi, kadi meji adi disanka kudi mujinguludi wa mianda." 
Proverbs10:24 Tshidi muntu mubi utshina netshilue kudiye, tshidi bantu bakane basue netshifidibue kudibo." 
Proverbs10:25 Bu mudi nvunde uhita, mbu mudi muntu mubi ujimina kabidi, kadi muntu muakane udi mujalame tshiendelele." 
Proverbs10:26 Bu mudi vinaigre ne nvuenvue ku menu, bu mudi muishi wa kahia mu mesu, mbu mudi muntu mufuba kudi badi bamutuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Ditshina dia Yehowa didi dilehesha matuku a muoyo, kadi bidimu bia bantu babi nebikeleshibue." 
Proverbs10:28 Ditekemena dia bantu bakane nedishihe ne disanka, kadi ditekemena dia bantu babi nedijimine." 
Proverbs10:29 Nshila wa Yehowa udi musoko wa ngumbu kudi muntu muakane, kadi udi kubutuka kudi benji ba malu mabi." 
Proverbs10:30 Muntu muakane kena umushibua kashidi, kadi bantu babi kabena bashikama ha buloba." 
Proverbs10:31 Mukana mua muntu muakane mudi muhatula meji, kadi ludimi ludi luamba mei a kuhambuisha bantu nelukoshibue." 
Proverbs10:32 Mishiku ya muntu muakane idi mimanye tshidi mua kusankisha bantu, kadi mukana mua bantu babi mudi ne tshitshu." 
Proverbs11:1 Tshiamu tshidibo bidikisha nʼatshi bujitu tshia mashimi tshidi tshitondesha Yehowa, kadi bujitu budibo bidikisha biakane budi disanka diandi." 
Proverbs11:2 Halua kudibandisha, bundu bulualua kabidi; kadi meji adi kudi bantu bahuekele." 
Proverbs11:3 Butoke bua mutshima bua bantu bakane nebubalombole; kadi kuhambuka kua bedi ba tshitungu nekubabutule. 
Proverbs11:4 Biuma kabiena bikuatshisha muntu mu dituku dia tshiji tshikole, kadi buakane budi bumuhandisha ku lufu." 
Proverbs11:5 Buakane bua muena mutshima mutoke budi bululamisha nshila wandi, kadi muntu mubi neadishinde ku bubi buandi yeye." 
Proverbs11:6 Buakane bua bantu bakane budi bu babandisha, kudi bedi ba tshitungu badi bakuatshibua ku lukuka luabo mene." 
Proverbs11:7 Hafua muntu mubi, ditekemena diandi didi dijimina; ditekemena dia badi beyemena bukole didi dijimina." 
Proverbs11:8 Badi babandisha muntu muakane mu dikenga, ne muntu mubi udi uhinganamu." 
Proverbs11:9 Mufudi wa mei a Nzambi udi ubutula muena mutumba nʼandi ne mei andi, kadi bantu bakane nebahandishibue ku lungenyi." 
Proverbs11:10 Bikala bantu bakane ne diakalengele, ba mu musoko badi basanka; hajimina bantu babi, badi bela mbila ya disanka." 
Proverbs11:11 Bikala bantu bakane ne disanka, musoko udi mutumbishibue, kadi udi ubutudibua mukana mua bantu babi." 
Proverbs11:12 Udi ulengulula muena mutumba nʼandi kena ne meji, kadi udi ujingulula mianda udi uhuwa biandi." 
Proverbs11:13 Udi wendakana bu muena mukoso udi usokolola malu masokoka, kadi udi mua kueyemenyibua udi usokoka dî didibo bamuambila." 
Proverbs11:14 Bikalaku kakuyi bulombodi, bantu badi badishinda hanshi; kadi mu tshisumbu tshinene tshia bafidi ba meji mudi luhandu." 
Proverbs11:15 Muntu ndi weyeka muntu wa bende tshieya neatate, kadi udi ukina kueyela kua bieya udi ushala talalâ." 
Proverbs11:16 Mukashi udi ne kalolo udi uheta butumbi, bena tshimbambila badi baheta bubanji." 
Proverbs11:17 Muena luse udi wenzela muoyo wandi bimpe, kadi muena lukisu udi ukengesha mubidi wandi." 
Proverbs11:18 Muntu mubi udi wangata difutu didi dimudinga, kadi udi ukuna buakane udi uheta difutu dia bushuwa." 
Proverbs11:19 Udi mushindame mu buakane neahete muoyo, kadi ndi ulonda bubi neafue biandi." 
Proverbs11:20 Badi ne mitshima ya tshitshu badi batondesha Yehowa, kadi badi bakane tshishiki mu bienzedi biabo badi bamusankisha." 
Proverbs11:21 Manya bimpe ne, Muntu mubi kena uhanga kukengeshibua, kadi tunkanunuma tua bantu bakane neluhandishibue." 
Proverbs11:22 Bu mudi lukanu lua or mu diulu dia ngulube mbu mudi mukashi wa mpala mulengele udi kayi ne lungenyi. 
Proverbs11:23 Dijinga dia bantu bakane didi dibavuishila anu diakalengele, ditekemena dia bantu babi didi dibavuishila tshiji tshikole." 
Proverbs11:24 Munga muntu udi wabanyina bantu bintu, kadi udi ubivudisha; mukuabo udi uhala bantu bidiye ne bua kubaha udi ukengela bintu." 
Proverbs11:25 Muena mutshima wa diha neavuishibue mubanji; wamiamina bakuabo mai neamiaminyibue handi mai kabidi. 
Proverbs11:26 Badi bela muntu udi udilaminyina manvua mulau, kadi badi basankisha udi wahana." 
Proverbs11:27 Udi unanukila kukebela banga bantu diakalengele udi uheta luse, kadi udi ubakebela bubi, nebulue kudiye." 
Proverbs11:28 Udi weyemena biuma biandi neahile hanshi, kadi bantu bakane nebadiunde bu mudi dianyi dibishi didiunda." 
Proverbs11:29 Udi utatshisha ba mu nsubu muandi neahiane luhehele, muntu muhote neikale muhika wa muena mutshima wa meji." 
Proverbs11:30 Mamuma adi muntu muakane akuama adi mutshi wa muoyo, udi ubandisha mioyo ya bakuabo udi ne meji." 
Proverbs11:31 Tangila, nebaleshe muntu muakane difutu diandi ha buloba; nebatumbe kufuta muntu mubi ne muenji wa malu mabi!" 
Proverbs12:1 Udi unanga diyisha didi dimuludikila nshila udi unanga lungenyi, kadi udi ukina kubedibua kuandi udi mujibale." 
Proverbs12:2 Muntu muimpe udi uheta diakalengele kudi Yehowa, kadi yeye udi uhisha muntu udi uhangidisha malu mabi." 
Proverbs12:3 Muntu kena mushindame ku malu mabi, kadi muji wa bantu bakane kawena unyungishibua." 
Proverbs12:4 Mukashi udi ne tshikadilu tshimpe udi tshifulu tshia butumbi kudi bayandi, kadi mukashi udi umufuisha bundu udi ubolesha mifuba yandi." 
Proverbs12:5 Meji adi bakane bahangidisha adi malulame, kadi malu adi bantu babi bahangidisha adi a mashimi." 
Proverbs12:6 Mei a bantu babi adi bu kualamina bua kumatshisha mashi hanshi, kadi mukana mua bantu bakane mudi muhandisha bantu." 
Proverbs12:7 Badi babutula bantu babi; bantu babi kabenaku kabidi; kadi nsubu wa bantu bakane neajalame. 
Proverbs12:8 Badi banyisha muntu muakane bu mudi meji andi, kadi badi bahetula muntu udi ne mutshima wa tshishiku." 
Proverbs12:9 Muntu udi muhuekele, udi kayi mumanyibue, udi udikuatshila mudimu, udi ne diese ditamba dia muntu udi uditumbisha kadi udi ukengela bia kudia." 
Proverbs12:10 Muntu muakane udi welela muoyo wa tshimuna tshiandi meji, kadi mitshima ya bantu babi idi ne lukisu." 
Proverbs12:11 Udi udima budimi buandi neikale ne bia kudia bia bungi, kadi udi ulonda malu a hatuhu kena ne lungenyi." 
Proverbs12:12 Bantu babi badi basamina muoyo ku bintu bidi benji ba malu mabi banyenga, kadi muji wa bantu bakane udi ukuama mamuma." 
Proverbs12:13 Muntu mubi udi ukuatshika mu buteyi bua mei mabi a ku mishiku yandi, kadi muntu muakane udi uhanduka mu dikenga." 
Proverbs12:14 Muntu udi uheta diakalengele ku mei makane a mukana muandi, ne bienzedi bidi bianza bia muntu bienza nebihingane kudiye." 
Proverbs12:15 Nshila udi muhote wenda udi muimpe ku mesu kuandi, kadi udi unvua lungenyi ludibo bamulesha udi ne meji." 
Proverbs12:16 Tshiji tshia muhote tshidi tshimanyibua lukasa, kadi muntu mudimuke udi ubuikila tshihendu." 
Proverbs12:17 Udi wamba mei malelela udi umanyisha bulumbuluishi buakane bua tshilumbu, kadi mumanyi wa mashimi udi wamba mei adi abadinga." 
Proverbs12:18 Muntu udi wamba mei a tshiakulakula adi ataha bu muele wa nvita, kadi ndimi ya bena meji idi isangasha bantu." 
Proverbs12:19 Muntu udi wamba mei malelela neashaleku kashidi, kadi udi wamba mei a mashimi udiku anu katuha kihi." 
Proverbs12:20 Mashimi adi mu mitshima ya badi bahangidisha malu mabi, kadi badi bajingila bantu ditalala badi ne disanka." 
Proverbs12:21 Kakuena bualu bubi buakuata muntu muakane, kadi bantu babi badi bûle tente ne diakabi." 
Proverbs12:22 Mishiku idi yamba mashimi idi itondesha Yehowa, kadi badi benza malu a bushuwa badi bamusankisha." 
Proverbs12:23 Muntu mudimuke udi usokoka lungenyi luandi, kadi meji a bahote adi asokolola buhote buabo." 
Proverbs12:24 Tshianza tshia muena disuminyina netshikokeshe, kadi nebenzeshe bafuba mudimu ku bukole." 
Proverbs12:25 Lutatu mu mutshima wa muntu ludi lumunemeshila bujitu, kadi dî dia luse didi dimusangulusha." 
Proverbs12:26 Muntu muakane udi ulombola muena mutumba nʼandi, kadi bienzedi bia bantu babi bidi bibahambuisha." 
Proverbs12:27 Muntu mufuba kena ukuata tshidiye ulemba, kadi muena disuminyina neahete biuma bia mushinga mukole." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu nshila wa buakane mudi muoyo, kadi mu nshila wa bubi mudi lufu." 
Proverbs13:1 Muana mulume udi ne meji udi unvua diyisha dia tatuʼandi, kadi mubuidi kena uteleja mibelu." 
Proverbs13:2 Muntu muimpe udi udia mamuma makane, kadi mitshima ya be dî ba bitungu idi misue tshimbambila." 
Proverbs13:3 Udi ulama mukana muandi udi ulama muoyo wandi, kadi udi ubulula mukana muandi bitongatonga neabutuke." 
Proverbs13:4 Mufuba udi usamina muoyo, kena ubiheta, kadi muoyo wa muena disuminyina udi ûshibua tente ne diakalengele." 
Proverbs13:5 Muntu muakane udi ukina mei a mashimi, kadi muntu mubi udi wenza malu a bundu ne adi avuisha bihendu." 
Proverbs13:6 Buakane budi bulama muntu udi ne mutshima mutoke, kadi bubi budi bubutula muenji wa malu mabi." 
Proverbs13:7 Munga muntu udi udivuisha bu mubanji, kadi kena ne tshintu; munga udi udivuisha bu muhele, kadi udi ne biuma bia bungi." 
Proverbs13:8 Biuma bia muntu bidi difutu dia kuhikula nʼadi muoyo wandi, kadi muhele kena unvua mei a badi bamufunyina." 
Proverbs13:9 Munya wa bantu bakane udi utema ne disanka, kadi muinda wa bantu babi udi ujima." 
Proverbs13:10 Kudisua kudi kuhatula anu matandu, kadi badi bitabusha mei a lungenyi badi ne meji." 
Proverbs13:11 Biuma bidibo bangata ku malu a hatuhu bidi bikeha, kadi udi ubisangisha ku tshituha ku tshituha udi ubivudisha." 
Proverbs13:12 Ditekemena didibo balayidila didi disamisha mutshima, kadi kukumbasha kua dijinga kudi bu mutshi wa muoyo." 
Proverbs13:13 Udi ulengulula dî dia Nzambi udi udivuisha muena dibanza kudidi, kadi udi unemeka mukenji neahete disanka." 
Proverbs13:14 Diyisha dia muena meji didi mushimi wa mai a muoyo, bua kuehuka mateyi a lufu." 
Proverbs13:15 Dijingulula dimpe dia mianda didi dihetesha diakalengele, kadi nshila wa bahidi ba Nzambi udi bizakala-bizakala." 
Proverbs13:16 Muntu mudimuke yonso udi wenza malu andi ne lungenyi, kadi muhote udi ulesha bantu buhote buandi." 
Proverbs13:17 Messager mubi udi uhona mu dikenga, kadi muloho udi mua kueyemenyibua udi usangasha bantu." 
Proverbs13:18 Buhele ne bundu bidi bilua kudi muntu udi ubenga diyisha, kadi udi udimuka hadibo bamubela udi mutumbishibue." 
Proverbs13:19 Kukumbasha kua dijinga kudi kusankisha mutshima, kadi bahote badi bakina bua kumuka ku malu mabi." 
Proverbs13:20 Udi wenda ne bena meji udi ulua muena meji, kadi udi ubuelakana ne bahote neakenge bua bualu ebu." 
Proverbs13:21 Diakabi didi dilonda benji ba malu mabi, kadi diakalengele didi difutu dia bantu bakane." 
Proverbs13:22 Muntu muimpe udi ushila bana ba bana bandi buhianyi, kadi biuma bia muenji wa malu mabimbitekela bantu bakane." 
Proverbs13:23 Budimi budi muhele udima budi bukuama bia kudia bia bungi, kadi budi bujimina bua dikosa dibi dia nsambu." 
Proverbs13:24 Udi kayi ukanda ne lukodi udi ne muanʼandi lukuna, kadi udi unanga muanʼandi udi unanukila kumukanda." 
Proverbs13:25 Muntu muakane udi udia, udi ushikisha nzala yandi, kadi difu dia muntu mubi didi diunvua nzala." 
Proverbs14:1 Meji adi asa nsubu wau, kadi buhote budi bumusasula ne bianza biabu mene." 
Proverbs14:2 Udi wenda mu buakane buandi udi utshina Yehowa, kadi udi ukonyangasha nshila yandi udi umuhetula." 
Proverbs14:3 Mukana mua muhote mudi mulangala wa diambu, kadi mishiku ya bena meji idi ibalama." 
Proverbs14:4 Kudi kakuyi ngombe, tshidilu tshiai tshidi munda mutuhu, kadi bukole bua ngombe budi buhetesha bia kudia bivule." 
Proverbs14:5 Mumonyi udi mua kueyemenyibua kena udinga nansha, kadi mumonyi udi udinga udi uhatula mei a mashimi." 
Proverbs14:6 Mubuidi udi ukeba meji, kena waheta, kadi diheta dia lungenyi didi bualu butekete kudi mujinguludi wa mianda." 
Proverbs14:7 Umuke biebe ku mesu kua muntu muhote; kuena uhetaku mei a lungenyi. 
Proverbs14:8 Meji a muena budimu adi a kujingulula nshila wandi, kadi buhote bua bahote budi bubahambuisha." 
Proverbs14:9 Bahote badi baseka bua malu mabi, kadi munkatshi mua bantu bakane mudi dinangangana." 
Proverbs14:10 Mutshima wa muntu udi mumanye kanyinganyinga kau, ne kakuena muntu wa bende udi mua kujingulula disanka diau." 
Proverbs14:11 Nebashimbule nsubu wa bantu babi, kadi ntenta wa bantu bakane neajalame." 
Proverbs14:12 Nshila udiku udi mululame ku mesu kua muntu, kadi nshikidilu wandi udi lufu." 
Proverbs14:13 Mu tuseku mene mutshima udi ne kanyinganyinga, ne nshikidilu wa disanka udi majia." 
Proverbs14:14 Muntu udi usesuka neukute bintu bidiye uhuola mu nshila yandi, ne muntu muimpe neukute bintu bidi bienzedi biandi bimutuadila." 
Proverbs14:15 Mutshimbakane udi witabusha dî dionso, kadi muena budimu udi utangila kudiye uya." 
Proverbs14:16 Muena meji udi udimuka, udi wehuka ku bubi, kadi muhote udi ne dikamakama, udi udieyemena." 
Proverbs14:17 Udi ukuata tshiji lubilu udi wenza malu mahote, kadi muena lungenyi udi ne lutulu." 
Proverbs14:18 Batshimbakanyi badi bahiana buhote, kadi badi ne budimu badi ne lungenyi bu tshifulu tshiabo tshia butumbi." 
Proverbs14:19 Bantu babi badi binamina bantu bimpe, ne benji ba malu mabi badi binama ku bibi bia bantu bakane." 
Proverbs14:20 Muhele udi mukinyibue kudi muena mutumba nʼandi mene, kadi balunda ba muntu mubanji badi ba bungi." 
Proverbs14:21 Udi uhetula muena mutumba nʼandi udi wenza bualu bubi, kadi udi ufuila bena dikenga luse udi ne disanka." 
Proverbs14:22 Badi bahangidisha malu mabi kabena bahambuka mu nshila, anyi? Kadi badi bahangidisha malu mimpe badi basangana luse lujalame ne bulelela." 
Proverbs14:23 Mudimu wonso udi uvudisha muntu bintu, kadi tshiakulakula tshia ku mishiku tshidi tshivuisha muntu muhele." 
Proverbs14:24 Tshifulu tshia butumbi tshia bena meji tshidi biuma biabo, kadi tshifulu tshia bahote tshidi buhote buabo." 
Proverbs14:25 Mumonyi udi wamba mei a bushuwa udi ubandisha mioyo, kadi wahatula mei a mashimi mukana udi udinga bena tshilumbu." 
Proverbs14:26 Udi utshina Yehowa udi ne tshieyemenu tshikole, ne bana bandi nebikale ne tshinyemenu." 
Proverbs14:27 Ditshina dia Yehowa didi mushimi wa mai a muoyo, bua kuehuka ku mateyi a lufu." 
Proverbs14:28 Bantu bavule mbutumbi bua mukelenge, kadi dikeha dia bantu ndibutuka dia mukokeshi." 
Proverbs14:29 Udi kayi ukuata tshiji lubilu udi ne lungenyi lule, kadi udi ne mutshima wa lukuluku udi ubandisha buhote." 
Proverbs14:30 Mutshima muhole udi muoyo wa mubidi, kadi mutshiaudi udi ubolesha mifuba." 
Proverbs14:31 Udi ukengesha muhele udi uhenda Mufuki wandi, kadi udi ulesha mukengedi wa bintu luse udi umutumbisha." 
Proverbs14:32 Muntu mubi udi wedibua hanshi bua malu mabi andi, kadi muntu muakane udi ne tshinyemenu mu lufu luandi." 
Proverbs14:33 Meji adi ashikama talalâ mu mutshima wa mujinguludi wa mianda, kadi kaena mumanyibue mu mitshima ya bahote." 
Proverbs14:34 Buakane budi butuma tshisamba tshia bantu ku mpala, kadi malu mabi adi afuisha bantu bonso bundu." 
Proverbs14:35 Muena mudimu udi ne meji udi uheta diakalengele kudi mukelenge wandi, kadi tshiji tshia mukelenge tshidi kudi muntu udi umufuisha bundu." 
Proverbs15:1 Dî dia kalolo didi diandamuna tshiji, kadi dî dikole didi disonsola tshiji." 
Proverbs15:2 Ludimi lua muena meji ludi luhatula lungenyi, kadi mukana mua bahote mudi muhatula buhote." 
Proverbs15:3 Mesu a Yehowa adi kuonso, adi alama bantu babi ne bantu bimpe." 
Proverbs15:4 Ludimi ludi luamba mei a kalolo ludi bu mutshi wa muoyo, kadi ludi luamba mei a buhidia ludi lunyanga mutshima." 
Proverbs15:5 Muhote udi uhetula diyisha dia tatuʼandi, kadi udi unvuila bamubedi udi ne budimu." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu nsubu wa muntu muakane mudi tshibutshilu tshinene, kadi luhetu lua bantu babi ludi lujimina." 
Proverbs15:7 Mishiku ya bena meji idi itangalasha lungenyi, kadi mitshima ya bahote kayena yenza nunku." 
Proverbs15:8 Mulambu udi bantu babi bafila udi utondesha Yehowa, kadi ditendelela dia bantu bakane didi dimusankisha." 
Proverbs15:9 Bienzedi bia muntu mubi bidi bitondesha Yehowa, kadi yeye udi unanga muntu udi ulonda buakane." 
Proverbs15:10 Nebakengeshe muntu udi uhambuka mu nshila bikole; udi ukina mibelu neafue biandi. 
Proverbs15:11 Muaba wa Bafue ne wa Kubutuka bidi buashi ku mesu kua Yehowa, mitshima ya bantu idi mitambe kubululuka kudiye!" 
Proverbs15:12 Mubuidi kena musue bantu bamubele; kena uya kudi bena meji nansha. 
Proverbs15:13 Mutshima wa disanka udi uvuisha mpala wa musangelu, kadi bikala mutshima ne kanyinganyinga, muoyo wa muntu udi utekela teketê." 
Proverbs15:14 Mutshima wa mujinguludi wa mianda udi ukeba lungenyi, kadi mukana mua bahote mudi mudia buhote." 
Proverbs15:15 Matuku onso a mukengi adi mabi, kadi muena mutshima wa disanka utu wikala ne bidia bia disanka matuku onso." 
Proverbs15:16 Kuikala ne bintu bibalê ne ditshina dia Yehowa kudi kutamba kuikala ne biuma bia bungi ne ntatu buimpe. 
Proverbs15:17 Kudia anu matamba nkayau hadi dinanga kudi kutamba kudia munyinyi wa ngombe wa manyi hadi lukuna buakane. 
Proverbs15:18 Muntu udi ukuata tshiji lukasa udi usonsola nvita, kadi udi ukuata tshiji bitekete udi ukolesha matandu." 
Proverbs15:19 Nshila wa mufuba udi ne luhangu lua mingonge ya meba, kadi nshila wa bantu bakane udi bu tshibebe tshibatamisha." 
Proverbs15:20 Muana mulume wa meji udi usankisha tatuʼandi, kadi muntu muhote udi uhetula mamuʼandi." 
Proverbs15:21 Buhote budi disanka kudi muntu udi kayi ne meji, kadi mujingulule wa mianda udi utangisha mpala wandi mu nshila mululame." 
Proverbs15:22 Bikalaku kakuyi bulombodi bua meji, malu adi bantu bahangidisha adi ahumbishibua, kadi bikalaku tshisumbu tshia balombodi, malu â adi alubuluka." 
Proverbs15:23 Disanka didi dikuata muntu bua dî didi mukana muandi muandamune; monai mudi dî diamba mu tshikondo tshiakane mudidi diakane! 
Proverbs15:24 Kudi muena meji nshila wa muoyo udi kulu, bua yeye ehuke ku Muaba wa Bafue udi hanshi." 
Proverbs15:25 Yehowa udi usasula nsubu wa badi badisue, kadi udi ujadika mukalu wa buloba bua mukashi wa mu lufuila." 
Proverbs15:26 Meji a malu mabi adi atondesha Yehowa, kadi mei a disanka adi makane kudiye." 
Proverbs15:27 Muntu udi ne lukuka lua luhetu udi ukengesha ba mu nsubu muandi, kadi udi ukina mbueshilu neikale ne muoyo." 
Proverbs15:28 Mutshima wa muntu muakane udi welangana meji a bualu budiye mua kukudimuna, kadi mukana mua bantu babi mudi muhatula malu mabi." 
Proverbs15:29 Yehowa udi kule ne bantu babi, kadi udi unvua kulomba kua bantu bakane." 
Proverbs15:30 Ntangidilu wa musangelu udi usankisha mutshima, lumu luimpe ludi lusangasha mifuba." 
Proverbs15:31 Udi ne matshu adi ateleja mibelu ya muoyo neashikame munkatshi mua bena meji. 
Proverbs15:32 Udi ubenga diyisha udi uhetula muoyo wandi, kadi udi unvua dî dia bamubedi udi uheta lungenyi." 
Proverbs15:33 Ditshina dia Yehowa didi diyisha dia meji, ne kudihuekesha kudi kuya ku mpala kua butumbi." 
Proverbs16:1 Malu adi bantu bahangidisha mu mitshima adi afuma kudibo, kadi dî didi ludimi lukudimuna didi difuma kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs16:2 Nshila yonso idi muntu wendela idi mitoke ku mesu kuandi, kadi Yehowa udi uteta mioyo ya bantu." 
Proverbs16:3 Teka mudimu webe mu bianza bia Yehowa, ne malu awahangidisha nealubuluke." 
Proverbs16:4 Yehowa wakafuka tshintu tshionso ne kafukila katshi; e, wakalongoluela muntu mubi dituku dia dikenga." 
Proverbs16:5 Muntu yonso udi ne kudisua mu mutshima udi utondesha Yehowa, manya bimpe ne, Kena uhanga kukengeshibua." 
Proverbs16:6 Luse lujalame ne lulamatu lua ku bushuwa bidi bibuikila malu mabi, ne bua ditshina diabo dia Yehowa bantu badi bahanduka mu dikenga." 
Proverbs16:7 Bikala bienzedi bia muntu bisankishe Yehowa, yeye udi umulengeshisha ne bena lukuna bandi." 
Proverbs16:8 Kuikala ne bintu bibale ne buakane kudi kuhita kuikala ne luhetu luvule ne kulumbulula kubi buimpe. 
Proverbs16:9 Mutshima wa muntu udi uhangidisha bua kuya ku luendu, kadi Yehowa udi ulombola makasa andi." 
Proverbs16:10 Dikosa dia bualu dia tshijila didi ku mishiku ya mukelenge; mukana muandi kamuena mushiha mikenji hakoseye nsambu. 
Proverbs16:11 Tshiamu ne malonga bidi biteta bujitu biakane mbia Yehowa; mabulu onso a mu tshibombi mbintu biakuenzeye. 
Proverbs16:12 Bienza bakelenge malu mabi, badi banyanguke, bualu bua nkuasa wa bukelenge udi ujadikibua ku buakane." 
Proverbs16:13 Mishiku idi yamba mei makane idi isankisha bakelenge, badi bananga muntu udi wamba dî diakane." 
Proverbs16:14 Tshiji tshia mukelenge tshidi messager wa lufu, muntu udi ne meji neatshitalashe." 
Proverbs16:15 Mpala wa musangelu wa mukelenge udi uvuisha muoyo, diakalengele didi muntu uheta kudiye didi bu matutu adi avuisha nvula mishishe." 
Proverbs16:16 Mona mudi diheta dia meji dihita tshiamu tshia or bulengele! Bulelela, kuheta dijingulula dia mianda kudi kuhita kusungula kua tshiamu tshia argent bulengele." 
Proverbs16:17 Nshila wa bantu bakane nkuehuka ku malu mabi, muntu udi ulama muoyo wandi udi utangile kudiye uya." 
Proverbs16:18 Kudisua kudi kuya ku mpala kua dibutuka, mutshima wa kudibandisha udi uya ku mpala kua dihona." 
Proverbs16:19 Kuikala ne mutshima muhuekele diatshimue ne badihuekeshi kudi kutamba kuabanyangana bintu binyenga mu nvita ne badisu buimpe. 
Proverbs16:20 Udi unvua dî ne ntema neahete diakalengele; udi weyemena Yehowa neikale ne disanka. 
Proverbs16:21 Badi babikila muena meji ne, Mujinguludi wa mianda; bulengele bua mei a ku mishiku budi buitabushisha bantu." 
Proverbs16:22 Lungenyi ludi bu mushimi wa mai a muoyo kudi muntu udi nʼalu, dikengesha dia bahote mbuhote buabo." 
Proverbs16:23 Mutshima wa muena meji udi uyisha mukana muandi lungenyi, udi uhetamu bukole bua kuitabushisha bantu." 
Proverbs16:24 Mei malengele adi bu dikatshi dia buitshi, adi mashemakane ku muoyo ne adi asangulusha mubidi." 
Proverbs16:25 Nshila udiku udi mululame ku mesu kua muntu, kadi nshikidilu wandi udi lufu." 
Proverbs16:26 Muoyo wa muena mudimu udi usamina bia kudia udi umuenzesha mudimu, bualu bua mukana muandi mudi mumuenzesha bua kukuata mudimu." 
Proverbs16:27 Muntu mulembakana udi umbuila bantu dijimba dia dikenga; mei a ku mishiku yandi adi bu kahia kadi kashidisha. 
Proverbs16:28 Muena mashimi udi utudisha matandu; muena mukoso udi uhandulula balunda banangangane. 
Proverbs16:29 Muena tshimbambila udi uteya muena mutumba nʼandi, udi umulombola mu nshila udi kayi muimpe." 
Proverbs16:30 Udi ubuikila mesu andi bua kuhangidisha malu a bunsonge, udi ubuta mishiku yandi, wakumana kuvuisha malu mabi." 
Proverbs16:31 Nsuki mitoke tô idi tshifulu tshia butumbi, nebatshihete mu nshila wa buakane." 
Proverbs16:32 Udi kayi ukuata tshiji lubilu udi uhita muena bukitu buimpe, udi ukokesha muoyo wandi udi uhita munyengi wa musoko kutumba." 
Proverbs16:33 Badi belela nshobo ha bibelu, kadi dikosa dionso dia bualu didi difuma kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs17:1 Kuikala ne diampa diume ne ditalala nkutamba kuikala ne nsubu mule tente ne munyinyi ne diyoyo buimpe. 
Proverbs17:2 Muhika udi wenza mudimu wandi ne meji neakokeshe muana mulume wa mu tshiota udi wenza mianda ya bundu, neikale ne tshituha tshia buhianyi munkatshi mua bana ba mu tshiota." 
Proverbs17:3 Luesu ludiku lua kulengesha tshiamu tshia argent, tshikutu tshidiku tshia kulengeshila tshiamu tshia or; kadi Yehowa udi uteta mitshima." 
Proverbs17:4 Muenji wa malu mabi udi uteleja matshu andi ku mishiku idi ihatula mei mabi; muena mashimi udi uteleja matshu andi ku ludimi ludi luamba mei adi ataha bantu. 
Proverbs17:5 Muntu udi useka muhele udi uhenda Mufuki wandi, udi usanka bua dikenga dia mukuabo kena uhanga kukengeshibua." 
Proverbs17:6 Bikulu badi tshifulu tshia butumbi tshia bantu banunu; butumbi bua bana mbatatu babo. 
Proverbs17:7 Mei a buneme kaena akumbana kudi muhote; mishiku idi yamba mashimi kayena itamba kukumbana muntu muneme. 
Proverbs17:8 Diha didi bu dibue dia mushinga mukole ku mesu kua muenʼadi; kuonso kudiye utangisha mpala wandi udi ne diakalengele. 
Proverbs17:9 Udi ubuikidila dihanga dia muntu udi ukeba dinanga, kadi udi wambulula mianda udi uhandulula balunda banangangane." 
Proverbs17:10 Dî dia mibelu didi dibuela mu mutshima wa muena lungenyi didi dihita mikumu lukama hamʼbidi ha muhote. 
Proverbs17:11 Muntu mubi udi ukeba kutomboka, nunku nebamutumine messager wa lukisu bua kumukuata." 
Proverbs17:12 Kusangakana ne nkashama udi ne bana bandi banyengibue kudiye kudi kutamba kusangakana ne muhote mu buhote buandi buimpe. 
Proverbs17:13 Bi uhingisha muntu malu mabi ku malu mimpe, malu mabi kaena umuka mu nsubu muandi." 
Proverbs17:14 Tshibangidilu tshia matandu tshidi bu kuhatuka kua mai; nunku diambedi matandu kâyi manze kuhatuka, lekela difuilangana." 
Proverbs17:15 Udi ubingisha muntu mubi ne udi uhisha muntu muakane, bubidi buabo badi batondesha Yehowa." 
Proverbs17:16 Bua tshinyi muhote udi ne mushinga mu tshianza tshiandi bua kusumba nʼau meji, hadiye kayi ujingulula mianda?" 
Proverbs17:17 Mulunda utu wananga mu bikondo bionso, muanʼetu utu walesha bulela mu tshikondo tshia dikenga." 
Proverbs17:18 Muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi udi uhunga tshihungidi, udi weyeka tshieya ku mesu kua muena mutumba nʼandi." 
Proverbs17:19 Udi unanga bubi udi unanga matandu, udi ubisha tshibi tshiandi kulu udi ukeba dibutuka." 
Proverbs17:20 Udi ne mutshima wa mashimi kena uheta diakalengele, udi ne ludimi ludi luamba mei a buhidia ludi bibuela mu dikenga." 
Proverbs17:21 Udi ulela muana muhote udi ne kanyinganyinga; tatu wa muhote kena ne disanka. 
Proverbs17:22 Mutshima wa disanka udi buanga hudi busangasha bimpe, kadi muoyo wa muntu udi ne majia udi inuisha mifuba." 
Proverbs17:23 Muntu mubi udi witabusha mbueshilu misokoka muinshi mua tshivualu bua kuhumbisha kulumbulula kuakane. 
Proverbs17:24 Mujinguludi wa mianda udi utangisha mpala wandi ku meji, kadi mesu a muhote adi akenzakana tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Proverbs17:25 Muana mulume muhote udi uvuisha tatuʼandi kanyinganyinga, udi bu tshintu tshia bululu kudi mamu wakamulela." 
Proverbs17:26 Kembimpe bua kufutshisha muntu muakane tshibau, anyi bua kukuma bantu baneme bua buakane buabo." 
Proverbs17:27 Udi ukanda mei andi udi ne lungenyi, udi ne muoyo muhole udi mujinguludi wa mianda." 
Proverbs17:28 Muhote mene, biahuweye biandi, udi mubadibue bu muena meji; habuteye mishiku yandi, badi bamubala bu muena budimu." 
Proverbs18:1 Udi udihandulula kudi banga bantu udi ukeba anu bualu budiye musue, ne udi uhatula mei a tshiji tshikole bua kuhidia meji makane." 
Proverbs18:2 Muntu muhote kena ne disanka mu dijingulula dia mianda, kadi udi usanka anu hiasokolola mutshima wandi meji adiye nʼau." 
Proverbs18:3 Halua muntu mubi, dihetu didi dilua kabidi; bihendu ne bundu bidi bilua diatshimue." 
Proverbs18:4 Mei a mukana mua muntu adi bu mai adi ne ndondo; mpokolo wa meji udi kasulu ka mai kadi kahueka. 
Proverbs18:5 Kembimpe bua kunemeka muntu mubi, anyi bua kukonyangasha kulumbulula kua bantu bakane." 
Proverbs18:6 Mishiku ya muhote idi ivuisha matandu; mukana muandi mudi mumubikidila mitutu. 
Proverbs18:7 Mukana mua muhote mudi ku butuka kuandi, mishiku yandi idi buteyi ku muoyo wandi." 
Proverbs18:8 Mei a umena bunsonge adi bu tuhesa tua bia kudia bilengele; adi abuela tô ne munda mua mubidi," 
Proverbs18:9 Muntu udi ulenguluka mu mudimu wandi udi muanʼabo ne mubutudi. 
Proverbs18:10 Dina dia Yehowa didi tshibumba tshikole; mundi muakane udi unyemenaku, udi uhanduka." 
Proverbs18:11 Biuma bia mundi mubanji bidi musoko wandi wa ngumbu, bidi bu lumbu lule mu meji andi." 
Proverbs18:12 Mutshima wa kudisua udi uya ku mpala kua dibutuka; kudihuekesha kudi kuya ku mpala kua butumbi. 
Proverbs18:13 Biakudimuma mundi dî kayi muanze kuteleja matshu diambedi, bualu ebu budi bulua buhote ne bundu kudiye." 
Proverbs18:14 Muoyo wa mundi neumukoleshe mu butekete buandi, kadi udi mua kujula mutshima wa kanyinganyinga kulu nganyi?" 
Proverbs18:15 Mutshima wa mujinguludi wa mianda udi uheta lungenyi; matshu a bena meji adi ukeba lungenyi. 
Proverbs18:16 Kuha kua mundi kudi kumuhetesha muaba, kudi kumuvuisha ku mpala kua bantu banene." 
Proverbs18:17 Udi udianjila kuamha tshilumbu tshiandi udi umueneka bu mubinga; kadi halua muena tshilumbu nʼandi, udi ukononona buluba buandi." 
Proverbs18:18 Kuela kua nshobo kudi kukosesha matandu, kudi kukosa tshilumbu tshidi tshihandulula bantu bakole." 
Proverbs18:19 Kulengesha ne muanʼabo wakenzelabo bibi kudi kuhita kunyenga kua musoko wa ngumbu bukole; matandu adi bu biamu bidibo bakanga nʼabi bibi bia mbalasa mukole. 
Proverbs18:20 Muntu udi ukuta mamuma adi mukana muandi mukuama, udi ukuta bintu bidi mishiku yandi ikuama." 
Proverbs18:21 Lufu ne muoyo bidi mu bukokeshi bua ludimi; badi bananga kuakula nʼalu nebadie mamuma adilu lukuama. 
Proverbs18:22 Udi uheta mukashi udi uheta disanka, ndiakalengele didiye uheta kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs18:23 Muntu muhele udi wakula mei a disengelela, kadi muntu mubanji udi ukudimuna ne mei makole." 
Proverbs18:24 Muntu udi ne balunda ba bungi udi udibutuisba, kadi kudi mulunda udi uhita muanʼabo ne muntu kumulamata." 
Proverbs19:1 Muntu muhele udi ne mutshima mutoke udi uhita udi ne tshishiku ne buhote buimpe. 
Proverbs19:2 Kembimpe bua mundi kuhanga lungenyi; udi wenda lukasa lukasa udi uhambuka mu nshila. 
Proverbs19:3 Buhote bua muntu budi bunyanga nshila wandi; mutshima wandi udi ukuatshila Yehowa tshiji. 
Proverbs19:4 Biuma bidi bivudishila muntu balunda ba bungi, kadi mulunda wa muhele udi uhanduluka kudiye." 
Proverbs19:5 Mumonyi udi ne mashimi kena uhanga kukengeshibua; udi uhatula mei a mashimi mukana muandi kena uhanduka. 
Proverbs19:6 Ba bungi badi bakeba diakalengele kudi muntu udi tshihahai; muntu yonso udi mulunda wa muntu udi uhangana. 
Proverbs19:7 Bana babo ne muhele bonso badi nʼandi lukuna; mona mudi balunda bandi batamba bana babo kumuka kudiye! Udi ubasengelela ne mei andi, kadi bakumana kuya." 
Proverbs19:8 Udi uheta meji udi unanga muoyo wandi; udi ulama dijingulula dia mianda neahete diakalengele. 
Proverbs19:9 Mumonyi udi ne mashimi kena uhanga kukengeshibua; udi uhatula mei a mashimi mukana muandi neajimine. 
Proverbs19:10 Kuikala ne bintu bimpe bia bungi kakuena kukumbanyina muhote; bidi bitamba bubi bua muhika kukokesha bakokeshi. 
Proverbs19:11 Lungenyi luimpe lua muntu ludi lukanda tshiji, ne butumbi buandi nkulekela muntu bubi." 
Proverbs19:12 Tshiji tshia mukelenge tshidi bu muadi wa nyama wa ntambue, kadi diakalengele diandi didi bu mume ha mashinde." 
Proverbs19:13 Muana muhote udi ubutuisha tatuʼandi; matandu a mukashi mubake adi bu mai adi kâyi alekela kumata. 
Proverbs19:14 Nsubu ne biuma bidi buhianyi budi bufuma kudi batatu, kadi mukashi mubake wa meji udi diha didi difuma kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs19:15 Bufuba budi buladika muntu tulu tukole, ne muena bukata neikale ne nzala." 
Proverbs19:16 Udi utumikila mukenji udi ulama muoyo wandi; udi uhetula nshila idiye wendela neafue biandi. 
Proverbs19:17 Udi ufuila muhele luse udi usombesha Yehowa bintu; yeye neamuenzele bimpe ku buimpe buakamuenzeleye. 
Proverbs19:18 Kengesha muanʼebe bua kumuyisha, bualu bua ditekemena ditshidiku; kumuleshi luse bua kalulu dibutuka diandi." 
Proverbs19:19 Muena tshiji tshikole neatule tshibau; bualu bua biwamuhandisha ku mpala, neumuenzele nunku tshiakabidi." 
Proverbs19:20 Unvua meji adibo bakuha, witabusha diyisha, bua wewe wikale ne meji mu matuku alualua." 
Proverbs19:21 Mutshima wa muntu udi ne malu a bungi adiye uhangidisha, kadi malu adi Yehowa Usungula neajadikibue." 
Proverbs19:22 Tshidi tshivuisha muntu dinanga kudi bakuabo nduse luandi; muntu muhele udi uhita muena mashimi buimpe. 
Proverbs19:23 Ditshina dia Yehowa didi dilombola muntu ku muoyo; udi nʼadi neashikame talalâ, dikenga kadiena dimukuata." 
Proverbs19:24 Mufuba udi ubuesha tshianza tshiandi munda mua dilonga, kadi kena ne bukole bua kutshihingisha mukana muandi kabidi." 
Proverbs19:25 Kuma mubuidi, nunku mutshimbakanyi neadimuke; ubele mujinguludi wa mianda, yeye neahete lungenyi." 
Proverbs19:26 Muntu udi unyanga biuma bia tatuʼandi, udi wihata mamuʼandi, udi muana mulume udi ubafuisha bundu ne udi ubavuishisha bihendu." 
Proverbs19:27 Muanʼanyi, lekela kunvua diyisha didi dikuhambuisha ku mei a lungenyi." 
Proverbs19:28 Mumonyi wa hatuhu udi uhetula kulumbulula kuakane; mukana mua bantu babi mudi mumina malu a tshishiku. 
Proverbs19:29 Bakulongoluela babuidi makengesha, bakulongoluela nyima ya bahote mitutu." 
Proverbs20:1 Nyinyo udi museki wa bantu, maluvu makole adi bu muena diyoyo; muntu yonso udi ubikuatshika kena ne meji." 
Proverbs20:2 Buowa budi mukelenge utshinyisha nʼabu bantu budi bu muadi wa nyama wa ntambue; udi umufuisha tshiji udi udienzela muoyo wandi bibi. 
Proverbs20:3 Butumbi budi kudi muntu biashilanganeye ne matandu, kadi muhote yonso neahatule mei a kutandangana nʼau." 
Proverbs20:4 Muhote kena udima budimi tshikondo tshidi mashika a banga; nunku hakebeye bia kudia mu tshikondo tshia kunowa, kena ne tshintu." 
Proverbs20:5 Meji adi muntu uhangidisha mu mutshima adi bu mai male, kadi mujinguludi wa mianda neâhatule." 
Proverbs20:6 Ba bungi badi badiamba ne, Tudi bena luse; kadi udi mua kusangana muntu udi mua kueyemenyibua nganyi?" 
Proverbs20:7 Muntu muakane udi wenda mu buakane bua mutshima wandi,— bana bandi badi bamulonda badi bavudishibue disanka!" 
Proverbs20:8 Mukelenge udi ushikama mu nkuasa wa bukelenge ukosamu bilumbu udi usungulula malu mabi onso ne mesu andi. 
Proverbs20:9 Muntu kai udi mua kuamba ne, Nakuvuisha mutshima wanyi mutoke, ndi mulengeshibue ku bubi buanyi?" 
Proverbs20:10 Majitu a mishindu ibidi ne bihiminu bia mishindu ibidi, bubidi buabi bidi bitondesha Yehowa." 
Proverbs20:11 Muana mene udi umuenesha tshikadilu tshiandi ku bienzedi biandi, ne bikala mianda idiye wenza milengele ne miakane." 
Proverbs20:12 Ditshu didi diunvua ne disu didi ditangila,— Yehowa wakafuka bubidi buabi." 
Proverbs20:13 Kunangi tulu, bua kubuedi mu buhele; tabala mesu ebe, newikale ne bia kudia bikumbane." 
Proverbs20:14 Musumbi udi wamba ne, Tshidi tshibi, tshidi tshibi; kadi hayeye, udi utshianyisha." 
Proverbs20:15 Or ne mabue a bungi a mushinga mukole bidiku; kadi mishiku idi ne mei a lungenyi idi tshianga tshia mushinga mukole. 
Proverbs20:16 Angata tshivualu tshia muntu udi mueyeke muenyi tshieya; ukuate udi mueyeke ba tshisamba tshia bende tshieya lukola. 
Proverbs20:17 Bidia bidi muntu uheta ku kudinga kuandi bidi bishemakana mukana muandi, kadi ku nyima mukana muandi nemûshibue tente ne tusoka." 
Proverbs20:18 Malu adi bantu bahangidisha adi ajadikibua ku kuhunga kua dî; hakuhabo lungenyi lua kuenza, luangana nvita." 
Proverbs20:19 Udi wendakana wamba buambamba udi usokolola malu masokoka; nunku kubuelakana ne muntu udi wakula biakulakula. 
Proverbs20:20 Biela muntu tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi mulau, nebajime muinda wandi mu midima mikole." 
Proverbs20:21 Buhianyi budi muntu uheta lubilu ku tshibangidilu kabuena buvudishibua disanka kunshikidilu kuabu. 
Proverbs20:22 Kuambi ne, Nempingishe bubi ku bubi; windile Yehowa, yeye neakusungile." 
Proverbs20:23 Majitu a mishindu ibidi adi atondesha Yehowa; tshiamu tshia kuidikisha nʼatshi bujitu tshidi tshidinga katshiena tshimpe kabidi. 
Proverbs20:24 Biendedi bia muntu bidi biendeshibua kudi Yehowa; nunku muntu neamanye mua kujingulula nshila wandi munyi? 
Proverbs20:25 Budi buteyi kudi muntu bua kuambeye lukasa ne, Tshidi tshia tshijila, ne bua kuelanganeye meji anu ku nyima bua kuditshiha kuandi." 
Proverbs20:26 Mukelenge udi ne meji udi usungula bantu babi, udi ubungulusha dikalu dia kushihula nʼadi hamʼbidi habo." 
Proverbs20:27 Nyuma wa muntu udi muinda wa Yehowa, ukebakebe malu onso adi munda muandi." 
Proverbs20:28 Luse lujalame ne lulamatu lua bushuwa bidi bilama mukelenge; nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge udi mushindame ku luse lujalame. 
Proverbs20:29 Butumbi bua bansongalume mbukole buabo, bulengele bua bantu banunu budi mutu mutoke tô." 
Proverbs20:30 Mitutu idi itaha mputa idi ilengesha muntu ku malu mabi; mikumu idi ilengesha malu adi munda muandi. 
Proverbs21:1 Mutshima wa mukelenge mu bianza bia Yehowa udi bu misulu ya mai, yeye udi ûtuma kuonso kudiye musue." 
Proverbs21:2 Nshila yonso udi muntu wendela udi muakane ku mesu kuandi, kadi Yehowa udi uteta mitshima." 
Proverbs21:3 Kuenza malu makane ne kukosa nsambu biakane bidi bihita kufila kua nyama mishiha kusankisha Yehowa. 
Proverbs21:4 Mesu adi ne dihetu ne mutshima udi udibandisha bidi disanka dia bantu babi, bidi malu mabi." 
Proverbs21:5 Meji adi muena mutshima wa mudimu uhangidisha adi amuvudishila luhetu luvule, kadi muntu yonso udi ne lukuluku neahete anu buhele." 
Proverbs21:6 Kuheta tshibutshilu ku ludimi lua mashimi kudi bu dibungi didi luhehele lumuangalasha, kudi buteyi bua lufu kabidi." 
Proverbs21:7 Tshimbambila tshia bantu babi netshibumusheku, bualu bua badi babenga kulumbulula bilumbu biakane." 
Proverbs21:8 Nshila wa muntu mutambe bubi udi mukonyangale, kadi bienzedi bia udi ne mutshima mutoke bidi biakane." 
Proverbs21:9 Kushikama ha ditumba dia ha mutu ha nsubu kudi kutamba kushikama mu mbalasa hohamue ne mukashi udi ne mutoyi buimpe. 
Proverbs21:10 Mutshima wa muntu mubi udi musue kuenzela bantu bibi; muena mutumba nʼandi kena usangana luse ku mesu kuandi. 
Proverbs21:11 Hakengeshabo mubuidi, mutshimbakanyi udi uheta meji; hayishaho muena meji, yeye udi uheta lungenyi." 
Proverbs21:12 Muntu muakane udi umona ba mu nsubu wa muntu mubi bu mudibo; bantu babi badi bedibua hanshi tô ne habutukabo. 
Proverbs21:13 Udi ujibika mu matshu andi bua kaunvu muadi wa muhele nêle biandi dî bikole, kabena bamunvuila nansha." 
Proverbs21:14 Diha didi muntu ufila mu musokoko didi diholesha tshiji; mbueshilu misokoko muinshi mua tshibalu idi iholesha tshiji tshikole. 
Proverbs21:15 Kulumbulula biakane kudi disanka kudi muntu muakane, kadi kudi kukuatshisha benji ba malu mabi buowa." 
Proverbs21:16 Muntu udi uhambuka mu nshila wa dijingulula dia mianda neashikame mu disangisha dia bantu bafue. 
Proverbs21:17 Udi unanga disanka neikale muhele; udi unanga nvinyo ne manyi kena wikala mubanji. 
Proverbs21:18 Muntu mubi udi tshia kuhikula nʼatshi muntu muakane; muena tshitungu udi ubuela mu muaba wakadi bantu bakane. 
Proverbs21:19 Kushikama mu tshihela tshia lusenga kudi kutamba kushikama mu nsubu ne mukashi, muena matandu ne munyengabadi buimpe." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu nsubu wa muena meji mudi biuma bia mushinga mukole ne manyi kabidi, kadi muntu muhote udi ubimina." 
Proverbs21:21 Udi ulonda buakane ne luse lujalame udi uheta muoyo, buakane ne butumbi." 
Proverbs21:22 Muena meji udi ubanda mu mu soko wa bena bukitu, udi ushimbula ngumbu ya nvita idibo beyemena." 
Proverbs21:23 Udi ulama mukana muandi ne ludimi luandi udi ulama muoyo wandi bua kaubuedi mu makenga. 
Proverbs21:24 Mubuidi ndina didibo binyika muntu udi ne dihetu ne didibandisha, udi wenza malu andi ne kudisua kuhite bukole." 
Proverbs21:25 Disua dia mufuba didi dimushiha, bualu bua bianza biandi bidi bibenga kukuata mudimu." 
Proverbs21:26 Muntu mubi udi usamina bintu muoyo dinda tô ne ku dilolo, kadi muntu muakane udi uhesha bantu bintu, kena ubahalabi nansha." 
Proverbs21:27 Mulambu udi bantu babi bafila udi utondesha Yehowa; mona mudiu utamba kumutondesha haluabo nʼau ne mitshima idi ihangidisha malu mabi! 
Proverbs21:28 Mumonyi udi ne mashimi nea jimine, kadi muntu udi unvua neambe dî didi dishala kashidi." 
Proverbs21:29 Muntu mubi udi unyenga mpala wandi, kadi muntu muakane udi welangana meji bua nshila idiye wendela." 
Proverbs21:30 Kakuena meji, anyi dijingulula dia mianda, anyi kuhunga kua mei, bidi mua kuhita Yehowa bukole." 
Proverbs21:31 Badi basakila kabalu bintu bia nvita difuku dia kuluangana, kadi luhandu lulualua kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs22:1 Kuikala ne lumu luimpe kudi kuhita kuikala ne bubanji bua bungi buakane, ne kuheta dianyisha kudi kuhita kuheta kua tshiamu tshia argent ne tshia or buimpe." 
Proverbs22:2 Babanji ne bahele badi basangila hamue; Yehowa udi mufuki wa buonso buabo. 
Proverbs22:3 Muntu mudimuke udi utangila dikenga diamba kumukuata, udi usokoma; kadi batshimbakanyi badi bahitaku, badi bakengeshibua." 
Proverbs22:4 Difutu dia kudihuekesha ne dia ditshina dietu dia Yehowa didi bubanji, butumbi ne muoyo." 
Proverbs22:5 Mingonge ya meba ne mateyi bidi mu nshila wa muena tshitshu; udi ulama muoyo wandi neabiehuke kule kudibi. 
Proverbs22:6 Yisha muana mu nshila udiye ne bua kuendela; nunku hakoleye, kena umukamu." 
Proverbs22:7 Mubanji udi ukokesha bahele; musombi wa bintu udi muhika wa mumusomheshi. 
Proverbs22:8 Udi ukuna malu mabi neahuole dikenga, mulangala wa tshiji tshiandi tshikole neajimine." 
Proverbs22:9 Udi ufuila bakuabo luse neavudishibue disanka, bualu bua udi wabanyangana bia kudia biandi ne bahele." 
Proverbs22:10 Biwihata mubuidi, difuilangana nediumuke; matandu ne bihendu nebihuwe." 
Proverbs22:11 Udi munange butoke bua mu tshima, udi ne mei a luse ku mishiku yandi, mukelenge neikale mulunda wandi." 
Proverbs22:12 Mesu a Yehowa adi alama lungenyi, kadi yeye udi utuisha muena tshitungu ku mei." 
Proverbs22:13 Mufuba udi wamba ne, Nyama wa ntambue udi ha mbelu! Nenshihibue mu misesu!" 
Proverbs22:14 Mukana mua bakashi ba bende mudi dijimba dile; muntu udi Yehowa mukuatshile tshiji neahonemu. 
Proverbs22:15 Buhote budi busuikibue mu mutshima wa muana; kadi lukodi nelubûmushe kudiye. 
Proverbs22:16 Udi ukengesha muhele hua kuvudisha luhetu luandi, anyi muntu udi uhesha mubanji bintu, neabuele anu mu buhele." 
Proverbs22:17 Teleja matshu ebe, unvue mei a bena meji, teka mutshima webe ku mei andi nkumanyisha." 
Proverbs22:18 Bualu bua newikale ne disanka, biwâlama munda muebe, biajadikibuau ku mishiku yebe." 
Proverbs22:19 Bua dieyemena diebe dikale mu Yehowa, nakukumanyishau lelu eu, kûdi wewe mene." 
Proverbs22:20 Tshiena muanze kukuindila mei a kukudimusha nʼau ne a kukuyisha nʼau lungenyi," 
Proverbs22:21 bua kukujadikila mei a bushuwa, bua wewe kuhingana ne mei a hushuwa kudi bantu hadi bakutuma, anyi?" 
Proverbs22:22 Kunyengi bintu bia muhele bualu bua buhele buandi, kukengeshi muhuekele mu tshilumbuluidi tshia ku tshibuelelu tshia musoko." 
Proverbs22:23 Bualu bua Yehowa neabalumbuluile tshilumbu tshiabo, neanyenge mioyo ya badi banyenga bintu biabo." 
Proverbs22:24 Kukuatshi bulunda ne muntu utu wakuata tshiji, kuendi diatshimue ne muena tshiji tshikole;" 
Proverbs22:25 bua wewe kuibididi mu nshila idiye wenda, bua wewe kukuatshishi muoyo webe mu buteyi." 
Proverbs22:26 Kuikadi munkatshi mua badi batutangana bianza bua kuhunga dî, anyi badi beyeka bantu bieya ku mabanza." 
Proverbs22:27 Bualu bua biwikala kuyi ne tshintu tshia kumufuta nʼatshi, nebumushe bulalu buebe bûdi uladila tshinyi?" 
Proverbs22:28 Kumushi mukalu wa kale wakajadikabo kudi batatu bebe. 
Proverbs22:29 Udi utangila muntu udi wenza mudimu wandi ne lungenyi, anyi? Yeye neimane ku mpala kua bakelenge, kena wimana ku mpala kua bantu bahuekele." 
Proverbs23:1 Hawashikama bua kudia bidia ne mukokeshi, welangane meji bimpe bua muntu udi ku mpala kuebe;" 
Proverbs23:2 uteke kele ku mununu webe, biwikala muena mudi." 
Proverbs23:3 Kusaminyi muoyo ku bidia biandi bishemakane, bualu bua bidi bikudinga." 
Proverbs23:4 Kudihangishi ne mudimu mukole bua kudivuisha mubanji, lekela kulonda meji au." 
Proverbs23:5 Neutshike mesu ebe ku biuma, biobi bimane kujimina, anyi? Bua biuma bidi bidiasa mahuahua, bitua mulelu bu nyunyu bua kuya mulu." 
Proverbs23:6 Kudi bidia bia muena tshitu; kusaminyi muoyo ku bidia biandi bishemakane. 
Proverbs23:7 Bualu bua bu mudiye welangana meji munda muandi, ke mudiye. Yeye udi ukuambila ne, Udie biebe, unue biebe; kadi mutshima wandi kawena kûdi." 
Proverbs23:8 Neuluke biebe bihesa bia bidia biwakudia; mei ebe mimpe neajimine. 
Proverbs23:9 Kuambi dî mu matshu a muhote, bualu bua neahetule meji a mei ebe." 
Proverbs23:10 Kumushi mukalu wa kale; kubuedi mu madimi a bana ba nshiya. 
Proverbs23:11 Bualu bua Musungidi wabo udi mukole; yeye neabakuile tshilumbu tshiabo ku mesu kuebe. 
Proverbs23:12 Teka mutshima webe ku diyisha, uteleshe matshu ebe ku mei a lungenyi." 
Proverbs23:13 Kubengi bua kubela muana; biwamututa ne lukodi, kena ufua nansha." 
Proverbs23:14 Umutute ne lukodi bua kusungila muoyo wandi mu Muaba wa Bafue. 
Proverbs23:15 Muanʼanyi, bikala mutshima webe ne meji, mutshima wanyi mene newikale ne disanka." 
Proverbs23:16 Bulelela, mutshima wanyi neusanke hamba mishiku yebe mei makane." 
Proverbs23:17 Mutshima webe kaukuatshidi bantu babi mukau, kadi wikale biau ne ditshina dia Yehowa dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Proverbs23:18 Bua bulelela, malu makuabo nealue kûdi, ne ditekemena diebe kadiena dijimina." 
Proverbs23:19 Unvua biebe, muanʼanyi, wikale ne meji; lombola mutshima webe mu nshila mululame." 
Proverbs23:20 Kuikadi munkatshi mua hanu ba maluvu, anyi munkatshi mua bena lumpukusu." 
Proverbs23:21 Bualu bua mukuatshiki wa maluvu ne muena lumpukusi nebabuele mu buhele; tulu netuluatshishe muntu bi lulu bisunsuke. 
Proverbs23:22 Unvua mei a tatu webe waka kulela; kuhetudi mamu webe halueye muntu mununu. 
Proverbs23:23 Sumba bushuwa, kubuhanyi nansha; sumba meji, diyisha ne dijingu tula dia mianda." 
Proverbs23:24 Tatu wa muntu muakane neatambe kusanka; udi ulela muana wa meji neasanke bualu buandi. 
Proverbs23:25 Tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe bikale ne disanka, mamu wakakuela ikale ne disanka." 
Proverbs23:26 Muanʼanyi, Umpe mutshima webe, mesu ebe atangile nshila yanyi." 
Proverbs23:27 Bualu bua mukashi wa ndumba udi tshina tshile, ne mukashi wa bende udi dijimba dibumbakane." 
Proverbs23:28 Yeye udi walamina muntu bu munyengi; udi uvudisha bahambuki munkatshi mua bantu. 
Proverbs23:29 Udi udila ne, Ndi ne mulau nganyi? Udi ne kanyinganyinga nganyi? Udi ne matandu nganyi? Udi utontolola nganyi? Udi ne mputa hamʼbidi kayi wenza bualu nganyi? Udi ne mesu makunze-kunzû nganyi?" 
Proverbs23:30 Mbadi bashikama ku maluvu musangu mule; mbadi baya kuteta maluvu masambakashe. 
Proverbs23:31 Kutangidi maluvu a nvinyo hatshidiu makunze, hadiu engelela munda mua luhanza, hadiu ahueka bitekete ha muminu." 
Proverbs23:32 Kunshikidilu adi asuma bu nyoka, adi asuma bu nyoka wa mbanvu." 
Proverbs23:33 Mesu ebe neamone bintu bidi bikukemesha, mutshima webe neuhatule mei a buhote." 
Proverbs23:34 Bulelela, wewe newikale bu muntu udi ulala munkatshi mua mai manene, newikale bu muntu udi ulala ha mutu ha mutshi udibo basuikila tshilulu tshia buatu." 
Proverbs23:35 Newambe ne, Bakunkuma, kadi tshiakunvua dikenga; bakukuta, kadi tshiakumanya bualu. Nenubale diba kai? Nempingane bua kuakeba kabidi." 
Proverbs24:1 Kuikadi ne bantu babi mukau, kujingi bua kubuelakana nʼabo." 
Proverbs24:2 Bualu bua mitshima yabo idi yelangana meji a kuenzela bantu bibi, mishiku yabo idi yakula bua kuenza malu mabi." 
Proverbs24:3 Badi bibaka nsubu ne meji, dijingulula dia mianda didi dimujadika." 
Proverbs24:4 Lungenyi ludi lûshisha nsubu idi munda muandi tente ne biuma bionso bia mushinga mukole ne bia disanka. 
Proverbs24:5 Muena meji udi mukole; muntu udi ne lungenyi udi uvudisha bukole buandi. 
Proverbs24:6 Bua, hakuhabo lungenyi lua kuenza, neumanye mua kuluangana nvita; mu tshisumbu tshinene tshia bafidi ba meji mudi luhandu." 
Proverbs24:7 Meji adi atamba muhote bule; kena ubululula mukana muandi ku tshibuelelu tshia musoko. 
Proverbs24:8 Udi uhangidisha bua kuenza malu mabi, nebamubikile ne, Muena tshinvundu." 
Proverbs24:9 Kuhangidisha buhote kudi bualu bubi; mubuidi udi utondesha bantu. 
Proverbs24:10 Biwateketa halua dituku dia dikenga, bukole buebe budi bukeha." 
Proverbs24:11 Handisha badibo baya nʼabo ku lufu; usungile badi bamba kushihibua. 
Proverbs24:12 Biwamba ne, Kabiakadi bamanye muanda eu, yeye udi uteta mitshima kena ûmona, anyi? Udi ulama muoyo webe kena mûmanye, anyi? Kena ufuta muntu bu mudi mudimu wandi, anyi?" 
Proverbs24:13 Muanʼanyi, udie buitshi, bualu bua budi buimpe, mamata a buitshi adi mashemakane mukana muebe." 
Proverbs24:14 Wamanya ne meji adi muomumue ku muoyo webe: Biwâheta, malu mimpe makuabo nealue kûdi, ne ditekemena diebe kadiena dijimina." 
Proverbs24:15 Wewe muntu mubi, kualaminyi ku muaba udi muntu muakane mushikame; kunyangi muaba udiye uladila." 
Proverbs24:16 Bualu bua muntu muakane udi uhona misangu muanda mutekete, udi ubika kabidi; kadi bantu babi badi balenduka mu dikenga." 
Proverbs24:17 Kusanki hahona muena lukuna webe, mutshima webe kawikadi ne disanka halendukeye;" 
Proverbs24:18 bua Yehowa kamonyi mudiye wenza, kikadi biandi ne disanka; bua yeye kumushi tshiji tshiandi kudiye bua kutshituma kûdi." 
Proverbs24:19 Kudinyengabashi bua benji ba malu mabi, kuikadi ne bantu babi mukau." 
Proverbs24:20 Bualu bua muntu mubi kena ne nshikidilu muimpe; nebajime muinda wa bantu babi. 
Proverbs24:21 Muanʼanyi, tshina Yehowa ne mukelenge kabidi; kubuelakana ne babueshakanyi ba malu." 
Proverbs24:22 Bualu bua dibutuka diabo dilualua lukasa; udi mumanye kabutu kadi kabakuata bubidi buabo nganyi? 
Proverbs24:23 Mei â kabidi adi mei akamba bena meji. Kambimpe kulesha kansungusungu mu kulumbulula kua bilumbu. 
Proverbs24:24 Udi wambila muntu mubi ne, Wewe udi mubinga, bantu nebanuibe mulau ne bisamba ha bantu nebimulengulule." 
Proverbs24:25 Kadi badi bamubela nebikale ne diakalengele, nebasankishibue bikole." 
Proverbs24:26 Udi ukudimuna dî diakane udi bu muntu udi uluangana mishiku. 
Proverbs24:27 Longolola mudimu webe ha mbelu, udilongolueleu mu budimi; hashishe wase nsubu webe." 
Proverbs24:28 Kuikadi mumonyi udi ubanda muenu mutumba nʼebe hatuhu, kudingi ne mishiku yebe." 
Proverbs24:29 Kuambi ne, Nemmuenzele bu muakungenzeleye; nempingishile muntu eu difutu diakanangane ne bienzedi biandi." 
Proverbs24:30 Nakahita ha buihi ne budimi bua muntu mufuba, ha buihi ne budimi bua tumuma tua nvinyo bua muntu wakadi kayi ne lungenyi." 
Proverbs24:31 Monai! Buakadi ne mingonge mitoloka kuonso, buakadi tente ne mpesa, ne luhangu luabu lua mabue luakadi lushimbuke." 
Proverbs24:32 Hashishe nakamona, nakelangana meji bimpe bua muanda eu; nakautangila, nakabela diyisha ne," 
Proverbs24:33 Anu tulu tukese, anu kulala tulu tshituha; anu kudikuata ne bianza bua kubunga tulu kakese." 
Proverbs24:34 Hashishe buhele buebe nebukukuate bu munyengi, ne tshiole netshikukuate bu muena nvita." 
Proverbs25:1 Ei kabidi idi nsumuinu ya Solomo yakatentulabo kudi bantu ba Hezikiya, mukelenge wa Yuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Butumbi bua Nzambi nkusokoka muanda, kadi butumbi bua bakelenge nkukononona muanda." 
Proverbs25:3 Bu mudi bule bua diulu ne ndondo wa buloba, mbu mudibo kabayi mua kukononona mitshima ya bakelenge." 
Proverbs25:4 Umusha tshikanganyi ku tshiamu tshia argent, ne tshiamu tshia kuenza nʼatshi dilonga tshidi tshimueneka kudi nsenda." 
Proverbs25:5 Umusha muntu mubi ku mpala kua mukelenge, ne nkuasa wandi wa bunfumu neajadikibue mu buakane." 
Proverbs25:6 Kuditeki mu muaba wa butumbi ku mpala kua mukelenge; kuimanyi mu muaba wa bantu banene. 
Proverbs25:7 Bua bobo kukuambila ne, Banda biebe kuneku, bidi bitamba bua kukushikika mu muaba mutambe kuhuekela ku mpala kua mukokeshi uwakumona ku mesu buimpe." 
Proverbs25:8 Kuyi lukasa bua kufuilangana ne muntu mu tshilumbu, bua kabakukonki ne, Newenze tshinyi kunshikidilu, halua muena mutumba nʼebe kukufuisha bundu?" 
Proverbs25:9 Utulumbuluila tshilumbu tshiebe ne muena mutumba nʼebe, ne kusokolodi bualu busokoka bua munga muntu:" 
Proverbs25:10 bua muntu udi unvua dî diebe kakufuishishi bundu, ne lumu luebe lubi kaluikadiku." 
Proverbs25:11 Dî diamba mu tshikondo tshiakane didi bu mamuma a tshiamu tshia or mu tshitekelu tshia argent. 
Proverbs25:12 Bu mudi kakanu ka or ku ditshu ne bu mudi tshilenga tshia or wa mushinga mukole, mbu mudi mubedi wa meji kudi muena ditshu didi dimutelesha." 
Proverbs25:13 Bu mudi mashika a neige mu tshikondo tshia kuhuola mbu mudi messager udi mua kueyemenyibua kudi bantu badi bamutuma. Bualu bua udi ukankamasha muoyo wa nfumu wandi. 
Proverbs25:14 Bu mudi matutu ne luhehele kabiyi ne nvula mbu mudi muntu udi uditumbisha bua maha adiye nfila, kadi udi udinga." 
Proverbs25:15 Udi ulesha lutulu lule udi mua kuitabushisha mulumbuluishi, ludimi ludi ne mei matekete ludi lutshibula mufuba." 
Proverbs25:16 Wakusangana buitshi, anyi? Udie anu tshituha tshiabu tshidi tshikukumbanyina, bua biwatamba kubudia, neuluke." 
Proverbs25:17 Dikasa diebe didiate ku nsubu wa muena mutumba nʼebe anu misangu mibalê, bua bualu buebe kabumutondeshi ne bua yeye kikadi nʼebe lukuna." 
Proverbs25:18 Muntu udi ubanda muena mutumba nʼandi tshibandabanda udi bu tshikau, muele wa nvita ne mukete mutue." 
Proverbs25:19 Kueyemena muntu udi kayi mua kueyemenyibua mu tshikondo tshia dikenga kudi bu dinu ditshibuke anyi bu dikasa dikoyoboke. 
Proverbs25:20 Udi wimbila mutshima udi unema bujitu misambu udi bu muntu udi uvula tshivualu mu dituku dia mashika ne bu vinaigre muedibue ha buanga bua nsabanga. 
Proverbs25:21 Bikala muena lukuna webe ne nzala, umuhe bia kudia; bikaleye ne nyota, umuhe mai a kunua." 
Proverbs25:22 Bualu bua neumuhuile njiya, ne Yehowa neakufute." 
Proverbs25:23 Luhehele lua ku nôde ludi lulua ne nvula; ludimi lua bunsonge ludi luvuisha mpala munyenge. 
Proverbs25:24 Kushikama ha ditumba dia ha mutu ha nsubu kudi kutamba kushikama mu mbalasa hohamue ne mukashi udi ne mutoyi buimpe. 
Proverbs25:25 Bu mudi mai ma tulala kudi muntu muhungile bua nyota, mbu mudi lumu luimpe ludi lufuma ku buloba bua kule." 
Proverbs25:26 Bu mudi mushimi wa mai mudiata muinshi mua makasa ne bu mudi mpokolo munyanguke, mbu mudi muntu muakane utekela ku mpala kua muntu mubi." 
Proverbs25:27 Kambimpe bua kudia buitshi bua bungi; nunku kambimpe bua bantu bakononone butumbi buabo. 
Proverbs25:28 Muntu udi kayi mumanye mua kudikanda udi bu musoko wakashimbulabo, udi kauyi ne ngumbu." 
Proverbs26:1 Bu mudi neige mu tshidimu tshia munya, bu mudi nvula mu tshikondo tshia kuhuola, mbu mudi buneme kabuyi buakanangane ne muhote." 
Proverbs26:2 Bu mudi mushamusha uhahala eku ne eku, wikila eku ne eku, bu mudi kandindi katua mulelu, mbu mudi mulau udi bantu bela hatuhu kauyi ukuata." 
Proverbs26:3 Mushosho udi wa kututa nʼau kabalu, mionshi idi ya kulombela nʼai nyama wa mpunda, ne mulangala udi wa kukuma nʼau bahote ha nyima." 
Proverbs26:4 Kukudimunyi muhote dî bu mudi buhote buandi, bua wewe kufuanangana nʼandi." 
Proverbs26:5 Kudimuna muhote dî bu mudi buhote buandi, bua yeye kedi meji ne, Ndi muena meji." 
Proverbs26:6 Udi utuma dî ku tshianza tshia muhote, udi udikosa makasa andi, udi unua tshimbambila." 
Proverbs26:7 Bu mudi mikolo ya muntu mulema ilemba kayiyi ne bukole, mbu mudi lusumuinu mukana mua bahote." 
Proverbs26:8 Bu mudi muntu usuika dibue mu tshielelu tshiadi, mbu mudi muntu udi uhesha muhote butumbi." 
Proverbs26:9 Bu mudi mungonge mutue mu tshianza tshia mukuatshiki wa maluvu, mbu mudi lusumuinu mukana mua bahote." 
Proverbs26:10 Bu mudi muena buta bua mikete udi wasa bantu bonso mputa, mbu mudi muntu udi ubuesha muhote mu mudimu wandi, anyi udi ubueshamu badi bahita mu nshila." 
Proverbs26:11 Bu mudi mbua uhingana ku bilushi biandi, mbu mudi muhote uhingana ku buhote buandi." 
Proverbs26:12 Udi umona muntu udi wela meji ne, Ndi muena meji, anyi? Ditekemena didibo nʼadi bua muhote didi dihita didibo nʼadi bua muntu au bunene." 
Proverbs26:13 Mufuba udi wamba ne, Nyama wa ntambue udi mu nshila; nyama wa ntambue udi mu misesu!" 
Proverbs26:14 Bu mudi tshibi tshiendakana ha biamu biatshi, mbu mudi mufuba ukudimuka mu bulalu buandi." 
Proverbs26:15 Mufuba udi ubuesha tshianza tshiandi munda mua dilonga; bua kutshihingisha mukana muandi budi bumuhangisha. 
Proverbs26:16 Mufuba udi wela meji ne, Ndi ne lungenyi luhite lua bantu muanda mutekete badi mua kukudimuna dî ne meji." 
Proverbs26:17 Udi uhita mu nshila, ubuela mu matandu adi kayi bua bualu buandi, udi bu muntu udi ukuata mbua ku matshu." 
Proverbs26:18 Bu mudi mubuluke udi wela bishelele, mikete ne bia lufu," 
Proverbs26:19 mbu mudi muntu udi udinga muena mutumba nʼandi ne, Tshiena ngamba mei a matuku, anyi?" 
Proverbs26:20 Hikalaku kakuyi nkunyi, kahia kadi kajima; hikalaku kakuyi muena bunsonge, kutandangana kudi kuhuwa." 
Proverbs26:21 Bu mudi makala mela ha mutu ha makala a kahia, bu mudi nkunyi miela mu kahia, mbu mudi muena matandu udi usonsola nvita." 
Proverbs26:22 Mei a muena bunsonge adi bu tuhesa tua bia kudia bilengele; adi abuela tô ne munda mua mubidi. 
Proverbs26:23 Mishiku idi ne mei a lubombo ne mutshima mubi bidi bu tshikanganya tshia tshiamu tshia argent tshilamika ha nyima ha luesu lua dima. 
Proverbs26:24 Muntu udi ne lukuna udi ulusokoka ku mei adi mishiku yandi yamba, kadi udi muteke kudinga mu mutshima wandi." 
Proverbs26:25 Havuisheye dî diandi bu dî dia luse, kuitabushi dî diandi nansha; bualu bua malu munyanguke muanda mutekete adi mu mutshima wandi." 
Proverbs26:26 Bikala lukuna luandi lubuikila ne lubombo, bubi buandi nebusokolodibue mu disangisha dia bantu." 
Proverbs26:27 Udi wumbula dijimba neahonemu; dibue didi muntu ubungulusha nedihingane hamʼbidi handi. 
Proverbs26:28 Ludimi ludi ne mashimi ludi lukina bantu bakutahalu mputa; mukana mudi muamba mei a lubombo mudi muvuisha dibutuka. 
Proverbs27:1 Kuditumbushi bua malu a makelela, bualu bua kuena mumanye muanda walua dituku dikuabo." 
Proverbs27:2 Munga muntu akutumbishe, kadi mukana muebe kamukutumbishi nansha. Muntu wa bende akutumbishe, kadi mishiku yebe kayikutumbishi." 
Proverbs27:3 Dibue didi ne bujitu, lusenga ludi lunema kabidi; kadi tshiji tshia muhote tshidi tshitamba bubidi buabi bujitu." 
Proverbs27:4 Tshiji tshikole tshidi ne lukinu, tshiji tshidi bu mai adi ahasalala; kadi muntu kai udi mua kuimana ku mpala kua mukau?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kubela muntu hatoke kudi kutamba luse lusokoka buimpe. 
Proverbs27:6 Hadi mulunda mukutahe mputa udi mua kumueyemena, kadi kutuangana kua mishiku kua muena lukuna kudi ne kudinga." 
Proverbs27:7 Muntu udi mûkute udi udiata dikatshi dia buitshi muinshi mua makasa, kadi tshintu tshionso tshidi ne bululu tshidi tshishemakana mukana mua udi ne nzala." 
Proverbs27:8 Bu mudi nyunyu udi uhambuka, umuka ku disua diandi, mbu mudi muntu udi uhambuka umuka ku muaba wandi." 
Proverbs27:9 Manyi ne manananshi bidi bisankisha muntu; ne mei malengele a mulunda wa muntu adi afuma ku lungenyi luimpe adi amusankisha muomumue. 
Proverbs27:10 Kulekedi mulunda webe ne mulunda wa tatu webe; kubuedi mu nsubu wa muanʼenu dituku dia dikenga diebe. Kuikala ne muena mutumba udi ha buihi kudi kuhita kuikala ne muanʼenu udi kule buimpe. 
Proverbs27:11 Muanʼanyi, wikale ne meji, usankishe mutshima wanyi, bua mmanye mua kuitaba kudi muntu udi umpenda." 
Proverbs27:12 Muntu mudimuke udi utangila dikenga diamba kumukuata, udi usokoma; kadi batshimbakanyi badi bahitaku, badi bakengeshibua." 
Proverbs27:13 Angata tshivualu tshia muntu udi mueyeke muenyi tshieya; ukuate udi mueyeke ba tshisamba tshia bende tshieya lukola. 
Proverbs27:14 Biavudishila muntu muena mutumba nʼandi disanka ne dî dikole ne dinda dionso, nebamubadile muanda eu bu mulau." 
Proverbs27:15 Kumatamata kua mai dituku dia nvula wa mudimbi ne mukashi muena matandu bidi muomumue. 
Proverbs27:16 Udi ukeba kumukanda udi bu udi ukanda luhehele, tshianza tshiandi tshia balume tshidi bu tshidi tshikuata manyi." 
Proverbs27:17 Bu mudi tshiamu tshisakisha tshinga tshiamu, mbu mudi muntu ulengesha tshikadilu tshia mulunda wandi." 
Proverbs27:18 Muntu udi ulama mutshi wa nfigi neadie mamuma au, ne udi ukuba nfumu wandi neatumbishibue." 
Proverbs27:19 Bu mudi mpala umueneka mu mai, mbu mudi mutshima wa muntu umumuenesha kudi munga muntu." 
Proverbs27:20 Muaba wa Bafue ne wa Kubutuka kabiena biule kashidi; mesu a muntu kaena ûkuta kashidi. 
Proverbs27:21 Luesu ludiku lua kulengesha tshiamu tshia argent, tshikutu tshidiku tshia kulengesha tshiamu tshia or; ne badi bateta muntu ku tshidiye utumbisha." 
Proverbs27:22 Biwatua muhote ne muinshi mu tshinu hamue ne manvua, buhote buandi kabuena bûmuka kudiye." 
Proverbs27:23 Umanye bimpe mudi mushindu wa bisumbu bia mikoko yebe, ela meji mudi mua kulama bisumbu bia bimuna biebe." 
Proverbs27:24 Bualu bua biuma kabienaku tshiendelele; tshifulu tshia bunfumu tshidi tshishala tô bikondo bionso, anyi?" 
Proverbs27:25 Hatahabo bisoso bia kudisha nʼabi himuna bua kubilama, batoloka mashinde a lutende, hakosabo mashinde adi adiunda ha mikuna," 
Proverbs27:26 bana ba mikoko nebikaleku bua bivualu biebe, ne mbushi neyikuheteshe mushinga wa budimi." 
Proverbs27:27 Newikale ne mabele a mbushi makumbane bua bia kudia biebe, bua bia kudia bia ba mu nsubu muebe, ne bua wewe ukube nʼau mishikankunde idi ikukuatshila mudimu." 
Proverbs28:1 Bantu babi badi banyema kakuyi muntu udi ubihata, kadi bantu bakane badi ne dikima bu dia nyama wa ntambue." 
Proverbs28:2 Bua ditomboka dia ba ha buloba bakokeshi babu badi ba bungi; kadi bikalaku bajinguludi ba mianda ne bena lungenyi, bukokeshi bujalame nebushale musangu mule." 
Proverbs28:3 Muntu muhele udi ukengesha bahele udi bu nvula wa tshihuhu udi kayi ushiya tshintu tshia kudia. 
Proverbs28:4 Badi balekela kulonda diyisha dia mikenji badi batumbisha bantu babi, kadi badi batumikila diyisha dia mikenji badi bafuilangana nʼabo." 
Proverbs28:5 Bantu babi kabena bajingulula kulumbulula kuakane, kadi badi bakeba lungenyi kudi Yehowa badi bakajingulula tshishiki." 
Proverbs28:6 Muntu muhele udi wenda mu buakane bua mutshima udi utamba udi mu nshila mikonyangale buimpe, nansha bikaleye mubanji." 
Proverbs28:7 Udi utumikila diyisha dia mikenji udi muana mulume udi ne meji, kadi udi ukuata bulunda ne bena lumpukusu udi ufuisha tatuʼandi bundu." 
Proverbs28:8 Udi utudisha biuma biandi ku kasombela ne ku makasa udi ubisangishila muntu udi ufuila bahele luse. 
Proverbs28:9 Udi umusha matshu andi ku diyisha dia mikenji, mulombu wandi udi utondesha Nzambi." 
Proverbs28:10 Udi uhambuisha bantu bakane bua bobo bende mu nshila mubi neahone mu dijimba didiye umbula; kadi badi ne mitshima mitoke nebahiane diakalengele. 
Proverbs28:11 Muntu mubanji udi wela meji ne, Ndi ne meji, kadi muhele udi ne dijingulula dia mianda udi ukononona tshikadilu tshiandi." 
Proverbs28:12 Hatumba bantu bakane, butumbi bunene budiku; kadi habanda bantu babi, bantu badi basokoma." 
Proverbs28:13 Udi usokoka matomboka andi kena wikala ne diakalengele, kadi udi uwatonda, uwalekela, neafuidibue luse." 
Proverbs28:14 Disanka didi kudi muntu udi utshina malu mabi misangu yonso, kadi udi ukolesha mutshima wandi neabuele mu dikenga." 
Proverbs28:15 Bu nyama wa ntambue udi udila, anyi bu nkashama udi ukeba nyama ya kudia, mbu mudi mukokeshi mubi udi ku mutu kua bantu bahele." 
Proverbs28:16 Mukokeshi udi kayi ne lungenyi udi mukengeshi mukole kabidi; kadi udi ukina luhetu lua ku malu mabi nealeheshe matuku andi. 
Proverbs28:17 Muntu udibo bahisha bualu bua mashi a munga muntu adi hamʼbidi handi aye mu dijimba; muntu kamukuatshisha nansha. 
Proverbs28:18 Muntu udi wenda mu buakane neahandishibue, kadi udi wenda mu nshila mikonyangale neahone lukasa." 
Proverbs28:19 Udi udima budimi buandi neikale ne bia kudia bia bungi, kadi udi ulonda malu a hatuhu neikale ne buhele bua bungi." 
Proverbs28:20 Muntu udi mua kueyemenyibua neavudishibue ne masanka a bungi, kadi udi ne lukuluku bua kudivuisha mubanji kena ubinga." 
Proverbs28:21 Kulesha kansungusungu kakuena kuimpe; kadi muntu nênze malu mabi bua tshihesa tshia nshima. 
Proverbs28:22 Muena lukuka udi wenda lukasa bua kuheta biuma, kena mumanye ne, Buhele nebunkuate." 
Proverbs28:23 Udi ubela muntu neahete diakalengele dihite dia udi umubomba ne ludimi luandi. 
Proverbs28:24 Udi wiba bintu bia tatuʼandi anyi bia mamuʼandi, wamba ne, Muanda eu kawena wa ditomboka, udi mulunda wa mubutudi." 
Proverbs28:25 Udi ne mutshima wa lukuka udi usonsola matandu, kadi udi weyemena Yehowa neavuishibue mubanji." 
Proverbs28:26 Udi weyemena mutshima wandi udi muhote, kadi udi ulonda meji neahandishibue." 
Proverbs28:27 Udi uha bahele bintu kena ukengela tshintu, kadi udi ubuikila mesu andi nebamuele milau ya bungi." 
Proverbs28:28 Habuela bantu babi mu bukokeshi, banga bantu badi basokoma; kadi hajiminabo, bantu bakane badi bavulangana." 
Proverbs29:1 Muntu udi mubedibue misangu ya bungi, kadi udi wela mpala mulu, neabutudibue mu katuha ka diba, kayi ne tshia kumusangasha nʼatshi." 
Proverbs29:2 Hikala bantu bakane ne bukokeshi, bantu badi basanka; kadi hakokesha muntu mubi, bantu badi batua mikemu." 
Proverbs29:3 Muntu udi unanga meji udi usankisha tatuʼandi, kadi udi ubuelakana ne bakashi ba masandi udi utangalasha bintu biandi." 
Proverbs29:4 Mukelenge udi ujadika buloba buandi ku kulumbulula kuakane, kadi muntu udi ulomba milambu mihite udi ububutula." 
Proverbs29:5 Udi ubomba muena mutumba nʼandi udi wandila makasa andi bukuondo. 
Proverbs29:6 Mu ditomboka dia muntu mubi mudi buteyi, kadi muntu muakane udi wimba misambu, udi usanka." 
Proverbs29:7 Muntu muakane udi mumanye ne, Bahele badi bakengela kulumbulula kuakane, kadi muntu mubi kena ujingulula lungenyi alu nansha." 
Proverbs29:8 Babuidi badi batemesha kahia mu musoko, kadi bena meji badi bandamuna tshiji." 
Proverbs29:9 Biatandangana muena meji ne muhote mu tshilumbu, muhote udi ukuata tshiji ne udi useka, kakuena ditalala." 
Proverbs29:10 Badi bakeba kumatshisha mashi badi bakina muntu muakane; kadi bantu bakane badi balama muoyo wandi. 
Proverbs29:11 Muhote udi uhatula tshiji tshionso tshidiye nʼatshi, kadi muena meji udi ntshibanda, udi utshiholesha." 
Proverbs29:12 Biunvua mukokeshi mei a mashimi, bonso badi bamukuatshila mudimu badi balua babi." 
Proverbs29:13 Muhele ne mukengeshi badi basangile hamue; Yehowa udi umunyika mesu a bubidi buabo. 
Proverbs29:14 Bialumbuluisha mukelenge bahele ne lulamatu lua bushuwa, nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge neajadikibue tshiendelele." 
Proverbs29:15 Lukodi ne kubela bidi biyisha meji, kadi muana udibo balekela nkayandi udi ufuishisha mamuʼandi bundu." 
Proverbs29:16 Hikala bantu babi mu bukokeshi, ditomboka didi didiunda; kadi bantu bakane nebamone dihona diabo talalâ." 
Proverbs29:17 Kengesha muanʼebe bua kumuyisha, ne neakuhe dikisha; e, neasankishe mutshima webe."
