Proverbs29:18 Bikalaku kakuyi tshikena kumona tshia muprofete, bantu badi balekela kudikanda; kadi udi utumikila diyisha dia mikenji udi ne disanka." 
Proverbs29:19 Kabena bamanye mua kuyisha muhika ne mei nkayau; bualu bua nansha biâjingululeye, kena watumikila." 
Proverbs29:20 Udi umona muntu udi wamba mei andi lukasa lukasa, anyi? Ditekemena didibo nʼadi bua muhote didi dihita didibo nʼadi bua muntu au bunene." 
Proverbs29:21 Udi udiundisha muhika wandi bimpe ku buana tô ne hakoleye, kunshikidilu neikale kudiye bu muanʼandi muledibue." 
Proverbs29:22 Muena tshiji udi usonsola ma tandu; muntu utu wafua tshiji lukasa udi utamba kubishisha ditomboka. 
Proverbs29:23 Kudisua kua muntu nekumuhuekeshe, kadi udi ne mutshima muhuekele neahete buneme." 
Proverbs29:24 Udi wabanyangana ne muibi udi ukina muoyo wandi mene, udi unvua mei a mulau hamutshihishabo, kena usokolola bualu." 
Proverbs29:25 Hatshina muntu bakuabo, bualu ebu budi buteyi kudiye, kadi udi weyemena Yehowa neahanduke." 
Proverbs29:26 Ba bungi badi bakeba diakalengele kudi mukokeshi, kadi dikosa dia nsambu dia muntu didi difuma kudi Yehowa." 
Proverbs29:27 Muena tshishiku udi utondesha bantu bakane, kadi udi wenda mu nshila muakane udi utondesha bantu babi." 
Proverbs30:1 Mei a Agû, muana wa Yake: di dia tshijila: Muntu au udi wambila Itiele, udi wambila Itiele ne Ukala, ne," 
Proverbs30:2 Bulelela, tshiena ne meji bu a muntu; tshiena njingulula mianda bu muntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Tshiena muanze kuyila meji, tshiena ne lungenyi lua malu a Wa Tshijila." 
Proverbs30:4 Wakubanda mu diulu, wakahueka hanshi kabidi nganyi? Wakusangisha luhehele mu bianza biandi bitunya nganyi? Wakukuta mai mu tshivualu tshiandi nganyi? Wakujadika matshika onso a kunfudilu kua buloba nganyi? Dina diandi nganyi, ne dina dia muanʼandi nganyi? Bulelela, wewe udi mumanye!" 
Proverbs30:5 Di dionso dia Nzambi diakutetshibua ne, Didi dia bushuwa; yeye udi ngabu kudi badi banyemena kudiye." 
Proverbs30:6 Kutentekashi dî ku mei andi, bua yeye kakubedi, kukusanganyi muena mashimi." 
Proverbs30:7 Ndi nkulomba malu abidi; kubengi kuampa tshiyi muanze kufua: 
Proverbs30:8 Ungumushile kudinga ne kuamba kua mashimi kundi; kumpi buhele anyi bubanji nansha, undishe bia kudia bidi binkumbanyina," 
Proverbs30:9 bua meme tshiukutshi, tshikubengi, tshiandi ne, Yehowa nganyi? Anyi bua tshikadi muhele ne tshibi bianyi, bua tshinyangi dina dia Nzambi wanyi." 
Proverbs30:10 Kusonguedi muena mudimu kudi nfumu wandi, bua yeye kakuedi mulau, bua wewe kuhishibu." 
Proverbs30:11 Bantu badiku badi bela batatu babo mulau, kabayi bavudishila bamamu babo disanka." 
Proverbs30:12 Bantu badiku badi bamba ne, Tudi balengele, kadi kabena balengeshibue ku bukoya buabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Bantu badiku,—mona mudi mesu abo ne dihetu, ne mudibo bahanda mesu mulu!" 
Proverbs30:14 Bantu badiku badi ne menu bu miele ya nvita, badi ne menu a ku binyanganyanga bu tuele bua kudiabo bahele, kubajimisha ha buloba, bua kudiabo bakengi, kubumusha munkatshi mua bantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Musundu udi ne bana bakashi babidi badi badila ne, Utuhe, Utuhe. Bintu bisatu bidiku bidi kabiyi biukuta kashidi; bintu binai mene bidiku bidi kabiyi biamba kashidi ne, Tuakukuta:" 
Proverbs30:16 Muaba wa Bafue, mukashi wa nkumba, buloba budi kabuyi mua kumana nyota yabu kashidi, ne kahia kadi kakayi kamba kashidi ne, Nakukuta." 
Proverbs30:17 Disu dia muntu udi useka tatu, ne udi uhetula ditumikila dia mamu,— nyunyu ya bikololo bia mu tshibanda nebiditue minu, nebiditule, ne bana ba nyunyu itu yadia bintu bibole nebadidie." 
Proverbs30:18 Bintu bisatu bidi bitamba kunkemesha bua kubimanya; e, kudi bintu binai bindi tshiyi mujingulule:" 
Proverbs30:19 nshila wa nyunyu wa mukanku mu luhehele, nshila wa nyoka udi wenda ujongoloka ha dibue, nshila wa buatu munkatshi mua mai manene, ne nshila wa muntu mulume udi wenda ne mushikankunde." 
Proverbs30:20 Nshila wa mukashi wa masandi udi nunku: udi udia, udi ukuhula ku mishiku, udi wamba ne, Tshiena muenze bualu bubi." 
Proverbs30:21 Buloba budi bikanka bua malu asatu; kabuena mua kutuala bujitu bua malu anai: 
Proverbs30:22 muhika habueleye mu bukelenge, muhote hukuteye bia kudia;" 
Proverbs30:23 mukashi, udibo bakina, hayeye ku dibaka; ne mukashi muenji wa mudimu udi uhiana bintu bia nfumu wandi mukashi." 
Proverbs30:24 Kudi bintu binai bitamba bukese hanshi ha buloba, kadi bidi ne meji male:" 
Proverbs30:25 Tunkenene tudi bu bantu badi kabayi ne bukole, kadi tudi tubuta bia kudia biatu mu tshikondo tshia munya." 
Proverbs30:26 Nyama ya nsenji idi bu bantu batekete, kadi idi yasa nsubu yai munkatshi mua mabue." 
Proverbs30:27 Mikumbi kayena ne mukelenge, kadi buonso buai idi yenda bu mialu ya nvita." 
Proverbs30:28 Udi mua kukuata musodi ne bianza, kadi wowo udi mu mbalasa ya bakelenge." 
Proverbs30:29 Bintu bisatu bidiku bidi bienda mananga; e, bintu binai bidi ne butumbi hadibi bienda." 
Proverbs30:30 Nyama wa ntambue udi uhita nyama yonso bukole, kena wahuka bua kushila mukuabo nshila." 
Proverbs30:31 Kabalu ka nvita, mpumbu wa mbushi, ne mukelenge udi wenda ku mpala kua masalayi andi." 
Proverbs30:32 Biwikala muenze buhote bua kudibandisha kuebe, anyi biwikala muhangidishe bualu bubi, uteke tshianza tshiebe ku mishiku yebe." 
Proverbs30:33 Bualu bua kukuma mabele kudi kuvuisha manteka, kubela diulu kudi kuhatuisha mashi, ne kukolesha tshiji kudi kuvuisha nvita." 
Proverbs31:1 Mei a mukelenge Lemuele: dî dia tshijila diakamuyisha mamu wandi. 
Proverbs31:2 Ngambe tshinyi, muanʼanyi? Ngambe tshinyi, muana mulume wa munda muanyi? Ngambe tshinyi, muana wa mitshihu yanyi?" 
Proverbs31:3 Kuheshi bakashi bukole buebe nansha, kulekeledi nshila yebe mu bianza bia badi babutula bakelenge." 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuele, bualu ebu kabuena buimpe, kambimpe bua bakelenge kunuabo nyinyo, anyi bua bakokeshi kujingabo malulu makole." 
Proverbs31:5 Kabânu, kabahu mikenji muoyo, kabasesuishi bakengi kulumbulula kuakane." 
Proverbs31:6 Nuisha muntu udi wamba kufua maluvu makole, nuisha muena mutshima munyingalale nyinyo;" 
Proverbs31:7 anue biandi, ahue buhele buandi muoyo, kavuluki makenga andi kabidi." 
Proverbs31:8 Buluila kamama mukana muebe, ûbulule bua kulumbuluila bonso hadibo bashiya hatuhu." 
Proverbs31:9 Bulula mukana muebe, ulumbulule bilumbu ne buakane; ulumbuluile bahele ne bakengi bilumbu biabo." 
Proverbs31:10 Udi mua kuheta mukashi wa tshikadilu tshimpe nganyi? Bulengele buandi budi butamba mabue a bilenga mushinga mukole. 
Proverbs31:11 Mutshima wa bayandi udi umueyemena, kena ukengela bintu." 
Proverbs31:12 Yeye udi wenzela bayandi malu mimpe, kena umuenzela bualu bubi matuku onso a muoyo wandi." 
Proverbs31:13 Udi ukeha miosa ya mikoko ne buanda bua lin, udi wenza mudimu wa bianza ne disanka." 
Proverbs31:14 Udi bu matu a ngendʼa mushinga, udi ulua ne bia kudia biandi ku miaba ya kule." 
Proverbs31:15 Udi ubika butuku kabuyi buanze kutshia, udi uha ba mu nsubu muandi bia kudia, udi uha bakashi benji ba mudimu wandi tshituha tshiabo tshia mudimu." 
Proverbs31:16 Udi ukenketa budimi, udi ubusumba; udi utentuisha mionshi ya nyinyo ku luhetu lua ku bianza biandi." 
Proverbs31:17 Udi usuika bukole bu mukaba mu tshifuka tshiandi, udi ukolesha maboko andi." 
Proverbs31:18 Udi mumanye ne, Bintu bindi ngenduluka nʼabi mushinga bidi bimpe. Muinda wandi kawena ujima butuku." 
Proverbs31:19 Udi ulongolola mbungu wandi; udi ukuata mundongo mu bianza biandi. 
Proverbs31:20 Udi woluela bahele tshianza tshiandi; e, udi woluela bakengi bianza biandi." 
Proverbs31:21 Yeye kena utshina ne, Mashika a neige neakuate ba mu nsubu muanyi, bualu bua yeye udi umatshisha bonso ba mu nsubu muandi bilulu bikunze." 
Proverbs31:22 Udi udikumina bilulu bia ha bulalu; bivualu biandi bidi bia lin bia mushinga mukole ne bikunzubile. 
Proverbs31:23 Bayandi udi mumanyibue ku bibuelelu bia ku musoko, hashikameye munkatshi mua bakulu ba ditunga." 
Proverbs31:24 Udi utela bivualu bia lin, udi ubihana; udi ufila mikaba kudi ngendʼa mushinga." 
Proverbs31:25 Bukole ne buneme bidi bivualu biandi; udi usanka bua matuku alualua. 
Proverbs31:26 Udi ubulula mukana muandi ne meji, diyisha dia luse didi ha ludimi luandi." 
Proverbs31:27 Udi utangila malu a ba mu nsubu muandi benza, katu wadia bia kudia bia bufuba." 
Proverbs31:28 Bana bandi badi bajuka, badi bamuvudishila disanka. Bayandi kabidi udi ujuka, udi umutumbisha ne," 
Proverbs31:29 Bana bakashi bangi bakuenza bimpe, kadi wewe udi utamba buonso buabo." 
Proverbs31:30 Diakalengele didi didinga, mpala mulengele udi hatuhu, kadi mukashi udi unemeka Yehowa neatumbishibue." 
Proverbs31:31 Umuhe difutu dia midimu ya bianza biandi; midimu yandi imutumbishe ku bibuelelu bia ku musoko. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Â mmei a Mulambi, muana wa Davidi, mukelenge wa mu Yelushalema." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Muambi udi Wamba ne, Malu a hatuhu, malu a hatuhu! Malu onso adi hatuhu." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Muntu udi uheta tshinyi ku mu dimu wonso udiye wenza muinshi mua diba? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Tshikondo tshimue tshidi tshiya ku mpala, tshikuabo tshidi tshilonda ku nyima; ka dî buloba budi muomumue tshiendelele." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Diba didi dibanda, didi dibuela, didi dihita lubilu kabidi ku muaba udidi dibanda." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Luhehele ludi luya ku Sude, ludi luhingana ku nôde; lufu luanyunguluka bua kuhingana kabidi ku muaba wakafumalu." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Misulu yonso idi ibuela mu mai manene, kadi mai manene kaena ûla tente; mu miaba yonso idi misulu ihueka, idi ihinganamu kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Malu onso adi mûle tente ne ntatu; muntu kena mumanye mua kuâmba; kumona kakuena kutonda disu; kunyua kakuena kudiatshisha ditshu. 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Malu akadiku diambedi neikaleku; malu akenzabo diambedi nênjibue; kakuena tshintu tshihia-tshihia muinshi mua diba. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tshintu tshidiku tshidibo ba manye mua kuamba ne, Tangila, etshi ntshintu tshihia-tshihia, anyi? Tshiakadiku kale, mu bikondo biakadi ku mpala kuetu." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kabena bavuluka bantu ba kale; balualua ha nyima kabena babavuluka kudi bantu badi babalonda kabidi. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Meme Muambi nakadi mukelenge wa Isalele mu Yelushalema. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nakateka mutshima wanyi ne meji anyi mu kukeba ne mu kujingulula kua malu onso adi menjibue muinshi mua diulu; eu mmudimu wa lutatu wakuha Nzambi ba ha buloba bua kubadisha nʼau. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nakatangila malu onso adi menjibue muinshi mua diba; monai, malu au onso adi hatuhu, adi bu kuihata kua luhehele." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Tshidi tshikonyangala, kabena mua kutshiludika kahidi; tshintu tshidi katshiyihu, kabena mua kutshibala." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nakamba mu mutshima wanyi ne, Nakuheta lungenyi lua bungi, muhite bonso bakadi ku mpala kuanyi mu Yelushalema; bulelela, mutshima wanyi wakajingulula meji a bungi ne lungenyi lua bungi." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nakuteka mutshima wanyi mu kukeba kua meji ne mu kujingulula kua buhote ne malu a tshianana; nakamanya ne bualu ehu kabidi budi bu kuihata kua luhehele. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Bualu bua mu meji a bungi mudi kanyinganyinga ka bungi; wavudisha lungenyi neavudishe kanyinganyinga kabidi. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nakambila mutshima wanyi ne, Tuye bietu, nenkutete ne masanka; nunku usanke biebe. Monai, buakadi hatuhu kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nakamba bua tuseku ne, Tudi tuhote, bua masanka ne, Adi enza tshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nakelangana meji mu mutshima wanyi bua kusankisha mubidi wanyi ne nvinyo, mutshima wanyi mutshikale undombola mu meji; nakateta malu a buhote bua kujingulula tshidi tshimpe bua ba ha buloba benze muinshi mua diulu matuku onso a muoyo waho." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Meme nakenza midimu minene; nakadiashila nsuhu; nakakuna mionshi ya tumuma tua nvinyo; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 nakadilongoluela bibundu ne miaba ya biendelu; nakakunamu mitshi ya mamuma ya mishindu yonso; 
Ecclesiastes2:6 nakadiumbuila mena a mai bua kusunabo mai a kumiamina mitshi inakakuna; 
Ecclesiastes2:7 nakasumba bahika balume ne bahika bakashi; nakadi ne bana ba bahika baledibue mu nsubu muanyi; nakadi ne bimuna bia bungi, ngombe ne mikoko, bihite bia bonso bakadi ku mpala kuanyi mu Yelushalema." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Nakaheta argent ne or ne bintu bia mushinga mukole bifume kudi bakelenge ne ku provinces; nakadiangatshila bimbi ba misambu, balume ne bakashi, ne biombelu bia mishindu yonso bia kuimba nʼabi misambu." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Nakalota lumu lunene; bintu bianyi biakavulangana, biakahita bia bonso bakadi ku mpala kuanyi mu Yelushalema; nakatshidi anu ne meji anyi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Tshiakahidia nansha tshintu tshimue tshiakajinga mesu anyi; tshiakalesha mutshima wanyi nansha disanka dimue; mutshima wanyi wakasanka bua midimu yonso makela; edi ndifutu dianyi dia ku midimu yonso biakenza. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Hashishe, nakatangila midimu yonso yakenza bianza bianyi, ne lutatu lunakadi nʼalu; monai, malu onso akadi hatuhu bu kuihata kua luhehele; kakuakadi bualu buimpe muinshi mua diba." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Nakahingana bua kutangila meji ne buhote ne malu a tshianana, kadi muntu walonda mukelenge udi mua kuenza tshinyi? Nênze anu malu akamanabo kuenza." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Hashishe, nakamona ne, Meji adi ahita malu a tshianana buakane bu mudi munya muhite midima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mesu a muena meji adi matangile ku mpala, ne muhote udi wenda mu midima; kadi nakajingulula ne, Bualu bumue budi bubakuata bonso." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Hashishe, nakamba mu mutshima wanyi ne, Bualu budi bukuata muhote nebunkuate kabidi; tshindi muvudishile meji ntshinyi? Nakamba mu mutshima wanyi ne, Bualu ebu budi hatuhu kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Kabena bavuluka nansha muena meji nansha muhote, bualu bua matuku alualua bubidi buabo nebabahue muoyo. Monai, muena meji ufuafua muomumue ne muhote!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Nunku nakakina muoyo, bualu bua mudimu udi muenjibue muinshi mua diba wakannyingalasha. Bualu bua malu onso adi hatuhu bu kuihata kua luhehele." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nakakina midimu yonso inakenza muinshi mua diba hanakamona ne, Ndi nyishila muntu udi undonda." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Udi mumanye ne, Yeye neikale muena meji anyi muhote nganyi? Kadi yeye neakokeshe midimu yanyi yonso inakenza ne yakalesha bantu lungenyi lunakadi nʼalu muinshi mua diba. Ebu mbualu bua batuhu kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Nunku ditekemena dia malu onso anakenza muinshi mua diba diakajimina. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Bualu bua misangu mikuabo muntu udi wenza mudimu wandi wa lungenyi, wa meji ne mulengele tshishiki udi ushila muntu buhianyi budiye kayi mukuatshile mudimu. Bualu ebu budi bua hatuhu, budi butambe bubi." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Muntu udi uheta tshinyi ku midimu yandi yonso yakenzeye ne yakanyingalasheye nʼai mutshima wandi muinshi mua diba? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Bualu bua matuku andi onso adi ne ntatu ne mudimu wandi udi wa kanyinganyinga; mutshima wandi mene kawena wikisha butuku. Ebu mbualu bua hatuhu kabidi. 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kakuena disanka kudi muntu bu kudia, kunua ne kusankisha mutshima wandi mu midimu yandi. Nakatangila disanka edi ne, Ndifume ku tshianza tshia Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Bualu bua udi mumanye mua kumpua meme ku didia ne disanka nganyi? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nzambi udi uha muntu udi umusankisha meji, lungenyi ne disanka; kadi udi uha muntu mubi lutatu lua kukunguisha bintu bia kuhesha mukuabo udi usankisha Nzambi. Bualu ebu mbua hatuhu kabidi ne bu kuihata kua luhehele." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Bualu bua tshintu tshionso tshidi ne tshikondo tshiatshi, ne bualu buonso budi ne diba diabu muinshi mua diulu kabidi:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 tshikondo tshia kuledibua ne tshikondo tshia kufua; tshikondo tshia kukuna bintu ne tshikondo tshia kubihuola; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 tshikondo tshia kushiha ne tshikondo tshia kuondaha; tshikondo tshia kubutula ne tshikondo tshia kuibaka; 
Ecclesiastes3:4 tshikondo tshia kudila ne tshikondo tshia kuseka; tshikondo tshia kuasa madilu ne tshikondo tshia kuja maja; 
Ecclesiastes3:5 tshikondo tshia kuimasha mabue ne tshikondo tshia kusangisha mabue kabidi; tshikondo tshia kuelangana bituha ku nshingu ne tshikondo tshia kubenga kuelangana bituha; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 tshikondo tshia kukeba ne tshikondo tshia kujimisha; tshikondo tshia kulama ne tshikondo tshia kuimasha; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 tshikondo tshia kubanda ne tshikondo tshia kutela; tshikondo tshia kuhuwa ne tshikondo tshia kuakula; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 tshikondo tshia kunanga ne tshikondo tshia kukuta; tshikondo tshia kuluangana nvita ne tshikondo tshia kushikama talalâ. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Muena mudimu udi uheta tshinyi ku mudimu udiye wenza? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nakatangila mudimu wa lutatu wakaha Nzambi ba ha buloba bua kubibidisha nʼau. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Yeye wakafuka tshintu tshionso tshiakane mu tshikondo tshiatshi; wakuteka lungenyi mu mitshima ya bantu, kadi kabena bamanye mua kujingulula mudimu wa Nzambi wakenzeye ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba tô ne kunshikidilu kuabu." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndi mumanye ne, Kakuena bualu buimpe bu kusanka ne kuenza malu mimpe matuku onso hatshidi muntu ne muoyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Muntu yonso adie biandi, anue biandi, asanke biandi mu midimu yandi yonso, bua eku nkuha kua Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndi mumanye ne, Malu onso adi Nzambi wenza neajalame tshiendelele; kabena bamanye mua kusangisha tshintu ha mutu, kabena bamanye mua kumushaku tshintu; Nzambi wakenza nunku bua bantu bamutshine." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Malu adiku katataka akadiku kale; ne malu adi kâyi manze kulua akadiku diambedi; Nzambi neamueneshe kabidi malu akamana kujimina. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Nakatangila muinshi mua diba ne mu muaba wa tshilumbuluidi muakadi dihetu, ne mu muaba wa buakane muakadi bubi kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Nakamba mu mutshima wanyi ne, Nzambi nealumbuluishe bantu bakane ne bantu babi; bualu bua malu onso ne midimu yonso bidi ne tshikondo tshiabi." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Nakamba mu mutshima wanyi ne, Nzambi udi wenzela bana ba bantu nunku bua kubateta ne bua bobo badimanye ne, Tuetu tudi anu bu nyama." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Bualu bua malu adi akuata bana ba bantu adi akuata nyama kabidi; mufuafua umue mmufuafua mukuabo; bidi ne muhuya muomumue; bantu kabena bahita nyama buakane; malu onso adi hatuhu. 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Bionso biyaya ku muaba umue; bionso bidi anu dinfuenkenya dia buloba, nebiandamuke dinfuenkenya dia buloba kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Udi mumanye ne, Muoyo wa muntu udi ubanda kulu, anyi muoyo wa nyama udi uhueka muinshi mua buloba nganyi?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Nunku nakajingulula ne, Kakuena bualu buimpe bu bua muntu kusanka mu midimu yandi; bualu bua edi ndifutu diandi; wamuhingasha ha buloba bua kutangileye malu adi alonda ku nyima kuandi nganyi?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Nakatangila kabidi makenga onso adibo bakengesha nʼau bantu muinshi mua diba; monai binsonshi bia bakadi bakengeshibua kabayi ne musambi! Bakabakengesha bakadi ne bukole, bobo kabakadi ne musambi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nunku nakamba ne, Bantu bakamana kufua badi batamba batshidi ne muoyo kusanka," 
Ecclesiastes4:3 ne badi kabayi banze kuledibua ne kabayi banze kutangila malu mabi adibo benza muinshi mua diba badi batamba buonso buabo kusanka. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Hashishe, nakatangila mudimu wonso ne ngenzelu wau mulengele bidi bivuisha bantu mukau. Bualu ebu budi hatuhu, bu kuihata kua luhehele." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Muhote udi udikuata bianza, udi udidia mubidi wandi." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Dianza diule tente ne ditalala didi dihita manza abidi mûle tente ne mudimu mukole ne kuihata kua luhehele. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Nakatangila kabidi malu a hatuhu muinshi mua diba; 
Ecclesiastes4:8 mukuabo udiku udi nkayandi kayi ne muntu, nansha muana wa balume nansha muanʼabo wa balume, kadi nshikidilu wa mudimu wandi kenaku; mesu andi kaena manze kutshina ne bubanji. Hashishe, udi udikonka munda ne, Ndi ngenzela nganyi mudimu? Ndi ndikandika masanka bua tshinyi? Ebu mbualu bua hatuhu ne mudimu wa lutatu." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Bantu babidi badi bahita umue, bua bobo badi baheta difutu dimpe ku mudimu wabo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Bualu bua biadishindabo, umue neabishe mukuandi; kadi diakabi didi kudi udi udishinda nkayandi kayi ne mukuabo bua kumuhisha." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Bualu bukuabo, bialala bantu babidi kaha kamue badi bakuatshishangana luya; kadi udi ulala nkayandi udi mua kukuata luya munyi?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Muntu udi mua kuhita mukuabo bukole, kadi bantu babidi badi mua kumuhita yeye bukole; kabena mua kutula mionshi isatu milukakasha lukasa." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Nsongalume muhele udi ne lungenyi udi uhita mukelenge mukulukashi muhote udi kayi witabusha mibelu," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 nansha yeye muluhuke mu nsubu wa mashika bua kubuela mu bukelenge, nansha yeye muledibue mu bukelenge buandi." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nakatangila bonso hadi ne muoyo bendakana muinshi mua diba hohamue ne nsongalume wakahiana bukelenge buandi; 
Ecclesiastes4:16 bungi buabo kabuakadi mua kubadibua ne yeye wakadi ha mutu ha buonso buabo. Kadi balonda ha nyima kabena mua kusanka bua bualu buandi. Bulelela, ebu mbualu bua hatuhu kabidi, bu kuihata kua luhehele." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ulame makasa ebe hawabuela mu nsubu wa Nzambi; kusemena ha buihi bua kunvua kudi kuhita milambu ya bahote buakane, bualu bua bobo kabena bamanye ne, Tudi tuenza bualu bubi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Mei kâluhuki mukana muebe lukasa; mutshima webe kauhatudi bualu ku mpala kua Nzambi lubilu; bualu bua Nzambi udi mu diulu, wewe udi ha buloba; nunku mei ebe ikale makehele." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Tshilota tshidi tshilua ne malu a bungi; diakula dia muhote didi dihatula mei a bungi. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Hawaditshiha kudi Nzambi, kujanguluki bua kumana mulayi; bualu bua yeye kena ne bahote disanka; ufute tshiwakalaya." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kubenga mua kuditshiha kudi kuhita kudinga buakane. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Kuitabushi bua mukana muebe kukulenduisha; kuambidi messager ne, Nakadi mutuhakane; udi musue Nzambi ikale ne tshiji bua mei ebe, ashihe mudimu wa bianza biebe bua tshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Bualu bua mu bilota bia bungi mudi mei a bungi ahatuka, kadi utshine Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Biwatangila bahele bakengeshibue ne kunyanga kua bilumbuluidi ne kushiha kua mikenji mu province wenu, kukemi bua malu au; bualu bua banfumu bonso badi ne banga badi babatangila, ne udi mubatambe bonso udi ha mutu habo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Dikuatshisha dia buloba didi kudi bantu bonso; mukelenge muine udi ukuatshishibua ne bintu bia mu madimi. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Wananga biuma kena usankishibua ku biuma; wananga bubanji kena ukuta bubanji; ebu mbualu bua hatuhu kabidi. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Bualu bua hakumbana bintu, badi babidia badi bakumbana kahidi; ne nfumuʼabi udi ne difutu kai dikuabo, anu bua kuntangila ku mesu?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Tulu tua muena mudimu tudi tuimpe biadieye bintu bikese anyi bia bungi; kadi kukuta kua muntu mubanji kakuena kumuladika tulu. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Nakatangila bualu bubi muinshi mua diba bua muntu mudilamine luhetu tô ne hakamukengeshalu; 
Ecclesiastes5:14 luhetu elu ludi lujimina mu malu mabi; kadi bialeleye muana wa balume, kena ne tshia kumushila." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Bu muakahatukeye munda mua mamu wandi butaka, yeye neahingane kabidi; kena uya ne tshintu tshimue mu bianza biandi tshia mu midimu yonso yakenzeye." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ebu mbualu bubi kabidi bua muntu udi uhingana anu bu muakalueye. Udi ne difutu kai? Wakenzela luhehele mudimu; 
Ecclesiastes5:17 matuku andi onso akadi mu midima, mu kanyinganyinga, ntatu, masama ne mu tshiji tshikole." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Monai, bualu bundi mmona buimpe ne bukumbanyine muntu: adie biandi, anue biandi ne asanke mu midimu yandi yonso idiye wenza muinshi mua diba, matuku onso a muoyo wandi adi Nzambi mumuhe; edi ndifutu diandi." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Muntu yonso udi Nzambi muhe bintu ne bubanji ne bukole bua kubidia, bua kuangateye difutu diandi ne kusankeye mu midimu yandi amanye ne, Edi ndiha dia Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Yeye kena mua kutamba kuvuluka matuku a muoyo wandi; bualu bua Nzambi udi umuvuishisha disanka mu mutshima wandi. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kudi bualu bubi bunakatangila muinshi mua diba budi bunemena bantu bujitu: 
Ecclesiastes6:2 muntu udi Nzambi uha biuma, bubanji ne butumbi ne kena uhanga tshintu, kena uheta bukole kudi Nzambi bua kuhidia; kadi muenyi udi uhidia; ebu mbualu bua hatuhu ne bua dikenga dikole." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Bialela muntu bana lukama ne biashaleye ne muoyo bidimu bia bungi, kadi bikala mutshima wandi kauyi mukulu ne malu mimpe, anyi bantu kabayi bamujike bimpe, ndi ngamba ne, Muana wa kabishi udi mumuhite ku dikasa dimpe;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 bualu bua yeye udi uledibua hatuhu, udi umuka mu mîdima, ne dina diandi didi dijimine mu mîdima;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 yeye kakatangila diba, kena mudimanye; kadi udi uhita muntu au kuheta dikisha;" 
Ecclesiastes6:6 bulelela, nansha yeye mushale ne muoyo bidimu tshinunu misangu ibidi, kadi kayi ne disanka, kena uya kuyaya bonso, anyi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Midimu yonso idi muntu wenza mbua kusankisha mukana muandi, kadi nzala yandi kayena ishika." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Muena meji udi mutambe muhote munyi? Muntu muhele udi ne lumu kai hendakaneye ku mpala kua bakua ndi? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kumona ne mesu kudi kutamba kujinga buakane; ebu mbualu bua hatuhu, bu kuihata kua luhehele." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Tshintu tshionso tshidiku katataka tshiakamana kuidikibua dina diatshi kale; muntu udi mumanyibue kabidi, nunku kena mumanye mua kufuilangana ne udi mua kumuhita bukole." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Hadi mei avulangana, kudisua kudi kuyisangana kabidi, ne bualu buimpe budi muntu uheta budi hanyi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Nganyi udi mumanye malu adi makanyine muntu udi uhitshisha matuku makese a muoyo wandi wa hatuhu bu mundidimbi? Nganyi udi mua kuambila muntu malu alualua ku mpala kuandi muinshi mua diba? 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Dina dimpe didi dihita manyi a mushinga mukole buakane, dituku dia lufu ndihita dia kuledibua bulengele." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kubuela mu nsubu wa madilu kudi kuhita kubuela mu nsubu wa bidia bia dibanji buakane; bualu bua eu nshikidilu wa bantu bonso, ne badi ne muoyo nebateke bualu ebu mu mitshima yabo." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kanyinganyinga kadi kahita tuseku buakane; mpala wa majia udi uvuisha mutshima disanka. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mutshima wa muena meji udi mu nsubu wa madilu; kadi mitshima ya bahote idi mu nsubu ya tuseku. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kunyua mibelu ya bena meji kudi kuhita kunyua misambu ya bahote buakane. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Tuseku tua bahote tudi bu kutudika kua meba muinshi mua luesu; bualu ebu mbua hatuhu kabidi. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Muena meji udi wandamuka muhote ku dikengesha didiye nʼadi, mbueshilu idi inyanga mutshima." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Nshikidilu wa muanda udi uhita tshibangidilu tshiau bulengele; mutshima wa buhuekela udi uhita mutshima wa dihetu buakane. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Kukuatshi tshiji mu mutshima webe lukasa, bualu bua tshiji tshidi tshiala mu tshiadi tshia bahote." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Kudikonki ne, Matuku a diambedi adi mahite a mpindiu buakane bua tshinyi? Bualu bua kuena ukonka bualu ebu ne meji mimpe." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Lungenyi ludi luakane bu buhianyi; ludi dikuatshisha kudi badi batangila diba. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Bualu bua lungenyi ludi ne dikuatshisha bu dia biuma; kadi lungenyi ludi lutamba bua ludi luvuisha muoyo kudi muenʼalu. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Welangane meji a mudimu wa Nzambi; tshiakamaneye kukonyangasha, watshiludika nganyi?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Mu dituku dia diakalengele usanke biebe; ne mu dituku dia dikenga, welangane meji; bulelela, Nzambi wakavuisha dituku dimue diakanangane ne dikuabo, bua muntu kajinguludi malu atshilualua." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Nakatangila malu onso mu matuku a ditshimbakana dianyi; muntu muakane udiku, udi ufua mu buakane buandi; muntu mubi udi uvudisha matuku andi mu bubi buandi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Kuhitshi kudibingisha; kudivuishi bu muena lungenyi lutambe; udi musue kudibutula bua tshinyi? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Kuvudishi malu mabi; kuikadi muhote; udi musue kufua dituku dia lufu luebe kadiyi dianze kufika bua tshinyi? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Mbimpe kulamata ku bualu ebu bikole; kumushiku tshianza tshiebe nansha; bualu bua watshina Nzambi neahanduke mu malu onso. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Lungenyi ludi luvuisha bukole kudi muena meji, buhite bua bileba dikumi mu musoko." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Bulelela, kakuena muntu muakane ha buloba utu wenza malu makane, kayi wenza malu mabi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kuteleji matshu ebe ku mei onso adibo bamba, bua wewe kunvu bihendu bia muhika webe;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 bualu bua mutshima webe udi mumanye ne, Wewe biebe wakahenda bakuabo misangu ya bungi." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Nakateka malu au onso mu meji; nakamba ne, Nempete meji, kadi nakuahanga." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Malu adiku, adi kule, adi ne ndondo mule; udi mumanye mua kuajingulula nganyi?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nakateka mutshima wanyi ku kumanya ne kujingulula lungenyi ne kusokolola kua malu onso bua meme kumanya buhote bua malu mabi, ne ditshimbakana dia malu a hatuhu." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nakasangana ne, Mukashi udi ne mutshima mufuanangane ne mateyi ne bukuondo ne bianza bidi bu mionshi, yeye udi mutambe lufu bululu; wasankisha Nzambi neahanduke mu bianza biandi; kadi yeye neakuate muntu mubi." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Muambi udi Wamba ne, Monai munakasangana hanakateta kusangisha bualu bumue ku bukuabo bua kuheta bualu bujalame;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 kadi tshiakasangana bualu buakadi mutshima wanyi ukeba tô ne mpindiu; nakasangana muntu mulume umue mujalame munkatshi mua tshinunu tshia bantu, kadi tshiakasangana muntu mukashi munkatshi muabo." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Nakasangana anu bualu ebu bumue ne, Nzambi wakafuka bantu ne mitshima mijalame, kadi bobo bakadikebela malu a ngenyi yabo." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Udi bu muena meji nganyi? Udi mumanye dijingulula dia bualu nganyi? Meji a muntu adi akenkesha mpala wandi, ne mpala wakadiye munyenge udi usululuka." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndi ngamba ne, Utumikile mukenji wa mukelenge; bualu bua wakamana kuditshiha kudi Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Kumuki ku mesu kuandi lukasa; kunanukidi mu bualu budi kabuyi bumusankisha, bualu bua yeye utu wenza bu mudiye musue." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Bualu bua dî dia mukelenge didi dishikisha bualu; nganyi udi mua kumukonka ne, Udi wenza tshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Mutumikidi wa mikenji kena ukengeshibua; mutshima wa muena meji udi ujingulula bikondo ne ngenzelu. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Bualu buonso budi ne tshikondo tshiabu ne ngenzelu wabu; dikenga dia muntu didi dimunemena bujitu; 
Ecclesiastes8:7 bualu bua yeye kena mumanye malu alualua; nganyi udi mua kumanya muikalau? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kakuena muntu udi mua kukandika muhuya wa muoyo; yeye kabidi kena mua kuindisha dituku dia lufu; kabena balekela bena nvita hatshidibo baluangana; bubi kabuena mua kuhandisha muenʼabu. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Nakatangila malu au onso; nakateka mutshima wanyi ku malu onso adi enjibua muinshi mua diulu; tshikondo tshidiku tshidi muntu ne bukole bua kukengesha mukuabo. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Nakatangila bantu babi bajikibue; bakadi babuele, bahatuke ku muaba wa tshijila; bena musoko bakabatula muoyo kabidi; ebu mbualu bua hatuhu." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Bualu bua kabena bakengesha benji ba malu mabi lukasa, mitshima ya bana ba bantu idi ikoleshibua bua kuenza malu mabi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nansha muntu muenze malu mabi misangu lukama, nansha mushale ne muoyo musangu mule, bulelela, ndi mumanye ne, Badi batshina Nzambi nebahete diakalengele ku mesu kuandi, bua badi bamunemeka;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 kadi muntu mubi kena uheta diakalengele, yeye kena uvudisha matuku andi, adi bu mindidimbi; bualu bua yeye kena utshina ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Bualu bua hatuhu budi buenjibue ha buloba, bua bantu bakane badiku bakaheta malu akadi kuikala kudi bantu babi; bantu babi badiku bakaheta malu akadi kuikala kudi bantu bakane. Nakamba ne, Bualu ebu budi hatuhu kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Hashishe, nakanyisha disanka, bualu bua muntu kena ne bualu buimpe bukuabo muinshi mua diba budi butamba kudia, kunua ne kusanka: bualu bua mu malu a mudimu wandi, â ke adi ashala kudiye matuku a muoyo wandi adi Nzambi mumuhe muinshi mua diba." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Hanateka mutshima wanyi ku dijingulula dia meji ne ku dimona dia midimu idi yenjibua ha buloba (bualu bua bakuabo badiku badi kabayi baheta tulu ku mesu munya ne butuku)," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 nunku nakatangila midimu yonso ya Nzambi, nakamona ne, Muntu kena mumanye mua kujingulula midimu yonso idi mienjibue muinshi mua diba, nansha muntu munanukile bua kuyikeba, yeye kena usheta; bielangana muena lungenyi meji ne, Nakayimanya, yeye mene kena ne bukole bua kuyisangana." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Bualu bua nakateka malu â onso mu mutshima wanyi bua kuateta bu mudi bantu bakane ne bena meji ne midimu yabo bidi mu bianza bia Nzambi; bikalaku dinanga anyi lukuna, muntu kena mumanye; malu onso adi ku mpala kuabo." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Nshikidilu wa bantu bonso udi muomumue: udi muomumue kudi bantu bakane ne kudi bantu babi, kudi bantu bimpe badi ne mitshima mitoke ne kudi badi ne mitshima mifike, kudi badi bashihela Nzambi nyama ne kudi badi kabayi bamushihela nyama; muntu muakane udi anu bu muntu mubi; udi muditshihe udi muomumue ne udi utshina mua kuditshiha." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ebu mbualu bubi bua mu malu onso adi menjibue muinshi mua diba ne nshikidilu umue udi kudi bantu bonso; bulelela, mitshima ya bana ba bantu idi miule tente ne malu mabi; kutomboka kudi mu mitshima yabo hatshidibo ne muoyo; ku nyima badi baya kudi bafue." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Bualu bua udi ubadibue munkatshi mua badi ne muoyo udi ne ditekemena; bualu bua mbua udi ne muoyo udi uhita nyama wa ntambue mufue. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Bualu bua badi ne muoyo badi bamanye ne, Netufue; kadi bafue kabena bamanye bualu bumue, kabena ne difutu diabo kabidi; kabena babavuluka." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Dinanga diabo ne lukinu luabo ne mukau wabo biakajimina kale; kabena ne bualu bukuabo tshiendelele mu malu onso adi enjibua muinshi mua diba. 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ya biebe, udie bidia biebe ne disanka; unue nvinyo yebe ne mutshima wa disanka; bualu bua Nzambi wakumana kuitabusha midimu yebe." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Bilulu biebe bikale bitoke tô matuku onso; kuhangi kuela manyi ha mutu hebe. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Usanke ne mukashi webe ûdi munange matuku onso a muoyo webe wa ha buloba akukuhabo muinshi mua diba, matuku ebe mene a ha buloba; ebu mbuebe buhianyi bua mu muoyo ne mu midimu yebe iudi wenza muinshi mua diba." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Malu onso audi wenza wenze ne bukole buebe buonso; bualu bua kakuena mudimu, kakuena kulongolola kua malu, kakuena lungenyi anyi meji ku Muaba wa Bafue kûdi uya." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Nakatangila kabidi muinshi mua diba ne, Bena lubilu lukole kabena bahita hakuaho mu kutumbila lubilu misangu yonso, nansha bena bukitu kabena bahitahita bakuabo bukole mu nvita; bena meji kabalu baheta bia kudia bionso; bena lungenyi kabatu baheta bubanji buonso; badi ne ngenzelu muimpe kabatu baheta diakalengele dionso; kadi buonso buabo badi ne bikondo bidi malu abatulukila." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Muntu kena mumanye tshikondo tshiandi; bu mudi minyinyi ya mu mai ikuatshibua mu kahamba kabi, ne bu mudi nyunyu ihia masoka, nunku bana ba bantu badi bakuatshibua mu tshikondo tshibi haluatshi kudibo lukasa." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Nakatangila lungenyi lua nunku muinshi mua diba, luakunkemesha, luakumueneka bu bualu bunene kundi:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Musoko mukese wakadiku, anu bantu banya-banya bakadimu; mukelenge munene wakalua kuluisha, wakautshintshimika ne wakasa bibumba;" 
Ecclesiastes9:15 bakasanganamu muena meji muhele; bua lungenyi luandi yeye wakasungila musoko, kadi kakuakadi muntu wakavuluka muhele eu." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Hashishe, nakamba ne, Lungenyi ludi luhita bukole buakane; kadi badi balengulula lungenyi lua muntu muhele ne kabena bunvua mei andi." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mei a bena meji adibo bunvua talalâ adi ahita mbila ya mukokeshi wa bahote buakane. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Lungenyi ludi luhita bintu bia nvita bukole; kadi muntu mubi umue udi unyanga malu makane a bungi. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Njiji mifue idi inunkisha manyi a muenji wa manananshi muhuya mubi; nunku buhote bukese budi bujimisha lungenyi ne butumbi. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mutshima wa muenu meji udi ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume; kadi mutshima wa muhote udi ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Bulelela, henda muhote mu nshila, mutshima wandi udi umuhangisha, yeye udi umanyisha bantu bonso ne, Ndi muhote." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Biakutekela mukokeshi tshiji, kumuki ku muaba webe nansha, bualu bua kalolo kadi katekesha bihendu bia bungi." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Nakatangila bualu bubi muinshi mua diulu, budi bu dituhakana didi difuma kudi mukokeshi;" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 malu mahote adi atumbishibua bikole, kadi babanji badi bashikame mu miaba mihuekele." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nakatangila bahika babanda ha nyima ha tuhalu; nakatangila bakokeshi benda hanshi bu bahika. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Udi umbula dijimba neadishindemu; udi uluhula disoso mu tshimanu, nyoka neumusume." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Udi uhanda mabue, wowo neamukengeshe; udi uhanda nkunyi neyimuheteshe njiu." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Biatshihala tshiamu, hikala muntu kayi mutshinone, nunku budiye nʼahu mbua kutaha ne bukole buonso; lungenyi ludi mua kumutungunusha." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Bulelela, nyoka neasume bikalaku kakuyi ditekesha; muenu biakulakula udi biandi muomumue." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mei a mukana mua muena meji adi ne kalolo, kadi mishiku ya muhote neyimumine." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ku tshibangidilu tshia mei a mukana muandi kudi butshimbe; nshikidilu wa mei andi udi buhale bubi. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Muhote udi utudisha mei, kadi muntu kena mumanye malu adi kâyi manze kulua; udi mumanye mua kumuambila malu adi amulonda nganyi?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Midimu ya bahote idi ibatekesha; kabena bamanye mua kuya ku musoko. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Mulau kûdi, wewe tshisamba, tshidi ne mukelenge mutshikale muana, tshidi ne haminyampala batu badia mu dinda!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Disanka kûdi, wewe tshisamba, tshidi ne mukelenge muneme, tshidi ne baminyampala batu badia ha diba dikumbane bua kuheta bukole kabuyi bua kukuatshika maluvu." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Bua bufuba musaka wa nsubu udi uhuka; bua lulengu mai adi amata mu nsubu. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Bidia bidi bisankisha bantu; nvinyo idi isankisha mitshima ya bantu; biuma bidi bihetesha bintu bionso. 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Kuhendi mukelenge mu meji ebe nansha; kuhendi babanji mu nsubu webe wa bulalu; bualu bua nyunyu wa mulu neaye ne dî diebe, ne tshidi ne mahuahua netshimuangalashe lumu elu." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Wele bidia biebe ha mutu ha mai, bualu bua neubisangane kabidi hahita matuku a bungi." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Uhe bantu muanda mutekete nansha muanda mukulu tshituha tshia bintu biebe, bualu bua wewe kuena mumanye bubi buamueneka ha buloha." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Bikala matutu mûle tente ne mai a nvula, adi amumatshisha ha buloba; biahona mutshi ku luseke lua ku sude anyi lua ku nôde, mutshi newikale anu mu muaba wakahonenau." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Udi utangila bu mudi luhehele luenza kena ukuna bintu; udi utangila bu mudi matutu enda kena uhuola. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Bu mûdi kuyi mumanye mudi luhehele luheha, bu mûdi kuyi mumanye mudi mifuba idiunda munda mua mukashi udi ne difu, nunku kuena mumanye mudimu wa Nzambi udi wenza malu onso." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kuna maminu ebe ne dinda, kuikishi dilolo; bualu bua kuena mumanye ne bidi bidiunda ngebi anyi mbiabia, anyi bubidi buabi nebidiunde." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Bulelela, munya udi muimpe; mesu adi asanka bua kumona diba." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Biashala muntu ne muoyo bidimu bia bungi, asankilemu; kadi avuluke biandi kabidi matuku a mîdima, bualu bua neikale a bungi. Malu onso alualua adi hatuhu." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Wewe nsongalume, usanke mu bunsongalume buebe, mutshima webe akusankishe mu matuku a bunsongalume buebe; wende mu nshila yonso idi mutshima webe musue ne idi mimpe ku mesu kuebe; kadi Umanye biebe ne, Nzambi neakulumbuluishe bua malu au onso." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Umushe kanyinganyinga mu mutshima webe ne malu mabi a mubidi webe; bualu bua bikondo bia buana ne bunsongalume bidi hatuhu. 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Uvuluke Mufuki webe mu matuku a bunsongalume buebe, hadi matuku mabi kayi manze kulua anyi bidimu kabiyi bianze kufika ha buihi, haudi wamba ne, Tshiena nʼabi disanka;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 hadi diba, munya, ngondo ne mitoto kabiyi bianze kulua mîdima ne matutu kâyi manze kuhingana haloka nvula;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 mu matuku adi balami ba nsubu bazakala, bantu hakole nebiname ne bahedi ba manvua nebalekele mudimu bualu bua badi banya-banya; batangidi ba ha madidishi kabena bamona bimpe;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 ne bibi bionso bia ku misesu bidi binshila; tshiona tshia dihela dia manvua tshidi tshitekete; muntu neajuke anu bua muadi wa nyunyu; bana ba bakashi bonso, bimbi ba misambu, nebahungile;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 bakulumpe nebatshine mikuna; buowa nebubakuate mu nshila; ne mutshi wa amande newele bilongo; ne mpasu mene neamunemene bujitu; dijinga nedimutalale ku muoyo; bualu bua muntu uyaya ku muaba wandi wa tshiendelele; bena madilu badi bendakana mu misesu; 
Ecclesiastes12:6 diambedi nshinga wa tshiamu tshia argent kayi muanze kusuluka, anyi dilonga dia tshiamu tshia or kadiyi dianze kufua anyi mulondo kauyi muanze kufua ku mpokolo wa mai, anyi nkata kayi muanze kutshibuka ku dina dia mai;" 
Ecclesiastes12:7 nunku mubidi newandamuke dinfuenkenya dia buloba kabidi ne muhuya wa muoyo neuhingane kudi Nzambi wakaufila. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Muambi udi wamba ne, Malu a hatuhu, malu onso adi hatuhu." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Bualu bukuabo, Muambi wakadi ne meji, yeye wakayisha bantu lungenyi; bulelela, yeye wakelangana meji, wakakebakeba ne wakalondolola nsumuinu ya bungi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Muambi wakadifila bua kuheta mei adi asankisha bantu, mei makane ne malelela." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mei a bena meji adi bu misongolo; adi masangishibue bu misumadi mikumine bikole kudi mulami umue. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Bualu bukuabo, muanʼanyi, udimuke; kakuena ndekelu wa kufunda kua mikanda ya bungi; kutamba kuyila kudi kutekesha mubidi." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Eu nshikidilu wa malu onso; malu onso adi munvuike. Utshine Nzambi, utumikile mikenji yandi; ebu mbualu buonso budi muntu ne bua kuenza." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Bualu bua Nzambi nealumbulule mudimu wonso ne bualu buonso busokoka, nansha buimpe nansha bubi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Musambu wa mu misambu, udi wa Solomo." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Utuangane nʼanyi mishiku, Bualu bua dinanga diebe didi dihita nvinyo buakane," 
SongOfSongs1:3 manyi ebe adi ne dihembu dimpe, dina diebe didi bu manyi adibo bahongolola; nunku bansongakashi batshidi tumama badi bakunanga." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Unkoke; netukulonde lukasa. Mukelenge wakulua nʼanyi mu nsubu muandi. Netusanke bua bualu buebe; kutumbisha kuetu kua dinanga diebe kudi kutamba kutumbisha kuetu kua nvinyo; badi bakunanga bulelela. 
SongOfSongs1:5 Nuenu bana bakashi ba mu Yelushalema, meme ndi mufike kadi ndi mulengele bu nsubu ya ntenta ya mu Kedâ ne bu bilulu bikudika bia Solomo." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Kanuntangidi bualu bua dikoba dianyi didi difike, bualu bua munya wakungosba. Bana betu ba balume ba difu dimue bakadi nʼanyi tshiji, bakunteka bua kulama mionshi ya tumuma tua nvinyo tua bakuabo, kadi tshiakalama mionshi yanyi." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Wewe, udi mutshima wanyi munange, ungambile kûdi udisha mikoko yebe ne kudiyi ilala munda munya. Bua tshinyi ndi ne bua kuikala bu muhambuke munkatshi mua mikoko ya balunda bebe?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Wewe mukashi udi uhita bakuabo bulengele, biwikala kuyi mumanye, ya biebe, ulonde mikono ya mikoko, udishe bana bebe ba mikoko ha buihi ne ntenta ya balami." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Wanyi munanga, nakakuelekesha ne kabalu kadi kakoka dikalu dia Palô." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Matama ebe adi malengele bua mabue adi malembelelahu, ne nshingu webe udi mulengesha ne mabue a mushinga mukole." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Netukulongoluele bilenga bia or bilamika argent. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Hakadi mukelenge mushikame ku mesa andi, manananshi anyi akanunka muhuya muimpe." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Wanyi munanga udi kundi bu kabombi ka myrrhe kadi kalala mu mabele anyi. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Wanyi munanga udi kundi bu tshisumbu tshia bilongo bia mu madimi a Ene-gedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Mona, wanyi munanga, wewe udi mulengele, mona, udi mulengele be; mesu ebe adi bu a nyunyu wa nkutshi." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Mona, wanyi munanga, wewe udi mulengele, udi mulengele be; bulalu buetu budi buadisha mabeshi a mitshi." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Mikamba ya mu nsubu muetu idi ya mitshi ya cèdre maleka etu adi a mitshi ya cyprès. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Meme ndi bu tshilongo tshia mu Shalona ne bu tshilongo tshia nsungubidi tshia mu tshibanda. 
SongOfSongs2:2 Bu mudi tshilongo tshia nsungubidi munkatshi mua meba, wanyi munanga udi nunku munkatshi mua bana ba bakashi." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Bu mudi mutshi wa mamuma a pommes munkatshi mua mitshi ya ditu, wanyi munanga udi nunku munkatshi mua bana ba balume. Nakashikama hanshi mu mundidimbi wandi ne disanka dinene, mamuma andi akadi mashemakane mukana muanyi." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yeye wakalua nʼanyi mu nsubu wa dibanji, dibendela diandi diakadi diheha mu mutu wanyi diakadi dinanga." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Unkoleshe ne tumuma tukese tûme, unsangashe ne mamuma a pommes, bualu bua dinanga diakunkengesha." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi tshidi bu musamu ku mutu wanyi; wakungela tshituha ne tshianza tshiandi tshia balume. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Nuenu, bana ba bakashi ba mu Yelushalema, ndi nnusengelela ne, Bu mudibo bahita bitekete hadi ngulungu ne ntole milale mu mpata, kanunyangishi, kanubishi wanyi munanga anu hasueye." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Dî dia wanyi munanga! Tangilai, yeye ulualua, udi wenda utuhika ha mikuna minene, udi wenda wela bidi ha mikuna mikese." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Wanyi munanga udi bu ngulungu anyi bu lukungulu lua ntole. Monai, yeye udi muimane ku nyima kua tshimanu tshietu, udi utangidila ha madidishi a nsubu, udi ukenzakana ha masoso a madidishi." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Wanyi munanga wakungambila ne, Juka biebe, wanyi munanga, wanyi mulengele, tuye bietu." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Bualu bua tshikondo tshia mashika tshiakuhita; nvula yakushika. 
SongOfSongs2:12 Bilongo bidi bimena mu buloba; tshikondo tshia kuimba misambu tshiakulua; dî dia nyunyu wa nkutshi didi diunvuika mu buloba buetu. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Mamuma a mitshi ya nfigi akuboba; mionshi ya tumuma tua nvinyo yakuela bilongo, bidi binunka muhuya muimpe. Juka, wanyi munanga, wanyi mulengele, tuye bietu." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Wewe, nyunyu wanyi wa nkutshi, udi usokoma mu mabue a mu mbuebue, mu miaba misokoka ya mu mbuwa; witabushe bua meme kumona mpala webe ne kunyua dî diebe; bualu bua dî diebe didi dimpe ne mpala webe udi mulengele." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Utukuatshile tunyama, tunyama tua mikenga, tudi lunyanga mionshi ya tumuma tua nvinyo, bualu bua mionshi yetu idi ne bilongo bitekete." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Wanyi munanga nguanyi, meme ndi wandi kabidi; yeye udi udishila mikoko yandi mu bilongo bia nsungubidi," 
SongOfSongs2:17 tô ne hatalala munya ne haleha mindidimbi, wanyi munanga walukile, wikale bu ngulungu anyi ntole ha mikuna ya Bete." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Butuku hanakadi ndala ha bulalu buanyi nakakeba udi mutshima wanyi munange; nakamukeba, kadi tshiakamuheta." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Nakamba ne, Nenjuke, nengendakane mu musoko; nenkebe udi mutshima wanyi munange mu misesu ne mu miaba minene; nakamukeba, kadi tshiakamuheta." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Bansentedi badi bendakana mu musoko bakasangakena nʼanyi; nakabebesha ne, Nuakutangila udi mutshima wanyi munange, anyi?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Hanakumuka kudibo, nakaya anu tshituha, nakasangana udi mutshima wanyi munange; nakamukuata bikole, tshiakamulekela tô ne hanakalua nʼandi mu nsubu wa mamu wanyi, mu nsubu mene wa wakandela." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Nuenu, bana ba bakashi ba mu Yelushalema, ndi nnusengelela ne, Bu mudibo bahita bitekete hadi ngulungu ne ntole mu mpata, kanunyungishi, kanubishi wanyi munanga anu hasueye." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Nganyi udi ufuma mu tshihela bu muishi wa kahia, mununke muhuya wa myrrhe ne manananshi, ne bintu bionso bia dihembu dimpe bia muendi wa mushinga?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Monai, ntshihoyi tshia Solomo! Bena bukitu makumi asambombo ba mu bakole ba mu Isalele badi batshiambula." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Buonso buabo badi ne miele ya nvita, badi ne bukitu bua kuluangana; muntu yonso udi ne muele wandi musuika ku mukaba wandi, bua buowa bua butuku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mukelenge Solomo wakadienzela tshihoyi tshia mitshi ya ku Lebanona. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Wakenza makunshi atshi ne tshiamu tshia argent, ne tshitaku tshiatshi ne tshia or, nkuasa watshi wakadi mulengeshibue ne bilulu bikunzubile; tshiakadi tshilengeshibue munda ku dinanga dia bana ba bakashi ba mu Yelushalema." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Nuenu, bana ba bakashi ba mu Siona, hatukai bua kutangila mukelenge Solomo, ne tshifulu tshia butumbi tshiakamuasabo kudi mamu wandi dituku dia dibaka diandi, dituku mene dia disanka dia mutshima wandi." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Mona, wanyi munanga, wewe udi mulengele, mona, udi mulengele be! Mesu ebe adi bu a nyunyu wa nkutshi; nsuki yebe idi bu tshisumbu tshia mbushi idi ilala ku mukuna wa Gilada." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Menu ebe adi bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko yakakosabo miosa, yakufuma ku tshiowelu tshia mai; buonso buai yakulela bana ba mahasa, kakuena umue mujimine." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Mishiku yebe idi bu buanda bukunze-kunzû; mukana muebe mudi mulengele. Matama ebe adi bu bihesa bia dimuma dia grenade, ku nyima kua tshilulu tshiebe tshibuikilu ha mutu hebe." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Nshingu webe udi bu tshibunda tshia Davidi, tshiakaseye bua bintu biandi bia nvita, tshidibo balembeleshe bintu bia nvita bia bantu tshinunu ne ngabu ya bena bukitu." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mabele ebe abidi adi bu bana ba ngulungu, bu bana ba mahasa ba ngulungu, badi badia munkatshi mua nsungubidi." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Hatalala munya ne haleha mi ndidimbi, nembande ku mukuna munene udi ne mitshi ya myrrhe ne ku mukuna mukese udi ne mitshi ya manananshi." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Wanyi munanga, wewe udi mulengele be; kuena ne ditoba, nansha dikese." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mukashi wanyi muhungile, umuke nʼanyi ku Lebanona; umuke nʼanyi ku Lebanona. Umuke ku mukuna wa Amana, ne ku wa Senî ne wa Hêmona, ku miaba idi mena a nyama ya ntambue, ne ku mikuna idi ne nkashama." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Wewe, muanʼetu mukashi, mukashi wanyi muhungile, wakakoka mutshima wanyi, wakakoka mutshima wanyi ne disu diebe dimue, ne dibue dimue dia ku mabue a mu nshingu muebe." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Muanʼetu mukashi, mukashi wanyi mubangile, dinanga diebe didi dimpe be! Dinanga diebe didi ditamba nvinyo buakane, muhuya wa manyi ebe udi uhita wa manananshi onso bulengele!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Mukashi wanyi mubangile, mishiku yebe idi bu dikatshi dia buitshi; buitshi ne mabele bidi muinshi mua ludimi luebe; muhuya wa bilulu biebe udi bu wa Lebanona." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Muanʼetu mukashi, mukashi wanyi mubangile, udi bu tshibunda tshidi ne tshibi tshinshila; udi bu mpokolo wa mai mubuikile, udi bu mushimi wa mai udi ne tshibuikilu." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Wewe udi bu mitoloko mimene mu tshibunda tshia mamuma a grenade a mushinga mukole, ne mitshi ya bilongo ne ya nard," 
SongOfSongs4:14 nard ne safran, cannelle ne cinnamone, ne mitshi yonso ya musenga wa manananshi, ne myrrhe ne aloès, ne bintu bionso bia muhuya muimpe—" 
SongOfSongs4:15 Wewe udi bu mushimi wa mai mu tshibunda tshia bilongo, bu dina dia mai a muoyo, ne bu misulu ya mai idi ihatuka ku Lebanona." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Luhehele lua ku nôde, tabala, wewe, luhehele lua ku sude, heha! Nuhehe mu tshibunda tshianyi bua muhuya wa manananshi anyi uhatuke. Wanyi munanga abuele mu tshibunda tshiandi, adie biandi mamuma andi mimpe." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Muanʼetu mukashi, mukashi wanyi mubangile, nakabuela mu tshibunda tshianyi. Nakasangisha myrrhe wanyi ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe; nakadia buitshi buanyi busangishe ne dikatshi; nakanua nvinyo yanyi misangisha ne mabele. Balunda banyi, diai, nuai bienu; bananga banyi, nuai bintu bia bungi." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nakadi mulale tulu, kadi mutshima wanyi wakadi mutabale; edi ndi dia wanyi munanga udi ukokola ku tshibi, wamba ne, Muanʼetu, wanyi munanga, nyunyu wanyi wa nkutshi, wanyi mulengele tshishiki, ungunzuluile tshibi; bualu bua dibungi didi ku mutu wanyi, dibungi dia butuku didi dimatshila ku nsuki yanyi." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Nakavula bilulu bianyi, nembiluate munyi? Nakowa ku makasa anyi, ndi mua kuanyanga kabidi, anyi?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Wanyi munanga wakabuesha tshianza tshiandi ku dididishi, mutshima wanyi wakatabuluka bualu buandi." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Nakajuka bua kunzulula wanyi munanga tshibi; manananshi a myrrhe akadi amata ku bianza bianyi, akadi ku minu yanyi akumatshila ku tshikuatshidi tshia tshibi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Nakunzuluila wanyi munanga tshibi, kadi wanyi munanga wakadi mumane kuya. Mutshima wanji wakabungama hakadiye wakula; nakamukeba, kadi tshiakamuheta; nakamubikila, kadi yeye kakuitaba." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Bansentedi badi bendakana ku musoko, bakasangakena nʼanyi; bakankina, bakantaha mputa; balami bakadi bashikame ha mutu ha ngumbu bakanyenga tshilulu tshianyi." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Nuenu bana ba bakashi ba mu Yelushalema, ndi nnusengelela ne, Binuasangakena ne wanyi munanga, numuambile ne, Dinanga didi dinkengesha." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Webe munanga udi uhita bakuabo munyi, wewe mukashi udi mutambe bulengele? Webe munanga udi uhita bakuabo munyi, bua wewe udi utusengelela nunku?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Wanyi munanga udi mutoke ne mpala wandi udi lunkunjilakunjila; yeye udi muneme munkatshi mua bantu binunu dikumi. 
SongOfSongs5:11 Mutu wandi udi bu or wa mushinga mukole be; nsuki yandi idi mifike fitutû bu nsala ya tshikololo, idi mijinga bikata." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Mesu andi adi bu a nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi mishikame kukala kua mai, masukula ne mabele, majalame bimpe mu bihoko." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matama andi adi bu bibunda bia bintu bia dihembu dimpe ne bu midioko ya muhuya muimpe; mishiku yandi idi bu nsungubidi, manananshi a myrrhe adi amataku." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Bianza biandi bidi bu tukanu tua or tulengesha ne mabue a chrysolithes; mubidi wandi udi bu mubanga muhela mulengesha ne mabue a saphirs. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Mikolo yandi idi bu makunshi a mabue masonga mujadike mu or; tshinfuanyi tshiandi tshidi bu Lebanona tshilengele bu mitshi ya cèdres. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Mei a mukana muandi adi mashema; bulelela, yeye udi mutambe bulengele. Nuenu, bana ba bakashi ba mu Yelushalema, mulunda wanyi ne wanyi munanga udi nunku." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Webe munanga wakuya kudi kunyi, wewe mukashi udi uhita bakuabo bulengele? Webe munanga wakuya kudi kunyi bua tuetu tukukebeleye?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Wanyi munanga wakuya ku tshibunda tshiandi, ku malalu andi a bintu bia muhuya muimpe bua kudieye bintu mu tshibunda tshiandi, ne bua kuangateye bilongo bia nsungubidi." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Meme ndi wa wanyi munanga; wanyi munanga nguanyi kabidi; yeye udi udisha mikoko yandi munkatshi mua nsungubidi. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wanyi munanga, wewe udi mulengele bu mukuna wa Tisa: udi mulengele bu Yelushalema; udi ukuatshisha bakuabo buowa bu tshisumbu tshia masalayi tshidi ne mabendela." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Umusha mesu ebe kundi, bua adi atshinyisha. Nsuki yebe idi bu tshisumbu tshia mbushi idi yendakana ku mukuna wa Gilada." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Menu ebe adi bu tshisumbu tshia mikoko idi ifuma ku tshiowelu tshia mai; buonso buai yakalela bana ba mahasa, nansha umue wai wakufua." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Matama ebe adi bu bihela bia dimuma dia grenade ku nyima kua tshilulu tshiebe tshibuikila ha mutu hebe. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Bakelenge bakashi makumi asambombo badiku, ne bakashi bahika babakibue makumi muanda mukulu badiku, ne bakashi batshidi tumama badiku badi kabayi mua kubadibua." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Wanyi nyunyu wa nkutshi udi muakane be, udi anu umue umuehele; yeye udi muana umuehele wa mamu wandi; yeye udi muana mulengele kudi mumuledi. Bana ba bakashi bakamutangila, bakamuvudishila disanka; bakelenge bakashi ne bakashi bahika babakibue bakamutangila, bakamutumbisha." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Nganyi udi ufuanangana ne lunkelu, udi ne bulengele bu ngondo, udi ukenka bu diba, udi ukuatshisha bantu buowa bu tshisumbu tshia masalayi tshidi ne mabendela?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Nakaya bianyi mu tshibunda tshia mamuma, bua kutangila Buitshi idi mimene mu tshibanda; bua kumona mionshi bikalayi miele ntonga, ne grenades bikalayi miele bilongo." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Diambedi tshiyi muanji kumanya bualu, mutshima wanyi wakanshikika munkatshi mua makalu a bantu banyi banene." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Hingana, hingana, wewe Muena Shulama; hingana, hingana, bua tuetu tukutangile. Nuenu nudi nutangila Muena Shulama bu munudi nutangila maja a bisumbu bibidi bia masalayi bua tshinyi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Wewe muana wa mukelenge, makasa ebe adi atamba bulengele mu bisabata. Bibelu biebe bidi bu mabue a mushinga mukole adi masonga ku bianza bia nsenda." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Mubidi webe udi luhanza luenza ne dibumba, ludi kaluyi luhanga nvinyo misangisha, tshifuka tshiebe tshidi bu tshisumbu tshia blé tshidi tshisuika bilongo bia nsungubidi." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mabele ebe abidi adi bu bana ba mahasa ba ngulungu. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Nshingu webe udi bu tshibumba tshia mubanga. Mesu ebe adi bu mashi ba a mai a mu Heshebona adi hehi ne tshibuelelu tshia ku Bata-labima. Diulu diebe didi bu tshibumba tshia ku Lebanona tshidi tshitangila ku luseke lua Damaseke. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Mutu webe udi ufuanangana ne mukuna wa Kâmele; nsuki ya ku mutu webe idi bu bintu bikunzubile; mukelenge udi muvuishibue bu muhika bua bulengele buai. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Wewe udi mulengele be, udi unsankisha, wanyi munanga, dishina dia masanka." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Mubidi webe udi bu dibue dia ngashi, ne mabele ebe adi bu ntungu ya ngashi." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Nakamba ne, Nembande ku dibue dia ngashi, nenkuate ku matata adi; mabele ebe ikale bu bisumbu bia tumuma tukese, muhuya webe wikale bu muhuya wa mamuma a pommes." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Mukana muebe muikale bu nvinyo ya mushinga mukole; idi ne nse mu hilakalaka kudi munanga wanyi, idi inyungisha mishiku ya badi balala tulu." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndi wa wanyi munanga, dinanga diandi didi kundi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Lua biebe, wanyi munanga, tuye bietu mu madimi; tushikame bietu mu misoko." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tujuke lunkelu bua kuya mu madimi a tumuma tukese; tutangile mionshi bikalabi miele ntonga ne bilongo, ne grenades bikalayi miele bilongo; nenkuheku dinanga dianyi." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Tumuma tua mandragores tudi tutuma muhuya muimpe; mamuma a mishindu yonso adi ku mbelu kuetu, ne mahia-mahia ne mukulukulu, anakukutekela, wewe wanyi munanga." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Bu wewe muikale muanʼetu wa balume, wa dibele dimue, nakadi kusangila nʼebe ha bula ne nakadi kutuangana nʼebe mishiku; muntu kakadi kulengulula." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nakadi kukulombola, nakadi kulua nʼebe mu nsubu wa mamu wanyi udi unyisha malu; nakadi kukumusha nvinyo misangisha ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne mai a mamuma anyi a grenades." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi tshidi bu musamu ku mutu wanyi, tshianza tshiandi tshia balume tshidi tshingela tshituha." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndi nnutshihisha, nuenu bana bakashi ba mu Yelushalema, ne, Kanusonsolodi, kanubishi wanyi munanga anu hasueye." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Udi ufuma ku tshihela mukuate ku diboko dia wandi munanga nganyi? Nakakutahasha muinshi mua mutshi wa mamuma; mamu webe wakadiku ne kanyinganyinga bualu buebe, yeye wakakulelaku ne kanyinganyinga." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Unteke mu mutshima webe bu tshimanyinu ne bu tshimanyinu ha diboko diebe; bualu bua dinanga didi ne bukole bua lufu; mukau udi ne bukole bua Muaba wa Bafue; udi utema bu ndimi ya kahia, bu kahia ka Yehowa mene." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Misulu ya mai ya bungi kayena mimanye mua kujima dinanga, mai a bungi kaena mamanye mua kudifuisha mu mai; bikala muntu mushintakashe bintu bionso bia mu nsubu wandi ku dinanga, ne bamuhishe bikole." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tudi ne muakunyʼetu wa bakashi udi kayi muase mabele; netuenzele muakunyʼetu wa bakashi tshinyi dituku diamubangilabo? 
SongOfSongs8:9 Bikaleye bu tshimanu tshia nsubu, netumuashileku tshibumba tshia tshiamu tshia argent; bikaleye bu tshibi tshia mu nsubu, netumubuikile ne mabaya a mitshi ya cèdre." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Meme ndi bu tshimanu tshia nsubu, mabele anyi adi bu bibumba biatshi; nunku nakadi ku mesu kuandi bu muntu muhele dikisha." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomo wakadi ne budimi bua tumuma tukese mu Bâla-hamona, yeye wakafila budimi ebu mu bianza bia balami; muntu ne muntu wakadi ne bua kumufila tshinunu tshia biamu bia argent ku mamuma abu." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Budimi buanyi, budi buanyi nkayanyi, budi ku mpala kuanyi; wewe Solomo neuhete tshinunu tshia biamu bia argent, ne balami ba mamuma nebahete nkama ibidi." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Wewe udi mushikame mu bibunda, balunda bebe badi bateleja matshu ku dî diebe; udingunvuishe." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Wanyi munanga, ulue lukasa; wikale bu kabuluku anyi bu lukungulu lua ntole ha mutu ha mikuna ya bintu bia muhuya muimpe." 
Isaiah1:1 Tshikena kumona tshia Yeshaya, muana, wa Amoza, tshiakatangileye bualu bua Yuda ne Yelushalema, mu matuku a Uziya, Yotama, Ahaza ne Hezikiya, bakelenge ba Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Diulu, unvua biebe, ne wewe buloba, teleja matshu ebe, bualu bua Yehowa wakuamba dî ne, Nakudisha, nakukolesha bana, ne bakuntombokela." 
Isaiah1:3 Ngombe udi mumanye nfumu wandi, mpunda udi mumanye tshidilu tshia mukelenge wandi; kadi Bena Isalele kabena bamanye bualu, bantu banyi kabena bajingulula malu." 
Isaiah1:4 Nuenu, tshisamba tshia bantu babi, tshia badi banema bujitu bua malu mabi, tunkanunuma tua benji ba malu mabi, bana badi banyanga bienzedi biabo! Bakulekela Yehowa, bakulengulula Wa Tshijila wa Isalele, bakulua bu benyi kudiye, bakumukoma nyima." 
Isaiah1:5 Bualu kai nutshidi ne bualu bua banukume kabidi, bua nudi nunanukila kutombokela? Mutu wonso udi musame, mutshima wonso udi muhungile." 
Isaiah1:6 Munda mua makasa tô ne ku lubombo lua mutu kakuena muaba udi kauyi ne disama, anu mputa, biuja, ne mibundabunda mihia-mihia, bidi kabiyi bianze kukama, kabiyi bianze kujingila ne tshilulu, kabiyi bianze kutekeshibua ne manyi." 
Isaiah1:7 Buloba buenu budi bubutuka, misoko yenu idi mioshibue ne kahia; bantu ba bende badi badia bintu bia mu buloba buenu ku mesu kuenu mene, ne budi bubutuka bu mudibo bahaula musoko kudi bantu ba bende." 
Isaiah1:8 Badi bashiya muana mukashi wa Siona bu tshisambusambu tshia mu budimi bua tumuma tua nvinyo, bu tshitandatanda tshia mu tshibidi tshia tumuma tua tunsalala, bu musoko udibo batshintshimika." 
Isaiah1:9 Bu Yehowa wa misumba kayi mutushile difuka dikese dia bantu bakahanduka munkatshi mua bantu bakadiku diambedi, tuakadi kuikala bu Sodoma, tuakadi kufuanangana ne Amola." 
Isaiah1:10 Nuenu bakokeshi ba mu Sodoma, unvuai dî dia Yehowa! Nuenu bantu ba mu Amola, telejai matshu enu ku diyisha dia Nzambi wetu!" 
Isaiah1:11 Yehowa udi unukonka ne, Bisumbu bia milambu yenu bidi bu tshinyi kundi? Nakumana kukuta ne milambu ya kuosha ya bimpanga ne ya manyi a nyama midisha; tshiena nsanka bua mashi a balume ba ngombe, anyi a bana ba mikoko anyi a mpumbu ya mbushi." 
Isaiah1:12 Hanualua kumueneka ku mesu kuanyi, wakunuelela mukenji nganyi bua nuenu nudiate biendedi bianyi?" 
Isaiah1:13 Kanulu kabidi ne milambu ei ya hatuhu; muishi wa musenga wa manananshi wakuntonda. Disanka dia ngondo muhia-muhia ne dia lumingu ne kubikila kua masangisha, mmalu adi atondesha mutshima wanyi. Ebu mbualu bubi; tshiena mua kutukisha ne lutulu bua malu mabi ne bua disangisha dia tshijila." 
Isaiah1:14 Mutshima wanyi udi ukina masangisha enu a ngondo mihia-mihia ne matuku enu masungula bua kudiamu bia kudia bia disanka; adi anemesha mutshima wanyi bujitu, ne kutuala kuau kudi kuntonda." 
Isaiah1:15 Nunku, hanuolola bianza bienu kundi, nensokoke mesu anyi kunudi; e, hanuantendelela ne mitendelelu ya bungi mene, tshiena nnunvuila; bianza bienu bidi biule tente ne mashi." 
Isaiah1:16 Nudioweshe bienu, nudilengeshe, numushe bubi bua bienzedi bienu ku mesu kuanyi; nulekele kuenza malu mabi," 
Isaiah1:17 nuyile mua kuenza malu makane; nukebe kulumbulula kuakane, nuenzeshe mukengeshi bua yeye kuenza biakane; nulumbulule bilumbu bia bana ba nshiya ne kulumbulula kuakane, nuakuile bakashi ba mu lufuila mu bilumbuluidi." 
Isaiah1:18 Yehowa udi Wamba ne, Luai bienu, tuhunge dî bua bualu ebu: nansha hikala mihi yenu mikunze-kunzû, neyikale ne butoke bua neige; anyi bikalayi mikunze bu mashi, neyikale mitoke bu miosa ya mikoko." 
Isaiah1:19 Binuikala ne mitshima ya kuenza malu anyi ne ya kutumikila dî dianyi, nenudie bintu bimpe bia mu buloba;" 
Isaiah1:20 kadi binuabenga ne binuatomboka, nebanushihe ku muele wa nvita; bualu bua mukana mua Yehowa muakuamba dî edi." 
Isaiah1:21 Monai mudi musoko eu wakamanyabo mua kueyemena diambedi muandamuke mukashi wa masandi! Wowo wakadi mule tente ne kulumbulula kuakane, kuakadi buakane bushikamemu diambedi, kadi katataka anu bashihianganyi badimu!" 
Isaiah1:22 Biamu biebe bia argent biakuandamuka anu bikanganya, nvinyo yebe yakutekeshibua ne mai." 
Isaiah1:23 Bakokeshi bebe badi batomboka, ne badi bakuatanganyi ba bulunda ne bibi. Muntu yonso wa munkatshi muabo udi musue mbueshilu, udi ukeba anu maha. Kabena balumbulula bilumbu bia bana ba nshiya ne kulumbulula kuakane, ne tshilumbu tshia mukashi wa mu lufuila katshiena tshifika kudibo." 
Isaiah1:24 Nunku Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, Mukole wa Isalele, udi Wamba ne, Tangilai! Nendiholeshe bua badi bankina, nendisombuele kudi badi nʼanyi lukuna." 
Isaiah1:25 Nempingishe tshianza tshianyi kabidi hamʼbidi hebe bua kukukengesha, nenkulengeshile ku tshikanganya tshiebe bu mudibo balengesha ne buanga bua nsabanga, nenkûmushile tshiamu tshiebe tshionso tshia hatuhu." 
Isaiah1:26 Nenkuhingashile balumbuluishi bebe bu muakadi aba ba diambedi, ne bafidi bebe ba meji bu muakadi ba ku tshibangidilu. Hashishe nebakubikile ne, Musoko wa buakane, musoko udi bantu bamanye mua kueyemena." 
Isaiah1:27 Nebabikile Siona ku kulumbulula kuakane, nebahikule bantu bandi badi bahingana kudi Yehowa ku buakane." 
Isaiah1:28 Kadi kubutuka nekuhone hamʼbidi ha bantombokedi ne bantu babi diatshimue, ne bantu badi balekela kulonda Yehowa nebabutudibue." 
Isaiah1:29 Bualu bua bundu nebubakuate bua mitshi ya telebinta inuakunanga, nenuikale babuandakashibue bualu bua bibidi binuakusungula." 
Isaiah1:30 Bualu bua nenuikale bu mutshi wa telebinta udi mabeshi au mafubidila, ne bu tshibidi tshidi katshiyi mai." 
Isaiah1:31 Muntu mukole neikale bu tshikanfu tshia kutemesha, ne mudimu wandi newikale bu lusase lua kahia. Bubidi buabi nebihie bohamue, kakuena wa kubijima." 
Isaiah2:1 Dî dia Yeshaya, muana wa Amoza, diakatangileye bualu bua Yuda ne bua Yelushalema." 
Isaiah2:2 Mu matuku atshidi alua mukuna wa nsubu wa Yehowa neujadikibue bu mukuna muhite mikuabo bule, neubandishibue ha mutu ha mikuna mikese; ne ba mu bisamba bionso nebabuelemu." 
Isaiah2:3 Bantu ba bungi nebayeku, nebambe ne, Luai bienu, tubande ku mukuna wa Yehowa, tubuele mu nsubu wa Nzambi wa Yakoba; bua yeye atuyishe bienzedi biandi, ne bua tuetu tuende mu nshila yandi. Bualu bua diyisha dia mikenji nedifume mu Siona, ne dî dia Yehowa nedihatuke mu Yelushalema." 
Isaiah2:4 Yeye nealumbulule bilumbu bia munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu, neakosele bantu ba bungi bilumbu biabo; bobo nebafule nkasu ya kudima nʼai ku miele yabo ya nvita, nebatule miele ya kukosa nʼai matamba mafubidila a mitshi ku mafuma abo; tshisamba tshikuabo katshiena tshibisha muele wa nvita bua kuluisha nʼau tshisamba tshikuabo, ne kabena bayila lungenyi lua kuluangana nʼalu nvita kabidi." 
Isaiah2:5 Bana ba Yakoba, luai bienu, tuende mu munya wa Yehowa." 
Isaiah2:6 Bualu bua wewe, Yehowa, wakulekela bantu bebe, ba mu tshiota tshia Yakoba, bualu bua badi batamba kulonda batempi ba mbuku ba ku luseke lua esete, bakatua batempi ba mbuku bu mudi Bena Peleshete, ne badi batutakashangana bianza ne bana ba bisamba bia bende." 
Isaiah2:7 Buloba buabo budi bûle tente ne argent ne or, ne kakuena kunfudilu kua biuma biabo; buloba buabo budi bule tente ne tubalu, ne kakuena kunfudilu kua makalu abo." 
Isaiah2:8 Buloba buabo budi bûle tente ne mpingu; badi batendelela bintu bidibo basonga ku bianza biabo, bidi minu yabo mene yenza." 
Isaiah2:9 Muntu muhuekele udi muiname, muntu munene udi muhuekeshibue; nunku kubabuikididi mihi yabo." 
Isaiah2:10 Buelaku mu lubuebue, udisokoke mu dinfuenkenya dia buloba, ku mesu a Yehowa adi akuatshisha bantu buowa, ne ku butumbi bua buneme buandi." 
Isaiah2:11 Mesu a diambu a bantu neinamishibue, dihetu dia bantu banene nedihuekeshibue, ne Yehowa nkayandi neatumbishibue mu dituku adi." 
Isaiah2:12 Bualu bua Yehowa wa misumba udi ne dituku didiye ulumbuluisha bifukibua bionso bidi biditumbisha ne bidi bidisue, ne tshifukibua tshionso tshidi tshidibandisha; nebihuekeshibue," 
Isaiah2:13 nedikale ku mitshi ya cèdre yonso ya ku Lebanona idi mile ne idi mileha mulu, ne ku mitshi ya telebinta yonso ya mu Bashana;" 
Isaiah2:14 nedikale ku mikuna mile yonso, ne ku mikuna mikese yonso idi mibande;" 
Isaiah2:15 ne ku tshibumba tshionso tshile, ne ku lumbu luonso ludi lukoleshibue ne bielelu bia nvita;" 
Isaiah2:16 ne ku matu onso a ku Tâshishi, ne ku bintu bionso bidi bimpe ku mesu." 
Isaiah2:17 Diambu dia bantu nedihuekeshibue, kudisua kua bantu nekukeheshibue; anu Yehowa nkayandi neatumbishibue mu dituku adi." 
Isaiah2:18 Mpingu yonso neyijimine tshiendelele. 
Isaiah2:19 Bantu kabidi nebabuele mu mbuebue ya mu mabue ne mu nyongolo ya mu buloba, bua kusokomabo ku mesu a Yehowa adi abakuatshisha buowa, ne ku butumbi bua buneme buandi, hajukeye bua kuzakasha buloba bikole." 
Isaiah2:20 Mu difuku adi bantu nebimashe mpingu yabo ya argent, ne mpingu yabo ya or, yakudifudilabo bua kuyitendelela, nebayimashe kudi bibulebule ne kudi tuhulukusu," 
Isaiah2:21 bua bobo bine kubuelabo mu mbuebue, ne mu mitanta ya mbuebue, bua kusokomabo ku mesu a Yehowa adi abakuatshisha buowa, ne ku butumbi bua buneme buandi, hajukeye bua kuzakasha buloba bikole." 
Isaiah2:22 Lekelai kueyemena muntu, udi ne muhuya mu mimpempe ya mu diulu diandi; bua badi mua kumubala bu tshinyi?" 
Isaiah3:1 Monai! Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba mene, udi umusha tshieyemenu ne tshibangu mu Yelushalema ne mu Yuda, tshieyemenu tshionso tshia bia kudia ne tshieyemenu tshionso tshia mai a kunua." 
Isaiah3:2 Udi umusha muena bukitu ne umena nvita, mulumbuluishi wa bilumbu ne muprofete, mutempeshanganyi wa mbuku ne nkolomo;" 
Isaiah3:3 kapitene ka masalayi makumi atanu, ne muena butumbi, mufidi wa meji, muena majimbu udi ne lungenyi, ne muena muhongo." 
Isaiah3:4 Nenvuishe bana ba balume bakokeshi babo, ne bana batekete nebakokeshe ku mutu kuabo." 
Isaiah3:5 Bantu nebakengeshangane, muntu yonso neakengeshibue kudi mukuabo, ne muntu yonso neakengeshibue kudi muena mutumba nʼandi. Muana neadileshe ku mpala kua muntu mukole, ne muntu udi bakuabo bahetula neadileshe ku mpala kua muntu udi ne butumbi." 
Isaiah3:6 Halua muntu kukuata muanʼabo mu nsubu wa tatu wandi, wamba ne, Wewe udi ne tshivualu, newikale mukokeshi wetu, ne buloba ebu bubutuke nebuikale muinshi mua tshianza tshiebe;" 
Isaiah3:7 mu difuku adi mene yeye neahidie ne dî dikole, wamba ne, Tshiena musue kuikala mukokeshi; bualu bua mu nsubu muanyi kamuena bia kudia anyi bia kuvuala; kanuena numbuesha mu bukokeshi ku mutu kua bantu aba." 
Isaiah3:8 Bualu bua Yelushalema wakulenduka, ne Yuda wakuhona; bualu bua mei abo ne bienzedi biabo bidi bihidia Yehowa, bidi bivuisha tshiji ku mesu kua udi ne butumbi." 
Isaiah3:9 Kansungusungu kabo ka mu bilumbu kadi kabahisha; badi balesha bakuabo bubi buabo, kabena babusokoka, bu muakenza Bena Sodoma. Mulau wikale kudibo! Bualu bua badi badivuishila malu mabi!" 
Isaiah3:10 Nuambile bantu bakane dî edi ne, Nenuikale ne diakalengele; bua nebadie mamuma a bienzedi biabo." 
Isaiah3:11 Mulau wikale kudi muntu mubi! Neafute dikasa dibi; bualu bua nebamuenzele yeye bienzedi biakuenzeye ne bianza biandi. 
Isaiah3:12 Ebu mbualu bua bantu banyi kabidi! Bana batekete badi bakengeshi babo, ne bakashi badi babakokesha. Bantu banyi! Badi banulombola badi banuhambuisha, badi banyanga nshila unudi nuendela." 
Isaiah3:13 Yehowa udi ujuka bua kusengelela bantu bandi, udi wimana kulu bua kubalumbuluisha." 
Isaiah3:14 Yehowa neabande bankolomo ne bakokeshi babo ba bantu bandi ne, Nuenu mene bakudia tumuma tuonso tua mu budimi bua tumuma tua nvinyo; bintu binuakunyenga kudi bahele bidi mu nsubu yenu." 
Isaiah3:15 Nudi nudiata bantu banyi muinshi mua makasa enu, nudi nuhela mpala ya bahele ne mpelu yenu munyi? Edi ndikonka didi Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba mene, unukonka." 
Isaiah3:16 Yehowa udi wamba kabidi ne, Bualu bua bana bakashi ba mu Siona badi badisue, badi benda bolola nshingu yabo, bakenzakana mesu mabi, bazunzuka, bakuisha nkanu idi miela ku mikolo yabo;" 
Isaiah3:17 nunku Mukelenge neameneshe nsudi ha mbombo ya mitu ya bana bakashi ba mu Siona, Yehowa neabavule bilulu biabo bua kusokolola butaka buabo." 
Isaiah3:18 Mu dituku adi Mukelenge neumushe bulengele bua nkanu ya ku mikolo yabo ne bilulu ne bintu bilengele ku mitu yabo," 
Isaiah3:19 tukanu tua ku matshu abo ne tua ku maboko abo ne bilulu bibuikila ha mpala yabo. 
Isaiah3:20 Neumushe bitambala bia ku mitu ne biamu bilengele bia ku mikolo ne mikaba ya tshilulu, tushete tua kuelamu manananshi, ne manga." 
Isaiah3:21 Neumushe tukanu tua ku minu ne mabue makane a ku mûlu," 
Isaiah3:22 bilulu bia dibanji ne bia kuela ha maha, bibombi," 
Isaiah3:23 ndimuenu ya kukuata ku bianza, bilulu bia mushinga mukole bia lin, bifulu ne bilulu bia kubuikila ha mpala." 
Isaiah3:24 Halua tshikondo atshi, mu muaba wa bintu bia muhuya muimpe nemuikale bintu bibole; mu muaba wa kusuikabo mukaba wa tshilulu nebasuike nshinga; mu muaba wa nsuki idi miluka bihia nemuikale mabala, ne mu muaba wakadibo baluata diyeke dimpe, nebadijingile ne tshilulu tshidi tshiosha; nsalu ya muhika misadibue ne tshiamu tshidi tshiosha nebikale mu muaba wa bulengele bua mpala yabo." 
Isaiah3:25 Nebashihe balume benu ku muele wa nvita, ne bilobo bienu nebifue mu nvita." 
Isaiah3:26 Ba mu bibuelelu bia ku Siona nebase madilu, nebadie; ne yeye udibo bahaula neashikame hanshi ha buloba." 
Isaiah4:1 Mu dituku adi bakashi muanda mutekete nebakuate mulume umue ku tshianza, bamba ne, Netudie bidia bietu tuetu, netuluate bilulu bietu tuetu; kadi anji kuitabusha bua batubikile ku dina diebe; utûmushile bundu buetu." 
Isaiah4:2 Mu dituku adi lutonga lua Yehowa neluikale lulengele ne lua butumbi, ne mamuma adi buloba bumenesha neikale mimpe ne bu tshilenge kudi ba mu Isalele batshidi bashala ne muoyo." 
Isaiah4:3 Hashishe, nebabikile muntu udibo bashiya mu Siona ne utshidi mushale mu Yelushalema ne, Wa Tshijila, mmuntu yonso mene udibo bafunda dina diandi munkatshi mua bantu basungudibue bua kuikaleye ne muoyo mu Yelushalema." 
Isaiah4:4 Nebabikidibue ku dina adi hashikisha Mukelenge kuvuwa bukoya bua bana bakashi ba mu Siona, ne halueye kumusha mamata a mashi a ba mu Yelushalema munkatshi mua musoko, ku nyuma wa kulumbulula kuakane ne ku nyuma wa kubutula." 
Isaiah4:5 Mu diba adi Yehowa neafuke ditutu didi ne muishi wa kahia mu munya, ne dinkenke dia kahia kadi katema butuku, bua kubiteka ha mutu ha muaba wonso wa mu Mukuna wa Siona udi bantu bashikamemu, ne ha mutu ha bitendelelu bidibo badisangishilamu. Bualu bua nebâdishe tshibuikidi ha mutu ha butumbi buonso." 
Isaiah4:6 Tshitandatanda netshikaleku bua kubaha dileshi mu diba dia munya mukole, ne bua kuikalatshi tshinyemenu ne tshibuikidi halua tshihuhu ne nvula." 
Isaiah5:1 Ngimbile wanyi munanga musambu wanyi wa dinanga bua budimi buandi bua tumuma tua nvinyo: Wanyi munanga wakadi ne budimi bua tumuma tua nvinyo ha mutu ha mukuna wakadi ne buloba buimpe. 
Isaiah5:2 Yeye wakabubundulula, wakumusha mabue onso akadimu, wakakunamu mionshi ya tumuma yakatamba buimpe, wakasa tshibumba tshia batentekedi munkatshi muabu, wakumbula tshikaminu tshia tumuma mu dibue diakadimu; wakatekemena ne, Budimi nebukuamishe tumuma tua nyinyo tuimpe, kadi buakakuamisha tumuma tusasa." 
Isaiah5:3 Nunku, nuenu badi bashikame mu Yelushalema, ne bantu ba mu Yuda, ndi nnusengelela ne, Nulumbulule tshilumbu tshidi hankatshi hanyi ne budimi buanyi." 
Isaiah5:4 Nakadi kumanya mua kuenza tshinyi mu budimi buanyi tshindi tshiyi muanze kuenza? Bualu kai, hanakatekemena ne, Nebukuamishe tumuma tuimpe tua nvinyo, buakakuamisha anu tumuma tuzaza?" 
Isaiah5:5 Mpindiu nennuambile malu andi ngamba kuenzela budimi buanyi: nentule luhangu luabu lua mingonge ya meba, nebabunyange; nenshimbule lumbu luabu lua mabue, ne nebanudiate muinshi mua makasa." 
Isaiah5:6 Nenkubutule, ne kabena balengesha matamba a mionshi yabu kabidi, kabena babulula; kadi meba ne mingonge nehimenemu; nengele matutu mukenji bua kalokeshi nvula hamʼbidi habu." 
Isaiah5:7 Bualu bua budimi bua tumuma tua nvinyo bua Yehowa wa misumba budi tshisamba tshia Bena Isalele, ne bantu ba mu Yuda badi mitshi yandi idiye munange. Yeye wakatekemena kulumbulula kuakane, kadi monai! Kumatshisha kua mashi kudiku; wakatekemena buakane, kadi monai! Muadi udiku." 
Isaiah5:8 Mulau wikale kudi badi balamakasha nsubu ne nsubu, ne badi basangakasha budimi ku budimi, tô ne hikalaku kakuyi muaba, ne badi banushikamisha ha nkayenu munkatshi mua buloba!" 
Isaiah5:9 Yehowa wa misumba udi wamba mu matshu anyi ne, Bulelela, nsubu ya bungi neyikale munda mutuhu, yoyo mene mminene ne miakane, kayiyi ne bantu bashikamemu." 
Isaiah5:10 Bualu bua hectares itanu ya buloba mu budimi bua nvinyo neyilue anu ne tshihiminu tshimue tshia nvinyo, ne ntshihiminu tshimue tshia homer tshia maminu netshikuamishe anu tshihiminu tshimue tshia épha tshia bia kudia." 
Isaiah5:11 Mulau wikale kudi bantu badi bajuka hatshiatshia bua kuya kukeba maluvu makole, kudi bantu badi batabale tô ne munda mua butuku, tô ne halua maluvu kutemesha mitshima yabo!" 
Isaiah5:12 Mu bidia biabo bia disanka badi ne tshisanji ne lunzenze, dikasa ne lujiba, ne maluvu kabidi; kadi kabena belangana meji a bienzedi bia Yehowa, kabena bamona mudimu udiye wenza ne bianza biandi." 
Isaiah5:13 Bua malu â bantu banyi badi babuela mu buhika bualu bua kabena ne meji; bantu babo baneme badi bafua ne nzala, ne nyota idi isuma ba mu tshisumbu tshiabo tshia bantu bangi." 
Isaiah5:14 Nunku Muaba wa Bafue wakudiundisha kunvua kuau kua nzala, wakubutula mukana muau kamuyi ne nshikidilu, ne badi ne butumbi mu Yelushalema badi bahuekamu, tshisumbu tshiabo tshia bantu bangi, ne tshia badi babishamu diyoyo, ne muntu udi uditumbishamu." 
Isaiah5:15 Muntu muhuekele udi muiname, muntu munene udi muhuekeshibue, mesu a badi badibandisha adi mahuekeshibue." 
Isaiah5:16 Kadi Yehowa wa misumba udi mutumbishibue ku kulumbulula kuakane. Nzambi wa Tshijila udi udimuenesha bu Wa Tshijila ku buakane buandi. 
Isaiah5:17 Hashishe, bana ba mikoko nebadieku mashinde bu muakadibo mua kudia mu budimi buabo bua mashinde, nyama idi ne manyi ne bana ba mikoko nebidie mashinde munkatshi mua bikulu." 
Isaiah5:18 Mulau wikale kudi badi bakoka malu mabi kudibo ne mionshi ya mashimi, badi bakoka bualu bubi bu muakadibo babukoka ne nshinga ya ku dikalu," 
Isaiah5:19 badi bamba ne, Endeshe biandi lubilu, endeshe bua kushikisha mudimu wandi bua tuetu tûmone; bualu budi Wa Tshijila wa Isalele muhangidishe busemene ha buihi, bumueneke, bua tuetu tubumanye!" 
Isaiah5:20 Mulau wikale kudi badi babikila bualu bubi ne, Mbualu buakane, ne bualu buakane ne, Mbubi; badi babala midima bu munya, badi babala munya bu midima; badi babala bintu bia bululu bu bintu bisheme ne bintu bidi bisheme bu bintu bia bululu!" 
Isaiah5:21 Mulau wikale kudi badi badimona bu bena meji, badi badimona bu bena budimu!" 
Isaiah5:22 Mulau wikale kudi badi ne bukitu mu kunua kua maluvu ne badi ne dikima dia kusangakasha maluvu makole; 
Isaiah5:23 badi babingisha muntu muhila ku mbueshilu, badi bahisha muntu mubinga ku dikosa dibi dia tshilumbu tshiandi!" 
Isaiah5:24 Nunku bu mudi ludimi lua kahia luosha misengeleke ya mponda, ne bu mudi bisonsa biume bihona hanshi mu kahia, muji wabo newikale bu tshintu tshibole, tshilongo tshiabo netshibande mulu bu mudi luhuishi luenza, bualu bua bakuhita diyisha dia mikenji ya Yehowa wa misumba, bakulengulula dî dia Wa Tshijila wa Isalele." 
Isaiah5:25 Bua malu â tshiji tshia Yehowa tshiakatema kudi bantu bandi, ne yeye wakolola tshianza tshiandi bua kubakuma nʼatshi, wakabatuta; mikuna yakazakala, ne bitalu biabo biakalala munkatshi mua misesu bu bintu bia kuela ku diala. Bua malu â onso tshiji tshiandi katshiena tshikudimuke, kadi tshianza tshiandi tshitshidi tshiolola."
