Isaiah5:26 Yeye neabishe dibendela diandi bua kusangishaku ba mu bisamba bidi kule, nele muosa bua kubabikila kudiye, bafume kunfudilu kua buloba; ne monai, nebadiendeshe bua kufika kudiye lubilu!" 
Isaiah5:27 Kakuena umue wabo udi uhanga anyi udi ulenduka mu nshila; kakuena umue wabo udi ubunga tulu anyi udi ulala tulu; kakuena umue wabo udi ne mukaba wa ku tshimono tshiandi musululuke, anyi muonshi wa ku bisabata biandi mukoseke." 
Isaiah5:28 Mikete yabo idi misakisha bimpe, mata abo onso adi mamanyibue; mikono ya tubalu tuabo idi ifuana dibue dikole mu meji abo, nkata ya makalu abo idi iya lubilu bu nvunde." 
Isaiah5:29 Tshibingu tshiabo netshikale bu kudila kua nyama wa ntambue mukashi, nebele tshibingu bu mudi bana ba nyama wa ntambue badila ne nebakungule, nebakuate tshintu tshidibo banyenga, nebanyeme nʼatshi, kakuyi muntu wa kutshihandisha." 
Isaiah5:30 Mu dituku adi nebele bantu aba tshibingu tshidi bu tshiona tshia mai manene; ne biamona muntu buloba, ke, mîdima ne kanyinganyinga bidiku; ne munya udi ulua midima ku matutu mafike." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu tshidimu tshiakafua mukelenge Uziya nakamona Mukelenge mushikame mu nkuasa wandi wa bukelenge, muikale kulu ne mubandishibue mulu, ne tshilulu tshia kumanda kua muzabi wandi tshia-kûsha ntempelo tente." 
Isaiah6:2 Ha mutu handi hakimana baselafima; muselafima ne muselafima wakadi ne mahuahua asambombo. Wakabuikila mesu andi ne mahuahua abidi, wakabuikila makasa andi ne abidi, ne wakahahala ne abidi makuabo." 
Isaiah6:3 Bakananukila kuelangana mei, bambilangana ne, Wa Tshijila, Wa Tshijila, Wa Tshijila udi Yehowa wa misumba; buloba buonso budi bûle tente ne butumbi buandi." 
Isaiah6:4 Bishimikidi bia ku mbelu kua nsubu biakakanka bua dî dia wakadi wela lubila, ne nsubu wakûla tente ne muishi wa kahia." 
Isaiah6:5 Ka meme nakamba ne, Mulau wakunkuata! Bualu bua ndi mujimine; bualu bua ndi muntu udi ne mishiku idi kayiyi miakane, ne ndi mushikame munkatshi mua bantu badi ne mishiku idi kayiyi miakane; bualu bua mesu anyi akumona Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba mene!" 
Isaiah6:6 Hashishe, umue wa baselafima wakahahala kundi, muikale ne dikala dia kahia diakadi ditema mu tshianza tshiandi, diakangateye ne lukuatu ku tshioshelu tshia milambu." 
Isaiah6:7 Wakaditua mukana muanyi, wakamba ne, Mona, edi diakulua mishiku yebe; bubi buebe budi bûmushibue, ne malu mabi ebe adi mabuikidibue." 
Isaiah6:8 Hashishe nakunvua dî dia Mukelenge diamba ne, Nentume nganyi, neatuyile nganyi? Nunku nakamba ne, Ka meme eu, untume meme!" 
Isaiah6:9 Yeye wakamba ne, Ya, wambile bantu aba ne, Unvuai! Unvuai! Kadi kanujinguludi! Monai! Monai! Kadi kanumanyi nansha!" 
Isaiah6:10 Vuisha mitshima ya bantu aba mitshima idi ne manyi, vuisha matshu abo mpudimatshu, ne buikila mesu abo; bua kabamonyi ne mesu abo, kabunvu ne matshu abo, kabajinguludi malu ne mitshima yabo, kabakudimunyi mitshima yabo bua kusangashibua." 
Isaiah6:11 Hashishe nakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, bualu ebu nebulehe musangu bule munyi? Yeye wakakudimuna dî ne, Tô ne habutuka misoko mishale mutuhu, tô ne hashala nsubu idimu mutuhu; tô ne halua buloba kushala anu tshihela tshia hatuhu;" 
Isaiah6:12 tô ne halua Yehowa kumusha bantu bua kubateka kule, tô ne havulangana makolo." 
Isaiah6:13 Biashalamu tshia dikumi, tshiotshi netshioshibue mu kahia tshiakabidi, bu mudi mutshi wa telebinta anyi mutshi wa chêne ishiya bikuka hayitahabo hanshi. Tunkanunuina tua tshijila netuikale tshikuka tshia bantu aba." 
Isaiah7:1 Mu matuku a Ahaza, muana wa Yotama, muana wa Uziya, mukelenge wa Yuda, Lesine, mukelenge wa Sulia, ne Peka, muana wa Lemalaya, mukelenge wa Isalele, bakabanda mu musoko wa Yelushalema bua kuluangana nʼabo, kadi kabakamanya mua kubatshimuna." 
Isaiah7:2 Bakambila ba mu nsubu wa Davidi ne, Bena Sulia bakuasa tshitudilu tshiabo mu buloba bua Efelayima. Mutshima wa mukelenge wakazakala, ne mitshima ya bantu bandi yakazakala, bu mudi mitshi ya muitu izakala ku mpala kua luhehele." 
Isaiah7:3 Hashishe, Yehowa wakambila Yeshaya ne, Ya biebe, wakidile Ahaza, wewe ne muanʼebe, Shea-yashuba, ku ndekelu kua mutuba wa mai udi uhatuka mu tshina tshia mai tshidi ku mutu kua mukuna, mu nshila udi uyila ku budimi bua Muvuwi wa Bilulu." 
Isaiah7:4 Wambile Ahaza ne, Udimuke biebe, wikale talalâ! Kutshinyi, ne mutshima webe kauteketshi, bualu bua nshikidilu ya bimunyi ebi bibidi bidi bihatula anu muishi wa kahia, bua tshiji tshikole tshia Lesine ne Bena Sulia ne tshia muana wa Lemalaya." 
Isaiah7:5 Bualu bua Bena Sulia, Bena Efelayima ne muana wa Lemalaya bakukuelela tshifufu, bamba ne," 
Isaiah7:6 Tubandeku bua kuluisha buloba bua Yuda, tutshinyishe badimu, tuhandemu muaba bua bualu buetu, tubueshe muana wa Tabêle mu bukelenge munkatshi muabu." 
Isaiah7:7 Bua bualu ebu Yehowa udi wamba ne, Muanda eu kawena ujalama, kawena wikalaku." 
Isaiah7:8 Bualu bua Damaseke udi mutu wa Sulia, ne Lesine udi mutu wa Damaseke; ne haleba bidimu makumi asambombo ne bitanu, Efelayima neahandike bihesa, bua kikadi tshisamba tshia bantu kabidi." 
Isaiah7:9 Samalea udi mutu wa Efelayima, ne muana wa Lemalaya udi mutu wa Samalea. Binuikala kanuyi nuitabusha, kanuena nujadikibua bulelela." 
Isaiah7:10 Yehowa wakambila Ahaza dî tshiakabidi ne," 
Isaiah7:11 Lombela biebe Yehowa Nzambi webe tshimanyinu. Utshilombe nansha mu muaba wa mu ndondo wa mu buloba, nansha mu muaba udi mulu mene." 
Isaiah7:12 Kadi Ahaza wakamba ne, Tshiena ntshilomba, tshiena nteta Yehowa munda." 
Isaiah7:13 Yeshaya wakamba ne, Unvuai bienu, nuenu ba mu tshiota tshia Davidi. Budi bualu buhite butekete bua nuenu kuhangisha bantu, bua nudi basue malu enu atondeshe Nzambi wanyi kabidi, anyi?" 
Isaiah7:14 Nunku Mukelenge muine neanuhe tshimanyinu. Monai! Mukashi utshidi kamama neimite difu, nealele muana wa balume, neamuidike dina ne, Imanuele." 
Isaiah7:15 Bia kudia biandi nebikale manteke ne buitshi hamanyeye mua kubenga malu mabi ne mua kusungula malu makane. 
Isaiah7:16 Bualu bua diambedi muana eu kayi muanze kumanya mua kubenga malu mabi ne mua kusungula malu makane, buloba bua bakelenge aba babidi baudi utamba kutshina nebushale dikolo." 
Isaiah7:17 Yehowa neafikishe kûdi wewe, ne kudi bantu bebe, ne kudi ba mu nsubu wa tatu webe, matuku mabi adi kayi manji kulua diambedi, katshia difuku diahanduluka Bena Efelayima kudi Bena Yuda, neanutumine mukelenge wa Ashû mene." 
Isaiah7:18 Mu dituku adi Yehowa nêle muosa bua kubikila lujiji ludi kunfudilu kua misulu ya mai ya mu Ejipitu, ne lubulubulu ludi mu buloba bua Ashû." 
Isaiah7:19 Yoyo neyilue, ne buonso buai neyikile mu mpongo ya hatuhu, ne mu mitanta ya mabue, ne hamʼbidi ha mitshi idi ne meba, ne ha madimi onso a kudishamu bimuna." 
Isaiah7:20 Mu dituku adi Mukelenge neanuheye ne dihaya diakabuesheye mu mudimu wandi, ne diakangateye mu nseke ya buloba idi ku nyima kua Musulu wa Pelata, neanubeye ne mukelenge wa Ashû mene, neabeye nsuki ya ku mitu ne miosa ya ha makasa; dihaya nediumushe muedi wonso kabidi." 
Isaiah7:21 Mu dituku adi muntu neadishe lukungulu lua ngombe ne mikoko ibidi; 
Isaiah7:22 ne bua bungi bua mabele adiye ukama kudibi, yeye neadie manteke, bualu bua manteke ne buitshi nebikale bia kudia bia muntu yonso washala munkatshi mua buloba abu." 
Isaiah7:23 Mu dituku adi, mu muaba wonso muakadi mionshi ya tumuma tua nvinyo tshinunu, yakadi mushinga wa bituha bia argent tshinunu, nemuikale buloba budi bumenesha anu meba ne mingonge." 
Isaiah7:24 Bantu nebalueku ne mikete ne mata, bualu bua buloba buonso nebulue ne meba ne mingonge." 
Isaiah7:25 Ne ebu mbualu bualua ku mikuna yakadibo babundulula ne lukasu diambedi; kuena mua kuyaku bualu bua buowa nebukukuate bua meba ne mingonge; kadi neyikale anu miaba ya kutumaku ngombe ne miaba idi mikoko mua kudiata. 
Isaiah8:1 Yehowa wakangambila dî ne, Udiangatshile dibue dinene, ufundehu ne maleta adi muntu yonso mumanye mua kubala ne, Kuhaula-kua-bintu-kudi-kulua-lubilu, Kunyenga-kua-bintu-kudi-kudiendesha-lukasa." 
Isaiah8:2 Nakadiangatshila bamonyi bakadi mua kueyemenyibua bua kujadikabo tshifundu, Uliya muakuidi, ne Zekâya, muana wa Yebelekaya." 
Isaiah8:3 Hashishe, nakabuela kudi mukashi wanyi wakadi muprofete mukashi wa Nzambi, ne yeye wakimita difu, wakalela muana wa balume. Nunku Yehowa wakangambila ne, Umuidike dina ne, Kuhaula-kua-bintu-kudi-kulua-lubilu, Kunyenga-kua-bintu-kudi-kudiendesha-lukasa." 
Isaiah8:4 Bualu bua diambedi muana eu kayi muanji kumanya mua kudila ne, Tatu wanyi, ne, Baba wanyi, biuma bia Damaseke ne bintu binyengibue mu Samalea nebiumushibue; nebaye nʼabi ku mpala kua mukelenge wa Ashû." 
Isaiah8:5 Yehowa wakangambila dî kabidi ne," 
Isaiah8:6 Bualu bua bantu aba bakuhetula mai a mu Shiloa adi ahueka talalâ, ne badi basanka bua bualu budi bukuata Lesine ne muana wa Lemalaya," 
Isaiah8:7 tangila, Mukelenge neabavuishile mai a ku Musulu wa Pelata, adi makole ne adi mavula-ngane, au mmukelenge wa Bena Ashû ne butumbi buandi buonso. Wowo neubande ha mutu ha mitubu yau yonso, neuhasalale mibungiji yau yonso." 
Isaiah8:8 Newende ku mpala tô ne habuelau mu Yuda, neuhasalale ne neuhitshilemu, neufike tô ne ku nshingu ya bantu. Kuolola kua mahuahua au nekûshe nseke yonso ya buloba buebe, Imanuele!" 
Isaiah8:9 Tshibukai bituha bituha, nuenu bantu, nukuatshike buowa; telejai matshu enu, nuenu ba mu maloba adi kule; nudiluatshishe bielelu bia nvita, nukuatshike buowa; nudiluatshishe bielelu bia nvita, nukuatshike buowa." 
Isaiah8:10 Elai tshifufu tshienu, kadi netshiandamuke bualu bua hatuhu; ambai dî, kadi kadiena dijalama, bualu bua Nzambi udi nʼetu." 
Isaiah8:11 Bualu bua Yehowa wakangambila nunku ne tshianza tshiandi tshikole tshinkuate, wakandimusha bua meme tshiendi mu nshila wa bantu aba, wamba ne," 
Isaiah8:12 Kutshibikidi ne, Ntshifufu, malu onso adi bantu aba babikila ne, Ntshifufu; kutshinyi malu adibo batshina, ne kuikadi ne buowa." 
Isaiah8:13 Kadi Yehowa wa misumba nyeye ûdi wewe ne bua kunemeka bu wa tshijila. Nyeye unudi ne bua kutshina ne bua kuikala ne buowa kudiye. 
Isaiah8:14 Yeye nealue muaba wa tshijila, ne dibue dia kukumaku dikasa, ne mutunda wa dibue wa kubalenduisha kudi ba mu nseke ibidi ya Isalele; neikale bukuondo ne buteyi kudi badi bashikame mu Yelushalema." 
Isaiah8:15 Ba bungi ba munkatshi muabo nebalenduke; nebadishinde hanshi, nebatshibuke; nebakuatshibue mu buteyi, nebanyengibue." 
Isaiah8:16 Kuta mukanda wa dî dianyi dia tshimanyishilu mu muvungu, jadika diyisha dianyi mu mitshima ya bayidi banyi." 
Isaiah8:17 Nengindile Yehowa udi usokoka mpala wandi kudi bana ba Yakoba, nemmutekemene mene." 
Isaiah8:18 Monai, meme ne bana bakumpabo kudi Yehowa tudi bu bimanyinu ne bu malu a kukema mu Isalele bidi Yehowa wa misumba, udi mushikame mu mukuna wa Siona, mutumine bantu." 
Isaiah8:19 Hanuambila bantu ne, Nukebe lungenyi kudi bena lubuku lua muzangu ne kudi bena muhongo badi bakula bu biambi ne badi banungana, bualu kabuena bukuata bantu bua kukeba lungenyi kudi Nzambi wabo, anyi? Bua kukuatshisha badi ne muoyo, budibo nʼabu mbua kuya kudi bafue, anyi?" 
Isaiah8:20 Tuye ku diyisha dia mikenji ne ku tshimanyishilu tshia dî dia Nzambi! Bikala bantu kabayi bambe dî didi diakanangane ne dî adi, bulelela, butuku kabuena buanze kubatshila." 
Isaiah8:21 Nebahitshile mu buloba batata bikole ne nzala ibasuma; ne mu diba adi bikalabo ne nzala, tshiji netshibakuate, nebahende mukelenge wabo ne Nzambi wabo. Nebatangishe mpala yabo mulu," 
Isaiah8:22 nebatangile kabidi ha buloba, ne monai! Anu ntatu ne mîdima, mufitu wa kanyinganyinga nebikaleku! Nebabibale bua babuele mu mîdima mikole." 
Isaiah9:1 Kadi mufitu kawena wikalaku kabidi ha buloba buakadi ne kanyinganyinga diambedi. Mu tshikondo tshia diambedi yeye wakafuisha buloba bua Zebulona ne buloba bua Nafatale bundu, kadi mu matuku atshidi alua neavuishe butumbi kudi buloba budi mu nshila udi uyila ku mai manene, budi dishiya dia Yadene, Galela wa munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu." 
Isaiah9:2 Bakadi benda mu midima bakumona munya munene; ha bantu bakadi bashikame mu buloba bua mîdima mikole hakatemena munya au. 
Isaiah9:3 Wewe wakuvudisha ba mu tshisamba etshi, wakudiundisha disanka diabo. Badi basanka ku mpala kuebe bu mudi bantu basanka hahuolabo bia kudia mu madimi, bu mudi bena nvita basanka habanyanganabo bintu binyenga mu nvita." 
Isaiah9:4 Bualu bua wewe wakutshibula mutshi wa tshikokedi wakadi bujitu buabo, ne mulangala wakadi ututa diaha diandi, ne tshibonge tshia mukengeshi wandi, bu muwakenza mu dituku diakahitabo Bena Midiyana bukole." 
Isaiah9:5 Bualu bua tshisabata tshionso tshidi disalayi diluata mu diyoyo dia nvita, ne bivualu bia nvita biakinabo mu mashi, nebikale bintu bia kuoshabo, bu nkunyi ya kuela mu kahia." 
Isaiah9:6 Bualu bua bakungelela muana, bakutuha muana mulume; bukokeshi nebuikale ha diaha diandi. Nebamuidike dina ne, Mubakemeshi, Muena Meji, Nzambi Mukole, Tatu wa Tshiendelele, Mukelenge wa Ditalala." 
Isaiah9:7 Kukudisha kua bukokeshi buandi ne kua ditalala kakuena kuikala ne nshikidilu, bua kujadika nkuasa wa bukokeshi wa Davidi, ne bukelenge buandi, ne bua kubukolesha ku kulumbulula kuakane ne ku buakane, mpindiu tô ne tshiendelele. Lukunukunu lua Yehowa wa misumba neluenze bualu ebu." 
Isaiah9:8 Mukelenge wakutumina Yakoba dî, nedihone hamʼbidi ha Bena Isalele." 
Isaiah9:9 Bantu bonso nebadimanye, ba mu Efelayima ne badi bashikame mu Samalea mene, badi bamba mu kudisua kuabo ne mu dikamakama dia mu mitshima yabo ne," 
Isaiah9:10 Tushola tuakushimbuka hanshi, kadi netuase musoko kabidi ne mabue masonga; bakutaha mitshi ya sycomores, kadi netuteke mitshi ya cèdre mu miaba yakadiyi." 
Isaiah9:11 Nunku Yehowa wakibisha badi ne Lesine lukuna bua kuluanganabo ne Bena Isalele, wakusonsola bena lukuna babo," 
Isaiah9:12 Bena Sulia ku luseke lua esete, ne Bena Peleshete ku luseke lua wesete bakudia Bena Isalele mukana muabo mubulula. Bua malu â onso tshiji tshiandi katshiena tshikudimuke, kadi tshianza tshiandi tshitshidi tshiolola." 
Isaiah9:13 Kadi bantu aba kabakuhingana kudi yeye wakabakuma, kabakukeba Yehowa wa misumba." 
Isaiah9:14 Nunku Yehowa wakukosela Isalele mutu ne mukila, dilala dia dibue ne disela, mu dituku dimue." 
Isaiah9:15 Nkolomo ne muena butumbi nyeye udi mutu mene, ne muprofete udi uyisha mashimi udi mukila." 
Isaiah9:16 Balombodi ba bantu aba bakulua bahambuishi babo, ne bantu bakadibo balombela ba kuminyibua." 
Isaiah9:17 Nunku Mukelenge kena usanka bua bansongalume babo, kena ufuila bana babo ba nshiya ne bakashi babo ba mu lufuila luse. Bualu bua muntu yonso wa munkatshi muabo udi muhidi wa bualu bua Nzambi ne udi muenji wa malu mabi, ne mukana muonso mudi muamba mei mabi. Bua malu â onso tshiji tshiandi katshiena tshikudimuke, kadi tshianza tshiandi tshitshidi tshiolola." 
Isaiah9:18 Bualu bua malu mabi adi osha bu kahia, kadi kosha meba ne mingonge, hashishe kadi katemesha mitshi ya mu bihuka kabidi, ne bidi bibanda mulu mu milanjilanji ya muishi wa kahia." 
Isaiah9:19 Bualu bua tshiji tshia Yehowa wa misumba buloba buakulua, ne bantu badi bu nkunyi ya kuela mu kahia, kakuena muntu udi Usungila muanʼabo." 
Isaiah9:20 Mukuabo wakunyenga bintu ku luseke lua tshianza tshia balume ne wakashala ne nzala; bakuabo bakudia bintu ku luseke lua tshianza tshia bakashi, kadi kabakukuta; muntu yonso wakudia munyinyi wa muena mutumba nʼandi." 
Isaiah9:21 Manashe wakudia Efelayima, ne Efelayima wakudia Manashe, ne bubidi buabo bakubunda Yuda. Bua malu â onso tshiji tshiandi katshiena tshikudimuke, kadi tshianza tshiandi tshitshidi tshiolola." 
Isaiah10:1 Mulau wikale kudi bantu badi bela mikenji idi kayiyi miakane, ne kudi bafundi badi bafunda mifundu idi ne mei mabi," 
Isaiah10:2 bua kusesuisha badi bakengela bintu bua kabikadi ne dikosa dimpe dia bilumbu biabo, ne bua kunyenga kulumbulula kuakane kudi bahele ba munkatshi mua bantu banyi, bua bakashi ba mu lufuila bikale bintu bia kuhaulabo, ne bua kuvuishabo bana ba nshiya bintu bia kunyengabo!" 
Isaiah10:3 Nenuenze tshinyi mu difuku dia kunulumbuluisha, ne dia kubutuka kudi kufuma ku muaba mule? Nenunyemene kudi nganyi bua yeye ankuatshishe? Nenushiye biuma bienu kudi kunyi?" 
Isaiah10:4 Nenumanye anu mua kusokoma munkatshi mua bena lukuna badi bakuatshibue mu nvita, nenubatame munkatshi mua bitalu bia bantu bashihibue! Bua malu â onso tshiji tshiandi katshiena tshikudimuke, kadi tshianza tshiandi tshitshidi tshiolola." 
Isaiah10:5 Tangila, wewe Muena Ashû, mulangala wa tshiji tshianyi, tshibonge tshia njiya yanyi!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ndi mmutuma bua kuluangana ne ba mu tshisamba tshia badi babenga Nzambi, ndi mmuelela mukenji bua bantu banakukuatshila tshiji tshianyi, bua kubahaula ne bua kunyenga bintu biabo, ne bua kubadiata muinshi mua makasa bu mudi bantu badiata bitahikidi bia mu misesu." 
Isaiah10:7 Kadi yeye kena welangana meji nunku, ne mutshima wandi kawena ne meji â; kadi mu mutshima wandi mudi anu muanda wakuhangidisheye, wa kubutula, ne wa kumana bisamba bia bungi." 
Isaiah10:8 Bualu bua yeye udi wamba ne, Tupitene tuanyi tua masalayi tuonso katuena banfumu, anyi?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kaleno kawena bu Kâkemisha, anyi? Hamata kawena bu Apada, anyi? Samalea kawena bu Damaseke, anyi?" 
Isaiah10:10 Bu muakufika tshianza tshianyi kudi makelenge akadi ne mpingu, akadi ne mpingu mihite ya mu Yelushalema ne ya mu Samalea bunene," 
Isaiah10:11 tshiena ngenzela musoko wa Yelushalema ne mpingu yau bu munakuenzela musoko wa Samalea ne mpingu yau, anyi?" 
Isaiah10:12 Kadi halua Mukelenge kushikisha mudimu wandi wonso udiye wenzela mukuna wa Siona ne musoko wa Yelushalema, yeye neakengeshe bienzedi bia mu mutshima wa diambu wa mukelenge wa Ashû, neuhuekeshe butumbi bua kudilesha kuandi." 
Isaiah10:13 Bualu bua wakuamba biandi ne, Nakuenza malu â ku bukole bua tshianza tshianyi, ne ku lungenyi luanyi, bualu bua ndi ne meji. Nakûmusha mikalu idi ihandulula bantu, nakunyenga bintu bia mu bibutshilu biabo; ne bu mudi muena bukitu wenza, nakuhuekesha badi bashikame mu nkuasa ya bukelenge." 
Isaiah10:14 Tshianza tshianyi tshiakaheta biuma bia bantu bu muditshi tshikuate disua dia nyunyu. Bu mudi muntu usangisha makela mu disua diakulekelabo kudi nyunyu, nakusangisha bia ha buloba bionso. Kakuakadi umue wakuolola dihuahua diandi, anyi wakubulula muinu, anyi wakudila." 
Isaiah10:15 Tshisui netshimanye mua kufunyina nfumu watshi udi utaha nʼatshi, anyi? Scie neamanye mua kudibandisha kudi udi uhanda nʼandi, anyi? Ebu mbu muakadi mulangala kulembelela bantu badi baubisha, anyi mbu muakadi tshibonge kubisha muntu udi kayi mufukibue mutshi!" 
Isaiah10:16 Nunku Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba mene, neatume disama dia tshinyanu munkatshi mua bena nvita bandi badi ne mafuta, ne muinshi mua butumbi buandi nebatemeshe tshidi tshitema bu kuosha kua kahia." 
Isaiah10:17 Munya wa Bena Isalele newandamuke kahia, ne wandi wa Tshijila neandamuke ludimi lua kahia; neluoshe, nelumane meba andi ne mingonge yandi mu dituku dimue." 
Isaiah10:18 Yeye neavingutule butumbi bua ditu diandi ne bua budimi buandi budi bulua ne bia kudia bia bungi ne muoyo wandi ne mubidi wandi. Bualu ebu nebuikale bu muntu musame unyananyana tô ne ku lufu. 
Isaiah10:19 Mitshi itshidi ishala ne muoyo mu ditu diandi neyikale anu mikese, ne bua bukeha buai muana neamanye mua kufunda bungi buai mu mukanda." 
Isaiah10:20 Mu dituku adi difuka dikese dia ba mu Isalele ne ba mu bana ba Yakoba badi bahanduka ku lufu, kabena beyemena muntu wakabakuma, kadi nebeyemene Yehowa, Wa Tshijila wa Isalele, mu bushuwa." 
Isaiah10:21 Bamue ba munkatshi mua bantu bakadiku diambedi, bamue ba mu bana ba Yakoba batshidi bashale mene, nebahingane kudi Nzambi Mukole." 
Isaiah10:22 Bualu bua bikala bantu bebe bungi bua nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene, Isalele, anu tshituha tshia bungi buabo netshihingane. Kubutuka kudi kusungudibua, kudi kuhumuka ne buakane." 
Isaiah10:23 Bualu bua Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, neashikishe mudimu wa kubutula munkatshi mua ba ha buloba bonso bu muakadihangidishileye." 
Isaiah10:24 Nunku Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, udi wamba ne, Nuenu bantu banyi badi bashikame mu Siona, kanutshinyi Bena Ashû, nansha bianukumabo ne mulangala, ne biabishabo tshibonge tshiabo bua kunututa nʼatshi, bu muakenza Bena Ejipitu." 
Isaiah10:25 Bualu bua, haleha anu tshituha tshihi, tshiji tshianyi tshiakadi tshinkuata bua bualu buenu netshihuwe, netshibakudimukile hua kubabutula." 
Isaiah10:26 Yehowa wa misumba neababishile nsokotshi bu muakakumeye Bena Midiyana ku Dibue dia Olebe; ne bu muakabisheye tshibonge tshiandi ha mutu ha mai manene, nunku yeye neatshioshile kabidi bu muakenzenzeye mu Ejipitu." 
Isaiah10:27 Mu dituku adi bujitu buandi nebûmuke ha diaba diebe, ne mutshi wandi wa tshikokedi neûmuke ha nshingu hebe. Mutshi eu wa tshikokedi neutshibuke bualu bua kuvulangana." 
Isaiah10:28 Yeye wakulua ku Ayata, wakuhitshila mu Migelona; ku Mikemasha udi utula bihia bia luendu." 
Isaiah10:29 Wakumana kuhitshila ku tshibuelelu tshia mu luhongo; badi bamba ne, Geba ntshitudilu tshietu tshia butuku. Ba mu Lama badi bazakala, ba mu Gibea wa Shaula badi banyema." 
Isaiah10:30 Tayika biebe, wewe muana mukashi wa Galima! Teleja matshu ebe, wewe musoko wa Layisha! Witabe kudibo, wewe musoko wa Anatota!" 
Isaiah10:31 Ba mu Mademana bakumana kunyema; badi bashikame mu Gebima badi basangisha bia mu nsubu yabo bua kunyemabo. 
Isaiah10:32 Dituku edi mene neatule ku Nobo, neavunge mbala ku mukuna wa muana mukashi wa Siona, mukuna wa Yelushalema mene." 
Isaiah10:33 Monai, Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, neakose matamba a mutshi ne tshiona tshidi tshivuisha buowa; mitshi mile-mile neyitahibue hanshi, ne idi mimane mulu neyihuekeshibue hanshi." 
Isaiah10:34 Yeye neatahe bihuka ne tshisui tshia tshiamu tshifike, ne Lebanona neahone ku mikumu ya Nzambi Mukole." 
Isaiah11:1 Lutonga nelutoloke ku tshikuku tshia Yishai, ne ditamba dia ku miji yandi nedikuame mamuma." 
Isaiah11:2 Nyuma wa Yehowa neashikame hamʼbidi handi, nyuma wa meji ne wa kujingulula kua malu, nyuma udi umukuatshisha ne meji ne bukole, nyuma wa kumanya Yehowa ne wa kumunemeka." 
Isaiah11:3 Disanka diandi nedikale mu dinemeka diandi dia Yehowa. Kena ulumbulula bilumbu anu bua malu adi mesu andi amona, kena ubikosa anu bua malu adi matshu andi unvua;" 
Isaiah11:4 kadi nealumbuluishe bahele ne buakane, neakose bilumbu bia badi ne kalolo ha buloba ne kulumbulula kuakane; neakume buloba ne tshibonge tshia mukana muandi, neashihe bantu babi ku muhuya wa ku mishiku yandi." 
Isaiah11:5 Buakane nebuikale mukaba wa mu tshimono tshiandi, kujalama kuandi kulelela nekuikale mukaba wa ku tshifuka tshiandi." 
Isaiah11:6 Tshimungu netshiule mu nsubu umue ne muana wa mukoko, ne nkashama nealale hohamue ne muana wa mbushi. Muana wa ngombe ne nyama wa ntambue ne nyama udi ne manyi neyidie mashinde mu muaba umue, ne muana mutekete neayilombole." 
Isaiah11:7 Mukashi wa ngombe ne nkashama nebidie mashinde hohamue, bana abi nebalale mu muaba umue; ne nyama wa ntambue neadie mashinde bu mudi ngombe wenza." 
Isaiah11:8 Muana utshidi wamua mabele neanayile ha mutu ha buina bua nyoka wa dikala, muana mumane kujila mabele neateke tshianza tshiandi ha buina bua nyoka wa ntoka." 
Isaiah11:9 Kabiena bienzela bikuabo bintu bibi, kabiena bishiha bikuabo, mu mukuna wanyi wa tshijila wonso; bualu bua buloba nebuikale bûle tente ne kumanya kua Yehowa, bu mudi mai a mu mai manene abuikila miaba yau yonso." 
Isaiah11:10 Hashishe mu dituku adi Lutonga lua ku miji ya Yishai neluimane bialu bu dibendela dia kusangishaku bisamba bia bantu. Ba mu bisamba ebi nebaye kudiye bua kumulomba lungenyi, ne muaba udiye mushikame newikale wa butumbi." 
Isaiah11:11 Mu dituku adi Mukelenge neolole tshianza tshiandi tshiakabidi bua kuhikuleye difuka dia bantu bandi badi mu Ashû, mu Ejipitu, mu Patelosa, mu Atiopa, mu Elama, mu Shinâ, mu Hamata ne mu maloba adi ku muelelu wa mai manene." 
Isaiah11:12 Yeye neabishile ba mu bisamba bia bantu dibendela, neasangisheku ba mu Isalele bakihatabo kudi bantu ba bende, neasangishe honso bamuangalashibue ba mu Yuda hohamue, ba ku matengu anai a buloba." 
Isaiah11:13 Efelayima nealekele mukau wandi, ne badi batatshisha Yuda nebajimine. Efelayima kena wikala ne Yuda mukau, ne Yuda kena utatshisha Efelayima." 
Isaiah11:14 Nebâuke ha diaha dia Bena Peleshete ku luseke lua wesete, ne bubidi buabo nebanyenge bintu bia bena luseke lua esete. Nebolole bianza biabo bua kukokesha Edome ne Moaba, ne Bena Amona nebatumikile mei abo." 
Isaiah11:15 Yehowa neakamishe diboko dia mai manene a mu Ejipitu tshishiki; neakuhe tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha Musulu wa Pelata, ne luhehele luandi ludi lûmisha, nenutahulule mu tusulu muanda mutekete, neasabulehu bantu ne bisabata biabo kabiyi bibola." 
Isaiah11:16 Nshila munene mufume ku buloba bua Ashû neikaleku bua difuka dia bantu bandi diendelemu, bu muakadiku tshikuabo bua Bena Isalele bendelemu mu dituku diakahatukabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Isaiah12:1 Mu dituku adi newambe biebe ne, Nenkusakidile wewe, Yehowa; bualu bua wakankuatshila tshiji diambedi, kadi tshiji tshiebe tshiakukudimuka kundi, wakunsamba." 
Isaiah12:2 Mona, Nzambi udi luhandu luanyi; nemmueyemene, ne tshiena ntshina nansha; bualu bua Yehowa, Yehowa mene, udi bukole buanyi ne musambu wanyi, ne yeye wakulua luhandu luanyi." 
Isaiah12:3 Nunku nenuhatule mai ne disanka mu bina bia mai bia luhandu. 
Isaiah12:4 Mu dituku adi nenuambe ne, Sakidilai Yehowa, tumbishai dinu diandi! Ambilai bantu bienzedi biandi munkatshi mua bisamba bionso, nubamanyishe ne, Dina diandi didi ditumbishibua." 
Isaiah12:5 Imbilai Yehowa misambu, bualu bua yeye wakuenza malu adi amuvuishila butumbi; muanda eu umanyibue mu miaba yonso ya ha buloba." 
Isaiah12:6 Bandisha dî diebe, ela mbila, wewe muena musoko wa Siona; bualu bua udi munene munkatshi muebe nyeye Wa Tshijila wa Isalele." 
Isaiah13:1 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua Babulona diakunvuabo kudi Yeshaya, muana wa Amoza." 
Isaiah13:2 Bisha dibendela ha mutu ha mukuna udi kauyi ne mitshi hamʼbidi hau, ubabikile ne dî dikole; kuha tshianza bua bantu babuele biabo mu bibuelelu bia bakokeshi banene." 
Isaiah13:3 Nakuelela bakudijidila kundi mukenji; nakubikila bena bukitu banyi, bantu banyi badi batumbila ku outumbi buanyi, bua kuenza mudimu udi tshiji tshianyi tshiamba." 
Isaiah13:4 Unvuai, tshiona tshia mbila mu mikuna tshidi bu tshia tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu! Unvuai, mutoyi udiku wa tshintompantompa tshia makelenge a bisamba bia bantu badi badikunguisha hohamue! Yehowa wa misumba udi usangisha musumba wa bena nvita bua nvita yandi!" 
Isaiah13:5 Badi bafuma ku buloba budi kule, kunfudilu kua diulu, Yehowa mene ne bielelu bia nvita bia tshiji tshiandi bua kubutula buloba buonso." 
Isaiah13:6 Asai muadi! Bualu bua dituku dia Yehowa didi ha buihi; nedilue bu kubutuka kudi kufuma kudi Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso! 
Isaiah13:7 Nunku bianza bia bantu bonso nebitekete, mutshima wa muntu yonso newenguluke," 
Isaiah13:8 ne bobo nebakuatshike buowa. Makenga ne tunyinganyinga nebibakuate; nebikale ne dikenga bu mukashi udi ne didinyenga dia ha kuleleye, Nebatangilangane muntu ne muntu ne ditshina, mpala yabo mikale bu mpala miteme ne kahia." 
Isaiah13:9 Monai, dituku dia Yehowa dilualua, dikengesha bantu, dikala dia tshikisu ne dia tshiji tshikole, ndia kuyuisha buloba bu tshihela tshia hatuhu, ndia kubutula bantu babi." 
Isaiah13:10 Bualu bua mitoto ya mu diulu ne bisumbu bia mitoto bidimu kabiena bitema, diba nedifikuluke habandadi, ne ngondo kena ukenka ha buloba." 
Isaiah13:11 Nenkengeshe ba ha buloba bua bubi buabo, ne bantu babi bua malu mabi abo; nempuwishe kudilesha kua badi badisue, nempuekeshe kudibandisha kua bakokeshi badi bakengesha bantu babo." 
Isaiah13:12 Nenvishe bungi bua bantu butamba bua or bukese, nembuvuishe butamba bua or wa Ofi mene bukese." 
Isaiah13:13 Nunku nenzakashe bintu bia mu diulu, nenkankishe buloba tô ne humukabu mu muaba wabu, bualu bua tshiji tshia Yehowa wa misumba mu dituku dia tshiji tshiandi tshikole." 
Isaiah13:14 Mu dituku adi, bu mudi ngulungu udibo bihata, ne bu mudi mikoko idi kayiyi ne mulami wa kuyiangisha, muntu yonso neahingane kudi bana babo, muntu yonso neanyemene ku buloba buandi." 
Isaiah13:15 Nebatubule muntu yonso udibo basangana, ne muntu yonso udibo bakuata neahone mushihibue ku muele wa nvita." 
Isaiah13:16 Nebele bana batekete ba bantu aba hanshi, babahanda nseke ku mesu kuabo; nebahaule nsubu yabo, nebakuate bakashi babo ku bukole." 
Isaiah13:17 Monai! Nensonsole Bena Madai bua kuleshabo bantu aba, ne bobo kabena bamona argent bu tshintu tshimpe, ne or kena ubasankisha." 
Isaiah13:18 Mata abo neasunsule mibidi ya bansongalume, kabena bafuila badi bahatuka mu mafu luse, mesu abo kaena amona bana ne dinanga dia mua kubasungila." 
Isaiah13:19 Ne Babulona, butumbi bua makelenge, bulengele budibo banyisha kudi Bena Kasada, neikale bu Sodoma ne Amola hakabutulabo kudi Yehowa." 
Isaiah13:20 Kena wikala ne bantu kashidi, bantu kabena bashikamamu kabidi tô ne tshiendelele. Muena Alaba kena ushimikamu ntenta wandi kabidi, ne balami ba mikoko kabena baladikaku mikoko yabo." 
Isaiah13:21 Kadi nyama ya ku tshihela tshia lusenga neyikale ne miaba idiyi ilalamu, nsubu yabo neyikale tente ne nyama idi idila muadi; nyunyu ya nfiondo neyishikamemu, ne mbushi ya mu mpata neyinayileku." 
Isaiah13:22 Nyama ya bimungu neyidile mu mbalasa ya bukelenge babo, mibuabua neyidile mu nsubu yabo ya mushinga mukole. Tshikondo tshiandi tshia kubutuka tshidi tshiamba kufika, ne matuku andi kaena aleha." 
Isaiah14:1 Bualu bua Yehowa neafuile Yakoba luse, neasungule ba mu Bena Isalele bu bantu bandi kabidi, ne neabashikike mu buloba buabo bua diambedi. Bantu ba bende nebadisangishe nʼabo, nebadilamike kudi ba mu bana ba Yakoba." 
Isaiah14:2 Ba mu bisamba bia ba bende nebabangate, nebabafile ku muaba wabo. Ba mu Bena Isalele nebadiangatshile bantu aba bu buhianyi buabo mu buloba bua Yehowa bua kuikalabo bahika babo balume ne bahika babo bakashi. Nunku nebabueshe bantu aba mu buhika bakadi bababuesha mu buhika diambedi, ne nebakokeshe ku mutu kua bakadi babakengesha." 
Isaiah14:3 Hashishe, mu difuku adi hakukuha Yehowa dikisha ku dikenga diebe ne ku malu akadi akutatshisha ne ku mudimu mukole wakakuenzeshabo ku bukole," 
Isaiah14:4 neubange kuimba musambu eu wa kutshimbisha nʼau mukelenge wa mu Babulona. Newambe biebe ne, Mona mudi mutukengeshi muholeshibue, ne mudi tshiji tshiandi tshiakudibandisheye nʼatshi tshihuwishibue!" 
Isaiah14:5 Yehowa wakutshibula mulangala wa bantu babi, dikombo mene dia bakokeshi," 
Isaiah14:6 bakadi bakuma bantu mu tshiji tshiabo, babakuma ne mikumu yakadi kayiyi ne ndekelu, bakadi bakokesha ba mu bisamba bia bantu ne luonji, babakengesha ne dikenga diakadi muntu kayi mua kukanda." 
Isaiah14:7 Ba ha buloba honso badi ne dikisha, badi ne ditalala, badi babisha mei abo mu kuimba kua musambu." 
Isaiah14:8 Mitshi ya cyprès mene idi isanka bua kubutuka kuebe, ne mitshi ya cèdre ya mu Lebanona kabidi idi yamba ne, Katshia wahuekeshibua kakuena muena tshisui wakulua bua kututaha." 
Isaiah14:9 Muaba wa Bafue udi muinshi mua buloba udi mubishibue bua kukuakidila hawafikamu, udi ukusonsuela bafue, bakokeshi banene bonso ba ha buloba mene, bua kukuakidilabo; udi ujula bakelenge bonso ba bisamba bia bantu mu nkuasa yabo ya bukelenge." 
Isaiah14:10 Buonso buabo nebakukudimune dî, nebakuambile ne, Wewe kabidi wakulua mutekete bu tuetu, anyi? Bakukufuanyishisha bu tuetu, anyi?" 
Isaiah14:11 Butumbi buebe buakuhuekeshibua tô ne ku Muaba wa Bafue, ne mutoyi wa nzenze yebe kabidi; bikusu bidi biadisha bu bulalu muinshi muebe, ne bikusu bidi tshibuikidilu tshiebe." 
Isaiah14:12 Mona muwakuluka mu diulu, wewe mutoto wa nkesha, muana wa lunkelu! Mona muakukushimbulabo tô ne hanshi ha buloba, wewe nguashimbula bisamba bia bantu!" 
Isaiah14:13 Wewe wakamba mu mutshima webe ne, Nembande mu diulu, nembandishe nkuasa wanyi wa bukelenge mulu ha mutu ha mitoto ya Nzambi; nenshikame bianyi ha mutu ha mukuna wa disangisha kunfudilu kua luseke lua nôde." 
Isaiah14:14 Nembande kulu ha mutu ha matutu, nendivuishe bu Nzambi Mutambe wa Mulu." 
Isaiah14:15 Kadi neuhuekeshibue tô ne ku Muaba wa Bafue, ku ndekelu wa Tshina tshia Bafue." 
Isaiah14:16 Badi bakumona nebakujoshe bikole, nebakuelele meji ne, Eu mmuntu wakazakasha buloba, wakakankisha makelenge, anyi?" 
Isaiah14:17 Eu nyeye wakavuisha buloba bu tshihela, wakabutula misoko yabu, wakahidia kulekela bena lukanu hua kuhinganabo kuabo, anyi?" 
Isaiah14:18 Banfumu bakuabo ba bisamba bia bantu, buonso buabo mene, badi balala munkatshi mua butumbi, muntu ne muntu mulale mu majambu andi;" 
Isaiah14:19 kadi wewe wakumushibua mu majambu ebe bu muana wa kabishi udibo bahetula, udi muluatshishibue bitalu bia bantu bashihibue, bakasompolabo ne muele wa nvita, badi bahueka tô ne ku mabue a mu Tshina, bu tshitalu tshidiatshibue muinshi mua makasa." 
Isaiah14:20 Wewe kuena usangishibue nʼabo mu dijikibua diebe, bualu bua wakubutula buloba buebe, wakushiha bantu bebe. Kabena batela mena a tunkanunuina tua benji ba malu mabi tshiendelele!" 
Isaiah14:21 Longoluelai bana bandi tshishihelu bualu bua malu mabi a batatu babo, bua kabajuki bua kuangatabo buloba bu biuma biabo, ne bua kabûshi buloba tente ne bimenga biabo." 
Isaiah14:22 Yehowa wa misumba udi wamba ne, Nenjuke bua kubaluisha, nengumushe ku Babulona badi babikidibue ku dina diau ne difuka dia bantu bau didi dishala, muana mulume ne muikuluʼandi, mmudi Yehowa wamba." 
Isaiah14:23 Yehowa wa misumba udi Wamba ne, Nenvuishe musoko eu muaba wa nkese ne muaba wa bintampi. Nenkombemu ne lukombo lua kubutula nʼalu." 
Isaiah14:24 Yehowa wa misumba wakuditshiha, wamba ne, Bulelela, bu munakuhangidisha bua kuenza, bualu nebuenjibue; bu nuina kusungula mu mutshima wanyi, nebujalame muomumue," 
Isaiah14:25 mbua kutshibula Muena Ashû bituha mu buloba buandi, nemmudiate muinshi mua makasa anyi ha mutu ba mikuna yanyi; hashishe, mutshi wandi wa tshikokedi neûmushibue ba nshingu ya bantu banyi, ne bujitu buandi nebûmuke ha maha abo." 
Isaiah14:26 Ebu mbualu bunakuhangidisha bua kuenzela ba ha buloba bonso; etshi ntshianza tshidi tshiolola ha mutu ha bisamba bionso. 
Isaiah14:27 Bualu bua Yehowa wa misumba wakuhangidisha bualu, ne muntu kai neamanye mua kubuvuisha hatuhu? Yeye wakuolola tshianza tshiandi, muntu kai neatshihingashe ku nyima?" 
Isaiah14:28 Mu tshidimu tshiakafua mukelenge Ahaza muakamueneka dî edi dia tshijila ne," 
Isaiah14:29 Nuenu ba mu Peleshete, buonso buenu, kanusanki bualu bua tshibonge tshiakanututabo nʼatshi tshiakutshibuka, bualu bua nyoka wa dikala neahatuke mu muji wa nyoka, ne muana udi dikala dilela neikale nyoka udi uhahala ne udi utema bu kahia." 
Isaiah14:30 Banʼa bute ba bahele nebikale ne bia kudia, ne bakengi nebalale tulu kabayi ne ntatu; kudi nenshihe ba ku muji webe ne tshiole, ne bantu bebe badi bashala ne muoyo nebashihibue." 
Isaiah14:31 Ela mukunda, wewe tshibuelelu tshia ku musoko; asa muadi, wewe musoko! Fingaluka ne buowa, wewe buloba bua Peleshete, buloba buebe buonso! Bualu bua muishi wa kahia udi uluhuka mu luseke lua nôde, ne kakuena muendi wa bitulu mu milongo ya bena mata bau." 
Isaiah14:32 Nunku muntu neamanye mua kukudimuna miloho ya tshisamba etshi dî kai? Neambe ne, Yehowa wakujadika Siona, ne bantu bandi bakengeshibue nebasanganemu tshinyemenu." 
Isaiah15:1 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua Moaba. Bualu bua mu butuku bumue bakubutula Ala wa Moaba, bakuyisha Moaba bu muaba wa hatuhu; bualu bua mu butuku bumue bakubutula Kî wa Moaba, bakuyisha Moaba bu muaba wa hatuhu." 
Isaiah15:2 Muana mukashi wa Dibona wakubanda ku bitendelelu bia mu mukuna bua kudilaku; ba mu Moaba badi badila ha mukuna wa Nebo, ne ha mukuna wa Medeba. Ha mitu yabo yonso hadi mabala, muedi wonso udi mubeyibue." 
Isaiah15:3 Mu misesu yabo badi badiluatshisha bilulu bikayabala; ha miaba idi ha mutu ha nsubu yabo ne mu miaba minene ya misoko yabo, bantu bonso badi basa muadi, badila ne binsonshi bivule." 
Isaiah15:4 Ba mu Heshebona ne ba mu Eleale badi badila bikole, mei abo adi unvuika tô ne ku Yahasa; nunku bena nvita ba mu Moaba badi basa muadi bikole, ne mutshima wa Moaba udi uzakala." 
Isaiah15:5 Mutshima wanyi udi udidila Moaba bikole; bihatshibue babo badi banyema tô ne ku Soâ, ku Egelata-shelishiya. Bualu bua badi babanda mu nshila udi uyila ku Luhita, bendela badila; ne mu nshila udi uyila ku Holonayima badi babandisha mei abo ne, Tuakubutuka;" 
Isaiah15:6 bualu bua mai a Nimelima adi kabutu, mashinde akufubidila, mashinde matekete akûma; kakuena mudioko umue utshidi mubishi." 
Isaiah15:7 Nunku badi baya ne bintu bivule biakudiangatshilabo ne bintu biakubutshiabo, babituala dishiya dia Kasulu ka Mitshi ya Saules." 
Isaiah15:8 Bualu bua muadi wakumana kunyunguluka matshika onso a Moaba; kudila kuau kudi kufika ku Egelayima, kuasa kuau kudi kufika tô ne ku Bê-elima." 
Isaiah15:9 Bualu bua mai a Dibona akûla tente ne mashi, kadi nenvuishile Dibona malu makuabo ha mutu, nyama wa ntambue neadiele hamʼbidi ha ba mu Moaba badi banyema, ne hamʼbidi ha bantu bakuabo ba mu buloba batshidi bashalamu." 
Isaiah16:1 Tuminai bienu mukokeshi wa buloba mulambu wa bana ba mikoko, bumuke biabo nʼau ku Sela, bayile nʼau mu nshila wa mu tshihela, tô ne ku mukuna wa muana mukashi wa Siona." 
Isaiah16:2 Bu mudi nyunyu yendakana mulu, bu tunyunyu tua mu disua didi disasula, mbu mudi bana bakashi ba Moaba ku tshisabukilu tshia ku musulu wa Ânona." 
Isaiah16:3 Nebambe ne, Utuleshe lungenyi, utukosele tshilumbu tshietu ne kulumbulula kuakane; uvuishe mundidimbi webe bu butuku mu diba dia munda-munya; usokoke bantu aba badibo bihata, kusokolodi bisokomenu bia badi banyema." 
Isaiah16:4 Itabusha bua bantu bakihatabo mu Moaba bashikame nʼebe; wikale kudibo bu tshibuikilu tshidi tshibasokoka ku mesu kua mushihianganyi. Hafika munyengi wa bintu ku ndekelu kuandi, halekela muhaudi wa bintu kuhaula, halua badiatshi ba bantu kujimina mu buloba kabidi;" 
Isaiah16:5 mu diba adi nkuasa wa bukelenge neajadikibue mu kuleshangana kua luse. Mukuabo neashikamemu mu kujalama kuandi kua bushuwa, mu ntenta wa Davidi mene, neikale mulumbuluishi udi ukeba kulumbulula ne kulumbulula kuakane, muikale ne lukunukunu lua kuenza bienzedi biakane." 
Isaiah16:6 Tuakunvua lumu lua diambu dia Moaba ne, Udi ne diambu dihita bukole. Tuakunvua lumu lua kudisua kuandi, lua dihetu diandi, ne lua dikamakama diandi; kufunafuna kuandi kudi bualu bua hatuhu." 
Isaiah16:7 Nunku Bena Moaba badidile Moaba muadi, buonso buabo badile muadi. Nudile bua mikata ya Kî-hala-sete, nuenu bamane kubutudibua." 
Isaiah16:8 Bualu bua madimi a mu Heshebona adi amba kuhanga, ne muonshi wa mu Sibema udi uhanga kabidi; bakokeshi ba bisamba bia bantu bakuahula matamba au, matamba a muonshi wawa akafika tô ne ku Yazê, wakendakana tô ne ku tshihela, ntonga yau yakenda mu miaba mikuabo, yakasabuka mai manene." 
Isaiah16:9 Nunku nendidile muonshi wa mu Sibema ne muadi wa Yazê; nennuboleshe ne binsonshi bianyi, nuenu Heshebona ne Eleale; bualu bua mbila ya bena nvita yakunvuika mu muaba wa tumuma tuenu ne ha diba dia kunowa kuenu." 
Isaiah16:10 Disanka ne tuseku biakumuka mu budimi buakadi ne maminu; ne mu madimi a tumuma tua nvinyo kamuena muikala kuimba kua misambu anyi kuela kua mbila ya disanka. Kakuena mukami wa nvinyo wadiata tumuma mu bikaminu bua kukameye nvinyo, Nakuhuwisha mbila ya disanka ya bahuodi ba tumuma tua nvinyo." 
Isaiah16:11 Bua malu â mutshima wanyi udi udidila Moaba ne tshiona bu tshia lunzenze, ne munda muanyi mudi mujinga Kî-helese." 
Isaiah16:12 Mu diba adi, halua Moaba ku mpala kuanyi, hadihangisheye ne mitendelelu ha mutu ha mukuna, habueleye mu tshitendelelu tshiandi bua kutendelela, kena udikuatshisha ne bualu bumue bua malu â." 
Isaiah16:13 Edi ndi diakamba Yehowa bualu bua Moaba mu bidimu biakamana kuhita. 
Isaiah16:14 Kadi katataka Yehowa wakuamba ne, Hahita bidimu bisatu, bu mudibo babala bidimu bia mudimu wa muntu mubueshibue bua ditutu, nebayishe butumbi bua Bena Moaba hualu bua kuhetula, nansha bikalabo tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu. Badi bashala ne muoyo munkatshi mua bantu bakadiku diambedi nebikale anu banya-banya, nebikale batekete." 
Isaiah17:1 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua Damaseke. Yehowa wa misumba udi wamba ne, Monai, badi bumusha Damaseke mu muaba wandi wa butumbi bua kikadi musoko munene, neikale tshikulu tshia nsubu mifue." 
Isaiah17:2 Badi bashiya misoko ya mu Aloê hatuhu bua ishale bikulu; neyikale miaba ya kudishamu bimuna, nebilalemu kakuyi wa mua kuyitshinyisha." 
Isaiah17:3 Nebumushile Efelayima musoko wandi wa lumbu wakadi tshieyemenu tshiandi mu nvita, nebumushile Damaseke bukelenge buandi; ne bantu ba mu Sulia batshidi bashalamu ne muoyo nebikale bu butumbi bua Bena Isalele." 
Isaiah17:4 Mu dituku adi butumbi bua Yakoba nebutekeshibue, ne mafuta a mubidi wandi nealue tshinyanu." 
Isaiah17:5 Bualu ebu nebuikale bu mudibo benza hadi banowi ba blé banowa maminu adi ashala mu budimi, ne tshianza tshiandi tshidi tshinowa miehu ya blé, muomu, nebuikale bu mudibo benza hanowa muntu miehu ya blé mu tshibanda tshia Bena Lefa." 
Isaiah17:6 Nebashiyemu bintu bia kuhumbulula bu mudibo benza hanyukulabo mutshi wa tumuma tua olive: tumuma tua olive, nansha tubidi nansha tusatu, tudi tushala ku mutu kua katongabela ka mutshi, tunai anyi tutanu tudi tushala ku matamba makuabo a mutshi wawa wakadi ukuama tumuma tua bungi. Edi ndi didi Yehowa Nzambi wa Isalele wamba." 
Isaiah17:7 Mu dituku adi bantu nebatangile kudi Mufuki wabo, ne mesu abo neanemeke wa Tshijila wa Isalele." 
Isaiah17:8 Kabena batangila ku bioshelu, bintu bidi bianza biabo bienza, kabena banemeka bintu bidi minu yabo mienze, nansha bikalabi mitshi ya Bashela, nansha bikalabi mpingu ya kutendelela nʼai diba." 
Isaiah17:9 Mu dituku adi misoko yabo yakadi ne bukole neyikale bu bikulu ne makolo bidi ha mikuna, misoko yakalekelabo hatuhu kudi bantu hakanyemabo ku mpala kua Bena Isalele; neyikale kabutu." 
Isaiah17:10 Bualu bua wewe wakuhua Nzambi wa luhandu luebe muoyo ne kuakuvuluka Dibue dia tshinyemenu tshiebe, nunku ukadi ukuna mitshi mimpe, ukadi utentula ntonga ya mioshi ya nzambi wa bende." 
Isaiah17:11 Mu dituku diudi wikuna nansha wewe winyunguluka ne luhangu lua mitshi hatshiabu ne dinda wewe mumane kukuna nansha wewe muvuishe maminu ebe bilongo, kadi bintu bia kunowa nebikujimine mu dituku dialua masama ne kanyinganyinga kadi kakayi kamanye mua kuholeshibua." 
Isaiah17:12 Aka! Mutoyi wa bantu ba bungi udiku, badi bahisha mutoyi udi bu tshiona tshia mai manene! Diyoyo didiku dia luendu lukole lua bisamba bia bantu badi benda lubilu bu mudi dihueka dia lukasa dia mai mahita bungi!" 
Isaiah17:13 Ba mu bisamba bia bantu badi mua kuenda lubilu bu dihueka dia lukasa dia mai a bungi, kadi Yehowa neababele, ne nebanyeme kule, nebihatshibue bu mudi bisote bia ku tshituilu tshia ha mukuna bihehudibua halua luhehele, ne bu mudi luhuishi lunyunguluka ne nvunde." 
Isaiah17:14 Habuela diba, monai, buowa bukole budiku! Dinda kadiyi dianji kulua, kabenaku! Edi ndikenga didi bantu badi batuhaula bahiana, ne bualu bubi buakusunguilabo badi banyenga bintu bietu." 
Isaiah18:1 Ke, buloba budi ne tshiona tshia kuhahala kua masala a bishi, budi ku nyima kua misulu ya Atiopa," 
Isaiah18:2 budi butuma miloho yabu mu nshila udi uyila ha mutu ha mai manene, yenda biayi mu matu maluka ne papyrus ha mai! Yai bienu, nuenu miloho idi yenda lubilu, kudi tshisamba tshia bantu badi bale ne badi basenene, kudi bantu badi bakuatshisha bakuabo badi ha buihi ne badi kule buowa; ntshisamba tshidi tshikole ne tshidi tshidiata banga bantu muinshi mua makasa, tshidi misulu itahulula buloba buatshi." 
Isaiah18:3 Nuenu bonso ba ha buloba bua bukua bantu, ne nuenu badi bashikame ha buloba, habandishabo dibendela ha mutu ha mukuna, tangilai! Helabo mpungi, unvuai bienu!" 
Isaiah18:4 Bualu bua Yehowa wakungambila dî edi ne, Nentangile malu talalâ bandi mu muaba undi mushikame, bu luya ludi lubanda mu munya, lukenka bikole; bu ditutu dia dibungi mu luya lua mu tshikondo tshia kunowa." 
Isaiah18:5 Bualu bua diambedi tshidimu tshia kunowa katshiyi tshianji kufika, huma tshilongo, ne hakudimuka lutonga luatshi kamuma ka nvinyo kamba kuboba, yeye neahempe ntonga ne miele, neayitahe, neumushe matamba a mutshi adi matanyinyika kudiu." 
Isaiah18:6 Nebashiye buonso buabi kudi nyunyu ya mu mikuna itu yadia munyinyi, ne kudi nyama ya mu mpata. Nyunyu itu yadia munyinyi neyiyikile bamʼbidi habi mu tshidimu tshia luya, nyama yonso ya mu mpata neyimane hadibi mu tshidimu tshia mashika." 
Isaiah18:7 Mu tshikondo atshi nebalue ne diha kudi Yehowa wa misumba didi difuma kudi bantu bale ne basenene, difuma kudi bantu badi bakuatshisha badi ha buihi ne badi kule buowa; ntshisamba tshidi tshikole ne tshidi tshidiata bantu muinshi mua makasa abo, tshidi misulu itahulula buloba buatshi. Nebalue nʼadi ku muaba udi Yehowa wa misumba uteka dina diandi, ku mukuna wa Siona mene." 
Isaiah19:1 Di dia tshijila bualu bua Ejipitu. Monai, Yehowa udi wenda mubande ba ditutu didi diya lukasa, ne neafike ku Ejipitu. Mpingu ya mu Ejipitu neyizakale ku mpala kuandi, mitshima ya ba mu Ejipitu neyivingutuke munda muabo." 
Isaiah19:2 Nensonsole Bena Ejipitu bua kuluishangana ne Bena Ejipitu bakuabo, nebaluangane muntu yonso ne muanʼabo, muntu yonso ne muena mutumba nʼandi; ba mu musoko umue nebaluangane ne ba mu munga musoko, bena bukelenge bumue nebaluangane ne bena bukelenge bukuabo." 
Isaiah19:3 Nyuma wa ba mu buloba bua Ejipitu neahange munda muabo, ne nentuhakashe meji adibo nʼau; nebaye kudi mpingu bua kudikebela lungenyi, ne kudi batempi ba mbuku, kudi bena mbuku ya mibangu, ne kudi bena muhongo." 
Isaiah19:4 Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, udi wamba ne, Nenfile Bena Ejipitu mu bianza bia mukokeshi udi muena tshinyangu; ne mukelenge udi ne luonji neabakokeshe." 
Isaiah19:5 Mai a mu mai manene neûme onso, ne Musulu wa Nile neunyanguke, neûme." 
Isaiah19:6 Misulu yau neyinunke muhuya mubi, maboko a musulu wa mu Ejipitu neakame, neûme; binkete ne luehu lua miû nebifubidile." 
Isaiah19:7 Miaba ya masele adi hehi ne Nile, ku muelelu wa Nile mene, ne madimi onso adi ha buihi ne Nile, adibo bakunamu maminu, nebiume, nebihehudibue, nebijimine." 
Isaiah19:8 Bilembi bia mishiha nebiase muadi, ne bonso badi bela ndoho mu mai nebadile, badi bâdisha tuhamba tuabo ha mai nebatekete." 
Isaiah19:9 Baluki ba bilulu bia lin, ne badi bakuma tshilulu tshia ndanda, nebatuhakashibue." 
Isaiah19:10 Badi bu makunshi adi akolesha buloba bua Ejipitu nebatshibuke bituha, bantu bonso badi benza mudimu wa ditutu nebikale ne kanyinganyinga mu mitshima yabo." 
Isaiah19:11 Bakokeshi ba mu Soana badi anu bahote; lungenyi lua bena meji ba Palô badi batamba kuikala ne meji luakulua buhote. Nudi bamanye mua kuambila Palô ne, Ndi muana wa bena meji, muana wa bakelenge ba kale munyi?" 
Isaiah19:12 Nunku bena meji bebe badi kudi kunyi? Bobo bakuambile mpindiu, bamanye biabo bualu budi Yehowa wa misumba muhangidishe bua kuenzela Ejipitu." 
Isaiah19:13 Bakokeshi ba mu Soana bakulua bahote, bakokeshi ba mu Mempi bakudingibua; bantu badi bu dibue dia mu ditumba dia bisamba biabo bakuhambuisha ba mu Ejipitu." 
Isaiah19:14 Yehowa wakusonsola nyuma wa tshibondakasha munkatshi muabo; ne bakuhambuisha Bena Ejipitu mu mudimu wabo wonso, bu mudi muntu mukuatshike maluvu wenda ututubila mu nshila uluka bilushi biandi." 
Isaiah19:15 Ne kakuena kushala mudimu mukuabo mu Ejipitu, udi mutu anyi mukila, dilala dia dibue anyi disele mua kuenza." 
Isaiah19:16 Mu dituku adi Bena Ejipitu nebikale bu bakashi. Nebazakale ne nebatshine bua kukuha kua tshianza tshia Yehowa wa misumba tshidiye ukuha ha mutu habo. 
Isaiah19:17 Buloba bua Yuda nebuhatshishe Ejipitu buowa. Muntu yonso wa ku muaba kudibo batela dina dia Yuda neatshine, bualu bua muanda udi Yehowa muhangidishe, udiye mudisunguile bua kuenzela Ejipitu." 
Isaiah19:18 Mu dituku adi nemuikale misoko itanu mu buloba bua Ejipitu idi ne bantu bakula muaku wa Bena Kanâna, ne badi baditshiha kudi Yehowa wa misumba. Nebabikile umue wa munkatshi mua misoko yaya ne, Musoko wa Dibutuka." 
Isaiah19:19 Mu dituku adi tshioshelu tshia Yehowa netshikale mu muaba wa munkatshi mua buloba bua Ejipitu, ne dikunshi nedikale ku mukalu wabu dijidila kudi Yehowa." 
Isaiah19:20 Nedikale bu tshimanyinu ne bu tshimanyishilu kudi Yehowa wa misumba mu buloba bua Ejipitu; bualu bua hadilabo kudi Yehowa bua babakengeshi babo, neabatumine musungidi udi kabidi tshilobo, ne yeye neabasungile." 
Isaiah19:21 Yehowa nendimanyishe kudi ba mu Ejipitu, ne Bena Ejipitu nebamanye Yehowa mu ditukuadi. Mmuomu, nebamutendelele ne milambu ya kumuoshela ne milambu ya bia kudia biabo, nebaditshihe mutshihu kudi Yehowa, nebenze bu mudibo baditshiha." 
Isaiah19:22 Yehowa neakume ba mu Ejipitu, neabatahe ne neabasangashe kabidi; nebahingane kudi Yehowa, ne yeye neitabushe bua bamulombe, neakoleshe mibidi yabo." 
Isaiah19:23 Mu dituku adi nshila munene neikaleku muhatuke mu Ejipitu ne muyile tô ne ku Ashû, ne muena Ashû neayilemu bua kufikeye mu Ejipitu, ne muena Ejipitu neayilemu bua kufikeye mu Ashû. Ne Bena Ejipitu nebatendelele Nzambi hohamue ne Bena Ashû." 
Isaiah19:24 Mu dituku adi Isalele neikale tshituha tshisatu tshidi tshisangisha Ejipitu ne Ashû bu disankisha dia bantu munkatshi mua ba ha buloba. 
Isaiah19:25 Bualu bua Yehowa wa misumba wakabavudishila disanka, wamba ne, Nuvudishibue disanka, ba mu Ejipitu, bantu banyi, ne Bena Ashû, mudimu wa bianza bianyi, ne Bena Isalele, buhianyi buanyi." 
Isaiah20:1 Mu tshidimu tshiakulua Tâtana ku Ashedodo, mutumibue kudi Sâgona, mukelenge wa Ashû, wakaluangana ne bena musoko wa Ashedodo ne wakabahita bukole." 
Isaiah20:2 Mu tshikondo atshi Yehowa wakambila Yeshaya, muana wa Amoza, ne, Ya usulule bilulu bikayabala bidi mu tshimono tshiebe, umushe bisabata biebe ku makasa ebe. Yeye Wakenza nunku, wenda butaka ne kayi ne bisabata." 
Isaiah20:3 Hashishe Yehowa wakamba ne, Bu muakuenda muntu wanyi Yeshaya butaka ne kayi ne bisabata bidimu ebi bisatu, bu tshimanyinu ne bu bualu bua dikema kudi ba mu Ejipitu ne kudi ba mu Atiopa," 
Isaiah20:4 nunku mukelenge wa Ashû neaye kuabo ne bantu badiye mukuate mu Ejipitu ne badiye mumushe mu Atiopa bua kubalela kule, bana ne bakulumpe diatshimue, bikale butaka ne kabayi ne hisabata, kabayi ne bilulu bia kubuikila ku mataku abo, bua kufuisheye ba mu Ejipitu bundu." 
Isaiah20:5 Bena Yuda nebakuatshike buowa, nebikale babuandakanangane, bualu bua Atiopa wakadi ditekemena diabo ne bua Ejipitu wakadi butumbi buabo." 
Isaiah20:6 Ne badi bashikame mu buloba ebu budi ku muelelu wa mai manene nebambe mu dituku adi ne, Monai, ebu mbualu buakukuata batuakutekemena, batuakunyemena bua batukuatshishe bua tuetu kuhanduka mu bianza bia mukelenge wa Ashû! Ne tuetu hetu netuhanduke munyi?" 
Isaiah21:1 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua tshihela tshia ku luseke lua mai manene. Bu mudi nvunde ya mu Sude ihitshilamu bikole, lumu ludi lufuma ku tshihela, ku buloba budi bukuatshisha bantu buowa." 
Isaiah21:2 Bakummanyisha tshikena kumona tshikole; muena lukinu udi wenza malu a lukinu, muhaudi udi uhaula. Bandaku, Elama; tshintshimika, Madai! Nempuwishe kuhumuna kuonso kuakuvuisheye ku luseke alu." 
Isaiah21:3 Nunku tshimono tshianyi tshiakûla tente ne kanyinganyinga, didinyenga diakunkuata, bu dia mukashi udi ne didinyenga dia ha kuleleye. Nakulua mukobame, ne bua muanda eu tshiena mua kunvua; nakukuatshika buowa, ne bua muanda eu tshiena mua kutangila." 
Isaiah21:4 Mutshima wanyi udi uhampakana, buowa buhite bukole buakuntshinyisha. Kafuanshimba kanakasua kakukudimuka kuzakala kundi." 
Isaiah21:5 Badi balongolola mesa, badi bâdisha biata, badi badia, badi banua. Jukai, nuenu bana ba mukelenge, labai manyi ha ngabu!" 
Isaiah21:6 Bualu bua Mukelenge wakungambila ne, Ya, utekeku nsentedi, yeye atuambile malu adiye umona." 
Isaiah21:7 Ne biatangileye bisumbu bia makalu a nvita, babandi ba ha nyima ha tubalu benda ku babidi ku babidi, tshisumbu tshia nyama ya mpunda, tshisumbu tshia nyama ya tumelo, ateleje matshu andi, ikale ne mbabi." 
Isaiah21:8 Ka yeye au wakadila bu nyama wa ntambue ne, Mukelenge, ndi ngimana nusangu yonso ha mutu ha tshibumba tshia nsentedi mu diba dia munya, ne badi banteka mu muaba wanyi wa butentekedi bufuku, ku dituku ku dituku." 
Isaiah21:9 Ne mona, tshisumbu tshia bena tubalu tshidi tshilua, babandi ha nyima ha tubalu benda ku babidi ku babidi! Yeye wakampingishila dî ne, Babulona wakûhuka, wakûhuka; mpingu yonso ya nzambi yabo yakutshibuka bituha bituha, yakuhona hanshi ha buloba." 
Isaiah21:10 Ke, wewe muntu wanyi mushihudibue, ne muana wanyi wa tshishihuidi! Mei anakunvua kudi Yehowa wa misumba, Nzambi wa Isalele, au mmei anakukuambila." 
Isaiah21:11 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua Duma. Muntu wa mu Seî udi ungela dî ne, Mutentekedi, udi wamba tshinyi bua butuku? Mutentekedi, udi wamba tshinyi bua butuku?" 
Isaiah21:12 Mutentekedi udi witaba ne, Butuku bukadi butshia, kadi nebuile kabidi. Binuasua kunkonka kabidi, nunkonke bienu. Alukilai kabidi, luai bienu." 
Isaiah21:13 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua Alaba. Bunudi nʼabu mbua kuasa tshitudilu tshienu mu bihuka bia mu Alaba, nuenu batuadi ba bintu ba Bena Dedana." 
Isaiah21:14 Luai ne mai kudi muntu udi ne nyota, nuenu badi bashikame mu buloba bua Tema, sankidilai bihatshibue ne bia kudia." 
Isaiah21:15 Bualu bua bakanyema miele ya nvita, bakanyema muele muhatula mu luhaha, ne buta bimana, ne dikenga dikole dia nvita." 
Isaiah21:16 Bualu bua Mukelenge wakungambila dî edi ne, Hahita tshidimu tshimue, bu mudi muena mudimu wa ditutu ubala bidimu biandi, butumbi buonso bua Kedâ nebuhange." 
Isaiah21:17 Badi bashala ba ku bungi bua bena mata ba diambedi, bena bukitu ba munkatshi mua bana ba Kedâ, nebikale anu banya-banya. Bualu bua Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, wakuamba di edi." 
Isaiah22:1 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua tshibanda tshia tshikena kumona. Bualu kai buakunkuata mpindiu bua buonso buenu nuakubanda ha mitu ha nsubu? 
Isaiah22:2 Wewe udi mûle tente ne mbila, musoko udi ne diyoyo tente, musoko udi usanka bikole; bakushihibua munkatshi muebe kabakushihibua ku miele, kabena bafue mu nvita." 
Isaiah22:3 Bakokeshi bebe bonso bakanyema diatshimue, bakabasuika hakadibo kabayi ne mata abo; bantu bebe bonso bakamonabo bakasuikibua hohamue, bobo mene bakadi banyema kule." 
Isaiah22:4 Nunku nakamba ne, Lekelai kuntangila, bua meme ndile bikole. Kanukebi kunsamba bualu bua kubutuka kua muana mukashi wa bantu banyi." 
Isaiah22:5 Bualu bua edi ndituku dia tshintompatompa, dia kudiata bantu muinshi mua makasa, dia kulubakana kua mitshima, difume kudi Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, mu tshibanda tshia tshikena kumona; ndituku dia kushimbula ngumbu ya musoko, ne dia muadi udi ufika tô ne ku mikuna." 
Isaiah22:6 Bena Elama bakambula nkaha ya mikete, bakalua ne bena makalu ne babandi ba ha nyima ha tubalu; Bena Kî bakasulula tshibuikilu tshia ha ngabu." 
Isaiah22:7 Bibanda biebe bia mushinga mukole biakadi biule tente ne makalu, ne bena tubalu bakasa mualu wa nvita ku tshibuelelu tshia ku musoko." 
Isaiah22:8 Yeye wakumusha tshibuikilu ku mesu kua Bena Yuda. Mu dituku adi wewe wakatangila kudi bielelu bia nvita biakadi mu nsuhu wa muitu. 
Isaiah22:9 Nuakamona miaba mishimbula mu musoko wa Davidi ne, Idi ya bungi; nuakasangisha mai a mu tshina tshia mu tshibanda hohamue." 
Isaiah22:10 Nuakabala nsubu ya mu Yelushalema kabidi, nuakashimbula, nsubu mikuabo bua kukolesha nʼai lumbu." 
Isaiah22:11 Nuakumbula tshina tshia mai hankatshi ha ngumbu ibidi bua kukuatamu mai a mu tshina tshia diambedi. Kadi kanuakatangila kudi wakavuisha muanda eu, kanuakanemeka wakadihangidishila muanda eu kale." 
Isaiah22:12 Mu dituku adi Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, wakanubikila bua kudila ne bua kuasa madilu, bua kubeya nsuki yenu ne bua kudiluatshisha bilulu bikayabala;" 
Isaiah22:13 ne monai, disanka dia bungi didiku ne musangelu, kushiha kua ngombe ne kua mikoko, kudia kua munyinyi ne kunua kua maluvu, nuambe bienu ne, Tudie bietu, tunue bietu, bua makelela tufuafua." 
Isaiah22:14 Yehowa wa misumba wakadimuenesha mu dî dinakunvua mu matshu anyi ne, Bulelela, bubi buenu kabuena bujimishibua tô ne ku lufu luenu; Mukelenge Yehowa wa misumba udi wamba nunku." 
Isaiah22:15 Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, udi wamba ne, Ya biebe kudi mulami eu wa bintu, kudi Shebena mene, udi ha mutu ha nsubu wa mukelenge, umuebeshe ne," 
Isaiah22:16 Udi wenza tshinyi kunoko, ne udi ne muntu kai kunoko, bua wewe wakudiumbuila majambu? Wakudiumbuila majambu ha mukuna, wakadisongela muaba mu dibue bua yeye kulalamu!" 
Isaiah22:17 Mona, wewe muntu mukole, Yehowa neakuhidie kule ne bukole buandi buonso. Neakukuate bikole," 
Isaiah22:18 neakuvunge tshivungu bulelela, nenkuele bu mudiye wela ndundu mu buloba bunene. Mu muaba wawa neufue biebe, ne mu muaba wawa nemuikale makalu ebe a mushinga mukole, wewe mufuishishi wa nsubu wa nfumu webe bundu." 
Isaiah22:19 Nenkûmushe mu mudimu webe, nebakutulule ku muaba webe." 
Isaiah22:20 Mu dituku adi nembikile muntu wanyi Eleyakima, muana wa Hilekiya," 
Isaiah22:21 nemmuluatshishe tshivualu tshiebe, nemmujingile mukaba webe, nenfile bukokeshi buebe mu bianza biandi; ne yeye neikale tatu kudi ba mu Yelushalema ne kudi ba mu Bena Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Nenteke luvungula lua ku nsubu wa Davidi ha diaha diandi; yeye neutulule tshibi, kakuena muntu watshinshila; neatshioshile, kakuena muntu watshiunzulula." 
Isaiah22:23 Nemmujadike bu mudibo basa tshikudika mu muaba mushindame, ne yeye neikale bu nkuasa wa butumbi kudi ba mu nsubu wa tatuʼandi." 
Isaiah22:24 Nebakudike bujitu buonso bua tshiota tshia tatuʼandi hamʼbidi handi, bana bakalelabo ne bantu ba hatuhu baledibue kudi bana aba, dilonga dionso dia tshianana mene, ku makoho tô ne ku mbidiki yonso." 
Isaiah22:25 Yehowa udi wamba ne, Mu dituku adi tshikudika tshiakadi tshiasa mu muaba mushindame netshihete; nebatshikose, netshihone hanshi, ne bujitu buakadi bukudikaku nebubutuke, bualu bua Yehowa wakuamba dî edi." 
Isaiah23:1 Dî dia tshijila bualu bua Tulo. Asai miadi, nuenu matu a Tâshishi, bualu bua bakubutula musoko wenu udi ne ngumbu ya nvita, ne kakuenamu nsubu kabidi, kakuena dilobo dia kutudilamu! Mu luendu luau lua ku buloba bua Kitima bualu ebu buakubuluibua kudiu." 
Isaiah23:2 Nuikale bu tumama, nuenu badi bashikame ku muelelu wa mai manene, nuenu bangendʼa mushinga ba ku Sidona, bakahita ha mutu ha mai manene, bakendulukila mushinga ha mutu ha mai a bungi;" 
Isaiah23:3 maminu a ku Shihô akadi luhetu luabo, bia kudia biakahuolabo ku luseke lua musulu wa Nile; musoko au wakadi tshisalu tshia bisamba bia bantu." 
Isaiah23:4 Nuenu ba mu Sidona, nukuatshike bundu, bualu bua mai manene akuamba dî, musoko wa ngumbu ya nvita wa ha mai manene wakuamba ne, Tshiena muanze kutantamena, tshiena muanze kulela, tshiena muanze kukolesha bansongalume anyi kudiundisha mishikankunde itshidi tumama." 
Isaiah23:5 Hafika lumu elu ku Ejipitu, nebikale ne kanyinganyinga bualu bua lumu lua ku Tulo." 
Isaiah23:6 Hitshilai mu mai manene tô ne ku Tâshishi; asai miadi, nuenu badi bashikame ku muelelu wa mai manene." 
Isaiah23:7 Eu mmusoko wenu wakadi ne disanka, wakadi tshibangidilu tshiau mu bidimu biakahita kale, nguakadi makasa au aya nʼau kule bua kushikamaku, anyi?" 
Isaiah23:8 Tulo nguakadi muheshi wa bifulu bia bukelenge kudi banfumu; nguakadi bangendʼa mushinga bandi bikale bakokeshi; nguakadi bahanyishanganyi bandi ba bintu bikale bantu ba butumbi ha buloba! Wakadihangidishila bua kumuenzela nunku nganyi? 
Isaiah23:9 Yehowa wa misumba wakadihangidishila bualu ebu bua kubihisheye butumbi buonso, ne bua bonso badi ne butumbi ha buloba bahetudibue." 
Isaiah23:10 Hongolokai biebe ha buloba buebe buonso, wewe muana mukashi wa Tâshishi, bu mudi musulu wa, Nile uhasalala mibungiji yau; kakuena tshintu tshia kukukanda kabidi." 
Isaiah23:11 Wakuolola tshianza tshiandi ha mutu ha mai manene, wakuzakasha makelenge. Yehowa wakuela mukenji bualu bua buloba bua Kanâna, bua kubutulabo misoko yabu idi ne ngumbu ya nvita." 
Isaiah23:12 Wakamba ne, Kuena usanka kabidi, wewe muana mukashi wa Sidona udi mukengeshibue. Juka biebe, uhitshile mu mai manene tô ne ku Kitima; nansha wewe muikale kuakua kuine kuena uheta dikisha." 
Isaiah23:13 Mona buloba bua Bena Kasada! Bantu aba kabenaku kabidi; Bena Ashû bakabusungula bua kubufila kudi nyama ya mu tshihela. Bakasa bibumba biabo bua kutshintshimika nʼabi musoko, bakashimbula mbalasa ya banfumu bau, bakauvuisha dikolo." 
Isaiah23:14 Asai miadi, nuenu matu a Tâshishi; bua musoko wenu udi ne ngumbu ya nvita wakubutudibua." 
Isaiah23:15 Mu dituku adi nebahue Tulo muoyo bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, bu mudi bantu babala matuku a mukelenge umue. Hashika bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, nebenzele Tulo bu mudi mei a musambu wa mukashi wa ndumba amba ne," 
Isaiah23:16 Angata lunzenze, endakana mu musoko, wewe mukashi wa ndumba udibo bahue muoyo. Imba lunzenze luebe bimpe, imba misambu ya bungi, bua bantu bakuvuluke kabidi!" 
Isaiah23:17 Hashika bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, Yehowa nealue kabidi bua kumona musoko wa Tulo, ne wowo neuhingane kabidi ku difutu diau dia bundumba, newende masandi ne makelenge onso a ba ha buloba adi hanshi ha buloba." 
Isaiah23:18 Kadi luhetu luau ne ditutu diau bua bundumba nebijidibue kudi Yehowa; kabiena bibutshidibua ne kabiena bitekedibua. Bualu bua luhetu luau lua ku kuendulula kua mushinga neluikale bintu bia kukuatshisha nʼabi bantu badi bashikame ku mpala kua Yehowa, bua bobo bikale ne bia kudia bikumbane ne bivualu bimpe." 
Isaiah24:1 Monai, Yehowa udi wamba kuvuisha buloba butuhu, udi wamba kubuvuisha bu tshihela tshia lusenga, udi wamba kubukudimuna ubutua mutu wabu muinshi, ne kumuangalasha bantu babu kuonso." 
Isaiah24:2 Mu dituku adi, bu mudibo benzela bantu mbu mudibo benzela bakuidi; bu mudibo benzela muhika mulume mbu mudibo benzela nfumu wandi; bu mudibo benzela muhika mukashi mbu mudibo benzela nfumu wandi mukashi; bu mudibo benzela musumbi wa bintu mbu mudibo benzela muhanyi wa bintu; bu mudibo benzela musombeshanganyi mbu mudibo benzela muena dibanza; bu mudibo benzela muangatshi wa kasombela mbu mudibo benzela mutentekedi wa kasombela." 
Isaiah24:3 Buloba nebuvuishibue butuhu bushuwa, nebubutudibue tshishiki; bualu bua Yehowa wakuamba di edi." 
Isaiah24:4 Buloba budi ne muadi ne budi bujimina, buloba bua bukua bantu budi buteketa ne budi bujimina, badi bahita butumbi munkatshi mua ba ha buloba badi bateketa." 
Isaiah24:5 Buloba buakunyanguka bualu bua malu mabi a badi bashikamehu; bualu bua bakusambuka mei a Nzambi, bakuhetula mikenji yandi, bakuhidia kutumikila tshihungidi tshia tshiendelele." 
Isaiah24:6 Bua bualu ebu mulau wakunyanga buloba, ne badi bashikamehu bakuhishibua, nunku ba ha buloba bakuoshibua ne kahia, anu bantu banya-banya badi bashala." 
Isaiah24:7 Nvinyo muhia-muhia udi ujinga, muonshi wa tumuma tua nvinyo wakulekela, bonso badi ne mitshima ya disanka badi bahumuna." 
Isaiah24:8 Disanka dia mazele didi dihuwa, mbila ya badi basanka yakushika, disanka dia lunzenze diakuhuwa." 
Isaiah24:9 Kabena banua nvinyo ne kuimba kua musambu, maluvu makole neikale ne bululu kudi bantu badi bânua." 
Isaiah24:10 Musoko wa kabutu wakushimbuka hanshi; bibi bia ku nsubu yonso bidi binshila, bua muntu kabuedimu." 
Isaiah24:11 Muadi udi mu misesu bualu bua nvinyo kenaku; disanka dionso diakuandamuka midima, tuseku tua ba ha buloba tuakuhuwa." 
Isaiah24:12 Mu musoko mudi mushala dibutuka, ne tshibuelelu tshiau tshiakubutudibua, tshiakutshihuka bituha bituha." 
Isaiah24:13 Bualu nebuikale nunku munkatshi mua buloba, munkatshi mua bantu badimu, bu mudi kunyukula kua mutshi wa olive, bu mudi kuhumbulula kua tumuma tua nvinyo ku nyima kua kuhuola kuatu kua diambedi." 
Isaiah24:14 Bantu aha nebabandishe mei abo, nebele mbila ya disanka; bua butumbi bua Yehowa badi bela dî dikole difume ku mai manene." 
Isaiah24:15 Bua malu â tumbishai bienu Yehowa mu maloba a ku esete, tumbishai dina dia Yehowa, Nzambi wa Isalele, mu maloba a ku muelelu wa mai manene." 
Isaiah24:16 Tuakunvua misambu mufume kunfudilu kua buloba mimbe ne, Muntu Muakane atumbishibue! Kadi nakamba ne, Tshinyanu tshidi tshinkuata, tshinyanu tshidi tshinkuata, mulau wankuatshi! batundianganyi ba tshitungu badi bantungila tshitungu, e, batundianganyi ba tshitungu badi batamba kuritungila tshitungu." 
Isaiah24:17 Buowa ne dijimba ne buteyi bidi ku mpala kuetu, wewe muntu wa ha buloba!" 
Isaiah24:18 Wanyema ku diyoyo didi dimukuatshisha buowa neahone mu dijimba; ne waluhuka munda mua dijimba neakuatshibue mu buteyi; bualu bua bibi bia mu diulu bidi kunzulula, ne bishimikidi bia buloba bidi bizakala." 
Isaiah24:19 Buloba buakutshibuka kuonso, buloba buakuhandika hankatshi, buloba budi butenkakana bikole." 
Isaiah24:20 Buloba nebuende bulenduke bu muntu mukuatshike maluvu, nebutenkakane eku ne eku bu tshihoyi. Kutomboka kudimu nekubunemeshile bujitu, nebudishinde hanshi, kabuena bujuka kabidi." 
Isaiah24:21 Mu dituku adi Yehowa neakengeshe tshisumbu tshia bakokeshi ba mu diulu ne bakelenge ba hanshi ha buloba. 
Isaiah24:22 Nebasangishibue hohamue, bu mudibo basangisha bena lukanu mu tshina tshia mu nsubu wa lukanu; nebabakomene mu nsubu wa lukanu, ne hahita matuku a bungi nebabakengeshe." 
Isaiah24:23 Hashishe ngondo neabuandakane, ne diba nedidisokoke bua bundu buadi; bualu bua Yehowa wa misumba neakokeshe mu mukuna wa Siona, ne mu Yelushalema; ku mpala kua bakulu bandi nekuikale butumbi." 
Isaiah25:1 Yehowa, wewe udi Nzambi wanyi; nenkutumbishe, nentumbishe dina diebe; bualu bua wewe wakuenza malu a kukema, malu awakadihangidishila kale kale bua kuenza mu kujalama kuebe tshishiki." 
Isaiah25:2 Bualu bua wakuyisha musoko munene dikolo, wakuvuisha musoko wa ngumbu ya nvita dibutuka, wakuyisha muaba mukole wa bantu ba bende hatuhu bua kawikadi musoko kabidi, ne kabena bawibaka kabidi tshiendelele." 
Isaiah25:3 Nunku ba mu tshisamba tshia bantu bakole nebakutumbishe; ba mu misoko ya bisamba bidi bikuatshisha bantu buowa nebakunemeke. 
Isaiah25:4 Bualu bua wewe wakadi bu musoko wa ngumbu kudi bahele, bu muaba mukole kudi mukengi mu dikenga diandi, bu tshinyemenu tshia kunyemenamu tshikondo tshia tshihuhu, bu dileshi mu diba dia munya mukole, hikala muhuya wa bena tshinyangu babi bu dikuma dia tshihuhu ku tshimanu," 
Isaiah25:5 bu mudi luya lua mu muaba mûme luenza. Wewe neuhuwishe mutoyi wa bantu ba bende; bu mudi luya luenza ne dileshi dia ditutu, musambu wa badi bakuatshisha bakuabo buowa neuhuwishibue." 
Isaiah25:6 Mu mukuna eu Yehowa wa misumba nealongoluele bantu bonso bidia bia disanka bia manyi, bidia bia disanka bia nvinyo muladike ndala, bia kudia bia manyi bisangisha ne buongo bua mu mifuba, bia nvinyo muladike ndala mulengeshibue bimpe." 
Isaiah25:7 Ha mukuna eu yeye neumushe tshilulu tshikudika tshidi tshibuikila ha mitu ya bantu bonso, ne tshibuikilu tshidi tshiadisha ha mutu ha bisamba bionso." 
Isaiah25:8 Yeye wakumina lufu tshiendelele; ne Mukelenge Yehowa neakuhule binsonshi ku mesu kua bantu bonso; neumushe tshihendu tshidibo bahenda nʼatshi bantu bandi, utshiumusha ha buloba buonso; bualu bua Yehowa wakuamba dî edi." 
Isaiah25:9 Mu dituku adi nebambe ne, Monai, eu udi Nzambi wetu utuakutekemena ne, Neatusungile; eu udi Yehowa utuakutekemena; netuikale ne disanka, netusanke mu luhandu luandi." 
Isaiah25:10 Bua tshianza tshia Yehowa netshikole ha mukuna eu, ne nebatuale Moaba hanshi hadiye mushikame, bu mudibo badiata bisonsa hanshi mu mai a diala dia tunvi tua bimuna." 
Isaiah25:11 Yeye neolole bianza biandi munkatshi mua mei â, bu mudi muombedi wa mai wolola bianza biandi bua kuombeleye; kadi Yehowa neuhuekeshe kudisua kuandi nansha bienzeye majimbu andi onso ne bianza biandi." 
Isaiah25:12 Neashimbule miaba mikole ya bielelu bia nvita idi misasa kulu ha mutu ha ngumbu yebe, neayihuekeshe hanshi, neayitulule tô ne hanshi ha buloba, mu dinfuenkenya mene." 
Isaiah26:1 Mu dituku adi nebimbe musambu eu mu buloba bua Yuda, bimba ne, Tudi ne musoko mukole; yeye neajadike luhandu bua kuikalalu ngumbu yau ne bibumba biau bikole." 
Isaiah26:2 Unzululai bibi, bua ba mu tshisamba tshia bantu bakane badi balamata ditabusha babuelemu." 
Isaiah26:3 Wewe udi ulama muntu udi ne mutshima wandi mujalame bua yeye ikale ne ditalala dia tshishiki, bualu bua yeye udi ukueyemena." 
Isaiah26:4 Eyemena! Yehowa tshiendelele, bualu bua Yehowa, Yehowa mene, udi dibue didiku tshiendelele!" 
Isaiah26:5 Bualu bua yeye wakahuekesha bakadi bashikame kulu, wakuhuekesha musoko wakadi mudibandishe kulu. Udi ûtulula hanshi, udi ûtulula tô ne hanshi ha buloba, udi ûtulula tô ne mu dinfuenkenya." 
Isaiah26:6 Dikasa nediudiate muinshi muadi; makasa a bahele, ne bidiatshidi bia bakengi nenudiate hanshi." 
Isaiah26:7 Nshila wa bantu bakane udi mululame; wewe udi ulandakasha nshila wa bantu bakane. 
Isaiah26:8 Bulelela, Yehowa, mu nshila wa kulumbulula kuebe, tuakukuindila; mitshima yetu idi ijinga dina diebe, idi ijinga tshivulukidi tshiebe." 
Isaiah26:9 Nakukujinga mu mutshima wanyi butuku; e, ndi nkukeba ne mutshima wanyi wonso. Bualu bua, hikala kulumbulula kuebe ha buloba, badi bashikame ha buloba badi bayila buakane." 
Isaiah26:10 Bialeshabo muntu mubi diakalengele, kena uyila buakane; munkatshi mua buloba bua buakane mene yeye nênze malu mabi, ne kena umona butumbi bua Yehowa." 
Isaiah26:11 Yehowa, tshianza tshiebe tshidi tshibishibua kulu, kadi kabena batshimona; kedi bamone lukunukunu lûdi nʼalu bua bantu bebe, bafue bundu; bushuwa, kahia nekoshe badi nʼebe lukuna!" 
Isaiah26:12 Yehowa, neutujadikile ditalala; bualu bua wakutuenzela midimu yetu yonso." 
Isaiah26:13 Yehowa Nzambi wetu, bakelenge bakuabo bakadi kabayi bu wewe bakutukokesha; kadi bua dikuatshisha diebe nkayadi netutumbishe dina diebe." 
Isaiah26:14 Bafue kabena hikala ne muoyo kabidi, bakahuola muoyo, kabena babika kabidi. Nunku wewe wakubakengesha ne wakubabutula, wakujimisha tshivulukidi tshiabo tshionso." 
Isaiah26:15 Wewe wakuvudisha ba mu tshisamba tshietu, Yehowa, wakuvudisha ba mu tshisamba tshietu; wewe udi mutumbishibue; wakulehesha mikalu yonso ya buloba buetu." 
Isaiah26:16 Yehowa, hakadibo mu makenga, bakakukeba; bakatuma milombu kûdi bakadi makengesha ebe hamʼbidi habo." 
Isaiah26:17 Bu mudi mukashi udi ne difu wenza, hafika tshikondo tshia kuleleye, udi ukenga ne udi usasabala mu didinyenga diandi, tuakadi nunku ku mpala kuebe, Yehowa;" 
Isaiah26:18 tuakadi ne mafu, tuakadi tudinyenga, tuakadi bu badi balela luhehele. Katuakuhetela ba ha buloba luhandu, ne kakuena bantu ba ha buloba baledibue bua bualu buetu." 
Isaiah26:19 Bafue bebe nebikale ne muoyo; mibidi yabo mifue neyibike. Tabalai ne imbai bienu, nuenu badi balala mu dinfuenkenya! Bua mume webe udi bu mume wa munya, buloba nebuluhule bafue badimu." 
Isaiah26:20 Luai, bantu banyi, buelai mu nsubu yenu, nuinshile bibi bienu ku nyima kuenu; nusokome katuha kihi, tô ne hahita tshikondo tshia njiya." 
Isaiah26:21 Bua, monai, Yehowa udi uluhuka mu muaba wandi bua kukengesha ba ha buloba bua bubi buabo; buloba kabidi nebusokolole mashi akanuabu, kabuena busokoka kabidi bakadi bashihibuamu." 
Isaiah27:1 Mu dituku adi Yehowa neikale ne muele wandi wa nvita mukole ne munene, neakengeshe nyoka mimene udi unyema lubilu, nyoka munene udi wenda utunyangala; neashihe nyama munene udi mu mai manene." 
Isaiah27:2 Mu dituku adi nebimbe musambu eu: Budimi bua tumuma tua nvinyo buimpe budiku, nuimbe musambu bualu buabu!" 
Isaiah27:3 Meme Yehowa ndi mulami wabu; nembumiamine mai diba dionso. Bua muntu kabanyangi, nembulame butuku ne munya." 
Isaiah27:4 Tshiji katshiena munda muanyi. Nakadi kusua ne meba ne mingonge bikale ku mpala kuanyi bua kuluangana nʼanyi nvita! Nakadi kubidiata muinshi mua makasa, nakadi kubiosha kaba kamue." 
Isaiah27:5 Anyi muntu mubi alue biandi kuangata luhandu luanyi, bua adilengeshe nʼanyi; bulelela, adilengeshe nʼanyi." 
Isaiah27:6 Mu matuku adi kâyi manji kulua Yakoba nêle miji; Isalele neabaluluke, neasampile ntonga; nebûshe buloba buonso ne tumuma tua nvinyo." 
Isaiah27:7 Yehowa wakubakuma bu muakakumeye bakuabo bakabakuma, anyi? Bakushihibua bu muakashiheye bakabashiha, anyi?" 
Isaiah27:8 Hawabihata, hawabatuma kukuabo, udi ufuilangana nʼabo; wakabumusha ne luhehele luandi lukole mu dituku diakafuma tshihehele ku luseke lua esete." 
Isaiah27:9 Bua muanda eu bubi bua Yakoba nebujimishibue, ne au mmamuma onso adi Yehowa musue bua kumûmushila bubi buandi: bua yeye avuishe mabue onso a bioshelu biandi bu mabue a luhemba adibo babotesha, bua Bashela ne mpingu idibo batendelela nʼai diba kabikadiku kabidi." 
Isaiah27:10 Bualu bua musoko wa ngumbu ya nvita udi ushala ha buau, tshishikaminu tshidibo balekela, tshidibo bashiya hatuhu, bu tshihela mene. Mu muaba wawa muana wa ngombe neadie mashinde, nealaleku, neadie ne neamane matamba a mitshi." 
Isaiah27:11 Huma matamba a mitshi, nebâhule, ne bakashi nebalue, nebatemeshe nʼau kahia; bualu bua badi bantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi; nunku yeye wakabafuka kena ubafuila luse, wakabafuanyikisha kena ubalesha diakalengele." 
Isaiah27:12 Mu dituku adi Yehowa neashihule miehu yandi ya blé ya ku musulu wa Pelata tô ne ku kasulu ka Ejipitu; ne ba nusangishe muntu ne muntu, nuenu, Bena Isalele." 
Isaiah27:13 Mu dituku adi nebele mpungi munene; bakadi bamba kufua mu buloba bua Ashû, ne bakadi bihatshibue bua kubuelabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu, nebalue; nebatendelele Yehowa mu mukuna wa tshijila wa ku Yelushalema." 
Isaiah28:1 Mulau wikale kudi tshifulu tshia bunfumu tshia diambu tshia bakuatshiki ba maluvu ba mu Efelayima, kudi tshilongo tshidi ne bulengele buatshi bua butumbi tshidi tshifubidila, tshidi tshimena ha mutu ha luhongo luimpe lua bantu aba badi maluvu mahite bukole!" 
Isaiah28:2 Monai, Mukelenge udi ne muntu munene ne mukole udi bu tshihuhu tshia mabue a mula tshidi tshishiha bintu bikuabo, udi bu mai adi ahueka bikole adi ahasalala mielelu ya musulu ku mpala kua tshihuhu, udi wela bintu hanshi ne tshianza tshiandi tshikole." 
Isaiah28:3 Tshifulu tshia bunfumu tshia diambu tshia bakuatshiki ba maluvu ba mu Efelayima netshidiatshibue muinshi mua makasa. 
Isaiah28:4 Tshilongo tshidi ne bulengele buatshi bua butumbi tshidi tshifubidila, tshidi tshimena ha mutu ha luhongo luimpe, netshikale bu dimuma dia nfigi didi didianjila kuboba diambedi matuku a luya kayi manze kulua; hadimona muntu, yeye neadidie hatshididi mu tshianza tshiandi." 
Isaiah28:5 Mu dituku adi Yehowa wa misumba neikale tshifulu tshia butumbi ne tshitotolo tshia bulengele kudi difuka dia bantu bandi. 
Isaiah28:6 Neikale nyuma wa kulumbulula kuakane kudi muntu udi mushikame mu tshilumbuluidi, neikale bukole kudi bantu badi bihata bena nvita badi bafika ku tshibuelelu tshia musoko." 
Isaiah28:7 Kadi bantu aba mene badi batshinkakana ne nvinyo, badi batenkakana bualu bua maluvu makole; muakuidi ne muprofete badi batshinkakana bualu bua maluvu makole, badi baboteshibua bualu bua nvinyo, badi batenkakana bualu bua maluvu makole; badi batuhakana mu dijingulula dia bikena kumona, badi balenduka hakosabo bilumbu." 
Isaiah28:8 Mesa onso adi mabuikila ne bilushi biabo ne bukoya, kakuenahu muaba udi kauyi ne bukoya." 
Isaiah28:9 Neayishe muntu kai lungenyi? Neajinguluile muntu kai dî diandi? Neayishe bana badi bajidika mabele, badi bumushibua mu biadi bia bamamuʼabo, anyi?" 
Isaiah28:10 Bualu bua mukenji ha mutu ha mukenji udiku, mukenji ha mutu ha mukenji, luidi ha mutu ha luidi ludiku, luidi ha mutu ha luidi; tshituha eku ne tshituha kuakua." 
Isaiah28:11 Eyo, kadi ku mishiku ya muena tshikukumina ne mu muaku wa bantu ba bende, yeye neambile bantu aba dî." 
Isaiah28:12 Wakumana kubambila ne, Etshi ntshikondo tshia kuikisha, nuheshe muntu muhungile dikisha; etshi ntshikondo tshia kukankamika. Kadi kabakasua kunvua nansha." 
Isaiah28:13 Nunku dî dia Yehowa nedikale mukenji ha mutu ha mukenji kudibo, mukenji ha mutu ha mukenji, luidi ha mutu ha luidi, luidi ha mutu ha luidi; tshituha eku, tshituha kuakua; bua bobo baye kudishinda luanyima, batshibuke, bahone mu mateyi, bakuatshibuemu." 
Isaiah28:14 Nunku, unvuai bienu dî dia Yehowa, nuenu babuidi badi bakokesha bantu aba ba mu Yelushalema!" 
Isaiah28:15 Bualu bua nuakuamba bienu ne, Tuakuhunga tshihungidi ne lufu, tuakuhungakasha dî ne Muaba wa Bafue; halua tshihuhu tshidi tshihongoloka kuhitshilamu, katshiena tshifika kutudi; bualu bua tuakuvisha mashimi tshinyemenu tshietu, tuakusokoma muinshi mua kudinga." 
Isaiah28:16 Bua mei â Mukelenge Yehowa udi wamba ne, Tangilai, ndi nteka dibue mu Siona bua kuasahu bishimikidi bia nsubu, ndibue diakutetshibua bimpe, dibue dia mushinga mukole didi ditumba dia mu bishimikidi bijadikibue bikole; waditabusha kena udiendesha lukasa." 
Isaiah28:17 Nenvuishe kulumbulula kuakane luidi, ne buakane tshiamu tshia plomb tshia kuteta nʼatshi tshimanu. Mabue a nvula neumushe tshinyemenu tshia mashimi, mai neahitshile ha mutu ha tshisokomenu." 
Isaiah28:18 Tshihungidi tshienu ne lufu netshishihibue, ne dî dinuakuhunga ne Muaba wa Bafue kadiena dijalama; hahitshilamu tshihuhu tshidi tshihongoloka, netshinudiate hanshi." 
Isaiah28:19 Misangu yonso iditshi tshihitshilamu, netshinkuate; bualu bua ku dinda ne ku dinda netshihitshilemu, munya ne butuku kabidi; kujingulula kua dî dia muprofete nekunuvuishile anu buowa bukole." 
Isaiah28:20 Bualu bua bulalu budi buhita buihi bua muntu adiololehu, tshilulu tshidi tshibubuikila tshidi tshitamba kukeha bua yeye adijingile nʼatshi." 
Isaiah28:21 Bua Yehowa neajuke bu muakajukeye ha mukuna wa Pelazima, neikale ne tshiji bu muakadiye nʼatshi mu luhongo lua Gibeona; bua kuenza mudimu wandi, mudimu udi ukemesha bantu, bua kumana tshienzedi tshiandi, tshienzedi tshiandi tshidiye kayi muanze kuenza diambedi." 
Isaiah28:22 Nunku kanuikadi babuidi, bua nkanu yenu kayikoleshibu; bualu bua nakunvua mukenji wa kubutula mufume kudi Mukelenge, Yehowa wa misumba, wakueleye ba ha buloba bonso." 
Isaiah28:23 Telejai matshu, unvuai dî dianyi; ungunvuilai, unvuai mei andi ngamba." 
Isaiah28:24 Muntu udi ubundulula buloba bua kukunamu maminu utu wabubundulula misangu ne misangu, anyi? Utu wasekununa ne utu walandakasha budimi buandi, anyi?" 
Isaiah28:25 Hashikisheye kulandakasha buloba bua ha mutu ha budimi, kena umiamina maminu a nielle ne kuelamu maminu a cumin, anyi? Kena ukuna blé mu mabula ne maminu a orge mu muaba wau musungula, ne maminu a épeautre kukala kua budimi, anyi?" 
Isaiah28:26 Bualu bua Nzambi wandi udi umulesha lungenyi luimpe lua kulondeye, udi umuyisha." 
Isaiah28:27 Bua kabena bashihula maminu a nielle ne tshiamu tshitue, ne kabena babungusha nkata wa dikalu ha mutu ha maminu a cumin; kadi badi batuta maminu a nielle ne mulangala, badi batuta maminu a cumin ne mutshi." 
Isaiah28:28 Badi babotesha maminu adibo benza nʼau bidia, anyi? Nansha, muntu katu wâshihula musangu ne musangu; kadi habungulusheye nkata wa dikalu diandi ne hendesheleye tubalu tuandi ha mutu hau, kena wâbotesha nansha." 
Isaiah28:29 Lungenyi elu kabidi ludi lufuma kudi Yehowa wa misumba, udi ulesha bantu meji adi abakemesha, ne udi ne lungenyi lutambe buimpe." 
Isaiah29:1 Mulau wikale kûdi, Aliele, Aliele, musoko muakasamu Davidi tshitudilu tshiandi! Tentekashai tshidimu ha mutu ha tshidimu; bikondo bia bidia bia disanka bilondangane mu bidimu biabi." 
Isaiah29:2 Hashishe nentatshishe Aliele, ne madilu ne muadi nebikalemu; ne musoko eu newikale kundi bu diku dia tshioshelu." 
Isaiah29:3 Nenkunyungulule ne bitudilu bianyi, nenkutshintshimike ne mialu ya mata, nengele mabula manene, ne nengibake bibumba bikoleshibue ne bielelu bia nvita bua kukuluisha nʼabi." 
Isaiah29:4 Nebakutulule hanshi, newambe mei ebe hawikala muinshi mua buloba, muaku webe ndifume munkatshi mua dinfuenkenya. Dî diebe nedikale bu dî dia muakuishi wa biambi dihatuka munda mua buloba, ne mei ebe neikale bu biambi bihatuka mu dinfuenkenya." 
Isaiah29:5 Kadi tshisumbu tshia badi nʼebe lukuna netshikale bu dinfuenkenya dibotesha, tshisumbu tshia badi bakuatshisha bantu buowa netshikale bu bisote bidi bihehuka kudi luhehele. Bulelela, bualu ebu nebumueneke lubilu, mu kubunya kua disu:" 
Isaiah29:6 Yehowa wa misumba nealue kûdi ne mikungulu, kukanka kua buloba, diyoyo dinene, nvunde ne tshihuhu, ne ludimi lua kadilu kadi kayi ngutula bintu bionso." 
Isaiah29:7 Tshisumbu tshia bisamba bionso bidi biluisha Aliele, tshia bantu bonso badi balua ngana nʼandi, ne miaba yandi ya ngumbu ya nvita ne badi bamukengesha nebikale bu tshilota, bu tshikena kumona butuku mene."
